Genesis1:1 Mu ntangiriro Imana yaremye ijuru n'isi.
Genesis1:2 Isi nta shusho yari ifite kandi nta cyari kiyiriho: yari imeze nk'inyanja kandi icuze umwijima. Umwuka w'Imana wari ubundikiye amazi.
Genesis1:3 Nuko Imana iravuga iti: “Nihabeho umucyo.” Umucyo ubaho.
Genesis1:4 Imana ibona ko umucyo ari mwiza
Genesis1:5 umucyo iwita amanywa
Genesis1:6 Imana iravuga iti: “Nihabeho igisenge cyo gutandukanya amazi ngo amwe abe munsi yacyo
Genesis1:7 Biba bityo. Imana irema icyo gisenge
Genesis1:8 Igisenge Imana icyita ijuru. Burira buracya
Genesis1:9 Imana iravuga iti: “Amazi ari munsi y'ijuru niyihindire hamwe kugira ngo ubutaka buboneke.” Biba bityo.
Genesis1:10 Ahatari amazi Imana ihita ubutaka
Genesis1:11 Imana iravuga iti: “Ubutaka nibumeze ibyatsi n'ibimera byera imbuto
Genesis1:12 Ubutaka bumeza ibyatsi n'ibimera bitari bimwe byera imbuto
Genesis1:13 Burira buracya
Genesis1:14 Imana iravuga iti: “Nihabeho ibinyarumuri ku gisenge cy'ijuru kugira ngo bitandukanye amanywa n'ijoro
Genesis1:15 byakire ku gisenge cy'ijuru kugira ngo bimurikire isi.” Biba bityo.
Genesis1:16 Imana irema ibinyarumuri bibiri binini: izuba ryo kugenga amanywa n'ukwezi ko kugenga ijoro
Genesis1:17 Imana ibishyira ku gisenge cy'ijuru kugira ngo bimurikire isi
Genesis1:18 bigenge amanywa n'ijoro kandi bitandukanye umucyo n'umwijima. Imana ibona ari byiza.
Genesis1:19 Burira buracya
Genesis1:20 Imana iravuga iti: “Udusimba two mu mazi nituyajagatemo
Genesis1:21 Imana irema ibikōko binini byo mu nyanja n'ibinyabuzima by'amoko yose byinyagambura bikajagata mu mazi
Genesis1:22 Byose ibiha umugisha
Genesis1:23 Burira buracya
Genesis1:24 Imana iravuga iti: “Inyamaswa z'amoko yose nizibe ku butaka: amatungo n'ibikurura inda hasi n'izindi nyamaswa zose nk'uko amoko yazo ari.” Biba bityo.
Genesis1:25 Imana irema inyamaswa z'amoko yose n'amatungo n'ibikurura inda hasi byose. Imana ibona ari byiza.
Genesis1:26 Imana iravuga iti: “Tureme abantu basa natwe
Genesis1:27 Imana yaremye umuntu usa na yo
Genesis1:28 Imana ibaha umugisha
Genesis1:29 Dore mbahaye ibimera byose byera imbuto n'ibiti byose byera imbuto
Genesis1:30 Inyamaswa zose n'inyoni n'ibisiga n'ibikurura inda hasi byose
Genesis1:31 Imana ireba ibyo yari imaze kurema ibona ari byiza cyane. Burira buracya
Genesis2:1 Ijuru n'isi n'ibibirimo byose bisozwa bityo.
Genesis2:2 Ku munsi wa karindwi Imana yari yashoje uwo murimo
Genesis2:3 Imana iha umugisha umunsi wa karindwi
Genesis2:4 Dore amavu n'amavuko y'iremwa ry'ijuru n'isi. Ubwo Uhoraho Imana yaremaga ijuru n'isi
Genesis2:5 nta bihuru cyangwa ibindi bimera byari byabaho
Genesis2:6 Ahubwo amasōko ni yo yadudubizaga akabobeza ubutaka.
Genesis2:7 Nuko Uhoraho Imana akura umukungugu mu gitaka awubumbabumbamo umuntu
Genesis2:8 Uhoraho Imana ategura ubusitani iburasirazuba
Genesis2:9 Uhoraho Imana ameza mu butaka ibiti by'amoko yose binogeye amaso n'ibyera imbuto ziribwa
Genesis2:10 Muri Edeni haturukaga uruzi rukabobeza ubusitani
Genesis2:11 Urwa mbere rwitwa Pishoni
Genesis2:12 Izahabu yaho ni nziza cyane
Genesis2:13 Uruzi rwa kabiri rwitwa Gihoni
Genesis2:14 Urwa gatatu rwitwa Tigiri
Genesis2:15 Uhoraho Imana ashyira umuntu mu busitani bwa Edeni kugira ngo abukorere kandi abufate neza.
Genesis2:16 Nuko Uhoraho Imana aramubwira ati: “Ushobora kurya ku mbuto z'igiti cyose cyo mu busitani
Genesis2:17 uretse izo ku giti cy'ubumenyi bwo gutandukanya icyiza n'ikibi. Ntuzazirye kuko nuzirya uzapfa nta kabuza!”
Genesis2:18 Nuko Uhoraho Imana aravuga ati: “Si byiza ko umuntu aba wenyine
Genesis2:19 Uhoraho Imana abumba mu butaka inyamaswa zose n'ibisiga n'inyoni byose
Genesis2:20 Umuntu yita amazina amatungo n'inyoni n'ibisiga n'inyamaswa zose. Ariko umuntu yari atarabona umufasha bakwiranye.
Genesis2:21 Nuko Uhoraho Imana asinziriza umuntu agira ibitotsi byinshi
Genesis2:22 Urwo rubavu Uhoraho Imana avanye mu mugabo aruremamo umugore
Genesis2:23 Umugabo aravuga ati: “Noneho dore uwo duhwanye: ni igufwa ryanjye n'amaraso yanjye. Uyu mwise umugore
Genesis2:24 Ni cyo gituma umugabo azasiga se na nyina akabana n'umugore we akaramata
Genesis2:25 Umugabo n'umugore we bari bambaye ubusa kandi ntibibatere isoni.
Genesis3:1 Inzoka yari incakura kurusha izindi nyamaswa zose Uhoraho Imana yari yararemye. Inzoka ibaza umugore iti: “Mbese koko Imana yababujije kurya ku mbuto zose z'ibiti byo muri ubu busitani?”
Genesis3:2 Umugore asubiza inzoka ati: “Dushobora kurya imbuto z'ibiti byo muri ubu busitani
Genesis3:3 uretse iz'igiti kiri hagati muri bwo. Imana yaravuze iti: ‘Ntimuzaziryeho
Genesis3:4 Inzoka ibwira umugore iti: “Reka da
Genesis3:5 Ahubwo Imana izi ko nimuziryaho muzahumuka
Genesis3:6 Nuko umugore abonye ko imbuto z'icyo giti ari nziza
Genesis3:7 Ni bwo bombi bahumutse bamenya ko bambaye ubusa. Nuko bidodera ibicocero mu bibabi by'umutini.
Genesis3:8 Baza kumva Uhoraho Imana watemberaga mu busitani mu mafu y'igicamunsi. Maze umugabo n'umugore we bihisha Uhoraho Imana mu biti by'ubusitani.
Genesis3:9 Uhoraho Imana ahamagara umugabo aramubaza ati: “Uri hehe?”
Genesis3:10 Aramusubiza ati: “Nakumvise mu busitani
Genesis3:11 Uhoraho aramubaza ati: “Ni nde wakubwiye ko wambaye ubusa? Aho ntiwariye ku mbuto za cya giti nakubujije?”
Genesis3:12 Umugabo aramusubiza ati: “Umugore wampaye ni we wazimpaye ndazirya.”
Genesis3:13 Uhoraho Imana abaza umugore ati: “Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki?” Umugore arasubiza ati: “Inzoka yanshutse ndazirya.”
Genesis3:14 Nuko Uhoraho Imana abwira inzoka ati: “Kubera ibyo wakoze
Genesis3:15 Nshyize inzigo hagati yawe n'umugore
Genesis3:16 Abwira umugore ati: “Nzongēra imibabaro yawe utwite
Genesis3:17 Hanyuma abwira umugabo ati: “Wumviye inama mbi y'umugore wawe
Genesis3:18 Ubutaka buzamera amahwa n'ibitovu
Genesis3:19 Uzajya ubona ibyokurya wiyushye akuya
Genesis3:20 Uwo mugabo Adamu yita umugore we Eva
Genesis3:21 Uhoraho Imana akorera Adamu n'umugore we imyambaro mu mpu
Genesis3:22 Uhoraho Imana aravuga ati: “Dore umuntu yabaye nkatwe
Genesis3:23 Nuko Uhoraho Imana yirukana umuntu mu busitani bwa Edeni
Genesis3:24 Amaze kwirukana umuntu
Genesis4:1 Adamu aryamana n'umugore we Eva amutera inda
Genesis4:2 Eva abyara undi muhungu amwita Abeli. Abeli aba umushumba
Genesis4:3 Hashize igihe Kayini ashyīra Uhoraho ituro ry'imyaka yahinze
Genesis4:4 Abeli na we azana uburiza mu matungo ye
Genesis4:5 ariko ntiyishimira Kayini n'ituro rye. Ibyo birakaza Kayini cyane maze mu maso he harijima.
Genesis4:6 Uhoraho abaza Kayini ati: “Urakajwe n'iki? Ese ni iki cyatumye mu maso hawe hijima?
Genesis4:7 Nukora ibyiza
Genesis4:8 Umunsi umwe Kayini na murumuna we Abeli bari mu murima baganira
Genesis4:9 Uhoraho abaza Kayini ati: “Murumuna wawe Abeli ari he?” Kayini aramusubiza ati: “Ndabizi se? Ese nshinzwe kurinda murumuna wanjye?”
Genesis4:10 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki? Amaraso ya murumuna wawe wamennye ku butaka
Genesis4:11 Kuva ubu ubaye ikivume kurusha ubutaka bwasamye bukamira amaraso ya murumuna wawe wishe.
Genesis4:12 Nubuhinga ntibuzongera kukurumbukira
Genesis4:13 Kayini abwira Uhoraho ati: “Icyo gihano kirakabije
Genesis4:14 Dore uhereye ubu unciye ku isuka
Genesis4:15 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Oya Kayini we
Genesis4:16 Kayini ava imbere y'Uhoraho ajya gutura mu gihugu cyitwa Nodi
Genesis4:17 Kayini aryamana n'umugore we
Genesis4:18 Henoki abyara Iradi
Genesis4:19 Lameki ashaka abagore babiri: uwa mbere yitwaga Ada
Genesis4:20 Ada abyara Yabali
Genesis4:21 Murumuna we yitwaga Yubali
Genesis4:22 Sila we yabyaye Tubalikayini
Genesis4:23 Lameki abwira abagore be ati: “Ada na Sila
Genesis4:24 Niba Kayini yahōrerwa incuro ndwi
Genesis4:25 Adamu aryamana n'umugore we
Genesis4:26 Seti na we abyara umuhungu amwita Enoshi. Icyo gihe abantu batangiye gusenga Imana bayita Uhoraho.
Genesis5:1 Iyi ni inyandiko ivuga ku bakomoka kuri Adamu. Igihe Imana yaremaga umuntu
Genesis5:2 Umugabo n'umugore ni ko yabaremye
Genesis5:3 Adamu amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo itatu
Genesis5:4 Amaze kubyara Seti
Genesis5:5 Adamu yapfuye amaze imyaka managa cyenda na mirongo itatu.
Genesis5:6 Seti amaze imyaka ijana n'itanu avutse
Genesis5:7 Amaze kubyara Enoshi
Genesis5:8 Seti yapfuye amaze imyaka magana cyenda na cumi n'ibiri.
Genesis5:9 Enoshi amaze imyaka mirongo cyenda avutse
Genesis5:10 Amaze kubyara Kenani
Genesis5:11 Enoshi yapfuye amaze imyaka magana cyenda n'itanu.
Genesis5:12 Kenani amaze imyaka mirongo irindwi avutse
Genesis5:13 Amaze kubyara Mahalalēli
Genesis5:14 Kenani yapfuye amaze imyaka magana cyenda na cumi.
Genesis5:15 Mahalalēli amaze imyaka mirongo itandatu n'itanu avutse
Genesis5:16 Amaze kubyara Yeredi
Genesis5:17 Mahalalēli yapfuye amaze imyaka magana inani na mirongo cyenda n'itanu.
Genesis5:18 Yeredi amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo itandatu n'ibiri avutse
Genesis5:19 Amaze kubyara Henoki
Genesis5:20 Yeredi yapfuye amaze imyaka magana cyenda mirongo itandatu n'ibiri.
Genesis5:21 Henoki amaze imyaka mirongo itandatu n'itanu avutse
Genesis5:22 Amaze kubyara Metusela
Genesis5:23 Henoki yabayeho imyaka magana atatu na mirongo itandatu n'itanu
Genesis5:24 hanyuma kubera ko yayobotse Imana iramujyana
Genesis5:25 Metusela amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo inani n'irindwi avutse
Genesis5:26 Amaze kubyara Lameki
Genesis5:27 Metusela yapfuye amaze imyaka magana cyenda na mirongo itandatu n'icyenda.
Genesis5:28 Lameki amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo inani n'ibiri avutse
Genesis5:29 Amwita Nowa
Genesis5:30 Amaze kubyara Nowa
Genesis5:31 Lameki yapfuye amaze imyaka magana arindwi na mirongo irindwi n'irindwi.
Genesis5:32 Nowa amaze imyaka magana atanu avutse
Genesis6:1 Abantu batangiye kuba benshi ku isi
Genesis6:2 abahungu b'Imana babengukwa abakobwa b'abantu
Genesis6:3 Uhoraho ni ko kuvuga ati: “Umwuka w'ubugingo ntuzaguma mu bantu iteka
Genesis6:4 Muri ibyo bihe abahungu b'Imana babanaga n'abakobwa b'abantu
Genesis6:5 Uhoraho abona ko abantu bo ku isi bakabije gukora ibibi
Genesis6:6 maze arababara yicuza icyatumye arema umuntu akamushyira ku isi.
Genesis6:7 Ni ko kuvuga ati: “Nzatsemba ku isi abantu naremye
Genesis6:8 Icyakora Nowa we atoneshwa n'Uhoraho.
Genesis6:9 Dore amateka ya Nowa: Nowa yari umuntu w'intungane mu bo mu gihe cye
Genesis6:10 Nowa yabyaye abahungu batatu
Genesis6:11 Imana ibona isi yononekaye kandi yuzuye urugomo
Genesis6:12 kubera ko abantu bose bakabije gukora ibibi.
Genesis6:13 Nuko ibwira Nowa iti: “Ngiye gutsemba abantu bose kuko bujuje isi urugomo
Genesis6:14 “Iyubakire ubwato bunini mu mbaho zikomeye
Genesis6:15 Dore uko uzabwubaka: buzagira uburebure bwa metero ijana na mirongo itanu
Genesis6:16 Uzashyireho igisenge
Genesis6:17 “Dore ngiye guteza isi umwuzure utsembe abantu n'ibinyabuzima byose biyiriho
Genesis6:18 Ariko wowe tuzagirana amasezerano. Uzinjire mu bwato
Genesis6:19 Uzinjize mu bwato n'ibinyabuzima bibiri bibiri bya buri bwoko
Genesis6:20 Hazajye haza bibiri bya buri bwoko bigusange kugira ngo bidapfa: inyoni n'ibisiga n'amatungo n'ibikurura inda hasi byose uko amoko yabyo ari.
Genesis6:21 Wowe uzashake ibiribwa by'amoko yose ubibike
Genesis6:22 Nowa akora ibyo Imana yamutegetse byose.
Genesis7:1 Uhoraho abwira Nowa ati: “Injira mu bwato wowe n'ab'inzu yawe bose
Genesis7:2 Mu nyamaswa n'amatungo byose bidahumanya
Genesis7:3 No mu nyoni n'ibisiga uzafatemo birindwi bya buri gitsina
Genesis7:4 Kuko hasigaye iminsi irindwi nkagusha imvura iminsi mirongo ine n'amajoro mirongo ine
Genesis7:5 Nowa akora ibyo Uhoraho yamutegetse byose.
Genesis7:6 Mu gihe cy'umwuzure
Genesis7:7 Nuko Nowa n'umugore we n'abahungu be n'abakazana be binjira mu bwato
Genesis7:8 Mu nyamaswa n'amatungo bidahumanya no mu bihumanya
Genesis7:9 hinjira bibiri bibiri
Genesis7:10 Hashize iminsi irindwi
Genesis7:11 Ku itariki ya cumi na karindwi y'ukwezi kwa kabiri Nowa amaze imyaka magana atandatu avutse
Genesis7:12 Nuko imvura igwa iminsi mirongo ine n'amajoro mirongo ine.
Genesis7:13 Uwo munsi Nowa n'umugore we n'abahungu be Semu na Hamu na Yafeti
Genesis7:14 Bari binjiranyemo n'inyamaswa z'amoko yose
Genesis7:15 Byaje bisanga Nowa mu bwato
Genesis7:16 ari ikigabo n'ikigore bivuye muri buri bwoko. Byinjiye nk'uko Imana yabitegetse
Genesis7:17 Nyuma y'iminsi mirongo ine amazi y'umwuzure yari amaze kuba menshi
Genesis7:18 Amazi akomeza kwiyongera
Genesis7:19 Amazi arushaho kwiyongera cyane
Genesis7:20 amazi ayirengeraho metero ndwi.
Genesis7:21 Ibikurura inda hasi n'inyoni n'ibisiga
Genesis7:22 Ibinyabuzima byose bihumeka biba ku butaka birashira.
Genesis7:23 Bityo ibiremwa byose biba ku butaka
Genesis7:24 Amazi yamaze iminsi ijana na mirongo itanu ku isi ataragabanuka.
Genesis8:1 Imana ntiyibagiwe Nowa n'inyamaswa zose n'amatungo yose bari kumwe mu bwato
Genesis8:2 Nuko amasōko yose araziba
Genesis8:3 Mu minsi ijana na mirongo itanu amazi yagendaga agabanuka.
Genesis8:4 Ku itariki ya cumi na karindwi y'ukwezi kwa karindwi
Genesis8:5 Amazi agenda agabanuka kugeza ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa cumi
Genesis8:6 Hashize indi minsi mirongo ine
Genesis8:7 arekura icyiyoni kirasohoka kiragaruka
Genesis8:8 Nowa arekura n'inuma
Genesis8:9 Ariko inuma ntiyabona aho ihagarara kuko amazi yari akiretse ku isi yose. Isubira mu bwato
Genesis8:10 Ategereza iminsi irindwi
Genesis8:11 Ku mugoroba igaruka mu bwato ifite mu kanwa ikibabi gitoshye cy'umunzenze. Nowa amenya atyo ko amazi yagabanutse ku isi.
Genesis8:12 Ategereza indi minsi irindwi
Genesis8:13 Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa mbere Nowa amaze imyaka magana atandatu n'umwe avutse
Genesis8:14 Ku itariki ya makumyabiri na karindwi y'ukwezi kwa kabiri
Genesis8:15 Maze Imana ibwira Nowa iti:
Genesis8:16 “Sohoka mu bwato
Genesis8:17 Sohokana n'inyamaswa n'inyoni n'ibisiga
Genesis8:18 Nuko Nowa asohokana n'umugore we n'abahungu be n'abakazana be.
Genesis8:19 Inyamaswa zose n'udukōko twose
Genesis8:20 Nowa yubakira Uhoraho urutambiro. Afata amwe mu matungo yose adahumanya
Genesis8:21 Uhoraho yishimira impumuro y'ibyo bitambo
Genesis8:22 Iminsi yose isi izaba ikiriho
Genesis9:1 Imana iha umugisha Nowa n'abahungu be
Genesis9:2 Inyamaswa n'inyoni n'ibisiga
Genesis9:3 Nk'uko nabahaye ibimera bibisi
Genesis9:4 uretse ko inyama zikirimo amaraso mutazazirya kubera ko amaraso agendana n'ubugingo.
Genesis9:5 Ni cyo gituma amaraso y'umuntu wese azahōrerwa. Nihagira inyamaswa yica umuntu na yo ntikabure kwicwa
Genesis9:6 Umuntu yaremwe asa n'Imana
Genesis9:7 Mwebwe nimubyare mugwire
Genesis9:8 Imana ikomeza kubwira Nowa n'abahungu be iti:
Genesis9:9 “Ngiranye Isezerano namwe n'abazabakomokaho
Genesis9:10 n'ibinyabuzima byose muri kumwe: inyoni n'ibisiga n'amatungo n'inyamaswa zose
Genesis9:11 Dore Isezerano ngiranye namwe: ntihazabaho ukundi umwuzure urimbura isi n'ibinyabuzima biyiriho byose.”
Genesis9:12 Imana iravuga iti: “Dore ikimenyetso cy'Isezerano ngiranye namwe n'ibinyabuzima byose muri kumwe
Genesis9:13 Nshyize umukororombya wanjye mu bicu
Genesis9:14 Ninshyira ibicu mu kirere hakabonekamo umukororombya
Genesis9:15 nzajya nzirikana Isezerano nagiranye namwe n'ibinyabuzima by'amoko yose. Nta mwuzure uzongera kubaho wo gutsemba ibinyabuzima byose.
Genesis9:16 Nimbona umukororombya mu bicu
Genesis9:17 Ngicyo ikimenyetso cy'Isezerano ngiranye na byo.”
Genesis9:18 Abahungu ba Nowa basohotse mu bwato ni Semu na Hamu na Yafeti. Hamu yabyaye umuhungu amwita Kanāni.
Genesis9:19 Abatuye isi yose bakomoka ku bahungu batatu ba Nowa.
Genesis9:20 Nowa atangira guhinga atera imizabibu
Genesis9:21 nuko anywa divayi yayenzemo arasinda
Genesis9:22 Hamu se wa Kanāni abonye se yambaye ubusa
Genesis9:23 Semu na Yafeti bafatira umwenda ku bitugu
Genesis9:24 Nowa amaze gusinduka
Genesis9:25 ni ko kuvuga ati: “Kanāni ndamuvumye
Genesis9:26 Nowa arongera ati: “Nihasingizwe Uhoraho
Genesis9:27 Imana ihe Yafeti kunguka
Genesis9:28 Nowa abaho imyaka magana atatu na mirongo itanu nyuma y'umwuzure
Genesis9:29 apfa amaze imyaka magana cyenda na mirongo itanu.
Genesis10:1 Umwuzure urangiye
Genesis10:2 Bene Yafeti ni Gomeri na Magogi na Madayi
Genesis10:3 Abakomoka kuri Gomeri ni Abashikenazi n'ab'i Rifati n'ab'i Togaruma.
Genesis10:4 Abakomoka kuri Yavani ni aba Elisha n'aba Esipaniya
Genesis10:5 Ni bo bakomotsweho n'amahanga atuye hirya no hino mu birwa. Abakomoka kuri Yafeti batuye mu bihugu bitari bimwe
Genesis10:6 Bene Hamu ni Kushi na Misiri na Puti na Kanāni
Genesis10:7 Abakomoka kuri Kushi ni ab'i Seba n'ab'i Havila n'ab'i Sabuta
Genesis10:8 Kushi yabyaye Nimurodi
Genesis10:9 Uhoraho yabonaga ari umuhigi ukomeye
Genesis10:10 Nimurodi yategekaga igihugu cya Babiloniya. Imijyi y'ingenzi yacyo yari Babiloni na Ereki
Genesis10:11 Yavuye muri icyo gihugu ajya muri Ashūru
Genesis10:12 na Reseni
Genesis10:13 Abakomoka kuri Misiri ni Abaludi n'Abanamu
Genesis10:14 n'Abapaturusi n'Abakafutori
Genesis10:15 Kanāni yabyaye Sidoni impfura ye
Genesis10:16 Abandi bamukomokaho ni Abayebuzi n'Abamori n'Abagirigashi
Genesis10:17 n'Abahivi n'Abaruki n'Abasini
Genesis10:18 n'Abaruvadi n'Abasemari n'Abahamati. Hanyuma imiryango ya bene Kanāni yimukira hirya no hino
Genesis10:19 imbibi z'iguhugu cyabo zihera i Sidoni zikamanukana i Gerari n'i Gaza
Genesis10:20 Ngabo abakomoka kuri Hamu ukurikije imiryango yabo
Genesis10:21 Semu mukuru wa Yafeti
Genesis10:22 Bene Semu ni Elamu na Ashūru
Genesis10:23 Bene Aramu ni Usi na Huli
Genesis10:24 Arupagishadi yabyaye Shela
Genesis10:25 Eberi yabyaye abahungu babiri: umukuru yitwaga Pelegi
Genesis10:26 Yokitani yabyaye Alumodadi na Shelefu
Genesis10:27 na Hadoramu na Uzali na Dikila
Genesis10:28 na Obali na Abimayeli na Sheba
Genesis10:29 na Ofiri na Havila na Yobabu. Abo bose ni abahungu ba Yokitani.
Genesis10:30 Urugabano rw'akarere batuyemo ruhera i Mesha
Genesis10:31 Ngabo abakomoka kuri Semu ukurikije imiryango yabo
Genesis10:32 Ngiyo imiryango y'abakomoka kuri Nowa ukurikije urubyaro rwabo n'amoko yabo. Ni bo bakomotsweho n'amahanga yose yakwiriye ku isi nyuma y'umwuzure.
Genesis11:1 Abantu bose bo ku isi bakoreshaga ururimi rumwe n'imvugo imwe.
Genesis11:2 Abantu bimuka bava iburasirazuba
Genesis11:3 Nuko baravugana bati: “Reka tubumbe amatafari tuyatwike.” Bityo aho gukoresha amabuye bakoresha amatafari
Genesis11:4 Barongera bati: “Reka twiyubakire umujyi kugira ngo tutazatatanira ku isi yose
Genesis11:5 Uhoraho aramanuka kugira ngo arebe umujyi n'umunara abantu bubakaga.
Genesis11:6 Nuko aribwira ati: “Biriya batangiye gukora babishobojwe n'uko ari umuryango umwe
Genesis11:7 Reka tumanuke maze dusobanye ururimi rwabo be kuzongera kumvikana!”
Genesis11:8 Nuko Uhoraho abatatanyiriza ku isi yose
Genesis11:9 Uwo mujyi wiswe Babiloni kubera ko ari ho Uhoraho yasobanyirije ururimi rw'abantu bose akanabatatanyiriza ku isi yose.
Genesis11:10 Dore abakomoka kuri Semu: Semu amaze imyaka ijana avutse yabyaye Arupagishadi. Hari hashize imyaka ibiri umwuzure urangiye.
Genesis11:11 Amaze kubyara Arupagishadi
Genesis11:12 Arupagishadi amaze imyaka mirongo itatu n'itanu avutse yabyaye Shela.
Genesis11:13 Amaze kubyara Shela
Genesis11:14 Shela amaze imyaka mirongo itatu avutse yabyaye Eberi.
Genesis11:15 Amaze kubyara Eberi
Genesis11:16 Eberi amaze imyaka mirongo itatu n'ine avutse yabyaye Pelegi.
Genesis11:17 Amaze kubyara Pelegi
Genesis11:18 Pelegi amaze imyaka mirongo itatu avutse yabyaye Rewu.
Genesis11:19 Amaze kubyara Rewu
Genesis11:20 Rewu amaze imyaka mirongo itatu n'ibiri avutse
Genesis11:21 Amaze kubyara Serugu
Genesis11:22 Serugu amaze imyaka mirongo itatu avutse
Genesis11:23 Amaze kubyara Nahori
Genesis11:24 Nahori amaze imyaka makumyabiri n'icyenda avutse
Genesis11:25 Amaze kubyara Tera
Genesis11:26 Tera amaze imyaka mirongo irindwi avutse yabyaye Aburamu
Genesis11:27 Dore abakomoka kuri Tera: Tera yabyaye Aburamu na Nahori na Harani. Harani na we yabyaye Loti.
Genesis11:28 Harani yapfuye mbere ya se Tera
Genesis11:29 Aburamu yarongoye Sarayi
Genesis11:30 Sarayi yari yarabuze ibyara
Genesis11:31 Tera ahagurukana n'umuhungu we Aburamu n'umwuzukuru we Loti mwene Harani n'umukazana we Sarayi
Genesis11:32 Tera yapfuye afite imyaka magana abiri n'itanu
Genesis12:1 Uhoraho abwira Aburamu ati: “Va mu gihugu cyanyu

Genesis12:3 Abazagusabira umugisha nzabaha umugisha
Genesis12:4 Aburamu yimutse i Harani nk'uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse
Genesis12:5

Genesis12:10 Muri Kanāni haza gutera inzara irabiyogoza

Genesis12:12 Abanyamisiri nibakubona bazagira ishyari ko ndi umugabo wawe
Genesis12:13 None rero ujye uvuga ko uri mushiki wanjye
Genesis12:14 Nuko Aburamu ageze mu Misiri
Genesis12:15 Ibyegera by'umwami wa Misiri bimubonye bijya kumuratira umwami
Genesis12:16 Aburamu afatwa neza kubera umugore we
Genesis12:17 Ariko Uhoraho ateza umwami wa Misiri n'urugo rwe indwara z'ibyorezo abahora Sarayi
Genesis12:18 Umwami ni ko gutumiza Aburamu aramubaza ati: “Ibyo wankoreye ni ibiki? Kuki utambwiye ko ari umugore wawe?
Genesis12:19 Kuki wambwiye ko ari mushiki wawe bigatuma mugira umugore? Nguyu umugore wawe musubirane umvire aha!”
Genesis12:20 Nuko umwami ategeka abantu be ngo basezerere Aburamu n'umugore we
Genesis13:1 Aburamu ava mu Misiri asubira mu majyepfo ya Kanāni
Genesis13:2 Aburamu yari umutunzi cyane
Genesis13:3 Nuko agenda yimuka
Genesis13:4 akahubaka n'urutambiro. Aburamu ahageze yambaza Uhoraho.
Genesis13:5 Loti wari waragiye yimukana na Aburamu
Genesis13:6 Kubera ko Aburamu na Loti bari batunze cyane
Genesis13:7 Ubwo kandi Abanyakanāni n'Abaperizi na bo bari batuye muri icyo gihugu. Bukeye abashumba ba Aburamu n'aba Loti batonganira urwuri.
Genesis13:8 Nuko Aburamu abwira Loti ati: “Dore turi umuryango umwe
Genesis13:9 None reka dutandukane. Hitamo aho wishakiye mu gihugu hose
Genesis13:10 Loti ni ko guterera amaso abona ikibaya cyose cya Yorodani kugera i Sowari gifite amazi menshi. Cyari kimeze nk'ubusitani bw'Uhoraho cyangwa ikibaya cya Nili mu Misiri. Icyo gihe Uhoraho yari atararimbura imijyi ya Sodoma na Gomora.

Genesis13:17 Haguruka utambagire igihugu impande zose kuko nzakiguha.”

Genesis16:1 Sarayi muka Aburamu
Genesis16:2 Nuko Sarayi abwira Aburamu ati: “Dore Uhoraho yanyimye ibyara. None genda uryamane n'umuja wanjye
Genesis16:3 maze umugore we Sarayi azana umuja we Hagari w'Umunyamisirikazi
Genesis16:4 Aburamu aryamana na Hagari amutera inda. Hagari abonye ko atwite asuzugura nyirabuja.
Genesis16:5 Sarayi abwira Aburamu ati: “Izi ngorane ni wowe uzinteye
Genesis16:6 Aburamu aramusubiza ati: “Umuja ni uwawe
Genesis16:7 Ariko Umumarayika w'Uhoraho asanga Hagari mu butayu
Genesis16:8 Aramubaza ati: “Hagari muja wa Sarayi we
Genesis16:9 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Subira kwa nyokobuja
Genesis16:10 Abazagukomokaho nzabagira benshi cyane ku buryo batazabarika.
Genesis16:11 Iyo nda utwite izavukamo umuhungu uzamwite Ishimayeli
Genesis16:12 Uwo muhungu azamera nk'indogobe y'ishyamba
Genesis16:13 Nuko Hagari atangarira Uhoraho bavuganye
Genesis16:14 Ni yo mpamvu iryo riba ryitwa “Iriba rya Nyirubuzima undeba.” Riri hagati ya Kadeshi na Beredi.

Genesis17:1 Aburamu amaze imyaka mirongo urwenda n'icyenda avutse
Genesis17:2 Nzagirana nawe Isezerano kandi nzagwiza cyane urubyaro rwawe.”
Genesis17:3 Aburamu yikubita hasi yubamye maze Imana iramubwira iti:
Genesis17:4 “Dore Isezerano ngiranye nawe: uzakomokwaho n'amahanga menshi.
Genesis17:5 Ntabwo uzongera kwitwa Aburamu
Genesis17:6 Nzaguha kororoka cyane ube sekuruza w'amahanga
Genesis17:7 Nzakomeza Isezerano nagiranye nawe n'urubyaro ruzagukomokaho
Genesis17:8 Wowe n'abazagukomokaho nzabaha iki gihugu cyose cya Kanāni wimukiyemo. Kizaba gakondo yabo burundu kandi nzaba Imana yabo.”
Genesis17:9 Imana ikomeza kubwira Aburahamu iti: “Wowe n'abazagukomokaho mugomba gukomeza Isezerano ryanjye uko ibihe bihaye ibindi.
Genesis17:10 Dore icyo mugomba kwitaho wowe n'abantu bawe n'abazagukomokaho: umuntu wese w'igitsinagabo agomba gukebwa.
Genesis17:11 Uko gukebwa kuzaba ikimenyetso cy'Isezerano nagiranye namwe.
Genesis17:12 Umwana wese w'umuhungu wo muri mwe azajya akebwa amaze iminsi umunani avutse
Genesis17:13 Abavukiye mu rugo rwanyu ndetse n'abo mwaguze
Genesis17:14 Umuntu wese w'igitsinagabo utazakebwa
Genesis17:15 Imana ikomeza kubwira Aburahamu iti: “Umugore wawe ntuzongere kumwita Sarayi
Genesis17:16 Nzamuha umugisha akubyarire umwana w'umuhungu. Ni koko nzamuha umugisha akomokweho n'amahanga ndetse n'abami.”
Genesis17:17 Aburahamu acyubamye hasi asetswa no kwibaza ati: “Mbese nabyara maze imyaka ijana? Ese Sara we umaze imyaka mirongo cyenda yabyara?”
Genesis17:18 Nuko abaza Imana ati: “Kuki utareka Ishimayeli ngo ancikure?”
Genesis17:19 Imana iramusubiza iti: “Oya da! Ahubwo umugore wawe Sara azabyara umwana w'umuhungu
Genesis17:20 Naho ku byerekeye Ishimayeli humura nzamuha umugisha
Genesis17:21 Ariko undi mwaka iki gihe
Genesis17:22 Imana imaze kuvugana na Aburahamu
Genesis17:23 Nuko uwo munsi Aburahamu agenza nk'uko Imana yamutegetse: akeba umuhungu we Ishimayeli n'ab'igitsinagabo bose bo mu rugo rwe
Genesis17:24 Aburahamu na we yakebwe amaze imyaka mirongo urwenda n'icyenda avutse
Genesis17:25 naho Ishimayeli we yakebwe amaze imyaka cumi n'itatu avutse.

Genesis17:27 n'abagabo bose bo mu rugo rwe
Genesis18:1 Uhoraho abonekera Aburahamu hafi y'ibiti by'inganzamarumbu bya Mamure. Aburahamu yari yicaye ku muryango w'ihema rye kubera izuba ryinshi.
Genesis18:2 Akebutse abona abagabo batatu bahagaze hafi aho
Genesis18:3 aravuga ati: “Nyakubahwa
Genesis18:4 Nibazane amazi mwoge ibirenge
Genesis18:5 nanjye ngiye kubazanira amazimano mufungure mubone gukomeza urugendo
Genesis18:6 Aburahamu yihutira mu ihema rye
Genesis18:7 Hanyuma Aburahamu yirukira mu nka
Genesis18:8 Inyama zimaze gushya Aburahamu azizanira abashyitsi
Genesis18:9 Nuko baramubaza bati: “Umugore wawe Sara ari he?” Arasubiza ati: “Ari mu ihema.”
Genesis18:10 Umwe muri bo aravuga ati: “Undi mwaka iki gihe nzagaruka iwawe
Genesis18:11 Aburahamu na Sara bari bashaje bageze mu zabukuru
Genesis18:12 Nuko asekera mu mutima yibwira ati: “Ko maze gukecura n'umutware wanjye akaba ashaje cyane
Genesis18:13 Uhoraho abaza Aburahamu ati: “Sara ashekejwe n'iki? Kuki atemera ko azabyara ashaje?
Genesis18:14 Mbese hari ikintu cyananira? Undi mwaka iki gihe nzagaruka iwawe
Genesis18:15 Sara agira ubwoba maze arahakana ati: “Sinigeze nseka!” Uhoraho ati: “Nyamara wasetse!”
Genesis18:16 Nuko ba bagabo barahaguruka bakomeza urugendo berekeza i Sodoma
Genesis18:17 Uhoraho aribwira ati: “Sinahisha Aburahamu icyo ngiye gukora.
Genesis18:18 Dore Aburahamu azakomokwaho n'ubwoko bukomeye
Genesis18:19 Namutoranyirije kugira ngo azategeke abahungu be n'abazamukomokaho kunyumvira
Genesis18:20 Maze Uhoraho abwira Aburahamu ati: “Abatuye i Sodoma n'i Gomora baregwa ubutitsa ko ibyaha byabo byarenze ihaniro!
Genesis18:21 None ngiyeyo ndebe niba ibyo baregwa ari byo
Genesis18:22 Babiri muri abo bagabo bakomeza kugenda berekeje i Sodoma
Genesis18:23 Aburahamu aramubaza ati: “Mbese warimburana intungane n'abagome?
Genesis18:24 Habaye hari intungane mirongo itanu mu mujyi wa Sodoma
Genesis18:25 Ntibikabeho ngo wicane intungane n'abagome! Ntibikabeho ngo ucire intungane urw'abagome! Uri umucamanza w'isi yose ntiwarenganya.”
Genesis18:26 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Ninsanga mu mujyi wa Sodoma hari intungane mirongo itanu
Genesis18:27 Aburahamu arongera ati: “Nyagasani mpangaye kuvugana nawe nubwo ndi umukungugu n'ivu.
Genesis18:28 Mbese ku ntungane mirongo itanu nihaburamo eshanu
Genesis18:29 Aburahamu arongera ati: “None se nihabonekamo mirongo ine?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Sinzawurimbura kubera intungane mirongo ine.”
Genesis18:30 Aburahamu arongera ati: “Nyagasani ntundakarire nongere nkubaze. Bizagenda bite nihaboneka mirongo itatu?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Sinzawurimbura nimpasanga intungane mirongo itatu.”
Genesis18:31 Aburahamu arakomeza ati: “Nyagasani nongeye guhangara kukubaza: none se habonetse makumyabiri?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Sinzawurimbura kubera intungane makumyabiri.”
Genesis18:32 Aburahamu arongera ati: “Nyagasani ntundakarire ureke mvuge rimwe gusa. Bizagenda bite nihaboneka icumi gusa?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Sinzawurimbura kubera intungane icumi.”
Genesis18:33 Uhoraho amaze kuvugana na we akomeza urugendo
Genesis19:1 Ba bamarayika babiri bagera i Sodoma nimugoroba
Genesis19:2 Arababwira ati: “Ba nyakubahwa

Genesis19:7 arababwira ati: “Bagenzi banjye
Genesis19:8 Ahubwo mureke mbazanire abakobwa banjye babiri b'amasugi

Genesis19:12 Ba bagabo babiri babaza Loti bati: “Mbese hari abandi bantu ufite ino
Genesis19:13 kuko tugiye kuwurimbura. Abanyasodoma baregwa ubutitsa

Genesis19:15 Umuseke ukebye
Genesis19:16 Loti azaririye
Genesis19:17 Bamaze kubakura mu mujyi
Genesis19:18 Ariko Loti aramubwira ati: “Ko bidashoboka se nyakubahwa!
Genesis19:19 Dore jyewe umugaragu wawe
Genesis19:20 Dore uriya mujyi mutoya uri hafi ku buryo nabasha kuwuhungiramo
Genesis19:21 Aramusubiza ati: “Nongeye kukwemerera ibyo unsabye
Genesis19:22 Ngaho ihute uhungireyo kuko nta cyo nshobora gukora utaragerayo.” Uwo mujyi wahimbwe Sowari kubera ko Loti yavuze ko ari mutoya.
Genesis19:23 Loti yagezeyo izuba rirashe.
Genesis19:24 Nuko Uhoraho agusha kuri Sodoma na Gomora amazuku n'umuriro bivuye mu ijuru
Genesis19:25 atsemba iyo mijyi n'abayituyemo bose n'ikibaya cyose
Genesis19:26 Umugore wa Loti arebye inyuma
Genesis19:27 Muri icyo gitondo Aburahamu yasubiye aho yavuganiraga n'Uhoraho
Genesis19:28 yerekeza amaso i Sodoma n'i Gomora no ku kibaya hose
Genesis19:29 Igihe Imana yarimburaga imijyi Loti yari atuyemo
Genesis19:30 Loti yatinye kuguma i Sowari
Genesis19:31 Umukobwa we w'impfura abwira murumuna we ati: “Dore data atangiye gusaza kandi mu gihugu cyose nta mugabo uhari ngo turyamane.
Genesis19:32 Reka tumuhe divayi asinde
Genesis19:33 Nuko iryo joro batereka se divayi arasinda. Umukuru aryamana na we
Genesis19:34 Bukeye umukuru abwira murumuna we ati: “Naraye ndyamanye na data
Genesis19:35 Iryo joro barongera batereka se divayi arasinda
Genesis19:36 Uko ni ko Loti yateye abakobwa be bombi inda.
Genesis19:37 Umukuru abyara umuhungu amwita Mowabu. Ni we sekuruza w'Abamowabu bakiriho kugeza n'ubu.
Genesis19:38 Umuto na we abyara umuhungu amwita Benami. Ni we sekuruza w'Abamoni na bo bakiriho kugeza n'ubu.

Genesis21:1 Uhoraho yahaye Sara umugisha
Genesis21:2 Sara asama inda
Genesis21:3 Uwo muhungu yabyaranye na Sara
Genesis21:4 amukeba amaze iminsi umunani avutse nk'uko Imana yabimutegetse.
Genesis21:5 Igihe Izaki yavukaga
Genesis21:6 Sara aravuga ati: “Imana inteye ibyishimo no guseka
Genesis21:7 Arongera ati: “Ni nde washoboraga kubwira Aburahamu ko nzonsa abana? Nyamara dore mubyariye umuhungu ageze mu za bukuru!”
Genesis21:8 Umwana arakura aracuka
Genesis21:9 Wa muhungu Hagari w'Umunyamisirikazi yari yabyaranye na Aburahamu
Genesis21:10 maze abwira Aburahamu ati: “Irukana uriya muja n'umuhungu we! Sinshaka ko umuhungu w'uwo muja azagabana umunani n'umuhungu wanjye Izaki.”
Genesis21:11 Ibyo kwirukana Ishimayeli bibabaza Aburahamu cyane kuko na we yari umwana we.
Genesis21:12 Ariko Imana iramubwira iti: “Iby'umuhungu wawe n'umuja wawe ntibikubabaze. Ahubwo ukore icyo Sara akubwira
Genesis21:13 Naho umuhungu w'umuja wawe
Genesis21:14 Aburahamu arazinduka aha Hagari impamba n'uruhago rw'uruhu rwuzuye amazi
Genesis21:15 Amazi amaze gushira
Genesis21:16 Aragenda yicara ahitaruye nko muri metero ijana
Genesis21:17 Nyamara Imana yumvise gutaka k'umwana
Genesis21:18 Genda umufate ukuboko umuhagurutse
Genesis21:19 Nuko Imana imwereka iriba ry'amazi
Genesis21:20 Imana ikomeza kurinda Ishimayeli arakura
Genesis21:21 Ubwo yari atuye mu butayu bwa Parani
Genesis21:22 Muri icyo gihe
Genesis21:23 None undahire izina ry'Imana ko utazigera umpemukira
Genesis21:24 Aburahamu aramusubiza ati: “Ndabirahiye.”
Genesis21:25 Ariko Aburahamu aregera Abimeleki ko abagaragu be bamwambuye iriba ry'amazi.
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki arahakana ati: “Ibyo sinzi uwabikoze
Genesis21:27 Nuko Aburahamu azana amashyo n'imikumbi abiha Abimeleki
Genesis21:28 Aburahamu azana n'inyagazi ndwi azishyira ku ruhande
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki ni ko kumubaza ati: “Mbese ziriya nyagazi ndwi washyize ku ruhande ni iz'iki?”
Genesis21:30 Aburahamu aramusubiza ati: “Kuko ari jye wafukuje iri riba
Genesis21:31 Aho hantu hitwa Bērisheba kuko ari ho bombi barahiriye.
Genesis21:32 Nyuma y'ayo masezerano y'i Bērisheba
Genesis21:33 Aburahamu atera igiti i Bērisheba
Genesis21:34 Maze amara igihe kirekire mu Bufilisiti.
Genesis22:1 Nyuma y'ibyo
Genesis22:2 Iramubwira iti: “Jyana Izaki umuhungu wawe w'ikinege ukunda
Genesis22:3 Aburahamu arazinduka yasa inkwi zo gutwika igitambo azishyira ku ndogobe ye
Genesis22:4 Ku munsi wa gatatu
Genesis22:5 Nuko abwira abagaragu be ati: “Nimusigare hano n'indogobe
Genesis22:6 Aburahamu akorera umuhungu we Izaki za nkwi
Genesis22:7 Izaki ahamagara se Aburahamu ati: “Data!” Aramwitaba ati: “Ndakumva mwana wanjye.” Izaki ni ko kumubaza ati: “Ko twazanye umuriro n'inkwi
Genesis22:8 Aburahamu aramusubiza ati: “Mwana wanjye
Genesis22:9 Bageze aho Imana yari yamubwiye
Genesis22:10 Nuko asingira icyuma ngo yice umuhungu we.
Genesis22:11 Ako kanya umumarayika w'Uhoraho ahamagara ari mu ijuru ati: “Aburahamu! Aburahamu!” Aritaba ati: “Karame!”
Genesis22:12 Umumarayika aramubwira ati: “Reka uwo mwana! Ntugire icyo umutwara. Ubu menye uko wubaha Imana kuko utayimye umwana wawe w'ikinege.”
Genesis22:13 Aburahamu akebutse inyuma ye abona impfizi y'intama
Genesis22:14 Aburahamu yita aho hantu “Uhoraho aratanga ”. Ni cyo gituma na n'ubu bakivuga ngo “Ku musozi w'Uhoraho azatanga ibikenewe.”
Genesis22:15 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho ari mu ijuru ahamagara Aburahamu ubwa kabiri
Genesis22:16 aramubwira ati: “Umva ibyo Uhoraho avuze: kubera ko ubigenje utyo ntunyime umwana wawe w'ikinege
Genesis22:17 nzaguha umugisha
Genesis22:18 Kandi amahanga yose yo ku isi azaherwa umugisha mu rubyaro rwawe
Genesis22:19 Nuko Aburahamu asanga abagaragu be
Genesis22:20 Nyuma y'ibyo

Genesis22:22 na Kesedi na Hazo
Genesis22:23 se wa Rebeka. Abo uko ari umunani ni bo Nahori
Genesis22:24 Nahori yari afite n'inshoreke yitwa Rewuma
Genesis23:1 Sara yamaze imyaka ijana na makumyabiri n'irindwi
Genesis23:2 agwa i Kiriyati-Aruba

Genesis23:4 “Dore ndi umushyitsi n'umwimukīra iwanyu

Genesis23:6 “Umva nyakubahwa

Genesis23:9 angurishe ubuvumo bwe bw'i Makipela

Genesis24:1 Aburahamu yari ashaje cyane
Genesis24:2 Aburahamu abwira umugaragu we mukuru wari ushinzwe ibye byose ati: “Shyira ikiganza cyawe munsi y'ikibero cyanjye
Genesis24:3 urahire Uhoraho
Genesis24:4 Ahubwo uzajye mu gihugu cyacu muri bene wacu
Genesis24:5 Umugaragu aramubaza ati: “Mbese uwo mugeni natemera ko tuzana muri iki gihugu
Genesis24:6 Aburahamu aramusubiza ati: “Uramenye ntuzamujyaneyo!
Genesis24:7 Uhoraho
Genesis24:8 Umugeni natemera ko muzana
Genesis24:9 Nuko uwo mugaragu ashyira ikiganza munsi y'ikibero cya shebuja Aburahamu
Genesis24:10 Umugaragu afata ingamiya icumi mu za shebuja
Genesis24:11 Nimugoroba igihe abagore bajya kuvoma
Genesis24:12 Nuko arasenga ati: “Uhoraho

Genesis24:14 Ndasaba umwe muri bo ngo nywere ku kibindi cye. Nansubiza ati: ‘Ngaho nywa
Genesis24:15 Agisenga
Genesis24:16 Rebeka yari mwiza cyane
Genesis24:17 Umugaragu yirukanka amusanga aramubwira ati: “Ndagusabye ureke nsome ku mazi yo mu kibindi cyawe.”
Genesis24:18 Ako kanya umukobwa acisha bugufi ikibindi aramubwira ati: “Ngaho nywa ushire inyota.”
Genesis24:19 Amaze kumuha amazi aramubwira ati: “Reka mvomere n'ingamiya zawe nzuhire kugeza ubwo zikūye.”
Genesis24:20 Ni ko gusuka amazi mu kibumbiro
Genesis24:21 Uwo mugabo agumya kumwitegereza yicecekeye ngo arebe ko Uhoraho yamuhaye urugendo ruhire.
Genesis24:22 Ingamiya zikutse
Genesis24:23 Nuko aramubaza ati: “Uri mwene nde?” Rebeka aramusubiza ati: “Ndi mwene Betuweli
Genesis24:24 
Genesis24:25 Aramusubiza ati: “Yee ryaboneka
Genesis24:26 Nuko uwo mugabo arapfukama aramya Uhoraho
Genesis24:27 ati: “Nihasingizwe Uhoraho
Genesis24:28 Umukobwa ariruka ajya kubwira abari mu nzu ya nyina ibyamubayeho.
Genesis24:29 Labani musaza wa Rebeka abyumvise
Genesis24:30 Labani yari yabonye impeta n'ibikomo mushiki we yari yambaye
Genesis24:31 Labani aramubwira ati: “Yewe uwahiriwe n'Uhoraho
Genesis24:32 Uwo mugabo yinjira mu nzu
Genesis24:33 babazanira n'amafunguro. Ariko uwo mugabo aravuga ati: “Simfungura ntaravuga ikingenza.” Labani aramusubiza ati: “Tuguhaye ijambo!”
Genesis24:34 Arababwira ati: “Ndi umugaragu wa Aburahamu.
Genesis24:35 Uhoraho yahaye databuja imigisha myinshi arakomera cyane. Yamuhaye imikumbi n'amashyo
Genesis24:36 Sara muka databuja nubwo yari umukecuru
Genesis24:37 Databuja yarandahije ati: ‘Ntuzashakire umuhungu wanjye umugeni wo mu Banyakanāni ntuyemo.
Genesis24:38 Ahubwo uzajye kumushakira umugeni iwacu muri bene wacu.’
Genesis24:39 Nuko ndamubaza nti: ‘Nakora iki uwo mugeni atemeye ko tuzana?’
Genesis24:40 Aransubiza ati: ‘Uhoraho mpora numvira
Genesis24:41 ube ushohoje icyo wandahiye. Nubwo bamukwima uzaba ubaye umwere.’
Genesis24:42 “Uyu munsi nageze ku iriba ndasenga nti: ‘Uhoraho Mana ya databuja Aburahamu
Genesis24:43 Dore mpagaze ku iriba
Genesis24:44 Nansubiza ati: “Ngaho nywa
Genesis24:45 Ngisenga bucece
Genesis24:46 Ako kanya acisha bugufi ikibindi arambwira ati: ‘Ngaho nywa kandi nduhira n'ingamiya zawe.’ Nanyoye kandi yuhira n'ingamiya.
Genesis24:47 Namubajije nti: ‘Uri mwene nde?’ Aransubiza ati: ‘Ndi mwene Betuweli
Genesis24:48 Hanyuma ndapfukama ndamya Uhoraho Imana ya databuja Aburahamu
Genesis24:49 None rero nimushaka kuba abanyamurava mukagirira databuja neza
Genesis24:50 Labani na Betuweli baramusubiza bati: “Ibyo byakozwe n'Uhoraho
Genesis24:51 Dore Rebeka nguyu mujyane
Genesis24:52 Umugaragu wa Aburahamu yumvise ayo magambo
Genesis24:53 Nuko aha Rebeka ibintu bikozwe mu izahabu no mu ifeza
Genesis24:54 Hanyuma we n'abagabo bamuherekeje barafungura
Genesis24:55 Labani na nyina baramusubiza bati: “Reka umukobwa abe agumye hano nk'iminsi icumi
Genesis24:56 Arabasubiza ati: “Mwinkerereza
Genesis24:57 Na bo bati: “Reka duhamagare umukobwa twumve icyo abivugaho.”
Genesis24:58 Nuko bahamagara Rebeka baramubaza bati: “Ese urahita ujyana n'uyu mugabo?” Arabasubiza ati: “Turajyana.”
Genesis24:59 Nuko basezera kuri Rebeka
Genesis24:60 Bene wabo wa Rebeka bamwifuriza umugisha bati: “Mushiki wacu
Genesis24:61 Rebeka n'abaja be bicara ku ngamiya
Genesis24:62 Icyo gihe Izaki yari yaravuye ku “Iriba rya Nyirubuzima undeba”
Genesis24:63 Nimugoroba Izaki yatemberaga ku gasozi
Genesis24:64 Rebeka amubonye ava ku ngamiya
Genesis24:65 abaza umugaragu wa Aburahamu ati: “Uriya mugabo uri ku gasozi uje hano ni nde?” Umugaragu aramusubiza ati: “Ni databuja.” Nuko Rebeka yitwikira umwenda mu maso.
Genesis24:66 Umugaragu atekerereza Izaki ibyo yakoze byose.
Genesis24:67 Izaki ajyana Rebeka mu ihema ryari irya nyina Sara aramurongora

Genesis25:2 babyarana Zimurani na Yokishani
Genesis25:3 Yokishani abyara Sheba na Dedani. Dedani akomokwaho n'Abashuri n'Abaletushi n'Abalewumi.
Genesis25:4 Bene Midiyani ni Eyifa na Eferi
Genesis25:5 Aburahamu yaraze Izaki ibyo yari atunze byose
Genesis25:6 ariko abana b'inshoreke ze na bo yari yarabahaye iminani akiriho

Genesis25:8 yashaje neza ageza mu za bukuru
Genesis25:9 Abahungu be

Genesis25:12 Dore abakomoka kuri Ishimayeli

Genesis25:14 na Mishuma na Duma na Masa
Genesis25:15 na Hadadi na Tema na Yeturi

Genesis25:20 Izaki amaze imyaka mirongo ine avutse

Genesis29:1 Yakobo akomeza urugendo
Genesis29:2 Aza kubona iriba riri mu misozi
Genesis29:3 Iyo amatungo yamaraga guteranira aho bakuragaho iryo buye bakayuhira
Genesis29:4 Yakobo abaza abashumba ati: “Ncuti zanjye
Genesis29:5 Arababaza ati: “Ese Labani ukomoka kuri Nahori muramuzi?” Baramusubiza bati: “Turamuzi.”
Genesis29:6 Yongera kubabaza ati: “Araho se?” Baramusubiza bati: “Araho
Genesis29:7 Yakobo arababaza ati: “Ko mwabyagije amatungo hakiri kare? Nimuyuhire nakuka muyaragire!”
Genesis29:8 Baramusubiza bati: “Ntitwabikora kuko tugomba gutegereza ko amatungo yose ahagera
Genesis29:9 Yakobo akivugana na bo
Genesis29:10 Yakobo abonye Rasheli umukobwa wa nyirarume Labani
Genesis29:11 Hanyuma ahobera Rasheli
Genesis29:12 Ni ko kubwira Rasheli ati: “Ndi mwishywa wa so
Genesis29:13 Labani yumvise yuko mwishywa we Yakobo yaje
Genesis29:14 Nuko Labani aramubwira ati: “Ni ukuri
Genesis29:15 Labani aramubwira ati: “Si byiza ko wankorera ku busa nubwo uri mwene wacu
Genesis29:16 Labani yari afite abakobwa babiri. Umukuru yitwaga Leya
Genesis29:17 Leya yari afite amaso meza
Genesis29:18 Yakobo akamukunda. Nuko asubiza Labani ati: “Nzagukorera imyaka irindwi
Genesis29:19 Labani aramubwira ati: “Kumugushyingira biruta kumushyingira undi
Genesis29:20 Nuko Yakobo akora imyaka irindwi kugira ngo bamushyingire Rasheli. Yaramukundaga cyane bituma iyo myaka imubera nk'iminsi mike.
Genesis29:21 Iyo myaka irangiye Yakobo abwira Labani ati: “Nshyingira umugeni wanjye kuko igihe cyo kugukorera cyarangiye.”
Genesis29:22 Labani atumira abaturanyi be bararya
Genesis29:23 nimugoroba ashyira Yakobo umukobwa we Leya
Genesis29:24 Labani yari yarahaye Leya umuja we Zilipa ngo amukorere.
Genesis29:25 Bukeye Yakobo asanga bamushyingiye Leya! Ni bwo abajije Labani ati: “Wangenje ute? Sinagukoreye ngira ngo unshyingire Rasheli? Kuki wandiganyije?”
Genesis29:26 Labani aramusubiza ati: “Mu muco wacu ntidushyingira umukobwa muto mbere y'umukuru.
Genesis29:27 Banza umarane na Leya icyumweru cy'ubugeni mbone kugushyingira Rasheli
Genesis29:28 Yakobo abigenza atyo. Amaranye na Leya icyumweru
Genesis29:29 Labani yari yarahaye Rasheli umuja we Biliha ngo amukorere.
Genesis29:30 Yakobo arongora Rasheli
Genesis29:31 Uhoraho abonye ko Leya adakunzwe nka Rasheli amuha ibyara
Genesis29:32 Leya asama inda abyara umwana w'umuhungu
Genesis29:33 Arongera arasama abyara undi muhungu
Genesis29:34 Arongera arasama abyara undi muhungu
Genesis29:35 Arongera arasama abyara undi muhungu
Genesis30:1 Rasheli abonye atabyaye agirira mukuru we ishyari
Genesis30:2 Yakobo arakarira Rasheli aramubwira ati: “Mbese ni jye wabibaza? Imana si yo yakwimye ibyara?”
Genesis30:3 Rasheli aramubwira ati: “Ryamana n'umuja wanjye Biliha azambyarire akana
Genesis30:4 Amuha umuja we Biliha ngo amugire inshoreke
Genesis30:5 Yakobo amutera inda babyarana umwana w'umuhungu.
Genesis30:6 Rasheli aravuga ati: “Imana yumvise gusenga kwanjye irandenganura
Genesis30:7 Biliha umuja wa Rasheli
Genesis30:8 Rasheli aravuga ati: “Narwanye inkundura na mukuru wanjye none ndatsinze!” Uwo mwana amwita Nafutali.
Genesis30:9 Leya abonye ko atakibyara
Genesis30:10 babyarana umwana w'umuhungu.
Genesis30:11 Leya aravuga ati: “Mbega umugisha!” Uwo mwana amwita Gadi.
Genesis30:12 Zilipa umuja wa Leya
Genesis30:13 Leya aravuga ati: “Ngize amahirwe! Kandi abagore bose bazanyita umunyehirwe!” Uwo mwana amwita Ashēri.
Genesis30:14 Mu gihe cy'isarura ry'ingano Rubeni ajya mu mirima
Genesis30:15 Leya aramusubiza ati: “Ese ntunyurwa? Wantwaye umugabo none urashaka no kuntwara imbuto z'ibyara umwana wanjye yanzaniye?” Rasheli aravuga ati: “Noneho iri joro murararana
Genesis30:16 Nimugoroba Yakobo avuye mu mirima
Genesis30:17 Imana yumva gusenga kwa Leya arasama
Genesis30:18 Leya aravuga ati: “Imana yampaye ibihembo
Genesis30:19 Leya arongera arasama abyara umuhungu wa gatandatu
Genesis30:20 aravuga ati: “Imana ingabiye impano nziza! Noneho umugabo wanjye azampa icyubahiro kuko tubyaranye abahungu batandatu.” Uwo mwana amwita Zabuloni.
Genesis30:21 Hanyuma Leya abyara n'umukobwa amwita Dina.
Genesis30:22 Imana izirikana Rasheli
Genesis30:23 asama inda abyara umwana w'umuhungu. Aravuga ati: “Imana inkuye mu isoni!”
Genesis30:24 Uwo mwana amwita Yozefu agira ati: “Icyampa ngo Imana inyongere undi muhungu!”
Genesis30:25 Rasheli amaze kubyara Yozefu
Genesis30:26 njyane n'abagore banjye n'abana banjye
Genesis30:27 Labani aramubwira ati: “Reka nkubwire: nahishuriwe yuko imigisha yose Imana yampaye ari wowe nyikesha.
Genesis30:28 None mbwira igihembo ushaka nkiguhe.”
Genesis30:29 Yakobo aramubwira ati: “Uzi uko nagukoreye n'uko amatungo yawe yagwiriye nyaragira.
Genesis30:30 Ayo wari ufite ntaraza yari make
Genesis30:31 Labani aramubaza ati: “Nguhe iki?” Yakobo aramusubiza ati: “Nta gihembo nkwatse. Ahubwo niba ushaka ko nkomeza kukuragirira amatungo
Genesis30:32 uyu munsi ndanyura mu mikumbi yawe yose
Genesis30:33 Mu gihe kizaza nusuzuma uzasanga ndi indahemuka. Nuramuka usanze mu ntama zanjye izitari imikara
Genesis30:34 Labani aramusubiza ati: “Ndabyemeye
Genesis30:35 Ariko uwo munsi Labani arobanura amapfizi y'ihene y'ibihuga n'ay'ibitobo
Genesis30:36 abategeka kuzijyana kure ya Yakobo ahareshya n'urugendo rw'iminsi itatu. Yakobo akomeza kuragira imikumbi ya Labani isigaye.
Genesis30:37 Nuko atema udushami tw'ibiti by'amoko atatu
Genesis30:38 Hanyuma ashyira utwo duti mu bibumbiro aho yuhira imikumbi
Genesis30:39 Bityo amatungo yimiraga imbere y'utwo duti
Genesis30:40 Yakobo avangura izivutse ziba ize. Umukumbi aragiye awubangurira ku z'ibihuga no ku z'ibitobo Labani yari yarobanuye. Bityo akibonera umukumbi we bwite ntawuvange n'uwa Labani.
Genesis30:41 Uko amatungo meza yarindaga
Genesis30:42 Ariko iyo yabaga ari mabi ntiyadushyiragaho
Genesis30:43 Bityo Yakobo aba umutunzi cyane
Genesis31:1 Yakobo yumva ko abahungu ba Labani bavuga bati: “Yakobo yatwaye ibya data byose
Genesis31:2 Abona ko na Labani atakimureba neza nka mbere.
Genesis31:3 Uhoraho abwira Yakobo ati: “Subira mu gihugu cya so na sokuru no muri bene wanyu
Genesis31:4 Yakobo atumira Rasheli na Leya bamusanga mu rwuri
Genesis31:5 arababwira ati: “Ndabona so atakindeba neza nka mbere
Genesis31:6 Murabizi nakoreye so n'imbaraga zanjye zose
Genesis31:7 ariko yagiye andiganya
Genesis31:8 Uko Labani yavugaga ati: ‘Igihembo cyawe ni iz'ibitobo’
Genesis31:9 Uko ni ko Imana yatse so amatungo ikayampa.
Genesis31:10 “Igihe amatungo yashakaga kwima
Genesis31:11 Muri izo nzozi Umumarayika w'Imana arampamagara ati: ‘Yakobo.’ Ndamwitaba nti: ‘Karame.’
Genesis31:12 Arambwira ati: ‘Dore amapfizi yose y'ihene yimya inyagazi ni ibihuga n'ubugondo n'ibitobo
Genesis31:13 Ndi Imana yakubonekeye uri i Beteli
Genesis31:14 Rasheli na Leya baramusubiza bati: “N'ubundi nta munani cyangwa umugabane tugifite kwa data!
Genesis31:15 Adufata nka rubanda
Genesis31:16 Ubu butunzi bwose Imana yatse data bubaye ubwacu n'abana bacu. None kora ibyo Imana yagutegetse byose.”
Genesis31:17 Nuko Yakobo ashyira abana n'abagore be ku ngamiya
Genesis31:18 ajyana n'amatungo ye yose
Genesis31:19 Icyo gihe Labani yari yagiye gukemuza amatungo
Genesis31:20 Yakobo yabaye inyaryenge yigendera adasezeye kuri Labani w'Umunyasiriya.
Genesis31:21 Yajyanye ibyo yari atunze byose yambuka uruzi rwa Efurati
Genesis31:22 Ku munsi wa gatatu babwira Labani ko Yakobo yigendeye.
Genesis31:23 Labani ajyana na bene wabo
Genesis31:24 Nijoro Imana ibonekera Labani w'Umunyasiriya mu nzozi
Genesis31:25 Yakobo yari yashinze amahema ye kuri umwe mu misozi y'i Gileyadi
Genesis31:26 Labani abaza Yakobo ati: “Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki? Kuki wagiye utansezeyeho ukajyana abakobwa banjye nk'aho ari iminyago?
Genesis31:27 Watewe n'iki kugenda rwihishwa utambwiye kandi utanansezeyeho? Mba naragusezeyeho mu byishimo n'indirimbo
Genesis31:28 Ntiwatumye nsezera ku bakobwa banjye no ku buzukuru banjye. Wakoze iby'ubupfu!
Genesis31:29 Nshobora kubagirira nabi
Genesis31:30 Ni iby'ukuri umwana ujya iwabo nta wumugarura. None ni kuki watwaye imana zanjye?”
Genesis31:31 Yakobo aramusubiza ati: “Sinagusezeyeho kuko natinyaga ko wanyambura abakobwa bawe.
Genesis31:32 Naho ibyerekeye imana zawe
Genesis31:33 Nuko Labani asaka mu ihema rya Yakobo no mu rya Leya no mu ya ba baja babiri
Genesis31:34 Rasheli yari yahishe ibyo bigirwamana munsi y'intebe bashyira ku ngamiya
Genesis31:35 Rasheli abwira se ati: “Data mbabarira
Genesis31:36 Nuko Yakobo ararakara
Genesis31:37 Aho wasakiye hari ikintu cyawe wigeze ubona mu bintu byanjye? Ngaho cyereke aba bavandimwe badukiranure.
Genesis31:38 Mu myaka makumyabiri twamaranye
Genesis31:39 Iyo itungo ryicwaga n'inyamaswa nararikurihaga
Genesis31:40 Ku manywa izuba ryarantwikaga
Genesis31:41 Namaze iwawe imyaka makumyabiri: nagukoreye imyaka cumi n'ine iba inkwano y'abakobwa bawe babiri
Genesis31:42 Iyo ntabana n'Imana ya Aburahamu ari yo data Izaki yatinyaga
Genesis31:43 Labani asubiza Yakobo ati: “Aba ni abakobwa banjye
Genesis31:44 reka tugirane amasezerano
Genesis31:45 Nuko Yakobo afata ibuye
Genesis31:46 Abwira bene wabo kuzana amabuye
Genesis31:47 Labani yita icyo kirundo cy'amabuye Yegarisahaduta
Genesis31:48 Labani aravuga ati: “Guhera uyu munsi iki kirundo cy'amabuye kizatubera umuhamya w'amasezerano tugiranye.” Ni yo mpamvu aho bahise Gileyadi.
Genesis31:49 Ubundi kandi hitwa Misipa
Genesis31:50 Nugirira nabi abakobwa banjye cyangwa ukabaharika
Genesis31:51 Reba iki kirundo n'iri buye nshinze biri hagati yacu
Genesis31:52 byombi bitubere abahamya. Sinzarenga iki kirundo ngo nze kukugirira nabi
Genesis31:53 Imana ya Aburahamu na Nahori na Tera izadukiranure.” Yakobo arahira Imana se Izaki yatinyaga.
Genesis31:54 Nuko Yakobo atambira igitambo kuri uwo musozi
Genesis31:55 Bukeye Labani arazinduka
Genesis32:1 Yakobo we akomeza urugendo
Genesis32:2 ababonye aravuga ati: “Aha hantu ni inkambi y'Imana.” Ni cyo cyatumye ahita Mahanayimu.
Genesis32:3 Yakobo yohereza intumwa kwa mwene se Ezawu wari utuye mu gihugu cya Seyiri
Genesis32:4 Arazibwira ati: “Muzabwire databuja Ezawu muti: ‘Umugaragu wawe Yakobo aradutumye ngo yabaye kwa Labani kugeza ubu
Genesis32:5 kandi afite inka n'indogobe
Genesis32:6 Intumwa ziragaruka zibwira Yakobo ziti: “Twageze kwa mwene so Ezawu
Genesis32:7 Yakobo agira ubwoba cyane bituma agabanya abantu be
Genesis32:8 Yaribwiraga ati: “Ezawu natera itsinda rimwe
Genesis32:9 Yakobo arasenga ati: “Mana ya sogokuru Aburahamu
Genesis32:10 Jyewe umugaragu wawe
Genesis32:11 Ndakwinginze unkize mwene data Ezawu
Genesis32:12 Kandi waransezeraniye uti: ‘Nzakugirira neza
Genesis32:13 Yakobo arara aho
Genesis32:14 ihene magana abiri n'isekurume zazo makumyabiri
Genesis32:15 n'ingamiya zonsa mirongo itatu hamwe n'izazo
Genesis32:16 Ayo matungo ayaha abagaragu be buri bwoko ukwabwo
Genesis32:17 Abwira ugiye imbere ati: “Nuhura na mwene data Ezawu akakubaza ati: ‘Uri nde? Urajya he? Ayo matungo ushoreye ni aya nde?’
Genesis32:18 umusubize uti: ‘Databuja
Genesis32:19 Yakobo abwira n'abandi bagaragu be bose bari bagiye gushorera amatungo ati: “Nimuhura na Ezawu muzamubwire mutyo
Genesis32:20 munamubwire ko mwansize inyuma.” Yaribwiraga ati: “Nimbanza kumwoherereza amatungo
Genesis32:21 Nuko bashorera ya matungo
Genesis32:22 Iryo joro Yakobo arabyuka ajyana n'abagore be babiri n'inshoreke ze zombi
Genesis32:23 Arabambutsa bose
Genesis32:24 ariko we yisigarira aho. Nuko haza umugabo barakirana bageza mu museke.
Genesis32:25 Uwo mugabo abonye atari butsinde Yakobo
Genesis32:26 Uwo mugabo aramubwira ati: “Ndekura ngende dore buracyeye.” Yakobo aramusubiza ati: “Sinkurekura utampaye umugisha.”
Genesis32:27 Undi aramubaza ati: “Witwa nde?” Aramusubiza ati: “Nitwa Yakobo.”
Genesis32:28 Uwo mugabo aramubwira ati: “Ntuzongera kwitwa Yakobo ahubwo uzitwa Isiraheli
Genesis32:29 Yakobo aramubwira ati: “Ndakwinginze mbwira izina ryawe.” Undi aramusubiza ati: “Urarimbariza iki?” Aho kurimubwira amuha umugisha.
Genesis32:30 Yakobo aratangara ati: “Narebanye n'Imana sinapfa!” Ni cyo cyatumye aho hantu ahita Penuweli.
Genesis32:31 Yahagurutse i Penuweli izuba rirashe
Genesis32:32 Uhereye ubwo Abisiraheli ntibarya inyama iri ku nyonga y'itako
Genesis33:1 Nuko Yakobo abona Ezawu azanye n'abantu magana ane
Genesis33:2 Inshoreke n'abana bazo yazibanje imbere
Genesis33:3 Yakobo abajya imbere agenda asanga Ezawu
Genesis33:4 Ezawu ariruka aramusanganira
Genesis33:5 Ezawu akebutse abona abagore n'abana
Genesis33:6 Nuko inshoreke n'abana bazo begera Ezawu bamwikubita imbere
Genesis33:7 Leya n'abana be na bo babigenza batyo
Genesis33:8 Ezawu aramubaza ati: “Amatungo twahuye yose ni ay'iki?” Yakobo aramusubiza ati: “Databuja
Genesis33:9 Ezawu ati: “Mwene data
Genesis33:10 Ariko Yakobo aramusubiza ati: “Niba unyakiriye neza koko
Genesis33:11 Akira rero impano nguhaye
Genesis33:12 Ezawu aramubwira ati: “Reka tujyane nguherekeze.”
Genesis33:13 Yakobo aramusubiza ati: “Databuja
Genesis33:14 None rero databuja
Genesis33:15 Ezawu aramubwira ati: “Reka noneho ngusigire bamwe mu bagaragu banjye.” Ariko Yakobo aramusubiza ati: “Databuja
Genesis33:16 Uwo munsi Ezawu asubira iwe i Seyiri.
Genesis33:17 Yakobo na we ajya i Sukoti
Genesis33:18 Yakobo yavuye muri Mezopotamiya
Genesis33:19 Aho hantu yashinze amahema ye yahaguze na bene Hamori se wa Shekemu
Genesis33:20 Nuko ahubaka urutambiro arwitirira Imana
Genesis34:1 Umunsi umwe
Genesis34:2 Hamori w'Umuhivi umutware w'ako karere
Genesis34:3 Yakunze cyane Dina umukobwa wa Yakobo
Genesis34:4 Maze abwira se Hamori ati: “Nsabira uyu mukobwa ambere umugore.”
Genesis34:5 Yakobo yumvise ko Shekemu yatesheje agaciro umukobwa we Dina
Genesis34:6 Hamori se wa Shekemu ajya kwirega kwa Yakobo.
Genesis34:7 Akiriyo bene Yakobo baratahuka
Genesis34:8 Hamori arababwira ati: “Umuhungu wanjye Shekemu yakunze umukobwa wanyu
Genesis34:9 Nimureke dushyingirane
Genesis34:10 Bityo muzibere muri iki gihugu muture aho mushaka
Genesis34:11 Shekemu abwira se w'umukobwa na basaza be ati: “Nimungirire neza
Genesis34:12 Inkwano zose n'impano zose mushaka nzazibaha
Genesis34:13 Kubera ko Shekemu yari yatesheje agaciro mushiki wabo Dina
Genesis34:14 bati: “Ntidushobora kwemera ibyo bintu. Dushyingiye mushiki wacu umuntu utakebwe twaba twikojeje isoni!
Genesis34:15 Ntituzabyemera keretse ab'igitsinagabo mwese nimukebwa.
Genesis34:16 Ni bwo tuzabashyingira abakobwa bacu namwe mukadushyingira abanyu
Genesis34:17 Niba kandi mutemeye gukebwa
Genesis34:18 Ayo magambo ashimisha Hamori n'umuhungu we Shekemu.
Genesis34:19 Uwo muhungu ahita akebwa kubera urukundo yakundaga umukobwa wa Yakobo. Ni na we kandi wari umunyacyubahiro mu nzu ya se.
Genesis34:20 Hamori n'umuhungu we Shekemu bajya ku irembo ry'umujyi wabo
Genesis34:21 “Burya ba bantu badushakira amahoro
Genesis34:22 Ariko abo bantu ntibazemera ko duturana ngo tube bamwe
Genesis34:23 Nimucyo tubemerere icyo bashaka
Genesis34:24 Abari ku irembo ry'umujyi bose bemera inama ya Hamori n'umuhungu we Shekemu
Genesis34:25 Ku munsi wa gatatu abakebwe bakibabara
Genesis34:26 Bica Hamori na Shekemu
Genesis34:27 Bene Yakobo bandi bacuza imirambo
Genesis34:28 Banyaga imikumbi n'amashyo n'indogobe
Genesis34:29 Basahura umutungo wose wo mu mazu
Genesis34:30 Nuko Yakobo atonganya Simeyoni na Levi ati: “Mwankururiye amahane munyangisha abenegihugu
Genesis34:31 Baramusubiza bati: “None se twari kwemera ko mushiki wacu afatwa nk'indaya?”
Genesis35:1 Imana ibwira Yakobo iti: “Jya gutura i Beteli maze unyubakireyo urutambiro
Genesis35:2 Nuko Yakobo abwira umuryango we n'abo bari kumwe bose ati: “Nimukureho ibigirwamana by'abanyamahanga mufite
Genesis35:3 maze tujye i Beteli. Nzahubakira urutambiro Imana yangobotse igihe nari mu kaga
Genesis35:4 Nuko baha Yakobo ibigirwamana bari bafite n'amaherena yo ku matwi
Genesis35:5 Batangira urugendo abatuye mu mijyi ibakikije ntibatinyuka kubakurikirana
Genesis35:6 Yakobo n'abantu bari kumwe bose bagera i Luzi ari yo Beteli
Genesis35:7 Ahubaka urutambiro maze aho hantu ahitirira Imana y'i Beteli
Genesis35:8 Debora umuja wari warareze Rebeka
Genesis35:9 Aho Yakobo aviriye muri Mezopotamiya
Genesis35:10 Iramubwira iti: “Witwa Yakobo
Genesis35:11 Irongera iramubwira iti: “Ndi Imana Nyirububasha. Wororoke ugwire
Genesis35:12 Iki gihugu nahaye Aburahamu na Izaki ndakiguhaye
Genesis35:13 Imana imaze kuvugana na we imusiga aho irigendera.
Genesis35:14 Aho hantu Imana yari imaze kuvuganira na Yakobo
Genesis35:15 ahita Beteli.
Genesis35:16 Yakobo n'umuryango we bimuka i Beteli. Bataragera Efurata
Genesis35:17 Ibise bimurembeje umubyaza aramubwira ati: “Ihangane dore na none ubyaye umuhungu.”
Genesis35:18 Ariko Rasheli yarasambaga. Mbere yo gupfa yita uwo mwana Benoni
Genesis35:19 Rasheli arapfa
Genesis35:20 Yakobo ashinga ibuye ku mva ya Rasheli
Genesis35:21 Isiraheli akomeza urugendo
Genesis35:22 Igihe Isiraheli yari akiri muri iyo ntara
Genesis35:23 Leya yabyaye Rubeni impfura ya Yakobo
Genesis35:24 Rasheli yabyaye Yozefu na Benyamini.
Genesis35:25 Biliha umuja wa Rasheli yabyaye Dani na Nafutali.
Genesis35:26 Zilipa umuja wa Leya yabyaye Gadi na Ashēri. Abo ni bo bahungu Yakobo yabyariye muri Mezopotamiya.
Genesis35:27 Yakobo agera kwa se Izaki i Mamure
Genesis35:28 Izaki yaramye imyaka ijana na mirongo inani
Genesis35:29 yashaje neza ageza mu za bukuru hanyuma aratabaruka. Abahungu be Ezawu na Yakobo baramushyingura.
Genesis36:1 Dore abakomoka kuri Ezawu ari we Edomu.
Genesis36:2 Ezawu yarongoye Abanyakanānikazi ari bo Ada umukobwa wa Eloni w'Umuheti
Genesis36:3 Arongora na Basemati umukobwa wa Ishimayeli
Genesis36:4 Ada babyaranye Elifazi
Genesis36:5 Oholibama babyarana Yewushi na Yalamu na Kōra. Abo ni bo bene Ezawu bavukiye mu gihugu cya Kanāni.
Genesis36:6 Ezawu yajyanye n'abagore be n'abahungu be n'abakobwa be
Genesis36:7 Bombi bari batunze ibintu byinshi n'amatungo menshi ku buryo batari bagishobora guturana
Genesis36:8 Ni cyo cyatumye Ezawu ari we Edomu
Genesis36:9 Dore abakomoka kuri Ezawu
Genesis36:10 Amazina yabo ni aya: hari Elifazi
Genesis36:11 Bene Elifazi ni Temani na Omari na Sefo
Genesis36:12 Elifazi mwene Ezawu yari afite inshoreke yitwa Timuna
Genesis36:13 Bene Ruweli ni Nahati na Zera
Genesis36:14 Abahungu Ezawu yabyaranye na Oholibama umukobwa wa Ana akaba n'umwuzukuru wa Sibeyoni
Genesis36:15 Abakomoka kuri Ezawu bigabanyijemo imiryango bayiha abatware. Abatware b'imiryango ikomoka kuri Elifazi impfura ya Ezawu
Genesis36:16 na Kōra na Gātamu na Amaleki. Abo ni bo bakomoka kuri Ada umugore wa Ezawu
Genesis36:17 Abatware b'imiryango ikomoka kuri Ruweli mwene Ezawu
Genesis36:18 Abatware b'imiryango ikomoka kuri Oholibama umugore wa Ezawu akaba n'umukobwa wa Ana
Genesis36:19 Abo bose ni abatware b'Abedomu bakomoka kuri Ezawu.
Genesis36:20 Igihugu Abedomu bagiye guturamo
Genesis36:21 
Genesis36:22 Bene Lotani ni Hori na Hemamu. Lotani yari afite mushiki we witwa Timuna.
Genesis36:23 Bene Shobali ni Aluwani na Manahati na Ebali
Genesis36:24 Bene Sibeyoni ni Aya na Ana. Ana uwo ni we wabonye iriba mu butayu
Genesis36:25 Bene Ana ni Dishoni na mushiki we Oholibama.
Genesis36:26 Bene Dishoni ni Hemudani na Eshibani
Genesis36:27 Bene Eseri ni Biluhani na Zāwani na Yakani.
Genesis36:28 Bene Dishani ni Usi na Arani.
Genesis36:29 Abatware b'Abahori ni Lotani na Shobali
Genesis36:30 na Dishoni na Eseri na Dishani. Abo ni bo batware b'imiryango y'Abahori mu gihugu cya Seyiri.
Genesis36:31 Abedomu bagize abami mbere y'Abisiraheli. Dore amazina y'abo bami:
Genesis36:32 Bela mwene Bewori yimye ingoma ya Edomu
Genesis36:33 Bela amaze gupfa
Genesis36:34 Yobabu amaze gupfa
Genesis36:35 Hushamu amaze gupfa
Genesis36:36 Hadadi amaze gupfa
Genesis36:37 Samula amaze gupfa
Genesis36:38 Shawuli amaze gupfa
Genesis36:39 Bāli-Hanani mwene Akibori amaze gupfa
Genesis36:40 Abatware bakomoka kuri Ezawu bari batuye hirya no hino n'imiryango yabo ni aba: Timuna na Aluwa na Yeteti
Genesis36:41 na Oholibama na Ela na Pinoni
Genesis36:42 na Kenazi na Temani na Mibusari
Genesis36:43 na Magidiyeli na Iramu. Ngabo abatware b'Abedomu
Genesis37:1 Yakobo yari atuye mu gihugu cya Kanāni
Genesis37:2 Dore amateka y'abahungu be. Igihe Yozefu yari umusore w'imyaka cumi n'irindwi
Genesis37:3 Yakobo yatoneshaga Yozefu kuruta abandi bahungu be
Genesis37:4 Bakuru be babonye uko se amutonesha barabimwangira
Genesis37:5 Ijoro rimwe Yozefu arota inzozi
Genesis37:6 Yari yazirotoye agira ati:
Genesis37:7 “Twari mu murima duhambira imiba
Genesis37:8 Bene se baramubaza bati: “Ubwo uribwira ko uzaba umwami wacu koko ukadutegeka?” Izo nzozi yabarotoreraga zatumye barushaho kumwanga.
Genesis37:9 Ikindi gihe Yozefu arotorera bene se izindi nzozi agira ati: “Nongeye kurota
Genesis37:10 Izo nzozi kandi azirotorera se ari kumwe na bene se. Se aramucyaha ati: “Izo ni nzozi ki? Uragira ngo jye na nyoko n'abavandimwe bawe tuzakwikubita imbere tukuramye?”
Genesis37:11 Bene se bamugirira ishyari
Genesis37:12 Umunsi umwe
Genesis37:13 Yakobo abwira Yozefu ati: “Ngwino ngutume ku bavandimwe bawe aho baragiye kuri Shekemu.” Yozefu aramusubiza ati: “Ndaje.”
Genesis37:14 Yakobo ati: “Jya kureba ko abavandimwe bawe ari amahoro
Genesis37:15 Umugabo aza kubona Yozefu ku gasozi akubita hirya no hino
Genesis37:16 Yozefu aramusubiza ati: “Ndashaka abavandimwe banjye baragiye umukumbi. Mbese ntiwandangira aho bari?”
Genesis37:17 Undi ati: “Ino barahavuye
Genesis37:18 Atarabageraho baba bamubonye
Genesis37:19 Baravugana bati: “Dore wa munyanzozi araje!
Genesis37:20 Nimuze tumwice tumujugunye muri rimwe muri aya mariba yakamye
Genesis37:21 Ariko Rubeni abyumvise ashaka kumubakiza
Genesis37:22 Mwe kumuhwanya
Genesis37:23 Yozefu ageze aho bene se bari
Genesis37:24 baramufata bamujugunya mu iriba ryakamye.
Genesis37:25 Hanyuma baricara bararya. Bagiye kubona babona umurongo w'Abishimayeli bari baturutse i Gileyadi. Ingamiya zabo zari zihetse indyoshyandyo
Genesis37:26 Nuko Yuda abwira bene se ati: “Kwica murumuna wacu nta cyo byatumarira
Genesis37:27 Nimuze tumugurishe na bariya Bishimayeli
Genesis37:28 Abo bacuruzi b'Abamidiyani (ari bo Bishimayeli) bageze aho
Genesis37:29 Rubeni asubiye ku iriba asanga Yozefu atakirimo
Genesis37:30 Ajya aho bene se bari arababwira ati: “Ndagira nte ko murumuna wacu atagihari?”
Genesis37:31 Hanyuma bene se babaga isekurume y'ihene
Genesis37:32 Bafata iyo kanzu y'igiciro bayoherereza se
Genesis37:33 Yakobo ayibonye arayimenya aravuga ati: “Koko ni iy'umwana wanjye Yozefu! Inyamaswa y'inkazi yaramutanyaguje iramurya!”
Genesis37:34 Yakobo ashishimura imyambaro ye
Genesis37:35 Abahungu be bose n'abakobwa be bose baza kumuhoza
Genesis37:36 Ba Bamidiyani bajyana Yozefu mu Misiri bamugurisha na Potifari wari icyegera cy'umwami wa Misiri
Genesis38:1 Muri icyo gihe
Genesis38:2 Yuda ahabona umukobwa wa Shuwa w'Umunyakanāni aramubengukwa

Genesis38:4 Arongera asama inda abyara undi muhungu
Genesis38:5 Yongera kubyara umuhungu amwita Shela
Genesis38:6 Yuda asabira impfura ye Eri umukobwa witwa Tamari.
Genesis38:7 Eri uwo arapfa azize kugomera Uhoraho.
Genesis38:8 Yuda abwira Onani ati: “Cyura umugore wa mukuru wawe umucikure.”
Genesis38:9 Ariko Onani abonye yuko abana batazamwitirirwa
Genesis38:10 Ibyo yakoraga Uhoraho arabigaya

Genesis38:12 Hashize iminsi
Genesis38:13 Tamari yumvise ko sebukwe agiye i Timuna gukemuza intama ze
Genesis38:14 yambura imyambaro ye y'ubupfakazi
Genesis38:15 Yuda amubonye akeka ko ari indaya kubera ko yari yitwikiriye
Genesis38:16 ntiyamenya ko ari umukazana we. Amusanga iruhande rw'umuhanda aramubwira ati: “Ngwino turyamane.” Aramusubiza ati: “Urampa iki ngo turyamane?”
Genesis38:17 Yuda aramusubiza ati: “Ndakoherereza umwana w'ihene wo mu mukumbi wanjye.” Undi ati: “Ndabyemeye
Genesis38:18 Yuda aramubaza ati: “Ndaguha ngwate ki?” Tamari aramusubiza ati: “Umpe ikashe yawe n'umukufi wayo
Genesis38:19 Maze Tamari asubira iwabo yiyambura cya gitambaro
Genesis38:20 Yuda atuma ya ncuti ye y'Umunyadulamu
Genesis38:21 Ni ko kubaza abaturage ba Enayimu ati: “Ya ndaya yari ku muhanda iri he?” Baramusubiza bati: “Nta ndaya iba ino.”
Genesis38:22 Asubira aho Yuda yari ari aramubwira ati: “Namubuze

Genesis38:24 Hashize nk'amezi atatu umuntu abwira Yuda ati: “Tamari umukazana wawe
Genesis38:25 Bakimusohora Tamari atuma kuri sebukwe ati: “Itegereze iyi kashe n'umukufi wayo n'inkoni
Genesis38:26 Yuda abibonye aravuga ati: “Andushije gutungana. Koko sinamushyingiye umuhungu wanjye Shela.” Yuda ntiyongeye kuryamana na we ukundi.
Genesis38:27 Igihe Tamari yaramukwaga bamenya ko ari bubyare impanga.
Genesis38:28 Igihe cyo kubyara
Genesis38:29 Ariko Gakuru ashubijeyo ikiganza
Genesis38:30 Hanyuma uwo bari baziritse akadodo k'umutuku ku kiganza na we aravuka. Se amwita Zera.

Genesis39:9 Muri uru rugo nta wunduta

Genesis40:14 Ariko ibyawe nibimara gutungana

Genesis40:17 Mu nkangara yo hejuru
Genesis40:18 Yozefu aramubwira ati: “Icyo inzozi zawe zisobanura ni iki: inkangara eshatu ni iminsi itatu.

Genesis40:20 Hashize iminsi itatu

Genesis40:23 Nyamara wa mutware w'abahereza divayi yibagirwa Yozefu.
Genesis41:1 Hashize imyaka ibiri
Genesis41:2 abona hazamutsemo inka ndwi nziza zibyibushye
Genesis41:3 Nuko izindi nka ndwi mbi kandi zinanutse na zo ziva mu ruzi zizikurikiye
Genesis41:4 Izo nka ndwi mbi kandi zinanutse
Genesis41:5 Yongeye gusinzira arota izindi nzozi. Abona amahundo arindwi manini kandi meza ahunze ku gikenyeri kimwe.
Genesis41:6 Maze andi mahundo arindwi y'iminambe

Genesis41:25 Nuko Yozefu abwira umwami ati: “Inzozi zawe ni zimwe. Imana yakweretse ibyo igiye gukora.
Genesis41:26 Za nka ndwi nziza ni imyaka irindwi
Genesis41:27 Naho inka ndwi mbi zinanutse zizikurikiye
Genesis41:28 Nk'uko nabikubwiye

Genesis41:35 Babyegeranye
Genesis41:36 Ibyo bazahunika
Genesis41:37 Iyo nama inyura umwami n'ibyegera bye byose.

Genesis43:2 Ingano bene Yakobo bakuye mu Misiri zishize

Genesis43:4 Nureka tukajyana na murumuna wacu
Genesis43:5 ariko nutamwohereza ntituzajyayo kuko uwo mugabo yatubwiye ati: ‘Ntimuzongere kumpinguka imbere mutazanye na murumuna wanyu.’ ”
Genesis43:6 Yakobo arababaza ati: “Kuki mwampemukiye mukamubwira ko mufite undi muvandimwe?”
Genesis43:7 Baramusubiza bati: “Yatubajije ibibazo by'urudaca ku mibereho yacu bwite no ku miryango yacu ati: ‘So aracyariho? Hari undi muvandimwe mufite?’ Natwe dusubiza ibyo atubajije gusa. Ntitwari kumenya ko azadutegeka kuzana murumuna wacu!”
Genesis43:8 Yuda abwira se ati: “Mpa uyu musore mujyane tubone kugenda
Genesis43:9 Ndamwishingiye uzamumbaze. Nintamugarura ngo mugushyikirize
Genesis43:10 Erega n'ubundi iyo tutikerereza tuba tuvuyeyo kabiri!”
Genesis43:11 Yakobo arababwira ati: “Nta kundi byagenda
Genesis43:12 Ifeza zo guhahisha muzikube kabiri
Genesis43:13 Ngaho nimujyane na murumuna wanyu
Genesis43:14 Imana Nyirububasha izatume uwo mugabo abagirira neza
Genesis43:15 Bene Yakobo bafata ya maturo na za feza
Genesis43:16 Yozefu abonye bazanye na Benyamini
Genesis43:17 Uwo munyanzu abigenza nk'uko abitegetswe

Genesis43:19 Bageze ku muryango babwira wa munyanzu wa Yozefu bati:
Genesis43:20 “Nyakubahwa
Genesis43:21 twageze aho turara dufunguye imifuka yacu
Genesis43:22 kuko tutazi uko zasubiye mu mifuka yacu. Ndetse twazanye n'izindi zo kongera guhahisha.”
Genesis43:23 Arabasubiza ati: “Nimuhumure
Genesis43:24 bose abinjiza mu nzu ya Yozefu. Babaha amazi yo koga ibirenge
Genesis43:25 Bamenye ko Yozefu aza kubazimanira saa sita
Genesis43:26 Yozefu aje bamushyikiriza ya maturo
Genesis43:27 Arababaza ati: “Ni amahoro? Wa musaza so mwambwiye na we ni amahoro? Ese aracyariho?”
Genesis43:28 Baramusubiza bati: “Ni amahoro. Umugaragu wawe data
Genesis43:29 Yozefu abonye mwene nyina Benyamini arababaza ati: “Uyu ni we wa muhererezi wanyu mwambwiye?” Abwira Benyamini ati: “Mwana wanjye
Genesis43:30 Yozefu akivugana na murumuna we agira ikiniga
Genesis43:31 Amaze kwiyuhagira mu maso
Genesis43:32 Yozefu bamugaburira ukwe
