Exodus3:11 Musa abaza Imana ati: “Ndi muntu ki wo guhangara umwami ngo nkure Abisiraheli mu Misiri?”
Exodus3:12 Imana iramusubiza iti: “Nzaba ndi kumwe nawe. Numara gukura ubwoko bwanjye mu Misiri
Exodus3:13 Musa abwira Imana ati: “Ningenda nkabwira Abisiraheli ko Imana ya ba sekuruza yabantumyeho
Exodus3:14 Imana iramusubiza iti: “Ndi uwo ndi we
Exodus3:15 Uzababwire uti: ‘Uhoraho Imana ya ba sokuruza
Exodus3:16 Genda rero ukoranye abakuru b'Abisiraheli
Exodus3:17 none niyemeje kubakura muri ako kaga ko mu Misiri
Exodus3:18 Abakuru b'Abisiraheli bazakumva
Exodus3:19 Nyamara nzi ko uwo mwami atazabemerera kugenda ntaramuvana ku izima.
Exodus3:20 Nzakoresha rero ububasha bwanjye nteze Abanyamisiri ibyago bitangaje. Ni bwo umwami azabareka mukagenda.
Exodus3:21 Ndetse nzatuma Abanyamisiri babareba neza
Exodus3:22 Abisirahelikazi bose bazasange Abanyamisirikazi baturanye n'abo bacumbikiye
Exodus4:1 Musa abaza Uhoraho ati: “None se nibatanyemera ntibite ku byo mvuga ngo ntiwambonekeye?”
Exodus4:2 Uhoraho aramubaza ati: “Icyo ufite mu ntoki ni iki?” Musa aramusubiza ati: “Ni inkoni.”
Exodus4:3 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Yijugunye hasi.” Musa arayijugunya ihinduka inzoka
Exodus4:4 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Rambura ukuboko uyifate umurizo.” Musa arayifata
Exodus4:5 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Uzabigenze utyo kugira ngo Abisiraheli bemere ko Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza
Exodus4:6 Uhoraho arongera aramubwira ati: “Shyira ikiganza mu gituza.” Musa arakihashyira
Exodus4:7 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Subiza ikiganza mu gituza.” Musa agisubizamo
Exodus4:8 Uhoraho ni ko kumubwira ati: “Nibatemezwa n'ikimenyetso cya mbere ngo bakumvire
Exodus4:9 Nibatemezwa n'ibyo bimenyetso byombi ngo bakumvire
Exodus4:10 Ariko Musa abwira Uhoraho ati: “Nyagasani
Exodus4:11 Uhoraho aramubaza ati: “Ni ko ye
Exodus4:12 Ngaho rero genda
Exodus4:13 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
Exodus4:14 Uhoraho asubiza Musa arakaye ati: “Ufite mwene so Aroni w'Umulevi uzi kuvuga neza. Azagusanganira yishimire kukubona.
Exodus4:15 Uzajya umubwira ibyo avuga
Exodus4:16 Azakubera umuvugizi abe nk'umunwa
Exodus4:17 Kandi uzitwaze iyo nkoni kugira ngo uzayikoreshe ibimenyetso.”
Exodus4:18 Nuko Musa asubira kwa sebukwe Yetiro
Exodus4:19 Musa akiri i Midiyani
Exodus4:20 Musa ashyira umugore n'abana ku ndogobe
Exodus4:21 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Dore naguhaye ububasha bwo gukora ibitangaza. Nugera mu Misiri uzabikorere imbere y'umwami. Nanjye nzanangira umutima we
Exodus4:22 Uzamumbwirire uti: ‘Abisiraheli ni umwana wanjye w'impfura
Exodus4:23 narakubwiye ngo umureke ajye kundamya ariko uranga. Ni yo mpamvu ngiye kwica umwana wawe w'impfura.’ ”
Exodus4:24 Bakiri mu rugendo
Exodus4:25 Sipora ni ko gufata ibuye rityaye akeba umuhungu we
Exodus4:26 Nuko Uhoraho aramureka. Sipora yabwiye umugabo we atyo kubera ugukebwa k'umwana we.
Exodus4:27 Hagati aho Uhoraho abwira Aroni ati: “Jya mu butayu usanganire Musa.” Aragenda amusanga ku musozi w'Imana
Exodus4:28 Musa abwira Aroni amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yamutumye
Exodus4:29 Musa na Aroni bajya mu Misiri bakoranya abakuru bose b'Abisiraheli.
Exodus4:30 Nuko Aroni abatekerereza ibyo Uhoraho yari yabwiye Musa byose
Exodus4:31 Abisiraheli baremera
Exodus5:1 Hanyuma Musa na Aroni bajya kubonana n'umwami wa Misiri
Exodus5:2 Umwami arabasubiza ati: “Uhoraho uwo ni nde kugira ngo mbe namwumvira ndeke Abisiraheli bagende? Sinzi Uhoraho
Exodus5:3 Musa na Aroni barongera bati: “Uhoraho ni Imana yacu twebwe Abaheburayi kandi yaratubonekeye
Exodus5:4 Umwami arababaza ati: “Musa na Aroni mwe
Exodus5:5 Tumaze kugira inkoreragahato zihagije none namwe murazibuza gukora!”
Exodus5:6 Uwo munsi
Exodus5:7 “Ntimuzongere kuzanira abantu ibyatsi byo kuvanga n'icyondo babumbisha amatafari nka mbere
Exodus5:8 Mubategeke kubumba umubare w'amatafari nk'uwo bari basanzwe babumba
Exodus5:9 Nimwongēre imirimo y'agahato bakoraga
Exodus5:10 Abo batware n'abahagarikiye imirimo baragenda babwira Abisiraheli bati: “Umwami yavuze ko mutazongera guhabwa ibyatsi
Exodus5:11 ni mwe mugomba kubyishakira kandi nta kintu na gito kizagabanuka ku kazi kanyu.”
Exodus5:12 Nuko Abisiraheli bakwira igihugu cyose cya Misiri bashaka ibyatsi bari bakeneye.
Exodus5:13 Abakoresha babo barabahataga bababwira bati: “Nimubumbe umubare w'amatafari mwategetswe ku munsi
Exodus5:14 Ndetse abo batware b'Abanyamisiri bagakubita Abisiraheli bari bahagarikiye imirimo
Exodus5:15 Abo Bisiraheli bahagarikiye imirimo basanga umwami
Exodus5:16 Abantu bawe ni abagome
Exodus5:17 Arabasubiza ati: “Muri abanebwe bikabije! Ni yo mpamvu mushaka kujya gutambira Uhoraho ibitambo.
Exodus5:18 Hoshi nimusubire ku kazi! Nta byatsi muzahabwa kandi muzajya mubumba amatafari mwategetswe.”
Exodus5:19 Abo Bisiraheli bari bahagarikiye imirimo babona ko bari mu makuba
Exodus5:20 Bavuye ibwami basanga Musa na Aroni babategereje.
Exodus5:21 Babwira Musa na Aroni bati: “Uhoraho abarebe
Exodus5:22 Nuko Musa ajya gutakambira Uhoraho ati: “Nyagasani
Exodus5:23 Kuva nabwira umwami wa Misiri ibyo wantumye
Exodus6:1 Uhoraho asubiza Musa ati: “Ugiye kwirebera icyo nzakorera uwo mwami wa Misiri. Nzamuhata areke Abisiraheli bagende
Exodus6:2 Imana irongera ibwira Musa iti: “Ndi Uhoraho.
Exodus6:3 Nabonekeye Aburahamu na Izaki na Yakobo mbabwira ko nitwa Imana Nyirububasha
Exodus6:4 Nagiranye na bo Isezerano ryo kubaha igihugu cya Kanāni
Exodus6:5 Numvise kandi amaganya y'Abisiraheli bakandamijwe n'Abanyamisiri
Exodus6:6 None genda umbwirire Abisiraheli uti: ‘Ndi Uhoraho. Nzabakura mu mirimo y'agahato mukoreshwa n'Abanyamisiri. Nzabacunguza ububasha bukomeye kandi mpane ababakandamije.
Exodus6:7 Nzabagira ubwoko bwanjye maze mbabere Imana. Muzamenya ko ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Exodus6:8 Nzabajyana mu gihugu narahiye kuzaha Aburahamu na Izaki na Yakobo
Exodus6:9 Nuko Musa abibwira Abisiraheli
Exodus6:10 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Exodus6:11 “Genda ubwire umwami wa Misiri areke Abisiraheli bave mu gihugu cye!”
Exodus6:12 Ariko Musa asubiza Uhoraho ati: “Dore n'Abisiraheli banze kunyumvira
Exodus6:13 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni kujya kureba Abisiraheli n'umwami wa Misiri
Exodus6:14 Dore abatware b'imiryango ya ba sekuruza. Abahungu ba Rubeni impfura ya Yakobo ni Hanoki na Palu
Exodus6:15 Abahungu ba Simeyoni ni Yemuweli na Yamini na Ohadi
Exodus6:16 Abahungu ba Levi ni Gerishoni na Kehati na Merari. Levi yapfuye amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo itatu n'irindwi. Dore amazina y'abakomoka ku bahungu be.
Exodus6:17 Abakomoka kuri Gerishoni ni Libuni na Shimeyi n'imiryango yabo.
Exodus6:18 Abahungu ba Kehati ni Amuramu na Yisehari
Exodus6:19 Abahungu ba Merari ni Mahili na Mushi. Abo ni bo bitiriwe imiryango y'abakomoka kuri Levi.
Exodus6:20 Amuramu arongora nyirasenge Yokebedi
Exodus6:21 Abahungu ba Yisehari ni Kōra na Nefegi na Zikiri.
Exodus6:22 Abahungu ba Uziyeli ni Mishayeli na Elisafani na Sitiri.
Exodus6:23 Aroni arongora Elisheba umukobwa wa Aminadabu akaba na mushiki wa Nahasoni
Exodus6:24 Abahungu ba Kōra ni Asiri na Elikana na Abiyasafu. Abo ni bo bitiriwe imiryango y'abakomoka kuri Kōra.
Exodus6:25 Eleyazari mwene Aroni arongora umwe mu bakobwa ba Putiyeli
Exodus6:26 Aroni na Musa ni bo Uhoraho yategetse gukura y'Abisiraheli mu gihugu cya Misiri
Exodus6:27 Ni na bo babwiye umwami wa Misiri ngo areke Abisiraheli bagende.
Exodus6:28 Igihe Uhoraho yavuganiraga na Musa mu Misiri
Exodus6:29 yaramubwiye ati: “Ndi Uhoraho. Ubwire umwami wa Misiri icyo ngutuma cyose.”
Exodus6:30 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Umwami yanyumva ate kandi ntazi kuvuga neza?”
Exodus7:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Nk'uko mvugira mu kanwa k'abahanuzi banjye
Exodus7:2 Uzabwira Aroni ibyo nzagutegeka byose na we abibwire umwami wa Misiri
Exodus7:3 Nanjye nzanangira umutima w'umwami
Exodus7:4 Umwami ntazabitaho
Exodus7:5 Ubwo ni bwo Abanyamisiri bazamenya Uhoraho uwo ari we.”
Exodus7:6 Musa na Aroni babigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yabibategetse.
Exodus7:7 Igihe bavuganaga n'umwami wa Misiri
Exodus7:8 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni ati:
Exodus7:9 “Umwami wa Misiri nababwira gukora igitangaza
Exodus7:10 Musa na Aroni basanga umwami bakora uko Uhoraho yabibategetse. Aroni ajugunya inkoni ye imbere y'umwami n'ibyegera bye
Exodus7:11 Nuko umwami ahamagaza abanyabwenge n'abashitsi n'abanyabugenge bo mu Misiri
Exodus7:12 Bose bajugunya inkoni zabo hasi zihinduka inzoka
Exodus7:13 Nyamara umwami arinangira
Exodus7:14 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Dore umwami wa Misiri yinangiye yanga kureka ubwoko bwanjye ngo bugende.
Exodus7:15 Ejo umwami azajya ku ruzi rwa Nili
Exodus7:16 Uzamubwire uti: ‘Uhoraho Imana y'Abaheburayi yakuntumyeho ngo ureke ubwoko bwe bujye mu butayu kumuramya
Exodus7:17 None dore ibizakumenyesha Uhoraho uwo ari we: iyi nkoni nitwaje ngiye kuyikubitisha aya mazi ya Nili
Exodus7:18 Amafi yo mu ruzi azapfa
Exodus7:19 Uhoraho arongera abwira Musa ati: “Uzabwire Aroni afate inkoni ye ayitunge ku mazi yo mu Misiri
Exodus7:20 Musa na Aroni bagenza uko Uhoraho yabategetse. Musa abangura inkoni ye akubitira amazi ya Nili imbere y'umwami n'ibyegera bye. Amazi yose ya Nili ahinduka amaraso.
Exodus7:21 Amafi yo mu ruzi arapfa
Exodus7:22 Ariko abanyabugenge bo mu Misiri na bo babigenza batyo bakoresheje ubugenge bwabo
Exodus7:23 Umwami aritahira nk'aho ari nta cyabaye!
Exodus7:24 Abanyamisiri bose bafukura mu mpande za Nili bashaka amazi yo kunywa
Exodus7:25 Amazi ya Misiri amaze guhinduka amaraso
Exodus7:26 Hanyuma Uhoraho atuma Musa ngo abwire umwami ati: “Reka ubwoko bwanjye bujye kundamya.
Exodus7:27 Niba ugikomeje kwanga kuburekura
Exodus7:28 Uruzi rwa Nili ruzuzura ibikeri
Exodus7:29 ndetse bizakuzuraho byuzure no ku byegera byawe no kuri rubanda.”
Exodus8:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa ngo abwire Aroni ati: “Rambura ukuboko utunge inkoni yawe ku migezi no ku miyoboro no ku bidendezi
Exodus8:2 Nuko Aroni arambura ukuboko agutunga ku mazi yo mu Misiri
Exodus8:3 Ariko abanyabugenge bakoresheje ubugenge bwabo
Exodus8:4 Umwami ahamagaza Musa na Aroni
Exodus8:5 Musa abwira umwami ati: “Ndemera kukwingingira Uhoraho
Exodus8:6 Aramusubiza ati: “Uzabikore ejo.” Musa aramubwira ati: “Nzabikora kugira ngo umenye ko nta wuhwanye n'Uhoraho Imana yacu.
Exodus8:7 Ibikeri bizava mu mazu yanyu no ku byegera byawe no ku bantu bawe
Exodus8:8 Musa na Aroni bava ibwami. Musa yinginga Uhoraho ngo akize umwami ibikeri yatejwe.
Exodus8:9 Uhoraho akora ibyo Musa yari amusabye
Exodus8:10 Babirunda ibirundo n'ibirundo
Exodus8:11 Umwami wa Misiri abonye habonetse agahenge arinangira
Exodus8:12 Uhoraho ategeka Musa ngo abwire Aroni ati: “Fata inkoni yawe uyikubite hasi
Exodus8:13 Nuko Aroni akubita inkoni ye hasi
Exodus8:14 Abanyabugenge na bo bakoresha ubugenge bwabo bagerageza guhindura umukungugu inda
Exodus8:15 Abanyabugenge babwira umwami bati: “Ibi byo byakozwe n'Imana!” Nyamara akomeza kwinangira
Exodus8:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Ejo umwami azajya ku ruzi
Exodus8:17 Nutabureka ngo bugende nzaguteza ibibugu
Exodus8:18 Ariko sinzatuma bigera mu ntara ya Gosheni kuko ari ho ubwoko bwanjye butuye
Exodus8:19 Nzahagarara ku bwoko bwanjye naho ubwawe mbureke. Icyo kimenyetso kizabaho ejo.’ ”
Exodus8:20 Uhoraho abigenza nk'uko yabivuze. Ibibugu byinshi cyane byinjira mu ngoro y'umwami no mu mazu y'ibyegera bye
Exodus8:21 Umwami ahamagaza Musa na Aroni arababwira ati: “Nimugende mujye gutambira Imana yanyu ibitambo
Exodus8:22 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Ntidushobora kugenza dutyo
Exodus8:23 Tuzajya mu butayu ahantu h'urugendo rw'iminsi itatu
Exodus8:24 Umwami arabasubiza ati: “Nzabareka mujye mu butayu gutambirira Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibitambo
Exodus8:25 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Nkimara kuva hano ndasaba Uhoraho
Exodus8:26 Musa ava ibwami ajya kwambaza Uhoraho.
Exodus8:27 Uhoraho akora ibyo Musa yamusabye
Exodus8:28 Ubwo na bwo umwami wa Misiri yongera kwinangira
Exodus9:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa kujya kubwira umwami ati: “Uhoraho Imana y'Abaheburayi aravuze ati: ‘Reka ubwoko bwanjye bujye kundamya.’
Exodus9:2 Niwanga ko bugenda ugakomeza kubukumira
Exodus9:3 Uhoraho azateza icyorezo gikomeye amatungo yawe: amafarasi n'indogobe n'ingamiya
Exodus9:4 Icyo cyorezo kizagera ku matungo y'Abanyamisiri
Exodus9:5 Uhoraho yavuze igihe bizabera ati: ‘Ejo ni ho nzabikora mu gihugu cyawe.’ ”
Exodus9:6 Bukeye Uhoraho akora ibyo yavuze
Exodus9:7 Umwami agenzuye asanga mu matungo y'Abisiraheli nta na rimwe ryapfuye. Ariko akomeza kwinangira
Exodus9:8 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni ati: “Nimujyane umurayi wo mu itanura wuzuye amashyi
Exodus9:9 Uwo murayi uzatumuka nk'umukungugu ukwire mu Misiri hose
Exodus9:10 Musa na Aroni bajyana umurayi wo mu itanura
Exodus9:11 Nuko abanyabugenge ntibashobora kongera guhangana na Musa
Exodus9:12 Ariko Uhoraho anangira umutima w'umwami ntiyita kuri Musa na Aroni. Byagenze nk'uko Uhoraho yari yabibwiye Musa.
Exodus9:13 Uhoraho abwira Musa ngo azinduke ajye kubwira umwami ati: “Uhoraho Imana y'Abaheburayi aravuze ati: ‘Reka ubwoko bwanjye bujye kundamya.
Exodus9:14 Naho ubundi wowe n'ibyegera byawe n'abantu bawe
Exodus9:15 Mba naraguteje indwara ikakurimburana n'abantu bawe
Exodus9:16 ariko narakwihoreye kugira ngo nkwereke imbaraga zanjye
Exodus9:17 Nyamara urakomeza kubuza ubwoko bwanjye kugenda.
Exodus9:18 Ni cyo gituma ejo nk'iki gihe nzagusha urubura rukaze
Exodus9:19 None ubwire abantu bacyure amatungo yawe n'ibyo ufite hanze byose
Exodus9:20 Bamwe mu byegera by'umwami bumvise ijambo ry'Uhoraho baratinya
Exodus9:21 Naho abatitaye ku ijambo ry'Uhoraho
Exodus9:22 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Tunga ukuboko kwawe ku ijuru
Exodus9:23 Musa atunga inkoni ye ku ijuru maze Uhoraho ahindisha inkuba
Exodus9:24 Hagwa urubura rukomeye ruvanze n'imirabyo myinshi
Exodus9:25 Mu gihugu cyose urubura rwica ibyari hanze byose
Exodus9:26 Mu ntara ya Gosheni yari ituwe n'Abisiraheli ni ho honyine urubura rutaguye.
Exodus9:27 Umwami wa Misiri ahamagaza Musa na Aroni arababwira ati: “Ubu bwo nacumuye
Exodus9:28 None nimunsabire Uhoraho arekere aho gukubitisha inkuba no kugusha urubura
Exodus9:29 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Nimara kuva mu mujyi ndasenga Uhoraho mutegeye amaboko
Exodus9:30 Nyamara nzi ko wowe n'ibyegera byawe mutarubaha Uhoraho Imana.”
Exodus9:31 Urubura rwononnye ibimera bivamo ubudodo byari bifite uruyange
Exodus9:32 Ariko izindi ngano zitinda kwera nta cyo zabaye.
Exodus9:33 Musa ava ibwami asohoka mu mujyi maze asenga Uhoraho amutegeye amaboko
Exodus9:34 Umwami abonye ko nta mvura n'inkuba n'urubura bikiriho
Exodus9:35 ntiyareka Abisiraheli ngo bagende. Byagenze nk'uko Uhoraho yatumye Musa.
Exodus10:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Subira ibwami kuko ari jye wanangiye umutima w'umwami n'uw'ibyegera bye
Exodus10:2 Bityo muzatekerereze abana banyu n'abuzukuru banyu
Exodus10:3 Musa na Aroni basanga umwami baramubwira bati: “Uhoraho Imana y'Abaheburayi aravuze ati: ‘Uzageza ryari kwanga kwicisha bugufi imbere yanjye? Reka ubwoko bwanjye bujye kundamya.
Exodus10:4 Nukomeza kwanga kurekura ubwoko bwanjye
Exodus10:5 Zizazimagiza ubutaka ku buryo butazagaragara. Zizarya ibyasigaye bitangijwe n'urubura
Exodus10:6 Zizuzura mu mazu yawe n'ay'ibyegera byawe byose
Exodus10:7 Ibyegera by'umwami biramubwira biti: “Uriya mugabo azakomeza kuduteza ibyago kugeza ryari? Reka abagabo b'Abisiraheli bajye kuramya Uhoraho Imana yabo. Ese nturamenya ko Misiri yarimbutse?”
Exodus10:8 Umwami ahamagaza Musa na Aroni
Exodus10:9 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Tuzajyana n'abana bacu n'abasaza bacu
Exodus10:10 Arababwira ati: “Ayo mahirwe mwayakura he ngo mbareke mwijyanire n'abana banyu? Biraboneka ko mufite imigambi mibi!
Exodus10:11 Ntabwo mbemerera. Nihagende abagabo bonyine baramye Uhoraho kuko ari cyo mwasabye.” Nuko birukana Musa na Aroni ibwami.
Exodus10:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Ramburira ukoboko kwawe ku gihugu cya Misiri
Exodus10:13 Musa aramburira inkoni ye ku gihugu cya Misiri
Exodus10:14 zuzura uturere twose twa Misiri. Inzige zingana zityo ntizigeze zigwa mbere y'icyo gihe
Exodus10:15 Izo nzige zizimagiza ubutaka bwose burijima
Exodus10:16 Bidatinze umwami wa Misiri atumiza Musa na Aroni
Exodus10:17 None mwongere mumbabarire igicumuro cyanjye. Nimunsabire Uhoraho Imana yanyu ankize iki cyorezo.”
Exodus10:18 Nuko Musa ava ibwami
Exodus10:19 Uhoraho atuma umuyaga w'inkubi uturutse iburengerazuba
Exodus10:20 Ariko Uhoraho akomeza kunangira umutima w'umwami wa Misiri
Exodus10:21 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Tunga ukuboko kwawe ku ijuru hacure umwijima mu Misiri
Exodus10:22 Musa atunga ukuboko kwe ku ijuru
Exodus10:23 Mu minsi itatu ntihagira ubasha kureba mugenzi we cyangwa ngo ave aho ari
Exodus10:24 Umwami ahamagaza Musa aramubwira ati: “Nimugende mujye kuramya Uhoraho mujyane n'abana banyu
Exodus10:25 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Ntidushobora kugenda tudafite amatungo yo gutambira Uhoraho Imana yacu ibitambo bisanzwe n'ibikongorwa n'umuriro.
Exodus10:26 Amatungo yacu yose tuzayajyana tudasize na rimwe
Exodus10:27 Ariko Uhoraho anangira umutima w'umwami
Exodus10:28 Umwami abwira Musa ati: “Mva mu maso! Ntuzongere kumpinguka imbere. Umunsi wagarutse aha nzakwica!”
Exodus10:29 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Ibyo uvuze ni byo koko. Sinzongera kuguhinguka imbere.”
Exodus11:1 Uhoraho yari yarabwiye Musa ati: “Ngiye guteza umwami wa Misiri n'abaturage be icyago cya nyuma. Ni bwo azabareka mugende
Exodus11:2 None bwira Abisiraheli ari umugabo ari umugore asabe umuturanyi we
Exodus11:3 Nuko Uhoraho atuma Abanyamisiri bareba neza Abisiraheli
Exodus11:4 Musa akomeza kubwira umwami ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Mu gicuku ndahita mu Misiri
Exodus11:5 abana b'abahungu b'impfura bose bapfe
Exodus11:6 Igihugu cya Misiri cyose kizacura umuborogo
Exodus11:7 Ariko mu Bisiraheli
Exodus11:8 Ibi byegera byawe byose bizansanga bimpfukamire
Exodus11:9 Uhoraho yari yarabwiye Musa ati: “Umwami wa Misiri ntazita ku byo muzavuga
Exodus11:10 Musa na Aroni bakoreye ibyo bitangaza byose imbere y'umwami
Exodus12:1 Musa na Aroni bakiri mu Misiri
Exodus12:2 “Uku kwezi ni ko kuzababera ukwa mbere k'umwaka.
Exodus12:3 Mubwire Abisiraheli ko ku itariki ya cumi y'uku kwezi
Exodus12:4 Niba abo mu rugo rumwe ari bake ku buryo badashobora kumara iryo tungo
Exodus12:5 Bazahitemo isekurume y'intama cyangwa y'ihene itarengeje umwaka
Exodus12:6 Bazayigumane kugeza ku itariki ya cumi na kane y'uku kwezi. Ku mugoroba w'uwo munsi Abisiraheli bose bazice ayo masekurume.
Exodus12:7 Bazafate ku maraso bayasīge ku mpande zose z'ibizingiti by'umuryango wa buri nzu
Exodus12:8 Iryo joro bazarye inyama zokeje
Exodus12:9 Ntibazarye inyama mbisi cyangwa zitetse
Exodus12:10 Ntibazagire inyama baraza
Exodus12:11 Bazazirye biteguye kugenda. Bazabe bakenyeye
Exodus12:12 “Iryo joro nzahita mu Misiri nice abahungu bose b'impfura
Exodus12:13 Amaraso muzasīga ku miryango azagaragaza amazu muzaba murimo. Nimbona ayo maraso nzabahitaho he kugira icyorezo kibageraho
Exodus12:14 Uwo munsi uzababere umunsi mukuru w'urwibutso rw'ibyo jyewe Uhoraho nabakoreye. Muzajye muwizihiza uko ibihe bihaye ibindi
Exodus12:15 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Uwo munsi muzakure umusemburo wose mu mazu yanyu
Exodus12:16 Ku munsi wa mbere no ku wa karindwi w'icyo cyumweru
Exodus12:17 “Muzajye mwizihiza iminsi mikuru y'imigati idasembuye
Exodus12:18 Kuva ku itariki ya cumi na kane y'ukwezi kwa mbere nimugoroba
Exodus12:19 Muri iyo minsi irindwi muzakure umusemburo wose mu mazu yanyu
Exodus12:20 Ntimuzarye rero imigati isembuye
Exodus12:21 Musa akoranya abakuru bose b'Abisiraheli
Exodus12:22 Amaraso yayo muyaregereze mu rweso
Exodus12:23 Uhoraho naza kwica Abanyamisiri akabona amaraso ku bizingiti by'imiryango yanyu
Exodus12:24 Mwebwe n'abazabakomokaho
Exodus12:25 Nimumara kugera mu gihugu Uhoraho yabasezeranyije
Exodus12:26 Abana banyu nibababaza bati: ‘Uwo muhango mukora usobanura iki?’
Exodus12:27 muzabasubize muti: ‘Turatambira Uhoraho igitambo cya Pasika
Exodus12:28 hanyuma baragenda. Abisiraheli babigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yategetse Musa na Aroni.
Exodus12:29 Mu gicuku Uhoraho yica abana b'impfura bose b'Abanyamisiri
Exodus12:30 Iryo joro umwami wa Misiri n'ibyegera bye ndetse n'Abanyamisiri bose barabyuka
Exodus12:31 Butaracya umwami ahamagaza Musa na Aroni
Exodus12:32 Nimujyane n'imikumbi yanyu n'amashyo yanyu nk'uko mubyifuza
Exodus12:33 Abanyamisiri bashushubikanya Abisiraheli ngo babavire mu gihugu
Exodus12:34 Abisiraheli bafata amapanu yariho imigati idasembuye bari batangiye gutegura
Exodus12:35 Abisiraheli bari bagenje nk'uko Musa yababwiye
Exodus12:36 Uhoraho yatumye Abanyamisiri bareba neza Abisiraheli
Exodus12:37 Abisiraheli bavuye i Ramesesi bataha i Sukoti bagenda n'amaguru. Bari nk'ibihumbi magana atandatu hatabariwemo abagore n'abana
Exodus12:38 bajyana n'imikumbi myinshi n'amashyo menshi. Abantu benshi b'amoko atari amwe bajyana na bo.
Exodus12:39 Ya mitsima bari batangiye gutegura bakiri mu Misiri
Exodus12:40 Abisiraheli bamaze mu Misiri imyaka magana ane na mirongo itatu.
Exodus12:41 Umunsi uheruka w'iyo myaka magana ane na mirongo itatu
Exodus12:42 Ijoro ryabanjirije ukuvanwa mu Misiri kw'Abisiraheli

Exodus12:44 Niba mufite inkoreragahato mwaguze ikaba yarakebwe
Exodus12:45 Umunyamahanga utuye muri mwe

Exodus12:47 Ubwoko bwose bw'Abisiraheli bujye bwizihiza Pasika.

Exodus21:1 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa ati: “Dore andi mabwiriza uzabaha:
Exodus21:2 “Nimugura inkoreragahato y'Umuheburayi izabakorere imyaka itandatu
Exodus21:3 Niba mwarayiguze ari ingaragu izagende yonyine
Exodus21:4 Niba ari shebuja wayishyingiye ikahabyarira abahungu cyangwa abakobwa
Exodus21:5 Ariko inkoreragahato nivuga iti: ‘Nkunda databuja n'umugore wanjye n'abana banjye sinshaka kubasiga’
Exodus21:6 shebuja azayijyane imbere y'abacamanza
Exodus21:7 “Umuntu nagurisha umukobwa we ngo abe umuja
Exodus21:8 Umuja nadashimisha shebuja ngo abe yamurongora
Exodus21:9 Namugurira kumushyingira umuhungu we
Exodus21:10 Umuntu naharika umuja
Exodus21:11 Natamukorera ibyo bintu uko ari bitatu
Exodus21:12 “Umuntu nakubita undi agapfa
Exodus21:13 Ariko namwica bimugwiririye kubera ko namukuyeho amaboko
Exodus21:14 Nyamara namurakarira akamwica yabigambiriye
Exodus21:15 “Umuntu nakubita se cyangwa nyina
Exodus21:16 “Umuntu nashimuta undi akamugurisha cyangwa akamugira inkoreragahato ye
Exodus21:17 “Umuntu navuma se cyangwa nyina
Exodus21:18 “Abantu nibatongana hakagira uterwa ibuye cyangwa ukubitwa ikofe ariko ntapfe
Exodus21:19 
Exodus21:20 “Umuntu nakubita inkoreragahato ye cyangwa umuja we inkoni akamwica
Exodus21:21 Ariko uwakubiswe namara umunsi umwe cyangwa ibiri atarapfa
Exodus21:22 “Abantu nibarwana bagahutaza umugore utwite akabyara atagejeje igihe ariko ntagire ikindi aba
Exodus21:23 Ariko nihagira izindi ngorane ziba
Exodus21:24 umennye undi ijisho ajye ahanishwa kumenwa ijisho
Exodus21:25 uwokeje undi ajye ahanishwa kotswa
Exodus21:26 “Umuntu nakubita inkoreragahato ye cyangwa umuja we akamumena ijisho
Exodus21:27 Niba ari iryinyo ry'inkoreragahato ye cyangwa iry'umuja we yakuye
Exodus21:28 “Impfizi niyica umugabo cyangwa umugore agapfa
Exodus21:29 Ariko niba hari impfizi isanzwe yica
Exodus21:30 Nibamwaka indishyi kugira ngo batamwica
Exodus21:31 Impfizi niyica umwana w'umuhungu cyangwa w'umukobwa
Exodus21:32 Niyica inkoreragahato cyangwa umuja
Exodus21:33 “Umuntu napfundura icyobo cyangwa akagicukura ntagipfundikire
Exodus21:34 nyir'icyo cyobo azahe nyir'itungo indishyi z'ifeza
Exodus21:35 “Impfizi y'umuntu niyica iy'undi igapfa
Exodus21:36 Icyakora niba byari bizwi yuko iyo mpfizi yari isanzwe yica
Exodus21:37 “Umuntu niyiba itungo akaribaga cyangwa akarigurisha
Exodus22:1 “Umujura napfumura inzu nijoro agafatwa akicwa
Exodus22:2 Ariko niyicwa ku manywa
Exodus22:3 Umujura niyiba inka cyangwa indogobe cyangwa intama cyangwa ihene
Exodus22:4 “Umuntu niyonesha umurima cyangwa imizabibu by'undi
Exodus22:5 “Umuntu nacana umuriro ugafata uruzitiro rw'amahwa
Exodus22:6 “Umuntu nabitsa mugenzi we ifeza cyangwa ibindi bintu bikibirwa iwe
Exodus22:7 Umujura nataboneka
Exodus22:8 Ku byerekeye imanza z'amahugu zose
Exodus22:9 “Umuntu naragiza undi itungo iryo ari ryo ryose
Exodus22:10 icyo kibazo kizakemurwe gitya: uwariragiye azarahire mu izina ry'Uhoraho ko nta cyo yatwaye itungo rya mugenzi we. Nyiraryo azabyemere
Exodus22:11 Ariko niryibirwa iwe
Exodus22:12 Niritanyagurwa n'inyamaswa
Exodus22:13 “Umuntu natira undi itungo rigakomereka cyangwa rigapfa nyiraryo adahari
Exodus22:14 Ariko nirikomereka cyangwa niripfa nyiraryo ahari
Exodus22:15 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa ati: “Umugabo nashuka umwari utarasabwa akaryamana na we
Exodus22:16 Nubwo se yakwanga kumumushyingira
Exodus22:17 “Umunyabugengekazi azicwe.
Exodus22:18 “Uzaryamana n'itungo azicwe.
Exodus22:19 “Uzatambira ibitambo izindi mana zitari jyewe Uhoraho
Exodus22:20 “Ntimukagirire nabi umunyamahanga utuye muri mwe ngo mumukandamize
Exodus22:21 Ntimukarenganye umupfakazi n'impfubyi.
Exodus22:22 Nimubarenganya bakantakira nzabumva
Exodus22:23 naho mwe mbarakarire ntume mugwa mu ntambara
Exodus22:24 “Nimuguriza umukene wo mu bwoko bwanjye
Exodus22:25 Nufata bugwate umwambaro w'undi muntu uzawumusubize izuba ritararenga
Exodus22:26 kuko ari wo wonyine afite wo kwifubika. Nawubura aziyorosa iki? Nantakira nzamugoboka kuko ndi umunyampuhwe.
Exodus22:27 “Ntugatuke Imana kandi ntukavume umutware w'ubwoko bwawe.
Exodus22:28 “Ntugatinde kuntura umuganura. “Uzanture umuhungu wawe w'impfura
Exodus22:29 uzabigenze utyo no ku buriza bw'amatungo yawe. Buzagumane na nyina iminsi irindwi
Exodus22:30 “Muzambere abaziranenge. “Ntimuzarye inyama z'itungo ryishwe n'inyamaswa
Exodus23:1 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Ntugakwize impuha z'ibinyoma. Ntugashyigikire abagome ngo uhamye ibitari ukuri.
Exodus23:2 Ntugakore ibibi witwaje gukurikira abenshi
Exodus23:3 Ntukabere umuntu witwaje ko ari umukene.
Exodus23:4 “Nuhura n'inka cyangwa indogobe y'umwanzi wawe yazimiye
Exodus23:5 Nusanga umwanzi wawe afite indogobe yagwanye umutwaro ntuzamutererane
Exodus23:6 “Ntukagoreke urubanza rw'umukene.
Exodus23:7 Ntukivange mu birego by'ibinyoma
Exodus23:8 Ntukakire ruswa
Exodus23:9 “Ntimugakandamize abanyamahanga batuye muri mwe
Exodus23:10 “Mu myaka itandatu ujye ubiba usarure
Exodus23:11 ariko mu wa karindwi ujye uraza imirima
Exodus23:12 “Ufite iminsi itandatu mu cyumweru yo gukora imirimo yawe
Exodus23:13 “Mujye mukora ibyo mbategetse byose
Exodus23:14 “Uko umwaka utashye
Exodus23:15 Mu kwezi kwa Abibu
Exodus23:16 Kandi mujye mwizihiza iminsi mikuru y'isarura rya mbere
Exodus23:17 Muri izo ncuro eshatu
Exodus23:18 Muri iyo minsi mikuru
Exodus23:19 “Umuganura w'ibyo musaruye mujye muwuzana mu Nzu yanjye
Exodus23:20 “Ngiye kohereza umumarayika abagende imbere abarinde mu rugendo
Exodus23:21 Muzite ku byo ababwira mumwumvire
Exodus23:22 Nimumwumvira mugakora ibyo mbabwira byose
Exodus23:23 Umumarayika wanjye azabajya imbere abageze mu gihugu cy'Abamori n'Abaheti n'Abaperizi
Exodus23:24 Icyakora ntimuzapfukamire ibigirwamana byabo ngo mubisenge
Exodus23:25 Ni jyewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu muzasenga jyenyine
Exodus23:26 mu gihugu cyanyu. Nta mugore uzakuramo inda cyangwa ngo abe ingumba
Exodus23:27 “Aho muzaba mugiye kunyura hose
Exodus23:28 Nzohereza amavubi abajye imbere yirukane Abahivi n'Abanyakanāni n'Abaheti.
Exodus23:29 Icyakora sinzabirukanira icyarimwe kugira ngo igihugu kitazahinduka ishyamba
Exodus23:30 Nzajya mbirukana buhoro buhoro kugeza igihe muzagwira mukazungura igihugu cyose.
Exodus23:31 Imbibi zacyo ni uguhera ku Nyanja Itukura ukageza ku Nyanja ya Mediterane
Exodus23:32 Ntimukagirane amasezerano na bo cyangwa n'ibigirwamana basenga.
Exodus23:33 Ntimuzabemerere kuguma mu gihugu cyanyu batazabatera kuncumuraho
Exodus24:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Zamuka unsange wowe na Aroni na Nadabu na Abihu
Exodus24:2 Wowe wenyine ushobora kunyegera. Bagenzi bawe basigare aho
Exodus24:3 Musa asanga abantu ababwira amagambo yose Uhoraho yavuze n'amategeko yatanze. Abantu bose bamusubiriza icyarimwe bati: “Ibyo Uhoraho yategetse byose tuzabikurikiza.”
Exodus24:4 Musa yandika amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yamubwiye. Bukeye azinduka ajya kubaka urutambiro munsi y'umusozi wa Sinayi
Exodus24:5 Ategeka abasore gutambira Uhoraho ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Exodus24:6 Amaraso yabyo Musa ayagabanyamo kabiri
Exodus24:7 Afata igitabo yari amaze kwandikamo Isezerano
Exodus24:8 Musa afata amaraso yo mu nzabya ayamisha ku bantu
Exodus24:9 Nuko Musa azamukana na Aroni na Nadabu na Abihu
Exodus24:10 babona Imana ya Isiraheli. Aho yari ihagaze hari hameze nk'ahashashwe ibuye rya safiro
Exodus24:11 Abo bayobozi b'Abisiraheli barebye Imana ntiyagira icyo ibatwara
Exodus24:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Zamuka unsange mu mpinga kandi uhagume. Nzaguha ibisate by'amabuye nanditseho Amategeko n'amabwiriza yo kwigisha Abisiraheli.”
Exodus24:13 Musa azamuka ku musozi w'Imana aherekejwe n'umufasha we Yozuwe.
Exodus24:14 Yasize abwiye abakuru b'Abisiraheli ati: “Nimudutegerereze hano kugeza igihe tuzagarukira
Exodus24:15 Musa akizamuka umusozi igicu kirawubundikira
Exodus24:16 ikuzo ry'Uhoraho riboneka kuri uwo musozi wa Sinayi rirahaguma
Exodus24:17 Ku Bisiraheli
Exodus24:18 Musa agera mu mpinga atwikiriwe n'igicu
Exodus25:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Exodus25:2 “Bwira Abisiraheli bampe umusanzu. Muzakire ikintu cyose bazabahana umutima mwiza
Exodus25:3 yaba izahabu cyangwa ifeza cyangwa umuringa.
Exodus25:4 Muzakire imyenda y'isine n'iy'umuhemba n'iy'umutuku
Exodus25:5 Muzakire impu z'intama zizigishijwe ibara ry'umutuku cyangwa izindi mpu z'agaciro
Exodus25:6 n'amavuta acanwa mu matara
Exodus25:7 Muzakire amabuye ya onigisi n'andi mabuye y'agaciro yo gutāka igishura cy'Umutambyi mukuru
Exodus25:8 Muzanyubakire Ihema kugira ngo nture hagati muri mwe.
Exodus25:9 Muzaryubake mushyiremo n'ibikoresho byaryo
Exodus25:10 “Muzabāze Isanduku mu mbaho z'iminyinya
Exodus25:11 Muzayomekeho izahabu inoze imbere n'inyuma
Exodus25:12 Muzayicurire ibifunga bine by'izahabu mubishyire mu nguni enye zo munsi y'Isanduku
Exodus25:13 Muzabāze imijishi mu biti by'iminyinya muyomekeho izahabu
Exodus25:14 maze muyinjize mu bifunga by'Isanduku kugira ngo mushobore kuyiheka.
Exodus25:15 Nimumara kuyinjizamo ntimuzayikuremo ukundi.
Exodus25:16 Muri iyo Sanduku muzashyiremo ibisate by'amabuye byanditsweho Amategeko nzaguha.
Exodus25:17 “Muzacure mu izahabu inoze igipfundikizo cyayo. Kizabe gifite uburebure bwa metero imwe na santimetero icumi
Exodus25:18 Muzacure abakerubi babiri mu izahabu
Exodus25:19 kandi bombi bazabe bafatanye na cyo.
Exodus25:20 Bazabe berekeranye
Exodus25:21 Nimumara gushyira bya bisate mu Isanduku
Exodus25:22 Aho ngaho ku gipfundikizo hagati y'abakerubi bombi
Exodus25:23 “Muzabāze ameza mu mbaho z'iminyinya
Exodus25:24 Muzayomekeho izahabu inoze
Exodus25:25 Muzayazengurutse umutambiko ufite ubugari bwa santimetero umunani
Exodus25:26 Muzayakorere ibifunga bine by'izahabu
Exodus25:27 ahegereye umutambiko. Ibyo bifunga ni byo muzinjizamo imijishi
Exodus25:28 Iyo mijishi yo kuyaheka muzayibāze mu biti by'iminyinya
Exodus25:29 Muzacure mu izahabu inoze ibikoresho byo kuri ayo meza: amasahani n'ibikombe n'utubindi n'inzabya
Exodus25:30 Kuri ayo meza mujye mushyiraho n'imigati yantuwe
Exodus25:31 “Muzacure igitereko cy'amatara mu izahabu inoze. Kizabe kigizwe n'indiba n'igihimba
Exodus25:32 Amashami atandatu azabe ashamikiye ku gihimba
Exodus25:33 Buri shami rizabe rifite amapfundo atatu n'indabyo eshatu
Exodus25:34 Ku gihimba muzashyireho amapfundo n'indabyo enye
Exodus25:35 Muzashyire ipfundo munsi ya buri mashami abiri abiri agize ibyiciro bitatu.
Exodus25:36 Amapfundo n'amashami by'igitereko byose
Exodus25:37 Muzacure n'amatara arindwi maze muyashyire ku gitereko
Exodus25:38 Ibikoresho byo kuyacana no kuyazimya n'isahani yo kubishyiraho
Exodus25:39 Icyo gitereko n'ibigendana na cyo byose
Exodus25:40 Wowe rero Musa
Exodus26:1 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa ati: “Muzanyubakire Ihema. Muzadode imyenda icumi yo kumanikamo. Izabe iboshye mu budodo bw'umweru bukaraze no mu bw'isine
Exodus26:2 Buri mwenda uzabe ufite uburebure bwa metero cumi n'ebyiri
Exodus26:3 Imyenda itanu muzayifatanye ukwayo
Exodus26:4 Ku musozo umwe wa buri mwenda munini muzaba mumaze gufatanya
Exodus26:5 
Exodus26:6 Ku musozo wundi wa buri mwenda
Exodus26:7 “Hanyuma muzabohe mu bwoya bw'ihene imyenda cumi n'umwe yo gusakara iryo Hema.
Exodus26:8 Buri mwenda uzaba ufite metero cumi n'eshatu
Exodus26:9 Muzabanze mufatanye imyenda itanu ukwayo
Exodus26:10 Muzashyire udukondo mirongo itanu ku musozo umwe wa buri mwenda munini.
Exodus26:11 Muzacure mu muringa udukonzo mirongo itanu mudutere ku wundi musozo wa buri mwenda munini
Exodus26:12 Igice cy'umwenda gisaguka
Exodus26:13 Ku mpande zose
Exodus26:14 Hejuru y'uwo mwenda muzasakazeho impu z'intama zizigishijwe ibara ry'umutuku
Exodus26:15 “Muzabāze mu mbaho z'iminyinya ibizingiti by'Ihema.
Exodus26:16 Buri kizingiti kizabe gifite uburebure bwa metero enye
Exodus26:17 muzagishyireho amaguru abiri.
Exodus26:18 Muzabāze ibizingiti makumyabiri mubishyire mu ruhande rw'amajyepfo
Exodus26:19 kandi muzacure mu ifeza ibirenge mirongo ine byo gushingamo ibyo bizingiti. Buri kizingiti gishingwe mu birenge bibiri bikurikije amaguru yacyo.
Exodus26:20 Muzabāze n'ibindi bizingiti makumyabiri mubishyire mu ruhande rw'amajyaruguru.
Exodus26:21 Muzacure mu ifeza n'ibirenge mirongo ine byo kubishingamo.
Exodus26:22 Muzabāze ibizingiti bitandatu byo kujya mu mutwe w'inyuma w'Ihema ahagana iburengerazuba
Exodus26:23 n'ibindi bibiri byo gushyira mu nguni.
Exodus26:24 Buri kizingiti cyo mu nguni kizabe ari ikimane. Kizafungirwe hamwe uhereye hasi
Exodus26:25 Bityo mu ruhande rw'inyuma hazabe ibizingiti umunani n'ibirenge by'ifeza cumi na bitandatu
Exodus26:26 “Muzabāze mu mbaho z'iminyinya imbariro zo gufatanya ibyo bizingiti
Exodus26:27 n'izindi eshanu mu rundi
Exodus26:28 Urubariro rwo hagati rujye rwambukiranya uruhande rwose rw'Ihema.
Exodus26:29 Muzomeke izahabu ku bizingiti no ku mbariro zabyo
Exodus26:30 Iryo Hema muzaryubake mukurikije igishushanyombonera maze kukwerekera kuri uyu musozi.
Exodus26:31 “Abahanga mu kudoda bazabohe umwenda mu budodo bw'isine n'ubw'umuhemba
Exodus26:32 Muzawumanike ku nkingi enye zabājwe mu mbaho z'iminyinya zometseho izahabu
Exodus26:33 Uwo mwenda muzawumanike kuri utwo dukonzo
Exodus26:34 Hanyuma muzashyire igipfundikizo kuri iyo Sanduku iri mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane.
Exodus26:35 Imbere y'uwo mwenda ibumoso muzahashyire ameza
Exodus26:36 “Abahanga mu kudoda bazabohe umwenda wo gukinga ku muryango w'Ihema
Exodus26:37 Uwo mwenda muzawumanikishe udukonzo tw'izahabu turi ku nkingi eshanu zabājwe mu mbaho z'iminyinya zometseho izahabu
Exodus27:1 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa ati: “Muzubake urutambiro mu mbaho z'iminyinya rufite impande enye zingana
Exodus27:2 Mu nguni zarwo zo hejuru uko ari enye
Exodus27:3 Muzacure mu muringa ibikoresho byose bijyana n'urutambiro: inzabya zo kuyoreramo ivu
Exodus27:4 Muzacure mu muringa akazitiro k'akayunguruzo gafite igifunga cy'umuringa
Exodus27:5 Ako kazitiro muzakazengurutse urutambiro kuva hasi kugeza mu cya kabiri cyarwo.
Exodus27:6 Muzabāze imijishi y'urutambiro mu biti by'iminyinya muyomekeho umuringa
Exodus27:7 muyinjize mu bifunga biri mu mpande zombi z'urutambiro
Exodus27:8 Muzarukore mu mbaho kandi imbere muri rwo habe umurangara
Exodus27:9 “Muzubakire iryo Hema urugo rw'imyenda iboshywe mu budodo bw'umweru bukaraze. Umwenda wo mu nkike yo mu ruhande rw'amajyepfo
Exodus27:10 Muzawumanikishe udukonzo n'udukondo tw'ifeza
Exodus27:11 N'uwo mu nkike yo mu ruhande rw'amajyaruguru
Exodus27:12 Umwenda w'inkike yo mu ruhande rw'iburengerazuba
Exodus27:13 Inkike yo mu ruhande rw'iburasirazuba
Exodus27:14 Umwenda wo ku nkike yo haruguru y'irembo
Exodus27:15 N'uwo ku nkike yo hepfo y'irembo
Exodus27:16 Umwenda wo gukinga ku irembo
Exodus27:17 Inkingi zose zizengurutse urwo rugo
Exodus27:18 Urwo rugo ruzabe rufite metero mirongo ine n'enye z'uburebure
Exodus27:19 Ibindi bikoresho byo muri iryo Hema n'imambo zaryo ndetse n'iz'urugo byose
Exodus27:20 Uhoraho arongera abwira Musa ati: “Uzategeke Abisiraheli bajye bakuzanira amavuta meza akamuwe mu mbuto z'iminzenze
Exodus27:21 Aroni n'abahungu be bazashyire igitereko cy'amatara mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus28:1 “Uzahamagare mukuru wawe Aroni n'abahungu be Nadabu na Abihu
Exodus28:2 Uzadodeshereze mukuru wawe Aroni imyambaro igenewe uwo murimo imuhesha icyubahiro.
Exodus28:3 Uzabwire abahanga mu kudoda bose nahaye ubwenge
Exodus28:4 Imyambaro bazadoda ni iyi: agafuka ko mu gituza n'igishura
Exodus28:5 Abadozi bazakoreshe ubudodo bw'isine n'ubw'umuhemba
Exodus28:6 “Abo bahanga bazadode igishura mu mwenda uboshywe mu budodo bw'isine n'ubw'umuhemba
Exodus28:7 Bazashyire imishumi ibiri ku mitwe yacyo yombi yo kugifatisha ku ntugu.
Exodus28:8 Bazadode umukandara wo kugikenyeza mu mwenda umeze nk'uwadozwemo igishura.
Exodus28:9 Muzafate amabuye abiri y'agaciro yitwa onigisi
Exodus28:10 Amazina atandatu ku ibuye rimwe
Exodus28:11 Umubāji w'amabuye azandike ayo mazina kuri ayo mabuye yombi nk'uko bakora ikashe
Exodus28:12 Muzayafatishe ku mishumi y'igishura abe urwibutso rw'imiryango y'Abisiraheli. Bityo uko Aroni aje imbere yanjye nzajya mbona ayo mazina ku ntugu ze
Exodus28:13 Muzacure udukondo mu izahabu
Exodus28:14 hanyuma mubohe udushumi tubiri mu budodo bw'izahabu inoze tumeze nk'imigozi
Exodus28:15 “Abahanga mu kudoda bazadode agafuka ko mu gituza cy'umutambyi
Exodus28:16 Kazabe gakubiranyije kandi gafite impande enye zingana
Exodus28:17 Muzagatakeho imisitari ine y'amabuye y'agaciro. Ku musitari wa mbere muzatakeho ayitwa rubi na topazi na emerodi
Exodus28:18 ku musitari wa kabiri muzatakeho malashita na safiro na diyama
Exodus28:19 ku musitari wa gatatu muzatakeho yasenti na agata na ametisito
Exodus28:20 naho ku musitari wa kane muzatakeho kirizolito na onigisi na yasipi. Buri buye rifungirwe mu kazingiti k'izahabu.
Exodus28:21 Kuri buri buye muzandikeho izina ry'umwe muri bene Yakobo nk'uko bakora ikashe
Exodus28:22 Ako gafuka muzakabohere udushumi mu budodo bw'izahabu inoze tumeze nk'imigozi.
Exodus28:23 Muzagacurire udukondo tubiri tw'izahabu mudutere ku mitwe yako yombi yo hejuru
Exodus28:24 maze mudufungireho utwo dushumi twombi.
Exodus28:25 Indi mitwe y'utwo dushumi muzayifunge ku tuzingiti duteye ku mishumi y'igishura
Exodus28:26 Muzacure utundi dukondo tubiri tw'izahabu
Exodus28:27 Muzacure n'utundi dukondo tubiri tw'izahabu
Exodus28:28 Utwo dukondo tw'agafuka n'utwo hejuru y'umukandara w'igishura
Exodus28:29 “Aroni najya yinjira mu cyumba kizira inenge
Exodus28:30 Uzashyire muri ako gafuka Urimu na Tumimu
Exodus28:31 “Muzadode ikanzu mu mwenda w'isine yo kwambariraho igishura
Exodus28:32 mubohe n'umusozo ukomeye wo gushyira ku ijosi ryayo kugira ngo itazacika.
Exodus28:33 Ku musozo wayo wo hasi muzahazengurutse incunda zimeze nk'amapera
Exodus28:34 
Exodus28:35 Aroni ajye yambara iyo kanzu uko agiye gukora umurimo w'ubutambyi. Uko yinjiye imbere yanjye mu Cyumba kizira inenge n'uko asohotsemo
Exodus28:36 “Muzacure agasate k'izahabu inoze maze mwandikeho ngo ‘Uweguriwe Uhoraho’
Exodus28:37 Muzagafunge imbere ku ngofero mukoresheje umushumi w'isine.
Exodus28:38 Ako gasate Aroni ajye agatamiriza
Exodus28:39 “Muzadode ikanzu ndende mu mwenda w'umweru n'ingofero mu mwenda w'umweru
Exodus28:40 Abahungu ba Aroni na bo muzabadodere amakanzu n'imikandara
Exodus28:41 Iyo myambaro uzayambike mukuru wawe Aroni n'abahungu be
Exodus28:42 Muzabadodere amakabutura y'umweru kugira ngo baterekana ubwambure bwabo.
Exodus28:43 Aroni n'abahungu be bazajye bayambara uko bagiye kwinjira mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro cyangwa kwegera urutambiro
Exodus29:1 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa ati: “Dore uko uzanyegurira Aroni n'abahungu be kugira ngo bankorere umurimo w'ubutambyi. Uzafate ikimasa n'amasekurume y'intama abiri bitagira inenge.
Exodus29:2 Uzatekeshe imigati idasembuye
Exodus29:3 Uzabishyire ku nkōko ubizanane na cya kimasa na ya masekurume yombi.
Exodus29:4 “Uzazane Aroni n'abahungu be ku muryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus29:5 Uzafate ya myambaro
Exodus29:6 Uzamwambike ingofero uyifungeho ka gasate kanditseho ‘Uweguriwe Uhoraho’.
Exodus29:7 Hanyuma uzafate amavuta yo gusīga uyamusuke ku mutwe
Exodus29:8 Uzazane n'abahungu be ubambike amakanzu
Exodus29:9 ubakenyeze imikandara
Exodus29:10 “Uzazane cya kimasa imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus29:11 Uzacyicire hafi y'umuryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro imbere yanjye.
Exodus29:12 Uzafate ku maraso yacyo uyasīgishe urutoki ku mahembe y'urutambiro
Exodus29:13 Uzafate urugimbu rwose rwo ku nyama zo mu nda
Exodus29:14 Naho izindi nyama z'ikimasa n'uruhu n'amayezi
Exodus29:15 “Uzazane imwe muri ya masekurume y'intama
Exodus29:16 Uzayice maze amaraso yayo uyaminjagire ku mpande zose z'urutambiro.
Exodus29:17 Uzayibage maze woze inyama zo mu nda n'amaguru
Exodus29:18 Iyo sekurume yose uzayitwikire ku rutambiro ibe igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Exodus29:19 “Hanyuma uzazane ya sekurume yindi
Exodus29:20 Uzayice ufate ku maraso yayo uyasīge ku gutwi kw'iburyo kwa Aroni n'abahungu be
Exodus29:21 Uzafate ku maraso ari ku rutambiro no ku mavuta yo gusīga
Exodus29:22 Uzafate urugimbu rw'iyo sekurume izatambwa bashyirwa ku murimo
Exodus29:23 No kuri ya nkōko y'imigati idasembuye muzaba mwashyize imbere yanjye
Exodus29:24 Byose uzabishyire mu biganza bya Aroni no mu by'abahungu be maze babīmurikire
Exodus29:25 Hanyuma babigusubize ubitwikire ku rutambiro hejuru y'igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Exodus29:26 Uzafate inkoro y'isekurume izatambwa Aroni ashyirwa ku murimo uyīmurikire
Exodus29:27 “Igihe umutambyi ashyirwa ku murimo
Exodus29:28 Igihe cyose Abisiraheli bazajya batamba ibitambo by'umusangiro
Exodus29:29 Aroni namara gupfa
Exodus29:30 Umwe mu bahungu ba Aroni azamusimbure
Exodus29:31 “Uzafate inyama z'isekurume izatambwa igihe abatambyi bashyirwa ku murimo
Exodus29:32 Aroni n'abahungu be bazarire izo nyama n'imigati yasigaye
Exodus29:33 Bazabirye kuko ari byo byakoreshejwe bahongererwa ibyaha byabo
Exodus29:34 Nihagira inyama cyangwa imigati birara
Exodus29:35 “Ibyo uzabikorere Aroni n'abahungu be ukurikije ibyo nagutegetse. Imihango yo kubashyira ku murimo izamare iminsi irindwi.
Exodus29:36 Buri munsi uzatambe ikimasa ho igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Bityo ube uhumanuye urutambiro
Exodus29:37 Muzagenze mutyo iminsi irindwi
Exodus29:38 “Buri munsi muzajye mutambira ku rutambiro abana b'intama babiri batarengeje umwaka.
Exodus29:39 Umwe mujye muwutamba mu gitondo
Exodus29:40 Igihe mutamba umwana w'intama wa mu gitondo
Exodus29:41 Igihe mutamba umwana w'intama wa nimugoroba
Exodus29:42 Muzajye mutamba ibyo bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro uko ibihe bihaye ibindi
Exodus29:43 Ni na ho nzabonanira n'Abisiraheli maze ikuzo ryanjye rihahindure ahaziranenge.
Exodus29:44 Nziyegurira Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'urutambiro
Exodus29:45 Nzatura hagati mu Bisiraheli mbabere Imana.
Exodus29:46 Bityo bazamenya ko ari jye Uhoraho Imana yabo wabakuye mu Misiri
Exodus30:1 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa ati: “Muzabāze mu mbaho z'iminyinya igicaniro cyo koserezaho imibavu.
Exodus30:2 Kizabe gifite ubugari bwa santimetero mirongo ine n'enye
Exodus30:3 Muzacyomekeho izahabu inoze impande zose
Exodus30:4 Muzacure ibifunga mu izahabu
Exodus30:5 Iyo mijishi muzayibāze mu biti by'iminyinya muyomekeho izahabu.
Exodus30:6 Icyo gicaniro muzagishyire mu Cyumba kizira inenge
Exodus30:7 Buri gitondo igihe Aroni azaba agiye gutunganya amatara
Exodus30:8 kandi ni na ko azajya abigenza buri mugoroba agiye gucana amatara. Bazajye banyosereza imibavu uko ibihe bihaye ibindi.
Exodus30:9 Ntimukacyoserezeho imibavu itemewe cyangwa ngo mugitambireho ibitambo. Ntimukagiturireho amaturo y'ibinyampeke cyangwa ngo mugisukeho ituro risukwa.
Exodus30:10 Rimwe mu mwaka
Exodus30:11 Uhoraho arongera abwira Musa ati:
Exodus30:12 “Igihe uzabarura Abisiraheli
Exodus30:13 Buri mugabo uzabarurwa azatange garama eshanu z'ifeza
Exodus30:14 Umuntu wese w'igitsinagabo ufite imyaka makumyabiri n'uyirengeje
Exodus30:15 Ari umukire ari n'umukene
Exodus30:16 Numara kwakira izo feza Abisiraheli bazatanga ho incungu
Exodus30:17 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Musa ati:
Exodus30:18 “Muzacure mu muringa igikarabiro mugishyire ku gitereko cy'umuringa
Exodus30:19 Aroni n'abahungu be bajye bagikarabiramo intoki boge n'ibirenge.
Exodus30:20 Mbere yo kwinjira mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro ngo bankorere
Exodus30:21 Bajye bakaraba intoki boge n'ibirenge kugira ngo badapfa. Aroni n'abazamukomokaho bazubahirize iryo tegeko uko ibihe bihaye ibindi.”
Exodus30:22 Uhoraho arongera abwira Musa ati:
Exodus30:23 “Uzashake ibiro bitandatu by'umubavu w'umushongi w'ishangi nziza
Exodus30:24 n'ibiro bitandatu by'umusagavu mwiza (uzakurikize igipimo gikoreshwa n'abatambyi)
Exodus30:25 Umuhanga mu gukora amarashi azabivange
Exodus30:26 Uzayasīge Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'Isanduku irimo bya bisate by'amabuye
Exodus30:27 n'ameza n'ibikoresho byayo byose
Exodus30:28 n'urutambiro n'ibikoresho byarwo byose
Exodus30:29 Uzabinyegurire bibe binyeguriwe rwose. Ikintu cyose kizabikoraho na cyo kizaba kinyeguriwe.
Exodus30:30 “Uzasuke kuri Aroni no ku bahungu be kuri ayo mavuta
Exodus30:31 Uzihanangirize Abisiraheli uti: ‘Ayo mavuta yo gusīga ajye akoreshwa gusa mu mihango y'Uhoraho. Nta kindi azakoreshwa uko ibihe bihaye ibindi.
Exodus30:32 Nta muntu n'umwe ugomba kuyisīga
Exodus30:33 Nihagira uyigana akayakora cyangwa akayasīga atari umutambyi
Exodus30:34 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Musa ati: “Uzafate imigabane ingana y'imibavu ihumura neza yitwa sitoragisi na onika na galubanumu
Exodus30:35 Umuhanga mu gukora amarashi azayivange n'umunyu
Exodus30:36 Uzafateho igice ugisyemo ifu maze uyishyire imbere y'Isanduku irimo ibisate byanditsweho Amategeko
Exodus30:37 Ntimukigane uwo mubavu ngo mukore umeze nka wo
Exodus30:38 Nihagira uwigana agakora nka wo kugira ngo awosereze iwe
Exodus31:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Exodus31:2 “Nitoranyirije Besalēli mwene Uri
Exodus31:3 Namwujuje Mwuka wanjye kugira ngo agire ubuhanga n'ubuhanzi n'ubumenyi. Azi ubukorikori bwinshi:
Exodus31:4 azi gukora ibishushanyombonera no gucura izahabu n'ifeza n'umuringa
Exodus31:5 azi kubāza amabuye y'agaciro no kuyatāka
Exodus31:6 Nitoranyirije kandi Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki wo mu muryango wa Dani
Exodus31:7 Bazubake Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus31:8 Bazakore n'ameza y'imigati n'ibikoresho byayo
Exodus31:9 Bazubake urutambiro bakore n'ibikoresho byarwo byose
Exodus31:10 Bazabohe imyenda
Exodus31:11 Bazatunganye amavuta yo gusīga
Exodus31:12 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Exodus31:13 ngo abwire Abisiraheli ati: “Mujye mwubahiriza isabato
Exodus31:14 Mujye muyubahiriza kuko ari umunsi mugomba kunyegurira. Utazayubahiriza wese akagira icyo akora kuri uwo munsi

Exodus32:1 Abisiraheli babonye Musa atinze ku musozi bakoranira hamwe basanga Aroni
Exodus32:2 Aroni arabasubiza ati: “Ngaho nimunzanire amaherena y'izahabu abagore banyu n'abakobwa banyu
Exodus32:3 Nuko abantu bose biyambura amaherena y'izahabu bari bambaye ku matwi
Exodus32:4 Arayafata arayashongesha
Exodus32:5 Hanyuma Aroni yubaka urutambiro imbere y'iyo shusho
Exodus32:6 Bukeye barazinduka
Exodus32:7 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Manuka kuko abantu bawe wakuye mu Misiri bacumuye bikomeye.
Exodus32:8 Ntibatinze guteshuka inzira nabategetse
Exodus32:9 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Ndabona bariya bantu ari ibyigomeke.
Exodus32:10 None ntugire icyo umbwira
Exodus32:11 Ariko Musa yinginga Uhoraho Imana ye ngo acururuke
Exodus32:12 Wituma Abanyamisiri bibwira ko wazaniye ubwoko bwawe kubugirira nabi
