Exodus32:14 Nuko Uhoraho arigarura
Exodus32:15 Musa amanuka umusozi atwaye mu maboko bya bisate bibiri by'amabuye
Exodus32:16 Ibyo bisate byari byakozwe n'Imana
Exodus32:17 Yozuwe yumvise urusaku rw'abantu
Exodus32:18 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Ndumva atari amajwi yo gutsinda cyangwa ayo gutsindwa
Exodus32:19 Musa ageze munsi y'umusozi hafi y'inkambi
Exodus32:20 Nuko afata ya shusho baremye arayitwika
Exodus32:21 Musa abaza Aroni ati: “Aba bantu bakugize bate kugira ngo utume bakora icyaha gikomeye gitya?”
Exodus32:22 Aroni aramusubiza ati: “Databuja
Exodus32:23 Baraje barambwira bati: ‘Turemere imana zo kutuyobora
Exodus32:24 Nuko ndababwira nti: ‘Abambaye izahabu nibazizane.’ Na bo bahita bazimpa nzijugunya mu muriro
Exodus32:25 Musa abona ko Aroni yoroheye abantu bagakora ibyo bishakiye
Exodus32:26 Nuko Musa ajya imbere y'inkambi aho binjirira
Exodus32:27 Arababwira ati: “Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli ategetse ko buri wese muri mwe afata inkota ye
Exodus32:28 Abalevi bumvira Musa
Exodus32:29 Musa abwira Abalevi ati: “Uyu munsi Uhoraho yabiyeguriye
Exodus32:30 Bukeye Musa abwira abantu ati: “Mwakoze icyaha gikomeye
Exodus32:31 Nuko Musa asubirayo atakambira Uhoraho ati: “Koko bariya bantu bakoze icyaha gikomeye
Exodus32:32 Icyakora ndakwinginze
Exodus32:33 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Uwakoze icyaha ni we nsiba mu gitabo cyanjye.
Exodus32:34 Naho wowe genda ujyane abantu aho nakubwiye
Exodus32:35 Nuko Uhoraho ateza Abisiraheli icyorezo
Exodus33:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Va aha hantu wowe n'ubwoko wakuye mu Misiri
Exodus33:2 Nzabaha umumarayika wo kubayobora
Exodus33:3 Muzagera muri icyo gihugu gitemba amata n'ubuki. Ariko jyewe ubwanjye sinzajyana namwe
Exodus33:4 Uhoraho atuma Musa ku Bisiraheli ati: “Muri ubwoko bw'ibyigomeke
Exodus33:5 
Exodus33:6 Babyiyambuye bakiri munsi y'umusozi wa Horebu.
Exodus33:7 Aho bageze Musa agashinga Ihema ry'ibonaniro inyuma y'inkambi ahitaruye. Yaryise “Ihema ry'ibonaniro”
Exodus33:8 Iyo Musa yajyaga kuri iryo Hema
Exodus33:9 Musa yamara kuryinjiramo
Exodus33:10 Iyo abantu babonaga iyo nkingi y'igicu ihagaze ku muryango w'Ihema
Exodus33:11 Uhoraho yavuganaga na Musa nk'uko umuntu avugana n'incuti ye. Hanyuma Musa agasubira mu nkambi
Exodus33:12 Musa abwira Uhoraho ati: “Ni wowe ubwawe wantegetse kujyana ubu bwoko
Exodus33:13 None rero niba ngutonnyeho koko
Exodus33:14 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Humura! Nziyizira ubwanjye.”
Exodus33:15 Musa arongera ati: “Nutiyizira ubwawe ntuzatuvane hano
Exodus33:16 kuko tutajyanye ntitwaba dutandukanye n'andi mahanga yose. Nta n'ubwo yamenya ko jye n'ubwoko bwawe twagutonnyeho.”
Exodus33:17 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Ibyo unsabye na byo nzabikora kuko wantonnyeho kandi nkaba nkuzi neza.”
Exodus33:18 Noneho Musa aravuga ati: “Nyiyereka nkubone mu ikuzo ryawe!”
Exodus33:19 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Nzakwereka ineza yanjye yose
Exodus33:20 Ariko ntushobora kumbona mu maso
Exodus33:21 Icyakora hano hafi hari urutare uzaruhagarareho
Exodus33:22 ninkwiyereka ukambona mu ikuzo ryanjye
Exodus33:23 Ninkuraho ikiganza uzambona mu mugongo
Exodus34:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Ubāze ibisate bibiri by'amabuye bimeze nk'ibya mbere. Nzandikaho amagambo yari yanditse ku byo wamennye.
Exodus34:2 Ejo kare mu gitondo uzabe witeguye
Exodus34:3 Ntihazagire uwo muzamukana cyangwa ukandagira ahantu aho ari ho hose kuri uwo musozi
Exodus34:4 Nuko Musa abāza ibisate bibiri by'amabuye bimeze nk'ibya mbere. Bukeye azamuka umusozi wa Sinayi afite bya bisate byombi
Exodus34:5 Uhoraho amanuka mu gicu ahurira na Musa ku musozi
Exodus34:6 Aca imbere ya Musa aravuga ati: “Ndi Uhoraho
Exodus34:7 Ngaragariza abantu urukundo rwanjye imyaka itabarika
Exodus34:8 Musa ahita yikubita hasi aramya Uhoraho.
Exodus34:9 Aravuga ati: “Nyagasani
Exodus34:10 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Dore ngiranye namwe Isezerano. Nzakorera imbere y'ubwoko bwawe ibitangaza bitigeze bikorwa mu mahanga yose yo ku isi
Exodus34:11 Nimukurikiza ibyo mbategetse uyu munsi
Exodus34:12 Igihugu cyose muzigarurira muzirinde kugirana amasezerano na bene cyo
Exodus34:13 Ahubwo muzasenye intambiro zabo
Exodus34:14 Ntimukagire indi mana musenga
Exodus34:15 Ntimukagirane amasezerano na bene igihugu
Exodus34:16 Kandi ntimugasabire abahungu banyu abakobwa babo
Exodus34:17 Ntimugacure amashusho y'ibigirwamana.
Exodus34:18 “Mu kwezi kwa Abibu
Exodus34:19 “Abana b'abahungu bose b'impfura muzabanyegurire babe abanjye
Exodus34:20 Ariko uburiza bw'indogobe ntimuzabumpe
Exodus34:21 “Mufite iminsi itandatu mu cyumweru yo gukora
Exodus34:22 “Mujye mwizihiza iminsi mikuru y'isarura rya mbere ari ryo ry'ibinyampeke
Exodus34:23 “Incuro eshatu ku mwaka
Exodus34:24 Nzamenesha abanyamahanga babahunge
Exodus34:25 “Muri iyo minsi mikuru
Exodus34:26 “Umuganura w'ibyo musaruye mujye muwuzana mu Nzu yanjye
Exodus34:27 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Andika ayo magambo kuko ari yo Isezerano ngiranye nawe n'Abisiraheli rishingiyeho.”
Exodus34:28 Musa yamaranye n'Uhoraho iminsi mirongo ine n'amajoro mirongo ine
Exodus34:29 Musa amanuka umusozi wa Sinayi afite bya bisate byombi by'amabuye byanditsweho Amategeko. Kubera kuvugana n'Uhoraho mu maso he hararabagiranaga
Exodus34:30 Aroni n'abandi Bisiraheli bose bamurebye mu maso babona harabagirana
Exodus34:31 Musa arabahamagara
Exodus34:32 Hanyuma n'abandi Bisiraheli bose baraza
Exodus34:33 Musa amaze kuvugana na bo yitwikira igitambaro mu maso
Exodus34:34 ariko yajya kuvugana n'Uhoraho akitwikurura. Iyo yasohokaga agiye kubwira Abisiraheli ibyo Uhoraho yategetse
Exodus34:35 babonaga mu maso he harabagirana. Nuko Musa akongera akitwikira kugeza igihe azasubirira kuvugana n'Uhoraho.
Exodus35:1 Musa akoranya Abisiraheli bose
Exodus35:2 Mu cyumweru hari iminsi itandatu yo gukora
Exodus35:3 Ku isabato ntimugacane umuriro aho muri hose.”
Exodus35:4 Musa abwira Abisiraheli bose ati: “Nimwumve ibyo Uhoraho yabategetse.
Exodus35:5 Nimuhe Uhoraho umusanzu. Abafite umutima mwiza bose bawumuzanire. Muzazane izahabu n'ifeza n'umuringa
Exodus35:6 muzazane imyenda y'isine n'iy'umuhemba n'iy'umutuku
Exodus35:7 muzazane impu z'intama zizigishijwe ibara ry'umutuku n'izindi mpu z'agaciro
Exodus35:8 Muzazane amavuta acanwa mu matara
Exodus35:9 Muzazane amabuye ya onigisi n'andi mabuye y'agaciro
Exodus35:10 “Abanyabukorikori bose muri mwe bazaze bakore imirimo Uhoraho yategetse.
Exodus35:11 Ibyo bazakora ni ibi: Ihema n'ibyo kurisakara n'udukonzo twaryo
Exodus35:12 Isanduku n'imijishi yayo n'igipfundikizo cyayo
Exodus35:13 Ameza n'imijishi yayo n'ibikoresho byayo
Exodus35:14 Igitereko cy'amatara n'ibikoresho byacyo
Exodus35:15 Igicaniro n'imijishi yacyo n'amavuta yo gusīga n'imibavu yoswa
Exodus35:16 Urutambiro n'akazitiro k'akayunguruzo karwo k'umuringa
Exodus35:17 Imyenda yo kubakisha urugo n'inkingi zarwo n'ibirenge byazo
Exodus35:18 Imambo z'Ihema n'iz'urugo n'imigozi.
Exodus35:19 Imyambaro iboshywe y'abazakora mu Ihema harimo iyagenewe Aroni
Exodus35:20 Musa amaze kuvuga atyo
Exodus35:21 Abafite umutima mwiza bose kandi babishaka
Exodus35:22 Abagabo n'abagore babishaka bazana ibikwasi n'amaherena n'impeta n'imikufi
Exodus35:23 Abari bafite imyenda y'isine n'iy'umuhemba n'iy'umutuku
Exodus35:24 Abandi bazaniye Uhoraho umusanzu w'ifeza n'umuringa. Abari bafite imbaho z'iminyinya n'ibindi byakoreshwa muri uwo mushinga
Exodus35:25 Mu bagore bazobereye mu mwuga wo kuboha imyenda
Exodus35:26 naho abandi bahitamo gukaraga ubwoya bw'ihene.
Exodus35:27 Abatware na bo bazana amabuye ya onigisi n'andi mabuye y'agaciro
Exodus35:28 Bazana n'imibavu n'amavuta yo gucana n'amavuta yo gusīga
Exodus35:29 Abisiraheli bose bafite umutima mwiza kandi babishaka
Exodus35:30 Musa abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Uhoraho yitoranyirije Besalēli mwene Uri akaba n'umwuzukuru wa Huri
Exodus35:31 Yamwujujemo Mwuka we kugira ngo agire ubuhanga n'ubuhanzi n'ubumenyi. Azi ubukorikori bwinshi:
Exodus35:32 azi gukora ibishushanyombonera no gucura izahabu n'ifeza n'umuringa
Exodus35:33 azi kubāza amabuye y'agaciro no kuyatāka
Exodus35:34 Kandi we na Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki wo mu muryango wa Dani
Exodus35:35 Yabahaye ubuhanga bwo gukora imirimo inyuranye: kubāza amabuye no kuboha no gufumisha ubudodo bw'isine n'ubw'umuhemba
Exodus36:1 None rero Besalēli na Oholiyabu bazakore ibyagenewe Ihema ry'Uhoraho nk'uko yabitegetse
Exodus36:2 Musa ahamagara Besalēli na Oholiyabu n'abandi Uhoraho yahaye ubuhanga bari babyitabiriye
Exodus36:3 Musa abaha ibikoresho byose Abisiraheli bari batanze byo gukoresha Ihema. Ariko buri gitondo abantu bakomeje kuzana ibindi bikoresho
Exodus36:4 kugeza ubwo abahanga bakoraga iby'Ihema bagiye
Exodus36:5 kumubwira bati: “Abantu bazanye ibikoresho bisāze ibikenewe kugira ngo dukore ibyo Uhoraho yategetse!”
Exodus36:6 Musa ategeka gutangaza mu nkambi yose ko abagabo n'abagore badakomeza kuzana umusanzu wo gukoresha Ihema. Nuko barekera aho kuwuzana.
Exodus36:7 Bari batanze ibirenze ibikenewe kugira ngo imirimo yagombaga gukorwa irangire.
Exodus36:8 Abahanga bashinzwe gukora Ihema badoze imyenda icumi iboshywe mu budodo bw'umweru bukaraze
Exodus36:9 Buri mwenda wari ufite uburebure bwa metero cumi n'ebyiri
Exodus36:10 Bafatanya imyenda itanu ukwayo
Exodus36:11 Ku musozo umwe wa buri mwenda munini
Exodus36:12 
Exodus36:13 Ku musozo wundi wa buri mwenda
Exodus36:14 Hanyuma baboha mu bwoya bw'ihene imyenda cumi n'umwe yo gusakara iryo Hema.
Exodus36:15 Buri mwenda wari ufite metero cumi n'eshatu
Exodus36:16 Bafatanyije imyenda itanu ukwayo
Exodus36:17 Bashyira udukondo mirongo itanu ku musozo umwe wa buri mwenda munini.
Exodus36:18 Bacura mu muringa udukonzo mirongo itanu two gufatanya iyo myenda
Exodus36:19 Bafatanya impu z'intama zizigishijwe ibara ry'umutuku
Exodus36:20 Babāza mu mbaho z'iminyinya ibizingiti by'Ihema.
Exodus36:21 Buri kizingiti cyari gifite uburebure bwa metero enye n'ubugari bwa santimetero mirongo itandatu n'esheshatu
Exodus36:22 bagishyiraho amaguru abiri.
Exodus36:23 Babāza ibizingiti makumyabiri byo gushyira mu ruhande rw'amajyepfo
Exodus36:24 kandi bacura mu ifeza ibirenge mirongo ine byo gushingamo ibyo bizingiti
Exodus36:25 Babāza n'ibindi bizingiti makumyabiri byo gushyira mu ruhande rw'amajyaruguru
Exodus36:26 bacura no mu ifeza ibirenge mirongo ine byo kuzabishingamo.
Exodus36:27 Babāza ibizingiti bitandatu bizajya mu mutwe w'inyuma w'Ihema ahagana iburengerazuba
Exodus36:28 n'ibindi bibiri byo kuzashyira mu nguni.
Exodus36:29 Buri kizingiti cyo mu nguni cyari ikimane gifungiwe hamwe uhereye hasi
Exodus36:30 Bityo bakoze ibizingiti umunani n'ibirenge by'ifeza cumi na bitandatu bizajya mu ruhande rw'inyuma
Exodus36:31 Babāza mu mbaho z'iminyinya imbariro zo gufatanya ibyo bizingiti: eshanu zo kujya mu ruhande rumwe rw'Ihema
Exodus36:32 n'izindi eshanu zo kujya mu rundi
Exodus36:33 Bakoze urubariro rwo hagati rwambukiranyije uruhande rwose rw'Ihema.
Exodus36:34 Bomeka izahabu ku bizingiti no ku mbariro zabyo
Exodus36:35 Abahanga mu kudoda baboha umwenda mu budodo bw'isine n'ubw'umuhemba
Exodus36:36 Bawubāriza inkingi enye mu mbaho z'iminyinya bazomekaho izahabu
Exodus36:37 Abahanga mu kudoda baboha umwenda wo gukinga ku muryango w'Ihema
Exodus36:38 Bawubāriza inkingi eshanu
Exodus37:1 Besalēli abāza Isanduku mu mbaho z'iminyinya
Exodus37:2 Ayomekaho izahabu inoze imbere n'inyuma
Exodus37:3 Ayicurira ibifunga bine by'izahabu abishyira mu nguni enye zo munsi y'Isanduku
Exodus37:4 Abāza imijishi mu biti by'iminyinya ayomekaho izahabu
Exodus37:5 ayinjiza mu bifunga by'Isanduku kugira ngo bashobore kuyiheka.
Exodus37:6 Acura mu izahabu inoze igipfundikizo cyayo gifite uburebure bwa metero imwe na santimetero icumi
Exodus37:7 Acura abakerubi babiri mu izahabu abashyira ku mitwe yombi y'igipfundikizo
Exodus37:8 kandi bombi bari bafatanye na cyo.
Exodus37:9 Bari berekeranye
Exodus37:10 Babāza ameza mu mbaho z'iminyinya
Exodus37:11 Bayomekaho izahabu inoze
Exodus37:12 Bayazengurutsa umutambiko ufite ubugari bwa santimetero umunani
Exodus37:13 Bayacurira ibifunga bine by'izahabu
Exodus37:14 ahegereye umutambiko. Ibyo bifunga ni ibyo kwinjizamo imijishi yo guhekesha ameza.
Exodus37:15 Iyo mijishi bayibāza mu biti by'iminyinya bayomekaho izahabu.
Exodus37:16 Bacura mu izahabu inoze ibikoresho byo kuri ayo meza: amasahani n'ibiyiko n'inzabya n'utubindi
Exodus37:17 Bacura igitereko cy'amatara mu izahabu inoze. Cyari kigizwe n'indiba n'igihimba n'amapfundo n'indabyo n'udututu twazo
Exodus37:18 Bashamikira ku gihimba amashami atandatu
Exodus37:19 Buri shami ryari rifite amapfundo atatu n'indabyo eshatu
Exodus37:20 Ku gihimba bashyiraho amapfundo n'indabyo
Exodus37:21 Bashyira ipfundo munsi ya buri mashami abiri abiri agize ibyiciro bitatu.
Exodus37:22 Amapfundo n'amashami by'igitereko
Exodus37:23 Bacura mu izahabu inoze amatara arindwi n'ibikoresho byo kuyacana no kuyazimya
Exodus37:24 Icyo gitereko n'ibigendana na cyo
Exodus37:25 Babāza mu mbaho z'iminyinya igicaniro cyo koserezaho imibavu. Cyari gifite ubugari bwa santimetero mirongo ine n'enye
Exodus37:26 Bacyomekaho izahabu inoze impande zose no hejuru no ku mahembe yacyo
Exodus37:27 Bacura ibifunga mu izahabu babifunga munsi y'umuguno
Exodus37:28 Iyo mijishi bayibāza mu biti by'iminyinya
Exodus37:29 Umuhanga mu gukora amarashi akora amavuta yo gukoresha mu mihango yo gusīga
Exodus38:1 Bakora urutambiro mu mbaho z'iminyinya rufite impande enye zingana
Exodus38:2 Mu nguni zarwo zo hejuru uko ari enye
Exodus38:3 Bacura mu muringa ibikoresho byose bijyana na rwo: inzabya n'ibitiyo byo kuyoza ivu
Exodus38:4 Bacura mu muringa akazitiro k'akayunguruzo
Exodus38:5 Bacura mu muringa ibifunga bine byo kwinjizamo imijishi
Exodus38:6 Babāza iyo mijishi mu biti by'iminyinya bayomekaho umuringa
Exodus38:7 bayinjiza mu bifunga biri mu mpande zombi z'urutambiro kugira ngo bajye bashobora kuruheka. Rwari rukoze mu mbaho
Exodus38:8 Bacura igikarabiro n'igitereko cyacyo mu muringa
Exodus38:9 Bakora n'ibyo kubaka urugo. Baboha imyenda mu budodo bw'umweru bukaraze: uwo mu nkike yo mu ruhande rw'amajyepfo wari ufite uburebure bwa metero mirongo ine n'enye.
Exodus38:10 Bawubāriza inkingi makumyabiri
Exodus38:11 N'uwo mu nkike yo mu ruhande rw'amajyaruguru babigenza batyo.
Exodus38:12 Umwenda w'inkike yo mu ruhande rw'iburengerazuba wari ufite uburebure bwa metero makumyabiri n'ebyiri
Exodus38:13 Inkike yo mu ruhande rw'iburasirazuba yari ifite uburebure bwa metero makumyabiri n'ebyiri.
Exodus38:14 Umwenda wo ku nkike yo haruguru y'irembo wari ufite uburebure bwa metero esheshatu n'igice
Exodus38:15 N'uwo ku nkike yo hepfo y'irembo na wo babigenza batyo.
Exodus38:16 Imyenda yose y'urwo rugo yari iboshywe mu budodo bw'umweru bukaraze.
Exodus38:17 Ibirenge by'inkingi babicuze mu muringa
Exodus38:18 Abahanga mu kudoda baboha umwenda wo gukinga ku irembo
Exodus38:19 Bawubāriza inkingi enye bazicurira mu muringa ibirenge bine
Exodus38:20 Imambo z'Ihema n'iz'urugo bazicura mu muringa.
Exodus38:21 Musa ategeka Abalevi ko babarura ibyo gukoresha mu mushinga wo kubaka Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus38:22 Besalēli mwene Uri akaba n'umwuzukuru wa Huri wo mu muryango wa Yuda
Exodus38:23 Yafashijwe na Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki wo mu muryango wa Dani. Yari azi ubukorikori bwinshi: kubāza amabuye no kuboha imyenda mu budodo bw'isine n'ubw'umuhemba
Exodus38:24 Ba Balevi babonye ko izahabu yose Abisiraheli batanze ngo ikoreshwe mu mushinga wo kubaka Ihema
Exodus38:25 Naho ifeza babonye ko zapimaga toni eshatu n'ibiro magana ane na makumyabiri. Ni izatanzwe mu gihe cy'ibarura ry'Abisiraheli.
Exodus38:26 Habaruwe abagabo ibihumbi magana atandatu na bitatu na magana atanu na mirongo itanu
Exodus38:27 Muri izo feza bakoresheje toni eshatu n'ibiro magana ane bacura ibirenge ijana byo gushingamo ibizingiti by'Ihema
Exodus38:28 Mu biro makumyabiri byasigaye bacuramo udukondo n'udukonzo tw'inkingi
Exodus38:29 Umuringa Abisiraheli batanze
Exodus38:30 Bawukoresheje mu gucura ibirenge by'inkingi zo ku muryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus38:31 bawucuramo n'ibirenge by'inkingi z'urugo n'izo ku irembo
Exodus39:1 Abahanga mu kudoda badoda imyambaro y'abazakora mu Ihema
Exodus39:2 Abanyabukorikori bacura izahabu bayigira agahwahwari
Exodus39:3 
Exodus39:4 Bashyiraho imishumi ku mitwe yacyo yombi yo kugifatisha ku ntugu.
Exodus39:5 Badoda umukandara wo kugikenyeza mu mwenda umeze nk'uwadozwemo igishura
Exodus39:6 Umubāji w'amabuye yandika amazina ya bene Yakobo ku mabuye y'agaciro yitwa onigisi nk'uko bakora ikashe
Exodus39:7 Bayafatisha ku mishumi y'igishura kugira ngo abe urwibutso rw'imiryango y'Abisiraheli
Exodus39:8 Abahanga mu kudoda badoda agafuka ko mu gituza cy'umutambyi mu mwenda umeze nk'uw'igishura
Exodus39:9 Kari gakubiranyije kandi gafite impande enye zingana
Exodus39:10 Bagatakaho imisitari ine y'amabuye y'agaciro
Exodus39:11 ku musitari wa kabiri batakaho malashita na safiro na diyama
Exodus39:12 ku musitari wa gatatu batakaho yasenti na agata na ametisito
Exodus39:13 naho ku musitari wa kane batakaho kirizolito na onigisi na yasipi. Buri buye barifungiye mu kazingiti k'izahabu.
Exodus39:14 Kuri buri buye bandikaho izina ry'umwe muri bene Yakobo nk'uko bakora ikashe. Ayo mabuye ashushanya imiryango cumi n'ibiri y'Abisiraheli.
Exodus39:15 Babohera ako gafuka udushumi mu budodo bw'izahabu inoze tumeze nk'imigozi.
Exodus39:16 Bagacurira utuzingiti tubiri tw'izahabu. Bacura n'udukondo tubiri tw'izahabu badutera ku mitwe yako yombi yo hejuru
Exodus39:17 maze badufungiraho utwo dushumi twombi.
Exodus39:18 Indi mitwe y'utwo dushumi bayifunga ku tuzingiti duteye ku mishumi y'igishura
Exodus39:19 Bacura utundi dukondo tubiri tw'izahabu
Exodus39:20 Bacura utundi dukondo tubiri tw'izahabu
Exodus39:21 Utwo dukondo tw'agafuka n'utwo hejuru y'umukandara w'igishura badufatanyisha agashumi k'isine kugira ngo ako gafuka kagume hamwe
Exodus39:22 Badoda ikanzu yo kwambariraho igishura mu mwenda uboshywe mu budodo bw'isine
Exodus39:23 ku ijosi ryayo bahashyira umusozo ukomeye kugira ngo itazacika.
Exodus39:24 Ku musozo wayo wo hasi bahazengurutsa incunda zimeze nk'amapera
Exodus39:25 Bacura amayugi y'izahabu inoze bayatera hagati y'incunda n'indi
Exodus39:26 bagenda babibisikanya batyo kuzenguruka ku musozo. Uko ni ko badoze ikanzu y'umutambyi
Exodus39:27 Aroni n'abahungu be babadodera amakanzu maremare y'umweru
Exodus39:28 badoda mu mwenda w'umweru ingofero ya Aroni n'iz'abahungu be
Exodus39:29 Babohera Aroni umukandara mu budodo bw'umweru bukaraze
Exodus39:30 Bacura mu izahabu inoze agasate ko kwambarana n'ingofero y'umutambyi
Exodus39:31 Bagafunga imbere ku ngofero bakoresheje umushumi w'isine nk'uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa.
Exodus39:32 Abisiraheli bakoze ibyo Uhoraho yategetse Musa byose: barangiza gutegura Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'ibigendana na ryo.
Exodus39:33 Bazanira Musa Ihema n'ibyo kurisakara n'udukonzo twaryo
Exodus39:34 Impu z'intama zizigishijwe ibara ry'umutuku n'izindi mpu z'agaciro zo gusakara Ihema
Exodus39:35 Isanduku yo gushyiramo ibisate by'amabuye byanditsweho Amategeko n'imijishi yayo n'igipfundikizo cyayo.
Exodus39:36 Ameza n'ibikoresho byayo n'imigati iturwa Uhoraho.
Exodus39:37 Igitereko cy'amatara cy'izahabu inoze n'amatara yacyo yose n'ibikoresho byacyo byose
Exodus39:38 Igicaniro cy'izahabu n'amavuta yo gusīga n'imibavu yoswa
Exodus39:39 Urutambiro rw'umuringa n'akazitiro k'akayunguruzo karwo k'umuringa
Exodus39:40 Imyenda yo kubakisha urugo n'inkingi zarwo n'ibirenge byazo
Exodus39:41 Imyambaro iboshywe y'abazakora mu Ihema harimo iyagenewe Aroni
Exodus39:42 Byose Abisiraheli babikora nk'uko Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa.
Exodus39:43 Musa abonye ko byose byakozwe nk'uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse
Exodus40:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Exodus40:2 “Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa mbere uzashinge Ihema ry'ibonaniro.
Exodus40:3 Uzashyiremo Isanduku irimo ibisate by'amabuye byanditsweho Amategeko
Exodus40:4 Uzinjize ameza ushyireho imigati
Exodus40:5 Igicaniro cy'izahabu cyo koserezaho imibavu
Exodus40:6 Uzashyire urutambiro imbere y'umuryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro.
Exodus40:7 Igikarabiro uzagishyire hagati y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'urutambiro
Exodus40:8 Uzubake urugo ruzengurutse Ihema
Exodus40:9 “Uzafate amavuta abigenewe
Exodus40:10 Uzayasīge n'urutambiro n'ibikoresho byarwo byose
Exodus40:11 Uzayasīge igikarabiro n'igitereko cyacyo
Exodus40:12 “Uzazane Aroni n'abahungu be ku muryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus40:13 Uzambike Aroni imyambaro y'umutambyi
Exodus40:14 Uzazane n'abahungu be ubambike amakanzu
Exodus40:15 ubasukeho amavuta nk'uko wayasutse kuri se
Exodus40:16 Musa akora ibyo Uhoraho yari yamutegetse byose.
Exodus40:17 Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa mbere bamaze umwaka bavuye mu Misiri
Exodus40:18 bayobowe na Musa. Bashinga ibizingiti mu birenge byabyo
Exodus40:19 barishyira hejuru yabyo maze bararisakara
Exodus40:20 Musa afata bya bisate by'amabuye byanditsweho Amategeko abishyira mu Isanduku
Exodus40:21 Bashyira Isanduku mu Ihema bakingaho umwenda wabigenewe
Exodus40:22 Bashyira ameza mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro iburyo
Exodus40:23 Musa ayashyiriraho imigati mu Cyumba kizira inenge
Exodus40:24 Bashyira igitereko cy'amatara mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro ibumoso ahateganye n'ameza
Exodus40:25 Musa aterekeraho amatara mu Cyumba kizira inenge
Exodus40:26 Bashyira igicaniro cy'izahabu mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro hino y'umwenda
Exodus40:27 Musa yoserezaho imibavu ihumura neza
Exodus40:28 Nuko bakinga umwenda ku muryango w'Ihema.
Exodus40:29 Bashyira urutambiro imbere y'umuryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus40:30 Bashyira igikarabiro hagati y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'urutambiro
Exodus40:31 Musa na Aroni n'abahungu be bajyaga bakarabiramo intoki bakoga n'ibirenge
Exodus40:32 mbere yo kwinjira mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Exodus40:33 Bubaka urugo ruzengurutse Ihema n'urutambiro
Exodus40:34 Igicu gitwikīra Ihema ry'ibonaniro maze ikuzo ry'Uhoraho riraryuzura
Exodus40:35 ku buryo Musa atashoboye kwinjiramo.
Exodus40:36 Kuva icyo gihe Abisiraheli ntibakomezaga urugendo icyo gicu kitavuye ku Ihema.
Exodus40:37 Iyo kitarivagaho
Exodus40:38 Icyo gicu cy'Uhoraho cyagumaga hejuru y'Ihema ku manywa
Leviticus1:1 Uhoraho ahamagara Musa
Leviticus1:2 ngo ashyikirize Abisiraheli amabwiriza akurikira: Umuntu ushaka gutambira Uhoraho itungo
Leviticus1:3 Umuntu natamba iryo mu matungo maremare ho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus1:4 Azarambike ikiganza ku mutwe w'icyo kimasa
Leviticus1:5 Azakicire imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus1:6 Uwo muntu azagikureho uruhu
Leviticus1:7 Nuko bene Aroni umutambyi bazashyire inkwi ku rutambiro bacane.
Leviticus1:8 Nyir'ikimasa namara koza inyama zo mu nda n'amaguru
Leviticus1:9 
Leviticus1:10 Nihagira umuntu utamba intama cyangwa ihene ho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus1:11 Azayicire imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro mu ruhande rwo mu majyaruguru y'urutambiro
Leviticus1:12 Nyir'itungo azaricemo ibice
Leviticus1:13 
Leviticus1:14 Nihagira umuntu utambira Uhoraho ikiguruka ho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus1:15 Umutambyi azayizane ku rutambiro ayice umutwe awutwikire ku rutambiro
Leviticus1:16 Azayikuremo agatorero n'ibikarimo
Leviticus1:17 Iyo numa azayitanyurire hagati y'amababa
Leviticus2:1 Umuntu natura Uhoraho ituro ry'ifu y'ibinyampeke
Leviticus2:2 Azarizanire abatambyi bene Aroni. Umwe muri bo akureho wa mubavu wose
Leviticus2:3 Ibisigaye byavuye ku ituro ritwikwa bizabe ibya Aroni n'abamukomokaho gusa
Leviticus2:4 Niba ari ituro ry'imigati yokejwe mu ifuru
Leviticus2:5 Niba ari ituro ry'utugati dukaranze ku ipanu igaramye
Leviticus2:6 Iyo migati imanyagurwemo ibice maze bisukweho amavuta
Leviticus2:7 Niba ari ituro ry'utugati dukaranze ku ipanu ifukuye
Leviticus2:8 Bene ayo maturo y'ibinyampeke bajye bayazanira Uhoraho
Leviticus2:9 Nuko afateho igice kibe ikimenyetso cy'uko byose byatuwe Uhoraho
Leviticus2:10 Ibisigaye byavuye ku ituro ritwikwa bizabe ibya Aroni n'abamukomokaho gusa
Leviticus2:11 Ntimugature Uhoraho ituro ry'ibinyampeke ririmo umusemburo. Amaturo atwikwa ntagomba kubamo umusemburo cyangwa ubuki.
Leviticus2:12 Mushobora kubimutura ho ituro ry'umuganura
Leviticus2:13 Ituro ryose ry'ibinyampeke mutura mujye murishyiramo umunyu
Leviticus2:14 Niba ari ituro ry'umuganura mutura Uhoraho
Leviticus2:15 Mujye musukaho amavuta kandi mushyireho n'umubavu
Leviticus2:16 Umutambyi ajye atwika uwo mubavu wose n'igice cy'impeke kivanze n'amavuta
Leviticus3:1 Umuntu natamba inka ho igitambo cy'umusangiro yaba ikimasa cyangwa inyana
Leviticus3:2 Azayirambike ikiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus3:3 Kuri icyo gitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus3:4 
Leviticus3:5 Nuko abatambyi babitwikire ku rutambiro hamwe n'igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus3:6 Umuntu natambira Uhoraho intama cyangwa ihene ho igitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus3:7 Niba ari intama
Leviticus3:8 Azarambike ikiganza ku mutwe wayo
Leviticus3:9 Kuri icyo gitambo cy'umusangiro ajye akuraho urugimbu rwacyo
Leviticus3:10 
Leviticus3:11 Nuko ibyo byokurya umutambyi abitwikire ku rutambiro
Leviticus3:12 Umuntu natamba ihene ho igitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus3:13 Azarambike ikiganza ku mutwe wayo
Leviticus3:14 Kuri icyo gitambo ajye akuraho urugimbu rwose rwo ku nyama zo mu nda
Leviticus3:15 
Leviticus3:16 Nuko ibyo byokurya umutambyi abitwikire ku rutambiro
Leviticus3:17 Ntimukarye urugimbu cyangwa amaraso
Leviticus4:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus4:2 kubwira Abisiraheli yuko umuntu ukoze icyaha atabigambiriye
Leviticus4:3 Niba ari Umutambyi mukuru ukoze icyaha agatuma Abisiraheli batababarirwa ibyaha
Leviticus4:4 Azane icyo kimasa ku Ihema ry'ibonaniro imbere y'Uhoraho
Leviticus4:5 Afate ku maraso yacyo ayajyane mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus4:6 ayakozemo urutoki ayatere incuro ndwi mu Cyumba kizira inenge imbere y'Uhoraho.
Leviticus4:7 Afate ku maraso asigaye
Leviticus4:8 Nuko akureho urugimbu rwose rw'icyo kimasa cyatambwe ho igitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha
Leviticus4:9 n'impyiko zombi n'urugimbu rwazo n'ityazo ry'umwijima
Leviticus4:10 nk'uko babigenza ku nka y'igitambo cy'umusangiro. Umutambyi abitwikire ku rutambiro.
Leviticus4:11 Naho uruhu rw'icyo kimasa n'inyama zacyo zose
Leviticus4:12 mbese ibisigaye byose
Leviticus4:13 Niba ari Abisiraheli bose bakoze icyaha batabigambiriye kandi batabizi
Leviticus4:14 Icyo cyaha nikimenyekana
Leviticus4:15 Abe ari ho abakuru b'Abisiraheli bakirambikira ibiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus4:16 Umutambyi mukuru afate ku maraso yacyo ayajyane mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus4:17 ayakozemo urutoki
Leviticus4:18 Afate ku maraso asigaye
Leviticus4:19 Hanyuma akureho urugimbu rwose rw'icyo kimasa
Leviticus4:20 Ajye akurikiza imihango y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus4:21 Ibisigaye by'icyo kimasa abijyane inyuma y'inkambi
Leviticus4:22 Niba ari umutware ukoze icyaha atabigambiriye
Leviticus4:23 Namenya icyaha cye ajye azana igitambo cy'isekurume y'ihene idafite inenge
Leviticus4:24 ayirambike ikiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus4:25 Umutambyi akoze urutoki mu maraso y'icyo gitambo ayasīge ku mahembe y'urutambiro
Leviticus4:26 urugimbu rwose rw'iyo hene arutwikire ku rutambiro nk'uko babigenza ku bitambo by'umusangiro. Uko ni ko umutambyi azajya ahongerera icyaha cy'umutware
Leviticus4:27 Niba ari umuturage usanzwe ukoze icyaha atabigambiriye
Leviticus4:28 Namenya icyaha cye
Leviticus4:29 ayirambike ikiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus4:30 Umutambyi akoze urutoki mu maraso y'icyo gitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha
Leviticus4:31 Uwo muturage akureho urugimbu rwayo rwose nk'uko babigenza ku gitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus4:32 Uwo muturage natura umwana w'intama ho igitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha cye
Leviticus4:33 ayirambike ikiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus4:34 Umutambyi akoze urutoki mu maraso y'icyo gitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha
Leviticus4:35 Uwo muturage akureho urugimbu rwayo rwose nk'uko babigenza ku ntama y'igitambo cy'umusangiro. Nuko umutambyi arutwikire ku rutambiro hamwe n'andi maturo atwikwa batuye Uhoraho. Uko ni ko umutambyi azajya ahongerera icyaha cy'umuturage usanzwe
Leviticus5:1 Umuntu niyanga kuba umugabo w'ibyo yabonye cyangwa yumvise azaba acumuye
Leviticus5:2 Umuntu nakora ku kintu gihumanye atabishaka
Leviticus5:3 Umuntu nakora ku muntu uhumanye na we azaba ahumanye nubwo yaba yamukozeho atabizi
Leviticus5:4 Umuntu narahirira ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose adatekereje ku ngaruka zacyo
Leviticus5:5 Umuntu nakora kimwe muri ibyo byaha ajye yemera ko yagikoze
Leviticus5:6 maze azane inyagazi y'intama cyangwa ishashi y'ihene ho igitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha yakoze. Uko ni ko azajya yiyunga n'Uhoraho
Leviticus5:7 Niba ari umukene udashobora kubona intama cyangwa ihene
Leviticus5:8 Umutambyi namara kuzākīra
Leviticus5:9 Afate ku maraso yayo ayaminjagire ku ruhande rw'urutambiro
Leviticus5:10 Indi numa ayitambe ho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus5:11 Niba ari umutindi udashobora kubona intungura ebyiri cyangwa inuma ebyiri
Leviticus5:12 Umutambyi namara kwākīra iyo fu
Leviticus5:13 Ifu isigaye ibe iy'umutambyi
Leviticus5:14 Uhoraho aha Musa amabwiriza akurikira:
Leviticus5:15 umuntu nacumura atabigambiriye ntatange amaturo yeguriwe Uhoraho
Leviticus5:16 Kandi amaturo atatanze ajye ayishyura yongeyeho kimwe cya gatanu
Leviticus5:17 Umuntu nacumura atabigambiriye agakora icyo Uhoraho yababujije cyose
Leviticus5:18 Ajye azanira umutambyi isekurume y'intama idafite inenge y'igiciro gihagije
Leviticus5:19 Uwo muntu ajye atanga igitambo cyo kwiyunga n'Uhoraho
Leviticus5:20 Uhoraho arakomeza aha Musa amabwiriza akurikira:
Leviticus5:21 umuntu nateshuka agacumura ku Uhoraho
Leviticus5:22 cyangwa nk'uwatoye ikintu cya mugenzi we akabihakana
Leviticus5:23 Umuntu uzacumura atyo ajye asubiza icyo yibye cyangwa icyo yariganyije
Leviticus5:24 cyangwa icyo yarahiriyeho ibinyoma cyose. Ajye asubiza nyiracyo ikintu cye cyose yongereyeho kimwe cya gatanu
Leviticus5:25 Nuko azanire umutambyi isekurume y'intama idafite inenge y'igiciro gihagije
Leviticus5:26 Umutambyi ajye ahongerera igicumuro cyose uwo muntu yakoze
Leviticus6:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus6:2 guha Aroni n'abahungu be aya mabwiriza: Dore amategeko yerekeye igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro: icya nimugoroba kijye kirara kigurumanira ku rutambiro kigeze mu gitondo
Leviticus6:3 Umutambyi ajye yambara ikanzu y'umweru n'ikabutura y'umweru
Leviticus6:4 Hanyuma ahindure imyambaro
Leviticus6:5 Umuriro wo ku rutambiro ntukigere uzima
Leviticus6:6 Umuriro ujye uhora waka ku rutambiro
Leviticus6:7 Dore amategeko yerekeye amaturo y'ibinyampeke: bene Aroni bajye bayazanira Uhoraho imbere y'urutambiro.
Leviticus6:8 Umwe muri bo akureho umubavu wose uriho
Leviticus6:9 Ibisigaye bibe ibya Aroni n'abamukomokaho. Ni umugabane uva ku maturo atwikwa
Leviticus6:10 
Leviticus6:11 Abakomoka kuri Aroni b'igitsinagabo bonyine ni bo bashobora kuryaho
Leviticus6:12 Uhoraho arakomeza aha Musa aya mabwiriza:
Leviticus6:13 Aroni n'abamukomokaho nibamara kwegurirwa Uhoraho
Leviticus6:14 Bajye bayivanga n'amavuta maze bayikoremo utugati dukaranze ku ipanu
Leviticus6:15 Umutambyi mukuru ukomoka kuri Aroni ajye ahora atura ayo maturo
Leviticus6:16 Igihe abatambyi batuye amaturo yabo y'ibinyampeke bajye bayatwika yose uko yakabaye
Leviticus6:17 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus6:18 guha Aroni n'abahungu be aya mategeko yerekeye igitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha: itungo ry'icyo gitambo rijye ryicirwa imbere y'Ihema ry'Uhoraho
Leviticus6:19 Umutambyi ugitamba ni we ushobora kuryaho
Leviticus6:20 Ikintu cyose kizakora ku nyama zacyo kizaba cyeguriwe Uhoraho. Amaraso y'icyo gitambo nameneka ku mwambaro
Leviticus6:21 Inyama zacyo nibaziteka mu nkono y'ibumba
Leviticus6:22 Abatambyi n'abahungu babo ni bo bonyine bashobora kurya kuri ibyo bitambo
Leviticus6:23 Ariko ntibakarye igitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha cy'umutambyi cyangwa icy'Abisiraheli bose
Leviticus7:1 Dore amategeko yerekeye igitambo cyo kwiyunga n'Uhoraho: ni igitambo cyamweguriwe rwose.
Leviticus7:2 Bajye bicira isekurume y'intama aho bicira amatungo y'ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus7:3 Nyir'iyo sekurume ajye akuraho urugimbu rwayo rwose
Leviticus7:4 
Leviticus7:5 Nuko umutambyi abitwikire byose ku rutambiro
Leviticus7:6 cyamweguriwe rwose. Abatambyi n'abahungu babo ni bo bonyine bashobora kurya ku nyama zisigaye
Leviticus7:7 Zijye ziba iz'uwatambye icyo gitambo cyo kwiyunga n'Uhoraho
Leviticus7:8 Umuntu natura itungo ho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus7:9 Amaturo y'ibinyampeke yokejwe mu ifuru cyangwa akaranze
Leviticus7:10 Naho amaturo y'ibinyampeke adatetse
Leviticus7:11 Dore amategeko yerekeye ibitambo by'umusangiro biturwa Uhoraho:
Leviticus7:12 niba ari igitambo cyo gushimira Uhoraho
Leviticus7:13 yongereho n'imigati isembuye.
Leviticus7:14 Afate umugati umwe umwe kuri buri bwoko
Leviticus7:15 Inyama z'igitambo cy'umusangiro cyo gushimira Uhoraho zijye ziribwa uwo munsi
Leviticus7:16 Niba icyo gitambo cy'umusangiro ari icyo guhigura umuhigo cyangwa icy'ubushake
Leviticus7:17 ariko nihagira izisigara ku munsi ukurikiyeho
Leviticus7:18 Nibazirya nyuma y'iyo minsi ibiri
Leviticus7:19 Inyama zakoze ku gihumanye cyose ntizikaribwe
Leviticus7:20 Nihagira umuntu uhumanye uziryaho ajye acibwa mu bwoko bwe.
Leviticus7:21 Uzaziryaho yakoze ku muntu uhumanye cyangwa inyamaswa ihumanye cyangwa ku kintu cyose kizira
Leviticus7:22 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa
Leviticus7:23 guha Abisiraheli aya mabwiriza ati: “Ntimukarye urugimbu urwo ari rwo rwose
Leviticus7:24 Urugimbu rw'itungo ryapfuye cyangwa ryatanyaguwe n'inyamaswa ntimukarurye
Leviticus7:25 Umuntu uzarya ku rugimbu rw'itungo ry'igitambo gitwikwa yatuye Uhoraho
Leviticus7:26 “Aho mwaba muri hose ntimukarye amaraso
Leviticus7:27 Umuntu wese uzarya amaraso ajye acibwa mu bwoko bwe.”
Leviticus7:28 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa
Leviticus7:29 guha Abisiraheli aya mabwiriza: umuntu uzanye itungo ry'igitambo cy'umusangiro ajye atura Uhoraho umugabane umugenewe.
Leviticus7:30 Ajye yizanira urugimbu n'inkoro
Leviticus7:31 ihabwe Aroni n'abamukomokaho
Leviticus7:32 Itako ry'iburyo ry'itungo ry'igitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus7:33 waminjagiye amaraso agatwika urugimbu rw'icyo gitambo. Iryo tako ni umugabane w'uwo mutambyi.
Leviticus7:34 Uhoraho yatse Abisiraheli iyo nkoro n'iryo tako byo ku gitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus7:35 Uwo mugabane w'amaturo atwikwa y'Uhoraho wahawe Aroni n'abahungu be
Leviticus7:36 Uwo munsi Uhoraho yategetse Abisiraheli gutanga uwo mugabane
Leviticus7:37 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus7:38 Uhoraho yahereye Musa ayo mategeko ku musozi wa Sinayi
Leviticus8:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Leviticus8:2 “Zana Aroni n'abahungu be
Leviticus8:3 uhamagaze Abisiraheli bose bateranire imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro.”
Leviticus8:4 Musa akora ibyo Uhoraho yamutegetse. Nuko Abisiraheli bateranira imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus8:5 Musa arababwira ati: “Ngiye gukora ibyo Uhoraho yantegetse.”
Leviticus8:6 Musa ahamagara Aroni n'abahungu be arabuhagira
Leviticus8:7 yambika Aroni ikanzu ndende amukenyeza umukandara
Leviticus8:8 amwambika Agafuka ko mu gituza agashyiramo ibikoresho byitwa Urimu na Tumimu
Leviticus8:9 amwambika n'ingofero ayifungaho agasate k'izahabu ku ruhanga
Leviticus8:10 Musa afata amavuta ayasīga Ihema n'ibiririmo byose
Leviticus8:11 Ayaminjagira ku rutambiro incuro ndwi
Leviticus8:12 Afata kuri ayo mavuta ayasuka ku mutwe wa Aroni
Leviticus8:13 Abahungu ba Aroni na bo Musa abigiza imbere abambika amakanzu
Leviticus8:14 Azana ikimasa cy'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus8:15 Musa aracyica afata ku maraso yacyo
Leviticus8:16 Musa afata urugimbu rwose rwo ku nyama zo mu nda
Leviticus8:17 Izindi nyama z'ikimasa n'uruhu n'amayezi abitwikira inyuma y'inkambi
Leviticus8:18 Azana isekurume y'intama y'igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus8:19 Musa arayica maze amaraso yayo ayaminjagira ku mpande z'urutambiro.
Leviticus8:20 Arayibaga yoza inyama zo mu nda n'amaguru
Leviticus8:21 
Leviticus8:22 Azana n'isekurume y'igitambo cyo kwegurira abatambyi Uhoraho
Leviticus8:23 Musa arayica afata ku maraso yayo
Leviticus8:24 Musa abigenza atyo no ku bahungu ba Aroni
Leviticus8:25 Afata urugimbu rw'iyo sekurume y'intama n'umurizo wayo
Leviticus8:26 agerekaho n'umugati udasembuye n'akagati gatekesheje amavuta
Leviticus8:27 Byose abishyira mu biganza bya Aroni no mu by'abahungu be
Leviticus8:28 Hanyuma babisubiza Musa
Leviticus8:29 Musa afata inkoro y'isekurume y'igitambo cyo kwegurira abatambyi Uhoraho
Leviticus8:30 Musa afata ku mavuta yo gusīga no ku maraso yari ku rutambiro
Leviticus8:31 Musa abwira Aroni n'abahungu be ati: “Mutekere izi nyama zisigaye z'isekurume ya kabiri imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus8:32 Nihagira inyama cyangwa imigati bisigara muzabitwike.
Leviticus8:33 Muzamare iminsi irindwi imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus8:34 Ibyo tumaze gukora byategetswe n'Uhoraho kugira ngo mubabarirwe ibyaha.
Leviticus8:35 None muzagume hano imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro amanywa n'ijoro
Leviticus8:36 Nuko Aroni n'abahungu be bakurikiza ibyo Uhoraho yategetse Musa byose.
Leviticus9:1 Ya minsi irindwi ishize
Leviticus9:2 Abwira Aroni ati: “Shaka ikimasa kidafite inenge cy'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus9:3 Hanyuma ubwire Abisiraheli uti: ‘Nimuzane isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus9:4 Muzane n'inka n'isekurume y'intama by'igitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus9:5 Nuko bajyana imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro ibyo Musa yari yabategetse
Leviticus9:6 Musa arababwira ati: “Ngibyo ibyo Uhoraho yabategetse gukora kugira ngo mubone ikuzo rye.”
Leviticus9:7 Musa abwira Aroni ati: “Egera urutambiro utambe igitambo cyawe cyo guhongerera ibyaha n'igikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus9:8 Aroni yegera urutambiro yica ikimasa cy'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha bye.
Leviticus9:9 Abahungu be bamuzanira amaraso yacyo
Leviticus9:10 Nuko urugimbu n'impyiko n'ityazo ry'umwijima by'icyo kimasa
Leviticus9:11 izindi nyama n'uruhu abitwikira inyuma y'inkambi.
Leviticus9:12 Hanyuma yica isekurume y'intama y'igitambo cye gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus9:13 Bamuzanira inyama n'igihanga abitwikira ku rutambiro
Leviticus9:14 yoza inyama zo mu nda n'amaguru
Leviticus9:15 Nuko azana amaturo y'Abisiraheli. Afata isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha byabo
Leviticus9:16 Afata na cya kimasa cya kabiri na wa mwana w'intama
Leviticus9:17 Azana na ya maturo y'ibinyampeke afataho ayuzuye urushyi
Leviticus9:18 Yica inka n'isekurume y'intama abantu batanze ho igitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus9:19 Bamuzanira n'urugimbu rwazo. Urugimbu rw'inyama zo mu nda n'impyiko zazo
Leviticus9:20 babishyira hejuru y'inkoro zazo
Leviticus9:21 Naho izo nkoro n'amatako y'iburyo
Leviticus9:22 Aroni amaze gutamba ibitambo byo guhongerera ibyaha n'ibikongorwa n'iby'umusangiro
Leviticus9:23 Musa na Aroni binjira mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus9:24 Muri ako kanya Uhoraho yohereza umuriro ku rutambiro
Leviticus10:1 Nadabu na Abihu bene Aroni bafata ibyotezo
Leviticus10:2 Nuko Uhoraho yohereza umuriro urabakongora
Leviticus10:3 Musa abwira Aroni ati: “Ibi ni byo Uhoraho yavuze ati: ‘Abatambyi bagomba kunyubaha kuko ndi umuziranenge
Leviticus10:4 Musa ahamagaza Mishayeli na Elisafani abahungu ba se wabo Uziyeli
Leviticus10:5 Baraza bayitwara yambaye amakanzu y'abatambyi bayijyana inyuma y'inkambi
Leviticus10:6 Nuko Musa abwira Aroni n'abandi bahungu be
Leviticus10:7 Naho mwebwe mwasīzwe amavuta mwegurirwa Uhoraho
Leviticus10:8 Uhoraho abwira Aroni ati:
Leviticus10:9 “Wowe n'abahungu bawe ntimukanywe divayi cyangwa indi nzoga isindisha muri bwinjire mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus10:10 kugira ngo mubone uko mutandukanya ibinyeguriwe n'ibisanzwe
Leviticus10:11 kandi ngo mubone uko mwigisha Abisiraheli amategeko yose nabahaye nyanyujije kuri Musa.”
Leviticus10:12 Musa abwira Aroni n'abahungu yari asigaranye
Leviticus10:13 Mujye muyarira imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus10:14 Mu gihe Abisiraheli bazanye ibitambo by'umusangiro
Leviticus10:15 
Leviticus10:16 Musa abajije ibya ya sekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha by'Abisiraheli
Leviticus10:17 “Kiriya gitambo cyari icyo guhongerera ibyaha bya rubanda
Leviticus10:18 Muzi ko mutajyanye amaraso yacyo mu Ihema
Leviticus10:19 Aroni asubiza Musa ati: “Dore Abisiraheli batambiye Uhoraho igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha byabo n'igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro. Ariko uyu munsi sinariye kuri izo nyama kuko napfushije abahungu banjye. Mbese hari icyo bitwaye Uhoraho?”
Leviticus10:20 Musa anyurwa n'icyo gisubizo.
Leviticus11:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa na Aroni
Leviticus11:2 kumenyesha Abisiraheli inyama bashobora kurya. Arababwira ati: “Mu matungo n'inyamaswa
Leviticus11:3 ibyūza kandi bifite inzara z'ibinono zigabanyijemo kabiri.
Leviticus11:4 Ariko ingamiya nubwo yūza ntimukayirye
Leviticus11:5 Impereryi na yo nubwo yūza ntimukayirye
Leviticus11:6 Urukwavu na rwo nubwo rwūza ntimukarurye
Leviticus11:7 N'ingurube na yo
Leviticus11:8 Ntimukarye ku nyama zabyo cyangwa ngo mukore ku ntumbi zabyo
Leviticus11:9 “Mu biba mu mazi ari mu migezi cyangwa mu biyaga cyangwa mu nyanja
Leviticus11:10 Ariko ibidafite amababa n'isharankima
Leviticus11:11 Ntimukarye inyama zabyo cyangwa ngo mukore ku ntumbi zabyo.
Leviticus11:12 Ibiba mu mazi byose bidafite amababa n'isharankima
Leviticus11:13 “Mu biguruka
Leviticus11:14 na sakabaka n'icyarūzi uko amoko yacyo ari
Leviticus11:15 n'amoko yose y'ibikōna
Leviticus11:16 na mbuni na nyirabarazana
Leviticus11:17 n'inzoya n'igihunyira gito n'igihunyira kinini
Leviticus11:18 n'igihunyira cy'amatwi n'uruyongoyongo n'ikizu
Leviticus11:19 n'umusambi n'igishondabagabo uko amoko yacyo ari
Leviticus11:20 “Udusimba twose tuguruka kandi tugendesha amamaguru
Leviticus11:21 uretse udusimbuka.
Leviticus11:22 Nuko rero mushobora kurya amoko yose y'inzige n'isanane n'ibihōre.
Leviticus11:23 Ariko utundi dusimba twose tuguruka kandi tugendesha amaguru
Leviticus11:24 “Umuntu wese ukoze ku ntumbi y'inyamaswa cyangwa y'itungo
Leviticus11:25 Umuntu wese uteruye iyo ntumbi ajye amesa imyambaro ye
Leviticus11:26 Inyamaswa zose zidafite inzara z'ibinono zigabanyijemo kabiri kandi ntizūze
Leviticus11:27 Inyamaswa zose z'amajanja na zo kuri mwe zirahumanye. Umuntu wese ukoze ku ntumbi yazo aba ahumanye kugeza nimugoroba
Leviticus11:28 uteruye intumbi yazo ajye amesa imyambaro ye kandi yirirwe ahumanye kugeza nimugoroba
Leviticus11:29 “Mu tunyamaswa dukururuka
Leviticus11:30 n'icyugu n'igihangara n'ikibangu n'uruvu.
Leviticus11:31 Umuntu wese ukoze ku ntumbi ya kamwe muri two
Leviticus11:32 Intumbi yako iyo iguye ku gikoresho icyo ari cyo cyose
Leviticus11:33 Intumbi yako iyo iguye mu gikoresho cyose cy'ibumba
Leviticus11:34 Iyo amazi yo mu gikoresho nk'icyo atarukiye ku biribwa birahumana
Leviticus11:35 Iyo iguye ku kindi gikoresho
Leviticus11:36 Nyamara amariba cyangwa ibigega by'amazi iguyemo ntibiba bihumanye
Leviticus11:37 Iyo iguye mu myaka
Leviticus11:38 ariko iyo iguye mu myaka bashyize mu mazi
Leviticus11:39 “Itungo mushobora kurya niryipfusha
Leviticus11:40 Haramutse hari uriye ku nyama zaryo ajye amesa imyambaro ye
Leviticus11:41 “Udusimba twose dukururuka hasi turazira
Leviticus11:42 Ntimukarye udusimba twose dukurura inda hasi
Leviticus11:43 Mujye muziririza utwo dusimba kugira ngo tutabahumanya.
Leviticus11:44 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Leviticus11:45 Ndi Uhoraho wabakuye mu Misiri kugira ngo mbabere Imana
Leviticus11:46 “Ngayo amabwiriza yerekeye inyamaswa n'amatungo
Leviticus11:47 Muyaherewe kumenya gutandukanya ibihumanye n'ibidahumanye
Leviticus12:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus12:2 guha Abisiraheli aya mabwiriza: Iyo umugore abyaye umuhungu amara iminsi irindwi ahumanye
Leviticus12:3 Kuva ku munsi wa munani ari wo umwana akebwaho
Leviticus12:4 umugore amara iminsi mirongo itatu n'itatu agihumanyijwe n'amaraso yatakaje abyara. Muri iyo minsi nta kintu cyeguriwe Uhoraho akoraho
Leviticus12:5 Iyo abyaye umukobwa amara iminsi cumi n'ine ahumanye
Leviticus12:6 Iminsi yo guhumana nirangira
Leviticus12:7 Umutambyi ajye abitambira Uhoraho
Leviticus12:8 Niba uwo mugore ari umukene adashobora kubona umwana w'intama
Leviticus13:1 Uhoraho aha Musa na Aroni aya mabwiriza:
Leviticus13:2 Umuntu nagira ikibyimba cyangwa ibisekera cyangwa amahumane ku mubiri
Leviticus13:3 Umutambyi ajye asuzuma ubwo burwayi
Leviticus13:4 Ariko umutambyi nasanga ari amahumane yeruruka kandi bitagaragara ko agera imbere mu mubiri
Leviticus13:5 Iminsi irindwi nishira umutambyi ajye yongera amusuzume
Leviticus13:6 Na none iyo minsi nishira umutambyi azongere amusuzume
Leviticus13:7 Ariko ibyo bisekera nibyiyongera muri iyo minsi irindwi
Leviticus13:8 Umutambyi nasanga ibisekera byariyongereye
Leviticus13:9 Umuntu nafatwa n'indwara y'uruhu yanduza bajye bamushyira umutambyi
Leviticus13:10 amusuzume. Namusangana ikibyimba cyeruruka n'ubwoya bw'aho kiri ari umweru n'inyama yo muri cyo yanamye
Leviticus13:11 izaba ari indwara y'uruhu yanduza yamwaritsemo. Umutambyi ajye atangaza ko uwo muntu ahumanye. Ntakirirwe amushyira ukwe kwa wenyine ngo bategereze kumugenzura
Leviticus13:12 Ariko umutambyi nasanga iyo ndwara yarasheshe umubiri wose kuva ku mutwe kugeza ku birenge
Leviticus13:13 kandi umubiri wose warerurutse
Leviticus13:14 Ariko nihagira aho abonekwaho n'inyama yanamye azaba ahumanye.
Leviticus13:15 Umutambyi ajye asuzuma iyo nyama atangaze ko uwo muntu ahumanye. Iyo habonetse inyama yanamye biba ari ikimenyetso cy'indwara y'uruhu yanduza
Leviticus13:16 Icyakora niba iyo nyama isubiranye inkovu igahinduka umweru
Leviticus13:17 amusuzume. Umutambyi nasanga inkovu ari umweru
Leviticus13:18 Niba umuntu yararwaye igisebe kigakira
Leviticus13:19 ariko mu nkovu yacyo hakazamo ikibyimba cyeruruka cyangwa urubara
Leviticus13:20 amusuzume. Nasanga ubwo burwayi buri imbere mu mubiri kandi ubwoya bwaho ari umweru
Leviticus13:21 Ariko nasanga butari imbere mu mubiri kandi bwaroroshye n'ubwoya bwaho atari umweru
Leviticus13:22 Iyo minsi nishira
Leviticus13:23 Ariko nasanga butariyongereye izaba ari inkovu isanzwe
Leviticus13:24 Umuntu nashya maze ubushye bukagaragaramo inyama yeruruka cyangwa igajuka
Leviticus13:25 umutambyi ajye amusuzuma. Nasanga ubwoya bwaho ari umweru
Leviticus13:26 Ariko umutambyi nasanga nta bwoya bw'umweru burimo n'ubushye butari imbere mu mubiri ahubwo bworoha
Leviticus13:27 Iminsi irindwi nishira
Leviticus13:28 Ariko ubwo burwayi nibwigumira aho ntibwiyongere ahubwo bukaba butangiye koroha

Leviticus13:32 Iminsi irindwi nishira
Leviticus13:33 uwo muntu ajye yiyogoshesha ariko ahari ibihushi bahihorere
Leviticus13:34 Iminsi irindwi nishira
Leviticus13:35 Ariko nyuma yaho ibihushi nibyiyongera
Leviticus13:36 umutambyi ajye amusuzuma
Leviticus13:37 Icyakora umutambyi nasanga ibihushi bitariyongereye
Leviticus13:38 Umugabo cyangwa umugore nagira amahumane yeruruka ku mubiri
Leviticus13:39 umutambyi ajye amusuzuma
Leviticus13:40 Umuntu namera uruhara azaba adahumanye
Leviticus13:41 niruturuka mu masoso na bwo azaba adahumanye
Leviticus13:42 ariko mu ruhara rwo mu masoso cyangwa rwo mu gitwariro nihazamo urubara
Leviticus13:43 Umutambyi ajye asuzuma urwo ruhara
Leviticus13:44 izaba ari indwara y'uruhu yanduza
Leviticus13:45 Umuntu urwaye indwara y'uruhu yanduza
Leviticus13:46 Igihe cyose azaba arwaye iyo ndwara yanduza azaba ahumanye
Leviticus13:47 Uruhumbu nirutonda ku mwambaro w'ubwoya cyangwa w'ubudodo
Leviticus13:48 cyangwa ku yindi myenda y'ubwoya cyangwa y'ubudodo
Leviticus13:49 kandi rukaba rusa n'icyatsi kibisi cyangwa rutukura
Leviticus13:50 Namara gusuzuma icyo ruriho
Leviticus13:51 Iminsi irindwi nishira agasanga uruhumbu rwarakwiriye kuri icyo kintu
Leviticus13:52 Umutambyi ajye agitwika kuko urwo ruhumbu rudashobora kukivamo.
Leviticus13:53 Ariko nagisuzuma agasanga uruhumbu rutaragikwiriyemo
Leviticus13:54 ajye ategeka ko bakimesa
Leviticus13:55 Iyo minsi irindwi nishira umutambyi azongere agisuzume
Leviticus13:56 Ariko umutambyi nasanga uruhumbu rwaragabanutse
Leviticus13:57 Nyamara nirwongera gutonda kuri icyo kintu kandi rukiyongera
Leviticus13:58 Icyakora umutambyi nasuzuma bene icyo kintu agategeka ko bakimesa
Leviticus13:59 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye uruhumbu rwo ku myambaro y'ubwoya cyangwa y'ubudodo
Leviticus14:1 Uhoraho aha Musa
Leviticus14:2 amategeko yerekeye guhumanurwa k'umuntu wakize indwara y'uruhu yanduza. Bajye bamushyīra umutambyi
Leviticus14:3 umutambyi asohoke amusuzumire inyuma y'inkambi. Nasanga uwo muntu yarakize indwara ye
Leviticus14:4 umutambyi ategeke ko bashakira ugiye guhumanurwa inyoni ebyiri nzima zidahumanye
Leviticus14:5 Umutambyi ategeke kwicira inyoni imwe hejuru y'urwabya rw'ibumba rurimo amazi y'iriba.
Leviticus14:6 Nuko ashyire inyoni ikiri nzima mu maraso ya ya yindi biciye hejuru y'urwabya rurimo amazi y'iriba
Leviticus14:7 ayaminjagire incuro ndwi kuri uwo muntu ahumanura. Umutambyi namara gutangaza ko uwo muntu ahumanuwe
Leviticus14:8 Uwahumanuwe amese imyambaro ye
Leviticus14:9 Ku munsi wa karindwi azongere yiyogosheshe umusatsi n'ubwanwa n'ibitsike
Leviticus14:10 Ku munsi wa munani afate abana b'intama babiri b'amasekurume badafite inenge
Leviticus14:11 Umutambyi uhumanura uwo muntu amujyanane n'amaturo ye imbere y'Uhoraho
Leviticus14:12 Umutambyi afate umwana w'intama umwe w'igitambo cyo kwiyunga n'Uhoraho hamwe na ya mavuta
Leviticus14:13 Ugiye guhumanurwa yicire uwo mwana w'intama mu rugo rw'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus14:14 Umutambyi afate ku maraso y'icyo gitambo
Leviticus14:15 Umutambyi yisuke ku kiganza cy'ibumoso kuri ayo mavuta
Leviticus14:16 hanyuma akozemo urutoki rwe rw'ikiganza cy'iburyo
Leviticus14:17 Ku mavuta asigaye mu kiganza cye
Leviticus14:18 Amavuta asigaye mu kiganza
Leviticus14:19 atambe igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha by'uwo ahumanura kugira ngo ahumanuke. Hanyuma uwo muntu yice umwana w'intama w'igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus14:20 umutambyi agitwikire ku rutambiro hamwe n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke. Bityo umutambyi amuhongerere
Leviticus14:21 Ariko niba uwo ugiye guhumanurwa ari umukene udashobora kubona ayo maturo yose
Leviticus14:22 Azane n'intungura ebyiri cyangwa inuma ebyiri kuko ari zo ashobora kubona
Leviticus14:23 Ku munsi wa munani kuva atangiye guhumanurwa
Leviticus14:24 Umutambyi afate umwana w'intama w'igitambo cyo kwiyunga n'Uhoraho hamwe na ya mavuta
Leviticus14:25 Ugiye guhumanurwa yice umwana w'intama w'igitambo cyo kwiyunga n'Uhoraho. Umutambyi afate ku maraso yacyo
Leviticus14:26 Umutambyi yisuke ku kiganza cy'ibumoso kuri ayo mavuta
Leviticus14:27 hanyuma akozemo urutoki rwe rw'ikiganza cy'iburyo
Leviticus14:28 Ku mavuta asigaye mu kiganza cye
Leviticus14:29 Amavuta asigaye mu kiganza
Leviticus14:30 atambe imwe mu numa uwo mukene yashoboye kubona
Leviticus14:31 ibe igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus14:32 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye umukene wakize indwara y'uruhu yanduza
Leviticus14:33 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni ati:
Leviticus14:34 “Nimugera mu gihugu cya Kanāni mbahaye ho gakondo ngateza uruhumbu ku nzu
Leviticus14:35 nyirayo ajye asanga umutambyi amubwire ko yabonye igisa n'uruhumbu ku nzu ye.
Leviticus14:36 Umutambyi ategeke ko bayisohoramo ibiyirimo byose mbere yuko yinjiramo ngo ayisuzume
Leviticus14:37 Hanyuma asuzume urwo ruhumbu
Leviticus14:38 ajye ayisohokamo ayikinge
Leviticus14:39 Ku munsi wa karindwi umutambyi azongere ayisuzume
Leviticus14:40 ajye ategeka ko bakuramo amabuye ariho uruhumbu
Leviticus14:41 Bayiharure imbere hose
Leviticus14:42 Nuko bashake andi mabuye yo gusimbura ayo bakuyemo
Leviticus14:43 “Ariko uruhumbu nirwongera kuhaboneka bamaze gukuraho amabuye no guhomora inzu bakongera kuyihoma
Leviticus14:44 umutambyi ajye yongera asuzume. Nasanga uruhumbu rwariyongereye
Leviticus14:45 Bajye bayisenya maze amabuye n'ibiti n'ibitaka byayo byose babisohore inyuma y'umujyi
Leviticus14:46 “Uzinjira mu nzu yafunzwe n'umutambyi
Leviticus14:47 Uzayiraramo cyangwa uzayiriramo ajye amesa imyambaro ye.
Leviticus14:48 “Umutambyi nagaruka gusuzuma inzu bamaze kuyihoma
Leviticus14:49 Hanyuma afate inyoni ebyiri n'ishami ry'isederi n'urudodo rutukura n'umushandiko wa hisopo
Leviticus14:50 Inyoni imwe ayicire hejuru y'urwabya rw'ibumba rurimo amazi y'iriba
Leviticus14:51 ashyire inyoni ikiri nzima mu mazi avanze n'amaraso ya ya yindi yishe
Leviticus14:52 Bityo ayihumanure akoresheje amaraso y'inyoni n'amazi y'iriba
Leviticus14:53 Hanyuma arekure inyoni nzima yigurukire ijye ku gasozi
Leviticus14:54 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye indwara zose z'uruhu zanduza

Leviticus14:56 
Leviticus14:57 Ayo mategeko yerekana ibihumanya n'ibidahumanya.
Leviticus15:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni
Leviticus15:2 guha Abisiraheli aya mabwiriza: Umugabo ufashwe n'indwara yo kuninda mu myanya ndangagitsina
Leviticus15:3 Uwo mugabo yaba aninda cyane cyangwa buhoro
Leviticus15:4 Uburiri bwose uwo mugabo uninda aryamyeho buba buhumanye
Leviticus15:5 Ukoze kuri ubwo buriri ajye amesa imyambaro ye kandi yiyuhagire
Leviticus15:6 Uwicaye ku kintu uwo mugabo uninda yicayeho ajye amesa imyambaro ye kandi yiyuhagire
Leviticus15:7 Ukoze kuri uwo mugabo uninda ajye amesa imyambaro ye kandi yiyuhagire
Leviticus15:8 Umugabo uninda nacira amacandwe ku muntu udahumanye
Leviticus15:9 Umugabo uninda nagendera ku itungo riheka abantu
Leviticus15:10 Ukoze ku kintu cyose umugabo uninda yicayeho
Leviticus15:11 Umuntu wese uwo mugabo uninda akozeho adakarabye
Leviticus15:12 Igikoresho cy'ibumba uwo mugabo uninda yakozeho bajye bakimena
Leviticus15:13 Umugabo uninda nakira ajye amara iminsi irindwi
Leviticus15:14 Ku munsi wa munani azane intungura ebyiri cyangwa inuma ebyiri imbere y'Uhoraho mu rugo rw'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus15:15 Imwe umutambyi ayitambe ho igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus15:16 Umugabo nasohora intanga ajye yiyuhagira umubiri wose
Leviticus15:17 Nizigwa ku kintu cyose gikozwe mu mwenda cyangwa mu ruhu ajye akimesa
Leviticus15:18 Umugabo naryamana n'umugore bajye biyuhagira
Leviticus15:19 Umugore cyangwa umukobwa uri mu mihango y'abakobwa
Leviticus15:20 Ikintu cyose yaryamyeho cyangwa icyo yicayeho cyose kiba gihumanye.
Leviticus15:21 Ukoze ku buriri bwe ajye amesa imyambaro ye kandi yiyuhagire
Leviticus15:22 Ukoze ku kintu umugore uri mu mihango yicayeho
Leviticus15:23 Ukoze ku kintu kiri ku buriri bwe cyangwa ku ntebe ye
Leviticus15:24 Umugabo naryamana n'umugore uri mu mihango
Leviticus15:25 Umugore cyangwa umukobwa nafatwa n'indwara yo kuva akayimarana iminsi
Leviticus15:26 Muri iyo minsi uburiri bwose aryamyeho buba buhumanye
Leviticus15:27 Ukoze kuri ibyo bintu wese aba ahumanye. Ajye amesa imyambaro ye kandi yiyuhagire
Leviticus15:28 Uwo mugore uva nakira
Leviticus15:29 Ku munsi wa munani
Leviticus15:30 Imwe umutambyi ayitambe ho igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus15:31 Uhoraho abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Mujye mwitarura ibibahumanya
Leviticus15:32 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye umugabo uhumanyijwe no kuninda cyangwa gusohora intanga
Leviticus15:33 cyangwa kuryamana n'umugore uhumanye. Ayo mategeko kandi yerekeye n'umugore cyangwa umukobwa uri mu mihango y'abakobwa
Leviticus16:1 Nyuma y'urupfu rwa ba bahungu babiri ba Aroni bifashe nabi imbere y'Uhoraho
Leviticus16:2 “Bwira mukuru wawe Aroni ye kujya arenga umwenda ukingirije Icyumba kizira inenge cyane ngo yinjiremo uko ashatse
Leviticus16:3 Uhoraho akomeza guha Musa aya mabwiriza
Leviticus16:4 Ajye yiyuhagira maze yambare imyambaro y'umweru igenewe uwo munsi: ikanzu n'ikabutura
Leviticus16:5 Abisiraheli bajye bamushakira amasekurume y'ihene abiri y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus16:6 Aroni ajye atamba ikimasa cy'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha bye n'iby'umuryango we.
Leviticus16:7 Hanyuma azane ya masekurume y'ihene yombi imbere y'Uhoraho mu rugo rw'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus16:8 azifindire kugira ngo amenye iy'Uhoraho n'iyo kohēra.
Leviticus16:9 Iy'Uhoraho ayitambe ho igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Leviticus16:10 naho iyo kohēra ayizane imbere y'Ihema ry'Uhoraho ari nzima
Leviticus16:11 Dore uko bizakorwa: igihe Aroni azaba atamba ikimasa cye cyo guhongerera ibyaha bye n'iby'umuryango we
Leviticus16:12 ajye akura amakara yaka ku rutambiro ayuzuze icyotezo
Leviticus16:13 Ashyire umubavu kuri ayo makara imbere y'Uhoraho
Leviticus16:14 Akoze urutoki mu maraso ya cya kimasa
Leviticus16:15 Yice isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha by'Abisiraheli
Leviticus16:16 Bityo abe ahumanuye Ihema ryahumanijwe n'uguhumana kw'Abisiraheli
Leviticus16:17 Igihe Aroni azaba yinjiye mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane guhongerera ibyaha bye n'iby'umuryango we n'iby'Abisiraheli bose
Leviticus16:18 Hanyuma asohoke ajye ku rutambiro ruri imbere y'Ihema ry'Uhoraho
Leviticus16:19 Akoze urutoki muri ayo maraso ayatere ku rutambiro incuro ndwi
Leviticus16:20 Aroni namara guhumanura Icyumba kizira inenge cyane
Leviticus16:21 Arambike ibiganza bye byombi ku mutwe wayo
Leviticus16:22 Bityo iyo sekurume ijyane ibyaha byabo byose mu kidaturwa. Nimara kohērwa mu butayu
Leviticus16:23 Aroni ajye yinjira mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus16:24 Ajye yiyuhagirira mu rugo rwaryo
Leviticus16:25 Hanyuma atwikire ku rutambiro n'urugimbu rwa bya bitambo byo guhongerera ibyaha.
Leviticus16:26 Uwajyanye isekurume yo kohēra ajye amesa imyambaro ye
Leviticus16:27 Bajye batwikira inyuma y'inkambi impu n'inyama n'amayezi bya cya kimasa
Leviticus16:28 Uwabitwitse ajye amesa imyambaro ye kandi yiyuhagire mbere yo gusubira mu nkambi.
Leviticus16:29 Mujye muhora mukurikiza aya mabwiriza: ku itariki ya cumi y'ukwezi kwa karindwi mujye mwigomwa kurya
Leviticus16:30 Kuko uwo munsi
Leviticus16:31 Uwo munsi mujye muruhuka nk'uko mubigenza ku isabato kandi mwigomwe kurya. Mujye muhora mukurikiza ayo mabwiriza.
Leviticus16:32 Ku munsi w'impongano
Leviticus16:33 Ajye ahumanura Icyumba kizira inenge cyane n'ikindi Cyumba cy'Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'urutambiro
Leviticus16:34 Mujye muhora mukurikiza ayo mabwiriza yo guhongerera ibyaha byose by'Abisiraheli buri mwaka. Aroni akurikiza ibyo Uhoraho yategetse Musa.
Leviticus17:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus17:2 guha Aroni n'abahungu be
Leviticus17:3 Umwisiraheli wese uzabāgira inka cyangwa intama cyangwa ihene mu nkambi cyangwa ahandi
Leviticus17:4 atari mu rugo rw'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus17:5 Aho gutambira ibitambo ku gasozi
Leviticus17:6 Umutambyi aminjagire amaraso ku rutambiro rw'Uhoraho mu rugo rw'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus17:7 Bityo Abisiraheli ntibazongera guhemukira Uhoraho baramya ibigirwamana by'ihene
Leviticus17:8 Umwisiraheli wese cyangwa umunyamahanga utuye muri bo uzatamba igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus17:9 atakijyanye mu rugo rw'Ihema ry'ibonaniro ngo agiture Uhoraho
Leviticus17:10 Umwisiraheli wese cyangwa umunyamahanga utuye muri bo unywa amaraso cyangwa urya inyama zirimo amaraso
Leviticus17:11 Uhoraho yategetse ko amaraso aminjagirwa ku rutambiro kugira ngo abahongerere
Leviticus17:12 Ni cyo cyatumye Uhoraho abuza Abisiraheli n'abanyamahanga batuye muri bo
Leviticus17:13 Umwisiraheli cyangwa umunyamahanga utuye muri bo
Leviticus17:14 Koko rero ubugingo bw'ikiremwa cyose bugendana n'amaraso yacyo
Leviticus17:15 Umwisiraheli cyangwa umunyamahanga nasanga itungo cyangwa inyamaswa yipfushije
Leviticus17:16 Natamesa imyambaro ye kandi ntiyiyuhagire
Leviticus18:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus18:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Leviticus18:3 Ntimugakore nk'ibyo abo mu gihugu cya Misiri mwahozemo bakora
Leviticus18:4 Mujye mukurikiza amabwiriza yanjye kandi mwumvire amategeko yanjye. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Leviticus18:5 Mujye mwitondera amabwiriza n'amategeko yanjye
Leviticus18:6 “Ntihakagire uryamana n'uwo bafitanye isano ya bugufi. Ndi Uhoraho.
Leviticus18:7 Ntukaryamane na nyoko
Leviticus18:8 Ntukaryamane na muka so
Leviticus18:9 Ntukaryamane na mushiki wawe musangiye so cyangwa nyoko
Leviticus18:10 Ntukaryamane n'umukobwa w'umuhungu wawe cyangwa w'umukobwa wawe
Leviticus18:11 Ntukaryamane na mushiki wawe muka so yabyaranye na so.
Leviticus18:12 Ntukaryamane na nyogosenge
Leviticus18:13 Ntukaryamane na nyoko wanyu
Leviticus18:14 Ntukaryamane na muka so wanyu
Leviticus18:15 Ntukaryamane n'umukazana wawe
Leviticus18:16 Ntukaryamane n'umugore wanyu
Leviticus18:17 Nuryamana n'umugore
Leviticus18:18 Igihe umugore wawe akiriho ntukarongore umuvandimwe we
Leviticus18:19 “Ntukaryamane n'umugore uri mu mihango y'abakobwa.
Leviticus18:20 Ntugasambane n'umugore w'undi
Leviticus18:21 Ntugatambire ikigirwamana Moleki abana bawe
Leviticus18:22 Ntukaryamane n'umugabo mugenzi wawe
Leviticus18:23 Ntihakagire umugabo cyangwa umugore wihumanyisha kuryamana n'itungo
Leviticus18:24 “Ntimukagire na kimwe muri ibyo byose mwihumanyisha
Leviticus18:25 Byatumye igihugu cyabo gihumana
Leviticus18:26 Nuko mujye mwitondera amabwiriza n'amategeko nabahaye
Leviticus18:27 Icyo gihugu cyarahumanye kubera ibizira Abanyakanāni bakoze.
Leviticus18:28 Namwe muzirinde kugihumanya mutazakivamo nka bo
Leviticus18:29 kuko umuntu wese uzakora ikintu na kimwe muri ibyo bizira
Leviticus18:30 Mujye mukora ibyo nshaka
Leviticus19:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus19:2 kubwira Abisiraheli bose ati: “Mube abaziranenge kuko nanjye Uhoraho Imana yanyu ndi umuziranenge.
Leviticus19:3 “Buri wese ajye yubaha se na nyina
Leviticus19:4 “Ntimukamparike ibigirwamana kandi ntimukicurire amashusho yabyo. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Leviticus19:5 “Nimuntambira igitambo cy'umusangiro
Leviticus19:6 Inyama zacyo mujye muzirya umunsi cyatambweho
Leviticus19:7 Nihagira uzirya nyuma y'iyo minsi ibiri sinzemera icyo gitambo
Leviticus19:8 Uwaziryaho wese yaba asuzuguje ibyanyeguriwe
Leviticus19:9 “Nimusarura ntimukageze mu mbibi z'imirima yanyu
Leviticus19:10 Nimusarura imizabibu yanyu
Leviticus19:11 “Ntimukibe
Leviticus19:12 Ntimukarahire izina ryanjye ibinyoma
Leviticus19:13 “Ntimugakandamize bagenzi banyu kandi ntimukabasahure ibyabo. Mujye muha nyakabyizi igihembo cye
Leviticus19:14 Ntimugatuke igipfamatwi cyangwa ngo mugire icyo mutega impumyi
Leviticus19:15 “Mujye muca imanza zitabera haba ku boroheje cyangwa ku bakomeye
Leviticus19:16 Ntimugashinje abandi ibinyoma
Leviticus19:17 “Ntukajye wanga mugenzi wawe
Leviticus19:18 Ntukihōrere kandi ntukagirire inzika bagenzi bawe
Leviticus19:19 “Mujye mwitondera amategeko yanjye. Ntimukabangurire amatungo ku yo bidahuje ubwoko
Leviticus19:20 “Umugabo naryamana n'umuja wari warasabwe n'undi mugabo
Leviticus19:21 Uwo mugabo wacumuye ajye anzanira imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro isekurume y'intama y'igitambo cyo kwiyunga.
Leviticus19:22 Umutambyi ajye atamba iyo sekurume kugira ngo amuhongerere icyo cyaha yakoze
Leviticus19:23 “Nimumara kugera mu gihugu cya Kanāni mukahatera ibiti byera imbuto ziribwa
Leviticus19:24 Mu mwaka wa kane muzazinyegurire zose zibe ituro ry'ishimwe.
Leviticus19:25 Kuva mu mwaka wa gatanu ni bwo muzaziryaho. Nimugenza mutyo
Leviticus19:26 “Ntimukarye inyama zirimo amaraso. Ntimukaraguze cyangwa ngo mushikishe.
Leviticus19:27 Ntimukiyogosheshe imisatsi yo mu misaya
Leviticus19:28 Igihe mwapfushije ntimukagaragaze umubabaro mwicisha indasago. Ntimukicishe imanzi. Ndi Uhoraho.
Leviticus19:29 “Ntimukemerere abakobwa banyu kuba indaya
Leviticus19:30 Mujye mwubahiriza isabato yanjye kandi mwubahe Ihema ryanjye. Ndi Uhoraho.
Leviticus19:31 “Ntimukagishe inama abaterekēra abazimu cyangwa abashitsi
Leviticus19:32 “Mujye mwubaha abasaza n'abakecuru kandi nanjye munyubahe. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Leviticus19:33 “Ntimukagirire nabi umunyamahanga utuye mu gihugu cyanyu
Leviticus19:34 ahubwo mujye mumufata nka kavukire wo muri mwe
Leviticus19:35 “Ntimugahende abandi mukoresha ibipimisho bidatunganye.
Leviticus19:36 Mujye mukoresha iminzani mizima
Leviticus19:37 “Mujye mwitondera amategeko yanjye n'amabwiriza yanjye kandi mubikurikize. Ndi Uhoraho.”
Leviticus20:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus20:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Umwisiraheli cyangwa umunyamahanga utuye muri mwe uzatambira umwana we ikigirwamana Moleki
Leviticus20:3 Uko ni ko nzamuhana muce mu Bisiraheli
Leviticus20:4 Nyamara abaturage nibabyirengagiza bakanga kumwica
Leviticus20:5 jyewe ubwanjye sinzabura kumuhana we n'umuryango we. Nzabaca mu Bisiraheli hamwe n'abandi bose banyimūye bakayoboka Moleki.
Leviticus20:6 “Nzahana n'umuntu wese ugisha inama abaterekēra abazimu cyangwa abashitsi
Leviticus20:7 Munyiyegurire mube abaziranenge
Leviticus20:8 Mwitondere amabwiriza yanjye kandi muyakurikize. Ndi Uhoraho wabitoranyirije.
Leviticus20:9 “Umuntu navuma se cyangwa nyina azicwe
Leviticus20:10 “Umuntu nasambana n'umugore w'undi
Leviticus20:11 Umuntu naryamana na muka se azaba akojeje se isoni
Leviticus20:12 Umuntu naryamana n'umukazana we bazaba bakoze ibidakwiye
Leviticus20:13 Umugabo naryamana n'undi mugabo bazaba bakoze ikizira
Leviticus20:14 Umuntu narongora umukobwa na nyina bizaba ari ubushizi bw'isoni
Leviticus20:15 Umugabo naryamana n'itungo azicwe
Leviticus20:16 Umugore na we naryamana n'itungo iryo ari ryo ryose azicwe
Leviticus20:17 “Umuntu narongora mushiki we basangiye se cyangwa nyina
Leviticus20:18 Umuntu naryamana n'umugore uri mu mihango y'abakobwa
Leviticus20:19 Umuntu naryamana na nyina wabo cyangwa nyirasenge
Leviticus20:20 Umuntu naryamana na muka se wabo azaba akojeje isoni se wabo
Leviticus20:21 Umuntu naryamana n'umugore wabo azaba akojeje isoni umuvandimwe we
Leviticus20:22 “Mujye mwitondera amabwiriza n'amategeko nabahaye kandi muyakurikize
Leviticus20:23 Ntimugakurikize imigenzereze y'abagituye
Leviticus20:24 Ariko mwebwe nabasezeranyije kuzabaha ubutaka bwabo
Leviticus20:25 Ni yo mpamvu mugomba kujya mutandukanya ibihumanya n'ibidahumanya mu matungo no mu nyamaswa
Leviticus20:26 Muzabe abanjye
Leviticus20:27 “Umugabo cyangwa umugore uterekēra abazimu cyangwa ushika
Leviticus21:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa kubwira abatambyi bene Aroni ati: “Umutambyi napfusha mwene wabo ntagakore ku ntumbi cyangwa ku wayikozeho
Leviticus21:2 Ariko yemerewe kwihumanya atyo yapfushije se cyangwa nyina
Leviticus21:3 cyangwa mushiki we babana utarashyingirwa.
Leviticus21:4 Umutambyi ni umutware w'umuryango we
Leviticus21:5 “Abatambyi ntibakimoze cyangwa ngo biyogosheshe ubwanwa bwo ku matama
Leviticus21:6 Be kunsuzuguza jye Uhoraho Imana yabo
Leviticus21:7 Umutambyi ntakarongore indaya cyangwa umukobwa utari isugi cyangwa umugore wasenzwe
Leviticus21:8 Rubanda rujye rwubaha umutambyi kuko ari we umpereza ibyokurya
Leviticus21:9 Umukobwa w'umutambyi niyiyandarika akigira indaya
Leviticus21:10 “Naho Umutambyi mukuru wanyeguriwe asutswe amavuta ku mutwe
Leviticus21:11 ntakihumanyishe intumbi yose nubwo yaba iya se cyangwa iya nyina.
Leviticus21:12 Ntagahagarike imirimo yo mu Ihema ryanjye cyangwa ngo arihumanye
Leviticus21:13 Umutambyi mukuru azarongore umukobwa w'isugi
Leviticus21:14 ntakarongore umupfakazi cyangwa umugore wasenzwe
Leviticus21:15 kugira ngo umwana azabyara atazagira amakemwa. Ndi Uhoraho witoranyiriza Umutambyi mukuru.”
Leviticus21:16 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus21:17 kubwira Aroni ati: “Mu bazagukomokaho ntihakagire umuntu ufite ubusembwa uza kumpereza ibyokurya
Leviticus21:18 yaba impumyi cyangwa ikirema
Leviticus21:19 yaba yaramugaye ikirenge cyangwa ikiganza
Leviticus21:20 yaba ahetse inyonjo cyangwa ari igikuri
Leviticus21:21 None rero Aroni
Leviticus21:22 Bashobora kurya kuri ayo maturo nubwo yanyeguriwe rwose
Leviticus21:23 ariko ntibakinjire mu Ihema cyangwa ngo begere urutambiro kuko bafite ubusembwa. Ntibagomba guhumanya ibyanyeguriwe. Ndi Uhoraho witoranyiriza abatambyi.”
Leviticus21:24 Nguko uko Musa yabwiye Aroni n'abahungu be
Leviticus22:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus22:2 kubwira Aroni n'abahungu be ati: “Dore imiziro ibabuza kwegera amaturo Abisiraheli banyegurira
Leviticus22:3 Umutambyi wese uhumanye ntakegere amaturo Abisiraheli bazaba banyeguriye
Leviticus22:4 “Umutambyi urwaye indwara y'uruhu yanduza cyangwa y'imyanya ndangagitsina
Leviticus22:5 cyangwa uwakoze ku gasimba gahumanya
Leviticus22:6 Uwo byagendekeye bityo ajye yiyuhagira kandi yirirwe ahumanye kugeza nimugoroba
Leviticus22:7 Izuba nirirenga azaba ahumanutse
Leviticus22:8 Umutambyi ntakarye itungo ryipfushije cyangwa ryatanyaguwe n'inyamaswa
Leviticus22:9 “Abatambyi bajye banyumvira birinde gukora icyaha cyerekeye ibyokurya
Leviticus22:10 “Utari uwo mu batambyi
Leviticus22:11 Ariko inkoreragahato umutambyi yaguze n'iyavukiye iwe
Leviticus22:12 Umukobwa w'umutambyi narongorwa n'utari umutambyi
Leviticus22:13 Icyakora nasendwa cyangwa agapfakara atarabyara
Leviticus22:14 Nihagira uyaryaho atabizi
Leviticus22:15 Abatambyi ntibagateshe agaciro amaturo Abisiraheli banyeguriye
Leviticus22:16 ngo bareke rubanda bayaryeho. Uyariyeho baba bamukoresheje icyaha
Leviticus22:17 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus22:18 kubwira Aroni n'abahungu be n'abandi Bisiraheli bose ati: “Umwisiraheli cyangwa umunyamahanga utuye muri mwe
Leviticus22:19 ajye azana ikimasa cyangwa isekurume bidafite inenge kugira ngo mwemere.
Leviticus22:20 Ntimugatambe itungo rifite inenge
Leviticus22:21 Umuntu nantambira igitambo cy'umusangiro cy'ubushake cyangwa icyo guhigura umuhigo
Leviticus22:22 Ntimukantambire itungo ryahumye cyangwa iricumbagira
Leviticus22:23 Itungo ryo mu bushyo cyangwa iryo mu mukumbi rifite ingingo zisumbana cyangwa iryagwingiye
Leviticus22:24 Ntimukantambire itungo ryakomeretse amabya cyangwa ryakonwe. Nimugera mu gihugu cyanyu ntimuzakone amatungo
Leviticus22:25 kandi ntimuzagure amatungo y'abanyamahanga afite bene ubwo busembwa ngo muyantambire. Sinayemera kuko afite inenge.”
Leviticus22:26 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Leviticus22:27 “Inyana cyangwa umwana w'intama cyangwa w'ihene bimaze kuvuka
Leviticus22:28 Ntimukicire umunsi umwe inka cyangwa intama cyangwa ihene n'iyayo.
Leviticus22:29 “Nimuntambira igitambo cyo kunshimira
Leviticus22:30 Inyama zacyo mujye muzirya uwo munsi
Leviticus22:31 “Mujye mwitondera amabwiriza yanjye muyakurikize. Ndi Uhoraho.
Leviticus22:32 Abisiraheli bajye banyubaha kuko ndi umuziranenge. None rero
Leviticus22:33 Ni jye wabakuye mu Misiri kugira ngo mbabere Imana. Ndi Uhoraho.”
Leviticus23:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus23:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Dore iminsi mikuru muzajya munyizihiriza
Leviticus23:3 “Hari iminsi itandatu mu cyumweru yo gukora
Leviticus23:4 “Dore indi minsi mikuru muzajya munyizihiriza
Leviticus23:5 “Ku itariki ya cumi n'enye y'ukwezi kwa mbere nimugoroba
Leviticus23:6 Naho ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu y'uko kwezi
Leviticus23:7 Mujye muyitangiza ikoraniro ryo kunsenga
Leviticus23:8 Muri iyo minsi uko ari irindwi mujye muntura amaturo atwikwa
Leviticus23:9 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus23:10 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimumara kugera mu gihugu nzabaha mukeza imyaka
Leviticus23:11 Ku munsi ukurikira isabato
Leviticus23:12 Uwo munsi mujye muntambira igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro cy'umwana w'intama udafite inenge kandi utarengeje umwaka
Leviticus23:13 kandi munture n'ibiro bibiri by'ifu nziza ivanze n'amavuta y'iminzenze bibe ituro ritwikwa
Leviticus23:14 Ntimukarye ku ngano nshya
Leviticus23:15 “Mujye mumara ibyumweru birindwi byuzuye muhereye ku munsi ukurikira ya sabato
Leviticus23:16 Ku munsi wa mirongo itanu ari wo ukurikira isabato
Leviticus23:17 rigizwe n'imigati ibiri isembuye ikozwe mu biro bibiri by'ifu nziza. Aho muzaba mutuye hose
Leviticus23:18 Mujye muntambira n'igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Leviticus23:19 Mujye muntambira kandi isekurume y'ihene
Leviticus23:20 Umutambyi ajye amurikira abo bana b'intama babiri
Leviticus23:21 Uwo munsi mujye mukoresha ikoraniro ryo kunsenga
Leviticus23:22 “Nimusarura
Leviticus23:23 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus23:24 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa karindwi
Leviticus23:25 Ntimukagire imirimo mukora
Leviticus23:26 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Leviticus23:27 “Ku itariki ya cumi y'uko kwezi kwa karindwi
Leviticus23:28 Uwo Munsi w'impongano ntimukagire imirimo mukora
Leviticus23:29 Umuntu wese utazigomwa kurya kuri uwo munsi azacibwe mu bwoko bwe
Leviticus23:30 kandi uzagira umurimo akora kuri uwo munsi nzamurimbura.
Leviticus23:31 Ntimukagire umurimo n'umwe mukora kuri uwo munsi. Iryo ni itegeko ridakuka
Leviticus23:32 Kuva ku itariki ya cyenda izuba rirenze kugeza ku ya cumi izuba rirenze
Leviticus23:33 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus23:34 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu y'uko kwezi kwa karindwi
Leviticus23:35 Mujye muyitangiza ikoraniro ryo kunsenga
Leviticus23:36 Muri iyo minsi uko ari irindwi mujye muntura amaturo atwikwa
Leviticus23:37 (Ngiyo iminsi mikuru yo kwizihiriza Uhoraho no gukoresha amakoraniro yo kumusenga. Ngayo n'amabwiriza yerekeye amaturo atwikwa
Leviticus23:38 Iyo minsi mikuru ni iyiyongera ku minsi isanzwe y'isabato y'Uhoraho
Leviticus23:39 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Na none nimumara gusarura imbuto zera ku biti
Leviticus23:40 Uwo munsi ubanza mujye muzana imbuto nziza zera ku biti
Leviticus23:41 Buri mwaka mu kwezi kwa karindwi
Leviticus23:42 Abisiraheli bose bajye bamara iyo minsi irindwi baba mu ngando.
Leviticus23:43 Bityo bizajya byibutsa abazabakomokaho ko Abisiraheli babaye mu ngando igihe nabakuraga mu Misiri. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.”
Leviticus23:44 Nuko Musa aha Abisiraheli ayo mabwiriza yerekeye iminsi mikuru bazajya bizihiriza Uhoraho.
Leviticus24:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Leviticus24:2 “Utegeke Abisiraheli bakuzanire amavuta meza akamuwe mu mbuto z'iminzenze
Leviticus24:3 yo mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Leviticus24:4 Ajye ahora yita kuri ayo matara ari ku gitereko cy'izahabu inoze
Leviticus24:5 “Utekeshe imigati cumi n'ibiri
Leviticus24:6 uyishyire imbere yanjye mu migabane ibiri uyigerekeranyije itandatu itandatu
Leviticus24:7 Kuri buri mugabane ushyireho umubavu mwiza wo kosereza imbere yanjye
Leviticus24:8 Buri sabato
Leviticus24:9 Aroni n'abahungu be ni bo bonyine bemerewe kurya imigati yari isanzweho
Leviticus24:10 Umunsi umwe mu nkambi habaye amahane
Leviticus24:11 witwaga Shelomiti
Leviticus24:12 Bamuha abamurinda bategereje icyo Uhoraho ari butegeke.
Leviticus24:13 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Leviticus24:14 “Jyana wa muntu wamvumye inyuma y'inkambi
Leviticus24:15 kandi ubwire Abisiraheli ko umuntu wese uzajya avuma Imana ye
Leviticus24:16 Uzatuka izina ry'Uhoraho azicwa. Abisiraheli bose bajye bamwicisha amabuye
Leviticus24:17 “Umwicanyi ajye acirwa urwo gupfa.
Leviticus24:18 Uwishe itungo ry'undi ajye aririha. Itungo rijye ririhwa irindi.
Leviticus24:19 Uteye undi ubusembwa
Leviticus24:20 Uvunnye undi igufwa
Leviticus24:21 Uwishe itungo ry'undi ajye aririha. Umwicanyi ajye acirwa urwo gupfa.
Leviticus24:22 “Ari Abisiraheli cyangwa abanyamahanga batuye muri mwe
Leviticus24:23 Musa amaze kubibwira Abisiraheli
Leviticus25:1 Musa ari ku musozi wa Sinayi
Leviticus25:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimumara kugera mu gihugu nzabaha
Leviticus25:3 Mu myaka itandatu mujye muhinga imirima yanyu
Leviticus25:4 ariko umwaka wa karindwi mujye munyubaha muraze imirima iruhuke
Leviticus25:5 Ntimuzasarure ngo muhunike ibyimejeje mu mirima yanyu cyangwa imizabibu yanyu mutakoreye. Uwo mwaka mujye mureka ubutaka buruhuke.
Leviticus25:6 Muzatungwa n'ibizimeza muri uwo mwaka
Leviticus25:7 n'amatungo yanyu n'inyamaswa. Ibizimeza mu gihugu cyanyu byose
Leviticus25:8 “Muzakomeze kuraza imirima mu mwaka wa karindwi mubigire incuro ndwi
Leviticus25:9 Nuko ku itariki ya cumi y'ukwezi kwa karindwi
Leviticus25:10 bityo munyegurire umwaka wa mirongo itanu
Leviticus25:11 Buri myaka mirongo itanu muzajya mwizihiza Yubile
Leviticus25:12 Muzanyegurire uwo mwaka wa Yubile
Leviticus25:13 “Muri uwo mwaka wa Yubile
Leviticus25:14 Nugura isambu cyangwa ukayigurisha
Leviticus25:15 ukurikije imyaka Yubile imaze ibaye
Leviticus25:16 Nihaba hasigaye igihe kirekire ikiguzi kiziyongere
Leviticus25:17 Ntimugahendane
Leviticus25:18 “Mujye mwumvira amabwiriza yanjye n'amategeko yanjye
Leviticus25:19 Kizarumbuka mubone ibibatunga byinshi
Leviticus25:20 “Ahari mwakwibaza muti: ‘Ese tuzatungwa n'iki mu mwaka wa karindwi ko tutazaba twarabibye ngo dusarure?’
Leviticus25:21 Mu mwaka wa gatandatu nzabaha umugisha
Leviticus25:22 Mu mwaka wa munani muzabiba ariko muzakomeza kurya ibyo mwahunitse
Leviticus25:23 “Ntimukagurishe burundu amasambu kuko ubutaka ari ubwanjye
Leviticus25:24 Ni yo mpamvu muzajya mureka umuntu agacungura isambu ye.
Leviticus25:25 Umwisiraheli nakena akagurisha isambu ye
Leviticus25:26 Umuntu nabura uyicungura
Leviticus25:27 Azabare imyaka ishize agurishije isambu ye
Leviticus25:28 Ariko natabona icyo ayicunguza
Leviticus25:29 “Umuntu nagurisha inzu yo kubamo iri mu mujyi uzengurutswe n'urukuta
Leviticus25:30 Iyo nzu nirenza umwaka itaracungurwa
Leviticus25:31 Naho mu mijyi mitoya itazengurutswe n'urukuta
Leviticus25:32 “Abalevi bo bazahorane uburenganzira bwo gucungura amazu yabo ari mu mijyi yabo.
Leviticus25:33 N'iyo yaba ari undi Mulevi ugura imwe muri ayo mazu
Leviticus25:34 Inzuri zikikije imijyi y'Abalevi ntizishobora kugurishwa
Leviticus25:35 “Mwene wanyu nakena akananirwa kugira icyo yimarira
Leviticus25:36 Ntukake mwene wanyu inyungu iyo ari yo yose
Leviticus25:37 Numuguriza amafaranga ntukamwake inyungu
Leviticus25:38 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakuye mu Misiri
Leviticus25:39 “Mwene wanyu nakena akagusaba kumugura
Leviticus25:40 ahubwo uzamukoreshe nk'umukozi wawe cyangwa nk'umunyamahanga uba iwawe. Azagukorere kugeza ku mwaka wa Yubile
Leviticus25:41 maze we n'abana be basubire mu muryango wabo no muri gakondo yabo.
Leviticus25:42 Abisiraheli ni abagaragu banjye kuko nabakuye mu Misiri. Ntimukabagurishe nk'inkoreragahato
Leviticus25:43 kandi ntimukabategekeshe igitugu
Leviticus25:44 “Nimukenera inkoreragahato mujye mugura iz'abanyamahanga bo mu bihugu bibakikije
Leviticus25:45 cyangwa abana b'abanyamahanga batuye muri mwe
Leviticus25:46 no kubagira inkoreragahato
Leviticus25:47 “Nihagira umunyamahanga utuye muri mwe uba umukire
Leviticus25:48 azaba afite uburenganzira bwo gucungurwa. Ashobora gucungurwa n'umwe mu bavandimwe be
Leviticus25:49 cyangwa se wabo cyangwa mwene se wabo
Leviticus25:50 Icyo gihe we n'uwamuguze bazabare iminsi izaba isigaye kugira ngo Yubile ibe
Leviticus25:51 Nihaba hasigaye imyaka myinshi azasubize amafaranga menshi ahwanye n'iyo myaka
Leviticus25:52 kandi nihaba hasigaye imyaka mike kugira ngo Yubile ibe
Leviticus25:53 Mu myaka ataracungurwa ajye akora nk'umukozi usanzwe
Leviticus25:54 Nadacungurwa mu buryo ubwo ari bwo bwose
Leviticus25:55 Abisiraheli ni abagaragu banjye kuko nabakuye mu Misiri. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.”
Leviticus26:1 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Ntimukiremere ibigirwamana cyangwa amashusho asengwa
Leviticus26:2 Mujye mwizihiza isabato kandi mwubahirize Ihema ryanjye. Ndi Uhoraho.
Leviticus26:3 “Nimwumvira amategeko yanjye mukitondera amabwiriza yanjye mukayakurikiza
Leviticus26:4 nzabaha imvura mu bihe byayo
Leviticus26:5 Muzasarura byinshi ku buryo isarura ry'ingano rizageza mu isarura ry'imizabibu
Leviticus26:6 Igihugu cyanyu nzagiha amahoro maze muryame nta cyo mwikanga. Nzamenesha inyamaswa z'inkazi
Leviticus26:7 Muzirukana abanzi banyu mubicishe inkota.
Leviticus26:8 Nubwo mwaba batanu gusa muzirukana ijana
Leviticus26:9 Nzabaha umugisha mwororoke mugwire
Leviticus26:10 Muzaba mutararangiza ibyo mwahunitse igihe muzongera gusarura
Leviticus26:11 Nzatura hagati muri mwe kandi sinzabatererana.
Leviticus26:12 Nzagendana namwe mbe Imana yanyu
Leviticus26:13 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakuye mu Misiri
Leviticus26:14 “Ariko nimutanyumvira ngo mukurikize aya mabwiriza yose
Leviticus26:15 Nimwanga amateka natanze mugasuzugura ibyemezo nafashe
Leviticus26:16 muzabihanirwa. Nzabateza ubwoba no kuzongwa n'indwara z'umuriro
Leviticus26:17 Nzabatererana maze abanzi banyu babigarurire babategeke
Leviticus26:18 “Ibyo nibidatuma munyumvira
Leviticus26:19 Nzabacisha bugufi mbamaremo agasuzuguro. Nzabima imvura maze ubutaka bukakare bumere nk'urutare.
Leviticus26:20 Muzavunikira ubusa kuko ubutaka bwanyu butazongera kwera
Leviticus26:21 “Nimukomeza kwigira nk'abanzi ntimunyumvire
Leviticus26:22 Nzabateza inyamaswa z'inkazi zice abana banyu zirimbure n'amatungo yanyu
Leviticus26:23 “Ibyo nibidatuma mwihana mugakomeza kwigira nk'abanzi
Leviticus26:24 nanjye nzababera nk'umwanzi
Leviticus26:25 Nzabateza intambara kubera ko mwishe Isezerano nagiranye namwe
Leviticus26:26 Nzatuma mubura ibyokurya ku buryo abagore icumi bazajya bateka mu ifuru imwe gusa
Leviticus26:27 “Ibyo nibidatuma munyumvira mugakomeza kwigira nk'abanzi
Leviticus26:28 nanjye nzabarakarira nk'umwanzi
Leviticus26:29 Inzara izatuma murya abana banyu.
Leviticus26:30 Aho muzasengera ibigirwamana nzahasenya
Leviticus26:31 Nzarimbura imijyi yanyu
Leviticus26:32 Igihugu cyanyu nzagisenya
Leviticus26:33 Nzabateza intambara maze mbatatanyirize mu mahanga. Igihugu cyanyu kizahinduka itongo n'imijyi yanyu isenywe.
