Leviticus26:34 “Muzajyanwa ho iminyago mu gihugu cy'abanzi banyu
Leviticus26:35 Igihe cyose kizaba kidatuwemo kizarara
Leviticus26:36 “Abazacika ku icumu muri mwe bazaba bari mu bihugu by'abanzi
Leviticus26:37 Bazagwirirana nk'abahunze igitero nta wubakurikiye. Ntibazashobora guhangana n'abanzi babo.
Leviticus26:38 Bazapfira mu mahanga
Leviticus26:39 Abazacika ku icumu muri mwe
Leviticus26:40 “Ariko igihe kizagera bemere ko bo na ba sekuruza bacumuye
Leviticus26:41 ari na cyo cyatumye nanjye mbabera nk'umwanzi ngatuma bajyanwa ho iminyago. Icyo gihe bazareka kwinangira bicishe bugufi
Leviticus26:42 Ni bwo nzazirikana Isezerano nagiranye na Yakobo na Izaki na Aburahamu
Leviticus26:43 Igihe cyose bazaba batari muri icyo gihugu kizarara
Leviticus26:44 Icyakora nubwo bazaba bakiri mu gihugu cy'abanzi babo
Leviticus26:45 Nzazirikana Isezerano nagiranye na ba sekuruza nakuye mu Misiri amahanga abibona
Leviticus26:46 Ngayo amategeko n'amateka n'amabwiriza Uhoraho yahereye Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi
Leviticus27:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Leviticus27:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nihagira uhiga umuhigo wo kunyegurira umuntu
Leviticus27:3 Umugabo ufite imyaka iri hagati ya makumyabiri na mirongo itandatu
Leviticus27:4 Umugore uri muri icyo kigero
Leviticus27:5 Umuhungu ufite imyaka iri hagati y'itanu na makumyabiri
Leviticus27:6 Umuhungu umaze ukwezi avutse kugeza ku myaka itanu
Leviticus27:7 Umugabo ufite imyaka mirongo itandatu n'uyirengeje
Leviticus27:8 “Niba uwahize ari umukene ku buryo atabona igiciro cyagenwe
Leviticus27:9 “Nihagira uhiga umuhigo wo kuntambira itungo
Leviticus27:10 Ntakarisimbuze irindi ryaba ryiza cyangwa ribi
Leviticus27:11 Nihagira uhiga umuhigo wo kuntura itungo rihumanye ridashobora kuntambirwa
Leviticus27:12 Umutambyi ajye arisuzuma arigenere igiciro kirikwiriye.
Leviticus27:13 Nyiraryo nashaka kuricungura
Leviticus27:14 “Nihagira unyegurira inzu ye
Leviticus27:15 Uwayinyeguriye nashaka kuyicungura
Leviticus27:16 “Nihagira unyegurira umurima wa gakondo ye
Leviticus27:17 niba ari mu mwaka wa Yubile.
Leviticus27:18 Ariko nawunyegurira nyuma y'umwaka wa Yubile
Leviticus27:19 Uwawunyeguriye nashaka kuwucungura
Leviticus27:20 Ariko nawugurisha atarawucungura
Leviticus27:21 Mu mwaka wa Yubile aho gusubizwa nyirawo
Leviticus27:22 “Nihagira unyegurira umurima yaguze utari uwa gakondo ye
Leviticus27:23 umutambyi ajye awugenera igiciro akurikije imyaka isigaye ngo Yubile ibe
Leviticus27:24 Mu mwaka wa Yubile
Leviticus27:25 “Ibiciro byose bijye bishyirwaho hakurikijwe igipimo gikoreshwa n'abatambyi. Ni igikoroto kimwe cy'ifeza gipima garama cumi n'imwe.
Leviticus27:26 “Nta wushobora kunyegurira uburiza bw'amatungo kuko busanzwe ari ubwanjye.
Leviticus27:27 “Umuntu nashaka gucungura itungo rihumanye
Leviticus27:28 “Nyamara nta muntu n'umwe ubasha kugurisha cyangwa gucungura icyanyeguriwe burundu
Leviticus27:29 n'iyo yaba ari umuntu ntashobora gucungurwa
Leviticus27:30 “Kimwe cya cumi cy'imyaka yo mu murima n'imbuto zera ku biti ni ibyanjye
Leviticus27:31 Nihagira ushaka gusimbuza kimwe cya cumi cy'imyaka igiciro cyayo
Leviticus27:32 Ku byerekeye amatungo mujye muyabara
Leviticus27:33 Ntimukarisimbuze irindi ryaba ryiza cyangwa ribi
Leviticus27:34 Ngayo amabwiriza Uhoraho yahereye Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi ngo ayashyikirize Abisiraheli.
Numbers1:1 Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa kabiri k'umwaka wa kabiri Abisiraheli bavuye mu Misiri
Numbers1:2 “Mubarure abagabo bose b'Abisiraheli mukurikije amazu yabo n'imiryango yabo
Numbers1:3 Mubabarure muhereye ku bamaze imyaka makumyabiri bashobora kujya ku rugamba. Wowe na Aroni mubabarure
Numbers1:4 mufatanyije n'umutware w'inzu wo muri buri muryango
Numbers1:5 Dore amazina y'abo batware: mu muryango wa Rubeni ni Elisuri mwene Shedewuri
Numbers1:6 mu wa Simeyoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi
Numbers1:7 mu wa Yuda ni Nahasoni mwene Aminadabu
Numbers1:8 mu wa Isakari ni Netanēli mwene Suwari
Numbers1:9 mu wa Zabuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni
Numbers1:10 mu wa Efurayimu mwene Yozefu ni Elishama mwene Amihudi
Numbers1:11 mu wa Benyamini ni Abidani mwene Gidewoni
Numbers1:12 mu wa Dani ni Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi
Numbers1:13 mu wa Ashēri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okirani
Numbers1:14 mu wa Gadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Duweli
Numbers1:15 mu wa Nafutali ni Ahira mwene Eyinani.”
Numbers1:16 Abo batware b'amazu bari bahagarariye imiryango ya ba sekuruza
Numbers1:17 Musa na Aroni bajyana n'abo bantu
Numbers1:18 maze bakoranya Abisiraheli bose ku itariki ya mbere y'uko kwezi kwa kabiri. Nuko Abisiraheli bavuga amasekuru yabo bakurikije amazu yabo n'imiryango yabo. Abagabo bose bamaze imyaka makumyabiri n'abayirengeje bariyandikisha
Numbers1:19 nk'uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa. Iryo barura ryakorewe mu butayu bwa Sinayi.
Numbers2:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni ati:
Numbers2:2 “Abisiraheli bose bajye bashinga amahema yabo hafi y'ikirangamuryango cyabo n'ibendera ry'umutwe w'ingabo barimo
Numbers2:3 “Abo mu miryango yo mu cyiciro cya Yuda
Numbers2:4 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo irindwi na bine na magana atandatu.
Numbers2:5 Abazashinga amahema iruhande rwabo ni abo mu muryango wa Isakari
Numbers2:6 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo itanu na bine na magana ane.
Numbers2:7 Ku rundi ruhande rw'umuryango wa Yuda hazabe abo mu muryango wa Zabuloni
Numbers2:8 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo itanu na birindwi na magana ane.
Numbers2:9 Icyo cyiciro cya Yuda kigizwe rero n'ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongo inani na bitandatu na magana ane. Abo ni bo bazajya babanza kugenda.
Numbers2:10 “Abo mu miryango yo mu cyiciro cya Rubeni
Numbers2:11 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo ine na bitandatu na magana atanu.
Numbers2:12 Abazashinga amahema iruhande rwabo ni abo mu muryango wa Simeyoni
Numbers2:13 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo itanu n'icyenda na magana atatu.
Numbers2:14 Ku rundi ruhande rw'umuryango wa Rubeni hazabe abo mu muryango wa Gadi
Numbers2:15 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo ine na bitanu na magana atandatu mirongo itanu.
Numbers2:16 Icyo cyiciro cya Rubeni kigizwe rero n'ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongo itanu na kimwe na magana ane mirongo itanu. Abo ni bo bazajya bakurikira icyiciro cya mbere.
Numbers2:17 “Abalevi batwaye Ihema ry'ibonaniro bazabe bari hagati y'ibyiciro by'ingabo by'imbere n'iby'inyuma
Numbers2:18 “Abo mu miryango yo mu cyiciro cya Efurayimu
Numbers2:19 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo ine na magana atanu.
Numbers2:20 Abazashinga amahema iruhande rwabo ni abo mu muryango wa Manase
Numbers2:21 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo itatu na bibiri na magana abiri.
Numbers2:22 Ku rundi ruhande rw'umuryango wa Efurayimu hazabe abo mu muryango wa Benyamini. Umutware wabo ni Abidani mwene Gidewoni
Numbers2:23 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo itatu na bitanu na magana ane.
Numbers2:24 Icyo cyiciro cya Efurayimu kigizwe rero n'ingabo ibihumbi ijana n'umunani n'ijana. Icyo cyiciro cya gatatu kizakurikira Abalevi.
Numbers2:25 “Abo mu miryango yo mu cyiciro cya Dani
Numbers2:26 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo itandatu na bibiri na magana arindwi.
Numbers2:27 Abazashinga amahema iruhande rwabo ni abo mu muryango wa Ashēri
Numbers2:28 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo ine na kimwe na magana atanu.
Numbers2:29 Ku rundi ruhande rw'umuryango wa Dani hazabe abo mu muryango wa Nafutali. Umutware wabo ni Ahira mwene Eyinani
Numbers2:30 ingabo ze ni abantu ibihumbi mirongo itanu na bitatu na magana ane.
Numbers2:31 Icyo cyiciro cya Dani kigizwe rero n'ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongo itanu na birindwi na magana atandatu. Ni bo bazaheruka abandi bakurikiye amabendera yabo.”
Numbers2:32 Ngizo ingabo z'Abisiraheli zabaruwe hakurikijwe imiryango n'imitwe zirimo
Numbers2:33 Ariko Abalevi bo ntibabaruwe hamwe n'abandi Bisiraheli
Numbers2:34 Abisiraheli bashinga amahema iruhande rw'amabendera yabo
Numbers3:1 Dore abo mu muryango wa Aroni na Musa
Numbers3:2 Aroni yari afite abahungu bane uw'impfura yitwaga Nadabu
Numbers3:3 Abo bahungu ba Aroni ni bo basīzwe amavuta begurirwa imirimo y'ubutambyi.
Numbers3:4 Icyakora Nadabu na Abihu bo baguye mu butayu bwa Sinayi
Numbers3:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers3:6 “Hamagaza ab'umuryango wa Levi
Numbers3:7 Bajye barinda abatambyi na rubanda n'ibireba Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers3:8 Bajye barinda n'ibikoresho byaryo byose
Numbers3:9 Utegeke Abalevi bajye bakorera Aroni n'abahungu be
Numbers3:10 Aroni n'abahungu be uzabe ari bo bonyine ushinga imirimo y'ubutambyi. Undi wese uzagerageza kuyikora azicwe.”
Numbers3:11 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa ati:
Numbers3:12 “Nitoranyirije Abalevi mu cyimbo cy'abana b'impfura b'Abisiraheli
Numbers3:13 Igihe nicaga abana b'impfura bose b'Abanyamisiri
Numbers3:14 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu butayu bwa Sinayi ati:
Numbers3:15 “Barura Abalevi bose b'igitsinagabo uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi bavutse
Numbers3:16 Musa arababarura nk'uko Uhoraho yabimutegetse.
Numbers3:17 Abahungu ba Levi bari Gerishoni na Kehati na Merari.
Numbers3:18 Bene Gerishoni imiryango yabo yitiriwe
Numbers3:19 Bene Kehati imiryango yabo yitiriwe
Numbers3:20 Bene Merari imiryango yabo yitiriwe
Numbers3:21 Abakomoka kuri Gerishoni bagizwe n'umuryango w'Abalibuni n'uw'Abashimeyi.
Numbers3:22 Abagerishoni b'igitsinagabo babaruwe uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi bavutse
Numbers3:23 Bashingaga amahema iburengerazuba bw'Ihema ry'ibonaniro.
Numbers3:24 Umutware wabo yari Eliyasafu mwene Layeli.
Numbers3:25 Abagerishoni bari bashinzwe Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'ibirisakaye
Numbers3:26 n'iyo kubakisha urugo ruzenguruka Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'urutambiro
Numbers3:27 Abakomoka kuri Kehati bagizwe n'umuryango w'Abamuramu n'uw'Abayisehari
Numbers3:28 Abakehati b'igitsinagabo babaruwe uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi bavutse
Numbers3:29 bashingaga amahema yabo mu majyepfo yaryo.
Numbers3:30 Umutware wabo yari Elisafani mwene Uziyeli.
Numbers3:31 Bari bashinzwe Isanduku y'Isezerano n'ameza y'imigati n'igitereko cy'amatara
Numbers3:32 Umukuru w'abatware b'Abalevi yari Eleyazari mwene Aroni umutambyi
Numbers3:33 Abakomoka kuri Merari bagizwe n'umuryango w'Abamahili n'uw'Abamushi.
Numbers3:34 Abamerari b'igitsinagabo babaruwe uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi bavutse
Numbers3:35 Umutware wabo yari Suriyeli mwene Abihayili
Numbers3:36 Bari bashinzwe ibizingiti n'imbariro n'ibirenge by'Ihema n'ibindi bikoresho byo mu rugo rwaryo
Numbers3:37 kimwe n'inkingi zarwo n'ibirenge byazo
Numbers3:38 Musa na Aroni n'abahungu be bashingaga amahema yabo iburasirazuba imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro. Bari bashinzwe imirimo yo mu Ihema mu cyimbo cy'abandi Bisiraheli. Undi wese wari kwiha kuyikora yari kwicwa.
Numbers3:39 Musa na Aroni bagenza nk'uko Uhoraho yabategetse. Babaruye Abalevi b'igitsinagabo bahereye ku bamaze ukwezi bavutse bakurikije imiryango yabo. Bose bari ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri.
Numbers3:40 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Barura ab'igitsinagabo b'impfura b'Abisiraheli uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi bavutse
Numbers3:41 Nuko mu cyimbo cyabo unyegurire Abalevi
Numbers3:42 Nuko Musa abarura ab'igitsinagabo bose b'impfura b'Abisiraheli nk'uko Uhoraho yamutegetse
Numbers3:43 asanga abamaze ukwezi n'abakurengeje ari ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri na magana abiri mirongo irindwi na batatu.
Numbers3:44 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Musa ati:
Numbers3:45 “Unyegurire Abalevi mu cyimbo cy'ab'igitsinagabo b'impfura b'Abisiraheli
Numbers3:46 Ariko hazaba hasigaye gucungura impfura z'Abisiraheli magana abiri mirongo irindwi n'eshatu
Numbers3:47 Ufate garama mirongo itanu n'eshanu z'ifeza kuri buri muntu muri abo magana abiri mirongo irindwi na batatu
Numbers3:48 Izo feza uzihe Aroni n'abahungu be
Numbers3:49 Abo magana abiri mirongi irindwi na batatu batari basimbuwe n'Abalevi baha Musa izo feza z'incungu
Numbers3:50 zihwanye n'ibiro cumi na bitanu na garama cumi n'eshanu.
Numbers3:51 Musa aziha Aroni n'abahungu be
Numbers4:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni ati:
Numbers4:2 “Mubarure Abalevi bakomoka kuri Kehati uko imiryango yabo iri.
Numbers4:3 Muhere ku bamaze imyaka mirongo itatu mugeze ku bamaze mirongo itanu
Numbers4:4 Imirimo yo mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro Abakehati bashinzwe
Numbers4:5 “Nimwimuka
Numbers4:6 bawugerekeho uruhu rw'agaciro
Numbers4:7 Ku meza y'imigati bajye batwikirizaho umwenda w'isine
Numbers4:8 Hejuru yabyo bajye batwikirizaho umwenda w'umutuku
Numbers4:9 Bajye bafata umwenda w'isine bawuzingiremo igitereko cy'amatara n'amatara yacyo
Numbers4:10 Byose bajye babizingira mu ruhu rw'agaciro
Numbers4:11 Bajye batwikiriza igicaniro cy'izahabu umwenda w'isine
Numbers4:12 Bajye bafata umwenda w'isine bawuzingiremo ibindi bikoresho byose byo mu Ihema
Numbers4:13 Bajye bayora ivu ku rutambiro barutwikirize umwenda w'umuhemba
Numbers4:14 bagerekeho ibikoresho byarwo byose: ibyotezo n'amakanya yo kwaruza inyama
Numbers4:15 “Aroni n'abahungu be nibarangiza gutegura ibyo bintu byanyeguriwe
Numbers4:16 “Eleyazari mwene Aroni umutambyi
Numbers4:17 Uhoraho arakomeza abwira Musa na Aroni ati:
Numbers4:18 “Muzirinde icyatuma inzu y'Abakehati irimbuka.
Numbers4:19 Wowe Aroni n'abahungu bawe
Numbers4:20 Ntibazigere babireba na rimwe batazapfa.”
Numbers4:21 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers4:22 “Barura n'abakomoka kuri Gerishoni
Numbers4:23 Uhere ku bamaze imyaka mirongo itatu ugeze ku bamaze mirongo itanu
Numbers4:24 Dore imirimo bashinzwe n'imitwaro bagomba gutwara.
Numbers4:25 Bajye batwara imyenda y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro ari yo iritwikīra
Numbers4:26 n'iyo kubakisha urugo ruzenguruka Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'urutambiro
Numbers4:27 bayobowe na Aroni n'abahungu be mu byerekeye imitwaro n'indi mirimo bazakora. Muzabashinga ibyo bagomba gutwara byose.
Numbers4:28 Ngiyo imirimo yo mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro Abagerishoni bashinzwe. Itamari mwene Aroni umutambyi
Numbers4:29 “Barura n'abakomoka kuri Merari
Numbers4:30 Uhere ku bamaze imyaka mirongo itatu ugeze ku bamaze mirongo itanu
Numbers4:31 Dore imirimo yo mu Ihema bashinzwe
Numbers4:32 n'inkingi z'urugo rw'Ihema n'ibirenge byazo
Numbers4:33 Ngiyo imirimo yo mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro Abamerari bashinzwe. Itamari mwene Aroni umutambyi
Numbers4:34 Nuko Musa na Aroni n'abakuru b'Abisiraheli babarura abakomoka kuri Kehati bakurikije imiryango yabo
Numbers4:35 bahereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongo itatu bageza ku bamaze mirongo itanu
Numbers4:36 Ababaruwe bose hakurikijwe imiryango yabo bari ibihumbi bibiri na magana arindwi mirongo itanu.
Numbers4:37 Abo ni bo Bakehati bakoraga imirimo y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro Musa na Aroni babaruye
Numbers4:38 Babaruye n'abakomoka kuri Gerishoni bakurikije imiryango yabo
Numbers4:39 bahereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongo itatu bageza ku bamaze mirongo itanu
Numbers4:40 Ababaruwe bose hakurikijwe imiryango yabo
Numbers4:41 Abo ni bo Bagerishoni bakoraga imirimo y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro Musa na Aroni babaruye
Numbers4:42 Babaruye n'abakomoka kuri Merari bakurikije imiryango yabo
Numbers4:43 bahereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongo itatu bageza ku bamaze mirongo itanu
Numbers4:44 Ababaruwe bose hakurikijwe imiryango yabo
Numbers4:45 Abo ni bo Bamerari Musa na Aroni babaruye
Numbers4:46 Bityo Musa na Aroni n'abakuru b'Abisiraheli
Numbers4:47 bahereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongo itatu bageza ku bamaze mirongo itanu
Numbers4:48 Bose hamwe bari ibihumbi umunani na magana atanu.
Numbers4:49 Buri muntu yarabaruwe kandi ashingwa umurimo we n'umutwaro we
Numbers5:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers5:2 “Tegeka Abisiraheli bajye bavana mu nkambi umuntu wese urwaye indwara y'uruhu yanduza
Numbers5:3 Ari umugabo cyangwa umugore
Numbers5:4 Abisiraheli babigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yategetse Musa
Numbers5:5 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers5:6 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Umugabo cyangwa umugore uhemukiye mugenzi we aba ampemukiye
Numbers5:7 Ajye yemera ko yakoze icyaha kandi arihe uwo yahemukiye
Numbers5:8 Ariko niba uwo yahemukiye yarapfuye
Numbers5:9 “Abatambyi bajye bafata umugabane wabagenewe ku bitambo by'Abisiraheli.
Numbers5:10 Icyo umuntu yanyeguriye akagishyikiriza umutambyi
Numbers5:11 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers5:12 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Hari ubwo umugore yahemukira umugabo we agasambana
Numbers5:13 
Numbers5:14 
Numbers5:15 Yaba afuhira ukuri cyangwa yibeshya
Numbers5:16 “Umutambyi ajye ajyana uwo mugore imbere y'Ihema ryanjye
Numbers5:17 afate urwabya asukemo amazi yanyeguriwe
Numbers5:18 Uwo mugore agihagaze aho
Numbers5:19 amutongere ati: ‘Niba utarasambanye ntiwiyandarike kandi ntiwihumanye kuva washyingirwa
Numbers5:20 Ariko niba wariyandaritse umaze gushyingirwa kandi ukihumanyisha ubusambanyi
Numbers5:21 Uhoraho azaguhindure ikivume muri bene wanyu
Numbers5:22 Numara kunywa aya mazi atera umuvumo
Numbers5:23 “Umutambyi ajye yandika iyo mivumo
Numbers5:24 Mbere yo kumunywesha ayo mazi y'ubusharire atera umuvumo
Numbers5:25 ajye amwaka rya turo ry'umugabo we wamufuhiye
Numbers5:26 Afateho ifu yuzuye urushyi ayitwikire ku rutambiro
Numbers5:27 Niba yarihumanyishije ubusambanyi
Numbers5:28 Ariko niba uwo mugore atarihumanyishije ubusambanyi
Numbers5:29 Ngiryo itegeko ryerekeye umugabo ufuhira umugore we
Numbers5:30 
Numbers5:31 Umugabo ukoze atyo nta cyaha aba akoze
Numbers6:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers6:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nihagira umugabo cyangwa umugore uhiga umuhigo wo kunyiyegurira kugira ngo abe umunaziri
Numbers6:3 ntakanywe divayi n'izindi nzoga zose zindisha cyangwa ibizikomokaho
Numbers6:4 Igihe cyose azaba akiri umunaziri ntakagire icyo arya kivuye ku mizabibu
Numbers6:5 Ntakiyogosheshe imisatsi cyangwa ubwanwa igihe yahize kuba umunaziri kitarashira. Gutereka imisatsi n'ubwanwa ni ikimenyetso cy'uko yanyiyeguriye akaba umuziranenge.
Numbers6:6 Muri icyo gihe cyose ntagomba kwegera intumbi
Numbers6:7 kabone n'ubwo yaba iya se cyangwa iya nyina cyangwa iy'umuvandimwe we
Numbers6:8 Igihe cyose azaba akiri umunaziri
Numbers6:9 Icyakora nihagira umuntu umupfira iruhande ku buryo butunguranye akamuhumanya
Numbers6:10 Ku munsi wa munani
Numbers6:11 Imwe umutambyi ayitambe ho igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Numbers6:12 Nuko uwo munaziri anyiyegurire bundi bushya
Numbers6:13 “Dore itegeko ryerekeye umunaziri ucyuye igihe. Ajye aza ku muryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers6:14 anture intama eshatu zidafite inenge
Numbers6:15 Azane n'inkōko y'imigati idasembuye ikozwe mu ifu nziza
Numbers6:16 Umutambyi ajye abinzanira maze atambe igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha n'igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
Numbers6:17 atambe n'impfizi y'intama y'igitambo cy'umusangiro hamwe n'imigati idasembuye yo ku nkōko
Numbers6:18 Hanyuma umunaziri yiyogosheshereze ku muryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers6:19 Nuko umutambyi afate ukuboko gutetse kwa ya mpfizi y'intama
Numbers6:20 Hanyuma umutambyi yongere abifate abīmurikire
Numbers6:21 “Ngayo amategeko yerekeye umuntu wahize umuhigo wo kunyiyegurira ngo abe umunaziri
Numbers6:22 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers6:23 kubwira Aroni n'abahungu be ati: “Dore uko muzajya musabira Abisiraheli umugisha:
Numbers6:24 ‘Uhoraho aguhe umugisha kandi akurinde
Numbers6:25 Uhoraho akurebane impuhwe kandi akugirire imbabazi
Numbers6:26 Uhoraho akwiteho kandi aguhe amahoro.’ ”
Numbers6:27 Uhoraho arongera ati: “Abatambyi nibakoresha izina ryanjye batyo
Numbers7:1 Barangije gushinga Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers7:2 Nuko abatware bahagarariye imiryango cumi n'ibiri y'Abisiraheli bazana amaturo. Ni bo batware b'amazu bashinzwe ibarura.
Numbers7:3 Bazanye amagare atandatu atwikiriye
Numbers7:4 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers7:5 “Akira ayo maturo azakoreshwa imirimo yerekeye Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers7:6 Musa yakira ayo magare n'ibyo bimasa
Numbers7:7 Abagerishoni abaha amagare abiri n'ibimasa bine akurikije imirimo bashinzwe.
Numbers7:8 Andi magare ane n'ibimasa umunani
Numbers7:9 Abakehati nta cyo yabahaye kuko umurimo wabo ari ugutwara ibintu byeguriwe Uhoraho
Numbers7:10 Mu minsi yakurikiye itahwa ry'urutambiro
Numbers7:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Buri mutware ajye agira umunsi we wo kuzana amaturo yo kwizihiza itahwa ry'urutambiro.”
Numbers8:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers8:2 kubwira Aroni ati: “Nushyira amatara arindwi ku gitereko cyayo
Numbers8:3 Aroni aramwumvira
Numbers8:4 Igitereko cy'amatara cyari gicuzwe mu izahabu inoze kuva hasi kugeza hejuru. Cyari gikozwe hakurikijwe igishushanyombonera Uhoraho yari yeretse Musa.
Numbers8:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers8:6 “Vana Abalevi mu bandi Bisiraheli
Numbers8:7 Dore uko bigomba kugenda: ubamisheho amazi yagenewe umuhango wo kubahumanura
Numbers8:8 Bazane ikimasa bagiturane n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke ry'ifu ivanze n'amavuta y'iminzenze
Numbers8:9 Uzane Abalevi imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro maze ukoranye Abisiraheli bose
Numbers8:10 Abalevi bakiri imbere yanjye
Numbers8:11 Hanyuma Aroni amurikire Abalevi
Numbers8:12 Nuko Abalevi barambike ibiganza ku mitwe y'ibyo bimasa
Numbers8:13 Hanyuma ubahagarike imbere ya Aroni n'abahungu be maze ubāmurikire.
Numbers8:14 Numara gutandukanya utyo Abalevi n'abandi Bisiraheli
Numbers8:15 Nyuma yo kubahumanura no kubamurikira
Numbers8:16 Narabitoranyirije kugira ngo babe abanjye mu cyimbo cy'abana b'impfura bose b'Abisiraheli.
Numbers8:17 Igihe nicaga abana b'impfura b'Abanyamisiri n'uburiza bw'amatungo yabo
Numbers8:18 Ariko mu cyimbo cy'abana b'impfura natoranyije Abalevi
Numbers8:19 kandi mbaha Aroni n'abahungu be kugira ngo bakore imirimo yerekeye Ihema ry'ibonaniro mu mwanya w'abandi Bisiraheli. Bashinzwe kandi kurinda Abisiraheli ngo badahumanya ahanyeguriwe bakarimbuka.”
Numbers8:20 Musa na Aroni n'Abisiraheli bose
Numbers8:21 Abalevi barihumanura kandi bamesa imyambaro yabo
Numbers8:22 Nuko Abalevi batangira gukora imirimo yabo yerekeye Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers8:23 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers8:24 “Abalevi bazajye batangira gukora imirimo yerekeye Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers8:25 Nibageza ku myaka mirongo itanu bajye bareka gukora imirimo iruhije.
Numbers8:26 Icyakora bashobora gufasha bagenzi babo kurinda Ihema ry'ibonaniro. Uzabigenze utyo ku byerekeye imirimo y'Abalevi.”
Numbers9:1 Mu kwezi kwa mbere k'umwaka wa kabiri Abisiraheli bavuye mu Misiri
Numbers9:2 “Abisiraheli bajye bizihiza Pasika ku munsi wayo
Numbers9:3 ari wo tariki ya cumi n'enye y'uku kwezi nimugoroba
Numbers9:4 Nuko Musa abwira Abisiraheli kwizihiza Pasika.
Numbers9:5 Bayizihiriza mu butayu bwa Sinayi ku mugoroba w'itariki ya cumi n'enye y'uko kwezi kwa mbere
Numbers9:6 Ariko kuri uwo munsi hari abantu batashoboye kwizihiza Pasika
Numbers9:7 babaza Musa bati: “Mbese ko twahumanyijwe n'intumbi
Numbers9:8 Musa arabasubiza ati: “Nimube mutegereje mbanze mbabarize Uhoraho.”
Numbers9:9 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers9:10 guha Abisiraheli n'abazabakomokaho aya mabwiriza
Numbers9:11 ku mugoroba w'itariki ya cumi n'enye y'ukwezi kwa kabiri. Bajye barya umwana w'intama wa Pasika
Numbers9:12 Ntibazagire inyama baraza cyangwa ngo bagire igufwa ry'umwana w'intama bavuna
Numbers9:13 Nyamara nihagira umuntu udahumanye cyangwa utari mu rugendo wirengagiza kwizihiza Pasika
Numbers9:14 “Umunyamahanga utuye muri mwe nashaka kwizihiza Pasika abigiriye kunyubaha
Numbers9:15 Ku munsi bashingiyeho Ihema ry'ibonaniro bakaryinjizamo bya bisate by'amabuye byanditseho Amategeko
Numbers9:16 Ku manywa icyo gicu cyagumaga hejuru y'Ihema
Numbers9:17 Iyo igicu cyavaga hejuru y'Ihema
Numbers9:18 Kugira ngo Abisiraheli bagende cyangwa bashinge amahema
Numbers9:19 Nubwo cyahamara igihe kirekire
Numbers9:20 N'iyo cyahavaga kihamaze iminsi mike gusa
Numbers9:21 Ndetse n'iyo cyahamaraga ijoro rimwe gusa kikagenda bukeye
Numbers9:22 Nubwo cyamaraga hejuru y'Ihema iminsi ibiri cyangwa ukwezi cyangwa igihe kirekire
Numbers9:23 Ari ukugenda cyangwa ugushinga amahema
Numbers10:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers10:2 “Curisha impanda ebyiri mu ifeza. Zizavuzwa uhamagaza ikoraniro ry'Abisiraheli
Numbers10:3 Bajye bazivugiriza icyarimwe igihe uzahamagara Abisiraheli bose
Numbers10:4 Nushaka gukoranya abatware ari bo bagaba b'ingabo z'Abisiraheli
Numbers10:5 Igihe mugiye kwimuka bajye bazivuza mu ijwi rirenga ridakuruye. Ku ncuro ya mbere
Numbers10:6 Ku ncuro ya kabiri
Numbers10:7 Ariko bajye bavuza impanda mu ijwi rikuruye igihe ukoranya Abisiraheli.
Numbers10:8 Abatambyi bakomoka kuri Aroni abe ari bo bazajya bavuza impanda
Numbers10:9 Nimumara kugera mu gihugu cyanyu mugahagurukira kurwanya abanzi babakandamiza
Numbers10:10 Mujye muzivuza no mu bihe by'ibyishimo
Numbers10:11 Ku itariki ya makumyabiri y'ukwezi kwa kabiri k'umwaka wa kabiri Abisiraheli bavuye mu Misiri
Numbers10:12 Abisiraheli bava mu butayu bwa Sinayi bakomeza urugendo rwabo
Numbers10:13 Urwo rugendo rwa mbere bavuye muri Sinayi
Numbers10:14 Abo mu miryango yo mu cyiciro cya Yuda ni bo babanje kugenda bakurikiye ibendera ryabo. Umuryango wa Yuda wayobowe na Nahasoni mwene Aminadabu
Numbers10:15 uwa Isakari wayobowe na Netanēli mwene Suwari
Numbers10:16 naho uwa Zabuloni wayobowe na Eliyabu mwene Heloni.
Numbers10:17 Bakurikirwa n'Abagerishoni n'Abamerari batwaye Ihema ry'ibonaniro ryamaze gushingurwa.
Numbers10:18 Abo mu miryango yo mu cyiciro cya Rubeni na bo bagenda bakurikiye ibendera ryabo. Umuryango wa Rubeni wayobowe na Elisuri mwene Shedewuri
Numbers10:19 uwa Simeyoni wayobowe na Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi
Numbers10:20 naho uwa Gadi wayobowe na Eliyasafu mwene Duweli.
Numbers10:21 Bakurikirwa n'Abakehati batwaye ibintu byeguriwe Uhoraho
Numbers10:22 Abo mu miryango yo mu cyiciro cya Efurayimu na bo bagenda bakurikiye ibendera ryabo. Umuryango wa Efurayimu wayobowe na Elishama mwene Amihudi
Numbers10:23 uwa Manase wayobowe na Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri
Numbers10:24 naho uwa Benyamini wayobowe na Abidani mwene Gidewoni.
Numbers10:25 Abo mu miryango yo mu cyiciro cya Dani ni bo baherutse abandi
Numbers10:26 uwa Ashēri wayobowe na Pagiyeli mwene Okirani
Numbers10:27 naho uwa Nafutali wayobowe na Ahira mwene Eyinani.
Numbers10:28 Nguko uko ibyiciro by'Abisiraheli byagiye bikurikiranye.
Numbers10:29 Musa abwira muramu we Hobabu mwene Ruweli w'Umumidiyani ati: “Dore tugiye mu gihugu Uhoraho yasezeranye kuduha
Numbers10:30 Hobabu aramusubiza ati: “Oya
Numbers10:31 Musa aramwinginga ati: “Widutererana kuko ari wowe uzi ubu butayu neza
Numbers10:32 Kandi nitujyana
Numbers10:33 Bava ku musozi w'Uhoraho bakora urugendo rw'iminsi itatu. Muri iyo minsi Isanduku y'Isezerano yabagendaga imbere
Numbers10:34 Igihe babaga bimuka
Numbers10:35 Igihe bahekaga Isanduku kugira ngo batangire urugendo
Numbers10:36 Iyo abahetse Isanduku bayururutsaga
Numbers11:1 Umunsi umwe Abisiraheli baritotomba
Numbers11:2 Abantu batakira Musa na we atakambira Uhoraho
Numbers11:3 Kubera ko Uhoraho yabaterereje umuriro
Numbers11:4 Abanyamahanga b'amoko atari amwe bari mu Bisiraheli bararikira inyama. Abisiraheli na bo bongera kuziririra bati: “Icyaduha inyama zo kurya!
Numbers11:5 Dukumbuye ya mafi twariraga mu Misiri nta cyo tuyaguze! Dukumbuye n'amadegede n'amapapayi
Numbers11:6 None ubu dusigaye dutunzwe na manu gusa
Numbers11:7 Iyo manu yajyaga gusa na soya
Numbers11:8 Abantu bajyaga bayitoragura bakayisya cyangwa bakayisekura
Numbers11:9 Iyo ikime cyatondaga mu nkambi nijoro
Numbers11:10 Musa yumva abantu bitotomba bahagaze imbere y'amahema yabo. Uhoraho ararakara cyane bibabaza Musa.
Numbers11:11 Musa aramubaza ati: “Kuki wampemukiye? Nagutwaye iki cyatumye unkorera umutwaro w'aba bantu bose?
Numbers11:12 Ko atari jye watwaye inda y'aba bantu ngo mbabyare
Numbers11:13 Nakura he inyama zo guha abantu bangana batya
Numbers11:14 Sinashobora kubaheka jyenyine
Numbers11:15 Aho kungenza utyo
Numbers11:16 Uhoraho asubiza Musa ati: “Ntoranyiriza abakuru b'Abisiraheli mirongo irindwi
Numbers11:17 Ndamanuka mpavuganire nawe mbahe ku bubasha naguhaye
Numbers11:18 Kandi ubwire abantu uti: ‘Mwiyegurire Uhoraho kuko ejo azabaha inyama mwaririye. Yumvise mwitotomba muti: “Icyaduha inyama zo kurya! Twari tumerewe neza mu Misiri.”
Numbers11:19 Ntimuzazirya umunsi umwe cyangwa ibiri cyangwa itanu
Numbers11:20 muzamara ukwezi kose muzirya kugeza ubwo zizabatera isesemi. Ibyo bizaterwa n'uko mwimūye Uhoraho uri hagati muri mwe
Numbers11:21 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Dore turi abantu ibihumbi magana atandatu
Numbers11:22 N'ubwo twabāga amatungo yacu yose ntabwo byaduhāza
Numbers11:23 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Ese ntuzi ko Imana igira amaboko? Uzirebera yuko ibyo navuze ari ukuri.”
Numbers11:24 Musa arasohoka abwira abantu ibyo Uhoraho yamubwiye. Atoranya abakuru b'Abisiraheli mirongo irindwi
Numbers11:25 Uhoraho amanuka mu gicu avugana na Musa
Numbers11:26 Icyakora Elidadi na Medadi
Numbers11:27 Umuhungu w'umusore ariruka ajya kubwira Musa ko Elidadi na Medadi bahanurira mu nkambi.
Numbers11:28 Yozuwe mwene Nuni wafashaga Musa kuva mu buto bwe
Numbers11:29 Musa aramusubiza ati: “Mbese urandwanira ishyaka? Icyampa Uhoraho agaha Abisiraheli bose ububasha bwo guhanura!”
Numbers11:30 Nuko Musa hamwe na ba bakuru b'Abisiraheli basubira mu nkambi.
Numbers11:31 Uhoraho ahuhisha umuyaga
Numbers11:32 Abantu bamara iminsi ibiri n'ijoro rimwe bazitoragura. Uwatoraguye nke yatoraguye nka toni imwe. Nuko bazanika mu mpande z'inkambi.
Numbers11:33 Ariko Abisiraheli bataramara izo batoraguye
Numbers11:34 Abantu benshi bazize irari ry'inyama barapfa
Numbers11:35 Abantu bava i Kiburoti-Hatāva bajya i Haseroti bahashinga amahema.
Numbers12:1 Musa yari yararongoye umugore w'Umunyakushi. Miriyamu na Aroni barabimunegura.
Numbers12:2 Musa yari umugabo wicisha bugufi kurusha abantu bose bo ku isi. Nyamara Miriyamu na Aroni baravuga bati: “Ese Uhoraho avugana na Musa wenyine? Ese twebwe ntavugana natwe?” Uhoraho arabumva
Numbers12:3 
Numbers12:4 ahita ahamagara Musa na Aroni na Miriyamu ati: “Nimuze uko muri batatu ku Ihema ry'ibonaniro.” Basohoka mu nkambi bajyayo.
Numbers12:5 Uhoraho amanukira mu nkingi y'igicu
Numbers12:6 Arababwira ati: “Nimwumve neza icyo ngiye kubabwira: iyo mbatumyeho umuhanuzi
Numbers12:7 Ariko si ko bimeze ku mugaragu wanjye Musa
Numbers12:8 We tuvugana imbonankubone
Numbers12:9 Uhoraho arabarakarira arigendera.
Numbers12:10 Cya gicu kivuye ku Ihema
Numbers12:11 abwira Musa ati: “Nyakubahwa
Numbers12:12 Dore Miriyamu arasa nk'icyavutse gihwereye cyaraboze uruhande rumwe. Umugirire impuhwe!”
Numbers12:13 Nuko Musa atakambira Uhoraho ati: “Mana
Numbers12:14 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Ese iyo umukobwa aciriwe mu maso na se
Numbers12:15 Nuko basohora Miriyamu mu nkambi amara iminsi irindwi inyuma yayo. Amaze kugaruka
Numbers12:16 Bava i Haseroti bashinga amahema mu butayu bwa Parani.
Numbers13:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers13:2 “Tuma abatasi mu gihugu cya Kanāni ngiye guha Abisiraheli. Wohereze umutware umwe wo muri buri muryango w'Abisiraheli.”
Numbers13:3 Nuko Musa afata abo batware nk'uko Uhoraho yabimutegetse
Numbers13:4 Dore amazina yabo: Shamuwa mwene Zakuri wo mu muryango wa Rubeni
Numbers13:5 Shafati mwene Hori wo mu muryango wa Simeyoni
Numbers13:6 Kalebu mwene Yefune wo mu muryango wa Yuda
Numbers13:7 Yigali mwene Yozefu wo mu muryango wa Isakari
Numbers13:8 Hoseya mwene Nuni wo mu muryango wa Efurayimu
Numbers13:9 Paliti mwene Rafu wo mu muryango wa Benyamini
Numbers13:10 Gadiyeli mwene Sodi wo mu muryango wa Zabuloni
Numbers13:11 Gadi mwene Susi wo mu muryango wa Manase mwene Yozefu
Numbers13:12 Amiyeli mwene Gemali wo mu muryango wa Dani
Numbers13:13 Seturi mwene Mikayeli wo mu muryango wa Ashēri
Numbers13:14 Nahibi mwene Wofusi wo mu muryango wa Nafutali
Numbers13:15 Guweli mwene Maki wo mu muryango wa Gadi.
Numbers13:16 Ngayo amazina y'abatasi Musa yohereje mu gihugu cya Kanāni
Numbers13:17 Igihe Musa yabatumaga yarababwiye ati: “Mwinjire muri Kanāni munyuze mu majyepfo
Numbers13:18 mutate igihugu mumenye uko abaturage bacyo bameze
Numbers13:19 Murebe niba igihugu ari cyiza cyangwa ari kibi
Numbers13:20 Murebe niba ubutaka bwabo burumbuka
Numbers13:21 Nuko baragenda batata igihugu cyose bahereye mu butayu bwa Tsini bageza i Rehobu
Numbers13:22 Babanje kujya mu majyepfo y'igihugu
Numbers13:23 Bageze mu gikombe cya Eshikoli
Numbers13:24 Kubera iryo seri ry'imizabibu bahakuye
Numbers13:25 Bamaze iminsi mirongo ine batata igihugu baragaruka
Numbers13:26 basanga Musa na Aroni n'abandi Bisiraheli i Kadeshi mu butayu bwa Parani. Bababwira ibyo babonye byose
Numbers13:27 Babwira Musa bati: “Twagiye mu gihugu watwoherejemo
Numbers13:28 Icyakora abagituyemo ni abanyambaraga
Numbers13:29 Mu majyepfo yacyo hatuwe n'Abamaleki
Numbers13:30 Abantu batangiye kwinubira Musa
Numbers13:31 Ariko abandi batasi baravuga bati: “Ashwi da! Ntibishoboka kubera ko abagituyemo baturusha amaboko.”
Numbers13:32 Nuko batangira kubeshya Abisiraheli iby'icyo gihugu batase
Numbers13:33 Ndetse twahabonye n'abantu b'ibihangange bakomoka kuri Anaki. Iyo twigereranyaga na bo twabonaga tumeze nk'inshishi
Numbers14:1 Abisiraheli barara basakuza barira
Numbers14:2 bitotombera Musa na Aroni bati: “Ibi birutwa n'uko tuba twarapfiriye mu Misiri cyangwa muri ubu butayu!
Numbers14:3 Kuki Uhoraho atwohereza muri icyo gihugu cya Kanāni? Tuzagwa mu ntambara
Numbers14:4 Nuko baravugana bati: “Dutore undi mutware dusubire mu Misiri.”
Numbers14:5 Musa na Aroni bakiri imbere y'ikoraniro ry'Abisiraheli
Numbers14:6 Nuko Yozuwe mwene Nuni na Kalebu mwene Yefune bo mu bagiye gutata igihugu
Numbers14:7 babwira Abisiraheli bose bati: “Igihugu twagiye gutata ni igihugu cyiza cyane
Numbers14:8 gitemba amata n'ubuki. Uhoraho natugirira neza azakitugezamo akiduhe.
Numbers14:9 None rero mwirinde kumugomera. Ntimutinye abatuye icyo gihugu
Numbers14:10 Ariko Abisiraheli bose bashakaga kwicisha amabuye Yozuwe na Kalebu. Nuko Abisiraheli babona ikuzo ry'Uhoraho hejuru y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro.
Numbers14:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Aba Bisiraheli bazansuzugura bageze ryari? Babonye ibitangaza byose nabakoreye
Numbers14:12 Ngiye kubateza icyorezo mbabuze kwinjira mu gihugu nari ngiye kubaha
Numbers14:13 Musa asubiza Uhoraho ati: “Ntibikabeho! Nugenza utyo Abanyamisiri bazabimenya. Wakuye ubu bwoko muri bo ukoresheje ibitangaza
Numbers14:14 kandi ibyo Abanyamisiri babitekerereje Abanyakanāni. Na bo bumvise yuko wowe Uhoraho ubana n'ubu bwoko
Numbers14:15 None nurimburira ubu bwoko bwose icyarimwe
Numbers14:16 ‘Uhoraho ntiyashoboye kugeza Abisiraheli mu gihugu yabasezeranyije
Numbers14:17 None rero Nyagasani
Numbers14:18 ‘Ndi Uhoraho
Numbers14:19 None rero kubera urukundo rwawe rwinshi
Numbers14:20 Uhoraho asubiza Musa ati: “Ndabababariye nk'uko ubinsabye.
Numbers14:21 Ariko ndahiye ubugingo bwanjye n'ikuzo ryanjye ryuzuye isi
Numbers14:22 ko nta n'umwe mu babonye ikuzo ryanjye n'ibitangaza nakoreye mu Misiri no mu butayu
Numbers14:23 uzatura mu gihugu nasezeranyije ba sekuruza. Nta n'umwe mu bansuzuguye uzakibamo.
Numbers14:24 Ariko umugaragu wanjye Kalebu nzamutuza mu gihugu yatase
Numbers14:25 Ariko kubera ko Abamaleki n'Abanyakanāni batuye muri ibi bibaya
Numbers14:26 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni ati:
Numbers14:27 “Numvise Abisiraheli banyitotombera. Abo bantu babi bahora banyitotombera nzabihanganira ngeze ryari?
Numbers14:28 Mubambwirire muti: ‘Mwahisemo kugwa mu butayu
Numbers14:29 Muri ubwo butayu ni ho muzagwa. Ababaruwe mwese mumaze imyaka makumyabiri n'abayirengeje
Numbers14:30 Ntimuzinjira mu gihugu narahiye kuzabaha. Hazinjiramo gusa Kalebu mwene Yefune na Yozuwe mwene Nuni.
Numbers14:31 Abana banyu mwavuze ko bazajyanwa ho iminyago
Numbers14:32 Naho mwe muzagwa muri ubu butayu.
Numbers14:33 Abana banyu bazamara imyaka mirongo ine baragiye amatungo mu butayu
Numbers14:34 Mwamaze iminsi mirongo ine mutata igihugu
Numbers14:35 Ndi Uhoraho.’ Sinzabura kugenza aba bantu babi bose bandwanya nk'uko mbivuze
Numbers14:36 Uhoraho yicisha icyorezo ba batasi Musa yari yohereje mu gihugu cya Kanāni
Numbers14:37 
Numbers14:38 Yozuwe mwene Nuni na Kalebu mwene Yefune
Numbers14:39 Musa asubiriramo Abisiraheli amagambo yose y'Uhoraho
Numbers14:40 Mu gitondo cya kare bitegura gutera Kanāni banyuze mu misozi
Numbers14:41 Musa arababwira ati: “Kuki mushaka kugomera Uhoraho? Ibyo mwitegura ntimuzabigeraho.
Numbers14:42 Ntimujyeyo kuko Uhoraho atari kumwe namwe
Numbers14:43 Abamaleki n'Abanyakanāni bazabamarira ku icumu. Uhoraho ntazabatabara kuko mwamwimūye.”
Numbers14:44 Nyamara bahangara kuzamuka mu misozi
Numbers14:45 Nuko Abamaleki n'Abanyakanāni bari batuye muri iyo misozi
Numbers15:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers15:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimumara gutura mu gihugu ngiye kubaha
Numbers15:3 muzantambire ibitambo bitwikwa
Numbers15:4 Buri gitambo mujye mukinturana n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke
Numbers15:5 na litiro ya divayi y'ituro risukwa rigendana na buri mwana w'intama
Numbers15:6 Nimutamba impfizi y'intama
Numbers15:7 na litiro n'igice ya divayi y'ituro risukwa
Numbers15:8 Nimuntambira ikimasa ho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro cyangwa icyo guhigura umuhigo cyangwa icy'umusangiro
Numbers15:9 mujye mukinturana n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke
Numbers15:10 na litiro ebyiri za divayi z'ituro risukwa. Impumuro y'ibyo bitambo bitwikwa izanshimisha.
Numbers15:11 Ayo ni yo maturo aturanwa n'igitambo cy'ikimasa cyangwa icy'impfizi y'intama
Numbers15:12 Uko umubare w'ibitambo uziyongēra
Numbers15:13 “Abisiraheli bose bajye bakurikiza ayo mabwiriza igihe bantambira ibitambo bitwikwa
Numbers15:14 Umunyamahanga uje gutura muri mwe cyangwa uhafite ibisekuruza byinshi
Numbers15:15 Mwebwe n'abanyamahanga batuye muri mwe
Numbers15:16 Ari Abisiraheli cyangwa abanyamahanga batuye muri mwe
Numbers15:17 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers15:18 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimumara gutura mu gihugu ngiye kubajyanamo
Numbers15:19 mugakora imigati
Numbers15:20 Uko muzakora imigati mu ifu nshya mujye mufataho umwe muwunture
Numbers15:21 Muzajye muntura uwo mugati ukozwe mu ifu nshya
Numbers15:22 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Dore amabwiriza muzakurikiza nimuramuka muciye ku itegeko ryose nabahaye mbinyujije kuri Musa
Numbers15:23 yaba mwebwe cyangwa abazabakomokaho:
Numbers15:24 niba ari Abisiraheli bose bakoze icyaha batabigambiriye kandi batabizi
Numbers15:25 Umutambyi ahongerere icyaha cy'Abisiraheli bose
Numbers15:26 Kubera ko mwese muzaba mwarancumuyeho
Numbers15:27 “Niba ari umuntu ukoze icyaha atabigambiriye
Numbers15:28 Umutambyi ahongerere icyo cyaha uwo muntu yakoze atabigambiriye
Numbers15:29 Ari Umwisiraheli cyangwa umunyamahanga utuye muri mwe wakoze icyaha atabigambiriye
Numbers15:30 “Ariko Umwisiraheli cyangwa umunyamahanga nakora icyaha yabigambiriye azaba anshebeje
Numbers15:31 Azahanishwe gucibwa
Numbers15:32 Abisiraheli bakiri mu butayu
Numbers15:33 Bamujyana imbere ya Musa na Aroni n'ikoraniro ry'Abisiraheli.
Numbers15:34 Na bo bamuha abamurinda kuko batari bazi igihano kimukwiriye.
Numbers15:35 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Uyu muntu akwiriye kwicwa! Abisiraheli bose bamujyane inyuma y'inkambi bamwicishe amabuye.”
Numbers15:36 Bamugenza nk'uko Uhoraho yabitegetse Musa
Numbers15:37 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers15:38 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Mwebwe n'abazabakomokaho mujye mutera incunda ku misozo y'imyambaro yanyu
Numbers15:39 Mujye mwambara imyambaro ifite bene izo ncunda. Uko muzibonye muzajya mwibuka amategeko yanjye muyakurikize. Bizabarinda kumpemukira mutwarwa n'ibintu bibi mutekereza cyangwa mubona.
Numbers15:40 Bityo muzajya muzirikana amabwiriza yanjye yose muyakurikize
Numbers15:41 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Numbers16:1 Umulevi witwa Kōra mwene Yisehari wo mu nzu ya Kehati
Numbers16:2 Bagomera Musa bashyigikiwe n'abatware magana abiri na mirongo itanu. Abo batware bari ibirangirire bakaba n'intumwa z'amakoraniro y'Abisiraheli.
Numbers16:3 Bishyize hamwe basanga Musa na Aroni
Numbers16:4 Musa yumvise ayo magambo
Numbers16:5 hanyuma abwira Kōra n'abo bafatanyije ati: “Ejo mu gitondo Uhoraho azatumenyesha abo yahisemo kwiyegereza
Numbers16:6 Wowe Kōra n'abo mufatanyije mutegure ibyotezo.
Numbers16:7 Ejo muzashyiremo amakara yaka kugira ngo mwosereze umubavu imbere y'Ihema ry'Uhoraho. Ubwo rero Uhoraho azatwereka abaziranenge abo ari bo.” Musa abwira Kōra n'Abalevi bamushyigikiye ati: “Mwa Balevi mwe
Numbers16:8 
Numbers16:9 Dore Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli yarabarobanuye arabiyegereza
Numbers16:10 Uhoraho yabahaye icyo cyubahiro cyose
Numbers16:11 Iyo mwitotombeye Aroni
Numbers16:12 Musa atumiza Datani na Abiramu bene Eliyabu
Numbers16:13 “Ibyo wadukoreye birahagije! Wadukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri gitemba amata n'ubuki kugira ngo dushirire mu butayu
Numbers16:14 Ntabwo watujyanye muri cya gihugu gitemba amata n'ubuki
Numbers16:15 Musa ararakara cyane maze abwira Uhoraho ati: “Ntuzemere imibavu bazakosereza. Nta kintu nigeze mbaka habe n'indogobe
Numbers16:16 Nuko Musa akomeza kubwira Kōra ati: “Wowe n'abo mufatanyije
Numbers16:17 Wowe na Aroni muzazane ibyotezo byo kosereza Uhoraho umubavu
Numbers16:18 Bukeye buri muntu afata icyotezo ashyiramo amakara yaka n'umubavu
Numbers16:19 Kōra yari yakoranyije Abisiraheli bose
Numbers16:20 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni ati:
Numbers16:21 “Nimwigireyo ndimbure iri koraniro nonaha!”
Numbers16:22 Musa na Aroni bikubita hasi maze barasenga bati: “Mana
Numbers16:23 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers16:24 “Tegeka Abisiraheli bave hafi y'amahema ya Kōra na Datani na Abiramu.”
Numbers16:25 Musa arahaguruka ajya ku mahema ya Datani na Abiramu
Numbers16:26 Abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimuve hafi y'amahema y'aba bagome. Ntimugire ikintu cyabo mukoraho
Numbers16:27 Nuko bava hafi y'amahema ya Kōra na Datani na Abiramu. Datani na Abiramu basohoka mu mahema yabo
Numbers16:28 Musa abwira abari aho ati: “Si jye wiyemeje gukora ibyo nkora
Numbers16:29 bariya bantu nibapfa urupfu rusanzwe
Numbers16:30 Ariko Uhoraho nakora igitangaza
Numbers16:31 Musa akimara kuvuga atyo
Numbers16:32 maze bubamirana n'ababo
Numbers16:33 Nuko barigita ikuzimu bakiri bazima bajyana n'ibyabo byose
Numbers16:34 Abisiraheli bose bāri aho
Numbers16:35 Naho ba bagabo magana abiri na mirongo itanu bosaga imibavu
Numbers17:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers17:2 “Tegeka Eleyazari mwene Aroni umutambyi
Numbers17:3 Abo bagome bazize ibyaha byabo ni bo babinzaniye
Numbers17:4 Nuko umutambyi Eleyazari afata ibyo byotezo by'umuringa
Numbers17:5 nk'uko Uhoraho yari yategetse Eleyazari abinyujije kuri Musa. Uwo muringa wibutsaga Abisiraheli ko abatambyi bakomoka kuri Aroni
Numbers17:6 Bukeye Abisiraheli bose barakorana bitotombera Musa na Aroni bavuga bati: “Mwishe abantu b'Uhoraho!”
Numbers17:7 Bakiri mu ikoraniro
Numbers17:8 Musa na Aroni bajya ku muryango w'Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers17:9 maze Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers17:10 “Nimwigireyo ndimbure iri koraniro nonaha!” Bombi bikubita hasi bubamye
Numbers17:11 maze Musa abwira Aroni ati: “Dore Uhoraho yarakaye cyane ateza abantu icyorezo. None jya ku rutambiro urahurire amakara mu cyotezo
Numbers17:12 Aroni agenza nk'uko Musa yamubwiye
Numbers17:13 Ahagarara hagati y'intumbi n'abazima
Numbers17:14 Ariko cyari kimaze guhitana abantu ibihumbi cumi na bine na magana arindwi
Numbers17:15 Icyorezo kimaze gushira
Numbers17:16 Uhoraho ategeka Musa ati:
Numbers17:17 “Hamagara abatware b'imiryango cumi n'ibiri y'Abisiraheli
Numbers17:18 Ku nkoni y'umuryango wa Levi wandikeho izina rya Aroni
Numbers17:19 Uzishyire mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro imbere y'Isanduku irimo bya bisate by'amabuye byanditseho Amategeko
Numbers17:20 Inkoni y'uwo nahisemo izashibukaho utubabi
Numbers17:21 Musa abibwira Abisiraheli
Numbers17:22 Musa azishyira mu Ihema ry'Uhoraho
Numbers17:23 Bukeye
Numbers17:24 Musa asohora inkoni zose zari imbere y'Uhoraho ajya kuzereka Abisiraheli bose
Numbers17:25 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Subiza inkoni ya Aroni imbere y'Isanduku uyihabike
Numbers17:26 Musa abigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yabimutegetse.
Numbers17:27 Abisiraheli babwira Musa bati: “Reba nawe turapfuye
Numbers17:28 Umuntu wese ugerageje kwegera Ihema ry'Uhoraho arapfa! Mbese twese dupfiriye gushira?”
Numbers18:1 Uhoraho abwira Aroni ati: “Wowe n'abahungu bawe n'abandi Balevi bose
Numbers18:2 Uzazane abavandimwe bawe b'Abalevi
Numbers18:3 Bazakurinde barinde n'Ihema
Numbers18:4 Bazagukorere barinda Ihema ry'ibonaniro bakora
Numbers18:5 Mwebwe abatambyi ni mwe mwenyine mushinzwe imirimo yo mu byumba bizira inenge n'iyo gutamba ibitambo
Numbers18:6 Nakuye abavandimwe banyu b'Abalevi muri bo
Numbers18:7 Wowe n'abahungu bawe muzajye muntambira ibitambo
Numbers18:8 Uhoraho abwira Aroni ati: “Nguhaye umugabane ku maturo Abisiraheli bantura. Ndawukweguriye burundu
Numbers18:9 Mu maturo atwikwa Abisiraheli banyegurira rwose
Numbers18:10 mujye muwurira mu rugo rw'Ihema ry'ibonaniro. Ariko uzaribwe n'ab'igitsinagabo bonyine kuko wanyeguriwe.
Numbers18:11 “Nguhaye kandi n'imigabane iva ku bitambo by'umusangiro Abisiraheli bantura bakayimurikira. Iyo migabane yose uzajye uyisangira n'abahungu bawe n'abakobwa bawe
Numbers18:12 “Ndetse nguhaye n'umuganura w'amavuta meza n'uwa divayi nshya n'uw'ibinyampeke
Numbers18:13 n'uw'ibindi byose Abisiraheli bantura. Abo mu rugo rwawe bose badahumanye bashobora kubiryaho.
Numbers18:14 Ibyo Abisiraheli banyegurira burundu byose na byo ndabiguhaye.
Numbers18:15 Bajye bantura abahungu bose b'impfura n'uburiza bwose bw'amatungo. Ubw'amatungo adahumanye ni ubwawe
Numbers18:16 Umuhungu w'impfura umaze ukwezi avutse
Numbers18:17 Ariko uburiza bw'inka cyangwa ubw'intama cyangwa ubw'ihene ntibakabucungure kuko bwanyeguriwe. Amaraso yabwo ujye uyamisha ku rutambiro
Numbers18:18 Inyama zabwo ni izawe
Numbers18:19 Amaturo yose Abisiraheli bāmurikira kandi bakayanyegurira
Numbers18:20 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Aroni ati: “Mwebwe abatambyi nta gakondo n'umugabane muzagira mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
Numbers18:21 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Umugabane w'Abalevi ni uguhabwa kimwe cya cumi cy'ibyo Abisiraheli bunguka. Ni cyo gihembo cy'imirimo bakora yerekeye Ihema ry'ibonaniro.
Numbers18:22 Abandi Bisiraheli ntibazongere kwiha gukora iyo mirimo
Numbers18:23 Abalevi bonyine bajye baba ari bo bakora iyo mirimo
Numbers18:24 ni cyo gituma mbahaye kimwe cya cumi Abisiraheli bantura. Ni wo mugabane w'Abalevi
Numbers18:25 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers18:26 kubwira Abalevi ati: “Abisiraheli nibabazanira kimwe cya cumi mbahaye ho umugabane
Numbers18:27 Kuri mwe iryo turo rizaba nk'ibyo bene wanyu bakura ku myaka yabo
Numbers18:28 Bityo namwe muzanture amaturo mukuye kuri kimwe cya cumi muzahabwa
Numbers18:29 Ku mpano zose muzahabwa
Numbers18:30 Kuri mwe iryo turo rizaba nk'ibyo bene wanyu bakura ku myaka yabo
Numbers18:31 Ibisigaye mushobora kubirira aho mushatse hose
Numbers18:32 Ku byo muhabwa
Numbers19:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa na Aroni
Numbers19:2 guha Abisiraheli aya mategeko agira ati: “Nimubabwire babazanire inka y'ibihogo idafite inenge kandi itarigeze ikoreshwa imirimo.
Numbers19:3 Muyihe umutambyi Eleyazari ayijyane inyuma y'inkambi
Numbers19:4 Hanyuma akoze urutoki mu maraso yayo
Numbers19:5 Ategeke umuntu kuyitwika yose
Numbers19:6 Umutambyi afate ishami ry'isederi
Numbers19:7 Hanyuma umutambyi amese imyambaro ye kandi yiyuhagire mbere yo gusubira mu nkambi
Numbers19:8 Uwatwitse iyo nka na we ajye amesa imyambaro ye kandi yiyuhagire
Numbers19:9 Umuntu udahumanye ajye ayora ivu ry'iyo nka
Numbers19:10 
Numbers19:11 “Ukoze ku ntumbi y'umuntu
Numbers19:12 Ku munsi wa gatatu no ku wa karindwi
Numbers19:13 Niyirengagiza kumishwaho amazi yo kumuhumanura akegera Ihema ryanjye agihumanye
Numbers19:14 “Umuntu napfira mu ihema rye
Numbers19:15 Ikizaba kiririmo kidapfundikiye neza kizaba gihumanye.
Numbers19:16 Umuntu naba ari hanze agakora ku ntumbi y'umuntu cyangwa ku magufwa y'umuntu cyangwa ku mva
Numbers19:17 “Dore uko bazajya bahumanura: bajye bafata ku ivu rya ya nka batwitse nk'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Numbers19:18 Umuntu udahumanye afate umushandiko wa hisopo
Numbers19:19 Uwo muntu udahumanye ajye abigenza atyo ku munsi wa gatatu n'uwa karindwi
Numbers19:20 Ariko umuntu nahumana akirengagiza kumishwaho amazi yo guhumanura
Numbers19:21 Iryo rizababere itegeko ridakuka. “Umuntu umisha amazi yo guhumanura ajye amesa imyambaro ye
Numbers19:22 Icyo umuntu uhumanye akozeho cyose kiba gihumanye
Numbers20:1 Mu kwezi kwa mbere Abisiraheli bose bagera mu butayu bwa Tsini
Numbers20:2 Abantu babura amazi bagomera Musa na Aroni
Numbers20:3 bijujutira Musa bavuga bati: “Iyaba twarapfiriye hamwe na bene wacu igihe Uhoraho yabicaga!
Numbers20:4 Mwatuzaniye iki muri ubu butayu? Kwari ukugira ngo tuhashirire twe n'amatungo yacu?
Numbers20:5 Kuki mwadukuye mu Misiri mukatuzana aha hantu habi? Ahantu utabona imyaka cyangwa imitini cyangwa imizabibu
Numbers20:6 Musa na Aroni babasiga aho
Numbers20:7 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers20:8 “Fata inkoni
Numbers20:9 Musa yinjira mu Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers20:10 Musa na Aroni bakoranyiriza Abisiraheli imbere y'urutare. Nuko Musa arababwira ati: “Mwa byigomeke mwe
Numbers20:11 Musa abangura inkoni ye akubita urutare incuro ebyiri. Amazi menshi aradudubiza maze Abisiraheli baranywa buhira n'amatungo yabo.
Numbers20:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni ati: “Kubera ko mutanyizeye kandi ntimwereke Abisiraheli ubuziranenge bwanjye
Numbers20:13 Aho hantu bahita Meriba kuko ari ho Abisiraheli bijujutiye Uhoraho
Numbers20:14 Bakiri i Kadeshi
Numbers20:15 ba sogokuruza bagiye mu Misiri
Numbers20:16 Twatakiye Uhoraho aratwumva
Numbers20:17 Twemerere tunyure mu gihugu cyawe. Ntituzanyura mu mirima no mu mizabibu
Numbers20:18 Ariko Abedomu barabasubiza bati: “Ntitubemereye kunyura mu gihugu cyacu
Numbers20:19 Abisiraheli barabasubiza bati: “Tuzanyura mu muhanda mukuru
Numbers20:20 Ariko Abedomu bakomeza kubangira
Numbers20:21 Babuza batyo Abisiraheli kunyura mu gihugu cyabo
Numbers20:22 Abisiraheli bose bava i Kadeshi bajya ku musozi wa Hori
Numbers20:23 ku mupaka w'igihugu cya Edomu. Uhoraho ahabwirira Musa na Aroni ati:
Numbers20:24 “Kubera ko mwangomeye ku byerekeye amazi y'i Meriba
Numbers20:25 None jyana Aroni n'umuhungu we Eleyazari
Numbers20:26 wambure Aroni imyambaro ye maze uyambike umuhungu we Eleyazari. Aroni ari bupfireyo.”
Numbers20:27 Musa akora uko Uhoraho yamutegetse
Numbers20:28 Musa yambura Aroni imyambaro ye ayambika Eleyazari. Nuko Aroni apfira mu mpinga y'uwo musozi. Hanyuma Musa na Eleyazari baramanuka.
Numbers20:29 Abisiraheli bose bamenye ko Aroni yapfuye
Numbers21:1 Umwami wa Aradi iri mu majyepfo ya Kanāni
Numbers21:2 Abisiraheli bahigira Uhoraho uyu muhigo bati: “Nutugabiza aba bantu
Numbers21:3 Uhoraho yumvira Abisiraheli abagabiza abo Banyakanāni
Numbers21:4 Abisiraheli bava ku musozi wa Hori baca mu nzira igana ku Nyanja Itukura
Numbers21:5 bitotombera Imana na Musa bati: “Kuki mwadukuye mu Misiri mukatuzana gupfira muri ubu butayu? Nta byokurya nta n'amazi ahari
Numbers21:6 Nuko Uhoraho abateza inzoka zifite ubumara zirabarya
Numbers21:7 Abantu basanga Musa baramubwira bati: “Twaracumuye ubwo twitotomberaga Uhoraho
Numbers21:8 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Cura ishusho y'inzoka maze uyimanike ku giti
Numbers21:9 Musa acura inzoka mu muringa ayimanika ku giti
Numbers21:10 Abisiraheli bakomeza urugendo bashinga amahema Oboti.
Numbers21:11 Barahava bashinga amahema Iyabarīmu mu butayu buri iburasirazuba bwa Mowabu.
Numbers21:12 Barahava bashinga amahema mu kabande ka Zeredi.
Numbers21:13 Barahava bashinga amahema mu gihugu cy'Abamori mu kidaturwa kiri hakurya y'uruzi rwa Arunoni. Urwo ruzi ni rwo rugabanya Mowabu n'igihugu cy'Abamori.
Numbers21:14 Aho handitswe mu gitabo cy'Intambara z'Uhoraho ngo “Umujyi wa Wahebu y'i Sufa n'utugezi twaho
Numbers21:15 n'utubande runyuramo hateganye n'umujyi wa Ari
Numbers21:16 Barahava bajya i Bēri. Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Koranya abantu mbahe amazi.” Bahabona iriba
Numbers21:17 maze bararirimba bati: “Wa riba we
Numbers21:18 Ibikomangoma ni byo byarifukuye
Numbers21:19 Barahava bajya i Nahaliyeli
Numbers21:20 Barahava bajya mu kibaya kiri mu gihugu cya Mowabu
Numbers21:21 Abisiraheli bohereza intumwa kuri Sihoni umwami w'Abamori
Numbers21:22 “Twemerere tunyure mu gihugu cyawe. Ntituzanyura mu mirima no mu mizabibu
Numbers21:23 Ariko Sihoni yanga ko Abisiraheli banyura mu gihugu cye
Numbers21:24 Abisiraheli baramutsinda. Igihugu cye baracyigarurira bahereye ku ruzi rwa Arunoni kugeza ku mugezi wa Yaboki
Numbers21:25 Abisiraheli bafata imijyi yose y'Abamori
Numbers21:26 Heshiboni wari umurwa wa Sihoni umwami w'Abamori
Numbers21:27 Ni yo mpamvu abasizi bavuze bati: “Nimuze i Heshiboni muyubake bundi bushya
Numbers21:28 Ingabo za Sihoni ziturutse i Heshiboni
Numbers21:29 Mowabu we
Numbers21:30 Abamori twabarashe imyambi
Numbers21:31 Nguko uko Abisiraheli batuye mu gihugu cy'Abamori.
Numbers21:32 Musa atuma abantu gutata umujyi wa Yāzeri
Numbers21:33 Barahindukira bagana i Bashani
Numbers21:34 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Ntumutinye kuko ngiye kumukugabiza we n'ingabo ze zose n'igihugu cye. Umugire nk'uko wagize Sihoni umwami w'Abamori wari utuye i Heshiboni.”
Numbers21:35 Abisiraheli bica Ogi n'abahungu be n'ingabo ze zose
Numbers22:1 Abisiraheli barakomeza baragenda
Numbers22:2 Umwami wa Mowabu witwaga Balaki mwene Sipori
Numbers22:3 Abamowabu babonye ubwinshi bw'Abisiraheli
Numbers22:4 Nuko babwira abakuru b'Abamidiyani bati: “Abisiraheli bazamaraho ibihugu bidukikije
Numbers22:5 yohereza intumwa kuri Balāmu mwene Bewori
Numbers22:6 None ngwino umvumire abo bantu kuko bandusha amaboko
Numbers22:7 Abakuru b'Abamowabu n'Abamidiyani bagenda bajyanye ibyo guha Balāmu
Numbers22:8 Balāmu arababwira ati: “Nimurare hano
Numbers22:9 Iryo joro Imana ibaza Balāmu iti: “Abo bantu bari iwawe ni bande?”
Numbers22:10 Balāmu arasubiza ati: “Balaki mwene Sipori umwami wa Mowabu yabantumyeho ati:
Numbers22:11 ‘Dore hari abantu bavuye mu Misiri bayogoje ibihugu. None ngwino ubamvumire
Numbers22:12 Imana ibwira Balāmu iti: “Ntuzajyane na bo kandi ntuzavume abo bantu
Numbers22:13 Bukeye Balāmu abwira intumwa za Balaki ati: “Nimwitahire kuko Uhoraho yanze ko tujyana.”
Numbers22:14 Abatware ba Mowabu barahaguruka basubira kwa Balaki baramubwira bati: “Balāmu yanze ko tuzana.”
Numbers22:15 Balaki atuma abandi batware barusha aba mbere ubwinshi n'icyubahiro.
Numbers22:16 Bageze kwa Balāmu baramubwira bati: “Balaki mwene Sipori aravuze ati: ‘Ntihagire ikikubuza kunyitaba
Numbers22:17 kuko nzaguhemba bishimishije kandi icyo uzansaba cyose nzakigukorera. None rero ngwino umvumire abo bantu.’ ”
Numbers22:18 Balāmu asubiza intumwa za Balaki ati: “N'aho Balaki yampa ifeza n'izahabu byuzuye ingoro ye
Numbers22:19 Namwe nimurare hano
Numbers22:20 Iryo joro Imana ibwira Balāmu iti: “Ubwo abo bantu baje kuguhamagara muzajyane
Numbers22:21 Bukeye Balāmu ategura indogobe ye
Numbers22:22 ahetswe n'indogobe ye
Numbers22:23 Indogobe ibonye umumarayika w'Uhoraho ahagaze mu nzira afashe inkota mu ntoki
Numbers22:24 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho ajya guhagarara mu nzira ifunganye
Numbers22:25 Indogobe imubonye yegera urukuta cyane irubyigiraho ikirenge cya Balāmu
Numbers22:26 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho arongera yigira imbere ahagarara ahantu hafunganye cyane
Numbers22:27 Indogobe imubonye iryama igihetse Balāmu
Numbers22:28 Nuko Uhoraho aha iyo ndogobe ububasha bwo kuvuga
Numbers22:29 Balāmu arayisubiza ati: “Wansuzuguye
Numbers22:30 Indogobe ibaza Balāmu iti: “Ko ari jye uguheka buri gihe
Numbers22:31 Ako kanya Uhoraho atuma Balāmu abona umumarayika wari uhagaze mu nzira
Numbers22:32 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Kuki wakubise indogobe yawe incuro eshatu zose? Dore ni jye waje kugutangīra
Numbers22:33 Indogobe yambonye impunga incuro eshatu. Iyo itampunga mba nakwishe
Numbers22:34 Balāmu aramusubiza ati: “Nacumuye! Ntabwo nari nzi ko waje kuntangīra. Nyamara niba ubona ko uru rugendo rudakwiriye
Numbers22:35 Ariko umumarayika w'Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Jyana n'abo bantu. Icyakora uzajye uvuga gusa icyo nkubwiye.” Nuko Balāmu akomeza urugendo hamwe n'intumwa za Balaki.
Numbers22:36 Balaki yumvise ko Balāmu aje
Numbers22:37 Balaki aramubaza ati: “Kuki utazanye n'intumwa nagutumyeho bwa mbere? Wibwiraga ko ntashobora kuguhemba bishimishije?”
Numbers22:38 Balāmu asubiza Balaki ati: “Noneho ndaje
Numbers22:39 Nuko Balaki ajyana Balāmu mu mujyi w'i Kiriyati-Husoti.
Numbers22:40 Balaki atamba ibitambo by'inka n'intama
Numbers22:41 Bukeye Balaki ajyana Balāmu ku musozi witwa Bamoti-Bāli
Numbers23:1 Balāmu abwira Balaki kumwubakishiriza aho hantu intambiro ndwi
Numbers23:2 Balaki abigenza nk'uko Balāmu abivuze. Balāmu na Balaki batambira kuri buri rutambiro ikimasa n'impfizi y'intama.
Numbers23:3 Maze Balāmu abwira Balaki ati: “Guma iruhande rw'ibitambo byawe bikongorwa n'umuriro nanjye ngende
Numbers23:4 Imana irahamusanga. Arayibwira ati: “Nubakishije intambiro ndwi
Numbers23:5 Uhoraho aha Balāmu ubutumwa kugira ngo abushyikirize Balaki.
Numbers23:6 Balāmu asanga Balaki ahagararanye n'abatware b'Abamowabu
Numbers23:7 Balāmu arahanura ati: “Balaki yankuye muri Siriya
Numbers23:8 Navuma nte abo Imana itavumye? Nasabira nte nabi abo Uhoraho yatonesheje?
Numbers23:9 Nabitegereje ndi hejuru y'ibitare
Numbers23:10 Abakomoka kuri Yakobo ni benshi nk'umukungugu! No kubara kimwe cya kane cy'Abisiraheli biraruhije! Icyampa nkipfira ndi intungane nka bo
Numbers23:11 Balaki abwira Balāmu ati: “Ungenje ute? Nakuzaniye kuvuma abanzi banjye none ubasabiye umugisha!”
Numbers23:12 Balāmu aramusubiza ati: “None se singomba kuvuga icyo Uhoraho ambwiye?”
Numbers23:13 Balaki arongera aramubwira ati: “Dore hano urareba igice kimwe cy'inkambi y'Abisiraheli gusa. None ngwino nkujyane aho ubasha kubareba bose ubamvumire.”
Numbers23:14 Amujyana ahirengeye mu mpinga y'umusozi wa Pisiga
Numbers23:15 Balāmu abwira Balaki ati: “Guma iruhande rw'ibitambo byawe bikongorwa n'umuriro
Numbers23:16 Uhoraho aha Balāmu ubutumwa kugira ngo abushyikirize Balaki.
Numbers23:17 Balāmu asanga Balaki ahagararanye n'abatware b'Abamowabu
Numbers23:18 Balāmu arahanura ati: “Balaki we
Numbers23:19 Imana si umuntu kugira ngo ibeshye
Numbers23:20 Yantegetse guhesha Abisiraheli umugisha
Numbers23:21 Ntihakabeho ibyago mu bakomoka kuri Yakobo
Numbers23:22 Imana yabakuye mu Misiri
Numbers23:23 Nta bupfumu bwagira icyo butwara abakomoka kuri Yakobo
Numbers23:24 Ni ubwoko bubaduka nk'intare y'ingore
Numbers23:25 Balaki abwira Balāmu ati: “Niba udashoboye kubavuma
Numbers23:26 Balāmu aramusubiza ati: “Mbese sinakubwiye nti: ‘Icyo Uhoraho avuga ni cyo ndi bukore?’ ”
Numbers23:27 Balaki abwira Balāmu ati: “Ngwino nkujyane ahandi hantu. Ahari Imana irakunda ko ubamvumira.”
Numbers23:28 Balaki amujyana mu mpinga ya Pewori ahitegeye ubutayu.
Numbers23:29 Balāmu abwira Balaki kumwubakishiriza aho hantu intambiro ndwi
Numbers23:30 Balaki abigenza nk'uko Balāmu abivuze
Numbers24:1 Balāmu abonye ko Uhoraho ashaka guha Abisiraheli umugisha
Numbers24:2 abona Abisiraheli bashinze amahema bakurikije imiryango yabo. Mwuka w'Imana amuzaho
Numbers24:3 maze Balāmu arahanura ati: “Nimwumve ubutumwa bwa Balāmu mwene Bewori
Numbers24:4 Ni ubutumwa bw'umuntu wumva amagambo y'Imana
Numbers24:5 “Mbega ngo amahema y'abakomoka kuri Yakobo araba meza! Mbega ukuntu amahema y'Abisiraheli ashinze neza!
Numbers24:6 Bazamera nk'imigezi itemba mu bikombe
Numbers24:7 Amariba yabo ntazakama
Numbers24:8 Imana yabakuye mu Misiri
Numbers24:9 Bazaryama nk'intare y'ingabo ihāze
Numbers24:10 Balaki arakarira Balāmu cyane akubita agatoki ku kandi
Numbers24:11 Hoshi subira iwanyu! Nari nakubwiye ko nzaguhemba bishimishije
Numbers24:12 Balāmu aramusubiza ati: “Nabwiye abo wantumyeho ko
Numbers24:13 naho wampa ifeza n'izahabu byuzuye ingoro yawe
Numbers24:14 Ariko ntarasubira iwacu
Numbers24:15 Nuko Balāmu arahanura ati: “Nimwumve ubutumwa bwa Balāmu mwene Bewori
Numbers24:16 Ni ubutumwa bw'umuntu wumva amagambo y'Imana
Numbers24:17 “Ndareba umuntu wo mu gihe kizaza
Numbers24:18 Azigarurira igihugu cy'abanzi be b'Abedomu
Numbers24:19 Uzakomoka kuri Yakobo azategeka ibyo bihugu
Numbers24:20 Balāmu yeretswe iby'Abamaleki
Numbers24:21 Yeretswe n'iby'Abakeni
Numbers24:22 Ariko Abakeni bazakongorwa n'umuriro
Numbers24:23 Arongera arahanura ati: “Mbega ishyano! Imana nikora ibyo
Numbers24:24 Abanyashipure bazambuka inyanja
Numbers24:25 Hanyuma Balāmu yisubirira iwabo
Numbers25:1 Igihe Abisiraheli bari i Shitimu
Numbers25:2 Abamowabu batambiraga imana zabo ibitambo
Numbers25:3 Bityo Abisiraheli bayoboka ikigirwamana Bāli y'i Pewori
Numbers25:4 Abwira Musa ati: “Koranya abatware bose b'Abisiraheli
Numbers25:5 Musa abwira abacamanza b'Abisiraheli ati: “Abo mu bantu mushinzwe bayobotse Bāli y'i Pewori
Numbers25:6 Abisiraheli bakiri imbere y'Ihema ry'ibonaniro baririra abishwe
Numbers25:7 Finehasi mwene Eleyazari mwene Aroni umutambyi abibonye
Numbers25:8 Yinjira mu ihema ry'uwo Mwisiraheli amusanga aho yari aryamanye n'uwo mugore
Numbers25:9 Icyo cyorezo cyishe abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
Numbers25:10 Hanyuma Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers25:11 “Finehasi mwene Eleyazari mwene Aroni umutambyi yafushye mu cyimbo cyanjye
Numbers25:12 None umubwire ko musezeranyije kuzamuha amahoro.
Numbers25:13 Kubera ko yandwaniye ishyaka agahongerera Abisiraheli
Numbers25:14 Umwisiraheli wicanywe n'Umumidiyanikazi
Numbers25:15 Umumidiyanikazi bicanywe
Numbers25:16 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers25:17 “Nimutere Abamidiyani mubice.
Numbers25:18 Ni bo banzi babashutse muracumura
Numbers26:1 Nyuma y'icyo cyorezo
Numbers26:2 “Nimubarure Abisiraheli bose mukurikije amazu yabo
Numbers26:3 Musa n'umutambyi Eleyazari babibwirira Abisiraheli mu kibaya cya Mowabu
Numbers26:4 Babigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yabitegetse Musa. Dore imiryango y'Abisiraheli yavuye mu Misiri.
Numbers26:5 Umuryango wa Rubeni impfura ya Yakobo wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abahanoki bakomoka kuri Hanoki
Numbers26:6 Abahesironi bakomoka kuri Hesironi
Numbers26:7 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abarubeni
Numbers26:8 Abakomoka kuri Palu ni Eliyabu
Numbers26:9 n'abahungu be Nemuweli na Datani na Abiramu. Datani na Abiramu ni bo bari bahagarariye Abisiraheli bigometse kuri Musa na Aroni. Bari bafatanyije na Kōra kugomera Uhoraho
Numbers26:10 ubutaka burasaduka burabamira
Numbers26:11 Ariko abakomoka kuri Kōra bo ntibishwe.
Numbers26:12 Umuryango wa Simeyoni wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abanemuweli bakomoka kuri Nemuweli
Numbers26:13 Abazera bakomoka kuri Zera
Numbers26:14 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abasimeyoni
Numbers26:15 Umuryango wa Gadi wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abasefoni bakomoka kuri Sefoni
Numbers26:16 Abozini bakomoka kuri Ozini
Numbers26:17 Abarodi bakomoka kuri Arodi
Numbers26:18 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abagadi
Numbers26:19 Abahungu babiri ba Yuda
Numbers26:20 Ni yo mpamvu umuryango wa Yuda wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abashela bakomoka kuri Shela
Numbers26:21 Mu Baperēsi harimo Abahesironi bakomoka kuri Hesironi
Numbers26:22 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abayuda
Numbers26:23 Umuryango wa Isakari wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abatola bakomoka kuri Tola
Numbers26:24 Abayashubu bakomoka kuri Yashubu
Numbers26:25 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abisakari
Numbers26:26 Umuryango wa Zabuloni wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abaseredi bakomoka kuri Seredi
Numbers26:27 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abazabuloni
Numbers26:28 Yozefu yari afite abahungu babiri
Numbers26:29 Umuryango wa Manase wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abamakiri bakomoka kuri Makiri
Numbers26:30 Abagileyadi bari bagizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abayezeri bakomoka kuri Yezeri
Numbers26:31 Abasiriyēli bakomoka kuri Asiriyēli
Numbers26:32 Abashemida bakomoka kuri Shemida
Numbers26:33 Selofehadi mwene Heferi nta bahungu yabyaye
Numbers26:34 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abamanase
Numbers26:35 Umuryango wa Efurayimu wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abashutela bakomoka kuri Shutela
Numbers26:36 Mu Bashutela harimo Aberani bakomoka kuri Erani.
Numbers26:37 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abefurayimu
Numbers26:38 Umuryango wa Benyamini wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Ababela bakomoka kuri Bela
Numbers26:39 Abashufamu bakomoka kuri Shufamu
Numbers26:40 Mu Babela harimo Abaridi bakomoka kuri Aridi
Numbers26:41 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Ababenyamini
Numbers26:42 Umuryango wa Dani wari ugizwe n'inzu y'Abashuhamu bakomoka kuri Shuhamu.
Numbers26:43 Inzu y'Abashuhamu yari igizwe n'abagabo ibihumbi mirongo itandatu na bine na magana ane.
Numbers26:44 Umuryango wa Ashēri wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abayimuna bakomoka kuri Yimuna
Numbers26:45 Mu Baberiya harimo Abaheberi bakomoka kuri Heberi
Numbers26:46 Ashēri yari afite n'umukobwa witwa Sera.
Numbers26:47 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abashēri
Numbers26:48 Umuryango wa Nafutali wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abayahisēli bakomoka kuri Yahisēli
Numbers26:49 Abayeseri bakomoka kuri Yeseri
Numbers26:50 Ayo ni yo mazu y'Abanafutali
Numbers26:51 Abagabo bose b'Abisiraheli babaruwe
Numbers26:52 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers26:53 “Ngiyo imiryango izagabana igihugu cya Kanāni
Numbers26:54 Umuryango munini uzahabwe umugabane munini
Numbers26:55 Buri muryango uzahabwe umugabane hakoreshejwe ubufindo
Numbers26:56 kugira ngo bamenye ahazatuzwa imiryango minini cyangwa imito.”
Numbers26:57 Umuryango wa Levi na wo warabaruwe. Wari ugizwe n'amazu akurikira: Abagerishoni bakomoka kuri Gerishoni
Numbers26:58 Muri ayo mazu harimo n'Abalibuni n'Abaheburoni
Numbers26:59 Amuramu uwo arongora Yokebedi
Numbers26:60 Aroni yabyaye Nadabu na Abihu
Numbers26:61 ariko Nadabu na Abihu bishwe bazize kuzana imbere y'Uhoraho umuriro udakwiye.
Numbers26:62 Abalevi b'igitsinagabo bose bamaze ukwezi n'abakurengeje
Numbers26:63 Ngiryo ibarura Musa n'umutambyi Eleyazari bakoze igihe Abisiraheli bari mu kibaya cya Mowabu
Numbers26:64 Mu babaruwe icyo gihe
Numbers26:65 uretse Kalebu mwene Yefune na Yozuwe mwene Nuni. Abandi bose bari baraguye mu butayu
Numbers27:1 Mahila na Nowa na Hogila
Numbers27:2 Abo bakobwa baza imbere ya Musa n'umutambyi Eleyazari n'abatware n'ikoraniro ryose
Numbers27:3 “Data yapfiriye mu butayu nta bahungu asize. Yapfuye azize ibyaha bye
Numbers27:4 Ntibikwiye rero ko inzu ya data izima kubera ko atabyaye abahungu. Nimuduhe gakondo kimwe na bene wacu.”
Numbers27:5 Musa ashyikiriza Uhoraho ikibazo cyabo.
Numbers27:6 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati:
Numbers27:7 “Ibyo abakobwa ba Selofehadi bavuga bifite ishingiro
Numbers27:8 Kandi ubwire Abisiraheli ko umuntu napfa adasize umuhungu
Numbers27:9 Niba nta mukobwa afite
Numbers27:10 Niba nta bavandimwe afite
Numbers27:11 Niba nta se wabo afite
Numbers27:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Uzazamuke ujye mu mpinga y'uriya musozi wo mu bisi bya Abarīmu
Numbers27:13 Numara kucyitegereza uzapfa nka mukuru wawe Aroni
Numbers27:14 kubera ko mutanyumviye ngo mwereke Abisiraheli ubuziranenge bwanjye
Numbers27:15 Nuko Musa abwira Uhoraho ati:
Numbers27:16 “Uhoraho Mana
Numbers27:17 mu gihe bazaba bari mu ngendo
Numbers27:18 Uhoraho asubiza Musa ati: “Nahaye Yozuwe mwene Nuni Mwuka wanjye
Numbers27:19 
Numbers27:20 Umuhe ku butegetsi bwawe kugira ngo Abisiraheli bose bamwumvire.
Numbers27:21 Yozuwe na we ajye yiyambaza umutambyi Eleyazari kugira ngo amenye icyo nshaka
Numbers27:22 Musa abigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yamutegetse
Numbers27:23 amurambikaho ibiganza. Musa atangaza ko ari we uzamusimbura nk'uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse.
Numbers28:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers28:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Mu bihe byategetswe mujye munzanira ibyokurya by'amaturo atwikwa
Numbers28:3 Dore amaturo atwikwa muzajya muntura: buri munsi mujye muzana abana b'intama babiri badafite inenge kandi batarengeje umwaka
Numbers28:4 Umwe mujye muwutamba mu gitondo
Numbers28:5 muwuturane n'ikiro cy'ifu ivanze na litiro y'amavuta y'iminzenze.
Numbers28:6 Ibyo bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers28:7 Igihe mutamba umwana w'intama mu gitondo mujye muntura n'ituro risukwa
Numbers28:8 N'igihe mutamba umwana w'intama nimugoroba
Numbers28:9 “Ku munsi w'isabato
Numbers28:10 Ibyo bitambo byo ku isabato mujye mubyongera ku bisanzwe bya buri munsi
Numbers28:11 “Ku itariki ya mbere ya buri kwezi
Numbers28:12 Buri tungo mujye muriturana n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke
Numbers28:13 naho buri mwana w'intama muwuturane n'ikiro kimwe. Impumuro y'ibyo bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro n'amaturo atwikwa iranshimisha.
Numbers28:14 Buri tungo kandi mujye muriturana n'ituro risukwa rya divayi ku buryo bukurikira: buri kimasa mujye mugiturana na litiro ebyiri
Numbers28:15 Uwo munsi mujye muntura n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Numbers28:16 “Ku itariki ya cumi n'enye y'ukwezi kwa mbere mujye munyizihiriza Pasika.
Numbers28:17 Naho ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu y'uko kwezi
Numbers28:18 Mujye muyitangiza ikoraniro ryo kunsenga
Numbers28:19 Mujye munzanira aya maturo atwikwa: ibimasa bibiri n'impfizi y'intama
Numbers28:20 Buri tungo mujye muriturana n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke ry'ifu ivanze n'amavuta ku buryo bukurikira: buri kimasa mujye mugiturana n'ibiro bitatu by'ifu
Numbers28:21 naho buri mwana w'intama muwuturane n'ikiro kimwe.
Numbers28:22 Uwo munsi mujye muntura n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha byanyu.
Numbers28:23 Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku gitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro gisanzwe cy'icyo gitondo.
Numbers28:24 Muri iyo minsi uko ari irindwi
Numbers28:25 Ku munsi wa karindwi
Numbers28:26 “Ku munsi mukuru w'isarura ry'ibinyampeke
Numbers28:27 Mujye muntura n'ibimasa bibiri n'impfizi y'intama
Numbers28:28 Buri tungo mujye muriturana n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke ry'ifu ivanze n'amavuta ku buryo bukurikira: buri kimasa mujye mugiturana n'ibiro bitatu by'ifu
Numbers28:29 naho buri mwana w'intama muwuturane n'ikiro kimwe.
Numbers28:30 Mujye muntura n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha byanyu.
Numbers28:31 Ayo matungo yose agomba kuba adafite inenge. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:1 Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Musa ati: “Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa karindwi ntimukagire imirimo mukora
Numbers29:2 Mujye muntura ikimasa n'impfizi y'intama
Numbers29:3 Buri tungo mujye muriturana n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke ry'ifu ivanze n'amavuta y'iminzenze ku buryo bukurikira: ikimasa mujye mugiturana n'ibiro bitatu by'ifu
Numbers29:4 naho buri mwana w'intama muwuturane n'ikiro kimwe.
Numbers29:5 Mujye muntura n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha byanyu.
Numbers29:6 Mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri kwezi n'ibya buri munsi
Numbers29:7 “Ku itariki ya cumi y'uko kwezi kwa karindwi ntimukagire imirimo mukora
Numbers29:8 Mujye muntura ikimasa n'impfizi y'intama
Numbers29:9 Buri tungo mujye muriturana n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke ry'ifu ivanze n'amavuta ku buryo bukurikira: ikimasa mujye mugiturana n'ibiro bitatu by'ifu
Numbers29:10 naho buri mwana w'intama muwuturane n'ikiro kimwe.
Numbers29:11 Mujye muntura n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Numbers29:12 “Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu y'uko kwezi kwa karindwi
Numbers29:13 Mujye muntura ibimasa cumi na bitatu n'amapfizi y'intama abiri
Numbers29:14 Buri tungo mujye muriturana n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke ry'ifu ivanze n'amavuta ku buryo bukurikira: buri kimasa mujye mugiturana n'ibiro bitatu by'ifu
Numbers29:15 naho buri mwana w'intama muwuturane n'ikiro kimwe.
Numbers29:16 Mujye muntura n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:17 “Ku munsi wa kabiri
Numbers29:18 Mujye mubiturana n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'asukwa yabigenewe
Numbers29:19 n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:20 “Ku munsi wa gatatu
Numbers29:21 Mujye mubiturana n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'asukwa yabigenewe
Numbers29:22 n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:23 “Ku munsi wa kane
Numbers29:24 Mujye mubiturana n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'asukwa yabigenewe
Numbers29:25 n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:26 “Ku munsi wa gatanu
Numbers29:27 Mujye mubiturana n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'asukwa yabigenewe
Numbers29:28 n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:29 “Ku munsi wa gatandatu
Numbers29:30 Mujye mubiturana n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'asukwa yabigenewe
Numbers29:31 n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:32 “Ku munsi wa karindwi
Numbers29:33 Mujye mubiturana n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'asukwa yabigenewe
Numbers29:34 n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:35 “Ku munsi wa munani
Numbers29:36 munture ikimasa n'impfizi y'intama n'abana b'intama barindwi batarengeje umwaka
Numbers29:37 Mujye mubiturana n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'asukwa yabigenewe
Numbers29:38 n'isekurume y'ihene y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha. Ibyo bitambo mujye mubyongera ku bitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Numbers29:39 “Ibyo ni byo muzantura ku minsi mikuru
Numbers29:40 Musa abwira Abisiraheli ibyo Uhoraho yari yamutegetse byose.
Numbers30:1 Musa abwira abatware b'imiryango y'Abisiraheli ati: “Nimwumve ibyo Uhoraho yategetse.
Numbers30:2 Umuntu nahiga umuhigo wo gutura Uhoraho ituro cyangwa akarahirira kugira icyo yigomwa
Numbers30:3 “Umukobwa w'inkumi ukiri kwa se nahiga umuhigo wo gutura Uhoraho ituro
Numbers30:4 se akabyumva akabyihorera
Numbers30:5 Icyakora se nabimubuza ku munsi yabyumviyeho
Numbers30:6 “Umukobwa nahiga umuhigo cyangwa akagira icyo arahirira atabitekerejeho
Numbers30:7 umugabo we ntabimubuze ku munsi abyumviyeho
Numbers30:8 Ariko umugabo we nabimubuza uwo munsi
Numbers30:9 “Umupfakazi cyangwa umugore wasenzwe
Numbers30:10 “Umugore ufite umugabo nahiga umuhigo cyangwa akarahirira kugira icyo yigomwa
Numbers30:11 umugabo we akabyumva ntamubuze
Numbers30:12 Ariko umugabo we nabimubuza ku munsi yabyumviyeho
Numbers30:13 Umugabo afite uburenganzira bwo kwemera cyangwa guhakana imihigo umugore we yahize
Numbers30:14 Natagira icyo amubuza ku munsi yabyumviyeho
Numbers30:15 Ariko umugabo namubuza kugisohoza nyuma y'uwo munsi
Numbers30:16 Ayo ni yo mabwiriza Uhoraho yahaye Musa ku byerekeye imihigo y'abagore
Numbers31:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers31:2 “Ugiye kuzapfa
Numbers31:3 Nuko Musa abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimutoranye abajya kurwanya Abamidiyani
Numbers31:4 Mutoranye umutwe w'ingabo igihumbi muri buri muryango w'Abisiraheli zitabare.”
Numbers31:5 Nuko Abisiraheli batoranya ingabo ibihumbi cumi na bibiri
Numbers31:6 Musa azohereza ku rugamba
Numbers31:7 Nuko zitera Abamidiyani nk'uko Uhoraho yabitegetse Musa
Numbers31:8 Zica n'abami batanu b'Abamidiyani ari bo Ewi na Rekemu
Numbers31:9 Abisiraheli banyaga abagore n'abana b'Abamidiyani
Numbers31:10 Batwika imijyi yose y'Abamidiyani n'inkambi zabo zose.
Numbers31:11 Hanyuma batabarukana ibyo basahuye n'iminyago y'abantu n'amatungo
Numbers31:12 babishyīra Musa n'umutambyi Eleyazari n'Abisiraheli bose
Numbers31:13 Musa n'umutambyi Eleyazari n'abatware b'Abisiraheli bose
Numbers31:14 Musa arakarira abatwaraga ingabo ibihumbi n'abatwaraga amagana batabarutse
Numbers31:15 arababaza ati: “Kuki mutishe abagore?
Numbers31:16 Ntimuzi ko ari bo bakurikije inama za Balāmu
Numbers31:17 None nimwice abahungu bose n'abagore bose
Numbers31:18 ariko abakobwa ntimubice
Numbers31:19 Mushinge kandi amahema yanyu inyuma y'inkambi muhamare iminsi irindwi. Maze ku munsi wa gatatu no ku wa karindwi
Numbers31:20 Muzahumanure n'imyambaro yose n'ibikoze mu mpu no mu bwoya bw'ihene byose n'ibibajwe mu biti byose.”
Numbers31:21 Umutambyi Eleyazari abwira ingabo zitabarutse ku rugamba ati: “Nimukurikize ibyo Uhoraho yategetse Musa.
Numbers31:22 Izahabu n'ifeza n'umuringa n'ibindi byuma byose
Numbers31:23 bidashobora gutwikwa n'umuriro
Numbers31:24 Nimumara kumesa imyambaro yanyu ku munsi wa karindwi
Numbers31:25 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers31:26 “Wowe n'umutambyi Eleyazari n'abakuru b'Abisiraheli
Numbers31:27 Nuko uyigabanyemo kabiri
Numbers31:28 Ku mugabane w'abatabarutse ukureho ibyo kunyegurira ku buryo bukurikira: umuntu umwe mu bantu magana atanu
Numbers31:29 Ubikure ku mugabane wabo maze ubihe umutambyi Eleyazari
Numbers31:30 No ku mugabane w'abandi Bisiraheli ukure umuntu umwe mu bantu mirongo itanu
Numbers31:31 Musa n'umutambyi Eleyazari babigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yabitegetse Musa.
Numbers31:32 Iminyago ingabo z'Abisiraheli zazanye
Numbers31:33 n'inka ibihumbi mirongo irindwi na bibiri
Numbers31:34 n'indogobe ibihumbi mirongo itandatu na kimwe
Numbers31:35 n'abakobwa ibihumbi mirongo itandatu na bibiri.
Numbers31:36 Abatabarutse bahawe kimwe cya kabiri cy'iyo minyago. Mu ntama n'ihene ibihumbi magana atatu mirongo itatu na birindwi na magana atanu bahawe
Numbers31:37 magana atandatu mirongo irindwi n'eshanu zeguriwe Uhoraho.
Numbers31:38 Mu nka ibihumbi mirongo itatu na bitandatu bahawe
Numbers31:39 Mu ndogobe ibihumbi mirongo itatu na magana atanu bahawe
Numbers31:40 Mu bakobwa ibihumbi cumi na bitandatu bahawe
Numbers31:41 Iyo minyago yeguriwe Uhoraho
Numbers31:42 Musa aha abandi Bisiraheli umugabane usigaye w'iminyago
Numbers31:43 wari ugizwe n'intama n'ihene ibihumbi magana atatu mirongo itatu na birindwi na magana atanu
Numbers31:44 n'inka ibihumbi mirongo itatu na bitandatu
Numbers31:45 n'indogobe ibihumbi mirongo itatu na magana atanu
Numbers31:46 n'abakobwa ibihumbi cumi na bitandatu.
Numbers31:47 Kuri uwo mugabane Musa akuraho umukobwa umwe muri mirongo itanu
Numbers31:48 Abatwaraga ingabo ibihumbi n'abatwaraga amagana begera Musa
Numbers31:49 baramubwira bati: “Nyakubahwa
Numbers31:50 Tuzanye n'ibyo twabonye bicuzwe mu izahabu
Numbers31:51 Musa n'umutambyi Eleyazari bakira ibyo bintu byose by'izahabu
Numbers31:52 abatware batuye Uhoraho
Numbers31:53 Izo zahabu zavuye ku byo buri ngabo yisahuriye.
Numbers31:54 Musa na Eleyazari bazizana ku Ihema ry'ibonaniro
Numbers32:1 Abarubeni n'Abagadi bari batunze cyane
Numbers32:2 basanga Musa n'umutambyi Eleyazari n'abatware b'Abisiraheli
Numbers32:3 “Uhoraho yahaye Abisiraheli kwigarurira umujyi wa Ataroti n'uwa Diboni
Numbers32:4 
Numbers32:5 kandi niba bikunogeye
Numbers32:6 Musa abaza Abagadi n'Abarubeni ati: “Mbese muragira ngo bene wanyu bajye ku rugamba
Numbers32:7 Kuki mushaka guca abandi Bisiraheli intege
Numbers32:8 Ibyo ni byo ba so bakoze ubwo naboherezaga gutata icyo gihugu turi i Kadeshi-Barineya.
Numbers32:9 Baragiye baragitata banyuze mu gikombe cya Eshikoli
Numbers32:10 Uwo munsi Uhoraho yararakaye maze ararahira ati:
Numbers32:11 ‘Aba bantu bavuye mu Misiri banze kunyoboka. Ni yo mpamvu kuva ku bafite imyaka makumyabiri n'abayirengeje
Numbers32:12 uretse Kalebu mwene Yefune w'Umukenizi
Numbers32:13 Uhoraho yarakariye Abisiraheli cyane
Numbers32:14 None namwe mwafashe imico mibi ya ba so murabakurikiza. Mugiye gutuma Uhoraho yongera kuturakarira.
Numbers32:15 Nimumugomera azongera atuzerereze mu butayu
Numbers32:16 Abarubeni n'Abagadi basubiza Musa bati: “Reka tubanze twubakire amatungo yacu ibiraro
Numbers32:17 tuyizengurutse inkuta zo kubarinda abanzi. Hanyuma tuzafata intwaro tujye imbere y'abandi Bisiraheli
Numbers32:18 Ntituzasubira mu ngo zacu Umwisiraheli wese atarahabwa gakondo ye.
Numbers32:19 Ntituzagira gakondo hamwe na bo hakurya ya Yorodani
Numbers32:20 Musa arababwira ati: “Ndabyemeye
Numbers32:21 mwambuke Yorodani mumurwanirire kugeza ubwo azatsinda abanzi be
Numbers32:22 akigarurira icyo gihugu. Nimubigenza mutyo
Numbers32:23 Ariko nimutabigenza mutyo
Numbers32:24 Ngaho nimwubakire ab'imiryango yanyu imijyi
Numbers32:25 Abagadi n'Abarubeni babwira Musa bati: “Databuja
Numbers32:26 tuzasiga abana bacu n'abagore bacu n'amatungo yacu yose mu mijyi ya Gileyadi.
Numbers32:27 Natwe databuja
Numbers32:28 Musa ategeka umutambyi Eleyazari na Yozuwe mwene Nuni
Numbers32:29 agira ati: “Abagadi n'Abarubeni nibemera kuyoborwa n'Uhoraho
Numbers32:30 Ariko nibatabikora batyo
Numbers32:31 Abagadi n'Abarubeni baramusubiza bati: “Nyakubahwa
Numbers32:32 Tuzafata intwaro twinjire mu gihugu cya Kanāni turwanirire Uhoraho
Numbers32:33 Musa aha Abagadi n'Abarubeni n'igice cy'umuryango wa Manase mwene Yozefu
Numbers32:34 Abagadi basana umujyi wa Diboni n'uwa Ataroti n'uwa Aroweri
Numbers32:35 n'uwa Ataroti-Shofani n'uwa Yāzeri n'uwa Yogibeha
Numbers32:36 n'uwa Beti-Nimura n'uwa Beti-Harani. Basana iyo mijyi barayikomeza
Numbers32:37 Abarubeni basana umujyi wa Heshiboni n'uwa Eleyale n'uwa Kiriyatayimu
Numbers32:38 n'uwa Nebo n'uwa Bāli-Mewoni n'uwa Sibuma
Numbers32:39 Abakomoka kuri Makiri mwene Manase batera Gileyadi
Numbers32:40 Nuko Musa aha Abamakiri icyo gihugu bagituramo.
Numbers32:41 Undi ukomoka kuri Manase witwa Yayiri
Numbers32:42 N'uwitwa Noba ajya kwigarurira umujyi wa Kenati n'insisiro ziwukikije
