Numbers33:1 Abisiraheli bavuye mu Misiri bakurikije imiryango yabo
Numbers33:2 
Numbers33:3 Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu y'ukwezi kwa mbere
Numbers33:4 Icyo gihe Abanyamisiri bari bagihamba abana babo bose b'impfura
Numbers33:5 Bavuye i Ramesesi bashinga amahema i Sukoti.
Numbers33:6 Bahavuye bayashinga Etamu hafi y'ubutayu.
Numbers33:7 Bahavuye basubira inyuma berekeje i Pihahiroti
Numbers33:8 Bahavuye bambuka inyanja bagera mu butayu
Numbers33:9 Bahavuye bayashinga Elimu aho basanze amasōko cumi n'abiri n'imikindo mirongo irindwi.
Numbers33:10 Bahavuye bashinga amahema hafi y'Inyanja Itukura.
Numbers33:11 Bahavuye bayashinga mu butayu bwa Sini.

Numbers33:13 Bahavuye bayashinga Alushi.

Numbers33:17 Bahavuye bayashinga i Haseroti.

Numbers33:24 Bahavuye bayashinga i Harada.
Numbers33:25 Bahavuye bayashinga i Makeloti.
Numbers33:26 Bahavuye bayashinga i Tahati.

Numbers33:34 Bahavuye bayashinga Abirona.
Numbers33:35 Bahavuye bayashinga Esiyoni-Geberi.
Numbers33:36 Bahavuye bayashinga i Kadeshi mu butayu bwa Tsini.
Numbers33:37 Bahavuye bayashinga ku musozi wa Hori
Numbers33:38 Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa gatanu k'umwaka wa mirongo ine Abisiraheli bavuye mu Misiri
Numbers33:39 Icyo gihe Aroni yari amaze imyaka ijana na makumyabiri n'itatu avutse.
Numbers33:40 Nuko umwami wa Aradi iri mu majyepfo ya Kanāni
Numbers33:41 Abisiraheli bava ku musozi wa Hori
Numbers33:42 Bahavuye bayashinga i Punoni.
Numbers33:43 Bahavuye bayashinga Oboti.
Numbers33:44 Bahavuye bayashinga Iyabarīmu
Numbers33:45 Bahavuye bayashinga i Diboni y'Abagadi.
Numbers33:46 Bahavuye bayashinga Alumoni-Dibulatayimu.
Numbers33:47 Bahavuye bayashinga mu bisi bya Abarīmu ahateganye na Nebo.
Numbers33:48 Bahavuye bayashinga mu kibaya cya Mowabu
Numbers33:49 Bashinga amahema yabo muri icyo kibaya ku nkombe za Yorodani
Numbers33:50 Bakiri mu kibaya cya Mowabu
Numbers33:51 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimumara kwambuka Yorodani mukagera mu gihugu cya Kanāni
Numbers33:52 muzirukane abahatuye bose
Numbers33:53 Muzigarurire icyo gihugu mugiture
Numbers33:54 Muzakigabanye imiryango n'amazu yanyu yose mukoresheje ubufindo
Numbers33:55 Ariko nimutirukana abatuye muri icyo gihugu
Numbers33:56 Nimutabirukana
Numbers34:1 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers34:2 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimutera igihugu cya Kanāni
Numbers34:3 Mu ruhande rw'amajyepfo ahagana mu butayu bwa Tsini muzagabana n'igihugu cya Edomu. Umupaka wanyu uzahera mu majyepfo y'Ikiyaga cy'Umunyu
Numbers34:4 unyure mu majyepfo y'umusozi wa Akurabimu
Numbers34:5 ukomeze ugere ku kagezi ko ku mupaka wa Misiri no ku Nyanja ya Mediterane.
Numbers34:6 “Umupaka wanyu w'iburengerazuba uzaba Inyanja ya Mediterane.
Numbers34:7 “Uwo mu majyaruguru uzahera ku Nyanja ya Mediterane unyure ku musozi wa Hori
Numbers34:8 ukomeze kuri Lebo-Hamati ugeze i Sedadi mu majyaruguru.
Numbers34:9 Kuva aho uzakomeza unyure i Zifuroni ugeze i Hasari-Enani. Uwo abe ari wo mupaka wanyu wo mu majyaruguru.
Numbers34:10 “Umupaka wanyu w'iburasirazuba uzahera Hasari-Enani unyure i Shefamu
Numbers34:11 ukomeze umanuke ugere i Ribula
Numbers34:12 ukurikire uruzi rwa Yorodani kugera ku Kiyaga cy'Umunyu. Ngiyo imipaka y'igihugu cyanyu.”
Numbers34:13 Musa abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Icyo ni cyo gihugu Uhoraho yategetse kugabanya imiryango icyenda n'igice hakoreshejwe ubufindo.
Numbers34:14 Umuryango wa Rubeni n'uwa Gadi n'igice cy'uwa Manase yabonye imigabane yayo.
Numbers34:15 Iyo miryango uko ari ibiri n'igice yahawe imigabane yayo iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani.”
Numbers34:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati:
Numbers34:17 “Dore amazina y'abantu bazabagabanya igihugu: umutambyi Eleyazari na Yozuwe mwene Nuni
Numbers34:18 bafashijwe n'umutware umwe muri buri muryango.
Numbers34:19 Dore amazina y'abo batware: Kalebu mwene Yefune wo mu muryango wa Yuda
Numbers34:20 Shemweli mwene Amihudi wo mu muryango wa Simeyoni
Numbers34:21 Elidadi mwene Kisiloni wo mu muryango wa Benyamini
Numbers34:22 Buki mwene Yogili wo mu muryango wa Dani
Numbers34:23 Haniyeli mwene Efodi wo mu muryango wa Manase mwene Yozefu
Numbers34:24 Kemuweli mwene Shifutani wo mu muryango wa Efurayimu
Numbers34:25 Elisafani mwene Parinaki wo mu muryango wa Zabuloni
Numbers34:26 Palitiyeli mwene Azani wo mu muryango wa Isakari
Numbers34:27 Ahihudi mwene Shelomi wo mu muryango wa Ashēri
Numbers34:28 Pedaheli mwene Amihudi wo mu muryango wa Nafutali.”
Numbers34:29 Abo ni bo Uhoraho yashinze kugabanya Abisiraheli igihugu cya Kanāni.
Numbers35:1 Abisiraheli bakiri mu kibaya cya Mowabu
Numbers35:2 “Tegeka Abisiraheli ko ku migabane yabo bahaho Abalevi imijyi yo guturamo
Numbers35:3 Abalevi bazaba muri iyo mijyi
Numbers35:4 Izo nzuri zizagarukire kuri metero magana ane na mirongo itanu
Numbers35:5 Bityo inzuri z'Abalevi zizaba mpande enye
Numbers35:6 Muzahe Abalevi imijyi mirongo ine n'ibiri
Numbers35:7 Bityo muzaha Abalevi imijyi mirongo ine n'umunani
Numbers35:8 Muzabahe iyo mijyi mukurikije imijyi iri mu mugabane wa buri muryango
Numbers35:9 Uhoraho ategeka Musa
Numbers35:10 kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimwambuka Yorodani mukagera mu gihugu cya Kanāni
Numbers35:11 muzitoranyirize imijyi kugira ngo umuntu wishe undi atabigambiriye
Numbers35:12 umuntu ushaka guhōrera uwishwe. Uwishe undi ntakicwe atabanje gucirwa urubanza n'ababishinzwe.
Numbers35:13 Muzatoranye imijyi itandatu ibe iy'ubuhungiro
Numbers35:14 itatu ibe hakuno ya Yorodani
Numbers35:15 Iyo mijyi itandatu izabe ubuhungiro bw'uwishe undi atabigambiriye
Numbers35:16 “Umuntu niyica undi amukubise icyitwa icyuma cyose
Numbers35:17 Namwica amukubise ibuye azaba ari umwicanyi
Numbers35:18 Namwica amukubise icyitwa igiti cyose azaba ari umwicanyi
Numbers35:19 Umwicanyi azashyikirizwe ugomba guhōrera uwishwe kugira ngo yicwe.
Numbers35:20 Umuntu nasunika undi ku bugome cyangwa akagira icyo amutera agambiriye kumugirira nabi
Numbers35:21 cyangwa akamutera ikofi kubera urwango akamwica
Numbers35:22 “Ariko umuntu nahutaza undi nta rwango amufitiye
Numbers35:23 cyangwa akamuhirikaho ibuye atamubonye akamwica
Numbers35:24 icyo gihe uwishe umuntu n'uhōrera uwapfuye
Numbers35:25 Bazasubize uwishe umuntu mu mujyi w'ubuhungiro yari yahungiyemo
Numbers35:26 Ariko umuntu wishe undi nava mu mujyi w'ubuhungiro
Numbers35:27 uhōrera uwapfuye akamwicira inyuma y'uwo mujyi
Numbers35:28 Uwishe undi agomba kuguma mu mujyi w'ubuhungiro
Numbers35:29 Mwebwe n'abazabakomokaho mujye muca imanza mutyo
Numbers35:30 “Uzica undi na we azicwe nihagira abagabo babimuhamya
Numbers35:31 Ntimukemere ko umwicanyi atanga indishyi
Numbers35:32 Ntimukemere kandi ko uwahungiye mu mujyi w'ubuhungiro atanga indishyi yo kwicungura kugira ngo asubire muri gakondo ye. Ajye ategereza ko Umutambyi mukuru apfa.
Numbers35:33 Ntimugahumanyishe igihugu cyanyu ubwicanyi. Nta bundi buryo bwo kugihumanura uretse kwica umwicanyi.
Numbers35:34 Ntimugahumanye igihugu muzaturamo kuko nanjye nzaba ngituyemo. Ndi Uhoraho uba hagati yanyu.”
Numbers36:1 Nuko abatware b'inzu ya Gileyadi mwene Makiri mwene Manase mwene Yozefu
Numbers36:2 Babwira Musa bati: “Databuja
Numbers36:3 Ariko nibashyingirwa mu yindi miryango y'Abisiraheli
Numbers36:4 Umwaka wa Yubile nugera
Numbers36:5 Uhoraho ategeka Musa kubwira Abisiraheli ati: “Ibyo Abayozefu bavuga bifite ishingiro.
Numbers36:6 None Uhoraho ategetse ko abakobwa ba Selofehadi bazarongorwa n'abo bihitiyemo
Numbers36:7 Umugabane w'Abisiraheli ntukave mu muryango ngo ujye mu wundi. Buri Mwisiraheli ajye agumana umugabane wo muri gakondo ya ba sekuruza.
Numbers36:8 Mu gihe umukobwa ahawe umunani kwa se
Numbers36:9 Bityo umugabane ntuzava mu muryango ngo ujye mu wundi
Numbers36:10 Abakobwa ba Selofehadi bumvira ibyo Uhoraho yabategetse abinyujije kuri Musa.
Numbers36:11 Mahila na Tirusa na Hogila
Numbers36:12 mu muryango wa Manase mwene Yozefu. Nuko umunani wabo uguma mu muryango wabo.
Numbers36:13 Ayo ni yo mabwiriza n'amategeko Uhoraho yahaye Abisiraheli
Deuteronomy1:1 Muri iki gitabo harimo amagambo Musa yabwiye Abisiraheli bose bakiri iburasirazuba bw'uruzi rwa Yorodani. Icyo gihe bari mu butayu hafi y'Ikiyaga cy'Umunyu ahateganye n'i Sufu
Deuteronomy1:2 (Kuva ku musozi wa Horebu kugera i Kadeshi-Barineya uciye mu misozi ya Seyiri
Deuteronomy1:3 Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa cumi na kumwe k'umwaka wa mirongo ine Abisiraheli bavuye mu Misiri
Deuteronomy1:4 Bari bamaze gutsinda Sihoni umwami w'Abamori wari utuye i Heshiboni
Deuteronomy1:5 Bakiri iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani mu gihugu cya Mowabu
Deuteronomy1:6 Uhoraho Imana yacu yatubwiriye i Horebu ati: “Igihe mumaze kuri uyu musozi kirahagije
Deuteronomy1:7 none nimuhaguruke mukomeze urugendo. Mujye mu misozi y'Abamori no mu bihugu by'abo bahana imbibi
Deuteronomy1:8 Ngicyo igihugu nabahaye
Deuteronomy1:9 Tukiri i Horebu narababwiye nti: “Sinshobora kubatwara jyenyine.
Deuteronomy1:10 Uhoraho Imana yanyu yarabagwije
Deuteronomy1:11 Uhoraho Imana ya ba sokuruza
Deuteronomy1:12 Sinshobora gukemura impaka zanyu zose jyenyine
Deuteronomy1:13 none nimwitoranyirize mu miryango yanyu abantu b'ibirangirire b'abahanga kandi bafite ubushishozi
Deuteronomy1:14 Ibyo mwarabyemeye.
Deuteronomy1:15 Nuko mfata abo bantu b'ibirangirire b'abahanga bo mu miryango yanyu
Deuteronomy1:16 Narabategetse nti: “Mujye mwumva ibibazo bya bagenzi banyu kandi muce imanza zitabera. Abantu bose mujye mubafata kimwe
Deuteronomy1:17 Ntimukagire aho mubogamira
Deuteronomy1:18 Namwe nabategetse ibyo mugomba gukora byose.
Deuteronomy1:19 Nuko tuvuye ku musozi wa Horebu
Deuteronomy1:20 ndababwira nti: “Mugeze hafi y'imisozi y'Abamori Uhoraho Imana yacu azaduha.
Deuteronomy1:21 Dore igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabasezeranyije
Deuteronomy1:22 Nuko mwese muranyegera murambwira muti: “Reka twohereze abatasi bajye gutata icyo gihugu
Deuteronomy1:23 Iyo nama narayishimye
Deuteronomy1:24 Baragiye batata icyo gihugu banyuze mu misozi no mu gikombe cya Eshikoli
Deuteronomy1:25 batuzanira ku mbuto zera muri icyo gihugu
Deuteronomy1:26 Ariko mwebwe mwagomeye Uhoraho Imana yanyu mwanga kukijyamo
Deuteronomy1:27 mwitotombeye mu mahema yanyu muvuga muti: “Uhoraho aratwanga
Deuteronomy1:28 Mbese ubundi turagirayo iki? Abatasi twohereje baraduhebeje ngo abantu baho baturusha imbaraga kandi baradusumba
Deuteronomy1:29 Ndababwira nti: “Ntimugire ubwoba
Deuteronomy1:30 Uhoraho Imana yanyu azabajya imbere
Deuteronomy1:31 no mu butayu. Mu rugendo rwose mwagenze kugera ino
Deuteronomy1:32 Nyamara ibyo ntibyatumye mugirira Uhoraho Imana yanyu icyizere.
Deuteronomy1:33 Ni we wabajyaga imbere mu nzira
Deuteronomy1:34 Uhoraho yumvise ibyo mwavugaga ararakara
Deuteronomy1:35 “Nta n'umwe wo muri aba bantu babi uri mu kigero cy'abakuze
Deuteronomy1:36 Ariko Kalebu mwene Yefune we yanyobotse adashidikanya
Deuteronomy1:37 Ndetse mwatumye Uhoraho andakarira arambwira ati: “Nawe Musa ntuzagituramo
Deuteronomy1:38 ahubwo Yozuwe mwene Nuni ugufasha ni we uzakigeramo. Umutere inkunga kuko ari we uzagihesha Abisiraheli.
Deuteronomy1:39 Abana banyu mwavuze ko bazajyanwa ho iminyago
Deuteronomy1:40 Ariko mwebweho nimusubize iy'ubutayu
Deuteronomy1:41 Mwarambwiye muti: “Twacumuye ku Uhoraho
Deuteronomy1:42 Uhoraho antegeka kubabwira nti: “Ntimuhatere kuko ntari kumwe namwe
Deuteronomy1:43 Nababwiye ibyo Uhoraho yavuze ntimwabyitaho
Deuteronomy1:44 Nuko Abamori bahatuye baraza barabarwanya
Deuteronomy1:45 Mwaragarutse muririra imbere y'Uhoraho
Deuteronomy1:46 Nuko mumara igihe kirekire i Kadeshi.
Deuteronomy2:1 Maze dusubiza iy'ubutayu
Deuteronomy2:2 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Deuteronomy2:3 “Igihe mumaze muri iyi misozi kirahagije
Deuteronomy2:4 Maze antegeka kubabwira nti: “Muzanyure mu gihugu cya Seyiri gituwe na bene wanyu b'Abedomu bakomoka kuri Ezawu. Bazabatinya ariko muzitonde
Deuteronomy2:5 ntimuzabarwanye. Sinzabaha n'ahangana urwara ku gihugu cyabo
Deuteronomy2:6 Muzagure na bo ibyokurya ndetse n'amazi yo kunywa.”
Deuteronomy2:7 Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye umugisha mu byo mwakoze byose
Deuteronomy2:8 Dukikira imisozi ya Seyiri ituwe na bene wacu b'Abedomu
Deuteronomy2:9 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Ntimushotōre Abamowabu bakomoka kuri Loti ngo mubarwanye. Sinzabaha ku gihugu cyabo kuko nakibahaye ho gakondo
Deuteronomy2:10 (Kera hari hatuwe n'Abemi bari ubwoko bukomeye
Deuteronomy2:11 Bamwe babafataga nk'Abarefa kimwe n'Abanaki
Deuteronomy2:12 Kandi kera Abahori bari batuye mu misozi ya Seyiri
Deuteronomy2:13 Uhoraho yatubwiye kwambuka akabande ka Zeredi
Deuteronomy2:14 Kuva igihe twaviriye i Kadeshi-Barineya kugeza icyo gihe
Deuteronomy2:15 Uhoraho yakomeje kubarwanya kugeza aho bashiriye.
Deuteronomy2:16 Bose bamaze gupfa
Deuteronomy2:17 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Deuteronomy2:18 “Uyu munsi muri bunyure hafi y'umupaka wa Mowabu
Deuteronomy2:19 Nimugera hafi y'igihugu cy'Abamoni bakomoka kuri Loti
Deuteronomy2:20 (Icyo gihugu na cyo cyitwa icy'Abarefa
Deuteronomy2:21 Bari ubwoko bukomeye
Deuteronomy2:22 Ni na ko yagiriye Abedomu
Deuteronomy2:23 Ni na ko Abafilisiti baturutse i Kafutori bagiriye Abawi bari batuye mu mijyi kugeza i Gaza.)
Deuteronomy2:24 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Nimuhaguruke mwambuke uruzi rwa Arunoni. Mbagabije Sihoni umwami w'Abamori utuye i Heshiboni n'igihugu cye
Deuteronomy2:25 Uhereye uyu munsi ndatuma amahanga yose yo ku isi agira ubwoba abatinye
Deuteronomy2:26 Igihe twari mu kidaturwa hafi y'i Kedemoti
Deuteronomy2:27 “Twemerere tunyure mu gihugu cyawe
Deuteronomy2:28 Ibyo tuzarya n'amazi tuzanywa tuzabyishyura
Deuteronomy2:29 Utugirire nk'uko Abedomu b'i Seyiri n'Abamowabu ba Ari batugiriye
Deuteronomy2:30 Ariko Umwami Sihoni ntiyemera ko tunyura mu gihugu cye
Deuteronomy2:31 Uhoraho yarambwiye ati: “Dore ntangiye kubagabiza Sihoni n'igihugu cye
Deuteronomy2:32 Maze Sihoni azana n'ingabo ze zose ngo adukumīre
Deuteronomy2:33 Uhoraho Imana yacu aramutugabiza
Deuteronomy2:34 Icyo gihe dufata imijyi yabo yose turayirimbura
Deuteronomy2:35 Icyakora twanyaze amatungo yabo
Deuteronomy2:36 Uhoraho Imana yacu atugabiza imijyi yose uhereye kuri Aroweri
Deuteronomy2:37 Ariko ntitwegereye igihugu cy'Abamoni
Deuteronomy3:1 Turakomeza duca mu muhanda ugana muri Bashani. Nuko Ogi umwami wa Bashani azana n'ingabo ze zose ngo adukumīre
Deuteronomy3:2 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Ntimubatinye kuko nababagabije bo n'igihugu cyabo
Deuteronomy3:3 Nuko Uhoraho Imana yacu atugabiza Ogi umwami wa Bashani n'ingabo ze zose
Deuteronomy3:4 Twafashe imijyi ye yose ntitwasiga n'umwe. Dufata n'imijyi mirongo itandatu mu karere ka Arugobu
Deuteronomy3:5 Iyo mijyi yose yari izengurutswe n'inkuta ndende
Deuteronomy3:6 Twarayirimbuye yose
Deuteronomy3:7 Icyakora twanyaze amatungo yose
Deuteronomy3:8 Twigarurira dutyo ibihugu by'abo bami bombi b'Abamori bari iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani
Deuteronomy3:9 (Uwo musozi Abanyasidoni bawita Siriyoni
Deuteronomy3:10 Twafashe igihugu cyose cya Ogi umwami wa Bashani
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ogi umwami wa Bashani ni we wenyine wari ukiriho mu bakomoka ku Barefa
Deuteronomy3:12 Tumaze kwigarurira ibyo bihugu
Deuteronomy3:13 Igice gisigaye cya Gileyadi na Bashani hose hategekwaga na Ogi

Deuteronomy22:1 Nubona inka cyangwa intama cyangwa ihene y'undi yazimiye ntukayirengagize
Deuteronomy22:2 Niba nyirayo atuye kure cyangwa ukaba utamuzi
Deuteronomy22:3 Ni na ko uzabigenza no ku ndogobe ye
Deuteronomy22:4 Nusanga indogobe y'undi cyangwa inka ye yatembye mu nzira ntukamutererane
Deuteronomy22:5 Umugore ntakambare imyambaro y'abagabo
Deuteronomy22:6 Niba uri mu nzira ugenda ukabona icyari cy'inyoni mu giti cyangwa hasi
Deuteronomy22:7 Ibyana cyangwa amagi ushobora kubijyana
Deuteronomy22:8 Niwubaka inzu ifite igisenge gishashe
Deuteronomy22:9 Ntukabibe izindi mbuto mu murima wawe w'imizabibu
Deuteronomy22:10 Ntugahingishe igisuka gikururwa n'ikimasa n'indogobe bizirikanyije hamwe.

Deuteronomy22:21 bajye bamujyana imbere y'inzu ya se

Deuteronomy22:25 Ariko umugabo nafatira mu gasozi umukobwa w'isugi wasabwe n'undi mugabo
Deuteronomy22:26 Umukobwa ntimuzagire icyo mumutwara kuko nta cyaha yakoze. Ni umwere nk'umuntu wishwe na mugenzi we

Deuteronomy22:29 uwo mugabo azahe se w'uwo mukobwa ibikoroto mirongo itanu by'ifeza. Uwo mugabo azarongore uwo mukobwa kuko yaryamanye na we ku ngufu

Deuteronomy31:3 Ariko Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni we uzabajya imbere murwambuke. Azarimbura amahanga atuye muri kiriya gihugu mucyigarurire. Yozuwe na we azabarangaza imbere mwambuka
Deuteronomy31:4 Uhoraho azatsemba ayo mahanga nk'uko yatsembye Sihoni na Ogi
Deuteronomy31:5 Azayabagabiza
Deuteronomy31:6 Nimukomere mube intwari
Deuteronomy31:7 Nuko Musa ahamagara Yozuwe
Deuteronomy31:8 Uhoraho azakujya imbere abane nawe
Deuteronomy31:9 Musa yandika Amategeko
Deuteronomy31:10 Musa arabategeka ati: “Uko imyaka irindwi ishize
Deuteronomy31:11 muzajye musomera Abisiraheli bose aya Mategeko
Deuteronomy31:12 Muzajye mukoranya abantu bose
Deuteronomy31:13 Muri ubwo buryo
Deuteronomy31:14 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Igihe cyawe cyo gupfa kiregereje
Deuteronomy31:15 Uhoraho aza mu nkingi y'igicu ihagarara hejuru y'umuryango w'Ihema.
Deuteronomy31:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa ati: “Dore ugiye gutabaruka
Deuteronomy31:17 Icyo gihe nzabarakarira mbatererane
Deuteronomy31:18 Icyo gihe nzabihorera rwose
Deuteronomy31:19 “Nuko rero nimwandike indirimbo ngiye kubabwira muzayigishe Abisiraheli
Deuteronomy31:20 Nzabageza mu gihugu gitemba amata n'ubuki nk'uko nabisezeranyije ba sekuruza
Deuteronomy31:21 Ndetse ntarabageza mu gihugu nasezeranye kubaha
Deuteronomy31:22 Nuko uwo munsi Musa yandika iyo ndirimbo
Deuteronomy31:23 Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe mwene Nuni ati: “Komera kandi ube intwari
Deuteronomy31:24 Musa arangije kwandika mu gitabo ayo Mategeko yose
Deuteronomy31:25 ategeka Abalevi bashinzwe guheka Isanduku y'Isezerano y'Uhoraho ati:
Deuteronomy31:26 “Nimufate iki gitabo cy'Amategeko
Deuteronomy31:27 Nuko abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nzi ko muri ibyigomeke kandi mutava ku izima. Niba mugomera Uhoraho nkiri kumwe namwe
Deuteronomy31:28 Munkoranyirize abakuru b'imiryango bose n'abashinzwe ubutabera banyumve
Deuteronomy31:29 Nzi ko nimara gupfa muzifata nabi cyane rwose mugateshuka ibyo nabategetse. Mu minsi iri imbere muzabona ibyago kubera ko muzakora ibyo Uhoraho yababujije
Deuteronomy31:30 Abisiraheli bamaze gukoranira hamwe
Deuteronomy32:1 Wa juru we
Deuteronomy32:2 Inyigisho zanjye nizimere nk'imvura itonyanga
Deuteronomy32:3 Reka namamaze Uhoraho
Deuteronomy32:4 Uhoraho ni urutare rudukingira
Deuteronomy32:5 Nyamara mwebwe ab'iki gihe mwarayihemukiye
Deuteronomy32:6 Ese uko ni ko mwitura Uhoraho
Deuteronomy32:7 Nimwibuke ibyabayeho kera
Deuteronomy32:8 Imana Isumbabyose yahaye amahanga yose iminani
Deuteronomy32:9 Ariko Uhoraho yitoranyirije abakomoka kuri Yakobo

Deuteronomy32:11 Yabitagaho nk'uko kagoma imenyereza abana bayo kuguruka

Deuteronomy32:14 Yabahaye ikivuguto n'amahenehene
Deuteronomy32:15 Abisiraheli babaye abatunzi nyamara baragoma
Deuteronomy32:16 Bayobotse imana z'abanyamahanga bamutera gufuha bakoze ibizira baramurakaza.
Deuteronomy32:17 Batambiye ibitambo ingabo za Satani mu cyimbo cy'Imana
Deuteronomy32:18 Bibagiwe urutare rubakingira

Deuteronomy32:24 Bazananurwa n'inzara
Deuteronomy32:25 Abana babo bazaba bari hanze bazahitanwa n'intambara

Deuteronomy32:29 Iyo baba abanyabwenge

Deuteronomy32:43 Mwa mahanga mwe

Deuteronomy33:2 agira ati: “Uhoraho yaje aturuka ku musozi wa Sinayi

Deuteronomy33:4 Bumvira Amategeko nabashyikirije
Deuteronomy33:5 Imiryango y'Abisiraheli n'abatware babo bikoranyirije hamwe

Deuteronomy33:8 Yasabiye umugisha ab'umuryango wa Levi agira ati: “Uhoraho

Deuteronomy33:14 Nabahe izuba rimeza imyaka
Deuteronomy33:15 Nibahinge no ku mpinga z'imisozi yabayeho kuva kera
Deuteronomy33:16 nibahabwe imisaruro itubutse. Uhoraho wambonekeye ari mu gihuru nabahe umugisha. Nawuhe ab'umuryango wa Yozefu wari umutware wa bene se.

Deuteronomy33:19 Bazahamagara abantu bateranire ku musozi

Deuteronomy34:1 Musa ava mu kibaya cya Mowabu
Deuteronomy34:2 n'intara yose y'Abanafutali n'iy'Abefurayimu
Deuteronomy34:3 Amwereka amajyepfo ya Kanāni n'ikibaya cya Yorodani n'igikombe cy'i Yeriko wa mujyi w'imikindo
Deuteronomy34:4 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Kiriya ni cyo gihugu narahiriye Aburahamu na Izaki na Yakobo ko nzagiha abazabakomokaho. None rero ukirebeshe amaso
Deuteronomy34:5 Nuko Musa umugaragu w'Uhoraho apfira aho ngaho mu gihugu cya Mowabu
Deuteronomy34:6 Uhoraho arahamushyingura mu kabande gateganye n'i Beti-Pewori
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa yapfuye amaze imyaka ijana na makumyabiri avutse
Deuteronomy34:8 Abisiraheli bamaze iminsi mirongo itatu baririra Musa mu kibaya cya Mowabu.
Deuteronomy34:9 Musa atarapfa yari yararambitse ibiganza kuri Yozuwe mwene Nuni

Deuteronomy34:12 Nta n'undi muhanuzi wagize ububasha cyangwa ngo akore ibikomeye biteye ubwoba
Joshua1:1 Musa umugaragu w'Uhoraho amaze gupfa
Joshua1:2 “Umugaragu wanjye Musa yarapfuye
Joshua1:3 Aho muzakoza ikirenge hose ndahabeguriye
Joshua1:4 Umupaka w'igihugu cyanyu uzahera ku butayu mu majyepfo
Joshua1:5 Mu mibereho yawe yose nta wuzaguhangara
Joshua1:6 Komera kandi ube intwari
Joshua1:7 Komera rero kandi ube intwari cyane. Uzajye ukurikiza Amategeko yose umugaragu wanjye Musa yagushyikirije
Joshua1:8 Ujye uhora usoma igitabo cy'Amategeko
Joshua1:9 Ujye wibuka ko nagutegetse gukomera no kuba intwari. None rero ntugatinye kandi ntugakuke umutima
Joshua1:10 Nuko Yozuwe ategeka abatware b'Abisiraheli
Joshua1:11 kuzenguruka mu nkambi
Joshua1:12 Yozuwe abwira Abarubeni n'Abagadi n'igice cy'Abamanase ati:
Joshua1:13 “Nimwibuke ibyo Musa umugaragu w'Uhoraho yababwiye agira ati: ‘Uhoraho Imana yanyu abemereye gutura muri iki gihugu
Joshua1:14 Abagore banyu n'abana banyu bazagume hakuno ya Yorodani aho Musa yabahaye
Joshua1:15 kugeza ubwo Uhoraho Imana yanyu azabaha kwigarurira igihugu abahaye
Joshua1:16 Nuko basubiza Yozuwe bati: “Ibyo udutegetse byose tuzabikora
Joshua1:17 Tuzakumvira byimazeyo nk'uko twumviraga Musa. Icyaduha gusa ngo Uhoraho Imana yawe azabe ari kumwe nawe nk'uko yari kumwe na Musa.

Joshua2:1 Bakiri i Shitimu
Joshua2:2 Umwami wa Yeriko amenya ko uwo mugoroba Abisiraheli babiri bageze mu mujyi
Joshua2:3 Ni ko gutuma kuri Rahabu ati: “Duhe abantu baje iwawe
Joshua2:4 Rahabu wari wamaze guhisha abatasi
Joshua2:5 Bagiye bwije irembo ry'umujyi ritarakingwa. Sinzi aho barengeye
Joshua2:6 Nyamara yari yaburije hejuru y'inzu ye maze abahisha mu byatsi yari yahanitse.
Joshua2:7 Intumwa z'umwami ziva mu mujyi zihuta irembo bararikinga
Joshua2:8 Mbere y'uko abantu baryama Rahabu asanga abatasi hejuru y'inzu
Joshua2:9 arababwira ati: “Nzi ko Uhoraho yabagabije iki gihugu. Mwadukuye umutima kandi abaturage bose mwabateye ubwoba.
Joshua2:10 Twumvise ko Uhoraho yakamije Inyanja y'Uruseke ngo mubone uko mwambuka
Joshua2:11 Twumvise iyo nkuru dukuka umutima
Joshua2:12 Ngaho nimundahire Uhoraho
Joshua2:13 Nimundahire ko nta cyo muzatwara ababyeyi banjye n'abavandimwe banjye
Joshua2:14 Abatasi baramurahira bati: “Ni ukuri tuzakiza amagara yanyu nk'uko ukijije ayacu
Joshua2:15 Inzu ya Rahabu yari ifatanye n'urukuta rw'umujyi ifite n'idirishya rireba hanze
Joshua2:16 Rahabu arababwira ati: “Nimujye kwihisha mu misozi kugira ngo mudahura n'abashaka kubafata. Nyuma y'iminsi itatu bazaba bagarutse
Joshua2:17 Ba batasi baramubwira bati: “Indahiro waturahije tuzayubahiriza.
Joshua2:18 Ariko nidutera
Joshua2:19 Nihagira usohoka mu nzu yawe akagira icyo aba
Joshua2:20 Nyamara nuramuka ugize uwo ubwira ibyacu
Joshua2:21 Rahabu arabasubiza ati: “Ndabyemeye.” Nuko abasezeraho baragenda
Joshua2:22 Abatasi bahungira ku misozi bahamara iminsi itatu bihishe. Naho intumwa z'umwami zibashakira mu mihanda yose zirababura
Joshua2:23 Nuko ba bagabo bombi baramanuka bambuka Yorodani
Joshua2:24 kandi baramubwira bati: “Uhoraho yatugabije kiriya gihugu cyose

Joshua4:2 “Ba bagabo cumi na babiri mwatoranyije umwe umwe muri buri muryango

Joshua4:4 Yozuwe ahamagaza ba bagabo cumi na babiri bari batoranyijwe
Joshua4:5 arababwira ati: “Nimusubire muri Yorodani

Joshua4:12 Abagabo b'intwari bo mu muryango wa Rubeni n'abo mu wa Gadi kimwe n'igice cy'abo mu wa Manase

Joshua4:16 “Tegeka abatambyi bahetse Isanduku irimo bya bisate by'amabuye byanditseho Amategeko

Joshua5:8 Ab'igitsinagabo bose bamaze gukebwa
Joshua5:9 Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe ati: “Uyu munsi mbavanyeho agasuzuguro k'Abanyamisiri.” Ni yo mpamvu aho hantu hitwa Gilugali kugeza n'ubu.

Joshua6:1 Inzugi z'amarembo y'umujyi wa Yeriko zari zidadiye
Joshua6:2 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe ati: “Nkugabije Yeriko n'umwami wayo n'ingabo zayo.
Joshua6:3 Wowe n'ingabo zose uyoboye mujye muzenguruka umujyi incuro imwe ku munsi
Joshua6:4 Abatambyi barindwi bajye bagenda imbere y'Isanduku y'Isezerano

Joshua6:7 Hanyuma abwira ingabo ati: “Ngaho nimuzenguruke umujyi
Joshua6:8 Yozuwe amaze kuvuga atyo
Joshua6:9 Ingabo zifite intwaro zikomeye zagendaga imbere y'abatambyi bavuzaga amahembe
Joshua6:10 Yozuwe yari yategetse ingabo kudasakuza no kutagira icyo zivuga no kugenda bucece
Joshua6:11 Nuko bazenguruka umujyi incuro imwe bahetse Isanduku y'Uhoraho
Joshua6:12 Bukeye Yozuwe abyuka kare
Joshua6:13 Ingabo zifite intwaro zikomeye zifata iya mbere
Joshua6:14 Kuri uwo munsi wa kabiri na bwo bazenguruka umujyi incuro imwe
Joshua6:15 Ku munsi wa karindwi babyuka mu museke
Joshua6:16 Ku ncuro ya karindwi abatambyi bavugije amahembe
Joshua6:17 Umujyi n'ibiwurimo byeguriwe burundu Uhoraho
Joshua6:18 Icyakora muzirinde kugira icyo musahura
Joshua6:19 Ifeza n'izahabu byose
Joshua6:20 Nuko abatambyi bavuza amahembe
Joshua6:21 Bamarira ku icumu abari mu mujyi bose
Joshua6:22 Yozuwe abwira ba batasi babiri ati: “Nimujye kwa wa mugore w'indaya
Joshua6:23 Nuko ba batasi b'abasore baragenda baramuzana
Joshua6:24 Nuko ingabo z'Abisiraheli zitwika umujyi n'ibyari biwurimo byose
Joshua6:25 Ariko Yozuwe yarokoye ya ndaya Rahabu na bene wabo bose n'abo mu rugo rwe bose
Joshua6:26 Icyo gihe Yozuwe yihanangiriza abantu ati: “Umuntu wese uzongera kubaka uyu mujyi wa Yeriko
Joshua6:27 Uhoraho yakomeje kubana na Yozuwe
Joshua7:1 Abisiraheli babujijwe gusahura iby'i Yeriko kuko byeguriwe burundu Uhoraho
Joshua7:2 Bakiri i Yeriko
Joshua7:3 Bagarutse babwira Yozuwe bati: “Umujyi wa Ayi utuwe n'abantu bake
Joshua7:4 Nuko hagenda ingabo nk'ibihumbi bitatu zitera Ayi ariko ziratsindwa.
Joshua7:5 Abaturage ba Ayi bazirukanira mu marembo barazirwanya bazigeza i Shebarimu
Joshua7:6 Nuko Yozuwe n'abakuru b'Abisiraheli bashishimura imyambaro yabo
Joshua7:7 Nuko Yozuwe aravuga ati: “Mbe Nyagasani Uhoraho
Joshua7:8 Ubu se Nyagasani navuga iki
Joshua7:9 Abanyakanāni n'abandi baturage b'iki gihugu nibabyumva
Joshua7:10 Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe ati: “Ngaho haguruka! Kuki wubamye hasi aho?
Joshua7:11 Abisiraheli baracumuye bica Isezerano nagiranye na bo
Joshua7:12 Ni cyo cyatumye badashobora guhangara abanzi babo ahubwo bakabahunga. Abisiraheli bakoze ibituma barimbuka
Joshua7:13 None genda ubwire abantu uti: ‘Nimwitunganye kugira ngo ejo muzabe mwiteguye
Joshua7:14 Ejo mu gitondo muzaze buri muryango ukwawo
Joshua7:15 Muri bo azerekana uwatwaye bya bintu byamweguriwe burundu. Uwo muntu azatwikanwe n'ibyo atunze byose kubera ko yishe Isezerano ry'Uhoraho
Joshua7:16 Bukeye Yozuwe arazinduka
Joshua7:17 Nuko ahamagara umuryango wa Yuda buri nzu ukwayo
Joshua7:18 Nuko ahamagara abo mu rugo rwa Zabudi umwe umwe
Joshua7:19 Yozuwe aramubwira ati: “Mwana wanjye
Joshua7:20 Akani aramusubiza ati: “Ni ukuri koko
Joshua7:21 i Yeriko nahabonye umwambaro mwiza wo muri Babiloniya
Joshua7:22 Yozuwe yohereza abantu
Joshua7:23 Nuko babisohora mu ihema babishyira Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bose
Joshua7:24 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bose bafata Akani ukomoka kuri Zera
Joshua7:25 Nuko Yozuwe abwira Akani ati: “Dore ni wowe waduteje ibyago! None rero ubu nawe Uhoraho agiye kuguteza ibyago.” Nuko Abisiraheli bose bamwicisha amabuye hamwe n'abe bose
Joshua7:26 kugeza ubwo bahakoze ikirundo kinini cy'amabuye
Joshua8:1 Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe ati: “Witinya kandi wicika intege. Hagurukana n'ingabo zawe zose mutere umujyi wa Ayi
Joshua8:2 Uzagenze uwo mujyi n'umwami wawo nk'uko wagenje Yeriko n'umwami wayo
Joshua8:3 Nuko Yozuwe n'ingabo ze zose bitegura kujya gutera Ayi. Atoranya abagabo b'intwari ibihumbi mirongo itatu
Joshua8:4 Arabategeka ati: “Nimujye kūbikirira inyuma y'umujyi ariko ntimujye kure
Joshua8:5 Naho jyewe n'ingabo tuzaba turi kumwe
Joshua8:6 Nibabibona bazibwira ko tubahunze nka mbere
Joshua8:7 Nuko mwebwe muzava aho mwihishe mwigarurire umujyi
Joshua8:8 Nimumara kuwigarurira
Joshua8:9 Nuko Yozuwe arabohereza
Joshua8:10 Bukeye arazinduka akoranya ingabo ze
Joshua8:11 Barakomeza bagera hafi y'umujyi
Joshua8:12 Nuko Yozuwe atoranya ingabo zagera nko ku bihumbi bitanu
Joshua8:13 Umugabane munini w'ingabo usigara muri iyo nkambi
Joshua8:14 Mu gitondo kare umwami wa Ayi ababonye
Joshua8:15 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bigira nk'abaneshejwe
Joshua8:16 Ingabo zose za Ayi zihabwa itegeko ryo kwirukana Abisiraheli. Bityo Yozuwe arazoshyoshya zigera kure y'umujyi.
Joshua8:17 Nta mugabo n'umwe wasigaye muri Ayi cyangwa muri Beteli
Joshua8:18 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe ati: “Tunga icumu ryawe ku mujyi wa Ayi kuko nywubagabije.” Yozuwe abigenza atyo.
Joshua8:19 Yabaye akirambura ukuboko
Joshua8:20 Umwotsi uracucumuka utumbagira mu kirere. Ingabo za Ayi zishubije amaso inyuma zirawubona
Joshua8:21 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli na bo babonye ko bagenzi babo bamaze gutwika umujyi
Joshua8:22 Ba Bisiraheli bandi bava mu mujyi na bo bajya kuzirwanya
Joshua8:23 Umwami wa Ayi bamufata mpiri
Joshua8:24 Abisiraheli bica ingabo zose za Ayi zari zabirukanye zikabageza ha hantu hadatuwe
Joshua8:25 Uwo munsi bishe abantu bose bo muri Ayi b'abagabo n'abagore
Joshua8:26 Yozuwe yakomeje gutunga icumu kuri Ayi
Joshua8:27 Abisiraheli batwaye iminyago y'amatungo n'ibintu babonye muri uwo mujyi
Joshua8:28 Uko ni ko Yozuwe yatwitse Ayi ayihindura umuyonga. Kugeza n'ubu iracyari amatongo.
Joshua8:29 Amanika umwami wa Ayi ku giti
Joshua8:30 Hanyuma Yozuwe yubakira Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli urutambiro ku musozi wa Ebali.
Joshua8:31 Arwubakisha amabuye atabājwe
Joshua8:32 Nuko Yozuwe ahashinga amabuye Abisiraheli babireba
Joshua8:33 Abisiraheli bose
Joshua8:34 Nuko Yozuwe asoma amagambo yose yanditswe mu gitabo cy'Amategeko
Joshua8:35 Nta jambo na rimwe mu yo Musa yategetse Yozuwe atasomeye Abisiraheli bose
Joshua9:1 Abami bose bo mu burengerazuba bwa Yorodani
Joshua9:2 bishyira hamwe ngo barwanye Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli.
Joshua9:3 Naho abatuye Gibeyoni bumvise uko Yozuwe yagenje Yeriko na Ayi
Joshua9:4 bakoresha ubucakura bariyoberanya
Joshua9:5 bambara n'inkweto zishaje ziteye ibiraka n'imyambaro y'ubushwambagara
Joshua9:6 Nuko bajya mu nkambi y'i Gilugali
Joshua9:7 Abisiraheli basubiza abo Bahivi b'i Gibeyoni bati: “Twabwirwa n'iki ko mudatuye hafi aha
Joshua9:8 Babwira Yozuwe bati: “Erega turi abagaragu bawe!” Yozuwe na we arababaza ati: “Ariko se ubundi muri bande
Joshua9:9 Baramusubiza bati: “Twebwe abagaragu bawe
Joshua9:10 n'ibyo yakoreye abami babiri b'Abamori bo hakurya ya Yorodani
Joshua9:11 None rero abakuru bacu n'abatuye igihugu cyacu bose batubwiye ngo dufate impamba
Joshua9:12 Nimwirebere namwe imigati yacu! Ubwo twayihambiraga duturutse iwacu tuje ino yari igishyushye
Joshua9:13 Nimwirebere kandi n'izi mpago z'impu! Ubwo twazuzuzaga divayi zari zikiri nshya
Joshua9:14 Abisiraheli bemezwa n'impamba z'abo Banyagibeyoni
Joshua9:15 Yozuwe agirana na bo amasezerano y'amahoro
Joshua9:16 Hashize iminsi itatu bamaze kugirana na bo ayo masezerano
Joshua9:17 Uwo munsi wa gatatu bahita bajya aho abo bantu bari batuye
Joshua9:18 Ntibabatera kuko abo bayobozi bari barahiye mu izina ry'Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli kutazabica
Joshua9:19 Na bo babwira rubanda bati: “Ntidushobora kugirira nabi bariya bantu
Joshua9:20 Tugomba rero kubareka bakiberaho kubera iyo ndahiro
Joshua9:21 tuzabihorera
Joshua9:22 Nuko Yozuwe atumiza Abanyagibeyoni arababaza ati: “Kuki mwatubeshye ngo muturutse kure kandi mutuye bugufi?
Joshua9:23 Kuva ubu muravumwe
Joshua9:24 Abanyagibeyoni baramusubiza bati: “Databuja
Joshua9:25 None ubu turi mu maboko yawe
Joshua9:26 Yozuwe abagenzereza nk'uko yababwiye
Joshua9:27 Kuva uwo munsi Yozuwe abashinga imirimo yo gutashya inkwi no kuvoma amazi y'Abisiraheli
Joshua10:1 Adonisedeki umwami w'i Yeruzalemu
Joshua10:2 Izo nkuru zikura umutima ab'i Yeruzalemu
Joshua10:3 Nuko Adonisedeki atuma kuri Hohamu umwami w'i Heburoni
Joshua10:4 “Nimuze mumfashe dutere Abanyagibeyoni
Joshua10:5 Nuko abo bami batanu b'Abamori
Joshua10:6 Nuko Abanyagibeyoni batuma kuri Yozuwe aho yari ari mu nkambi y'i Gilugali bati: “Databuja
Joshua10:7 Yozuwe ahaguruka i Gilugali n'ingabo ze zose zirimo abagabo bose b'intwari.
Joshua10:8 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Ntibagukange! Ngiye kubakugabiza bose
Joshua10:9 Yozuwe n'ingabo ze bava i Gilugali
Joshua10:10 Uhoraho atuma Abamori bacikamo igikuba
Joshua10:11 Igihe Abamori bahungaga Abisiraheli
Joshua10:12 Uwo munsi ubwo Uhoraho yagabizaga Abamori ingabo z'Abisiraheli
Joshua10:13 Izuba ryahise rihagarara
Joshua10:14 Uhoraho yabigenje atyo kubera umuntu wabimusabye. Haba mbere cyangwa nyuma
Joshua10:15 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bose batarasubira mu nkambi y'i Gilugali
Joshua10:16 ba bami batanu b'Abamori bari bahunze bihishe mu buvumo bw'i Makeda.
Joshua10:17 Abantu babimenye bajya kubibwira Yozuwe
Joshua10:18 na we ategeka abantu be ati: “Nimugende muhirikire ibibuye binini ku muryango w'ubuvumo
Joshua10:19 Ariko ntimuhatinde
Joshua10:20 Nuko Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bakubita incuro Abamori babatsinda uruhenu
Joshua10:21 Hanyuma Abisiraheli bisubirira iruhande rwa Yozuwe mu nkambi yari hafi y'i Makeda
Joshua10:22 Yozuwe ategeka ko bavana bya bibuye ku muryango w'ubuvumo
Joshua10:23 Nuko bamuzanira umwami w'i Yeruzalemu n'uw'i Heburoni n'uw'i Yarimuti
Joshua10:24 Abo bami bakimugera imbere
Joshua10:25 Yozuwe abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Uko ni ko Uhoraho azagenza abanzi bose muzarwanya. None rero ntimugatinye kandi ntimugacike intege
Joshua10:26 Nyuma y'ibyo
Joshua10:27 Izuba rirenze ategeka ko bamanura imirambo
Joshua10:28 Uwo munsi kandi Yozuwe yigaruriye umujyi wa Makeda
Joshua10:29 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bavuye i Makeda batera Libuna.
Joshua10:30 Uhoraho abagabiza uwo mujyi
Joshua10:31 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bavuye i Libuna bajya Lakishi
Joshua10:32 Ku munsi wa kabiri w'imirwano
Joshua10:33 Horamu umwami w'i Gezeri atabara umujyi wa Lakishi
Joshua10:34 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bavuye i Lakishi bajya Eguloni
Joshua10:35 Uwo munsi bigarurira uwo mujyi
Joshua10:36 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bavuye Eguloni
Joshua10:37 Nuko barayigarurira
Joshua10:38 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bahavuye batera Debiri.
Joshua10:39 Nuko barayigarurira
Joshua10:40 Yozuwe yigarurira icyo gice cyose cy'igihugu
Joshua10:41 Yozuwe abatsinda ahereye mu majyepfo i Kadeshi-Barineya n'i Gaza
Joshua10:42 Yozuwe yigarurira icyo gice cyose cy'igihugu n'abami baho mu gitero kimwe
Joshua10:43 Hanyuma Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli bose basubira mu nkambi y'i Gilugali.
Joshua11:1 Yabini umwami w'i Hasori yumvise ibyo gutsinda kwa Yozuwe
Joshua11:2 no ku bandi bami bo mu majyaruguru ya Kanāni
Joshua11:3 Abo yatumyeho ni Abanyakanāni batuye mu burasirazuba no mu burengerazuba
Joshua11:4 Abo bami bahagurukana n'ingabo zabo zose zitabarika nk'umusenyi wo ku nkombe z'inyanja
Joshua11:5 Bose bishyira hamwe kugira ngo batere Abisiraheli
Joshua11:6 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe ati: “Ntubatinye kuko ejo magingo aya nzabagabiza Abisiraheli. Muzabice bose
Joshua11:7 Nuko Yozuwe n'ingabo ze zose bahita bagaba igitero hafi y'umugezi wa Meromu
Joshua11:8 Abo banzi Uhoraho abagabiza Abisiraheli
Joshua11:9 Yozuwe abagenza nk'uko Uhoraho yabimutegetse
Joshua11:10 Icyo gihe umwami w'i Hasori yari akomeye kuruta abo bami bandi. Yozuwe avuye i Misipa
Joshua11:11 Abisiraheli bamarira ku icumu abaturage baho bose
Joshua11:12 Nuko Yozuwe yigarurira imirwa y'abo bami bose na bo abicisha inkota
Joshua11:13 Icyakora Abisiraheli ntibatwitse imijyi yubatse ku tununga
Joshua11:14 Abisiraheli basahura ibintu n'amatungo basanze muri iyo mijyi
Joshua11:15 Yozuwe yakurikije amabwiriza yose Uhoraho yamuhaye ayanyujije ku mugaragu we Musa
Joshua11:16 Uko ni ko Yozuwe yigaruriye igihugu cyose
Joshua11:17 uhereye ku musozi wa Halaki ukerekeza i Seyiri
Joshua11:18 Iyo ntambara Yozuwe yarwanye na bo yamaze igihe kirekire.
Joshua11:19 Abahivi b'i Gibeyoni ni bo bonyine bagiranye amasezerano y'amahoro n'Abisiraheli. Naho indi mijyi yose yagarujwe umuheto.
Joshua11:20 Uhoraho yatumye abaturage b'icyo gihugu binangira
Joshua11:21 Muri icyo gihe kandi
Joshua11:22 Mu gihugu Abisiraheli bigaruriye
Joshua11:23 Yozuwe amaze kwigarurira igihugu cyose nk'uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa

Joshua12:2 Umwe yitwaga Sihoni umwami w'Abamori wari utuye i Heshiboni
Joshua12:3 Mu burengerazuba umupaka wacyo wari uruzi rwa Yorodani
Joshua12:4 Undi mwami yitwaga Ogi
Joshua12:5 Yategekaga Bashani yose. Mu burengerazuba umupaka wayo wari umusozi wa Herumoni
Joshua12:6 Musa n'Abisiraheli bamaze kwigarurira ibyo bihugu
Joshua12:7 Yozuwe n'Abisiraheli batsinze abami bo mu burengerazuba bwa Yorodani
Joshua12:8 Bategekaga imisozi miremire n'imigufi

Joshua12:10 umwami w'i Yeruzalemu
Joshua12:11 umwami w'i Yarimuti
Joshua12:12 umwami wa Eguloni

Joshua12:24 umwami w'i Tirusa. Bose hamwe bari abami mirongo itatu n'umwe.
Joshua13:1 Yozuwe amaze kugera mu zabukuru
Joshua13:2 Intara y'Abafilisiti n'iy'Abageshuri
Joshua13:3 uhereye ku mugezi wa Shihori uri ku mupaka wa Misiri
Joshua13:4 Mu majyepfo mushigaje kwigarurira ahatuwe n'Abanyakanāni hose
Joshua13:5 n'intara y'Abagebali n'ibisi bya Libani byose by'iburasirazuba
Joshua13:6 Hasigaye n'akarere k'imisozi miremire kari hagati ya Libani na Misirefoti-Mayimu gatuwe n'Abanyasidoni. Uko Abisiraheli bazagenda bigira imbere
Joshua13:7 Uzakigabanye imiryango icyenda
Joshua13:8 Umuryango wa Rubeni n'uwa Gadi n'ikindi gice cy'uwa Manase
Joshua13:9 Yabahaye Aroweri iri haruguru y'akabande ka Arunoni n'umujyi uri muri ako kabande
Joshua13:10 n'imijyi yose yategekwaga na Sihoni umwami w'Abamori wari utuye i Heshiboni
Joshua13:11 Yabahaye n'intara ya Gileyadi n'akarere ka Geshuri n'aka Māka
Joshua13:12 Hategekwaga na Ogi umwami w'i Bashani
Joshua13:13 Icyakora Abisiraheli ntibamenesheje Abageshuri n'Abamāka
Joshua13:14 Abalevi ntibagenewe umugabane w'ubutaka
Joshua13:15 Dore umugabane Musa yahaye abagize amazu y'Abarubeni:
Joshua13:16 Aroweri iri haruguru y'akabande ka Arunoni n'umujyi uri muri ako kabande
Joshua13:17 n'i Heshiboni n'indi mijyi yose yubatse mu mirambi
Joshua13:18 na Yahasi na Kedemoti na Mefāti
Joshua13:19 na Kiriyatayimu na Sibuma na Sereti-Shahari iri hejuru y'ikibaya
Joshua13:20 na Beti-Pewori n'imicyamu y'umusozi wa Pisiga na Beti-Yeshimoti
Joshua13:21 mbese imijyi yose yo mu mirambi n'igihugu cyose cya Sihoni umwami w'Abamori wari utuye i Heshiboni. Musa yari yaratsinze Sihoni n'abatware b'Abamidiyani bari batuye mu gihugu cye
Joshua13:22 Abisiraheli barabishe
Joshua13:23 Mu burengerazuba
Joshua13:24 Dore umugabane Musa yahaye abagize amazu y'Abagadi:
Joshua13:25 Yāzeri n'imijyi yose y'i Gileyadi n'igice cy'igihugu cy'Abamoni kugera Aroweri yindi iri hafi y'i Raba
Joshua13:26 no kuva Heshiboni kugera i Ramati-Misipa n'i Betonimu
Joshua13:27 n'ikibaya cya Yorodani na Beti-Haramu na Beti-Nimura na Sukoti na Safoni
Joshua13:28 Iyo ni yo mijyi n'imidugudu amazu yabo yahawe ho gakondo.
Joshua13:29 Dore umugabane Musa yahaye abagize igice cy'amazu y'Abamanase:
Joshua13:30 igihugu cyose cyahoze ari icya Ogi umwami w'i Bashani
Joshua13:31 n'igice cy'i Gileyadi n'imirwa ya Ogi ari yo Ashitaroti na Edureyi. Uwo ni wo mugabane wahawe igice cy'umuryango w'Abamanase kigizwe n'amazu y'Abamakiri.
Joshua13:32 Iyo ni yo migabane Musa yari yaratanze igihe yari mu kibaya cy'i Mowabu
Joshua13:33 Abalevi bo nta mugabane w'ubutaka Musa yabahaye
Joshua14:1 Umutambyi Eleyazari na Yozuwe mwene Nuni n'abatware b'imiryango
Joshua14:2 Bakigabanya imiryango icyenda n'igice isigaye bakoresheje ubufindo
Joshua14:3 Indi miryango ibiri n'igice Musa yari yarayihaye imigabane iburasirazuba bw'uruzi rwa Yorodani
Joshua14:4 uretse ko nyuma bahawe imijyi yo guturamo n'inzuri ziyikikije
Joshua14:5 Nuko Abisiraheli bagabana igihugu bakurikije amabwiriza Uhoraho yahaye Musa.
Joshua14:6 Bakiri i Gilugali
Joshua14:7 Igihe Musa umugaragu w'Imana anyohereje gutata iki gihugu
Joshua14:8 Abo twajyanye baje baca abantu intege
Joshua14:9 Icyo gihe Musa yararahiye ati: ‘Igihugu wakandagijemo ikirenge uzagihabwamo gakondo n'abazagukomokaho iteka
Joshua14:10 Dore hashize imyaka mirongo ine n'itanu Uhoraho ategetse Musa kurahira atyo
Joshua14:11 nyamara ndacyakomeye nk'igihe Musa yanyoherezaga gutata. Ndacyafite imbaraga nk'iz'icyo gihe
Joshua14:12 Uwo munsi Uhoraho yansezeranyije kumpa akarere k'imisozi gatuwe n'Abanaki
Joshua14:13 Nuko Yozuwe asabira Kalebu mwene Yefune umugisha
Joshua14:14 Heburoni iracyari gakondo y'abakomoka kuri Kalebu mwene Yefune w'Umukenizi
Joshua14:15 Kera Heburoni yitwaga Kiriyati-Aruba
Joshua15:1 Umugabane wahawe abagize amazu y'Abayuda hakoreshejwe ubufindo
Joshua15:2 Umupaka wo mu majyepfo wavaga ku kigobe cyo mu mpera y'amajyepfo y'Ikiyaga cy'Umunyu
Joshua15:3 ugaca mu majyepfo y'umusozi wa Akurabimu
Joshua15:4 ukanyura Asimoni ukagera ku kagezi ko ku mupaka wa Misiri
Joshua15:5 Umupaka wo mu burasirazuba wari ugizwe n'Ikiyaga cy'Umunyu. Umupaka wo mu majyaruguru watangiriraga mu kigobe cy'aho uruzi rwa Yorodani rwinjirira muri icyo kiyaga
Joshua15:6 ukazamuka i Betihogila unyuze mu majyaruguru i Betaraba
Joshua15:7 Wazamukaga i Debiri unyuze iruhande rw'igikombe cya Akori
Joshua15:8 ukazamuka akabande ka Hinomu kari mu micyamu yo mu majyepfo ya Yeruzalemu umujyi w'Abayebuzi
Joshua15:9 Kuva aho
Joshua15:10 Umupaka wavaga i Bāla iburengerazuba ugana ku musozi wa Seyiri
Joshua15:11 Wakomezaga mu micyamu iri mu majyaruguru y'umujyi wa Ekuroni ukagera i Shikeroni
Joshua15:12 Umupaka wo mu burengerazuba wari iyo nyanja. Uwo ni wo mugabane wahawe amazu y'abakomoka kuri Yuda.
Joshua15:13 Nk'uko Uhoraho yategetse Yozuwe
Joshua15:14 Nuko Kalebu ahamenesha Abanaki batatu ari bo Sheshayi na Ahimani na Talumayi.
Joshua15:15 Yahagurutse i Heburoni atera i Debiri yahoze yitwa Kiriyati-Seferi.
Joshua15:16 Kalebu aratangaza ati: “Umuntu uzatera Kiriyati-Seferi akahigarurira
Joshua15:17 Nuko Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi akaba n'umuhungu wabo wa Kalebu
Joshua15:18 Bamaze gushyingiranwa
Joshua15:19 Akisa aramusubiza ati: “Ngirira ubuntu umpe amariba
Joshua15:20 Uyu ni umugabane wahawe abagize amazu y'Abayuda
Joshua15:21 ukurikije imijyi yabo. Uhereye mu majyepfo ku mupaka wa Edomu
Joshua15:22 na Kina na Dimona na Adada
Joshua15:23 na Kedeshi na Hasori na Yitinani
Joshua15:24 na Zifu na Telemu na Beyaloti
Joshua15:25 na Hasori-Hadata na Keriyoti-Hesironi ari yo Hasori
Joshua15:26 na Amamu na Shema na Molada
Joshua15:27 na Hasari-Gada na Heshimoni na Beti-Peleti
Joshua15:28 na Hasari-Shuwali na Bērisheba na Biziyotiya
Joshua15:29 na Bāla na Iyimu na Esemu
Joshua15:30 na Elitoladi na Kesili na Horuma
Joshua15:31 na Sikulagi na Madumana na Sansana
Joshua15:32 na Lebawoti na Shilehimu na Ayini na Rimoni. Bityo mu majyepfo bahawe imijyi makumyabiri n'icyenda n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua15:33 Iyi ni yo mijyi bahawe mu misozi migufi mu burengerazuba: Eshitawoli na Sora na Ashina
Joshua15:34 na Zanowa na Eniganimu na Tapuwa na Enamu
Joshua15:35 na Yarimuti na Adulamu na Soko na Azeka
Joshua15:36 na Shārayimu na Aditayimu na Gedera na Gederotayimu. Bahawe iyo mijyi cumi n'ine n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua15:37 Bahawe na Senani na Hadasha na Migidoli-Gadi
Joshua15:38 na Dilani na Misipa na Yokitēli
Joshua15:39 na Lakishi na Bosikati na Eguloni
Joshua15:40 na Kaboni na Lahimasi na Kitilishi
Joshua15:41 na Gederoti na Betidagoni na Nāma na Makeda. Bahawe iyo mijyi cumi n'itandatu n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua15:42 Bahawe na Libuna na Eteri na Ashani
Joshua15:43 na Yifita na Ashuna na Nesibu
Joshua15:44 na Keyila na Akizibu na Maresha. Bahawe iyo mijyi icyenda n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua15:45 Bahawe na Ekuroni n'insisiro zayo n'imidugudu iyikikije
Joshua15:46 n'imijyi yose n'imidugudu ikikije Ashidodi
Joshua15:47 na Ashidodi n'insisiro zayo n'imidugudu iyikikije
Joshua15:48 Iyi ni yo mijyi bahawe mu misozi miremire
Joshua15:49 na Dana na Kiriyati-Seferi ari yo Debiri
Joshua15:50 na Anabu na Eshitemowa na Animu
Joshua15:51 na Gosheni na Holoni na Gilo. Bahawe iyo mijyi cumi n'umwe n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua15:52 Bahawe na Arabu na Duma na Eshani
Joshua15:53 na Yanimu na Beti-Tapuwa na Afeka
Joshua15:54 na Humeta na Kiriyati-Aruba ari yo Heburoni
Joshua15:55 Bahawe na Mawoni na Karumeli na Zifu na Yuta
Joshua15:56 na Yizerēli na Yokideyamu na Zanowa
Joshua15:57 na Kayini na Gibeya na Timuna. Bahawe iyo mijyi icumi n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua15:58 Bahawe na Halihuli na Beti-Suri na Gedori
Joshua15:59 na Mārati na Betanoti na Elitekoni. Bahawe iyo mijyi itandatu n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua15:60 Bahawe na Kiriyati-Bāli ari yo Kiriyati-Yeyarimu
Joshua15:61 Iyi ni yo mijyi bahawe hafi y'Ikiyaga cy'Umunyu: Betaraba na Midini na Sekaka
Joshua15:62 na Nibushani na Irimelahi na Enigedi. Bahawe iyo mijyi itandatu n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua15:63 Nubwo Yeruzalemu yari mu ntara yahawe abakomoka kuri Yuda
Joshua16:1 Umugabane wahawe abakomoka kuri Yozefu hakoreshejwe ubufindo
Joshua16:2 Wanyuraga i Luzi ugakomeza Ataroti-Adari hatuwe n'Abaruki
Joshua16:3 ukamanuka mu burengerazuba ahatuwe n'Abayafuleti
Joshua16:4 Umugabane wahawe abakomoka kuri Yozefu
Joshua16:5 Umupaka w'umugabane wahawe abagize amazu y'Abefurayimu wanyuraga mu burasirazuba bwa Ataroti-Adari ugakomeza i Betihoroni ya ruguru
Joshua16:6 ukagera ku Nyanja ya Mediterane. Mu majyaruguru
Joshua16:7 Wamanukanaga Ataroti n'i Nāra
Joshua16:8 Umupaka wo mu majyaruguru wanyuraga i Tapuwa ugakurikira akagezi kitwa Kana werekeza iburengerazuba
Joshua16:9 Bahawe n'indi mijyi n'imidugudu iyikikije iri mu mugabane w'umuryango wa Manase.
Joshua16:10 Nubwo Gezeri yari mu ntara yahawe Abefurayimu
Joshua17:1 Abakomoka kuri Manase umwana w'impfura wa Yozefu
Joshua17:2 Amazu akomoka ku bandi bahungu ba Manase mwene Yozefu
Joshua17:3 Ariko uwitwa Selofehadi mwene Heferi mwene Gileyadi mwene Makiri mwene Manase
Joshua17:4 Abo bakobwa basanze umutambyi Eleyazari na Yozuwe mwene Nuni n'abatware b'Abisiraheli
Joshua17:5 Umuryango wa Manase wahawe imigabane icumi utabariyemo uw'i Gileyadi n'uw'i Bashani
Joshua17:6 kuko abakobwa ba Selofehadi na bo bahawe imigabane kimwe n'andi mazu asanzwe. Abandi Bamanase bahawe Gileyadi.
Joshua17:7 Umugabane w'Abamanase waheraga ku w'Abashēri ukagera i Mikimetati
Joshua17:8 Ahakikije i Tapuwa hari ah'Abamanase
Joshua17:9 Umupaka wamanukaga ukurikiye akagezi kitwa Kana ukagera ku Nyanja ya Mediterane. Imijyi yo mu majyepfo y'ako kagezi yari iy'Abefurayimu
Joshua17:10 Mu majyepfo yako hari ah'Abefurayimu
Joshua17:11 Mu ntara y'Abisakari n'iy'Abashēri
Joshua17:12 Icyakora Abamanase ntibashoboye kumenesha Abanyakanāni batuye muri izo ntara
Joshua17:13 Ndetse n'igihe Abisiraheli bari bamaze gukomera ntibigeze bashobora kubamenesha
Joshua17:14 Abakomoka kuri Yozefu basanga Yozuwe baramubaza bati: “Kuki watugeneye umugabane umwe gusa
Joshua17:15 Yozuwe arabasubiza ati: “Niba muri benshi ku buryo intara y'imisozi y'Abefurayimu itabahagije
Joshua17:16 Baramusubiza bati: “Ni byo koko intara y'imisozi ntiduhagije
Joshua17:17 Nuko Yozuwe abwira abakomoka kuri Yozefu ari bo Abefurayimu n'Abamanase ati: “Koko muri benshi kandi murakomeye
Joshua17:18 Mwahawe intara y'imisozi
Joshua18:1 Abisiraheli bamaze gutsinda abatuye mu gihugu bose bakoraniye i Shilo
Joshua18:2 Icyo gihe hari hasigaye imiryango irindwi itarabona imigabane.
Joshua18:3 Nuko Yozuwe abaza Abisiraheli ati: “Mutegereje iki kugira ngo mwigarurire igihugu Uhoraho Imana ya ba sokuruza yabahaye?
Joshua18:4 Buri muryango umpe abantu batatu mbohereze gutambagira igihugu
Joshua18:5 Igihugu bazakigabanyemo imigabane irindwi. Abakomoka kuri Yuda bazagumane umugabane wabo mu majyepfo
Joshua18:6 Muzandike uko iyo migabane izaba iteye
Joshua18:7 Abalevi nta mugabane w'ubutaka bazabona
Joshua18:8 Abantu bamaze gutoranywa
Joshua18:9 Nuko baragenda bazenguruka igihugu
Joshua18:10 Nuko Yozuwe akoresha ubufindo imbere y'Ihema ry'Uhoraho i Shilo
Joshua18:11 Umugabane wa mbere ubufindo bwerekanye ni uw'abagize amazu y'Ababenyamini. Umugabane wabo wari hagati y'uw'Abayuda n'uw'Abefurayimu.
Joshua18:12 Umupaka wawo wo mu majyaruguru waheraga kuri Yorodani
Joshua18:13 Wakomezaga werekeza i Beteli iri mu mucyamu wo mu majyepfo y'i Luzi
Joshua18:14 Umupaka wo mu burengerazuba waheraga kuri uwo musozi
Joshua18:15 Umupaka wo mu majyepfo waheraga mu burengerazuba bw'i Kiriyati-Yeyarimu
Joshua18:16 ugaca munsi y'umusozi uri mu majyaruguru y'ikibaya cy'Abarefa
Joshua18:17 ugahindukira ugana mu majyaruguru kuri Enishemeshi n'i Geliloti
Joshua18:18 Watambikaga mu majyaruguru mu micyamu ya Yorodani ukamanuka mu kibaya
Joshua18:19 ugakomeza werekeza mu majyaruguru
Joshua18:20 Yorodani ni yo yari umupaka w'iburasirazuba. Iyo ni yo mipaka y'umugabane wahawe amazu y'Ababenyamini.
Joshua18:21 Imijyi yahawe abagize amazu y'Ababenyamini yari Yeriko na Betihogila na Emeki-Kesisi
Joshua18:22 na Betaraba na Semarayimu na Beteli
Joshua18:23 na Avimu na Para na Ofura
Joshua18:24 na Kefari-Amoni na Ofini na Geba. Bahawe iyo mijyi cumi n'ibiri n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua18:25 Bahawe na Gibeyoni na Rama na Bēroti
Joshua18:26 na Misipa na Kefira na Mosa
Joshua18:27 na Rekemu na Yiripēli na Tarala
Joshua18:28 na Sela na Elefu na Yeruzalemu umujyi w'Abayebuzi
Joshua19:1 Umugabane wa kabiri ubufindo bwerekanye ni uwabagize amazu y'Abasimeyoni. Umugabane wabo wari uzengurutswe n'uw'Abayuda.
Joshua19:2 Imijyi yabo ni Bērisheba na Sheba na Molada
Joshua19:3 na Hasari-Shuwali na Bāla na Esemu
Joshua19:4 na Elitoladi na Betuli na Horuma
Joshua19:5 na Sikulagi na Beti-Marukaboti na Hasari-Susa
Joshua19:6 na Beti-Lebawoti na Sharuheni. Bahawe iyo mijyi cumi n'itatu n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua19:7 Bahawe na Ayini na Rimoni na Eteri na Ashani
Joshua19:8 Bahawe n'indi midugudu yose kugera i Bālati-Bēri
Joshua19:9 Umugabane w'umuryango wa Simeyoni wari wavanywe k'uw'umuryango wa Yuda
Joshua19:10 Umugabane wa gatatu ubufindo bwerekanye ni uw'abagize amazu y'Abazabuloni. Umupaka w'umugabane wabo wanyuraga i Sarida
Joshua19:11 ugakomeza ukazamuka iburengerazuba ugahita i Marala n'i Dabesheti
Joshua19:12 Ukongera ukava i Sarida
Joshua19:13 Wakomezaga werekeza mu burasirazuba ukagera i Gatiheferi na Itakasini n'i Rimoni
Joshua19:14 Umupaka wo mu majyaruguru wazengurukaga Hanatoni
Joshua19:15 Bahawe na Katati na Nahalali na Shimuroni
Joshua19:16 Iyo ni yo mijyi n'imidugudu yahawe amazu y'Abazabuloni.
Joshua19:17 Umugabane wa kane ubufindo bwerekanye ni uw'abagize amazu y'Abisakari.
Joshua19:18 Wari ugizwe n'imijyi ikurikira: Yizerēli na Kesuloti na Shunemu
Joshua19:19 na Hafarayimu na Shiyoni na Anaharati
Joshua19:20 na Rabiti na Kishiyoni na Ebesi
Joshua19:21 na Remeti na Eniganimu na Enihada na Betipasesi.
Joshua19:22 Umupaka wanyuraga i Taboru n'i Shahasima n'i Beti-Shemeshi ukagera kuri Yorodani. Bahawe iyo mijyi cumi n'itandatu n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua19:23 Iyo ni yo mijyi n'imidugudu yo mu mugabane wahawe amazu y'Abisakari.
Joshua19:24 Umugabane wa gatanu ubufindo bwerekanye ni uw'abagize amazu y'Abashēri.
Joshua19:25 Wari ugizwe n'imijyi ikurikira: Helikati na Hali na Beteni na Akishafu
Joshua19:26 na Alameleki na Amadi na Mishali. Umupaka wabo waheraga mu burengerazuba ku musozi wa Karumeli
Joshua19:27 Umupaka wo mu burasirazuba wanyuraga i Betidagoni
Joshua19:28 ukanyura Eburoni n'i Rehobu n'i Hamoni n'i Kana
Joshua19:29 Wanyuraga i Rama ukagera ku mujyi ntamenwa wa Tiri
Joshua19:30 Bahawe na Uma na Afeki na Rehobu. Bahawe imijyi makumyabiri n'ibiri n'imidugudu iyikikije.
Joshua19:31 Iyo ni yo mijyi n'imidugudu yo mu mugabane wahawe amazu y'Abashēri.
Joshua19:32 Umugabane wa gatandatu ubufindo bwerekanye ni uw'abagize amazu y'Abanafutali.
Joshua19:33 Umupaka wabo waheraga i Helefi no ku giti cy'inganzamarumbu cy'i Sānanimu
Joshua19:34 Mu burengerazuba
Joshua19:35 Bahawe imijyi ntamenwa ikurikira: Tsidimu na Sera na Hamati
Joshua19:36 na Adama na Rama na Hasori
Joshua19:37 na Kedeshi na Edureyi na Enihasori
Joshua19:38 na Yironi na Migidaleli na Horemu
Joshua19:39 Iyo ni yo mijyi n'imidugudu yo mu mugabane wahawe amazu y'Abanafutali.
Joshua19:40 Umugabane wa karindwi ubufindo bwerekanye ni uw'abagize amazu y'Abadani.
Joshua19:41 Wari ugizwe n'imijyi ikurikira: Sora na Eshitawoli na Irishemeshi
Joshua19:42 na Shālabimu na Ayaloni na Yitila
Joshua19:43 na Eloni na Timuna na Ekuroni
Joshua19:44 na Eliteke na Gibetoni na Bālati
Joshua19:45 na Yehudi na Beneberaki na Gatirimoni
Joshua19:46 na Meyarukoni na Rakoni n'intara iteganye n'i Yope.
Joshua19:47 Abadani bamaze kwirukanwa muri iyo ntara bagiye gutera umujyi wa Layishi. Barawutsinze barawigarurira
Joshua19:48 Iyo ni yo mijyi n'imidugudu yo mu mugabane wahawe amazu y'Abadani.
Joshua19:49 Abisiraheli bamaze kugabanywa igihugu
Joshua19:50 nk'uko Uhoraho yabitegetse. Yozuwe yasabye Timunati-Sera umujyi wari mu misozi y'Abefurayimu
Joshua19:51 Uko ni ko umutambyi Eleyazari na Yozuwe mwene Nuni n'abatware b'imiryango barangije kugabanya Abisiraheli igihugu
Joshua20:1 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe ati:
Joshua20:2 “Tegeka Abisiraheli bitoranyirize imijyi y'ubuhungiro
Joshua20:3 kugira ngo umuntu wishe undi bimugwiririye
Joshua20:4 Uwishe undi nahungira muri umwe muri iyo mijyi
Joshua20:5 Uhōrera uwishwe namukurikirana muri uwo mujyi abakuru ntibazamutange
Joshua20:6 Uwishe undi ajye yigumira muri uwo mujyi kugeza ubwo azacirwa urubanza n'umuryango
Joshua20:7 Nuko Abisiraheli batoranya Kedeshi yo muri Galileya
Joshua20:8 Iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani
Joshua20:9 Iyo ni yo mijyi batoranyije kugira ngo uwishe undi bimugwiririye abone aho ahungira
Joshua21:1 Abatware b'umuryango wa Levi basanga umutambyi Eleyazari na Yozuwe mwene Nuni
Joshua21:2 aho bari bari i Shilo mu gihugu cya Kanāni. Nuko barababwira bati: “Musa akiriho
Joshua21:3 Nuko Abisiraheli baha Abalevi imijyi n'inzuri ziyikikije bavanye mu migabane yabo
Joshua21:4 Amazu y'Abalevi bakomoka kuri Kehati ni yo ya mbere ubufindo bwerekanye. Inzu y'abakomoka ku mutambyi Aroni
Joshua21:5 Abandi Bakehati bahawe imijyi icumi yo mu ntara y'Abefurayimu n'iy'Abadani
Joshua21:6 Inzu y'Abagerishoni yahawe imijyi cumi n'itatu yo mu ntara y'Abisakari n'iy'Abashēri
Joshua21:7 Inzu y'Abamerari yahawe imijyi cumi n'ibiri yo mu ntara y'Abarubeni
Joshua21:8 Abisiraheli bahaye Abalevi iyo mijyi n'inzuri ziyikikije bakoresheje ubufindo
Joshua21:9 Mu ntara y'Abayuda n'iy'Abasimeyoni
Joshua21:10 yahawe abakomoka kuri Aroni bo mu nzu ya Kehati mwene Levi
Joshua21:11 Bahawe Heburoni n'inzuri ziwukikije mu misozi y'Abayuda. Uwo mujyi wahoze witwa Kiriyati-Aruba waritiriwe Aruba
Joshua21:12 Icyakora Kalebu mwene Yefune yagumanye imirima yaho n'imidugudu ihakikije.
Joshua21:13 Abakomoka kuri Aroni bahawe Heburoni
Joshua21:14 na Yatiri na Eshitemowa
Joshua21:15 na Holoni na Debiri
Joshua21:16 na Ayini na Yuta na Beti-Shemeshi. Bahawe iyo mijyi uko ari icyenda hamwe n'inzuri ziyikikije mu ntara y'Abayuda n'iy'Abasimeyoni.
Joshua21:17 Mu ntara y'Ababenyamini
Joshua21:18 na Anatoti na Alumoni
Joshua21:19 Iyo mijyi cumi n'itatu n'inzuri ziyikikije
Joshua21:20 Abandi Balevi bakomoka kuri Kehati bahawe imijyi hakoreshejwe ubufindo. Mu ntara y'Abefurayimu
Joshua21:21 bahawe Shekemu n'inzuri ziyikikije mu misozi y'Abefurayimu. Shekemu iyo ni umwe mu mijyi y'ubuhungiro. Bahawe na Gezeri
Joshua21:22 na Kibusayimu na Betihoroni
Joshua21:23 Mu ntara y'Abadani
Joshua21:24 na Ayaloni na Gatirimoni
Joshua21:25 Mu ntara y'Abamanase iburengerazuba bwa Yorodani
Joshua21:26 Iyo mijyi icumi n'inzuri ziyikikije
Joshua21:27 Abalevi bakomoka kuri Gerishoni na bo bahawe imijyi n'inzuri ziyikikije. Mu ntara y'Abamanase y'i Bashani bahawe imijyi ibiri
Joshua21:28 Mu ntara y'Abisakari bahawe Kishiyoni na Daberati
Joshua21:29 na Yarimuti na Eniganimu
Joshua21:30 Mu ntara y'Abashēri bahawe Mishali na Abudoni
Joshua21:31 na Helikati na Rehobu
Joshua21:32 Mu ntara y'Abanafutali bahawe Kedeshi yo muri Galileya umwe mu mijyi y'ubuhungiro
Joshua21:33 Iyo mijyi cumi n'itatu n'inzuri ziyikikije
Joshua21:34 Abalevi basigaye ari bo bakomoka kuri Merari
Joshua21:35 na Dimuna na Nahalali
Joshua21:36 Mu ntara y'Abarubeni iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani
Joshua21:37 na Kedemoti na Mefāti
Joshua21:38 Mu ntara y'Abagadi bahawe Ramoti y'i Gileyadi umwe mu mijyi y'ubuhugiro
Joshua21:39 na Heshiboni na Yāzeri
Joshua21:40 Iyo mijyi cumi n'ibiri n'inzuri ziyikikije ni yo yahawe Abalevi bari basigaye
Joshua21:41 Iyo mijyi yose Abalevi bahawe mu ntara z'abandi Bisiraheli ni mirongo ine n'umunani
Joshua21:42 iyo mijyi bayihanywe n'inzuri ziyikikije.
Joshua21:43 Uko ni ko Uhoraho yahaye Abisiraheli igihugu cyose yari yarasezeranyije ba sekuruza. Bamaze kucyigarurira bagituramo.
Joshua21:44 Uhoraho abaha amahoro ku mipaka yose nk'uko yari yarabisezeranyije ba sekuruza. Nta n'umwe mu banzi babo bose wabahangaye
Joshua21:45 Amasezerano yose Uhoraho yari yarasezeranyije Abisiraheli
Joshua22:1 Nuko Yozuwe ahamagaza Abarubeni n'Abagadi n'igice cy'Abamanase
Joshua22:2 arababwira ati: “Mwakurikije ibyo Musa umugaragu w'Uhoraho yabategetse byose
Joshua22:3 Ntimwatereranye bene wanyu b'Abisiraheli muri iki gihe kirekire gishize
Joshua22:4 Ubwo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yahaye bene wanyu amahoro nk'uko yabibasezeranyije
Joshua22:5 Icyakora muzitondere amabwiriza n'amategeko Musa umugaragu w'Uhoraho yabahaye. Mujye mukunda Uhoraho Imana yanyu mugenze uko ashaka
Joshua22:6 Nuko Yozuwe abasabira umugisha
Joshua22:7 avuga ati: “Nimwisubirire iwanyu
Joshua22:8 
Joshua22:9 Nuko Abarubeni n'Abagadi n'igice cy'Abamanase batandukanira n'abandi Bisiraheli i Shilo mu gihugu cya Kanāni
Joshua22:10 Bakiri mu gihugu cya Kanāni
Joshua22:11 Abandi Bisiraheli bumva ko Abarubeni n'Abagadi n'igice cy'Abamanase bubatse urutambiro hafi ya Yorodani
Joshua22:12 Nuko bakoranira i Shilo
Joshua22:13 Ariko babanza kohereza Finehasi
Joshua22:14 Yajyanye n'abatware icumi
Joshua22:15 Nuko bajya i Gileyadi
Joshua22:16 “Abandi Bisiraheli bakoranye mu izina ry'Uhoraho baradutuma bati: ‘Ni kuki mwahemukiye Imana y'Abisiraheli? Kuki mwateshutse ku Uhoraho mukamugomera mwiyubakira urutambiro?
Joshua22:17 Mbese ntimwibuka uko twacumuye turi i Pewori
Joshua22:18 Nyamara dore mwebwe mwongeye kwigomeka ku Uhoraho! Ntimuzi ko nimumucumuraho uyu munsi
Joshua22:19 Niba mwumva ko akarere kanyu gahumanye
Joshua22:20 Mbese ntimwibuka uko Akani ukomoka kuri Zera yahemutse bikabije
Joshua22:21 Nuko Abarubeni n'Abagadi n'igice cy'Abamanase
Joshua22:22 “Uhoraho ni we Mana nyamana! Uhoraho Imana nyamana ni we ubizi
Joshua22:23 Niba twariyubakiye urutambiro tugamije kwimūra Uhoraho
Joshua22:24 Nyamara si cyo cyatumye turwubaka. Ahubwo twatinyaga ko abazabakomokaho bazabaza abacu bati: ‘Muhuriye he n'Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli?
Joshua22:25 Uhoraho ubwe yagize Yorodani umupaka hagati yacu namwe Abarubeni n'Abagadi. None rero
Joshua22:26 Ni yo mpamvu twiyemeje kubaka urwo rutambiro
Joshua22:27 ahubwo ari ikimenyetso hagati yacu namwe n'abazadukomokaho
Joshua22:28 Nibaramuka bavuze batyo
Joshua22:29 Ntibikabeho ko twakwigomeka ku Uhoraho ngo tureke kumuyoboka twubaka urutambiro rwo gutambiraho ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Joshua22:30 Umutambyi Finehasi n'abakuru b'Abisiraheli
Joshua22:31 Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umutambyi arababwira ati: “Noneho tumenye ko mutahemukiye Uhoraho nk'uko twibwiraga. Ntimwashyize Abisiraheli mu kaga ko guhanwa n'Uhoraho
Joshua22:32 Hanyuma Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umutambyi
Joshua22:33 Nuko babyumvise baranezerwa basingiza Imana
Joshua22:34 Abarubeni n'Abagadi bita urwo rutambiro “Kimenyetso”
Joshua23:1 Uhoraho yahaye Abisiraheli amahoro abarinda abanzi babakikije. Hashize igihe kirekire
Joshua23:2 ahamagaza Abisiraheli bose barimo n'abakuru b'imiryango n'abatware n'abacamanza n'abandi bashinzwe ubutabera
Joshua23:3 Mwiboneye uko Uhoraho Imana yanyu yagenje amahanga yari atuye muri iki gihugu kubera mwe
Joshua23:4 Nagabanyije igihugu cyose kuva kuri Yorodani kugeza ku Nyanja ya Mediterane
Joshua23:5 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ubwe ni we uzamenesha ayo mahanga asigaye
Joshua23:6 Muzabe intwari cyane
Joshua23:7 Ntimuzifatanye n'ayo mahanga asigaye muri mwe
Joshua23:8 Muzabane akaramata n'Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Joshua23:9 Uhoraho yabameneshereje amahanga akomeye kandi y'ibihangange
Joshua23:10 Umuntu umwe muri mwe yashoboye kumenesha abanzi igihumbi
Joshua23:11 Muramenye rero muzakunde Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Joshua23:12 Ntimuzamwimūre
Joshua23:13 Naho ubundi Uhoraho ntiyakomeza kumenesha abo banyamahanga mu gihugu cyanyu bazababera nk'umutego cyangwa nk'ikiboko ku mugongo
Joshua23:14 “Dore jyewe ngiye kwigendera
Joshua23:15 None rero nk'uko yasohoje ibyo byiza byose
Joshua23:16 nimutubahiriza Isezerano yabahaye. Nimuyoboka izindi mana mukaziramya
Joshua24:1 Yozuwe akoranyiriza imiryango yose y'Abisiraheli i Shekemu
Joshua24:2 Nuko Yozuwe abwira Abisiraheli bose ati: “Uhoraho Imana yanyu aravuze ati: ‘Kera mu gihe cya Tera se wa Aburahamu na Nahori
Joshua24:3 Nuko mvana sokuruza Aburahamu hakurya ya Efurati
Joshua24:4 Izaki na we abyara Yakobo na Ezawu. Ezawu namuhaye gutura mu misozi ya Seyiri
Joshua24:5 “Hanyuma ntumayo Musa na Aroni kuvanayo Abisiraheli
Joshua24:6 Navanye ababyeyi banyu mu Misiri
Joshua24:7 Nuko Abisiraheli barantakambira
Joshua24:8 Nabagejeje mu gihugu cy'Abamori bari batuye mu burasirazuba bwa Yorodani. Barabateye ariko ndababagabiza murabatsinda
Joshua24:9 Umwami w'i Mowabu witwaga Balaki mwene Sipori na we yarabateye. Ndetse yatumije Bālamu mwene Bewori kugira ngo abavume
Joshua24:10 ariko sinamwemerera ko abavuma
Joshua24:11 Mwambutse Yorodani mugera i Yeriko. Abaturage baho kimwe n'Abamori n'Abaperizi n'Abanyakanāni
Joshua24:12 Igihe ba bami bombi b'Abamori babateraga nohereje amavubi arabamenesha
Joshua24:13 Nabahaye igihugu kitabaruhije mugihinga
Joshua24:14 Nuko Yozuwe arakomeza ati: “None rero nimwubahe Uhoraho
Joshua24:15 Ariko niba mudashaka kumuyoboka
Joshua24:16 Nuko Abisiraheli baramusubiza bati: “Ntibikabeho ko twimūra Uhoraho! Ntabwo tuzayoboka izindi mana!
Joshua24:17 Koko Uhoraho Imana yacu ni we watuvanye mu Misiri
Joshua24:18 Ni we wirukanye ayo mahanga yose ndetse n'Abamori babaga muri iki gihugu. Natwe rero tuzayoboka Uhoraho
Joshua24:19 Nuko Yozuwe abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Ntabwo mushobora kuyoboka Uhoraho mumubangikanyije n'ibigirwamana. Ni Imana nziranenge kandi ifuha. Ntabwo izihanganira ubwigomeke bwanyu n'ibicumuro byanyu
Joshua24:20 
Joshua24:21 Baramusubiza bati: “Oya
Joshua24:22 Yozuwe arababwira ati: “Mujye muzirikana ko ari mwe ubwanyu mwihitiyemo kuyoboka Uhoraho.” Baramusubiza bati: “Tuzabizirikana.”
Joshua24:23 Nuko Yozuwe arababwira ati: “Nimwamagane ibigirwamana by'abanyamahanga biri muri mwe
Joshua24:24 Baramusubiza bati: “Tuzayoboka Uhoraho Imana yacu tumwumvire.”
Joshua24:25 Uwo munsi bari i Shekemu
Joshua24:26 ayandika mu gitabo cy'Amategeko y'Imana. Hanyuma afata ibuye rinini
Joshua24:27 Nuko abwira Abisiraheli bose ati: “Iri buye rizatubera umugabo
Joshua24:28 Nuko Yozuwe arabasezerera
Joshua24:29 Nyuma y'ibyo Yozuwe mwene Nuni akaba n'umugaragu w'Uhoraho
Joshua24:30 Bamuhamba mu isambu ye i Timunati-Sera mu misozi y'Abefurayimu
Joshua24:31 Abisiraheli bayobotse Uhoraho igihe cyose Yozuwe yari akiriho
Joshua24:32 Nuko amagufwa ya Yozefu Abisiraheli bari barakuye mu Misiri
Joshua24:33 Nuko Eleyazari mwene Aroni na we arapfa
Judges1:1 Dore ibyabayeho Yozuwe amaze gupfa. Abisiraheli babajije Uhoraho bati: “Ni uwuhe muryango uzabanza gutera Abanyakanāni?”
Judges1:2 Uhoraho arabasubiza ati: “Ni umuryango wa Yuda kandi nawugabije igihugu cyabo.”
Judges1:3 Nuko Abayuda babwira bene wabo b'Abasimeyoni bati: “Nimudufashe turwanye Abanyakanāni tubirukane mu mugabane wacu
Judges1:4 Uhoraho abaha gutsinda Abanyakanāni n'Abaperizi
Judges1:5 b'Abanyakanāni n'Abaperizi. Muri uwo mujyi bahasanze Umwami Adoni-Bezeki baramurwanya
Judges1:6 arahunga bamwirukaho. Bamaze kumufata bamuca ibikumwe by'ibiganza n'iby'ibirenge.
Judges1:7 Adoni-Bezeki aravuga ati: “Abami mirongo irindwi baciwe ibikumwe by'ibiganza n'iby'ibirenge
Judges1:8 Abayuda bateye na Yeruzalemu barayitsinda
Judges1:9 Hanyuma Abayuda bajya kurwanya Abanyakanāni bari batuye mu misozi miremire
Judges1:10 Batera Abanyakanāni bari batuye i Heburoni
Judges1:11 Abayuda bavuye aho bajya kurwanya abatuye umujyi wa Debiri
Judges1:12 Kalebu aratangaza ati: “Umuntu uzatera Kiriyati-Seferi akahigarurira
Judges1:13 Nuko Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi murumuna wa Kalebu yigarurira uwo mujyi
Judges1:14 Bamaze gushyingiranwa
Judges1:15 Akisa aramusubiza ati: “Ngirira ubuntu umpe amariba
Judges1:16 Abakeni bakomoka kuri sebukwe wa Musa bazamukanye n'Abayuda bava i Yeriko umujyi w'imikindo
Judges1:17 Abayuda na bene wabo b'Abasimeyoni batera Abanyakanāni batuye mu mujyi wa Sefati barawurimbura
Judges1:18 Bigaruriye umujyi wa Gaza n'uwa Ashikeloni
Judges1:19 Uhoraho yabahaye kwigarurira akarere k'imisozi miremire
Judges1:20 Nuko bakurikije uko Musa yabitegetse baha Kalebu umujyi wa Heburoni
Judges1:21 Ababenyamini bo ntibashoboye kumenesha Abayebuzi bari batuye i Yeruzalemu
Judges1:22 Abakomoka kuri Yozefu na bo barazamuka batera umujyi wa Beteli
Judges1:23 Babanza kohereza abo gutata Beteli. Uwo mujyi kera witwaga Luzi.
Judges1:24 Abo batasi babonye umugabo usohoka mu mujyi
Judges1:25 Nuko arahabereka. Bityo abakomoka kuri Yozefu bamarira ku icumu abantu bose bo muri uwo mujyi
Judges1:26 Hanyuma uwo mugabo ajya mu gihugu cy'Abaheti ahubaka umujyi awita Luzi
Judges1:27 Abamanase ntibashoboye kumenesha abaturage b'i Betishani n'ab'i Tānaki n'ab'i Dori
Judges1:28 Abisiraheli bamaze gukomera bakoresheje Abanyakanāni imirimo y'agahato
Judges1:29 Abefurayimu ntibashoboye kumenesha Abanyakanāni bari batuye i Gezeri. Ni cyo cyatumye Abanyakanāni bakomeza gutura i Gezeri mu ntara y'Abefurayimu.
Judges1:30 Abazabuloni ntibashoboye kumenesha Abanyakanāni bari batuye i Kitironi n'i Nahalali
Judges1:31 Abashēri ntibashoboye kumenesha abaturage ba Ako n'ab'i Sidoni n'aba Ahilabu n'aba Akizibu
Judges1:32 Abashēri baturanye n'Abanyakanāni bari bahasanzwe
Judges1:33 Abanafutali ntibashoboye kumenesha Abanyakanāni bari batuye i Beti-Shemeshi n'i Betanati
Judges1:34 Abamori bahejeje Abadani mu karere k'imisozi miremire
Judges1:35 Abamori biyemeje no gukomeza gutura Ayaloni n'i Shālabimu
Judges1:36 Umupaka w'igihugu cy'Abamori watangiriraga ku musozi wa Akurabimu uhereye ku rutare
Judges2:1 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho yavuye i Gilugali ajya i Bokimu
Judges2:2 Namwe ntimuzagirane amasezerano n'abatuye muri iki gihugu
Judges2:3 None rero aba bantu sinzabirukana muri mwe
Judges2:4 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho amaze kuvuga ayo magambo
Judges2:5 Aho hantu bahita Bokimu
Judges2:6 Nuko Yozuwe asezerera Abisiraheli bose
Judges2:7 Abantu bayobotse Uhoraho iminsi yose Yozuwe yari akiriho
Judges2:8 Yozuwe mwene Nuni akaba n'umugaragu w'Uhoraho
Judges2:9 Bamuhamba mu isambu ye i Timunati-Heresi mu misozi y'Abefurayimu
Judges2:10 Abantu babyirutse muri icyo gihe na bo barapfa
Judges2:11 Abisiraheli bacumuye ku Uhoraho
Judges2:12 Bimūye Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza wabavanye mu Misiri
Judges2:13 Koko bimūye Uhoraho bayoboka Bāli na za Ashitaroti.
Judges2:14 Nuko Uhoraho arakarira Abisiraheli abateza abanyazi barabasahura
Judges2:15 Iyo Abisiraheli bajyaga ku rugamba
Judges2:16 Hanyuma Uhoraho yabashyiriyeho abarengezi bo kubakiza abanzi babanyagaga ibyabo.
Judges2:17 Icyakora Abisiraheli ntibumviye abo barengezi
Judges2:18 Nuko abanzi babo bakabakandamiza kandi bakabatoteza
Judges2:19 Nyamara iyo umurengezi yapfaga
Judges2:20 Ni cyo cyatumye Uhoraho abarakarira aravuga ati: “Aba bantu bishe Isezerano nagiranye na ba sekuruza
Judges2:21 Nanjye sinzongera kwirukana umuntu n'umwe wo mu mahanga Yozuwe yasize mu gihugu atarapfa.
Judges2:22 Ayo mahanga ni yo nzakoresha ngerageza Abisiraheli
Judges2:23 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho yaretse ayo mahanga ntayameneshe huti huti
Judges3:1 Hari amahanga Uhoraho yaretse kugira ngo ayakoreshe
Judges3:2 Ibyo yabikoreye kugira ngo Abisiraheli batigeze bajya ku rugamba bimenyereze intambara.
Judges3:3 Abo Uhoraho yaretse ni abami batanu bategekaga Abafilisiti
Judges3:4 Icyatumye abareka kwari ukugira ngo abakoreshe agerageza Abisiraheli
Judges3:5 Bityo Abisiraheli baturana n'Abanyakanāni n'Abaheti n'Abamori
Judges3:6 Abisiraheli bashyingiranye n'abantu bo muri ayo mahanga kandi bayoboka imana zabo.
Judges3:7 Abisiraheli bacumuye ku Uhoraho Imana yabo baramwimūra
Judges3:8 Uhoraho arabarakarira abagabiza Kushani-Rishatayimu
Judges3:9 Abisiraheli batakambira Uhoraho maze abashyiriraho umuntu wo kubakiza. Uwo ni Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi murumuna wa Kalebu.
Judges3:10 Mwuka w'Uhoraho amuzaho
Judges3:11 Igihugu cyamaze imyaka mirongo ine mu mutekano
Judges3:12 Abisiraheli bongeye gucumura ku Uhoraho
Judges3:13 Eguloni yishyize hamwe n'Abamoni n'Abamaleki
Judges3:14 Nuko Abisiraheli bategekwa na Eguloni umwami wa Mowabu imyaka cumi n'umunani.
Judges3:15 Abisiraheli batakambira Uhoraho
Judges3:16 Maze Ehudi acurisha inkota ifite uburebure bwa santimetero mirongo ine n'eshanu
Judges3:17 Ya maturo ayashyīra Eguloni umwami wa Mowabu
Judges3:18 Amaze kuyamushyikiriza
Judges3:19 Ngo bagere i Gilugali aho bacukura amabuye
Judges3:20 Igihe umwami yari asigaye wenyine mu cyumba gifutse cy'igorofa yo hejuru
Judges3:21 Nuko Ehudi akura ya nkota ku itako ry'iburyo abikoresheje ukuboko kw'ibumoso
Judges3:22 Inkota uko yakabaye ndetse n'ikirindi
Judges3:23 Ehudi arasohoka afungisha umuryango urufunguzo
Judges3:24 Amaze kugenda abagaragu b'umwami bagaruka ku cyumba gifutse cy'igorofa yo hejuru
Judges3:25 Bategereza umwanya munini cyane
Judges3:26 Igihe bari bagitegereje
Judges3:27 Ageze mu misozi y'Abefurayimu avuza ihembe
Judges3:28 Ehudi arababwira ati: “Nimunkurikire dutere abanzi banyu b'Abamowabu
Judges3:29 Uwo munsi bica Abamowabu ibihumbi icumi
Judges3:30 Uwo munsi Abisiraheli batsinda Abamowabu
Judges3:31 Uwakurikiye Ehudi ni Shamugari mwene Anati. Yicishije igihosho Abafilisiti magana atandatu
Judges4:1 Ehudi amaze gupfa
Judges4:2 Nuko abagabiza Yabini umwami w'Umunyakanāni wari utuye mu mujyi wa Hasori. Umugaba w'ingabo ze witwaga Sisera
Judges4:3 Yabini yari afite amagare y'intambara magana cyenda acuzwe mu byuma. Yamaze imyaka makumyabiri ategekesha Abisiraheli igitugu n'urugomo
Judges4:4 Icyo gihe umuhanuzikazi Debora muka Lapidoti
Judges4:5 Abantu bamusangaga munsi y'igiti cy'umukindo kugira ngo abakemurire ibibazo. Icyo giti cyitwaga umukindo wa Debora
Judges4:6 Umunsi umwe atumira Baraki mwene Abinowamu w'i Kedeshi yo mu ntara ya Nafutali
Judges4:7 Nanjye nzatuma Sisera umugaba w'ingabo za Yabini agusanga ku mugezi wa Kishoni. Nubwo azaba afite amagare n'ingabo nyinshi
Judges4:8 Nuko Baraki asubiza Debora ati: “Nzajyayo niwemera ko tujyana
Judges4:9 Debora aramubwira ati: “Ndabyemeye turajyana
Judges4:10 Baraki ahamagaza ab'umuryango wa Zabuloni n'uwa Nafutali kugira ngo bakoranire i Kedeshi
Judges4:11 Icyo gihe Heberi w'Umukeni yari akambitse mu ihema rye iruhande rw'igiti cy'inganzamarumbu
Judges4:12 Sisera yumvise ko Baraki mwene Abinowamu ageze ku musozi wa Taboru
Judges4:13 akoranya ya magare ye magana cyenda n'ingabo ze zose
Judges4:14 Debora abwira Baraki ati: “Haguruka ugende dore Uhoraho akurangaje imbere
Judges4:15 batera Sisera n'amagare ye n'ingabo ze. Uhoraho aha Abisiraheli kuzica ariko Sisera we ava mu igare
Judges4:16 Baraki akurikira ingabo za Sisera n'amagare yazo
Judges4:17 Sisera uko yagahunze yiruka agana ku ihema rya Yayeli muka Heberi w'Umukeni
Judges4:18 Nuko Yayeli ajya gusanganira Sisera aramubwira ati: “Mutware
Judges4:19 Sisera aramubwira ati: “Ntiwampa utuzi two kunywa ko inyota inyishe!” Nuko Yayeli apfundura icyansi amuha amata aranywa
Judges4:20 Sisera aramubwira ati: “Ihagararire ku muryango w'ihema
Judges4:21 Sisera yari yarushye arasinzira cyane. Nuko Yayeli muka Heberi afata inyundo n'urubambo rw'ihema
Judges4:22 Muri ako kanya Baraki aba atungutse ashaka Sisera. Yayeli ajya kumusanganira aramubwira ati: “Ngwino nkwereke umuntu ushaka!” Nuko Baraki yinjirana na we
Judges4:23 Uwo munsi Imana iha Abisiraheli gucogoza Yabini umwami w'Umunyakanāni
Judges4:24 bakomeza kugira amaboko baramurwanya kugeza ubwo bamutsinze burundu.
