Judges6:1 Abisiraheli bongeye gucumura ku Uhoraho abagabiza Abamidiyani
Judges6:2 Abamidiyani barabakandamije kugeza ubwo Abisiraheli bateganya aho bahungira mu misozi
Judges6:3 Igihe Abisiraheli babaga bamaze gutera imyaka
Judges6:4 Barazaga bagashinga amahema hirya no hino mu gihugu
Judges6:5 Abamidiyani bazanaga ingamiya zabo zitabarika n'andi matungo n'amahema
Judges6:6 Ibyo bikorwa by'Abamidiyani byazonze Abisiraheli
Judges6:7 Ubwo batakambiye Uhoraho kugira ngo abakize Abamidiyani
Judges6:8 yaboherereje umuhanuzi arababwira ati: “Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: ‘Nabakuye mu Misiri aho mwari inkoreragahato
Judges6:9 mbakiza Abanyamisiri. Nabakijije n'ababakandamizaga bose ndabamenesha
Judges6:10 Nababwiye ko ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Judges6:11 Umumarayika 'Uhoraho aza Ofura
Judges6:12 Nuko wa Mumarayika w'Uhoraho aramubonekera
Judges6:13 Gideyoni aramubwira ati: “Ariko se databuja
Judges6:14 Nuko Uhoraho arahindukira aramubwira ati: “Genda ukoreshe imbaraga ufite
Judges6:15 Nuko Gideyoni aramusubiza ati: “Ariko se databuja
Judges6:16 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Humura ndi kumwe nawe
Judges6:17 Gideyoni aramusubiza ati: “Niba koko nakugizeho ubutoni
Judges6:18 None nyamuneka
Judges6:19 Nuko Gideyoni aragenda abaga ishashi y'ihene
Judges6:20 Umumarayika w'Imana aramubwira ati: “Shyira inyama n'imigati idasembuye kuri uru rutare
Judges6:21 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho akoza umutwe w'inkoni yari yitwaje kuri za nyama na ya migati
Judges6:22 Nuko Gideyoni amenya ko yari kumwe n'Umumarayika w'Uhoraho
Judges6:23 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Humura
Judges6:24 Aho ngaho Gideyoni ahubakira Uhoraho urutambiro
Judges6:25 Iryo joro Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni ati: “Fata impfizi y'ubuheta ya so imaze imyaka irindwi
Judges6:26 Naho jyewe Uhoraho Imana yawe
Judges6:27 Nuko Gideyoni ajyana n'abantu icumi bo mu bagaragu be
Judges6:28 Bukeye abatuye uwo mujyi babyutse
Judges6:29 Nuko barabazanya bati: “Ibi byakozwe na nde?” Bamaze kubaririza no gushakisha
Judges6:30 Nuko babwira Yowashi bati: “Sohora umuhungu wawe tumwice kuko yasenye urutambiro rwa Bāli
Judges6:31 Ariko Yowashi abwira abo bantu bose bari bamuhagurukiye ati: “Mbese ni mwe muburanira Bāli? Ni mwe muri buyirengere? Uri buyiburanire wese
Judges6:32 Uhereye icyo gihe Gideyoni bamuhimba Yerubāli
Judges6:33 Abamidiyani bose n'Abamaleki hamwe n'andi moko y'iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani bakoranira hamwe
Judges6:34 Nuko Mwuka w'Uhoraho aza kuri Gideyoni
Judges6:35 Yohereza intumwa no ku bandi Bamanase bose kugira ngo bamutabare
Judges6:36 Nuko Gideyoni abwira Imana ati: “Wavuze ko ari jye uzakirisha Abisiraheli
Judges6:37 Ngiye kurambika uruhu rw'intama rufite ubwoya bwinshi kuri iyi mbuga
Judges6:38 Uko Gideyoni yabisabye ni ko byagenze. Yarazindutse akamura rwa ruhu
Judges6:39 Nuko Gideyoni abwira Imana ati: “Ntundakarire
Judges6:40 Muri iryo joro na bwo Imana ibigenza nk'uko Gideyoni yabisabye. Uruhu rwonyine rwari rwumutse
Judges7:1 Bukeye Yerubāli ari we Gideyoni hamwe n'abantu bose bari kumwe
Judges7:2 Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni ati: “Ingabo muri kumwe ni nyinshi cyane
Judges7:3 None utangarize ingabo uti: ‘Ufite ubwoba akaba adagadwa
Judges7:4 Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni ati: “Ingabo ziracyari nyinshi. Noneho umanukane na zo mujye ku isōko nzikurobanurire. Uwo nkubwira nti: ‘Jyana n'uyu’
Judges7:5 Nuko Gideyoni amanukana n'ingabo bajya ku isōko
Judges7:6 Nuko abanywesheje amazi amashyi bayajabagira baba abantu magana atatu
Judges7:7 Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni ati: “Ndabakirisha bariya bantu magana atatu banywesheje amashyi
Judges7:8 Nuko Gideyoni arabasezerera barataha
Judges7:9 Iryo joro Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni ati: “Haguruka ujye gutera inkambi y'Abamidiyani
Judges7:10 Nyamara niba ufite ubwoba ujyaneyo n'umugaragu wawe Pura
Judges7:11 wumve ibyo bavuga bigutere ubutwari bwo kubatera.” Nuko amanukana n'umugaragu we Pura
Judges7:12 Abamidiyani n'Abamaleki n'andi moko y'iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani
Judges7:13 Gideyoni ahageze
Judges7:14 Mugenzi we aramusubiza ati: “Erega izo nzozi nta kindi zivuga kitari Gideyoni mwene Yowashi w'Umwisiraheli
Judges7:15 Gideyoni amaze kumva izo nzozi n'uko zasobanuwe
Judges7:16 Nuko ba bantu magana atatu abagabanyamo amatsinda atatu
Judges7:17 Arababwira ati: “Muze kureba aho ndi bube ndi iruhande rw'inkambi y'Abamidiyani
Judges7:18 Jyewe n'abo turi kumwe nituvuza amahembe
Judges7:19 Bijya kuba mu gicuku
Judges7:20 Ubwo abantu bo mu yandi matsinda na bo bavugiriza amahembe icyarimwe n'ibibindi babitura hasi. Bafata amafumba mu kuboko kw'ibumoso
Judges7:21 Buri wese ahagarara mu mwanya we bakikije inkambi
Judges7:22 Ba bantu magana atatu bakomeza kuvuza amahembe
Judges7:23 Abisiraheli batabaza bene wabo bo mu muryango wa Nafutali n'uwa Ashēri n'uwa Manase
Judges7:24 Gideyoni yohereza intumwa mu misozi yose y'Abefurayimu kugira ngo zibabwire ziti: “Nimumanuke murwanye Abamidiyani
Judges7:25 Bafata abatware babiri b'Abamidiyani
Judges8:1 Abefurayimu babaza Gideyoni bati: “Watugize ibiki? Kuki utatubwiye ngo tugutabare ujya kurwanya Abamidiyani?” Nuko baramutonganya cyane.
Judges8:2 Na we arabasubiza ati: “Ibyo nakoze ntibigira amahuriro n'ibyo mwakoze. Mbese si mwebwe Abefurayimu mwishe Abamidiyani benshi kurusha abishwe natwe abakomoka kuri Abiyezeri?
Judges8:3 Ni mwebwe Imana yahaye kwica abatware b'Abamidiyani
Judges8:4 Gideyoni na ba bantu magana atatu bari kumwe bambuka Yorodani. Nubwo bari bananiwe bwose bakomeza gukurikirana Abamidiyani.
Judges8:5 Bageze mu mujyi wa Sukoti
Judges8:6 Ariko abategetsi b'i Sukoti baramubaza bati: “Ubwo se wamaze gufata mpiri Zebahi na Salimuna kugira ngo tubone kugaburira ingabo zawe?”
Judges8:7 Nuko Gideyoni aravuga ati: “Mumenye ko Uhoraho namara kungabiza Zebahi na Salimuna
Judges8:8 Gideyoni avuye aho ajya i Penuweli
Judges8:9 Nuko arababwira ati: “Nintabaruka amahoro
Judges8:10 Zebahi na Salimuna bari i Karikori n'ingabo zasigaye z'amoko y'iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani
Judges8:11 Gideyoni we azamuka iburasirazuba bwa Noba na Yogibeha mu nzira z'aborozi b'abagisha
Judges8:12 Nuko abami babo Zebahi na Salimuna barahunga
Judges8:13 Gideyoni mwene Yowashi avuye ku rugamba anyura ku musozi wa Heresi.
Judges8:14 Ahafatira umusore w'i Sukoti
Judges8:15 Gideyoni ageze i Sukoti arababwira ati: “Mwari mwaninuye ngo ‘Ubwo se wamaze gufata mpiri Zebahi na Salimuna kugira ngo tubone kugaburira ingabo zawe zinaniwe?’ Noneho dore ngaba nje kubabereka!”
Judges8:16 Nuko aca amahwa n'imifatangwe abikubita abakuru b'i Sukoti.
Judges8:17 Asenya n'umunara w'i Penuweli
Judges8:18 Hanyuma Gideyoni abaza Zebahi na Salimuna ati: “Harya abantu mwiciye i Taboru basaga bate?” Baramusubiza bati: “Basaga nkawe
Judges8:19 Arababwira ati: “Ni byo
Judges8:20 Gideyoni abwira umuhungu we w'impfura Yeteri ati: “Haguruka ubice!” Ariko uwo musore kuko yari akiri muto
Judges8:21 Zebahi na Salimuna babwira Gideyoni bati: “Ube ari wowe utwiyicira
Judges8:22 Abisiraheli babwira Gideyoni bati: “Uzadutegeke wowe ubwawe n'umuhungu wawe ndetse n'abazagukomokaho
Judges8:23 Gideyoni arabasubiza ati: “Sinzabategeka ndetse n'umuhungu wanjye ntazabategeka
Judges8:24 Icyakora hari icyo mbasaba
Judges8:25 Abisiraheli baramusubiza bati: “Turayaguha rwose.” Nuko basasa umwenda
Judges8:26 Amaherena y'izahabu Gideyoni yari yabasabye yapimaga ibiro nka makumyabiri. Gideyoni yafashe n'imitāko n'imikufi n'imyambaro y'imihemba ba bami b'Abamidiyani bari bambaye
Judges8:27 Nuko Gideyoni abikoramo ishusho ayishyira mu mujyi w'iwabo Ofura
Judges8:28 Uko ni ko Abisiraheli batsinze Abamidiyani ubutazongera kubyutsa umutwe. Igihe cyose Gideyoni yari akiriho
Judges8:29 Yerubāli ari we Gideyoni mwene Yowashi aritahira
Judges8:30 Yabyaye abahungu mirongo irindwi
Judges8:31 Yari afite n'inshoreke yari ituye i Shekemu
Judges8:32 Gideyoni mwene Yowashi yisaziye neza
Judges8:33 Gideyoni akimara gupfa
Judges8:34 Ntibongeye kwibuka Uhoraho Imana yabo wabakijije abanzi bose bari babakikije.
Judges8:35 Nta n'ubwo bigeze bagirira neza ab'inzu ya Yerubāli ari we Gideyoni
Judges9:1 Abimeleki mwene Gideyoni ajya i Shekemu kureba ba nyirarume n'ab'umuryango wa sekuru ubyara nyina bose
Judges9:2 “Nimumbarize abatware bose b'i Shekemu muti: ‘Mbese ari ugutegekwa n'abahungu mirongo irindwi ba Gideyoni
Judges9:3 Ba nyirarume babwira ayo magambo yose abatware b'i Shekemu. Na bo babyumvise batyo biyemeza gushyigikira Abimeleki kuko bavugaga bati: “Erega ni mwene wacu!”
Judges9:4 Nuko bamuha ibikoroto mirongo irindwi by'ifeza bavanye mu ngoro ya Bāli-Beriti. Abimeleki abigurira abantu b'imburamukoro n'ibyihebe
Judges9:5 Bajyana kwa se mu mujyi wa Ofura
Judges9:6 Abatware b'i Shekemu bose n'ab'i Betimilo bose
Judges9:7 Hagati aho Yotamu abyumvise
Judges9:8 Umunsi umwe ibiti byakoraniye hamwe
Judges9:9 Umunzenze urasubiza uti: ‘Muragira ngo ndeke amavuta amvamo ashimisha Imana n'abantu
Judges9:10 Nuko ibiti bibwira umutini biti: ‘Ngwino utubere umwami.’
Judges9:11 Umutini urasubiza uti: ‘Muragira ngo ndeke kwera imbuto ziryoha
Judges9:12 Maze ibiti bibwira umuzabibu biti: ‘Ngwino utubere umwami.’
Judges9:13 Umuzabibu urasubiza uti: ‘Muragira ngo ndeke divayi imvamo ishimisha Imana n'abantu
Judges9:14 Noneho ibiti byose bibwira igihuru cy'amahwa biti: ‘Ngwino utubere umwami.’
Judges9:15 Igihuru cy'amahwa cyo kirasubiza kiti: ‘Niba koko mushaka kunyimika kugira ngo mbabere umwami
Judges9:16 Yotamu arakomeza ati: “Mbese koko mwakoze ibikwiye kandi mwashyize mu gaciro mwimika Abimeleki? Mbese mwagiriye Gideyoni n'ab'inzu ye ineza ihwanye n'iyo yabagiriye?
Judges9:17 Data yarabarwaniriye yemera no guhara amagara kugira ngo abakize Abamidiyani
Judges9:18 nyamara ab'inzu ye mwarabahindutse. Uyu munsi abahungu be mirongo irindwi mwabiciye ku rutare rumwe
Judges9:19 Niba rero mwakoze ibikwiye kandi mwashyize mu gaciro ku byo mwakoreye uyu munsi Gideyoni n'ab'inzu ye
Judges9:20 Naho ubundi
Judges9:21 Nuko Yotamu ava aho ahungira i Bēri aturayo
Judges9:22 Abimeleki yamaze imyaka itatu ategeka Abisiraheli.
Judges9:23 Hanyuma Imana iteza amakimbirane hagati ye n'abatware b'i Shekemu
Judges9:24 Ibyo byabaye kugira ngo Abimeleki ahanirwe ubugome bwe
Judges9:25 Abo batware bashyira abantu mu mpinga z'imisozi bo guteza akaduruvayo
Judges9:26 Gāli mwene Ebedi azana i Shekemu n'abavandimwe be
Judges9:27 Bajya mu mirima yabo basarura imizabibu benga amayoga
Judges9:28 Gāli mwene Ebedi aravuga ati: “Abimeleki ni iki
Judges9:29 Iyaba ari jye wayoboraga aba bantu
Judges9:30 Zebuli umutegetsi wa Shekemu yumvise ibyo Gāli mwene Ebedi avuze
Judges9:31 Atuma kuri Abimeleki rwihishwa ati: “Dore Gāli n'abavandimwe be baje i Shekemu
Judges9:32 None rero wowe n'abantu muri kumwe muhaguruke iri joro mwubikīrire hafi y'umujyi.
Judges9:33 Muzahaguruke mu gitondo izuba rirashe mutere umujyi. Gāli n'abo bari kumwe nibaza bagusatīra
Judges9:34 Abimeleki n'abantu bose bari kumwe bagenda nijoro bubikīrira hafi y'i Shekemu
Judges9:35 Bukeye Gāli mwene Ebedi araza ahagarara ku irembo ry'umujyi
Judges9:36 Gāli ababonye abwira Zebuli ati: “Dore ziriya ngabo zimanuka mu mpinga z'imisozi!” Zebuli aramusubiza ati: “Bariya si abantu
Judges9:37 Ariko Gāli yongera kumubwira ati: “Nyamara ziriya rwose ni ingabo ziturutse mu mpinga y'umusozi
Judges9:38 Zebuli aramubwira ati: “Wajyaga wirarira uvuga ngo ‘Abimeleki ni iki kugira ngo twemere adutegeke?’ Bariya si ba bantu wasuzuguraga? Ngaho rero genda murwane!”
Judges9:39 Nuko Gāli agenda imbere y'abatware b'i Shekemu
Judges9:40 Abimeleki atsinda ab'i Shekemu
Judges9:41 Abimeleki yigira Aruma
Judges9:42 Bukeye ab'i Shekemu bajya mu mirima yabo
Judges9:43 Nuko agabanya ingabo ze mu matsinda atatu
Judges9:44 Abimeleki n'itsinda bari kumwe barirukanka bahagarara ku irembo ry'umujyi
Judges9:45 Abimeleki yateye uwo mujyi awurwanya umunsi wose arawigarurira
Judges9:46 Abatware bari mu munara w'i Shekemu babyumvise
Judges9:47 Abimeleki amenye ko abo batware bose bakoraniye hamwe
Judges9:48 azamuka umusozi wa Salimoni hamwe n'ingabo ze zose. Afata ishoka atema ishami ry'igiti ariterera ku rutugu. Abwira ingabo ze ati: “Mugire umwete mukore nk'ibyo nkoze.”
Judges9:49 Nuko zose zitema amashami zikurikira Abimeleki
Judges9:50 Abimeleki atera n'umujyi wa Tebesi arawugota
Judges9:51 Muri uwo mujyi hagati hari umunara ukomeye cyane. Abaturage bose
Judges9:52 Nuko Abimeleki arahatera
Judges9:53 Ariko umwe mu bagore bari hejuru y'umunara amutera ingasire mu mutwe
Judges9:54 Nuko Abimeleki ahita ahamagara umusore wari umutwaje intwaro
Judges9:55 Abisiraheli babonye Abimeleki apfuye
Judges9:56 Uko ni ko Imana yituye Abimeleki ibibi yakoreye se
Judges9:57 n'abantu b'i Shekemu Imana ibitura ibibi byose bakoze. Bityo umuvumo wa Yotamu mwene Gideyoni urabahama.
Judges10:1 Abimeleki amaze gupfa
Judges10:2 Yamaze imyaka makumyabiri n'itatu ategeka Abisiraheli
Judges10:3 Nyuma ya Tola hakurikiyeho Yayiri w'Umunyagileyadi. Yamaze imyaka makumyabiri n'ibiri ategeka Abisiraheli.
Judges10:4 Yari afite abahungu mirongo itatu bagenderaga ku ndogobe. Bategekaga imijyi mirongo itatu mu ntara ya Gileyadi
Judges10:5 Hanyuma Yayiri arapfa bamuhamba i Kamoni.
Judges10:6 Abisiraheli bongera gucumura ku Uhoraho
Judges10:7 Uhoraho arakarira Abisiraheli cyane
Judges10:8 Uhereye ubwo
Judges10:9 Ndetse Abamoni bambuka Yorodani batera Abayuda n'Ababenyamini n'Abefurayimu
Judges10:10 Nuko Abisiraheli batakambira Uhoraho bati: “Mana yacu
Judges10:11 Uhoraho abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Mbese sinabakijije Abanyamisiri n'Abamori
Judges10:12 Abanyasidoni n'Abamaleki n'Abanyamawoni na bo barabakandamije
Judges10:13 Nyamara mwaranyimūye muyoboka izindi mana
Judges10:14 Ngaho nimutakambire izo mana mwitoranyirije
Judges10:15 Abisiraheli basubiza Uhoraho bati: “Koko twaracumuye utugenze uko ushaka
Judges10:16 Baherako bareka imana z'abanyamahanga basengaga bagarukira Uhoraho
Judges10:17 Abamoni barahamagarana
Judges10:18 Nuko abatware b'Abisiraheli bo muri Gileyadi barabazanya bati: “Ni nde muri twe uzashoza intambara
Judges11:1 Mu Banyagileyadi hari umugabo w'intwari witwaga Yefute
Judges11:2 Ubundi Gileyadi yari afite abahungu yabyaranye n'umugore we usanzwe. Abo bahungu bamaze gukura bamenesheje Yefute
Judges11:3 Nuko Yefute arabahunga ajya gutura mu karere k'i Tobu. Abantu b'imburamukoro baramusanga bifatanya na we
Judges11:4 Hashize iminsi Abamoni batera Abisiraheli
Judges11:5 maze abakuru b'i Gileyadi bajya mu karere k'i Tobu guhuruza Yefute.
Judges11:6 Baramubwira bati: “Ngwino utubere umugaba w'ingabo kugira ngo turwanye Abamoni.”
Judges11:7 Yefute arabasubiza ati: “Mwaranyanze munyirukana mu bya data
Judges11:8 Abakuru b'i Gileyadi baramusubiza bati: “Turakugarukiye kugira ngo uze tujyane kurwanya Abamoni
Judges11:9 Yefute arababaza ati: “Mbese nitujyana kurwanya Abamoni Uhoraho akanshoboza kubatsinda
Judges11:10 Abakuru b'i Gileyadi baramusubiza bati: “Tuzabikora nk'uko ubivuze kandi Uhoraho ni we dutanze ho umugabo.”
Judges11:11 Nuko Yefute ajyana n'abakuru b'i Gileyadi
Judges11:12 Yefute atuma ku mwami w'Abamoni agira ati: “Turapfa iki? Ni iki cyatumye unterera igihugu?”
Judges11:13 Umwami w'Abamoni asubiza intumwa za Yefute ati: “Impamvu ni uko Abisiraheli bavuye mu Misiri bantwarira igihugu
Judges11:14 Nuko Yefute yongera kohereza intumwa ku mwami w'Abamoni
Judges11:15 ziramubwira ziti: “Yefute aravuze ngo: ntabwo Abisiraheli bigeze banyaga igihugu cy'Abamowabu cyangwa icy'Abamoni.
Judges11:16 Igihe Abisiraheli bavaga mu Misiri
Judges11:17 Maze batuma ku mwami wa Edomu bati: ‘Twemerere tunyure mu gihugu cyawe’
Judges11:18 Hanyuma bakikira igihugu cya Edomu n'icya Mowabu
Judges11:19 Abisiraheli batuma kuri Sihoni umwami w'Abamori wari utuye i Heshiboni bati: ‘Twemerere tunyure mu gihugu cyawe twikomereze urugendo.’
Judges11:20 Nyamara Sihoni ntiyabemerera kunyura mu gihugu cye
Judges11:21 Nuko Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli abagabiza Sihoni n'ingabo ze zose barazitsinda. Maze Abisiraheli bigarurira icyo gihugu cyose cy'Abamori
Judges11:22 uhereye ku ruzi rwa Arunoni ukageza ku mugezi wa Yaboki
Judges11:23 Ubwo Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli yaduhaye kumenesha Abamori muri iki gihugu
Judges11:24 Mbese igihugu mutuyemo si icyo Kemoshi imana yanyu yabahaye? Natwe rero dufite uburenganzira bwo gutura mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yacu yaduhaye.
Judges11:25 Balaki mwene Sipori umwami wa Mowabu ntiyigeze ashotōra Abisiraheli cyangwa ngo abarwanye. None se wowe mwami w'Abamoni
Judges11:26 Abisiraheli bamaze imyaka magana atatu batuye i Heshiboni na Aroweri no mu mijyi ihakikije
Judges11:27 Ntitwigeze tubakosereza ahubwo ni mwebwe mwaduhemukiye muraturwanya. Uhoraho ni we mucamanza
Judges11:28 Nyamara umwami w'Abamoni ntiyita ku byo Yefute yamutumyeho.
Judges11:29 Mwuka w'Uhoraho aza kuri Yefute
Judges11:30 Yefute ahigira Uhoraho umuhigo ati: “Numpa gutsinda Abamoni
Judges11:31 ngatabaruka amahoro
Judges11:32 Yefute amaze kwambuka umupaka w'Abamoni arabarwanya
Judges11:33 uhereye Aroweri ukageza hafi y'i Miniti na Abeli-Keramimu. Yefute yigarurira imijyi makumyabiri yo muri ako karere
Judges11:34 Yefute atabarutse agera iwe i Misipa
Judges11:35 Nuko Yefute amukubise amaso ashishimura imyambaro ye agira ati: “Ye baba we
Judges11:36 Umukobwa we aramubwira ati: “Data
Judges11:37 Ariko ngusabye ikintu kimwe gusa: ube undetse amezi abiri
Judges11:38 Yefute aramwemerera
Judges11:39 Amezi abiri arangiye aragaruka
Judges11:40 buri mwaka abakobwa b'Abisiraheli bakajya kumara iminsi ine mu misozi
Judges12:1 Abefurayimu bakoranira hamwe bambuka Yorodani
Judges12:2 Yefute arabasubiza ati: “Jyewe n'abo twari kumwe twari dushyamiranye n'Abamoni
Judges12:3 Mbibonye ntyo mperako mpara amagara yanjye njya gutera Abamoni
Judges12:4 Nuko Yefute akoranyiriza hamwe Abagileyadi barwanya Abefurayimu
Judges12:5 bigarurira ibyambu bya Yorodani bigana mu ntara y'Abefurayimu. Nuko hagira umuntu ushaka kwambuka kugira ngo ahunge
Judges12:6 bakamubwira bati: “Ngaho vuga uti: ‘Shiboleti’ ”
Judges12:7 Yefute w'Umugileyadi yamaze imyaka itandatu ategeka Abisiraheli
Judges12:8 Nyuma ya Yefute
Judges12:9 Yari afite abahungu mirongo itatu n'abakobwa mirongo itatu. Abo bakobwa be bose yabashyingiye mu yindi miryango itari uwo akomokamo
Judges12:10 nuko arapfa bamuhamba i Betelehemu.
Judges12:11 Nyuma ya Ibusani
Judges12:12 arapfa
Judges12:13 Nyuma ya Eloni
Judges12:14 Yari afite abahungu mirongo ine
Judges12:15 arapfa bamuhamba i Piratoni mu ntara y'Abefurayimu
Judges13:1 Abisiraheli bongera gucumura ku Uhoraho
Judges13:2 Mu karere ka Sora hari hatuye umugabo witwaga Manowa wo mu muryango wa Dani. Yari afite umugore w'ingumba utigeze abyara.
Judges13:3 Nuko Umumarayika w'Uhoraho abonekera uwo mugore
Judges13:4 None rero uramenye ntukanywe divayi cyangwa izindi nzoga zose zisindisha
Judges13:5 kuko umuhungu uzabyara
Judges13:6 Uwo mugore asanga umugabo we aramubwira ati: “Umuntu w'Imana yaje aho nari ndi
Judges13:7 Yambwiye ati: ‘Dore uzasama inda ubyare umuhungu. Ntukanywe divayi cyangwa izindi nzoga zose zisindisha ntukarye n'ibyokurya byose bihumanye
Judges13:8 Maze Manowa asenga Uhoraho agira ati: “Nyagasani
Judges13:9 Imana yumva isengesho rya Manowa
Judges13:10 Umugore agenda yiruka abwira umugabo we ati: “Wa muntu nabonye ubushize yagarutse!”
Judges13:11 Nuko Manowa arahaguruka akurikira umugore we
Judges13:12 Manowa aramubaza ati: “None se nibiba nk'uko wabivuze
Judges13:13 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho asubiza Manowa ati: “Umugore wawe agomba kwitondera ibyo namubwiye byose.
Judges13:14 Ntakagire icyo arya cyangwa anywa gikomoka ku muzabibu
Judges13:15 Manowa abwira Umumarayika w'Uhoraho ati: “Ndakwinginze
Judges13:16 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Ndategereza ariko sindya. Icyakora ubishatse watambira Uhoraho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro.” Manowa ntiyari azi ko ari Umumarayika w'Uhoraho
Judges13:17 nuko aramubaza ati: “Witwa nde kugira ngo nibiba nk'uko wabivuze tuzagushime?”
Judges13:18 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Urambariza iki izina ryanjye? Mfite izina ry'akataraboneka!”
Judges13:19 Nuko Manowa azana umwana w'ihene n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke abishyira hejuru y'urutare
Judges13:20 Igihe umuriro w'igitambo wagurumanaga ku rutare
Judges13:21 Manowa amenya ko yari Umumarayika w'Uhoraho
Judges13:22 Nuko Manowa abwira umugore we ati: “Turi bupfe nta kabuza
Judges13:23 Umugore we aramusubiza ati: “Iyo Uhoraho ashaka ko dupfa ntaba yemeye igitambo cyacu n'ituro ryacu
Judges13:24 Igihe kigeze umugore abyara umuhungu
Judges13:25 Igihe Samusoni yari i Mahane-Dani hafi ya Sora na Eshitawoli
Judges14:1 Umunsi umwe Samusoni yaramanutse ajya i Timuna
Judges14:2 Agarutse imuhira abwira ababyeyi be ati: “Nabonye umukobwa wo mu Bafilisiti i Timuna
Judges14:3 Baramusubiza bati: “Mbese wabuze umugeni mu bakobwa bo mu muryango wacu cyangwa mu bandi Bisiraheli
Judges14:4 Ababyeyi be ntibamenya ko ari Uhoraho ubiteye
Judges14:5 Samusoni n'ababyeyi be baramanuka bajya i Timuna. Bageze mu mirima y'imizabibu yaho
Judges14:6 Nuko Mwuka w'Uhoraho amuzaho
Judges14:7 Samusoni akomeza urugendo aramanuka
Judges14:8 Hashize iminsi
Judges14:9 Afata kuri ubwo buki agenda arya
Judges14:10 Se wa Samusoni ajya kwa bamwana we
Judges14:11 Abafilisiti bamubonye
Judges14:12 Samusoni arababwira ati: “Ngiye kubasākuza igisākuzo
Judges14:13 Ariko nimutacyica
Judges14:14 Arababwira ati: “Mu kiryana havuyemo ikiribwa
Judges14:15 Umunsi wa karindwi babwira muka Samusoni bati: “Oshyoshya umugabo wawe
Judges14:16 Umugore wa Samusoni aramwegera amuririra imbere ati: “Uranyanga rwose ntunkunda! Ubonye ngo we kumbwira uko bica igisākuzo wahaye bene wacu!” Aramusubiza ati: “Ese wibwira ko nakigusobanurira
Judges14:17 Yamaze iyo minsi irindwi y'ibirori amuririra imbere
Judges14:18 Kuri uwo munsi wa karindwi izuba ritararenga
Judges14:19 Muri ako kanya Mwuka w'Uhoraho amuzaho
Judges14:20 Umugore we acyurwa n'umwe muri ba basore bari kumwe na Samusoni mu bukwe.
Judges15:1 Hashize iminsi
Judges15:2 ahubwo aramubwira ati: “Nibwiye ko wamwanze maze mushyingira umwe mu basore mwari kumwe. Noneho ndagushyingira murumuna we mu cyimbo cye. Erega amurusha n'ubwiza!”
Judges15:3 Ariko Samusoni aravuga ati: “Ubu se kandi hari uwandenganya ndamutse ngiriye nabi Abafilisiti?”
Judges15:4 Nuko aragenda afata ingunzu magana atatu
Judges15:5 Amaze gukongeza ayo mafumba
Judges15:6 Abafilisiti babajije uwakoze ibyo
Judges15:7 Samusoni arababwira ati: “Ubwo mubigenje mutyo
Judges15:8 Nuko abatera arakaye cyane yica benshi muri bo
Judges15:9 Abafilisiti barazamuka
Judges15:10 Abayuda barababaza bati: “Ni iki gitumye mudutera?” Barabasubiza bati: “Tuje gufata Samusoni kugira ngo tumwitūre ibyo yadukoreye.”
Judges15:11 Nuko Abayuda bakoranya abantu ibihumbi bitatu
Judges15:12 Baramubwira bati: “Tuzanywe hano no kukuboha
Judges15:13 Baramusubiza bati: “Humura ntituri bukwice
Judges15:14 Bamugejeje i Lehi
Judges15:15 Abona igufwa ry'urwasaya rw'indogobe yamaze gupfa
Judges15:16 Nuko Samusoni ariyamirira ati: “Nafashe urwasaya rw'indogobe nica abantu igihumbi
Judges15:17 Amaze kuvuga atyo ajugunya rwa rwasaya
Judges15:18 Samusoni agira inyota cyane maze atabaza Uhoraho agira ati: “Nyagasani
Judges15:19 Nuko Imana isatura urutare i Lehi isōko iradudubiza
Judges15:20 Samusoni yamaze imyaka makumyabiri ari umurengezi w'Abisiraheli
Judges16:1 Umunsi umwe Samusoni ajya i Gaza ahabona umugore w'indaya
Judges16:2 Abantu b'i Gaza bumvise ko Samusoni ahari
Judges16:3 Nyamara Samusoni ntiyategereje ko bucya
Judges16:4 Ikindi gihe Samusoni abenguka umugore witwa Delila
Judges16:5 Abategetsi b'Abafilisiti basanga uwo mugore baramubwira bati: “Oshyoshya Samusoni umubaze aho akura imbaraga ze nyinshi
Judges16:6 Nuko Delila abwira Samusoni ati: “Ese ntiwambwira aho ukura imbaraga zawe nyinshi
Judges16:7 Samusoni aramusubiza ati: “Bambohesheje injishi nshya ndwi z'umuheto zitigeze zanikwa
Judges16:8 Nuko abategetsi b'Abafilisiti bazanira Delila injishi nshya ndwi z'umuheto zitigeze zanikwa
Judges16:9 Yari yahishe abantu mu kindi cyumba maze aravuga ati: “Wapfa Samusoni we
Judges16:10 Delila abwira Samusoni ati: “Wankinishije rwose urambeshya
Judges16:11 Samusoni aramusubiza ati: “Bambohesheje imigozi mishya itarigeze ikoreshwa
Judges16:12 Delila ahisha abantu mu kindi cyumba
Judges16:13 Delila abwira Samusoni ati: “Na n'ubu uracyankinisha kandi ukambeshya! Noneho mbwira uburyo umuntu yakuboha.” Samusoni aramusubiza ati: “Uwagabanya imisatsi yanjye mo imigabane irindwi akayibohekanya
Judges16:14 Samusoni asinziriye Delila abigenza atyo
Judges16:15 Nuko Delila aramubwira ati: “Kuki umbeshya ngo urankunda kandi undyarya? Ubonye ngo urankinisha incuro eshatu zose utambwira aho ukura imbaraga zawe nyinshi!”
Judges16:16 Delila yahozaga Samusoni ku nkeke amubaza atyo
Judges16:17 Nuko Samusoni amumenera ibanga ati: “Ntabwo nigeze nogoshwa na rimwe
Judges16:18 Delila abonye ko amumeneye ibanga
Judges16:19 Delila abikīrira Samusoni ku bibero bye
Judges16:20 Nuko aravuga ati: “Wapfa Samusoni we
Judges16:21 Abafilisiti baramufata
Judges16:22 Ariko umusatsi we wongeye kumera.
Judges16:23 Nuko abategetsi b'Abafilisiti baraterana
Judges16:24 Abantu bari babonye Samusoni bahimbaza imana yabo bavuga bati: “Imana yacu yadushoboje gutsinda umwanzi wari wayogoje igihugu cyacu
Judges16:25 Kubera umunezero abari mu ngoro ya Dagoni bari bafite
Judges16:26 Samusoni abwira umuhungu wari umurandase ati: “Ngeza ku nkingi z'ingenzi zishyigikiye iyi ngoro maze nzegamire nduhuke.”
Judges16:27 Iyo ngoro yari yuzuyemo abagabo n'abagore
Judges16:28 Samusoni atakambira Uhoraho ati: “Nyagasani Uhoraho
Judges16:29 Nuko Samusoni afata inkingi ebyiri zo hagati zari zishyigikiye iyo ngoro
Judges16:30 maze aravuga ati: “Nibura reka mpfane n'aba Bafilisiti!” Hanyuma asunika izo nkingi n'imbaraga ze zose
Judges16:31 Nuko abavandimwe be na bene wabo baramanuka baza gutwara umurambo we. Barawuzamukana bawuhamba hamwe na se Manowa
Judges17:1 Habayeho umuntu witwaga Mika wari utuye mu misozi y'Abefurayimu.
Judges17:2 Nyina abura ibikoroto igihumbi n'ijana by'ifeza
Judges17:3 Nuko Mika amusubiza ibyo bikoroto igihumbi n'ijana by'ifeza
Judges17:4 Muri za feza yamushubije
Judges17:5 Mika yari afite ingoro yasengeragamo
Judges17:6 Muri icyo gihe Abisiraheli nta mwami bari bafite
Judges17:7 Hari umusore w'Umulevi wari utuye i Betelehemu mu Buyuda
Judges17:8 arahava ajya kwishakira ahandi yatura. Aza kugera kwa Mika mu misozi y'Abefurayimu.
Judges17:9 Mika aramubaza ati: “Uraturuka he?” Aramusubiza ati: “Ndi Umulevi nturutse i Betelehemu mu Buyuda
Judges17:10 Mika aramubwira ati: “Igumire hano
Judges17:11 Uwo musore w'Umulevi yemera kuhaguma
Judges17:12 amwegurira umurimo w'ubutambyi maze akajya yibera iwe.
Judges17:13 Nuko Mika aravuga ati: “Ubu noneho Uhoraho azangirira neza
Judges18:1 Muri icyo gihe Abisiraheli nta mwami bari bafite. Muri icyo gihe kandi
Judges18:2 Nuko Abadani batoranya mu mazu yabo yose abagabo batanu b'intwari
Judges18:3 Bakiri aho baza kumva imvugo ya wa musore w'Umulevi
Judges18:4 Arabasubiza ati: “Mika yankoreye byinshi
Judges18:5 Baramubwira bati: “Tubarize Imana niba urugendo turimo ruzatubera ruhire.”
Judges18:6 Uwo mutambyi arabasubiza ati: “Nimugende amahoro
Judges18:7 Nuko abo bagabo batanu bakomeza urugendo bagera mu mujyi wa Layishi
Judges18:8 Ba bagabo batanu basubiye i Sora na Eshitawoli
Judges18:9 Barabasubiza bati: “Igihugu twagenzuye twasanzemo intara nziza cyane. None muracyategereje iki? Nimuhaguruke
Judges18:10 Nimugerayo muzirebera ukuntu ari hagari
Judges18:11 Nuko abagabo magana atandatu bo mu muryango wa Dani bafata intwaro
Judges18:12 Barazamuka bakambika mu burengerazuba bwa Kiriyati-Yeyarimu mu ntara y'u Buyuda. Aho hantu hitwa Mahane-Dani kugeza n'ubu.
Judges18:13 Bahavuye bagera kwa Mika mu misozi y'Abefurayimu.
Judges18:14 Ba bagabo batanu bari bagiye gutata intara ya Layishi
Judges18:15 Abo bagabo batanu bahita binjira mu nzu ya wa musore w'Umulevi bamubaza amakuru
Judges18:16 naho ba bandi magana atandatu bari bahagaze ku irembo bitwaje intwaro.
Judges18:17 Wa Mulevi w'umutambyi arahabasanga
Judges18:18 Bakibisahura uwo mutambyi arababaza ati: “Murakora ibiki?”
Judges18:19 Baramusubiza bati: “Ceceka kandi uruce urumire! Ahubwo ngwino twijyanire
Judges18:20 Ibyo byashimishije uwo mutambyi
Judges18:21 Nuko bashyira nzira baragenda
Judges18:22 Bamaze kugera kure
Judges18:23 bavuza induru
Judges18:24 Mika arabasubiza ati: “Mwansahuye imana niremeye
Judges18:25 Abadani baramubwira bati: “Ntiwongere gukopfora! Aba bantu barubiye
Judges18:26 Mika abonye ko bamurusha amaboko arahindukira yisubirira iwe
Judges18:27 bajyanye wa mutambyi n'ibyo basahuye kwa Mika. Nuko batera umujyi wa Layishi wari utuwe n'abantu biberagaho mu mahoro no mu mutekano
Judges18:28 Abanyalayishi ntibabonye uwo kubatabara
Judges18:29 bawitirira sekuruza wabo Dani mwene Yakobo
Judges18:30 Abadani bahatereka ya shusho ibajwe basahuye kwa Mika
Judges18:31 Abadani bakomeje gusenga ya shusho Mika yibarije
Judges19:1 Muri icyo gihe Abisiraheli nta mwami bari bafite. Hari Umulevi wari utuye ahantu hitaruye mu misozi y'Abefurayimu
Judges19:2 Uwo mugore aza guhemukira umugabo arasambana
Judges19:3 Nuko umugabo we ajyana n'umugaragu we n'indogobe ebyiri
Judges19:4 Aramwinginga ngo asibire
Judges19:5 Mu gitondo cy'umunsi wa kane bazinduka bitegura gutaha. Nuko se w'uwo mugore abwira umukwe we ati: “Ubanze ugire icyo ufungura mubone kugenda.”
Judges19:6 Nuko bombi baricara bararya baranywa. Sebukwe aramubwira ati: “Ndakwinginze ongera urare hano iri joro
Judges19:7 Umulevi ahagurutse kugira ngo agende sebukwe akomeza kumwinginga
Judges19:8 Mu gitondo cy'umunsi wa gatanu
Judges19:9 Igihe Umulevi n'inshoreke ye n'umugaragu we bahagurutse ngo batahe
Judges19:10 Ariko noneho Umulevi ntiyemera kurara
Judges19:11 Bahageze bugorobye
Judges19:12 Shebuja aramusubiza ati: “Ntabwo twacumbika mu mujyi w'abatari Abisiraheli
Judges19:13 turareyo cyangwa dukomeze tujye i Rama.”
Judges19:14 Nuko barakomeza baragenda
Judges19:15 Bajya kurara i Gibeya
Judges19:16 Muri uwo mwanya babona umusaza uhinguye abahingutseho. Nubwo uwo musaza yari atuye mu mujyi w'Ababenyamini
Judges19:17 Uwo musaza abonye abo bantu bicaye aho
Judges19:18 Umulevi aramusubiza ati: “Turava i Betelehemu mu Buyuda
Judges19:19 nyamara kandi twifitiye icyarire n'ibyokurya by'indogobe zacu
Judges19:20 Uwo musaza aramusubiza ati: “Muhumure
Judges19:21 Nuko abajyana iwe agaburira indogobe zabo
Judges19:22 Igihe bari biyicariye aho banezerewe
Judges19:23 Nyir'urugo arasohoka arababwira ati: “Bavandimwe
Judges19:24 Ahubwo mureke mbahe umukobwa wanjye w'isugi n'inshoreke y'uwo mugabo mubakoreho ibyo mushaka
Judges19:25 Ariko abo bagabo barinangira. Umulevi abibonye atyo afata umugore we amusunikira hanze
Judges19:26 Mu museke
Judges19:27 Umugabo we abyutse kugira ngo akomeze urugendo
Judges19:28 Umugabo we aramubwira ati: “Byuka tugende!” Ariko ntiyagira icyo amusubiza kuko yari yapfuye. Nuko uwo Mulevi ashyira umurambo ku ndogobe arataha.
Judges19:29 Ageze iwe afata icyuma
Judges19:30 Ababibonye bose baravuga bati: “Uhereye igihe Abisiraheli baviriye mu Misiri
Judges20:1 Abisiraheli bose bahuza umugambi bateranira imbere y'Inzu y'Uhoraho i Misipa. Bari baturutse mu gihugu cyose
Judges20:2 Abayobozi bose b'imiryango y'Abisiraheli bari muri iryo koraniro ry'ubwoko bw'Imana. Bose bari abantu ibihumbi magana ane biteguye kujya ku rugamba.
Judges20:3 Ababenyamini bumva ko Abisiraheli bateraniye i Misipa. Nuko Abisiraheli baravuga bati: “Ngaho nimutubwire iby'ayo marorerwa!”
Judges20:4 Nuko wa Mulevi
Judges20:5 nuko abagabo baho barantera. Baje nijoro bagota inzu narimo bashaka kunyica
Judges20:6 Nuko umurambo wayo nywucamo imigabane
Judges20:7 Dore mwese muri Abisiraheli
Judges20:8 Abantu bose bahagurukira icyarimwe baravuga bati: “Nta muntu n'umwe muri twe uri busubire iwe
Judges20:9 ahubwo tugiye gukoresha ubufindo turebe uko tuzatera Gibeya.
Judges20:10 Mu miryango yose y'Abisiraheli
Judges20:11 Nuko Abisiraheli bose bahuza umugambi wo gutera uwo mujyi.
Judges20:12 Imiryango yose y'Abisiraheli yohereza intumwa ku Babenyamini
Judges20:13 Ngaho nimuduhe abo bagabo b'ibirara b'i Gibeya tubice
Judges20:14 ahubwo bava mu mijyi yabo bateranira i Gibeya kugira ngo bajye kurwanya Abisiraheli.
Judges20:15 Ababenyamini bose bavuye muri iyo mijyi
Judges20:16 Muri izo ngabo zose harimo magana arindwi b'indobanure batwariraga imoso
Judges20:17 Abandi Bisiraheli bari bakoranyije ingabo ibihumbi magana ane zimenyereye intambara.
Judges20:18 Nuko Abisiraheli barahaguruka bajya i Beteli kubaza Imana bati: “Ni uwuhe muryango uzabanza gutera Ababenyamini?” Uhoraho arabasubiza ati: “Ni umuryango wa Yuda.”
Judges20:19 Bukeye Abisiraheli barahaguruka
Judges20:20 Baragenda bagota umujyi batera Ababenyamini.
Judges20:21 Nuko Ababenyamini basohoka muri uwo mujyi barwanya Abisiraheli
Judges20:22 Abisiraheli batakambiye Uhoraho bararira bageza nimugoroba
Judges20:23 
Judges20:24 batera Ababenyamini.
Judges20:25 Nuko Ababenyamini basohoka mu mujyi wa Gibeya
Judges20:26 Hanyuma ingabo zose z'Abisiraheli zirazamuka zijya ku Nzu y'Uhoraho i Beteli. Zirahicara
Judges20:27 Abisiraheli bagisha Uhoraho inama
Judges20:28 Icyo gihe Finehasi mwene Eleyazari akaba n'umwuzukuru wa Aroni
Judges20:29 Nuko Abisiraheli bubikīrira ahazengurutse Gibeya.
Judges20:30 Ku munsi wa gatatu bongera gufata ibirindiro nk'ibyo ku minsi ya mbere.
Judges20:31 Ababenyamini barasohoka bajya kurwana
Judges20:32 Ababenyamini baribwira bati: “Twongeye kubatsinda!” Nyamara Abisiraheli bo bari bafashe umugambi wo guhunga
Judges20:33 Nuko Abisiraheli ibihumbi icumi b'indobanure bari bubikīriye mu giteme cy'i Geba
Judges20:34 
Judges20:35 Uwo munsi Uhoraho aha Abisiraheli gutsinda Ababenyamini
Judges20:36 Ubwo ni bwo Ababenyamini babonye ko batsinzwe. Impamvu Abisiraheli babaye nk'abahunga
Judges20:37 Abo ngabo bahise biroha mu mujyi bawugwa gitumo
Judges20:38 Icyo gitero cyahise gitwika umujyi umwotsi uratumbagira
Judges20:39 Icyo gihe Ababenyamini bari bamaze kwica Abisiraheli nka mirongo itatu
Judges20:40 Umwotsi wakomeje gutumbagira hejuru ya Gibeya umeze nk'igicu
Judges20:41 Nuko Abisiraheli barabarwanya
Judges20:42 Nuko bahunga berekeje ahantu hadatuwe kuko abaturage bo mu mijyi babicaga umugenda
Judges20:43 Zarabatangatanze zibabuza amahwemo
Judges20:44 Haguye Ababenyamini ibihumbi cumi n'umunani b'intwari.
Judges20:45 Abacitse ku icumu bahunga bagana ahantu hadatuwe ku rutare rwa Rimoni
Judges20:46 Ababenyamini bishwe uwo munsi bari ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu
Judges20:47 Icyakora Ababenyamini magana atandatu bacitse ku icumu bahungira ahantu hadatuwe ku rutare rwa Rimoni
Judges20:48 Abisiraheli bahindukirana Ababenyamini basigaye
Judges21:1 Igihe Abisiraheli bari bateraniye i Misipa
Judges21:2 Nuko bajya ku Nzu y'Imana i Beteli
Judges21:3 bagatakamba bati: “Uhoraho Mana y'Abisiraheli
Judges21:4 Bukeye barazinduka bubaka urutambiro
Judges21:5 Nuko baravuga bati: “Mbere y'uko duteranira ku Nzu y'Uhoraho i Misipa
Judges21:6 Abisiraheli bibajije batyo kuko bari bababajwe n'abavandimwe babo b'Ababenyamini
Judges21:7 Twakora iki kugira ngo Ababenyamini barokotse babone abageni
Judges21:8 Ni cyo cyatumye bibaza bati: “Ni uwuhe muryango w'Abisiraheli utaje ku Nzu y'Uhoraho i Misipa?” Basanga ari nta muntu w'i Yabeshi yo muri Gileyadi waje muri iryo koraniro.
Judges21:9 Nuko barebye no mu ngabo basanga koko nta waturutse i Yabeshi y'i Gileyadi.
Judges21:10 Maze ikoraniro ryose ryohereza ingabo z'intwari ibihumbi cumi na bibiri
Judges21:11 uretse abakobwa b'isugi.”
Judges21:12 Bageze i Yabeshi y'i Gileyadi
Judges21:13 Nuko ikoraniro ryose ry'Abisiraheli rituma ku Babenyamini bari ku rutare rwa Rimoni kugira ngo babahumurize.
Judges21:14 Nuko Ababenyamini bava mu buhungiro
Judges21:15 Abisiraheli bababazwa n'ibyabaye ku Babenyamini
Judges21:16 Abakuru b'iryo koraniro baravugana bati: “Twakora iki kugira ngo Ababenyamini basigaye babone abagore
Judges21:17 Tugomba gucikūra Ababenyamini basigaye
Judges21:18 Nyamara ntidushobora kubashyingira abakobwa bacu
Judges21:19 Ariko baza kwibuka ko mu gihe gito bazizihiza iminsi mikuru y'Uhoraho ibera i Shilo buri mwaka. Shilo yari mu majyaruguru ya Beteli
Judges21:20 Nuko babwira abo Babenyamini bati: “Muzagende mwihishe mu mizabibu
Judges21:21 maze nimubona abakobwa b'i Shilo basohotse bajya kubyina
Judges21:22 Ba se b'abo bakobwa cyangwa basaza babo nibaza kubaturegera
Judges21:23 Nuko Ababenyamini babigenza batyo
Judges21:24 Birangiye abandi Bisiraheli barataha
Judges21:25 Muri icyo gihe Abisiraheli nta mwami bari bafite
Ruth1:1 Igihe Abisiraheli bategekwaga n'abacamanza
Ruth1:2 Uwo mugabo yitwaga Elimeleki
Ruth1:3 Elimeleki arapfa
Ruth1:4 Abo bahungu barongora abakobwa b'Abamowabukazi. Umwe yitwaga Orupa
Ruth1:5 Mahiloni na Kiliyoni na bo barapfa. Nawomi asigara ari umupfakazi n'incike.
Ruth1:6 Nawomi akiri i Mowabu amenya ko Uhoraho yitaye ku bantu be
Ruth1:7 Ahagurukana na bo bombi
Ruth1:8 Nawomi abwira abakazana be ati: “Bana banjye
Ruth1:9 Mwembi Uhoraho abahe kuzabona abandi bagabo
Ruth1:10 Baramubwira bati: “Ashwi da! Ntitugusiga ahubwo turajyana iwanyu.”
Ruth1:11 Nawomi yongera kubabwira ati: “Bana banjye
Ruth1:12 Nimundeke mwisubirire iwanyu. Dore ndakecuye cyane
Ruth1:13 mbese mwategereza igihe bazakurira ntimushake abandi bagabo? Oya
Ruth1:14 Abakazana be bombi bongera kurira cyane
Ruth1:15 Nawomi abwira Ruti ati: “Dore mukeba wawe asubiye muri bene wabo no ku mana zabo. Nawe mukurikire usubire iwanyu.”
Ruth1:16 Ariko Ruti aramusubiza ati: “Wimpatira kugusiga kugira ngo nsubire iwacu. Aho uzajya ni ho nzajya
Ruth1:17 Aho uzagwa ni ho nzagwa bahampambe. Nihagira ikindi kidutandukanya kitari urupfu
Ruth1:18 Nawomi abonye ko Ruti yiyemeje kujyana na we
Ruth1:19 Bombi barajyana bagerana i Betelehemu. Bagezeyo batera abo mu mujyi bose amatsiko. Abagore barabazanya bati: “Niko ye
Ruth1:20 Nawomi arababwira ati: “Ntimukongere kunyita Nawomi - risobanurwa ngo Nyiramahirwe - ahubwo mujye munyita Mara - risobanurwa ngo Nyirashavu - kuko Imana nyir'ububasha yanteye ishavu ryinshi.
Ruth1:21 Navuye ino ntunganiwe
Ruth1:22 Nguko uko Nawomi yavuye mu gihugu cy'i Mowabu akagaruka iwabo
Ruth2:1 Elimeleki umugabo wa Nawomi yari afite mwene wabo witwaga Bowazi. Yari umukungu kandi abantu baramwemeraga.
Ruth2:2 Nuko Umumowabukazi Ruti abwira Nawomi ati: “Reka njye kwihumbira amahundo y'ingano mu murima w'umugiraneza uri bubinyemerere.” Nawomi aramusubiza ati: “Mwana wanjye
Ruth2:3 Nuko Ruti ajya guhumba ingano aho abakozi bamaze gusarura. Iby'amahirwe
Ruth2:4 Hashize umwanya
Ruth2:5 Bowazi abaza uwari uyoboye abasaruzi ati: “Uriya mugore ni uwa nde?”
Ruth2:6 Na we aramusubiza ati: “Ni wa Mumowabukazi wazanye na Nawomi avuye i Mowabu.
Ruth2:7 Yansabye uruhushya rwo kwihumbira amahundo yagiye asigara hagati y'imiba. Yahereye mu gitondo ahumba
Ruth2:8 Bowazi amaze gusuhuza Ruti
Ruth2:9 Ujye witegereza neza umurima abakozi basaruramo
Ruth2:10 Nuko Ruti yikubita imbere ya Bowazi
Ruth2:11 Bowazi aramusubiza ati: “Bantekerereje ibyo wagiriye nyokobukwe byose kuva umugabo wawe yapfa. Namenye ko wasize so na nyoko uva mu gihugu cyanyu kavukire
Ruth2:12 Uhoraho akwiture ibyo wakoze byose. Koko rero Uhoraho wisunze
Ruth2:13 Ruti asubiza Bowazi ati: “Mubyeyi
Ruth2:14 Igihe cyo gufungura kigeze
Ruth2:15 Hanyuma Ruti arahaguruka asubira guhumba. Bowazi abwira abakozi be ati: “Mumureke ahumbe no hagati y'imiba y'ingano
Ruth2:16 Ahubwo amahundo amwe mujye muyasohorora mu miba muyasige inyuma
Ruth2:17 Nuko Ruti ahumba mu kwa Bowazi ageza nimugoroba. Ahuye ingano yahumbye zivamo nk'ibiro icumi.
Ruth2:18 Arazikorera azitahana mu mujyi
Ruth2:19 Nawomi abaza Ruti ati: “Uyu munsi wahumbye mu kwa nde? Wakoze hehe? Imana ihe umugisha uwo muntu wakugiriye neza.” Ruti abwira nyirabukwe ati: “Uyu munsi nahumbye mu murima w'umugabo witwa Bowazi.”
Ruth2:20 Nawomi abwira umukazana we ati: “Uwo mugabo aragahirwa n'Uhoraho udahwema kugirira neza ba nyakwigendera
Ruth2:21 Umumowabukazi Ruti abwira nyirabukwe ati: “Ndetse yambwiye kugumana n'abakozi be kugira ngo njye nihumbira aho bamaze gusarura
Ruth2:22 Nawomi abwira Ruti umukazana we ati: “Mwana wanjye
Ruth2:23 Ruti agumana n'abaja ba Bowazi akajya ahumba aho bakoraga
Ruth3:1 Muri iyo minsi Nawomi abwira umukazana we Ruti ati: “Mwana wanjye
Ruth3:2 Wa mugabo witwa Bowazi wakwemereraga gukorana n'abaja be
Ruth3:3 None iyuhagire witere amarashi
Ruth3:4 Najya kuryama uze kwitegereza aho aryamye
Ruth3:5 Ruti asubiza nyirabukwe ati: “Ibyo umbwiye byose ndabikora.”
Ruth3:6 Ruti ajya ku mbuga
Ruth3:7 Bowazi amaze kurya no kunywa yumva yishimye
Ruth3:8 Mu gicuku Bowazi ashigukira hejuru. Ngo yeguke
Ruth3:9 Bowazi aramubaza ati: “Yewe! Uri nde?” Ruti aramusubiza ati: “Ndi umuja wawe Ruti. Ndakwinginze nyorosa igishura cyawe unyijyanire
Ruth3:10 Bowazi aramusubiza ati: “Ruti
Ruth3:11 None rero ntuhangayike
Ruth3:12 Ni iby'ukuri koko mfite uburenganzira bwo kugucyura ngacikura nyakwigendera. Icyakora hari undi mugabo ufitanye na we isano ya bugufi
Ruth3:13 None rara hano
Ruth3:14 Nuko Ruti aryama hafi y'ibirenge bya Bowazi. Mu kabwibwi
Ruth3:15 Bowazi abwira Ruti ati: “Ikuremo umwambaro wifubitse maze uwurambure.” Ruti awikuramo arawurambura
Ruth3:16 Ruti na we ajya kwa nyirabukwe. Nyirabukwe aramubaza ati: “Mbese ni wowe
Ruth3:17 Kandi yungamo ati: “Ni na we wampaye izi ngano za bushoki
Ruth3:18 Nawomi aramubwira ati: “Mwana wanjye
Ruth4:1 Bowazi ajya mu mujyi aho bakemuriraga ibibazo
Ruth4:2 Bowazi ahamagara abagabo icumi bo mu bakuru b'umujyi
Ruth4:3 Bowazi abwira wa mugabo ati: “Uzi ko Nawomi yavuye mu gihugu cy'i Mowabu
Ruth4:4 Nkaba nagira ngo mbikumenyeshe
Ruth4:5 Bowazi abwira uwo mugabo ati: “Ubwo wemeye gushingwa isambu ya Nawomi n'Umumowabukazi Ruti
Ruth4:6 Uwo mugabo asubiza Bowazi ati: “Niba ari ibyo sinkibyemeye
Ruth4:7 Kera mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
Ruth4:8 Nuko wa mugabo abwira Bowazi ati: “Ibyo ube ari wowe ubishingwa.” Maze akuramo urukweto rwe ararumuha.
Ruth4:9 Nuko Bowazi abwira ba bakuru na rubanda bari aho ati: “Uyu munsi mbatanze ho abagabo ko nemeye ko Nawomi anshinga ibya Elimeleki n'abahungu be
Ruth4:10 Byongeye kandi
Ruth4:11 Abakuru b'umujyi na rubanda bari aho baramusubiza bati: “Yee
Ruth4:12 Icyaduha urubyaro Uhoraho azaguha kuri uwo mugore ukiri inkumi rukagwira
Ruth4:13 Nuko Bowazi acyura Ruti
Ruth4:14 Abagore babwira Nawomi bati: “Uhoraho nasingizwe
Ruth4:15 Uwo mwana azatuma ubuzima bwawe bugarura itoto
Ruth4:16 Nawomi aterura uwo mwana amushyira mu gituza cye
Ruth4:17 Abagore baturanye na Nawomi bakajya bavuga bati: “Nawomi yabonye akuzukuru.” Uwo mwana bamwita Obedi. Obedi uwo ni we wabyaye Yese
Ruth4:18 Uru ni rwo rubyaro rwa Perēsi: Perēsi yabyaye Hesironi
Ruth4:19 Hesironi abyara Ramu
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu abyara Nahasoni
Ruth4:21 Salumoni abyara Bowazi
Ruth4:22 Obedi abyara Yese
1Samuel1:1 I Rama y'Abasufu mu misozi y'Abefurayimu
1Samuel1:2 Yari afite abagore babiri
1Samuel1:3 Buri mwaka Elikana yajyaga i Shilo gusenga Uhoraho Nyiringabo
1Samuel1:4 Uko Elikana yaturaga igitambo cy'umusangiro
1Samuel1:5 ariko Hana akamuha umugabane w'akarusho kuko yari inkundwakazi
1Samuel1:6 Mukeba we Penina yahoraga amukwena kugira ngo amubabaze
1Samuel1:7 Buri mwaka uko bajyaga ku Nzu y'Uhoraho
1Samuel1:8 Umugabo we Elikana akamubaza ati: “Urarizwa n'iki? Ni kuki wanga kurya? Ni iki kikubabaje? Mbese sinkurutira abahungu icumi?”
1Samuel1:9 Umunsi umwe bari i Shilo bamaze gufungura
1Samuel1:10 Hana yari afite agahinda kenshi
1Samuel1:11 Nuko ahiga umuhigo agira ati: “Uhoraho Nyiringabo
1Samuel1:12 Hana amara umwanya muremure asenga Uhoraho. Eli yaramwitegerezaga
1Samuel1:13 akabona iminwa inyeganyega
1Samuel1:14 ni ko kumubwira ati: “Uzakomeza gusinda kugeza ryari? Waretse inzoga!”
1Samuel1:15 Hana aramusubiza ati: “Oya nyakubahwa
1Samuel1:16 Ishavu n'agahinda byandenze
1Samuel1:17 Eli aramubwira ati: “Genda amahoro
1Samuel1:18 Hana na we ati: “Nyakubahwa
1Samuel1:19 Bukeye Elikana n'urugo rwe bazinduka bajya kuramya Uhoraho
1Samuel1:20 Hana asama inda
1Samuel1:21 Uwo mwaka Elikana asubira i Shilo hamwe n'urugo rwe
1Samuel1:22 Icyakora Hana ntiyajyanye n'umugabo we
1Samuel1:23 Elikana aramusubiza ati: “Nta cyo bitwaye
1Samuel1:24 Amaze kumucutsa
1Samuel1:25 Nuko batamba cya kimasa
1Samuel1:26 Hana ni ko kubwira Eli ati: “Nyakubahwa
1Samuel1:27 Uyu mwana ni we nasabaga
1Samuel1:28 Nanjye rero mutuye Uhoraho
1Samuel2:1 Hana asenga agira ati: “Umutima wanjye wasābwe n'ibyishimo kubera Uhoraho
1Samuel2:2 Uhoraho
1Samuel2:3 “Ntimugasukiranye amagambo y'ubwirasi
1Samuel2:4 Imiheto y'intwari iravunika
1Samuel2:5 Abari barariye bagahaga ubu barashaka aho baca incuro
1Samuel2:6 Uhoraho arica kandi akabeshaho
1Samuel2:7 Uhoraho atanga ubukene n'ubukire
1Samuel2:8 Akura umunyantegenke mu mukungugu
1Samuel2:9 Uhoraho arinda abamwubaha
1Samuel2:10 Uhoraho azarimbura abanzi be
1Samuel2:11 Hanyuma Elikana asubira iwe i Rama
1Samuel2:12 Abahungu ba Eli bari abapfayongo
1Samuel2:13 no ku byo abatambyi bagombaga gukorera rubanda. Iyo umuntu yaturaga igitambo
1Samuel2:14 akakijomba mu ngunguru cyangwa mu isafuriya
1Samuel2:15 Ndetse umutambyi ataranatwika urugimbu rw'igitambo
1Samuel2:16 Iyo undi yamusubizaga ati: “Reka babanze batwike urugimbu
1Samuel2:17 Icyo cyaha cya bene Eli cyari gikomeye cyane ku Uhoraho
1Samuel2:18 Umwana Samweli yiyambariraga ikanzu y'umweru
1Samuel2:19 Uko umwaka utashye
1Samuel2:20 Eli yasabiraga umugisha Elikana n'umugore we
1Samuel2:21 Nuko Uhoraho agirira Hana impuhwe
1Samuel2:22 Umutambyi Eli yari ageze mu zabukuru. Amenye uko abahungu be bitwara mu Bisiraheli
1Samuel2:23 arababwira ati: “Ibyo nabumviseho ni ibiki? Abantu bose bavuga ko mwifata nabi!
1Samuel2:24 Bana banjye
1Samuel2:25 Iyo umuntu akoreye undi ikosa
1Samuel2:26 Naho umwana Samweli yakomezaga gukura neza
1Samuel2:27 Umuhanuzi asanga Eli aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Nimenyesheje ba sokuruza igihe bari mu Misiri bakorera umwami waho.
1Samuel2:28 Mu miryango yose y'Abisiraheli sokuruza Aroni ni we nahisemo ngo ambere umutambyi
1Samuel2:29 None se
1Samuel2:30 Jyewe Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli nari nasezeranyije urugo rwawe ndetse n'abazagukomokaho bose ko muzambera abatambyi iteka ryose
1Samuel2:31 Bidatinze
1Samuel2:32 Abisiraheli bazagubwa neza
1Samuel2:33 Abenshi mu muryango wawe bazakenyuka
1Samuel2:34 Ikizabikwemeza ni uko abahungu bawe bombi
1Samuel2:35 Nzitoranyiriza umutambyi w'umunyamurava uzakora ibyo nifuza. Nzamutonesha we n'abazamukomokaho
1Samuel2:36 Uzaba yararokotse mu bazagukomokaho
1Samuel3:1 Umwana Samweli yakoreraga Uhoraho atōzwa na Eli. Muri icyo gihe
1Samuel3:2 Umutambyi Eli yari atangiye guhuma
1Samuel3:3 Samweli we yari yiryamiye mu Nzu y'Uhoraho hafi y'Isanduku y'Imana. Igihe itara ryo mu Nzu y'Imana ryari ritarazima
1Samuel3:4 Uhoraho ahamagara Samweli
1Samuel3:5 Samweli yiruka asanga Eli
1Samuel3:6 Uhoraho yongera guhamagara Samweli. Samweli arabyuka asanga Eli
1Samuel3:7 Samweli yari ataramenya Uhoraho
1Samuel3:8 Uhoraho ahamagara Samweli ubwa gatatu
1Samuel3:9 Ni ko kumubwira ati: “Genda uryame
1Samuel3:10 Uhoraho araza yongera guhamagara nka mbere ati: “Samweli
1Samuel3:11 Nuko Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Hari icyo ngiye gukora mu Bisiraheli
1Samuel3:12 Icyo gihe umuryango wa Eli nzawuteza ibyago byose navuze nta na kimwe nsize inyuma.
1Samuel3:13 Namumenyesheje ko nzarimbura umuryango we burundu. Koko rero
1Samuel3:14 Ni yo mpamvu narahiriye umuryango wa Eli
1Samuel3:15 Nuko Samweli akomeza kuryama ageza mu gitondo
1Samuel3:16 Eli aramuhamagara ati: “Samweli mwana wanjye.” Samweli aritaba ati: “Karame!”
1Samuel3:17 Eli ati: “Imana yakubwiye iki? Uramenye ntugire icyo umpisha. Nugira ijambo na rimwe umpisha mu byo yakubwiye
1Samuel3:18 Nuko Samweli amutekerereza byose nta cyo amuhishe. Eli ni ko kuvuga ati: “Ni Uhoraho
1Samuel3:19 Samweli akomeza gukura kandi Uhoraho yari kumwe na we
1Samuel3:20 Mu gihugu cyose cya Isiraheli
1Samuel3:21 Uhoraho yakomeje kwigaragariza i Shilo. Ni ho yihishuriraga Samweli kugira ngo amugezeho ijambo rye
1Samuel4:1 Samweli na we arigeze ku Bisiraheli bose. Umunsi umwe Abisiraheli bajya kurwanya Abafilisiti
1Samuel4:2 Nuko Abafilisiti batera Abisiraheli
1Samuel4:3 Abasigaye bageze mu nkambi
1Samuel4:4 Nuko bohereza abantu i Shilo bo kuzana Isanduku y'Isezerano ry'Uhoraho Nyiringabo
1Samuel4:5 Isanduku y'Isezerano ry'Uhoraho igeze mu nkambi
1Samuel4:6 Abafilisiti bumvise urwo rusaku
1Samuel4:7 bashya ubwoba maze barabwirana bati: “Imana yageze mu nkambi yabo
1Samuel4:8 Koko turashize! Ni nde uzaturokora ububasha bw'izo mana z'ibihangange? Ni zo zateje Abanyamisiri ibyago by'ishyano ryose mu butayu!
1Samuel4:9 Bafilisiti
1Samuel4:10 Abafilisiti bagaba igitero batsinda Abisiraheli
1Samuel4:11 Isanduku y'Imana Abafilisiti barayinyaga
1Samuel4:12 Uwo munsi umugabo w'Umubenyamini ava ku rugamba yiruka agera i Shilo
1Samuel4:13 Yahageze Eli yicaye ku ntebe ye ku muhanda aho yari ategerereje
1Samuel4:14 Eli yumvise iyo nduru arabaza ati: “Urwo rusaku ni urw'iki?” Wa mugabo yihutira kumenyesha Eli iyo nkuru.
1Samuel4:15 Icyo gihe Eli yari amaze imyaka mirongo cyenda n'umunani avutse
1Samuel4:16 Nuko uwo mugabo aramubwira ati: “Mvuye ku rugamba kandi naje mpunze.” Eli aramubaza ati: “Mwana wanjye se
1Samuel4:17 Iyo mbitsi irasubiza iti: “Abisiraheli bakubiswe incuro n'Abafilisiti
1Samuel4:18 Uwo mugabo yabaye akivuga Isanduku y'Imana
1Samuel4:19 Umukazana wa Eli ari we muka Finehasi
1Samuel4:20 Kubera ko yendaga gupfa
1Samuel4:21 Ariko yita uwo mwana Ikabodi agira ati: “Hehe n'ikuzo mu Bisiraheli!” Yamwise atyo kubera ko Isanduku y'Imana yari yanyazwe
1Samuel4:22 Nuko asamba avuga ati: “Hehe n'ikuzo mu Bisiraheli
1Samuel5:1 Abafilisiti rero bari banyaze Isanduku y'Imana
1Samuel5:2 mu ngoro y'ikigirwamana cyabo Dagoni

1Samuel5:4 Bukeye bwaho basanga ryongeye kugwa ryubamye
1Samuel5:5 Ni cyo gituma n'ubu abatambyi b'ikigirwamana Dagoni

1Samuel6:1 Isanduku y'Uhoraho yamaze amezi arindwi mu gihugu cy'Abafilisiti.
1Samuel6:2 Amaherezo Abafilisiti babaza abatambyi n'abapfumu babo bati: “Isanduku y'Uhoraho tuyigenze dute? Nimutubwire uburyo tuzayisubiza mu Bisiraheli.”

1Samuel6:4 Abafilisiti barabaza bati: “Ariko se ni ayahe maturo tugomba kuyitura” Abatambyi n'abapfumu barabasubiza bati: “Kubera ko icyorezo cyabateye mwebwe n'abategetsi banyu ari kimwe
1Samuel6:5 Muzacure rero amashusho y'ibibyimba byanyu n'ay'imbeba zayogoje igihugu cyanyu
1Samuel6:6 Ntimunangire imitima nk'uko Abanyamisiri n'umwami wabo babigenje. Mwibuke ukuntu iyo Mana yabagenje kugeza ubwo baretse Abisiraheli bakagenda.
1Samuel6:7 Ubu rero nimukore igare rishyashya
1Samuel6:8 Isanduku y'Uhoraho muzayishyire mu igare
1Samuel6:9 Muzitegereze
1Samuel6:10 Abafilisiti babigenza batyo
1Samuel6:11 Isanduku y'Uhoraho bayishyira mu igare hamwe na ka gasanduku karimo ya mashusho y'imbeba n'ay'ibibyimba.
1Samuel6:12 Za nka ziboneza inzira y'i Betishemeshi
1Samuel6:13 Abaturage b'uwo mujyi bari mu kibaya basarura ingano
1Samuel6:14 Igare rigeze mu murima wa Yozuwe w'i Betishemeshi rihagarara aho
1Samuel6:15 Abalevi bari bururukije Isanduku y'Uhoraho mu igare hamwe na ka gasanduku karimo ya mashusho y'izahabu

1Samuel6:17 Abafilisiti bari batuye Uhoraho amaturo yo kwiyunga na we
1Samuel6:18 Naho imbeba z'izahabu
1Samuel6:19 Abaturage b'i Betishemeshi barebye mu Isanduku y'Uhoraho

1Samuel9:5 Bageze mu ntara yitwa Sufu

1Samuel10:1 Nuko Samweli afata agacupa k'amavuta ayasuka ku mutwe wa Sawuli

1Samuel10:3 Nyuma urakomeza urugendo ugere ku giti cy'inganzamarumbu cy'i Taboru

1Samuel10:5 Nyuma y'ibyo uragera i Gibeya-Elohimu

1Samuel10:16 Sawuli aramusubiza ati: “Yatubwiye ko indogobe zabonetse.” Ariko ntiyamuhingukiriza ibyo Samweli yari yamubwiye byerekeye ubwami.
