1Samuel11:1 Nahashi umwami w'Abamoni agota umujyi wa Yabeshi yo muri Gileyadi. Abantu bose b'i Yabeshi baramubwira bati: “Reka tugirane amasezerano maze tukuyoboke.”
1Samuel11:2 Ariko Nahashi arabasubiza ati: “Amasezerano nayagirana namwe ari uko mwese mwemeye ko mbanogoramo amaso y'iburyo
1Samuel11:3 Abakuru b'i Yabeshi baramubwira bati: “Duhe iminsi irindwi twohereze intumwa mu gihugu cyose cy'Abisiraheli
1Samuel11:4 Intumwa zigeze i Gibeya
1Samuel11:5 Sawuli ahinguye aza ashoreye ibimasa bye
1Samuel11:6 Sawuli abyumvise Mwuka w'Imana amuzaho
1Samuel11:7 Afata ibimasa bibiri abicagaguramo ibice
1Samuel11:8 Sawuli akoranyiriza i Bezeki Abisiraheli ibihumbi magana atatu
1Samuel11:9 Abwira za ntumwa z'i Yabeshi y'i Gileyadi ati: “Nimugende mubwire ab'i Yabeshi ko ejo ku gasusuruko
1Samuel11:10 Nuko Abanyayabeshi babwira Abamoni bati: “Ejo tuzabayoboka mutugenze uko mwishakiye.”
1Samuel11:11 Sawuli agabanya ingabo mo imitwe itatu. Bujya gucya zitera inkambi y'Abamoni
1Samuel11:12 Nuko Abisiraheli babwira Samweli bati: “Ba bandi batashakaga ko Sawuli atubera umwami bari he? Nibabazane tubice!”
1Samuel11:13 Ariko Sawuli arababwira ati: “Uyu munsi nta muntu n'umwe uri bwicwe mu Bisiraheli
1Samuel11:14 Nuko Samweli abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimuze tujye i Gilugali gushimangira ingoma ya Sawuli.”
1Samuel11:15 Bose bajyayo bimikira Sawuli imbere y'Uhoraho
1Samuel12:1 Samweli abwira Abisiraheli bose ati: “Dore numvise ibyo mwambwiye byose maze mbimikira umwami.
1Samuel12:2 None rero nguyu umwami wanyu
1Samuel12:3 Mbese hari uwo nanyaze ikimasa cye cyangwa indogobe ye? Mbese hari uwo nariganyije cyangwa nakandamije? Ese hari uwo natse ruswa kugira ngo nirengagize ibikorwa bye bibi? Dore ndi hano
1Samuel12:4 Baramusubiza bati: “Ntabwo waturiganyije cyangwa ngo udukandamize
1Samuel12:5 Arongera arababwira ati: “Uyu munsi Uhoraho n'uyu mwami bambereye abagabo ko nta kintu na kimwe munshinja.” Abisiraheli baramusubiza bati: “Uhoraho yakubereye umugabo.”
1Samuel12:6 Nuko Samweli arababwira ati: “Uhoraho ni we watoranyije Musa na Aroni
1Samuel12:7 None rero nimuhaguruke mbashinje imbere y'Uhoraho mbibutsa ibyiza byose yabakoreye
1Samuel12:8 Nyuma y'aho Yakobo agereye mu Misiri
1Samuel12:9 Icyakora birengagije Uhoraho Imana yabo
1Samuel12:10 Barongera batakambira Uhoraho bagira bati: ‘Twaracumuye twimūra Uhoraho
1Samuel12:11 Nuko Uhoraho aboherereza Gideyoni na Bedani na Yefute nanjye Samweli
1Samuel12:12 Nyamara mubonye Nahashi umwami w'Abamoni yitegura kubatera
1Samuel12:13 “Dore umwami mwahisemo ari na we mwasabye
1Samuel12:14 Mujye mwubaha Uhoraho mumuyoboke
1Samuel12:15 Ariko nimutamwumvira ntimwite ku mabwiriza ye
1Samuel12:16 None ubu nimugume aho muri
1Samuel12:17 Dore turi mu mpeshyi mu isarura ry'ingano
1Samuel12:18 Nuko Samweli arasenga
1Samuel12:19 Nuko babwira Samweli bati: “Databuja
1Samuel12:20 Samweli arabasubiza ati: “Nimuhumure! Koko mwaracumuye
1Samuel12:21 Ntimukayoboke ibigirwamana kuko nta cyo byabungura
1Samuel12:22 Uhoraho ntazabatererana kuko yiyemeje kubagira ubwoko bwe
1Samuel12:23 Nanjye ntibikamvugweho ko nacumura ku Uhoraho ndeka kubasabira. Nzakomeza no kubereka imigenzereze itunganiye Uhoraho.
1Samuel12:24 Mujye mumwubaha mumukorere mu kuri n'umutima wanyu wose
1Samuel12:25 Ariko nimukomeza gukora ikibi muzarimbukana n'umwami wanyu.”
1Samuel13:1 Sawuli yimye ingoma amaze imyaka mirongo itatu avutse
1Samuel13:2 Sawuli yatoranyije ingabo ibihumbi bitatu mu Bisiraheli
1Samuel13:3 Yonatani atera Abafilisiti bari bakambitse i Geba
1Samuel13:4 Bose babyumvise baravuga bati: “Sawuli yateye inkambi y'Abafilisiti none baturakariye!” Sawuli ategeka ko ingabo zimusanga i Gilugali.
1Samuel13:5 Abafilisiti barakorana kugira ngo barwanye Abisiraheli. Bari bafite amagare y'intambara ibihumbi mirongo itatu
1Samuel13:6 Abisiraheli babonye ko bari mu kaga
1Samuel13:7 ndetse bamwe bambuka Yorodani bahungira mu Bagadi mu ntara ya Gileyadi. Sawuli yari acyibereye i Gilugali
1Samuel13:8 Sawuli ategereza iminsi irindwi Samweli yari yamubwiye
1Samuel13:9 Sawuli aravuga ati: “Nimunzanire itungo ry'igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
1Samuel13:10 Akimara kugitamba Samweli aba araje
1Samuel13:11 Samweli aramubaza ati: “Ibi wakoze ni ibiki?” Sawuli aramusubiza ati: “Nabonye ingabo zintorotse nawe utinze
1Samuel13:12 ndibwira nti: ‘Abafilisiti bagiye kuza i Gilugali bandwanye kandi ntaratakambira Uhoraho!’ Ni bwo niyemeje gutamba igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro.”
1Samuel13:13 Samweli abwira Sawuli ati: “Wakoze iby'ubucucu
1Samuel13:14 None ingoma yawe ntizamara kabiri. Uhoraho yitoranyirije undi muntu umunogeye amugira umuyobozi w'Abisiraheli
1Samuel13:15 Samweli ava i Gilugali
1Samuel13:16 Ubwo Sawuli n'umuhungu we Yonatani n'ingabo bari kumwe
1Samuel13:17 Igihe kimwe
1Samuel13:18 irindi ryerekeza i Betihoroni
1Samuel13:19 Mu gihugu cy'Abisiraheli ntihari hakiboneka umucuzi n'umwe
1Samuel13:20 Kugira ngo Abisiraheli batyarishe amasuka cyangwa intorezo cyangwa ibindi bikoresho
1Samuel13:21 Gutyarisha buri gikoresho bishyuraga igiceri.
1Samuel13:22 Bityo mu ngabo zose zari kumwe na Sawuli na Yonatani
1Samuel13:23 Nuko ingabo z'Abafilisiti zishinga ibirindiro ku nzira y'i Mikimasi.
1Samuel14:1 Umunsi umwe Yonatani mwene Sawuli abwira umusore wamutwazaga intwaro ati: “Ngwino tujye hakurya hariya aho Abafilisiti bashinze ibirindiro.” Ariko ntiyabibwira se.
1Samuel14:2 Ubwo Sawuli yari ari ku mupaka wa Gibeya
1Samuel14:3 Icyo gihe uwagishaga inama Uhoraho yari Ahiya mwene Ahitubu
1Samuel14:4 Yonatani yagombaga kunyura hagati y'ibitare bibiri birebire
1Samuel14:5 Kimwe cyari ahagana mu majyaruguru ahateganye n'i Mikimasi
1Samuel14:6 Nuko Yonatani abwira wa musore wamutwazaga intwaro ati: “Ngwino tujye mu nkambi ya bariya banyamahanga batakebwe
1Samuel14:7 Uwo musore aramusubiza ati: “Ukore uko wabitekereje
1Samuel14:8 Nuko Yonatani aravuga ati: “Noneho reka tugane aho bari batubone.
1Samuel14:9 Nibatubwira bati: ‘Nimuhagarare aho tubanze tumenye ikibagenza’
1Samuel14:10 Ariko nibatubwira ngo tuzamuke tubegere
1Samuel14:11 Bombi biyereka ingabo z'Abafilisiti
1Samuel14:12 Nuko izo ngabo zibwira Yonatani n'uwari umutwaje intwaro ziti: “Nimuzamuke tubabwire.” Yonatani abwira uwari umutwaje intwaro ati: “Nkurikira kuko Abafilisiti Uhoraho yabagabije Abisiraheli.”
1Samuel14:13 Nuko Yonatani azamuka akambakamba
1Samuel14:14 Muri icyo gitero cya mbere
1Samuel14:15 Nuko igikuba gicika mu nkambi no muri ako karere no mu baturage bose
1Samuel14:16 Abarinzi ba Sawuli bari i Gibeya mu ntara y'Ababenyamini
1Samuel14:17 Nuko Sawuli abwira ingabo zari kumwe na we ati: “Nimubarure abantu murebe abatuvuyemo.” Barabarura basanga habura Yonatani n'umutwaza intwaro.
1Samuel14:18 Sawuli ni ko kubwira Ahiya ati: “Igiza hino Isanduku y'Imana.” Koko rero
1Samuel14:19 Sawuli akivugana n'umutambyi
1Samuel14:20 Nuko Sawuli akoranya ingabo zose bari kumwe bajya ku rugamba
1Samuel14:21 Abaheburayi bari bakambitse iruhande rw'Abafilisiti bakajya batabarana na bo
1Samuel14:22 Ingabo zose z'Abisiraheli zari zihishe mu misozi y'Abefurayimu
1Samuel14:23 Intambara irakomeza igera hakurya ya Betaveni
1Samuel14:24 Uwo munsi ingabo z'Abisiraheli ziragorwa cyane
1Samuel14:25 Hanyuma abantu bose bagera mu ishyamba ryarimo ubuki bwashongeraga hasi.
1Samuel14:26 Baryinjiyemo babona ubwo buki bwashongeraga hasi
1Samuel14:27 Ariko Yonatani we ntiyari yumvise indahiro ya se. Ni ko gukoza inkoni ye mu buki
1Samuel14:28 Umwe mu ngabo aramubwira ati: “So yari yarahiye agira ati: ‘Nihagira umuntu ugira icyo arya uyu munsi
1Samuel14:29 Nuko Yonatani aravuga ati: “Data yateje imidugararo mu gihugu
1Samuel14:30 Ubu se koko iyo ingabo ziza kurya ku minyago zanyaze Abafilisiti
1Samuel14:31 Uwo munsi
1Samuel14:32 maze ziroha ku minyago
1Samuel14:33 Babwira Sawuli ko ingabo zacumuye ku Uhoraho zikarya inyama zirimo amaraso
1Samuel14:34 Hanyuma aravuga ati: “Nimujye mu ngabo mubwire abashaka kubaga amatungo banyaze
1Samuel14:35 Nuko Sawuli yubakira Uhoraho urutambiro
1Samuel14:36 Iryo joro Sawuli aravuga ati: “Nimuze tumanuke dukurikirane Abafilisiti tubamarire ku icumu
1Samuel14:37 Sawuli agisha inama Imana ati: “Mbese nkurikirane Abafilisiti? Ese uraduha kubatsinda?” Ariko uwo munsi Imana ntiyamusubiza.
1Samuel14:38 Sawuli ahita ahamagaza abagaba b'ingabo arababwira ati: “Nimushakashake uwaba yakoze icyaha uyu munsi.
1Samuel14:39 Ndahiye Uhoraho Umukiza w'Abisiraheli
1Samuel14:40 Nuko abwira Abisiraheli bose ati: “Nimuherere ku ruhande rumwe
1Samuel14:41 Sawuli abwira Uhoraho ati: “Mana ya Isiraheli
1Samuel14:42 Sawuli aravuga ati: “Nimukoreshe ubufindo hagati yanjye n'umuhungu wanjye Yonatani.” Ubufindo bwerekana Yonatani
1Samuel14:43 maze Sawuli aramubwira ati: “Mbwira icyo wakoze.” Yonatani aramusubiza ati: “Nakojeje inkoni yanjye mu buki ndarigata
1Samuel14:44 Nuko Sawuli aravuga ati: “Yonatani we
1Samuel14:45 Ariko ingabo zibwira Sawuli ziti: “Yonatani ko ari we wahesheje Abisiraheli gutsinda
1Samuel14:46 Sawuli arekera aho gukurikirana Abafilisiti
1Samuel14:47 Aho Sawuli yimiye ingoma
1Samuel14:48 Yabaye intwari atsinda n'Abamaleki
1Samuel14:49 Abahungu ba Sawuli bari Yonatani na Yishiwi na Malikishuwa. Abakobwa be
1Samuel14:50 Umugore wa Sawuli yitwaga Ahinowamu umukobwa wa Ahimāsi. Umugaba w'ingabo ze yitwaga Abuneri mwene Neri
1Samuel14:51 Neri na Kishi se wa Sawuli
1Samuel14:52 Ku ngoma yose ya Sawuli
1Samuel15:1 Samweli abwira Sawuli ati: “Ubushize Uhoraho yaranyohereje kugira ngo nkwimikishe amavuta
1Samuel15:2 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: ‘Ngiye guhanira Abamaleki ko bateye Abisiraheli bakabicira mu nzira
1Samuel15:3 None genda ubatere
1Samuel15:4 Nuko Sawuli ahamagaza ingabo zikoranira i Telemu. Hari ingabo z'Abisiraheli ibihumbi magana abiri
1Samuel15:5 Sawuli ajya kubikīrira hafi y'umujyi w'Abamaleki
1Samuel15:6 maze abwira Abakeni ati: “Nimumanuke muve mu Bamaleki ntabatsembana na bo
1Samuel15:7 Sawuli atsinda Abamaleki kuva Havila kugera i Shuru
1Samuel15:8 Agagi umwami w'Abamaleki arafatwa
1Samuel15:9 Sawuli n'ingabo ze ntibagira icyo batwara Agagi
1Samuel15:10 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Samweli ati:
1Samuel15:11 “Nicujije icyatumye nimika Sawuli
1Samuel15:12 Bukeye arazinduka ajya gusanganira Sawuli
1Samuel15:13 Samweli amusangayo
1Samuel15:14 Ariko Samweli aramubaza ati: “None se ayo matungo numva atāma
1Samuel15:15 Sawuli aramusubiza ati: “Ni ayo ingabo zanyaze mu Bamaleki. Amatungo arusha andi kuba meza mu mikumbi no mu mashyo ntizayishe
1Samuel15:16 Samweli aramubwira ati: “Rekera aho nanjye nkumenyeshe ibyo Uhoraho yaraye ambwiye.” Sawuli ati: “Ngaho mbwira.”
1Samuel15:17 Samweli aravuga ati: “Nubwo wigaya
1Samuel15:18 Yagutumye kurwanya bariya Bamaleki b'abagome kugeza ubwo ubarimbuye ukabatsemba.
1Samuel15:19 None ni kuki utumviye Uhoraho? Ni kuki watwaye iminyago
1Samuel15:20 Nuko Sawuli aramusubiza ati: “Nyamara numviye Uhoraho ntera aho yanyohereje. Abamaleki nabamariye ku icumu
1Samuel15:21 Naho amatungo meza ingabo zanyaze
1Samuel15:22 Samweli aramubaza ati: “Mbese ikirusha ibindi gushimisha Uhoraho ni ibitambo cyangwa ni ukumwumvira? Menya ko kumwumvira biruta ibitambo
1Samuel15:23 Erega yanga abamugomera
1Samuel15:24 Nuko Sawuli abwira Samweli ati: “Naracumuye sinakurikiza amabwiriza y'Uhoraho wampaye
1Samuel15:25 None rero ndakwinginze mbabarira icyaha cyanjye
1Samuel15:26 Samweli aramusubiza ati: “Singuherekeza kuko wanze kumvira Uhoraho
1Samuel15:27 Samweli ahindukiye kugira ngo agende
1Samuel15:28 Nuko Samweli aramubwira ati: “Uko ni ko Uhoraho akuvanye ku ngoma y'Abisiraheli! Iyo ngoma azayiha undi ukurusha umurava.
1Samuel15:29 Imana nyir'ikuzo y'Abisiraheli ntibeshya
1Samuel15:30 Sawuli arongera aravuga ati: “Koko naracumuye! Ariko ndakwinginze winkoza isoni imbere y'abagaba b'ingabo zanjye n'abandi Bisiraheli. Mperekeza njye kwambaza Uhoraho Imana yawe.”
1Samuel15:31 Nuko Samweli aramuherekeza
1Samuel15:32 Samweli aravuga ati: “Nimunzanire Agagi umwami w'Abamaleki.” Agagi aza nta cyo yishisha yibwira ati: “Koko ubanza ntagipfuye!”
1Samuel15:33 Samweli aramubwira ati: “Nk'uko inkota yawe yahekuye ababyeyi
1Samuel15:34 Hanyuma Samweli yitahira i Rama
1Samuel15:35 Kuva ubwo Samweli yarinze apfa batarongera kubonana. Samweli yakomeje kugira agahinda kubera Sawuli
1Samuel16:1 Uhoraho abaza Samweli ati: “Uzageza ryari kuririra Sawuli kugeza ryari? Jyewe naramuzinutswe
1Samuel16:2 Samweli aramusubiza ati: “Najyayo nte se
1Samuel16:3 Uzatumire Yese mugisangire
1Samuel16:4 Nuko Samweli abigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yari yabimubwiye
1Samuel16:5 Arabasubiza ati: “Ni amahoro
1Samuel16:6 Yese n'abahungu be bahageze
1Samuel16:7 Ariko Uhoraho abwira Samweli ati: “Ntukangwe n'uko asa cyangwa n'igihagararo cye
1Samuel16:8 Nuko Yese ahamagaza Abinadabu amwereka Samweli. Samweli ati: “Uyu na we si we Uhoraho yahisemo.”
1Samuel16:9 Yese ahamagaza Shama
1Samuel16:10 Yese ahamagaza barindwi mu bahungu be
1Samuel16:11 Ariko se nta bandi bana usigaranye?” Aramusubiza ati: “Hasigaye umuhererezi ariko aragiye amatungo.” Nuko Samweli abwira Yese ati: “Mutumeho aze
1Samuel16:12 Yese yohereza ujya kumuzana. Uwo musore yari igituku
1Samuel16:13 Nuko Samweli afata rya hembe ririmo amavuta
1Samuel16:14 Mwuka w'Uhoraho ava kuri Sawuli
1Samuel16:15 Nuko abagaragu be baramubwira bati: “Dore Imana yaguteje umwuka mubi ukubuza amahoro.
1Samuel16:16 None nyagasani
1Samuel16:17 Sawuli arabasubiza ati: “Ngaho nimunshakire umuntu uzi gucuranga neza
1Samuel16:18 Umwe mu bakozi aravuga ati: “Yese w'i Betelehemu afite umuhungu uzi gucuranga neza. Ni intwari kandi azi kurwana
1Samuel16:19 Nuko Sawuli atuma kuri Yese ati: “Nyoherereza umuhungu wawe Dawidi uragira amatungo.”
1Samuel16:20 Yese afata imigati n'uruhago rwa divayi n'umwana w'ihene
1Samuel16:21 Dawidi ahageze atangira gukorera Sawuli
1Samuel16:22 Sawuli atuma kuri Yese ati: “Ndagusaba undekere Dawidi akomeze kunkorera
1Samuel16:23 Iyo Sawuli yahangwagaho na wa mwuka mubi
1Samuel17:1 Abafilisiti bakoranya ingabo zabo kugira ngo bashoze urugamba. Bakoranira ahitwa Soko mu Buyuda
1Samuel17:2 Sawuli n'ingabo z'Abisiraheli na bo barakorana
1Samuel17:3 Abafilisiti bari hakurya y'ikibaya
1Samuel17:4 Nuko mu nkambi y'Abafilisiti hasohoka umugabo w'intwari witwaga Goliyati w'i Gati. Yari afite hafi metero eshatu z'uburebure.
1Samuel17:5 Yari ateze ingofero y'umuringa
1Samuel17:6 Yari yambaye ibyuma bicuzwe mu muringa bikingira amaguru
1Samuel17:7 Uruti rw'icumu rye rwari rumeze nk'igiti cy'ikumbo
1Samuel17:8 Nuko Goliyati arahagarara
1Samuel17:9 Nashobora kurwana nanjye akanyica turaba inkoreragahato zanyu
1Samuel17:10 Uyu munsi mpinyuye ingabo za Isiraheli
1Samuel17:11 Sawuli n'ingabo z'Abisiraheli zose bumvise ayo magambo
1Samuel17:12 Muri icyo gihe
1Samuel17:13 Abahungu be batatu bakuru bari baratabaranye na Sawuli
1Samuel17:14 Dawidi ni we wari umuhererezi. Igihe bakuru be batabaranye na Sawuli
1Samuel17:15 Dawidi yajyaga kwa Sawuli
1Samuel17:16 Ubwo ariko
1Samuel17:17 Yese abwira umuhungu we Dawidi ati: “Fata ibi biro icumi by'ingano zikaranze n'iyi migati icumi
1Samuel17:18 n'aya maforomaji icumi uzayahe umutware w'umutwe w'ingabo barimo. Uzarebe uko bakuru bawe bameze
1Samuel17:19 Uzabasanga hamwe na Sawuli n'ingabo zose z'Abisiraheli mu kibaya cya Ela
1Samuel17:20 Bukeye Dawidi arazinduka amatungo ayasigira umushumba
1Samuel17:21 Ingabo z'Abisiraheli n'iz'Abafilisiti zari zishyamiranye.
1Samuel17:22 Dawidi atura imitwaro ye ayisigira uri ku izamu
1Samuel17:23 Akivugana na bo
1Samuel17:24 Ingabo zose z'Abisiraheli zibonye Goliyati
1Samuel17:25 Abisiraheli barabwirana bati: “Nimurebe uriya mugabo uje kudushōtōra! Umuntu uzamwica
1Samuel17:26 Nuko Dawidi abaza abo bari kumwe ati: “Harya ngo uzica uriya Mufilisiti agakiza ikimwaro Abisiraheli bazamugirira bate? Ese ubundi uriya Mufilisiti utakebwe ni iki kugira ngo ashōtōre ingabo z'Imana nzima?”
1Samuel17:27 Bamusubiriramo uko umuntu uzica Goliyati azagororerwa.
1Samuel17:28 Mukuru we Eliyabu wari wumvise ibyo yavuganye na bo
1Samuel17:29 Dawidi aramusubiza ati: “Ese hari ikibi nakoze uretse ko nibarije gusa?”
1Samuel17:30 Nuko arahindukira abaza abandi iby'uzica Goliyati
1Samuel17:31 Abantu bumvise ibibazo Dawidi yabajije bajya kubibwira Sawuli
1Samuel17:32 Dawidi ahageze abwira Sawuli ati: “Ntihagire uterwa ubwoba n'uriya Mufilisiti
1Samuel17:33 Sawuli aramubwira ati: “Uracyari umwana
1Samuel17:34 Dawidi aramusubiza ati: “Jywe umugaragu wawe
1Samuel17:35 nyirukaho nkayikubita nkayambura itungo ryanjye. Iyo impindukiranye nyifata mu ijosi
1Samuel17:36 Nguko uko jyewe umugaragu wawe nishe intare n'ikirura
1Samuel17:37 Uhoraho wankijije intare n'ikirura
1Samuel17:38 Nuko yambika Dawidi imyambaro ye y'intambara n'ingofero ye icuzwe mu muringa
1Samuel17:39 Dawidi amaze kwambara atyo
1Samuel17:40 maze afata inkoni ye
1Samuel17:41 Umufilisiti na we aza amusanga
1Samuel17:42 Umufilisiti abonye Dawidi
1Samuel17:43 aramubwira ati: “Ni ko sha
1Samuel17:44 aramubwira ati: “Ngaho ngwino nkubagire ibisiga uribwe n'inyamaswa.”
1Samuel17:45 Dawidi aramusubiza ati: “Waje kundwanya witwaje inkota n'icumu n'igihosho
1Samuel17:46 Uyu munsi Uhoraho arakungabiza nkwice maze nguce umutwe
1Samuel17:47 n'abantu bose bazamenya ko Uhoraho adakeneye inkota n'amacumu kugira ngo atsinde. Uhoraho ni we utanga gutsinda urugamba kandi uyu munsi yabatugabije.”
1Samuel17:48 Umufilisiti aza asanga Dawidi
1Samuel17:49 Dawidi akura akabuyenge mu ruhago rwe agashyira mu muhumetso
1Samuel17:50 Dawidi atsinda atyo Umufilisiti akoresheje umuhumetso n'akabuyenge
1Samuel17:51 Nuko ariruka ajya aho Umufilisiti yaguye amukura inkota mu rwubati
1Samuel17:52 Nuko ingabo z'Abisiraheli n'iz'Abayuda zirahaguruka
1Samuel17:53 Abisiraheli bamaze kwirukana Abafilisiti
1Samuel17:54 Dawidi afata igihanga cya Goliyati akijyana i Yeruzalemu
1Samuel17:55 Igihe Sawuli yabonaga Dawidi asatiriye Umufilisiti
1Samuel17:56 Umwami aramubwira ati: “Noneho ubaririze umenye se.”
1Samuel17:57 Aho Dawidi agarukiye amaze kwica wa Mufilisiti
1Samuel17:58 Sawuli aramubaza ati: “Ni ko sha
1Samuel18:1 Dawidi amaze kuvugana na Sawuli
1Samuel18:2 Kuva uwo munsi kandi Sawuli agumana Dawidi
1Samuel18:3 Yonatani anywana na Dawidi
1Samuel18:4 Yikuramo igishura yari yambaye agiha Dawidi
1Samuel18:5 Dawidi yatabaraga ahantu hose Sawuli amwohereje agatsinda
1Samuel18:6 Ingabo zitabarutse Dawidi amaze kwica wa Mufilisiti
1Samuel18:7 Abo bagore barikiranyaga bishimye bagira bati: “Sawuli yishe ibihumbi
1Samuel18:8 Ayo magambo Sawuli ayafata nabi ararakara cyane
1Samuel18:9 Kuva uwo munsi Sawuli atangira kureba nabi Dawidi.
1Samuel18:10 Nyuma y'aho Imana iteza Sawuli wa mwuka mubi
1Samuel18:11 Nuko Sawuli aribwira ati: “Ndatera Dawidi icumu rimushite ku nzu.” Ariteye Dawidi aryizibukira kabiri kose.
1Samuel18:12 Sawuli yatinyaga Dawidi kuko Uhoraho yari kumwe na we
1Samuel18:13 Sawuli ni ko kumwikura iruhande amugira umutware w'ingabo igihumbi
1Samuel18:14 Ibyo Dawidi yakoraga byose byaramuhiraga kuko Uhoraho yari kumwe na we
1Samuel18:15 Sawuli abibonye aramutinya.
1Samuel18:16 Icyakora Abisiraheli bose n'Abayuda bose bakundaga Dawidi
1Samuel18:17 Sawuli abwira Dawidi ati: “Dore Merabu umukobwa wanjye w'impfura
1Samuel18:18 Dawidi asubiza Sawuli ati: “Ndi nde kandi naba ndi mwene nde
1Samuel18:19 Ariko igihe cyo gushyingira Merabu kigeze
1Samuel18:20 Undi mukobwa wa Sawuli witwaga Mikali aza kubenguka Dawidi. Sawuli ngo babimumenyesheje biramushimisha
1Samuel18:21 kuko yibwiraga ati: “Nzamumushyingira amubere umutego uzatuma yicwa n'Abafilisiti.” Sawuli arongera abwira Dawidi ubwa kabiri ati: “Uyu munsi uraba umukwe wanjye.”
1Samuel18:22 Nuko Sawuli ategeka abagaragu be ati: “Muzihererane Dawidi mumubwire muti: ‘Ko uri umutoni w'umwami n'abagaragu be bakagukunda
1Samuel18:23 Abagaragu basubiriramo Dawidi ayo magambo
1Samuel18:24 Abagaragu ba Sawuli bamutekerereza uko Dawidi yababwiye.
1Samuel18:25 Nuko Sawuli ashaka uko Dawidi yazicwa n'Abafilisiti
1Samuel18:26 Barabimubwira maze Dawidi yishimira ko azaba umukwe w'umwami. Mbere y'igihe cyo kumushyingira
1Samuel18:27 ahagurukana n'ingabo ze bagaba igitero
1Samuel18:28 Sawuli abona ko Uhoraho ari kumwe na Dawidi
1Samuel18:29 Nuko arushaho gutinya Dawidi
1Samuel18:30 Abategetsi b'Abafilisiti bajyaga bagaba ibitero
1Samuel19:1 Sawuli abwira umuhungu we Yonatani n'ibyegera bye byose ko ashaka kwica Dawidi. Ariko Yonatani yari incuti magara ya Dawidi
1Samuel19:2 nuko amuburira agira ati: “Data Sawuli arashaka kukwica. Uramenye rero ejo mu gitondo ntuzagaragare
1Samuel19:3 Nanjye nzajyanayo na data maze mubaze ibikwerekeye
1Samuel19:4 Yonatani avugira Dawidi neza kuri Sawuli agira ati: “Mubyeyi
1Samuel19:5 Yahaze amagara ye yica wa Mufilisiti
1Samuel19:6 Sawuli yemera amagambo ya Yonatani
1Samuel19:7 Yonatani abwira Dawidi ibyavuzwe byose
1Samuel19:8 Intambara yongeye kūbura Dawidi ajya ku rugamba kurwana n'Abafilisiti
1Samuel19:9 Umunsi umwe Uhoraho ateza Sawuli wa mwuka mubi
1Samuel19:10 Sawuli ni ko kumutera icumu kugira ngo rimushite ku rukutu rw'inzu
1Samuel19:11 Nuko Sawuli yohereza abantu kwa Dawidi kugira ngo bahagote
1Samuel19:12 Aherako amucisha mu idirishya
1Samuel19:13 Hanyuma Mikali afata ishusho y'ikigirwamana ayiryamisha mu buriri
1Samuel19:14 Nuko Mikali abwira ba bantu Sawuli yari yohereje gufata Dawidi ati: “Ararwaye.”
1Samuel19:15 Ariko Sawuli arongera arabohereza arababwira ati: “Nimugende mumuterure mu buriri bwe
1Samuel19:16 Basubira kwa Dawidi
1Samuel19:17 Sawuli abyumvise atonganya Mikali ati: “Ni kuki wandiganyije ugacikisha umwanzi wanjye?” Mikali aramusubiza ati: “Yambwiye ngo nimureke agende
1Samuel19:18 Dawidi amaze gucika ahungira kwa Samweli i Rama
1Samuel19:19 Iyo nkuru iza kugera kuri Sawuli
1Samuel19:20 Sawuli aherako yohereza abantu bo gufata Dawidi. Bahageze basanga itsinda ry'abahanuzi bahanura
1Samuel19:21 Sawuli abyumvise yohereza abandi bantu
1Samuel19:22 Noneho Sawuli ubwe yigira i Rama
1Samuel19:23 Sawuli ajyayo
1Samuel19:24 Agezeyo na we akuramo imyambaro ye
1Samuel20:1 Nuko Dawidi ava mu macumbi i Nayoti h'i Rama arahunga
1Samuel20:2 Yonatani aramusubiza ati: “Humura ntugipfuye kuko data nta cyo akora atakimbwiye
1Samuel20:3 Dawidi arongera aramubwira ati: “So azi neza ko unkunda cyane
1Samuel20:4 Nuko Yonatani abwira Dawidi ati: “Icyo wifuza cyose nzakigukorera.”
1Samuel20:5 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Ejo ni umunsi mukuru w'imboneko y'ukwezi
1Samuel20:6 So naramuka anshatse
1Samuel20:7 Navuga ati: ‘Ni byiza’
1Samuel20:8 None rero databuja
1Samuel20:9 Yonatani aramubwira ati: “Ibyo ntibikavugwe! Ndamutse menye ko data yiyemeje kukugirira nabi
1Samuel20:10 Dawidi aramubaza ati: “So nagusubiza nabi ni nde uzabimenyesha?”
1Samuel20:11 Yonatani abwira Dawidi ati: “Ngwino tujye mu gasozi!” Nuko barajyana.
1Samuel20:12 Yonatani abwira Dawidi ati: “Nkurahiye Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli
1Samuel20:13 Ariko ninumva data ashaka kukugirira nabi sinkuburire kugira ngo wicikire
1Samuel20:14 Igihe nkiriho ntuzabure kungirira ineza
1Samuel20:15 na bwo uzagirire abanjye ineza wandahiriye
1Samuel20:16 Nuko Yonatani agirana isezerano na Dawidi
1Samuel20:17 Yonatani yongera kugirana na Dawidi isezerano ry'urukundo. Koko Yonatani yakundaga Dawidi nk'uko yikunda.
1Samuel20:18 Nuko Yonatani aramubwira ati: “Ejo ni umunsi mukuru w'imboneko y'ukwezi
1Samuel20:19 Ejobundi uzamanuke ujye ha handi wari wihishe bwa bundi
1Samuel20:20 Nzaharasa imyambi itatu nk'urasa intego
1Samuel20:21 maze nohereze umusore tuzaba turi kumwe kuyizana. Nimubwira nti: ‘Imyambi iri hino yawe yifate’
1Samuel20:22 Ariko nimubwira nti: ‘Imyambi iri hirya yawe’
1Samuel20:23 Naho ku byerekeye ukunywana kwacu
1Samuel20:24 Nuko Dawidi ajya kwihisha mu gasozi. Ku munsi mukuru w'imboneko y'ukwezi
1Samuel20:25 nk'uko bisanzwe
1Samuel20:26 Uwo munsi Sawuli ntiyagira icyo avuga kuko yibwiraga ati: “Ni ibyamugwiririye birashoboka ko yahumanye
1Samuel20:27 Ku munsi wa kabiri
1Samuel20:28 Yonatani asubiza se ati: “Dawidi yaransabye ngo anyarukire i Betelehemu
1Samuel20:29 agira ati: ‘Mukuru wanjye yantegetse kuza gusangira na bene wacu igitambo
1Samuel20:30 Nuko Sawuli arakarira Yonatani cyane
1Samuel20:31 Igihe cyose mwene Yese azaba akiriho
1Samuel20:32 Yonatani abaza se Sawuli ati: “Ni kuki agomba gupfa? Ese ubundi yakoze iki?”
1Samuel20:33 Nuko Sawuli amutera icumu kugira ngo amwice. Yonatani ahita yumva ko se yiyemeje kwica Dawidi.
1Samuel20:34 Ahaguruka ku meza arakaye cyane kubera ibitutsi bya se
1Samuel20:35 Bukeye mu gitondo Yonatani ajya mu gasozi nk'uko yari yabisezeranye na Dawidi
1Samuel20:36 Yonatani aramubwira ati: “Iruka ujye gushaka imyambi ngiye kurasa.” Uwo mwana ariruka
1Samuel20:37 Uwo mwana yegereye aho umwambi waguye
1Samuel20:38 gira vuba wihagarara ahubwo ihute!” Nuko uwo mwana atoragura imyambi agaruka aho shebuja ari
1Samuel20:39 ariko nta cyo yigeze amenya. Dawidi na Yonatani ni bo bonyine bari babiziranyeho.
1Samuel20:40 Yonatani aha intwaro ze uwo musore
1Samuel20:41 Uwo mwana w'umuhungu amaze kugenda Dawidi ava aho yari yihishe hepfo y'urutare
1Samuel20:42 Nuko Yonatani abwira Dawidi ati: “Igendere amahoro
1Samuel21:1 Dawidi ajya i Nobu ku mutambyi Ahimeleki
1Samuel21:2 Dawidi aramusubiza ati: “Umwami yampaye ubutumwa
1Samuel21:3 Mbese nta cyo kurya ufite? Mpa imigati itanu cyangwa icyo ufite cyose.”
1Samuel21:4 Umutambyi aramusubiza ati: “Nta migati isanzwe mfite
1Samuel21:5 Dawidi asubiza umutambyi ati: “N'ubusanzwe iyo turi bujye ku rugamba dutegetswe kwirinda abagore
1Samuel21:6 Uwo munsi ni bwo bari bakuye ku meza imigati yeguriwe Uhoraho
1Samuel21:7 Ubwo hakaba hari umutware w'abashumba ba Sawuli wari imbere y'Inzu y'Uhoraho
1Samuel21:8 Dawidi abaza Ahimeleki ati: “Nta cumu cyangwa inkota wagira? Ubutumwa bw'umwami bwihutirwaga
1Samuel21:9 Umutambyi aramusubiza ati: “Hariya inyuma y'igishura cy'ubutambyi
1Samuel21:10 Uwo munsi Dawidi ahungira Sawuli kure
1Samuel21:11 Abagaragu ba Akishi baramubaza bati: “Ariko uriya si we Dawidi
1Samuel21:12 Dawidi yumvise ayo magambo
1Samuel21:13 Ni ko kwisarisha mu maso yabo
1Samuel21:14 Nuko Akishi atonganya abagaragu be ati: “Ko mubona uyu muntu ari umusazi
1Samuel21:15 Mbese mwasanze nkeneye abasazi ku buryo mwazanye uyu nguyu
1Samuel22:1 Nuko Dawidi ava i Gati
1Samuel22:2 Abantu bose bari mu kaga
1Samuel22:3 Dawidi ava aho ajya i Misipa mu gihugu cya Mowabu
1Samuel22:4 Nuko abazanira umwami wa Mowabu
1Samuel22:5 Umuhanuzi Gadi abwira Dawidi ati: “Wiguma muri ubu buhungiro
1Samuel22:6 Sawuli aza kumenya aho Dawidi n'abantu be bari. Icyo gihe Sawuli yari ku musozi i Gibeya yicaye munsi y'igiti afite icumu mu ntoki
1Samuel22:7 Nuko Sawuli arababaza ati: “Ni ko mwa Babenyamini mwe
1Samuel22:8 Ese ni yo mpamvu mwese mwangambaniye? Nta n'umwe muri mwe ukinyitayeho. Nta muntu n'umwe wamenyesheje ko umuhungu wanjye yanywanye na mwene Yese
1Samuel22:9 Nuko Dowegi w'Umwedomu wari muri abo bagaragu ba Sawuli
1Samuel22:10 Nuko Ahimeleki amugishiriza inama Uhoraho
1Samuel22:11 Umwami ahita atumira umutambyi Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu
1Samuel22:12 Sawuli aravuga ati: “Ni ko mwene Ahitubu!” Ahimeleki ati: “Karame nyagasani!”
1Samuel22:13 Sawuli aramubaza ati: “Ni kuki wowe na mwene Yese mwangambaniye? Ni iki cyatumye umuha impamba n'inkota
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki aramusubiza ati: “Ariko se
1Samuel22:15 Mbese bwari ari bwo bwa mbere mugishiriza inama Imana? Ashwi da! Nyagasani
1Samuel22:16 Ariko umwami aravuga ati: “Wowe Ahimeleki n'umuryango wawe wose muhanishijwe urwo gupfa.”
1Samuel22:17 Nuko umwami abwira abamurindaga ati: “Nimwice abatambyi b'Uhoraho kuko na bo bafatanyije na Dawidi
1Samuel22:18 Nuko umwami abwira Dowegi w'Umwedomu aba ari we wica abatambyi
1Samuel22:19 Nuko umujyi wa Nobu wari utuwe n'abatambyi awumarira ku icumu
1Samuel22:20 Icyakora Abiyatari umuhungu wa Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu
1Samuel22:21 Abiyatari amutekerereza uko Sawuli yicishije abatambyi b'Uhoraho.
1Samuel22:22 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Urya munsi nari nzi ko Dowegi w'Umwedomu yari ahari
1Samuel22:23 None humura igumire hano
1Samuel23:1 Abantu baza kubwira Dawidi bati: “Abafilisiti bateye i Keyila kandi barasahura ibyanitse ku mbuga.”
1Samuel23:2 Dawidi agisha inama Uhoraho ati: “Mbese njye kurwanya abo Bafilisiti?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Genda ubarwanye ukize umujyi wa Keyila.”
1Samuel23:3 Ariko ingabo za Dawidi ziramubwira ziti: “Mbese ko dufite ubwoba turi hano mu Buyuda
1Samuel23:4 Nuko Dawidi yongera kugisha inama Uhoraho
1Samuel23:5 Dawidi ni ko kujyana n'ingabo ze i Keyila agaba igitero mu Bafilisiti
1Samuel23:6 Igihe Abiyatari mwene Ahimeleki yahungiraga kuri Dawidi yamusanze aho i Keyila
1Samuel23:7 Sawuli amenye ko Dawidi yageze i Keyila aribwira ati: “Imana yamungabije kuko yifungiranye mu mujyi ufite inzugi n'ibihindizo.”
1Samuel23:8 Nuko Sawuli akoranya ingabo ze zose
1Samuel23:9 Dawidi amenya imigambi mibi ya Sawuli
1Samuel23:10 Nuko Dawidi aravuga ati: “Uhoraho Mana y'Abisiraheli
1Samuel23:11 Mbese abakuru b'i Keyila bazantanga? Ese Sawuli azamanuka nk'uko nabibwiwe? Uhoraho Mana y'Abisiraheli
1Samuel23:12 Dawidi arongera ati: “Ese jyewe n'ingabo zanjye
1Samuel23:13 Nuko Dawidi n'ingabo ze nka magana atandatu bava i Keyila
1Samuel23:14 Dawidi ajya kwihisha mu bihanamanga by'i Zifu
1Samuel23:15 Dawidi akiri i Horesha mu misozi y'i Zifu
1Samuel23:16 Nuko Yonatani mwene Sawuli asanga Dawidi i Horesha
1Samuel23:17 Aramubwira ati: “Witinya
1Samuel23:18 Nuko Yonatani na Dawidi bongera guhamya ubucuti bwabo mu izina ry'Uhoraho. Dawidi aguma aho i Horesha
1Samuel23:19 Abanyazifu bajya i Gibeya kwa Sawuli baramubwira bati: “Dawidi yihishe iwacu mu bihanamanga by'i Horesha
1Samuel23:20 None nyagasani
1Samuel23:21 Sawuli arababwira ati: “Uhoraho abahe umugisha kuko mumfitiye impuhwe.
1Samuel23:22 Ngaho nimugende mwongere mugenzure neza
1Samuel23:23 Muzarebe neza ubwihisho bwose yihishamo
1Samuel23:24 Nuko basubira iwabo i Zifu babanjirije Sawuli. Ubwo Dawidi n'ingabo ze bari mu butayu bw'i Mawoni
1Samuel23:25 Sawuli n'ingabo ze bajya guhīga Dawidi
1Samuel23:26 Dawidi yihutaga cyane ahunga Sawuli
1Samuel23:27 haza intumwa iramubwira iti: “Tebuka Abafilisiti bateye igihugu.”
1Samuel23:28 Nuko Sawuli aba arekeye aho gukurikirana Dawidi
1Samuel23:29 Dawidi ava aho ajya mu bihanamanga bya Enigedi agumayo.
1Samuel24:1 Aho Sawuli aviriye kumenesha Abafilisiti
1Samuel24:2 Nuko Sawuli atoranya ingabo z'intwari ibihumbi bitatu mu Bisiraheli
1Samuel24:3 Aragenda agera ku biraro by'intama byari iruhande rw'inzira
1Samuel24:4 Ingabo za Dawidi ziramubwira ziti: “Uyu ni wo munsi Uhoraho yakubwiye ko azakugabiza umwanzi wawe
1Samuel24:5 Ariko Dawidi yumva afite inkomanga ku mutima
1Samuel24:6 Nuko abwira ingabo ze ati: “Uhoraho arandinde gukora ishyano ngo nice databuja. Ibyo ari byo byose ni umwami Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta!”
1Samuel24:7 Ayo magambo ya Dawidi acubya ubukana bw'ingabo ze
1Samuel24:8 Dawidi na we asohoka mu buvumo ahamagara Sawuli ati: “Nyagasani databuja!” Sawuli arakebuka
1Samuel24:9 Abaza Sawuli ati: “Kuki wumva amabwire ngo ndashaka kukugirira nabi?
1Samuel24:10 Uyu munsi uribonera neza ko Uhoraho yari yakumpaye kugira ngo nkugenze uko nshaka mu buvumo. Bambwiye ngo nkwice ariko nakubabariye ndavuga nti: ‘Sinakwica databuja
1Samuel24:11 Mubyeyi
1Samuel24:12 Uhoraho abe ari we uducira urubanza kandi azampōrere
1Samuel24:13 N'ubundi hari umugani w'aba kera uvuga ngo ‘Ubugome buva mu bagome!’ Ni yo mpamvu nta cyo nzagutwara.
1Samuel24:14 Ariko se mwami w'Abisiraheli
1Samuel24:15 Uhoraho nabe ari we udukiranura
1Samuel24:16 Dawidi amaze kumubwira ayo magambo
1Samuel24:17 Abwira Dawidi ati: “Undushije ubutungane
1Samuel24:18 Uyu munsi ugaragaje umutima mwiza umfitiye
1Samuel24:19 Mbese ubundi umuntu yabona umwanzi we ntamwice
1Samuel24:20 Ubu noneho menye ko uzaba umwami
1Samuel24:21 None ndahira Uhoraho ko nimara gupfa

1Samuel25:3 
1Samuel25:4 Dawidi akiri mu butayu amenya ko Nabali akemuza intama ze
1Samuel25:5 amutumaho abasore icumi ati: “Nimujye i Karumeli
1Samuel25:6 muti: ‘Gira amahoro n'ubugingo wowe n'abawe
1Samuel25:7 Namenye ko waje gukemuza intama. Igihe cyose twamaranye n'abashumba bawe i Karumeli twabanye neza
1Samuel25:8 na bo ubibarize barabikubwira. None rero kubera umunsi mukuru
1Samuel25:9 Abo basore bageze kwa Nabali
1Samuel25:10 Nabali arabasubiza ati: “Dawidi uwo mwene Yese ni nde? Muri iki gihe hari abagaragu benshi batoroka ba shebuja
1Samuel25:11 none ngo nimfate imigati n'amazi n'inyama nazigamiye abakemura intama zanjye
1Samuel25:12 Abo basore basubira aho Dawidi ari
1Samuel25:13 Nuko Dawidi abwira ingabo ze ati: “Buri wese nafate inkota ye.” Maze babigenza batyo
1Samuel25:14 Hagati aho umwe mu bagaragu ba Nabali aza kubwira Abigayile muka Nabali ati: “Dawidi aho ari mu butayu yatumye abantu gusuhuza databuja
1Samuel25:15 Nyamara abo bantu batugiriye neza cyane igihe cyose twamaranye na bo mu gasozi twabanye neza kandi nta tungo ryacu na rimwe batwaye.
1Samuel25:16 Igihe cyose twari kumwe na bo turagiye imikumbi
1Samuel25:17 None rero gerageza urebe icyo ukwiriye gukora
1Samuel25:18 Nuko Abigayile ategura bwangu imigati magana abiri n'intama eshanu zitetse neza
1Samuel25:19 Abwira abagaragu be ati: “Nimugende ndaza mbakurikiye.” Ariko ntiyagira icyo abwira umugabo we Nabali.
1Samuel25:20 Nuko amanuka umusozi rwihishwa ari ku ndogobe
1Samuel25:21 Dawidi yari yavuze ati: “Ni ishyano kuba nararinze amatungo yose y'uriya mugabo mu gasozi
1Samuel25:22 Uhoraho azampane yihanukiriye
1Samuel25:23 Abigayile akubise Dawidi amaso ahita yururuka ku ndogobe
1Samuel25:24 Acyubamye imbere ye aramubwira ati: “Databuja
1Samuel25:25 Databuja
1Samuel25:26 None rero databuja
1Samuel25:27 None rero databuja
1Samuel25:28 Ndakwinginze umbabarire icyaha cyanjye
1Samuel25:29 Nihagira umuntu uzagukurikirana ashaka kukwica
1Samuel25:30 Databuja
1Samuel25:31 ntuzicuze ko utihōreye umena amaraso nta mpamvu. Databuja
1Samuel25:32 Nuko Dawidi abwira Abigayile ati: “Nihasingizwe Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli
1Samuel25:33 Nawe ushimirwe gushyira mu gaciro kwawe
1Samuel25:34 Nari narahiye Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli
1Samuel25:35 Nuko Dawidi yakira ibyo Abigayile amutuye
1Samuel25:36 Abigayile ageze imuhira
1Samuel25:37 Bukeye Nabali amaze gusinduka
1Samuel25:38 Hashize nk'iminsi icumi
1Samuel25:39 Dawidi amenye ko Nabali yapfuye aravuga ati: “Nihasingizwe Uhoraho wandengeye akankiza agasuzuguro ka Nabali
1Samuel25:40 Bageze i Karumeli baramubwira bati: “Dawidi yakudutumyeho kugira ngo tukuzane umubere umugore.”
1Samuel25:41 Nuko Abigayile yubama imbere yabo aravuga ati: “Dore ndi umuja we
1Samuel25:42 Abigayile ahaguruka bwangu yurira indogobe
1Samuel25:43 Dawidi yari yaranarongoye Ahinowamu w'i Yizerēli
1Samuel25:44 Naho Mikali umukobwa wa Sawuli wahoze ari umugore wa Dawidi
1Samuel26:1 Abanyazifu bongera kujya i Gibeya kubwira Sawuli ko Dawidi yihishe ku musozi wa Hakila
1Samuel26:2 Sawuli atoranya mu Bisiraheli ingabo z'intwari ibihumbi bitatu
1Samuel26:3 Sawuli ashinga amahema ku musozi wa Hakila ahateganye na Yeshimoni
1Samuel26:4 Nuko yohereza abatasi
1Samuel26:5 Dawidi ajya kugenzura
1Samuel26:6 Dawidi abaza Ahimeleki w'Umuheti
1Samuel26:7 Nijoro Dawidi na Abishayi bajyayo basanga Sawuli asinziriye
1Samuel26:8 Abishayi ni ko kubwira Dawidi ati: “Uyu munsi Imana ikugabije umwanzi wawe
1Samuel26:9 Dawidi asubiza Abishayi ati: “Uramenye ntugire icyo umutwara kuko nta kuntu utabarwaho igicumuro
1Samuel26:10 Ndahiye Uhoraho
1Samuel26:11 Uhoraho arandinde gukora ishyano ngo nice uwo yimikishije amavuta. Ahubwo fata icumu rye riri iruhande rw'umusego
1Samuel26:12 Dawidi na Abishayi batwara icumu n'agacuma k'amazi byari iruhande rw'umusego wa Sawuli barigendera. Ntihagira n'umwe ubabona cyangwa ngo abimenye
1Samuel26:13 Nuko Dawidi ajya hakurya mu mpinga y'umusozi ahitaruye
1Samuel26:14 ahamagara ingabo za Sawuli na Abuneri mwene Neri ati: “Abuneri we
1Samuel26:15 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Ko uri intwari ukaba utagira uwo muhwanye mu ngabo z'Abisiraheli
1Samuel26:16 Ibyo mwakoze si byo. Ndahiye Uhoraho ko mukwiye kwicwa kuko mutaraririye shobuja
1Samuel26:17 Sawuli yumvise iryo jwi amenya ko ari irya Dawidi
1Samuel26:18 Ariko se databuja
1Samuel26:19 None nyagasani
1Samuel26:20 ariko Uhoraho ntiyemere ko mpfira mu mahanga. Ni kuki umwami w'Abisiraheli yahagurutswa no guhīga imbaragasa nkanjye
1Samuel26:21 Sawuli aravuga ati: “Dawidi mwana wanjye
1Samuel26:22 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Dore icumu ryawe
1Samuel26:23 Uhoraho yitura buri wese ibihwanye n'ubutungane n'ubudahemuka bwe. Iri joro Uhoraho yakungabije
1Samuel26:24 None rero nk'uko nakijije ubugingo bwawe iri joro
1Samuel26:25 Sawuli aramubwira ati: “Dawidi mwana wanjye
1Samuel27:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Dawidi aribwira ati: “Umunsi umwe Sawuli azanyica. Icyiza ni uko nahungira mu gihugu cy'Abafilisiti. Nindenga umupaka w'Abisiraheli bizaca Sawuli intege ye gukomeza kunkurikirana
1Samuel27:2 Nuko ahagurukana n'ingabo ze magana atandatu
1Samuel27:3 buri wese ajyana n'umuryango we. Dawidi na we ajyana n'abagore be bombi Ahinowamu w'i Yizerēli
1Samuel27:4 Baza kubwira Sawuli ko Dawidi yahungiye i Gati
1Samuel27:5 Dawidi abwira Akishi ati: “Nyagasani niba ngutonnyeho
1Samuel27:6 Uwo munsi Akishi amugabira Sikulagi. Ni yo mpamvu uwo mujyi wabaye uw'abami b'u Buyuda kugeza n'ubu.
1Samuel27:7 Dawidi yamaze umwaka n'amezi ane mu gihugu cy'Abafilisiti.
1Samuel27:8 Bakiri i Sikulagi
1Samuel27:9 Aho Dawidi yateraga muri ako karere ntiyasigaga n'uwo kubara inkuru
1Samuel27:10 Iyo Akishi yamubazaga niba hari aho bateye
1Samuel27:11 Aho Dawidi yateraga yarabatsembaga ntihagire umuntu n'umwe ajyana i Gati
1Samuel27:12 Akishi yaramwizeraga cyane kuko yibwiraga ati: “Dawidi yatumye Abisiraheli bamuzinukwa
1Samuel28:1 Muri iyo minsi Abafilisiti bakoranya ingabo kugira ngo batere Abisiraheli. Akishi abwira Dawidi ati: “Umenye neza ko wowe n'ingabo zawe muzatabarana natwe.”
1Samuel28:2 Dawidi aramusubiza ati: “Databuja
1Samuel28:3 Muri icyo gihe Samweli yari yarapfuye
1Samuel28:4 Nuko Abafilisiti barakorana bashinga ibirindiro i Shunemu. Sawuli na we akoranya ingabo z'Abisiraheli bashinga ibirindiro ku musozi wa Gilibowa.
1Samuel28:5 Sawuli abonye ibirindiro by'ingabo z'Abafilisiti
1Samuel28:6 Agisha Uhoraho inama ariko ntiyagira icyo amusubiza
1Samuel28:7 Nuko Sawuli abwira ibyegera bye
1Samuel28:8 Nijoro Sawuli ariyoberanya ahindura imyambaro
1Samuel28:9 Uwo mugore aramubwira ati: “Uzi ko Sawuli yaciye mu gihugu abashitsi n'abapfumu bose. None ni iki gitumye untega umutego wo kunyicisha?”
1Samuel28:10 Sawuli amurahira mu izina ry'Uhoraho ati: “Nkurahiye Uhoraho
1Samuel28:11 Umugore aramubaza ati: “Ngushikire nde?” Sawuli aramusubiza ati: “Nshikira Samweli.”
1Samuel28:12 Wa mugore abonye Samweli atera hejuru
1Samuel28:13 Sawuli aramubwira ati: “Humura witinya! Ariko se ubonye iki?” Umugore aramubwira ati: “Mbonye umuzimu azamuka ava ikuzimu!”
1Samuel28:14 Sawuli aramubaza ati: “Ubonye asa ate?” Umugore ati: “Ni umusaza wifubitse igishura.” Sawuli amenya ko ari Samweli
1Samuel28:15 Nuko Samweli abaza Sawuli ati: “Ni kuki wankubaganiye ukampamagaza?” Sawuli aramusubiza ati: “Ndi mu kaga gakomeye cyane
1Samuel28:16 Samweli aramubaza ati: “None se niba Uhoraho yarakuzinutswe akaba yarabaye umwanzi wawe
1Samuel28:17 Uhoraho ashohoje ibyo yakuntumyeho
1Samuel28:18 Icyatumye Uhoraho akugenza atyo
1Samuel28:19 Wowe ubwawe n'Abisiraheli bose Uhoraho azabagabiza Abafilisiti
1Samuel28:20 Ako kanya Sawuli yikubita hasi arambaraye kuko amagambo ya Samweli yari amuteye ubwoba cyane
1Samuel28:21 Wa mugore yegera Sawuli asanga yazahaye cyane. Ni ko kumubwira ati: “Databuja
1Samuel28:22 None nanjye umuja wawe ndakwinginze wumve icyo nkubwira: ureke nguhe utwo ufungura ufate agatege
1Samuel28:23 Ariko Sawuli aranga ati: “Ntabwo ndi burye.” Nyamara ibyegera bye na wa mugore bakomeje kumuhata aremera
1Samuel28:24 Uwo mugore yari afite ikimasa cy'umushishe akibagisha vuba vuba
1Samuel28:25 Arangije ahereza Sawuli n'abagaragu be barafungura. Hanyuma barahaguruka basubira mu birindiro byabo muri iryo joro.
1Samuel29:1 Mbere y'uko Abisiraheli bakambika hafi y'isōko mu kibaya cya Yizerēli
1Samuel29:2 Abategetsi b'Abafilisiti biyereka imbere y'imitwe y'ingabo zabo
1Samuel29:3 Nuko abategetsi b'Abafilisiti babaza Akishi bati: “Bariya Baheburayi baragenzwa n'iki?” Arabasubiza ati: “Uriya ni Dawidi wari umugaragu wa Sawuli umwami w'Abisiraheli. Tumaranye umwaka urenga kandi kuva yagera iwanjye nta cyo munengaho.”
1Samuel29:4 Ariko abategetsi b'Abafilisiti barakarira Akishi
1Samuel29:5 Si we Dawidi babyinaga ngo ‘Sawuli yishe ibihumbi
1Samuel29:6 Nuko Akishi ahamagaza Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Nkurahiye Uhoraho ko uri intungane. Ndetse nakwishimira gutabarana nawe
1Samuel29:7 None isubirireyo mu mahoro
1Samuel29:8 Dawidi abaza Akishi ati: “Nyagasani
1Samuel29:9 Akishi aramusubiza ati: “Ntacyo! Ku bwanjye unshimisha nk'umumarayika w'Imana
1Samuel29:10 None rero ejo uzazindukane n'ingabo mwazanye
1Samuel29:11 Bukeye Dawidi azindukana n'ingabo ze basubira mu gihugu cy'Abafilisiti
1Samuel30:1 Ku munsi wa gatatu ni bwo Dawidi n'ingabo ze bageze i Sikulagi
1Samuel30:2 Abamaleki bari baranyaze abagore n'abandi bantu bose bari bahari
1Samuel30:3 Dawidi n'ingabo ze bahageze basanga umujyi ari umuyonga
1Samuel30:4 Dawidi n'ingabo ze baraboroga kugeza ubwo bari batagishobora kurira.
1Samuel30:5 Abagore bombi ba Dawidi
1Samuel30:6 Ingabo zose zari zarakaye cyane kubera ko abana babo bari banyazwe
1Samuel30:7 Dawidi abwira umutambyi Abiyatari mwene Ahimeleki ati: “Zana igishura cy'ubutambyi.” Abiyatari arakizana.
1Samuel30:8 Dawidi abaza Uhoraho ati: “Mbese ninkurikira Abamaleki nzabashyikira?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Bakurikire uzabashyikira
1Samuel30:9 Dawidi ahagurukana n'ingabo ze magana atandatu
1Samuel30:10 ingabo magana abiri zirahasigara
1Samuel30:11 Bakigenda ingabo za Dawidi zibona Umunyamisiri ku gasozi
1Samuel30:12 zimuha n'agatsima k'imbuto z'imitini n'amaseri abiri y'imizabibu yumye. Amaze kurya arahembuka. Yari amaze iminsi itatu n'amajoro atatu nta cyo arya nta n'icyo anywa.
1Samuel30:13 Dawidi aramubaza ati: “Uri umugaragu wa nde
1Samuel30:14 Twari twarateye mu majyepfo ya Kanāni
1Samuel30:15 Dawidi aramubaza ati: “Wajya kunyereka aho izo ngabo ziri?” Na we aramusubiza ati: “Ndahira mu izina ry'Imana ko utazanyica cyangwa ngo unsubize databuja
1Samuel30:16 Nuko arabajyana basanga Abamaleki bari aho hose barya banywa
1Samuel30:17 Ingabo za Dawidi zirabica
1Samuel30:18 Dawidi abohōza abantu bose Abamaleki bari banyaze
1Samuel30:19 Ntihagira umuntu n'umwe ubura yaba umuto cyangwa umukuru
1Samuel30:20 Anyaga amashyo n'imikumbi by'Abamaleki
1Samuel30:21 Dawidi agera aho ba bandi magana abiri bari bananiriwe
1Samuel30:22 Bamwe mu ngabo za Dawidi b'abagome n'ibipfayongo baravuga bati: “Aba bantu tutatabaranye ntituzabaha ku minyago twazanye
1Samuel30:23 Dawidi arababwira ati: “Oya bavandimwe
1Samuel30:24 Nta wakwemera rero igitekerezo cyanyu. Ahubwo mwese muragabana muringanize
1Samuel30:25 Ibyo Dawidi abigira ihame n'itegeko mu Bisiraheli
1Samuel30:26 Bageze i Sikulagi
1Samuel30:27 Ayoherereza ab'i Beteli n'ab'i Ramoti yo mu majyepfo n'ab'i Yatiri
1Samuel30:28 n'aba Aroweri n'ab'i Sifemoti n'aba Eshitemowa
1Samuel30:29 n'ab'i Rakala n'abo mu mijyi y'Abayerahimēli n'abo mu mijyi y'Abakeni
1Samuel30:30 n'ab'i Horuma n'ab'i Borashani n'aba Ataki
1Samuel30:31 n'ab'i Heburoni n'ab'ahantu hose Dawidi n'ingabo ze bigeze kugera.
1Samuel31:1 Igihe kimwe Abafilisiti barwanye n'Abisiraheli
1Samuel31:2 Abafilisiti basatira Sawuli n'abahungu be
1Samuel31:3 Urugamba rwibasira Sawuli
1Samuel31:4 Sawuli abwira uwamutwazaga intwaro ati: “Kura inkota yawe unsogote
1Samuel31:5 Uwamutwazaga intwaro abonye Sawuli apfuye
1Samuel31:6 Nguko uko uwo munsi Sawuli n'abahungu be batatu n'uwamutwazaga intwaro
1Samuel31:7 Nuko Abisiraheli bari batuye mu kibaya cya Yizerēli no hakurya ya Yorodani
1Samuel31:8 Ku munsi ukurikiye uw'urugamba Abafilisiti baza gucuza imirambo
1Samuel31:9 Bamuca umutwe bamucuza intwaro ze
1Samuel31:10 Intwaro za Sawuli bazishyira mu ngoro y'imanakazi Ashitaroti
1Samuel31:11 Abaturage b'i Yabeshi y'i Gileyadi bumvise ibyo Abafilisiti bakoreye Sawuli
1Samuel31:12 abagabo bose b'intwari bagenda ijoro ryose bajya i Betishani
1Samuel31:13 Hanyuma barundarunda amagufwa yabo
2Samuel1:1 Sawuli amaze gupfa Dawidi asubira i Sikulagi amaze gutsinda Abamaleki
2Samuel1:2 Ku munsi wa gatatu haza umuntu uvuye mu birindiro by'ingabo za Sawuli
2Samuel1:3 Dawidi aramubaza ati: “Uturutse he?” Aramusubiza ati: “Nacitse mu birindiro by'ingabo z'Abisiraheli.”
2Samuel1:4 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Ntekerereza uko byagenze.” Uwo muntu ati: “Abisiraheli barahunze kandi benshi muri bo baguye ku rugamba
2Samuel1:5 Dawidi abaza uwo musore ati: “Wamenye ute ko Sawuli n'umuhungu we Yonatani bapfuye?”
2Samuel1:6 Uwo musore ati: “Nari ku musozi wa Gilibowa mbona Sawuli yishingikirije icumu
2Samuel1:7 Akebutse arambona
2Samuel1:8 Ambaza uwo ndi we mubwira ko ndi Umwamaleki.
2Samuel1:9 Ni ko kumbwira ati: ‘Igira hino unsonge kuko mbabara cyane nubwo ngihumeka.’
2Samuel1:10 Nuko ndamwegera ndamusonga
2Samuel1:11 Dawidi ashishimura imyambaro ye
2Samuel1:12 bararira baraboroga
2Samuel1:13 Dawidi abaza uwo musore ati: “Uri uwa he?” Aramusubiza ati: “Data ni Umwamaleki w'umwimukīra mu gihugu cyanyu.”
2Samuel1:14 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Koko watinyutse kwica umwami Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta!”
2Samuel1:15 Dawidi ni ko guhamagara umwe mu ngabo ze aramubwira ati: “Genda umwice.” Nuko aramwica.
2Samuel1:16 Dawidi yari yabwiye uwo Mwamaleki ati: “Amaraso yawe aguhame
2Samuel1:17 Nuko Dawidi ahimba indirimbo yo kuririra Sawuli n'umuhungu we Yonatani
2Samuel1:18 ategeka ko izigishwa Abayuda bose. Ni indirimbo yitwa iy'umuheto
2Samuel1:19 “Isiraheli we
2Samuel1:20 Ntimubihingukirize ab'i Gati
2Samuel1:21 Misozi y'i Gilibowa
2Samuel1:22 Umuheto wa Yonatani ntiwahushaga umwanzi
2Samuel1:23 Sawuli na Yonatani bari bafite igikundiro mu mibereho yabo
2Samuel1:24 Bisirahelikazi
2Samuel1:25 Mbega ukuntu intwari zaguye ku rugamba! Yonatani yaguye mu mpinga z'imisozi.
2Samuel1:26 Igendere muvandimwe Yonatani unsigiye agahinda
2Samuel1:27 Mbega ukuntu intwari zahaguye! Intwaro z'intambara zararimbuwe.”
2Samuel2:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Dawidi agisha Uhoraho inama ati: “Mbese nzamuke njye muri umwe mu mijyi y'u Buyuda?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Zamuka ujyeyo.” Dawidi aramubaza ati: “Njye mu wuhe?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Jya i Heburoni.”
2Samuel2:2 Dawidi ajyayo
2Samuel2:3 Ajyana kandi n'ingabo ze zose n'imiryango yazo
2Samuel2:4 Nuko Abayuda baza i Heburoni
2Samuel2:5 abatumaho ati: “Uhoraho abahe umugisha
2Samuel2:6 Uhoraho abagirire neza kandi abiteho
2Samuel2:7 Nuko rero nimukomere mube intwari. Dore shobuja Sawuli yarapfuye
2Samuel2:8 Abuneri mwene Neri umugaba w'ingabo za Sawuli
2Samuel2:9 Amugira umwami wa Isiraheli yose igizwe n'intara ya Gileyadi
2Samuel2:10 Icyo gihe Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli yari amaze imyaka mirongo ine avutse
2Samuel2:11 Dawidi amara imyaka irindwi n'amezi atandatu i Heburoni ari umwami wabo.
2Samuel2:12 Abuneri mwene Neri n'ingabo za Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli
2Samuel2:13 Yowabu mwene Seruya na we ajyana n'ingabo za Dawidi berekeza i Gibeyoni. Iyo mitwe yombi y'ingabo ihurira ku cyuzi cy'i Gibeyoni
2Samuel2:14 Nuko Abuneri abwira Yowabu ati: “Abasore bamwe bo mu ngabo zanyu nibaze barwane n'abo mu zacu.” Yowabu arabyemera.
2Samuel2:15 Mu ngabo za Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli hahaguruka abasore cumi na babiri b'Ababenyamini
2Samuel2:16 Buri musore asingira umutwe w'uwo bahanganye
2Samuel2:17 Uwo munsi haba intambara ikomeye cyane
2Samuel2:18 Ubwo abahungu batatu ba Seruya ari bo Yowabu na Abishayi na Asaheli
2Samuel2:19 ni ko gukurikirana Abuneri nta gukebakeba.
2Samuel2:20 Nuko Abuneri akebutse aramubaza ati: “Mbese ni wowe Asaheli we?” Aramusubiza ati: “Ni jye.”
2Samuel2:21 Abuneri aramubwira ati: “Reka kunkurikirana
2Samuel2:22 Abuneri arongera aramubwira ati: “Waretse rwose kunkurikirana! Kuki ushaka ko nkwica? Nazongera nte kurebana na mukuru wawe Yowabu?”
2Samuel2:23 Nyamara Asaheli ntiyareka kumusatira. Nuko Abuneri amutikura umuhunda w'icumu mu nda uhinguka mu mugongo
2Samuel2:24 Ariko Yowabu na Abishayi bakurikirana Abuneri
2Samuel2:25 Ingabo z'Ababenyamini zikoranira iruhande rwa Abuneri
2Samuel2:26 Abuneri ahamagara Yowabu aramubaza ati: “Tuzageza he kwicana? Mbese ibyo ntibizatuzanira ingaruka mbi? Utegereje iki kugira ngo ubwire abantu bawe be gukomeza gukurikirana abavandimwe babo?”
2Samuel2:27 Yowabu aramusubiza ati: “Ndahiye Imana ihoraho ko iyo utaza kuvuga ayo magambo
2Samuel2:28 Nuko Yowabu avuza ihembe
2Samuel2:29 Muri iryo joro Abuneri n'ingabo ze bamanuka mu kibaya cya Yorodani bambuka uruzi
2Samuel2:30 Yowabu amaze kureka gukurikirana Abuneri akoranya ingabo
2Samuel2:31 Nyamara zari zishe abantu magana atatu na mirongo itandatu mu Babenyamini no mu ngabo za Abuneri.
2Samuel2:32 Nuko bajyana umurambo wa Asaheli
2Samuel3:1 Intambara imara igihe kirekire hagati y'abashyigikiye abo kwa Sawuli n'abashyigikiye Dawidi. Dawidi yagendaga agwiza amaboko
2Samuel3:2 Dore abahungu Dawidi yabyariye i Heburoni: uw'impfura ni Amunoni yabyaranye na Ahinowamu w'i Yizerēli
2Samuel3:3 uwa kabiri ni Kileyabu yabyaranye na Abigayile wahoze ari muka Nabali w'i Karumeli
2Samuel3:4 uwa kane ni Adoniya yabyaranye na Hagita
2Samuel3:5 naho uwa gatandatu ni Yitereyamu yabyaranye na Egila. Ngabo abahungu Dawidi yabyariye i Heburoni.
2Samuel3:6 Mu ntambara yabaye hagati y'ab'inzu ya Sawuli n'iya Dawidi
2Samuel3:7 Sawuli yari afite inshoreke yitwaga Risipa
2Samuel3:8 Abuneri arakazwa cyane n'ayo magambo ya Ishibosheti
2Samuel3:9 Imana impane yihanukiriye nintasohoza ibyo Uhoraho yarahiye Dawidi
2Samuel3:10 ari byo gukura ubwami mu muryango wa Sawuli kugira ngo Dawidi yime ingoma
2Samuel3:11 Ishibosheti ntiyabasha kugira icyo amusubiza kuko yamutinyaga.
2Samuel3:12 Abuneri ahera ko yohereza intumwa kuri Dawidi
2Samuel3:13 Dawidi aramusubiza ati: “Ndabyemeye
2Samuel3:14 Nuko Dawidi yohereza intumwa kuri Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli
2Samuel3:15 Ishibosheti ategeka ko bavana Mikali ku mugabo we Palitiyeli mwene Layishi.
2Samuel3:16 Palitiyeli agenda arira aherekeje umugore we kugera i Bahurimu. Bahageze Abuneri aramubwira ati: “Subira iwawe”. Nuko Palitiyeli asubirayo.
2Samuel3:17 Hanyuma Abuneri akoranya abakuru b'Abisiraheli
2Samuel3:18 none ngaho nimusohoze icyifuzo cyanyu! Uhoraho yamuvuzeho ati: ‘Umugaragu wanjye Dawidi ni we uzakura ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli mu maboko y'Abafilisiti
2Samuel3:19 Abuneri abyemeza n'Ababenyamini
2Samuel3:20 Yageze i Heburoni kwa Dawidi aherekejwe n'abantu makumyabiri
2Samuel3:21 Abuneri aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel3:22 Nyuma y'ibyo Yowabu n'izindi ngabo za Dawidi baratabaruka
2Samuel3:23 Yowabu n'ingabo bari kumwe bakihagera
2Samuel3:24 Yowabu ahita asanga umwami aramubaza ati: “Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki? Kubona Abuneri aza iwawe ukamureka akagenda!
2Samuel3:25 Buriya uzi ko Abuneri mwene Neri yazanywe no kukwinja kugira ngo agutate
2Samuel3:26 Yowabu avuye ibwami yohereza intumwa ngo zikurikire Abuneri
2Samuel3:27 Abuneri akigera ku irembo rya Heburoni
2Samuel3:28 Dawidi abimenye aravuga ati: “Uhoraho azi ko jye n'ubwami bwanjye
2Samuel3:29 Amaraso ye azahame Yowabu n'ab'inzu ye. Mu bazamukomokaho ntihakaburemo urwaye kuninda cyangwa indwara z'uruhu zanduza
2Samuel3:30 Yowabu na mukuru we Abishayi bishe Abuneri
2Samuel3:31 Dawidi abwira Yowabu n'abari kumwe na we bose ati: “Nimushishimure imyambaro yanyu
2Samuel3:32 bawuhamba i Heburoni. Dawidi ahacurira umuborogo
2Samuel3:33 Umwami ahimba indirimbo yo kuririra Abuneri agira ati: “Abuneri upfuye urw'abatagira ubwenge koko?
2Samuel3:34 Ntiwari uboshye amaboko cyangwa amaguru
2Samuel3:35 Hanyuma binginga Dawidi ngo afungure butarira
2Samuel3:36 Abantu bose babimenye barabishima
2Samuel3:37 Ibyo byatumye Abayuda n'Abisiraheli bose bamenya ko atari umwami wicishije Abuneri mwene Neri.
2Samuel3:38 Nuko umwami arakomeza abwira ibyegera bye ati: “Mbese ntimuzi ko twapfushije Umwisiraheli w'intwari akaba n'igikomangoma?
2Samuel3:39 Nanjye ubwanjye nubwo ndi umwami nkaba narimikishijwe amavuta
2Samuel4:1 Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli yumvise ko Abuneri yapfiriye i Heburoni
2Samuel4:2 Mu batware b'ingabo za Ishibosheti harimo abavandimwe babiri
2Samuel4:3 kuva igihe abaturage bayo bahungiraga i Gitayimu bakahatura kugeza n'ubu.
2Samuel4:4 Yonatani mwene Sawuli yari afite umuhungu witwaga Mefibosheti. Igihe umuntu yavaga i Yizerēli akabika Sawuli na Yonatani
2Samuel4:5 Bāna na Rekabu bene Rimoni w'i Bēroti bajya kwa Ishibosheti
2Samuel4:6 Abo bavandimwe bagezeyo
2Samuel4:7 
2Samuel4:8 Bagishyīra Dawidi i Heburoni baramubwira bati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel4:9 Dawidi arababwira ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho wankijije mu makuba yose
2Samuel4:10 ko ubwo Sawuli yapfaga uwaje kumumbikira yibwiraga ko anzaniye inkuru nziza. Nyamara naramufashe mwicira i Sikulagi
2Samuel4:11 None se nk'abagizi ba nabi biciye umuntu w'intungane mu nzu ye bakamutsinda ku buriri bwe
2Samuel4:12 Dawidi ategeka ingabo ze kwica Bāna na Rekabu
2Samuel5:1 Imiryango yose y'Abisiraheli yohereza abantu kuri Dawidi i Heburoni
2Samuel5:2 Byongeye kandi mu gihe Sawuli yari umwami wacu
2Samuel5:3 Nuko abakuru bose b'Abisiraheli basanga Umwami Dawidi i Heburoni
2Samuel5:4 Dawidi yabaye umwami amaze imyaka mirongo itatu avutse
2Samuel5:5 I Heburoni yahamaze imyaka irindwi n'amezi atandatu ari umwami w'u Buyuda
2Samuel5:6 Umwami Dawidi ajyana n'ingabo ze i Yeruzalemu
2Samuel5:7 Nyamara Dawidi yigaruriye ikigo ntamenwa cy'i Siyoni
2Samuel5:8 Yari yavuze ati: “Umuntu ushaka gutsinda Abayebuzi agomba kunyura mu muyoboro w'amazi. Naho izo mpumyi n'ibyo birema mbanga urunuka.” Ni yo mpamvu bavuga ngo “Ntihakagire impumyi cyangwa ikirema binjira mu ngoro y'umwami.”
2Samuel5:9 Dawidi atura muri icyo kigo ntamenwa
2Samuel5:10 Dawidi agenda arushaho gukomera
2Samuel5:11 Hiramu umwami w'i Tiri yohereza intumwa kuri Dawidi zimushyiriye ibiti by'amasederi
2Samuel5:12 Nuko Dawidi amenya ko Uhoraho yamwimitse kugira ngo abe umwami w'Abisiraheli
2Samuel5:13 Dawidi ageze i Yeruzalemu avuye i Heburoni yongera kugira inshoreke
2Samuel5:14 Dore amazina y'abavukiye i Yeruzalemu: Shamuwa na Shobabu
2Samuel5:15 na Yibuhari na Elishuwa
2Samuel5:16 na Elishama na Eliyada na Elifeleti.
2Samuel5:17 Abafilisiti bumvise ko Dawidi yimitswe kugira ngo abe umwami w'Abisiraheli
2Samuel5:18 Abafilisiti baraza bashinga ibirindiro mu kibaya cy'Abarefa.
2Samuel5:19 Dawidi abaza Uhoraho ati: “Mbese njye gutera Abafilisiti urabangabiza mbatsinde?” Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Genda ubatere
2Samuel5:20 Nuko Dawidi ajya i Bāli-Perasimu aba ari ho abatsindira Abafilisiti. Aravuga ati: “Uhoraho aciye icyuho mu banzi banjye nk'ahashenywe n'isuri.” Ni cyo cyatumye aho hantu bahita Bāli-Perasimu.
2Samuel5:21 Abafilisiti bahasiga ibigirwamana byabo
2Samuel5:22 Abafilisiti bongera gutera
2Samuel5:23 Dawidi abaza Uhoraho
2Samuel5:24 Niwumva imirindi y'abantu mu biti uhite ugaba igitero
2Samuel5:25 Dawidi abigenza nk'uko Uhoraho yamutegetse
2Samuel6:1 Dawidi yongera gukoranya intwari zose zo mu ngabo z'Abisiraheli
2Samuel6:2 Ajyana na zo i Bāla mu Buyuda kuzana Isanduku y'Imana
2Samuel6:3 Bayikura kwa Abinadabu wari utuye mu mpinga y'umusozi
2Samuel6:4 Bayikuye mu nzu kwa Abinadabu
2Samuel6:5 Dawidi n'abandi Bisiraheli bose bari kumwe bishimira imbere y'Isanduku y'Uhoraho
2Samuel6:6 Bageze ku mbuga y'i Nakoni
2Samuel6:7 Uhoraho arakarira Uza cyane
2Samuel6:8 Dawidi ababazwa n'uko Uhoraho yishe Uza
2Samuel6:9 Uwo munsi Dawidi atinya Uhoraho
2Samuel6:10 Ahitamo kutayijyana mu Murwa wa Dawidi
2Samuel6:11 Isanduku y'Uhoraho imarayo amezi atatu
2Samuel6:12 Hanyuma Umwami Dawidi amenya ko Uhoraho yahaye umugisha urugo rwa Obedi-Edomu n'ibye byose kubera Isanduku y'Imana. Nuko ajya kwa Obedi-Edomu avanayo Isanduku y'Imana
2Samuel6:13 Abayihetse bamaze gutera intambwe esheshatu
2Samuel6:14 Dawidi abyinira imbere y'Isanduku y'Uhoraho yitakuma cyane
2Samuel6:15 We n'abandi Bisiraheli bose baherekeza Isanduku y'Uhoraho
2Samuel6:16 Igihe Isanduku y'Uhoraho yinjiraga mu Murwa wa Dawidi
2Samuel6:17 Isanduku imaze kuhagera bayishyira mu ihema Dawidi yayiteguriye. Dawidi atambira Uhoraho ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
2Samuel6:18 Arangije gutamba ibyo bitambo
2Samuel6:19 Nuko agaburira Abisiraheli bose bahateraniye
2Samuel6:20 Dawidi na we arataha asabira abo mu rugo rwe umugisha
2Samuel6:21 Dawidi abwira Mikali ati: “Nzabyinira Uhoraho wantoranyije akandutisha so n'umuryango we wose
2Samuel6:22 Ku bwanjye nzakomeza kwiyoroshya no kwicisha bugufi
2Samuel6:23 Mikali umukobwa wa Sawuli ntiyigeze abyara arinda apfa.
2Samuel7:1 Umwami Dawidi amaze gutura mu ngoro ye
2Samuel7:2 Dawidi abwira umuhanuzi Natani ati: “Dore ntuye mu ngoro yubakishijwe amasederi
2Samuel7:3 Natani aramusubiza ati: “Genda ukore uko ubitekereza
2Samuel7:4 Nyamara iryo joro Uhoraho abwira Natani ati:
2Samuel7:5 “Genda umbwirire umugaragu wanjye Dawidi uti: ‘Ntabwo ari wowe uzanyubakira inzu nzabamo.
2Samuel7:6 Kuva igihe navaniye Abisiraheli mu Misiri kugeza n'ubu sinigeze mba mu nzu
2Samuel7:7 None se muri icyo gihe cyose
2Samuel7:8 None rero ubwire umugaragu wanjye Dawidi uti: ‘Ni jye Uhoraho Nyiringabo wakwikuriye mu rwuri aho wari uragiye intama
2Samuel7:9 Aho wajyaga hose sinigeze ngutererana
2Samuel7:10 Igihugu cy'ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli nzacyāgura nkibatuzemo mu mahoro. Abagome ntibazongera kubakandamiza nka kera
2Samuel7:11 igihe nari narashyizeho abacamanza bo kuyobora ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli. Nawe nzakurinda abanzi bawe bose. Jyewe Uhoraho ngusezeranyije ko abagukomokaho bazahora basimburana ku ngoma.
2Samuel7:12 Numara gupfa ugashyingurwa hamwe na ba sokuruza
2Samuel7:13 Uwo ni we uzanyubakira inzu
2Samuel7:14 Nzamubera Se na we ambere umwana
2Samuel7:15 Sinzigera mukuraho icyizere nk'uko nacyambuye Sawuli ubwo namurekaga nkamugusimbuza.
2Samuel7:16 Abazagukomokaho bazahora basimburana ku ngoma
2Samuel7:17 Natani abwira Dawidi ayo magambo yose nk'uko yayahishuriwe.
2Samuel7:18 Umwami Dawidi arinjira apfukama imbere y'Uhoraho
2Samuel7:19 Nyamara wowe Nyagasani Uhoraho
2Samuel7:20 Nkubwire iki se kandi Nyagasani Uhoraho
2Samuel7:21 Ku bw'Isezerano ryawe n'ubushake bwawe wankoreye ibikomeye
2Samuel7:22 Nyagasani Uhoraho
2Samuel7:23 Mbese ku isi hari undi muryango uhwanye n'ubwoko bwawe bw'Abisiraheli? Ni ubwoko Imana yicunguriye ibugira ubwayo
2Samuel7:24 Uhoraho
2Samuel7:25 None Uhoraho Mana
2Samuel7:26 Izina ryawe rizakuzwa iteka ryose bavuge bati: ‘Uhoraho Nyiringabo ni we Mana y'Abisiraheli.’ Byongeye kandi
2Samuel7:27 Koko ni wowe Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli wanyihishuriye
2Samuel7:28 Nyagasani Uhoraho
2Samuel7:29 Nuko rero Nyagasani
2Samuel8:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Dawidi yatsinze Abafilisiti
2Samuel8:2 atsinda n'Abamowabu. Yabategekaga kurambarara hasi
2Samuel8:3 Yatsinze na Hadadezeri mwene Rehobu umwami w'i Soba. Icyo gihe yashakaga kwigarurira akarere k'uruzi rwa Efurati.
2Samuel8:4 Nuko Dawidi amunyaga amagare y'intambara igihumbi
2Samuel8:5 Abanyasiriya b'i Damasi baza gutabara Hadadezeri umwami w'i Soba
2Samuel8:6 Dawidi ashyiraho ibigo by'ingabo i Damasi muri Siriya
2Samuel8:7 Dawidi anyaga ingabo zicuzwe mu izahabu z'abagaba b'ingabo ba Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:8 Anyaga n'imiringa myinshi i Beta n'i Berotayi
2Samuel8:9 Towu umwami wa Hamati yumvise ko Dawidi yatsinze ingabo zose za Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:10 yohereza umuhungu we Yoramu kumuramukiriza Umwami Dawidi
2Samuel8:11 Umwami Dawidi abyegurira Uhoraho nk'uko yari yamweguriye ifeza n'izahabu
2Samuel8:12 ari yo Abanyasiriya n'Abamowabu
2Samuel8:13 Dawidi yongera kuba icyamamare
2Samuel8:14 Nuko ashyiraho ibigo by'ingabo muri Edomu hose
2Samuel8:15 Dawidi yabaye umwami w'igihugu cyose cya Isiraheli
2Samuel8:16 Yowabu mwene Seruya yari umugaba w'ingabo. Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi yari umuvugizi w'ibwami.
2Samuel8:17 Sadoki mwene Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyatari bari abatambyi
2Samuel8:18 Benaya mwene Yehoyada yari umugaba w'ingabo zarindaga Dawidi zigizwe n'Abakereti n'Abapeleti
2Samuel9:1 Igihe kimwe Dawidi arabaza ati: “Mbese hari umuntu wo mu muryango wa Sawuli waba ukiriho
2Samuel9:2 Bamuzanira umwe mu bari abagaragu ba Sawuli witwa Siba
2Samuel9:3 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Mbese nta muntu wo mu muryango wa Sawuli waba akiriho
2Samuel9:4 Umwami arongera aramubaza ati: “Aba he?” Siba aramusubiza ati: “Aba i Lodebari kwa Makiri mwene Amiyeli.”
2Samuel9:5 Umwami Dawidi yohereza abajya kumuzanira uwo muhungu.
2Samuel9:6 Nuko Mefibosheti mwene Yonatani mwene Sawuli ageze ibwami
2Samuel9:7 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Humura
2Samuel9:8 Mefibosheti amwikubita imbere aramubwira ati: “Databuja
2Samuel9:9 Umwami ni ko guhamagaza Siba wa mugaragu wa Sawuli aramubwira ati: “Ibyari ibya Sawuli byose n'iby'abo mu muryango we byose mbihaye uyu mwuzukuru wa shobuja.
2Samuel9:10 Wowe n'abahungu bawe n'abagaragu bawe muzajya mumuhingira
2Samuel9:11 nuko asubiza umwami ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel9:12 Yari afite umwana muto w'umuhungu witwaga Mika
2Samuel9:13 Mefibosheti yari yararemaye amaguru yombi
2Samuel10:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Nahashi umwami w'Abamoni arapfa
2Samuel10:2 Dawidi aravuga ati: “Nzagirira neza Hanuni mwene Nahashi
2Samuel10:3 Nyamara abatware b'Abamoni babaza Hanuni bati: “Ese ubona ko Dawidi yarohereje aba bantu kwifatanya nawe mu kababaro
2Samuel10:4 Nuko Hanuni afata intumwa za Dawidi azogosha ubwanwa
2Samuel10:5 Dawidi amenye ibyabaye ku bagaragu be
2Samuel10:6 Abamoni babonye ko batumye Dawidi abazinukwa
2Samuel10:7 Dawidi abimenye yohereza Yowabu n'ingabo z'intwari zose bagaba igitero.
2Samuel10:8 Abamoni na bo barasohoka bashinga ibirindiro ku marembo y'umujyi wabo. Ba Banyasiriya b'i Soba n'ab'i Beti-Rehobu
2Samuel10:9 Yowabu abonye ko urugamba rumusatiriye imbere n'inyuma
2Samuel10:10 Ingabo zisigaye azishinga mukuru we Abishayi
2Samuel10:11 Yowabu aramubwira ati: “Abanyasiriya nibandusha amaboko untabare
2Samuel10:12 Ukomere turwane kigabo
2Samuel10:13 Yowabu n'ingabo ze basatira Abanyasiriya
2Samuel10:14 Abamoni babonye Abanyasiriya bahunze
2Samuel10:15 Abanyasiriya babonye ko batsinzwe n'Abisiraheli
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezeri atumiza ingabo z'Abanyasiriya batuye iburasirazuba hakurya y'uruzi rwa Efurati
2Samuel10:17 Dawidi abyumvise akoranya ingabo zose z'Abisiraheli
2Samuel10:18 Nuko Abanyasiriya baratsindwa barahunga
2Samuel10:19 Nuko abami bose bari bifatanyije na Hadadezeri babonye ko batsinzwe
2Samuel11:1 Mu ntangiriro z'umwaka wakurikiyeho
2Samuel11:2 Umunsi umwe nimugoroba Dawidi amaze kuruhuka
2Samuel11:3 Dawidi yohereza abantu kubaririza uwo mugore uwo ari we baramubwira bati: “Ni Batisheba umukobwa wa Eliyamu akaba n'umugore wa Uriya w'Umuheti.”
2Samuel11:4 Nuko Dawidi yohereza intumwa kumuzanira uwo mugore
2Samuel11:5 Uwo mugore asama inda
2Samuel11:6 Nuko Dawidi ahita atuma kuri Yowabu ati: “Nyoherereza Uriya w'Umuheti.” Yowabu aramwohereza.
2Samuel11:7 Uriya agezeyo Dawidi amubaza uko Yowabu n'abandi Bisiraheli bameze
2Samuel11:8 Bamaze kuvugana Dawidi abwira Uriya ngo agende ajye iwe kuruhuka. Agisohoka umwami amukurikiza intumwa imushyiriye n'izimano.
2Samuel11:9 Nyamara Uriya ntiyataha
2Samuel11:10 Babwira Dawidi ko Uriya atigeze ajya iwe
2Samuel11:11 Uriya aramusubiza ati: “Isanduku y'Isezerano iri ku rugamba
2Samuel11:12 Dawidi ni ko kumubwira ati: “Sibira uyu munsi
2Samuel11:13 nimugoroba Dawidi aramutumira
2Samuel11:14 Bukeye Dawidi yandikira Yowabu urwandiko aruha Uriya.
2Samuel11:15 Yari yanditsemo ngo “Mushyire Uriya imbere aho urugamba rukomeye
2Samuel11:16 Igihe Yowabu yari agose umujyi wa Raba
2Samuel11:17 Abamoni barasohoka barwana n'ingabo za Dawidi ziyobowe na Yowabu
2Samuel11:18 Yowabu yohereza intumwa yo gutekerereza Dawidi uko intambara yagenze
2Samuel11:19 arayibwira ati: “Numara kubwira umwami ibyabaye byose mu ntambara
2Samuel11:20 ashobora kurakara akakubaza ati: ‘Kuki mwateye uwo mujyi muwusatiriye cyane
2Samuel11:21 Ntimwari muzi uko Abimeleki mwene Gideyoni yiciwe i Tebesi? Yishwe n'umugore wari hejuru y'urukuta amuteye ingasire. None ni iki cyatumye musatira urukuta?’ Uzamubwire uti: ‘N'umugaragu wawe Uriya w'Umuheti yarapfuye!’ ”
2Samuel11:22 Iyo ntumwa igeze kwa Dawidi imutekerereza ibyo Yowabu yayitumye
2Samuel11:23 igira iti “Abamoni bagabye igitero gikomeye aho twari twashinze ibirindiro ku gasozi
2Samuel11:24 Ariko abari hejuru y'urukuta baraturashe
2Samuel11:25 Nuko Dawidi abwira iyo ntuma ati: “Genda ukomeze Yowabu
2Samuel11:26 Umugore wa Uriya aza kumenya ko umugabo we yapfuye
2Samuel11:27 Iminsi y'akababaro irangiye
2Samuel12:1 Uhoraho atuma Natani kuri Dawidi
2Samuel12:2 Uwo mukire yari afite amashyo menshi y'inka n'intama.
2Samuel12:3 Naho uwo mukene afite akāgazi k'intama kamwe gusa yiguriye
2Samuel12:4 Wa mukire agenderewe n'umushyitsi ntiyafata mu matungo ye kugira ngo amuzimanire
2Samuel12:5 Dawidi arakarira cyane uwo mukire
2Samuel12:6 kandi ako kāgazi k'intama azakariha intama enye kuko atagize impuhwe.”
2Samuel12:7 Natani ni ko kubwira Dawidi ati: “Uwo muntu ni wowe. Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: ‘Ni jyewe ubwanjye wagusīze amavuta kugira ngo ube umwami w'Abisiraheli
2Samuel12:8 Naguhaye gutwara ab'inzu yashobuja nguha n'abagore be
2Samuel12:9 None ni iki cyatumye uncumuraho ukarenga ku mategeko yanjye? Wagambiriye ko Uriya w'Umuheti yicwa n'Abamoni
2Samuel12:10 Kubera ko wansuzuguye ugacyura umugore wa Uriya w'Umuheti
2Samuel12:11 Ngiye kuguteza ibyago bizaturuka ku muryango wawe bwite
2Samuel12:12 Ibyo wakoze wabikoze rwihishwa
2Samuel12:13 Dawidi abwira Natani ati: “Koko nacumuye ku Uhoraho.” Natani aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho yakugiriye imbabazi nturi bupfe.
2Samuel12:14 Ariko kuko washujuguje utyo Uhoraho mu banzi be
2Samuel12:15 Nuko Natani yisubirira iwe. Uhoraho ahita ateza indwara wa mwana Dawidi yabyaranye n'uwahoze ari muka Uriya.
2Samuel12:16 Dawidi atakambira Imana asabira uwo mwana kugira ngo akire
2Samuel12:17 Ibyegera bye biramwinginga ngo abyuke ariko aranga
2Samuel12:18 Hashize iminsi irindwi umwana arapfa. Abagaragu ba Dawidi batinya kubimubwira
2Samuel12:19 Nyamara Dawidi abonye abagaragu be bongorerana
2Samuel12:20 Dawidi abyuka aho yari aryamye hasi
2Samuel12:21 Abagaragu be baramubaza bati: “Ibyo ukoze ibi ni ibiki? Umwana akiriho wigomwe kurya urarira
2Samuel12:22 Dawidi arabasubiza ati: “Umwana akiriho nigomwe kurya ndarira
2Samuel12:23 None se ko amaze gupfa
2Samuel12:24 Dawidi ahoza umugore we Batisheba
2Samuel12:25 atuma umuhanuzi Natani ngo amwite Yedidiya. Iryo zina risobanurwa ngo “Ukunzwe n'Uhoraho”.
2Samuel12:26 Hagati aho Yowabu akomeza kugota Raba umurwa w'Abamoni
2Samuel12:27 Nuko atuma kuri Dawidi ati: “Twateye Raba dufata agace k'umujyi k'aho bavoma
2Samuel12:28 none ube ari wowe ukoranya izindi ngabo z'Abisiraheli wigarurire umujyi
2Samuel12:29 Nuko Dawidi akoranya izindi ngabo zose atera Raba
2Samuel12:30 Afata ikamba ry'umwami wabo ryari rikozwe mu izahabu
2Samuel12:31 Asohora abaturage mu mujyi abakoresha imirimo y'agahato. Bamwe basatura ibiti bakoresheje inkero
2Samuel13:1 Dore ibyabaye hanyuma y'ibyo: Abusalomu mwene Dawidi yari afite mushiki we ufite uburanga witwaga Tamari. Dawidi yari afite undi muhungu witwaga Amunoni
2Samuel13:2 Ariko Tamari yari isugi ku buryo Amunoni atashoboraga kubonana na we
2Samuel13:3 Amunoni yari afite incuti y'incakura yitwaga Yonadabu mwene Shama
2Samuel13:4 Yonadabu abaza Amunoni ati: “Ntiwambwira igituma buri munsi urushaho kumererwa nabi kandi uri umwana w'umwami?” Amunoni aramusubiza ati: “Nkunda cyane Tamari mushiki wa mwene data Abusalomu.”
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu amugira inama ati: “Ujye kuryama wirwaze
2Samuel13:6 Nuko Amunoni araryama arirwaza. Se aje kumusura Amunoni aramubwira ati: “Ndashaka ko mushiki wanjye Tamari yaza akantegurira utugati tubiri
2Samuel13:7 Dawidi atuma kuri Tamari ngo ajye kwa musaza we Amunoni
2Samuel13:8 Tamari ajyayo asanga musaza we aryamye
2Samuel13:9 Amwegereza isahani kugira ngo afungure
2Samuel13:10 Amunoni abwira Tamari ati: “Nzanira ibyokurya mfungurire mu cyumba cyanjye.” Tamari afata twa tugati yateguye adushyīra musaza we mu cyumba.
2Samuel13:11 Akitumuhereza
2Samuel13:12 Tamari aramubwira ati: “Oya musaza wanjye
2Samuel13:13 Izo soni sinabona aho nzikwiza
2Samuel13:14 Ariko Amunoni yanga kumwumva
2Samuel13:15 Birangiye Amunoni amwanga urunuka
2Samuel13:16 Tamari aramubwira ati: “Ntibishoboka
2Samuel13:17 ahamagara umugaragu we aramubwira ati: “Vana uyu mukobwa aha umushyire hanze
2Samuel13:18 Uwo mugaragu abigenza atyo. Tamari yari yambaye ikanzu y'igiciro nk'uko abakobwa b'umwami bambaraga bakiri abāri.
2Samuel13:19 Nuko arayishishimura yitera ivu mu mutwe
2Samuel13:20 Musaza we Abusalomu aramubaza ati: “Mbese ni musaza wawe Amunoni wagufashe ku ngufu? Mwana wa mama
2Samuel13:21 Umwami Dawidi yumvise ibyabaye ararakara cyane.
2Samuel13:22 Abusalomu ntiyongera kuvugisha Amunoni
2Samuel13:23 Hashize imyaka ibiri
2Samuel13:24 Abusalomu ajya kubwira umwami ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel13:25 Ariko umwami aramubwira ati: “Oya mwana wanjye
2Samuel13:26 Abusalomu aramubwira ati: “Noneho reka tujyane na mwene data Amunoni.” Umwami aramubaza ati: “Kuki ushaka ko mujyana?”
2Samuel13:27 Abusalomu arahatiriza
2Samuel13:28 Bagezeyo Abusalomu ategeka abagaragu be ati: “Nimubona Amunoni amaze gusinda nkababwira nti: ‘Nimumwice’
2Samuel13:29 Abo bagaragu bica Amunoni nk'uko Abusalomu yabategetse. Abandi bana b'umwami babibonye
2Samuel13:30 Bakiri mu nzira
2Samuel13:31 Umwami ahita ahaguruka ashishimura imyambaro ye aryama hasi
2Samuel13:32 Nyamara Yonadabu mwene Shama mukuru wa Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel13:33 None nyagasani
2Samuel13:34 Abusalomu we yahise ahunga. Umusore wari ku izamu i Yeruzalemu akebutse iburengerazuba
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabu asanga umwami aramubwira ati: “Dore abahungu bawe baraje nk'uko nakubwiraga.”
2Samuel13:36 Akimara kuvuga atyo
2Samuel13:37 Dawidi amara iminsi myinsi aririra Amunoni. Abusalomu we ahungira kwa Talumayi mwene Amihudi umwami wa Geshuri
2Samuel13:38 ahamara imyaka itatu.
2Samuel13:39 Dawidi amaze gushira agahinda ka Amunoni wapfuye
2Samuel14:1 Yowabu mwene Seruya amenya ko umwami akumbuye Abusalomu cyane
2Samuel14:2 atumiza umugore w'umunyabwenge w'i Tekowa aramubwira ati: “Wambare nk'uwapfushije we kwisīga amavuta
2Samuel14:3 Hanyuma usange umwami umubwire ibyo ngiye kukubwira.” Nuko Yowabu arabimubwira.
2Samuel14:4 Uwo mugore w'i Tekowa asanga umwami
2Samuel14:5 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Ubaye iki?” Aramusubiza ati: “Umugabo wanjye yarapfuye nsigara ndi umupfakazi.
2Samuel14:6 Nari mfite abahungu babiri
2Samuel14:7 None ab'umuryango bose barampagurukiye bati: ‘Duhe umwicanyi na we tumwice
2Samuel14:8 Umwami abwira uwo mugore ati: “Isubirire iwawe ikibazo cyawe nzagikemura.”
2Samuel14:9 Na we aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel14:10 Ariko umwami aramubwira ati: “Nihagira n'ugutunga urutoki uzamunzanire
2Samuel14:11 Umugore ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel14:12 Umugore arongera ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel14:13 Umugore aravuga ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel14:14 Twese tuzapfa kuko ari ko Imana yagennye
2Samuel14:15 None nyagasani
2Samuel14:16 Nabyumva azankiza ushaka kundimburana n'umuhungu wanjye
2Samuel14:17 Nyagasani
2Samuel14:18 Umwami aramubwira ati: “Ntugire icyo umpisha mu byo ngiye kukubaza.” Umugore aramusubiza ati: “Mbaza nyagasani.”
2Samuel14:19 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Ibyo byose umbwiye nta ruhare Yowabu abifitemo?” Umugore aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel14:20 Yagenje atyo kugira ngo ugire icyo uhindura ku byerekeye Abusalomu. Nyagasani
2Samuel14:21 Nyuma yaho umwami abwira Yowabu ati: “Nemeye inama yawe
2Samuel14:22 Yowabu yikubita imbere y'umwami yubamye
2Samuel14:23 Yowabu ahita ajya i Geshuri
2Samuel14:24 Umwami aravuga ati: “Abusalomu azagende ajye iwe
2Samuel14:25 Mu Bisiraheli bose nta muntu n'umwe wari ufite uburanga nk'ubwa Abusalomu
2Samuel14:26 Buri mwaka yariyogosheshaga kuko umusatsi we wabaga umuremereye. Bamaraga kumwogosha bapima umusatsi we bakoresheje igipimo cy'ibwami
2Samuel14:27 Abusalomu yabyaye abahungu batatu n'umukobwa witwaga Tamari. Tamari uwo yari afite uburanga.
2Samuel14:28 Abusalomu amaze kugaruka i Yeruzalemu
2Samuel14:29 Nuko atuma kuri Yowabu ngo aze amutume ku mwami
2Samuel14:30 Abusalomu ni ko kubwira abagaragu be ati: “Dore umurima wa Yowabu uri hafi y'uwanjye urimo ingano za bushoki
2Samuel14:31 Yowabu ahita ajya kwa Abusalomu
2Samuel14:32 Abusalomu aramubwira ati: “Nagutumyeho ngo uze ngutume ku mwami umumbarize uti: ‘Kuki navuye i Geshuri? Icyari kumbera cyiza
2Samuel14:33 Yowabu aragenda abibwira umwami
2Samuel15:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Abusalomu yishakira igare rikururwa n'amafarasi
2Samuel15:2 Abusalomu yajyaga azinduka agahagarara ku nzira yinjira mu irembo ry'umurwa. Umuntu wese uhanyuze afite urubanza agiye kuregera umwami
2Samuel15:3 Abusalomu akamubwira ati: “Urubanza rwawe rurasobanutse kandi rufite ishingiro
2Samuel15:4 Abusalomu yajyaga avuga ati: “Icyangira umucamanza muri iki gihugu! Umuntu wese wajya anzanira urubanza cyangwa ikibazo najya mbikemura mu butabera.”
2Samuel15:5 Kandi iyo hagiraga umuntu umupfukamira
2Samuel15:6 Abusalomu akomeza kugenzereza atyo Abisiraheli bose bajyaga kuburanira umwami
2Samuel15:7 Hashize imyaka ine Abusalomu abwira umwami ati: “Nyemerera njye i Heburoni guhigura umuhigo nahigiye Uhoraho.
2Samuel15:8 Kuko nyagasani
2Samuel15:9 Umwami aramubwira ati: “Ugende amahoro!” Nuko Abusalomu ashyira nzira ajya i Heburoni.
2Samuel15:10 Agezeyo yohereza intumwa mu miryango yose y'Abisiraheli ngo zibabwire ziti: “Nimwumva ihembe rivuze
2Samuel15:11 Abusalomu akiri i Yeruzalemu yari yatumiye abantu magana abiri bajyana na we
2Samuel15:12 Ubwo Abusalomu yatambaga ibitambo
2Samuel15:13 Nuko umuntu araza abwira Dawidi ati: “Abisiraheli bayobotse Abusalomu.”
2Samuel15:14 Ako kanya Dawidi abwira abagaragu be bari i Yeruzalemu ati: “Nimuhaguruke duhunge Abusalomu. Nimugire bwangu kuko yakwihutira kutugirira nabi
2Samuel15:15 Baramubwira bati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel15:16 Nuko umwami ahungana n'ab'urugo rwe bose
2Samuel15:17 Ajyana n'abo bantu bose
2Samuel15:18 Abagaragu be bose
2Samuel15:19 Umwami abwira Itayi umutware w'abo Banyagati ati: “Ni iki gitumye ujyana natwe? Subirayo ugumane n'umwami mushya
2Samuel15:20 Dore ni bwo ukigera ino none ugiye kwangarana natwe
2Samuel15:21 Itayi aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel15:22 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Ngaho tambuka.” Itayi w'Umunyagati ajyana n'ingabo ze n'imiryango yabo yose.
2Samuel15:23 Dawidi yambukana n'abantu bose akagezi ka Kedironi
2Samuel15:24 Bagisohoka mu mujyi
2Samuel15:25 Umwami abwira Sadoki ati: “Nimusubize Isanduku y'Imana mu mujyi. Nintona ku Uhoraho
2Samuel15:26 Ariko natanyishimira
2Samuel15:27 Ese nturi umushishozi? Ngaho ugende amahoro usubire mu mujyi
2Samuel15:28 Nanjye nzategerereza ku byambu bya Yorodani
2Samuel15:29 Nuko Sadoki na Abiyatari basubiza Isanduku y'Imana i Yeruzalemu bagumayo.
2Samuel15:30 Dawidi azamuka Umusozi w'Iminzenze agenda aboroga
2Samuel15:31 Babwira Dawidi ko Ahitofeli yifatanyije na Abusalomu
2Samuel15:32 Dawidi ageze mu mpinga y'umusozi aho basengeraga Imana
2Samuel15:33 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Nitujyana uzandushya
2Samuel15:34 ahubwo usubire i Yeruzalemu ubwire Abusalomu uti: ‘Nyagasani
2Samuel15:35 Abatambyi Sadoki na Abiyatari muzaba muri kumwe
2Samuel15:36 Uko mugize icyo mumenya muzajye muntumaho abahungu banyu
2Samuel15:37 Nuko Hushayi incuti ya Dawidi asubira i Yeruzalemu
2Samuel16:1 Dawidi amaze kuminuka umusozi
2Samuel16:2 Umwami abaza Siba ati: “Ibyo ni iby'iki?” Siba aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel16:3 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Mefibosheti umwuzukuru wa shobuja ari he?” Siba aramusubiza ati: “Ubu ari i Yeruzalemu
2Samuel16:4 Nuko umwami aramubwira ati: “Nkugabiye ibyari ibya Mefibosheti byose.” Siba aravuga ati: “Urakarama nyagasani
2Samuel16:5 Umwami Dawidi ageze i Bahurimu haza umugabo witwaga Shimeyi mwene Gera wo mu muryango wa Sawuli
2Samuel16:6 Atera amabuye Umwami Dawidi n'abagaragu be bose
2Samuel16:7 Yamutukaga agira ati: “Hoshi genda wa mupfayongo we w'umwicanyi!
2Samuel16:8 Uhoraho akuryoje amaraso y'abo mu muryango wa Sawuli wasimbuye ku ngoma! Ubwami abuhaye Abusalomu umuhungu wawe
2Samuel16:9 Abishayi mwene Seruya abwira umwami ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel16:10 Dawidi aravuga ati: “Mpuriye he namwe bene Seruya? Niba Uhoraho yamubwiye ngo antuke
2Samuel16:11 Nuko Dawidi abwira abagaragu be bose na Abishayi ati: “Dore n'umuhungu wanjye nibyariye arashaka kunyica
2Samuel16:12 Birashoboka ko Uhoraho yareba amagorwa ndimo
2Samuel16:13 Dawidi n'abo bari kumwe bakomeza urugendo
2Samuel16:14 Hanyuma umwami n'abo bari kumwe bose bagera ku ruzi rwa Yorodani bananiwe
2Samuel16:15 Abusalomu agera i Yeruzalemu ari kumwe na Ahitofeli n'abandi Bisiraheli bose bari bamushyigikiye.
2Samuel16:16 Ubwo ni bwo Hushayi w'Umwaruki incuti ya Dawidi yasanze Abusalomu
2Samuel16:17 Abusalomu aramubaza ati: “Kuki wahemukiye incuti yawe ntimujyane?”
2Samuel16:18 Hushayi aramusubiza ati: “Nabitewe n'uko ari wowe watoranyijwe n'Uhoraho
2Samuel16:19 None kuki ntagukorera kandi so yari incuti yanjye? Bityo rero nk'uko nari umugaragu wa so
2Samuel16:20 Abusalomu abwira Ahitofeli ati: “Ngira inama
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofeli aramubwira ati: “Genda uryamane n'inshoreke za so yasize ku rugo. Ibyo bizatuma Abisiraheli bamenya ko wazinutswe so
2Samuel16:22 Nuko bashinga ihema ku gisenge gishashe cy'ingoro y'umwami
2Samuel16:23 Yaba Dawidi yaba Abusalomu
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofeli abwira Abusalomu ati: “Reka ntoranye ingabo ibihumbi cumi na bibiri nkurikire Dawidi iri joro.
2Samuel17:2 Ndamugeraho ananiwe nta gatege
2Samuel17:3 Bityo nzakugarurira abantu be bose
2Samuel17:4 Iyo nama inyura Abusalomu n'abakuru b'Abisiraheli bose.
2Samuel17:5 Ariko Abusalomu aravuga ati: “Nimuhamagare Hushayi w'Umwaruki
2Samuel17:6 Hushayi ahageze
2Samuel17:7 Hushayi aramusubiza ati: “Noneho
2Samuel17:8 Nawe ubwawe uzi neza so n'ingabo ze
2Samuel17:9 Ubu ashobora kuba yihishe mu buvumo cyangwa ahandi. Adutunguye hakagira abapfa muri twe
2Samuel17:10 Ubwo rero n'uw'intwari ushiritse ubwoba nk'intare azacika intege
2Samuel17:11 Inama nakugira rero ni uko wakoranyiriza hano Abisiraheli bose
2Samuel17:12 Aho azaba ari hose tuzamugeraho tuhazimagize nk'uko ikime gitonda hasi kikahazimagiza. Yaba we cyangwa abantu be nta wuzarokoka.
2Samuel17:13 Nagira umujyi ahungiramo Abisiraheli bose bazazana imigozi tuwukurure
2Samuel17:14 Abusalomu n'abandi Bisiraheli bose baravuga bati: “Inama ya Hushayi w'Umwaruki iruse iya Ahitofeli.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho yaburijemo inama nziza ya Ahitofeli
2Samuel17:15 Hushayi ahita ajya kubwira abatambyi Sadoki na Abiyatari
2Samuel17:16 Yongeraho ati: “Nimuhite mutuma kuri Dawidi ye kurara aho ari ku byambu bya Yorodani
2Samuel17:17 Yonatani mwene Abiyatari na Ahimāsi mwene Sadoki ntibashoboraga kwinjira mu mujyi kugira ngo batababona. Bategerereza Enirogeli
2Samuel17:18 Ariko umusore aza kubabona abibwira Abusalomu. Yonatani na Ahimāsi bagenda biruka bagera i Bahurimu ku muntu wari ufite iriba iwe mu rugo
2Samuel17:19 Umugore nyir'urugo ashyira ikidasesa hejuru y'iriba
2Samuel17:20 Abagaragu ba Abusalomu binjira muri urwo rugo babaza uwo mugore bati: “Ahimāsi na Yonatani bari he?” Arabasubiza ati: “Bambutse akagezi.” Barabashaka barababura bisubirira i Yeruzalemu.
2Samuel17:21 Bamaze kugenda
2Samuel17:22 Dawidi n'abo bari kumwe bose bahita bambuka Yorodani
2Samuel17:23 Ahitofeli abonye ko batemeye inama ye
2Samuel17:24 Dawidi yahungiye i Mahanayimu
2Samuel17:25 Abusalomu yari yarashyizeho Amasa
2Samuel17:26 Abusalomu n'abo Bisiraheli bakambika mu ntara ya Gileyadi.
2Samuel17:27 Dawidi ageze i Mahanayimu
2Samuel17:28 bamuzanira ibyo kuryamaho n'amabesani n'inzabya z'ibumba
2Samuel17:29 n'ubuki n'amata y'ikivuguto n'amavuta akuze
2Samuel18:1 Dawidi akoranya ingabo ze azigabanyamo imitwe
2Samuel18:2 Umutwe umwe uyoborwa na Yowabu mwene Seruya
2Samuel18:3 Ariko ingabo ze ziramusubiza ziti: “Ntugomba gutabarana natwe! Turamutse duhunze abanzi bacu ntibatwitaho
2Samuel18:4 Umwami arababwira ati: “Icyo muhisemo ni cyo nkora.” Nuko ahagarara ku irembo ry'umujyi ingabo zimunyura imbere zitabaye
2Samuel18:5 Umwami ategeka Yowabu na Abishayi na Itayi ati: “Ndabinginze ntimuzagire icyo mutwara uwo musore Abusalomu.” Ingabo zose zumva umwami aha abo batware iryo tegeko.
2Samuel18:6 Nuko ingabo ziratabara
2Samuel18:7 Ingabo za Dawidi zitsinda iz'Abisiraheli
2Samuel18:8 Intambara ikwira muri ako karere kose
2Samuel18:9 Abusalomu ahubirana n'ingabo za Dawidi ari ku nyumbu ye
2Samuel18:10 Umwe mu ngabo za Dawidi aramubona ajya kubwira Yowabu ati: “Nabonye Abusalomu anagana mu giti.”
