2Samuel18:11 Yowabu aramubwira ati: “Niba wamubonye kuki utahise umutsinda aho? Ubu simba nguhaye ibikoroto icumi by'ifeza n'umukandara?”
2Samuel18:12 Undi aramusubiza ati: “Kabone n'iyo wampa ibikoroto igihumbi by'ifeza sinakwica umwana w'umwami
2Samuel18:13 N'iyo nkora ishyano nkamwica
2Samuel18:14 Yowabu aramubwira ati: “Singiye gukomeza guta igihe mvugana nawe.” Ni ko gufata amacumu atatu
2Samuel18:15 Nuko abasore icumi bari batwaje Yowabu intwaro begera Abusalomu baramwica.
2Samuel18:16 Yowabu ategeka ko bavuza ihembe rihagarika intambara
2Samuel18:17 Bafata umurambo wa Abusalomu bawujugunya mu rwobo aho mu ishyamba
2Samuel18:18 Abusalomu akiriho yari yarashingishije inkingi y'ibuye mu Gikombe cyitwa icy'umwami
2Samuel18:19 Ahimāsi mwene Sadoki abwira Yowabu ati: “Reka nihute njye kubwira umwami inkuru nziza
2Samuel18:20 Ariko Yowabu aramubwira ati: “Ntujyeyo uyu munsi
2Samuel18:21 Yowabu abwira umugaragu we w'Umunyakushi ngo ajye kubwira umwami ibyo yabonye
2Samuel18:22 Ariko Ahimāsi mwene Sadoki arongera abwira Yowabu ati: “Uko byamera kose
2Samuel18:23 Na we ati: “Uko byamera kose reka ngende!” Yowabu ati: “Ngaho genda!” Ahimāsi ariruka anyura mu nzira yo mu kibaya cya Yorodani
2Samuel18:24 Icyo gihe Dawidi yari yicaye mu kirongozi cy'umunara hagati y'inzugi zombi
2Samuel18:25 Abibwiye umwami
2Samuel18:26 Uwo murinzi abona undi muntu aje yiruka ari wenyine
2Samuel18:27 Umurinzi aravuga ati: “Umuntu wa mbere ndabona yiruka nka Ahimāsi mwene Sadoki.” Umwami ati: “Ni umuntu mwiza
2Samuel18:28 Ahimāsi ageze hafi ararangurura abwira umwami ati: “Ni amahoro!” Nuko amwikubita imbere yubamye ati: “Uhoraho Imana yawe asingizwe
2Samuel18:29 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Uwo musore Abusalomu yaba ari amahoro?” Ahimāsi aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel18:30 Umwami aramubwira ati: “Igirayo
2Samuel18:31 Wa Munyakushi na we aba arahageze
2Samuel18:32 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Uwo musore Abusalomu
2Samuel19:1 Umwami abyumvise ashengurwa n'ishavu
2Samuel19:2 Maze baza kubwira Yowabu ko umwami aririra Abusalomu akaba ari mu kababaro ko gupfusha.
2Samuel19:3 Bityo ibyishimo byo gutsinda k'uwo munsi bihinduka akababaro ko gupfusha
2Samuel19:4 Ingabo zose zitabarutse zigaruka mu mujyi zibebera nk'izahunze ku rugamba.
2Samuel19:5 Umwami yitwikīra mu maso
2Samuel19:6 Nuko Yowabu yinjira aho umwami ari aramubwira ati: “Uyu munsi ingabo zawe zagukirije ubugingo
2Samuel19:7 Ukunda abakwanga
2Samuel19:8 None haguruka ujye gushimira ingabo zawe. Nkurahiye Uhoraho ko nutabigenza utyo
2Samuel19:9 Nuko umwami arahaguruka yicara imbere y'irembo ry'umujyi. Babwira ingabo ze zose bati: “Umwami yicaye imbere y'irembo.” Ziraza zikoranira imbere ye. Abisiraheli bari bahunze buri wese yagiye iwe.
2Samuel19:10 Mu miryango yose y'Abisiraheli baravugaga bati: “Umwami yadukijije abanzi bacu cyane cyane Abafilisiti
2Samuel19:11 None Abusalomu twari twariyimikiye kugira ngo atubere umwami
2Samuel19:12 Iyo nkuru igera ku Mwami Dawidi
2Samuel19:13 Muri abavandimwe banjye
2Samuel19:14 Muzambwirire kandi Amasa muti: ‘Mbese ntituri amaraso amwe? Imana izampane yihanukiriye
2Samuel19:15 Ayo magambo anyura Abayuda bose bahuza inama
2Samuel19:16 Nuko umwami araza agera kuri Yorodani. Abayuda bajya i Gilugali gusanganira umwami no kumwambutsa Yorodani.
2Samuel19:17 Shimeyi mwene Gera w'Umubenyamini w'i Bahurimu
2Samuel19:18 ari kumwe n'Ababenyamini igihumbi. Siba wahoze ari umugaragu wa Sawuli
2Samuel19:19 Ubwato bwagombaga kwambutsa umwami n'ab'umuryango we bwari aho butegereje icyo umwami ategeka. Shimeyi mwene Gera amaze kwambuka yikubita hasi imbere y'umwami
2Samuel19:20 aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel19:21 Rwose nyagasani nzi ko nacumuye
2Samuel19:22 Nuko Abishayi mwene Seruya abaza umwami ati: “Mbese ibyo byabuza Shimeyi kwicwa
2Samuel19:23 Ariko Dawidi aramusubiza ati: “Mpuriye he namwe bene Seruya? Kuki mushaka kumbangamira? Uyu munsi nta Mwisiraheli ukwiye gupfa kuko namenye neza ko ari jye mwami w'Abisiraheli.”
2Samuel19:24 Nuko umwami abwira Shimeyi ati: “Nturi bupfe”
2Samuel19:25 Mefibosheti umwuzukuru wa Sawuli na we ajya gusanganira umwami. Ntiyari yarigeze yoga ibirenge cyangwa akata ubwanwa
2Samuel19:26 i Yeruzalemu. Umwami aramubaza ati: “Mefibosheti
2Samuel19:27 Aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel19:28 Nyamara nyagasani
2Samuel19:29 Ab'umuryango wa sogokuru bose bari bakwiye kwicwa
2Samuel19:30 Umwami aramubwira ati: “Wikwirirwa uvuga byinshi. Ntegetse ko wowe na Siba mugabana isambu yahoze ari iya Sawuli.”
2Samuel19:31 Mefibosheti aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel19:32 Barizilayi w'Umunyagileyadi ava i Rogelimu kugira ngo aherekeze umwami amugeze hakurya ya Yorodani.
2Samuel19:33 Yari umusaza umaze imyaka mirongo inani avutse. Igihe umwami yari i Mahanayimu
2Samuel19:34 Umwami aramubwira ati: “Twambukane tujyane i Yeruzalemu nzakwitura ineza wangiriye.”
2Samuel19:35 Ariko Barizilayi asubiza umwami ati: “Nshigaje imyaka ingahe yo kubaho byatuma tujyana i Yeruzalemu?
2Samuel19:36 Dore maze imyaka mirongo inani mvutse
2Samuel19:37 kandi si ngombwa ko umpa ingororano. Icyakora ndihangana nguherekeze nkwambutse Yorodani
2Samuel19:38 hanyuma nisubirire mu mujyi wacu abe ari ho nzapfira
2Samuel19:39 Umwami aravuga ati: “Kimuhamu turajyana kandi nzamukorera ibyo ushaka byose
2Samuel19:40 Abantu bose bamaze kwambuka Yorodani umwami ahobera Barizilayi
2Samuel19:41 Umwami yambukana atyo na Kimuhamu
2Samuel19:42 Nuko Abisiraheli bose basanga umwami baramubaza bati: “Ni kuki abavandimwe bacu b'Abayuda baje rwihishwa kugusanganira kugira ngo bakwambutse Yorodani
2Samuel19:43 Abayuda bose basubiza Abisiraheli bati: “Ni uko dufitanye n'umwami isano ya bugufi. Icyabarakaje ni iki? Hari iby'umwami twariye cyangwa hari ibyo yatugororeye?”
2Samuel19:44 Abisiraheli barabasubiza bati: “Dufite uruhare ku mwami incuro icumi kubarusha
2Samuel20:1 Aho i Gilugali hari Umubenyamini w'umupfayongo witwaga Sheba mwene Bikuri. Avuza ihembe
2Samuel20:2 Nuko Abisiraheli bose bava kuri Dawidi bayoboka Sheba mwene Bikuri
2Samuel20:3 Dawidi ageze iwe i Yeruzalemu afata za nshoreke ze icumi yari yasize ku rugo
2Samuel20:4 Umwami abwira Amasa ati: “Unkoranyirize ingabo z'Abayuda mu minsi itatu
2Samuel20:5 Amasa ajya gukoranya ingabo z'Abayuda
2Samuel20:6 Dawidi ni ko kubwira Abishayi ati: “Sheba mwene Bikuri azaduteza ibyago bikomeye
2Samuel20:7 Nuko Abishayi ajyana n'ingabo zose za Yowabu n'Abakereti n'Abapeleti
2Samuel20:8 Bageze hafi y'urutare rw'i Gibeyoni bahura na Amasa. Yowabu yari yambaye imyambaro ya gisirikari
2Samuel20:9 Yowabu aramusuhuza ati: “Ni amahoro muvandimwe?” Afatisha ikiganza cy'iburyo ubwanwa bwa Amasa nk'ushaka kumusoma.
2Samuel20:10 Ariko Amasa ntiyita ku nkota Yowabu yari afite mu kuboko kw'ibumoso
2Samuel20:11 Umwe mu ngabo za Yowabu asigara ku murambo wa Amasa
2Samuel20:12 Ingabo zageraga kuri uwo murambo urambitse mu maraso mu nzira hagati zarahagararaga
2Samuel20:13 Amaze kuwukura mu nzira ingabo zose ziratambuka
2Samuel20:14 Sheba yari yaranyuze mu miryango yose y'Abisiraheli agera mu mujyi wa Abeli-Betimāka
2Samuel20:15 Ingabo za Yowabu zigota Abeli-Betimāka
2Samuel20:16 Ariko umugore umwe w'umunyabwenge wo muri uwo mujyi atera hejuru ati: “Yemwe
2Samuel20:17 Yowabu aramwegera
2Samuel20:18 Umugore ati: “Kera hari imvugo ngo ‘Nimujye Abeli muhashakire igisubizo’
2Samuel20:19 Abisiraheli bose bazi ko abatuye uyu mujyi turi abanyamahoro n'abanyamurava
2Samuel20:20 Yowabu aramusubiza ati: “Ibyo ntibikabeho! Jyewe nta mugambi mfite wo kuwusenya cyangwa kuwurimbura.
2Samuel20:21 Ibyo si byo nshaka
2Samuel20:22 Uwo mugore aragenda akoranya abaturage bose
2Samuel20:23 Icyo gihe Yowabu yari umugaba w'ingabo zose z'Abisiraheli
2Samuel20:24 Adoramu ni we wayoboraga imirimo y'agahato
2Samuel20:25 Shewa yari umunyamabanga
2Samuel20:26 Ira w'Umunyayayiri na we yari umutambyi ukorera Dawidi.
2Samuel21:1 Ku ngoma ya Dawidi hateye inzara imara imyaka itatu ikurikiranye
2Samuel21:2 Abanyagibeyoni ntabwo bari Abisiraheli
2Samuel21:3 Arababaza ati: “Nabakorera iki? Nabaha cyiru ki kugira ngo musabire umugisha igihugu Uhoraho yaduhaye?”
2Samuel21:4 Abanyagibeyoni baramusubiza bati: “Ikibazo dufitanye na Sawuli n'umuryango we nticyarangizwa n'ifeza cyangwa izahabu
2Samuel21:5 Abanyagibeyoni baramubwira bati: “Sawuli yishe benshi muri twe
2Samuel21:6 None nimuduhe abantu barindwi mu bamukomokaho tubicire imbere y'Uhoraho
2Samuel21:7 Ariko kubera indahiro Dawidi yari yararahiriye Yonatani mwene Sawuli mu izina ry'Uhoraho
2Samuel21:8 Umwami afata Arumoni na Mefibosheti abahungu Sawuli yabyaranye na Risipa umukobwa wa Aya
2Samuel21:9 Bose uko ari barindwi abaha Abanyagibeyoni babicira icyarimwe ku musozi imbere y'Uhoraho
2Samuel21:10 Risipa wa mukobwa wa Aya afata ibigunira
2Samuel21:11 Baza kubwira Dawidi icyo Risipa umukobwa wa Aya akaba n'inshoreke ya Sawuli yakoze.
2Samuel21:12 Dawidi ajya i Yabeshi y'i Gileyadi
2Samuel21:13 Nuko bazana ayo magufwa
2Samuel21:14 yose bayahamba hamwe na Kishi se wa Sawuli i Sela mu ntara y'Ababenyamini. Bamaze kurangiza ibyo byose nk'uko umwami yabitegetse
2Samuel21:15 Abafilisiti bongera gutera Abisiraheli. Dawidi atabarana n'ingabo ze
2Samuel21:16 Nuko Umufilisiti muremure kandi munini witwaga Ishibi-Benobu ashaka kwica Dawidi. Yari afite icumu ry'umuringa ripima ibiro bitatu n'igice
2Samuel21:17 Ariko Abishayi mwene Seruya agoboka Dawidi
2Samuel21:18 Ikindi gihe urugamba rwongera kuremera i Goba hagati y'Abisiraheli n'Abafilisiti
2Samuel21:19 Mu kindi gitero cyakurikiyeho aho i Goba
2Samuel21:20 Ikindi gihe urugamba ruremera i Gati. Hari Umufilisiti w'intwari muremure kandi munini wari ufite intoki esheshatu kuri buri kiganza
2Samuel21:21 Nuko atuka Abisiraheli
2Samuel21:22 Abo Bafilisiti barebare kandi banini uko ari bane bakomokaga i Gati
2Samuel22:1 Uhoraho amaze gukiza Dawidi abanzi be bose cyane cyane Sawuli
2Samuel22:2 agira ati:: Uhoraho ni urutare runkingira
2Samuel22:3 Imana yanjye ni urutare mpungiraho
2Samuel22:4 Uhoraho nasingizwe! Naramutabaje ankiza abanzi banjye.
2Samuel22:5 Urupfu rwanyugarije nk'imivumba y'amazi
2Samuel22:6 Ingoyi z'ikuzimu zaramboshye
2Samuel22:7 Nageze mu kaga ntakambira Uhoraho
2Samuel22:8 Icyo gihe isi yarahungabanye iratingita
2Samuel22:9 Uburakari bwayo bwasohotse mu mazuru yayo nk'umwotsi ucucumuka
2Samuel22:10 Uhoraho yitsa ijuru aramanuka
2Samuel22:11 Umukerubi aguruka amuhetse
2Samuel22:12 Uhoraho ntiyagaragaraga yari atwikiriwe n'umwijima
2Samuel22:13 Aho yari ari haturukaga imirabyo n'ibishashi by'umuriro.
2Samuel22:14 Uhoraho ahindishiriza inkuba mu ijuru
2Samuel22:15 Yarashe imyambi ye atatanya abanzi
2Samuel22:16 Ubutaka bwo munsi y'inyanja bwaragaragaye
2Samuel22:17 Nari ngiye kurohama mu mazi
2Samuel22:18 Yankijije umwanzi wanjye ukomeye
2Samuel22:19 Ku munsi w'amakuba bari bantangatanze
2Samuel22:20 Yankuye mu makuba anshyira mu mudendezo
2Samuel22:21 Uhoraho angirira neza kuko ndi intungane
2Samuel22:22 Nakurikije amabwiriza y'Uhoraho
2Samuel22:23 Koko ibyemezo yafashe byose ndabyubahiriza
2Samuel22:24 Nayibereye indakemwa
2Samuel22:25 Uhoraho yanyituye ibikwiranye n'ubutungane bwanjye
2Samuel22:26 Uhoraho
2Samuel22:27 Uboneye umugaragariza ko uboneye
2Samuel22:28 Koko ugoboka ubwoko bwawe buri mu kaga
2Samuel22:29 Uhoraho
2Samuel22:30 Mana yanjye
2Samuel22:31 Imigenzereze y'Imana ntigira amakemwa
2Samuel22:32 Uhoraho wenyine ni we Mana
2Samuel22:33 Imana mpungiraho ni inyambaraga
2Samuel22:34 Impa kugenda nta mpungenge nk'imparakazi itondagira ibihanamanga
2Samuel22:35 Ni yo intoza kujya ku rugamba
2Samuel22:36 Mana
2Samuel22:37 Ni wowe nkesha kugenda nta cyo nikanga
2Samuel22:38 Nirukankana abanzi banjye nkabarimbura
2Samuel22:39 Ndabatsemba nkabajanjagura ntibashobore kwegura umutwe
2Samuel22:40 Ku rugamba ni wowe umpa imbaraga
2Samuel22:41 Utuma abanzi banjye bampunga
2Samuel22:42 Baratakamba ariko ntibagire n'umwe ubatabara
2Samuel22:43 Ndabaribata nkabahindura nk'umukungugu
2Samuel22:44 Uhoraho
2Samuel22:45 Abanyamahanga baranyobotse
2Samuel22:46 Abanyamahanga bacitse intege
2Samuel22:47 Uhoraho arakabaho! Nasingizwe we rutare runkingira. Imana yo rutare rwanjye n'Umukiza wanjye nihabwe ikuzo.
2Samuel22:48 Imana yanjye ni yo impōrera
2Samuel22:49 yangobotoye mu maboko y'abanzi banjye. Uhoraho
2Samuel22:50 Ni cyo gituma ngusingiza mu ruhame rw'amahanga
2Samuel22:51 Umwami wiyimikiye umuha gutsinda gukomeye
2Samuel23:1 Aya ni yo magambo y'indunduro yavuzwe na Dawidi. “Nimwumve amagambo ya Dawidi mwene Yese
2Samuel23:2 Mwuka w'Uhoraho avugira muri jye
2Samuel23:3 Imana y'Abisiraheli yaravuze
2Samuel23:4 ameze nk'izuba rirashe mu gitondo kitagira igicu
2Samuel23:5 Ni koko Imana yagiriye neza umuryango wanjye
2Samuel23:6 Abapfayongo bose bazamera nk'amahwa bajugunye
2Samuel23:7 bazabasunikisha icyuma cyangwa uruti rw'icumu
2Samuel23:8 Aya ni yo mazina y'intwari mu ngabo za Dawidi: Yoshebu-Bashebeti w'i Hakemoni yari umutware w'abitwa “Intwari eshatu”. Uwo ni we wicishije icumu abanzi magana inani mu gitero kimwe.
2Samuel23:9 Ukurikiraho muri za Ntwari eshatu ni Eleyazari mwene Dodo w'Umwahohi. Yari kumwe na Dawidi ubwo bashotōraga Abafilisiti bari bakoranyijwe no kubarwanya. Abisiraheli barahunze
2Samuel23:10 ariko we arakomeza ararwana
2Samuel23:11 Uwa gatatu ni Shama mwene Age w'Umuharari. Igihe Abafilisiti bari bakoraniye hafi y'umurima w'inkori
2Samuel23:12 Nyamara Shama we ashinga ibiringiro muri uwo murima
2Samuel23:13 Ikindi gihe intwari eshatu zo muri za zindi mirongo itatu
2Samuel23:14 Ubwo Dawidi yari aho hantu hatavogerwa
2Samuel23:15 Dawidi aravuga ati: “Icyampa ku mazi yo mu iriba ryo hafi y'irembo ry'i Betelehemu!”
2Samuel23:16 Za ngabo eshatu z'intwari zibyumvise
2Samuel23:17 Maze aravuga ati: “Uhoraho
2Samuel23:18 Abishayi mukuru wa Yowabu mwene Seruya yari umuyobozi wa za Ntwari eshatu. Yigeze kwicisha icumu abantu magana atatu mu gitero kimwe
2Samuel23:19 ndetse aba icyamamare kuzirusha. Nyamara nubwo yabaye umuyobozi wazo ntiyigeze abarwa muri zo.
2Samuel23:20 Hari na Benaya mwene Yehoyada w'i Kabusēli
2Samuel23:21 Ni we kandi wishe Umunyamisiri w'igihangange. Uwo Munyamisiri yari yitwaje icumu
2Samuel23:22 Ngibyo ibyo Benaya mwene Yehoyada yakoze
2Samuel23:23 Yabaye ikirangirire kurusha ba batware mirongo itatu
2Samuel23:24 Aba ni bo bari intwari mirongo itatu: Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu
2Samuel23:25 Shama w'i Harodi
2Samuel23:26 Helesi w'i Peleti
2Samuel23:27 Abiyezeri w'i Anatoti
2Samuel23:28 Salimoni w'Umwahohi
2Samuel23:29 Helebu mwene Bāna w'i Netofa
2Samuel23:30 Benaya w'i Piratoni
2Samuel23:31 Abiyaluboni w'i Araba
2Samuel23:32 Eliyahiba w'i Shālabimu
2Samuel23:33 Shama w'Umuharari
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti mwene Ahasibayi w'i Māka
2Samuel23:35 Hesiro w'i Karumeli
2Samuel23:36 Yigali mwene Natani w'i Soba
2Samuel23:37 Seleki w'Umwamoni
2Samuel23:38 Ira w'i Yatiri
2Samuel23:39 Uriya w'Umuheti. Bose hamwe ni mirongo itatu na barindwi.
2Samuel24:1 Uhoraho yongera kurakarira cyane Abisiraheli
2Samuel24:2 Umwami abwira Yowabu umugaba w'ingabo ze ati: “Jya mu Bisiraheli bose uhereye i Dani mu majyaruguru ukageza i Bērisheba mu majyepfo
2Samuel24:3 Yowabu aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel24:4 Ariko umwami aganza Yowabu n'abandi bakuru b'ingabo mu magambo
2Samuel24:5 Bambuka Yorodani bashinga amahema mu majyepfo ya Aroweri
2Samuel24:6 Banyura mu ntara ya Gileyadi bagera i Tahatimu-Hodishi
2Samuel24:7 Bamanuka berekeje ku kigo ntamenwa cy'i Tiri no mu mijyi yose y'Abahivi n'iy'Abanyakanāni
2Samuel24:8 Bityo bazenguruka igihugu cyose
2Samuel24:9 Nuko Yowabu abwira umwami umubare w'abagabo bashobora kujya ku rugamba. Mu Bisiraheli habonetse abagabo b'intwari ibihumbi magana inani
2Samuel24:10 Dawidi amaze kubarura abantu
2Samuel24:11 Mu gitondo Dawidi akibyuka
2Samuel24:12 “Genda ubwire Dawidi uti: ‘Uhoraho avuze ko hari ibyago bitatu agiye kukubwira
2Samuel24:13 Nuko Gadi asanga Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Uhisemo ko habaho imyaka irindwi y'inzara mu gihugu cyawe
2Samuel24:14 Dawidi abwira Gadi ati: “Ndumva nshenguwe n'agahinda! Ibyo ari byo byose
2Samuel24:15 Muri icyo gitondo
2Samuel24:16 Ubwo umumarayika w'Uhoraho yari agiye kurimbura i Yeruzalemu
2Samuel24:17 Dawidi abonye uko uwo mumarayika arimbura abantu
2Samuel24:18 Uwo munsi Gadi asanga Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Zamuka wubakire Uhoraho urutambiro ku mbuga ya Arawuna w'Umuyebuzi!”
2Samuel24:19 Dawidi yita ku byo Gadi yamubwiye
2Samuel24:20 Arawuna abonye umwami azamukanye n'ibyegera bye amugana
2Samuel24:21 Arawuna aramubaza ati: “Databuja
2Samuel24:22 Arawuna abwira Dawidi ati: “Nyagasani
2Samuel24:23 Nyagasani
2Samuel24:24 Ariko umwami aramuhakanira ati: “Ntibishoboka ngomba kubigura
2Samuel24:25 Dawidi ahubakira Uhoraho urutambiro
1Kings1:1 Umwami Dawidi yari ageze mu za bukuru
1Kings1:2 Abagaragu be baramubwira bati: “Nyagasani
1Kings1:3 Bashaka umukobwa mwiza muri Isiraheli yose
1Kings1:4 Uwo mukobwa yari mwiza cyane
1Kings1:5 Hanyuma Adoniya umuhungu wa Dawidi na Hagita
1Kings1:6 Nyamara muri ibyo byose nta na rimwe se yari yarigeze amucyaha ngo amubaze ati: “Ibyo ukora ibyo ni ibiki?” Adoniya ni we wari murumuna wa Abusalomu kandi yari umusore w'uburanga.
1Kings1:7 Bukeye agisha inama Yowabu mwene Seruya n'umutambyi Abiyatari
1Kings1:8 Nyamara umutambyi Sadoki na Benaya mwene Yehoyada
1Kings1:9 Nuko Adoniya atamba intama n'ibimasa n'inyana z'imishishe
1Kings1:10 Icyakora ntiyatumira umuhanuzi Natani na Benaya
1Kings1:11 Nuko Natani abwira Batisheba nyina wa Salomo
1Kings1:12 None reka nkugire inama uyikurikize
1Kings1:13 Jya ku Mwami Dawidi umubwire uti: ‘Nyagasani
1Kings1:14 Nuko igihe uri bube uvugana n'umwami
1Kings1:15 Batisheba ajya ku Mwami Dawidi amusanga aho yari ari mu cyumba kuko yari ashaje cyane
1Kings1:16 Batisheba ni ko gupfukamira umwami
1Kings1:17 Batisheba aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
1Kings1:18 None dore Adoniya ni we wimye ingoma
1Kings1:19 Yatambye ibimasa n'inyana z'imishishe n'intama nyinshi
1Kings1:20 None rero nyagasani
1Kings1:21 Naho ubundi nyagasani numara gupfa
1Kings1:22 Batisheba akivugana na Dawidi
1Kings1:23 Abagaragu b'umwami baramubwira bati: “Umuhanuzi Natani yinjiye ibwami.” Nuko Natani yubama imbere y'umwami
1Kings1:24 Aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani
1Kings1:25 Dore uyu munsi yagiye atamba ibimasa n'inyana z'imishishe n'intama nyinshi
1Kings1:26 Icyakora nyagasani
1Kings1:27 None se nyagasani
1Kings1:28 Umwami Dawidi aravuga ati: “Nimumpamagarire Batisheba.” Araza ahagarara imbere y'umwami.
1Kings1:29 Nuko Dawidi aravuga ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho wankijije akaga kose
1Kings1:30 nk'uko nabirahiye mu izina ry'Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli
1Kings1:31 Batisheba apfukamira umwami yubamye
1Kings1:32 Umwami Dawidi atumiza umutambyi Sadoki
1Kings1:33 Umwami Dawidi arababwira ati: “Mujyane n'ingabo zanjye
1Kings1:34 Umutambyi Sadoki n'umuhanuzi Natani bamwimikishe amavuta
1Kings1:35 Mumuherekeze aze yicare ku ntebe yanjye ya cyami ansimbure ku ngoma. Mushyiriyeho gutegeka Abisiraheli n'Abayuda.”
1Kings1:36 Benaya mwene Yehoyada asubiza umwami ati: “Bibe bityo nyagasani! Koko ibyo ni byo Uhoraho Imana yawe ishaka.
1Kings1:37 Nk'uko kandi Uhoraho yabanye nawe nyagasani abe ari ko azabana na Salomo
1Kings1:38 Nuko umutambyi Sadoki n'umuhanuzi Natani na Benaya mwene Yehoyada
1Kings1:39 Bagezeyo umutambyi Sadoki afata ihembe ryuzuye amavuta yavanye mu Ihema ry'Uhoraho
1Kings1:40 Hanyuma Salomo arataha
1Kings1:41 Adoniya n'abatumirwa be bamaze gufungura bumva urusaku. Yowabu yumvise ihembe rivuga arabaza ati: “Kuki mu mujyi hari urusaku rwinshi?”
1Kings1:42 Yowabu akivuga atyo
1Kings1:43 Yonatani asubiza Adoniya ati: “Inkuru si nziza! Umwami Dawidi amaze kwimika Salomo kugira ngo abe umwami.
1Kings1:44 Dawidi yategetse umutambyi Sadoki n'umuhanuzi Natani na Benaya mwene Yehoyada
1Kings1:45 Umutambyi Sadoki n'umuhanuzi Natani bamwimikisha amavuta i Gihoni kugira ngo abe umwami. Bagarukanye na we banezerewe cyane
1Kings1:46 Ndetse ubu Salomo yicaye ku ntebe ya cyami.
1Kings1:47 Ikindi kandi n'ibyegera byose by'Umwami Dawidi byaje kumushimira bivuga biti: ‘Imana izashyire hejuru izina rya Salomo gusumbya aho iryawe ryari rigeze
1Kings1:48 aravuga ati: “Nihasingizwe Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli yo yashyizeho uyu munsi
1Kings1:49 Abatumirwa ba Adoniya babyumvise bashya ubwoba
1Kings1:50 Adoniya agira ubwoba bwinshi kubera Salomo
1Kings1:51 Baza kubwira Salomo ko Adoniya yamutinye cyane agahungira ku rutambiro
1Kings1:52 Salomo aravuga ati: “Naba inyangamugayo nta n'agasatsi na kamwe kazava ku mutwe we
1Kings1:53 Umwami Salomo yohereza abantu kumuvana aho ku rutambiro. Araza apfukamira Salomo yubamye. Salomo aramubwira ati: “Itahire.”
1Kings2:1 Urupfu rwa Dawidi rwegereje
1Kings2:2 “Dore urupfu rurangera amajanja
1Kings2:3 Ujye wubahiriza ibyo Uhoraho Imana yawe ategeka
1Kings2:4 Uhoraho azasohoza Isezerano yansezeranyije ati: ‘Abazagukomokaho nibitwara neza bakangiraho umurava babikuye ku mutima
1Kings2:5 Dawidi arakomeza ati: “Nawe ubwawe uzi ibyo Yowabu mwene Seruya yangiriye n'ibyo yakoreye ba bagaba b'ingabo b'Abisiraheli
1Kings2:6 Ni yo mpamvu ukwiye gukorana ubwitonzi
1Kings2:7 “Naho abakomoka kuri Barizilayi w'i Gileyadi uzabatoneshe
1Kings2:8 “Dore kandi uri kumwe na Shimeyi mwene Gera w'Umubenyamini w'i Bahurimu
1Kings2:9 None ubu ntukamubabarire na gato. Nzi ko uri umunyabwenge
1Kings2:10 Nuko Dawidi arapfa
1Kings2:11 Imyaka Dawidi yamaze ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
1Kings2:12 Umuhungu we Salomo amusimbura ku ngoma
1Kings2:13 Igihe kimwe Adoniya umuhungu wa Dawidi na Hagita
1Kings2:14 Ariko mfite icyo nshaka kukubwira.” Batisheba ati: “Ngaho mbwira.”
1Kings2:15 Adoniya aramubwira ati: “Uzi ko ubwami bwagombaga kuba ubwanjye
1Kings2:16 None hari icyo ngusaba niba ubinyemereye.” Batisheba aramubwira ati: “Kivuge.”
1Kings2:17 Adoniya aramubwira ati: “Ndakwinginze unsabire Umwami Salomo kuko wowe adashobora kukwangira
1Kings2:18 Batisheba aramusubiza ati: “Ndabyemeye ndajya kubikubwirira umwami.”
1Kings2:19 Batisheba ajya kureba Umwami Salomo ngo amubwire ibya Adoniya. Amugeze imbere umwami arahaguruka aramusanganira
1Kings2:20 Batisheba aramubaza ati “Uranyemerera ko ngira ikibazo nkubaza?” Umwami aramusubiza ati: “Ndabikwemereye mubyeyi wanjye mbaza.”
1Kings2:21 Nyina aramubwira ati: “Mbese birashoboka ko washyingira umuvandimwe wawe Adoniya
1Kings2:22 Umwami Salomo asubiza nyina ati: “Kuki umusabira Abishagi w'i Shunemu? Dore ni mukuru wanjye wari ukwiriye kumusabira n'ubwami! Azabufatanye n'abayoboke be ari bo umutambyi Abiyatari na Yowabu mwene Seruya.”
1Kings2:23 Maze Umwami Salomo arahira mu izina ry'Uhoraho avuga ati: “Niba amagambo Adoniya avuze atari ayo kumwicisha
1Kings2:24 Ubu ndahiye Uhoraho muzima wampaye gukomera
1Kings2:25 Nuko Umwami Salomo yohereza Benaya mwene Yehoyada
1Kings2:26 Nuko umwami abwira umutambyi Abiyatari ati: “Genda ujye Anatoti mu isambu yawe
1Kings2:27 Uko ni ko Salomo yirukanye Abiyatari ntiyongere kuba umutambyi w'Uhoraho
1Kings2:28 Iyo nkuru iza kugera kuri Yowabu kandi Yowabu yari umuyoboke wa Adoniya
1Kings2:29 Babwira Salomo ko Yowabu yahungiye mu Ihema ry'Uhoraho akaba ari ku rutambiro
1Kings2:30 Benaya aherako ajya mu Ihema ry'Uhoraho
1Kings2:31 Maze umwami aramubwira ati: “Genda uhamwicire nk'uko yabyivugiye maze umuhambe
1Kings2:32 Uhoraho araba amuryoje ko yicishije inkota abagabo babiri bamurushaga cyane ubutungane
1Kings2:33 Amaraso yabo azabarwe kuri Yowabu
1Kings2:34 Maze Benaya mwene Yehoyada asubirayo
1Kings2:35 Umwami ashyira Benaya mwene Yehoyada mu mwanya wa Yowabu umugaba w'ingabo
1Kings2:36 Umwami ahamagaza Shimeyi aramubwira ati: “Wiyubakire inzu i Yeruzalemu uyituremo
1Kings2:37 Umunsi wayisohotsemo ukambuka akabande ka Kedironi
1Kings2:38 Shimeyi abwira umwami ati: “Nyagasani
1Kings2:39 Hashize imyaka itatu
1Kings2:40 Shimeyi yumvise ko abagaragu be bari i Gati arahaguruka
1Kings2:41 Salomo aza kumenya ko Shimeyi yavuye i Yeruzalemu akajya i Gati akagaruka.
1Kings2:42 Salomo atumiza Shimeyi aramubaza ati: “Mbese sinakurahije mu izina ry'Uhoraho
1Kings2:43 None ni kuki utakomeje indahiro warahiye mu izina ry'Uhoraho
1Kings2:44 Wowe ubwawe uzirikana ibibi byose wakoreye data Dawidi. None Uhoraho aguhoye ububi bwawe
1Kings2:45 naho jyewe ampaye umugisha kandi intebe y'ubwami ya Dawidi Uhoraho azayikomeza iteka ryose.”
1Kings2:46 Umwami ategeka Benaya mwene Yehoyada yica Shimeyi. Nuko ingoma ya Salomo irakomera.
1Kings3:1 Salomo agirana ubumwe n'umwami wa Misiri maze arongora umukobwa we
1Kings3:2 Muri icyo gihe abantu batambiraga ibitambo ahasengerwaga
1Kings3:3 Salomo yakundaga Uhoraho agakurikiza amateka ya se Dawidi
1Kings3:4 Umwami Salomo ajya i Gibeyoni ahatambira ibitambo kuko ari ho hantu h'ingenzi hasengerwaga
1Kings3:5 Aho i Gibeyoni ni ho Uhoraho yabonekeye Salomo nijoro mu nzozi. Imana iramubwira iti: “Nsaba icyo ushaka ndakiguha.”
1Kings3:6 Salomo arayisubiza ati: “Wagiriye ubuntu bukomeye umugaragu wawe data Dawidi kuko yakunogeraga
1Kings3:7 “Ni koko Uhoraho Mana yanjye
1Kings3:8 Jyewe umugaragu wawe mbaye umuyobozi w'abantu watoranyije
1Kings3:9 None rero Nyagasani
1Kings3:10 Nuko Uhoraho anezezwa n'ibyo Salomo asabye.
1Kings3:11 Imana iramubwira iti: “Ubwo wasabye ibyo ngibyo ukaba utasabye kurama
1Kings3:12 ibyo usabye ndabiguha. Nguhaye ubwenge n'ubushishozi
1Kings3:13 Ikindi kandi n'ibyo utansabye nzabiguha
1Kings3:14 Nugenza nk'uko nakubwiye ukanakurikiza amateka n'amabwiriza yanjye nk'uko so Dawidi yagenzaga
1Kings3:15 Nuko Salomo arakanguka
1Kings3:16 Igihe kimwe abagore babiri b'indaya baraje bahagarara imbere y'umwami.
1Kings3:17 Umwe muri abo bagore aravuga ati: “Nyagasani
1Kings3:18 Nuko hashize iminsi ibiri mbyaye
1Kings3:19 Ijoro rimwe umwana w'uyu mugore arapfa
1Kings3:20 Nuko rero nyagasani
1Kings3:21 Bukeye mu gitondo nkangutse kugira ngo njye konsa umwana wanjye
1Kings3:22 Nuko uwo mugore wundi aravuga ati: “Ashwi da
1Kings3:23 Umwami Salomo aravuga ati: “Umwe aravuga ngo ‘Umwana wanjye ni umuzima naho uwawe ni upfuye’
1Kings3:24 Umwami ni ko gutegeka ati: “Nimunzanire inkota.” Barayimuzanira.
1Kings3:25 Hanyuma umwami atanga itegeko ati: “Uyu mwana muzima nimumucemo kabiri igice kimwe mugihe umugore umwe
1Kings3:26 Umugore wari nyina w'umwana muzima impuhwe ziramusāba kubera umwana we
1Kings3:27 Nuko umwami akemura impaka ati: “Uwo mwana ntimumwice
1Kings3:28 Abisiraheli bose bumvise uko umwami yaciye urwo rubanza
1Kings4:1 Nuko Salomo aba umwami w'igihugu cyose cya Isiraheli.
1Kings4:2 Aba ni bo bategetsi bakuru yashyizeho: Azariya mwene Sadoki yari umutambyi.
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu na Ahiya bene Shisha bari abanditsi. Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi yari umunyamabanga.
1Kings4:4 Benaya mwene Yehoyada yari umugaba w'ingabo. Sadoki na Abiyatari bari abatambyi.
1Kings4:5 Azariya mwene Natani yari umukuru w'abayobozi b'intara. Zabudi mwene Natani yari umutambyi akaba n'umujyanama bwite w'umwami.
1Kings4:6 Ahishari yari ashinzwe ingoro y'ibwami. Adoniramu mwene Abuda yari ashinzwe abakoraga imirimo y'agahato.
1Kings4:7 Salomo kandi yari yarashyizeho abategetsi cumi na babiri
1Kings4:8 Dore amazina yabo: Beni-Huri yari ashinzwe akarere k'imisozi ya Efurayimu.
1Kings4:9 Beni-Dekeri yari ashinzwe akarere ka Makazi
1Kings4:10 Beni-Hesedi yari ashinzwe Aruboti
1Kings4:11 Beni-Abinadabu yari ashinzwe imisozi yose iri hafi y'i Dori. Ni we wari wararongoye Tafati umukobwa wa Salomo.
1Kings4:12 Bāna mwene Ahiludi yari ashinzwe Tānaki na Megido
1Kings4:13 Beni-Geberi yari ashinzwe Ramoti y'i Gileyadi. Aho muri Gileyadi yari ashinzwe n'Inkambi za Yayiri ukomoka kuri Manase
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu mwene Ido yari ashinzwe akarere ka Mahanayimu.
1Kings4:15 Ahimāsi yari ashinzwe intara ya Nafutali. Ni we wari wararongoye Basemati umukobwa wa Salomo.
1Kings4:16 Bāna mwene Hushayi yari ashinzwe intara ya Ashēri n'i Beyaloti.
1Kings4:17 Yehoshafati mwene Paruwa yari ashinzwe intara ya Isakari.
1Kings4:18 Shimeyi mwene Ela yari ashinwe intara ya Benyamini.
1Kings4:19 Geberi mwene Uri yari ashinzwe akarere ka Gileyadi
1Kings4:20 Abayuda n'Abisiraheli bari benshi cyane nk'umusenyi wo ku nyanja. Bari bafite ibyo barya n'ibyo banywa
1Kings5:1 Salomo yategekaga ibihugu byose kuva ku ruzi rwa Efurati kugeza mu gihugu cy'Abafilisiti
1Kings5:2 Igaburo Salomo n'abantu be bakeneraga buri munsi ryari rihwanye na toni icyenda z'ifu nziza y'ingano
1Kings5:3 n'ibimasa icumi by'imishishe byororewe mu kiraro
1Kings5:4 Yategekaga ibihugu byose by'iburengerazuba bwa Efurati
1Kings5:5 Igihe cyose Salomo yari akiriho
1Kings5:6 Salomo yari afite ibiraro ibihumbi mirongo ine by'amafarasi akurura amagare y'intambara
1Kings5:7 Abategetsi b'intara bazaniraga Umwami Salomo ibyo kugaburira ab'ibwami bose. Buri mutegetsi yari afite ukwezi ashinzwe buri mwaka ko kugemura amafunguro. Nta kintu cyahaburaga.
1Kings5:8 Bazanaga kandi ingano za bushoki n'ibyatsi byo kugaburira amafarasi akurura amagare
1Kings5:9 Imana yahaye Salomo ubwenge n'ubuhanga bukomeye
1Kings5:10 Salomo yarushaga ubwenge abanyabwenge bose b'iburasirazuba n'abo mu Misiri.
1Kings5:11 Yari ahebuje abantu bose ubwenge. Yaburushaga n'Umwezera Etani
1Kings5:12 Yahimbye imigani ibihumbi bitatu
1Kings5:13 Yavuze ibyerekeye amoko y'ibimera
1Kings5:14 Abantu baturukaga mu mahanga yose bakaza kumva ubwenge bwa Salomo. Boherezwaga n'abami b'ibihugu byose bumvise iby'ubwenge bwe.
1Kings5:15 Hiramu umwami w'i Tiri yari asanzwe ari incuti ya Dawidi. Nuko yumvise ko Salomo yimikishijwe amavuta kugira ngo asimbure se Dawidi ku ngoma
1Kings5:16 Salomo na we yohereza intumwa zibwira Hiramu ziti:
1Kings5:17 “Uzi ko data Dawidi yahoraga mu ntambara arwana n'ibihugu by'abanzi bimukikije. Ni cyo cyamubujije kubakira Uhoraho Imana ye Ingoro
1Kings5:18 Ariko noneho Uhoraho Imana yanjye yampaye umutekano ku mipaka yose
1Kings5:19 Bityo rero
1Kings5:20 None rero utange amabwiriza bantemere ibiti by'amasederi yo muri Libani. Abantu banjye bazafatanya n'abawe
1Kings5:21 Nuko Hiramu amaze kwakira ubutumwa bwa Salomo
1Kings5:22 Hiramu atuma kuri Salomo ati: “Ubutumwa wantumyeho bwangezeho
1Kings5:23 Abantu banjye bazabikurura babivane mu bisi bya Libani babigeze ku nyanja. Bazabihambiranya mbyambutse bireremba bigere aho uzaba wavuze. Nibihagera babihambure hanyuma ubijyane. Icyo ngusaba ni uko uzagira icyo umpa kigashyirwa mu mutungo w'ibwami.”
1Kings5:24 Nuko Hiramu yoherereza Salomo imigogo y'ibiti byose by'amasederi n'iby'amasipure yashakaga.
1Kings5:25 Buri mwaka Salomo na we yahaga Hiramu toni ibihumbi bitandatu z'ingano
1Kings5:26 Uhoraho yahaye Salomo ubwenge nk'uko yari yaramusezeraniye. Hiramu na Salomo bagirana ubwumvikane
1Kings5:27 Umwami Salomo atoranya mu gihugu cya Isiraheli cyose abantu bo gukora imirimo y'agahato. Bari abagabo ibihumbi mirongo itatu.
1Kings5:28 Nuko abagabanyamo amatsinda atatu. Buri kwezi akohereza itsinda ry'abantu ibihumbi icumi
1Kings5:29 Salomo kandi yari afite abantu ibihumbi mirongo inani bacukura amabuye mu misozi
1Kings5:30 Hari n'abategetsi ibihumbi bitatu na magana atatu
1Kings5:31 Umwami yategetse ko bacukura amabuye meza kandi manini
1Kings5:32 Abafundi ba Salomo n'abafundi ba Hiramu
1Kings6:1 Hashize imyaka magana ane na mirongo inani Abisiraheli bavuye mu Misiri
1Kings6:2 Ingoro Umwami Salomo yubakiye Uhoraho yari ifite uburebure bwa metero mirongo itatu
1Kings6:3 Uburebure bw'ibaraza ry'Ingoro bwari metero icumi bungana n'ubugari bw'iyo Ngoro. Ubugari bw'ibaraza bwari metero eshanu.
1Kings6:4 Iyo Ngoro y'Imana yari ifite amadirishya afite ibizingiti bisobekeranye.
1Kings6:5 Ingoro yose uko yari igizwe n'ibyumba byombi bizira inenge
1Kings6:6 Umubyimba w'urukuta rw'Ingoro ntiwari ufite ubugari bungana kuva hasi kugera hejuru
1Kings6:7 Mu iyubakwa ry'Ingoro
1Kings6:8 Umuryango winjiraga mu byumba byometse ku igorofa yo hasi
1Kings6:9 Nuko Salomo yubaka Ingoro y'Imana arayirangiza. Igisenge cyayo yacyubakishije ibiti by'imigogo n'imbaho z'amasederi.
1Kings6:10 Impande z'Ingoro zari zometseho ibyumba bigize inyubako y'amagorofa atatu. Buri gorofa yari ifite metero ebyiri n'igice z'ubuhagarike
1Kings6:11 Uhoraho abwira Salomo ati:
1Kings6:12 “Dore unyubakiye iyi Ngoro. Nukurikiza amateka n'ibyemezo nafashe
1Kings6:13 Nzatura kandi mu Bisiraheli rwagati
1Kings6:14 Nuko Salomo yubaka Ingoro y'Uhoraho maze arayuzuza.
1Kings6:15 Ku nkuta z'imbere mu Ngoro
1Kings6:16 Imbere mu mutwe w'Ingoro yaciyemo icyumba gifite metero icumi z'uburebure
1Kings6:17 Icyumba kigari cyabanzirizaga Icyumba kizira inenge cyane
1Kings6:18 Imbere ku nkuta z'Ingoro hari hometseho imbaho z'amasederi
1Kings6:19 Hanyuma ategura mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane
1Kings6:20 Naho igicaniro cy'imibavu cyari cyometsweho imbaho z'amasederi
1Kings6:21 Imbere mu Ngoro Salomo ahomeka izahabu inoze
1Kings6:22 Mu Ngoro hose ahomeka izahabu
1Kings6:23 Mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane
1Kings6:24 Buri baba ry'umukerubi ryari rifite metero ebyiri n'igice z'uburebure
1Kings6:25 Abakerubi bombi barareshyaga kandi bameze kimwe
1Kings6:26 bombi bari bafite uburebure bwa metero eshanu.
1Kings6:27 Salomo ahagarika abo bakerubi bombi mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane. Amababa yabo yari arambuye ku buryo ibaba rimwe ryakoraga ku rukuta
1Kings6:28 Abo bakerubi Salomo abomekaho izahabu.
1Kings6:29 Imbere mu Ngoro ku nkuta zose
1Kings6:30 Yomeka izahabu hasi muri ibyo byumba byombi by'Ingoro.
1Kings6:31 Umuryango w'Icyumba kizira inenge cyane yawukingishije inzugi ebyiri zikozwe mu giti cy'umunzenze. Umuryango wari ufite impande eshanu.
1Kings6:32 Kuri izo nzugi z'umunzenze yaharagaseho amashusho y'abakerubi n'ay'imikindo
1Kings6:33 Inzugi z'umuryango w'Icyumba kizira inenge na zo azigenza atyo
1Kings6:34 Uwo muryango na wo yawukingishije inzugi ibyiri zikozwe mu mbaho z'amasipure. Buri rugi rwari rugizwe n'ibipande bibiri bifatanyijwe n'amapata.
1Kings6:35 Kuri izo nzugi aharagataho amashusho y'abakerubi n'ay'imikindo
1Kings6:36 Urugo ruzengurutse Ingoro yarwubakishije impushya eshatu z'amabuye aconze
1Kings6:37 Bari barashyizeho urufatiro rw'Ingoro y'Uhoraho mu kwezi kwa Zivu
1Kings6:38 Mu kwezi kwa Buli mu mwaka wa cumi n'umwe Salomo ari ku ngoma
1Kings7:1 Salomo yiyubakira ingoro ya cyami
1Kings7:2 Muri iyo ngoro hari ahitwa “Ingoro y'Ishyamba rya Libani”. Yari ifite metero mirongo itanu z'uburebure
1Kings7:3 Iyo migogo yari mirongo ine n'itanu igizwe n'imisitari itatu
1Kings7:4 Impande zombi z'ingoro zariho imisitari itatu y'amadirishya ateganye.
1Kings7:5 Buri ruhande rwari rufite imiryango itatu
1Kings7:6 Hirya y'Ingoro y'Ishyamba rya Libani hari ahitwa “Icyumba cy'Inkingi”. Cyari gifite metero makumyabiri n'eshanu z'uburebure
1Kings7:7 Salomo yubaka icyumba cy'intebe ya cyami bacyita “Icyumba cy'Imanza”
1Kings7:8 Ingoro Salomo yabagamo yari yubatse kimwe n'izindi
1Kings7:9 Ayo mazu yose n'urugo rugari ruyakikije byari byubakishije amabuye manini y'indobanure
1Kings7:10 Imfatiro zari zubakishijwe amabuye manini y'indobanure
1Kings7:11 Hejuru y'imfatiro hari hubakishijwe amabuye y'indobanure
1Kings7:12 Urugo rugari rwari ruzengurutswe n'urukuta rwubakishijwe impushya eshatu z'amabuye aconze
1Kings7:13 Umwami Salomo atumiza Huramu w'i Tiri
1Kings7:14 Nyina yari umupfakazi wo mu muryango wa Nafutali
1Kings7:15 Huramu yashongesheje umuringa awukoramo inkingi ebyiri. Buri nkingi yari ifite metero icyenda z'ubuhagarike
1Kings7:16 Yashongesheje umuringa awukoramo imitwe yo gutereka kuri izo nkingi. Buri mutwe wari ufite metero ebyiri n'igice z'ubuhagarike.
1Kings7:17 Kuri iyo mitwe yo hejuru y'inkingi
1Kings7:18 Kuri urwo rushundura yashyizeho impushya ebyiri z'imbuto z'imikomamanga zikozwe mu muringa ziruzengurutse
1Kings7:19 Hejuru ya buri mutwe w'inkingi
1Kings7:20 Izo ndabyo zishyirwa ku rugara rw'umutwe w'inkingi
1Kings7:21 Bashinga izo nkingi zombi imbere y'ibaraza ry'Ingoro. Inkingi yo mu majyepfo bayita Yakini
1Kings7:22 Kuri izo nkingi hari hatatse za ndabyo z'amalisi. Nuko imirimo yerekeranye n'inkingi iba irarangiye.
1Kings7:23 Huramu acura ikizenga cyiburungushuye mu muringa ushongeshejwe. Cyari gifite metero eshanu z'umurambararo
1Kings7:24 Icyo kizenga cyari gifite urugara rutatseho impushya ebyiri z'uducuma tw'umuringa turuzengurutse. Kuri buri metero hariho uducuma makumyabiri twakoranywe n'icyo kizenga.
1Kings7:25 Icyo kizenga cyari giteretse ku migongo y'ibimasa cumi na bibiri bikozwe mu muringa. Bitatu byarebaga mu majyaruguru
1Kings7:26 Umubyimba w'icyo kizenga wari santimetero umunani
1Kings7:27 Huramu yakoze kandi ibigare icumi mu muringa. Buri kigare cyari gifite metero ebyiri z'uburebure na metero ebyiri z'ubugari
1Kings7:28 Dore uko ibyo bigare byari bikozwe
1Kings7:29 Kuri ibyo bisate hari hashushanyijeho intare n'ibimasa n'abakerubi. Ku bizingiti byo hejuru na ho ni ko byari bimeze. Hejuru no munsi y'intare n'ibimasa hari imitako.
1Kings7:30 Buri kigare cyari gifite inziga enye zicuzwe mu muringa
1Kings7:31 Icyo gitereko cyari cyiburungushuye. Ubuhagarike bwacyo bwari santimetero mirongo itanu
1Kings7:32 Inziga uko ari enye zari munsi y'ikigare
1Kings7:33 Inziga z'ibigare zari zimeze nk'iz'igare ry'intambara
1Kings7:34 Kuri buri nguni y'ikigare hariho ibifashi bimeze nk'ibirenge
1Kings7:35 Hejuru ya buri kigare hari igitereko cyiburungushuye
1Kings7:36 Ku mubyimba wacyo wose
1Kings7:37 Nguko uko yakoze bya bigare icumi. Byose byari bikozwe mu bikoresho bimwe
1Kings7:38 Huramu yacuze kandi ibikarabiro icumi mu muringa
1Kings7:39 Ibigare bitanu yabishyize ku ruhande rw'iburyo rw'Ingoro
1Kings7:40 Huramu yacuze ibikarabiro n'ibitiyo n'ibikombe. Nuko arangiza imirimo yose yagombaga gukorera Umwami Salomo ku Ngoro y'Uhoraho.
1Kings7:41 Dore ibyo Huramu yakoze: inkingi ebyiri n'imitwe yazo yiburungushuye
1Kings7:42 Imbuto magana ane z'imikomamanga zo gutāka kuri izo nshundura
1Kings7:43 Ibigare icumi n'ibikarabiro icumi byari bibiteretseho.
1Kings7:44 Ikizenga n'ibimasa cumi na bibiri cyari giteretseho.
1Kings7:45 Inzabya n'ibitiyo n'ibikombe. Ibyo bikoresho byose by'Ingoro y'Uhoraho Huramu yakoreye Umwami Salomo
1Kings7:46 Umwami yabikoreshereje hagati ya Sukoti na Zaretani mu kibaya cya Yorodani
1Kings7:47 Salomo ashyira ibyo bikoresho byose mu mwanya wabyo
1Kings7:48 Salomo yakoresheje kandi n'ibindi bikoresho byose byerekeranye n'Ingoro y'Uhoraho ari byo: igicaniro cy'imibavu cy'izahabu
1Kings7:49 Ibitereko icumi by'amatara byari bitatsweho indabyo
1Kings7:50 Ibyungo n'ibikoresho byo kuzimya amatara
1Kings7:51 Umwami Salomo arangije imirimo yose yo ku Ngoro y'Uhoraho
1Kings8:1 Nuko Umwami Salomo ahamagaza abakuru b'Abisiraheli
1Kings8:2 Abisiraheli bose baraza bakoranira aho Umwami Salomo yari ari
1Kings8:3 Abakuru bose b'Abisiraheli bamaze kuhagera
1Kings8:4 Abatambyi n'Abalevi baterura Isanduku n'Ihema ry'Ibonaniro
1Kings8:5 Umwami Salomo yari ashagawe n'ikoraniro ryose ry'Abisiraheli imbere y'Isanduku
1Kings8:6 Nuko abatambyi bazana Isanduku y'Isezerano y'Uhoraho
1Kings8:7 Amashusho y'abakerubi yari afite amababa arambuye hejuru y'aho Isanduku y'Isezerano yari iteretse
1Kings8:8 Iyo mijishi yari miremire cyane
1Kings8:9 Muri iyo Sanduku harimo gusa ibisate bibiri by'amabuye. Musa yari yarabishyizemo ari kuri Sinayi
1Kings8:10 Abatambyi bamaze gusohoka mu Cyumba kizira inenge
1Kings8:11 Icyo gicu cyabujije abatambyi gukora imirimo yabo
1Kings8:12 Nuko Salomo aravuga ati: “Uhoraho
1Kings8:13 Dore nkubakiye n'Ingoro y'akataraboneka
1Kings8:14 Abisiraheli bari bakoranye bahagaze aho
1Kings8:15 Aravuga ati: “Nihahimbazwe Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli! We ubwe wasohoje Isezerano yagiranye na data Dawidi muri aya magambo:
1Kings8:16 ‘Kuva igihe mvanye ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli mu Misiri
1Kings8:17 “Data Dawidi yari afite umugambi wo kubakira Ingoro Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli.
1Kings8:18 Nyamara Uhoraho yaramubwiye ati: ‘Wagize umugambi wo kunyubakira Ingoro kandi wagize neza.
1Kings8:19 Icyakora si wowe uzanyubakira Ingoro
1Kings8:20 “None Uhoraho yasohoje Isezerano rye: dore nasimbuye data Dawidi ku ngoma
1Kings8:21 Muri iyo Ngoro kandi nateganyije aho gushyira Isanduku irimo ibisate bibiri
1Kings8:22 Umwami Salomo ahagarara imbere y'urutambiro rw'Uhoraho mu ruhame rw'ikoraniro ryose ry'Abisiraheli
1Kings8:23 arasenga ati: “Uhoraho Mana y'Abisiraheli
1Kings8:24 Wasohoje Isezerano wagiranye n'umugaragu wawe data Dawidi. Ibyo wivugiye ukabisezerana kubera ububasha bwawe
1Kings8:25 None rero Uhoraho Mana y'Abisiraheli
1Kings8:26 Bityo rero Mana y'Abisiraheli ndakwinginze
1Kings8:27 “Mbese Mana
1Kings8:28 Ahubwo Uhoraho Mana yanjye
1Kings8:29 Iyi Ngoro ujye uyitaho amanywa n'ijoro kuko wayivuzeho uti: ‘Ni ho nzajya niyerekanira.’ None rero Nyagasani
1Kings8:30 Ujye wita ku gutakamba kwanjye no ku gutakamba k'ubwoko bwawe bw'Abisiraheli
1Kings8:31 “Umuntu naregwa ko yacumuye kuri mugenzi we maze akarahizwa indahiro yo kwivuma
1Kings8:32 uzumve uri mu ijuru maze ukemure impaka. Uzacire urubanza abagaragu bawe bombi. Uwo icyaha gihamye umuhane
1Kings8:33 “Ubwoko bwawe bw'Abisiraheli nibutsindwa n'umwanzi kubera ko bagucumuyeho hanyuma bakihana bakakugarukira
1Kings8:34 uzumve uri mu ijuru maze ubababarire icyaha cyabo
1Kings8:35 “Nubuza imvura kugwa kubera ko abantu bawe bagucumuyeho
1Kings8:36 uzumve uri mu ijuru maze Abisiraheli ari bo bagaragu bawe
1Kings8:37 “Mu bihe bizaza mu gihugu hashobora kuzatera inzara cyangwa icyorezo cy'indwara
1Kings8:38 Umwisiraheli wese uzababazwa na byo akagutakambira
1Kings8:39 uzumve uri mu ijuru aho utuye. Uzamugoboke umubabarire kuko uzi ibiri mu mutima we; ndetse ni wowe wenyine uzi ibiri mu mitima y'abantu bose. Uzamugirire ibikwiranye n'imigenzereze ye
1Kings8:40 bityo Abisiraheli bazagutinya igihe cyose bazaba bakiri mu gihugu wahaye ba sekuruza.
1Kings8:41 “Abantu bo mu mahanga ya kure bazumva ko uri ikirangirire
1Kings8:42 
1Kings8:43 uzamwumve uri mu ijuru aho utuye. Uwo munyamahanga uzamuhe icyo agusabye cyose
1Kings8:44 “Uhoraho
1Kings8:45 uzumve uri mu ijuru wite ku masengesho yabo no ku gutakamba kwabo
1Kings8:46 “Mu bihe bizaza Abisiraheli bashobora kuzagucumuraho
1Kings8:47 Bageze muri icyo gihugu
1Kings8:48 Nibakugarukira nta buryarya babikuye ku mutima
1Kings8:49 uzumve uri mu ijuru aho utuye. Uzite ku masengesho yabo no ku gutakamba kwabo maze ubagoboke.
1Kings8:50 Bityo uzababarire abantu bawe bazaba bagucumuyeho
1Kings8:51 Erega ni abantu bawe! Ni bo mwihariko wawe wikuriye mu Misiri hāri habamereye nk'itanura rishongesha ibyuma!
1Kings8:52 “Ujye uzirikana amasengesho yanjye n'ay'ubwoko bwawe bw'Abisiraheli
1Kings8:53 Koko rero Uhoraho Nyagasani
1Kings8:54 Umwami Salomo arangije gusenga no gutakambira Uhoraho
1Kings8:55 Asabira ikoraniro ryose ry'Abisiraheli umugisha aranguruye ati:
1Kings8:56 “Nihasingizwe Uhoraho
1Kings8:57 Uhoraho Imana yacu ajye abana natwe nk'uko yabanaga na ba sogokuruza
1Kings8:58 Niyigarurire imitima yacu kugira ngo tugenze uko ashaka kose
1Kings8:59 Uhoraho Imana yacu ajye azirikana amasengesho yanjye ku manywa na nijoro
1Kings8:60 Bityo rero
1Kings8:61 Nuko rero namwe nimwirundurire Uhoraho Imana yacu mutizigamye
1Kings8:62 Umwami Salomo n'Abisiraheli bose bafatanya gutambira Uhoraho ibitambo.
1Kings8:63 Salomo yatambiye Uhoraho ibitambo by'umusangiro: atamba ibimasa ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri
1Kings8:64 Uwo munsi igice cyo hagati cy'ikibuga cyari imbere y'Ingoro umwami yacyeguriye Uhoraho
1Kings8:65 Umwami Salomo n'ikoraniro ryose ry'Abisiraheli bamaze ibyumweru bibiri imbere y'Uhoraho Imana yacu
1Kings8:66 Ku munsi ukurikira iyo minsi mikuru
1Kings9:1 Salomo arangije kubaka Ingoro y'Uhoraho n'iye bwite
1Kings9:2 Uhoraho yongera kumubonekera nk'uko yari yamubonekeye i Gibeyoni.
1Kings9:3 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Amasengesho wangejejeho untakambira nayumvise. Ingoro wanyubakiye nyigize umwihariko wanjye
1Kings9:4 “Nawe rero nunyobokana umutima uboneye utagira amakemwa nk'uko so Dawidi yabigenje
1Kings9:5 nzashimangira ingoma yawe mu Bisiraheli ubuziraherezo. Koko rero nasezeraniye so Dawidi nti: ‘Ntihazabura ugukomokaho ugusimbura ku ngoma ya Isiraheli.’
1Kings9:6 “Nyamara mwebwe n'abazabakomokaho
1Kings9:7 icyo gihe nzamenesha Abisiraheli mu gihugu nabahaye
1Kings9:8 Nubwo iyi Ngoro ari akataraboneka
1Kings9:9 Abandi bazabasubiza bati: ‘Abisiraheli baretse Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza yabavanye mu Misiri. Bayobotse izindi mana baraziramya
1Kings9:10 Imirimo y'ubwubatsi bw'Ingoro y'Uhoraho n'iy'umwami yamaze imyaka makumyabiri.
1Kings9:11 Hiramu umwami wa Tiri yari yarahaye Salomo amasederi n'amasipure
1Kings9:12 Hiramu ava i Tiri ajya kureba imijyi Salomo yari yamuhaye
1Kings9:13 Nuko aramubaza ati: “Muvandimwe wanjye Salomo
1Kings9:14 Ubwo kandi Hiramu yari yarahaye Umwami Salomo hafi toni enye z'izahabu.
1Kings9:15 Umwami Salomo yakoresheje imirimo y'agahato kugira ngo yubakishe Ingoro y'Uhoraho
1Kings9:16 Umwami wa Misiri yari yarateye umujyi wa Gezeri arawigarurira
1Kings9:17 Ni yo mpamvu yasannye Gezeri
1Kings9:18 n'uwa Bālati
1Kings9:19 Yasannye n'imijyi yose yabikagamo ibintu bye
1Kings9:20 Muri icyo gihugu hari hakiri Abamori n'Abaheti
1Kings9:21 Ababakomotseho bari basigaye mu gihugu Abisiraheli batashoboye gutsemba
1Kings9:22 Icyakora nta Mwisiraheli n'umwe Salomo yagize inkoreragahato
1Kings9:23 Abategetsi bakuru bari bashinzwe imirimo ya Salomo
1Kings9:24 Salomo yubakira wa mukobwa w'umwami wa Misiri ingoro
1Kings9:25 Umwami Salomo yatambaga ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
1Kings9:26 Umwami Salomo yubakishije amato muri Esiyoni-Geberi hafi ya Elati
1Kings9:27 Umwami Hiramu amwoherereza bamwe mu basare be bazobereye mu by'amazi
1Kings9:28 Nuko abo bakozi bose bajya mu gihugu cya Ofiri
1Kings10:1 Umwamikazi w'i Sheba yumvise ko Salomo yabaye ikirangirire abikesha Uhoraho
1Kings10:2 Yageze i Yeruzalemu ashagawe n'abantu benshi
1Kings10:3 Salomo asubiza ibibazo byose by'umwamikazi w'i Sheba. Nta kibazo na kimwe cyamubereye insobe ngo akiburire igisubizo.
1Kings10:4 Umwamikazi w'i Sheba yibonera ubwenge bwose bwa Salomo
1Kings10:5 Yibonera n'ibyokurya byagaburwaga ku meza ye
1Kings10:6 Nuko abwira umwami ati: “Ibyo nabwiwe nkiri mu gihugu cyanjye bikwerekeyeho n'ibyerekeye ubwenge bwawe
1Kings10:7 Nyamara sinigeze mbyemera kugeza ubwo niyiziye nkabyibonera ubwanjye. Koko rero nsanze nta n'igice cyabyo nabwiwe. Ubwenge bwawe n'ubukungu bwawe birenze cyane ibyo nabwiwe.
1Kings10:8 Hahirwa abantu bawe
1Kings10:9 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho Imana yawe
1Kings10:10 Umwamikazi w'i Sheba atura Umwami Salomo amaturo: toni eshatu n'igice z'izahabu
1Kings10:11 Amato y'Umwami Hiramu yazanaga izahabu ayivanye Ofiri
1Kings10:12 Ibyo biti by'indobanure Umwami Salomo yabikoreshaga mu iyubakwa ry'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
1Kings10:13 Salomo yahaye umwamikazi w'i Sheba ibyo yasabye byose
1Kings10:14 Buri mwaka Salomo yinjizaga mu mutungo we izahabu ipima toni ibihumbi makumyabiri
1Kings10:15 wongeyeho amahōro yakwaga abantu no ku bicuruzwa byinjizwaga mu gihugu
1Kings10:16 Umwami Salomo yakoresheje ingabo nini magana abiri mu izahabu y'imvange
1Kings10:17 Yakoresheje kandi izindi ngabo nto magana atatu mu izahabu y'imvange
1Kings10:18 Umwami Salomo yakoresheje intebe ya cyami mu mahembe y'inzovu
1Kings10:19 Iyo ntebe yari ifite ingazi esheshatu zigana aho iteye
1Kings10:20 Koko rero ingazi zari esheshatu
1Kings10:21 Ibikombe byose by'ibwami kwa Salomo byari bikozwe mu izahabu
1Kings10:22 Umwami Salomo yari afite amato ku nyanja
1Kings10:23 Umwami Salomo yarushaga cyane ubukungu n'ubwenge abandi bami bose bo ku isi.
1Kings10:24 Abantu bo mu mahanga yose bifuzaga kubonana na we
1Kings10:25 Buri mwaka
1Kings10:26 Salomo akoranya amagare y'intambara n'amafarasi. Yari afite amagare igihumbi na magana ane
1Kings10:27 Ku ngoma y'Umwami Salomo ifeza yabaye nyinshi i Yeruzalemu inganya ubwinshi n'amabuye yaho
1Kings10:28 Amafarasi ya Salomo yatumizwaga mu Misiri n'i Kuwe. Abayagurishaga umwami bayaranguriraga i Kuwe.
1Kings10:29 Amagare y'intambara yatumizwaga mu Misiri
1Kings11:1 Umwami Salomo wari wararongoye umukobwa w'umwami wa Misiri
1Kings11:2 Abo bose bakomokaga mu mahanga Uhoraho yari yarabujije Abisiraheli ati: “Ntimugashyingirane na bo kugira ngo batazahindura imitima yanyu
1Kings11:3 Bityo atunga abagore b'ibikomangoma magana arindwi n'inshoreke magana atatu. Nuko abo bagore be baramuyobya cyane.
1Kings11:4 Salomo ageze mu zabukuru abagore be bamwica umutima
1Kings11:5 Nuko Salomo aramya Ashitaroti imanakazi y'Abanyasidoni
1Kings11:6 Uko ni ko Salomo yakoze ibizira imbere y'Uhoraho
1Kings11:7 Muri icyo gihe Salomo yubatse ahasengerwa ikigirwamana Kemoshi seshyano y'Abamowabu
1Kings11:8 Uko ni ko yubakiye imana z'abagore be bose b'abanyamahangakazi
1Kings11:9 Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli yari yarabonekeye Salomo incuro ebyiri
1Kings11:10 
1Kings11:11 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Kubera ko witwaye utyo ntiwitondere Isezerano ryanjye
1Kings11:12 Icyakora kubera so Dawidi ibyo sinzabikora ukiriho
1Kings11:13 Ndetse umwana wawe sinzamutwara ubwami bwose
1Kings11:14 Nuko Uhoraho aterereza Salomo umwanzi witwa Hadadi w'Umwedomu wakomokaga ku bami b'Abedomu.
1Kings11:15 Igihe Umwami Dawidi yigaruriraga Edomu
1Kings11:16 hanyuma yicisha Abedomu bose b'igitsinagabo. Yowabu n'abantu be bagumayo amezi atandatu
1Kings11:17 Hadadi wari ukiri muto acika ku icumu
1Kings11:18 Bahaguruka i Midiyani banyura i Parani
1Kings11:19 Hadadi atona ku mwami wa Misiri
1Kings11:20 Nuko uwo murumuna wa Tahupenesi abyarana umuhungu na Hadadi amwita Genubati
1Kings11:21 Hadadi akiri mu Misiri yumva ko Umwami Dawidi yapfuye kandi ko n'umugaba w'ingabo Yowabu yapfuye
1Kings11:22 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Ni iki wabuze kuri jye gitumye ushaka gusubira mu gihugu cyanyu?” Hadadi aramusubiza ati: “Nta cyo. Nyamara unyemerere nsubireyo.”
1Kings11:23 Imana yongera guterereza Salomo undi mwanzi witwa Rezoni mwene Eliyada
1Kings11:24 Mu gihe Umwami Dawidi yari amaze gutsemba ingabo za Hadadezeri
1Kings11:25 Ku marorerwa yose Hadadi yakoze
1Kings11:26 Yerobowamu mwene Nebati w'Umwefurayimu wakomokaga i Sereda
1Kings11:27 Dore impamvu yatumye Yerobowamu amugomera: igihe Umwami Salomo yubakishaga ahiswe Milo agasanisha n'icyuho cy'umurwa wa se Dawidi
1Kings11:28 Yerobowamu yari umusore w'intwari. Salomo abonye ko ari ingirakamaro
1Kings11:29 Igihe kimwe Yerobowamu ari mu nzira avuye i Yeruzalemu
1Kings11:30 Nuko afata uwo mwitero mushya
1Kings11:31 maze abwira Yerobowamu ati: “Akira iyi migabane icumi
1Kings11:32 Nzamusigira umuryango umwe mbitewe n'umugaragu wanjye Dawidi
1Kings11:33 Nzabiterwa n'uko Abisiraheli banteye umugongo bakaramya Ashitaroti imanakazi y'Abanyasidoni
1Kings11:34 “Nyamara ntabwo ari Salomo nzanyaga ubwami
1Kings11:35 Umuhungu wa Salomo ni we nzanyaga ubwami
1Kings11:36 Icyakora nzasigira uwo muhungu wa Salomo umuryango umwe
1Kings11:37 Wowe Yerobowamu
1Kings11:38 Nukora ibyo nzagutegeka byose ukagenza uko nshaka
1Kings11:39 Bityo nzahana abakomoka kuri Dawidi kubera Salomo
1Kings11:40 Ni cyo cyatumye Salomo agerageza kwicisha Yerobowamu
1Kings11:41 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Salomo
1Kings11:42 Salomo yamaze imyaka mirongo ine ari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu
1Kings11:43 Nuko Salomo arapfa bamushyingura mu murwa wa se Dawidi
1Kings12:1 Robowamu ajya i Shekemu kuko ari ho imiryango y'Abisiraheli yo mu majyaruguru yari yaje kumwimikira.
1Kings12:2 Yerobowamu mwene Nebati yari mu Misiri aho yari yahungiye Umwami Salomo. Yumvise bavuga iby'ikoraniro ry'i Shekemu
1Kings12:3 Nyamara boherezayo abantu bo kumushaka
1Kings12:4 “So yatwikoreje imitwaro iremereye. Niba wowe uzatworohereza iyo mitwaro so yatwikoreje
1Kings12:5 Robowamu arabasubiza ati: “Nimugende muzagaruke nyuma y'iminsi itatu.” Nuko baragenda.
1Kings12:6 Umwami Robowamu agisha inama abasaza bakoranaga na se Salomo akiriho
1Kings12:7 Baramusubiza bati: “Uyu munsi nugaragariza abantu ko ushaka kubakorera ukabasubiza neza
1Kings12:8 Nyamara Robowamu ntiyita ku nama abasaza bamuhaye
1Kings12:9 Arababaza ati: “Ni ikihe gisubizo naha bariya bantu bansaba ngo mborohereze imitwaro data yabikoreje?”
1Kings12:10 Abo basore b'urungano rwe baramubwira bati: “Abo bantu binubira ko so yabagize inkoreragahato none ngo uzaborohereze
1Kings12:11 Data yabikoreje imitwaro iremereye ariko jyewe nzabarushirizaho. Data yabakubise iminyafu nyamara jyewe nzabakubita ibibōko.’ ”
1Kings12:12 Ku munsi wa gatatu
1Kings12:13 Robowamu abasubizanya inabi nyinshi
1Kings12:14 abasubiza akurikije inama yahawe n'abasore ati: “Data yabikoreje imitwaro iremereye ariko jyewe nzabarushirizaho. Data yabakubise iminyafu
1Kings12:15 Robowamu arinangira ntiyumva abo bantu. Uhoraho ni we washatse ko biba bityo
1Kings12:16 Abisiraheli bo mu majyaruguru babonye ko umwami atabumvise
1Kings12:17 Abisiraheli bari batuye mu mijyi y'i Buyuda
1Kings12:18 Nuko Umwami Robowamu atuma Adoramu wakoreshaga imirimo y'agahato ku Bisiraheli bo mu majyaruguru
1Kings12:19 Guhera ubwo
1Kings12:20 Abisiraheli bo mu majyaruguru bamaze kumenya ko Yerobowamu yagarutse
1Kings12:21 Robowamu ageze i Yeruzalemu
1Kings12:22 Nuko Imana ibwira umuhanuzi Shemaya iti:
1Kings12:23 “Bwira Robowamu mwene Salomo umwami w'u Buyuda
1Kings12:24 Ntimurwanye abavandimwe banyu b'Abisiraheli
1Kings12:25 Nuko Yerobowamu akomeza urukuta ruzengurutse Shekemu umujyi wo mu misozi ya Efurayimu
1Kings12:26 Yerobowamu aribwira ati: “Ubwami bushobora kuzasubira mu nzu ya Dawidi.
1Kings12:27 Dore aba bantu nibakomeza kujya i Yeruzalemu gutambira ibitambo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
1Kings12:28 Umwami yigira inama akora amashusho abiri y'inyana mu izahabu
1Kings12:29 Yerobowamu ashyira ishusho imwe i Beteli
1Kings12:30 Ibyo byatumye abantu bacumura
1Kings12:31 Yerobowamu yubakisha ingoro y'ahasengerwaga
1Kings12:32 Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu z'ukwezi kwa munani
1Kings12:33 Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu z'ukwezi kwa munani
1Kings13:1 Nuko Uhoraho ategeka umuhanuzi kuva mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda no kujya i Beteli
1Kings13:2 Uwo muhanuzi avuma urutambiro akurikije ijambo ry'Uhoraho ati: “Wa rutambiro we
1Kings13:3 Arongera aravuga ati: “Urutambiro rugiye gusaduka ndetse n'ivu ry'ibinure rigwe hasi. Bityo kiraba ari ikimenyetso ko byavuzwe n'Uhoraho.”
1Kings13:4 Nuko Umwami Yerobowamu amaze kumva uwo muhanuzi avuma urutambiro rw'i Beteli
1Kings13:5 Uwo mwanya urutambiro rurasaduka
1Kings13:6 Umwami abwira umuhanuzi ati: “Inginga Uhoraho Imana yawe akize ukuboko kwanjye.” Nuko umuhanuzi asaba Uhoraho
1Kings13:7 Umwami abwira umuhanuzi ati: “Ngwino tujyane imuhira tugire icyo turya kandi nkugororera.”
1Kings13:8 Umuhanuzi asubiza Umwami Yerobowamu ati: “Nubwo wampa umugabane wa kabiri w'ubutunzi bwawe
1Kings13:9 Uhoraho yanyihanangirije ngo ‘Ntuzagire icyo urya
1Kings13:10 Umuhanuzi aca indi nzira ntiyasubiza iyamuzanye.
1Kings13:11 I Beteli hari hatuye umuhanuzi w'umusaza
1Kings13:12 Nuko se arababaza ati: “Aciye mu yihe nzira?” Abana be bajya kubaza aho umuhanuzi w'i Buyuda yanyuze.
1Kings13:13 Nuko se arababwira ati: “Nimuntegurire indogobe yanjye.” Abana bashyira icyicaro ku ndogobe
1Kings13:14 Uwo musaza akurikira umuhanuzi
1Kings13:15 Nuko uwo muhanuzi w'umusaza aramubwira ati: “Ngwino dusubirane imuhira dufungure.”
1Kings13:16 Umuhanuzi w'i Buyuda aramusubiza ati: “Sinshobora gusubiranayo nawe
1Kings13:17 Uhoraho yanyihanangirije ngo ‘Ntuzagire icyo urira aho hantu
1Kings13:18 Uwo muhanuzi w'umusaza aramubwira ati: “Nanjye ndi umuhanuzi nkawe
1Kings13:19 Umuhanuzi w'i Buyuda aramuherekeza basubirana imuhira
1Kings13:20 Nuko bombi bagifungura
1Kings13:21 abwira uwo muhanuzi waturutse i Buyuda ati: “Uhoraho Imana yawe aravuze ati: ‘Wasuzuguye ijambo ryanjye
1Kings13:22 None wagarutse kurira no kunywera aha hantu kandi narabikubujije. Kubera ibyo ugiye gupfa
1Kings13:23 Nuko bamaze kurya no kunywa
1Kings13:24 arataha. Akiri mu nzira ahura n'intare iramwica
1Kings13:25 Abagenzi babonye uwo murambo mu nzira
1Kings13:26 Uwo muhanuzi w'umusaza wamugaruriye mu nzira abyumvise aravuga ati: “Ni wa muhanuzi w'i Buyuda
1Kings13:27 Uwo muhanuzi w'umusaza abwira abana be ati: “Nimuntegurire icyicaro ku ndogobe.” Bamaze kugitegura
1Kings13:28 uwo muhanuzi aragenda asanga umurambo mu nzira
1Kings13:29 Nuko uwo muhanuzi w'umusaza aterura uwo murambo wa wa muhanuzi awushyira ku ndogobe
1Kings13:30 Bamushyingura mu mva uwo muhanuzi w'umusaza yari yaricukuriye
1Kings13:31 Bamaze kumushyingura uwo muhanuzi w'umusaza abwira abana be ati: “Nimpfa muzanshyingure muri iyi mva uyu muhanuzi ashyinguwemo.
1Kings13:32 Koko rero ijambo ry'Uhoraho wa muhanuzi w'i Buyuda yavuze ryerekeye urutambiro rw'i Beteli
1Kings13:33 Yerobowamu ntiyahinduye imigenzereze ye mibi nubwo yari yaraburiwe
1Kings13:34 Iyo migenzereze ye mibi yaroshye umuryango we bituma urimbuka uvanwa ku isi.
1Kings14:1 Muri icyo gihe
1Kings14:2 Nuko Yerobowamu abwira umugore we ati: “Wiyoberanye hatagira umenya ko uri umugore wanjye
1Kings14:3 Jyana imigati icumi n'utundi tugati turyohereye
1Kings14:4 Nuko muka Yerobowamu abigenza atyo ajya i Shilo kwa Ahiya. Ahiya yari ashaje cyane atakibona.
1Kings14:5 Uhoraho yari yabwiye Ahiya ati: “Dore muka Yerobowamu ari buze iwawe yiyoberanyije
1Kings14:6 Ako kanya Ahiya yumva imirindi y'uwo mugore. Akigera mu muryango Ahiya aramubwira ati: “Injira
1Kings14:7 Genda ubwire Yerobowamu ko Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli avuze ati: ‘Nagutoranyije muri rubanda nkugira umuyobozi w'ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli.
1Kings14:8 Nanyaze ubwami abakomoka kuri Dawidi ndabuguha
1Kings14:9 Wakoze nabi kurusha abakubanjirije bose urandakaza
1Kings14:10 Ni cyo gituma ngiye guteza ibyago umuryango wawe
1Kings14:11 Yerobowamu we
1Kings14:12 Nuko Ahiya abwira muka Yerobowamu ati: “Itahire. Icyakora ukigera iwawe mu mujyi
1Kings14:13 Abisiraheli bose bazamuririra bamushyingure. Ni we wenyine wo mu nzu ya Yerobowamu uzashyingurwa
1Kings14:14 Uhoraho azimika undi mwami muri Isiraheli
1Kings14:15 Uhoraho azahana Abisiraheli maze bahindagane nk'urubingo rwo ku nkengero z'amazi
1Kings14:16 Uhoraho azatererana Abisiraheli abahoye ibyaha Yerobowamu yakoze
1Kings14:17 Nuko muka Yerobowamu aragenda ataha i Tirusa. Akigera ku muryango w'inzu umwana arapfa.
1Kings14:18 Baramuhamba Abisiraheli bose baramuririra
1Kings14:19 Ibindi bikorwa bya Yerobowamu n'intambara yarwanye n'imitegekere ye
1Kings14:20 Yerobowamu yamaze imyaka makumyabiri n'ibiri ku ngoma yisazira amahoro
1Kings14:21 Robowamu mwene Salomo yabaye umwami mu Buyuda. Icyo gihe yari afite imyaka mirongo ine n'umwe
1Kings14:22 Nuko Abayuda bakora ibitanogeye Uhoraho
1Kings14:23 Biyubakiye ahasengerwaga ibigirwamana
1Kings14:24 Byongeye kandi
1Kings14:25 Mu mwaka wa gatanu Robowamu ari ku ngoma
1Kings14:26 Asahura umutungo wo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho n'uwo mu ngoro ya cyami
1Kings14:27 Umwami Robowamu acurisha ingabo mu muringa zo gusimbura izasahuwe
1Kings14:28 Buri gihe iyo umwami yinjiraga mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
1Kings14:29 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Robowamu
1Kings14:30 Buri gihe habaga intambara zishyamiranya Robowamu na Yerobowamu.
1Kings14:31 Robowamu yisazira amahoro
1Kings15:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'umunani Yerobowamu mwene Nebati ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
1Kings15:2 amara imyaka itatu ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Nyina yitwaga Māka umukobwa wa Abusalomu.
1Kings15:3 Abiya yakomeje gukora ibyaha nk'ibya se ntiyagenza nka sekuruza Dawidi
1Kings15:4 Nyamara kubera umugaragu we Dawidi
1Kings15:5 Ibyo byatewe n'uko Dawidi yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho
1Kings15:6 Abiya ari ku ngoma
1Kings15:7 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Abiya
1Kings15:8 Abiya yisazira amahoro bamushyingura mu Murwa wa Dawidi
1Kings15:9 Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri Yerobowamu ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
1Kings15:10 amara imyaka mirongo ine n'umwe ari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Nyirakuru yitwaga Māka umukobwa wa Abusalomu.
1Kings15:11 Asa yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho nka sekuruza Dawidi.
1Kings15:12 Yamenesheje mu gihugu abagabo b'indaya mu mihango y'idini
1Kings15:13 Asa avana nyirakuru Māka ku bugabekazi
1Kings15:14 Ntiyashenye ahasengerwaga ibigirwamana
1Kings15:15 Nuko Asa ajyana ibintu we na se beguriye Imana abishyira mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
1Kings15:16 Buri gihe habaga intambara zashyamiranyaga Asa na Bāsha umwami wa Isiraheli.
1Kings15:17 Bāsha atera u Buyuda hanyuma asana Rama arayikomeza
1Kings15:18 Asa rero afata ifeza n'izahabu byose byari bisigaye mu mutungo w'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
1Kings15:19 “Reka tugirane amasezerano nk'uko so na data bayagiranye. Dore nkoherereje impano y'ifeza n'izahabu. Ngaho sesa amasezerano wagiranye na Bāsha umwami wa Isiraheli
1Kings15:20 Benihadadi yumvira Umwami Asa
1Kings15:21 Bāsha amaze kumva iyo nkuru
1Kings15:22 Umwami Asa aherako atumiza Abayuda bose nta n'umwe ubuze
1Kings15:23 Ibindi bikorwa n'ubutwari n'ibigwi byose bya Asa n'imijyi yubatse
1Kings15:24 ariko yisazira amahoro bamushyingura hamwe na ba sekuruza mu Murwa wa Dawidi. Umuhungu we Yozafati amusimbura ku ngoma.
1Kings15:25 Mu mwaka wa kabiri Asa ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
1Kings15:26 Yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
1Kings15:27 Hanyuma Bāsha mwene Ahiya wo mu muryango wa Isakari agambanira Nadabu. Icyo gihe Nadabu n'ingabo zose z'Abisiraheli bari bagose umujyi wa Gibetoni wari uw'Abafilisiti
1Kings15:28 Ibyo byabaye mu mwaka wa gatatu Asa ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda. Nuko Bāsha afata ubutegetsi muri Isiraheli.
1Kings15:29 Bāsha amaze kuba umwami
1Kings15:30 Ibyo byose byatewe n'ibyaha Yerobowamu yakoze n'uburyo yatoje Abisiraheli gucumura
1Kings15:31 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Nadabu
1Kings15:32 Buri gihe habaga intambara zishyamiranya Asa na Bāsha umwami wa Isiraheli.
1Kings15:33 Mu mwaka wa gatatu Asa ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
1Kings15:34 Yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
1Kings16:1 Hanyuma ijambo ry'Uhoraho rigera ku muhanuzi Yehu mwene Hanani
1Kings16:2 “Nagukuye muri rubanda nkugira umuyobozi w'ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli
1Kings16:3 Ni yo mpamvu ngiye kugutsembana n'inzu yawe nk'uko natsembye iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati.
1Kings16:4 Uwo mu muryango wa Bāsha uzagwa mu mujyi azaribwa n'imbwa
1Kings16:5 Ibindi bikorwa n'ubutwari n'ibigwi byose bya Bāsha
1Kings16:6 Bāsha yisazira amahoro bamushyingura i Tirusa
1Kings16:7 Koko rero
1Kings16:8 Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n'itandatu Asa ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
1Kings16:9 Zimuri wari umwe mu bayobozi b'abagenderaga mu magare y'intambara
1Kings16:10 Nuko Zimuri araza aramwica amusimbura ku ngoma. Hari mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n'irindwi Asa ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda.
1Kings16:11 Zimuri amaze kuba umwami atsemba ab'igitsinagabo bose bo mu nzu ya Bāsha
1Kings16:12 Zimuri yatsembye inzu yose ya Bāsha nk'uko Uhoraho yari yamutumyeho umuhanuzi Yehu.
1Kings16:13 Ibyo byose byatewe n'ibyaha byose Bāsha n'umuhungu we Ela bakoze
1Kings16:14 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Ela
1Kings16:15 Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n'irindwi Asa ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
1Kings16:16 Nuko ingabo zari mu birindiro zumva ko Zimuri yagambaniye umwami akamwica. Maze zimika Omuri wari umugaba w'ingabo kugira ngo abe umwami wa Isiraheli.
1Kings16:17 Hanyuma Omuri n'Abisiraheli bose bava i Gibetoni
1Kings16:18 Zimuri abonye ko umujyi wafashwe ahungira mu munara ntamenwa w'ingoro ya cyami
1Kings16:19 Ibyo byatewe n'ibyaha bya Zimuri wakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
1Kings16:20 Ibindi bikorwa bya Zimuri n'ubugome bwe
1Kings16:21 Zimuri amaze gupfa Abisiraheli bigabanyamo ibice bibiri
1Kings16:22 Hanyuma abantu ba Omuri batsinda abakurikiye Tibini mwene Ginati. Tibini arapfa
1Kings16:23 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'umwe Asa ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
1Kings16:24 Hanyuma agura na Shemeri umusozi w'i Samariya
1Kings16:25 Omuri akora ibitanogeye Uhoraho kurusha abamubanjirije bose.
1Kings16:26 Yakomeje gukora ibyaha nk'ibya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati watoje Abisiraheli gucumura
1Kings16:27 Ibindi bikorwa n'ubutwari n'ibigwi byose bya Omuri
1Kings16:28 Omuri yisazira amahoro bamushyingura i Samariya
1Kings16:29 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'umunani Asa ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
1Kings16:30 Ahabu mwene Omuri akora ibitanogeye Uhoraho kurusha abamubanjirije bose.
1Kings16:31 Gukurikiza ibyaha bya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati ntibyamuhagije
1Kings16:32 Yubakiye Bāli ingoro i Samariya
1Kings16:33 Yubatse kandi inkingi yeguriwe ikigirwamanakazi Ashera
1Kings16:34 Ahabu ari ku ngoma
1Kings17:1 Eliya w'i Tishibi y'i Gileyadi abwira Umwami Ahabu ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli nkorera
1Kings17:2 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Eliya ati:
1Kings17:3 “Va hano ujye kwihisha iruhande rw'akagezi ka Keriti
1Kings17:4 Uzanywa amazi y'ako kagezi kandi nzategeka ibikona bikugemurire.”
1Kings17:5 Nuko Eliya ajya gutura iruhande rwa Keriti nk'uko Uhoraho yamutegetse.
1Kings17:6 Ibikona byamugemuriraga imigati n'inyama mu gitondo na nimugoroba
1Kings17:7 Hashize iminsi ako kagezi karakama
1Kings17:8 Uhoraho abwira Eliya ati:
1Kings17:9 “Haguruka ujye mu mujyi wa Sarepati hafi y'i Sidoni abe ari ho utura
1Kings17:10 Eliya arahaguruka ajya i Sarepati
1Kings17:11 Ubwo yari agiye kuyamuzanira
1Kings17:12 Uwo mugore aramubwira ati: “Nkurahiye Uhoraho Imana yawe ko nta mugati mfite
1Kings17:13 Eliya aramubwira ati: “Ntutinye
1Kings17:14 Dore Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: ‘Ifu ntizabura muri ako gaseke
1Kings17:15 Nuko uwo mugore abigenza nk'uko Eliya yamubwiye
1Kings17:16 Ifu ntiyigera ibura muri ako gaseke
1Kings17:17 Hanyuma y'ibyo umwana w'uwo mugore nyir'urugo ararwara
1Kings17:18 Uwo mugore abaza Eliya ati: “Muntu w'Imana
1Kings17:19 Eliya aramubwira ati: “Mpa uwo mwana wawe.” Eliya aramuterura amujyana mu cyumba cyo hejuru aho acumbitse
1Kings17:20 Nuko atakambira Uhoraho ati: “Uhoraho Mana yanjye
1Kings17:21 Eliya yubarara ku mwana gatatu
1Kings17:22 Uhoraho yumva ugutakamba kwa Eliya
1Kings17:23 Eliya amukura mu cyumba cyo hejuru
1Kings17:24 Uwo mugore abwira Eliya ati: “Noneho menye by'ukuri ko uri umuntu w'Imana
1Kings18:1 Nyuma y'igihe kirekire mu mwaka wa gatatu amapfa ateye
1Kings18:2 Nuko Eliya ajya kwiyereka Ahabu. Icyo gihe i Samariya hari inzara ikomeye cyane.
1Kings18:3 Ahabu ahamagaza Obadiya umuyobozi w'ingoro ye. Obadiya uwo yubahaga Uhoraho cyane
1Kings18:4 igihe Umwamikazi Yezebeli yicishaga abahanuzi b'Uhoraho
1Kings18:5 Ahabu abwira Obadiya ati: “Ngwino tuzenguruke igihugu tugere ku masōko yose no ku tugezi
1Kings18:6 Bigabanya uturere tw'igihugu
1Kings18:7 Obadiya ari mu rugendo ahura na Eliya aramumenya
1Kings18:8 Eliya aramusubiza ati: “Yee
1Kings18:9 Obadiya abaza Eliya ati: “Nacumuye iki cyatuma ungabiza Ahabu kugira ngo anyice?
1Kings18:10 Nkurahiye Uhoraho Imana yawe ko nta bwoko na bumwe cyangwa igihugu
1Kings18:11 None ngo ningende mbwire databuja ko Eliya ari hano!
1Kings18:12 Nimara gutandukana nawe Mwuka w'Uhoraho arakujyana ahantu ntazi
1Kings18:13 Mbese databuja
1Kings18:14 None ngo ningende mbwire databuja ko Eliya ari hano! Yanyica.”
1Kings18:15 Eliya aramusubiza ati: “Nkurahiye Uhoraho Nyiringabo nkorera
1Kings18:16 Nuko Obadiya ajya gushaka Ahabu amutekerereza ibya Eliya
1Kings18:17 Ahabu ngo amukubite amaso aramubwira ati: “Ndashyize ndakubonye wowe wateje akaga Isiraheli!”
1Kings18:18 Eliya aramusubiza ati: “Si jye wateje akaga Isiraheli ahubwo ni wowe n'inzu ya so
1Kings18:19 None koranyiriza Abisiraheli bose ku musozi wa Karumeli
1Kings18:20 Ahabu ahamagaza imiryango yose y'Abisiraheli
1Kings18:21 Nuko Eliya yegera abantu bose arababwira ati: “Mbese muzageza ryari gufata impu zombi? Niba Uhoraho ari we Mana nyakuri nimumuyoboke
1Kings18:22 Eliya yungamo ati: “Ni jye jyenyine muhanuzi w'Uhoraho usigaye
1Kings18:23 Nimutuzanire amapfizi abiri
1Kings18:24 Hanyuma mwambaze imana yanyu Bāli
1Kings18:25 Eliya abwira abahanuzi ba Bāli ati: “Ngaho nimuhitemo impfizi mubanze muyibage kuko ari mwe benshi. Bityo mwambaze imana yanyu Bāli ariko ntimucane umuriro.”
1Kings18:26 Nuko babazanira impfizi barayibaga
1Kings18:27 Ahagana mu masaa sita Eliya arabakwena ati: “Nimuhamagare cyane kuko ari imana
1Kings18:28 Barushaho guhamagara baranguruye amajwi
1Kings18:29 Saa sita imaze kurenga bakaza umurego kugeza ku isaha y'igitambo cya nimugoroba
1Kings18:30 Eliya abwira rubanda rwose ati: “Nimunyegere.” Bamaze kumwegera
1Kings18:31 Nuko afata amabuye cumi n'abiri ari wo mubare w'imiryango ya bene Yakobo
1Kings18:32 Ayo mabuye ayubakisha urutambiro rweguriwe Uhoraho. Iruhande rw'urutambiro ahacukura urwobo rwajyamo litiro mirongo itatu z'amazi
1Kings18:33 maze ashyira inkwi ku rutambiro
1Kings18:34 Hanyuma Eliya abwira abakoraniye aho ati: “Nimwuzuze amazi ibibindi bine
1Kings18:35 Bityo basuka amazi ku mpande zose z'urutambiro
1Kings18:36 Isaha y'igitambo cya nimugoroba igeze
1Kings18:37 Uhoraho nsubiza
1Kings18:38 Uhoraho aherako amanura umuriro ukongora igitambo n'inkwi
1Kings18:39 Abisiraheli bose babonye ibibaye bikubita hasi
1Kings18:40 Nuko Eliya abwira rubanda ati: “Nimufate abo bahanuzi ba Bāli ntihagire n'umwe ubacika.” Barabafata bose
1Kings18:41 Hanyuma Eliya abwira Ahabu ati: “Genda urye kandi unywe kuko numva imvura ihinda.”
1Kings18:42 Ahabu ajya kurya no kunywa
1Kings18:43 Nuko abwira umugaragu we ati: “Ngaho genda witegereze ku nyanja.” Uwo mugaragu aragenda yitegereza ku nyanja
1Kings18:44 Ku ncuro ya karindwi uwo mugaragu aragaruka aravuga ati: “Mbonye igihu gito kingana n'ikiganza cy'umuntu kiva mu nyanja.” Eliya aramutegeka ati: “Ihute ubwire Ahabu azirike amafarasi ku igare rye
1Kings18:45 Nuko ijuru ririjima kubera ibicu bizanye n'umuyaga
1Kings18:46 Eliya na we ni ko gukenyera arakomeza
1Kings19:1 Ahabu atekerereza Umwamikazi Yezebeli ibyo umuhanuzi Eliya yakoze byose
1Kings19:2 Yezebeli atuma intumwa kuri Eliya ati: “Ejo magingo aya
1Kings19:3 Eliya agira ubwoba maze ahungana n'umugaragu we kugira ngo akize ubuzima bwe. Nuko yerekeza i Bērisheba mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda ahasiga umugaragu we.
1Kings19:4 Hanyuma agenda urugendo rw'umunsi wose mu butayu
1Kings19:5 Aryama munsi y'ako gati maze arasinzira. Umumarayika amukoraho aramubwira ati: “Byuka urye.”
1Kings19:6 Yitegereje abona umugati wokejwe ku mabuye ashyushye
1Kings19:7 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho aragaruka akora kuri Eliya aramubwira ati: “Byuka urye kuko ugiye mu rugendo rurerure.”
1Kings19:8 Eliya arabyuka ararya aranywa
1Kings19:9 Eliya ageze ku musozi wa Sinayi ajya mu buvumo araramo. Uhoraho aramubaza ati: “Eliya we
1Kings19:10 Eliya aramusubiza ati: “Uhoraho Mana Nyiringabo
1Kings19:11 Uhoraho abwira Eliya ati: “Sohoka ujye ku musozi witegeye aho ndi bunyure
1Kings19:12 Nyuma y'umutingito w'isi haza umuriro
1Kings19:13 Eliya yumvise ako kayaga yipfuka mu maso n'umwitero we
1Kings19:14 Eliya arasubiza ati: “Uhoraho Mana Nyiringabo
1Kings19:15 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Hindukira usubize inzira y'ubutayu ujye i Damasi. Nugerayo uzimikishe Hazayeli amavuta abe umwami wa Siriya.
1Kings19:16 Hanyuma uzimike Yehu mwene Nimushi kugira ngo abe umwami wa Isiraheli. Nawe uzasimburwa na Elisha mwene Shafati w'i Abeli-Mehola.
1Kings19:17 Umuntu wese uzarokoka inkota ya Hazayeli azicwa na Yehu
1Kings19:18 Icyakora umenye ko nsigaranye abantu ibihumbi birindwi muri Isiraheli
1Kings19:19 Eliya ava aho ngaho
1Kings19:20 Elisha aherako asiga ibimasa bye yiruka kuri Eliya agira ati: “Reka njye gusezera kuri data na mama
1Kings19:21 Elisha arahindukira afata ibimasa bibiri abitamba ho igitambo
1Kings20:1 Umwami wa Siriya Benihadadi akoranya ingabo ze ari kumwe n'abami mirongo itatu na babiri
1Kings20:2 Nuko yohereza intumwa kubwira Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli ziti:
1Kings20:3 “Umwami Benihadadi aravuze ngo: ‘Ndigarurira ifeza yawe n'izahabu yawe
1Kings20:4 Umwami Ahabu wa Isiraheli aramusubiza ati: “Bibe uko ubivuze mwami databuja! Nanjye ubwanjye nkwishyize mu maboko hamwe n'ibyanjye byose.”
1Kings20:5 Za ntumwa zongera kugaruka zibwira Ahabu ziti: “Benihadadi umwami wa Siriya aravuze ngo: ‘Nagutumyeho ngo umpe ifeza yawe n'izahabu yawe
1Kings20:6 Bityo rero
1Kings20:7 Nuko Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli akoranya abakuru b'imiryango bo mu gihugu cye bose
1Kings20:8 Abakuru b'imiryango bose na rubanda rwose baramusubiza bati: “Ntumwemerere.”
1Kings20:9 Ahabu asubiza za ntumwa za Benihadadi ati: “Nimugende mubwire shobuja muti: ‘Ibyo watumye ku mugaragu wawe ubushize nzabikora byose
1Kings20:10 Benihadadi ni ko kongera kumutumaho bwa gatatu ati: “Imana zibimpore ndetse bikomeye ninsigira Samariya n'agakungugu
1Kings20:11 Umwami wa Isiraheli arabasubiza ati: “Mubwire Benihadadi muti: ‘Komeza wivugire! Ariko kandi ukenyereye urugamba ntakirate nk'utabarutse.’ ”
1Kings20:12 Ubwo Benihadadi yari hamwe n'abandi bami mu mahema banywa
1Kings20:13 Nuko umuhanuzi asanga Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ngo: ‘Urabona ziriya ngabo zose n'ubwinshi bwazo. Ngiye kuzikugabiza uzitsinde kugira ngo umenyereho ko ndi Uhoraho.’ ”
1Kings20:14 Ahabu aramubaza ati: “Ni nde uzazidukiza?” Umuhanuzi aramusubiza ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ngo: ‘Muzazikizwa n'abasore batoranyijwe n'abayobozi b'intara.’ ” Ahabu yongera kubaza ati: “Ni nde uzasembura urugamba?” Umuhanuzi aramusubiza ati: “Ni wowe.”
1Kings20:15 Ahabu aherako akoranya umutwe w'abasore batoranyijwe n'abayobozi b'intara
1Kings20:16 Mu ma saa sita batangira imirwano
1Kings20:17 Ba basore batoranyijwe n'abayobozi b'intara ni bo babimbuye imirwano
1Kings20:18 Benihadadi arababwira ati: “Niba baje bashaka amahoro mubafate mpiri
1Kings20:19 Nyamara ba basore batoranyijwe hamwe n'ingabo
1Kings20:20 Nuko buri wese yica umwanzi
1Kings20:21 Hanyuma Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli arasohoka
1Kings20:22 Umuhanuzi asanga umwami wa Isiraheli aramubwira ati: “Komera ube intwari kandi utekereze uko uzabigenza
1Kings20:23 Nuko abagaragu b'umwami wa Siriya baramubwira bati: “Erega Imana y'Abisiraheli ni imana yo mu misozi
1Kings20:24 None rero kuraho abami bose ubasimbuze abayobozi b'intara
1Kings20:25 hanyuma utoranye izindi ngabo zingana n'izaguye ku rugamba
1Kings20:26 Mu mwaka ukurikiyeho Benihadadi akoranya ingabo z'Abanyasiriya
1Kings20:27 Ahabu na we akoranya ingabo z'Abisiraheli aziha impamba
1Kings20:28 Wa muntu w'Imana agaruka kwa Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli
1Kings20:29 Ingerero zombi zimara iminsi irindwi mu birindiro ziteganye. Ku munsi wa karindwi rurambikana
1Kings20:30 Ingabo z'Abanyasiriya ibihumbi makumyabiri na birindwi zisigaye zihungira mu mujyi wa Afeka
1Kings20:31 Abagaragu be baramubwira bati: “Twumvise ko abami b'Abisiraheli ari abanyampuhwe. None reka twambare imyambaro igaragaza akababaro
1Kings20:32 Nuko bambara imyambaro igaragaza akababaro
1Kings20:33 Intumwa za Benihadadi zibona ko iyo mvugo ari ikimenyetso cyiza
1Kings20:34 Benihadadi abwira Umwami Ahabu ati: “Ndagusubiza imijyi data yanyaze so. Ikindi kandi
1Kings20:35 Icyo gihe Uhoraho atuma umwe mu itsinda ry'abahanuzi kubwira mugenzi we ati: “Ngaho nkubita.” Nyamara mugenzi we aranga.
1Kings20:36 Uwo muhanuzi yungamo ati: “Kubera ko utumviye itegeko ry'Uhoraho
1Kings20:37 Wa muhanuzi abona undi muntu aramubwira ati: “Ngaho nkubita.” Uwo muntu aramukubita maze aramukomeretsa.
1Kings20:38 Uwo muhanuzi ariyoberanya
1Kings20:39 Umwami ahanyuze wa muhanuzi aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
1Kings20:40 Igihe umugaragu wawe nacuragiranaga hirya no hino
1Kings20:41 Nuko uwo muhanuzi yitwikurura mu maso
1Kings20:42 Uwo muhanuzi aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ngo: ‘Kubera ko warokoye ubuzima bw'uwo nari naciriye urwo gupfa
1Kings20:43 Umwami wa Isiraheli asubira iwe i Samariya ababaye kandi arakaye.
1Kings21:1 Uwitwa Naboti yari afite umurima w'imizabibu i Yizerēli
1Kings21:2 Igihe kimwe Ahabu abwira Naboti ati: “Dore umurima wawe w'imizabibu uri hafi y'ingoro yanjye
1Kings21:3 Naboti aramusubiza ati: “Ntibishoboka
1Kings21:4 Nuko Ahabu asubira iwe ababaye cyane kandi arakaye
1Kings21:5 Umugore we Yezebeli aramusanga aramubaza ati: “Ni iki cyaguteye agahinda kugeza aho wanga kurya?”
1Kings21:6 Ahabu aramusubiza ati: “Ni ukubera ko nabwiye Naboti w'i Yizerēli nti: ‘Mpa umurima wawe w'imizabibu tuwugure amafaranga
1Kings21:7 Yezebeli aramubaza ati: “Mbese si wowe uri ku ngoma muri Isiraheli? Byuka ufungure ugubwe neza. Jyewe ubwanjye nzaguhesha uwo murima w'imizabibu wa Naboti w'i Yizerēli.”
1Kings21:8 Nuko Yezebeli yandika inzandiko mu izina ry'Umwami Ahabu
1Kings21:9 Yari yanditsemo ati: “Nimukoranye rubanda bigomwe kurya
1Kings21:10 Hanyuma mwicaze imbere ye ibirara bibiri bimushinje biti: ‘Yatutse Imana n'umwami.’ Bityo mumusohore mumujyane inyuma y'umujyi
1Kings21:11 Abakuru b'imiryango n'abatware b'i Yizerēli bakora ibyo Yezebeli yabategetse mu nzandiko ze.
1Kings21:12 Batumira rubanda mu ikoraniro ryo kwigomwa kurya
1Kings21:13 Bya birara bibiri biraza byicara ahateganye na Naboti
1Kings21:14 Abatware b'umujyi batuma intumwa kuri Yezebeli bati: “Naboti yicishijwe amabuye.”
1Kings21:15 Yezebeli yumvise ko Naboti yapfuye
1Kings21:16 Ahabu yumvise ko Naboti yapfuye
1Kings21:17 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Eliya umuhanuzi w'i Tishibi ati:
1Kings21:18 “Jya kwa Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli uri i Samariya
1Kings21:19 Umusangeyo umubwire uti: ‘Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Umaze kwica umuntu none uje kuzungura ibye!’ Maze wongere umubwire uti: ‘Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Aho imbwa zarigatiye amaraso ya Naboti
1Kings21:20 Eliya ajyana ubwo butumwa kwa Ahabu. Ahabu amubonye
1Kings21:21 ‘Ngiye kuguteza ibyago
1Kings21:22 Inzu yawe nzayigenza nk'iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati
1Kings21:23 Nuko Eliya yungamo ati: “Ku byerekeye Yezebeli
1Kings21:24 Uwo mu muryango wa Ahabu uzagwa mu mujyi azaribwa n'imbwa
1Kings21:25 Nta muntu wigeze yiha gucumura ku Uhoraho nka Ahabu
1Kings21:26 Ahabu yakoze ibizira bikabije
1Kings21:27 Umwami Ahabu yumvise ubwo butumwa bw'Uhoraho
1Kings21:28 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Eliya w'i Tishibi ati:
1Kings21:29 “Wabonye ukuntu Ahabu yicishije bugufi imbere yanjye. Kubera ko yicishije bugufi kariya kageni
1Kings22:1 Nuko hashira imyaka itatu nta ntambara ibaye hagati ya Siriya na Isiraheli.
1Kings22:2 Mu mwaka wa gatatu
1Kings22:3 Nyamara Ahabu yari yarabwiye ibyegera bye ati: “Muzi neza ko umujyi wa Ramoti y'i Gileyadi ari uwacu. Ni kuki tutawigarurira kugira ngo tuwukure mu maboko y'umwami wa Siriya?”
1Kings22:4 Ahabu abaza Umwami Yozafati ati: “Mbese tuzajyana kurwana
1Kings22:5 Icyakora Yozafati yungamo ati: “Banza ugishe Uhoraho inama.”
1Kings22:6 Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli akoranya abahanuzi bagera kuri magana ane
1Kings22:7 Ariko Yozafati abaza Ahabu ati: “Mbese nta wundi muhanuzi w'Uhoraho uri hano kugira ngo tumubaze?”
1Kings22:8 Ahabu aramusubiza ati: “Hasigaye umwe watubariza Uhoraho
1Kings22:9 Nuko Ahabu ahamagaza umukozi w'ibwami aramutuma ati: “Ihute uzane Mikaya mwene Yimila.”
1Kings22:10 Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli na Yozafati umwami w'u Buyuda bari bicaye mu ntebe zabo
1Kings22:11 Uwitwaga Sedekiya mwene Kenāna wari waricurishirije amahembe y'icyuma
1Kings22:12 N'abandi bahanuzi bose baherako barahanura bati: “Zamuka utere i Ramoti y'i Gileyadi
1Kings22:13 Intumwa yari yoherejwe kwa Mikaya iramubwira iti: “Abandi bahanuzi bose bahanuriye umwami ko azatsinda
1Kings22:14 Mikaya aramusubiza ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho ko nta kindi ndi butangaze uretse icyo Uhoraho ari bumbwire.”
1Kings22:15 Mikaya yitaba umwami
1Kings22:16 Nyamara umwami yongera kumubaza ati: “Mbese ngusabe kangahe kumbwira ukuri kuvuye ku Uhoraho?”
1Kings22:17 Mikaya aramusubiza ati: “Nabonye Abisiraheli bose batataniye ku misozi bameze nk'intama zidafite umushumba
1Kings22:18 Nuko umwami wa Isiraheli abaza Yozafati ati: “Sinakubwiye ko nta cyiza ajya ampanurira uretse ibibi?”
1Kings22:19 Mikaya yungamo ati: “Umva ijambo ry'Uhoraho. Nabonye Uhoraho yicaye ku ntebe ye ya cyami
1Kings22:20 maze arazibaza ati: ‘Ni nde ugiye gushuka Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli ngo atere i Ramoti y'i Gileyadi
1Kings22:21 Nuko haza umwe muri zo ahagarara imbere y'Uhoraho
1Kings22:22 Iyo ngabo iravuga iti: ‘Ndagenda nshuke abahanuzi be bose bamuhanurire ibinyoma.’ Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Genda ugenze utyo kuko ubishoboye.’ ”
1Kings22:23 Mikaya yungamo ati: “Ubwo Uhoraho yohereje mu bahanuzi bawe ingabo y'ibinyoma
1Kings22:24 Hanyuma Sedekiya mwene Kenāna yegera Mikaya
1Kings22:25 Umuhanuzi Mikaya aramusubiza ati: “Uzarushaho kubisobanukirwa
1Kings22:26 Nuko Ahabu ategeka umugaragu we ati: “Fata Mikaya umushyikirize Amoni umuyobozi w'umujyi n'umwana wanjye Yowashi
1Kings22:27 ubabwire bamushyire muri gereza. Bajye bamuha ibyokurya n'amazi by'intica ntikize
1Kings22:28 Mikaya aramubwira ati: “Nutabaruka uri mutaraga
1Kings22:29 Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli na Yozafati umwami w'u Buyuda
1Kings22:30 Ahabu abwira Yozafati ati: “Ngiye kwiyoberanya njye ku rugamba
1Kings22:31 Nyamara umwami wa Siriya yari yategetse abakuru b'ingabo mirongo itatu na babiri barwanira mu magare y'intambara
1Kings22:32 Abakuru b'ingabo barwanira mu magare y'intambara babonye Yozafati
1Kings22:33 Abakuru b'ingabo bamenye ko atari we mwami wa Isiraheli baramureka.
1Kings22:34 Hanyuma umusirikare w'Umunyasiriya arasa umwambi
1Kings22:35 Nyamara kubera ko uwo munsi urugamba rwari rukomeye
