1Kings22:36 Izuba rirenze ijwi rirangururira mu rugerero ngo “Buri muntu nasubire iwe no mu gihugu cye
1Kings22:37 dore umwami amaze gupfa.” Nuko bajyana umurambo we i Samariya barawushyingura.
1Kings22:38 Igihe bozaga rya gare rya Ahabu ku kizenga cy'i Samariya aho indaya ziyuhagiriraga
1Kings22:39 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Ahabu
1Kings22:40 Ahabu ashyingurwa hamwe na ba sekuruza
1Kings22:41 Mu mwaka wa kane Ahabu ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
1Kings22:42 Yozafati yabaye umwami afite imyaka mirongo itatu n'itanu
1Kings22:43 Yozafati yakurikije se Asa muri byose
1Kings22:44 Yozafati yuzura n'umwami wa Isiraheli.
1Kings22:45 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yozafati n'intambara yarwanye
1Kings22:46 Yatsembye kandi mu gihugu abagabo b'indaya mu mihango y'idini
1Kings22:47 Icyo gihe nta mwami wari muri Edomu
1Kings22:48 Yozafati abajisha amato manini yajyaga gutunda izahabu mu gihugu cya Ofiri. Icyakora ayo mato ntiyagerayo kuko yamenekeye ahitwa Esiyoni-Geberi.
1Kings22:49 Nuko Ahaziya mwene Ahabu abwira Yozafati ati: “Reka abakozi banjye bajyane n'abawe mu mato.” Ariko Yozafati arabyanga.
1Kings22:50 Yozafati yisazira amahoro
1Kings22:51 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'irindwi Yozafati ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
1Kings22:52 Nuko Ahaziya akora ibitanogeye Uhoraho nka se Ahabu na nyina Yezebeli
1Kings22:53 Ahaziya yasengaga ikigirwamana Bāli akakiramya. Bityo arakaza Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli muri byose nka se Ahabu.
2Kings1:1 Umwami Ahabu amaze gupfa
2Kings1:2 Igihe kimwe Umwami Ahaziya ari i Samariya mu cyumba cye cy'igorofa yo hejuru
2Kings1:3 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho ni ko kubwira Eliya w'i Tishibi ati: “Genda utangīre intumwa z'umwami w'i Samariya uzibaze uti: ‘Mbese wagombye kujya kuraguza Bāli-Zebubi ikigirwamana cya Ekuroni
2Kings1:4 Uhoraho avuze ko Ahaziya atazabyuka ku buriri aryamyeho
2Kings1:5 Intumwa ziragaruka umwami arazibaza ati: “Ni iki gitumye mukimirana?”
2Kings1:6 Ziramusubiza ziti: “Umuntu yadutangiriye aratubwira ati: ‘Musubireyo
2Kings1:7 Ahaziya arazibaza ati: “Uwo muntu waje akabatangira akababwira atyo ameze ate?”
2Kings1:8 Ziramusubiza ziti: “Ni umuntu wari wambaye umwambaro ubohesheje ubwoya bw'ingamiya
2Kings1:9 Nuko Umwami Ahaziya atuma umutware hamwe n'umutwe w'ingabo ze mirongo itanu gufata Eliya. Uwo mutware azamuka agasozi agera mu mpinga aho Eliya yari ari
2Kings1:10 Eliya ni ko kumubwira ati: “Ubwo ndi umuntu w'Imana
2Kings1:11 Umwami atuma undi mutware hamwe n'umutwe w'ingabo ze mirongo itanu kuri Eliya. Aramusanga aramubwira ati: “Muntu w'Imana
2Kings1:12 Eliya ni ko kubabwira ati: “Ubwo ndi umuntu w'Imana
2Kings1:13 Incuro ya gatatu umwami atuma undi mutware hamwe n'umutwe w'ingabo ze mirongo itanu kuri Eliya. Umutware azamuka ka gasozi
2Kings1:14 Dore umuriro wavuye mu ijuru utsemba abatware babiri bambanjirije n'ingabo zabo! None ubu jye ndakwinginze ungirire impuhwe ndi mu maboko yawe.”
2Kings1:15 Nuko umumarayika w'Uhoraho abwira Eliya ati: “Manukana na we ntugire ubwoba.” Aherako ajyana n'umutware ku Mwami Ahaziya.
2Kings1:16 Bagezeyo Eliya aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ngo: ‘Mbese wagombye kujya kuraguza Bāli-Zebubi ikigirwamana cya Ekuroni
2Kings1:17 Umwami Ahaziya arapfa nk'uko Uhoraho yari yamutumyeho umuhanuzi Eliya. Kubera ko Ahaziya atagiraga umuhungu
2Kings1:18 Ibindi bikorwa bya Ahaziya byanditswe mu gitabo cyitwa “Ibikorwa by'abami ba Isiraheli.”
2Kings2:1 Igihe Uhoraho yari agiye gutwara Eliya muri serwakira kugira ngo amuzamure mu ijuru
2Kings2:2 Eliya abwira Elisha ati: “Sigara hano dore Uhoraho antumye i Beteli.” Elisha aramusubiza ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho nawe ubwawe ko ntagusiga.” Nuko barajyana bagerana i Beteli.
2Kings2:3 Itsinda ry'abahanuzi b'i Beteli basanga Elisha baramubaza bati: “Mbese wari uzi ko Uhoraho ari butware shobuja?” Na we arabasubiza ati: “Yee
2Kings2:4 Eliya yongera kubwira Elisha ati: “Sigara hano dore Uhoraho antumye i Yeriko.” Na we aramusubiza ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho nawe ubwawe ko ntagusiga.” Nuko bajyana i Yeriko.
2Kings2:5 Itsinda ry'abahanuzi b'i Yeriko begera Elisha baramubaza bati: “Mbese wari uzi ko Uhoraho ari butware shobuja?” Na we arabasubiza ati: “Yee
2Kings2:6 Eliya yongera kubwira Elisha ati: “Sigara hano dore Uhoraho antumye kuri Yorodani.” Elisha aramusubiza ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho nawe ubwawe ko ntagusiga.” Bakomezanya urugendo.
2Kings2:7 Itsinda ry'abahanuzi mirongo itanu barabakurikira
2Kings2:8 Nuko Eliya avanamo umwitero we
2Kings2:9 Bamaze kwambuka Eliya abaza Elisha ati: “Ni iki ushaka ko ngukorera mbere y'uko Uhoraho antwara?” Elisha aramusubiza ati: “Ndagusaba ko undaga incuro ebyiri z'umwuka w'ubuhanuzi ukurimo.”
2Kings2:10 Eliya ni ko kumusubiza ati: “Unsabye ikintu kiruhije cyane. Icyakora nubasha kumbona igihe Uhoraho aribube akuntwaye birakubera uko unsabye
2Kings2:11 Bakigenda baganira
2Kings2:12 Elisha ngo abone ibibaye avuga cyane ati: “Mubyeyi
2Kings2:13 Elisha atora umwitero wa Eliya wari uguye hasi
2Kings2:14 Hanyuma afata uwo mwitero Eliya yasize awukubita ku mazi avuga ati: “Uhoraho Imana ya Eliya ari hehe?” Amaze kuyakubitaho yigabanyamo kabiri amwe ajya hepfo andi haruguru
2Kings2:15 Rya tsinda ry'abahanuzi b'i Yeriko babireberaga kure baravuga bati: “Koko umwuka w'ubuhanuzi wari muri Eliya wagiye muri Elisha.” Bahita bajya kumusanganira baramupfukamira.
2Kings2:16 Nuko baramubwira bati: “Dore twebwe abagaragu bawe turimo abagabo mirongo itanu b'intwari
2Kings2:17 Nyamara bakomeza kumuhata bamurembeje arabemera ati: “Nimubohereze.” Bohereza abagabo mirongo itanu bamushakisha iminsi itatu
2Kings2:18 Bagaruka i Yeriko aho Elisha yari yasigaye
2Kings2:19 Abaturage b'i Yeriko babwira Elisha bati: “Nyakubahwa
2Kings2:20 Elisha arababwira ati: “Nimunzanire urwabya rushya mushyiremo umunyu.” Bararumuzanira.
2Kings2:21 Nuko Elisha ajya ku isoko y'amazi ajugunyamo uwo munyu aravuga ati: “Uhoraho agize ati: ‘Mpumanuye aya mazi. Ntazongera kwicana kandi n'ubutaka ntibuzongera kurumba’ ”
2Kings2:22 Amazi ni ko guhumanuka nk'uko Elisha yavuze
2Kings2:23 Nuko Elisha ava i Yeriko yerekeza i Beteli. Ari mu nzira abana baturutse mu mujyi baramukoba bati: “Genda wa munyaruhara we! Genda!”
2Kings2:24 Elisha arakebuka
2Kings2:25 Hanyuma Elisha ajya ku musozi wa Karumeli
2Kings3:1 Yehoramu mwene Ahabu yabaye umwami wa Isiraheli mu mwaka wa cumi n'umunani Yozafati ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda. Yehoramu yamaze imyaka cumi n'ibiri ari ku ngoma i Samariya.
2Kings3:2 Yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nubwo atagejeje aha se na nyina
2Kings3:3 Icyakora yakomeje gukora ibyaha nk'ibyo Yerobowamu mwene Nebati yatoje Abisiraheli
2Kings3:4 Mesha umwami wa Mowabu yari umworozi w'intama. Buri mwaka yagombaga gutura umwami wa Isiraheli intama z'inyagazi ibihumbi ijana
2Kings3:5 Ahabu amaze gupfa Mesha yigomeka kuri Yehoramu
2Kings3:6 Yehoramu ava i Samariya
2Kings3:7 Hanyuma atuma intumwa ku Mwami Yozafati w'u Buyuda kumubwira ziti: “Umwami wa Mowabu yanyigometseho. Ese ntitwajyana kumutera?” Na we ni ko kumutumaho ati: “Tuzajyana kuko turi bamwe n'abantu banjye akaba ari bamwe n'abawe
2Kings3:8 Yozafati yungamo ati: “Mbese tuzanyura iyihe nzira?” Yehoramu aramusubiza ati: “Tuzanyura iy'ubutayu bwa Edomu.”
2Kings3:9 Nuko umwami wa Isiraheli n'uw'u Buyuda n'uwa Edomu bafata urugendo. Bagenze iminsi irindwi ingabo zabo zibura amazi
2Kings3:10 Umwami wa Isiraheli ariyamirira ati: “Ibi ni ibiki? Mbese aho si Uhoraho waduhuruje hano uko turi abami batatu
2Kings3:11 Nyamara Yozafati arabaza ati: “Mbese nta muhanuzi uba ino kugira ngo atugishirize inama Uhoraho?” Umwe mu bagaragu b'umwami wa Isiraheli aravuga ati: “Elisha mwene Shafati wari inkoramutima ya Eliya ari hano.”
2Kings3:12 Yozafati ni ko kuvuga ati: “Koko uwo mugabo aratugezaho ijambo ry'Uhoraho adutumweho.” Nuko Umwami wa Isiraheli na Yozafati n'umwami wa Edomu bajya kureba Elisha.
2Kings3:13 Elisha abaza umwami wa Isiraheli ati: “Mpuriye he nawe? Jya gushaka abahanuzi ba so n'abahanuzi ba nyoko.” Umwami wa Isiraheli aramusubiza ati: “Oya kuko Uhoraho ari we waduhuruje hano uko turi abami batatu
2Kings3:14 Elisha yongera kumubwira ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho Nyiringabo nkorera ko iyaba atari Yozafati umwami w'u Buyuda nari nubashye
2Kings3:15 Ngaho nibanzanire umucuranzi.” Uko umucuranzi yacurangaga
2Kings3:16 Bityo Elisha ararangurura ati: “Uhoraho agize ati: ‘Nimucukure ibyobo byinshi muri iki kibaya.
2Kings3:17 Nta muyaga muza kumva nta n'imvura iri bugwe
2Kings3:18 Icyo gikorwa kandi cyoroheye Uhoraho
2Kings3:19 Muzasenya imijyi yacyo yose ntamenwa kimwe n'imijyi yacyo myiza
2Kings3:20 Bukeye bwaho igihe cyo gutamba igitambo
2Kings3:21 Abamowabu bumvise ko abo bami batatu babateye
2Kings3:22 Bukeye ingabo za Mowabu zikangutse zibona izuba ryarashe ku mazi. Ayo mazi zayaboneraga kure atukura nk'amaraso.
2Kings3:23 Izo ngabo ziravuga ziti: “Rwose ariya ni amaraso! Ba bami basubiranyemo baterana inkota none bamaranye! Mwa Bamowabu mwe
2Kings3:24 Abamowabu bageze ku nkambi y'ingabo z'Abisiraheli
2Kings3:25 Abisiraheli basenya imijyi yaho
2Kings3:26 Umwami wa Mowabu abonye ko yatsinzwe akoranya abantu magana arindwi barwanisha inkota
2Kings3:27 Umwami wa Mowabu ni ko kuzana umwana we w'imfura wari kuzamusimbura ku ngoma
2Kings4:1 Igihe kimwe umugore w'umwe mu itsinda ry'abahanuzi
2Kings4:2 Elisha aramubaza ati: “Urumva nagukorera iki? Mbwira niba hari icyo waba utunze iwawe.” Na we aramusubiza ati: “Nyakubahwa
2Kings4:3 Elisha aramubwira ati: “Jya mu baturanyi bawe maze utire inzabya zirimo ubusa
2Kings4:4 Winjire mu nzu n'abahungu bawe ukinge urugi
2Kings4:5 Nuko umugore amusezeraho
2Kings4:6 Inzabya zimaze kuzura abwira umwe mu bahungu be ati: “Nzanira urundi rwabya.” Aramusubiza ati: “Nta rwabya rusigaye.” Amavuta aherako arakama.
2Kings4:7 Umugore ni ko gusanga Elisha umuntu w'Imana
2Kings4:8 Igihe kimwe Elisha yanyuze i Shunemu
2Kings4:9 Uwo mugore abwira umugabo we ati: “Ndahamya ko uriya mugabo uhora aza iwacu ari umuntu w'Imana w'umuziranenge.
2Kings4:10 None rero tumwubakire akumba hejuru ku gisenge tumushyiriremo uburiri n'ameza n'intebe n'itara
2Kings4:11 Igihe kimwe Elisha yaraje ajya muri ako kumba aruhukiramo.
2Kings4:12 Nuko abwira umugaragu we Gehazi ati: “Hamagara wa mugore aze hano.” Gehazi aramuhamagara maze umugore yitaba Elisha aho yari acumbitse.
2Kings4:13 Elisha abwira Gehazi kumubaza ati: “Dore waratuvunikiye
2Kings4:14 Elisha abaza Gehazi ati: “Twamukorera iki?” Gehazi aramusubiza ati: “Erega nta mwana agira kandi umugabo we arashaje!”
2Kings4:15 Elisha yongera kuvuga ati: “Muhamagare aze hano.” Nuko uwo mugore w'i Shunemu aragaruka ahagarara ku muryango.
2Kings4:16 Elisha aramubwira ati: “Umwaka utaha nk'iki gihe uzaba ukikiye umwana w'umuhungu.” Uwo mugore ariyamirira ati: “Nyakubahwa muntu w'Imana
2Kings4:17 Ariko mu mwaka ukurikira
2Kings4:18 Nuko umwana arakura
2Kings4:19 Umwana abwira se ati: “Umutwe we
2Kings4:20 Uwo mugaragu aramujyana amushyikiriza nyina
2Kings4:21 Nuko aramwurirana amurambika ku buriri bwa Elisha
2Kings4:22 Ahamagara umugabo we aramubwira ati: “Nyoherereza umwe mu bagaragu anzanire indogobe kugira ngo nyarukire kwa wa muntu w'Imana
2Kings4:23 Umugabo aramubaza ati: “Kuki ugiye iwe uyu munsi kandi atari mu mboneko z'ukwezi cyangwa ku isabato?” Na we aramusubiza ati: “Ni ngombwa ko njyayo.”
2Kings4:24 Umugore ategura aho yicara ku ndogobe maze abwira umugaragu ati: “Nyobora tugende
2Kings4:25 Baherako baragenda
2Kings4:26 Ihute umusanganire maze umubaze uti: ‘Ni amahoro? N'umugabo wawe ni amahoro? N'umwana wawe ni amahoro? ’ ” Agezeyo uwo mugore aramusubiza ati: “Ni amahoro.”
2Kings4:27 Ageze kuri uwo musozi aho Elisha ari
2Kings4:28 Umugore ahita avuga ati: “Ese Nyakubahwa
2Kings4:29 Elisha abwira Gehazi ati: “Kenyera ujyane inkoni yanjye maze uvuduke ujye i Shunemu. Nugira uwo muhura ntumuramutse
2Kings4:30 Nyamara nyina w'umwana abwira Elisha ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho nawe ubwawe ko ntagusiga.” Nuko Elisha arahaguruka barajyana.
2Kings4:31 Gehazi abagenda imbere ageze i Shunemu arambika inkoni mu maso h'umwana
2Kings4:32 Elisha ageze mu nzu asanga koko umwana yapfuye
2Kings4:33 Elisha asanga umwana mu cyumba
2Kings4:34 Yubarara ku mwana ashyira umunwa ku munwa
2Kings4:35 Elisha arabyuka azembagira mu nzu
2Kings4:36 Elisha aherako ahamagara Gehazi aramubwira ati: “Hamagara wa mugore.” Gehazi aramanuka aramuhamagara
2Kings4:37 Nuko nyina w'uwo mwana yikubita hasi yubamye imbere ya Elisha
2Kings4:38 Elisha asubira i Gilugali
2Kings4:39 Umwe muri iryo tsinda arasohoka ajya ku gasozi gusoroma imboga
2Kings4:40 Bagaburira iyo supu iryo tsinda ry'abahanuzi
2Kings4:41 Elisha aherako arababwira ati: “Nimunzanire ifu.” Ayiminjira mu nkono
2Kings4:42 Umuntu uturutse i Bāli-Shalisha
2Kings4:43 Uwo mugaragu abaza Elisha ati: “Ese ibi birahagije kubigaburira abantu ijana?” Elisha aramusubiza ati: “Bibagaburire! Dore Uhoraho avuze ko barya bagahaga ndetse bigasaguka.”
2Kings4:44 Nuko uwo mugaragu abigabanya abantu
2Kings5:1 Umugaba w'ingabo z'umwami wa Siriya yitwaga Nāmani. Yari umuntu wemerwa na shebuja
2Kings5:2 Igihe kimwe agatsiko k'abanyazi b'Abanyasiriya bateye muri Isiraheli
2Kings5:3 Nuko rimwe abwira nyirabuja ati: “Iyaba databuja yemeraga gusa agasanga umuhanuzi i Samariya. Yamuvura indwara z'uruhu zanduza.”
2Kings5:4 Nāmani ajya kumenyesha umwami wa Siriya icyo umukobwa w'Umwisirahelikazi yavuze.
2Kings5:5 Umwami abwira Nāmani ati: “Jyayo! Dore ndandikira umwami wa Isiraheli urwandiko urumushyire.” Nāmani agenda yitwaje ibiro magana atatu by'ifeza n'ibiro mirongo itandatu by'izahabu
2Kings5:6 Nuko aragenda ashyikiriza umwami wa Isiraheli urwandiko ruvuga ngo “Hamwe n'uru rwandiko
2Kings5:7 Umwami wa Isiraheli amaze gusoma urwo rwandiko ashishimura imyambaro ye
2Kings5:8 Umuhanuzi Elisha yumva ko umwami wa Isiraheli yashishimuye imyambaro ye
2Kings5:9 Nāmani aherako afata igare rye ry'intambara n'amafarasi ye
2Kings5:10 Elisha amwoherereza intumwa yo kumubwira iti: “Genda wiyuhagire muri Yorodani incuro ndwi urahumanuka
2Kings5:11 Nuko Nāmani agenda arakaye yivovota ati: “Nibwiraga ko umuhanuzi ari busohoke akansanganira agatakambira Uhoraho Imana ye
2Kings5:12 Ese inzuzi z'i Damasi
2Kings5:13 Abagaragu be baramwegera baramubwira bati: “Mubyeyi
2Kings5:14 Nuko Nāmani aramanuka yiyuhagira muri Yorodani incuro ndwi
2Kings5:15 Nāmani ari kumwe n'abagaragu be aherako agaruka kwa Elisha wa muntu w'Imana
2Kings5:16 Elisha aramubwira ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho nkorera
2Kings5:17 Nāmani aramubwira ati: “Databuja
2Kings5:18 Icyakora Uhoraho azajye ambabarira iki kintu kimwe gusa: iyo databuja umwami wa Siriya yinjiye mu ngoro y'imana Rimoni
2Kings5:19 Elisha aramubwira ati: “Genda amahoro.” Nuko Nāmani aragenda. Nāmani yicumeho gato
2Kings5:20 Gehazi wa mugaragu w'umuntu w'Imana Elisha aribwira ati: “Databuja yorohereje uriya Munyasiriya
2Kings5:21 Gehazi amuvudukaho
2Kings5:22 Gehazi aramusubiza ati: “Ni amahoro! Gusa databuja Elisha anyohereje kukubwira ko haje abasore babiri b'abahanuzi baturutse mu misozi ya Efurayimu. None ngo ubamuhere ibiro mirongo itatu by'ifeza n'imyambaro ibiri yo kurimbana.”
2Kings5:23 Nāmani aramubwira ati: “Nyamuneka
2Kings5:24 Bageze ahitwa Ofeli
2Kings5:25 Nuko Gehazi asubira kwa shebuja. Elisha aramubaza ati: “Gehazi we
2Kings5:26 Elisha yongera kumubwira ati: “Uragira ngo mu buryo bwa Mwuka sinabonye wa wundi wamanutse mu igare ry'intambara agusanganira! Iki si igihe cyo kwigwizaho ifeza cyangwa imyambaro
2Kings5:27 Dore indwara za Nāmani zizakuzaho
2Kings6:1 Abagize itsinda ry'abahanuzi babwira Elisha bati: “Dore aha hantu udukoranyiriza ni hato.
2Kings6:2 Reka tujye kuri Yorodani
2Kings6:3 Umwe muri bo abwira Elisha ati: “Databuja
2Kings6:4 Aherako ajyana na bo
2Kings6:5 Mu gihe umwe yatemaga igiti
2Kings6:6 Elisha aramubaza ati: “Irohamiye hehe?” Amaze kumwereka aho yarohamiye Elisha aca agati akajugunyayo
2Kings6:7 Elisha aramubwira ati: “Yisingire uyizane.” Nuko arambura ukuboko arayifata
2Kings6:8 Mu gihe umwami wa Siriya yarwanyaga igihugu cya Isiraheli yagishije inama abagaragu be
2Kings6:9 Nuko Elisha atuma ku mwami wa Isiraheli ati: “Witondere hariya hantu
2Kings6:10 Bityo umwami wa Isiraheli yoherezaga ingabo ze kugenzura aho hantu Elisha yabaga yabarangiye. Elisha abigenza atyo kenshi
2Kings6:11 Ibyo bihagarika umutima umwami wa Siriya cyane
2Kings6:12 Umwe mu bagaragu aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
2Kings6:13 Nuko umwami wa Siriya arategeka ati: “Mugende murebe aho ari maze nohereze abo kumufata.” Bamusubije ko ari i Dotani
2Kings6:14 umwami aherako yoherezayo abarwanira ku mafarasi no mu magare y'intambara n'izindi ngabo nyinshi
2Kings6:15 Umugaragu wa Elisha azinduka kare
2Kings6:16 Elisha aramubwira ati: “Wigira ubwoba. Dore ingabo turi kumwe ziruta izabo ubwinshi.”
2Kings6:17 Hanyuma arasenga ati: “Uhoraho
2Kings6:18 Ingabo z'Abanyasiriya zisatiriye Elisha
2Kings6:19 Elisha arazibwira ati: “Erega mwibeshye inzira n'umujyi babatumyemo
2Kings6:20 Bageze i Samariya Elisha yongera gusaba Uhoraho ati: “Noneho aba Banyasiriya bahumūre babashe kureba.” Uhoraho aherako arabahumūra
2Kings6:21 Umwami wa Isiraheli azirabutswe abaza Elisha ati: “Mubyeyi
2Kings6:22 Elisha aramusubiza ati: “Oya
2Kings6:23 Nuko umwami abakorera ibirori bamaze kurya no kunywa arabohereza basubira kwa shebuja. Kuva ubwo nta dutsiko tw'ingabo z'Abanyasiriya twongeye gutera igihugu cya Isiraheli.
2Kings6:24 Ikindi gihe Benihadadi umwami wa Siriya akoranya ingabo ze
2Kings6:25 Bityo inzara ikomeye iyogoza uwo mujyi ku buryo umutwe w'indogobe waguraga ibikoroto mirongo inani by'ifeza
2Kings6:26 Igihe kimwe umwami wa Isiraheli anyuze ku rukuta ruzengurutse umujyi
2Kings6:27 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Uhoraho atakurengeye
2Kings6:28 Icyakora umwami yungamo ati: “Urifuza iki?” Umugore aramusubiza ati: “Uriya mugore mugenzi wanjye yarambwiye ngo nzane umwana wanjye tumurye none
2Kings6:29 Umwana wanjye twaramutetse turamurya. Bukeye mubwiye nti: ‘Zana umwana wawe na we tumurye’
2Kings6:30 Umwami yumvise amagambo y'uwo mugore ashishimura imyambaro ye
2Kings6:31 Nuko umwami aritotomba ati: “Imana impane bikomeye niba uyu munsi bigejeje nimugoroba
2Kings6:32 Ubwo Elisha yari ari iwe ari kumwe n'abakuru b'imiryango mu nama
2Kings6:33 Elisha amaze kuvuga atyo
2Kings7:1 Elisha aramusubiza ati: “Nimwumve ijambo ry'Uhoraho: aravuga ati: ‘Ejo magingo aya ku isoko rya Samariya
2Kings7:2 Umugaba w'ingabo abaza Elisha ati: “N'aho Uhoraho yafungura amadirishya ku ijuru akabinyuzamo
2Kings7:3 Hariho abantu bane barwaye indwara z'uruhu zanduza bahoraga ku irembo ry'umujyi
2Kings7:4 Nitujya mu mujyi
2Kings7:5 Nimugoroba barahaguruka
2Kings7:6 Koko rero
2Kings7:7 Bugorobye abo Banyasiriya barahunga. Basiga amahema yabo n'amafarasi yabo n'indogobe zabo
2Kings7:8 Ba barwayi bagera aho inkambi itangirira binjira mu ihema rimwe
2Kings7:9 Baravugana bati: “Ibi dukora si byiza! Dore twamenye iyi nkuru nziza tugumya kuyihererana. Niturindira ko igitondo gitangaza turabihanirwa. Nimuze tujye ibwami tubamenyeshe iyi nkuru nziza.”
2Kings7:10 Nuko basubira mu mujyi
2Kings7:11 Abo barinzi babimenyesha abo mu mujyi
2Kings7:12 Umwami abyuka igicuku cyose abwira abagaragu be ati: “Dore icyo Abanyasiriya bashaka kudukorera: kubera ko bazi ko dushonje babereretse bava mu nkambi
2Kings7:13 Umwe mu bagaragu be aramusubiza ati: “Dufate amafarasi atanu mu yasigaye mu mujyi maze twohereze abantu bajye kureba uko byifashe
2Kings7:14 Nuko bafata amagare y'intambara abiri akururwa n'amafarasi
2Kings7:15 Abo bantu bakurikira ingabo z'Abanyasiriya kugera ku ruzi rwa Yorodani
2Kings7:16 Abisiraheli baraza binjira mu nkambi z'Abanyasiriya barazisahura. Bityo ibiro cumi na bibiri by'ifu cyangwa ibiro makumyabiri na bine by'ingano bigurwa igikoroto kimwe cy'ifeza
2Kings7:17 Umwami yari yategetse wa mugaba w'ingabo kujya kurinda irembo ry'umujyi
2Kings7:18 Koko rero
2Kings7:19 Ubwo ni bwo umugaba w'ingabo yabazaga Elisha ati: “N'aho Uhoraho yafungura amadirishya ku ijuru akabinyuzamo
2Kings7:20 Uko ni ko byagenze
2Kings8:1 Igihe kimwe Elisha yabwiye wa mugore w'i Shunemu yari yazuriye umwana ati: “Suhukira mu kindi gihugu hamwe n'umuryango wawe mutureyo
2Kings8:2 Uwo mugore akora ibyo Elisha yari amutegetse
2Kings8:3 Imyaka irindwi ishize wa mugore w'i Shunemu atahukana n'abe bavuye mu Bufilisiti
2Kings8:4 Ubwo umwami yaganiraga na Gehazi wahoze ari umugaragu wa Elisha
2Kings8:5 Gehazi atangiye kumutekerereza uko Elisha yazuye umwana wari wapfuye
2Kings8:6 Umwami abyibariza uwo mugore
2Kings8:7 Ikindi gihe Elisha yagiye i Damasi
2Kings8:8 umwami abwira Hazayeli ati: “Shyīra impano uwo muntu w'Imana
2Kings8:9 Hazayeli ajya kureba Elisha yitwaje impano z'ibintu by'agaciro bivuye i Damasi
2Kings8:10 Elisha aramusubiza ati: “Genda umubwire uti: ‘Iyo ndwara uzayikira
2Kings8:11 Elisha atumbira Hazayeli adahumbya
2Kings8:12 Hazayeli aramubaza ati: “Databuja
2Kings8:13 Hazayeli abaza Elisha ati: “Databuja
2Kings8:14 Hanyuma Hazayeli asezera kuri Elisha
2Kings8:15 Nyamara bukeye Hazayeli afata uburingiti abwinika mu mazi
2Kings8:16 Mu mwaka wa gatanu Yehoramu mwene Ahabu ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings8:17 Icyo gihe yari afite imyaka mirongo itatu n'ibiri
2Kings8:18 Yoramu yitwaye nabi nk'abami ba Isiraheli
2Kings8:19 Nyamara Uhoraho ntiyashatse gutsembaho ingoma y'u Buyuda
2Kings8:20 Yoramu ari ku ngoma Abedomu bigometse ku butegetsi bwe
2Kings8:21 Nuko Yoramu ajya i Sayiri aherekejwe n'amagare ye yose y'intambara. Abedomu barahamugotera we n'abatware be b'amagare y'intambara. Nuko nijoro Yoramu abacamo icyuho we n'ingabo ze bahungira iwabo.
2Kings8:22 Bityo Abedomu bigomeka ku Bayuda kuva ubwo barigenga. Muri icyo gihe umudugudu wa Libuna na wo wigometse kuri Yoramu.
2Kings8:23 Ibindi bikorwa byose n'ibigwi bya Yoramu
2Kings8:24 Yoramu yisazira amahoro
2Kings8:25 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'ibiri Yehoramu mwene Ahabu ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings8:26 Icyo gihe yari afite imyaka makumyabiri n'ibiri
2Kings8:27 Ahaziya yitwaye nabi nk'abami ba Isiraheli akurikiza inzu ya Ahabu. Yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nk'ab'inzu ya Ahabu
2Kings8:28 Ahaziya aherako afatanya na Yehoramu mwene Ahabu
2Kings8:29 Nuko Yehoramu agaruka i Yizerēli kwiyomora ibyo bikomere. Umwami w'u Buyuda Ahaziya mwene Yoramu
2Kings9:1 Igihe kimwe umuhanuzi Elisha yahamagaye umwe mu itsinda ry'abahanuzi
2Kings9:2 Nugerayo uzashake Yehu mwene Yehoshafati akaba n'umwuzukuru wa Nimushi
2Kings9:3 Uzafate imperezo y'amavuta uyamusuke ku mutwe uvuga uti: ‘Uhoraho aravuze ngo: nkwimikishije amavuta kugira ngo ube umwami wa Isiraheli. Hanyuma ukingure urugi wirukanke
2Kings9:4 Nuko uwo musore w'umuhanuzi ajya i Ramoti y'i Gileyadi.
2Kings9:5 Agezeyo asanga abakuru b'ingabo bakoranye aravuga ati: “Mutware
2Kings9:6 Yehu arahaguruka bajyana mu nzu. Uwo musore w'umuhanuzi amusuka amavuta ku mutwe avuga ati: “Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli aravuze ngo: ‘Nkwimikishije amavuta kugira ngo ube umwami w'ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli.
2Kings9:7 Ni wowe uzatsemba ab'inzu ya shobuja Ahabu
2Kings9:8 Inzu yose ya Ahabu izashirira ku icumu. Koko rero
2Kings9:9 Inzu ya Ahabu nzayigenza nk'uko nagenjeje iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati
2Kings9:10 Naho Yezebeli we nta muntu uzashyingura intumbi ye
2Kings9:11 Yehu na we arasohoka asanga abagaragu ba shebuja
2Kings9:12 Baramubwira bati: “Witubeshya tubwire uko byagenze.” Yehu arabasubiza ati: “Yambwiye ati: ‘Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Nkwimikishije amavuta kugira ngo ube umwami wa Isiraheli.’ ”
2Kings9:13 Abakuru mu ngabo barahaguruka buri wese afata umwambaro we
2Kings9:14 Muri icyo gihe ingabo zose za Isiraheli zari mu mujyi wa Ramoti y'i Gileyadi
2Kings9:15 
2Kings9:16 Nuko Yehu yurira igare ry'intambara atera i Yizerēli kuko ari ho Yehoramu yari arwariye
2Kings9:17 Umurinzi wari mu munara i Yizerēli abona igitero cy'ingabo za Yehu kiraje
2Kings9:18 Umuntu ugendera ku ifarasi ajya gusanganira Yehu
2Kings9:19 Yehoramu yohereza undi ugendera ku ifarasi. Abagezeho arababwira ati: “Umwami antumye kubabaza ngo ‘Mbese ni amahoro?’ ” Yehu aramusubiza ati: “Iby'amahoro ubishakaho iki? Ahubwo hindukira unkurikire.”
2Kings9:20 Umurinzi yongera gutuma ati: “Intumwa yabagezeho ariko ntiyagarutse. Icyakora uyoboye igare ry'intambara ararigendesha nk'umusazi
2Kings9:21 Yehoramu umwami wa Isiraheli arategeka ati: “Nimuntegurire igare ryanjye ry'intambara.” Nuko araryurira
2Kings9:22 Yehoramu ahuye na Yehu aramubaza ati: “Yehu we
2Kings9:23 Yehoramu arahindukira kugira ngo ahunge
2Kings9:24 Yehu afora umuheto we arasa Yehoramu umwambi
2Kings9:25 Yehu abwira Bidukari umwungirije mu nkambi ati: “Terura intumbi ye uyijugunye mu murima wa Naboti w'i Yizerēli. Wibuke icyo Uhoraho yavuze cya gihe twagendanaga mu igare ry'intambara dukurikiye se Ahabu.
2Kings9:26 Uhoraho yagize ati: ‘Ejo nabonye ukuntu wowe Ahabu wamennye amaraso ya Naboti n'ay'abana be
2Kings9:27 Ahaziya umwami w'u Buyuda abibonye atyo
2Kings9:28 Abagaragu be batwara umurambo we mu igare ry'intambara
2Kings9:29 Ahaziya yari yarabaye umwami w'u Buyuda mu mwaka wa cumi n'umwe Yehoramu mwene Ahabu ari ku ngoma.
2Kings9:30 Nuko Yehu ajya i Yizerēli. Yezebeli abyumvise yisiga irange ku ngohi
2Kings9:31 Yehu yinjiye mu irembo ry'umujyi Yezebeli aramubaza ati: “Ni amahoro Zimuri
2Kings9:32 Yehu yubura amaso akebuka mu idirishya ararangurura ati: “Unshyigikiye ni nde? Ni nde se?” Abagabo babiri cyangwa batatu b'inkone bamurungurukira mu idirishya.
2Kings9:33 Arababwira ati: “Nimujugunye hasi Yezebeli uriya.” Nuko barahamujugunya. Aragwa amaraso ye yimisha ku rukuta no ku mafarasi. Yehu arahamuribatira n'amafarasi ye.
2Kings9:34 Yehu yinjira mu ngoro ararya aranywa
2Kings9:35 Basohoka bagiye kumushyingura
2Kings9:36 Basubirayo babibwira Yehu na we ariyamirira ati: “Uko ni ko Uhoraho yari yarabihishuriye umugaragu we Eliya w'i Tishibi
2Kings9:37 kandi ko intumbi ye izamera nk'ibishingwe binyanyagijwe mu murima w'i Yizerēli
2Kings10:1 Ahabu yari afite abana mirongo irindwi bamukomokaho
2Kings10:2 “Mwebwe abashinzwe kwita ku rubyaro rwa Ahabu
2Kings10:3 muhite murobanura mu bana ba shobuja Ahabu ukwiriye kuba umwami
2Kings10:4 Nuko bagira ubwoba cyane baravuga bati: “Tubasha dute guhangara Yehu niba abami babiri batabishoboye?”
2Kings10:5 Umuyobozi w'imirimo y'ibwami
2Kings10:6 Yehu yongera kubandikira ati: “Niba munshyigikiye kandi mukaba munyumvira
2Kings10:7 Ba bayobozi bobonye urwandiko bazana abo bana uko ari mirongo irindwi barabica
2Kings10:8 Intumwa igezeyo ibwira Yehu iti: “Imitwe ya bene Ahabu bayizanye.” Yehu ategeka ko bayirunda ibirundo bibiri ku irembo ry'umujyi
2Kings10:9 Bukeye Yehu asohoka mu mujyi ahagarara imbere ya rubanda rwose
2Kings10:10 Nuko rero muzirikane ko nta jambo Uhoraho yavuze ku nzu ya Ahabu
2Kings10:11 Bityo Yehu yicisha buri wese ufitanye isano na Ahabu wari usigaye i Yizerēli
2Kings10:12 Hanyuma Yehu ava aho yerekeza i Samariya. Ageze ahitwa i Betekedi y'Abashumba
2Kings10:13 ahasanga abafitanye isano ya hafi na Ahaziya umwami w'u Buyuda. Arababaza ati: “Muri ba nde?” Baramusubiza bati: “Dufitanye isano ya hafi na Ahaziya
2Kings10:14 Yehu arategeka ati: “Nimubafate.” Nuko barabafata barabica
2Kings10:15 Yehu yigiye imbere gato ahura na Yonadabu mwene Rekabu wari uje kumusanganira
2Kings10:16 Yehu aramubwira ati: “Reka tujyane wirebere uburyo nkorera Uhoraho n'ishyaka ryinshi!” Nuko bajyana mu igare rye.
2Kings10:17 Yehu ageze i Samariya yicisha abakomoka kuri Ahabu bose bari basigaye mu murwa. Bose arabatsemba akurikije ijambo Uhoraho yari yaratumye Eliya.
2Kings10:18 Yehu akoranya rubanda rwose maze arababwira ati: “Ahabu yashengereraga buhoro Bāli
2Kings10:19 Nimuhamagaze rero abahanuzi bose ba Bāli
2Kings10:20 Yehu arategeka ati: “Nimuhamagaze ikoraniro ryo gushengerera Bāli.” Bararihamagaza.
2Kings10:21 Iryo tangazo rikwira muri Isiraheli hose
2Kings10:22 Maze Yehu ategeka ushinzwe imyambaro yeguriwe ingoro
2Kings10:23 Yehu na Yonadabu mwene Rekabu binjira mu ngoro ya Bāli
2Kings10:24 Nuko barinjira batura amaturo
2Kings10:25 Yehu amaze gutamba ibitambo ategeka za ngabo n'abakuru bazo ati: “Nimwinjire mutsembe abayoboke ba Bāli. Ntihagire n'umwe urokoka.” Izo ngabo n'abakuru bazo ziherako zibatsembesha inkota
2Kings10:26 basenya inkingi barayisohora barayitwika.
2Kings10:27 Barimbura inkingi yeguriwe Bāli
2Kings10:28 Nguko uko Yehu yakuyeho Bāli mu gihugu cya Isiraheli.
2Kings10:29 Nyamara na we ntiyareka ibyaha byakorwaga na Yerobowamu mwene Nebati
2Kings10:30 Uhoraho abwira Yehu ati: “Kubera ko wakoze ibinogeye
2Kings10:31 Nyamara Yehu ntiyumviraga Amategeko y'Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli abikuye ku mutima. Bityo ntiyaretse gukora ibyaha nk'ibya Yerobowamu wari waratoje Abisiraheli gucumura.
2Kings10:32 Muri icyo gihe Uhoraho yibasira igihugu cya Isiraheli aragitubya. Ashyigikira Hazayeli umwami wa Siriya arwanya Abisiraheli
2Kings10:33 Nuko banyagwa akarere kose k'iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani
2Kings10:34 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yehu n'ubutwari bwe
2Kings10:35 Yehu yamaze imyaka makumyabiri n'umunani ari ku ngoma ya Isiraheli i Samariya
2Kings10:36 
2Kings11:1 Umugabekazi Ataliya ngo yumve ko umuhungu we Ahaziya yishwe
2Kings11:2 Ariko Yehosheba umukobwa w'umwami Yoramu
2Kings11:3 Nuko Yowasi amara imyaka itandatu mu Ngoro y'Imana yihishemo hamwe n'umurezi we. Muri icyo gihe Ataliya ni we wategekaga igihugu.
2Kings11:4 Nuko mu mwaka wa karindwi umutambyi Yehoyada atumiza abagaba b'ingabo zitwa Abakari n'abandi barinzi
2Kings11:5 Yehoyada arabategeka ati: “Dore icyo mugomba gukora: mwebwe abashinzwe kurinda inzu y'umwami ku isabato murakora uko bisanzwe
2Kings11:6 itsinda rya kabiri rirarinda irembo ryitwa Suru
2Kings11:7 Ku byerekeye imitwe y'ingabo ibiri isigaye idashinzwe kurinda ku isabato
2Kings11:8 Buri wese agomba kuba yitwaje intwaro buri gihe
2Kings11:9 Nuko abo bagaba b'ingabo babigenza uko umutambyi Yehoyada yabategetse. Buri wese afata abasirikari be
2Kings11:10 Bahageze abaha amacumu n'ingabo byari iby'Umwami Dawidi
2Kings11:11 Abasirikari bamaze gufata intwaro bashinga ibirindiro aho umwana w'umwami ari
2Kings11:12 Nuko Yehoyada azana umwana w'umwami amwambika ikamba
2Kings11:13 Umugabekazi Ataliya yumvise urusaku rw'abarinzi n'urwa rubanda
2Kings11:14 Asanga harimo umwami uhagaze iruhande rw'inkingi y'Ingoro nk'uko umuhango wari uri. Abagaba b'ingabo n'abavuza amakondera bari bamukikije
2Kings11:15 Umutambyi Yehoyada ategeka abagaba b'ingabo ati: “Nimumusohore mumunyuze hagati y'imirongo y'ingabo
2Kings11:16 Nuko baherako baramujyana bamunyuza mu Irembo ry'Amafarasi
2Kings11:17 Yehoyada asaba umwami na rubanda kugirana Isezerano n'Uhoraho ko bamuyobotse
2Kings11:18 Rubanda rwose rwiroha ku ngoro ya Bāli ruyirindimurira hasi
2Kings11:19 Afata abagaba b'ingabo
2Kings11:20 Rubanda rwose basābwa n'ibyishimo
2Kings12:1 Mu mwaka wa karindwi Yehu ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings12:2 Mu mibereho ye yose Yowasi yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho
2Kings12:3 Icyakora ntibigeze bakuraho ahasengerwaga
2Kings12:4 Yowasi abwira abatambyi ati: “Mukoranye amafaranga yose azanwa mu Ngoro ku bw'imirimo y'Uhoraho: umusoro wa buri muntu asoreshwa ku bintu bitandukanye n'ayo abantu batanga ku bushake bwabo.
2Kings12:5 Buri mutambyi yakire amafaranga avuye kuri buri mucungamutungo. Ayo mafaranga bazayakoresha mu gusana aho Ingoro y'Uhoraho yasenyutse hose.”
2Kings12:6 Nyamara kugeza mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n'itatu Yowasi ari ku ngoma
2Kings12:7 Umwami Yowasi ahamagaza Yehoyada n'abandi batambyi
2Kings12:8 Bityo abatambyi biyemerera kutazongera gukoranya amafaranga ya rubanda
2Kings12:9 Umutambyi Yehoyada azana isanduku atobora umwenge mu gipfundikizo cyayo
2Kings12:10 Iyo babonaga ko ayo mafaranga amaze kugwira mu isanduku
2Kings12:11 Amafaranga amaze kubarurwa bakayashyikiriza abubakisha n'abagenzuzi b'imirimo yo ku Ngoro y'Uhoraho
2Kings12:12 kimwe n'abaconzi b'amabuye n'ababatsi. Bityo amafaranga asigaye bayaguraga ibikoresho birimo imbaho n'amabuye abaconzwe byo gusana Ingoro y'Uhoraho
2Kings12:13 Icyakora amafaranga yatangwaga mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho ntiyishyurwaga imirimo yo gucura ibikombe by'ifeza cyangwa ibikoresho by'ibyuma
2Kings12:14 Ahubwo yose bayashyikirizaga abubakishaga
2Kings12:15 Nta n'ubwo birirwaga bagenzura abo bubakishaga uburyo bahembaga abakozi
2Kings12:16 Amafaranga yatangwaga mu mwanya wo kwitambira ibitambo byo kwigorora n'iby'impongano z'ibyaha byabo
2Kings12:17 Muri icyo gihe Hazayeli umwami wa Siriya atera i Gati arahigarurira. Hanyuma agambirira no gutera i Yeruzalemu
2Kings12:18 ariko Yowasi umwami w'u Buyuda akoranya impano zose z'agaciro
2Kings12:19 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yowasi
2Kings12:20 Hanyuma abagaragu be baramugambanira
2Kings12:21 
2Kings13:1 Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n'itatu Yowasi mwene Ahaziya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings13:2 Yehowahazi yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
2Kings13:3 Bityo Uhoraho arakarira Abisiraheli
2Kings13:4 Yehowahazi atakambira Uhoraho
2Kings13:5 Nuko Uhoraho ahagurutsa umurengezi wo gutabara Abisiraheli maze barokoka Abanyasiriya
2Kings13:6 Nyamara Abisiraheli ntibihana gukora ibyaha nk'iby'inzu ya Yerobowamu watoje Abisiraheli gucumura
2Kings13:7 Yehowahazi yari asigaranye gusa abarwanira ku mafarasi mirongo itanu
2Kings13:8 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yehowahazi n'ubutwari bwe
2Kings13:9 Yehowahazi yisazira amahoro bamushyingura i Samariya. Umuhungu we Yehowasi amusimbura ku ngoma.
2Kings13:10 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'irindwi Yowasi ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings13:11 Yehowasi yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
2Kings13:12 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yehowasi
2Kings13:13 Hanyuma Yehowasi yisazira amahoro bamushyingura i Samariya hamwe na ba sekuru
2Kings13:14 Elisha ararwara araremba byo gupfa. Yehowasi umwami wa Isiraheli agiye kumusura amwubararaho aramuririra
2Kings13:15 Elisha aramubwira ati: “Ngaho zana umuheto n'imyambi.” Yehowasi arabizana.
2Kings13:16 Elisha ati: “Kingura idirishya ryerekeye iburasirazuba.” Amaze kurikingura yungamo ati: “Fora umuheto.” Amaze kuwufora Elisha ashyira ibiganza bye ku biganza by'umwami. Aramubwira ati: “Rasa.” Na we ararasa. Elisha aravuga ati: “Uwo mwambi urashe urashushanya uko Uhoraho azaguha gutsinda Abanyasiriya.” Uzatsindira Abanyasiriya Afeka ubatsembeho.
2Kings13:17 
2Kings13:18 Nuko Elisha yongera kubwira umwami Yehowasi ati: “Zana indi myambi.” Nuko arayizana. Elisha abwira umwami wa Isiraheli ati: “Kubite hasi.” Akubita hasi gatatu arekara aho.
2Kings13:19 Elisha arakarira Yehowasi aramubwira ati: “Washoboraga gukubita hasi incuro eshanu cyangwa esheshatu
2Kings13:20 Hanyuma Elisha arapfa baramushyingura. Uko umwaka utashye udutsiko tw'Abamowabu twateraga muri Isiraheli.
2Kings13:21 Igihe kimwe Abisiraheli bagiye gushyingura umurambo mu irimbi aho bashyinguye Elisha
2Kings13:22 Hazayeli umwami wa Siriya yari yarakandamije Abisiraheli ku ngoma yose ya Yehowahazi.
2Kings13:23 Nuko Uhoraho agirira impuhwe Abisiraheli
2Kings13:24 Hazayeli umwami wa Siriya amaze gupfa
2Kings13:25 Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi yigarurira imijyi y'Abisiraheli
2Kings14:1 Mu mwaka wa kabiri Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings14:2 Icyo gihe yari afite imyaka makumyabiri n'itanu
2Kings14:3 Amasiya yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho nka se Yowasi
2Kings14:4 Icyakora ntibigeze bakuraho ahasengerwaga
2Kings14:5 Amasiya amaze gukomeza ingoma ye
2Kings14:6 Icyakora ntiyicisha abana babo akurikije ibyanditswe mu Mategeko y'igitabo cya Musa
2Kings14:7 Amasiya amarira ku icumu Abedomu ibihumbi icumi mu kibaya cy'Umunyu
2Kings14:8 Amasiya atuma ku mwami wa Isiraheli Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi akaba n'umwuzukuru wa Yehu
2Kings14:9 Nuko Yehowasi umwami wa Isiraheli atuma kuri Amasiya umwami w'u Buyuda ati: “Igihe kimwe igitovu cyo ku bisi bya Libani cyatumye ku giti cy'isederi cy'aho i Libani kiti: ‘Ndagusaba umugeni w'umuhungu wanjye.’ Bukeye inyamaswa inyura kuri icyo gitovu irakiribata.
2Kings14:10 Koko wamariye Abedomu ku icumu none uriyumvamo ikuzo. Ishimire iryo kuzo
2Kings14:11 Nyamara Amasiya ntiyita kuri uwo muburo. Nuko Yehowasi umwami wa Isiraheli ajya ku rugamba
2Kings14:12 Abayuda bameneshwa n'Abisiraheli barahunga
2Kings14:13 Yehowasi umwami wa Isiraheli afatira i Beti-Shemeshi umwami w'u Buyuda Amasiya mwene Yowasi
2Kings14:14 Nuko asahura izahabu n'ifeza n'ibindi bikoresho byose byari mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
2Kings14:15 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yehowasi
2Kings14:16 Hanyuma Yehowasi yisazira amahoro
2Kings14:17 Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi umwami wa Isiraheli amaze gupfa
2Kings14:18 Ibindi bikorwa bya Amasiya
2Kings14:19 Hanyuma abaturage b'i Yeruzalemu bagambanira Amasiya maze ahungira i Lakishi
2Kings14:20 Umurambo we bawuzana i Yeruzalemu mu igare rikururwa n'amafarasi
2Kings14:21 Abayuda bose bimika Uziya mwene Amasiya asimbura se ku ngoma
2Kings14:22 Se amaze gupfa
2Kings14:23 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'itanu Amasiya mwene Yowasi ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings14:24 Yerobowamu uwo yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nk'ibyo Yerobowamu mwene Nebati yatoje Abisiraheli.
2Kings14:25 Icyakora yagaruje intara zose zahoze ari iza Isiraheli kuva ahitwaga Lebo-Hamati mu majyaruguru
2Kings14:26 Koko rero Uhoraho yari yarabonye ukuntu Abisiraheli bakandamizwaga bikabije
2Kings14:27 Icyakora Uhoraho ntabwo yari yariyemeje gutsemba Abisiraheli burundu. Ni cyo cyatumye abagoboka akoresheje Yerobowamu mwene Yehowasi.
2Kings14:28 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yerobowamu
2Kings14:29 Yerobowamu yisazira amahoro
2Kings15:1 Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n'irindwi Yerobowamu ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings15:2 Icyo gihe Uziya yari afite imyaka cumi n'itandatu
2Kings15:3 Uziya akora ibinogeye Uhoraho nka se Amasiya.
2Kings15:4 Icyakora ntibigeze bakuraho ahasengerwaga
2Kings15:5 Uhoraho ahana umwami Uziya amuteza indwara z'uruhu zanduza
2Kings15:6 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Uziya
2Kings15:7 Uziya amaze gupfa bamushyingura hamwe na ba sekuruza mu Murwa wa Dawidi. Umuhungu we Yotamu amusimbura ku ngoma.
2Kings15:8 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'umunani Uziya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings15:9 Zakariya yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho kimwe na ba sekuruza
2Kings15:10 Nuko uwitwa Shalumu mwene Yabeshi aramugambanira
2Kings15:11 Ibindi bikorwa bya Zakariya
2Kings15:12 Bityo
2Kings15:13 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'icyenda Uziya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings15:14 Menahemu mwene Gadi ava i Tirusa yigira i Samariya
2Kings15:15 Ibindi bikorwa bya Shalumu n'uko yagambaniye Zakariya
2Kings15:16 Menahemu atera umujyi wa Tipusa atsemba abari bawutuye bose
2Kings15:17 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'icyenda Uziya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings15:18 Muri icyo gihe cyose
2Kings15:19 Tigulati-Pileseri umwami wa Ashūru atera Isiraheli
2Kings15:20 Kugira ngo izo feza ziboneke Menahemu yashyizeho umusoro ku bakire b'Abisiraheli
2Kings15:21 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Menahemu
2Kings15:22 Menahemu yisazira amahoro
2Kings15:23 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itanu Uziya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings15:24 Pekahiya yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
2Kings15:25 Hanyuma uwitwaga Peka mwene Remaliya yari yaragize icyegera cye aramugambanira
2Kings15:26 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Pekahiya
2Kings15:27 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itanu n'ibiri Uziya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings15:28 Peka yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
2Kings15:29 Peka akiri ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings15:30 Hanyuma Hozeya mwene Ela agambanira Peka mwene Remaliya aramwica
2Kings15:31 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Peka
2Kings15:32 Mu mwaka wa kabiri Peka mwene Remaliya ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings15:33 Icyo gihe Yotamu yari afite imyaka makumyabiri n'itanu
2Kings15:34 Yotamu yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho nka se Uziya.
2Kings15:35 Icyakora ntibigeze bakuraho ahasengerwaga
2Kings15:36 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi bya Yotamu
2Kings15:37 Mu gihe cya Yotamu
2Kings15:38 Hanyuma Yotamu yisazira amahoro
2Kings16:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'irindwi Peka mwene Remaliya ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings16:2 Icyo gihe Ahazi yari afite imyaka makumyabiri
2Kings16:3 Yagenje nk'abami ba Isiraheli ageza n'aho atamba umwana we
2Kings16:4 Nuko atamba n'ibitambo yosereza n'imibavu ahasengerwaga ibigirwamana
2Kings16:5 Resini umwami wa Siriya
2Kings16:6 Muri icyo gihe umwami Resini wa Siriya ni bwo agaruriye Abedomu umujyi wa Elati
2Kings16:7 Ahazi aherako yohereza intumwa kwa Tigulati-Pileseri umwami wa Ashūru kumubwira ziti: “Jyewe ndi nk'umwana wawe n'umugaragu wawe. None ngwino unkize umwami wa Siriya n'uwa Isiraheli banteye.”
2Kings16:8 Nuko akoranya izahabu n'ifeza byari mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho no mu bubiko bw'ibwami
2Kings16:9 Umwami wa Ashūru akora ibyo Ahazi amusabye atera i Damasi arahigarurira
2Kings16:10 Ahazi ajya i Damasi guhura na Tigulati-Pileseri umwami wa Ashūru
2Kings16:11 Uriya yubakisha urutambiro akurikije bidasubirwaho amabwiriza umwami Ahazi yamwoherereje
2Kings16:12 Umwami ngo ave i Damasi abona urwo rutambiro maze ararwegera
2Kings16:13 arutambiraho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro
2Kings16:14 Ahazi yimura urutambiro rw'umuringa rwari rweguriwe Uhoraho. Urwo rutambiro rwari imbere y'Ingoro
2Kings16:15 Nuko umwami Ahazi ategeka umutambyi Uriya ati: “Uzajye utambira kuri uru rutambiro rugari igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro cya buri gitondo
2Kings16:16 Umutambyi Uriya ashyira mu bikorwa ibyemezo byose by'umwami Ahazi.
2Kings16:17 Hanyuma Umwami Ahazi yomora ibisate by'umuringa byari ku bigare byo mu rugo rw'Ingoro
2Kings16:18 Asenya ibaraza ryitwaga iry'isabato ryari ryubatse imbere mu Ngoro
2Kings16:19 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi bya Ahazi
2Kings16:20 Nuko Ahazi amaze gupfa ashyingurwa mu irimbi rya ba sekuruza mu Murwa wa Dawidi. Umuhungu we Hezekiya amusimbura ku ngoma
2Kings17:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'ibiri Ahazi ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
2Kings17:2 Hozeya yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
2Kings17:3 Shalimaneseri umwami wa Ashūru aramutera
2Kings17:4 Bitinze Hozeya agomera Shalimaneseri
2Kings17:5 Hanyuma umwami wa Ashūru atera igihugu cyose cya Isiraheli
2Kings17:6 Bityo yigarurira Samariya mu mwaka wa cyenda Hozeya ari ku ngoma
2Kings17:7 Ibyo byago byageze ku Bisiraheli kubera ko bari baracumuye ku Uhoraho Imana yabo
2Kings17:8 Bagenzaga nk'abanyamahanga Uhoraho yari yarirukanye imbere yabo kugira ngo babasimbure. Bakurikizaga kandi imigenzo izira abami ba Isiraheli badukanaga.
2Kings17:9 Abisiraheli bakoraga rwihishwa ibintu bitanogeye Uhoraho Imana yabo
2Kings17:10 Bashingaga amabuye n'inkingi byeguriwe ikigirwamana Ashera mu mpinga z'imisozi zose
2Kings17:11 Aho hantu hose bahosereza imibavu
2Kings17:12 Koko rero Abisiraheli bashengereye ibigirwamana Uhoraho yari yarabihanangirije ati: “Ntimuzabishengerere.”
2Kings17:13 Uhoraho yari yaraburiye Abisiraheli n'Abayuda abinyujije ku bahanuzi batari bamwe ati: “Nimuhindukire mureke gukora ibibi
2Kings17:14 Nyamara abo bantu barinangira banga kumvira
2Kings17:15 Banze amateka ye n'Isezerano yagiranye na ba sekuruza
2Kings17:16 Nuko baca ku mabwiriza yose Uhoraho Imana yabo yabahaye
2Kings17:17 Batambye abahungu n'abakobwa ho ibitambo
2Kings17:18 Uhoraho arakarira Abisiraheli bikomeye
2Kings17:19 Abayuda na bo ntibita ku mabwiriza y'Uhoraho Imana yabo
2Kings17:20 Ni cyo cyatumye Uhoraho azibukira abakomokaga kuri Isiraheli bose arababurabuza
2Kings17:21 Ubwo Uhoraho yatandukanyaga ubutegetsi bw'ingoma y'inzu ya Dawidi n'intara ya Isiraheli
2Kings17:22 Nuko Abisiraheli bakomeza gukora ibyaha byose batojwe na Yerobowamu
2Kings17:23 Uhoraho abamenesha mu gihugu cyabo bajyanwa ho iminyago muri Ashūru
2Kings17:24 Umwami wa Ashūru ajyana abantu baturutse i Babiloni n'i Kuta na Awa
2Kings17:25 Bagitangira kuhatura ntibasengaga Uhoraho
2Kings17:26 Nuko iyo nkuru bayimenyesha umwami wa Ashūru bati: “Ba bantu bajyanywe bagatuzwa mu mijyi yo mu ntara ya Samariya
2Kings17:27 Nuko umwami wa Ashūru ategeka ko basubiza i Samariya umwe mu batambyi baho bazanye ho umunyago
2Kings17:28 Bityo umutambyi wari warajyanywe ho umunyago avanywe i Samariya
2Kings17:29 Nyamara abo banyamahanga biremera imana zabo bazishyira mu mazu bubatse
2Kings17:30 Bityo Abanyababiloniya biremera imana yitwa Sukuti-Benoti
2Kings17:31 Abavuye Awa biremera iyitwa Nibuhazi na Tarutaki
2Kings17:32 Icyakora bose baramyaga n'Uhoraho
2Kings17:33 Bityo ku ruhande rumwe baramyaga Uhoraho
2Kings17:34 Na n'ubu abakomoka kuri bo baracyagenza batyo. Ntabwo bayoboka Uhoraho neza kugira ngo bakurikize amateka ye
2Kings17:35 Uhoraho yagiranye na bo Isezerano arabategeka ati: “Ntimuzayoboke izindi mana
2Kings17:36 Mube ari jye jyenyine Uhoraho muramya
2Kings17:37 Mujye mukurikiza Amategeko yanjye kimwe n'amabwiriza yanjye nk'uko nabyandikishije
2Kings17:38 Ntimukibagirwe Isezerano nagiranye namwe
2Kings17:39 Ahubwo mujye munyubaha jyewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu
2Kings17:40 Nyamara abo banyamahanga ntibumvira Uhoraho
2Kings17:41 Bityo ku ruhande rumwe bakaramya Uhoraho
2Kings18:1 Mu mwaka wa gatatu Hozeya mwene Ela ari ku ngoma muri Isiraheli
2Kings18:2 Icyo gihe Hezekiya yari afite imyaka makumyabiri n'itanu
2Kings18:3 Hezekiya yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho nka sekuruza Umwami Dawidi.
2Kings18:4 Akuraho ahasengerwaga ibigirwamana
2Kings18:5 Hezekiya aherako yizera Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli
2Kings18:6 Yishingikirije ku Uhoraho ntiyamutezukaho
2Kings18:7 Uhoraho agendana na Hezekiya amuha gusohoza imigambi ye. Nuko yivumbagatanya ku mwami wa Ashūru ntiyaba akimuhakwaho.
2Kings18:8 Arwanya Abafilisiti arabatsinda
2Kings18:9 Mu mwaka wa kane Hezekiya ari ku ngoma
2Kings18:10 Hashize imyaka itatu abona kwigarurira Samariya
2Kings18:11 Umwami wa Ashūru ajyana Abisiraheli ho iminyago
2Kings18:12 Izo ngorane zose zatewe n'uko Abisiraheli banze kumvira Uhoraho Imana yabo kandi bari barishe Isezerano yabahaye
2Kings18:13 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'ine Hezekiya ari ku ngoma
2Kings18:14 Nuko Hezekiya umwami w'u Buyuda atuma ku mwami wa Ashūru wari i Lakishi ati: “Koko nagucumuyeho! None reka kuntera
2Kings18:15 Hezekiya akoranya ifeza yose abonye mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho no mu bubiko bw'ibwami
2Kings18:16 Hezekiya yomora n'izahabu yari yometse ku nzugi z'Ingoro y'Uhoraho n'iyo ku bihindizo byazo
2Kings18:17 Umwami wa Ashūru ari i Lakishi yohereza umugaba mukuru w'ingabo
2Kings18:18 Nuko basaba kuvugana n'umwami. Mwene Hilikiya ari we Eliyakimu wari umuyobozi w'ibwami
2Kings18:19 Umujyanama wihariye w'umwami wa Ashūru arababwira ati: “Nimugende mubwire Hezekiya ubu butumwa bw'umwami ukomeye ari we mwami wa Ashūru muti: ‘Icyizere ufite ni cyizere ki?
2Kings18:20 Mbese uribwira ko amagambo yonyine
2Kings18:21 Erega uracyishingikirije kuri Misiri rwa rubingo rusadutse
2Kings18:22 “Ahari aho mugiye kunsubiza muti: ‘Uwo dufitiye icyizere ni Uhoraho Imana yacu.’ Nyamara Hezekiya ni we ubwe washenye ahasengerwa hose n'intambiro zaho
2Kings18:23 “None rero tēga na databuja umwami wa Ashūru. Jyewe ndiyemeza kuguha amafarasi y'intambara ibihumbi bibiri
2Kings18:24 Ubwo se koko washobora gutsimbura n'umwe woroheje wo mu bagaba b'ingabo za databuja? None wishingikirije ku Banyamisiri ngo bazaguha amagare y'intambara n'amafarasi!
2Kings18:25 Mbese ye
2Kings18:26 Nuko Eliyakimu mwene Hilikiya na Shebuna na Yowa
2Kings18:27 Umujyanama w'umwami wa Ashūru arabasubiza ati: “Mbese mwibwira ko databuja yantumye kuri shobuja namwe gusa? Erega yantumye no kuri bariya bicaye ku rukuta
2Kings18:28 Umujyanama w'umwami wa Ashūru arahaguruka
2Kings18:29 aravuga ati: ‘Mwe kwishinga Hezekiya
2Kings18:30 Arishingikiriza ku cyizere cy'uko Uhoraho azabankiza akantesha kwigarurira uyu mujyi
2Kings18:31 Nimureke kumvira Hezekiya ahubwo mukurikize ibi mbabwira: nimuharanire amahoro munyoboke
2Kings18:32 Hanyuma nzabajyana mu gihugu kimeze nk'icyanyu
2Kings18:33 Ese hari ubwo imana z'amahanga zambujije gufata ibihugu byazo?
2Kings18:34 Mbese imana za Hamati n'iza Arupadi zakoze iki? Naho se iza Sefaruvayimu n'iza Hena n'iza Iwa zo zakoze iki? Mbese haba hari iyambujije kwigarurira Samariya?
2Kings18:35 Ni iyihe muri izo mana zose yambujije kwigarurira igihugu cyayo? Nta yo. None se Uhoraho azambuza ate kwigarurira Yeruzalemu?’ ”
2Kings18:36 Abantu bari aho baricecekera ntibamusubiza ijambo na rimwe
2Kings18:37 Hanyuma Eliyakimu mwene Hilikiya umuyobozi w'ibwami
2Kings19:1 Umwami Hezekiya abyumvise ashishimura imyambaro ye yambara igaragaza akababaro
2Kings19:2 Atuma Eliyakimu umuyobozi w'ibwami na Shebuna umunyamabanga n'abakuru bo mu batambyi
2Kings19:3 Baramubwira bati: “Hezekiya yadutumye ngo ‘Uyu munsi ni umunsi w'umubabaro n'igihano n'ikimwaro. Nk'uko bavuga ngo: abana bageze mu matako
2Kings19:4 Dore umwami wa Ashūru yohereje umujyanama we atuka Imana nzima. Iyaba Uhoraho Imana yawe yari yumvise ibyo bitutsi byose yari guhita abimuhanira. None rero senga
2Kings19:5 Izo ntumwa z'Umwami Hezekiya zimaze kubwira Ezayi ubwo butumwa
2Kings19:6 arazisubiza ati: “Nimusubire ku mwami mumubwire ko Uhoraho avuze ati: ‘Wumvise abagaragu b'umwami wa Ashūru bansebya
2Kings19:7 Dore ndahindura umutima we
2Kings19:8 Icyo gihe umwami wa Ashūru amaze kwigarurira Lakishi yagiye kugota Libuna. Wa mujyanama we abimenye amusangayo.
2Kings19:9 Umwami wa Ashūru amenyeshwa ko Tiruhaka w'Umunyakushi umwami wa Misiri
2Kings19:10 “Wowe Hezekiya mwami w'u Buyuda
2Kings19:11 Wumvise ukuntu abami ba Ashūru bagenje ibindi bihugu byose bakabirimbura. None se uragira ngo uzarokoka?
2Kings19:12 Ubwo abo nasimbuye ku ngoma batsembaga abaturage ba Gozani n'aba Harani
2Kings19:13 Umwami wa Hamati n'umwami wa Arupadi
2Kings19:14 Nuko Hezekiya afata urwo rwandiko rwazanywe n'intumwa z'umwami wa Ashūru ararusoma hanyuma arujyana mu Ngoro y'Imana arushyira imbere y'Uhoraho.
2Kings19:15 Hezekiya arasenga ati: “Uhoraho Mana y'Abisiraheli wowe uganje hejuru y'abakerubi
2Kings19:16 Uhoraho
2Kings19:17 “None rero Uhoraho
2Kings19:18 imana zayo bazijugunya mu muriro barazisenya kuko zitari imana nyakuri
2Kings19:19 Uhoraho Mana yacu ndakwinginze
2Kings19:20 Nuko Ezayi mwene Amotsi ageza kuri Hezekiya igisubizo cy'Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli. Aramubwira ati: “Numvise isengesho ryawe wangejejeho ku byerekeye Senakeribu umwami wa Ashūru.
2Kings19:21 None umva icyo muvugaho. Abatuye i Siyoni baragusuzuguye
2Kings19:22 Ni nde watutse ukamwandagaza? Ni nde wavugishije umurebana agasuzuguro? Ni jye Umuziranenge wa Isiraheli!
2Kings19:23 Jyewe Nyagasani wanyoherereje intumwa zo kuntuka ziti: ‘Amagare yanjye y'intambara yangejeje mu mpinga z'imisozi
2Kings19:24 Nafukuye amariba nywa ku mazi yo mu mahanga
2Kings19:25 “None se Senakeribu
2Kings19:26 Abaturage bafite amaboko atentebutse
2Kings19:27 Erega wowe Senakeribu ndakuzi! Nzi neza imyifatire yawe n'ibikorwa byawe byose
2Kings19:28 Koko warikubise urandakaza
2Kings19:29 “Naho wowe Hezekiya
2Kings19:30 Abayuda barokotse bazongera gushinga imizi
2Kings19:31 Koko rero i Yeruzalemu hazaboneka itsinda ry'abarokotse
2Kings19:32 None rero ku byerekeye umwami wa Ashūru
2Kings19:33 Azasubirayo anyuze inzira yamuzanye
2Kings19:34 Nzarinda uyu murwa ndokore abaturage bawo ngirira ko ndi Uhoraho
2Kings19:35 Iryo joro umumarayika w'Uhoraho anyura mu nkambi y'Abanyashūru
2Kings19:36 Senakeribu umwami wa Ashūru asubira iwe atura i Ninive.
2Kings19:37 Igihe Senakeribu yaramyaga imana ye Nisiroki
2Kings20:1 Muri icyo gihe Hezekiya ararwara yenda gupfa. Umuhanuzi Ezayi mwene Amotsi ajya kumusura aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ngo: ‘Itegure urage abo mu rugo rwawe
2Kings20:2 Hezekiya arahindukira areba ivure yambaza Uhoraho ati:
2Kings20:3 “Uhoraho
2Kings20:4 Nuko Ezayi ataragera hagati mu rugo rw'ingoro y'umwami
2Kings20:5 “Subira kwa Hezekiya umuyobozi w'ubwoko bwanjye maze umubwire uti: ‘Jyewe Uhoraho Imana ya sokuruza Dawidi
2Kings20:6 Ubuzima bwawe mbwongereyeho imyaka cumi n'itanu. Wowe n'abatuye uyu murwa nzabakiza umwami wa Ashūru
2Kings20:7 Ezayi abwira ab'ibwami ati: “Nimutegure umubumbe w'imbuto z'umutini
2Kings20:8 Nuko Hezekiya abaza Ezayi ati: “Mbese ni ikihe kimenyetso kibasha kunyemeza ko Uhoraho agiye kunkiza iyi ndwara
2Kings20:9 Ezayi aramusubiza ati: “Uhoraho ari buguhe ikimenyetso kikwemeza ko azasohoza icyo yasezeranye. None se wahitamo ko igicucu kiva aho kiri ku ngazi kikagana imbere mu ntambwe icumi
2Kings20:10 Hezekiya aramusubiza ati: “Biroroshye ko igicucu kigana imbere ho intambwe icumi
2Kings20:11 Nuko umuhanuzi Ezayi atakambira Uhoraho
2Kings20:12 Muri icyo gihe umwami wa Babiloniya Merodaki-Baladani mwene Baladani
2Kings20:13 Hezekiya anezezwa no kubakira
2Kings20:14 Hanyuma umuhanuzi Ezayi aramusanga aramubaza ati: “Bariya bantu bakubwiraga iki? Ese ubundi bari baturutse he?” Hezekiya aramusubiza ati: “Bari baturutse kure cyane muri Babiloniya.”
2Kings20:15 Ezayi aramubaza ati: “None se babonye iki mu ngoro yawe?” Hezekiya aramusubiza ati: “Babonye ibiyirimo byose
2Kings20:16 Ezayi abwira Hezekiya ati: “Umva icyo Uhoraho avuze:
2Kings20:17 ‘Igihe kizagera ibiri mu ngoro yawe byose
2Kings20:18 ‘Ndetse bazajyana bamwe mu rubyaro rwawe bwite
2Kings20:19 Hezekiya asubiza Ezayi ati: “Ni byiza kungezaho iryo jambo ry'Uhoraho.” Koko rero yaribwiraga ati: “Nta cyo bitwaye kuko mu gihe nzaba nkiriho
2Kings20:20 Ibindi bikorwa bya Hezekiya n'ubutwari bwe
2Kings20:21 Nuko Hezekiya yisazira amahoro
2Kings21:1 Manase yabaye umwami afite imyaka cumi n'ibiri
2Kings21:2 Manase yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
2Kings21:3 Bityo Manase asubizaho ahasengerwaga ibigirwamana se Hezekiya yari yarashenye
2Kings21:4 Yubatse kandi intambiro z'ibigirwamana mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho i Yeruzalemu
2Kings21:5 Yubatse mu bikari byombi by'Ingoro y'Uhoraho intambiro z'ibinyarumuri byose.
2Kings21:6 Manase ageza aho atamba umwana we amucisha mu muriro
2Kings21:7 Hanyuma Manase abumbisha ishusho y'imanakazi Ashera ayishyira mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
2Kings21:8 Ikindi sinzongera kwimura Abisiraheli mu gihugu nahaye ba sekuruza kugira ngo bazerere
2Kings21:9 Nyamara ntibumvira Uhoraho
2Kings21:10 Uhoraho aherako ategeka abagaragu be b'abahanuzi kuvuga bati:
2Kings21:11 “Manase umwami w'u Buyuda yakoze ibizira biteye ishozi
2Kings21:12 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli avuze ati: ‘Nzahana Yeruzalemu n'u Buyuda bwose mpateze icyago kizakubita nk'inkuba ku bazabyumva.
2Kings21:13 Ngiye gusenya Yeruzalemu nk'uko nashenye Samariya
2Kings21:14 Abantu banjye bazacika ku icumu nzabahāna mu maboko y'abanzi babo
2Kings21:15 Nzabigenza ntyo mbitewe n'uko bakomeje gukora ibitanogeye
2Kings21:16 Manase yicishije abantu benshi cyane b'inzirakarengane
2Kings21:17 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Manase n'ibyaha yakoze
2Kings21:18 Nuko Manase yisazira amahoro ashyingurwa iwe mu rugo
2Kings21:19 Amoni yabaye umwami afite imyaka makumyabiri n'ibiri
2Kings21:20 Amoni yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nka se Manase.
2Kings21:21 Yitwaye nabi muri byose nka se
2Kings21:22 Yimūye Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza ntiyagenza uko ashaka.
2Kings21:23 Hanyuma ibyegera bye byaje kumugambanira
2Kings21:24 Icyakora abaturage b'u Buyuda bahinduka ibyo byegera byose byicishije umwami Amoni
2Kings21:25 Ibindi bikorwa bya Amoni
2Kings21:26 Amoni bamushyingura mu mva ye mu busitani bwa Uza
2Kings22:1 Yosiya yabaye umwami afite imyaka umunani
2Kings22:2 Yosiya yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho
2Kings22:3 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'umunani Yosiya ari ku ngoma
2Kings22:4 ati: “Genda ushake Umutambyi mukuru Hilikiya
2Kings22:5 Ayo mafaranga bayashyikirize abashinzwe imirimo yo gusana Ingoro y'Uhoraho
2Kings22:6 guhemba ababaji n'abubatsi n'abandi bakozi
2Kings22:7 Ntabwo ari ngombwa kugenzurwa ku mikorereshereze y'ayo mafaranga
2Kings22:8 Bageze kwa Hilikiya Umutambyi mukuru
2Kings22:9 maze asubira ibwami
2Kings22:10 Nuko umunyamabanga Shafani abwira umwami ati: “Umutambyi Hilikiya yanshyikirije iki gitabo.” Nuko Shafani ahita agisomera umwami.
2Kings22:11 Umwami yumvise ibyanditswe muri icyo gitabo cy'Amategeko ashishimura imyambaro ye.
2Kings22:12 Nuko ategeka umutambyi Hilikiya na Ahikamu mwene Shafani
2Kings22:13 ati: “Nimugende mugishe inama Uhoraho ku bwanjye no ku bw'Abayuda bose
2Kings22:14 Nuko umutambyi Hilikiya na Ahikamu na Akibori
2Kings22:15 Umuhanuzikazi arabasubiza ati:
2Kings22:16 “Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli aravuze ngo: ‘Ngiye guteza Yeruzalemu n'abayituye ibyago bikomeye nkurikije ibyanditswe mu gitabo umwami w'u Buyuda yasomye.
2Kings22:17 Ni ukubera ko abaturage banyimūye bosereza imibavu izindi mana
2Kings22:18 Naho uwo mwami w'u Buyuda wabatumye kungisha inama
2Kings22:19 icyo nateganyirije uyu murwa n'abawutuye
2Kings22:20 nzaguha kwisazira neza ushyingurwe amahoro
2Kings23:1 Umwami atumiza abakuru b'imiryango y'u Buyuda n'ab'i Yeruzalemu.
2Kings23:2 Nuko umwami ajya mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho aherekejwe n'abaturage b'u Buyuda n'ab'i Yeruzalemu
2Kings23:3 Umwami ahagarara iruhande rw'inkingi y'Ingoro
2Kings23:4 Nuko umwami ategeka Umutambyi mukuru Hilikiya n'abatambyi bamwungirije
2Kings23:5 Umwami Yosiya amenesha ingirwabatambyi bari barashyizweho n'abami b'u Buyuda
2Kings23:6 Yosiya ajya mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho asenyesha inkingi yeguriwe imanakazi Ashera
2Kings23:7 Yosiya kandi asenyesha ibyumba byari mu gikari cy'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
2Kings23:8 Nuko Yosiya atumiza abatambyi bose bari mu mijyi y'u Buyuda
2Kings23:9 Kuva ubwo abo batambyi b'ahasengerwaga
2Kings23:10 Yosiya ahumanya urutambiro rw'i Tofeti mu kabande ka Hinomu
2Kings23:11 Akuraho n'amafarasi yari yaragenewe gukoreshwa mu kuramya izuba. Ayo mafarasi yabaga iruhande rw'umuryango w'Ingoro mu byumba biyometseho
2Kings23:12 Asenyesha intambiro abami b'u Buyuda bari barubakishije ku bibuga byo hejuru y'amazu ya Ahazi
2Kings23:13 Yosiya ahumanya kandi ahasengerwaga hari iburasirazuba bwa Yeruzalemu
2Kings23:14 Yosiya ahamenagura amabuye yeguriwe ibigirwamana
2Kings23:15 Yosiya asenya n'urutambiro n'ahasengerwaga i Beteli
2Kings23:16 Yosiya akiri muri ibyo abona imva zari ku misozi
2Kings23:17 Yosiya arabaza ati: “Kiriya kibuye ndeba kiri ku mva ni urwibutso rw'iki?” Abatuye umujyi baramusubiza bati: “Ni imva y'umuntu w'Imana wavuye i Buyuda. Ni we wari warahanuye ibyo ukoze ku rutambiro rw'i Beteli.”
2Kings23:18 Nuko Yosiya arategeka ati: “Iriya mva nimuyireke! Ntihagire umuntu ugira icyo akora ku magufwa y'uwo muntu w'Imana.” Bityo bazigama ayo magufwa kimwe n'ay'umuhanuzi wavuye i Samariya.
2Kings23:19 Abami ba Isiraheli bari bararakaje Uhoraho bikomeye bubakisha ahasengerwaga mu mijyi yo mu ntara ya Samariya
2Kings23:20 Atsemba n'abatambyi bose batambiraga ku ntambiro z'ahasengerwaga
2Kings23:21 Umwami Yosiya ategeka abantu bose ati: “Nimwizihirize Uhoraho Imana yanyu iminsi mikuru ya Pasika
2Kings23:22 Koko rero kuva igihe Isiraheli yayoborwaga n'abacamanza
2Kings23:23 Iyo Pasika yijihirijwe Uhoraho i Yeruzalemu
2Kings23:24 Mu kubahiriza amabwiriza yanditswe mu gitabo cy'Amategeko umutambyi Hilikiya yavumbuye mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
2Kings23:25 Koko rero nta mwami mu bamubanjirije cyangwa mu bamukurikiye wagejeje ahe
2Kings23:26 Icyakora Uhoraho ntiyigeze areka kurakarira u Buyuda
2Kings23:27 Ni cyo cyatumye Uhoraho avuga ati: “Nzamenesha Abayuda bamve imbere nk'uko namenesheje Abisiraheli bakamva imbere
2Kings23:28 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yosiya
2Kings23:29 Akiri ku ngoma
2Kings23:30 Abakuru mu ngabo ze bashyira umurambo we mu igare
2Kings23:31 Yowahazi yabaye umwami afite imyaka makumyabiri n'itatu
2Kings23:32 Yowahazi yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nk'ibyo ba sekuruza bakoze.
2Kings23:33 Neko umwami wa Misiri amugira imbohe i Ribula mu ntara ya Hamati. Bityo amukura ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu kandi yaka igihugu cy'u Buyuda umusoro wa toni eshatu z'ifeza
2Kings23:34 Hanyuma Neko yimika Eliyakimu mwene Yosiya
2Kings23:35 Yoyakimu yaka imisoro y'ifeza abaturage b'u Buyuda zingana n'izo Neko yategetse
2Kings23:36 Yoyakimu yabaye umwami w'u Buyuda afite imyaka makumyabiri n'itanu
2Kings23:37 Yoyakimu yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nk'ibyo ba sekuruza bakoze.
2Kings24:1 Yoyakimu ari ku ngoma
2Kings24:2 Nuko Uhoraho ateza Yoyakimu udutsiko tw'Abanyababiloniya n'Abanyasiriya
2Kings24:3 Uhoraho aba ari we uteza u Buyuda icyo cyago
2Kings24:4 Manase uwo yari yaricishije inzirakarengane nyinshi
2Kings24:5 Ibindi bikorwa n'ibigwi byose bya Yoyakimu
2Kings24:6 Yoyakimu yisazira amahoro
2Kings24:7 Naho umwami wa Misiri ntiyongeye kuva mu gihugu cye
2Kings24:8 Yoyakini yabaye umwami afite imyaka cumi n'umunani
2Kings24:9 Yoyakini yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nka se.
2Kings24:10 Muri icyo gihe ingabo za Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya
2Kings24:11 Nebukadinezari ubwe agera i Yeruzalemu ingabo ze zikihagose.
2Kings24:12 Yoyakini umwami w'u Buyuda yishyira mu maboko y'umwami wa Babiloniya
2Kings24:13 Nk'uko Uhoraho yari yarabivuze
2Kings24:14 Nebukadinezari ajyana abaturage ibihumbi icumi b'i Yeruzalemu ho iminyago
2Kings24:15 Ajyana Yoyakini ho umunyago i Babiloni hamwe n'umugabekazi
2Kings24:16 Nuko ajyana i Babiloni abantu bose b'intwari bagera ku bihumbi birindwi
2Kings24:17 Nebukadinezari yimika Mataniya se wabo wa Yoyakini amugira umwami
2Kings24:18 Sedekiya yabaye umwami afite imyaka makumyabiri n'umwe
2Kings24:19 Sedekiya yakoze ibibi byose bitanogeye Uhoraho
2Kings24:20 Kubera uburakari Uhoraho ni we ubwe wateje akaga Yeruzalemu kimwe n'u Buyuda bwose
2Kings25:1 Amaherezo Sedekiya agomera Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya. Ku itariki ya cumi y'ukwezi kwa cumi k'umwaka wa cyenda Sedekiya ari ku ngoma
2Kings25:2 Iryo gotwa ry'umujyi rigeza mu mwaka wa cumi n'umwe Sedekiya ari ku ngoma.
2Kings25:3 Nuko inzara izahaza umurwa
2Kings25:4 Abanyababiloniya baca icyuho mu rukuta ruzengurutse umujyi
2Kings25:5 Icyakora ingabo z'Abanyababiloniya ziramukurikira zimufatira mu kibaya cya Yeriko
2Kings25:6 Abanyababiloniya bafata Sedekiya bamushyira umwami wabo i Ribula
2Kings25:7 Bahera ku bahungu ba Sedekiya babica abyirebera
2Kings25:8 Ku itariki ya karindwi y'ukwezi kwa gatanu k'umwaka wa cumi n'icyenda Nebukadinezari ari ku ngoma
2Kings25:9 Atwika Ingoro y'Uhoraho n'ingoro y'umwami
2Kings25:10 Ingabo z'Abanyababiloniya zose zari zimuherekeje
2Kings25:11 Hanyuma Nebuzaradani umutware w'abarinzi ajyana ho iminyago i Babiloni abaturage bari basigaye mu mujyi
2Kings25:12 Icyakora uwo mutware w'Abarinzi asigayo abaturage b'abatindi nyakujya
2Kings25:13 Nuko Abanyababiloniya bamenagura inkingi z'umuringa zari ku ibaraza ry'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
2Kings25:14 Basahura ibikarayi n'ibitiyo
2Kings25:15 Uwo mutware w'abarinzi asahura n'ibindi bikoresho by'izahabu n'iby'ifeza
2Kings25:16 Umuringa w'inkingi zombi hamwe n'uw'ikizenga
2Kings25:17 Koko rero buri nkingi yari ifite uburebure bwa metero icyenda
2Kings25:18 Umutware w'abarinzi ni ko gufata Umutambyi mukuru Seraya
2Kings25:19 Hanyuma afatira mu mujyi umutware w'ingabo n'abantu batanu b'ibyegera by'umwami
2Kings25:20 Nuko Nebuzaradani ari we mutware w'abarinzi
2Kings25:21 Umwami wa Babiloniya arabakubita
2Kings25:22 Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya yari yararekeye mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda abaturage bamwe
2Kings25:23 Ingabo zimwe z'Abayuda zari zacitse
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya arababwira bo n'ingabo zabo ati: “Mwitinya abagaragu b'Abanyababiloniya. Nimwigumire mu gihugu maze mukorere umwami wa Babiloniya muzagubwa neza.”
2Kings25:25 Nyamara mu kwezi kwa karindwi k'uwo mwaka
2Kings25:26 Nuko rubanda rwose barokotse hamwe n'abagaba b'ingabo
2Kings25:27 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'irindwi nyuma y'aho Yoyakini umwami w'u Buyuda ajyanywe ho umunyago
2Kings25:28 Nuko Evili-Merodaki amubwirana ineza
2Kings25:29 Yoyakini ntiyongera kwambara imyambaro y'imfungwa
2Kings25:30 Umwami wa Babiloniya yageneraga Yoyakini ibyo kumutunga bya buri munsi

1Chronicles1:2 Enoshi abyara Kenani
1Chronicles1:3 Yeredi yabyaye Henoki
1Chronicles1:4 Lameki yabyaye Nowa
1Chronicles1:5 Abakomoka kuri Yafeti ni Gomeri na Magogi na Madayi
1Chronicles1:6 Abakomoka kuri Gomeri ni Abashikenazi n'ab'i Difati n'ab'i Togaruma.
1Chronicles1:7 Abakomoka kuri Yavani ni aba Elisha n'aba Esipaniya
1Chronicles1:8 Abakomoka kuri Hamu ni Kushi na Misiri
1Chronicles1:9 Abakomoka kuri Kushi n'ab'i Seba n'ab'i Havila
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi yabyaye Nimurodi wabaye intwari ya mbere ku isi.
1Chronicles1:11 Abakomoka kuri Misiri ni Abaludi n'Abanamu
1Chronicles1:12 n'Abapaturusi n'Abakafutori n'Abakasiluhi bakomokwaho n'Abafilisiti.
1Chronicles1:13 Kanāni yabyaye Sidoni impfura ye amukurikiza Heti
1Chronicles1:14 abandi bamukomokaho ni Abayebuzi n'Abamori n'Abagirigashi
1Chronicles1:15 n'Abahivi n'Abaruki n'Abasini
1Chronicles1:16 n'Abaruvadi n'Abasemari n'Abahamati.
1Chronicles1:17 Abakomoka kuri Semu ni Elamu na Ashūru na Arupagishadi
1Chronicles1:18 Arupagishadi yabyaye Shela
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi yabyaye abahungu babiri
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani yabyaye Alumodadi na Shelefu
1Chronicles1:21 na Hadoramu na Uzali na Dikila
1Chronicles1:22 na Obali na Abimayeli na Sheba
1Chronicles1:23 na Ofiri na Havila na Yobabu.
1Chronicles1:24 Semu yabyaye Arupagishadi
1Chronicles1:25 Shela abyara Eberi
1Chronicles1:26 Rewu abyara Serugu
1Chronicles1:27 Tera abyara Aburamu
1Chronicles1:28 Bene Aburahamu ni Izaki na Ishimayeli.
1Chronicles1:29 Dore abakomoka kuri Ishimayeli: impfura ye ni Nebayoti
1Chronicles1:30 na Mishuma na Duma na Masa
1Chronicles1:31 na Yeturi na Nafishi na Kedema.
1Chronicles1:32 Ketura inshoreke ya Aburahamu yabyaye Zimurani na Yokishani na Medani
1Chronicles1:33 Bene Midiyani ni Eyifa na Eferi na Hanoki
1Chronicles1:34 Aburahamu yabyaye Izaki
1Chronicles1:35 Bene Ezawu ni Elifazi na Ruweli na Yewushi
1Chronicles1:36 Bene Elifazi ni Temani na Omari na Sefi
1Chronicles1:37 Bene Ruweli ni Nahati na Zera
1Chronicles1:38 Abakomoka kuri Seyiri ni Lotani na Shobali na Sibeyoni
1Chronicles1:39 Bene Lotani ni Hori na Hemamu
1Chronicles1:40 Bene Shobali ni Aluwani na Manahati na Ebali
1Chronicles1:41 Mwene Ana ni Dishoni
1Chronicles1:42 Bene Eseri ni Biluhani na Zāwani na Yakani. Bene Dishani ni Usi na Arani.
1Chronicles1:43 Abedomu bagize abami mbere y'Abisiraheli. Dore amazina y'abo bami: Bela mwene Bewori yari atuye i Dinihaba.
1Chronicles1:44 Bela amaze gupfa yasimbuwe na Yobabu mwene Zera w'i Bosira.
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu amaze gupfa yasimbuwe na Hushamu wo mu karere gatuwe n'Abatemani.
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamu amaze gupfa yasimbuwe na Hadadi mwene Bedadi wari utuye Awiti. Ni we watsindiye Abamidiyani mu gihugu cya Mowabu.
1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi amaze gupfa yasimbuwe na Samula w'i Masireka.
1Chronicles1:48 Samula amaze gupfa yasimbuwe na Shawuli w'i Rehoboti
1Chronicles1:49 Shawuli amaze gupfa yasimbuwe na Bāli-Hanani mwene Akibori.
1Chronicles1:50 Bāli-Hanani amaze gupfa yasimbuwe na Hadadi w'i Pawu. Umugore we yitwaga Mehetabēli umukobwa wa Matiredi mwene Mezahabu.
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi na we arapfa. Abedomu bayobowe n'aba batware bakurikira: Timuna na Aluwa na Yeteti
1Chronicles1:52 na Oholibama na Ela na Pinoni
1Chronicles1:53 na Kenazi na Temani na Mibusari
1Chronicles1:54 na Magidiyeli na Iramu. Ngabo abatware b'Abedomu.
1Chronicles2:1 Dore amazina ya bene Isiraheli ari we Yakobo: Rubeni na Simeyoni na Levi
1Chronicles2:2 na Dani na Yozefu na Benyamini
1Chronicles2:3 Yuda yabyaranye n'umukobwa wa Shuwa w'Umunyakanāni abahungu batatu. Impfura ya Yuda ni Eri
1Chronicles2:4 Yuda kandi yabyaranye n'umukazana we Tamari abandi bana babiri
1Chronicles2:5 Bene Perēsi ni Hesironi na Hamuli.
1Chronicles2:6 Bene Zera ni Zimuri na Etani na Hemani
1Chronicles2:7 Bene Karumi ni Akani ari na we wateje Abisiraheli akaga
1Chronicles2:8 Mwene Etani ni Azariya.
1Chronicles2:9 Bene Hesironi ni Yerahimēli na Ramu na Kalebu.
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu yabyaye Aminadabu
1Chronicles2:11 Nahasoni yabyaye Salumoni
1Chronicles2:12 Bowazi abyara Obedi
1Chronicles2:13 Yese yabyaye abahungu barindwi. Impfura ye ni Eliyabu
1Chronicles2:14 uwa kane ni Netanēli
1Chronicles2:15 uwa gatandatu ni Osemu
1Chronicles2:16 Bashiki babo ni Seruya na Abigayile. Bene Seruya ni Abishayi na Yowabu na Asaheli
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayile yabyaye Amasa
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mwene Hesironi yabyaranye n'umugore we Azuba na Yeriyoti abana ari bo aba: Yesheri na Shobabu na Arudoni.
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba amaze gupfa Kalebu yashatse undi mugore witwa Efurata
1Chronicles2:20 Huri yabyaye Uri
1Chronicles2:21 Hesironi amaze imyaka mirongo itandatu avutse
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu yabyaye Yayiri wategekaga imijyi makumyabiri n'itanu yo mu ntara ya Gileyadi.
1Chronicles2:23 Umwami wa Geshuri n'umwami wa Aramu bigarurira Inkambi za Yayiri
1Chronicles2:24 Hesironi umugabo wa Abiya amaze gupfa
1Chronicles2:25 Bene Yerahimēli impfura ya Hesironi ni aba: impfura ye ni Ramu
1Chronicles2:26 Yerahimēli yari afite undi mugore witwa Atara
1Chronicles2:27 Bene Ramu impfura ya Yerahimēli ni Māsi na Yamini na Ekeri.
1Chronicles2:28 Bene Onamu ni Shamayi na Yada
1Chronicles2:29 Abishuri yarongoye Abihayili
1Chronicles2:30 Bene Nadabu ni Seledi na Apayimu
1Chronicles2:31 Mwene Apayimu ni Yisheyi
1Chronicles2:32 Bene Yada murumuna wa Shamayi ni Yeteri na Yonatani
1Chronicles2:33 Bene Yonatani ni Peleti na Zaza. Abo bose bakomoka kuri Yerahimēli.
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani yari yarabyaye abakobwa gusa
1Chronicles2:35 Nuko Sheshani amushyingira umukobwa we maze babyarana Atayi.
1Chronicles2:36 Atayi yabyaye Natani
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi abyara Efulali
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi abyara Yehu
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya abyara Helesi
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyasa abyara Sisimayi
1Chronicles2:41 Shalumu abyara Yekamiya
1Chronicles2:42 Bene Kalebu murumuna wa Yerahimēli ni aba: impfura ye ni Mesha se wa Zifu
1Chronicles2:43 Bene Heburoni ni Kōra na Tapuwa
1Chronicles2:44 Shema yabyaye Rahamu
1Chronicles2:45 Shamayi abyara Mawoni
1Chronicles2:46 Eyifa yari inshoreke ya Kalebu
1Chronicles2:47 Bene Yahidayi ni Regemu na Yotamu na Geshani
1Chronicles2:48 Kalebu yari afite indi nshoreke yitwa Māka
1Chronicles2:49 Bongera kubyarana Shāfi ari we wahanze umujyi: wa Madumana
1Chronicles2:50 Aba na bo bakomotse kuri Kalebu: Huri umuhungu we w'impfura yabyaranye na Efurata yari afite abahungu batatu ari bo Shobali wahanze umujyi: wa Kiriyati-Yeyarimu
1Chronicles2:51 na Salima wahanze umujyi: wa Betelehemu
1Chronicles2:52 Shobali wahanze umujyi: wa Kiriyati-Yeyarimu yakomotsweho na Harowe na kimwe cya kabiri cy'Abamanahati

1Chronicles2:55 Salima yakomotsweho kandi n'imiryango y'abanditsi bari batuye i Yabesi
1Chronicles3:1 Dore amazina y'abana ba Dawidi bavukiye i Heburoni: impfura ye ni Amunoni yabyaranye na Ahinowamu w'i Yizerēli. Umukurikira ni Daniyeli yabyaranye na Abigayile w'i Karumeli.
1Chronicles3:2 Uwa gatatu ni Abusalomu yabyaranye na Māka umukobwa wa Talumayi umwami w'i Geshuri. Uwa kane ni Adoniya yabyaranye na Hagita.
1Chronicles3:3 Uwa gatanu ni Shefatiya yabyaranye na Abitali. Uwa gatandatu ni Yitereyamu yabyaranye na Egila.
1Chronicles3:4 Abo uko ari batandatu Dawidi yababyaye mu myaka irindwi n'amezi atandatu ari ku ngoma i Heburoni. Naho i Yeruzalemu yahamaze imyaka mirongo itatu n'itatu ari ku ngoma.
1Chronicles3:5 Dore abana yabyariyeyo: Shama na Shobabu
1Chronicles3:6 Yabyariyeyo kandi n'abandi bahungu icyenda ari bo aba: Yibuhari na Elishuwa na Elifeleti
1Chronicles3:7 na Noga na Nefegi na Yafiya
1Chronicles3:8 na Elishama na Eliyada na Elifeleti.
1Chronicles3:9 Abo bose ni abahungu ba Dawidi
1Chronicles3:10 Dore abakomoka kuri Salomo: mwene Salomo ni Robowamu
1Chronicles3:11 Yoramu
1Chronicles3:12 Amasiya
1Chronicles3:13 Ahazi

1Chronicles3:15 Dore amazina ya bene Yosiya: impfura ye ni Yohanani
