1Chronicles19:2 Dawidi aravuga ati: “Nzagirira neza Hanuni mwene Nahashi
1Chronicles19:3 Nyamara abatware b'Abamoni babaza Hanuni bati: “Ese ubona ko Dawidi yohereje aba bantu kwifatanya nawe mu kababaro
1Chronicles19:4 Nuko Hanuni afata intumwa za Dawidi azogosha ubwanwa
1Chronicles19:5 Dawidi amenye ibyabaye ku bagaragu be yohereza abantu bo kubasanganira
1Chronicles19:6 Abamoni babonye ko basuzuguye Dawidi
1Chronicles19:7 Nuko bakodesha amagare ibihumbi mirongo itatu na bibiri
1Chronicles19:8 Dawidi abimenye yohereza umugaba w'ingabo Yowabu hamwe n'ingabo zose z'intwari.
1Chronicles19:9 Abamoni baraza bashinga ibirindiro mu irembo ry'umujyi:
1Chronicles19:10 Yowabu abonye ko urugamba rumusatiriye imbere n'inyuma
1Chronicles19:11 Ingabo zisigaye azishinga mukuru we Abishayi
1Chronicles19:12 Yowabu aramubwira ati: “Abanyasiriya nibandusha amaboko untabare
1Chronicles19:13 Ukomere turwane kigabo
1Chronicles19:14 Yowabu n'ingabo ze basatira Abanyasiriya
1Chronicles19:15 Abamoni babonye ko Abanyasiriya bahunze
1Chronicles19:16 Abanyasiriya babonye ko Abisiraheli babatsinze
1Chronicles19:17 Dawidi abyumvise akoranya ingabo z'Abisiraheli zose
1Chronicles19:18 Nuko Abanyasiriya baratsindwa barahunga
1Chronicles19:19 Abagaragu ba Hadadezeri babonye ko Abisiraheli babatsinze
1Chronicles20:1 Mu ntangiriro z'umwaka wakurikiyeho
1Chronicles20:2 Dawidi afata ikamba ryari ku mutwe w'ikigirwamana cy'Abamoni cyitwaga Milikomu
1Chronicles20:3 Asohora abaturage mu mujyi:
1Chronicles20:4 Nyuma y'ibyo Abisiraheli barwanira n'Abafilisiti i Gezeri. Sibekayi w'i Husha yica Umufilisiti muremure kandi munini witwaga Sipayi
1Chronicles20:5 Abisiraheli n'Abafilisiti bongera kurwana
1Chronicles20:6 Ikindi gihe urugamba ruremera i Gati. Hari Umufilisiti w'intwari muremure kandi munini
1Chronicles20:7 Atuka Abisiraheli maze Yonatani mwene Shama mukuru wa Dawidi aramwica.
1Chronicles20:8 Abo Bafilisiti barebare kandi banini bakomokaga i Gati
1Chronicles21:1 Satani yashakaga guteza Abisiraheli ibyago
1Chronicles21:2 Dawidi abwira Yowabu n'abandi bagaba b'ingabo ati: “Nimujye kubarura Abisiraheli muhereye i Bērisheba mu majyepfo mugeze i Dani mu majyaruguru
1Chronicles21:3 Yowabu aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
1Chronicles21:4 Ariko umwami aganza Yowabu. Nuko Yowabu aragenda azenguruka igihugu cyose cya Isiraheli maze agaruka i Yeruzalemu.
1Chronicles21:5 Yowabu ashyikiriza Dawidi umubare w'abagabo bashobora kujya ku rugamba. Mu Bisiraheli bose habonetse abagabo miliyoni imwe n'ibihumbi ijana
1Chronicles21:6 Yowabu ntiyabaruye Abalevi n'Ababenyamini
1Chronicles21:7 Iryo barura ntiryashimishije Imana
1Chronicles21:8 Dawidi abwira Imana ati: “Nakoze icyaha gikomeye. None ndakwinginze ubabarire igicumuro cy'umugaragu wawe
1Chronicles21:9 Uhoraho atuma umuhanuzi Gadi wahanuriraga Dawidi ati:
1Chronicles21:10 “Genda ubwire Dawidi uti: ‘Uhoraho aravuze ati:: Nguhaye ibihano bitatu
1Chronicles21:11 Nuko Gadi asanga Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Hitamo:
1Chronicles21:12 ari imyaka itatu y'inzara cyangwa amezi atatu uhunga abanzi bagukurikiranye n'inkota
1Chronicles21:13 Dawidi asubiza Gadi ati: “Ndumva nshenguwe n'agahinda! Reka ngwe mu maboko y'Uhoraho kuko impuhwe ze ari nyinshi
1Chronicles21:14 Nuko Uhoraho ateza Abisiraheli icyorezo
1Chronicles21:15 Bityo Imana ituma umumarayika wayo kujya kurimbura Yeruzalemu. Igihe uwo mumarayika yariho arimbura
1Chronicles21:16 Dawidi yubuye amaso abona umumarayika ahagaze mu kirere yakuye inkota
1Chronicles21:17 Dawidi abwira Imana ati: “Mbese si jye wategetse ko babarura abantu? Ni jye rero wakoze icyaha ndacumura. None se aba bantu bo barazira iki? Ndakwinginze Uhoraho Mana yanjye
1Chronicles21:18 Umumarayika w'Uhoraho ategeka Gadi kubwira Dawidi ngo azamuke
1Chronicles21:19 Nuko Dawidi yumvira itegeko ry'Uhoraho
1Chronicles21:20 Orunani yariho ahura ingano
1Chronicles21:21 Dawidi ajya aho Orunani yari ari
1Chronicles21:22 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Mpa iyi mbuga yawe nyigure
1Chronicles21:23 Orunani asubiza Dawidi ati: “Nyagasani
1Chronicles21:24 Nyamara Umwami Dawidi asubiza Orunani ati: “Ntibishoboka
1Chronicles21:25 Dawidi agura iyo mbuga
1Chronicles21:26 Dawidi ahubaka urutambiro rw'Uhoraho
1Chronicles21:27 Uhoraho ategeka wa mumarayika gusubiza inkota ye mu rwubati.
1Chronicles21:28 Dawidi abonye ko Uhoraho amushubirije ku mbuga ya Orunani w'Umuyebuzi
1Chronicles21:29 Icyo gihe rya Hema ry'Uhoraho Musa yakoze bakiri mu butayu
1Chronicles21:30 Ariko Dawidi ntiyashoboraga kujyayo gusenga Imana
1Chronicles22:1 Nuko Dawidi aravuga ati: “Aha ni ho hazaba Ingoro y'Uhoraho Imana
1Chronicles22:2 Dawidi ategeka ko bakoranya abanyamahanga bose bari mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
1Chronicles22:3 Nuko Dawidi ateganya ibyuma byinshi byo gucuramo imisumari n'amapata by'inzugi z'amarembo
1Chronicles22:4 Dawidi ateganya n'ibiti byinshi by'amasederi
1Chronicles22:5 Dawidi yaribwiraga ati: “Umuhungu wanjye Salomo aracyari muto ntarakura
1Chronicles22:6 Dawidi ahamagaza umuhungu we Salomo
1Chronicles22:7 Dawidi aramubwira ati: “Mwana wanjye
1Chronicles22:8 ariko Uhoraho arambwira ati: ‘Warwanye intambara nyinshi zikomeye umena amaraso menshi. Kubera ayo maraso wamennye ku isi mbyirebera
1Chronicles22:9 Icyakora umuhungu wawe azagira ituze
1Chronicles22:10 Uwo ni we uzanyubakira Ingoro
1Chronicles22:11 Nuko rero mwana wanjye
1Chronicles22:12 Uhoraho aguhe ubwenge n'ubushishozi
1Chronicles22:13 Uzahirwa niwitonda ugakurikiza amateka n'ibyemezo Imana yahaye Abisiraheli iyanyujije kuri Musa. Komera kandi ube intwari
1Chronicles22:14 Nakoze uko nshoboye nteganya toni eshatu n'igice z'izahabu
1Chronicles22:15 Uzaba ufite abakozi b'ingeri zose
1Chronicles22:16 Ufite izahabu n'ifeza
1Chronicles22:17 Nuko Dawidi ategeka abatware bose b'Abisiraheli gufasha umuhungu we Salomo.
1Chronicles22:18 Dawidi arababwira ati: “Mbese Uhoraho Imana yanyu ntari kumwe namwe? Ese ntiyabahaye umutekano impande zose? Koko rero yampaye gutsinda abahoze batuye iki gihugu bose
1Chronicles22:19 None rero nimushake Uhoraho Imana yanyu mubikuye ku mutima. Nimutangire mwubake Ingoro y'Uhoraho
1Chronicles23:1 Dawidi ageze mu zabukuru yimika umuhungu we Salomo
1Chronicles23:2 Nuko akoranya abatware bose b'Abisiraheli
1Chronicles23:3 Babara Abalevi umwe umwe bahereye ku bafite imyaka mirongo itatu
1Chronicles23:4 Dawidi aha Abalevi ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine muri bo inshingano yo kugenzura imirimo y'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
1Chronicles23:5 Abandi ibihumbi bine abagira abarinzi b'amarembo
1Chronicles23:6 Dawidi abagabanyamo amatsinda atatu akurikije bene Levi
1Chronicles23:7 Bene Gerishoni ni Lādani na Shimeyi.
1Chronicles23:8 Bene Lādani ni Yehiyeli na Zetamu na Yoweli.
1Chronicles23:9 Bene Shimeyi ni Shelomoti na Haziyeli na Harani. Abo ni bo bari abakuru b'imiryango ya bene Lādani.
1Chronicles23:10 Bene Shimeyi ni Yahati na Ziza
1Chronicles23:11 Umukuru yari Yahati
1Chronicles23:12 Bene Kehati ni Amuramu na Yisehari
1Chronicles23:13 Bene Amuramu ni Aroni na Musa. Aroni n'abamukomokaho beguriwe burundu imirimo yerekeye ibikoresho byeguriwe Imana. Bagombaga kosereza imibavu imbere y'Uhoraho no kumukorera
1Chronicles23:14 Naho Musa umuntu w'Imana n'abahungu be
1Chronicles23:15 Bene Musa ni Gerushomu na Eliyezeri.
1Chronicles23:16 Impfura ya Gerushomu ni Shebuweli.
1Chronicles23:17 Eliyezeri yabyaye umuhungu umwe ari we Rehabiya. Ariko Rehabiya we yabyaye abahungu benshi cyane.
1Chronicles23:18 Impfura ya Yiseheri ni Shelomiti.
1Chronicles23:19 Bene Heburoni ni Yeriya na Amariya
1Chronicles23:20 Bene Uziyeli ni Mika na Ishiya.
1Chronicles23:21 Bene Merari ni Mahili na Mushi. Bene Mahili ni Eleyazari na Kishi.
1Chronicles23:22 Eleyazari yapfuye nta muhungu abyaye
1Chronicles23:23 Bene Mushi ni Mahili na Ederi na Yeremoti.
1Chronicles23:24 Abo ni bo bakomotse kuri Levi hakurikijwe imiryango yabo. Bari abakuru b'amazu yabo nk'uko babaruwe hakurikijwe amazina yabo. Abari bafite imyaka makumyabiri n'abayirengeje
1Chronicles23:25 Koko rero Dawidi yari yaravuze ati: “Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli yahaye ubwoko bwayo ituze
1Chronicles23:26 Bityo ntibizaba bikiri ngombwa ko Abalevi bimukana Ihema ry'ibonaniro
1Chronicles23:27 Hakurikijwe amabwiriza ya nyuma ya Dawidi
1Chronicles23:28 Umurimo wabo wari uwo gufasha abakomoka kuri Aroni imirimo yo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
1Chronicles23:29 kwita ku migati yaturwaga Imana
1Chronicles23:30 Bari bashinzwe guhimbaza no gusingiza Uhoraho buri gitondo na buri mugoroba
1Chronicles23:31 n'igihe cyose baturaga Uhoraho amaturo ya buri sabato
1Chronicles23:32 Bari bashinzwe kwita ku Ihema ry'ibonaniro n'Ingoro
1Chronicles24:1 Abakomoka kuri Aroni bari muri aya matsinda: bene Aroni ni Nadabu na Abihu
1Chronicles24:2 Nadabu na Abihu babanjirije se gupfa kandi nta bahungu babyaye; bityo imirimo y'ubutambyi yegurirwa Eleyazari na Itamari.
1Chronicles24:3 Umwami Dawidi afashijwe na Sadoki ukomoka kuri Eleyazari
1Chronicles24:4 Icyakora amazu y'abatambyi bakomokaga kuri Eleyazari
1Chronicles24:5 Babashyize muri ayo matsinda hakoreshejwe ubufindo
1Chronicles24:6 Umwigishamategeko Shemaya mwene Netanēli wo mu muryango wa Levi
1Chronicles24:7 Dore abatware b'amazu berekanywe n'ubufindo uko bagiye bakurikirana: uwa mbere ni Yehoyaribu
1Chronicles24:8 Uwa gatatu ni Harimu
1Chronicles24:9 Uwa gatanu ni Malikiya
1Chronicles24:10 Uwa karindwi ni Hakosi
1Chronicles24:11 Uwa cyenda ni Yoshuwa
1Chronicles24:12 Uwa cumi n'umwe ni Eliyashibu
1Chronicles24:13 Uwa cumi na batatu ni Hupa
1Chronicles24:14 Uwa cumi na batanu ni Biluga
1Chronicles24:15 Uwa cumi na barindwi ni Heziri
1Chronicles24:16 Uwa cumi n'icyenda ni Petahiya
1Chronicles24:17 Uwa makumyabiri n'umwe ni Yakini
1Chronicles24:18 Uwa makumyabiri na batatu ni Delaya
1Chronicles24:19 Nguko uko ayo matsinda yakurikiranaga bakora imirimo yo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho. Basohozaga inshingano zabo bakurikije amabwiriza bari barahawe na sekuruza Aroni
1Chronicles24:20 Dore abandi bakomoka kuri Levi: Mu bakomoka kuri Amuramu ni Shubayeli
1Chronicles24:21 Mu bakomoka kuri Rehabiya
1Chronicles24:22 Mu bakomoka kuri Yisehari ni Shelomoti
1Chronicles24:23 Bene Heburoni umukuru ni Yeriya
1Chronicles24:24 Mwene Uziyeli ni Mika
1Chronicles24:25 Umuvandimwe wa Mika ni Ishiya
1Chronicles24:26 Bene Merari ni Mahili na Mushi
1Chronicles24:27 Bene Merari bakomotse ku muhungu we Yāziya ni Beno na Shohamu
1Chronicles24:28 Mwene Mahili ni Eleyazari utarigeze abyara umuhungu
1Chronicles24:29 mwene Kishi ni Yerahimēli.
1Chronicles24:30 Bene Mushi ni Mahili na Ederi na Yerimoti. Abo bari Abalevi ukurikije imiryango yabo.
1Chronicles24:31 Kugira ngo bamenye uko basimburana ku mirimo yabo
1Chronicles25:1 Dawidi ari kumwe n'abakuru b'ingabo
1Chronicles25:2 Bene Asafu ni Zakuri na Yozefu
1Chronicles25:3 Bene Yedutuni ni Gedaliya na Seri na Yeshaya
1Chronicles25:4 Bene Hemani ni Bukiya na Mataniya
1Chronicles25:5 Abo bose bari bene Hemani umuhanuzi w'umwami
1Chronicles25:6 Abo bose baririmbaga mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho bayobowe na se
1Chronicles25:7 Abo bose hamwe n'abavandimwe babo uko bari magana abiri na mirongo inani n'umunani
1Chronicles25:8 Kugira ngo bamenye uko bazajya basimburana ku mirimo yabo
1Chronicles25:9 Aba ni bo bari abayobozi b'amatsinda bagaragajwe n'ubwo bufindo
1Chronicles25:10 Ubwa gatatu ni Zakuri n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:11 Ubwa kane ni Seri n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:12 Ubwa gatanu ni Netaniya n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:13 Ubwa gatandatu ni Bukiya n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe.
1Chronicles25:14 Ubwa karindwi ni Asarela n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:15 Ubwa munani ni Yeshaya n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:16 Ubwa cyenda ni Mataniya n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:17 Ubwa cumi ni Shimeyi n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:18 Ubwa cumi na rimwe ni Uziyeli n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:19 Ubwa cumi na kabiri ni Hashabiya n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:20 Ubwa cumi na gatatu ni Shubayeli n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:21 Ubwa cumi na kane ni Matitiya n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:22 Ubwa cumi na gatanu ni Yerimoti n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:23 Ubwa cumi na gatandatu ni Hananiya n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:24 Ubwa cumi na karindwi ni Yoshibekasha n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:25 Ubwa cumi n'umunani ni Hanani n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:26 Ubwa cumi n'icyenda ni Maloti n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:27 Ubwa makumyabiri ni Eliyata n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:28 Ubwa makumyabiri na rimwe ni Hotiri n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:29 Ubwa makumyabiri na kabiri ni Gidaliti n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:30 Ubwa makumyabiri na gatatu ni Mahaziyoti n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles25:31 Ubwa makumyabiri na kane ni Romamuti-Ezeri n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be.
1Chronicles26:1 Abarinzi b'Ingoro na bo bari bigabanyijemo amatsinda. Abo mu muryango wa Kōra ni Meshelemiya mwene Kōra
1Chronicles26:2 Bene Meshelemiya ni Zakariya na Yediyayeli
1Chronicles26:3 na Elamu na Yehohanani na Elihowenayi.
1Chronicles26:4 Bene Obedi-Edomu ni Shemaya na Yehozabadi
1Chronicles26:5 na Amiyeli na Isakari na Pewuletayi. Koko rero Imana yari yarahaye Obedi-Edomu umugisha.
1Chronicles26:6 Umuhungu we Shemaya yabyaye abahungu babaye abakuru b'imiryango
1Chronicles26:7 Bene Shemaya ni Otini na Refayeli
1Chronicles26:8 kandi bose bakomokaga kuri Obedi-Edomu. Bo ubwabo n'abahungu babo hamwe n'abavandimwe babo
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemiya yari afite abahungu n'abavandimwe b'intwari
1Chronicles26:10 Muri bene Hosa wo mu muryango wa Merari
1Chronicles26:11 Yakurikirwaga na Hilikiya na Tabaliya na Zakariya. Bene Hosa n'abavandimwe be bose bari cumi na batatu.
1Chronicles26:12 Aya matsinda y'abarinzi b'amarembo hamwe n'abatware babo
1Chronicles26:13 Bigabanyije amarembo bagombaga kurinda bakoresheje ubufindo
1Chronicles26:14 Ubufindo bugaragaza ko Meshelemiya ari we ugomba kurinda irembo ry'iburasirazuba. Umuhungu we Zakariya wari umujyanama mwiza
1Chronicles26:15 Obedi-Edomu ashingwa kurinda irembo ryo mu majyepfo
1Chronicles26:16 Ubufindo bwagaragaje kandi ko Shupimu na Hosa bashingwa irembo ry'iburengerazuba
1Chronicles26:17 ku irembo ry'iburasirazuba buri munsi habaga Abalevi batandatu
1Chronicles26:18 Ku cyumba cyerekeye mu ruhande rw'iburengerazuba
1Chronicles26:19 Ayo ni yo yari amatsinda y'abarinzi b'amarembo bakomokaga mu muryango wa Kōra n'uwa Merari.
1Chronicles26:20 Abandi Balevi bari bashinzwe gucunga umutungo w'Ingoro y'Imana
1Chronicles26:21 Abakomoka kuri Lādani bo mu muryango wa Gerishoni ari na bo bakuru b'imiryango yabo
1Chronicles26:22 n'abahungu be
1Chronicles26:23 Abakomoka mu muryango wa Amuramu n'uwa Yisehari
1Chronicles26:24 Shubayeli ukomoka kuri Gerushomu mwene Musa
1Chronicles26:25 Yari afitanye isano n'abakomoka kuri Eliyezeri. Eliyezeri yabyaye Rehabiya
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomiti n'abavandimwe be bari bashinzwe impano zeguriwe Imana zatanzwe n'Umwami Dawidi n'abakuru b'imiryango
1Chronicles26:27 Iminyago y'intambara bayeguriye Imana
1Chronicles26:28 Naho ibyo umuhanuzi Samweli na Sawuli mwene Kishi
1Chronicles26:29 Kenaniya ukomoka mu muryango wa Yisehari n'abahungu be
1Chronicles26:30 Hashabiya n'abandi bagabo b'intwari igihumbi na magana arindwi bo mu muryango wa Heburoni
1Chronicles26:31 Yeriya ni we wari umukuru w'abakomoka kuri Heburoni. Mu mwaka wa mirongo ine Dawidi ari ku ngoma
1Chronicles26:32 Yeriya n'abavandimwe be ibihumbi bibiri na magana arindwi
1Chronicles27:1 Dore urutonde rw'Abisiraheli bari abakuru b'imiryango yabo
1Chronicles27:2 Aba ni bo bari abayobozi b'icyiciro cya buri kwezi: Ukwezi kwa mbere ni Yashobeyamu mwene Zabudiyeli
1Chronicles27:3 Yari mwene Perēsi akaba n'umukuru w'abagaba b'ingabo bose.
1Chronicles27:4 Ukwezi kwa kabiri ni Dodayi w'Umwahohi wari wungirijwe na Mikuloti. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:5 Ukwezi kwa gatatu ni Benaya mwene Yehoyada w'umutambyi. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya uwo yari umwe wo muri za ntwari mirongo itatu akaba n'umutware wazo. Umuhungu we Amizabadi yari amwungirije.
1Chronicles27:7 Ukwezi kwa kane ni Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu
1Chronicles27:8 Ukwezi kwa gatanu ni Shamuti w'Umuyizirahi wari umugaba w'ingabo. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:9 Ukwezi kwa gatandatu ni Ira mwene Ikeshi w'i Tekowa. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:10 Ukwezi kwa karindwi ni Helesi w'i Peloni wari Umwefurayimu. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:11 Ukwezi kwa munani ni Sibekayi w'Umuzera w'i Husha. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:12 Ukwezi kwa cyenda ni Abiyezeri w'Umubenyamini wa Anatoti. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:13 Ukwezi kwa cumi ni Maharayi w'Umuzera w'i Netofa. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:14 Ukwezi kwa cumi na kumwe ni Benaya w'Umwefurayimu w'i Piratoni. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:15 Ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri ni Helidayi wo mu muryango wa Otiniyeli w'i Netofa. Yayoboraga icyiciro cy'abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:16 Aba ni bo bari abakuru b'imiryango y'Abisiraheli. Mu muryango wa Rubeni ni Eliyezeri mwene Zikiri
1Chronicles27:17 Mu muryango wa Levi ni Hashabiya mwene Kemuweli
1Chronicles27:18 Mu muryango wa Yuda ni Elihu umuvandimwe wa Dawidi
1Chronicles27:19 Mu muryango wa Zabuloni ni Ishimaya mwene Obadiya
1Chronicles27:20 Mu muryango wa Efurayimu ni Hoseya mwene Azaziya
1Chronicles27:21 Muri kimwe cya kabiri kindi cy'umuryango wa Manase wari utuye muri Gileyadi
1Chronicles27:22 Mu muryango wa Dani yari Azarēli mwene Yerohamu. Abo ni bo bakuru b'imiryango y'Abisiraheli.
1Chronicles27:23 Dawidi ntiyabaruye abantu bamaze imyaka makumyabiri cyangwa abatarayigezaho
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabu mwene Seruya yari yatangiye kubabarura ariko ntiyarangiza
1Chronicles27:25 Azimaveti mwene Adiyeli yari ashinzwe amazu yabikwagamo umutungo w'umwami. Yonatani mwene Uziya yari ashinzwe amazu y'ububiko yo mu cyaro n'ayo mu mijyi
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mwene Kelubu yari ashinzwe abahinzi bo mu cyaro.
1Chronicles27:27 Shimeyi w'i Rama yari ashinzwe imizabibu. Zabudi w'i Shefamu yari ashinzwe guhunika divayi zivuye mu mizabibu.
1Chronicles27:28 Bāli-Hanani w'i Gederi yari ashinzwe imivumu n'iminzenze yari mu misozi y'imirambi. Yowashi yari ashinzwe ububiko bw'amavuta y'iminzenze.
1Chronicles27:29 Shitirayi w'i Sharoni yari ashinzwe amashyo yarishaga mu nzuri z'i Sharoni. Shafati mwene Adilayi yari ashinzwe andi mashyo yarishaga mu bibaya.
1Chronicles27:30 Obili w'Umwishimayeli yari ashinzwe ingamiya. Yedeya w'Umunyameronoti yari ashinzwe indogobe.
1Chronicles27:31 Yazizi w'Umuhageri yari ashinzwe imikumbi y'intama n'ihene. Ayo ni yo mazina y'abantu bacungaga umutungo w'Umwami Dawidi.
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatani se wabo wa Dawidi
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli na we yari umujyanama w'umwami. Hushayi w'Umwaruki yari incuti y'umwami.
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitofeli yasimbuwe na Yehoyada mwene Benaya
1Chronicles28:1 Umwami Dawidi akoranya abakuru b'Abisiraheli bose i Yeruzalemu
1Chronicles28:2 Umwami Dawidi arahaguruka maze arababwira ati: “Bavandimwe bwoko bwanjye
1Chronicles28:3 Ariko Imana irambwira iti: ‘Si wowe uzanyubakira Inzu
1Chronicles28:4 Nyamara Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli yantoranyije mu nzu ya data
1Chronicles28:5 Uhoraho yampaye abahungu benshi
1Chronicles28:6 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati: ‘Umuhungu wawe Salomo ni we uzanyubakira Ingoro n'urugo rwayo
1Chronicles28:7 Nagira umwete wo gukurikiza amategeko n'amabwiriza yanjye nk'uko abikurikiza ubu
1Chronicles28:8 None rero
1Chronicles28:9 “Naho wowe Salomo mwana wanjye
1Chronicles28:10 Kuva ubu umenye ko Uhoraho yagutoranyije kugira ngo umwubakire Ingoro azabamo. Ngaho rero ba intwari kandi ukore.”
1Chronicles28:11 Nuko Dawidi aha umuhungu we Salomo igishushanyombonera cy'Ingoro n'ibyumba byayo
1Chronicles28:12 Amuha kandi n'igishushanyombonera cy'ibyo yateganyaga kubaka
1Chronicles28:13 Amuha amabwiriza yerekeye ibyiciro by'abatambyi n'iby'Abalevi
1Chronicles28:14 Amwereka uburemere bw'izahabu bukwiranye na buri gikoresho cy'izahabu kizakoreshwa imirimo inyuranye
1Chronicles28:15 Amwereka uburemere bw'izahabu bukwiranye n'ibitereko by'amatara by'izahabu
1Chronicles28:16 Amwereka uburemere bukwiranye na buri meza y'izahabu yo gushyiraho imigati yatuwe Imana
1Chronicles28:17 Amwereka n'uburemere bw'izahabu inoze bukwiranye n'amakanya
1Chronicles28:18 Amwereka uburemere bw'izahabu inoze bukwiranye n'igicaniro cy'imibavu. Amuha kandi n'igishushanyombonera cy'igare ririho abakerubi bacuzwe mu izahabu
1Chronicles28:19 Nuko Dawidi aravuga ati: “Ibyo byose byanditswe n'Uhoraho
1Chronicles28:20 Dawidi abwira umuhungu we Salomo ati: “Komera kandi ube intwari
1Chronicles28:21 Dore kandi ibyiciro by'abatambyi n'Abalevi
1Chronicles29:1 Nuko Umwami Dawidi abwira abakoraniye aho bose ati: “Umwana wanjye Salomo ari we Imana yatoranyije
1Chronicles29:2 Nakoze uko nshoboye kose ntegura ibyo kubaka Ingoro y'Imana. Nashatse izahabu yo kuzakoramo ibigomba gukorwa mu izahabu
1Chronicles29:3 Byongeye kandi kubera ko nitangiye Ingoro y'Imana yanjye
1Chronicles29:4 toni ijana z'izahabu ya Ofiri
1Chronicles29:5 kugira ngo izahabu ikorwemo ibigomba kuyikorwamo
1Chronicles29:6 Nuko abakuru b'amazu n'abakuru b'imiryango y'Abisiraheli
1Chronicles29:7 Batanga toni ijana na mirongo irindwi z'izahabu
1Chronicles29:8 Abari bafite amabuye y'agaciro bayashyikiriza Yehiyeli ukomoka kuri Gerishoni
1Chronicles29:9 Abantu bishimira izo mpano batanganye ubwuzu. Koko rero bazituye Uhoraho bafite umutima utunganye. Umwami Dawidi arabyishimira cyane.
1Chronicles29:10 Nuko Dawidi asingiza Uhoraho ari imbere y'ikoraniro
1Chronicles29:11 Uhoraho
1Chronicles29:12 Ubukungu n'ikuzo ni wowe ubitanga kandi ni wowe ugenga byose. Ni wowe nyiri ububasha n'imbaraga
1Chronicles29:13 None rero Mana yacu
1Chronicles29:14 “Jyewe n'abantu banjye nta cyo turi cyo byatuma tubasha kugutura amaturo angana atya. Byose ni wowe bikomokaho
1Chronicles29:15 Imbere yawe turi abashyitsi n'abasuhuke nk'uko ba sogokuruza bari bameze. Ubuzima bwacu bwo kuri iyi si bushira vuba nk'igicucu
1Chronicles29:16 Uhoraho Mana yacu
1Chronicles29:17 Mana yanjye
1Chronicles29:18 Uhoraho Mana ya ba sogokuruza Aburahamu na Izaki na Yakobo
1Chronicles29:19 Byongeye kandi
1Chronicles29:20 Dawidi abwira ikoraniro ati: “Nimusingize Uhoraho Imana yanyu.” Nuko abantu bose basingiza Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza
1Chronicles29:21 Bukeye bwaho batambira Uhoraho ibitambo by'umusangiro n'ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro. Batambye ibimasa igihumbi n'amasekurume y'intama igihumbi
1Chronicles29:22 Uwo munsi barariye kandi banywera imbere y'Uhoraho banezerewe cyane. Bongera kwemeza ko Salomo mwene Dawidi ari we mwami
1Chronicles29:23 Salomo yicara ku ntebe ya cyami y'Uhoraho
1Chronicles29:24 Abayobozi bose n'abantu b'intwari ndetse n'abahungu bose b'Umwami Dawidi

1Chronicles29:26 Dawidi mwene Yese yabaye umwami w'Abisiraheli bose.

2Chronicles1:1 Salomo mwene Dawidi akomera mu bwami bwe
2Chronicles1:2 Salomo avugana n'Abisiraheli bose
2Chronicles1:3 Salomo ajyana n'iryo koraniro ryose ahasengerwaga ku musozi wa Gibeyoni
2Chronicles1:4 Dawidi yari yarazanye Isanduku y'Isezerano ayikuye i Kiriyati-Yeyarimu ayigeza i Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles1:5 Aho imbere y'ihema ry'Uhoraho i Gibeyoni yari yahashyize urutambiro rw'umuringa
2Chronicles1:6 Salomo yegera urutambiro rw'umuringa rwari imbere y'Ihema ry'Ibonaniro
2Chronicles1:7 Iryo joro Imana ibonekera Salomo iramubwira iti: “Nsaba icyo ushaka ndakiguha.”
2Chronicles1:8 Salomo asubiza Imana ati: “Wagiriye neza data Dawidi none dore wampaye kumusimbura.
2Chronicles1:9 Ubu rero Uhoraho Mana
2Chronicles1:10 Ndagusaba ubwenge n'ubushishozi kugira ngo nshobore kuyobora neza aba bantu. Naho ubundi sinabasha gutegeka abantu bawe bangana batya.”
2Chronicles1:11 Imana ibwira Salomo iti: “Ntabwo wigeze usaba ubutunzi n'ubukire
2Chronicles1:12 Ni yo mpamvu nzaguha ubwenge n'ubushishozi
2Chronicles1:13 Nuko Salomo ava ahasengerwaga i Gibeyoni ahari Ihema ry'ibonaniro
2Chronicles1:14 Salomo akoranya amagare y'intambara n'amafarasi. Yari afite amagare igihumbi na magana ane
2Chronicles1:15 Ku ngoma y'Umwami Salomo
2Chronicles1:16 Amafarasi ya Salomo yatumizwaga mu Misiri n'i Kuwe. Abayagurishaga umwami bayaranguriraga i Kuwe.
2Chronicles1:17 Amagare y'intambara yatumizwaga mu Misiri
2Chronicles1:18 Salomo yiyemeza kubakisha Ingoro y'Uhoraho n'iye bwite.
2Chronicles2:1 Salomo ashyiraho abikorezi ibihumbi mirongo irindwi
2Chronicles2:2 Salomo yohereza intumwa zibwira Hiramu umwami w'i Tiri ziti: “Woherereje Data Dawidi imigogo y'amasederi kugira ngo yiyubakire ingoro
2Chronicles2:3 Ubu ngiye kubakira Uhoraho Imana yanjye Ingoro. Bazayoserezamo imibavu
2Chronicles2:4 Byongeye kandi Ingoro ngiye kubaka igomba kuba nini
2Chronicles2:5 Nyamara ntawashobora kubakira Imana ingoro
2Chronicles2:6 Nuko rero unyoherereze umuhanga wo gutunganya izahabu n'ifeza n'umuringa n'ibyuma
2Chronicles2:7 Unyoherereze n'imigogo y'amasederi n'amasipure
2Chronicles2:8 maze bantemere ibiti byinshi
2Chronicles2:9 Abagaragu bawe bazatema ibiti
2Chronicles2:10 Hiramu umwami wa Tiri yandikira Salomo ati: “Uhoraho yakugize umwami w'abantu be kuko abakunda.
2Chronicles2:11 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli waremye ijuru n'isi
2Chronicles2:12 None nkoherereje umuhanga uzi gushishoza witwa Huramu
2Chronicles2:13 nyina akomoka kuri Dani naho se ni Umunyatiri. Huramu uwo azi gutunganya izahabu n'ifeza
2Chronicles2:14 None databuja
2Chronicles2:15 Twebwe tuzajya mu bisi bya Libani gutema ibiti byose ukeneye
2Chronicles2:16 Salomo abarura abanyamahanga bose bari mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
2Chronicles2:17 Afatamo ibihumbi mirongo irindwi b'abikorezi
2Chronicles3:1 Salomo atangira kubaka Ingoro y'Uhoraho i Yeruzalemu ku musozi wa Moriya
2Chronicles3:2 Yatangiye imirimo yo kubaka mu kwezi kwa kabiri
2Chronicles3:3 Dore ingero z'Ingoro Salomo yubakiye Imana: uburebure bwari metero mirongo itatu
2Chronicles3:4 Uburebure bw'ibaraza ry'Ingoro bwari metero icumi bungana n'ubugari bw'iyo Ngoro
2Chronicles3:5 Inkuta z'Icyumba kizira inenge zari zubakishijwe imbaho z'amasipure zometseho izahabu inoze
2Chronicles3:6 Icyo Cyumba agitākisha amabuye y'agaciro. Naho izahabu yakoreshaga yaturukaga i Paruvayimu.
2Chronicles3:7 Mu Ngoro ahomeka izahabu
2Chronicles3:8 Hanyuma yubaka Icyumba kizira inenge cyari gifite uburebure bungana n'ubugari bw'Ingoro. Uburebure bwari metero icumi n'ubugari ari metero icumi. Acyomekaho izahabu ipima toni makumyabiri.
2Chronicles3:9 Uburemere bw'imisumari yakoreshejwe bwanganaga na garama magana atanu y'izahabu. Ibyumba byo hejuru na byo abyomekaho izahabu.
2Chronicles3:10 Mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane ahashyira amashusho abiri y'abakerubi
2Chronicles3:11 Buri baba ry'umukerubi ryari rifite metero ebyiri n'igice z'uburebure. Ibaba rimwe rya buri mukerubi ryakoraga ku rukuta rw'Ingoro
2Chronicles3:12 
2Chronicles3:13 Abo bakerubi bari bahagaze berekeye Icyumba kizira inenge.
2Chronicles3:14 Salomo aboha umwenda wo gukinga Icyumba kizira inenge cyane
2Chronicles3:15 Salomo akora inkingi ebyiri azishyira ku ibaraza ry'Ingoro. Buri nkingi yari ifite metero icyenda z'ubuhagarike
2Chronicles3:16 Akora imitako imeze nk'iminyururu isobekeranye
2Chronicles3:17 Ashinga izo nkingi ku ibaraza ry'Ingoro. Inkingi yo mu majyepfo ayita Yakini
2Chronicles4:1 Salomo yubaka urutambiro rw'umuringa
2Chronicles4:2 Acura ikizenga kiburungushuye mu muringa ushongeshejwe. Cyari gifite metero eshanu z'umurambararo
2Chronicles4:3 Icyo kizenga cyari gifite urugara rutatseho impushya ebyiri z'amashusho y'ibimasa biruzengurutse. Kuri buri metero hariho ibimasa makumyabiri byakoranywe n'icyo kizenga.
2Chronicles4:4 Icyo kizenga cyari giteretse ku migongo y'ibimasa cumi na bibiri bikozwe mu muringa. Bitatu byarebaga mu majyaruguru
2Chronicles4:5 Umubyimba w'icyo kizenga wari sentimetero umunani
2Chronicles4:6 Yacuze kandi ibikarabiro icumi
2Chronicles4:7 Salomo yakoze ibitereko icumi by'amatara mu izahabu akurikije uko byagenwe maze abishyira mu Ngoro y'Imana
2Chronicles4:8 Yakoze ameza icumi ayashyira mu Ngoro y'Imana
2Chronicles4:9 Yubatse kandi urugo rw'abatambyi n'urugo runini
2Chronicles4:10 Icyo kizenga yagiteretse ku nguni y'Ingoro
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu yacuze ibikarabiro n'ibitiyo n'ibikombe. Nuko arangiza imirimo yagombaga gukorera Umwami Salomo mu Ngoro y'Imana.
2Chronicles4:12 Dore ibyo Huramu yakoze: inkingi ebyiri n'imitwe yazo yiburungushuye
2Chronicles4:13 n'amashusho magana ane y'imikomamanga yo gutāka kuri izo nshundura
2Chronicles4:14 n'ibigare n'ibikarabiro byari bibiteretseho
2Chronicles4:15 n'ikizenga kimwe n'ibimasa cumi na bibiri cyari giteretsweho
2Chronicles4:16 n'ibikarabiro n'ibitiyo n'amakanya yo kwarura inyama n'ibindi byabigenewe. Ibyo bikoresho byose by'Ingoro y'Uhoraho Huramu yakoreye Umwami Salomo

2Chronicles4:21 n'indabyo n'amatara n'udufashi twayo byose bikozwe mu izahabu inoze
2Chronicles4:22 n'ibyuma n'ibikarabiro n'ibikombe n'amasafuriya mu izahabu inoze

2Chronicles6:24 “Ubwoko bwawe bw'Abisiraheli nibatsindwa n'umwanzi kubera ko bagucumuyeho

2Chronicles6:26 “Nubuza imvura kugwa kubera ko abantu bawe bagucumuyeho
2Chronicles6:27 uzumve uri mu ijuru maze Abisiraheli ari bo bagaragu bawe ubabarire ibyaha byabo. Uzabigishe imigenzereze nyakuri bagomba gukurikiza
2Chronicles6:28 “Inzara nitera mu gihugu cyangwa hagatera icyorezo cy'indwara
2Chronicles6:29 maze uwo ari we wese mu bwoko bwawe bw'Abisiraheli akagusenga cyangwa akagutakambira
2Chronicles6:30 uzumve uri mu ijuru aho utuye. Uzamubabarire kubera ko uzi umutima w'umuntu (koko rero ni wowe wenyine uzi imitima y'abantu bose)
2Chronicles6:31 Bityo Abisiraheli bazagutinya kandi bakurikize imigenzereze yawe
2Chronicles6:32 Abantu bo mu mahanga ya kure bazumva ko uri ikirangirire
2Chronicles6:33 uzamwumve uri mu ijuru aho utuye. Uwo munyamahanga uzamuhe icyo agusabye cyose
2Chronicles6:34 “Uhoraho
2Chronicles6:35 uzumve uri mu ijuru wite ku masengesho yabo no ku ugutakamba kwabo maze ubahe gutsinda.
2Chronicles6:36 “Abisiraheli nibagucumuraho dore ko nta muntu udacumura

2Chronicles6:38 Nibakugarukira babikuye ku mutima n'ubuzima bwabo bwose
2Chronicles6:39 uzumve uri mu ijuru aho utuye wite ku masengesho yabo no ku ugutakamba kwabo. Uzabagoboke bityo ubabarire abantu bawe bagucumuyeho.

2Chronicles7:4 Nuko umwami n'abantu bose batambira Uhoraho ibitambo.
2Chronicles7:5 Umwami Salomo yatambye ibimasa ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri
2Chronicles7:6 Abatambyi bari mu myanya yabo
2Chronicles7:7 Nuko uwo munsi igice cyo hagati mu kibuga cy'urugo rw'imbere y'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles7:8 Icyo gihe Salomo amara iminsi irindwi yizihiza iminsi mikuru y'ingando

2Chronicles7:22 Abandi bazabasubiza bati: ‘Abisiraheli baretse Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza yabavanye mu Misiri. Bayobotse izindi mana baraziramya
2Chronicles8:1 Salomo yubatse Ingoro y'Uhoraho n'iye bwite mu myaka makumyabiri
2Chronicles8:2 asana n'imijyi Umwami Hiramu wa Tiri yari yaramuhaye ayituzamo Abisiraheli.
2Chronicles8:3 Nuko atera umujyi: wa Hamati-Soba arawigarurira.
2Chronicles8:4 Yubaka umujyi: wa Tadimori wari mu butayu
2Chronicles8:5 Yongera kubaka Beti-Horoni ya ruguru na Beti-Horoni y'epfo
2Chronicles8:6 Yubatse na Bālati n'imijyi yose y'ububiko
2Chronicles8:7 Mu gihugu hari Abaheti n'Amori n'Abaperizi
2Chronicles8:8 Bakomokaga ku banyamahanga bahoze batuye gihugu
2Chronicles8:9 Icyakora nta Mwisiraheli n'umwe Salomo yagize inkoreragahato
2Chronicles8:10 Abategetsi bakuru bari bashinzwe imirimo ya Salomo
2Chronicles8:11 Salomo avana umukobwa w'umwami wa Misiri mu Murwa wa Dawidi
2Chronicles8:12 Nuko Salomo atura Uhoraho ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
2Chronicles8:13 Yabigenzaga atyo gatatu ku mwaka buri gihe nk'uko byategetswe na Musa: ku masabato no ku mboneko z'amezi no ku minsi mikuru y'ingenzi
2Chronicles8:14 Akurikije amabwiriza ya se Dawidi
2Chronicles8:15 Ntibigeze bateshuka ku mategeko ya Dawidi agenga abatambyi n'Abalevi
2Chronicles8:16 Nuko ibyo Salomo yari yarateganyije birangira bityo
2Chronicles8:17 Ibyo birangiye Salomo ajya kuri Esiyoni-Geberi no kuri Elati
2Chronicles8:18 Umwami Hiramu amwoherereza amato atwawe na bamwe mu basare be bazobereye mu by'amazi. Abo basare bajyana n'aba Salomo mu gihugu cya Ofiri
2Chronicles9:1 Umwamikazi w'i Sheba yumvise ko Umwami Salomo yabaye ikirangirire
2Chronicles9:2 Salomo asubiza ibibazo byose umwamikazi w'i Sheba yari amubajije. Nta kibazo na kimwe cyabereye Salomo insobe
2Chronicles9:3 Umwamikazi w'i Sheba yibonera ubwenge bwa Salomo hamwe n'Ingoro yari yarubatse.
2Chronicles9:4 Yiboneye ibyokurya byagaburwaga ku meza ye
2Chronicles9:5 Nuko abwira umwami ati: “Ibyo nabwiwe nkiri mu gihugu cyanjye bikwerekeyeho n'ibyerekeye ubwenge bwawe
2Chronicles9:6 Nyamara sinigeze mbyemera kugeza ubwo niyiziye nkabyibonera ubwanjye. Koko rero nsanze nta n'igice cyabyo nabwiwe. Ubwenge bwawe n'ubukungu bwawe birenze ibyo nabwiwe.
2Chronicles9:7 Hahirwa abantu bawe
2Chronicles9:8 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho Imana yawe
2Chronicles9:9 Umwamikazi w'i Sheba aha Umwami Salomo toni eshatu n'igice z'izahabu n'imibavu myinshi
2Chronicles9:10 Byongeye kandi abagaragu b'Umwami Hiramu n'aba Salomo bazanaga izahabu bayivanye Ofiri
2Chronicles9:11 Ibyo biti by'indobanure Umwami Salomo yabikoreshaga mu iyubakwa ry'Ingoro y'Uhoraho n'ingoro ye bwite
2Chronicles9:12 Umwami Salomo aha umwamikazi w'i Sheba ibyo yashakaga byose
2Chronicles9:13 Buri mwaka Umwami Salomo yinjizaga mu mutungo we izahabu ipima toni makumyabiri
2Chronicles9:14 utabariyemo amahōro yakwaga abantu no ku bicuruzwa byinjizwaga mu gihugu. Abami bose bo muri Arabiya n'abategetsi b'intara bazaniraga Salomo izahabu n'ifeza.
2Chronicles9:15 Umwami Salomo yacurishije ingabo nini magana abiri mu izahabu y'imvange. Buri ngabo yayomekagaho ibiro bitandatu by'izahabu.
2Chronicles9:16 Yacurishije n'izindi ngabo nto magana atatu mu izahabu y'imvange. Buri ngabo yayomekagaho izahabu ipima ikiro n'igice. Izo ngabo zose umwami yazibitse mu nzu yiswe “Ingoro y'Ishyamba rya Libani.”
2Chronicles9:17 Umwami arongera akoresha intebe ya cyami mu mahembe y'inzovu
2Chronicles9:18 Iyo ntebe yari ifite ingazi esheshatu zigana aho iteye
2Chronicles9:19 Andi mashusho cumi n'abiri y'intare yari ahagaze impande zombi z'ingazi uko ari esheshatu. Nta kindi gihugu kigeze gikoresha intebe ya cyami nk'iyo.
2Chronicles9:20 Ibikombe byose by'ibwami kwa Salomo byari bikozwe mu izahabu
2Chronicles9:21 Umwami Salomo yari afite amato yajyaga mu bucuruzi bwa kure
2Chronicles9:22 Umwami Salomo yarushaga cyane ubukungu n'ubwenge abandi bami bose bo ku isi.
2Chronicles9:23 Abami bose bo ku isi bifuzaga kubonana na we
2Chronicles9:24 Buri mwaka umuntu wese wazaga kumureba yazanaga amaturo agizwe n'ibikoresho by'ifeza n'iby'izahabu
2Chronicles9:25 Salomo yari afite ibigo ibihumbi bine bigenewe amafarasi n'amagare y'intambara
2Chronicles9:26 Yategekaga abami bose kuva ku ruzi rwa Efurati kugeza mu gihugu cy'Abafilisiti
2Chronicles9:27 Ku ngoma ye ifeza yabaye nyinshi i Yeruzalemu inganya ubwinshi n'amabuye yaho
2Chronicles9:28 Amafarasi ya Salomo yatumizwaga mu Misiri no mu yandi mahanga.
2Chronicles9:29 Ibindi bikorwa bya Salomo
2Chronicles9:30 Salomo yamaze imyaka mirongo ine ari ku ngoma Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles9:31 Salomo yisazira amahoro bamushyingura mu murwa wa se Dawidi
2Chronicles10:1 Robowamu ajya i Shekemu kuko ari ho imiryango y'Abisiraheli bose yari yaje kumwimikira.
2Chronicles10:2 Icyo gihe Yerobowamu mwene Nebati yari mu Misiri aho yari yarahungiye Umwami Salomo. Yumvise bavuga iby'ikoraniro ry'i Shekemu ava mu Misiri aratahuka.
2Chronicles10:3 Abisiraheli batuma kuri Yerobowamu maze araza aherekeza ikoraniro ryose. Basanga Robowamu baramubwira bati:
2Chronicles10:4 “So yatwikoreje imitwaro iremereye. Wowe rero nuyitworohereza ukatworohereza n'imirimo y'agahato yadukoresheje
2Chronicles10:5 Robowamu arababwira ati: “Nimugende muzagaruke nyuma y'iminsi itatu.” Nuko barataha.
2Chronicles10:6 Umwami Robowamu agisha inama abantu b'inararibonye bakoranaga na se Salomo
2Chronicles10:7 Baramusubiza bati: “Nugaragariza aba bantu ko wiyemeje kubakorera
2Chronicles10:8 Nyamara Robowamu ntiyita ku nama inararibonye zamuhaye
2Chronicles10:9 Arababaza ati: “Bariya bantu bansaba ngo mborohereze imitwaro data yabikoreje nabasubiza iki?”
2Chronicles10:10 Abo basore babyirukanye baramubwira bati: “Abo bantu binubira ko so yabagize inkoreragahato
2Chronicles10:11 Data yabikoreje imitwaro iremereye
2Chronicles10:12 Ku munsi wa gatatu Yerobowamu n'abantu be bose
2Chronicles10:13 Nuko Robowamu abasubizanya inabi nyinshi
2Chronicles10:14 ahubwo abasubiza akurikije inama yahawe n'abasore ati: “Data yabikoreje imitwaro iremereye
2Chronicles10:15 Robowamu arinangira ntiyita ku byo abo bantu bamubwiye. Uhoraho ni we washatse ko biba bityo
2Chronicles10:16 Abisiraheli bo mu majyaruguru babonye ko umwami atabumvise
2Chronicles10:17 Abisiraheli bari batuye mu mijyi y'u Buyuda
2Chronicles10:18 Nuko Umwami Robowamu atuma Adoniramu wakoreshaga imirimo y'agahato ku Bisiraheli bo mu majyaruguru
2Chronicles10:19 Guhera ubwo imiryango y'Abisiraheli bo mu majyaruguru
2Chronicles11:1 Robowamu ageze i Yeruzalemu atoranya mu muryango wa Yuda n'uwa Benyamini
2Chronicles11:2 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Umuhanuzi Shemaya ati:
2Chronicles11:3 “Jyana ubu butumwa kwa Robowamu mwene Salomo umwami w'u Buyuda
2Chronicles11:4 Uhoraho aravuze ngo: ‘Ntimurwanye abavandimwe banyu b'Abisiraheli
2Chronicles11:5 Robowamu atura i Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles11:6 Betelehemu na Etamu na Tekowa
2Chronicles11:7 na Betisuri na Soko na Adulamu
2Chronicles11:8 na Gati na Maresha na Zifu
2Chronicles11:9 na Adorayimu na Lakishi na Azeka
2Chronicles11:10 na Soreya na Ayaloni na Heburoni. Ngiyo imijyi ntamenwa yo mu Buyuda no mu Bubenyamini.
2Chronicles11:11 Ayizengurutsa inkuta zikomeye
2Chronicles11:12 Muri buri mujyi: yahabitse ingabo n'amacumu maze arayikomeza cyane
2Chronicles11:13 Abatambyi n'Abalevi baza bavuye mu gihugu cyose cya Isiraheli
2Chronicles11:14 Koko rero Abalevi bari basize imirima yabo n'ibyabo byose
2Chronicles11:15 Icyakora Yerobowamu yishyiriraho abatambyi b'ahasengerwaga
2Chronicles11:16 Abantu b'imiryango yose y'Abisiraheli bari bafite umwete wo gusenga Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli
2Chronicles11:17 Bityo batera inkunga ubwami bw'u Buyuda
2Chronicles11:18 Robowamu arongora Mahalati umukobwa wa Yerimoti mwene Dawidi
2Chronicles11:19 Babyarana abana batatu ari bo Yewushi na Shemariya na Zahamu.
2Chronicles11:20 Nyuma Robowamu arongora Māka umukobwa wa Abusalomu
2Chronicles11:21 Robowamu akundwakaza Māka umukobwa wa Abusalomu
2Chronicles11:22 Robowamu aha umwanya wa mbere Abiya umuhungu wa Māka
2Chronicles11:23 Robowamu yagize n'igitekerezo cyo gutatanyiriza abandi bahungu be mu mijyi ikomeye y'u Buyuda n'iyo mu ntara y'Ababenyamini
2Chronicles12:1 Robowamu amaze gukomeza ingoma ye ntiyaba acyumvira Amategeko y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles12:2 Kubera ko bari bacumuriye Uhoraho
2Chronicles12:3 Shishaki yari ayoboye amagare y'intambara igihumbi na magana abiri
2Chronicles12:4 Afata imijyi ntamenwa y'u Buyuda maze agera i Yeruzalemu.
2Chronicles12:5 Umuhanuzi Shemaya asanga Robowamu n'abayobozi b'u Buyuda bari bakoraniye i Yeruzalemu bahunga Shishaki
2Chronicles12:6 Abayobozi b'Abisiraheli ndetse n'umwami bicisha bugufi baravuga bati: “Uhoraho ni Intungane.”
2Chronicles12:7 Uhoraho abonye ko bicishije bugufi abwira Shemaya ati: “Ubwo bicishije bugufi sinzabarimbura
2Chronicles12:8 Icyakora bazaba abagaragu be
2Chronicles12:9 Nuko Shishaki umwami wa Misiri atera Yeruzalemu. Asahura umutungo wo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho n'uwo mu ngoro ya cyami
2Chronicles12:10 Umwami Robowamu acurisha ingabo mu muringa zo gusimbura iz'izahabu zasahuwe
2Chronicles12:11 Buri gihe uko yinjiraga mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles12:12 Kubera ko umwami yari yicishije bugufi
2Chronicles12:13 Nuko Umwami Robowamu akomera i Yeruzalemu. Yabaye umwami afite imyaka mirongo ine n'umwe
2Chronicles12:14 Robowamu akora ibibi kuko atashatse Uhoraho abikuye ku mutima.
2Chronicles12:15 Ibindi bikorwa bya Robowamu byose
2Chronicles12:16 Robowamu yisazira amahoro bamushyingura mu Murwa wa Dawidi. Umuhungu we Abiya amusimbura ku ngoma.
2Chronicles13:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'umunani Yerobowamu ari ku ngoma
2Chronicles13:2 amara imyaka itatu ari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Nyina yitwaga Māka
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya ajya ku rugamba afite abasirikari ibihumbi magana ane b'intwari
2Chronicles13:4 Abiya ahagarara ku musozi wa Semarayimu wo mu misozi ya Efurayimu
2Chronicles13:5 Ntimuzi ko Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli yagiranye Isezerano ridakuka na Dawidi
2Chronicles13:6 Nyamara Yerobowamu mwene Nebati
2Chronicles13:7 Abantu b'imburamumaro baza kwifatanya na we
2Chronicles13:8 None ubu
2Chronicles13:9 Mwirukanye abatambyi b'Uhoraho bakomoka kuri Aroni n'Abalevi
2Chronicles13:10 Naho twebwe
2Chronicles13:11 Buri gitondo na buri mugoroba batura Uhoraho ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
2Chronicles13:12 Imana iri kumwe natwe ni yo mutware wacu
2Chronicles13:13 Ariko Yerobowamu yohereza igitero guca igico inyuma y'ingabo z'Abayuda
2Chronicles13:14 Abayuda bakebutse basanga bagoswe
2Chronicles13:15 Ingabo z'Abayuda zivuza akamo
2Chronicles13:16 Abisiraheli bahunga Abayuda
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya n'ingabo ze barabatsinda barabahashya
2Chronicles13:18 Icyo gihe Abisiraheli bacishwa bugufi naho Abayuda baratsinda
2Chronicles13:19 Nuko Abiya akurikirana Yerobowamu
2Chronicles13:20 Abiya akiri ku ngoma Yerobowamu ntiyongeye gukomera
2Chronicles13:21 Naho Abiya arakomera
2Chronicles13:22 Ibindi bikorwa bya Abiya
2Chronicles13:23 Abiya yisazira amahoro bamushyingura mu Murwa wa Dawidi. Umuhungu we Asa amusimbura ku ngoma. Ku ngoma ya Asa igihugu kimara imyaka icumi gifite umutekano.
2Chronicles14:1 Asa yakoze ibyiza kandi binogeye Uhoraho Imana ye.
2Chronicles14:2 Yakuyeho intambiro z'abanyamahanga n'ahasengerwaga ibigirwamana
2Chronicles14:3 Yategetse Abayuda gushakashaka Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza
2Chronicles14:4 Asa yashenye ahasengerwaga ibigirwamana n'ibicaniro byoserezwagaho imibavu
2Chronicles14:5 Bityo Asa yubakisha imijyi ntamenwa mu Buyuda. Muri icyo gihe ntihagira umurwanya kuko Uhoraho yari yamuhaye ituze.
2Chronicles14:6 Nuko abwira Abayuda ati: “Nimuze twubake imijyi tuyizengurutse inkuta n'iminara
2Chronicles14:7 Asa yari afite ingabo z'Abayuda ibihumbi magana atatu bitwaje ingabo nini n'amacumu

2Chronicles14:9 Asa aza amusanga
2Chronicles14:10 Asa yambaza Uhoraho Imana ye ati: “Uhoraho
2Chronicles14:11 Uhoraho atsindira Abanyakushi imbere ya Asa n'ingabo ze z'Abayuda

2Chronicles14:13 Bateye n'imidugudu ikikije Gerari kubera ko Uhoraho yari yateye ubwoba abaturage
2Chronicles14:14 Batera no mu biraro by'amatungo banyaga imikumbi y'intama n'ingamiya
2Chronicles15:1 Mwuka w'Imana atuma Azariya mwene Odedi

2Chronicles15:3 Dore Abisiraheli bamaze igihe kirekire batamenya Imana nyakuri
2Chronicles15:4 Nyamara bageze mu makuba bagarukira Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli
2Chronicles15:5 Muri icyo gihe abantu ntibari bafite umutekano
2Chronicles15:6 Igihugu cyashyamiranaga n'ikindi
2Chronicles15:7 Mwebwe rero nimukomere mureke kwiheba
2Chronicles15:8 Asa yumvise ubwo butumwa agejejweho n'umuhanuzi Azariya mwene Odedi
2Chronicles15:9 Nuko akoranya Abayuda n'Ababenyamini bose

2Chronicles15:11 Uwo munsi batambira Uhoraho ibimasa magana arindwi

2Chronicles15:17 Asa ntiyasenya ahasengerwaga muri Isiraheli

2Chronicles15:19 Maze ntihongera kuba intambara
2Chronicles16:1 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'itandatu Asa ari ku ngoma
2Chronicles16:2 Asa ajyana ku ifeza no ku izahabu byari bisigaye mu mutungo w'Ingoro y'Uhoraho no mu mutungo w'ibwami
2Chronicles16:3 “Reka tugirane amasezerano nk'uko so na data bayagiranye. Dore nkoherereje ifeza n'izahabu. Ngaho sesa amasezerano wagiranye na Bāsha umwami wa Isiraheli
2Chronicles16:4 Benihadadi yumvikana na Asa
2Chronicles16:5 Bāsha amaze kumva iyo nkuru

2Chronicles16:14 Bamushyingura mu mva yari yaracukurishije mu Murwa wa Dawidi
2Chronicles17:1 Yozafati asimbura se Asa ku ngoma
2Chronicles17:2 Akwiza ingabo mu mijyi ntamenwa yose y'u Buyuda
2Chronicles17:3 Uhoraho ashyigikira Yozafati
2Chronicles17:4 Yihatiraga gushaka Uhoraho Imana ya se agukurikiza amabwiriza yayo
2Chronicles17:5 Uhoraho akomeza ingoma ya Yozafati maze Abayuda bose bamuzanira amaturo
2Chronicles17:6 Akomeza gushakashaka Uhoraho abikuye ku mutima
2Chronicles17:7 Mu mwaka wa gatatu Yozafati ari ku ngoma
2Chronicles17:8 Bari baherekejwe n'Abalevi ari bo Shemaya na Netaniya na Zebadiya
2Chronicles17:9 Bajyana igitabo cy'Amategeko y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles17:10 Uhoraho atuma abami bose b'ibihugu bikikije u Buyuda bagira ubwoba

2Chronicles17:12 Nuko Yozafati agenda arushaho gukomera
2Chronicles17:13 Yari afite ibigega byinshi mu mijyi y'u Buyuda
2Chronicles17:14 Dore umubare wabo ukurikije ibisekuruza byabo. Mu Buyuda abagaba b'ingabo bayoboraga ingabo ibihumbi ni aba: Aduna watwaraga ingabo ibihumbi magana atatu z'intwari
2Chronicles17:15 agakurikirwa na Yehohanani watwaraga ingabo ibihumbi magana abiri na mirongo inani
2Chronicles17:16 na Amasiya mwene Zikiri witanze akorera Uhoraho
2Chronicles17:17 Mu Babenyamini hari Eliyada
2Chronicles17:18 na Yehozabadi watwaraga ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongo inani zambariye urugamba.
2Chronicles17:19 Abo ni bo bagaba b'ingabo bakoreraga umwami
2Chronicles18:1 Yozafati agira ubukire bwinshi n'ikuzo
2Chronicles18:2 Hashize igihe Yozafati ajya gusura Ahabu i Samariya. Ahabu amwakirana n'abo bari kumwe
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli abaza Yozafati umwami w'u Buyuda ati: “Wakwemera ko tujyana gutera Ramoti y'i Gileyadi?” Yozafati aramusubiza ati: “Erega jyewe nawe turi umwe
2Chronicles18:4 Yozafati yongera kubwira Ahabu ati: “Banza ugishe Uhoraho inama.”
2Chronicles18:5 Umwami wa Isiraheli akoranya abahanuzi magana ane
2Chronicles18:6 Nyamara Yozafati arabaza ati: “Mbese nta muhanuzi w'Uhoraho uri hano ngo tumubaze?”
2Chronicles18:7 Ahabu aramusubiza ati: “Hasigaye umwe watubariza Uhoraho
2Chronicles18:8 Nuko Umwami Ahabu ahamagaza umugaragu we
2Chronicles18:9 Umwami wa Isiraheli n'uw'u Buyuda bari bicaye mu ntebe zabo ku irembo ry'umujyi: wa Samariya
2Chronicles18:10 Uwitwa Sedekiya mwene Kenāna wari waracurishije amahembe y'icyuma
2Chronicles18:11 Abandi bahanuzi bose na bo barahanura bati: “Zamuka utere Ramoti y'i Gileyadi uzahatsinda. Uhoraho azakugabiza uwo mujyi:.”
2Chronicles18:12 Intumwa yari yoherejwe kwa Mikaya iramubwira iti: “Abandi bahanuzi bose bahanuriye umwami ko azatsinda
2Chronicles18:13 Mikaya aramusubiza ati: “Ndahiye Uhoraho ko nta kindi ndi butangaze
2Chronicles18:14 Mikaya asanga umwami
2Chronicles18:15 Nyamara Ahabu yongera kumubaza ati: “Mbese ngusabe kangahe kumbwira gusa ukuri kuvuye ku Uhoraho?”
2Chronicles18:16 Mikaya aramusubiza ati: “Nabonye Abisiraheli bose batataniye ku misozi bameze nk'intama zidafite umushumba
2Chronicles18:17 Nuko umwami wa Isiraheli abwira Yozafati ati: “Sinakubwiye ko nta cyiza ajya ampanurira uretse ibibi!”
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya yungamo ati: “Umva ijambo ry'Uhoraho: nabonye Uhoraho yicaye ku ntebe ye ya cyami abamarayika bose bamuhagaze iburyo n'ibumoso
2Chronicles18:19 maze Uhoraho arabaza ati: ‘Ni nde ugiye gushuka Ahabu umwami wa Isiraheli ngo atere Ramoti y'i Gileyadi yicirweyo?’ Umwe avuga ibye undi ibye.
2Chronicles18:20 Nuko haza umumarayika ahagarara imbere y'Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Ngiye kumushuka.’ Uhoraho aramubaza ati: ‘Uzabigenza ute?’
2Chronicles18:21 Umumarayika ati: ‘Ndagenda nshuke abahanuzi be bose bamuhanurire ibinyoma.’ Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Genda ukore utyo umushuke
2Chronicles18:22 Mikaya yungamo ati: “Dore Uhoraho yashyize mu bahanuzi bawe ubuhanuzi bw'ibinyoma

2Chronicles28:16 Muri iyo minsi

2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya yabaye umwami afite imyaka makumyabiri n'itanu
2Chronicles29:2 Hezekiya yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho nka sekuruza Dawidi.
2Chronicles29:3 Mu kwezi kwa mbere k'umwaka wa mbere ari ku ngoma
2Chronicles29:4 Atumira abatambyi n'Abalevi abakoranyiriza ku kibuga aherekera iburasirazuba.
2Chronicles29:5 Nuko arababwira ati: “Yemwe Balevi
2Chronicles29:6 Koko rero ba sokuruza baracumuye kandi bakora ibitanogeye Uhoraho Imana yacu
2Chronicles29:7 Ikindi kandi bakinze n'inzugi z'Ingoro y'Imana
2Chronicles29:8 Ibyo bituma Uhoraho arakarira u Buyuda na Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles29:9 None kubera ibyo ababyeyi bacu bicishijwe inkota
2Chronicles29:10 None rero ndashaka kugirana Isezerano n'Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli
2Chronicles29:11 Bana banjye
2Chronicles29:12 Abalevi bari bahari ni aba: mu muryango wa Kehati hari Mahati mwene Amasiya
2Chronicles29:13 Muri bene Elizafani hari Shimuri na Yeweli. Muri bene Asafu hari Zakariya na Mataniya.
2Chronicles29:14 Muri bene Hemani hari Yehiyeli na Shimeyi. Muri bene Yedutuni hari Shemaya na Uziyeli.
2Chronicles29:15 Nuko bakoranya abavandimwe babo
2Chronicles29:16 Nuko abatambyi binjira mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho kugira ngo bayisukure
2Chronicles29:17 Batangiye umuhango wo guhumanura Ingoro ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa mbere
2Chronicles29:18 Nuko basanga Umwami Hezekiya baramubwira bati: “Twahumanuye Ingoro yose y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles29:19 Ibikoresho byose Umwami Ahazi yanduje mu bwigomeke bwe akiri ku ngoma
2Chronicles29:20 Bukeye mu gitondo Umwami Hezekiya akoranya abatware b'umujyi:
2Chronicles29:21 Bazana ibimasa birindwi n'amapfizi y'intama arindwi
2Chronicles29:22 Nuko batamba ibimasa
2Chronicles29:23 Hanyuma bazana amasekurume y'ihene yo guhongerera ibyaha
2Chronicles29:24 Abatambyi barayica maze amaraso yayo bayamisha ku rutambiro
2Chronicles29:25 Umwami ashyira Abalevi mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho bafite inanga y'indoha n'inanga nyamuduri nk'uko byategetswe na Dawidi
2Chronicles29:26 Abalevi bajya mu myanya yabo bafite ibicurangisho bya Dawidi
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekiya ategeka ko batamba igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro ku rutambiro
2Chronicles29:28 Ikoraniro ryose rikomeza kuramya
2Chronicles29:29 Bamaze gutamba igitambo
2Chronicles29:30 Hanyuma Umwami Hezekiya n'abatware bategeka Abalevi gusingiza Uhoraho
2Chronicles29:31 Nuko Hezekiya aravuga ati: “Noneho ubwo mwiyeguriye Uhoraho
2Chronicles29:32 Nuko bazana ibimasa mirongo irindwi
2Chronicles29:33 Ibindi bitambo byari bigizwe n'amatungo maremare magana atandatu
2Chronicles29:34 Nyamara kubera ko abatambyi batari bahagije kugira ngo bashobore kubaga ayo matungo yose
2Chronicles29:35 Ikindi kandi hari n'ibitambo byinshi bikongorwa n'umuriro
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekiya n'ikoraniro ryose bishimira ibyo Imana yari yabakoreye
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekiya atumira Abisiraheli n'Abayuda bose
2Chronicles30:2 Umwami n'ibyegera bye n'ikoraniro ryose ry'i Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles30:3 Koko rero ntibashoboye kuwizihiza mu gihe cyawo
2Chronicles30:4 Icyo cyemezo gishimisha umwami n'ikoraniro ryose.
2Chronicles30:5 Nuko bohereza inzandiko muri Isiraheli hose
2Chronicles30:6 Izo nzandiko zoherejwe n'umwami n'ibyegera bye
2Chronicles30:7 Ntimukabe nka ba sokuruza n'abavandimwe banyu bagomeye Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza
2Chronicles30:8 Mwikwigomeka nka ba sokuruza
2Chronicles30:9 Nimugarukira Uhoraho
2Chronicles30:10 Intumwa zizenguruka intara yose ya Efurayimu n'iya Manase kugera mu ntara ya Zabuloni
2Chronicles30:11 Nyamara abantu bake mu Bashēri no mu Bamanase no mu Bazabuloni barumvira
2Chronicles30:12 Mu Buyuda na ho Imana ituma bahuza umutima wo kubahiriza itegeko ry'umwami n'ibyegera bye
2Chronicles30:13 Mu kwezi kwa kabiri
2Chronicles30:14 Nuko basenya intambiro zari zubatse i Yeruzalemu n'ibicaniro by'imibavu
2Chronicles30:15 Ku itariki ya cumi n'enye z'ukwezi kwa kabiri
2Chronicles30:16 Nuko bajya mu myanya yabo bakurikije Itegeko rya Musa umuntu w'Imana. Abalevi bazanye amaraso y'ibitambo bayahereza Abatambyi na bo bayamisha ku rutambiro.
2Chronicles30:17 Kubera ko abantu benshi batari bihumanuye
2Chronicles30:18 Abantu benshi ntibari bihumanuye
2Chronicles30:19 “Uhoraho Mana ya ba sokuruza gira impuhwe
2Chronicles30:20 Uhoraho yumva isengesho rya Hezekiya
2Chronicles30:21 Nuko Abisiraheli bari baje i Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiya ashimira Abalevi bose bakoranaga umurava umurimo w'Uhoraho. Abantu bamaze iyo minsi irindwi y'ibirori batura ibitambo by'umusangiro kandi basingiza Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza.
2Chronicles30:23 Abari bateraniye aho bemeza ko bamara indi minsi irindwi bizihiza iminsi mikuru
2Chronicles30:24 Hezekiya umwami w'u Buyuda yatanze ibimasa igihumbi n'intama ibihumbi birindwi
2Chronicles30:25 Ikoraniro ryose ry'Abayuda n'abatambyi n'Abalevi
2Chronicles30:26 Nuko i Yeruzalemu bose barishima
2Chronicles30:27 Abatambyi n'Abalevi barahaguruka basabira abantu bari aho umugisha
2Chronicles31:1 Iyo minsi mikuru irangiye
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekiya ashyiraho ibyiciro by'abatambyi n'Abalevi
2Chronicles31:3 Umwami atanga mu mutungo we ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
2Chronicles31:4 Ategeka abaturage b'i Yeruzalemu gutanga ituro ry'abatambyi n'Abalevi
2Chronicles31:5 Umwami amaze gutangaza ayo mabwiriza
2Chronicles31:6 Nuko abatuye mu mijyi y'u Buyuda batanga kimwe cya cumi cy'amatungo maremare n'amagufi
2Chronicles31:7 Batangiye kurunda ibirundo by'amaturo mu kwezi kwa gatatu
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiya n'ibyegera bye baza kureba ibyo birundo
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekiya abaza abatambyi n'Abalevi ibyerekeye ibyo birundo
2Chronicles31:10 umutambyi mukuru Azariya ukomoka kuri Sadoki aramusubiza ati: “Kuva igihe batangiye kuzanira amaturo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho twarariye turahaga
2Chronicles31:11 Hezekiya abategeka gutegura ububiko mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles31:12 Bashyiramo cya kimwe cya cumi n'andi maturo yeguriwe Uhoraho
2Chronicles31:13 Yehiyeli na Azaziya
2Chronicles31:14 Kore w'Umulevi mwene Yimuna wari umurinzi w'irembo ry'iburasirazuba bw'Ingoro
2Chronicles31:15 Mu yindi mijyi ituwe n'abatambyi
2Chronicles31:16 Ab'igitsinagabo bagejeje ku myaka mirongo itatu n'abayirengeje babaruwe
2Chronicles31:17 Abatambyi bahabwaga imirimo hakurikijwe imiryango
2Chronicles31:18 Babarurirwaga hamwe n'imiryango yabo yose
2Chronicles31:19 Naho ku batambyi batuye imijyi igenewe abakomoka kuri Aroni
2Chronicles31:20 Hezekiya abigenza atyo mu Buyuda hose
2Chronicles31:21 Ibyo yakoze byose byerekeye Ingoro y'Imana no kubaha Amategeko yayo n'amabwiriza yayo
2Chronicles32:1 Hezekiya amaze kugaragariza Imana umurava
2Chronicles32:2 Hezekiya abonye ko Senakeribu yacuze umugambi wo gutera na Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles32:3 ajya inama n'ibyegera bye n'abagaba b'ingabo ngo bazibe amasōko y'amazi yari hanze y'umujyi:
2Chronicles32:4 Nuko abantu benshi barakorana baza kuziba amasōko n'akagezi kanyuraga munsi y'ubutaka
2Chronicles32:5 Hezekiya asanisha inkuta zizengurutse umurwa azubakaho iminara
2Chronicles32:6 Ashyiraho abakuru b'ingabo bo gutegeka abatuye umujyi:
2Chronicles32:7 “Nimukomere kandi mube intwari! Ntimugire ubwoba ngo mutinye umwami wa Ashūru n'igitero kiri kumwe na we
2Chronicles32:8 nyamara we afite imbaraga z'abantu
2Chronicles32:9 Nyuma y'ibyo
2Chronicles32:10 Baravuga bati: “Senakeribu umwami wa Ashūru aravuze ati: ‘Ni cyizere ki kidasanzwe mwicaranye aho i Yeruzalemu?’
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekiya ntababeshye kugira ngo abicishe inzara n'inyota
2Chronicles32:12 Ese Hezekiya si we washenye ahasengerwaga n'intambiro zaho
2Chronicles32:13 Mbese ntimuzi ibyo jye na ba sogokuruza twakoreye mu yandi amahanga yose? Ese hari imana z'amahanga zambujije gufata ibihugu byazo?
2Chronicles32:14 Ni iyihe muri izo mana zose z'amahanga yarimbuwe na ba sogokuruza
2Chronicles32:15 Nuko rero Hezekiya ntakomeza kubabeshya atyo! Ntimumwemerere kubera ko nta mana n'imwe y'ubwoko ubwo ari bwo bwose
2Chronicles32:16 Abagaragu ba Senakeribu bakomeza gutuka Uhoraho Imana n'umugaragu wayo Hezekiya.
2Chronicles32:17 Senakeribu umwami wa Ashūru
2Chronicles32:18 Intumwa za Senakeribu zirangurura ijwi mu giheburayi
2Chronicles32:19 Imana y'i Yeruzalemu bayigereranyaga n'imana z'amahanga zaremwe n'abantu.
2Chronicles32:20 Umwami Hezekiya n'umuhanuzi Ezayi mwene Amotsi
2Chronicles32:21 Nuko Uhoraho yohereza umumarayika mu rugerero rw'umwami wa Ashūru yica abasirikari n'abagaba babo
2Chronicles32:22 Uhoraho akiza atyo Hezekiya n'abatuye i Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles32:23 Abantu benshi baza i Yeruzalemu bazaniye Uhoraho amaturo
2Chronicles32:24 Muri iyo minsi Hezekiya ararwara agera hafi yo gupfa. Asaba Uhoraho aramwumva
2Chronicles32:25 Nyamara Hezekiya yabaye umwirasi ntiyitura ineza yagiriwe
2Chronicles32:26 Hezekiya n'abantu b'i Yeruzalemu bicisha bugufi
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiya yari afite ubukire bwinshi n'icyubahiro cyinshi
2Chronicles32:28 Yubakisha kandi amazu yo guhunikamo ingano na divayi n'amavuta y'iminzenze
2Chronicles32:29 Yubakishije n'imijyi kandi atunga amatungo menshi ari amaremare ari n'amagufi
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekiya ni we kandi wagomeye isōko ya Gihoni
2Chronicles32:31 Nyamara igihe abategetsi b'i Babiloni boherezaga intumwa zo kumubaza ibyerekeye ibitangaza byabaye mu gihugu cye
2Chronicles32:32 Ibindi bikorwa bya Hezekiya n'uburyo yubahaga Imana byanditswe mu gitabo cyitwa “Ibonekerwa ry'umuhanuzi Ezayi mwene Amotsi”
2Chronicles32:33 Nuko Hezekiya yisazira amahoro
2Chronicles33:1 Manase yabaye umwami afite imyaka cumi n'ibiri
2Chronicles33:2 Yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho
2Chronicles33:3 Manase asubizaho ahasengerwaga ibigirwamana se Hezekiya yari yarashenye
2Chronicles33:4 Yubatse n'intambiro z'ibigirwamana mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho i Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles33:5 Izo ntambiro yazubatse mu ngo zombi z'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles33:6 Manase yageze n'aho atamba abana be bacishwa mu muriro mu kabande ka Hinomu
2Chronicles33:7 Hanyuma Manase ashyira ikigirwamana mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles33:8 Byongeye kandi
2Chronicles33:9 Manase ayobya Abayuda
2Chronicles33:10 Uhoraho aburira Manase n'abantu be
2Chronicles33:11 Nuko Uhoraho abateza abatware b'ingabo z'umwami wa Ashūru
2Chronicles33:12 Manase ageze muri ayo makuba atakambira Uhoraho Imana ye
2Chronicles33:13 Imana yumva isengesho rye imugirira impuhwe
2Chronicles33:14 Nyuma y'ibyo
2Chronicles33:15 Avana mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho imana z'amahanga na cya kigirwamana yashyizemo
2Chronicles33:16 Asana urutambiro rw'Uhoraho arutambiraho ibitambo by'umusangiro n'iby'ishimwe
2Chronicles33:17 Bakomeje gutambira ibitambo ahasengerwaga hose
2Chronicles33:18 Ibindi bikorwa bya Manase
2Chronicles33:19 Ibyerekeye isengesho rye n'uko Imana yaryakiriye
2Chronicles33:20 Nuko Manase yisazira amahoro bamushyingura iwe mu rugo. Umuhungu we Amoni amusimbura ku ngoma.
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni yabaye umwami afite imyaka makumyabiri n'ibiri
2Chronicles33:22 Yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nka se Manase. Amoni atambira ibitambo ibigirwamana byose se Manase yari yakoresheje akabiramya.
2Chronicles33:23 Ariko Amoni ntiyicisha bugufi imbere y'Uhoraho nka se Manase
2Chronicles33:24 Hanyuma ibyegera bye byaje kumugambanira
2Chronicles33:25 Abantu bo mu Buyuda bica abagambaniye Umwami Amoni bose
2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya yabaye umwami afite imyaka umunani
2Chronicles34:2 Yakoze ibinogeye Uhoraho kandi yitwara neza nka sekuruza Umwami Dawidi nta guteshuka.
2Chronicles34:3 Mu mwaka wa munani Yosiya ari ku ngoma
2Chronicles34:4 Ategeka ko basenya intabiro za Bāli abahagarikiye
2Chronicles34:5 Atwikira amagufwa y'abatambyi ku ntambiro zabo
2Chronicles34:6 Arangije ajya mu mijyi ya Manase n'iya Efurayimu n'iya Simeyoni
2Chronicles34:7 Asenya intambiro
2Chronicles34:8 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'umunani Yosiya ari ku ngoma
2Chronicles34:9 Basanga Umutambyi mukuru Hilikiya maze bamuha ifeza zigenewe Ingoro y'Imana. Izo feza zari zakiriwe n'Abalevi barinda imiryango
2Chronicles34:10 Nuko izo feza bazishyikiriza abashinzwe imirimo yo gusana Ingoro y'Uhoraho.
2Chronicles34:11 Bityo bahemba ababaji ba za mwikorezi
2Chronicles34:12 Abantu bakoranaga umurava umurimo wabo bayobowe n'Abalevi ari bo Yahati na Obadiya bakomoka kuri Merari
2Chronicles34:13 bayoboraga abikorezi n'abandi bakozi bose
2Chronicles34:14 Igihe babikuraga amafaranga yagenewe gusana Ingoro y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles34:15 Hilikiya abwira umwanditsi Shafani ati: “Nabonye igitabo cy'Amategeko mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho.” Nuko agishyikiriza Shafani.
2Chronicles34:16 Shafani na we agishyira umwami kandi aramubwira ati: “Ibyo wategetse abagaragu bawe byose ubu barabikora:
2Chronicles34:17 amafaranga yari mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho bayashyikirije abashinzwe imirimo yo gusana.”
2Chronicles34:18 Umwanditsi Shafani yungamo ati: “Umutambyi Hilikiya yanshyikirije iki gitabo.” Nuko Shafani agisomera umwami.
2Chronicles34:19 Umwami yumvise ibivugwa mu gitabo cy'Amategeko ashishimura imyambaro ye
2Chronicles34:20 ategeka Hilikiya na Ahikamu mwene Shafani na Abudoni mwene Mika
2Chronicles34:21 “Nimugende mugishe inama Uhoraho ku bwanjye no ku bw'Abisiraheli n'Abayuda basigaye
2Chronicles34:22 Hilikiya n'izindi ntumwa z'umwami bajya ku muhanuzikazi Hulida
2Chronicles34:23 Umuhanuzikazi aherako arabasubiza ati: “Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli aravuze ngo: Nimugende mumbwirire uwabatumye muti:
2Chronicles34:24 ‘Ngiye guteza aha hantu n'abahatuye icyago gikomeye
2Chronicles34:25 Abayuda baranyimūye bosereza imibavu izindi mana
2Chronicles34:26 Naho uwo mwami w'u Buyuda wabatumye kungisha inama
2Chronicles34:27 wicisha bugufi imbere yanjye
2Chronicles34:28 Ni yo mpamvu nzakureka ukisazira neza ugashyingurwa mu mahoro
2Chronicles34:29 Umwami atumiza abakuru b'imiryango y'u Buyuda n'ab'i Yeruzalemu.
2Chronicles34:30 Nuko arazamuka ajya mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho ari kumwe n'abantu bose bo mu Buyuda n'abaturage b'i Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles34:31 Ahagarara imbere y'abaturage
2Chronicles34:32 Hanyuma yemeza Ab'i Yeruzalemu n'ab'Ababenyamini iryo Sezerano. Kuva ubwo abatuye i Yeruzalemu bakurikiza Isezerano bagiranye n'Imana ya ba sekuruza.
2Chronicles34:33 Yosiya akuraho ibizira byose byakorerwaga mu ntara zose za Isiraheli
2Chronicles35:1 Yosiya yizihiriza Uhoraho umunsi mukuru wa Pasika i Yeruzalemu
2Chronicles35:2 Yosiya ashyira abatambyi ku mirimo yabo
2Chronicles35:3 Abwira abo Balevi bashinzwe kwigisha Abisiraheli bose
2Chronicles35:4 Nimwishyire hamwe mukurikije imiryango yanyu n'imirimo yanyu
2Chronicles35:5 Abalevi bahagarare mu Ngoro bakurikije imiryango ya ba sekuruza
2Chronicles35:6 Mwihumanure maze mutambe umwana w'intama wa Pasika
2Chronicles35:7 Yosiya aha abantu bose bari bahari abana b'intama n'ab'ihene bo mu mikumbi ye
2Chronicles35:8 Ibyegera bye na byo bitanga amatungo bititangiriye itama
2Chronicles35:9 Abayobozi b'Abalevi ari bo Konaniya n'abavandimwe be
2Chronicles35:10 Dore uko bateguye Pasika: abatambyi bahagaze mu myanya yabo
2Chronicles35:11 Nuko batamba abana b'intama ba Pasika
2Chronicles35:12 Bashyira ku ruhande ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro kugira ngo babigabanye bakurikije amatsinda y'imiryango ya rubanda
2Chronicles35:13 Botsa intama ya Pasika ku muriro nk'uko byemejwe
2Chronicles35:14 Hanyuma bitegurira ibyokurya byabo bwite n'iby'abatambyi
2Chronicles35:15 Abaririmbyi bakomoka kuri Asafu baguma mu myanya yabo bakurikije itegeko rya Dawidi
2Chronicles35:16 Mu birori by'uwo munsi byateguriwe Uhoraho byo kwizihiza Pasika
2Chronicles35:17 Icyo gihe cya Pasika
2Chronicles35:18 Koko rero kuva igihe cy'umuhanuzi Samweli
2Chronicles35:19 Iyo Pasika bayizihije mu mwaka wa cumi n'umunani Yosiya ari ku ngoma.
2Chronicles35:20 Nyuma y'ibyo

2Chronicles35:23 Abarwanisha imiheto barasa Umwami Yosiya
2Chronicles35:24 Abagaragu be bamukura mu igare ry'intambara bamushyira mu rindi
2Chronicles35:25 Umuhanuzi Yeremiya ahimbira Yosiya indirimbo y'amaganya
2Chronicles35:26 Ibindi bikorwa bya Yosiya n'ibyiza yakoze akurikije ibyanditswe mu Mategeko y'Uhoraho

2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloni aramutera
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadinezari asahura bimwe mu bikoresho byo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho arabijyana
2Chronicles36:8 Ibindi bikorwa bya Yoyakimu n'ibizira yakoze
2Chronicles36:9 Yoyakini yabaye umwami afite imyaka umunani
2Chronicles36:10 Umwaka ujya kurangira

2Chronicles36:13 Yasuzuguye Umwami Nebukadinezari wari wamurahije Imana

2Chronicles36:15 Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza yahoraga ibaburira ibinyujije ku ntumwa
2Chronicles36:16 Nyamara izo ntumwa z'Imana barazisuzugura ntibita ku butumwa bwazo
2Chronicles36:17 Nuko Uhoraho abateza umwami w'Abanyababiloniya
2Chronicles36:18 Ibikoresho byose ari ibito ari ibinini byo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
2Chronicles36:19 Nuko Abanyababiloniya batwika Ingoro y'Imana
