2Chronicles36:21 Bityo ijambo ry'Uhoraho ryavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Yeremiya rirashyika ari ryo iri “Igihugu kizaba umusaka imyaka mirongo irindwi
2Chronicles36:22 Mu mwaka wa mbere Sirusi umwami w'u Buperesi amaze kwigarurira Babiloniya
2Chronicles36:23 “Uku ni ko umwami w'u Buperesi avuze ati: ‘Uhoraho Imana Nyir'ijuru yampaye ububasha bwo kwigarurira ibihugu byose by'abami bo ku isi
Ezra1:1 Mu mwaka wa mbere Sirusi umwami w'u Buperesi amaze kwigarurira Babiloniya
Ezra1:2 “Uku ni ko Sirusi umwami w'u Buperesi avuze ati: ‘Uhoraho Imana nyir'ijuru yampaye ububasha bwo kwigarurira ibihugu byose by'abami bo ku isi
Ezra1:3 Nuko rero umuntu wese wo mu bwoko bw'iyo Mana nimuhe umugisha asubire mu Buyuda
Ezra1:4 Abantu bose batuye ahantu hose hari Abayahudi bacitse ku icumu
Ezra1:5 Nuko abatware b'amazu y'umuryango wa Yuda
Ezra1:6 Abaturanyi babo bose babatera inkunga
Ezra1:7 Nuko Umwami Sirusi ahamagaza ibikoresho byo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
Ezra1:8 Ibyo bikoresho Sirusi umwami w'u Buperesi yabitumye umucungamari Mitiredati
Ezra1:9 Dore ibyo yamubaruriye: amasahane mirongo itatu akozwe mu izahabu
Ezra1:10 n'amabesani mirongo itatu akozwe mu izahabu
Ezra1:11 Ibikoresho byose byari ibihumbi bitanu na magana ane bikozwe mu ifeza no mu izahabu. Sheshibasari abitahukana byose ubwo abajyanywe ho iminyago bavaga muri Babiloniya bagiye i Yeruzalemu.
Ezra2:1 Dore Abayahudi bo mu mazu Umwami Nebukadinezari wa Babiloniya yari yarajyanye ho iminyago. Baje mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda no mu murwa wacyo wa Yeruzalemu bavuye muri Babiloniya
Ezra2:2 Baje bayobowe na Zerubabeli na Yeshuwa na Nehemiya
Ezra2:3 Abakomokaga kuri Paroshi bari ibihumbi bibiri n'ijana na mirongo irindwi na babiri.
Ezra2:4 Abakomokaga kuri Shefatiya bari magana atatu na mirongo irindwi na babiri.
Ezra2:5 Abakomokaga kuri Ara bari magana arindwi na mirongo irindwi na batanu.
Ezra2:6 Abakomokaga kuri Pahati-Mowabu
Ezra2:7 Abakomokaga kuri Elamu bari igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo itanu na bane.
Ezra2:8 Abakomokaga kuri Zatu bari magana cyenda na mirongo ine na batanu.
Ezra2:9 Abakomokaga kuri Zakayi bari magana arindwi na mirongo itandatu.
Ezra2:10 Abakomokaga kuri Bani bari magana atandatu na mirongo ine na babiri.
Ezra2:11 Abakomokaga kuri Bebayi bari magana atandatu na makumyabiri na batatu.
Ezra2:12 Abakomokaga kuri Azigadi bari igihumbi na magana abiri na makumyabiri na babiri.
Ezra2:13 Abakomokaga kuri Adonikamu bari magana atandatu na mirongo itandatu na batandatu.
Ezra2:14 Abakomokaga kuri Bigivayi bari ibihumbi bibiri na mirongo itanu na batandatu.
Ezra2:15 Abakomokaga kuri Adini bari magana ane na mirongo itanu na bane.
Ezra2:16 Abakomokaga kuri Ateri
Ezra2:17 Abakomokaga kuri Besayi bari magana atatu na makumyabiri na batatu.
Ezra2:18 Abakomokaga kuri Yora bari ijana na cumi na babiri.
Ezra2:19 Abakomokaga kuri Hashumu bari magana abiri na makumyabiri na batatu.
Ezra2:20 Abakomokaga kuri Gibari bari mirongo cyenda na batanu.
Ezra2:21 Abantu bakomokaga mu mujyi wa Betelehemu bari ijana na makumyabiri na batatu.
Ezra2:22 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Netofa bari mirongo itanu na batandatu.
Ezra2:23 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Anatoti bari ijana na makumyabiri n'umunani.
Ezra2:24 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Azimaveti bari mirongo ine na babiri.
Ezra2:25 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Kiriyatiyeyarimu n'uwa Kefira n'uwa Bēroti bari magana arindwi na mirongo ine na batatu.
Ezra2:26 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Rama n'uwa Geba bari magana atandatu na makumyabiri n'umwe.
Ezra2:27 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Mikimasi bari ijana na makumyabiri na babiri.
Ezra2:28 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Beteli n'uwa Ayi bari magana abiri na makumyabiri na batatu.
Ezra2:29 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Nebo bari mirongo itanu na babiri.
Ezra2:30 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Magibishi bari ijana na mirongo itanu na batandatu.
Ezra2:31 Abakomokaga kuri Elamu wundi bari igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo itanu na bane.
Ezra2:32 Abakomokaga kuri Harimu bari magana atatu na makumyabiri.
Ezra2:33 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Lodi n'uwa Hadidi n'uwa Ono bari magana arindwi na makumyabiri na batanu.
Ezra2:34 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Yeriko bari magana atatu na mirongo ine na batanu.
Ezra2:35 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Senaya bari ibihumbi bitatu na magana atandatu na mirongo itatu.
Ezra2:36 Itsinda ry'abatambyi: abakomokaga kuri Yedaya ukomoka kuri Yoshuwa bari magana cyenda na mirongo irindwi na batatu.
Ezra2:37 Abakomokaga kuri Imeri bari igihumbi na mirongo itanu na babiri.
Ezra2:38 Abakomokaga kuri Pashehuri bari igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo ine na barindwi.
Ezra2:39 Abakomokaga kuri Harimu bari igihumbi n'ijana na cumi na barindwi.
Ezra2:40 Itsinda ry'Abalevi: abakomokaga kuri Yoshuwa na Kadimiyeli
Ezra2:41 Itsinda ry'abaririmbyi bo mu Ngoro y'Imana: abakomokaga kuri Asafu bari ijana na makumyabiri n'umunani.
Ezra2:42 Itsinda ry'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana ryari rigizwe n'abakomokaga kuri Shalumu no kuri Ateri
Ezra2:43 Itsinda ry'abakozi bo mu Ngoro y'Imana ryari rigizwe n'abakomokaga kuri Sīha no kuri Hasufa no kuri Tabawoti
Ezra2:44 no kuri Kerosi no kuri Siyaha no kuri Padoni
Ezra2:45 no kuri Lebana no kuri Hagaba no kuri Akubu
Ezra2:46 no kuri Hagabu no kuri Shalimayi no kuri Hanani
Ezra2:47 no kuri Gideli no kuri Gahari no kuri Reyaya
Ezra2:48 no kuri Resini no kuri Nekoda no kuri Gazamu
Ezra2:49 no kuri Uza no kuri Paseya no kuri Besayi
Ezra2:50 no kuri Asina no kuri Meyunimu no kuri Nefusimu
Ezra2:51 no kuri Bakibuki no kuri Hakufa no kuri Harihuri
Ezra2:52 no kuri Basiluti no kuri Mehida no kuri Harisha
Ezra2:53 no kuri Barikosi no kuri Sisera no kuri Tema
Ezra2:54 no kuri Nesiya no kuri Hatifa.
Ezra2:55 Itsinda ry'abakomokaga ku bagaragu ba Salomo ryari rigizwe n'abakomokaga kuri Sotayi
Ezra2:56 no kuri Yāla no kuri Darikoni no kuri Gideli
Ezra2:57 no kuri Shefatiya no kuri Hatili
Ezra2:58 Abo mu itsinda ry'abakozi bo mu Ngoro y'Imana hamwe n'abo mu itsinda ry'abakomokaga ku bagaragu ba Salomo
Ezra2:59 Kandi hari abantu batahutse bavuye i Telimela n'i Teliharisha n'i Kerubu no muri Adani no muri Imeri
Ezra2:60 Abo bantu bakomokaga kuri Delaya no kuri Tobiya no kuri Nekoda
Ezra2:61 Hari n'abatambyi bagize ingorane nk'izo. Abo ni abakomokaga kuri Hobaya no kuri Hakosi no kuri Barizilayi (uwo yitiriwe sebukwe kuko yari yarashatse umukobwa wa Barizilayi w'i Gileyadi).
Ezra2:62 Bashatse ibisekuruza byabo mu bitabo by'ibarura ariko ntibabibona
Ezra2:63 Nuko umutegetsi w'u Buyuda ababuza kurya ibyokurya byavanywe ku bitambo byatuwe Imana
Ezra2:64 Umubare w'abatahutse bose bavuye muri Babiloniya
Ezra2:65 Bari kumwe n'abagaragu n'abaja ibihumbi birindwi na magana atatu na mirongo itatu na barindwi
Ezra2:66 Bari bafite amafarasi magana arindwi na mirongo itatu n'atandatu
Ezra2:67 n'ingamiya magana ane na mirongo itatu n'eshanu
Ezra2:68 Bamwe mu batware b'amazu bageze i Yeruzalemu umurwa w'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
Ezra2:69 Batanze bakurikije amikoro yabo
Ezra2:70 Nuko abatambyi n'Abalevi na bamwe bo muri rubanda
Ezra3:1 Ukwezi kwa karindwi kwageze Abisiraheli bose baramaze gutura mu mijyi gakondo yabo
Ezra3:2 Nuko bakurikije ibyanditse mu Mategeko ya Musa wa muntu w'Imana
Ezra3:3 Nubwo abanyamahanga bari baratujwe mu gihugu babashyiragaho iterabwoba
Ezra3:4 Hanyuma y'ibyo
Ezra3:5 Uhereye uwo munsi bakajya batamba ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro bya buri munsi
Ezra3:6 Kuva ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa karindwi
Ezra3:7 Abisiraheli bahemba ifeza abafundi babāzaga amabuye
Ezra3:8 Nuko mu kwezi kwa kabiri k'umwaka wakurikiye uwo bagarukiye i Yeruzalemu ahari Ingoro y'Imana
Ezra3:9 Abalevi ari bo Yoshuwa n'abahungu be n'abavandimwe be
Ezra3:10 Ubwo abubatsi bashyiragaho urufatiro rw'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
Ezra3:11 Nuko bikiranya basingiza Uhoraho kandi bamushimira bagira bati: “Uhoraho agira neza
Ezra3:12 Ariko abatambyi n'Abalevi n'abatware b'amazu bageze mu zabukuru bari bazi Ingoro ya mbere y'Imana
Ezra3:13 ku buryo nta muntu wabashaga gutandukanya urusaku rw'abari bishimye n'imiborogo y'abariraga. Abantu barangururaga amajwi urusaku rukumvikanira kure.
Ezra4:1 Abanzi b'Abayuda n'ab'Ababenyamini bamenya ko abari barajyanywe ho iminyago batahutse
Ezra4:2 Nuko basanga Zerubabeli n'abatware b'amazu barababwira bati: “Nimureke tubafashe kubaka iyi Ngoro. Imana musenga ni yo natwe dusenga
Ezra4:3 Zerubabeli na Yeshuwa n'abandi batware b'amazu y'Abisiraheli barabasubiza bati: “Nta cyo duhuriyeho cyatuma dufatanya kubaka Ingoro y'Imana yacu. Twebwe ubwacu dukurikije itegeko twahawe na Sirusi umwami w'u Buperesi
Ezra4:4 Nuko abanyamahanga bari baratujwe mu gihugu
Ezra4:5 Bagurira abajyanama b'ibwami kugira ngo badindize imishinga y'Abayahudi. Biba bityo uhereye ku ngoma ya Sirusi ukageza ku ya Dariyusi
Ezra4:6 Umwami Ahashuwerusi akigera ku ngoma
Ezra4:7 Byongeye kandi ku ngoma ya Aritazeruzi umwami w'u Buperesi
Ezra4:8 Nuko umutegetsi Rehumu wari uhagarariye umwami
Ezra4:9 “Jyewe umutegetsi Rehumu uhagarariye umwami
Ezra4:10 n'abandi baturage nyir'icyubahiro Umwami Asinapari yimuye akabatuza mu mujyi wa Samariya
Ezra4:11 Dore ibyari bikubiye muri urwo rwandiko bandikiye umwami Aritazeruzi: “Nyagasani
Ezra4:12 “Turakumenyesha ko ba Bayahudi bavuye aho bageze ino i Yeruzalemu
Ezra4:13 Nyagasani
Ezra4:14 None rero kubera ko ari wowe udutunze tukagukorera
Ezra4:15 kugira ngo bashakashake mu bitabo by'amateka by'abami bakubanjirije. Muri ibyo bitabo uzasanga ko abaturage b'uyu mujyi ari ibyigomeke
Ezra4:16 Bityo rero tukaba tukumenyesheje mbere y'igihe
Ezra4:17 Nuko umwami arabandikira abasubiza ati: “Ku mutegetsi Rehumu uhagarariye umwami
Ezra4:18 “Urwandiko mwanyoherereje barusobanuye mu rurimi rwanjye kavukire bararunsomera.
Ezra4:19 Nategetse ko bashakashaka mu bitabo by'amateka
Ezra4:20 Kera abami b'ibihangange babaga muri uwo mujyi wa Yeruzalemu bari barigaruriye ibihugu byose by'iburengerazuba bw'uruzi rwa Efurati
Ezra4:21 None rero nimutegeke abo Bayahudi bahagarike ibikorwa byabo
Ezra4:22 Nimwihutire gukemura icyo kibazo kugira ngo cye gukomeza kubangamira inyungu z'ibwami.”
Ezra4:23 Nuko Rehumu na Shimushayi umunyamabanga umwungirije hamwe na bagenzi babo
Ezra4:24 Uhereye ubwo imirimo y'ubwubatsi bw'Ingoro y'Imana i Yeruzalemu irahagarara
Ezra5:1 Muri icyo gihe umuhanuzi Hagayi n'umuhanuzi Zakariya ukomoka kuri Ido
Ezra5:2 Nuko Zerubabeli mwene Salatiyeli
Ezra5:3 Muri icyo gihe Tatenayi umutegetsi w'ibihugu bikomatanyije by'iburengerazuba bwa Efurati
Ezra5:4 Nimutubwire amazina y'abantu barimo bubaka kuri iyi nzu.”
Ezra5:5 Ariko Imana ikomeza kurinda abakuru b'Abayahudi
Ezra5:6 Tatenayi umutegetsi w'ibihugu bikomatanyije by'iburengerazuba bwa Efurati
Ezra5:7 Dore ibyari bikubiye muri urwo rwandiko: “Nyagasani Mwami Dariyusi
Ezra5:8 “Nyagasani
Ezra5:9 Nuko tubaza abakuru babo tuti: ‘Ni nde wabahaye uburenganzira bwo kubaka iyi Ngoro no kuzamura inkuta zayo?’
Ezra5:10 Byongeye kandi twababajije amazina yabo
Ezra5:11 Dore uko badusubije: “Twebwe turi abagaragu b'Imana nyir'ijuru n'isi
Ezra5:12 Icyakora kubera ko ba sogokuruza barakaje Imana nyir'ijuru
Ezra5:13 Ariko mu mwaka wa mbere wo ku ngoma ya Sirusi umwami wa Babiloniya
Ezra5:14 Yategetse no gusubizayo ibikoresho by'izahabu n'ifeza byakoreshwaga mu Ngoro y'Imana i Yeruzalemu. Nebukadinezari yari yarabinyaze abijyana i Babiloni mu ngoro ye
Ezra5:15 Umwami Sirusi aramubwira ati: ‘Jyana ibi bikoresho i Yeruzalemu
Ezra5:16 Nuko Sheshibasari aza i Yeruzalemu maze ashyiraho urufatiro rw'Ingoro y'Imana. Uhereye icyo gihe ukageza n'ubu iracyubakwa
Ezra5:17 “Nuko rero Nyagasani
Ezra6:1 Nuko Umwami Dariyusi ategeka ko bashakashaka mu bitabo by'amateka byari i Babiloni mu nzu yabikwagamo ibintu by'ingirakamaro.
Ezra6:2 Nyamara mu kigo ntamenwa cya Ekibatana mu gihugu cy'u Bumedi
Ezra6:3 “Mu mwaka wa mbere Umwami Sirusi ari ku ngoma
Ezra6:4 Bazubake impushya eshatu z'amabuye manini
Ezra6:5 Bagomba kandi gusubiza mu Ngoro y'Imana ibikoresho by'izahabu n'ifeza byakoreshwaga muri yo
Ezra6:6 Maze Umwami Dariyusi asubiza Tatenayi ati: “Kuri Tatenayi
Ezra6:7 nimureke imirimo y'ubwubatsi bw'Ingoro y'Imana ikomeze. Umutegetsi w'Abayahudi n'abakuru babo nibayubake aho indi yahoze.
Ezra6:8 Ntegetse kandi ko mwunganira abakuru b'Abayahudi muri uwo mushinga wo kubaka iyo Ngoro y'Imana. Ibyo umushinga uzatwara bizavanwe mu mutungo w'umwami
Ezra6:9 Ntihakagire ikibabuza guha abatambyi b'i Yeruzalemu ibyo bazajya babasaba buri munsi
Ezra6:10 Bityo bazabashe gutura Imana nyir'ijuru ibitambo bifite impumuro nziza
Ezra6:11 Nihagira kandi uzaca kuri iri tegeko nciye iteka: bazarandure inkingi mu nzu ye bayishinge maze bayimuturubikemo
Ezra6:12 Imana yahisemo Yeruzalemu ikaba iyiganjemo
Ezra6:13 Nuko Tatenayi umutegetsi w'ibihugu bikomatanyije by'iburengerazuba bwa Efurati
Ezra6:14 Abakuru b'Abayahudi batewe inkunga n'ubutumwa bwa Hagayi n'ubw'umuhanuzi Zakariya ukomoka kuri Ido
Ezra6:15 Iyo Ngoro yuzuye ku itariki ya gatatu y'ukwezi kwa Adari
Ezra6:16 Nuko Abisiraheli bose
Ezra6:17 Ku munsi w'itahwa ry'iyo Ngoro hatambwe ibimasa ijana
Ezra6:18 Bashyira kandi abatambyi mu byiciro byabo
Ezra6:19 Abatahutse bavuye muri Babiloniya
Ezra6:20 Abatambyi n'Abalevi bishyira hamwe bakora umuhango wo kwihumanura bose barabonera
Ezra6:21 Nuko Abisiraheli bose barya intama za Pasika
Ezra6:22 Maze bizihiza ibirori by'iminsi mikuru irindwi y'imigati idasembuye bafite ibyishimo. Koko rero Uhoraho yatumye bishima kuko yahinduye imigambi y'umwami wa Ashūru
Ezra7:1 Hashize igihe kirekire
Ezra7:2 wa Shalumu wa Sadoki wa Ahitubu
Ezra7:3 wa Amariya wa Azariya wa Merayoti
Ezra7:4 wa Zerahiya wa Uzi wa Buki
Ezra7:5 wa Abishuwa wa Finehasi wa Eleyazari wa Aroni Umutambyi mukuru. Yari umwigishamategeko wazobereye mu by'Amategeko Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli yahaye Musa.
Ezra7:6 Ezira ava i Babiloni ajya i Yeruzalemu. Kubera ko yari arinzwe n'Uhoraho Imana ye
Ezra7:7 Nuko bamwe mu Bisiraheli barimo abatambyi n'Abalevi n'abaririmbyi
Ezra7:8 Mu kwezi kwa gatanu k'uwo mwaka ni bwo Ezira yageranye na bo i Yeruzalemu.
Ezra7:9 Yari yarahagurutse i Babiloni ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa mbere
Ezra7:10 Koko rero Ezira yari yariyeguriye kwiga no gukurikiza Amategeko y'Uhoraho
Ezra7:11 Dore ibyari bikubiye mu rwandiko Umwami Aritazeruzi yandikiye Ezira umutambyi n'umwigishamategeko
Ezra7:12 “Kuri Ezira umutambyi n'umwigishamategeko y'Imana nyir'ijuru. Jyewe Aritazeruzi umwami
Ezra7:13 “Nciye iteka ko Abisiraheli bose bari mu bihugu by'ubwami bwanjye bashaka kujya i Yeruzalemu
Ezra7:14 Jyewe ubwanjye mfatanyije n'abajyanama banjye barindwi
Ezra7:15 Uzajyane kandi ifeza n'izahabu
Ezra7:16 Uzajyane n'ifeza yose n'izahabu yose uzaherwa muri Babiloniya
Ezra7:17 Uzagire umwete wo gukoresha ayo maturo. Uzayaguremo ibimasa n'amasekurume y'intama n'abana b'intama
Ezra7:18 Ifeza n'izahabu bisagutse
Ezra7:19 Byongeye kandi ibikoresho uzahabwa byo gukoresha mu mihango y'Ingoro y'Imana
Ezra7:20 Nubona hari ikindi kintu gikwiye gukorwa ku Ngoro y'Imana yawe uzagikore
Ezra7:21 “Nuko rero jyewe Umwami Aritazeruzi
Ezra7:22 Bazamuhe ibiro by'ifeza bitarenga ibihumbi bitatu
Ezra7:23 Icyo Imana nyir'ijuru yategetse cyose ko gikorwa ku Ngoro yayo
Ezra7:24 Menyesheje kandi abacungamari bose ko amahōro n'imisoro n'amakoro
Ezra7:25 “Naho wowe Ezira
Ezra7:26 Nihagira umuntu utitabīra gukurikiza Amategeko y'Imana yawe
Ezra7:27 Nuko jyewe Ezira ndavuga nti: “Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza nisingizwe
Ezra7:28 Imana ishimwe kandi yo yampesheje umugisha ku mwami
Ezra8:1 Aya ni yo mazina y'abatware b'amazu y'Abisiraheli babaruranywe n'abantu twatahukanye tuva muri Babiloniya
Ezra8:2 Umutware w'inzu ya Finehasi yari Gerushomu
Ezra8:3 wakomokaga kuri Shekaniya. Umutware w'inzu ya Paroshi yari Zakariya
Ezra8:4 Umutware w'inzu ya Pahati-Mowabu yari Elihowenayi
Ezra8:5 Umutware w'inzu ya Zatu yari Shekaniya mwene Yahaziyeli
Ezra8:6 Umutware w'inzu ya Adini yari Ebedi mwene Yonatani
Ezra8:7 Umutware w'inzu ya Elamu yari Yeshaya mwene Ataliya
Ezra8:8 Umutware w'inzu ya Shefatiya yari Zebadiya mwene Mikayeli
Ezra8:9 Umutware w'inzu ya Yowabu yari Obadiya mwene Yehiyeli
Ezra8:10 Umutware w'inzu ya Bani yari Shelomiti mwene Yosifiya
Ezra8:11 Umutware w'inzu ya Bebayi yari Zakariya mwene Bebayi
Ezra8:12 Umutware w'inzu ya Azigadi yari Yohanani mwene Hakatani
Ezra8:13 Haherutse abatware b'inzu ya Adonikamu ari bo aba: Elifeleti na Yeyiyeli na Shemaya bari kumwe n'abagabo mirongo itandatu
Ezra8:14 hamwe n'abatware b'inzu ya Bigivayi ari bo aba: Utayi na Zabudi bari kumwe n'abagabo mirongo irindwi
Ezra8:15 Abo bantu mbakoranyiriza ku muyoboro w'amazi ugana mu mujyi wa Ahava
Ezra8:16 Ntumiza bamwe mu batware ari bo aba: Eliyezeri na Ariyeli na Shemaya
Ezra8:17 Nuko mbatuma kuri Ido umutegetsi mukuru w'umujyi wa Kasifiya
Ezra8:18 Kubera ko Imana yacu yari iturinze
Ezra8:19 Batwoherereje na Hashabiya ari kumwe na Yeshaya wo mu nzu ya Merari
Ezra8:20 Batwoherereje kandi abakozi magana abiri na makumyabiri batoranyijwe mu rwego rw'abakozi babavuze mu mazina. Urwo rwego rwari rwarashyizweho na Dawidi afatanyije n'ibyegera bye
Ezra8:21 Tukiri kuri uwo muyoboro wa Ahava ntangaza ko twigomwa kurya
Ezra8:22 Nari gukorwa n'isoni iyo nsaba umwami umutwe w'abasirikare n'uw'abarwanira ku mafarasi bo kuturinda ababisha badutegera mu nzira. Koko rero twari twabwiye umwami ko Imana yacu irinda abayiringira bose
Ezra8:23 Nuko twigomwa kurya kandi dusaba Imana yacu kuturinda
Ezra8:24 Hanyuma ntoranya abakuru cumi na babiri bo mu batambyi
Ezra8:25 Mbapimira ifeza n'izahabu n'ibikoresho byatanzwe n'umwami n'abajyanama be n'ibyegera bye
Ezra8:26 Nuko mbaha ibiro by'ifeza bigeze ku bihumbi makumyabiri
Ezra8:27 Mbaha kandi n'amabesani makumyabiri y'izahabu afite ibiro bigeze ku umunani n'igice
Ezra8:28 Ndababwira nti: “Mwebwe ubwanyu mweguriwe Uhoraho kimwe n'ibi bikoresho. Iyi feza n'izahabu ni amaturo y'ubushake yatuwe Uhoraho Imana ya ba sokuruza.
Ezra8:29 Muzabirinde maze mubisohoze i Yeruzalemu amahoro. Nimugerayo muzabipimire mu byumba by'ububiko bw'Ingoro y'Imana
Ezra8:30 Nuko abatambyi n'Abalevi bakira ifeza n'izahabu n'ibindi bikoresho nari nabapimiye
Ezra8:31 Ku itariki ya cumi n'ebyiri z'ukwezi kwa mbere
Ezra8:32 Nuko tugeze i Yeruzalemu turuhuka iminsi itatu.
Ezra8:33 Ku munsi wa kane tujya mu Ngoro y'Imana yacu
Ezra8:34 Ibintu byose birabarurwa kandi birapimurwa ntihagira ikibura
Ezra8:35 Nuko abatahutse bavuye aho bari barajyanywe ho iminyago
Ezra8:36 Hanyuma ya mategekoteka umwami yashyizeho bayashyikiriza abategetsi b'ibihugu bikomatanyije
Ezra9:1 Ibyo birangiye
Ezra9:2 Bashatse kandi abageni b'abanyamahanga ndetse babashakira n'abahungu babo
Ezra9:3 Nuko numvise ibyo nshishimura ikanzu yanjye n'umwitero wanjye
Ezra9:4 Nkomeza kwicara aho mfite agahinda kugeza ku isaha yo gutura igitambo cya nimugoroba. Nuko abakurikiza amabwiriza y'Imana ya Isiraheli
Ezra9:5 Isaha yo gutura igitambo cya nimugoroba igeze
Ezra9:6 maze nsenga ngira nti: “Ayii
Ezra9:7 Uhereye mu gihe cya ba sogokuruza kugeza n'uyu munsi
Ezra9:8 Ariko noneho Uhoraho Mana yacu
Ezra9:9 Ni koko Mana yacu
Ezra9:10 “None rero Mana yacu
Ezra9:11 waduhaye uyanyujije ku bagaragu bawe b'abahanuzi
Ezra9:12 Nuko rero abakobwa banyu ntimukabashyingire abahungu babo
Ezra9:13 Koko rero Mana yacu
Ezra9:14 None se twongere turenge ku mabwiriza yawe
Ezra9:15 Uhoraho Mana ya Isiraheli
Ezra10:1 Nuko Ezira akiri imbere y'Ingoro y'Imana apfukamye asenga
Ezra10:2 Nuko Shekaniya mwene Yehiyeli wo mu nzu ya Elamu abwira Ezira ati: “Twacumuye ku Mana yacu
Ezra10:3 Ubu nimuze tugirane amasezerano n'Imana yacu
Ezra10:4 None haguruka iki kibazo ni wowe kireba
Ezra10:5 Nuko Ezira arahaguruka arahiza abakuru b'abatambyi n'ab'Abalevi n'ab'Abisiraheli bose
Ezra10:6 Ezira ava aho yari ari imbere y'Ingoro y'Imana
Ezra10:7 Nuko itangazo ryamamazwa mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda no mu murwa wacyo wa Yeruzalemu
Ezra10:8 Ryavugaga kandi ko umuntu wese uzaba ataragera i Yeruzalemu nyuma y'iminsi itatu ritanzwe
Ezra10:9 Nyuma y'iminsi itatu
Ezra10:10 Umutambyi Ezira arahaguruka arababwira
Ezra10:11 None rero nimwihane ibyaha byanyu imbere y'Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza
Ezra10:12 Nuko abari bateraniye aho bose bavuga baranguruye bati: “Ibyo uvuze ni ukuri tuzabikora.
Ezra10:13 Icyakora turi benshi kandi ni igihe cy'imvura
Ezra10:14 Abatware bacu nibabe ari bo baduhagararira. Abaturage bose ba buri mujyi bashatse abanyamahangakazi bajye bitaba ku matariki bazahamagarwaho
Ezra10:15 Yonatani mwene Asaheli na Yahazeya mwene Tikuva
Ezra10:16 Abatahutse bavuye aho bari barajyanywe ho iminyago bemera iyo nama
Ezra10:17 Naho ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa mbere
Ezra10:18 Mu batambyi
Ezra10:19 Nuko basezerana gusezerera abagore babo
Ezra10:20 Mu bakomokaga kuri Imeri ni Hanani na Zebadiya.
Ezra10:21 Mu bakomokaga kuri Harimu ni Māseya na Eliya na Shemaya
Ezra10:22 Mu bakomokaga kuri Pashehuri ni Eliyowenayi na Māseya na Ishimayeli
Ezra10:23 Mu Balevi
Ezra10:24 Mu baririmbyi ni Eliyashibu. Mu barinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana ni Shalumu na Telemu na Uri.
Ezra10:25 Muri rubanda rw'Abisiraheli
Ezra10:26 Mu bakomokaga kuri Elamu ni Mataniya na Zakariya na Yehiyeli
Ezra10:27 Mu bakomokaga kuri Zatu ni Eliyowenayi na Eliyashibu na Mataniya
Ezra10:28 Mu bakomokaga kuri Bebayi ni Yehohanani na Hananiya
Ezra10:29 Mu bakomokaga kuri Bani ni Meshulamu na Maluki na Adaya
Ezra10:30 Mu bakomokaga kuri Pahati-Mowabu ni Adina na Kelali
Ezra10:31 Mu bakomokaga kuri Harimu ni Eliyezeri na Ishiya
Ezra10:32 na Benyamini na Maluki na Shemariya.
Ezra10:33 Mu bakomokaga kuri Hashumu ni Matenayi na Matata
Ezra10:34 Mu bakomokaga kuri Bani ni Madayi na Amuramu na Uweli
Ezra10:35 na Benaya na Bedeya na Keluhi
Ezra10:36 na Vaniya na Meremoti na Eliyashibu
Ezra10:37 na Mataniya na Matenayi na Yāsayi
Ezra10:38 na Bani na Binuwi na Shimeyi
Ezra10:39 na Shelemiya na Natani na Adaya
Ezra10:40 na Makinadebayi na Shashayi na Sharayi
Ezra10:41 na Azarēli na Shelemiya na Shemariya
Ezra10:42 na Shalumu na Amariya na Yozefu.
Ezra10:43 Mu bakomokaga kuri Nebo ni Yeyiyeli na Matitiya
Ezra10:44 Abo bagabo bose bari barashatse abanyamahangakazi
Nehemiah1:1 Ibyo Nehemiya mwene Hakaliya yakoze. Mu kwezi kwa Kisilevu mu mwaka wa makumyabiri Umwami Aritazeruzi ari ku ngoma
Nehemiah1:2 Nuko umuvandimwe wanjye Hanani aza i Shushani aturutse mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda
Nehemiah1:3 Barambwira bati: “Iryo tsinda ry'abatahutse bagize amakuba menshi ndetse bahinduka insuzugurwa. Naho ibyerekeye Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah1:4 Maze kumva ibyo nicara hasi ndarira
Nehemiah1:5 ngira nti: “Ayii
Nehemiah1:6 Ndakwinginze undebe jyewe umugaragu wawe
Nehemiah1:7 twagucumuyeho bikabije. Twanze gukurikiza amabwiriza n'amateka n'ibyemezo wahaye Musa umugaragu wawe.
Nehemiah1:8 Ariko wibuke amabwiriza wahaye umugaragu wawe Musa ugira uti: ‘Nimumpemukira nzabatatanyiriza mu mahanga.
Nehemiah1:9 Ariko nimungarukira mugakurikiza amabwiriza yanjye
Nehemiah1:10 Abo bantu ni twebwe abagaragu bawe wacunguje imbaraga zawe nyinshi n'ubushobozi bwawe bwinshi.
Nehemiah1:11 Ayii Nyagasani
Nehemiah2:1 Umunsi umwe mu kwezi kwa Nisani mu mwaka wa makumyabiri Umwami Aritazeruzi ari ku ngoma
Nehemiah2:2 Nuko umwami arambaza ati: “Ko utarwaye ni iki kikubabaje? Ugomba kuba ufite ikigushengura umutima.” Nuko numva mfite ubwoba cyane.
Nehemiah2:3 Mbwira umwami nti: “Nyagasani
Nehemiah2:4 Nuko umwami arambaza ati: “Urifuza ko nagukorera iki?” Ako kanya nsenga Imana nyir'ijuru
Nehemiah2:5 maze nsubiza umwami nti: “Nyagasani
Nehemiah2:6 Umwami yari yicaranye n'umwamikazi maze arambaza ati: “Urugendo rwawe ruzamara igihe kingana iki
Nehemiah2:7 Nuko ndongera mbwira umwami nti: “Nyagasani niba bikunogeye
Nehemiah2:8 Umpeshe n'urwandiko rwo gushyīra Asafu umurinzi w'ishyamba ry'umwami
Nehemiah2:9 Umwami ampa bamwe mu bakuru b'ingabo
Nehemiah2:10 Umunyahoroni Sanibalati na Tobiya umutware wo mu Bamoni bamenye ko naje
Nehemiah2:11 Nuko ngera i Yeruzalemu marayo iminsi itatu.
Nehemiah2:12 Ariko nta muntu n'umwe nari nigeze mbwira imigambi Imana yanjye yari yanshyizemo
Nehemiah2:13 Nijoro nsohokera mu Irembo ry'Igikombe
Nehemiah2:14 Nuko nkomeza kugenda nerekeye ku Irembo ry'Iriba no ku kizenga cy'umwami
Nehemiah2:15 Iryo joro nkomeza kuzamuka nkikiye umubande w'akagezi ka Kederoni ngenda nsuzuma urukuta
Nehemiah2:16 Abatware b'umujyi ntibari bazi aho nari nagiye cyangwa icyo nari nakoze. Koko kandi kugeza icyo gihe
Nehemiah2:17 Nuko ndababwira nti: “Nimurebe ibyago dufite: Yeruzalemu yarasenyutse ni amatongo
Nehemiah2:18 Mbatekerereza ukuntu Imana yanjye yangiriye neza ikandinda
Nehemiah2:19 Ariko Umunyahoroni Sanibalati na Tobiya umutware wo mu Bamoni
Nehemiah2:20 Ndabasubiza nti: “Imana nyir'ijuru ni yo izaduha ishya n'ihirwe muri iki gikorwa. Twebwe abagaragu bayo tugiye guhita twubaka
Nehemiah3:1 Umutambyi mukuru Eliyashibu afatanyije n'abatambyi bagenzi be
Nehemiah3:2 Abagabo b'i Yeriko ni bo bakurikiragaho bubaka
Nehemiah3:3 Abagabo b'i Hasenaya ni bo bakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:4 Meremoti mwene Uriya wa Hakosi ni we wakurikiragaho asana
Nehemiah3:5 Abaturage b'i Tekowa ni bo bakurikiragaho basana
Nehemiah3:6 Irembo rya Yeshana ryubatswe na Yoyada mwene Paseya
Nehemiah3:7 Umunyagibeyoni Melatiya n'Umunyameronoti Yadoni hamwe n'abantu b'i Gibeyoni n'ab'i Misipa
Nehemiah3:8 Uziyeli mwene Harihaya wari umucuzi w'izahabu
Nehemiah3:9 Refaya mwene Huri ari na we wategekaga kimwe cya kabiri cy'intara ya Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah3:10 Yedaya mwene Harumafu ni we wakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:11 Malikiya ukomoka kuri Harimu na Hashubu ukomoka kuri Pahati-Mowabu
Nehemiah3:12 Shalumu mwene Haloheshi akaba n'umutegetsi wa kimwe cya kabiri kindi cy'intara ya Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah3:13 Irembo ry'Igikombe ryubatswe na Hanuni afatanyije n'abaturage b'i Zanowa. Bamaze kuryubaka bariteraho inzugi
Nehemiah3:14 Irembo ry'Imyanda ryubatswe na Malikiya mwene Rekabu
Nehemiah3:15 Irembo ry'Iriba ryubatswe na Shaluni mwene Kolihoze
Nehemiah3:16 Nehemiya mwene Azibuki akaba n'umutegetsi wa kimwe cya kabiri cy'intara ya Beti-Suri
Nehemiah3:17 Iruhande rwe hasanwaga n'Abalevi ari bo Rehumu mwene Bani
Nehemiah3:18 Bene wabo ni bo bakurikiragaho basana bayobowe na Binuwi mwene Henadadi
Nehemiah3:19 Iruhande rwabo hasanwe na Ezeri mwene Yoshuwa
Nehemiah3:20 Baruki mwene Zabayi ni we wakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:21 Meremoti mwene Uriya wa Hakosi ni we wakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:22 Abatambyi baturutse mu turere dukikije Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah3:23 Benyamini na Hashubu ni bo bakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:24 Binuwi mwene Henadadi ni we wakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:25 Palali mwene Uzayi ni we wakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:26 n'abakozi bo mu Ngoro y'Imana babaga mu gace ka Yeruzalemu kitwaga Ofeli
Nehemiah3:27 Abaturage b'i Tekowa ni bo bakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:28 Guhera haruguru y'Irembo ry'Amafarasi hasanwe n'abatambyi
Nehemiah3:29 Sadoki mwene Imeri ni we wakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:30 Hananiya mwene Shelemiya na Hanuni umuhungu wa gatandatu wa Salafu ni bo bakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:31 Malikiya wo mu bacuzi b'izahabu ni we wakurikiragaho
Nehemiah3:32 Uhereye kuri iyo nzu ukageza ku Irembo ry'Intama
Nehemiah3:33 Sanibalati amenye ko twebwe Abayahudi twubaka urukuta rwa Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah3:34 avugira imbere ya bagenzi be n'imbere y'ingabo z'i Samariya ati: “Ese abo Bayahudi batagize icyo bashoboye barashaka kugera ku ki? Mbese koko urwo rukuta bazarangiza kurwubaka? Mbese baragira ngo gutura Imana ibitambo ni byo bizatuma bubaka urukuta rw'icyuzuriraho? Ese baragira ngo bataburure ibirundo by'amabuye yangijwe n'umuriro maze bayubakishe?”
Nehemiah3:35 Ubwo Tobiya umutware wo mu Bamoni yari ahagaze iruhande rwe
Nehemiah3:36 Nuko ndasenga nti: “Mana yacu
Nehemiah3:37 Ntukabababarire igicumuro cyabo cyangwa ngo ubahanagureho icyaha cyabo
Nehemiah3:38 Nuko twubaka urukuta rwa Yeruzalemu rwose turugeza muri kimwe cya kabiri cy'ubuhagarike bwarwo
Nehemiah4:1 Ariko Sanibalati na Tobiya n'Abarabu n'Abamoni hamwe n'Abanyashidodi
Nehemiah4:2 Bose bahuza umugambi wo gutera i Yeruzalemu no kwangiza ibyaho.
Nehemiah4:3 Nuko dusenga Imana yacu
Nehemiah4:4 Byongeye kandi Abayahudi baravugaga bati: “Abakozi bacitse intege
Nehemiah4:5 Abanzi bacu na bo bakavuga bati: “Ntibazigera batubona cyangwa ngo bamenye igihe tuzazira
Nehemiah4:6 Nuko Abayahudi bo mu cyaro baturanye n'abanzi bacu
Nehemiah4:7 Nuko nshyira abantu inyuma y'urukuta aho rwari rukiri rugufi n'aho rwari rutarasanwa
Nehemiah4:8 Maze kubona uko ibintu byifashe
Nehemiah4:9 Abanzi bacu bamenya ko twaburiwe
Nehemiah4:10 Uhereye uwo munsi kimwe cya kabiri cy'abakozi banjye barakoraga
Nehemiah4:11 bubakaga urukuta. Abahereza babo bakoreshaga ukuboko kumwe
Nehemiah4:12 Buri muntu wubakaga yabaga afite inkota ye mu rukenyerero. Uwari ushinzwe kuvuza impanda
Nehemiah4:13 kuko nari narabwiye abanyacyubahiro n'abatware na rubanda nti: “Murabona ko uyu murimo ari munini kandi ari mugari
Nehemiah4:14 Nimujya mwumva impanda ivuze
Nehemiah4:15 Nuko dukomeza gukora dutyo kuva mu museke kugeza nimugoroba mu kabwibwi
Nehemiah4:16 Icyo gihe kandi mbwira abantu nti: “Umuntu wese kimwe n'abakozi bamufasha ajye arara muri Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah4:17 Nararaga nkenyeye kimwe na bagenzi banjye n'abakozi bamfashaga
Nehemiah5:1 Icyo gihe rubanda rw'Abayahudi n'abagore babo bitotombera bene wabo.
Nehemiah5:2 Bamwe muri bo baravugaga bati: “Twebwe ubwacu n'abana bacu turi benshi
Nehemiah5:3 Abandi bakagira bati: “Kugira ngo tubone ingano mu gihe cy'inzara
Nehemiah5:4 Abandi na bo bakagira bati: “Kugira ngo tubone imisoro y'umwami w'u Buperesi
Nehemiah5:5 Nyamara twese turi Abayahudi kimwe na bo
Nehemiah5:6 Nuko numvise ayo maganya n'ibyo birego ndarakara cyane.
Nehemiah5:7 Niyemeza gutonganya abanyacyubahiro n'abatware b'Abayahudi
Nehemiah5:8 Ndababwira nti: “Twakoze uko dushoboye kose ducungura Abayahudi bene wacu
Nehemiah5:9 Ndongera ndababwira nti: “Ibyo mukora si byiza. Mbese ntimwari mukwiye gutinya Imana mugakora ibyiza
Nehemiah5:10 Jyewe ubwanjye na bagenzi banjye kimwe n'abakozi bamfasha
Nehemiah5:11 Ndetse bitarenze uyu munsi
Nehemiah5:12 Barambwira bati: “Ibyo utubwiye tuzabikora. Tuzabasubiza ibyo batugwatirije
Nehemiah5:13 Nanjye mfata umweko nari nkenyeje nabikagamo ibiceri
Nehemiah5:14 Umwami Aritazeruzi yangize umutegetsi w'igihugu cy'u Buyuda
Nehemiah5:15 Abategetsi bambanjirije baryaga rubanda imitsi
Nehemiah5:16 Ahubwo nitangiye kubaka urukuta sinagira n'isambu nigurira. Abantu bamfashaga na bo nta masambu biguriye
Nehemiah5:17 Byongeye kandi nagaburiraga abatware b'Abayahudi ijana na mirongo itanu
Nehemiah5:18 Buri munsi natekeshaga ikimasa n'intama esheshatu z'indobanure n'inkoko
Nehemiah5:19 Mana yanjye ujye unyibuka
Nehemiah6:1 Sanibalati na Tobiya n'Umwarabu Geshemu kimwe n'abandi banzi bacu
Nehemiah6:2 Nuko Sanibalati na Geshemu bantumaho bati: “Ngwino duhurire i Kefirimu mu kibaya cya Ono.” Ariko bari bafite umugambi wo kungirira nabi.
Nehemiah6:3 Nanjye mbatumaho mbasubiza nti: “Sinshobora kuza. Umurimo nkora ni ingirakamaro ndamutse nywusize wahagarara
Nehemiah6:4 Bantumaho incuro enye zose ngo nze tubonane
Nehemiah6:5 Nuko ku ncuro ya gatanu Sanibalati yongera kuntumaho nka mbere
Nehemiah6:6 Dore ibyari bikubiye muri urwo rwandiko: “Hari inkuru yabaye gikwira mu batari Abayahudi
Nehemiah6:7 ubu ukaba waramaze gushyiraho abahanuzi bo kwamamaza muri Yeruzalemu ko uri umwami w'u Buyuda. Iyo nkuru ntizabura kugera ku mwami w'u Buperesi. None ngwino tubyumvikaneho.”
Nehemiah6:8 Nuko nanjye ndamusubiza nti: “Ibyo uvuze byose ntibifite ishingiro
Nehemiah6:9 Bose bashakaga kudutera ubwoba bibwira ko tuzacika intege
Nehemiah6:10 Umunsi umwe njya kwa Shemaya mwene Delaya wa Mehetabēli
Nehemiah6:11 Nuko ndamusubiza nti: “Mbese umugabo nkanjye akwiye guhunga? Byongeye kandi umuntu nkanjye yakwinjira mu Ngoro
Nehemiah6:12 Nuko mbibonye ntyo menya ko ibyo ambwiye atabitumwe n'Imana
Nehemiah6:13 Kwari ukugira ngo ngire ubwoba nkore ibyo ambwiye
Nehemiah6:14 Nuko ndasenga nti: “Mana yanjye
Nehemiah6:15 Ku itariki ya makumyabiri n'eshanu y'ukwezi kwa Eluli
Nehemiah6:16 Abanzi bacu bose bamenye ko twarwujuje
Nehemiah6:17 Icyo gihe abanyacyubahiro benshi b'i Buyuda bandikiraga Tobiya inzandiko nyinshi
Nehemiah6:18 Abantu benshi b'i Buyuda bari barahanye igihango na we
Nehemiah6:19 Bamwe mu Bayahudi bahoraga bandatira ibikorwa bya Tobiya
Nehemiah7:1 Urukuta rumaze kuzura maze no gutera inzugi ku marembo yarwo
Nehemiah7:2 Ubutegetsi bw'umurwa wa Yeruzalemu mbushinga umuvandimwe wanjye Hanani
Nehemiah7:3 Nuko ndababwira nti: “Inzugi za Yeruzalemu ntizigakingurwe mbere yo ku gasusuruko
Nehemiah7:4 Umurwa wa Yeruzalemu wari munini nyamara utuwemo n'abantu bake
Nehemiah7:5 Nuko Imana yanjye inyungura igitekerezo maze nteranya abanyacyubahiro n'abatware b'umujyi hamwe na rubanda
Nehemiah7:6 Dore Abayahudi bo mu mazu Umwami Nebukadinezari wa Babiloniya yari yarajyanye ho iminyago. Baje mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda no mu murwa wacyo wa Yeruzalemu bavuye muri Babiloniya
Nehemiah7:7 Baje bayobowe na Zerubabeli na Yeshuwa na Nehemiya
Nehemiah7:8 Abakomokaga kuri Paroshi bari ibihumbi bibiri n'ijana na mirongo irindwi na babiri.
Nehemiah7:9 Abakomokaga kuri Shefatiya bari magana atatu na mirongo irindwi na babiri.
Nehemiah7:10 Abakomokaga kuri Ara bari magana atandatu na mirongo itanu na babiri.
Nehemiah7:11 Abakomokaga kuri Pahati-Mowabu
Nehemiah7:12 Abakomokaga kuri Elamu bari igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo itanu na bane.
Nehemiah7:13 Abakomokaga kuri Zatu bari magana inani na mirongo ine na batanu.
Nehemiah7:14 Abakomokaga kuri Zakayi bari magana arindwi na mirongo itandatu.
Nehemiah7:15 Abakomokaga kuri Binuwi bari magana atandatu na mirongo ine n'umunani.
Nehemiah7:16 Abakomokaga kuri Bebayi bari magana atandatu na makumyabiri n'umunani.
Nehemiah7:17 Abakomokaga kuri Azigadi bari ibihumbi bibiri na magana atatu na makumyabiri na babiri.
Nehemiah7:18 Abakomokaga kuri Adonikamu bari magana atandatu na mirongo itandatu na barindwi.
Nehemiah7:19 Abakomokaga kuri Bigivayi bari ibihumbi bibiri na mirongo itandatu na barindwi.
Nehemiah7:20 Abakomokaga kuri Adini bari magana atandatu na mirongo itanu na batanu.
Nehemiah7:21 Abakomokaga kuri Ateri
Nehemiah7:22 Abakomokaga kuri Hashumu bari magana atatu na makumyabiri n'umunani.
Nehemiah7:23 Abakomokaga kuri Besayi bari magana atatu na makumyabiri na bane.
Nehemiah7:24 Abakomokaga kuri Harifu bari ijana na cumi na babiri.
Nehemiah7:25 Abakomokaga kuri Gibeyoni bari mirongo cyenda na batanu.
Nehemiah7:26 Abantu bakomokaga mu mujyi wa Betelehemu n'uwa Netofa bari ijana na mirongo inani n'umunani.
Nehemiah7:27 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Anatoti bari ijana na makumyabiri n'umunani.
Nehemiah7:28 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Betazimaveti bari mirongo ine na babiri.
Nehemiah7:29 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Kiriyati-Yeyarimu n'uwa Kefira n'uwa Bēroti bari magana arindwi na mirongo ine na batatu.
Nehemiah7:30 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Rama n'uwa Geba bari magana atandatu na makumyabiri n'umwe.
Nehemiah7:31 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Mikimasi bari ijana na makumyabiri na babiri.
Nehemiah7:32 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Beteli n'uwa Ayi bari ijana na makumyabiri na batatu.
Nehemiah7:33 Abakomokaga mu wundi mujyi witwa Nebo bari mirongo itanu na babiri.
Nehemiah7:34 Abakomokaga kuri Elamu wundi bari igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo itanu na bane.
Nehemiah7:35 Abakomokaga kuri Harimu bari magana atatu na makumyabiri.
Nehemiah7:36 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Yeriko bari magana atatu na mirongo ine na batanu.
Nehemiah7:37 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Lodi n'uwa Hadidi n'uwa Ono bari magana arindwi na makumyabiri n'umwe
Nehemiah7:38 Abakomokaga mu mujyi wa Senaya bari ibihumbi bitatu na magana cyenda na mirongo itatu.
Nehemiah7:39 Itsinda ry'abatambyi: Abakomokaga kuri Yedaya ukomoka kuri Yoshuwa bari magana cyenda na mirongo irindwi na batatu.
Nehemiah7:40 Abakomokaga kuri Imeri bari igihumbi na mirongo itanu na babiri.
Nehemiah7:41 Abakomokaga kuri Pashehuri bari igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo ine na barindwi.
Nehemiah7:42 Abakomokaga kuri Harimu bari igihumbi na cumi na barindwi.
Nehemiah7:43 Itsinda ry'Abalevi: Abakomokaga kuri Yoshuwa na Kadimiyeli na bo bakomokaga kuri Hodeva
Nehemiah7:44 Itsinda ry'abaririmbyi bo mu Ngoro y'Imana: Abakomokaga kuri Asafu bari ijana na mirongo ine n'umunani.
Nehemiah7:45 Itsinda ry'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana ryari rigizwe n'abakomokaga kuri Shalumu no kuri Ateri
Nehemiah7:46 Itsinda ry'abakozi bo mu Ngoro y'Imana ryari rigizwe n'abakomokaga kuri Sīha no kuri Hasufa na Tabawoti
Nehemiah7:47 no kuri Kerosi no kuri Siya no kuri Padoni
Nehemiah7:48 no kuri Lebana no kuri Hagaba no kuri Shalimayi
Nehemiah7:49 no kuri Hanani no kuri Gideli no kuri Gahari
Nehemiah7:50 no kuri Reyaya no kuri Resini no kuri Nekoda
Nehemiah7:51 no kuri Gazamu no kuri Uza no kuri Paseya
Nehemiah7:52 no kuri Besayi no kuri Meyunimu
Nehemiah7:53 no kuri Bakibuki no kuri Hakufa no kuri Harihuri
Nehemiah7:54 no kuri Basiliti no kuri Mehida no kuri Harisha
Nehemiah7:55 no kuri Barikosi no kuri Sisera no kuri Tema
Nehemiah7:56 no kuri Nesiya no kuri Hatifa.
Nehemiah7:57 Itsinda ry'abakomokaga ku bagaragu ba Salomo ryari rigizwe n'abakomokaga kuri Sotayi no kuri Sofereti no kuri Perida
Nehemiah7:58 no kuri Yāla no kuri Darikoni no kuri Gideli
Nehemiah7:59 no kuri Shefatiya no kuri Hatili
Nehemiah7:60 Abo mu itsinda ry'abakozi bo mu Ngoro y'Imana
Nehemiah7:61 Hari n'abantu batahutse bavuye i Telimela n'i Teliharisha
Nehemiah7:62 Abo bantu bakomokaga kuri Delaya no kuri Tobiya no kuri Nekoda
Nehemiah7:63 Hari n'abatambyi bagize ingorane nk'izo. Abo ni abakomokaga kuri Hobaya no kuri Hakosi no kuri Barizilayi
Nehemiah7:64 Bashatse ibisekuruza byabo mu bitabo by'ibarura ariko ntibabibona
Nehemiah7:65 Byongeye kandi umutegetsi w'u Buyuda ababuza kurya ibyokurya byavanywe ku bitambo byatuwe Imana
Nehemiah7:66 Umubare w'abatahutse bose bavuye muri Babiloniya
Nehemiah7:67 Bari kumwe n'abagaragu n'abaja ibihumbi birindwi na magana atatu na mirongo itatu na barindwi
Nehemiah7:68 Bari bafite ingamiya magana ane na mirongo itatu n'eshanu
Nehemiah7:69 Bamwe mu batware b'amazu batanze imfashanyo yo kubaka Ingoro y'Imana. Umutegetsi w'u Buyuda yatanze ibiro umunani n'igice by'izahabu
Nehemiah7:70 Bamwe mu batware b'amazu bashyize muri icyo kigega ibiro ijana na mirongo irindwi by'izahabu
Nehemiah7:71 Naho rubanda batanga ibiro ijana na mirongo irindwi by'izahabu
Nehemiah7:72 Nuko abatambyi n'Abalevi
Nehemiah8:1 Nuko ku itariki ya mbere y'uko kwezi
Nehemiah8:2 
Nehemiah8:3 Kuva kare mu gitondo kugeza saa sita
Nehemiah8:4 Umwigishamategeko Ezira yari ahagaze ku ruhimbi rw'ibiti rugari bubatse kubera iryo teraniro. Iburyo bwe hari hahagaze Matitiya na Shema
Nehemiah8:5 Abantu bose bashoboraga kureba Ezira kuko yari ahagaze kuri rwa ruhimbi abasumba. Abumbuye cya gitabo cy'Amategeko
Nehemiah8:6 Nuko Ezira asingiza Uhoraho Imana ikomeye
Nehemiah8:7 Nuko barahaguruka
Nehemiah8:8 Basomaga Amategeko y'Imana mu gitabo ku buryo bwumvikana
Nehemiah8:9 Abantu bumvise ibyasomwaga mu gitabo cy'Amategeko ya Musa
Nehemiah8:10 Ahubwo nimusubire iwanyu murye ibyokurya byiza
Nehemiah8:11 Abalevi na bo bacecekesha abantu
Nehemiah8:12 Nuko abantu bose barataha bajya kurya no kunywa
Nehemiah8:13 Ku itariki ya kabiri y'uko kwezi
Nehemiah8:14 Basanga mu gitabo cy'Amategeko Uhoraho yari yaratanze ayanyujije kuri Musa
Nehemiah8:15 Basanze kandi ko iyo minsi mikuru yagombaga gutangarizwa abantu bo mu mijyi yose ndetse n'ab'i Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah8:16 Nuko abantu bose bajya kuzana amashami yo kubaka utuzu tw'ingando. Bamwe batwubatse hejuru y'amazu yabo
Nehemiah8:17 Abantu bose batahutse bavuye aho bari barajyanywe ho iminyago
Nehemiah8:18 Uhereye ku munsi wa mbere w'iminsi mikuru y'Ingando
Nehemiah9:1 Ku itariki ya makumyabiri n'enye z'uko kwezi
Nehemiah9:2 
Nehemiah9:3 Bamara amasaha atatu bahagaze babasomera ibyanditse mu gitabo cy'Amategeko y'Uhoraho Imana yabo. Bamara n'andi masaha atatu birega ibyaha byabo
Nehemiah9:4 Nuko Abalevi ari bo Yoshuwa na Bani na Kadimiyeli
Nehemiah9:5 Abalevi ari bo Yoshuwa na Kadimiyeli na Bani
Nehemiah9:6 Ni wowe wenyine witwa Uhoraho! Wahanitse ijuru hejuru y'amajuru yose
Nehemiah9:7 Uhoraho Mana
Nehemiah9:8 Wabonye ko akubereye indahemuka
Nehemiah9:9 “Wabonye imibabaro ya ba sogokuruza bari mu Misiri
Nehemiah9:10 Ibimenyetso n'ibitangaza bihambaye wabyerekaniye ku mwami wa Misiri
Nehemiah9:11 Amazi y'inyanja wayagabanyijemo kabiri
Nehemiah9:12 Ku manywa wayoboraga ba sogokuruza wibereye mu nkingi y'igicu
Nehemiah9:13 Wavuye mu ijuru umanukira ku musozi wa Sinayi uvugana na bo. Wabagejejeho ibyemezo biboneye wafashe n'amategeko y'ukuri
Nehemiah9:14 Watumye umugaragu wawe Musa kubamenyesha isabato nziranenge
Nehemiah9:15 “Bagize inzara ubagaburira umugati uturutse mu ijuru
Nehemiah9:16 Ariko ba sogokuruza baragusuzuguye
Nehemiah9:17 Banze kukumva birengagiza ibitangaza wabakoreye. Bashinze amajosi barakugomera
Nehemiah9:18 Byongeye kandi bashongesheje ubutare
Nehemiah9:19 Ariko kubera impuhwe zawe nyinshi
Nehemiah9:20 Wabahaye Mwuka wawe ugira neza kugira ngo abajijure
Nehemiah9:21 Wabitayeho imyaka mirongo ine bari mu butayu
Nehemiah9:22 “Wabagabije ibihugu n'ababituye
Nehemiah9:23 Wabahaye urubyaro nyamwinshi nk'inyenyeri zo ku ijuru
Nehemiah9:24 Urubyaro rwabo rugeze muri icyo gihugu ruracyigarurira. Imbere yarwo uganza Abanyakanāni bene igihugu barukomera yombi
Nehemiah9:25 Bafashe imijyi izengurutswe n'inkuta
Nehemiah9:26 Nyamara baranze barakugomera
Nehemiah9:27 bityo baba baragusebeje cyane. Wabagabije abanzi babo kugira ngo babakandamize
Nehemiah9:28 Nyamara babona agahenge bakongera bakagucumuraho
Nehemiah9:29 Warababuriraga kugira ngo bumvire amategeko yawe
Nehemiah9:30 Uko imyaka ihise indi igataha warihanganaga
Nehemiah9:31 Nyamara kubera impuhwe zawe nyinshi
Nehemiah9:32 “None rero Mana yacu
Nehemiah9:33 Muri ibyo byose byatugezeho twese
Nehemiah9:34 Abami bacu n'abatware bacu
Nehemiah9:35 Bakiri mu bwami bwabo bigenga
Nehemiah9:36 None rero dore abanyamahanga batugize abagaragu babo
Nehemiah9:37 kandi kubera ibyaha byacu
Nehemiah10:1 Kubera ibyo byose byatubayeho twiyemeje gukurikiza amasezerano akubiye mu nyandiko
Nehemiah10:2 Dore urutonde rw'abayashyizeho umukono: Umutegetsi Nehemiya mwene Hakaliya
Nehemiah10:3 Hakurikiyeho Seraya na Azariya na Yeremiya
Nehemiah10:4 Pashehuri na Amariya na Malikiya
Nehemiah10:5 Hatushi na Shebaniya na Maluki
Nehemiah10:6 Harimu na Meremoti na Obadiya
Nehemiah10:7 Daniyeli na Ginetoni na Baruki
Nehemiah10:8 Meshulamu na Abiya na Miyamini
Nehemiah10:9 Māziya na Bilugayi na Shemaya. Abo bose bari abatambyi.
Nehemiah10:10 Abalevi bari Yoshuwa mwene Azaniya na Binuwi wakomokaga kuri Henadadi na Kadimiyeli
Nehemiah10:11 na bene wabo ari bo Shebaniya na Hodiya
Nehemiah10:12 na Mika na Rehobu na Hashabiya
Nehemiah10:13 na Zakuri na Sherebiya na Shebaniya wundi
Nehemiah10:14 na Hodiya wundi na Bani na Beninu.
Nehemiah10:15 Naho ku ruhande rwa rubanda bari abatware b'aya mazu: iya Paroshi na Pahati-Mowabu na Elamu na Zatu na Bani
Nehemiah10:16 na Buni na Azigadi na Bebayi
Nehemiah10:17 na Adoniya na Bigivayi na Adini
Nehemiah10:18 na Ateri na Hezekiya na Azuri
Nehemiah10:19 na Hodiya na Hashumu na Besayi
Nehemiah10:20 na Harifu na Anatoti na Nebayi
Nehemiah10:21 na Magipiyashi na Meshulamu na Heziri
Nehemiah10:22 na Meshezabēli na Sadoki na Yaduwa
Nehemiah10:23 na Pelatiya na Hanani na Anaya
Nehemiah10:24 na Hoseya na Hananiya na Hashubu
Nehemiah10:25 na Haloheshi na Piliha na Shobeki
Nehemiah10:26 na Rehumu na Hashabuna na Māseya
Nehemiah10:27 na Ahiya na Hanani wundi na Anani
Nehemiah10:28 na Maluki na Harimu na Bāna.
Nehemiah10:29 Twebwe Abayahudi basigaye
Nehemiah10:30 hamwe n'abavandimwe bacu b'ibikomerezwa
Nehemiah10:31 Byongeye kandi twiyemeje ko abakobwa bacu tutazabashyingira abanyamahanga twasanze muri iki gihugu
Nehemiah10:32 Ku munsi w'isabato cyangwa se ku munsi mukuru uwo ari wo wose
Nehemiah10:33 Twishyiriyeho n'amabwiriza ko buri mwaka umuntu wese azajya atanga umusoro w'igiceri cy'ifeza gipima garama enye
Nehemiah10:34 Uwo musoro uzakoreshwa ku byerekeye imigati iturwa Imana
Nehemiah10:35 Twebwe abatambyi n'Abalevi na rubanda
Nehemiah10:36 Twiyemeje kandi ko buri mwaka tuzajya tuzana mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho umuganura w'ibyeze mu mirima yacu
Nehemiah10:37 Nk'uko byanditse mu Mategeko
Nehemiah10:38 Byongeye kandi tuzaha abatambyi ifu y'umuganura
Nehemiah10:39 Umutambyi ukomoka kuri Aroni ajye ajyana n'Abalevi igihe bagiye kwaka kimwe cya cumi. Abalevi na bo bagomba kujya bazana kimwe cya cumi cya kimwe cya cumi bakiriye
Nehemiah10:40 Rubanda rw'Abisiraheli n'Abalevi bazajya bazana amaturo yabo y'ibinyampeke
Nehemiah11:1 Abatware b'Abisiraheli batuye i Yeruzalemu mu bandi basigaye
Nehemiah11:2 Abantu bashima abagabo bose biyemeje gutura muri Yeruzalemu.
Nehemiah11:3 Abategetsi bo mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda babaga i Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah11:4 Ariko hari bamwe bo mu muryango wa Yuda
Nehemiah11:5 Hari kandi na Māseya wakomokaga kuri Baruki
Nehemiah11:6 Abagabo b'intwari bo mu nzu ya Perēsi bari batuye i Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah11:7 Salu wakomokaga kuri Meshulamu
Nehemiah11:8 Hari kandi na Gabayi na Salayi. Ababenyamini bose bari magana cyenda na makumyabiri n'umunani.
Nehemiah11:9 Yoweli mwene Zikiri ni we wari umutware wabo
Nehemiah11:10 Yedaya mwene Yoyaribu na Yakini.
Nehemiah11:11 Hari na Seraya wakomokaga kuri Hilikiya
Nehemiah11:12 hamwe na bene wabo magana inani na makumyabiri na babiri bakoraga mu Ngoro y'Imana. Hari na Adaya wakomokaga kuri Yerohamu
Nehemiah11:13 yari kumwe na bene wabo b'abatware b'amazu yabo. Bose hamwe bari magana abiri na mirongo ine na babiri. Hari kandi na Amashisayi wakomokaga kuri Azarēli
Nehemiah11:14 yari kumwe na bene wabo b'intwari ijana na makumyabiri n'umunani. Zabudiyeli mwene Hagedolimu ni we wari umutware wabo.
Nehemiah11:15 Shemaya wakomokaga kuri Hashubu
Nehemiah11:16 yari hamwe n'abakuru b'Abalevi ari bo Shabetayi na Yozabadi
Nehemiah11:17 Hari na Mataniya wakomokaga kuri Mika
Nehemiah11:18 Abalevi bose bari mu murwa w'Imana bari magana abiri na mirongo inani na bane.
Nehemiah11:19 Akubu na Talimoni hamwe na bene wabo bari bashinzwe kurinda amarembo y'Ingoro
Nehemiah11:20 Abandi Bisiraheli bose basigaye
Nehemiah11:21 Abakozi bo mu Ngoro y'Imana babaga mu gace ko muri Yeruzalemu kitwa Ofeli. Abatware babo bari Sīha na Gishipa.
Nehemiah11:22 Umutware w'Abalevi b'i Yeruzalemu yari Uzi wakomokaga kuri Bani
Nehemiah11:23 Abaririmbyi bagengwaga n'amabwiriza y'umwami
Nehemiah11:24 Petahiya wakomokaga kuri Meshezabēli wo mu nzu ya Zera mwene Yuda
Nehemiah11:25 Ku byerekeye indi mijyi abantu bamwe bo mu muryango wa Yuda batuye mu mujyi wa Kiriyati-Aruba
Nehemiah11:26 no mu mujyi witwaga Yeshuwa no mu wa Molada no mu wa Beti-Peleti
Nehemiah11:27 no mu wa Hasari-Shuwali no mu wa Bērisheba no mu nsisiro zihegereye.
Nehemiah11:28 Abandi batura mu mujyi wa Sikulagi n'uwa Mekona no mu nsisiro zihegereye.
Nehemiah11:29 Abandi batura mu mujyi wa Enirimoni n'uwa Sora n'uwa Yarimuti
Nehemiah11:30 n'uwa Zanowa n'uwa Adulamu no mu nsisiro zihegereye. Abandi batuye mu mujyi wa Lakishi n'ahegeranye na ho
Nehemiah11:31 Abantu bo mu muryango wa Benyamini batuye mu mujyi wa Geba no mu wa Mikimasi
Nehemiah11:32 Abandi batuye mu mujyi wa Anatoti
Nehemiah11:33 no mu wa Hasori no mu wa Rama no mu wa Gitayimu
Nehemiah11:34 no mu wa Hadidi no mu wa Seboyimu no mu wa Nebalati
Nehemiah11:35 no mu wa Lodi no mu wa Ono
Nehemiah11:36 Bamwe mu Balevi bo mu ntara ya Yuda bagiye kwiturira mu ntara ya Benyamini.
Nehemiah12:1 Dore amazina y'abatambyi n'Abalevi batahutse bava aho bari barajyanywe ho iminyago. Baje bayobowe na Zerubabeli mwene Salatiyeli hamwe na Yeshuwa. Abo ni Seraya na Yeremiya na Ezira
Nehemiah12:2 na Amariya na Maluki na Hatushi
Nehemiah12:3 na Shekaniya na Rehumu na Meremoti
Nehemiah12:4 na Ido na Ginetoyi na Abiya
Nehemiah12:5 na Miyamini na Madiya na Biluga
Nehemiah12:6 na Shemaya na Yoyaribu na Yedaya
Nehemiah12:7 na Salu na Amoki na Hilikiya na Yedaya wundi. Abo ni bo bari abatware b'amazu y'abatambyi n'aya bene wabo mu gihe cya Yeshuwa.
Nehemiah12:8 Naho Abalevi bari Yoshuwa na Binuwi na Kadimiyeli
Nehemiah12:9 Naho Bakibukiya na Uni na bene wabo
Nehemiah12:10 Yeshuwa yabyaye Yoyakimu
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada abyara Yonatani
Nehemiah12:12 Igihe Yoyakimu yari Umutambyi mukuru
Nehemiah12:13 Umutware w'inzu ya Ezira yari Meshulamu
Nehemiah12:14 Uw'inzu ya Maluki yari Yonatani
Nehemiah12:15 Uw'inzu ya Harimu yari Adina
Nehemiah12:16 Uw'inzu ya Ido yari Zakariya
Nehemiah12:17 Umutware w'inzu ya Abiya yari Zikiri
Nehemiah12:18 Uw'inzu ya Biluga yari Shamuwa
Nehemiah12:19 Umutware w'inzu ya Yoyaribu yari Matenayi
Nehemiah12:20 Uw'inzu ya Salayi yari Kalayi
Nehemiah12:21 Uw'inzu ya Hilikiya yari Hashabiya
Nehemiah12:22 Igihe Eliyashibu na Yoyada na Yohanani na Yaduwa bari Abatambyi bakuru
Nehemiah12:23 Ndetse igihe Yohanani umwuzukuru wa Eliyashibu yari Umutambyi mukuru
Nehemiah12:24 Abatware b'amazu y'Abalevi ari bo Hashabiya na Sherebiya na Yoshuwa mwene Kadimiyeli
Nehemiah12:25 Abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana ari bo Mataniya na Bakibukiya na Obadiya
Nehemiah12:26 Bakoraga iyo mirimo igihe Yoyakimi mwene Yeshuwa wa Yosadaki yari Umutambyi mukuru
Nehemiah12:27 Ubwo batahaga urukuta ruzengurutse Yeruzalemu batumije Abalevi aho babaga hose
Nehemiah12:28 Bakoranyije kandi abaririmbyi bo mu karere ka Yeruzalemu baturukaga mu nsisiro z'i Netofa
Nehemiah12:29 n'iz'i Betigilugali no mu cyaro kiri hafi ya Geba na Azimaveti. Koko rero abaririmbyi bari bariyubakiye insisiro ahakikije Yeruzalemu.
Nehemiah12:30 Abatambyi n'Abalevi bamaze gukora umuhango wo kwihumanura
Nehemiah12:31 Nuko mbwira abatware b'u Buyuda kurira urukuta
Nehemiah12:32 Abari muri uwo mutwe bakurikiwe na Hoshaya na kimwe cya kabiri cy'abatware b'u Buyuda
Nehemiah12:33 hakurikiraho Azariya na Ezira na Meshulamu
Nehemiah12:34 na Yuda na Benyamini na Shemaya na Yeremiya.
Nehemiah12:35 Hakurikiraho abatambyi bafite impanda. Na bo bagakurikirwa na Zakariya wakomokaga kuri Yonatani
Nehemiah12:36 Yari hamwe na bene wabo ari bo Shemaya na Azarēli na Milalayi
Nehemiah12:37 Bageze ku Irembo ry'Iriba
Nehemiah12:38 Umutwe wa kabiri w'abaririmbyi ugenda werekeje ibumoso. Ndabashorera tugenda hejuru y'urukuta
Nehemiah12:39 Tunyura hejuru y'Irembo rya Efurayimu
Nehemiah12:40 Imitwe yombi y'abaririmbyi ihurira ku Ngoro y'Imana
Nehemiah12:41 kimwe n'abatambyi bari bafite impanda ari bo Eliyakimu na Māseya na Miniyamini
Nehemiah12:42 Hari kandi na Māseya wundi na Shemaya na Eleyazari
Nehemiah12:43 Kuri uwo munsi hatambwe ibitambo byinshi
Nehemiah12:44 Icyo gihe kandi hashyizweho abagabo bashinzwe kurinda ibyumba by'ububiko bw'umutungo w'Ingoro y'Imana
Nehemiah12:45 Bakoraga imirimo Imana yabashinze
Nehemiah12:46 Koko rero kuva kera mu gihe cya Dawidi na Asafu
Nehemiah12:47 Bityo no mu gihe cya Zerubabeli no mu cya Nehemiya
Nehemiah13:1 Muri icyo gihe ubwo basomeraga abantu mu gitabo cya Musa
Nehemiah13:2 Impamvu ni uko batari basanganiye Abisiraheli kugira ngo babahe ibyokurya n'ibyokunywa. Ibiri amambu Abamowabu baguriye Balāmu ngo aze kuvuma Abisiraheli
Nehemiah13:3 Abisiraheli bumvise iryo tegeko biyemeza kwitandukanya n'uruvange rw'abanyamahanga bose.
Nehemiah13:4 Ariko ibyo bitaraba
Nehemiah13:5 Kubera ko yari incuti ya Tobiya
Nehemiah13:6 Ibyo byose byabaye ntari i Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah13:7 maze ngaruka i Yeruzalemu. Mpageze menya ko Eliyashibu yakoze ishyano
Nehemiah13:8 Biranshegesha cyane maze mfata ibintu bya Tobiya byose
Nehemiah13:9 Nuko ntegeka ko bakora umuhango wo guhumanura ibyo byumba
Nehemiah13:10 Menya kandi ko Abalevi batahawe imigabane yabagenewe
Nehemiah13:11 Nuko ntonganya abatware b'Abayahudi ndababaza nti: “Ni iki cyatumye mwemera ko Ingoro y'Imana yandagara?” Nuko ngarura Abalevi n'abaririmbyi ku mirimo yabo.
Nehemiah13:12 Abayahudi bose bazana kimwe cya cumi cy'ingano n'icya divayi nshya n'icy'amavuta
Nehemiah13:13 Inzu y'ububiko nyishinga umutambyi Shelemiya n'umwigishamategeko Sadoki
Nehemiah13:14 Mana yanjye
Nehemiah13:15 Muri iyo minsi
Nehemiah13:16 Byongeye kandi Abanyatiri babaga i Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah13:17 Nuko ntonganya abanyacyubahiro bo mu Bayahudi ndababwira nti: “Ni iki cyatumye mukora ishyano rimeze rityo
Nehemiah13:18 Mbese uko si ko ba sogokuruza bagenzaga bigatuma Imana yacu iduteza ibyago
Nehemiah13:19 Nuko ku munsi ubanziriza isabato bumaze kugoroba
Nehemiah13:20 Nuko abacuruzaga n'abadandazaga ibintu by'amoko menshi
Nehemiah13:21 Nuko mbihanangiriza mbabwira nti: “Ni iki gituma murara inyuma y'urukuta rw'umujyi? Nimwongera nzabafatisha.” Kuva ubwo ntibongera kugaruka ku munsi w'isabato.
Nehemiah13:22 Mperako ntegeka Abalevi gukora umuhango wo kwihumanura no kujya kurinda amarembo y'umurwa
Nehemiah13:23 Muri iyo minsi kandi mbona abagabo b'i Buyuda bashatse Abanyashidodikazi
Nehemiah13:24 Kimwe cya kabiri cy'abana babo bavugaga ikinyashidodi
Nehemiah13:25 Nuko ndabatonganya ndanabavuma
Nehemiah13:26 Mbese bene ibyo si byo byatumye Salomo umwami w'Abisiraheli acumura ku Mana? Mu mahanga yose ntihigeze habaho umwami uhwanye na we. Imana yaramukundaga
Nehemiah13:27 None namwe tubemerere gukora ishyano nk'iryo
Nehemiah13:28 Umwe mu bahungu ba Yoyada wakomokaga kuri Eliyashibu Umutambyi mukuru
Nehemiah13:29 Mana yanjye
Nehemiah13:30 Nguko uko nabatunganyije nkabatandukanya n'ibyabahumanya byose
Nehemiah13:31 Nashubijeho n'amabwiriza agenga amaturo y'inkwi zagombaga gutangwa mu bihe byagenwe
Esther1:1 Ngaya amateka y'ibyabaye ku ngoma y'Umwami Ahashuwerusi
Esther1:2 Icyo gihe Umwami Ahashuwerusi yari aganje mu kigo ntamenwa cy'ibwami i Shushani
Esther1:3 Nuko mu mwaka wa gatatu Umwami Ahashuwerusi ari ku ngoma
Esther1:4 Umwami yamaze amezi atandatu yerekana ubukungu butangaje n'ibindi bintu by'agaciro
Esther1:5 Icyo gihe kirangiye umwami atumira mu birori by'iminsi irindwi
Esther1:6 Aho hantu hari harimbishijwe imyenda y'umweru n'iy'isine
Esther1:7 kandi banyweshaga ibikombe by'izahabu by'amoko anyuranye. Koko rero divayi yari nyinshi
Esther1:8 Umuntu wese yanywaga icyo ashaka
Esther1:9 Umwamikazi Vashiti na we yari yateguriye abagore ibirori ikambere
Esther1:10 Ku munsi wa karindwi umwami asābwa n'ibyishimo kubera divayi yari yanyoye
Esther1:11 Nuko abategeka kumuzanira Umwamikazi Vashiti atamirije ikamba
Esther1:12 Ibyo byegera bigeza ubutumwa bw'umwami kuri Vashiti
Esther1:13 Umwami yari asanzwe ageza ikibazo cyose kirebana n'amategeko n'ubutabera ku bajyanama
Esther1:14 Muri abo harimo uwitwa Karishena na Shetari na Adimata
Esther1:15 Umwami arababwira ati: “Natumye ibyegera byanjye ku Mwamikazi Vashiti aransuzugura yanga kuza. None se dushingiye ku mategeko
Esther1:16 Uwitwa Memukani afata ijambo
Esther1:17 Koko rero imyifatire y'umwamikazi izakwira mu bagore bose
Esther1:18 None uhereye uyu munsi abagore b'abaminisitiri b'u Buperesi n'u Bumedi
Esther1:19 Bityo rero nyagasani
Esther1:20 Iryo teka ugiye guca ritangazwe mu bihugu by'ubwami bwawe bugari
Esther1:21 Iyo nama ya Memukani inyura umwami n'abaminisitiri be
Esther1:22 Nuko yohereza inzandiko mu bihugu byose by'ubwami bwe
Esther2:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Umwami Ahashuwerusi amaze gucururuka
Esther2:2 Abatoni b'umwami bashinzwe kumuba hafi bamugīra inama bati: “Nibagushakire abāri birinze kandi bafite uburanga.
Esther2:3 None rero shyiraho abantu mu bihugu byose by'ubwami bwawe
Esther2:4 Nuko nyagasani
Esther2:5 Mu kigo ntamenwa cy'ibwami i Shushani habaga Umuyahudi witwaga Moridekayi mwene Yayiri
Esther2:6 Moridekayi uwo yari umwe mu bajyanywe ho iminyago na Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya
Esther2:7 Moridekayi ni we wari warasigaranye Hadasa
Esther2:8 Nuko umwami aca iteka itegeko riratangazwa
Esther2:9 Esiteri anyura Hegayi ndetse amutonaho
Esther2:10 Esiteri ntabwo yari yarigeze avuga ubwenegihugu bwe cyangwa umuryango we
Esther2:11 Buri munsi Moridekayi yagendagendaga imbere y'inzu y'abagore b'umwami
Esther2:12 Mbere yo gushyīrwa Umwami Ahashuwerusi
Esther2:13 Iyo umukobwa yavaga mu nzu irinzwe na Hegayi maze agashyirwa umwami ikambere
Esther2:14 Yagendaga nimugoroba akavayo mu gitondo
Esther2:15 Esiteri umukobwa wa Abihayili
Esther2:16 Esiteri yashyiriwe Umwami Ahashuwerusi mu ngoro ye
Esther2:17 Nuko Esiteri anyura umwami kurusha abandi bakobwa bose bamubanjirije
Esther2:18 Umwami akorera Esiteri ibirori bikomeye
Esther2:19 Igihe bongeraga gukoranya abakobwa b'inkumi
Esther2:20 Esiteri yari ataravuga ubwenegihugu bwe n'ubwoko bwe
Esther2:21 Igihe Moridekayi yakoraga ibwami
Esther2:22 Ariko Moridekayi atahura ubugambanyi bwabo
Esther2:23 Nuko bakora iperereza basanga icyo cyaha kibahama
Esther3:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Umwami Ahashuwerusi azamura mu mwanya w'icyubahiro Hamani mwene Hamedata ukomoka kuri Agagi
Esther3:2 Umwami ategeka abakozi bose b'ibwami kujya būbaha Hamani bakamupfukamira
Esther3:3 Abandi bakozi b'ibwami bakamubaza bati: “Kuki utumvira itegeko ry'umwami?”
Esther3:4 Uko bukeye bakabimubaza ariko ntabyiteho. Aho bigeze Moridekayi ababwira ko ari Umuyahudi
Esther3:5 Hamani abonye ko Moridekayi yanze rwose kumupfukamira ngo amuhe icyubahiro
Esther3:6 Bari baramubwiye ko Moridekayi ari Umuyahudi
Esther3:7 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'ibiri Umwami Ahashuwerusi ari ku ngoma
Esther3:8 Nuko Hamani abwira Umwami Ahashuwerusi ati: “Nyagasani
Esther3:9 None rero nyagasani
Esther3:10 Umwami aherako yikuramo impeta mu rutoki iriho kashe ye
Esther3:11 Nuko abwira Hamani ati: “Ibyo bikoroto by'ifeza ubyigumanire
Esther3:12 Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshatu z'ukwezi kwa Nisani batumiza abanditsi b'umwami
Esther3:13 Intumwa zihutira kugeza izo nzandiko mu bihugu byose by'umwami
Esther3:14 Kopi y'urwo rwandiko igomba gutangazwa ho itegekoteka mu bihugu byose
Esther3:15 Ku itegeko ry'umwami intumwa zihutana izo nzandiko
Esther4:1 Moridekayi amenye ibyabaye ashishimura imyambaro ye
Esther4:2 Ageze aho binjirira bajya ibwami arahagarara
Esther4:3 Mu bihugu byose iryo teka ry'umwami ryageragamo rigatangazwa
Esther4:4 Abaja ba Esiteri n'abagaragu be b'inkone bamugezaho ibyabaye kuri Moridekayi
Esther4:5 Esiteri ni ko guhamagaza Hataki
Esther4:6 Hataki arasohoka ajya kureba Moridekayi mu muhanda mukuru w'umujyi
Esther4:7 Moridekayi amubwira ibyamubayeho byose
Esther4:8 Amuha na kopi y'itegekoteka ryatangajwe i Shushani ryo kurimbura Abayahudi
Esther4:9 Hataki aragaruka ashyikiriza Esiteri ubutumwa bwa Moridekayi.
Esther4:10 Esiteri ategeka Hataki gushyīra Moridekayi igisubizo agira ati:
Esther4:11 “Umuntu wese yaba umugabo cyangwa umugore
Esther4:12 Icyo gisubizo cya Esiteri bagishyikiriza Moridekayi
Esther4:13 na we amutumaho ati: “Ntiwibwire ko mu Bayahudi ari wowe wenyine uzarokoka ngo ni uko uri mu ngoro y'umwami.
Esther4:14 Niba rero mu gihe nk'iki wiyemeje kwicecekera
Esther4:15 Nuko Esiteri atuma kuri Moridekayi ati:
Esther4:16 “Genda ukoranye Abayahudi bose bari i Shushani
Esther4:17 Moridekayi aragenda akora ibyo Esiteri yamutegetse byose.
Esther5:1 Esiteri amaze iyo minsi itatu yigomwa kurya
Esther5:2 Umwami abonye Umwamikazi Esiteri ahagaze mu rugo ikambere
Esther5:3 Umwami aramubaza ati: “Bite Mwamikazi Esiteri? Ni iki unsaba? Icyo unsaba cyose ndakiguha
Esther5:4 Esiteri ati: “Nyagasani niba bikunogeye
Esther5:5 Ako kanya umwami aravuga ati: “Nimujye kubwira Hamani yubahirize ubutumire bwa Esiteri.” Nuko umwami ajyana na Hamani mu gitaramo Esiteri yateguye.
Esther5:6 Bakiri mu gitaramo bica akanyota
Esther5:7 Esiteri asubiza umwami ati: “Icyo nifuza kugusaba ni iki:
Esther5:8 nyagasani niba ngutonnyeho
Esther5:9 Uwo munsi Hamani asohoka mu ngoro y'umwami anezerewe
Esther5:10 icyakora ariyumanganya arataha. Nyuma atumiza incuti ze
Esther5:11 Nuko Hamani abaratira ubukungu bwe n'abana be benshi
Esther5:12 Hamani akomeza agira ati: “Uretse ibyo
Esther5:13 Ariko ibyo byose nta cyo bimariye igihe cyose nkibona Umuyahudi Moridekayi
Esther5:14 Nuko umugore we Zereshi n'incuti ze zose bamwungura inama bati: “Bashinge igiti cya metero makumyabiri n'eshanu
Esther6:1 Muri iryo joro umwami ntiyabasha kugoheka
Esther6:2 Basanga ahanditse ko Moridekayi ari we watahuye umugambi wa Bigitani na Tereshi ibyegera by'umwami by'inkone
Esther6:3 Umwami arababaza ati: “Mbese hari ishimwe n'icyubahiro Moridekayi yahawe kubera icyo gikorwa?” Abo batoni b'umwami bashinzwe kumuba hafi baramusubiza bati: “Nta byo yigeze ahabwa.”
Esther6:4 Umwami arongera arababaza ati: “Ni nde uri mu rugo?” Ubwo Hamani ni we wari ugeze mu rugo ikambere
Esther6:5 Abatoni b'umwami baramusubiza bati: “Ni Hamani.” Umwami ati: “Nimumubwire yinjire.”
Esther6:6 Hamani arinjira
Esther6:7 Nuko asubiza umwami ati: “Nyagasani
Esther6:8 umwambike umwambaro wawe wa cyami
Esther6:9 Umwe mu bikomangoma byawe bikomeye umushinge kuzana uwo mwambaro n'ifarasi. Uwo muntu umwami yifuza guha icyubahiro bamwambike uwo mwambaro
Esther6:10 Nuko umwami abwira Hamani ati: “Ihute ufate umwambaro n'ifarasi
Esther6:11 Hamani ajya kuzana umwambaro n'ifarasi awambika Moridekayi
Esther6:12 Nyuma y'ibyo Moridekayi asubira ku kazi ibwami
Esther6:13 Agezeyo atekerereza umugore we Zereshi n'incuti ze zose ibyamubayeho. Abajyanama be n'umugore we baramubwira bati: “Moridekayi uwo watangiye kugutesha agaciro
Esther6:14 Bakivugana na we ibyegera by'umwami biba birahageze
Esther7:1 Umwami na Hamani basubira gutaramana n'Umwamikazi Esiteri
Esther7:2 incuro ya kabiri. Bakiri mu gitaramo bica akanyota
Esther7:3 Umwamikazi Esiteri aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
Esther7:4 Jyewe na bene wacu twaraguzwe kugira ngo turimburwe
Esther7:5 Umwami Ahashuwerusi abaza Umwamikazi Esiteri ati: “Umuntu wahangaye kugira bene uwo mugambi ni nde
Esther7:6 Esiteri aramusubiza ati: “Ni uwo mugome Hamani
Esther7:7 Umwami ni ko kurakara cyane asohoka mu gitaramo ajya mu busitani bw'ingoro. Hamani abonye ko umwami yamufatiye icyemezo
Esther7:8 Umwami avuye mu busitani agarutse mu cyumba basangiriragamo
Esther7:9 Haribona umwe mu byegera by'umwami by'inkone
Esther7:10 Hamani amanikwa kuri cya giti yari yateganyirije Moridekayi. Bityo umwami abona gucururuka.
Esther8:1 Uwo munsi Umwami Ahashuwerusi agabira Umwamikazi Esiteri ibyahoze ari ibya Hamani
Esther8:2 yikuramo impeta ye ya cyami yari yambuye Hamani ayiha Moridekayi. Esiteri na we ashinga Moridekayi ibyahoze ari ibya Hamani.
Esther8:3 Esiteri yongera gusanga umwami amwikubita imbere arira. Amwingingira kuvuguruza umugambi wa kigome Hamani ukomoka kuri Agagi
Esther8:4 Nuko umwami atunga Esiteri inkoni ya cyami y'izahabu. Esiteri arahaguruka ahagarara imbere y'umwami
Esther8:5 aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
Esther8:6 Mbese rwose nakwihanganira nte kubona icyago nk'icyo kigwirira bene wacu? Ese nakwihanganira nte kubona batsemba ubwoko bwanjye?”
Esther8:7 Umwami Ahashuwerusi asubiza Umwamikazi Esiteri n'Umuyahudi Moridekayi ati: “Dore namanikishije Hamani ku giti kubera ko yashakaga kwicisha Abayahudi
Esther8:8 Noneho rero nimube ari mwe mwandika urwandiko mu izina ryanjye mukurikije icyo mubona kinogeye Abayahudi
Esther8:9 Uwo munsi ku itariki ya makumyabiri n'eshatu z'ukwezi kwa gatatu kwa Sivani
Esther8:10 Izo nzandiko bazandika mu izina ry'Umwami Ahashuwerusi
Esther8:11 Muri izo nzandiko umwami yahaga Abayahudi bari mu mijyi yose uburenganzira bwo kwishyira hamwe
Esther8:12 Mu bihugu by'Umwami Ahashuwerusi ubwo burenganzira bwari gukoreshwa umunsi umwe gusa
Esther8:13 Kopi y'urwo rwandiko igomba gutangazwa ho itegekoteka mu bihugu byose
Esther8:14 Nuko umwami atanga itegeko
Esther8:15 Moridekayi asohoka mu ngoro y'umwami yambaye umwambaro wa cyami w'isine n'uw'umweru
Esther8:16 Abayahudi baracya
Esther8:17 Mu bihugu byose no mu mijyi yose aho iryo tegekoteka ry'umwami ryageraga
Esther9:1 Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshatu z'ukwezi kwa Adari
Esther9:2 Mu mijyi bari batuyemo yo mu bihugu byose by'Umwami Ahashuwerusi
Esther9:3 Abatware n'abategetsi bashinzwe ibihugu bikomatanyije
Esther9:4 Koko rero Moridekayi yari akomeye ibwami
Esther9:5 Abayahudi bagirira ababangaga ibyo na bo babifurizaga. Bityo bamarira ku icumu abanzi babo bose
Esther9:6 Mu kigo ntamenwa cy'ibwami i Shushani honyine
Esther9:7 Bica kandi abahungu icumi ba Hamani mwene Hamedata umwanzi w'Abayahudi
