Esther9:9 
Esther9:10 
Esther9:11 Uwo munsi bamenyesha umwami umubare w'abiciwe mu kigo ntamenwa cy'ibwami i Shushani.
Esther9:12 Nuko abwira Umwamikazi Esiteri ati: “Mu kigo ntamenwa cy'ibwami i Shushani honyine
Esther9:13 Esiteri aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani niba bikunogeye
Esther9:14 Umwami ati: “Ni bibe bityo.” Nuko itegeko ritangazwa i Shushani
Esther9:15 Ku itariki ya cumi n'enye z'ukwezi kwa Adari
Esther9:16 Kandi ku itariki ya cumi n'eshatu z'ukwezi kwa Adari
Esther9:17 
Esther9:18 Naho Abayahudi b'i Shushani
Esther9:19 Ngiyo impamvu ituma Abayahudi batuye mu nsisiro zo mu cyaro bizihiza itariki ya cumi n'enye z'ukwezi kwa Adari
Esther9:20 Ibyo byose Moridekayi arabyandika
Esther9:21 Ababwira ishyirwaho ry'umunsi mukuru bazajya bizihiza buri mwaka
Esther9:22 Koko rero kuri iyo minsi yombi Abayahudi bikijije abanzi babo
Esther9:23 Abayahudi biyemeza gukurikiza amabwiriza ya Moridekayi
Esther9:24 Umwanzi w'Abayahudi bose Hamani mwene Hamedata ukomoka kuri Agagi
Esther9:25 Ariko umwami amenye ubwo bugambanyi
Esther9:26 Ni yo mpamvu iyo minsi yiswe iminsi mikuru ya Purimu
Esther9:27 Nuko bishyiriraho iyo minsi yombi
Esther9:28 Byongeye kandi imiryango yose y'Abayahudi bo mu mijyi yose y'ibihugu byose
Esther9:29 Umwamikazi Esiteri umukobwa w'Abihayili
Esther9:30 Kopi z'urwo rwandiko zohererezwa Abayahudi bose bari mu bihugu ijana na makumyabiri na birindwi by'Umwami Ahashuwerusi
Esther9:31 Izo nzandiko zashimangiraga ishyirwaho ry'iminsi mikuru ya Purimu ku matariki yagenwe
Esther9:32 Itegeko rya Esiteri rishimangira ibyerekeye Purimu
Esther10:1 Umwami Ahashuwerusi ategeka ko abatuye mu birwa n'abatuye mu bihugu bagomba gusora.
Esther10:2 Ibikorwa by'umwami byose bikomeye n'ububasha bwe
Esther10:3 Koko rero Umuyahudi Moridekayi yabaye uwa kabiri ku Mwami Ahashuwerusi. Abayahudi bene wabo baramwubahaga kandi bakamukunda. Yabashakiraga ibyiza kandi agaharanira ko bagira amahoro.
Job1:1 Mu gihugu cya Usi hari hatuye umugabo witwaga Yobu. Yari intungane n'umunyamurava
Job1:2 Yari yarabyaye abahungu barindwi n'abakobwa batatu.
Job1:3 Yari atunze intama ibihumbi birindwi n'ingamiya ibihumbi bitatu
Job1:4 Abahungu ba Yobu bajyaga batumirana mu ngo zabo bakagira ibirori
Job1:5 Iyo iminsi y'ibirori yabaga irangiye
Job1:6 Umunsi umwe abana b'Imana bagiye gushengerera Uhoraho
Job1:7 Uhoraho abaza Satani ati: “Uturutse he?” Satani aramusubiza ati: “Mvuye kuzerera ku isi no kuyitambagira.”
Job1:8 Uhoraho aramubaza ati: “Mbese wiboneye umugaragu wanjye Yobu? Nta wundi muntu uhwanye na we ku isi
Job1:9 Satani asubiza Uhoraho ati: “Ese Mana ugira ngo Yobu akubahira ubusa?
Job1:10 Waramurinze impande zose
Job1:11 Ngaho mwambure ibyo atunze byose
Job1:12 Uhoraho abwira Satani ati: “Dore ibya Yobu byose ndabikweguriye
Job1:13 Umunsi umwe abahungu n'abakobwa ba Yobu bari bateraniye kwa mukuru wabo
Job1:14 Haza umuntu abwira Yobu ati: “Ya mapfizi yawe yahingaga
Job1:15 Abasheba bagabye igitero barazinyaga. Abashumba bazo babatsembye
Job1:16 Akivuga ibyo undi aba arahageze
Job1:17 Akivuga ibyo undi aba arahageze
Job1:18 Akivuga ibyo undi aba arahageze
Job1:19 nuko inkubi y'umuyaga iturutse mu butayu ihitana inzu yose irabagwira barapfa
Job1:20 Yobu ni ko guhaguruka ashishimura umwambaro we
Job1:21 Aravuga ati: “Navuye mu nda ya mama nta cyo mfite
Job1:22 Muri ayo makuba yose
Job2:1 Umunsi umwe abana b'Imana bagiye gushengerera Uhoraho
Job2:2 Uhoraho abaza Satani ati: “Uturutse he?” Satani aramusubiza ati: “Mvuye kuzerera ku isi no kuyitambagira.”
Job2:3 Uhoraho abaza Satani ati: “Mbese wiboneye umugaragu wanjye Yobu? Nta wundi muntu uhwanye na we ku isi
Job2:4 Satani asubiza Uhoraho ati: “Erega ibyo umuntu atunze byose
Job2:5 Ngaho muvune igufwa cyangwa ugire indi ndwara umuteza
Job2:6 Uhoraho aramubwira ati: “Dore Yobu ndamukweguriye ariko ntumwice.”
Job2:7 Nuko Satani ava imbere y'Uhoraho maze atera Yobu indwara z'uruhu
Job2:8 Yobu yishakira urujyo rwo kwishimisha akajya yiyicarira mu ivu.
Job2:9 Umugore we aramubwira ati: “Harya ngo ntuzatezuka kuba indahemuka
Job2:10 Yobu aramusubiza ati: “Uvuze nk'umugore w'umupfapfa. Mbese twakwemera ibyiza gusa Imana iduha
Job2:11 Incuti eshatu za Yobu ari zo Elifazi w'Umutemani
Job2:12 Bamukubise amaso bakiri kure baramuyoberwa
Job2:13 Nuko bicarana na we hasi
Job3:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Yobu afata ijambo
Job3:2 aravuga ati:
Job3:3 “Nihavumwe umunsi navutseho
Job3:4 Uwo munsi uragacura umwijima
Job3:5 Nube umunsi w'icuraburindi
Job3:6 Iryo joro niricure umwijima
Job3:7 Ni koko iryo joro niribe ingumba
Job3:8 Abacunnyi nibavume iryo joro
Job3:9 Inyenyeri z'urukerera rwaryo nizicure umwijima
Job3:10 Koko ntiryazibye inda yambyaye
Job3:11 “Ni kuki ntapfiriye mu nda ya mama? Kuki ntapfuye nkivuka?
Job3:12 Ni kuki mama yankikiye ku bibero? Ni kuki yanyonkeje?
Job3:13 None mba ntuje mu mva yanjye
Job3:14 mba nsinziranye n'abami n'abategetsi
Job3:15 Mba nsinziriye hamwe n'ibikomangoma
Job3:16 Erega iyo mba nk'inda yavuyemo
Job3:17 Mu mva ni ho abagome bashira ubukana
Job3:18 Imfungwa zirishyira zikizana
Job3:19 Mu mva ukomeye n'uworoheje baba bamwe
Job3:20 “Ni kuki Imana ireka umunyamibabaro akavuka? Kuki iha ubuzima uwavukanye amaganya?
Job3:21 Bashaka urupfu ntibarubone
Job3:22 Banezezwa no gupfa
Job3:23 Ni kuki ndi umuntu utazi iyo agana? Imana yantangatanze impande zose!
Job3:24 Aho kugira icyo ndya ndaganya
Job3:25 Icyo ntinya ni cyo kiba
Job3:26 Simfite amahoro simfite ituze
Job4:1 Nuko Elifazi w'Umutemani abwira Yobu ati:
Job4:2 “Mbese ningira icyo nkubwira urabyihanganira? None se ni nde wabasha kwifata ntavuge?
Job4:3 Dore wigishije abantu benshi
Job4:4 inama watangaga zaramiraga abadandabirana
Job4:5 None dore ni wowe amakuba yugarije
Job4:6 Kuba warubahaga Imana ukagira n'imigenzereze myiza
Job4:7 Ngaho tekereza
Job4:8 Ababiba ibibi n'abateza amakuba ni byo basarura
Job4:9 Bombi Imana ibahumekeraho ikabatsemba
Job4:10 Icecekesha imitontomo y'intare n'urusaku rwazo
Job4:11 Intare ishaje yicwa no kubura umuhigo
Job4:12 “Ijambo ry'ibanga ringezeho
Job4:13 Ryangezeho nijoro igihe narotaga
Job4:14 Nahiye ubwoba mpinda umushyitsi
Job4:15 Umuyaga wampushye mu maso
Job4:16 Nabonye umuntu uhagaze imbere yanjye
Job4:17 ‘Mbese umuntu yarusha Imana kuba intungane? Ese umuntu yarusha Umuremyi we kubonera?
Job4:18 Abagaragu bayo bo mu ijuru na bo ntibagirira icyizere
Job4:19 None se yagirira ite icyizere abantu yaremye
Job4:20 Mu gitondo abantu baba bahumeka
Job4:21 Ukubaho kwabo kuba kurangiye
Job5:1 “Hamagara urebe niba hari ukwitaba. Ese hari uwo mu baziranenge watakambira?
Job5:2 Koko umupfapfa yicwa n'agahinda
Job5:3 Niboneye umupfapfa uguwe neza
Job5:4 Urubyaro rwe ntirukagire kivurira
Job5:5 Ibyo yasaruye nibiribwe n'abandi
Job5:6 Umubabaro ntukomoka mu mukungugu
Job5:7 Koko umuntu avukira kuruha
Job5:8 “Ndi nkawe natakambira Imana
Job5:9 Ibyo ikora birenze ubwenge bw'abantu
Job5:10 Ivubira imvura ubutaka
Job5:11 Aboroheje irabakuza
Job5:12 Iburizamo imigambi y'abariganya
Job5:13 Ifatira abanyabwenge mu mutego w'uburiganya bwabo
Job5:14 Ku manywa bitwara nk'abari mu mwijima
Job5:15 Imana ni yo ikiza utishoboye
Job5:16 Iha icyizere utishoboye
Job5:17 Erega hahirwa umuntu Imana ikosora! Ntukange gukosorwa na Nyirububasha.
Job5:18 “Ni yo irema uruguma
Job5:19 Izagukiza amakuba incuro nyinshi
Job5:20 Izagukiza urupfu mu gihe cy'inzara
Job5:21 Izakurinda intonganya z'abantu
Job5:22 Icyorezo n'inzara nibitera uzabiseka
Job5:23 Imirima uhinga ntizarangwamo amabuye
Job5:24 Amahoro azaganza iwawe
Job5:25 Urubyaro rwawe ruzagwira
Job5:26 Nk'uko ingano zisarurwa zeze
Job5:27 Ibyo twarabigenzuye dusanga ari uko biri
Job6:1 Nuko Yobu arasubiza ati:
Job6:2 “Iyaba umubabaro wanjye wapimwaga
Job6:3 byarusha uburemere umusenyi wo ku nyanja
Job6:4 Imyambi y'Imana Nyirububasha yarampinguranyije
Job6:5 Mbese indogobe y'ishyamba yakwabira ifite ubwatsi? Ese impfizi yo yakwivuga iri mu rwuri irisha?
Job6:6 Mbese ibyokurya bidafite icyanga byaribwa nta munyu? None se mu murenda w'igi wabonamo uburyohe?
Job6:7 Ibyo byokurya simbigirira ipfa
Job6:8 “Icyampa Imana ikampa icyo nyisaba
Job6:9 Icyampa ikemera kunyica
Job6:10 Nzanezerwa cyane mu mubabaro wanjye
Job6:11 Mfite mbaraga ki zo gukomeza kubaho? Ese ntegereje iki ko nta cyo nizeye?
Job6:12 None se ndemwe mu mabuye? Ese umubiri wanjye uremwe mu muringa?
Job6:13 Nta cyo ngishoboye kwimarira
Job6:14 “Uwihebye agirwa n'incuti
Job6:15 Abavandimwe banjye barambeshya
Job6:16 Mu itumba twuzuramo urubura
Job6:17 Mu gihe cy'ubushyuhe turakama
Job6:18 Abagenzi barorongotana bashaka amazi
Job6:19 Abagenzi b'i Tema baza barangamiye utwo tugezi
Job6:20 Bamwajwe n'uko utwo tugezi twakamye
Job6:21 Namwe muri nk'utwo tugezi
Job6:22 Mbese hari uwo nigeze nsaba impano? Ese hari uwo nasabye kuntangira icyiru?
Job6:23 Mbese hari uwo nasabye kunkura mu maboko y'umwanzi? Ese hari uwo nasabye kunkiza abankandamiza?
Job6:24 Nimunyigishe ndaceceka
Job6:25 Amagambo y'ukuri ntakomeretsa
Job6:26 Mbese murashaka guhinyura ibyo mvuze? Amagambo y'uwihebye ni nk'umuyaga.
Job6:27 Mushobora gufindira impfubyi
Job6:28 None nimunyitegereze
Job6:29 Nimungarukire ndabasabye ntimucumure
Job6:30 Mbese mutekereza ko mvuga ibinyoma? Ese mwibwira ko ntazi gutandukanya icyatsi n'ururo?
Job7:1 “Ku isi umuntu agira umurimo uruhije
Job7:2 Ni nk'iy'inkoreragahato ishaka amafu
Job7:3 Ni ko nanjye nagenewe amezi y'impfabusa
Job7:4 Iyo ndyamye ndibaza nti: ‘Ndabyuka ryari?’ Ijoro ryaba rirerire nkagaragurika kugeza bukeye.
Job7:5 Umubiri wanjye urajagata inyo wuzuyeho imyanda
Job7:6 Iminsi yo kubaho kwanjye irihuta cyane
Job7:7 “Mana
Job7:8 Undeba ubu ntazongera kumbona
Job7:9 Uko igihu cyeyuka kigashira
Job7:10 Ntazagaruka iwe ukundi
Job7:11 Singishoboye kwiyumanganya
Job7:12 Kuki ukomeza kungenzura? Mbese ugira ngo ndi inyanja? Cyangwa ugira ngo ndi igikōko nyamunini cyo muri yo?
Job7:13 Iyo ndyamye nibwira ko mbona agahenge
Job7:14 nyamara unteza inzozi zikantera ubwoba
Job7:15 Ibyo bituma nifuza icyaniga ngapfa
Job7:16 Ndizinutswe singishaka kubaho
Job7:17 “Mbese umuntu ni iki byatuma umwitaho? Umuntu ni iki byatuma umuzirikana?
Job7:18 Buri gitondo uramugenzura
Job7:19 Mbese uzareka ryari kumpozaho ijisho? Wampaye agahenge nkamira amacandwe!
Job7:20 Ni ko se Murinzi w'abantu
Job7:21 Ni kuki utambabarira ibyaha byanjye? Ni kuki utampanaguraho ibicumuro? Dore ngiye kujya ikuzimu
Job8:1 Biludadi w'Umushuwa asubiza Yobu ati:
Job8:2 “Uzageza he kuvuga bene ibyo? Uzageza he kuvuga amagambo ameze nk'inkubi y'umuyaga?
Job8:3 Mbese Imana yahindura ubutabera? Ese Nyirububasha yagoreka ubutungane?
Job8:4 Niba abana bawe baracumuye
Job8:5 Wowe shakashaka Imana
Job8:6 Imana izakwitaho nuba intungane n'umunyamurava
Job8:7 Nubwo imibereho wabanje yari myiza
Job8:8 “Baza abatubanjirije kubaho
Job8:9 Twe turi ab'ejo nta cyo tuzi
Job8:10 Abatubanjirije bazakwigisha bagusobanurire
Job8:11 Mbese urufunzo rwamera ahatari igishanga? Ese uruseke rwatoha ahatari amazi?
Job8:12 Iyo rubuze amazi rukiri ruto rutaratemwa
Job8:13 Ayo ni yo maherezo y'abibagirwa Imana
Job8:14 Ibyiringiro bye bizashira
Job8:15 Yishingikiriza ku nzu ye ariko ntikomeye
Job8:16 Ameze nk'igiti gitohagiye igihe cy'impeshyi
Job8:17 Imizi yacyo ishora mu mabuye
Job8:18 Ariko iyo bakiranduye
Job8:19 Nguwo umunezero w'umuntu mubi
Job8:20 Imana ntitererana inyangamugayo
Job8:21 Izakuzuza umunezero
Job8:22 Abanzi bawe bazakorwa n'isoni
Job9:1 Nuko Yobu aramusubiza ati:
Job9:2 “Mu by'ukuri nzi ko ari ko biri. Mbese umuntu yashobora ate kuba intungane imbere y'Imana?
Job9:3 Iyo umuntu ashatse kujya impaka n'Imana
Job9:4 Ifite ubwenge buhanitse n'imbaraga zitangaje
Job9:5 Yimura imisozi itabizi
Job9:6 Itigisa isi ikayitirimura ku mfatiro zayo
Job9:7 Itegeka izuba ntirirase
Job9:8 Ni yo yonyine yāgūye ijuru
Job9:9 Ni yo yaremye inyenyeri zitwa Ikirura
Job9:10 Ikora ibikomeye birenze ubwenge bw'abantu
Job9:11 Iyo inyuze iruhande rwanjye sinyibona
Job9:12 Mbese igize icyo inyaga ni nde wayibaza? Ni nde wayibaza ati: ‘Uragira ibiki?’
Job9:13 Iyo Imana irakaye ntibyoroshye kwivuguruza
Job9:14 “None se jye nayisubiza iki? Nakura he amagambo yo kwiregura?
Job9:15 Nubwo ndi intungane nta cyo nayisubiza
Job9:16 Nubwo nayihamagara ikanyitaba
Job9:17 Imponyoza inkubi y'umuyaga ikamvunagura
Job9:18 Ntimpa agahenge ngo mpumeke
Job9:19 Nidupima imbaraga ni yo nyirazo
Job9:20 Nubwo naba intungane umunwa wanjye uzanshinja
Job9:21 Ndi umunyamurava ariko simbyiyiziho
Job9:22 Byose ni kimwe ni cyo gituma ngira nti: ‘Intungane n'umugome Imana ibahana kimwe.’
Job9:23 Iyo intungane ipfuye itunguwe Imana irabiseka.
Job9:24 Igihugu cyigaruriwe n'abagome
Job9:25 “Iminsi yo kubaho kwanjye irihuta kurusha uwiruka
Job9:26 Irihuta cyane nk'amato mu nyanja
Job9:27 Ndibwira nti: ‘Reka ndeke kuganya
Job9:28 Imibabaro yanjye intera ubwoba
Job9:29 Nzi ko Imana izanshinja icyaha
Job9:30 Nubwo nakwiyuhagira amazi y'urubogobogo
Job9:31 Imana yakongera kungaragura mu isayo
Job9:32 Imana si umuntu nkanjye ngo nyisubize
Job9:33 Icyampa ngo mbone unkiranura na yo
Job9:34 yakuraho ibihano yampaye
Job9:35 Icyo gihe navuga ntayishisha
Job10:1 “Ubuzima bwanjye ndabuzinutswe
Job10:2 Ndabwira Imana nti: ‘Ntuncire ho iteka’
Job10:3 Mbese ushimishwa no kunkandamiza? Ese ushimishwa no gusuzugura uwo waremye? Mbese ushyigikira imigambi y'abagome?
Job10:4 Ese Mana
Job10:5 Mbese ubaho iminsi mike nk'umuntu? Ese kurama kwawe ni nk'uk'umuntu?
Job10:6 None se kuki unshakishaho amakosa? Kuki ushishikazwa no kumbona mu cyaha?
Job10:7 Nyamara uzi neza ko ndi umwere
Job10:8 Ni wowe wambumbabumbye urandema
Job10:9 Ibuka ko wanyikuriye mu ibumba
Job10:10 Wansutse nk'ubuganiza amata
Job10:11 Wanteyeho inyama untwikiraho uruhu
Job10:12 Wangiriye neza umpa ubuzima
Job10:13 “Nyamara hari ibanga uhishe mu mutima wawe
Job10:14 Umpozaho ijisho ngo urebe ko ncumura
Job10:15 Niba ndi umunyabyaha ngushije ishyano
Job10:16 Iyo nubuye umutwe umpīga nk'uko intare ihīga
Job10:17 Unteza abandi banshinja
Job10:18 Ni kuki wemeye ko mvuka? Mba narapfuye ntawe uranca iryera
Job10:19 mba narabaye nk'utigeze kubaho
Job10:20 Erega iminsi yo kubaho kwanjye ni mike! Ndeka nishime akanya gato.
Job10:21 Dore ngiye kujya aho ntazagaruka
Job10:22 ni igihugu gicuze umwijima
Job11:1 Nuko Sofari w'Umunāmati aravuga ati:
Job11:2 “Mbese nta wagira icyo avuga kuri ibyo bigambo byose? Erega kuvuga menshi si byo bigira umuntu intungane!
Job11:3 Ayo mateshwa si yo yacecekesha abantu. Gukwena abantu kwawe si ko kwatuma udacyahwa!
Job11:4 Ndetse uravuga uti: ‘Inyigisho zanjye ziraboneye
Job11:5 Icyampa Imana ikagira icyo ikubwira
Job11:6 Yaguhishurira ibanga ry'ubwenge bwayo
Job11:7 “Mbese wabasha gucengera amayobera y'Imana? Ese wabasha gucengera ububasha bwayo?
Job11:8 Wabigenza ute ko buri hejuru y'amajuru? Wabusobanukirwa ute ko buri ikuzimu?
Job11:9 Uburebure bw'ububasha bwayo busumba isi
Job11:10 Mbese Imana icakiye umuntu ikamujyana mu rukiko
Job11:11 Koko rero imenya abantu b'imburamumaro
Job11:12 Indogobe y'ishyamba igize imico myiza
Job11:13 “Ngaho hinduka wihane
Job11:14 Waracumuye ntukongere bibaho
Job11:15 Bityo uzagendana ishema nta kimwaro
Job11:16 Koko ntuzongera kwibuka ingorane zawe zose
Job11:17 Imibereho yawe izaba myiza kurusha amanywa y'ihangu
Job11:18 Uzagira umutekano wuzuye icyizere
Job11:19 Uziruhukira ntawe uzakubangamira
Job11:20 Amaso y'inkozi z'ibibi azahera mu kirere
Job12:1 Nuko Yobu arabasubiza ati:
Job12:2 “Koko muri ijwi rya rubanda. Mbese nimupfa abanyabwenge bazabura kubaho?
Job12:3 Nanjye mfite ibitekerezo nkamwe
Job12:4 Incuti zanjye zampinduye urw'amenyo
Job12:5 Abadamaraye basuzugura abanyabyago
Job12:6 Abanyarugomo baguwe neza mu mazu yabo
Job12:7 “Ngaho rero igira ku nyamaswa uzasobanukirwa
Job12:8 Itegereze isi uyigireho
Job12:9 Ni ikihe muri ibi biremwa byose kidasobanukiwe
Job12:10 Ni we mugenga w'ubugingo bwa buri kiremwa
Job12:11 Dore ugutwi ntigusesengura amagambo
Job12:12 Ubwenge bugirwa n'abasaza
Job12:13 Nyamara Imana ni yo nyir'ubwenge n'ububasha
Job12:14 “Icyo ishenye ntawe ugisana
Job12:15 Iyo yimanye imvura amapfa aracana
Job12:16 Imana ni yo nyir'imbaraga n'ubutwari
Job12:17 Irindagiza abanyabwenge
Job12:18 Inyaga abami ubutegetsi
Job12:19 Abatambyi ibagira abatindi
Job12:20 Icecekesha abiringirwa
Job12:21 Abanyacyubahiro ibakoza isoni
Job12:22 Ikuraho umwijima w'ikuzimu
Job12:23 Ni yo ikomeza amahanga ikanayarimbura
Job12:24 Abategetsi bo ku isi ibagira ibipfamutima
Job12:25 Barindagira mu mwijima w'icuraburindi
Job13:1 “Koko rero ibyo byose narabyiboneye
Job13:2 Ibyo muzi nanjye ndabizi
Job13:3 Ndashaka kwivuganira n'Imana Nyirububasha
Job13:4 Mwebwe muri abanyabinyoma
Job13:5 Icyampa mugaceceka rwose
Job13:6 Nimwumve ibitekerezo byanjye
Job13:7 Mbese mwibwira ko mukorera Imana muvuga amafuti? Mwaba se muyivugira kandi muri abanyabinyoma?
Job13:8 Ese murashaka kuba mu ruhande rw'Imana? Cyangwa se murashaka kuyiburanira?
Job13:9 Mbese ibagenzuye byababera byiza? Ese murashaka kuyibeshya nk'ubeshya umuntu?
Job13:10 N'iyo mwabogama rwihishwa
Job13:11 Mbese icyubahiro cyayo nticyabatera ubwoba? Ese igitinyiro cyayo nticyabagwa gitumo?
Job13:12 Impanuro zanyu nta cyo zimaze ni nk'ivu
Job13:13 Nimuceceke mureke mvuge
Job13:14 Niteguye gushyira ubugingo bwanjye mu kaga
Job13:15 Nubwo Imana yanyica nta cyo nari maze
Job13:16 Ibi ni byo bizamviramo agakiza
Job13:17 Nimwite ku byo mbabwira
Job13:18 Dore niteguye urubanza
Job13:19 Mbese ni nde uza kunshinja? Niba ahari ndemera kwicwa ncecetse.
Job13:20 “Mana
Job13:21 Undinde akaboko kawe kanshikamiye
Job13:22 Erega numpamagara nzakwitaba! Cyangwa reka nkubwire nawe unsubize.
Job13:23 Mbese ibicumuro n'ibyaha byanjye ni bingahe? Nsobanurira ikosa n'icyaha nakoze.
Job13:24 Mbese kuki umpunza amaso? Ese kuki umfata nk'umwanzi wawe?
Job13:25 Dore ndi nk'ikibabi kigurutswa n'umuyaga
Job13:26 Umfatira ibyemezo bikaze
Job13:27 Ntutuma nishyira ngo nizane
Job13:28 Ndashanguka nk'igiti cyamunzwe
Job14:1 “Umuntu abyarwa n'umugore
Job14:2 Ameze nk'ururabyo rukura rugahita rwuma
Job14:3 Mana
Job14:4 Mbese hari umwere wava mu muntu wanduye? Ntibishoboka nta n'umwe.
Job14:5 Iminsi yo kubaho k'umuntu irabaze
Job14:6 Reka kumugenzura yishyire yizane
Job14:7 “Igiti gitemwe kigira icyizere ko kizongera gushibuka
Job14:8 Nubwo imizi yacyo yasazira mu butaka
Job14:9 iyo kibonye amazi kirashibuka
Job14:10 Iyo umuntu apfuye imbaraga ze ziba zishize
Job14:11 Uko amazi y'inyanja akama
Job14:12 umuntu upfuye na we ntiyongera kubaho

Job14:16 Ubwo ni bwo uzita ku migendere yanjye

Job14:19 Uko amazi avungura amabuye

Job15:1 Nuko Elifazi w'Umutemani asubiza Yobu ati:
Job15:2 “Mbese umunyabwenge yavuga amagambo y'impfabusa? Ese yakomeza kwishyiramo amagambo adafite ishingiro?
Job15:3 Mbese yakwireguza amagambo adafite akamaro? Ese yakomeza kuvuga amagambo y'imburamumaro?
Job15:4 Erega noneho kubaha Imana ubikuyeho
Job15:5 Gucumura kwawe ni ko kugutera kuvuga ibyo
Job15:6 Ibyo uvuga ni byo bigucira urubanza ntabwo ari jye
Job15:7 “Mbese Yobu
Job15:8 Mbese wumvise ibyavugiwe mu nama z'Imana? Waba se warikubiye ubwenge bwose?
Job15:9 Icyo uzi twe tutazi ni iki? Ni iki wamenya twe tudasanzwe tuzi?
Job15:10 Muri twe hari abasheshe akanguhe n'inararibonye
Job15:11 Mbese ihumure Imana iguha ntirikunyuze? Ese amagambo meza tukubwira ntakunyuze?
Job15:12 “Ni kuki umutima wawe uguhabya? Ni kuki amaso yawe arebana uburakari?
Job15:13 Ni kuki urebana Imana umujinya? Ni kuki uhangara kuyamagana?
Job15:14 Mbese koko umuntu yabasha kuba umwere? Ese umuntu buntu yaba intungane ate?
Job15:15 Niba Imana itiringira abamarayika bayo
Job15:16 umuntu wononekaye byamugendekera bite
Job15:17 “Ntega amatwi ngire icyo ngusobanurira
Job15:18 ndakubwira ibyo abanyabwenge bavuze
Job15:19 Ni bo Imana yari yaragabiye igihugu
Job15:20 Umugome ahorana uburibwe igihe cyose akiriho
Job15:21 Amatwi ye ntahwema kumva ibimutera ubwoba
Job15:22 Ntiyiringira ko azarokoka urupfu
Job15:23 Akubita hirya no hino ashaka ibyokurya
Job15:24 Amakuba n'ishavu bimuhagarika umutima
Job15:25 Koko rero yarwanyije Imana
Job15:26 Yirutse agamitse ijosi ajya kurwanya Imana
Job15:27 “Koko yari abyibushye mu maso yaramiramije
Job15:28 nyamara yari atuye mu mijyi yasenyutse
Job15:29 Uwo muntu ntazaba umukire
Job15:30 Ntateze guhunga urupfu
Job15:31 “Ntakishuke yiringira ibitagira umumaro
Job15:32 Ameze nk'ishami ryuma imburagihe
Job15:33 Azamera nk'umuzabibu uhunguka imbuto zikiri mbisi
Job15:34 Koko agatsiko k'abahakanamana kazazima
Job15:35 Batwita ubugizi bwa nabi bakabyara amakuba
Job16:1 Nuko Yobu arabasubiza ati:
Job16:2 “Numvise amagambo menshi nk'ayo
Job16:3 Mbese amagambo yawe y'impfabusa ntashira? Ni iki kigutera gusubiza utyo?
Job16:4 Iyaba mwari mumeze nkanjye
Job16:5 Inama nabagira zabakomeza
Job16:6 “Nyamara iyo mvuze uburibwe bwanjye ntibucogora
Job16:7 Erega ubu Imana yaranjahaje
Job16:8 Iminkanyari yanteje ku mubiri ni cyo kimenyetso
Job16:9 Imana irandakarira ikantanyaguza
Job16:10 Abantu barampagurukiye banyasamiye
Job16:11 Imana yangabije abagizi ba nabi
Job16:12 Yampungabanyije nari nguwe neza
Job16:13 Imyambi inturuka impande zose
Job16:14 Incakira nk'umurwanyi
Job16:15 Mpora nambaye imyambaro igaragaza akababaro
Job16:16 Amaso yanjye yatukujwe no guhora ndira
Job16:17 nyamara ntawe nagiriye urugomo
Job16:18 “Wa si we
Job16:19 Erega mfite umurengezi mu ijuru! Koko rero umurengezi wanjye ari mu ijuru.
Job16:20 Incuti zanjye zo zirankoba
Job16:21 Umurengezi wanjye nankiranure n'Imana
Job16:22 Nangoboke iminsi yanjye ni mbarwa
Job17:1 “Umwuka wanjye ugiye guhera
Job17:2 Koko nkikijwe n'abakobanyi
Job17:3 Mana
Job17:4 Incuti zanjye wazihinduye umutima ntizasobanukirwa
Job17:5 Mbese ni nk'utumira incuti akazidabagiza
Job17:6 “Imana yangize iciro ry'imigani
Job17:7 Amaso yanjye ntakibona kubera ishavu
Job17:8 Abantu b'indakemwa birabatangaza
Job17:9 Icyakora intungane ntizizatezuka ku migirire yazo
Job17:10 Ngaho mwebwe mwese nimugaruke
Job17:11 “Iminsi yo kubaho kwanjye irashize
Job17:12 Incuti zanjye ijoro ziryita amanywa
Job17:13 Iyo nzirikanye ko iwanjye ari ikuzimu
Job17:14 mbwira imva nti: ‘Umbereye data’
Job17:15 None se icyizere cyanjye kiri he? Ni nde uzi amaherezo yanjye?
Job17:16 Mbese icyo cyizere nzamanukana na cyo ikuzimu? Ese nzajyana na cyo mu mva?”
Job18:1 Nuko Biludadi w'Umushuwa asubiza Yobu ati:
Job18:2 “Muzareka kuvuga amagambo nk'ayo ryari? Nimushyire mu gaciro maze tuganire.
Job18:3 Yobu
Job18:4 Erega uburakari bwawe buragukomeretsa! Mbese wibwira ko isi izarimbuka kubera wowe? Ese Imana izashyigure ibitare?
Job18:5 “Imibereho y'umugome izazima
Job18:6 imibereho y'abe izacura umwijima
Job18:7 Yagendanaga imbaraga none acitse intege
Job18:8 Ubwe azishorera yigushe mu mutego
Job18:9 Umutego uzamufata agatsinsino
Job18:10 Umutego utezwe mu butaka uzamushibukana
Job18:11 Ibitera ubwoba bimuturuka impande zose
Job18:12 “Yari umunyambaraga none acogojwe n'inzara
Job18:13 Icyo cyago kizamutemagura uruhu
Job18:14 Azaturumburwa mu rugo rwe rwari mu mutekano
Job18:15 Urugo rwe ruzahumanuzwa amazuku
Job18:16 Azamera nk'igiti cyumye
Job18:17 “Ku isi ntawe uzongera kumwibuka ukundi
Job18:18 Azamburwa ubuzima ashyirwe ikuzimu
Job18:19 Ntazasiga imbuto azazima
Job18:20 Ab'iburasirazuba n'iburengerazuba bazumva ibye
Job18:21 Koko ayo ni yo maherezo y'inkozi z'ibibi
Job19:1 Nuko Yobu arabasubiza ati:
Job19:2 “Muzahereza he kunkura umutima? Muzageza ryari kunshengura n'amagambo yanyu?
Job19:3 Dore bubaye ubwa cumi muntuka
Job19:4 Niba koko hari icyo nakosheje
Job19:5 Niba koko mushaka kunyigamba ho
Job19:6 nimumenye ko Imana ari yo yanteje aka kaga
Job19:7 Ndatabaza ariko sindenganurwa.
Job19:8 Yishe inzira kugira ngo ntabona aho nyura
Job19:9 Imana ni yo yanyaze ikuzo ryanjye
Job19:10 Yambujije epfo na ruguru ndi nyakwigendera
Job19:11 Uburakari bwayo bwangurumaniyeho
Job19:12 Ingabo zayo zishyira hamwe zintera
Job19:13 “Yantandukanyije n'abavandimwe banjye
Job19:14 Bene wacu barantereranye
Job19:15 Abashyitsi banjye n'abaja banjye bose bamfata nk'umunyamahanga
Job19:16 Mpamagara umugaragu wanjye ntanyitabe
Job19:17 Umugore wanjye ntiyihanganira umunuko wanjye
Job19:18 Abana bato basigaye bansuzugura
Job19:19 Incuti zanjye zaranzinutswe
Job19:20 Uruhu rwanjye rwumiye ku magufwa
Job19:21 “Ncuti zanjye
Job19:22 Mbese kuki muntoteza nk'Imana? Ese ntimurambirwa kungirira nabi?
Job19:23 Iyaba amagambo mvuga yandikwaga! Iyaba yari yanditswe mu gitabo
Job19:24 iyaba yari yandikishijwe umusyi w'icyuma
Job19:25 “Nyamara nzi ko umucunguzi wanjye ariho
Job19:26 Uyu mubiri wanjye numara kubora
Job19:27 Nzayirebera ubwanjye imbonankubone
Job19:28 Muravuga muti: ‘Ese twamugirira nabi dute?’
Job19:29 Namwe murajye mutinya inkota y'Uhoraho
Job20:1 Nuko Sofari w'Umunāmati abwira Yobu ati:
Job20:2 “Ibitekerezo byanjye bindwaniramo
Job20:3 Numvise kuncyaha kwawe kunkojeje isoni
Job20:4 Zirikana uko Imana igenza abagome kuva kera kose
Job20:5 Koko ibyishimo by'abagome bimara igihe gito
Job20:6 Nubwo igihagararo cye cyakora ku ijuru
Job20:7 azashiraho burundu amere nk'amazirantoki ye
Job20:8 Koko uwo muntu azamera nk'inzozi ziyoyoka
Job20:9 Uwari umuzi ntazongera kumuca iryera
Job20:10 Abana be bazariha abakene ibyo yabambuye
Job20:11 Nubwo akiyumvamo ubusore n'imbaraga
Job20:12 Nubwo icyaha kimuryohēra
Job20:13 nubwo yagumya akakinyunguta
Job20:14 ibyo byokurya bizamugwa nabi
Job20:15 Umutungo w'abandi yariye azawuryozwa
Job20:16 Yanyunyuje ubumara bw'inzoka
Job20:17 Ntazongera kubona ya mavuta atemba nk'imigezi
Job20:18 Ibyo yaruhiye azabisubiza atabiriye
Job20:19 Koko yakandamije abakene ntiyabitaho
Job20:20 Koko rero ahorana umururumba ntanyurwe
Job20:21 Nta kintu cyamutakobwa atagiconshomeye
Job20:22 Nubwo azaba akungahaye ishavu rizamushengura
Job20:23 Ubwo azaba ahugiye mu kuzuza inda ye
Job20:24 Azizibukira inkota
Job20:25 Azikura umwambi wamuhinguranyije
Job20:26 Umwijima w'icuraburindi uramutegereje
Job20:27 Ijuru rizamushinja ibyaha bye
Job20:28 Ubukungu bwe buzayoyoka bushire
Job20:29 Ngayo amaherezo Imana yateganyirije umugome
Job21:1 Nuko Yobu arabasubiza ati:
Job21:2 “Nimutege amatwi mwite ku byo mvuga
Job21:3 Munyihanganire ntimunce mu ijambo
Job21:4 Ese aho ntimugira ngo ndinubira umuntu? None se ni iki cyatuma ntarambirwa?
Job21:5 Ngaho nimundebe murumirwa
Job21:6 Iyo ntekereje ibyambayeho nshya ubwoba
Job21:7 Ni kuki abagome barama? Ni kuki bagera mu zabukuru bagifite imbaraga?
Job21:8 Bakomeza kubana n'urubyaro rwabo
Job21:9 Ingo zabo ziganjemo amahoro
Job21:10 Amapfizi yabo arororoka
Job21:11 Bareka abana babo bakiruka nk'imitavu
Job21:12 Bavuza ingoma n'inanga
Job21:13 Imyaka yo kubaho kwabo bayimara banezerewe
Job21:14 Nyamara babwira Imana bati: ‘Have tubise
Job21:15 Mbese Nyirububasha ni nde byatuma tumuyoboka? Kumusenga se byo byatwungura iki?’
Job21:16 Bibwira ko amahirwe bayakesha imbaraga zabo
Job21:17 Ni kangahe wabonye abagome bapfa bakenyutse? Ni kangahe bagwiririrwa n'amakuba? Ni kangahe Imana yabateje uburakari bwayo?
Job21:18 Ni kangahe babaye nk'icyatsi gitwawe n'umuyaga? Ni kangahe babaye nk'umurama utumurwa na serwakira?
Job21:19 Muravuga muti: ‘Imana ihanira abana ibyaha bya ba se’
Job21:20 Umugome ubwe niyirebere igihano cye
Job21:21 Mbese iyo umugome amaze gupfa
Job21:22 Ese umuntu ni we wigisha Imana ubwenge
Job21:23 Hariho umuntu upfa agifite amagara mazima
Job21:24 apfa yari abyibushye
Job21:25 Undi na we apfana intimba ku mutima
Job21:26 Abo bombi bahambwa kimwe
Job21:27 Erega nzi neza ibyo mutekereza
Job21:28 Muribaza muti: ‘Inzu ya cya gikomerezwa iri he? Urwo rugo rw'abagome ruri he?’
Job21:29 Ese hari icyo mwabajije abagenzi? Mwaba se muhinyura ibyo bahamije?
Job21:30 Iyo amakuba yateye umugome ararokoka
Job21:31 Ni nde wahangara kumushinja? Ni nde wamwitura ibyo yakoze?
Job21:32 Iyo apfuye ajyanwa mu irimbi
Job21:33 Abantu benshi baramuherekeza bakamushyingura
Job21:34 None se ko mugerageza kumpumuriza
Job22:1 Nuko Elifazi w'Umutemani aravuga ati:
Job22:2 “Mbese umuntu yaba ingirakamaro ku Mana? Ese ubundi umunyabwenge yigirira akamaro?
Job22:3 Mbese iyo ubaye intungane Nyirububasha yunguka iki? Ni iki yunguka iyo imigenzereze yawe iboneye?
Job22:4 Mbese yaba agucyaha akuziza ko umwubaha? Ese yaba ari yo mpamvu ituma agucira urubanza?
Job22:5 Aho ntiyaba aguhōra ubugome bwawe bwinshi
Job22:6 Dore waka abavandimwe bawe ingwate nta mpamvu
Job22:7 Abaguye agacuho wabimye amazi
Job22:8 Abanyambaraga ni bo warekeye igihugu
Job22:9 Abapfakazi wabasezereye amara masa
Job22:10 Ni cyo gituma ufashwe n'imitego
Job22:11 Dore umeze nk'uri mu icuraburindi
Job22:12 Imana iganje mu ijuru
Job22:13 Nyamara urabaza uti: ‘Ese Imana hari icyo yiyiziye
Job22:14 Ibicu bibuditse birayikingiriza ntigire icyo ibona
Job22:15 Mbese wiyemeje gukurikiza imigenzereze ya kera? Ese wiyemeje gukurikiza imigenzereze y'inkozi z'ibibi?
Job22:16 Inkozi z'ibibi zirakenyutse
Job22:17 Zibwira Imana ziti: ‘Have tubise
Job22:18 Nyamara ni we wujuje amazu yazo ibyiza
Job22:19 Intungane zizabona urwo bapfuye zishime
Job22:20 ‘Koko abanzi bacu bashizeho
Job22:21 Ngaho iyunge n'Imana uzagira amahoro
Job22:22 Emera amabwiriza ikwihera ubwayo
Job22:23 Garukira Nyirububasha azagukomeza
Job22:24 Izahabu yawe nziza cyane uyijugunye mu bishingwe
Job22:25 Bityo Nyirububasha azakubera nk'izahabu
Job22:26 Koko rero uzanezerwa ubikesha Nyirububasha
Job22:27 Uzayisenga yite ku masengesho yawe
Job22:28 Icyo uzagambirira gukora uzakigeraho
Job22:29 Erega Imana icisha bugufi abirasi
Job22:30 Imana ikunda kurokora umwere
Job23:1 Yobu arabasubiza ati:
Job23:2 “Na n'ubu ndacyivovotera Imana
Job23:3 Iyaba nari nzi aho nabona Imana! Iyaba nabashaga kugera aho ituye!
Job23:4 Nayisanga nkayibwira akababaro kanjye
Job23:5 Bityo namenya icyo insubije
Job23:6 Mbese yandwanya igombye gukoresha imbaraga? Oya
Job23:7 Umunyakuri ni we wumvikana n'Imana
Job23:8 Nyishakira iburasirazuba sinyibone
Job23:9 Nyishakira mu majyaruguru sinyibone
Job23:10 Nyamara yo imenya aho ngannye
Job23:11 Nagenjeje uko ishaka
Job23:12 Amabwiriza watanze nayagize nk'ifunguro rya buri munsi
Job23:13 None se ko Imana idahinduka ni nde wayivuguruza? Icyo yiyemeje gukora iragikora.
Job23:14 Izasohoza ibyo yangeneye
Job23:15 Ni cyo gituma ngifite ubwoba
Job23:16 Imana yatumye niheba
Job23:17 Umwijima yanteje si wo watumye nceceka
Job24:1 “Kuki Imana Nyirububasha itagena igihe cy'urubanza? Kuki abayoboke bayo batamenya uwo munsi?
Job24:2 Dore hariho abimura imbago z'amasambu yabo
Job24:3 Hariho abahuguza impfubyi indogobe yayo
Job24:4 Batoteza abatishoboye bakabayobya
Job24:5 Bameze nk'indogobe mu butayu
Job24:6 Bahatirwa gutongora imirima
Job24:7 Bararira aho nta cyo biyoroshe
Job24:8 Imvura yo mu misozi ibacikiraho
Job24:9 Impfubyi bayinyaga n'ibyayibeshagaho
Job24:10 Bityo bagendera aho bambaye ubusa
Job24:11 Bakamura amavuta mu minzenze
Job24:12 Mu mujyi huzuye imiborogo y'abasamba
Job24:13 Abagome bazirana n'urumuri
Job24:14 Umwicanyi abyuka mu rukerera
Job24:15 Umusambanyi ategereza ko bwira
Job24:16 Abajura bamena amazu nijoro
Job24:17 Kuri bo igitondo kibabera nk'umwijima w'icuraburindi
Job24:18 “Imibereho y'abagome ni nk'amazi ahita
Job24:19 Uko icyokere n'ubushyuhe bishongesha urubura
Job24:20 Nyina wamubyaye aramwibagirwa
Job24:21 Yagiriraga nabi abagore bagumbashye
Job24:22 Imana nyir'imbaraga irimbura abanyagitugu
Job24:23 Haba ubwo Imana ibareka bakiyumvamo amahoro
Job24:24 Bagubwa neza akanya gato
Job24:25 Ni nde wanyomōza ko ibyo atari ko biri? Nagaragaze ko ibyo mvuze ari amahomvu.”
Job25:1 Nuko Biludadi w'Umushuwa aravuga ati:
Job25:2 “Imana ni yo nyir'ububasha n'igitinyiro
Job25:3 Ni nde wabasha kubarura imitwe y'ingabo zayo? Ni nde umucyo w'Imana utamurikira?
Job25:4 Mbese umuntu yabasha gutunganira Imana? Ese umuntu buntu yabasha ate kuba umwere?
Job25:5 Mbese niba Imana ibona ukwezi kudacyeye
Job25:6 kuri mwene muntu hacura iki
Job26:1 Nuko Yobu arabasubiza ati:
Job26:2 “Mbega ngo uratera inkunga umunyantegenke! Mbega ngo uragoboka utishoboye!
Job26:3 Mbega ngo uragira inama ikiburabwenge! Mbega ngo urangaragariza ubushishozi buhambaye!
Job26:4 Mbese ayo magambo yose urayabwira nde? Ni nde wakoheje kuvuga utyo?
Job26:5 Abapfuye barahindira umushyitsi ikuzimu
Job26:6 Imana ireba ibiri ikuzimu
Job26:7 Ni yo yahanitse ikirere
Job26:8 Amazi iyabumbira mu bicu bibuditse
Job26:9 Itwikira ukwezi
Job26:10 Ishyiraho ikirere cy'urugabano hejuru y'amazi
Job26:11 Imana itigisa inkingi z'ijuru
Job26:12 Ububasha bwayo bwatumye icubya inyanja
Job26:13 Umwuka wayo wakenkemuye ijuru
Job26:14 Niba ibi yakoze bidahambaye kuri yo
Job27:1 Nuko Yobu yongera gufata ijambo aravuga ati:
Job27:2 “Ndahiye Imana yanze kundenganura
Job27:3 igihe cyose ngihumeka
Job27:4 sinzigera ngira ikibi mvuga
Job27:5 Sinshobora kwemera na rimwe ko muvuga ukuri
Job27:6 Nzakomeza kuba intungane sinzabireka
Job27:7 Unyanga azapfe urw'abagome
Job27:8 Umuhakanamana agira cyizere ki? Agira cyizere ki iyo yambuwe ubuzima bwe?
Job27:9 Dore amakuba azamwugariza
Job27:10 Umuntu nk'uwo ntiyakwishimira Nyirububasha
Job27:11 Jyewe nzabamenyesha ububasha bw'Imana
Job27:12 Erega namwe mwese mwarabyiboneye! None se ni iki gituma muvuga amagambo y'amahomvu?
Job27:13 Dore ibihembo Imana igenera umugome
Job27:14 abana abyara bazicwa n'inkota
Job27:15 Abe barokotse bazatsembwa n'icyorezo
Job27:16 Nubwo yarunda ifeza nyinshi
Job27:17 iyo myambaro izambarwa n'intungane
Job27:18 Inzu y'umugome idigadiga nk'iy'igitagangurirwa
Job27:19 Aryama akungahaye akabyuka atindahaye
Job27:20 Ibitera ubwoba bimwisukiranyaho nk'amazi
Job27:21 Umuyaga w'iburasirazuba uramutwara
Job27:22 Umuyaga umutumura nta mpuhwe
Job27:23 Ababonye ibimubayeho baramukwena
Job28:1 “Ifeza igira aho icukurwa
Job28:2 Ubutare bucukurwa mu butaka
Job28:3 Mu binombe byijimye abacukuzi bajyanamo amatara
Job28:4 Bacukura ibinombe birebire kure y'aho abantu batuye
Job28:5 Ubutaka ni bwo bwera ibyokurya
Job28:6 Amabuye yaho abonekamo ibuye ryitwa safiri
Job28:7 Aho ubwo butare buva na za kagoma ntizigerayo
Job28:8 Inyamaswa z'inkazi ntizihagera
Job28:9 Umuntu amenagura urutare rw'isarabwayi
Job28:10 Aca ibyuho mu rutare
Job28:11 Baracukura bakagera ku masōko
Job28:12 Ariko se ubwenge bwaboneka he? Mbese isōko y'ubuhanga yo iboneka he?
Job28:13 Nta muntu n'umwe uzi agaciro kabwo
Job28:14 Ikuzimu haragira hati: ‘Ntabundimo’
Job28:15 Ntabwo buguranwa izahabu
Job28:16 Nta wabugereranya n'izahabu nziza cyane
Job28:17 Ntibuhwanyije agaciro n'izahabu cyangwa ikirahuri
Job28:18 Ntawabugereranya n'amabuye y'agaciro ayo ari yo yose
Job28:19 Ntawabugereranya n'ibuye rya topazi ry'i Kushi
Job28:20 Noneho se ubwenge bukomoka he? Mbese isōko y'ubuhanga yo ni iyihe?
Job28:21 Dore buhishwe amaso y'umuntu wese
Job28:22 Kirimbuzi na Rupfu na byo biti: ‘Twumvise bavuga iby'ubwo bwenge’.
Job28:23 Imana izi inzira ibuganaho
Job28:24 Ireba hose no ku mpera z'isi
Job28:25 Igihe yashyiragaho uburemere bw'umuyaga
Job28:26 igihe yashyiragaho itegeko rigenga imvura
Job28:27 ni bwo yabonye ubwo bwenge ibuha agaciro
Job28:28 Imana ibwira umuntu iti: ‘Kubaha Uhoraho ni bwo bwenge
Job29:1 Yobu akomeza kuvuga ati:
Job29:2 “Icyampa ngasubirana imibereho nigeze
Job29:3 Icyo gihe urumuri rwayo rwandasiragaho
Job29:4 Icyampa ngasubirana imbaraga nahoranye
Job29:5 igihe Nyirububasha yari akiri kumwe nanjye
Job29:6 Icyo gihe nari naradamaraye
Job29:7 Iyo najyaga mu nama y'abakuru b'umujyi
Job29:8 abasore barambonaga bakambererekera
Job29:9 Abatware bahagarikaga ibiganiro byabo
Job29:10 Abategetsi na bo baracecekaga
Job29:11 Abanyumvaga bose banyitaga umunyehirwe
Job29:12 Koko nagobokaga umukene untakambiye
Job29:13 Ababaga bagiye gupfa banyifurizaga umugisha
Job29:14 Nambaraga ubutungane bukanyizihira
Job29:15 Impumyi narayirandataga
Job29:16 Abakene nababereye nk'umubyeyi
Job29:17 Abagizi ba nabi nabamenaga urwasaya
Job29:18 Najyaga nibwira nti: ‘Nzapfira iwanjye
Job29:19 nibwiraga ko nzamera nk'igiti gitewe hafi y'amazi
Job29:20 Ikuzo ryanjye rizahorana itoto
Job29:21 Icyo gihe abantu banyumvaga bafite amatsiko
Job29:22 Nta wagiraga icyo yongera ku ijambo ryanjye
Job29:23 Bantegerezaga nk'abategereje imvura
Job29:24 Iyo nabarebanaga ineza baratangaraga
Job29:25 Nabayoboraga inzira mbarangaje imbere
Job30:1 “Nyamara ubu abato kuri jye bangize urw'amenyo
Job30:2 Erega n'ubundi nta cyo bari kumarira
Job30:3 Bari barazahajwe n'ubukene n'inzara
Job30:4 Basoromaga ibibabi by'ibihuru
Job30:5 Bari barabaye ibicibwa mu bantu
Job30:6 Biberaga mu mikokwe
Job30:7 Bahūmiraga mu biti
Job30:8 Bari imburamumaro batagira inkomoko
Job30:9 None ubu basigaye bankwena
Job30:10 Baranyitarura kuko mbatera ishozi
Job30:11 Erega Imana yarancogoje inancisha bugufi
Job30:12 Abagome barampagurukiye kugira ngo banshinje
Job30:13 Barantangatanze singira aho mpungira
Job30:14 Baca icyuho bakanyuramo
Job30:15 Ubwoba bwarantashye
Job30:16 None amagara arimo arancika
Job30:17 Nijoro amagufwa arara anguguna
Job30:18 Imana yanshikuje umwambaro wanjye
Job30:19 Yantuye mu cyondo
Job30:20 Mana
Job30:21 Dore wambereye umugome
Job30:22 Unteza umuyaga ukangurukana
Job30:23 Nzi neza ko unshyira urupfu
Job30:24 Kuki ukurikirana umukene ugutakambira
Job30:25 Mbese sinaririraga abari mu kaga? Ese sinagiriraga abakene impuhwe?
Job30:26 Nari nizeye umunezero ngwirirwa n'ibyago
Job30:27 Umutima wanjye uradiha ubutitsa
Job30:28 Ngendana umubabaro ntihagire umpumuriza
Job30:29 Nabaye ruhabwanduru nka nyiramuhari
Job30:30 Umubiri wanjye warijimye numva unyomokaho
Job30:31 Inanga yanjye yahindutse iy'amaganya
Job31:1 “Niyemeje kutarangamira inkumi
Job31:2 Ni ayahe maherezo abantu bagenerwa n'Imana? Ni uwuhe munani mu ijuru duteze kuri Nyirububasha?
Job31:3 Abagome abateganyiriza kurimbuka
Job31:4 Imana izi imigenzereze yanjye
Job31:5 Mu mibereho yanjye sinigeze mbeshya
Job31:6 Ngaho Imana nimpimishe umunzani utunganye
Job31:7 Niba narateshutse inzira yanyeretse
Job31:8 icyo nzajya mbiba rubanda rujye rwisarurira
Job31:9 Niba narigeze ndarikira umugore w'undi
Job31:10 umugore wanjye azacyurwe n'undi
Job31:11 Koko rero iryo ryaba ari ishyano
Job31:12 Icyo cyaha cyambera nk'umuriro ukongora
Job31:13 Niba narakandamije umugaragu wanjye cyangwa umuja wanjye
Job31:14 Nabigenza nte Imana impagurukiye? Nayisubiza iki iramutse ibimbajije?
Job31:15 None se Imana yandemye si yo yabaremye? Erega Imana yaturemye ni imwe!
Job31:16 Sinigeze nima umukene icyo ansabye
Job31:17 Sinigeze niharira ibyokurya
Job31:18 Nazibereye nk'umubyeyi kuva mu buto bwanjye
Job31:19 Ntabwo naretse umukene ngo abure icyo yambara
Job31:20 Bagiye banshimira ko nabambitse
Job31:21 Niba naragiriye nabi impfubyi
Job31:22 urutugu rwanjye ruhwanyuke
Job31:23 Koko rero igihano cy'Imana cyanteraga ubwoba
Job31:24 Sinigeze nishingikiriza ku izahabu
Job31:25 Sinigeze nirata umutungo wanjye mwinshi
Job31:26 Sinigeze ndamya izuba rirabagirana
Job31:27 Ntibyigeze bindarura ngo mbiramye
Job31:28 Byari kumbera icyaha nkwiye guhanirwa
Job31:29 Sinigeze nezezwa n'ibyago by'umwanzi wanjye
Job31:30 Sinigeze ncumura mu magambo
Job31:31 Ni nde mushyitsi ntigeze ngaburira ngo ahage? Abakozi banjye babihamya.
Job31:32 Nta mushyitsi nigeze ndaza hanze
Job31:33 Sinigeze mpisha ibicumuro byanjye nk'abandi
Job31:34 Sinigeze ntinya amagambo ya rubanda
Job31:35 Icyampa nkagira untega amatwi! Ngiryo ijambo ryanjye riheruka
Job31:36 Koko rero nzemera ngiheke ku ntugu
Job31:37 Nzamurikira Imana ibyo nakoze byose
Job31:38 Niba ubutaka mpinga bwaranyamaganye
Job31:39 niba narariye umusaruro wabwo ntawurishye
Job31:40 ahagombaga kumera ingano hazamere amahwa
Job32:1 Abo bagabo batatu barekera aho kuvugana na Yobu kuko yiyitaga intungane.
Job32:2 Nuko ibyo birakaza cyane Elihu mwene Barakeli ukomoka i Buzi
Job32:3 Elihu yarakariye kandi na za ncuti eshatu za Yobu
Job32:4 Kubera ko Elihu yari muto kuri bagenzi be
Job32:5 Elihu abonye ko ba bagabo batatu batagifite icyo basubiza Yobu
Job32:6 Nuko Elihu mwene Barakeli ukomoka i Buzi aravuga ati: “Jyewe ndacyari muto naho mwe musheshe akanguhe
Job32:7 Naribwiye nti: ‘Reka ndeke abakuze bavuge
Job32:8 Koko rero mu muntu wese harimo umwuka
Job32:9 Abakuze si bo banyabwenge bonyine
Job32:10 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira nti: nimuntege amatwi
Job32:11 Dore naretse murabanza muravuga
Job32:12 Nitaye ku magambo yanyu
Job32:13 Muramenye rero ntimuvuge muti: ‘Twungutse ubwenge
Job32:14 Koko rero Yobu si jye yabwiraga ahubwo ni mwe
Job32:15 Dore murumiwe nta cyo musubiza
Job32:16 Mbese ngumye ntegereze ko nta cyo muvuga? Dore murihagarariye nta cyo musubiza.
Job32:17 Ni jye uramukiwe gusubiza
Job32:18 Koko rero amagambo arandwaniramo
Job32:19 Amagambo arambyiganiramo nk'inzoga ibira
Job32:20 Nimureke mvuge maze noroherwe
Job32:21 Koko ntawe ndi bubere
Job32:22 nta n'uwo ndi bucacure. Mbigenje ntyo Iyandemye yankuraho.”
Job33:1 “Yobu
Job33:2 Dore niteguye kuvuga ibyo ntekereza
Job33:3 Ndavuga amagambo andi ku mutima
Job33:4 Umwuka w'Imana ni wo wandemye
Job33:5 Nyomoza niba ubishobora
Job33:6 Erega imbere y'Imana turi bamwe! Nanjye naremwe mu mukungugu
Job33:7 ntuntinye ngo uhinde umushyitsi
Job33:8 Nyamara nakwiyumviye uvuga
Job33:9 ‘Jyewe ndaboneye nta cyaha nakoze
Job33:10 Nyamara Imana inshakaho urwitwazo
Job33:11 Ntituma nishyira ngo nizane
Job33:12 Yobu
Job33:13 None se ni kuki uyigisha impaka? Harya ngo ni uko idasubiza ibyo uyibaza byose?
Job33:14 Imana ivuga ikoresheje uburyo bwinshi
Job33:15 Ivuganira n'abantu mu nzozi no mu iyerekwa
Job33:16 Izibura amatwi y'abantu
Job33:17 Bityo ivana abantu mu bikorwa byabo bibi
Job33:18 irinda abantu kujya ikuzimu
Job33:19 Imana ikosorera umuntu mu bubabare bwe
Job33:20 bityo azinukwa ibyokurya
Job33:21 Arananuka agata isura
Job33:22 Koko rero agiye gupfa ashyirwe ikuzimu
Job33:23 Nyamara iyo habonetse umumarayika umugoboka
Job33:24 amwingingira Imana ayibwira ati: ‘Mukize urupfu namuboneye incungu.’
Job33:25 Icyo gihe umubiri we ugarura itoto
Job33:26 Nasenga Imana izamwumva
Job33:27 Azarangurura mu ruhame ati: ‘Naracumuye sinakora ibitunganye
Job33:28 yandinze kujya ikuzimu
Job33:29 Ngibyo ibyo Imana igirira umuntu
Job33:30 Nguko uko imurinda kujya ikuzimu
Job33:31 Yobu
Job33:32 Niba ufite icyo unsubiza
Job33:33 Niba nta cyo uvuga ntega amatwi
Job34:1 Elihu arakomeza ati:
Job34:2 “Mwa banyabwenge mwe
Job34:3 Koko ugutwi gusesengura amagambo
Job34:4 Nimureke dushishoze tumenye igikwiye
Job34:5 Yobu yivugiye ati: ‘Ndi intungane
Job34:6 Nubwo ncisha mu kuri simbura kwitwa umubeshyi
Job34:7 Hari ubwo mwigeze mubona umuntu umeze nka Yobu? Ahinyura Imana nk'ugotomera amazi
Job34:8 agirana ubucuti n'inkozi z'ibibi
Job34:9 Koko yaravuze ati: ‘Kumvira Imana ntacyo bimaze.’
Job34:10 Bantu mushyira mu gaciro
Job34:11 Imana yitura umuntu ibihwanye n'ibyo yakoze
Job34:12 Ni ukuri Imana ntiyakora iby'ubugome
Job34:13 Mbese haba hari undi wamushinze kugenga iyi si? Ese haba hari undi wamushinze kugenga ibiyiriho byose?
Job34:14 Iyaba Imana yisubiragaho
Job34:15 bityo ibinyabuzima byose byarimbuka
Job34:16 Yobu
Job34:17 Mbese uwanga ubutabera yabasha gutegeka? Mbese wahangara gushinja Imana nyir'ubutungane?
Job34:18 Ni yo yonyine ishobora kubwira umwami iti: ‘Nta cyo umaze’
Job34:19 Ntitonesha abatware
Job34:20 Mu gicuku abantu bapfa amanzaganya
Job34:21 Imana ihoza ijisho ku migenzereze y'abantu
Job34:22 Nta curaburindi ryahisha umunyabyaha
Job34:23 Nta gihe cyihariye Imana yashyiriyeho buri muntu
Job34:24 Ijanjagura ibihangange itabaririje
Job34:25 Koko izi neza ibyo bakora
Job34:26 Ibahanira mu ruhame kubera ubugome bwabo.
Job34:27 Koko rero banze kuyoboka Imana
Job34:28 Bakandamije abakene batakira Imana
Job34:29 Mbese itagize icyo ikora ni nde wayinenga? Ishatse kwihisha ni nde wayibona? Nyamara yita ku bantu no ku mahanga
Job34:30 ibikora ishaka ko hatagira umugome widegembya
Job34:31 Umuntu aramutse abwiye Imana ati: ‘Ndihannye sinzongera gukora icyaha
Job34:32 ibyo ntabasha gusobanukirwa ujye ubinyigisha
Job34:33 Mbese urabona Imana yabimuhanira? Ubwo utemera ibyo ihitiremo
Job34:34 Abantu bazi gushishoza bazambwira
Job34:35 ‘Yobu aravuga ibyo atazi
Job34:36 Icyampa ibigeragezo bya Yobu bikiyongera
Job34:37 Icyaha yakoze acyongeyeho kwigomeka
Job35:1 Elihu arakomeza ati:
Job35:2 “Yobu
Job35:3 Dore uravuga uti: ‘Kuba ntarakoze icyaha bimariye iki
Job35:4 Noneho reka ngusubize
Job35:5 Itegereze ijuru ugenzure ibicu
Job35:6 Iyo ukoze icyaha bitwara iki Imana? Iyo ibicumuro byawe byisukiranya biyitwara iki?
Job35:7 Iyo uri intungane uba uyunguye iki? Ese ni iki uba uyihaye?
Job35:8 Ubugome bwawe bubangamira abantu nkawe
Job35:9 Iyo abantu bakandamijwe cyane barataka
Job35:10 Nyamara ntawe utakamba agira ati: ‘Mbese Imana yandemye iri he? Ni yo iha abantu ubushobozi bwo kuyiririmbira mu gihe cy'akaga
Job35:11 ni yo iduha ubuhanga buruta ubw'inyamaswa
Job35:12 Barayitakambira ariko ntibasubiza
Job35:13 Koko Imana ntiyumva amahomvu yabo
Job35:14 None se yakumva ite kandi uvuga ko utayibona? Wayishyikirije ikirego cyawe tegereza igisubizo.
Job35:15 Utekereza ko Imana idahana
Job35:16 ni cyo gitumye wowe Yobu uvuga amahomvu
Job36:1 Elihu akomeza agira ati:
Job36:2 “Ba wihanganye gato ngusobanurire
Job36:3 Nzakoresha ubwenge bwanjye bwose
Job36:4 Koko rero ibyo nkubwira si ibinyoma
Job36:5 Imana ni inyabubasha nyamara nta wisuzugura
Job36:6 Ntireka umugome ngo arame
Job36:7 Ihora yita ku ntungane
Job36:8 Iyo abantu baboheshejwe iminyururu
Job36:9 Imana ibagaragariza impamvu zabyo
Job36:10 Ibazibura amatwi kugira ngo bite ku nyigisho zayo
Job36:11 Nibayumvira bakayiyoboka bazasazana ihirwe
Job36:12 Nibatayumvira bazarimburwa n'inkota
Job36:13 Abahakanamana babika inzika mu mitima yabo
Job36:14 bapfa umutima bakiri bato
Job36:15 Nyamara abanyamibabaro ibakirisha imibabaro yabo
Job36:16 Nawe Imana yari yakurinze ibyago
Job36:17 Urubanza waciraga abagome ni rwo waciriwe
Job36:18 Uramenye uburakari ntibugutere kwirata
Job36:19 Ugutaka kwawe ntikwakubuza kugira amakuba
Job36:20 Ntukifuze rya joro ry'urupfu
Job36:21 Wirinde kwitabira gukora ibibi
Job36:22 Ububasha bw'Imana buyihesha ikuzo
Job36:23 Ni nde wahangara kubwira Imana icyo ikora? Ni nde wakubahuka kuyibwira ati: ‘Ugize nabi.’
Job36:24 Ujye wibuka ibikorwa byayo
Job36:25 Ni ibikorwa abantu bose babona
Job36:26 Koko rero Imana irakomeye
Job36:27 Ikurura ibitonyanga by'amazi
Job36:28 bityo imvura igwa ivuye mu bicu
Job36:29 Ni nde wasobanukirwa imitambagirire y'ibicu? Ni nde wamenya imihindire y'inkuba?
Job36:30 Koko ikwiza imirabyo mu kirere
Job36:31 Nguko uko Imana ikemura ibibazo by'amahanga
Job36:32 Ifata imirabyo mu biganza byayo
Job36:33 Uguhinda kw'inkuba kugaragaza ko Imana ije
Job37:1 “Ibyo bituma umutima wanjye udiha
Job37:2 Nimwumve ijwi ry'Imana ngo rirahinda
Job37:3 Yohereza imirabyo yayo igakwira ikirere
Job37:4 Nyuma y'imirabyo humvikana ijwi ry'Imana
Job37:5 Imana ihindisha ijwi ryayo mu buryo butangaje
Job37:6 Itegeka amasimbi iti: ‘Nimugwe ku isi’
Job37:7 Ihagarika ibikorwa by'abantu
Job37:8 Icyo gihe inyamaswa zisubira mu ndiri yazo
Job37:9 Inkubi y'umuyaga ituruka mu majyepfo
Job37:10 Imana ihuha ku mazi agahinduka urubura
Job37:11 Ituma ibicu birēkamo imvura
Job37:12 Imana irabitegeka bikabuyera hirya no hino
Job37:13 Ibyo ni byo Imana ihanisha abatuye ku isi
Job37:14 Yobu
Job37:15 Mbese uzi uko Imana igenga ibyo bicu? Ni yo ituma imirabyo irabiriza mu bicu.
Job37:16 Mbese wari uzi impamvu ibicu bidahanuka mu kirere? Ibyo bigaragaza ibitangaza by'ubuhanga bwayo buhebuje.
Job37:17 Mu gihe cy'ubushyuhe buzanwa n'umuyaga w'amajyepfo
Job37:18 mbese ubwo wari gufasha Imana kubamba ijuru? Ese wari kubasha kurikomeza nk'indorerwamo y'umuringa?
Job37:19 Twigishe icyo tuzabwira Imana
Job37:20 Mbese nayimenyesha ko nshaka kuvugana na yo? Ese umuntu yakwifuza kurimburwa na yo?
Job37:21 Dore abantu ntibashobora kubona umucyo
Job37:22 Urumuri rurabagirana nk'izahabu ruturutse mu majyaruguru
Job37:23 Nyirububasha ntitubasha kumushyikira
Job37:24 Ni cyo gituma abantu bayitinya
Job38:1 Nuko Uhoraho avuganira na Yobu mu nkubi y'umuyaga
Job38:2 “Uri muntu ki uhinyura imigambi yanjye? Ni kuki uyihinyura uvuga amahomvu?
Job38:3 Noneho kenyera kigabo ukomeze
Job38:4 Igihe naremaga isi wari uri he? Ngaho mbwira niba ubijijukiwe.
Job38:5 Mbese waba uzi uwashyizeho ingero zayo? Ni nde wafashe umugozi akayipima?
Job38:6 Mbese inkingi ihagazeho zishingiye ku ki? Ese ibuye nsanganyarukuta ryashyizweho na nde
Job38:7 igihe inyenyeri zo mu rukerera zaririmbaga zikiranya
Job38:8 Ni nde wagomeye amazi y'inyanja kugira ngo atarenga inkombe? Ni nde watumye apfupfunuka mu nda y'isi?
Job38:9 Inyanja nayambitse ibicu nk'umwambaro
Job38:10 Ni jye wayihaye imbibi ntarengwa
Job38:11 Narayibwiye nti: ‘Jya ugarukira hano ntukaharenge
Job38:12 Kuva wabaho wigeze utegeka ko bucya? Wigeze utegeka umuseke igihe utambikira?
Job38:13 Mbese wigeze uwutegeka kubonekera iyo gihera? Ese wawutegetse gukunkumura abagome bari ku isi?
Job38:14 Bityo isi ihinduka nk'ibumba bashyizeho kashe
Job38:15 Abagome babura urumuri rwabamurikiraga
Job38:16 Mbese wigeze ugera ku isōko y'inyanja? Wigeze ugendagenda ikuzimu hayo?
Job38:17 Mbese wigeze ubona amarembo y'ahagana ikuzimu? Waba warabonye amarembo y'isi y'abapfuye?
Job38:18 Mbese waba uzi uko ingero z'isi zingana? Ngaho nsubiza niba ibyo byose ubizi.
Job38:19 Mbese uzi aho umucyo uturuka? Ese uzi aho umwijima ukomoka?
Job38:20 Mbese wabasha kubijyana aho bikomoka? Ese uzi akayira kagana aho bituye?
Job38:21 Reka ubimenye ahari wabitanze kubaho
Job38:22 Mbese wigeze ubona ikigega amasimbi abikwamo? Ese wabonye ikigega cy'urubura?
Job38:23 Byombi nabizigamiye igihe cy'amakuba
Job38:24 Mbese uzi inzira imirabyo inyuramo kugira ngo ikwire? Umuyaga w'iburasirazuba ukwira ku isi uvuye he?
Job38:25 Ni nde waciye imiyoboro imvura inyuramo? Ni nde waciriye inkuba inzira ihindiramo?
Job38:26 Ni nde ugusha imvura ahadatuwe? Ni nde uyigusha mu butayu?
Job38:27 Ni nde uvomerera agasi karimo ubusa? Ni nde uhameza ibyatsi bitoshye?
Job38:28 Mbese imvura igira se uyibyara? Ikime cyo kibyarwa na nde?
Job38:29 Mbese amasimbi agira nyina uyabyara? Ikime cy'ubunyinya cyo gikomoka kuri nde?
Job38:30 Ni nde utuma amazi akomera nk'ibuye? Ni nde uhindura inyanja barafu?
Job38:31 Mbese wabasha gukoranya inyenyeri zitwa Puleyadi zitera ibishashi? Ese wabasha guhambura imigozi izirikanyije izitwa Oriyoni?
Job38:32 Mbese ni wowe utuma inyenyeri zibonekera igihe cyazo? Ese wabasha kuyobora izitwa Ikirura n'izizishagaye?
Job38:33 Mbese uzi amategeko agenga ijuru? Ese wabasha kuyahindura akagenga isi?
Job38:34 Mbese wabasha kurangurura ijwi ukageza ku bicu
Job38:35 Mbese imirabyo igenda ari uko uyohereje? Hari ubwo se ikubwira iti: ‘Karame?’
Job38:36 Ni nde wahaye nyirabarazana ubwenge? Ni nde wahaye isake kujijuka?
Job38:37 Ni nde ufite ubwenge bwatuma abarura ibicu
Job38:38 Ni nde wahindura umukungugu ukaba icyondo
Job38:39 Mbese ni wowe uhigira intare y'ingore umuhigo? Ese ni wowe umara ipfa ibyana byayo
Job38:40 igihe byibundiye mu ndiri yabyo
Job38:41 Ni nde ushakira igikona ibyokurya? Ni nde ubigishakira igihe ibyana byacyo bintakambira
Job39:1 “Mbese uzi igihe ihene z'agasozi zibyarira? Waba se waragenzuye igihe imparakazi zibyarira?
Job39:2 Mbese wabaze amezi zimara zihaka
Job39:3 Zica bugufi zikabyara
Job39:4 Ibyana byazo bikurana imbaraga bikibera mu gasozi
Job39:5 Ni nde washumuye indogobe y'agasozi? Ni nde wayihaye uburenganzira bwo kujya aho ishaka?
Job39:6 Nayihaye ubutayu ngo ibubemo
Job39:7 Ntiyita ku rusaku rwo mu mijyi
Job39:8 Itambagira imisozi ishaka urwuri
Job39:9 Mbese imbogo yakwemera kugukorera? Yakwemerera se kurara mu kiraro cyawe?
Job39:10 Mbese imbogo wabasha kuyizirika? Wabasha se kuyizirikaho ibisuka ngo iguhingire?
Job39:11 Mbese wakwishingikiriza imbaraga zayo
Job39:12 Mbese wakwizera ko yagusarurira imyaka? Ese wakwiringira ko yayikwanikira ku mbuga?
Job39:13 Mbuni ikubita amababa yayo yishimye
Job39:14 Nyamara itera amagi yayo ku butaka
Job39:15 ntizirikana ko umuntu yayakandagira
Job39:16 Ibyana byayo ibifata nabi nk'aho itabibyaye
Job39:17 Koko mbuni sinayihaye ubwenge
Job39:18 Nyamara ikuramo ikiruka
Job39:19 Mbese ifarasi ni wowe wayihaye imbaraga? Ese ni wowe wayambitse umugara ku gikanu?
Job39:20 Mbese ni wowe wayihaye gusimbuka nk'inzige? Yivugana ishema abantu bagakangarana.
Job39:21 Iraha ubutaka mu kibaya ikoresheje imbaraga
Job39:22 Nta cyo itinya nta n'ikiyitera ubwoba
Job39:23 Uyicayeho akora mu mutana imyambi igakomangana
Job39:24 Usanga isisibiranya ishaka gutema ikirere
Job39:25 Iyo ihembe ry'intambara rivuze irīvuga
Job39:26 Mbese ni wowe wigishije agaca kuguruka? Ese ni wowe wakigishije kuguruka cyerekeje mu majyepfo?
Job39:27 Mbese ni wowe utegeka kagoma gutumbagira? Ese ni wowe uyitegeka kwarika ahirengeye?
Job39:28 Yibera mu bitare akaba ari ho irara
Job39:29 Aho ni ho yubikirira icyo ishaka kurya
Job39:30 Ibyana byayo ibihaza inyama n'amaraso
Job40:1 Uhoraho abwira Yobu ati:
Job40:2 “Wowe Yobu
Job40:3 Nuko Yobu asubiza Uhoraho ati:
Job40:4 “Dore nta cyo ndi cyo
Job40:5 Maze kuvuga sinongera
Job40:6 Nuko Uhoraho avuganira na Yobu mu nkubi y'umuyaga
Job40:7 “Noneho kenyera kigabo ukomeze
Job40:8 Mbese urashaka gusesa ibyemezo nafashe? Ese urashaka kunsīga icyaha ngo wigire intungane?
Job40:9 Mbese ufite ububasha nk'ubwanjye? Ese ijwi ryawe ryakangaranya abantu nk'iryanjye?
Job40:10 Noneho ambara ikuzo n'ubuhangange
Job40:11 Ngaho suka uburakari bwawe bukwire hose
Job40:12 Reba abishyira hejuru bacishwe bugufi
Job40:13 Basubize bose mu gitaka
Job40:14 Ubwo ni bwo nzagushimagiza
Job40:15 Itegereze imvubu
Job40:16 Imbaraga zayo ziba mu matako
Job40:17 Umurizo wayo wagira ngo ni igiti cya sederi
Job40:18 Amagufwa yayo akomeye nk'impombo zikozwe mu muringa
Job40:19 Mu byo naremye byose yo ni agahebuzo
Job40:20 Koko ibibaya biyibera urwuri irishamo
Job40:21 Yiryamira munsi y'amarebe
Job40:22 Amarebe ayikingira izuba
Job40:23 Umuvumba ukaze w'uruzi ntuyitera ubwoba
Job40:24 Ese hari uwayifata igihe iri maso? Ese hari uwayitega igafatwa izuru?
Job40:25 “Mbese warobesha urushundura igikoko nyamunini? Ese ururimi rwacyo warurobesha umugozi?
Job40:26 Mbese wabasha kunyuza umugozi mu zuru ryacyo? Ese wabasha gutoboza urwasaya rwacyo ururobo?
Job40:27 Mbese wibwira ko cyagusaba imbabazi? Ese cyakubwira amagambo agucacura?
Job40:28 Mbese hari amasezerano cyagirana nawe
Job40:29 Mbese wagikinisha nk'ukinisha akanyoni? Ese wakizirika ngo kibe igikinisho cy'abakobwa bawe?
Job40:30 Mbese abarobyi bazakigenera igiciro? Babasha se kukigabanya abajya kugicuruza?
Job40:31 Mbese uruhu rwacyo wabasha kurupfumuza imyambi? Ese igihanga cyacyo wagipfumaguza amacumu?
Job40:32 Uzagerageze kugishyiraho ikiganza
Job41:1 Erega guhangana na cyo ni ukwibeshya
Job41:2 Ni nde wahangara kugishōtōra? Ese ni nde watinyuka kundwanya?
Job41:3 Nta wagize icyo ampa ngo mbone kumwitura
Job41:4 Sinabura kuvuga uko ingingo z'icyo gikōko ziteye
Job41:5 Ni nde wabasha kukivanaho uruhu? Ni nde wahangara gupfumura uruhu rwacyo rukomeye?
Job41:6 Ni nde watinyuka kwasamura urwasaya rwacyo? Imikaka yacyo iteye ubwoba.
Job41:7 Cyikingiye isharankima ku mugongo zimeze nk'ingabo
Job41:8 buri sharankima isobekeranye n'indi
Job41:9 Buri sharankima yomekeranye n'indi
Job41:10 Iyo cyitsamuye umuriro uraka
Job41:11 Mu rwasaya rwacyo hasohokamo ibirimi by'umuriro
Job41:12 Mu mazuru yacyo hapfupfunukamo umwuka
Job41:13 Umwuka wacyo watsa amakara
Job41:14 Imbaraga zacyo ziganditse mu gikanu cyacyo
Job41:15 Imihore yacyo irasobekeranye
Job41:16 Umutima wacyo ukomeye nk'ibuye
Job41:17 Iyo icyo gikōko kibadutse
Job41:18 Kugitera inkota nta cyo byagitwara
Job41:19 Kuri cyo icumu ni nk'icyatsi
Job41:20 Imyambi ntigitsimbura
Job41:21 Kugikubita ubuhiri ni nko kugikubita icyatsi
Job41:22 Ku nda yacyo hari isharankima zityaye
Job41:23 Iyo cyiroshye mu nyanja amazi aribirindura
Job41:24 Aho kinyuze hasigara inkōra y'urwererane
Job41:25 Nta yindi nyamaswa ihwanye na cyo ku isi
Job41:26 Inyamaswa z'inyamaboko zose ziragitinya
Job42:1 Nuko Yobu asubiza Uhoraho ati:
Job42:2 “Nzi ko ushobora byose
Job42:3 Waranyibarije uti: ‘Uri muntu ki uhinyura imigambi yanjye? Mbese kuki uyihinyura uvuga amahomvu?’ Ni koko navuze ibyo ntasobanukiwe
Job42:4 Warambwiye uti: ‘Tega amatwi ureke abe ari jye uvuga
Job42:5 Najyaga numva bakuvuga
Job42:6 Ndihannye nzinutswe ibyo navuze
Job42:7 Uhoraho amaze kuvugana na Yobu abwira Elifazi w'Umutemani ati: “Ndakurakariye cyane wowe na bagenzi bawe babiri
Job42:8 None rero nimushake amapfizi arindwi n'amasekurume y'intama arindwi
Job42:9 Nuko Elifazi w'Umutemani na Biludadi w'Umushuwa
Job42:10 Yobu amaze gusengera izo ncuti ze
Job42:11 Abavandimwe be na bashiki be n'incuti ze za kera
Job42:12 Mu minsi iheruka y'ubuzima bwa Yobu
Job42:13 Yobu abyara abahungu barindwi n'abakobwa batatu.
Job42:14 Umukobwa mukuru amwita Yemima
Job42:15 Mu gihugu cyose nta bakobwa bari bahwanyije uburanga n'abakobwa ba Yobu. Nuko se abaha iminani hamwe na basaza babo.
Job42:16 Nyuma y'ibyo
Job42:17 Nuko Yobu apfa ashaje

Psalms2:10 Mwa bami mwe

Psalms2:12 Nimwubahirize umwana we

Proverbs1:13 Tuzanyaga ibintu byinshi by'agaciro gakomeye
Proverbs1:14 Nawe uzagiramo umugabane

Proverbs1:16 kuko bagenzwa no gukora nabi bakihutira kuvusha amaraso.
Proverbs1:17 Koko rero ibuye ryagaragaye ntiriba rikishe isuka!
Proverbs1:18 Nyamara bo ubwabo ni bo bicira igico
Proverbs1:19 Ni ko bigenda ku muntu wese ufite umururumba
Proverbs1:20 Bwenge arahamagarira mu mayira
Proverbs1:21 Arahamagarira mu mihanda no mu marembo y'umujyi agira ati:
Proverbs1:22 “Yemwe mwa banyabwengebuke mwe
Proverbs1:23 Nimwite ku miburo yanjye! Dore ndabagezaho ibyo ntekereza
Proverbs1:24 Narabahamagaye mwica amatwi
Proverbs1:25 Mwahinyuye inama zanjye zose

Ecclesiastes5:19 Bityo umuntu yibagirwa ko ubuzima bwe ari bugufi
Ecclesiastes6:1 Hari akandi kaga nabonye ku isi kibasiye abantu.
Ecclesiastes6:2 Hari ubwo Imana iha umuntu ubukungu n'ubutunzi n'icyubahiro
Ecclesiastes6:3 Umuntu ashobora kugira abana ijana kandi akaramba. Ibyo byamumarira iki niba ataguwe neza
Ecclesiastes6:4 Koko rero ivuka ry'uwo mwana ni impfabusa
Ecclesiastes6:5 Nubwo atigeze amenya izuba ntagire n'ikindi amenya mu buzima
Ecclesiastes6:6 N'iyo umuntu yamara imyaka ibihumbi bibiri
Ecclesiastes6:7 Umuntu akorera guhaza inda ye nyamara ntiyigera anyurwa.
Ecclesiastes6:8 None se umunyabwenge arusha iki umupfapfa? Umukene we bimumariye iki kwitwara neza imbere y'abantu?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Ni byiza kunyurwa n'ibyo ufite kuruta guhora urarikiye. Ibyo na byo ni ubusa
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ibiriho byose bizwi kuva kera kose
Ecclesiastes6:11 Iyo amagambo abaye menshi
Ecclesiastes6:12 Mbese ni nde uzi icyatunganira umuntu mu mibereho ye y'igihe gito? Ni nde uzamubwira uko bizagenda amaze gupfa?
Ecclesiastes7:1 Kuvugwa neza biruta amavuta y'agaciro
Ecclesiastes7:2 Ni byiza kugenderera abari mu cyunamo kuruta abari mu byishimo
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kwibera mu mubabaro biruta kunezerwa
Ecclesiastes7:4 Abanyabwenge bifatanya n'abashavuye
Ecclesiastes7:5 Ni byiza kumvira umunyabwenge ugucyaha
Ecclesiastes7:6 Igitwenge cy'umupfapfa ni ubusa
Ecclesiastes7:7 Umunyabwenge ukandamiza abandi aba umupfapfa
Ecclesiastes7:8 Iherezo ry'igikorwa rishimisha kuruta intangiriro yacyo
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ntukihutire kurakara
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ntukibaze uti: “Kuki ibya kera byari byiza kuruta iby'ubu?”
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ubwenge ni bwiza nk'umurage
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ubwenge bushobora kurengera umuntu akaga kimwe n'amafaranga
Ecclesiastes7:13 Itegereze ibyo Imana yaremye. Ni nde washobora kugorora ibyo yaremye bihetamye?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ibihe nibiba byiza ujye unezerwa
Ecclesiastes7:15 Mu mibereho yanjye y'imburamumaro nabonye ibi byombi: intungane ikenyuka
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ntukabe intungane ngo ukabye
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ntugatwarwe n'ubugome kandi ntukitware nk'umupfapfa. Ese ni kuki umuntu yapfa atarageza ku munsi?
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ibyiza ni ugukurikiza izo nama zombi
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ubwenge buhesha umunyabwenge imbaraga
Ecclesiastes7:20 Koko rero nta muntu n'umwe ku isi uba intungane
Ecclesiastes7:21 Byongeye kandi ntihakagire utega amatwi ibyo abantu bavuga byose
Ecclesiastes7:22 Koko nawe ubwawe uzi ko wigeze gusebya abandi.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ibi byose narabigenzuye mbigiranye ubwenge. Nuko ndibwira nti: “Nzajya ngenza nk'umunyabwenge.” Nyamara birenze ubushobozi bwanjye.
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ubumenyi bw'ibiriho buri kure buhishe ikuzimu
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nihatiye kumenya no gusobanukirwa ubwenge icyo ari cyo
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ikintu nabonye gikabije ubugome kurusha urupfu
Ecclesiastes7:27 Jyewe Umubwiriza nagenzuye ibintu buhoro buhoro ngira ngo mbimenye neza
Ecclesiastes7:28 Ubwo nashakashakaga nasanze mu bagabo igihumbi umwe ari we ukwiye icyubahiro
Ecclesiastes7:29 Icyakora nabonye ikintu kimwe
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ni nde umeze nk'umunyabwenge wasobanura ibi bintu? Ubwenge bw'umuntu butuma acya mu maso
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ujye wumvira umwami nk'uko wabyemereye imbere y'Imana.
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ntukamuvirire cyangwa ngo utsimbarare ku bikorwa bitamushimisha
Ecclesiastes8:4 Koko rero ijambo ry'umwami ntirikuka
Ecclesiastes8:5 Umwumvira wese ntazagubwa nabi
Ecclesiastes8:6 Koko rero buri gikorwa cyose kizagira umunsi wacyo w'urubanza
Ecclesiastes8:7 Nta muntu uzi ibizamubaho. Ni nde wambwira uko bizamugendekera?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Nta muntu n'umwe ufite ububasha bwo guhagarara ku buzima bwe
Ecclesiastes8:9 Nitegereje ibintu byose bibaho ku isi ndabigenzura
Ecclesiastes8:10 Nabonye kandi abagome bahambanwa icyubahiro
Ecclesiastes8:11 Iyo umugizi wa nabi adahanwe vuba
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nubwo umunyabyaha ashobora gukora ibikorwa bibi ijana akarenga akaramba
Ecclesiastes8:13 Nyamara abagome bo ntibazagubwa neza
Ecclesiastes8:14 Hari ikindi kintu cy'imburamumaro nabonye ku isi: ni ukubona intungane zigwirirwa n'akaga kari gakwiriye abagome
Ecclesiastes8:15 Jyewe rero niyemeje kwinezeza. Koko ku isi nta wundi munezero umuntu ateze
Ecclesiastes8:16 Nagerageje gusobanukirwa iby'ubwenge no gusesengura ibikorerwa ku isi
Ecclesiastes8:17 bityo mbona ko umuntu adashobora gusobanukirwa ibyo Imana ikora ku isi. Nubwo umuntu agerageza kubishakashaka ntabigeraho

Ecclesiastes9:12 Koko rero umuntu wese ntamenya igihe cye
Ecclesiastes9:13 Hari ikindi kintu nabonye ku isi gikomeye: ni akamaro k'ubwenge.

Isaiah1:1 Ibi ni ibyo Ezayi mwene Amotsi yeretswe byerekeye u Buyuda na Yeruzalemu. Yabyeretswe ku ngoma ya Uziya no ku ya Yotamu

Isaiah1:3 Inka imenya nyirayo
Isaiah1:4 Muragowe
Isaiah1:5 Mwanangiriye mu bwigomeke

Isaiah1:7 Igihugu cyanyu ni ikidaturwa
Isaiah1:8 Yeruzalemu yonyine ni yo yacitse ku icumu
Isaiah1:9 Iyo Uhoraho Nyiringabo ataturokora
Isaiah1:10 Batware b'i Sodoma

Isaiah1:12 Mbese iyo muje kunshengerera
Isaiah1:13 Nimurekere aho gukomeza kunzanira amaturo atagira umumaro
Isaiah1:14 Nanga iminsi mikuru yanyu y'imboneko z'ukwezi
Isaiah1:15 Iyo murambuye amaboko musenga mbima amaso

Isaiah1:22 Ifeza yawe yahindutse umwanda
Isaiah1:23 Abatware bawe ni ibyigomeke n'ibyitso by'abajura

Isaiah1:29 Koko muzakozwa isoni kubera ibiti mwagize imana zanyu
Isaiah1:30 Muzamera nk'ibibabi by'ibiti birabije
Isaiah1:31 Umuntu w'umunyamaboko azahinduka ubusa

Isaiah3:3 Azabima abagaba b'ingabo n'abanyacyubahiro
Isaiah3:4 Azabaha abasore babategeke
