Isaiah3:18 Uwo munsi Nyagasani azabambura imirimbo yabo yose: amayugi n'ibirezi n'inigi
Isaiah3:19 amaherena n'ibitare n'ibitambaro byo mu mutwe
Isaiah3:20 imitamirizo n'imikufi n'imikandara
Isaiah3:21 impeta zo ku ntoki n'izo ku mazuru
Isaiah3:22 amakanzu y'iminsi mikuru n'imyitero
Isaiah3:23 imyenda ibengerana n'amashati y'imyeru
Isaiah3:24 Impumuro nziza y'imibavu izasimburwa n'umunuko
Isaiah3:25 Ingabo zawe zizatsembwa n'inkota
Isaiah3:26 Abatuye i Siyoni bazarira bacure umuborogo
Isaiah4:1 Icyo gihe abagore barindwi bazihambira ku mugabo umwe bamubwire bati: “Ibyokurya n'imyambaro tuzabyishakira
Isaiah4:2 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azameza umushibu uzaba ubwiza n'icyubahiro
Isaiah4:3 Nuko rero abazaba basigaye i Siyoni
Isaiah4:4 Nyagasani namara guhumanura abantu b'i Siyoni akoresheje urubanza n'umuriro utwika
Isaiah4:5 ahantu hose ku musozi wa Siyoni no ku makoraniro yaho
Isaiah4:6 ku manywa rizakingira abantu ubushyuhe
Isaiah5:1 Reka ndirimbire uwo nkunda indirimbo y'imizabibu ye. Uwo nkunda yari afite imizabibu
Isaiah5:2 Uwo nkunda yahinze umurima awukuramo amabuye
Isaiah5:3 None rero baturage b'i Yeruzalemu n'ab'i Buyuda
Isaiah5:4 Icyo nari nkwiye gukorera imizabibu yanjye ntakoze ni iki? Nari nizeye gusarura imbuto nziza
Isaiah5:5 Reka mbabwire ibyo ngiye gukorera imizabibu yanjye: ngiye gusenya uruzitiro ruyikikije
Isaiah5:6 Nzayireka yangirike
Isaiah5:7 Umurima w'imizabibu w'Uhoraho Nyiringabo ni Abisiraheli
Isaiah5:8 Bazabona ishyano abagereka amazu ku yandi
Isaiah5:9 Numvise Uhoraho Nyiringabo arahira ati: “Koko rero aya mazu yose manini azasenyuka
Isaiah5:10 Hegitari icumi z'imizabibu zizavamo gusa litiro mirongo itanu za divayi
Isaiah5:11 Bazabona ishyano abazinduka biruka ku nzoga
Isaiah5:12 Banywa bacuranga inanga nyamuduri n'inanga y'indoha
Isaiah5:13 Dore ubwoko bwanjye bugiye kujyanwa ho iminyago
Isaiah5:14 Ikuzimu harasamye cyane
Isaiah5:15 Abantu bose bazacishwa bugufi bakorwe n'isoni
Isaiah5:16 Uhoraho Nyiringabo azubahirizwa kubera ubutabera bwe
Isaiah5:17 Intama zizarisha nk'iziri mu rwuri rwazo
Isaiah5:18 Bazabona ishyano abikururiraho ibicumuro
Isaiah5:19 Koko rero hari abavuga bati: “Uhoraho natebuke yihutishe ibikorwa bye tubibone
Isaiah5:20 Bazabona ishyano abafata ikibi nk'icyiza
Isaiah5:21 Bazabona ishyano abiyita abanyabwenge
Isaiah5:22 Bazabona ishyano abahanga bo kunywa divayi
Isaiah5:23 Barya ruswa bakarengera inkozi z'ibibi
Isaiah5:24 Nk'uko umuriro utwika ibyatsi byumye
Isaiah5:25 Bityo Uhoraho arakariye cyane ubwoko bwe
Isaiah5:26 Uhoraho ahamagaje ingabo z'amahanga ya kure
Isaiah5:27 Nta n'umwe muri zo unanirwa ngo acike intege
Isaiah5:28 Imyambi yabo iratyaye
Isaiah5:29 Urusaku rwabo ni nk'umutontomo w'intare
Isaiah5:30 Icyo gihe bazatontomera Isiraheli nk'inyanja yoroma
Isaiah6:1 Mu mwaka Umwami Uziya yapfuyemo
Isaiah6:2 Abaserafi bari bahagaze iruhande rwe
Isaiah6:3 Nuko bakikiranya amajwi bati: “Umuziranenge
Isaiah6:4 Ijwi ryabo ryatigisaga ibizingiti by'inzugi
Isaiah6:5 Nuko ndavuga nti: “Ngushije ishyano
Isaiah6:6 Umwe muri abo Baserafi aguruka ansanga afite ikara mu kiganza
Isaiah6:7 Arinkoza ku munwa arambwira ati: “Iri kara rigukoze ku munwa
Isaiah6:8 Numva Nyagasani abaza ati: “Mbese ndatuma nde? Ni nde tuzatuma?” Ndamusubiza nti: “Ndi hano ntuma.”
Isaiah6:9 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Genda ubwire abo bantu uti: ‘Kumva muzumva ariko ntimuzasobanukirwa
Isaiah6:10 Unangire imitima y'abo bantu
Isaiah6:11 Ndamubaza nti: “Ibyo bizageza ryari se Nyagasani?” Aransubiza ati: “Bizageza igihe imijyi izaba yashenywe
Isaiah6:12 Koko rero
Isaiah6:13 N'iyo mu gihugu hasigara kimwe cya cumi
Isaiah7:1 Ku ngoma ya Ahazi umwami w'u Buyuda
Isaiah7:2 Babwira abo mu nzu ya Dawidi bati: “Abanyasiriya bifatanyije n'Abisiraheli.” Nuko Ahazi n'ingabo ze bagira ubwoba
Isaiah7:3 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Ezayi ati: “Jyana n'umuhungu wawe Sheyari-Yashubu
Isaiah7:4 Umubwire uti: ‘Humura! Ntugire ubwoba kandi ntukuke umutima
Isaiah7:5 Nzi ko Abanyasiriya
Isaiah7:6 Baravuga bati: ‘Nimuze dutere u Buyuda
Isaiah7:7 Nyamara Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Ibyo ntibizashoboka
Isaiah7:8 Damasi ni umurwa wa Siriya
Isaiah7:9 Samariya ni umurwa wa Isiraheli
Isaiah7:10 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Ahazi ati:
Isaiah7:11 “Saba Uhoraho Imana yawe ikimenyetso
Isaiah7:12 Ahazi arasubiza ati: “Oya nta cyo nzasaba
Isaiah7:13 Nuko Ezayi aramubwira ati: “Tega amatwi
Isaiah7:14 Noneho rero Uhoraho ubwe azabaha ikimenyetso: dore umukobwa azasama inda
Isaiah7:15 Uwo mwana azatungwa n'amata n'ubuki
Isaiah7:16 Mbere y'uko uwo mwana amenya kwanga ikibi no guhitamo icyiza
Isaiah7:17 Naho wowe n'umuryango wawe na bene wanyu
Isaiah7:18 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azahamagara Abanyamisiri
Isaiah7:19 Abo Banyamisiri n'Abanyashūru bazaza
Isaiah7:20 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azabogosha umusatsi
Isaiah7:21 Icyo gihe buri muntu azorora inka imwe n'ihene ebyiri.
Isaiah7:22 Nyamara ayo matungo azakamwa amata menshi
Isaiah7:23 Icyo gihe kandi umurima urimo imizabibu igihumbi
Isaiah7:24 Uzagerwamo gusa n'abahigi bitwaje imiheto n'imyambi
Isaiah7:25 Ntibazagaruka guhinga ku misozi
Isaiah8:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Fata ikibaho ucyandikeho aya magambo ‘Kuri Nyaga-Vuba-Sahura-Bwangu.’ ”
Isaiah8:2 Nuko mbyereka abagabo babiri b'inyangamugayo
Isaiah8:3 Hanyuma umugore wanjye w'umuhanuzikazi asama inda maze abyara umwana w'umuhungu. Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Mwite Nyaga-Vuba-Sahura-Bwangu.
Isaiah8:4 Koko rero
Isaiah8:5 Uhoraho arongera arambwira ati:
Isaiah8:6 “Aba bantu banze amazi ya Silowe atembana ituze
Isaiah8:7 Bityo ngiye kubamanuriraho imivumba myinshi
Isaiah8:8 Ruzasandara rube umwuzure ukwire mu Buyuda
Isaiah8:9 Mwa mahanga mwe
Isaiah8:10 Nimucure inama izaba impfabusa
Isaiah8:11 Uhoraho yanyihanangirije akomeje ko ntakwiye gukurikiza imyifatire y'ubu bwoko agira ati:
Isaiah8:12 “Ntimugafate nk'ubugambanyi ibyo aba bantu bita ubugambanyi. Ntimugatinye ibyo batinya
Isaiah8:13 Nimwubahe Uhoraho Nyiringabo
Isaiah8:14 Uhoraho azabera Ingoro abamwubaha
Isaiah8:15 Benshi muri bo bazasitara kuri urwo rutare
Isaiah8:16 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Ukomeze ubwo buhamya n'izo nyigisho mu bigishwa banjye.”
Isaiah8:17 Nuko rero
Isaiah8:18 Dore ndi hano hamwe n'abana Uhoraho yampaye
Isaiah8:19 Abantu bazababwira kugisha inama abapfumu n'abashitsi
Isaiah8:20 Muzabasubize muti: “Nimugarukire amabwiriza y'Uhoraho n'inyigisho ze. Utazabikurikiza ntazongera kubona umuseke weya.”
Isaiah8:21 Abo bantu bazabuyera mu gihugu
Isaiah8:22 bazahindukira barebe ku isi. Bazahabona amakuba n'umwijima
Isaiah8:23 Nyamara nta mwijima ukirangwa muri ibyo bihugu byarimo akaga. Mu gihe cya kera
Isaiah9:1 Abantu bāri mu mwijima bigunze
Isaiah9:2 Uhoraho warabagwije ubongerera umunezero
Isaiah9:3 Koko rero
Isaiah9:4 Inkweto zose z'abasirikari zateraga ubwoba
Isaiah9:5 Koko rero umwana yatuvukiye
Isaiah9:6 Azāgura ubutegetsi bwe n'amahoro iteka ryose
Isaiah9:7 Nyagasani aciriye urubanza Yakobo
Isaiah9:8 Rubanda rwose ruzamenya iyo nkuru
Isaiah9:9 “Inkuta z'amatafari zarasenyutse
Isaiah9:10 Uhoraho azatiza umurindi umwanzi wabo Resini
Isaiah9:11 Abanyasiriya bazabaturuka imbere
Isaiah9:12 Abisiraheli ntibagarukiye Uwabahannye
Isaiah9:13 Uhoraho azatsemba Isiraheli mu gihe gito
Isaiah9:14 Abayobozi n'abanyacyubahiro ni bo mutwe
Isaiah9:15 Abayobozi b'aba bantu barabayobya
Isaiah9:16 Bityo Uhoraho ntazishimira abasore babo
Isaiah9:17 Koko ubugome butwika nk'umuriro
Isaiah9:18 Uburakari bw'Uhoraho Nyiringabo buracyariho
Isaiah9:19 Hirya no hino barasahuranwa nyamara ntibanyurwa
Isaiah9:20 Abamanase barashiha Abefurayimu
Isaiah10:1 Bazabona ishyano abashyiraho amategeko arenganya
Isaiah10:2 Bazabona ishyano abahohotera abatishoboye
Isaiah10:3 Muzabigenza mute umunsi Uhoraho azabahana? Muzabigenza mute amakuba nabageraho aturutse kure? Muzahungira kwa nde kugira ngo abatabare? Ubukungu bwanyu muzabuhungishiriza he?
Isaiah10:4 Muzaba mushigaje gusa kugirwa imfungwa
Isaiah10:5 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abanyashūru bazabona ishyano bazabona ishyano kuko bemeye kuba ibikoresho by'uburakari bwanjye
Isaiah10:6 Nabohereje guhana igihugu cyacumuye
Isaiah10:7 Nyamara Abanyashūru bo si ko babibona
Isaiah10:8 Umwami wa Ashūru aravuga ati: “Mbese
Isaiah10:9 Mbese sinatsinze umujyi wa Kalino n'uwa Karikemishi? Natsinze umujyi wa Hamati n'uwa Arupadi
Isaiah10:10 Natsembye ibihugu byasengaga ibigirwamana
Isaiah10:11 Ibyo nakoreye Samariya n'imana zayo
Isaiah10:12 Nyamara Nyagasani aravuga ati: “Nimara gusohoza ibikorwa byanjye byose ku musozi wa Siyoni n'i Yeruzalemu
Isaiah10:13 Koko rero uwo mwami arirata ati: “Ibyo nakoze mbikesha imbaraga zanjye
Isaiah10:14 Nk'uko umuntu yārurira inyoni
Isaiah10:15 Mbese ishoka ishobora kwirata ku uyitemesha? Ese urukero rushobora kwishongora ku urukeresha? Ni nk'aho ikiboko cyakwigarura kigakubita ukibanguye
Isaiah10:16 Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyiringabo azateza indwara abarwanyi
Isaiah10:17 Uhoraho umucyo wa Isiraheli
Isaiah10:18 Amashyamba n'imirima itagira uko isa
Isaiah10:19 Mu mashyamba ya Ashūru hazasigara ibiti mbarwa
Isaiah10:20 Icyo gihe itsinda ry'abasigaye muri Isiraheli
Isaiah10:21 Itsinda ry'abasigaye rizagaruka
Isaiah10:22 Isiraheli we
Isaiah10:23 Koko rero
Isaiah10:24 Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Bwoko bwanjye butuye i Siyoni
Isaiah10:25 Koko mu minsi mike cyane
Isaiah10:26 Uhoraho Nyiringabo azabangura ikibōko cye akubite Abanyashūru
Isaiah10:27 Icyo gihe nzagukura mu buja bw'Abanyashūru
Isaiah10:28 Abanzi bageze Ayi banyuze i Migironi
Isaiah10:29 Banyuze mu nzira y'impatanwa
Isaiah10:30 Bantu b'i Galimu nimuboroge
Isaiah10:31 Abantu b'i Madimena barahunze
Isaiah10:32 Uyu munsi umwanzi ashinze ibirindiro i Nobu
Isaiah10:33 Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyiringabo azabakonyagura nk'amashami y'ibiti
Isaiah10:34 Uhoraho azabārarika nk'ibiti bitemwe n'intorezo
Isaiah11:1 Umwami azaba nk'umushibu ushibutse ku gishyitsi cya Yese
Isaiah11:2 Mwuka w'Uhoraho azahorana n'uwo mwami
Isaiah11:3 Mwuka azatoza uwo mwami kubaha Uhoraho
Isaiah11:4 Abatishoboye azabacira imanza zitabera
Isaiah11:5 Abantu be azabayoborana ubutungane
Isaiah11:6 Isega izaturana n'umwana w'intama
Isaiah11:7 Inka n'ikirura bizarisha hamwe
Isaiah11:8 Umwana uri ku ibere azakinira ku mwobo w'impiri
Isaiah11:9 Ubugizi bwa nabi cyangwa ubwangizi ntibizarangwa ku musozi w'Uhoraho
Isaiah11:10 Ukomoka kuri Yese azaba nk'ibendera ry'ibihugu
Isaiah11:11 Icyo gihe Nyagasani azongera akoreshe ububasha bwe
Isaiah11:12 Azazamura ibendera riburira amahanga
Isaiah11:13 Ishyari ry'Abisiraheli rizashira
Isaiah11:14 Abayuda n'Abisiraheli bazifatanya batere u Bufilisiti
Isaiah11:15 Uhoraho azakamya Inyanja itukura
Isaiah11:16 Hazaba inzira y'itsinda ry'abasigaye mu bwoko bwe
Isaiah12:1 Icyo gihe uzavuga uti: “Uhoraho ndagushimiye
Isaiah12:2 Imana ni yo gakiza kanjye
Isaiah12:3 Muzavoma amazi munezerewe
Isaiah12:4 Icyo gihe muzavuga muti: “Nimushimire Uhoraho mwambaze izina rye
Isaiah12:5 Nimuririmbire Uhoraho kuko yakoze ibitangaje
Isaiah12:6 Abatuye Siyoni nimurangurure amajwi
Isaiah13:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwahawe Ezayi mwene Amotsi bwagenewe Babiloni.
Isaiah13:2 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Ku musozi w'ibiharabuge nimuhashinge ibendera
Isaiah13:3 Nategetse abanyiyeguriye
Isaiah13:4 Nimwumve urusaku ku misozi
Isaiah13:5 Zivuye iyo gihera mu bihugu bya kure
Isaiah13:6 Nimucure umuborogo kuko umunsi w'Uhoraho wegereje
Isaiah13:7 Ni yo mpamvu amaboko yose azatentebuka
Isaiah13:8 Dore bazakangarana
Isaiah13:9 Dore umunsi w'Uhoraho uraje
Isaiah13:10 Inyenyeri zo ku ijuru ntizizamurika
Isaiah13:11 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Nzahana isi kubera ubugizi bwa nabi buyirangwamo
Isaiah13:12 Nzatubya abantu babe ingume kurusha izahabu inoze
Isaiah13:13 Koko rero ijuru rizahubangana
Isaiah13:14 Bazamera nk'isha ikurikiwe n'umuhigi
Isaiah13:15 Abo bazabona bose bazabicisha imyambi
Isaiah13:16 Ibibondo byabo bizicirwa mu maso yabo
Isaiah13:17 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ngiye kubateza Abamedi
Isaiah13:18 Bazicisha imyambi abasore b'i Babiloni
Isaiah13:19 Babiloniya yari umutāko w'ibihugu
Isaiah13:20 Koko ntizongera guturwa bibaho
Isaiah13:21 Inyamaswa zizahagira amasenga yazo
Isaiah13:22 Impyisi zizahumira mu mazu ntamenwa
Isaiah14:1 Uhoraho azagirira impuhwe urubyaro rwa Yakobo
Isaiah14:2 Ibihugu byinshi by'amahanga bizishingira kugarura Abisiraheli mu gihugu cyabo. Abisiraheli nibagera mu gihugu Uhoraho yabahaye
Isaiah14:3 Isiraheli
Isaiah14:4 uzaririmbire umwami w'i Babiloni iyi indirimbo imukwena: Bishoboka bite se ko umunyagitugu yapfa? Gukandamiza bigiye nk'ifuni iheze!
Isaiah14:5 Uhoraho avunaguye inkoni z'abagome
Isaiah14:6 inkoni bakubitishaga abantu n'umujinya
Isaiah14:7 Bityo ibihugu byose bifite umutekano n'amahoro
Isaiah14:8 Amasipure yishimiye urupfu rwawe
Isaiah14:9 Ab'ikuzimu na bo biteguye kwakira umwami w'i Babiloni
Isaiah14:10 Bose bafashe ijambo bagira bati: “Nawe ubaye umunyantegenke kimwe natwe!”
Isaiah14:11 Icyubahiro n'amajwi y'inanga byawe byagiye ikuzimu
Isaiah14:12 Mbese wahanantutse ute mu ijuru
Isaiah14:13 Waribwiraga uti: “Nzazamuka ngere mu ijuru
Isaiah14:14 Nzazamuka ngere hejuru y'ibicu
Isaiah14:15 Nyamara dore wahananturiwe ikuzimu
Isaiah14:16 Abakubona barakwitegereza cyane
Isaiah14:17 wa muntu wahinduye isi ubutayu
Isaiah14:18 Koko rero
Isaiah14:19 Nyamara wowe wajugunywe hanze y'imva yawe
Isaiah14:20 Ntuzahambwa nk'abandi bami
Isaiah14:21 Nimwitegure kwica abana babo mubaziza ubugome bwa ba sekuruza
Isaiah14:22 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Nzahagurukira Abanyababiloniya
Isaiah14:23 Nzayihindura igishanga ibe icyanya cy'ibiyongoyongo
Isaiah14:24 Uhoraho Nyiringabo ararahiye ati: “Ibyo nateganyije nzabisohoza
Isaiah14:25 Nzajanjagurira Abanyashūru mu gihugu cyanjye
Isaiah14:26 Uyu ni umugambi Uhoraho yafatiye isi yose
Isaiah14:27 None se niba Uhoraho Nyiringabo yabigambiriye
Isaiah14:28 Ubu butumwa bwatanzwe mu mwaka Umwami Ahazi yapfuyemo.
Isaiah14:29 Bafilisiti mwese
Isaiah14:30 Abatindi nyakujya bazabona ibyokurya
Isaiah14:31 Mwa mijyi ntamenwa mwe
Isaiah14:32 Bazasubiza iki intumwa z'Abafilisiti? Bazazisubiza bati: “Uhoraho ni we washinze Siyoni
Isaiah15:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Mowabu. Ari na Kiri
Isaiah15:2 Abaturage b'i Diboni bagiye mu ngoro yabo
Isaiah15:3 Mu mayira abantu bambaye imyambaro igaragaza akababaro
Isaiah15:4 Ab'i Heshiboni n'i Eleyale barataka
Isaiah15:5 Ndaririra Mowabu
Isaiah15:6 Amazi y'i Nimurimu yarakamye
Isaiah15:7 Umutungo bari basigaranye
Isaiah15:8 Imiborogo ni yose mu mpande zose z'igihugu cya Mowabu
Isaiah15:9 Amazi y'i Diboni yuzuyemo amaraso
Isaiah16:1 Nimwoherereze umwami abana b'intama
Isaiah16:2 Abamowabukazi barabuyera ku byambu bya Arunoni
Isaiah16:3 Abamowabu baratakambira ab'i Yeruzalemu bati: “Nimutugire inama mufate icyemezo
Isaiah16:4 Nimureke impunzi z'Abamowabu zihungire iwanyu
Isaiah16:5 Icyo gihe ukomoka kuri Dawidi azaba umwami
Isaiah16:6 Ab'i Yeruzalemu baravuga bati: “Twumvise bavuga ubwirasi bukabije bw'Abamowabu
Isaiah16:7 None Abamowabu bose bararirira igihugu cyabo
Isaiah16:8 Imirima y'i Heshiboni yarangiritse
Isaiah16:9 Ni yo mpamvu twifatanyije n'ab'i Yāzeri
Isaiah16:10 Imirima yanyu ntikibatera kunezerwa
Isaiah16:11 Ni yo mpamvu ncurangira Mowabu indirimbo y'amaganya
Isaiah16:12 Abamowabu bazajya ahasengerwa
Isaiah16:13 Ibyo ni byo Uhoraho yavuze kuri Mowabu kuva kera. None Uhoraho aravuze ati:
Isaiah16:14 “Mu myaka itatu itarengaho umunsi n'umwe
Isaiah17:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Damasi. Dore Damasi ntizongera kuba umujyi ukundi
Isaiah17:2 Imijyi yo muri Aroweri izahinduka umusaka
Isaiah17:3 Abisiraheli ntibazongera kugira imijyi ntamenwa
Isaiah17:4 Icyo gihe Abisiraheli bazatakaza icyubahiro cyabo
Isaiah17:5 Isiraheli izamera nk'ingano zirundanyijwe igihe cy'isarura
Isaiah17:6 Muri Isiraheli hazarokoka abantu mbarwa
Isaiah17:7 Icyo gihe abantu bazarangamira Umuremyi wabo
Isaiah17:8 Ntibazongera kwita ku ntambiro biyubakiye
Isaiah17:9 Icyo gihe imijyi ntamenwa baretse kubera Abisiraheli izahinduka ibihuru n'ishyamba. Koko iyo mijyi izahinduka amatongo.
Isaiah17:10 Isiraheli we
Isaiah17:11 Imbuto mwabibye mwazimejeje uwo munsi
Isaiah17:12 Mbega uburakari bw'abantu benshi! Bararuruma nk'inyanja irimo imihengeri. Mbega umuborogo w'amahanga! Bararuruma nk'amazi menshi.
Isaiah17:13 Umva uburyo ibihugu biruruma nk'amazi y'inyanja
Isaiah17:14 Ku mugoroba biba biteye ubwoba
Isaiah18:1 Uragowe wa gihugu we cyuzuyemo inzige
Isaiah18:2 Ni igihugu cyohereza intumwa zinyuze mu nyanja
Isaiah18:3 Yemwe bantu mwese mutuye isi
Isaiah18:4 Koko Uhoraho yarambwiye ati: “Nzatuza mbyitegerereze aho ntuye
Isaiah18:5 Mbere y'isarura imizabibu ibanza kurabya
Isaiah18:6 Ibyo byose bizagabizwa ibisiga n'inyamaswa byo mu gasozi
Isaiah18:7 Icyo gihe bazazanira amaturo Uhoraho Nyirububasha
Isaiah19:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Misiri. Dore Uhoraho agiye mu Misiri
Isaiah19:2 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ngiye kubateranya basubiranemo
Isaiah19:3 Abanyamisiri bazakuka umutima
Isaiah19:4 Abanyamisiri nzabagabiza abategetsi b'inkazi
Isaiah19:5 Amazi ya Nili azakama
Isaiah19:6 Imigende yarwo izaba umunuko
Isaiah19:7 Imirima yose yuhirwaga n'uruzi rwa Nili izakakara
Isaiah19:8 Abarobaga muri Nili bose bazaganya barire
Isaiah19:9 Ababoshyi b'imyenda bazacika intege
Isaiah19:10 Koko ababoshyi b'imyenda bazashoberwa
Isaiah19:11 Abategetsi b'i Sowani ni abapfapfa
Isaiah19:12 Mwami wa Misiri
Isaiah19:13 Abategetsi ba Sowani ni abapfapfa
Isaiah19:14 Uhoraho yayobeje imigambi yabo
Isaiah19:15 Nta n'umwe mu Misiri ushobora kugira icyo amara
Isaiah19:16 Igihe kimwe Abanyamisiri bazaba nk'abagore
Isaiah19:17 Abayuda bazatera ubwoba Abanyamisiri
Isaiah19:18 Icyo gihe imijyi itanu yo mu Misiri izavuga igiheburayi
Isaiah19:19 Icyo gihe mu Misiri rwagati hazubakwa urutambiro rw'Uhoraho
Isaiah19:20 Ibyo bizaba ikimenyetso n'ubuhamya ko Uhoraho Nyiringabo ari mu gihugu cya Misiri. Igihe Abanyamisiri bazatabaza Uhoraho kubera ababakandamiza
Isaiah19:21 Uhoraho azimenyesha Abanyamisiri
Isaiah19:22 Uhoraho azahana Abanyamisiri abateze indwara
Isaiah19:23 Icyo gihe hazaboneka inzira ihuza Misiri na Ashūru. Abanyashūru bazagenderera Abanyamisiri
Isaiah19:24 Icyo gihe nikigera
Isaiah19:25 Uhoraho Nyiringabo azabaha umugisha avuga ati: “Mpaye umugisha abantu banjye b'Abanyamisiri
Isaiah20:1 Hari mu mwaka umugaba mukuru w'ingabo yoherejwe na Sarugoni umwami wa Ashūru
Isaiah20:2 Muri icyo gihe Uhoraho yari yarabwiye Ezayi mwene Amotsi ati: “Genda wiyambure imyambaro igaragaza akababaro
Isaiah20:3 Nuko Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nk'uko umugaragu wanjye Ezayi amaze imyaka itatu agenda yambaye ubusa nta n'inkweto
Isaiah20:4 ni na ko Umwami wa Ashūru azajyana Abanyamisiri n'Abanyakushi ho iminyago
Isaiah20:5 Abiringiraga Kushi bakiratana Misiri
Isaiah20:6 Icyo gihe abaturage baturanye n'ibyo bihugu bazavuga bati: “Dore ibyabaye ku bo twishingikirizagaho
Isaiah21:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe abaturiye ubutayu bwegereye inyanja. Nk'uko serwakira yambukiranya mu majyepfo
Isaiah21:2 Neretswe ibiteye ubwoba: Umugambanyi akomeje kugambana
Isaiah21:3 Ibyo neretswe binteye ubwoba bwinshi
Isaiah21:4 Nacitse intege ndadagadwa kubera ubwoba
Isaiah21:5 Ibyokurya byateguwe
Isaiah21:6 Koko rero Uhoraho arambwiye ati: “Genda ushyireho umurinzi
Isaiah21:7 Nabona amagare y'intambara akururwa n'amafarasi
Isaiah21:8 Nuko uwo munyezamu arangurura ijwi ati: “Databuja
Isaiah21:9 None dore ibyo mbona: haje umuntu uri mu igare rikururwa n'amafarasi abiri.” Uwo munyezamu arongera ati: “Babiloni irarimbutse
Isaiah21:10 Bwoko bwanjye
Isaiah21:11 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Edomu. Ijwi riturutse i Seyiri rimbaza riti: “Mbese munyezamu
Isaiah21:12 Nuko ndasubiza nti: “Bugiye gucya bwongere bwire
Isaiah21:13 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Arabiya. Yemwe bagenzi b'i Dedani
Isaiah21:14 Mwebwe abatuye i Tema
Isaiah21:15 Koko bahunze inkota yavuye mu rwubati
Isaiah21:16 Koko rero Uhoraho arambwiye ati: “Mu mwaka umwe gusa
Isaiah21:17 Hazasigara abantu mbarwa mu barwanisha imiheto b'ingabo z'i Kedari.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli avuze.
Isaiah22:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Umubande w'ibonekerwa. Baturage b'i Yeruzalemu
Isaiah22:2 Ni kuki muvuza urwamo mwishimye
Isaiah22:3 Abakuru banyu bose bahunze
Isaiah22:4 Ni yo mpamvu nababwiye nti: “Nimundeke ndire mpogore
Isaiah22:5 Koko rero Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyiringabo yaduteje akaga
Isaiah22:6 Ingabo z'Abanyelamu zitwaje imiheto n'imyambi
Isaiah22:7 Mwa batuye i Yeruzalemu mwe
Isaiah22:8 Koko rero u Buyuda nta gitabara bugifite
Isaiah22:9 Mwiboneye ibyuho byaciwe mu nkuta zizengurutse Umurwa wa Dawidi
Isaiah22:10 Mwabaruye amazu y'i Yeruzalemu
Isaiah22:11 Mwubatse ikizenga hagati y'inkuta zombi
Isaiah22:12 Icyo gihe Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyiringabo yarabahamagaye
Isaiah22:13 Nyamara dore ibyishimo byarabasagutse
Isaiah22:14 Uhoraho Nyiringabo yarabimpishuriye avuga ati: “Ndarahiye
Isaiah22:15 Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyiringabo yaravuze ati: “Jya kwa Shebuna
Isaiah22:16 ‘Urakora iki aha? Ni nde mufitanye isano?’ Koko rero wahicukuriye imva mu rutare ahirengeye
Isaiah22:17 Wa munyambaraga we
Isaiah22:18 Azakujugunya nk'ujugunya umupira
Isaiah22:19 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzagukura ku mwanya wawe nkwambure ubutegetsi.
Isaiah22:20 Icyo gihe nzatuma umugaragu wanjye
Isaiah22:21 Nzamwambika umwambaro wawe w'ubutegetsi
Isaiah22:22 Nzamuha urufunguzo rw'inzu ya Dawidi
Isaiah22:23 Nzamugira ukomeye
Isaiah22:24 Ikuzo ry'umuryango we rizaza kuri we
Isaiah22:25 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Icyo gihe ya nkingi izakuka yikubite hasi
Isaiah23:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Tiri. Nimurire batware b'amato ajya i Tarushishi
Isaiah23:2 Mwebwe abaturiye inyanja nimuceceke
Isaiah23:3 Inyungu zanyu zavaga mu mbuto zo mu kibaya cya Nili
Isaiah23:4 Sidoni
Isaiah23:5 Misiri niyumva ko Sidoni yashenywe izababara cyane.
Isaiah23:6 Mwebwe abaturage b'i Fenisiya nimurire
Isaiah23:7 Mbese uriya ni wa mujyi wanyu wahoze uhinda? Ese waba wa mujyi wubatswe kera cyane? Waba se ari wa mujyi woherezaga abantu bawo kwigarurira ibihugu?
Isaiah23:8 Ni nde wafashe umugambi wo guhana Tiri? Uwo mujyi wahoze wimika abami
Isaiah23:9 Ni Uhoraho Nyiringabo wafashe uwo mugambi
Isaiah23:10 Baturage b'i Tarushishi
Isaiah23:11 Uhoraho yibasiye inyanja
Isaiah23:12 Uhoraho yaravuze ati: “Bantu b'i Sidoni mwarakandamijwe
Isaiah23:13 Reba igihugu cya Babiloniya ntikigituwe
Isaiah23:14 Nimurire basare b'amato ajya i Tarushishi
Isaiah23:15 Ubwo Tiri izibagirana igihe cy'imyaka mirongo irindwi
Isaiah23:16 “Yewe wa ndaya we yibagiranye
Isaiah23:17 Nyuma y'iyo myaka mirongo irindwi
Isaiah23:18 Umutungo bazagira bazawegurira Uhoraho. Ntibazawubika kure
Isaiah24:1 Dore Uhoraho agiye konona isi ayihindure umusaka
Isaiah24:2 Akaga kazagera ku muntu wese
Isaiah24:3 Isi izononekara ihinduke umusaka rwose. Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.
Isaiah24:4 Isi iri mu cyunamo ihindutse amatongo
Isaiah24:5 Isi yandavujwe n'abayituye
Isaiah24:6 Ni yo mpamvu umuvumo uyogoje isi
Isaiah24:7 Imizabibu irarabiranye
Isaiah24:8 Ibyishimo bivanze n'umurishyo w'ingoma birayoyotse
Isaiah24:9 Ntibakinywa divayi banezerewe
Isaiah24:10 Umujyi wabaye ikidaturwa
Isaiah24:11 Mu mayira baraganya ko nta divayi ikiboneka
Isaiah24:12 Umujyi ubaye amatongo
Isaiah24:13 Koko rero ni ko bizagendekera isi n'abayituye
Isaiah24:14 Abacitse ku icumu bahanitse amajwi
Isaiah24:15 Ab'iburasirazuba n'abo mu birwa barasingiza Uhoraho
Isaiah24:16 Kuva ku mpera z'isi bararirimba bati: “Ikuzo nirihabwe Imana Nyir'ubutungane.” Nyamara ndibwira nti: “Kambayeho! Kambayeho! Ngushije ishyano!” Abagambanyi bakomeje kugambana.
Isaiah24:17 Mwa batuye isi mwe
Isaiah24:18 uzahunga induru y'iterabwoba azagwa mu rwobo
Isaiah24:19 Isi iziyasa
Isaiah24:20 Isi izadandabirana nk'umusinzi
Isaiah24:21 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azahana ibinyabubasha byo ku ijuru
Isaiah24:22 Bazarundanywa nk'abanyururu muri gereza
Isaiah24:23 Ukwezi n'izuba ntibizamurika
Isaiah25:1 Uhoraho
Isaiah25:2 Imijyi wayihinduye ikirundo cy'amabuye
Isaiah25:3 Amoko akomeye azagusingiza
Isaiah25:4 Koko uri ubuhungiro bw'abanyantegenke
Isaiah25:5 bumeze nk'ubushyuhe ku butaka bwumiranye. Nyamara wowe Uhoraho
Isaiah25:6 Uhoraho Nyiringabo azakoresha ibirori ku musozi wa Siyoni
Isaiah25:7 Kuri uwo musozi Uhoraho azakuraho akaga
Isaiah25:8 Uhoraho azatsemba urupfu burundu
Isaiah25:9 Icyo gihe bazavuga bati: “Uhoraho ni Imana yacu
Isaiah25:10 Uhoraho azarinda umusozi wa Siyoni
Isaiah25:11 Bazarambura amaboko nk'abakura umusomyo
Isaiah25:12 Mowabu we

Isaiah26:2 Nimukingure amarembo

Isaiah27:1 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azafata inkota ye nini
Isaiah27:2 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azavuga ati: “Nimutere indirimbo y'umuzabibu unejeje.
Isaiah27:3 Jyewe Uhoraho ndawurinda nkawuvomerera buri gihe
Isaiah27:4 Sinkiwurakariye
Isaiah27:5 Nyamara abanzi banjye nibampungiraho
Isaiah27:6 Mu gihe kizaza urubyaro rwa Yakobo ruzagwira
Isaiah27:7 Mbese Uhoraho yahannye Abisiraheli? Yabahannye se nk'uko yagenje ababakandamizaga? Yabishe se nk'uko yagenje ababicaga?
Isaiah27:8 Yabamenesheje mu gihugu cyabo
Isaiah27:9 Bityo ibicumuro by'Abisiraheli bizahanagurwa
Isaiah27:10 Wa mujyi w'intamenwa uzahinduka umusaka
Isaiah27:11 Amashami y'ibiti azuma avunagurike
Isaiah27:12 Icyo gihe guhera ku ruzi rwa Efurati kugeza ku kagezi ko ku mupaka wa Misiri
Isaiah27:13 Icyo gihe ikondera rinini rizavuga
Isaiah28:1 Samariya iragowe
Isaiah28:2 Dore Uhoraho yohereje umuntu w'umunyambaraga n'intwari
Isaiah28:3 Azaribata iryo kamba ry'ubwirasi bw'abasinzi b'Abisiraheli
Isaiah28:4 azaribata za ndabyo zarabiranye z'ubwiza bw'ikuzo ry'uwo mujyi
Isaiah28:5 Icyo gihe Uhoraho Nyiringabo azaba ikamba ribengerana
Isaiah28:6 Abacamanza azabatoza guca imanza zitabera
Isaiah28:7 Abatambyi n'abahanuzi na bo barayobye kubera divayi
Isaiah28:8 Ibirutsi byabo binuka bidendeje hose
Isaiah28:9 Barabazanya bati: “Mbese Ezayi arigisha nde? Mbese ni nde ukeneye inyigisho ze? Ese aho ntagira ngo turi abana bakiri ku ibere cyangwa bacutse?
Isaiah28:10 Nyumvira na we aragira ati: ‘Nimugire mutya
Isaiah28:11 Nyamara Uhoraho azabwira ubwoko bwe mu zindi ndimi
Isaiah28:12 Uhoraho yari yarababwiye ati: “Aha ni ho muzaruhukira
Isaiah28:13 Bityo Ijambo ry'Uhoraho rizababera nka ya mvugo ngo: “Nimugire mutya
Isaiah28:14 Nimwumve mwa banyagasuzuguro mwe
Isaiah28:15 Muravuga muti: “Twagiranye isezerano n'urupfu
Isaiah28:16 Nyamara Uhoraho Imana aravuze ati: “Ngiye gushyira muri Siyoni ibuye ritunganye
Isaiah28:17 Ubutabera nzabugira nk'igipimisho
Isaiah28:18 Isezerano mwagiranye n'urupfu rizaseswa
Isaiah28:19 Buri gihe uko kije kizabageraho
Isaiah28:20 Bityo bizamera nk'aho uburiri bubabanye bugufi
Isaiah28:21 Uhoraho azabahagurukira nk'uko yabigenje ku musozi wa Perasimu
Isaiah28:22 None rero nimureke guhinyura iyo miburo
Isaiah28:23 Nimutege amatwi munyumve
Isaiah28:24 Iyo umuhinzi agamije kubiba ntarambirwa
Isaiah28:25 Iyo amaze gutunganya umurima abiba umurama w'imboga
Isaiah28:26 Iyo mikorere ayikomora ku Mana ye
Isaiah28:27 Ushaka umurama w'imboga ntawusekura mu isekuru
Isaiah28:28 Umuhinzi azi uburyo ahura ingano ze atazimenaguye
Isaiah28:29 Iyo mikorere na yo ayikomora ku Uhoraho Nyiringabo

Isaiah29:2 nyamara amaherezo nzaguhana
Isaiah29:3 Nanjye nzakugota impande zose

Isaiah29:9 Ngaho nimutangare maze mwumirwe
Isaiah29:10 Koko Uhoraho yarabarindagije
Isaiah29:11 Ibi byose mweretswe bibabereye nk'inyandiko ifungishijwe kashe baha umuntu uzi gusoma bati: “Soma iyi nyandiko.” Nuko akabasubiza ati: “Sinabishobora kuko ifungishijwe kashe.”
Isaiah29:12 Hanyuma bakayiha utazi gusoma bati: “Soma iyi nyandiko”
Isaiah29:13 Nyagasani aravuze ati: “Aba bantu bampoza ku rurimi
Isaiah29:14 Nzakomeza mbakorere ibikorwa bitangaje
Isaiah29:15 Bazabona ishyano abahisha Uhoraho imigambi yabo

Isaiah29:20 Icyo gihe abategekesha igitugu bazanyagwa
Isaiah29:21 Abashinja abandi ibyaha bazarimburwa
Isaiah29:22 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho avugira abakomoka kuri Yakobo
Isaiah29:23 Koko bo n'abana babo bazabona ibyo nzabakorera
Isaiah29:24 Abari barahabye bazahabuka
Isaiah30:1 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Bazabona ishyano abantu bigometse! Abantu bacura imigambi itanturutseho
Isaiah30:2 Bajya mu Misiri batangishije inama
Isaiah30:3 Nyamara umwami wa Misiri nta cyo azabamarira
Isaiah30:4 Koko abategetsi banyu bageze i Sowani
Isaiah30:5 Bose bazakozwa isoni n'icyo gihugu kitabagiriye akamaro
Isaiah30:6 Ubu butumwa bwerekeye inyamaswa zo mu butayu bw'amajyepfo. Dore intumwa zirambukiranya igihugu giteye ubwoba
Isaiah30:7 Inkunga ya Misiri nta cyo imaze
Isaiah30:8 Uhoraho yabwiye Ezayi ati: “Genda wandike ku kibaho no mu gitabo imbere yabo
Isaiah30:9 Koko ubu bwoko ni abagome n'ababeshyi
Isaiah30:10 Babwira abashishozi bati: ‘Nimureke kubonekerwa!’ Babwira n'abahanuzi bati: ‘Ntimuzongere kutumenyesha ukuri. Mujye mutubwira ibitunezeza
Isaiah30:11 Abantu babwira kandi abahanuzi bati: ‘Nimureke gukurikiza ukuri
Isaiah30:12 Imana Umuziranenge wa Isiraheli aravuze ati: “Mwajugunye ubutumwa bwanjye
Isaiah30:13 Nta kabuza iryo kosa rizababera nk'urukuta
Isaiah30:14 Urwo rukuta nirwikubita hasi ruzamenagurika
Isaiah30:15 Nyagasani Uhoraho
Isaiah30:16 Muravuga muti: ‘Reka da! Tuzahunga tugendere ku mafarasi.’ Ni koko muzahunga mwihuta. Muravuga kandi muti: ‘Tuzagendera ku mafarasi yihuta cyane.’ Nyamara abazabakurikirana na bo bazaba bihuta cyane.
Isaiah30:17 Abantu igihumbi muri mwe bazahunga
Isaiah30:18 Uhoraho yiyemeje kubagirira imbabazi
Isaiah30:19 Yemwe baturage b'i Siyoni
Isaiah30:20 Nyagasani azabanyuza mu mibabaro
Isaiah30:21 Nimuramuka muteshutse inzira muzumva ijwi ribabwira riti: “Dore inzira nimube ari yo munyuramo.”
Isaiah30:22 Ibigirwamana byanyu bitatse ifeza
Isaiah30:23 Uhoraho azabaha imvura yo kumeza imbuto mwabibye
Isaiah30:24 Ibimasa n'indogobe bihinga bizarya ibyatsi biryoshye kandi biteguwe neza.
Isaiah30:25 Ku munsi w'ubwicanyi bukabije iminara yose izariduka
Isaiah30:26 Kuri uwo munsi Uhoraho azapfuka ibikomere by'ubwoko bwe
Isaiah30:27 Nguriya Uhoraho araje aturutse kure
Isaiah30:28 Umwuka we umeze nk'uruzi rwuzuye rukarenga inkombe
Isaiah30:29 Icyo gihe muzaririmba nk'abari mu gitaramo cy'umunsi mukuru
Isaiah30:30 Uhoraho azumvikanisha ijwi rye riteye ubwoba

Isaiah30:32 Uko Uhoraho azajya ahana Abanyashūru
Isaiah30:33 Ahagenewe gutwikira Umwami wa Ashūru hateguwe kuva kera

Isaiah35:2 Icyo gihugu kizuzura indabyo

Isaiah36:2 Umwami wa Ashūru ari i Lakishi
Isaiah36:3 Nuko mwene Hilikiya ari we Eliyakimu wari umuyobozi w'ibwami
Isaiah36:4 Umujyanama wihariye w'umwami wa Ashūru arababwira ati: “Nimugende mubwire Hezekiya ubu butumwa bw'umwami ukomeye ari we mwami wa Ashūru muti: ‘Icyizere ufite ni cyizere ki?
Isaiah36:5 Mbese uribwira ko amagambo yonyine
Isaiah36:6 Erega wishingikirije kuri Misiri
Isaiah36:7 “Ahari aho mugiye kunsubiza muti: ‘Uwo dufitiye icyizere ni Uhoraho Imana yacu.’ Nyamara Hezekiya ni we ubwe washenye ahasengerwa hose n'intambiro zaho
Isaiah36:8 “None rero
Isaiah36:9 Ubwo se koko washobora gutsimbura n'umwe woherejwe wo mu bagaba b'ingabo ba databuja? None wishingikirije ku Banyamisiri ngo bazaguha amagare y'intambara n'amafarasi!
Isaiah36:10 Mbese ye
Isaiah36:11 Nuko Eliyakimu na Shebuna na Yowa
Isaiah36:12 Umujyanama w'umwami wa Ashūru arabasubiza ati: “Mbese mwibwira ko databuja yantumye kuri shobuja namwe gusa? Erega yantumye no kuri bariya bicaye ku rukuta
Isaiah36:13 Umujyanama w'umwami wa Ashūru arahaguruka
Isaiah36:14 aragira ati: ‘Nimureke kwishinga Hezekiya
Isaiah36:15 Arishingikiriza ku cyizere cy'uko Uhoraho azabankiza
Isaiah36:16 Nimureke kumvira Hezekiya ahubwo mukurikize ibi mbabwira: nimuharanire amahoro munyoboke
Isaiah36:17 Hanyuma nzabajyana mu gihugu kimeze nk'icyanyu
Isaiah36:18 Nimwitondere Hezekiya
Isaiah36:19 Ese ye
Isaiah36:20 Ni iyihe muri izo mana zose yambujije kwigarurira igihugu cyayo? Nta yo. None se Uhoraho azambuza ate kwigarurira Yeruzalemu?’ ”
Isaiah36:21 Abari aho baricecekera
Isaiah36:22 Nuko Eliyakimu mwene Hilikiya umuyobozi w'ibwami
Isaiah37:1 Umwami Hezekiya abyumvise ashishimura imyambaro ye
Isaiah37:2 Atuma Eliyakimu umuyobozi w'ibwami na Shebuna umunyamabanga
Isaiah37:3 Baramubwira bati: “Hezekiya yadutumye ngo: ‘Uyu munsi ni umunsi w'umubabaro n'igihano n'ikimwaro. Nk'uko bavuga ngo: abana bageze mu matako
Isaiah37:4 Dore umwami wa Ashūru yohereje umujyanama we atuka Imana nzima. Iyaba Uhoraho Imana yawe yari yumvise ibyo bitutsi
Isaiah37:5 Izo ntumwa z'Umwami Hezekiya zimaze kubwira Ezayi ubwo butumwa
Isaiah37:6 arazisubiza ati: “Nimusubire ku mwami mumubwire ko Uhoraho avuze ati: ‘Wumvise abagaragu b'umwami wa Ashūru bansebya
Isaiah37:7 Dore ndahindura umutima we
Isaiah37:8 Icyo gihe umwami wa Ashūru amaze kwigarurira Lakishi
Isaiah37:9 Umwami wa Ashūru amenyeshwa ko Tiruhaka w'Umunyakushi
Isaiah37:10 “Wowe Hezekiya umwami w'u Buyuda
Isaiah37:11 Wumvise ukuntu abami ba Ashūru bagenje ibindi bihugu byose bakabirimbura. None se uragira ngo uzarokoka?
Isaiah37:12 Ubwo abo nasimbuye ku ngoma batsembaga abaturage ba Gozani n'aba Harani
Isaiah37:13 Umwami wa Hamati
Isaiah37:14 Nuko Hezekiya afata urwandiko rwazanywe n'intumwa z'umwami wa Ashūru ararusoma. Hanyuma arujyana mu Ngoro y'Imana arushyira imbere y'Uhoraho.
Isaiah37:15 Hezekiya ni ko gusenga ati
Isaiah37:16 “Uhoraho Nyiringabo Mana y'Abisiraheli
Isaiah37:17 Uhoraho
Isaiah37:18 None rero Uhoraho
Isaiah37:19 imana zayo bazijugunya mu muriro
Isaiah37:20 Uhoraho Mana yacu
Isaiah37:21 Nuko Ezayi mwene Amotsi ageza kuri Hezekiya igisubizo cy'Uhoraho Imana ya Isiraheli. Aramubwira ati: “Numvise isengesho ryawe wangejejeho ku byerekeye Senakeribu
Isaiah37:22 None umva icyo muvugaho. Abatuye i Siyoni baragusuzuguye
Isaiah37:23 Ni nde watutse ukamwandagaza? Ni nde wavugishije umurebana agasuzuguro? Ni jyewe Umuziranenge wa Isiraheli!
Isaiah37:24 Jyewe Nyagasani wanyoherereje intumwa zo kuntuka ziti: ‘Amagare yanjye y'intambara yangejeje mu mpinga z'imisozi
Isaiah37:25 Nafukuye amariba nywa ku mazi yayo
Isaiah37:26 “None se Senakeribu
Isaiah37:27 Abaturage bafite amaboko atentebutse
Isaiah37:28 Erega wowe Senakeribu ndakuzi! Nzi neza imyifatire yawe n'ibikorwa byawe byose
Isaiah37:29 Koko warikubise urandakaza
Isaiah37:30 “Naho wowe Hezekiya
Isaiah37:31 Abayuda barokotse bazongera gushinga imizi
Isaiah37:32 Koko rero i Yeruzalemu hazaboneka itsinda ry'abasigaye
Isaiah37:33 None rero ku byerekeye umwami wa Ashūru
Isaiah37:34 Azasubirayo anyuze inzira yamuzanye
Isaiah37:35 Nzarinda uyu murwa
Isaiah37:36 Iryo joro umumarayika w'Uhoraho anyura mu nkambi y'Abanyashūru
Isaiah37:37 Senakeribu umwami wa Ashūru asubira iwe atura i Ninive.
Isaiah37:38 Igihe Senakeribu yaramyaga imana ye Nisiroki
Isaiah38:1 Muri icyo gihe Hezekiya ararwara yenda gupfa. Umuhanuzi Ezayi mwene Amotsi ajya kumusura aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ngo: ‘Itegure urage abo mu rugo rwawe
Isaiah38:2 Hezekiya arahindukira areba ivure
Isaiah38:3 “Uhoraho
Isaiah38:4 Uhoraho abwira Ezayi ati:
Isaiah38:5 “Genda ubwire Hezekiya uti: ‘Jyewe Uhoraho Imana ya sokuruza Dawidi
Isaiah38:6 Wowe n'abatuye uyu murwa nzabakiza umwami wa Ashūru
Isaiah38:7 Ezayi aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho ari buguhe ikimenyetso kikwemeza ko azasohoza icyo yasezeranye.
Isaiah38:8 Dore igicucu cy'izuba kiri ku ngazi ya Ahazi
Isaiah38:9 Dore igisigo cya Hezekiya umwami w'u Buyuda amaze gukira indwara. Yaravuze ati:
Isaiah38:10 “Nibwiraga ko ngiye gukenyuka
Isaiah38:11 Nibwiraga ko ntazongera kubona Uhoraho nkiri ku isi
Isaiah38:12 Icumbi ryanjye ryarashenywe
Isaiah38:13 Ndara ntaka kugeza mu gitondo
Isaiah38:14 Ndajwigira nk'intashya cyangwa igishwi
Isaiah38:15 None se kandi mvuge iki
Isaiah38:16 Nyagasani
Isaiah38:17 Koko umubabaro wanjye uwuhinduyemo umunezero
Isaiah38:18 Uhoraho
Isaiah38:19 Abazima ni bo bagusingiza
Isaiah38:20 Uhoraho warankijije
Isaiah38:21 Ezayi aravuga ati: “Nibategure umubumbe w'imbuto z'umutini
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiya aramubaza ati: “Mbese ni ikihe kimenyetso kibasha kunyemeza ko nzasubira mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho?”
Isaiah39:1 Muri icyo gihe umwami wa Babiloniya
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiya anezezwa no kubakira
Isaiah39:3 Hanyuma umuhanuzi Ezayi aramusanga aramubaza ati: “Bariya bantu bakubwiraga iki? Ese ubundi bari baturutse he?” Hezekiya aramusubiza ati: “Bari baturutse kure cyane muri Babiloniya.”
Isaiah39:4 Ezayi aramubaza ati: “None se babonye iki mu ngoro yawe?” Hezekiya aramusubiza ati: “Babonye ibiyirimo byose
Isaiah39:5 Ezayi abwira Hezekiya ati: “Umva icyo Uhoraho Nyiringabo avuze:
Isaiah39:6 ‘Igihe kizagera ibiri mu ngoro yawe byose
Isaiah39:7 ‘Ndetse bazajyana bamwe mu rubyaro rwawe bwite
Isaiah39:8 Hezekiya asubiza Ezayi ati: “Ni byiza kungezaho iryo jambo ry'Uhoraho.” Koko rero yaribwiraga ati: “Mu gihe nzaba nkiriho
Isaiah40:1 Nimuhumurize ubwoko bwanjye
Isaiah40:2 Nimubwirane ubugwaneza abantu b'i Yeruzalemu
Isaiah40:3 Nimwumve ijwi ry'urangururira mu butayu ati: “Nimutunganye inzira y'Uhoraho
Isaiah40:4 Imibande yose izigizwa hejuru
Isaiah40:5 Ikuzo ry'Uhoraho rizahishurwa
Isaiah40:6 Ndumva ijwi ry'uvuga ati: “Ngaho tangaza ubutumwa.” Ndamubaza nti: “Ni ubuhe butumwa ntangaza.” Aransubiza ati: “Tangaza ibi: ‘Abantu bose bameze nk'ibyatsi
Isaiah40:7 Ibyatsi biruma
Isaiah40:8 Koko rero abantu ni nk'ibyatsi
Isaiah40:9 Abazanye inkuru nziza i Siyoni nimuzamuke umusozi muremure
Isaiah40:10 Koko Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyir'imbaraga araje
Isaiah40:11 Azaragira umukumbi we nk'umushumba
Isaiah40:12 Ni nde wapima inyanja akoresheje ikiganza? Ni nde wapimisha ijuru ukuboko kwe? Ni nde wapimisha icyibo ubutaka bwo ku isi? Ni nde wapima imisozi n'udusozi ku minzani?
Isaiah40:13 Ni nde wabasha gusobanukirwa Mwuka w'Uhoraho? Ni nde wamugira inama akamwigisha?
Isaiah40:14 Ni nde Uhoraho yagishije inama ngo asobanukirwe? Ni nde wamwigishije imigenzereze itunganye? Ni nde wamwigishije ubumenyi n'ubuhanga?
Isaiah40:15 Amahanga ni ubusa imbere y'Uhoraho
Isaiah40:16 Inyamaswa zo muri Libani ntizihagije gutambwa ho ibitambo
Isaiah40:17 Amahanga yose ni ubusa imbere ye. Koko kuri we amahanga yose ni ubusa nta cyo amaze.
Isaiah40:18 Imana mwayigereranya na nde? Ni iki mwayigereranya na yo?
Isaiah40:19 Mbese mwayigereranya n'ikigirwamana cyakozwe n'abantu? Ese mwayigereranya n'ikigirwamana cyometsweho izahabu
Isaiah40:20 Abakene bo ntibashobora kubona bene icyo kigirwamana
Isaiah40:21 Mbese ntimwari mubizi? Ese ntabwo mwigeze mubyumva? Ntimwabimenyeshejwe se kuva kera? Ntimwigeze mumenya igihe isi yaremewe?
Isaiah40:22 Uwo ni we uganje hejuru y'isi
Isaiah40:23 Abanyacyubahiro bo ku isi abagira ubusa busa
Isaiah40:24 Nubwo baba bakomeye ku butegetsi
Isaiah40:25 Umuziranenge arabaza ati: “Ni nde mwangereranya na we? Mbese hari uwo duhwanye?”
Isaiah40:26 Nimwubure amaso murebe ku ijuru
Isaiah40:27 Mwa Bisiraheli bene Yakobo mwe
Isaiah40:28 Mbese ntimwari mubizi? Ese ntabwo mwigeze mubyumva? Uhoraho ni Imana iteka ryose
Isaiah40:29 Asubiza umunyantegenke imbaraga
Isaiah40:30 Abasore barananirwa bagacogora
Isaiah40:31 Nyamara abiringira Uhoraho bazasubizwa imbaraga
Isaiah41:1 Mwa batuye ibirwa mwe
Isaiah41:2 Ni nde wahagurukije umutabazi amukuye iburasirazuba? Ni nde wamuhamagaye ngo amube hafi? Ni nde wamweguriye amahanga? Ni nde wamuhaye gutsinda abami? Yabahinduye umukungugu akoresheje inkota ye
Isaiah41:3 Yarabakurikiranye ntibagira icyo bamutwara
Isaiah41:4 Ni nde wabiteguye akabishyira mu bikorwa? Ni wa wundi waremye abantu kuva mu ntangiriro
Isaiah41:5 Abatuye ibirwa barabibonye bashya ubwoba
Isaiah41:6 Buri muntu afasha mugenzi we
Isaiah41:7 Umunyabukorikori ashyigikira ushongesha izahabu
Isaiah41:8 Isiraheli mugaragu wanjye
Isaiah41:9 Nabakuye ku mpera z'isi
Isaiah41:10 Ntimugire ubwoba ndi kumwe namwe
Isaiah41:11 Koko ababahagurukiye bose bazakorwa n'isoni
Isaiah41:12 Nubwo mwashakashaka abanzi banyu ntimuzababona
Isaiah41:13 Koko ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibakomeza
Isaiah41:14 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Mwa rubyaro rwa Yakobo mwe
Isaiah41:15 Ngiye kubagira nk'igikoresho gihura ingano
Isaiah41:16 Muzayigosora itwarwe n'umuyaga
Isaiah41:17 Abakene n'abatindi bashakashaka amazi ntibayabone
Isaiah41:18 Nzavubura inzūzi mu misozi y'ibiharabuge
Isaiah41:19 Mu butayu nzahatera amasederi
Isaiah41:20 Abantu bose bazabyibonera
Isaiah41:21 Uhoraho umwami wa Isiraheli arabwira ibigirwamana ati: “Nimushoze urubanza mutange n'ibimenyetso.
Isaiah41:22 Ngaho nibize bidutekerereze ibigiye kuba
Isaiah41:23 Nimutubwire ibizaba mu gihe kizaza
Isaiah41:24 Nyamara nta cyo mumaze
Isaiah41:25 Jyewe Uhoraho nihagurukirije umuntu
Isaiah41:26 Ni nde se watangaje ibingibi kuva kera? Ni nde kugira ngo tubimenye? Ni nde wabanje kubitangaza ngo tuvuge tuti: “Ibyo yavuze ni ukuri?” Koko rero nta n'umwe muri mwe wabitangaje
Isaiah41:27 Ni jye wa mbere wabitangaje i Siyoni
Isaiah41:28 Naritonze nditegereza
Isaiah41:29 Byose nta cyo bimaze
Isaiah42:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Dore umugaragu wanjye nshyigikiye
Isaiah42:2 Ntazatongana kandi ntazasakuza
Isaiah42:3 Urubingo rwavunitse ntazaruhwanya
Isaiah42:4 Ntazacika intege kandi ntazacogora ubutabera butaraganza ku isi
Isaiah42:5 Uhoraho Imana yaremye ijuru ikarihanika
Isaiah42:6 “Jyewe Uhoraho naguhamagariye guharanira ubutungane
Isaiah42:7 Uzahumura impumyi kandi ubohore imfungwa
Isaiah42:8 Ndi Uhoraho
Isaiah42:9 Dore ibyo nababwiye kera byarasohojwe
Isaiah42:10 Nimuririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nshya
Isaiah42:11 Abatuye ubutayu n'imijyi yabwo nibahanike amajwi
Isaiah42:12 Abaturage b'iyo gihera nibarate Uhoraho
Isaiah42:13 Uhoraho asohotse nk'intwari
Isaiah42:14 Kuva kera kose naricecekeye
Isaiah42:15 Ngiye kurimbura imisozi n'utununga
Isaiah42:16 Nzayobora impumyi mu nzira zitigeze zimenya
Isaiah42:17 Abiringira ibigirwamana bazasubizwa inyuma
Isaiah42:18 Mwa bipfamatwi mwe
Isaiah42:19 Ni nde mpumyi nk'umugaragu wanjye? Ni nde mpumyi nk'intumwa yanjye?
Isaiah42:20 Abisiraheli babonye byinshi nyamara ntibabyitaho
Isaiah42:21 Uhoraho yishimiye gukomeza Amategeko ye no kuyaboneza
Isaiah42:22 Nyamara aba bantu banyazwe ibyabo barasenyerwa
Isaiah42:23 Ni nde muri mwe uzabitega amatwi? Ni nde uzabyitaho akabyumva uhereye ubu?
Isaiah42:24 Ni nde watumye abakomoka kuri Yakobo basenyerwa? Ni nde watumye Abisiraheli bajyanwa ho iminyago? Ni Uhoraho uwo twacumuyeho
Isaiah42:25 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho yabasutseho uburakari bwe
Isaiah43:1 Mwebwe abakomoka kuri Yakobo nimwumve Uhoraho wabaremye
Isaiah43:2 Nimunyura mu mazi nzaba ndi kumwe namwe
Isaiah43:3 Koko jyewe Uhoraho ndi Imana yanyu
Isaiah43:4 Ibyo nabitewe n'agaciro mufite
Isaiah43:5 Mwigira ubwoba ndi kumwe namwe
Isaiah43:6 Nzabwira amahanga yo mu majyaruguru nti: ‘Nimubampe’
Isaiah43:7 Abo bose bitirirwa izina ryanjye
Isaiah43:8 Nimumuhamagare abo bafite amaso ariko ntibabone
Isaiah43:9 Amahanga yose niyishyire hamwe
Isaiah43:10 Uhoraho arabwira Abisiraheli ati: “Muri abagabo bo guhamya ibyanjye
Isaiah43:11 Koko ni jyewe Uhoraho
Isaiah43:12 Ni jye wabahishuriye agakiza ndakabaha
Isaiah43:13 Nzahora ndi Imana yanyu
Isaiah43:14 Uhoraho Umuziranenge wa Isiraheli
Isaiah43:15 Jyewe Uhoraho wahanze Isiraheli
Isaiah43:16 Uhoraho wahanze inzira mu nyanja
Isaiah43:17 yimiriye amagare y'intambara n'amafarasi
Isaiah43:18 “Ntimugakomeze kwihambira ku byabaye kera
Isaiah43:19 Dore ngiye gukora igikorwa gishya
Isaiah43:20 Inyamaswa zizanyubaha
Isaiah43:21 Abo bantu nabaremeye kumpesha ikuzo.”
Isaiah43:22 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yemwe abakomoka kuri Yakobo
Isaiah43:23 Ntimwantambiye intama ho ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Isaiah43:24 Ntimwanguriye imibavu y'agaciro
Isaiah43:25 Nyamara jyewe niyemeje kubababarira ibicumuro byanyu
Isaiah43:26 “Nimunyibutse ibyo munshinja tubiburane
Isaiah43:27 Umukurambere wanyu yakoze icyaha
Isaiah43:28 Ni yo mpamvu nahinyuye abatware b'Ingoro yanyu
Isaiah44:1 Nimwumve rubyaro rwa Yakobo umugaragu wanjye
Isaiah44:2 Jyewe Uhoraho nabaremye kuva mukiri mu nda
Isaiah44:3 Ngiye guha amazi abishwe n'inyota
Isaiah44:4 Bazakura nk'ibyatsi bivomererwa
Isaiah44:5 Umwe azavuga ati: ‘Ndi uw'Uhoraho’
Isaiah44:6 Uhoraho Nyiringabo
Isaiah44:7 Ni nde uhwanye nanjye? Ngaho nabivuge abinsobanurire. Nasobanure ibyabaye uhereye igihe naremaga abantu
Isaiah44:8 Mwihinda umushyitsi kandi mwigira ubwoba
Isaiah44:9 Abakora amashusho y'ibigirwamana ni inkorabusa
Isaiah44:10 Uwiremera imana akicurira ikigirwamana nta cyo bimumarira.
Isaiah44:11 Ababiyoboka bose bazakorwa n'isoni
Isaiah44:12 Umucuzi w'icyuma aragikata akagicanira
Isaiah44:13 Umubāji w'amashusho abanza gupimisha umugozi
Isaiah44:14 Umubāji atema isederi cyangwa isipure
Isaiah44:15 Akamaro k'ibyo biti ni ugucanwa
Isaiah44:16 Igice kimwe cy'igiti agicanisha umuriro
Isaiah44:17 Igice gisigaye akibāzamo ishusho ikaba imana ye
Isaiah44:18 Bene abo bantu nta cyo bazi ntibanashishoza
Isaiah44:19 Nta n'umwe ushishoza ngo avuge ati: “Igice kimwe cy'igiti naragicanye
Isaiah44:20 Yishingikiriza ku bidafite umumaro
Isaiah44:21 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yemwe abakomoka kuri Yakobo
Isaiah44:22 Ubwigomeke bwanyu nabuhanaguye nk'uko igicu kiyoyoka
Isaiah44:23 Koko rero Uhoraho ni we wabikoze. Wa juru we
Isaiah44:24 Uhoraho umucunguzi wawe wakuremye kuva ukiri mu nda aravuga ati: “Ni jyewe Uhoraho waremye byose
Isaiah44:25 Mburizamo ibikorwa by'abahanurabinyoma
Isaiah44:26 Ijambo ry'umugaragu wanjye ndiha agaciro gakomeye
Isaiah44:27 Ntegeka inyanja nti: ‘Kama’
Isaiah44:28 Nabwiye Sirusi nti: ‘Uri umushumba unkorera.’ Azasohoza icyo nifuza cyose
Isaiah45:1 Uhoraho abwiye Sirusi uwo yitoranyirije ati: “Ndagushyigikiye kugira ngo utsinde amahanga agukikije
Isaiah45:2 Jyewe ubwanjye nzakugenda imbere
Isaiah45:3 Nzaguha ubukungu bwari buhishwe
Isaiah45:4 Naraguhamagaye nguha icyubahiro utari unzi
Isaiah45:5 Ni jye Uhoraho nta wundi ubaho
Isaiah45:6 Iburasirazuba n'iburengerazuba bazabimenya
Isaiah45:7 Ni jye wahanze urumuri ndema n'umwijima
Isaiah45:8 “Ibicu nibitonyange ibijojoba
Isaiah45:9 Azabona ishyano umuntu ugisha impaka Imana yamuremye
Isaiah45:10 Azabona ishyano umuntu utinyuka kubaza se ati: “Wambyariye iki?” Azabona ishyano ubaza nyina ati: “Wambyariye iki?”
Isaiah45:11 Uhoraho Umuremyi n'Umuziranenge wa Isiraheli arabaza ati: “Kuki mumbaza ibyerekeye abana banjye n'ibihe bizaza? Kuki muntegeka ibyo nzakora?
Isaiah45:12 Ni jye waremye isi ndema n'abayituye
Isaiah45:13 Ni jye ubwanjye wagize Sirusi intungane
Isaiah45:14 Uhoraho arabwira Abisiraheli ati: “Ubukire bwa Misiri n'ubucuruzi bwa Kushi bizaba ibyanyu
Isaiah45:15 Koko Imana y'Abisiraheli ikiza abantu bayo
Isaiah45:16 Abakora amashusho y'ibigirwamana bazakorwa n'isoni
Isaiah45:17 Nyamara Abisiraheli bazakizwa n'Uhoraho
Isaiah45:18 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ni jye Mana yaremye ijuru
Isaiah45:19 Sinavugiye mu bwihisho ahatagaragara
Isaiah45:20 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwebwe abacitse ku icumu bo mu mahanga nimuze
Isaiah45:21 Ngaho nimutangaze ibigiye kuba mubyerekane
Isaiah45:22 Yemwe bantu bari ku mpera z'isi
Isaiah45:23 Jyewe ubwanjye ndarahiye
Isaiah45:24 Bazamvugaho bati: ‘Uhoraho wenyine ni we uduha gukomera no kuba intungane.’ Abari barandakariye bose bazangarukira
Isaiah45:25 Nyamara urubyaro rwose rwa Isiraheli ruzaba intungane
Isaiah46:1 Ikigirwamana Beli gicitse intege
Isaiah46:2 Inyamaswa ngizo zirasukuma zigiye gutemba
Isaiah46:3 Nimunyumve rubyaro rwa Yakobo
Isaiah46:4 nzakomeza kubitaho kugeza mu busaza bwanyu
Isaiah46:5 None se mwangereranya na nde? Ni nde umeze nkanjye mwangereranya na we?
Isaiah46:6 Abantu bazana izahabu n'ifeza byabo
Isaiah46:7 Bagishyira ku ntugu bakagiheka
Isaiah46:8 Mwa bahemu mwe
Isaiah46:9 Nimwibuke ibyabaye kera
Isaiah46:10 Kuva mu ntangiriro navuze ibizaba
Isaiah46:11 Ndahamagaza igisiga kive iburasirazuba
Isaiah46:12 Nimunyumve bantu binangiye
Isaiah46:13 Dore ubutungane bwanjye ndabubegereje
Isaiah47:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwa baturage b'i Babiloni mwe
Isaiah47:2 Nimufate urusyo n'ingasire musye
Isaiah47:3 Abantu bazababona mwambaye ubusa
Isaiah47:4 Izina ry'Umucunguzi wacu ni Uhoraho Nyiringabo
Isaiah47:5 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwa baturage b'i Babiloni mwe
Isaiah47:6 Narakariye ubwoko bwanjye
Isaiah47:7 Waribwiye uti: ‘Nzahora ndi umwamikazi’
Isaiah47:8 Wa mukunzi w'iraha we
Isaiah47:9 Nyamara mu gihe gito ibi byombi bizakugwa gitumo
Isaiah47:10 “Wiringiye ubugome bwawe
Isaiah47:11 Nyamara ibyago utabasha kwikuramo bizakugeraho
Isaiah47:12 Ngaho komeza amarozi yawe
Isaiah47:13 Urirushya ugisha inama abapfumu
Isaiah47:14 Dore bameze nk'ibyatsi umuriro uzabakongora
Isaiah47:15 Uko ni ko abo wishingikirijeho bazakugenza
Isaiah48:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwa rubyaro rwa Yakobo mwe mwitirirwa izina rya Isiraheli
Isaiah48:2 Mwe mwiyita abo mu Murwa weguriwe Imana
Isaiah48:3 Ibyabaye nabitangaje kera
Isaiah48:4 Nari nzi ko mwinangiye
Isaiah48:5 Ibi nabibamenyesheje kuva kera
Isaiah48:6 Ibyo navuze mwarabyumvise ubu birasohojwe. None se mwe ntimushobora kubyemera? Guhera ubu ngiye kubabwira ibikorwa bishya
Isaiah48:7 Si ibya kera ni bwo bikiremwa
Isaiah48:8 Ntimwigeze mubyumva
Isaiah48:9 Nyamara kubera ko ndi Imana sinkirakara
Isaiah48:10 Dore nabagerageje nk'usuzuma ifeza
Isaiah48:11 Ibyo nabikoreye kwihesha icyubahiro
Isaiah48:12 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Mwa rubyaro rwa Yakobo mwe
Isaiah48:13 Ni jye wahanze isi
Isaiah48:14 Nimukoranire hamwe mwese muntege amatwi. Ni nde muri mwe wahishuye ibyo? Uwo natoranyije ni we uzasohoza umugambi wanjye
Isaiah48:15 Koko ni jye ubwanjye wabivuze
Isaiah48:16 Nimunyegere mwumve ibyo mbabwira
Isaiah48:17 Uhoraho Umuziranenge wa Isiraheli n'Umucunguzi wanyu aravuga ati: “Ni jye Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Isaiah48:18 Iyo mujya kwita ku mabwiriza yanjye mwari kugira amahoro
Isaiah48:19 Urubyaro rwanyu rwari kuba rwinshi nk'umusenyi
Isaiah48:20 Nimuve muri Babiloni muhunge Abanyababiloniya
Isaiah48:21 Yabayoboye mu butayu ntibicwa n'inyota
Isaiah48:22 nyamara abagome ntibateze kugira amahoro.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.
Isaiah49:1 Mwa batuye ibirwa nimunyumve
Isaiah49:2 Amagambo yanjye yayagize nk'inkota ityaye
Isaiah49:3 Yarambwiye ati: “Isiraheli
Isaiah49:4 Naho jyewe naribwiye nti: “Ndaruhira ubusa
Isaiah49:5 Nyamara Uhoraho yarantoranyije kugira ngo mubere umugaragu
Isaiah49:6 Uhoraho yarambwiye ati: “Ntibiguhagije kuzahūra urubyaro rwa Yakobo
Isaiah49:7 Uhoraho Umuziranenge wa Isiraheli n'Umucunguzi aravuga ati: “Warasuzugurwaga bikabije
Isaiah49:8 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mu gihe gikwiye nzagusubiza
Isaiah49:9 Nzagushyiraho ubwire abajyanywe ho iminyago ngo batahuke
Isaiah49:10 Ntibazongera kwicwa n'inzara n'inyota
Isaiah49:11 Imisozi yose nzayihangaho inzira
Isaiah49:12 Abantu banjye bazatahuka baturutse kure
Isaiah49:13 Wa juru we
Isaiah49:14 Icyakora Yeruzalemu iravuga iti: “Uhoraho yarandetse
Isaiah49:15 Uhoraho arasubiza ati: “Mbese umubyeyi yakwibagirwa umwana yonsa? Ese yareka gukunda umwana yabyaye? Nubwo we yamwibagirwa jye sinzakwibagirwa.
Isaiah49:16 Dore nanditse izina ryawe mu kiganza cyanjye
Isaiah49:17 Abana bawe nibatahuke vuba
Isaiah49:18 Ubura amaso urebe impande zose
Isaiah49:19 Koko wabaye amatongo n'umusaka
Isaiah49:20 Abana bakubyariwe bazavuga bati: ‘Aha hantu ni hato rwose
Isaiah49:21 Icyo gihe uzibaza uti: ‘Aba bana bose ni nde wabambyariye? Nabaye incike ntagishoboye kubyara
Isaiah49:22 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Ngiye guha amahanga ikimenyetso
Isaiah49:23 Abami bazakugenzereza nka so
Isaiah49:24 Mbese hari uwakwambura intwari ibyo yanyaze? Ese hari uwavana imbohe mu nzara z'uwayiboshye?”
Isaiah49:25 Nyamara Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Koko intwari igiye kwamburwa ibyo yanyaze
Isaiah49:26 Abagukandamiza nzabareka baryane
Isaiah50:1 Uhoraho arabwira Abisiraheli ati: “Urwandiko nanditse rwo gusenda nyoko ruri he? Mbese narabagurishije kubera ko narimo umwenda? Reka da! Mwaragurishijwe kubera ibyaha byanyu
Isaiah50:2 Kuki nta muntu wari uhari igihe nazaga? Kuki nta wanshubije igihe nahamagaraga? Mbese nananiwe kubacungura? Mbese simfite imbaraga zo kubarokora? Mbasha gutegeka inyanja igakama
Isaiah50:3 Ijuru ndyambika umwijima
Isaiah50:4 Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyigishije ibyo mvuga
Isaiah50:5 Nyagasani Uhoraho yanzibuye amatwi
Isaiah50:6 Umugongo wanjye nawutegeje abankubitaga
Isaiah50:7 Nyagasani Uhoraho aramfasha sinzakorwa n'isoni
Isaiah50:8 Umuvugizi wanjye ampora iruhande
Isaiah50:9 Koko Nyagasani Uhoraho ni we ungoboka
Isaiah50:10 Ni nde muri mwe wubaha Uhoraho? Ni nde wumvira ijambo ry'umugaragu we? Ni nde ugendera mu mwijima ntamurikirwe n'umucyo? Niyizere Imana ye yishingikirize ku Uhoraho.
Isaiah50:11 Nyamara mwe mucana umuriro mukimurikira
Isaiah51:1 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Nimunyumve mwe abaharanira ubutungane
Isaiah51:2 Nimwibuke sokuruza Aburahamu
Isaiah51:3 Koko Uhoraho azahumuriza Siyoni
Isaiah51:4 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Bantu banjye nimunyumve
Isaiah51:5 Dore ubutungane bwanjye buregereje
Isaiah51:6 Nimwubure amaso murebe ku ijuru
Isaiah51:7 “Nimunyumve mwe abazi ubutungane
Isaiah51:8 Koko rero umuswa uzabarya nk'umwambaro
Isaiah51:9 Uhoraho
Isaiah51:10 Ni wowe wakamije inyanja
Isaiah51:11 Abo wacunguye bazatahuka
Isaiah51:12 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Ni jye uguhumuriza. Ni kuki utinya umuntu buntu? Kuki utinya abantu bameze nk'icyatsi gusa?
Isaiah51:13 Mbese wibagiwe Uhoraho wakuremye? Ese wibagiwe uwahanitse ijuru agahanga n'isi? Kuki ukomeza guterwa ubwoba n'abagukandamiza? Kuki utinya abiteguye kukurimbura? Mbese uburakari bw'abagukandamiza buri he?
Isaiah51:14 Abafunzwe bagiye gufungurwa
Isaiah51:15 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yawe
Isaiah51:16 Nakubwiye ibyo uvuga
Isaiah51:17 Yeruzalemu we
Isaiah51:18 Mu bana bawe ntawe ubasha kuyobora
Isaiah51:19 Wibasiwe n'ibyago binyuranye
Isaiah51:20 Abana bawe barasambagurika
Isaiah51:21 Tega amatwi wa munyabyago we
Isaiah51:22 Nyagasani Uhoraho ukurengera aravuga ati: “Nakuyeho igikombe cy'uburakari cyagusindishaga
Isaiah51:23 Icyo gikombe nzakinywesha abagukandamizaga
Isaiah52:1 Siyoni we
Isaiah52:2 Yeruzalemu ihungure umukungugu
Isaiah52:3 Koko rero Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Mwagizwe inkoreragahato nta kiguzi
Isaiah52:4 Nyagasani Uhoraho yungamo ati: “Kera abantu banjye bagiye gutura mu Misiri
Isaiah52:5 None se ubu nungutse iki? Abantu banjye batwawe nta kiguzi bakandamizwa na ba shebuja
Isaiah52:6 Kubera ibyo abantu banjye bazamenya izina ryanjye
Isaiah52:7 Mbega ukuntu ari byiza kubona ku misozi uzanye inkuru nziza! Dore azanye inkuru nziza y'amahoro
Isaiah52:8 Umva amajwi y'abarinzi bawe
Isaiah52:9 Nimurangururire icyarimwe amajwi y'ibyishimo
Isaiah52:10 Uhoraho agaragarije amahanga yose ububasha bwe buzira inenge
Isaiah52:11 Nimuhunge
Isaiah52:12 Noneho ntimuzavayo hutihuti
Isaiah52:13 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Umugaragu wanjye azagira ishya n'ihirwe
Isaiah52:14 Abantu benshi baramubonye barakangarana
Isaiah52:15 Nyamara amahanga menshi azamutangarira
Isaiah53:1 Ni nde wemeye ibyo yatwumvanye? Ni nde wahishuriwe ububasha bw'Uhoraho?
Isaiah53:2 Uwo mugaragu yakuriye imbere y'Uhoraho nk'urugemwe
Isaiah53:3 Yarasuzugurwaga akangwa n'abantu
Isaiah53:4 Yarababajwe kubera ububi bwacu
Isaiah53:5 Yarakomerekejwe kubera ubwigomeke bwacu
Isaiah53:6 Twese twabuyeraga nk'intama zazimiye
Isaiah53:7 Yagiriwe nabi yicisha bugufi
Isaiah53:8 Yafashwe ku gahato acirwa urubanza. Ni nde uzamenyekanisha urubyaro rwe? Koko yakuwe ku isi
Isaiah53:9 Yashyinguwe hamwe n'abagizi ba nabi
Isaiah53:10 Uhoraho yemeye ko ashenjagurwa n'imibabaro
Isaiah53:11 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Umugaragu wanjye namara kubabazwa azanezerwa
Isaiah53:12 Nzamuha umwanya ukomeye mu banyacyubahiro
Isaiah54:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yeruzalemu we
Isaiah54:2 Ngaho agūra ihema utuyemo
Isaiah54:3 Dore ugiye kwagūka impande zose
Isaiah54:4 Humura ntuzongera gukorwa n'isoni
Isaiah54:5 Uwakuremye azaba nk'aho ari umugabo wawe
Isaiah54:6 Uhoraho azakugarura nk'umugore w'intabwa washavuye
Isaiah54:7 Nabaye nkuretse mu gihe gito
Isaiah54:8 Narakurakariye nkwima amaso igihe gito
Isaiah54:9 Nzabigenza nk'uko nakoze mu gihe cya Nowa
Isaiah54:10 Imisozi ishobora kuvaho
Isaiah54:11 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yeruzalemu we
Isaiah54:12 Hejuru y'inkuta zawe nzahataka amabuye arimbishijwe
Isaiah54:13 Abana bawe bose bazaba abigishwa b'Uhoraho
Isaiah54:14 Uzakomera ubikesha ubutungane
Isaiah54:15 Nihagira ugutera si jye bizaba biturutseho
Isaiah54:16 Dore ni jye waremye umucuzi
Isaiah54:17 Intwaro zose zakorewe kukurwanya nta cyo zizagutwara
Isaiah55:1 Abafite inyota mwese nimuze mbahe amazi
Isaiah55:2 Kuki mugura ibyokurya bidafite akamaro? Kuki mwiyuha akuya ku bitamara inzara? Nimunyumvira muzarya ibyokurya byiza
Isaiah55:3 Bantu banjye
Isaiah55:4 Dore namugize umuhamya wanjye mu mahanga
Isaiah55:5 Uzahamagara amahanga utazi
Isaiah55:6 Nimugarukire Uhoraho mu gihe akiboneka
Isaiah55:7 Umugome nareke imigenzereze y'ubugome
Isaiah55:8 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ibitekerezo byanjye si nk'ibyanyu
Isaiah55:9 Ijuru riri hejuru kure y'isi
Isaiah55:10 Imvura n'urubura biva ku ijuru
Isaiah55:11 Uko ni ko Ijambo ryanjye ritazagaruka ubusa
Isaiah55:12 Muzava i Babiloni munezerewe
Isaiah55:13 Ahari ibihuru by'amahwa hazamera amasipure
Isaiah56:1 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Nimuharanire ubutabera mukore ibitunganye
Isaiah56:2 Hahirwa ugenza atyo
Isaiah56:3 Umunyamahanga wisunze Uhoraho ntakavuge ati: “Uhoraho azanyirukana mu bantu be.” Inkone na yo ntikavuge iti: “Dore jye nsanzwe ndi nk'igiti cyumye.”
Isaiah56:4 Koko Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Inkone zubahiriza amasabato yanjye zigakora ibinshimisha
Isaiah56:5 nzashyira urwibutso rw'amazina yazo ku nkuta zo mu Ngoro yanjye. Ibyo bizabarutira kugira abahungu n'abakobwa
Isaiah56:6 Abanyamahanga bazisunga Uhoraho bakamukorera
Isaiah56:7 nzabazana ku musozi nitoranyirije
Isaiah56:8 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Natarurukanyije Abisiraheli bajyanywe ho iminyago
Isaiah56:9 Mwa nyamaswa zose zo mu gasozi mwe
Isaiah56:10 Abo bayobozi babo ni impumyi
Isaiah56:11 Bameze nk'imbwa z'ibisambo
Isaiah56:12 Barabwirana bati: “Nimuze tujye gushaka divayi
Isaiah57:1 Nyamara intungane zirapfa ntihagire ubyitaho
Isaiah57:2 Iyo bapfuye baba mu ituze
Isaiah57:3 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimuze hano mwa rubyaro rw'abapfumu mwe
Isaiah57:4 Mbese ni nde mwihaye gukōba? Ese ni nde muha urw'amenyo? Muri urubyaro rw'abagome n'ababeshyi.
Isaiah57:5 Mutwarwa n'irari ry'ubusambanyi munsi y'ibiti binini
Isaiah57:6 Mutoranya amabuye aconzwe yo mu mikokwe
Isaiah57:7 Musasa amariri y'ubusambanyi mu mpinga z'imisozi miremire
Isaiah57:8 Mwashyize ibishushanyo bisengwa inyuma y'inzugi zanyu
Isaiah57:9 “Mwisīga amarashi n'amavuta menshi
Isaiah57:10 Mwinaniza mushakashaka izindi mana
Isaiah57:11 “Mutinya nde bituma muntererana? Mutinya nde kugeza ubwo munyimūra? Maze igihe kirekire nicecekeye
Isaiah57:12 Nyamara nzashyira imyifatire yanyu ku mugaragaro
Isaiah57:13 Mutakambira ibigirwamana byanyu mubisaba kubafasha
Isaiah57:14 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimutunganye inzira
Isaiah57:15 Uhoraho uri hejuru mu ijuru
Isaiah57:16 Sinzahora mbashinja
Isaiah57:17 Narabarakariye kubera ibicumuro n'irari ryabo
Isaiah57:18 Nabonye imigenzereze yabo
Isaiah57:19 Nzabahumuriza rwose
Isaiah57:20 Nyamara abagome ni nk'inyanja yarubiye
Isaiah57:21 Abagome ntibateze kugira amahoro! Uko ni ko Imana yanjye ivuze.
Isaiah58:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Rangurura
Isaiah58:2 Baza kunsenga buri munsi
Isaiah58:3 Murambaza muti: ‘Kuki twigomwa kurya ntubibone? Kuki twicisha bugufi ntubyiteho?’ ” Uhoraho arabasubiza ati: “Iyo mwigomwe kurya mwifata uko mushaka
Isaiah58:4 Iyo mwigomwe kurya murarwana mugakubitana amakofi
Isaiah58:5 Iyo mwigomwe kurya muba mwirushya
Isaiah58:6 Ukwigomwa kurya nshaka ni uku: kurenganura abakandamizwa
Isaiah58:7 Ukwigomwa kurya gukwiye ni ukugaburira abashonji
Isaiah58:8 Nimugenza mutyo umucyo wanyu uzaba nk'umuseke utambitse
Isaiah58:9 Nimusenga Uhoraho azabasubiza
Isaiah58:10 nimugaburira abashonji mukita ku bakandamizwa
Isaiah58:11 Uhoraho azahora abayobora
Isaiah58:12 Amatongo yanyu azongera yubakwe

Isaiah58:14 muzishima mubikesha Uhoraho. Nzabatambagiza mu mpinga z'imisozi
Isaiah59:1 Ntimwibwire ko Uhoraho ari umunyantegenke
Isaiah59:2 Ahubwo ni ibicumuro byanyu byabatandukanyije n'Imana yanyu
Isaiah59:3 Ibiganza byanyu byuzuye amaraso
Isaiah59:4 Nta n'umwe ushaka ubutabera
Isaiah59:5 Imigambi yabo imeze nk'amagi y'inzoka
Isaiah59:6 ntizibasha kuvamo imyenda
Isaiah59:7 Bagambirira gukora ibibi
Isaiah59:8 Ntibamenya imigenzereze y'amahoro
Isaiah59:9 Abantu baravuga bati: “Koko ubutabera buri kure yacu
Isaiah59:10 Tumeze nk'impumyi zikabakaba ku rukuta
Isaiah59:11 Turahūma nk'impyisi
Isaiah59:12 Koko ubwigomeke bwacu buragwiriye imbere y'Uhoraho
Isaiah59:13 Twarigometse turyarya Uhoraho
Isaiah59:14 Bityo rero ubutabera bwararetswe
Isaiah59:15 Koko ukuri kwarabuze
Isaiah59:16 Yabonye nta muntu n'umwe uhari
Isaiah59:17 Yambaye ubutungane nk'ikoti ry'icyuma rikingira igituza
Isaiah59:18 Azahana abanzi akurikije ibikorwa byabo
Isaiah59:19 Kuva iburengerazuba abantu bazubaha Uhoraho
Isaiah59:20 Azazanwa no gucungura Siyoni
Isaiah59:21 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzagirana Isezerano namwe: Mwuka wanjye azabazaho
Isaiah60:1 Yeruzalemu
Isaiah60:2 Dore umwijima utwikiriye isi
Isaiah60:3 Amahanga azakugana uyamurikire
Isaiah60:4 Ubura amaso witegereze impande zose
Isaiah60:5 Uzabireba maze unezerwe
Isaiah60:6 Amashyo y'ingamiya azakwira mu gihugu cyawe
Isaiah60:7 Imikumbi yose y'i Kedari izakoranyirizwa iwawe
Isaiah60:8 Abo ni ba nde baguruka nk'igicu? Bameze nk'inuma zisubira mu byari byazo.
Isaiah60:9 Amato aturutse mu birwa bya kure azakoranywa
Isaiah60:10 Uhoraho arabwira Yeruzalemu ati: “Abanyamahanga bazubaka bundi bushya inkuta zawe
Isaiah60:11 Amarembo yawe azahora yuguruye
Isaiah60:12 Nyamara amahanga atazakuyoboka azarimbuka
Isaiah60:13 Ibiti byiza byaheshaga Libani agaciro bizazanwa iwawe
Isaiah60:14 Abana b'abagukandamizaga bazakubaha
Isaiah60:15 Nyamara wari waratereranywe nta wukikugenderera
Isaiah60:16 Abanyamahanga bazakuzanira ibyokurya
Isaiah60:17 Mu cyimbo cy'umuringa nzakuzanira izahabu
Isaiah60:18 Urugomo ntiruzongera kubaho mu gihugu cyawe

Isaiah60:21 Abantu bawe bose bazaba intungane
Isaiah60:22 Umuto muri mwe azakomokwaho n'abantu igihumbi

Isaiah61:4 Bazubaka bundi bushya mu matongo ya kera
Isaiah61:5 Abanyamahanga bazabaragirira amatungo
Isaiah61:6 Muzitwa abatambyi b'Uhoraho

Isaiah61:10 Ndanezerewe cyane ku bw'Uhoraho
Isaiah61:11 Uko ubutaka bumeza ingemwe n'uko imbuto zo mu murima zikura

Isaiah63:1 Uyu ni nde uturutse muri Edomu
Isaiah63:2 Ni kuki imyambaro yawe itukura

Isaiah63:5 Nararanganyije amaso hirya no hino sinabona untabara
Isaiah63:6 Nararakaye ndibata abatuye amahanga
Isaiah63:7 Nzajya ndata ineza y'Uhoraho

Isaiah64:1 Waba nk'umuriro utwika ibyatsi
Isaiah64:2 Koko umanutse ugakora ibikorwa tutari twiteze
Isaiah64:3 Guhera kera kose nta wigeze abyumva
Isaiah64:4 Ushyigikira abanezezwa no gukurikiza ubutungane
Isaiah64:5 Twese twabaye nk'abandavuye
Isaiah64:6 Nta n'umwe ukwiyambaza
Isaiah64:7 Nyamara Uhoraho
