Isaiah64:11 Uhoraho
Isaiah65:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Niyeretse abatambaririje
Isaiah65:2 Nirizaga umunsi nteze amaboko ngo nakire abantu b'ibyigomeke
Isaiah65:3 Ni abantu bahora bandakaza ku mugaragaro
Isaiah65:4 Baba mu marimbi bakarara mu buvumo
Isaiah65:5 Babwira abo bahuye na bo bati: ‘Mwitwegera turi abaziranenge.’ Abo bantu barandakaza cyane
Isaiah65:6 Nimumenye ko ibyo byose mbizirikana ndetse narabyanditse
Isaiah65:7 Nzabahanira ibicumuro byanyu n'ibya ba sokuruza
Isaiah65:8 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Iyo babonye iseri ry'imizabibu rihishije baravuga bati: ‘Ntimuryangize rizavamo umutobe mwiza’
Isaiah65:9 Abisiraheli nzabaha urubyaro
Isaiah65:10 I Sharoni hazaba urwuri rw'imikumbi
Isaiah65:11 Nyamara mwebwe mwarandetse
Isaiah65:12 Nzabatsembesha inkota
Isaiah65:13 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati: “Abagaragu banjye bazarya
Isaiah65:14 Abagaragu banjye bazaririmbana umunezero
Isaiah65:15 Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho nzabica
Isaiah65:16 Bityo abasabira abandi umugisha mu gihugu
Isaiah65:17 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Dore ngiye kurema ijuru rishya n'isi nshya
Isaiah65:18 Nyamara munezerwe mwishime iteka ryose
Isaiah65:19 Koko nzanezerwa kubera Yeruzalemu
Isaiah65:20 Abana ntibazongera gupfa bakiri bato
Isaiah65:21 Bazubaka amazu bayabemo
Isaiah65:22 Ntibazubaka amazu ngo aturwemo n'abandi
Isaiah65:23 Ibikorwa byabo ntibizaba impfabusa
Isaiah65:24 Nzabagoboka mbere y'uko banyiyambaza
Isaiah65:25 Isega n'umwana w'intama bizarisha hamwe
Isaiah66:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ijuru ni intebe yanjye
Isaiah66:2 Ibiriho byose ni jye wabiremye
Isaiah66:3 Hari abatamba ikimasa ariko bakica n'abantu
Isaiah66:4 Ni yo mpamvu nzabateza ibyago
Isaiah66:5 Nimwumve Ijambo ry'Uhoraho mwebwe mwese abamwumvira bakamwubaha. Bene wanyu barabanga bakabirukana babampōra
Isaiah66:6 Nimwumve urusaku rwumvikanira mu mujyi
Isaiah66:7 Yeruzalemu yabyaye mbere yuko iramukwa
Isaiah66:8 Ni nde wigeze kumva ibintu nk'ibyo? Ni nde wigeze kubona ibintu nk'ibyo? Mbese igihugu kibasha kuvuka mu munsi umwe? Mbese ubwoko bwavuka mu mwanya muto? Nyamara Siyoni yabaye ikiramukwa ibyara abana.
Isaiah66:9 Mbese ndetse umubyeyi akagera igihe inda ivuka namubuza kubyara? Uko ni ko Imana yanyu ibaza. Mbese niba ari jye utuma abana bavuka naziba inda ibyara?
Isaiah66:10 Mwe abakunda Yeruzalemu
Isaiah66:11 Muzonka munezezwe n'amabere ahumuriza
Isaiah66:12 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ngiye kubazanira amahoro atemba nk'uruzi
Isaiah66:13 Nk'uko umwana ahumurizwa na nyina
Isaiah66:14 Muzabibona munezerwe
Isaiah66:15 Dore Uhoraho agendera mu muriro
Isaiah66:16 Uhoraho azacira imanza abantu bose
Isaiah66:17 Hariho abiyegurira ibizira n'abihumanura ubwabo
Isaiah66:18 Azi ibikorwa byabo
Isaiah66:19 Nzashyira ikimenyetso hagati yabo
Isaiah66:20 Bazazana abavandimwe banyu bose babakuye mu mahanga yose babature Uhoraho. Bazabazana babahetse ku mafarasi no ku nyumbu no ku ngamiya no mu magare
Isaiah66:21 Nzatoranya bamwe muri bo mbagire abatambyi n'Abalevi.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.
Isaiah66:22 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nk'uko ijuru rishya n'isi nshya nzarema bizahoraho
Isaiah66:23 Kuva mu mboneko y'ukwezi kugeza mu mboneko y'ukundi
Isaiah66:24 Abantu bazasohoka babone imirambo y'abangomeye. Inyo zizabarya iteka ryose
Jeremiah1:1 Iki gitabo gikubiyemo ibyavuzwe n'ibyakozwe na Yeremiya mwene Hilikiya
Jeremiah1:2 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'itatu Umwami Yosiya mwene Amoni ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
Jeremiah1:3 Yakomeje kumuha ubutumwa igihe Yoyakimu mwene Yosiya yari ku ngoma
Jeremiah1:4 Jyewe Yeremiya
Jeremiah1:5 “Nakumenye ntarakurema mu nda ya nyoko
Jeremiah1:6 Ndamusubiza nti: “Nyagasani Uhoraho
Jeremiah1:7 Nyamara Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Wivuga ko ukiri muto. Abo nzagutumaho uzabasanga
Jeremiah1:8 Ntuzagire uwo utinya
Jeremiah1:9 Nuko Uhoraho ankoza ikiganza ku munwa arambwira ati: “Dore nshyize amagambo yanjye mu kanwa kawe.
Jeremiah1:10 Uhereye ubu ngushinze kuvugira amahanga yose n'ibihugu byose kugira ngo urandure
Jeremiah1:11 Uhoraho arambaza ati: “Yeremiya we
Jeremiah1:12 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Warebye neza. Koko rero nanjye ngiye gushishikarira gusohoza ibyo navuze.”
Jeremiah1:13 Uhoraho yongera kumbaza ati: “Urareba iki?” Ndamusubiza nti: “Ndareba mu majyaruguru inkono ibira
Jeremiah1:14 Arakomeza arambwira ati: “Mu majyaruguru ni ho hazaturuka ibyago bizasukwa ku batuye iki gihugu bose.
Jeremiah1:15 Koko rero ngiye guhamagara amahanga yose yo mu majyaruguru. Abami babo bazaza bashinge intebe zabo za cyami ku marembo ya Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah1:16 Nanjye nzacira imanza abantu banjye kubera ubugome bwabo. Baranyimūye bosereza imibavu izindi mana
Jeremiah1:17 None rero komera
Jeremiah1:18 Kuva ubu ngushyize mu gihugu cy'u Buyuda nk'umujyi ntamenwa
Jeremiah1:19 Bazakurwanya ariko ntibazagutsinda kuko nzaba ndi kumwe nawe ngutabare.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.
Jeremiah2:1 Uhoraho yarambwiye ati:
Jeremiah2:2 “Genda ubwire Yeruzalemu uti: ‘Ndibuka uko wankundaga ukiri muto
Jeremiah2:3 Isiraheli yari yareguriwe Uhoraho
Jeremiah2:4 Mwa rubyaro rwa Yakobo mwe
Jeremiah2:5 Uhoraho arababaza ati: “Ba sokuruza banshinja iki
Jeremiah2:6 Ntibigeze bibaza bati: ‘Uhoraho wadukuye mu Misiri ari he? Ari he uwatuyoboye mu butayu
Jeremiah2:7 Nabazanye mu gihugu kirumbuka
Jeremiah2:8 Abatambyi ntibigeze bibaza bati: ‘Uhoraho ari he?’ Abahanga mu by'Amategeko ntibakīmenya. Abayobozi banyigometseho
Jeremiah2:9 Ni yo mpamvu nongeye kubashinja
Jeremiah2:10 “Nimujye mu kirwa cya Shipure murebe
Jeremiah2:11 Mbese hari igihugu kigeze gihindura imana zacyo? Hari icyazihinduye nubwo na zo atari imana? Nyamara abantu banjye barandetse nubwo ndi ishema ryabo
Jeremiah2:12 Wa juru we
Jeremiah2:13 “Koko rero ubwoko bwanjye bwakoze amakosa abiri: baranyimūye nubwo ndi isōko y'amazi y'ubugingo
Jeremiah2:14 Mbese Abisiraheli ni inkoreragahato? Ese baba baravukiye mu buja? Mbese ni kuki babaye iminyago y'amahanga?
Jeremiah2:15 Intare zirabatontomera n'urusaku rukaze
Jeremiah2:16 Abaturage b'i Memfisi n'ab'i Tafune bazaguharangura umutwe.
Jeremiah2:17 Ibyo ni mwe mwabyikururiye
Jeremiah2:18 Mbese kuki mujya mu Misiri kunywa amazi ya Nili? Ni kuki mujya muri Ashūru kunywa amazi ya Efurati?
Jeremiah2:19 Ububi bwanyu nibubahane
Jeremiah2:20 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Jeremiah2:21 Nabateye mumeze nk'imizabibu y'indobanure
Jeremiah2:22 Nubwo mwakwiyuhagira mute
Jeremiah2:23 Bishoboka bite ko mwavuga muti: ‘Ntitwahumanye cyangwa ngo tuyoboke za Bāli?’ Nimwibuke uko mwitwaye mu kabande n'ibyo mwahakoreye
Jeremiah2:24 Mumeze nk'indogobe y'ingore imenyereye ubutayu
Jeremiah2:25 Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Jeremiah2:26 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nk'uko umujura ufatiwe mu cyuho akorwa n'isoni
Jeremiah2:27 Babwira igiti bati: ‘Uri data!’ Babwira n'ibuye bati: ‘Ni wowe watubyaye!’ Koko rero banteye umugongo ntibakinyitaho
Jeremiah2:28 None se imana mwiremeye ziri he? Ngaho nizize zibakize akaga murimo. Mwa Bayuda mwe
Jeremiah2:29 Ni kuki munshinja? Mwese uko mungana mwarangomeye.
Jeremiah2:30 Narabahannye ariko biba iby'ubusa
Jeremiah2:31 None rero nimuzirikane Ijambo ry'Uhoraho ubabwira ati: “Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Jeremiah2:32 Mbese umukobwa w'inkumi yakwibagirwa imirimbo ye? Mbese umugeni yakwibagirwa imitamirizo ye? Nyamara abantu banjye banyibagiwe kenshi.
Jeremiah2:33 “Icyo mushoboye ni ukwiruka inyuma y'abakunzi banyu
Jeremiah2:34 Imyambaro yanyu yuzuyeho amaraso y'abakene b'inzirakarengane
Jeremiah2:35 ‘Turi intungane
Jeremiah2:36 Kuki muhindagurika mu mibanire yanyu n'amahanga? Misiri izabakoza isoni nk'uko Ashūru yabagenjeje.
Jeremiah2:37 Aho na ho muzavanayo ikimwaro mukozwe n'isoni
Jeremiah3:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mbese umugabo yirukanye umugore we akishakira undi mugabo
Jeremiah3:2 Nimwubure amaso murebe mu mpinga z'imisozi
Jeremiah3:3 Kubera ibyo nabujije imvura kugwa
Jeremiah3:4 Na n'ubu muracyantakira muvuga muti: ‘Uri Data! Wadukunze kuva tukiri bato.
Jeremiah3:5 Mbese uzakomeza kuturakarira? Mbese uburakari bwawe buzahoraho?’ Uko ni ko muhora muvuga
Jeremiah3:6 Ku ngoma ya Yosiya
Jeremiah3:7 Naribwiraga nti: ‘Nibamara gukora biriya byose bazangarukira’
Jeremiah3:8 Nirukanye Abisiraheli b'abahakanyi ntandukana na bo
Jeremiah3:9 Abisiraheli babonye ko kwitwara nk'indaya nta cyo bibatwaye
Jeremiah3:10 Nubwo bimeze bityo abavandimwe babo b'Abayuda b'abahemu ntibihannye babikuye ku mutima
Jeremiah3:11 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati: “Icyakora nubwo Abisiraheli ari abahakanyi
Jeremiah3:12 None genda ujye mu majyaruguru ubabwire uti: ‘Mwa Bisiraheli b'abahakanyi mwe nimungarukire
Jeremiah3:13 Nimwemere gusa ibicumuro byanyu
Jeremiah3:14 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwa Bisiraheli b'ibirara mwe
Jeremiah3:15 Nzabaha abayobozi nzihitiramo kandi bazabayoborana ubwenge n'ubushishozi.”
Jeremiah3:16 Uhoraho yungamo ati: “Icyo gihe muzororoka mugwire mu gihugu. Abantu ntibazaba bakivuga ibyerekeye Isanduku y'Isezerano
Jeremiah3:17 Icyo gihe Yeruzalemu izitwa intebe y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah3:18 Icyo gihe Abayuda n'Abisiraheli bazafatanya
Jeremiah3:19 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nibwiraga ko nzabafata nk'abana banjye
Jeremiah3:20 Nyamara mwabaye nk'umugore uhemukira umugabo we
Jeremiah3:21 Urusaku rw'Abisiraheli rwumvikaniye mu mpinga z'imisozi
Jeremiah3:22 Mwa birara mwe
Jeremiah3:23 Koko twarararutse
Jeremiah3:24 Iki gikorwa giteye isoni
Jeremiah3:25 Nimureke dukorwe n'ikimwaro
Jeremiah4:1 Uhoraho abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Jeremiah4:2 nimurahira Uhoraho mu kuri
Jeremiah4:3 Uhoraho arabwira abantu b'u Buyuda n'ab'i Yeruzalemu ati: “Nimuhinge ahatigeze hahingwa
Jeremiah4:4 Yemwe bantu b'u Buyuda n'ab'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah4:5 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimutangaze ibi mu Buyuda
Jeremiah4:6 Nimwerekeze ibendera ryanyu i Siyoni
Jeremiah4:7 Intare ivumbutse aho yari yihishe
Jeremiah4:8 Nimwambare imyambaro igaragaza akababaro
Jeremiah4:9 Icyo gihe umwami n'abatware bazakuka umutima
Jeremiah4:10 Nuko ndavuga nti: “Nyagasani Uhoraho
Jeremiah4:11 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azabwira abantu b'i Yeruzalemu ati: “Umuyaga utwika uzaturuka mu misozi yo mu butayu
Jeremiah4:12 izaba ari inkubi y'umuyaga inturutseho. Ni jye Uhoraho ugiye kubacira urubanza.”
Jeremiah4:13 Dore umwanzi aje nk'igicu
Jeremiah4:14 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yeruzalemu we
Jeremiah4:15 Ijwi riranguruye riturutse i Dani
Jeremiah4:16 “Tangaza ibi mu mahanga
Jeremiah4:17 kigose Yeruzalemu nk'uko abarinzi bakikiza umurima’
Jeremiah4:18 Ibyo bitewe n'imyifatire yawe n'ibikorwa byawe bibi
Jeremiah4:19 Yeremiya atera hejuru ati: “Ndababara ndashengurwa n'agahinda
Jeremiah4:20 Ibyago birakurikirana
Jeremiah4:21 Nzahereza he kureba ibendera ry'intambara? Nzahereza he kumva urusaku rw'impanda?”
Jeremiah4:22 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abantu banjye ni abapfapfa
Jeremiah4:23 Nitegereje isi mbona itagira ishusho nta n'ikiyiriho
Jeremiah4:24 Nitegereje imisozi mbona itingita
Jeremiah4:25 Nitegereje mbona nta muntu ugituye ku isi
Jeremiah4:26 Nitegereje mbona igihugu cyarumbukaga cyahindutse ubutayu
Jeremiah4:27 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihugu cyose kizasenyuka
Jeremiah4:28 Ni yo mpamvu isi izajya mu cyunamo
Jeremiah4:29 Nimwumve urusaku rw'abarwanira ku mafarasi
Jeremiah4:30 Yewe Yeruzalemu wahindutse amatongo
Jeremiah4:31 Ndumva urusaku nk'urw'umugore uribwa n'ibise
Jeremiah5:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimujye mu mayira y'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah5:2 Nubwo barahira mu izina ryanjye
Jeremiah5:3 None se Uhoraho
Jeremiah5:4 Naribwiye nti: “Aba ni rubanda nta cyo bazi
Jeremiah5:5 Nzasanga abayobozi babo mvugane na bo
Jeremiah5:6 Ni yo mpamvu bazaribwa n'intare zo mu ishyamba
Jeremiah5:7 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nabababarira nte? Abana banyu baranyimūye bayoboka ibigirwamana
Jeremiah5:8 Bameze nk'amafarasi y'imishishe
Jeremiah5:9 Nzabahanira ibyo bikorwa byabo
Jeremiah5:10 “Nimujye mu mizabibu yabo muyonone
Jeremiah5:11 ni koko Abisiraheli n'Abayuda barangomeye bikabije.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.
Jeremiah5:12 Bihakanye Uhoraho bavuga bati: “Uhoraho nta cyo azadutwara
Jeremiah5:13 Abahanuzi nta cyo bamaze
Jeremiah5:14 None rero Uhoraho Imana Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Kubera ko mwavuze mutyo
Jeremiah5:15 Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Jeremiah5:16 Imyambi yabo irica
Jeremiah5:17 Zizatsembaho ibintu byanyu byose
Jeremiah5:18 Nyamara icyo gihe sinzabatsembaho.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.
Jeremiah5:19 Abantu bazabaza bati: “Kuki Uhoraho Imana yacu iduteza ibi byago byose?” Uzabasubize uti: “Ni uko mwimūye Uhoraho
Jeremiah5:20 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Menyesha Abisiraheli ibi
Jeremiah5:21 Nimwumve mwa bapfapfa mwe mutagira ubwenge
Jeremiah5:22 Kuki mutanyubaha? Kuki mudahinda umushyitsi imbere yanjye? Ni jye washyizeho umusenyi ngo ube urubibi rw'inyanja
Jeremiah5:23 Nyamara aba bantu binangiye umutima barararuka
Jeremiah5:24 Ntibajya bibwira bati: ‘Reka twubahe Uhoraho Imana yacu
Jeremiah5:25 Ibicumuro byanyu ni byo byahinduye ibyo byose
Jeremiah5:26 Ni koko mu bwoko bwanjye harimo abagome
Jeremiah5:27 Uko inyoni bazuzuza mu rutete
Jeremiah5:28 barabyibushye
Jeremiah5:29 Nzabahanira ibyo bikorwa byabo
Jeremiah5:30 Amahano ateye ubwoba yabaye muri iki gihugu.
Jeremiah5:31 Abahanuzi bahanura ibinyoma
Jeremiah6:1 Yewe muryango wa Benyamini
Jeremiah6:2 Siyoni umurwa mwiza kandi w'igikundiro nzawurimbura
Jeremiah6:3 Abantu bazakugariza bameze nk'abashumba n'amatungo yabo
Jeremiah6:4 Bazavugana bati: “Nimwitegure dutere Siyoni
Jeremiah6:5 Nimuhaguruke tuyitere mu gicuku
Jeremiah6:6 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Nimuteme ibiti murunde ibirundo
Jeremiah6:7 Uko isōko yo mu iriba ivubura amazi
Jeremiah6:8 Yewe Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah6:9 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Nimukoranye itsinda ry'Abisiraheli basigaye
Jeremiah6:10 Ni nde nzavugana na we? Ni nde nzaburira kugira ngo babyumve? Amatwi yabo ntiyumva
Jeremiah6:11 Dore nuzuye uburakari bw'Uhoraho
Jeremiah6:12 Amazu yabo azahabwa abandi
Jeremiah6:13 Kuva ku muto kugeza ku mukuru bose bararikira inyungu mbi
Jeremiah6:14 Ibikomere by'abantu banjye babibona nk'ibyoroheje
Jeremiah6:15 Mbese batewe isoni n'ibikorwa byabo bibi? Reka da
Jeremiah6:16 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimuhagarare mu mayira murebe
Jeremiah6:17 Nabashyiriyeho abarinzi kugira ngo mujye mwumva ijwi ry'ihembe
Jeremiah6:18 None mwa mahanga mwe
Jeremiah6:19 Mwa batuye isi yose mwe
Jeremiah6:20 Singikeneye imibavu iturutse i Sheba
Jeremiah6:21 Nzashyira inzitizi imbere y'aba bantu
Jeremiah6:22 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Dore ingabo ziturutse mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru
Jeremiah6:23 Bitwaje imiheto n'amacumu
Jeremiah6:24 Abisiraheli baravuga bati: “Twumvise amakuru yabo
Jeremiah6:25 Ntimujye mu murima cyangwa mu mayira
Jeremiah6:26 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Bantu banjye
Jeremiah6:27 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yeremiya we
Jeremiah6:28 Yeremiya arasubiza ati: “Bose ni ibyigomeke bikabije
Jeremiah6:29 Umuvuba urahuhera cyane
Jeremiah6:30 Aba bantu bazaba nk'umuringa udafite agaciro
Jeremiah7:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa Uhoraho yahaye Yeremiya.
Jeremiah7:2 Hagarara ku irembo ry'Ingoro
Jeremiah7:3 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: “Nimutunganye imigenzereze n'imikorere yanyu
Jeremiah7:4 Ntimukiringire ibinyoma ngo muvuge muti: ‘Iyi ni Ingoro y'Uhoraho! Ingoro y'Uhoraho! Ingoro y'Uhoraho!’
Jeremiah7:5 Nyamara nimuhindure imigenzereze n'imikorere yanyu mugire ubutabera.
Jeremiah7:6 Nimureke gukandamiza abasuhuke n'impfubyi n'abapfakazi
Jeremiah7:7 Nimugenza mutyo nzabareka muture aha hantu
Jeremiah7:8 “Nyamara mwizera ibinyoma bidafite umumaro.
Jeremiah7:9 Dore muriba
Jeremiah7:10 Muza imbere yanjye muri iyi Ngoro yanyeguriwe muvuga muti: ‘Turi amahoro’
Jeremiah7:11 Mbese mutekereza ko iyi Ngoro yanyeguriwe ari indiri y'abajura? Nyamara jye nabonye ari uko bimeze.
Jeremiah7:12 “Ngaho nimujye i Shilo aho natoranyije ngo habe Inzu yanjye
Jeremiah7:13 Mwakoze ibi bibi byose nubwo ntahwemye kuvugana namwe
Jeremiah7:14 Ni yo mpamvu uko nagenjeje Shilo
Jeremiah7:15 Nzabirukana mujye kure yanjye nk'uko nagenje abavandimwe banyu b'Abisiraheli.”
Jeremiah7:16 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati: “Ntugire icyo usabira aba bantu kandi ntuntakambire ku bwabo
Jeremiah7:17 Mbese ntureba ibyo bakorera mu mijyi y'u Buyuda no mu mayira y'i Yeruzalemu?
Jeremiah7:18 Abana baratashya inkwi
Jeremiah7:19 Ubwo se ni jyewe bababaza
Jeremiah7:20 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati: “Uburakari bwanjye n'umujinya wanjye nzabisuka aha hantu
Jeremiah7:21 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: “Nimwongēre ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Jeremiah7:22 Koko rero ubwo nakuraga ba sokuruza mu Misiri
Jeremiah7:23 Nyamara narababwiye nti: ‘Nimunyumve bityo nzaba Imana yanyu namwe mube ubwoko bwanjye. Nimukurikize amategeko mbahaye kugira ngo mumererwe neza.’
Jeremiah7:24 Nyamara ntibanyumviye kandi ntibanyitayeho
Jeremiah7:25 Kuva igihe ba sokuruza baviriye mu Misiri kugeza ubu
Jeremiah7:26 Nyamara ntibanyumviye kandi ntibanyitayeho
Jeremiah7:27 “None rero uzababwira aya magambo yose
Jeremiah7:28 Icyakora uzababwire uti: ‘Muri ubwoko butumvira Uhoraho Imana yabwo
Jeremiah7:29 Mwa baturage b'i Yeruzalemu mwe
Jeremiah7:30 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abayuda bakoreye ibibi imbere yanjye
Jeremiah7:31 Bubatse ahasengerwa ibigirwamana i Tofeti mu kabande ka Hinomu
Jeremiah7:32 Igihe kizagera he kongera kwitwa Tofeti cyangwa akabande ka Hinomu
Jeremiah7:33 Imirambo y'abo bantu izaba ibyokurya by'ibisiga n'inyamaswa zo mu gasozi
Jeremiah7:34 Igihugu kizahinduka amatongo. Nzacecekesha amajwi y'ibyishimo mu mijyi y'u Buyuda no mu mayira y'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah8:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Icyo gihe amagufwa y'abami b'u Buyuda n'abatware baho
Jeremiah8:2 Ayo magufwa azajugunywa ku gasozi yaname ku zuba n'ukwezi n'inyenyeri bakundaga
Jeremiah8:3 Abarokotse muri ubwo bwoko bubi
Jeremiah8:4 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Ubaze abantu banjye uti: ‘Mbese iyo umuntu aguye ntabyuka? Mbese iyo umuntu ayobye ntagaruka?
Jeremiah8:5 Kuki aba bantu bayobye bakanga kungarukira? Batsimbaraye ku kinyoma banga kungarukira.’
Jeremiah8:6 “Naritonze ntega amatwi
Jeremiah8:7 “Ikiyongoyongo kimenya igihe kigomba kwimuka
Jeremiah8:8 Mushobora mute kuvuga muti: ‘Turi abanyabwenge dufite Amategeko y'Uhoraho?’
Jeremiah8:9 Abanyabwenge banyu bazakorwa n'isoni
Jeremiah8:10 “Abagore babo n'amasambu yabo nzabyegurira abandi
Jeremiah8:11 Ibikomere by'abantu banjye babibona nk'aho byoroheje
Jeremiah8:12 Mbese batewe isoni n'ibikorwa byabo bibi? Reka da! Nta soni bibatera
Jeremiah8:13 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nashatse gukoranya abantu banjye nk'urundarunda umusaruro
Jeremiah8:14 Abantu baravuga bati: “Kuki twicaye nta cyo dukora? Reka dukoranire hamwe
Jeremiah8:15 Twari twizeye kuzagira amahoro
Jeremiah8:16 Urusaku rw'amafarasi y'abanzi rurumvikanira i Dani
Jeremiah8:17 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzabateza inzoka z'impiri
Jeremiah8:18 Agahinda mfite ntigashobora gushira
Jeremiah8:19 Umva umuborogo w'ubwoko bwanjye
Jeremiah8:20 Yeremiya aravuga ati: “Isarura rirarangiye n'impeshyi irashize
Jeremiah8:21 Nashengutse kubera ibikomere by'ubwoko bwanjye
Jeremiah8:22 Mbese nta muti uboneka i Gileyadi? Mbese nta muganga ukiharagwa? Ni kuki ibikomere by'ubwoko bwanjye bidashira?
Jeremiah8:23 Iyaba umutwe wanjye wari iriba ry'amazi
Jeremiah9:1 “Iyaba nari mfite icumbi mu butayu
Jeremiah9:2 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Bahora biteguye kubeshya
Jeremiah9:3 Nimwirinde incuti zanyu
Jeremiah9:4 Buri wese aryarya mugenzi we
Jeremiah9:5 Barangwa n'urugomo n'ibinyoma
Jeremiah9:6 Ni cyo gituma Uhoraho Nyiringabo avuga ati: “Nzabashongesha nk'ubutare mbagerageze. Abantu banjye bakoze ibibi nabakorera kindi ki?
Jeremiah9:7 Ururimi rwabo ni nk'umwambi wica
Jeremiah9:8 None se sinari nkwiye kubibahanira? Mbese sinari nkwiye kwihimura ubwoko bumeze butyo?”
Jeremiah9:9 Yeremiya aravuga ati: “Nzarira mboroge kubera imisozi
Jeremiah9:10 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yeruzalemu nzayihindura amatongo
Jeremiah9:11 Yeremiya arabaza ati: “Uhoraho
Jeremiah9:12 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati: “Byatewe n'uko baretse Amategeko nabahaye. Banze kunyumvira ntibakora ibyo mbabwiye
Jeremiah9:13 ahubwo barinangiye baramya za Bāli nk'uko babyigishijwe na ba sekuruza.
Jeremiah9:14 None rero nimwumve icyo jyewe Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli nzakora: aba bantu nzabagaburira ibyokurya birura kandi mbuhire amazi arimo uburozi.
Jeremiah9:15 Nzabatatanyiriza mu mahanga batigeze bamenya
Jeremiah9:16 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Nimubaririze
Jeremiah9:17 Abantu na bo baravuga bati: “Nimubabwire batebuke baduterere indirimbo z'icyunamo
Jeremiah9:18 Yeremiya aravuga ati: “Nimwumve imiborogo iturutse i Siyoni
Jeremiah9:19 Mwa bagore mwe
Jeremiah9:20 Dore urupfu rwinjiriye mu madirishya yacu
Jeremiah9:21 Intumbi zandagaye ahantu hose
Jeremiah9:22 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Umunyabwenge ntakirate ubwenge bwe
Jeremiah9:23 Ushaka kwirata yirate ko anzi kandi asobanukiwe ko ndi Uhoraho. Niyirate ko urukundo rwanjye ruhoraho
Jeremiah9:24 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kiri hafi ngahana abirata ko bimoje imisatsi.
Jeremiah9:25 Nzahana Abanyamisiri n'Abayuda
Jeremiah10:1 Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Jeremiah10:2 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ntimugakurikize imigenzereze y'andi mahanga
Jeremiah10:3 Imigenzo y'abo bantu nta cyo imaze
Jeremiah10:4 Agitakaho ifeza n'izahabu
Jeremiah10:5 Ibyo bigirwamana bimeze nk'ibishushanyo bikanga inyoni mu murima w'inzuzi zera ibicuma
Jeremiah10:6 Uhoraho
Jeremiah10:7 Ni nde utakubaha wowe mwami w'amahanga? Ukwiye icyubahiro mu banyabwenge bose b'amahanga
Jeremiah10:8 Bose ni abapfapfa ntibagira ubwenge
Jeremiah10:9 Ibyo bigirwamana birimbishijwe ifeza yavuye i Tarushishi
Jeremiah10:10 Nyamara Uhoraho ni Imana y'ukuri
Jeremiah10:11 Muzababwire muti: “Za mana zitaremye ijuru n'isi zizarimburwa ku isi.
Jeremiah10:12 “Uhoraho yaremesheje isi ububasha bwe
Jeremiah10:13 Iyo ategetse
Jeremiah10:14 Iyo abantu babibonye bibabera urujijo bakumirwa
Jeremiah10:15 Nta gaciro zifite
Jeremiah10:16 Imana ya Yakobo yo ntimeze nka zo
Jeremiah10:17 Yeremiya aravuga ati: “Yemwe bantu b'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah10:18 Koko rero Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Ubu ngiye kubirukana muve muri iki gihugu
Jeremiah10:19 Abantu b'i Yeruzalemu batera hejuru bati: “Mbega ishyano tugushije! Turakomeretse. Igikomere cyacu ntigiteze gukira. Nyamara twaribwiraga tuti: ‘Ibi ni ibyago dushobora kwihanganira.
Jeremiah10:20 None dore amahema yacu yasenyutse

Jeremiah11:1 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah11:2 “Tega amatwi amagambo y'iri Sezerano maze uyabwire Abayuda n'abatuye i Yeruzalemu.

Jeremiah11:4 Ni Isezerano nagiranye na ba sokuruza igihe nabakuraga mu Misiri
Jeremiah11:5 Bityo nzasohoza Isezerano nagiranye na ba sokuruza
Jeremiah11:6 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Jya mu mijyi y'u Buyuda no mu mayira y'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah11:7 Kuva igihe nkuye ba sokuruza mu Misiri kugeza ubu
Jeremiah11:8 Nyamara ntibigeze banyumvira kandi ntibanyitayeho
Jeremiah11:9 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Habonetse ubugambanyi mu Buyuda no mu batuye i Yeruzalemu.
Jeremiah11:10 Basubiye mu byaha bya ba sekuruza
Jeremiah11:11 Ni cyo gituma jyewe Uhoraho ngiye kubateza ibyago batazigobotora. Nubwo bantakambira sinzabumva.
Jeremiah11:12 Abo mu mijyi y'u Buyuda n'abatuye i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah11:13 Ibigirwamana by'abantu bo mu Buyuda binganya ubwinshi n'imijyi yabo
Jeremiah11:14 None rero Yeremiya
Jeremiah11:15 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abantu nkunda bakora ibibi
Jeremiah11:16 Nigeze kubagereranya n'igiti cy'umunzenze gitoshye
Jeremiah11:17 “Jyewe Uhoraho Nyiringabo narawuteye
Jeremiah11:18 Uhoraho yaramburiye menya imigambi mibi y'abanzi banjye.
Jeremiah11:19 Nari meze nk'umwana w'intama utuje bajyanye mu ibagiro

Jeremiah13:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Jya kugura umukandara w'umweru maze uwukenyeze ariko ntuwumese.”
Jeremiah13:2 Nuko ndagenda ngura umukandara ndawukenyeza nk'uko Uhoraho yambwiye.
Jeremiah13:3 Hanyuma Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati:
Jeremiah13:4 “Fata wa mukandara waguze kandi ukenyeje
Jeremiah13:5 Nuko ndagenda nywutaba hafi ya Efurati nk'uko Uhoraho yambwiye.
Jeremiah13:6 Nyuma y'iminsi myinshi Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Subira kuri Efurati uzane wa mukandara nakubwiye kuhataba.”
Jeremiah13:7 Nuko njyayo ndacukura nywukuramo
Jeremiah13:8 Maze Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Jeremiah13:9 “Nguko uko nzarimbura ubwirasi bw'u Buyuda n'ubwirasi bukomeye bw'i Yeruzalemu.
Jeremiah13:10 Abo bantu babi banze kunyumvira barinangira
Jeremiah13:11 Nk'uko umuntu akenyeza umukandara agakomeza
Jeremiah13:12 Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli arambwira ati: “Genda ubwire Abisiraheli uti: ‘Buri kibindi kizuzuzwa divayi.’ Nibasubiza bati: ‘None se tuyobewe ko ikibindi cyuzuzwa divayi?’
Jeremiah13:13 Nawe uzababwire ko jyewe Uhoraho ngiye guhindura abantu bose bo muri iki gihugu abasinzi: abami bakomoka kuri Dawidi n'abatambyi n'abahanuzi
Jeremiah13:14 Abantu bose nzabateza umwiryane
Jeremiah13:15 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimwicishe bugufi mwumve
Jeremiah13:16 nimwubahe Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Jeremiah13:17 Nyamara nimutumvira iyi miburo
Jeremiah13:18 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Bwira umwami n'umugabekazi uti: ‘Nimuve ku ntebe zanyu za cyami
Jeremiah13:19 Imijyi yo mu majyepfo y'u Buyuda yagoswe
Jeremiah13:20 Yewe Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah13:21 Uzavuga iki abo witaga incuti zawe nibagutera? Uzavuga iki nibagutera bakagutegeka? Koko uzabababara nk'umugore uribwa n'ibise.
Jeremiah13:22 Icyo gihe uzabaza uti: “Ni kuki ibi byambayeho?” Byatewe n'ibyaha byawe byinshi
Jeremiah13:23 Mbese umwirabura yahindura ibara ry'uruhu rwe? Mbese ingwe yahindura amabara yayo? Niba bishoboka namwe mwashobora gukora ibyiza
Jeremiah13:24 “Ngiye kubatatanya nk'umurama utumurwa n'umuyaga
Jeremiah13:25 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Ibyo ni byo bigukwiriye

Jeremiah14:1 Igihe amapfa yateraga Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya iri jambo:
Jeremiah14:2 “Abantu bo mu Buyuda bari mu cyunamo
Jeremiah14:3 Abakomeye bohereje abakozi babo kuvoma amazi
Jeremiah14:4 Ubutaka bwiyashije imitutu
Jeremiah14:5 Mu gasozi imparakazi zasize ibyana byazo
Jeremiah14:6 Indogobe zo mu gasozi zihagaze ahirengeye ku gasi
Jeremiah14:7 “Abantu banjye barantakira bati: ‘Nubwo ibyaha byacu bidushinja
Jeremiah14:8 Wowe Byiringiro by'Abisiraheli
Jeremiah14:9 Kuki umeze nk'umuntu wumiwe? Kuki uri nk'intwari idashobora gutabara? Nyamara Uhoraho uri kumwe natwe
Jeremiah14:10 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Koko bakunze kurorongotana baranyimūra ntibisubiraho. Ni cyo gituma ntakibishimira
Jeremiah14:11 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Ntiwirirwe uvuganira aba bantu.
Jeremiah14:12 Nubwo bakwigomwa kurya sinzumva gutakamba kwabo. Nubwo bantura ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke sinzabishimira
Jeremiah14:13 Nuko mbwira Uhoraho nti: “Nyagasani Uhoraho
Jeremiah14:14 Nyamara Uhoraho aransubiza ati: “Abo bahanuzi barahanura ibinyoma bitwaje izina ryanjye. Ntabwo nigeze mbatuma
Jeremiah14:15 Ni yo mpamvu jyewe Uhoraho mbabwiye ibyo ngiye gukorera abo bahanuzi bitwaje izina ryanjye
Jeremiah14:16 Abo bahanuriye na bo bazapfa rumwe na bo. Imirambo yabo izajugunywa mu mayira yo muri Yeruzalemu kubera intambara n'inzara
Jeremiah14:17 Uzababwire uti: ‘Amarira yanjye ahora atemba ku manywa na nijoro
Jeremiah14:18 Iyo ngiye ku gasozi mbona abishwe n'inkota

Jeremiah14:20 Uhoraho

Jeremiah16:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Jeremiah16:2 “Ntuzashakire umugore aha hantu cyangwa ngo uhabyarire abana.

Jeremiah16:4 Bazapfa kubera indwara simusiga kandi nta muntu uzabaririra cyangwa ngo abahambe
Jeremiah16:5 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati: “Ntukinjire mu rugo rurimo icyunamo
Jeremiah16:6 Muri iki gihugu abakuru n'abato bazapfa babure gihamba
Jeremiah16:7 Nta muntu uzagemurira ibyokurya abari mu cyunamo ngo abahumurize
Jeremiah16:8 “Ntukinjire mu nzu irimo ibirori ngo wicare urye cyangwa unywe.
Jeremiah16:9 Koko rero jyewe Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli
Jeremiah16:10 “Numara kubwira aba bantu aya magambo bazakubaza bati: ‘Ni kuki Uhoraho yiyemeje kuduteza ibyago bikomeye bitya? Igicumuro cyacu ni ikihe? Ni cyaha ki twakoreye Uhoraho Imana yacu?’
Jeremiah16:11 Uzabasubize uti: ‘Ni ukubera ko ba sokuruza banyimūye bakayoboka izindi mana
Jeremiah16:12 Naho mwebwe mwakoze ibibi kurusha ba sokuruza
Jeremiah16:13 Ni yo mpamvu ngiye kubamenesha muri iki gihugu
Jeremiah16:14 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kizagera ubwo abantu batazongera kuvuga bati: ‘Ndahiye Uhoraho we wakuye Abisiraheli mu Misiri’
Jeremiah16:15 ahubwo bazavuga bati: ‘Ndahiye Uhoraho we wakuye Abisiraheli mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru
Jeremiah16:16 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ngiye kohereza abarobyi benshi bazabarobe
Jeremiah16:17 Nitegereje imigenzereze yabo yose
Jeremiah16:18 Ubugome bwabo n'ibyaha byabo nzabibaryoza incuro ebyiri
Jeremiah16:19 Uhoraho
Jeremiah16:20 Mbese abantu bashobora kwiremera imana? Reka da! Bene izo si imana.”
Jeremiah16:21 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ubu noneho ngiye kubamenyesha ububasha n'ubushobozi bwanjye

Jeremiah17:7 Hahirwa umuntu wizera Uhoraho
Jeremiah17:8 Uwo ameze nk'igiti cyatewe hafi y'umugezi
Jeremiah17:9 Umutima w'umuntu wibeshya kurusha byose
Jeremiah17:10 Ni jye Uhoraho ugenzura imitima
Jeremiah17:11 Hariho umuntu wikungahaza mu buryo bubi
Jeremiah17:12 Ingoro yacu ifite ikuzo

Jeremiah17:14 Uhoraho

Jeremiah17:18 Abantoteza nibakorwe n'isoni

Jeremiah17:20 Nuko ubabwire uti: ‘Yemwe bami b'u Buyuda

Jeremiah17:22 Kuri uwo munsi w'isabato ntimukikorere imitwaro muvanye mu mazu yanyu cyangwa ngo mugire umurimo mukora
Jeremiah17:23 Nyamara ntibanyumviye kandi ntibanyitayeho
