Jeremiah18:1 Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah18:2 “Haguruka ujye ku mubumbyi
Jeremiah18:3 Nuko ndamanuka njya kwa wa mubumbyi nsanga abumba.
Jeremiah18:4 Iyo icyo yabumbaga cyangirikiraga mu biganza bye nk'uko bikunze kuba ku bibumbano
Jeremiah18:5 Nuko Uhoraho antuma ku Bisiraheli ati:
Jeremiah18:6 “Mbese murasanga ntashobora kubagenza nk'uko uriya mubumbyi yabikoze? Nk'uko afata ibumba mu biganza bye
Jeremiah18:7 Haba ubwo niyemeza ko ngiye kurandura no guhirika
Jeremiah18:8 nyamara icyo gihugu nikireka ibibi byacyo
Jeremiah18:9 Haba ubwo kandi niyemeza kubaka no gukomeza igihugu cyangwa ubwami
Jeremiah18:10 nyamara abatuye icyo gihugu nibakora ibitanogeye bakanga kunyumvira
Jeremiah18:11 None rero bwira abantu b'u Buyuda n'abatuye Yeruzalemu uti: “Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Dore mbafitiye umugambi mubi
Jeremiah18:12 “Nyamara bazasubiza bati: ‘Urarushywa n'ubusa! Tuzakomeza imigambi yacu
Jeremiah18:13 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ngaho nimubaririze mu mahanga. Mbese hari uwigeze yumva ibintu nk'ibi? Abisiraheli bakoze ikizira!
Jeremiah18:14 Mbese ibitare byo muri Libani byigeze biburamo amasimbi? Mbese amazi yo mu misozi yaho yigeze akama?
Jeremiah18:15 Nyamara abantu banjye baranyibagiwe
Jeremiah18:16 Igihugu cyabo bagihinduye ikintu giteye ubwoba
Jeremiah18:17 Nzatatanya abantu banjye imbere y'abanzi babo
Jeremiah18:18 Abantu barabwirana bati: “Nimuze tugambanire Yeremiya
Jeremiah18:19 Yeremiya arasenga ati: “Uhoraho
Jeremiah18:20 Mbese icyiza cyiturwa ikibi? Nyamara bo bancukuriye urwobo. Uhoraho
Jeremiah18:21 Reka abana babo bicwe n'inzara
Jeremiah18:22 Ingo zabo nizijye mu cyunamo
Jeremiah18:23 Nyamara Uhoraho urabizi
Jeremiah19:1 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati: “Jya ku mubumbyi ugure ikibindi
Jeremiah19:2 ujye mu kabande ka Hinomu bugufi bw'Irembo ry'Injyo
Jeremiah19:3 Uzavuge uti: ‘Mwa bami b'u Buyuda mwe
Jeremiah19:4 Koko rero baranyimūye aha hantu barahahindanya
Jeremiah19:5 bubatse ahasengerwa Bāli
Jeremiah19:6 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kizagera ubwo aha hantu hatazongera kwitwa Tofeti cyangwa akabande ka Hinomu
Jeremiah19:7 Aha ni ho nzafatira icyemezo cyo kuburizamo imigambi y'u Buyuda n'iya Yeruzalemu. Nzareka abanzi babo kimwe n'abandi bose bashaka kubica babatsembeshe inkota. Imirambo yabo nzayigabiza inkongoro n'inyamaswa.
Jeremiah19:8 Uyu murwa nzawuhindura amatongo uhinduke urw'amenyo. Abahisi n'abagenzi bazumirwa
Jeremiah19:9 Muri icyo gihe cy'imibabaro n'agahinda bazaterwa n'abanzi babo kimwe n'abashaka kubica
Jeremiah19:10 “Hanyuma uzamenere icyo kibindi imbere y'abantu muzaba muri kumwe
Jeremiah19:11 ubabwire uti: ‘Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ngo: Nzarimbura aba bantu n'uyu mujyi nk'uko iki kibindi kijanjaguritse ntikibe cyakongera gusubiranywa. Bazahamba imirambo yabo i Tofeti kugeza igihe bazabura aho bahamba.’ ”
Jeremiah19:12 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Ibyo ni byo nzakorera aha hantu n'abahatuye
Jeremiah19:13 Inzu z'i Yeruzalemu n'ingoro z'abami b'u Buyuda zizaba zihumanye nk'i Tofeti
Jeremiah19:14 Hanyuma Yeremiya ava i Tofeti aho Uhoraho yari yamutumye guhanura
Jeremiah19:15 “Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: ‘Dore ngiye guteza uyu mujyi n'insisiro ziwukikije ibyago byose navuze
Jeremiah20:1 Umutambyi Pashehuri mwene Imeri wari umuyobozi w'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah20:2 Nuko Pashehuri aramukubita
Jeremiah20:3 Bukeye Pashehuri amubohora kuri ya nkingi
Jeremiah20:4 Koko rero Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ngiye gukora ku buryo wowe ubwawe witera ubwoba
Jeremiah20:5 Ubutunzi bwose bw'uyu mujyi
Jeremiah20:6 Naho wowe Pashehuri n'abo mu rugo rwawe bose
Jeremiah20:7 Uhoraho
Jeremiah20:8 Igihe cyose ngomba kuvuga mba ntaka
Jeremiah20:9 Iyo mvuze nti: “Sinongera kubutangaza
Jeremiah20:10 Ndumva abantu benshi bamvuga bati: “Akwiza iterabwoba impande zose
Jeremiah20:11 Nyamara Uhoraho
Jeremiah20:12 Uhoraho Nyiringabo
Jeremiah20:13 Nimuririmbire Uhoraho mumusingize
Jeremiah20:14 Nihavumwe umunsi navutseho
Jeremiah20:15 Nihavumwe umuntu wabwiye data ati: “Wabyaye umuhungu”
Jeremiah20:16 Uwo muntu arakaba nka ya mijyi Uhoraho yarimbuye
Jeremiah20:17 Ni kuki Uhoraho atanyiciye mu nda ya mama? Koko mama yari kumbera imva.
Jeremiah20:18 Kuki navukiye kuruha no kubabara? Kuki navukiye gukorwa n'ikimwaro mu mibereho yanjye?
Jeremiah21:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa Uhoraho yahaye Yeremiya ngo abushyikirize Umwami Sedekiya. Icyo gihe Sedekiya yari yatumye Pashehuri mwene Malikiya
Jeremiah21:2 “Tubarize Uhoraho
Jeremiah21:3 Nuko Yeremiya arabasubiza ati: “Muzabwire Sedekiya muti:
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Umva uko Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli avuze: intwaro mufite zo guhangana n'umwami wa Babiloniya n'ingabo ze babagose
Jeremiah21:5 Ni jye ubwanjye uzabarwanya nkoresheje imbaraga n'ubushobozi byanjye. Nzabikorana uburakari bwanjye bukaze kandi bugurumana.
Jeremiah21:6 Ngiye gutsemba ibiri muri uyu mujyi byose
Jeremiah21:7 Nyuma y'ibyo nzatanga Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda n'abagaragu be n'abantu bose
Jeremiah21:8 “Naho rubanda uzababwire uti: ‘Nimwumve uko Uhoraho avuze: dore mbashyize imbere ubuzima n'urupfu kugira ngo muhitemo.
Jeremiah21:9 Umuntu uzaguma muri uyu mujyi azicwa n'inkota cyangwa inzara cyangwa icyorezo. Naho uzawusohokamo akishyira mu maboko y'Abanyababiloniya babagose
Jeremiah21:10 Koko rero ngiye kuzibukira uyu mujyi
Jeremiah21:11 Ubu ni ubutumwa bugenewe umuryango w'umwami w'u Buyuda. Nimwumve Ijambo ry'Uhoraho
Jeremiah21:12 nimwumve mwebwe mukomoka kuri Dawidi
Jeremiah21:13 Dore ubu ni mwebwe abatuye Yeruzalemu muramukiwe
Jeremiah21:14 Jyewe ubwanjye nzabarwanya
Jeremiah22:1 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati: “Jya ibwami maze ubwire umwami w'u Buyuda
Jeremiah22:2 uti: ‘Yewe mwami w'u Buyuda wicaye ku ntebe ya Dawidi
Jeremiah22:3 nimukurikize ubutungane n'ubutabera
Jeremiah22:4 Nuko rero nimukurikiza aya mabwiriza
Jeremiah22:5 Nyamara nimudakurikiza aya mabwiriza
Jeremiah22:6 Ibi ni byo Uhoraho avuga byerekeye ingoro y'umwami w'u Buyuda: “Nubwo ari nziza nk'intara ya Gileyadi
Jeremiah22:7 Nzayiteza abanzi bitwaje intwaro
Jeremiah22:8 “Nuko abantu baturutse mu mahanga bazanyura hafi y'uyu mujyi bazabazanye bati: ‘Kuki Uhoraho yagenje atya uyu mujyi w'ikirangirire?’
Jeremiah22:9 Bazasubizanya bati: ‘Ni ukubera ko baretse Isezerano ry'Uhoraho Imana yabo
Jeremiah22:10 Ntimukaririre Umwami Yosiya wapfuye
Jeremiah22:11 Ibi ni byo Uhoraho avuze kuri Yowahazi mwene Yosiya wasimbuye se ku ngoma mu Buyuda: yavanywe ino ntazongera kuhagaruka
Jeremiah22:12 azapfira aho yajyanywe ho umunyago
Jeremiah22:13 Uzabona ishyano Yoyakimu
Jeremiah22:14 Uravuga uti: “Nziyubakira ingoro nini cyane
Jeremiah22:15 Koko rero wubakishije amasederi. Mbese ibyo bituma uba umwami uruta abandi? So yari afite ibyokurya n'ibyokunywa
Jeremiah22:16 Yarwanaga ku bakene n'abandi batishoboye
Jeremiah22:17 Nyamara wowe amaso yawe n'umutima wawe birarikiye inyungu mbi
Jeremiah22:18 Dore ibyo Uhoraho yongeye kuvuga kuri Yoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w'u Buyuda: napfa ntibazamuririra bavuga bati: “Abonye ishyano umuvandimwe wacu! Abonye ishyano mushiki wacu!” Ntibazamuririra bavuga bati: “Abonye ishyano databuja! Abonye ishyano umwami wanjye!”
Jeremiah22:19 Bazamushyingura nk'uhamba indogobe
Jeremiah22:20 Bantu b'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah22:21 Nababuriye mugifite amahoro
Jeremiah22:22 Abayobozi banyu bose bazajyanwa n'umuyaga
Jeremiah22:23 Yemwe abatuye ibwami mu Ngoro y'Ishyamba rya Libani
Jeremiah22:24 Uhoraho abwira Umwami Yoyakini mwene Yoyakimu umwami w'u Buyuda ati: “Ndarahiye
Jeremiah22:25 Nzakugabiza abashaka kukwica
Jeremiah22:26 Wowe na nyoko nzabameneshereza mu gihugu mutavutsemo
Jeremiah22:27 Muzashaka kugaruka muri iki gihugu nyamara ntibizashoboka.
Jeremiah22:28 “Bazabaza bati: ‘Mbese Yoyakini uyu si nk'ikibindi cyamenetse
Jeremiah22:29 Wa gihugu we
Jeremiah22:30 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimwandike uyu muntu nk'aho ari incike. Ni umuntu utagira amahoro mu mibereho ye
Jeremiah23:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abayobozi b'abantu banjye bazabona ishyano! Ni abashumba bica kandi bagatatanya umukumbi wanjye.
Jeremiah23:2 None rero ku byerekeye abo bashumba bayobora abantu banjye
Jeremiah23:3 Nzakoranya itsinda ry'abantu banjye basigaye mu bihugu byose nabatatanyirijemo
Jeremiah23:4 Nzabaha abashumba bazabitaho
Jeremiah23:5 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kizagera nzatoranye umwami w'intungane
Jeremiah23:6 Ku ngoma ye u Buyuda buzishyira bwizane
Jeremiah23:7 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kizagera ubwo abantu batazongera kuvuga ngo ndahiye Uhoraho
Jeremiah23:8 Ahubwo bazavuga bati: ‘Ndahiye Uhoraho
Jeremiah23:9 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwerekeye abahanuzi. Narashengutse ndahinda umushyitsi
Jeremiah23:10 Dore igihugu cyuzuyemo abasambanyi
Jeremiah23:11 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abahanuzi n'abatambyi barandavuye
Jeremiah23:12 Inzira banyuramo zirimo ubunyereri n'umwijima
Jeremiah23:13 Nabonye ikintu giteye ishozi mu bahanuzi b'i Samariya
Jeremiah23:14 Nabonye n'ikindi giteye ubwoba mu bahanuzi b'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah23:15 None Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga iby'abo bahanuzi ati: “Ngiye kubagaburira ibyokurya bisharira
Jeremiah23:16 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Ntimukumve amagambo y'abo bahanuzi
Jeremiah23:17 Babwira abahinyura Ijambo ryanjye bati: ‘Muzagira amahoro.’ Babwira n'abatsimbaraye ku bitekerezo byabo bati: ‘Nta byago bizabageraho.’
Jeremiah23:18 Ni nde wigeze yumva inama yanjye? Ni nde wumvise Ijambo ryanjye akarisobanukirwa? Ni nde wariteze amatwi akaryitaho?”
Jeremiah23:19 Yeremiya aravuga ati: “Dore inkubi y'umuyaga y'Uhoraho iraje
Jeremiah23:20 Uburakari bw'Uhoraho ntibuteze gushira
Jeremiah23:21 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abo bahanuzi sinigeze mbatuma
Jeremiah23:22 Iyo baza kumva inama yanjye
Jeremiah23:23 Uhoraho arabaza ati: “Mbese ndi Imana y'abantu bandi bugufi gusa? Ntabwo se ndi n'Imana y'abari kure?
Jeremiah23:24 Mbese hari aho umuntu yanyihisha simubone? Ese ntimuzi ko mba hose
Jeremiah23:25 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Numvise ibyo abahanuzi b'ibinyoma bavuga mu izina ryanjye bati: ‘Nabonekewe mu nzozi.’
Jeremiah23:26 “Mbese abo bahanuzi bazahanura ibinyoma kugeza ryari? Bazareka ryari guhanura ibyo bibwira mu mitima yabo?
Jeremiah23:27 Batekereza ko uko kubonekerwa kwabo birata kuzatuma abantu banjye banyibagirwa
Jeremiah23:28 Umuhanuzi wihaye kubonekerwa mu nzozi navuge iryo bonekerwa rye
Jeremiah23:29 Ijambo ryanjye ni nk'umuriro
Jeremiah23:30 None rero Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ngiye guhana abahanuzi babwirabwirana amagambo bakayanyitirira.
Jeremiah23:31 Koko rero ngiye guhana abo bahanuzi bitwaza amagambo yabo bakavuga ko nabatumye.
Jeremiah23:32 Nzahana abo bahanuzi bayobya abantu banjye
Jeremiah23:33 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati: “Nihagira umuhanuzi cyangwa umutambyi cyangwa undi muntu wese ukubaza ati: ‘Ni ubuhe butumwa butubereye umuzigo Uhoraho yatwikoreje?’ Uzamusubize uti: ‘Nimwe mumuberye umuzigo none agiye kubareka.’
Jeremiah23:34 Nihagira umuhanuzi cyangwa umutambyi cyangwa undi muntu wese uvuga ati: ‘Uyu ni umuzigo Uhoraho yatwikoreje’
Jeremiah23:35 Dore icyo buri wese akwiye kubaza mugenzi we: mbese Uhoraho yasubije iki? Uhoraho yavuze iki?
Jeremiah23:36 Nuko rero iryo jambo umuzigo w'Uhoraho ntimuzongere kurivuga. Abazongera kurivuga ubutumwa bwanjye buzabahindukira umuzigo. Koko rero mwagoretse amagambo y'Imana nzima
Jeremiah23:37 Dore icyo mukwiye kubaza umuhanuzi: mbese Uhoraho yagusubije iki? Yakubwiye iki?
Jeremiah23:38 Nyamara nibaca ku itegeko ryanjye bakavuga bati: ‘Umuzigo w'Uhoraho’
Jeremiah23:39 uzababwire ko nzabazinukwa nkabatatanyiriza kure yanjye
Jeremiah23:40 Nzabakoza isoni iteka ryose
Jeremiah24:1 Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya afata Yoyakini mwene Yoyakimu umwami w'u Buyuda n'ibyegera bye
Jeremiah24:2 Igitebo kimwe cyarimo imbuto nziza cyane z'imitini zahishije mbere y'izindi. Naho ikindi cyarimo imbuto mbi cyane zidashobora kuribwa.
Jeremiah24:3 Nuko Uhoraho arambaza ati: “Yeremiya we
Jeremiah24:4 Nuko Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli arambwira ati: “Nk'uko abantu bashimishwa n'imbuto nziza z'imitini
Jeremiah24:5 
Jeremiah24:6 Nzabagirira impuhwe mbagarure muri iki gihugu
Jeremiah24:7 Nzatuma bagira ubushake bwo kumenya ko ndi Uhoraho. Koko rero bazaba abantu banjye
Jeremiah24:8 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nk'uko bagenza imbuto mbi z'imitini zidashobora kuribwa
Jeremiah24:9 Nzabateza ibyago ku buryo amahanga yose yo ku isi azashya ubwoba. Bazahinduka urw'amenyo babe iciro ry'imigani
Jeremiah24:10 Nzabateza inkota n'inzara n'icyorezo
Jeremiah25:1 Mu mwaka wa kane Yoyakimu mwene Yosiya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
Jeremiah25:2 Nuko umuhanuzi Yeremiya abwira Abayuda bose n'abatuye i Yeruzalemu bose ati:
Jeremiah25:3 “Hashize imyaka makumyabiri n'itatu
Jeremiah25:4 Nubwo Uhoraho yakomeje kubatumaho abagaragu be bose b'abahanuzi
Jeremiah25:5 Yarababwiye ati: ‘Nimureke imigenzereze yanyu mibi n'ibikorwa byanyu bibi
Jeremiah25:6 Nimureka kuyoboka izindi mana no kuziramya
Jeremiah25:7 Nyamara ntimwanyumviye ahubwo mwarandakaje mukora ibibi
Jeremiah25:8 “Uhoraho Nyiringabo yungamo ati: ‘Kubera ko mutanyumviye
Jeremiah25:9 ngiye kubateza abantu bose bo mu majyaruguru
Jeremiah25:10 Nzacecekesha urusaku rwanyu rw'ibyishimo n'umunezero
Jeremiah25:11 Iki gihugu cyose kizahinduka amatongo ateye ishozi
Jeremiah25:12 “Uhoraho arakomeza ati: ‘Iyo myaka mirongo irindwi nishira
Jeremiah25:13 Nzagiteza ibyago byose navuze byanditswe muri iki gitabo
Jeremiah25:14 Hanyuma abo Banyababiloniya bazigarurirwa n'amahanga menshi n'abami bakomeye
Jeremiah25:15 Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli arambwira ati: “Akira iki gikombe cya divayi kiri mu ntoki zanjye ari yo burakari bwanjye
Jeremiah25:16 Bazayinywa basinde
Jeremiah25:17 Nuko Uhoraho ampereza icyo gikombe ncyuhira amahanga yose Uhoraho yanyoherejemo.
Jeremiah25:18 Nuko mpera kuri Yeruzalemu n'imijyi y'u Buyuda
Jeremiah25:19 Hanyuma nkurikizaho umwami wa Misiri n'abagaragu be
Jeremiah25:20 n'abanyamahanga bose n'abami bose bo mu gihugu cya Usi
Jeremiah25:21 Nkurikizaho Abedomu n'Abamowabu n'Abamoni
Jeremiah25:22 n'abami bose bo mu bihugu bya Tiri na Sidoni
Jeremiah25:23 Nkurikizaho abatuye mu mijyi ya Dedani n'i Tema n'i Buzi
Jeremiah25:24 Nkurikizaho abami bose b'Abarabu
Jeremiah25:25 n'abami bose bo mu gihugu cya Zimuri
Jeremiah25:26 Nuko mperukira ku bami bose bo mu majyaruguru
Jeremiah25:27 Uhoraho arongera arambwira ati: “Bwira abo bantu ko jyewe Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli mvuze nti: ‘Nimunywe musinde
Jeremiah25:28 Nibanga kwakira icyo gikombe kiri mu ntoki zawe ngo banywe
Jeremiah25:29 Dore nteje ibyago mpereye ku mujyi witiriwe izina ryanjye. None se mutekereza ko muzabirokoka? Reka da! Muzahanwa nta kabuza kuko ngiye guteza ubwicanyi mu batuye ku isi bose. Ni jye Uhoraho Nyiringabo ubivuze.’ ”
Jeremiah25:30 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Wowe Yeremiya ubahanurire aya magambo uti: ‘Uhoraho azatontomera mu ijuru
Jeremiah25:31 Urusaku rwe ruzagera ku mpera z'isi
Jeremiah25:32 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Ibyago bivuye mu gihugu bijya mu kindi
Jeremiah25:33 Icyo gihe imirambo y'abishwe n'Uhoraho izaba inyanyagiye kuva ku mpera y'isi kugeza ku yindi. Nta muntu uzabaririra cyangwa ngo abahambe. Bazaba nk'ibishingwe biri ku gasozi.
Jeremiah25:34 Mwa bayobozi mwe
Jeremiah25:35 Abayobozi ntibazabona ubuhungiro
Jeremiah25:36 Nimwumve amarira y'abayobozi
Jeremiah25:37 Igihugu cy'amahoro kizahinduka amatongo
Jeremiah25:38 Bagiye nk'intare itaye indiri yayo
Jeremiah26:1 Yoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w'u Buyuda akigera ku ngoma
Jeremiah26:2 “Hagarara mu rugo rw'Ingoro yanjye
Jeremiah26:3 Ahari bazumva bareke imigenzereze yabo mibi
Jeremiah26:4 “Uzababwire ko Uhoraho avuze ati: ‘Nimutanyumvira ngo mukurikize Amategeko nabahaye
Jeremiah26:5 nimutumva amagambo y'abagaragu banjye b'abahanuzi ntahwemye kubatumaho nubwo mutayitayeho
Jeremiah26:6 iyi Ngoro nzayigenza nk'uko nagenje Shilo
Jeremiah26:7 Abatambyi n'abahanuzi na rubanda rwose bumva Yeremiya avugira ayo magambo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho.
Jeremiah26:8 Akimara kuvuga amagambo yose Uhoraho yamutegetse kubwira abantu bose
Jeremiah26:9 Ni iki gitumye uhangara kuvuga ko Uhoraho agutumye guhanura ko iyi Ngoro izamera nka Shilo
Jeremiah26:10 Abayobozi b'u Buyuda bumvise ibyabaye bajya mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah26:11 Abatambyi n'abahanuzi babwira abayobozi na rubanda rwose bati: “Uyu muntu akwiye gupfa
Jeremiah26:12 Nuko Yeremiya abwira abayobozi bose na rubanda rwose ati: “Uhoraho yantumye guhanura iby'iyi Ngoro n'uyu mujyi
Jeremiah26:13 None rero nimuhindure imigenzereze yanyu n'ibikorwa byanyu
Jeremiah26:14 Naho jye ndi mu maboko yanyu
Jeremiah26:15 Nyamara mumenye yuko nimunyica muzaba mumennye amaraso y'intungane
Jeremiah26:16 Abayobozi na rubanda rwose babwira abatambyi n'abahanuzi bati: “Uyu muntu ntakwiriye kwicwa
Jeremiah26:17 Nuko bamwe mu bakuru b'imiryango barahaguruka babwira abantu bose bateraniye aho bati:
Jeremiah26:18 “Ku ngoma ya Hezekiya umwami w'u Buyuda
Jeremiah26:19 “None se Hezekiya umwami w'u Buyuda na rubanda rwose hari ubwo bishe Mika? Reka da! Ahubwo Hezekiya yatinye Uhoraho amusaba imbabazi
Jeremiah26:20 Habayeho undi muntu wahanuye mu izina ry'Uhoraho. Uwo muntu yitwaga Uriya mwene Shemaya wo mu mujyi wa Kiriyati-Yeyarimu
Jeremiah26:21 Umwami Yoyakimu n'ingabo ze zose n'ibyegera bye bumvise ibyo Uriya yavuze
Jeremiah26:22 Nuko Yoyakimu yohereza Elinatani mwene Akibori n'abandi bantu mu Misiri
Jeremiah26:23 bamuvanayo bamushyikiriza Yoyakimu. Umwami amwicisha inkota
Jeremiah26:24 Nyamara Yeremiya we yari arinzwe na Ahikamu mwene Shafani
Jeremiah27:1 Sedekiya mwene Yosiya umwami w'u Buyuda akigera ku ngoma
Jeremiah27:2 “Hambira imizigo y'ingiga z'ibiti maze uyiheke ku bitugu
Jeremiah27:3 hanyuma iyo mizigo uyoherereze umwami wa Edomu n'uwa Mowabu
Jeremiah27:4 Uzazitume kuri ba shebuja ko Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli avuze ati:
Jeremiah27:5 ‘Ni jye waremye isi n'abantu n'inyamaswa biyiriho
Jeremiah27:6 None rero ibi bihugu byose mbyeguriye umugaragu wanjye Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya
Jeremiah27:7 Amahanga yose azamuyoboka we n'umwana we n'umwuzukuru we kugeza igihe igihugu cye kizatsindwa
Jeremiah27:8 “ ‘Nihagira igihugu cyangwa ubwami byanga kuyoboka Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya bikanga kumwumvira
Jeremiah27:9 “ ‘None rero ntimugatege amatwi abahanuzi banyu
Jeremiah27:10 Ibyo babahanurira ni ibinyoma
Jeremiah27:11 Nyamara nihagira abantu bayoboka umwami wa Babiloniya bakamukorera
Jeremiah27:12 Jyewe Yeremiya amagambo nk'aya nayabwiye Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda nti: “Nimuyoboke umwami wa Babiloniya
Jeremiah27:13 Kuki wowe n'abantu bawe mwakwicwa n'intambara n'inzara n'icyorezo
Jeremiah27:14 None rero ntimugatege amatwi amagambo y'abahanuzi bababwira bati: ‘Ntimuzayoboke umwami wa Babiloniya
Jeremiah27:15 Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Ntabwo nigeze mbatuma. Ibyo bahanura mu izina ryanjye ni ibinyoma
Jeremiah27:16 Hanyuma nabwiye abatambyi n'abantu bose nti: “Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Ntimutege amatwi abahanuzi babahanurira ngo ibikoresho byo mu Ngoro byajyanywe i Babiloni bizagarurwa vuba. Ibyo babahanurira ni ibinyoma.
Jeremiah27:17 Ntimukabatege amatwi
Jeremiah27:18 “Nyamara niba abo ari abahanuzi koko bakaba bafite Ijambo ry'Uhoraho
Jeremiah27:19 “Dore ibyo Uhoraho Nyiringabo avuga ku byerekeye inkingi n'ikizenga n'ibigare
Jeremiah27:20 Ibyo ni ibikoresho Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya atasahuye
Jeremiah27:21 Nuko rero nimwumve icyo Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli avuga ku byerekeye ibikoresho byasigaye mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah27:22 Bizajyanwa i Babiloni bigumeyo kugeza igihe nzabigarurira aha hantu.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.
Jeremiah28:1 Mu kwezi kwa gatanu k'umwaka wa kane Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah28:2 “Ibi ni byo Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli avuze: nkuyeho agahato k'umwami wa Babiloniya.
Jeremiah28:3 Mu myaka ibiri nzagarura aha hantu ibikoresho byose byo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah28:4 Nzagarura kandi Yoyakini mwene Yoyakimu umwami w'u Buyuda
Jeremiah28:5 Hanyuma umuhanuzi Yeremiya asubiriza umuhanuzi Hananiya imbere y'abatambyi
Jeremiah28:6 “Icyampa ngo Uhoraho asohoze ibyo uhanuye
Jeremiah28:7 Nyamara umva icyo nkubwira wowe na rubanda rwose.
Jeremiah28:8 Abahanuzi batubanjirije bahanuye ko ibihugu byinshi n'ubwami bukomeye
Jeremiah28:9 Nyamara umuhanuzi uhanura ibyerekeye amahoro
Jeremiah28:10 Nuko umuhanuzi Hananiya afata wa muzigo wari ku bitugu by'umuhanuzi Yeremiya
Jeremiah28:11 Maze Hananiya avugira imbere ya rubanda ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Nguko uko nzakuraho agahato Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya yakoresheje amahanga yose mu myaka ibiri.’ ” Nuko umuhanuzi Yeremiya arigendera.
Jeremiah28:12 Umuhanuzi Hananiya amaze gusandaza umuzigo wari ku bitugu bya Yeremiya
Jeremiah28:13 “Genda umbwirire Hananiya uti: ‘Wasandaje ingiga z'ibiti nyamara nzazisimbuza iz'ibyuma.’
Jeremiah28:14 Dore ibyo Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli avuga: nzashyira ku bitugu by'aya mahanga yose umuzigo w'ibyuma
Jeremiah28:15 Nuko umuhanuzi Yeremiya abwira Hananiya ati: “Umva Hananiya we
Jeremiah28:16 Ni cyo gituma Uhoraho avuga ati: ‘Dore ngiye kukwica. Uyu mwaka uzapfa kuko woheje abantu kugomera Uhoraho.’ ”
Jeremiah28:17 Nuko Hananiya apfa mu kwezi kwa karindwi k'uwo mwaka.
Jeremiah29:1 Uru ni urwandiko umuhanuzi Yeremiya yanditse ari i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah29:2 Yeremiya yanditse urwo rwandiko nyuma y'uko Umwami Yoyakini n'umugabekazi
Jeremiah29:3 Urwo rwandiko rwajyanywe na Elasa mwene Shafani na Gemariya mwene Hilikiya
Jeremiah29:4 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli arabwira abantu bose bavuye i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah29:5 “Nimwiyubakire amazu muyabemo
Jeremiah29:6 Nimushake abagore mubyare abahungu n'abakobwa
Jeremiah29:7 Nimuharanire amahoro y'umujyi nemeye ko mujyanwa mo iminyago. Muzantakambire musabira amahoro uyu mujyi kuko amahoro yawo ari yo yanyu.”
Jeremiah29:8 Koko rero Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: “Ntimukemere ko abahanuzi banyu n'ababaterekerera babashuka
Jeremiah29:9 Ibyo babahanurira mu izina ryanjye ni ibinyoma
Jeremiah29:10 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Nimumara imyaka mirongo irindwi muri Babiloniya
Jeremiah29:11 Nzi imigambi mbafitiye. Ni imigambi ibazanira amahoro si ibakururira ibyago
Jeremiah29:12 Nimunsanga mukantakambira mukansenga
Jeremiah29:13 Muzanshakashaka mumbone
Jeremiah29:14 Muzambona maze mbagarure mbavanye aho mwajyanywe ho iminyago
Jeremiah29:15 Muravuga muti: “Turi muri Babiloniya
Jeremiah29:16 Nyamara nimwumve ibyo Uhoraho avuga byerekeye umwami wicaye ku ntebe ya Dawidi
Jeremiah29:17 Uhoraho Nyiringabo arababwira ati: “Dore ngiye kubatsembesha inkota n'inzara n'icyorezo
Jeremiah29:18 Nzabakurikirana mbatsembeshe inkota n'inzara n'icyorezo
Jeremiah29:19 Ibi bizababaho kuko batumviye amagambo ntahwemye kubatumaho
Jeremiah29:20 None rero mwebwe abavuye i Yeruzalemu mujyanywe ho iminyago muri Babiloniya
Jeremiah29:21 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana ya Isiraheli arabwira Ahabu mwene Kolaya
Jeremiah29:22 Abantu bavanywe mu Buyuda bajyanywe ho iminyago muri Babiloniya
Jeremiah29:23 Bakoze ikizira muri Isiraheli
Jeremiah29:24 Ubu ni ubutumwa Uhoraho yampaye ngo mbubwire Shemaya w'i Nehelamu.
Jeremiah29:25 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: “Wanditse urwandiko mu izina ryawe
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Uhoraho yakugize umutambyi mu cyimbo cya Yehoyada ngo ube umuyobozi w'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah29:27 None se kuki udahana Yeremiya wa Anatoti wigize umuhanuzi?
Jeremiah29:28 Dore aherutse kutwandikira hano muri Babiloniya ngo: Muzahamara igihe kirekire. None rero nimwiyubakire amazu mubamo
Jeremiah29:29 Nuko umutambyi Sefaniya asomera urwo rwandiko umuhanuzi Yeremiya.
Jeremiah29:30 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah29:31 “Tuma ku bantu bose bajyanywe ho iminyago uti: ‘Nimwumve ibyo Uhoraho avuga kuri Shemaya w'i Nehelamu
Jeremiah29:32 Ngiye kumuhana we n'abamukomokaho. Nta n'umwe mu bamukomokaho uzasigara muri mwe
Jeremiah30:1 Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah30:2 “Jyewe Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli ndavuze nti: ‘Andika mu gitabo amagambo yose nakubwiye.
Jeremiah30:3 Dore igihe kiregereje
Jeremiah30:4 Uhoraho yabwiye Abisiraheli n'Abayuda ati:
Jeremiah30:5 “Humvikanye umuborogo uteye ubwoba
Jeremiah30:6 Nimubaririze kandi murebe
Jeremiah30:7 Ndabona buri wese yasuherewe. Mbega ishyano! Ni umunsi uteye ubwoba
Jeremiah30:8 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Uwo munsi nugera nzahambura umuzigo bahetse nywuvane ku bitugu byabo
Jeremiah30:9 ahubwo bazayoboka Uhoraho Imana yabo n'umwami nzabaha ukomoka kuri Dawidi.”
Jeremiah30:10 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Rubyaro rw'umugaragu wanjye Yakobo
Jeremiah30:11 Koko ndi kumwe namwe kugira ngo mbakize
Jeremiah30:12 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ibyago byanyu ntibishira
Jeremiah30:13 Nta muntu n'umwe ubitaho
Jeremiah30:14 Incuti zanyu zose zarabibagiwe
Jeremiah30:15 Kuki mutakishwa n'ibyaha byanyu? Ububabare bwanyu ntibukira
Jeremiah30:16 Abagambiriye kubatsemba na bo bazatsembwa
Jeremiah30:17 Nzatuma mugarura ubuyanja
Jeremiah30:18 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzagarura abakomoka kuri Yakobo mu gihugu cyabo
Jeremiah30:19 Aho ni ho bazaririmbira indirimbo zo gushima Imana
Jeremiah30:20 Ababakomokaho bazasubizwa uburenganzira bahoranye
Jeremiah30:21 Umuyobozi wabo azava muri bo
Jeremiah30:22 Muzaba abantu banjye
Jeremiah30:23 Dore haje inkubi y'umuyaga
Jeremiah30:24 Uburakari bukaze bw'Uhoraho ntibuteze gushira
Jeremiah31:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe nikigera nzaba Imana y'imiryango yose y'Abisiraheli
Jeremiah31:2 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Abisiraheli bacitse ku icumu nabagiriye impuhwe
Jeremiah31:3 Mu gihe cyashize Uhoraho yaratwigaragarije avuga ati: “Nabakunze urukundo rudashira
Jeremiah31:4 Isiraheli we
Jeremiah31:5 Uzongera utere imizabibu ku misozi y'i Samariya
Jeremiah31:6 Koko rero igihe kirageze
Jeremiah31:7 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Rubyaro rwa Yakobo
Jeremiah31:8 Ngiye kubavana mu gihugu cy'amajyaruguru
Jeremiah31:9 Bazagaruka barira bantakambira
Jeremiah31:10 Mwa mahanga mwe
Jeremiah31:11 Koko Uhoraho yacunguye urubyaro rwa Yakobo
Jeremiah31:12 Bazaza baririmbana ibyishimo ku musozi Siyoni
Jeremiah31:13 Abakobwa b'inkumi bazanezerwa babyine
Jeremiah31:14 Abatambyi nzabahaza ibinure
Jeremiah31:15 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Induru yumvikaniye i Rama
Jeremiah31:16 Nyamara Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Rekera aho kurira wihanagure amarira
Jeremiah31:17 Hari ibyiringiro ku mibereho yawe y'igihe kizaza
Jeremiah31:18 Numvise amaganya y'urubyaro rwa Efurayimu bagira bati: ‘Waraduhannye turabyemera
Jeremiah31:19 Twari twarakwimūye none turihannye
Jeremiah31:20 Urubyaro rwa Efurayimu ni abana nkunda
Jeremiah31:21 Nimwishyirireho ibimenyetso ku nzira
Jeremiah31:22 Muzashidikanya kugeza ryari
Jeremiah31:23 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: “Nimara kubagarura mu gihugu cyabo
Jeremiah31:24 “Abantu bo mu Bayuda no mu mijyi yaho yose
Jeremiah31:25 Nzahembura abishwe n'inyota
Jeremiah31:26 Nyuma y'ibyo narakangutse menya ko nasinziriye neza.
Jeremiah31:27 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kizagera
Jeremiah31:28 Nk'uko nitaye ku kurandurwa
Jeremiah31:29 Icyo gihe abantu ntibazongera kuvuga bati: ‘Ababyeyi bariye imizabibu isharira
Jeremiah31:30 Ahubwo buri wese azapfa azize icyaha cye
Jeremiah31:31 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Dore igihe kigiye kugera ngirane Isezerano rishya n'Abisiraheli n'Abayuda.
Jeremiah31:32 Ntabwo rizaba rimeze nk'irya kera nagiranye na ba sekuruza igihe nabafataga akaboko nkabavana mu Misiri
Jeremiah31:33 Noneho ngiri Isezerano nzagirana n'Abisiraheli nyuma y'icyo gihe: nzabacengezamo amategeko yanjye nyandike mu mitima yabo
Jeremiah31:34 Ntawe uzongera kwigisha mugenzi we cyangwa umuvandimwe we ati: ‘Menya Uhoraho’
Jeremiah31:35 Uhoraho ategeka izuba ngo ribe urumuri rw'amanywa
Jeremiah31:36 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Niba aya mateka aramutse atabayeho
Jeremiah31:37 Niba ijuru rishobora gupimwa
Jeremiah31:38 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kizagera
Jeremiah31:39 Umugozi wo gupimisha uzongera kuramburwa kugera ku musozi wa Garebu
Jeremiah31:40 Akabande kose gahambwamo abapfu kakajugunywamo n'imyanda
Jeremiah32:1 Ijambo ry'Uhoraho ryageze kuri Yeremiya mu mwaka wa cumi Sedekiya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
Jeremiah32:2 Icyo gihe ingabo z'umwami wa Babiloniya zari zigose Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah32:3 Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda yari yarafunze Yeremiya amuhora ibyo yahanuye ngo Uhoraho yavuze ati: “Uyu mujyi ngiye kuwugabiza umwami wa Babiloniya awufate.
Jeremiah32:4 Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda ntazava mu nzara z'Abanyababiloniya
Jeremiah32:5 Uwo mwami azajyana Sedekiya i Babiloni
Jeremiah32:6 Yeremiya aravuga ati: “Uhoraho yambwiye ngo:
Jeremiah32:7 Hanamēli mwene data wacu Shalumu agiye kugusanga akubwire ati: ‘Gura umurima wanjye uri Anatoti kuko ari wowe muvandimwe wa bugufi ufite uburenganzira bwo kuwugura.’ ”
Jeremiah32:8 Nuko nk'uko Uhoraho yabivuze
Jeremiah32:9 Bityo ngura umurima wa Hanamēli mwene data wacu
Jeremiah32:10 Nandika icyemezo cy'ubuguzi ngiteraho kashe imbere y'abagabo
Jeremiah32:11 Hanyuma njyana cya cyemezo cyari giteyeho kashe
Jeremiah32:12 Ibyo byemezo byombi mbiha Baruki mwene Neriya mwene Mahaseya. Mbimuhera imbere ya mwene data wacu Hanamēli n'abagabo bari bashyize umukono kuri icyo cyemezo
Jeremiah32:13 Mbwirira Baruki imbere yabo nti
Jeremiah32:14 “Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: ‘Jyana ibi byemezo byombi by'ubuguzi
Jeremiah32:15 Koko Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: “Amazu n'imirima hamwe n'imizabibu
Jeremiah32:16 Namaze guha Baruki mwene Neriya icyemezo cy'ubuguzi ndasenga nti:
Jeremiah32:17 “Nyagasani Uhoraho
Jeremiah32:18 Wagaragarije abantu benshi ko ubakunda
Jeremiah32:19 Imigambi yawe irakomeye n'ibyo ukora biratangaje. Wita ku migenzereze yose y'abantu maze ukabahemba ukurikije imyifatire yabo n'ibikorwa byabo.
Jeremiah32:20 “Kera wakoreye ibimenyetso n'ibitangaza mu gihugu cya Misiri
Jeremiah32:21 Wakuye ubwoko bwawe bw'Abisiraheli mu Misiri ubikoresheje ibimenyetso n'ibitangaza
Jeremiah32:22 Wabahaye iki gihugu wari wararahiye ko uzaha ba sekuruza
Jeremiah32:23 Baraje baracyigarurira
Jeremiah32:24 “Dore Abanyababiloniya bazengurukije umurwa ibirundo by'ibitaka kugira ngo bawutere. None kubera inkota n'inzara n'icyorezo
Jeremiah32:25 Nyamara Nyagasani Uhoraho ni wowe wambwiye uti: ‘Shaka ifeza wigurire umurima kandi ubitorere abagabo.’ None dore umurwa ugiye kwigarurirwa n'Abanyababiloniya.”
Jeremiah32:26 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah32:27 “Ndi Uhoraho Imana y'abantu bose
Jeremiah32:28 Noneho rero Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Uyu mujyi ngiye kuwugabiza Abanyababiloniya na Nebukadinezari umwami wabo
Jeremiah32:29 Abanyababiloniya bagose uyu mujyi bazawinjiramo bawutwike. Bazatwika n'amazu abantu batambiragamo ibitambo bya Bāli hejuru yayo
Jeremiah32:30 “Kuva mu buto bwabo Abisiraheli n'Abayuda bakoze ibibi gusa
Jeremiah32:31 Kuva uyu mujyi wubakwa kugeza ubu
Jeremiah32:32 kubera ibibi byose bikorwa n'Abisiraheli n'Abayuda
Jeremiah32:33 Banteye umugongo nubwo ntahwemye kubigisha
Jeremiah32:34 Ahubwo Ingoro yanyeguriwe bayishyizemo ibigirwamana byabo biteye ishozi
Jeremiah32:35 Bubatse ahasengerwa Bāli mu kabande ka Hinomu
Jeremiah32:36 None rero Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: “Yeremiya we
Jeremiah32:37 Ngiye kubakoranyiriza hamwe mbavane mu bihugu byose nabatatanyirijemo
Jeremiah32:38 Bazaba abantu banjye
Jeremiah32:39 Nzabaha guhuza imigambi n'ibitekerezo bitume bahora banyubaha
Jeremiah32:40 Nzagirana na bo Isezerano rihoraho
Jeremiah32:41 Nzashimishwa no kubagirira neza mbahe no gukomera muri iki gihugu
Jeremiah32:42 “Nk'uko nateje aba bantu ibi byago byose bikomeye
Jeremiah32:43 Muri iki gihugu muvuga ko ari ikidaturwa
Jeremiah32:44 Imirima izagurwa ifeza
Jeremiah33:1 Igihe Yeremiya yari akiri mu rugo rwa gereza
Jeremiah33:2 Uhoraho waremye isi akayitunganya kandi akayishyira mu mwanya wayo aravuga ati:
Jeremiah33:3 “Ntabaza nzagutabara nkwereke ibintu bitangaje kandi bihishwe
Jeremiah33:4 Koko rero ibi ni byo Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli avuga ku byerekeye amazu yo muri uyu mujyi n'ingoro z'abami b'u Buyuda byashenywe
Jeremiah33:5 Bashatse kurwanya Abanyababiloniya
Jeremiah33:6 “Nubwo bimeze bityo nzita kuri uyu mujyi n'abawutuye
Jeremiah33:7 Nzagarura Abayuda n'Abisiraheli bajyanywe ho iminyago
Jeremiah33:8 Nzabahanaguraho ibyaha byose bankoreye kandi nzabababarira ibyaha byabo n'ubugome bwabo.
Jeremiah33:9 Yeruzalemu izatuma nezerwa
Jeremiah33:10 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Muravuga muti: ‘Aha hantu hameze nk'ikidaturwa
Jeremiah33:11 amajwi y'ibyishimo n'umunezero
Jeremiah33:12 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Muri iki gihugu kimeze nk'ikidaturwa
Jeremiah33:13 Mu mijyi yubatswe mu misozi miremire no mu misozi migufi y'iburengerazuba
Jeremiah33:14 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kizagera nsohoze Isezerano nagiriye Abisiraheli n'Abayuda.
Jeremiah33:15 Icyo gihe nzatoranya umwami w'intungane mu rubyaro rwa Dawidi
Jeremiah33:16 Icyo gihe u Buyuda buzarokoka na Yeruzalemu ibe mu mutekano. Yeruzalemu izahimbwa ngo ‘Uhoraho ni we Murengezi wacu.’ ”
Jeremiah33:17 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ntihazigera habura uwo mu rubyaro rwa Dawidi uzaba umwami w'Abisiraheli.
Jeremiah33:18 Ntihazabura kandi abatambyi bo muryango wa Levi
Jeremiah33:19 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah33:20 “Niba mudashobora kwica Isezerano nashyizeho ryerekeye ijoro n'amanywa ngo bitabaho nk'uko nabigennye
Jeremiah33:21 ni na ko mudashobora kwica Isezerano nagiranye n'umugaragu wanjye Dawidi
Jeremiah33:22 Nk'uko inyenyeri n'umusenyi wo ku nyanja bidashobora kubarurwa
Jeremiah33:23 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah33:24 “Mbese wumvise ibyo aba bantu bavuga? Baravuga ngo natereranye Abisiraheli n'Abayuda
Jeremiah33:25 Jyewe Uhoraho nagiranye Isezerano n'amanywa n'ijoro
Jeremiah33:26 Nk'uko nakoze ibyo
Jeremiah34:1 Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya n'ingabo ze zose
Jeremiah34:2 “Genda ubwire Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda uti: ‘Jyewe Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli
Jeremiah34:3 Nawe Sedekiya ntuzamuva mu nzara
Jeremiah34:4 None rero wowe Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda
Jeremiah34:5 ahubwo uzisazira amahoro
Jeremiah34:6 Nuko Yeremiya ageza ubwo butumwa kuri Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah34:7 ubwo ingabo z'umwami wa Babiloniya zarwanyaga Yeruzalemu n'imijyi y'u Buyuda ari yo Lakishi na Azeka. Ni yo mijyi ikomeye yonyine yari isigaye mu Buyuda.
Jeremiah34:8 Umwami Sedekiya yagiranye n'abantu b'i Yeruzalemu amasezerano yo guha inkoreragahato ubwigenge. Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah34:9 “Buri wese agomba guha ubwigenge Umuheburayi w'inkoreragahato y'umugore cyangwa umugabo uri iwe. Ntihakagire uhindura inkoreragahato umuvandimwe we w'Umuyuda.”
Jeremiah34:10 Nuko abayobozi bose na rubanda bari bagiranye ayo masezerano
Jeremiah34:11 Nyamara hanyuma bisubiraho barazigarura bongera kuzikoresha imirimo y'agahato.
Jeremiah34:12 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah34:13 “Uku ni ko jyewe Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli mvuze: Nagiranye Isezerano na ba sokuruza
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Buri mwaka wa karindwi
Jeremiah34:15 Icyakora vuba aha mwarihannye mukora ibinogeye
Jeremiah34:16 Nyamara hanyuma mwisubiyeho murantukisha
Jeremiah34:17 None rero Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ntimwanyumviye ngo muhe abavandimwe banyu ukwishyira bakizana. Bityo mwebwe ngiye kubaha ukwishyira mukizana kubakwiye
Jeremiah34:18 “Abantu bishe Isezerano ryanjye
Jeremiah34:19 Abayobozi b'Abayuda na Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah34:20 nzabagabiza abanzi babo bashaka kubica. Imirambo yabo izaba ibyokurya by'ibisiga n'inyamaswa.
Jeremiah34:21 Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda n'ibyegera bye nzabagabiza abanzi babo bashaka kubica
Jeremiah34:22 Dore ngiye kuzitegeka zigaruke kuri uyu mujyi
Jeremiah35:1 Yoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w'u Buyuda akiri ku ngoma
Jeremiah35:2 “Jya ku Barekabu
Jeremiah35:3 Ndagenda nzana Yāzaniya mwene Yeremiya mwene Habasiniya
Jeremiah35:4 Mbageza ku Ngoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah35:5 Nuko nzana ibibindi byuzuye divayi
Jeremiah35:6 Nyamara baransubiza bati: “Ntabwo tunywa inzoga
Jeremiah35:7 Ntimuzubake amazu
Jeremiah35:8 Nuko rero twumviye ibyo sogokuruza Yonadabu mwene Rekabu yadutegetse byose. Ntitunywa inzoga twebwe n'abagore bacu n'abahungu bacu n'abakobwa bacu.
Jeremiah35:9 Ntitwubaka amazu
Jeremiah35:10 Twibera mu mahema
Jeremiah35:11 Nyamara igihe Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya yateraga iki gihugu twaravuze tuti: ‘Reka twigire i Yeruzalemu duhunge ingabo z'Abanyababiloniya n'iz'Abanyasiriya.’ Ni yo mpamvu dutuye i Yeruzalemu.”
Jeremiah35:12 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati: “Genda ubwire abantu bo mu Buyuda n'ab'i Yeruzalemu ko jyewe Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli mvuze nti: ‘Mbese mwebwe ntimushobora kumva inyigisho mbaha ngo muzikurikize?
Jeremiah35:13 
Jeremiah35:14 Itegeko ryo kutanywa divayi Yonadabu mwene Rekabu yahaye abana be bararikurikije. Kugeza n'uyu munsi ntabwo banywa divayi kubera ko bumviye itegeko rya sekuruza. Nyamara jye sinahwemye kuvugana namwe
Jeremiah35:15 Sinahwemye kubatumaho abagaragu banjye b'abahanuzi
Jeremiah35:16 Bene Yonadabu mwene Rekabu bumviye icyo sekuruza yabategetse
Jeremiah35:17 Ni cyo gituma Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli avuga ati: ‘Dore ngiye guteza abantu bo mu Buyuda n'ab'i Yeruzalemu ibyago byose nagambiriye
Jeremiah35:18 Nuko Yeremiya abwira abakomoka kuri Rekabu ati: “Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: ‘Kubera ko mwumviye itegeko rya sokuruza Yonadabu mugakomeza amabwiriza ye
Jeremiah35:19 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ngo Yonadabu mwene Rekabu ntazabura umwe mu bamukomokaho uzanyoboka iteka ryose.’ ”
Jeremiah36:1 Mu mwaka wa kane Yoyakimu mwene Yosiya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
Jeremiah36:2 “Fata umuzingo w'igitabo
Jeremiah36:3 Ahari Abayuda nibumva ibyago ngambiriye kubateza bazihana
Jeremiah36:4 Nuko Yeremiya ahamagara Baruki mwene Neriya
Jeremiah36:5 Hanyuma Yeremiya aha Baruki amabwiriza agira ati: “Jyewe mfite impamvu imbuza kujya mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah36:6 none wowe uzajyeyo ku munsi wo kwigomwa kurya
Jeremiah36:7 Ahari bazatakambira Uhoraho maze bareke imigenzereze yabo mibi
Jeremiah36:8 Nuko Baruki mwene Neriya akora ibyo umuhanuzi Yeremiya yamutegetse byose
Jeremiah36:9 Mu kwezi kwa cyenda k'umwaka wa gatanu Yoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w'u Buyuda ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah36:10 Nuko igihe abantu bari bateze amatwi bari mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah36:11 Mikaya mwene Gemariya akaba n'umwuzukuru wa Shafani
Jeremiah36:12 ajya mu ngoro y'umwami mu cyumba cy'umwanditsi
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaya abatekerereza ibyo yumvise Baruki asomera abantu.
Jeremiah36:14 Nuko abayobozi batuma Yehuda mwene Netaniya mwene Shelemiya mwene Kushi ngo abwire Baruki ati: “Zana wa muzingo w'igitabo wasomeye abantu.” Baruki mwene Neriya afata wa muzingo w'igitabo arawubashyira.
Jeremiah36:15 Baramubwira bati: “Icara maze uwudusomere.” Nuko Baruki arawubasomera.
Jeremiah36:16 Bamaze kumva ayo magambo yose bararebana maze barumirwa
Jeremiah36:17 Hanyuma baramubaza bati: “Dusobanurire uko wanditse aya magambo yose. Mbese ni Yeremiya wayakubwiye?”
Jeremiah36:18 Baruki arabasubiza ati: “Yeremiya ni we wayambwiye nyandika muri uyu muzingo w'igitabo nkoresheje wino.”
Jeremiah36:19 Abo bayobozi babwira Baruki bati: “Wowe na Yeremiya nimugende mwihishe
Jeremiah36:20 Abayobozi bamaze gushyira umuzingo w'igitabo mu cyumba cy'umwanditsi Elishama
Jeremiah36:21 Nuko umwami yohereza Yehudi kuzana wa muzingo w'igitabo
Jeremiah36:22 Ubwo hari mu kwezi kwa cyenda mu gihe cy'imbeho
Jeremiah36:23 Iyo Yehudi yamaraga gusoma ibika bitatu cyangwa bine
Jeremiah36:24 Umwami n'ibyegera bye byose ntibigeze baterwa ubwoba n'ayo magambo
Jeremiah36:25 Nyamara Elinatani na Delaya na Gemariya binginze umwami ngo areke gutwika uwo muzingo w'igitabo
Jeremiah36:26 Ahubwo umwami ategeka Yerahimēli umwana we
Jeremiah36:27 Umwami Yoyakimu amaze gutwika umuzingo w'igitabo warimo amagambo yanditswe na Baruki abwirijwe na Yeremiya
Jeremiah36:28 “Fata undi muzingo w'igitabo wandikemo ya magambo yose yari muri wa wundi wa mbere
Jeremiah36:29 Uzamubwire uti: ‘Uhoraho aravuze ngo watwitse uyu muzingo w'igitabo unshinja ko nanditsemo ko umwami wa Babiloniya azatera iki gihugu akakirimbura
Jeremiah36:30 None rero dore ibyo Uhoraho avuze ku byerekeye Yoyakimu umwami w'u Buyuda: nta n'umwe wo mu rubyaro rwe uzicara ku ntebe ya Dawidi. Umurambo we uzajugunywa ku gasozi waname ku zuba
Jeremiah36:31 Nzamuhana we n'urubyaro rwe n'ibyegera bye mbahora ubugome bwabo. Byongeye kandi
Jeremiah36:32 Nuko Yeremiya afata undi muzingo w'igitabo awuha umwanditsi Baruki mwene Neriya. Baruki yandikamo amagambo yose Yeremiya yamubwiye kwandika
Jeremiah37:1 Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya yimitse Sedekiya mwene Yosiya aba umwami w'u Buyuda
Jeremiah37:2 Nyamara Sedekiya n'ibyegera bye na rubanda
Jeremiah37:3 Nuko Umwami Sedekiya yohereza Yehukari mwene Shelemiya n'umutambyi Zefaniya mwene Māseya ku muhanuzi Yeremiya
Jeremiah37:4 Icyo gihe Yeremiya yashoboraga kujya aho ashaka
Jeremiah37:5 Abanyababiloniya bari bagose Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah37:6 Nuko Uhoraho abwira umuhanuzi Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah37:7 “Ibi ni byo jyewe Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli nshaka ko umenyesha umwami w'u Buyuda wakuntumyeho. Umubwire uti: ‘Dore ingabo z'umwami wa Misiri zari zaje kugutabara
Jeremiah37:8 Bityo Abanyababiloniya bazagaruka batere uyu mujyi
Jeremiah37:9 None rero ntimuzishuke ngo mwibwire ko Abanyababiloniya bagiye ubutazagaruka
Jeremiah37:10 Nubwo mwatsinda ingabo zose z'Abanyababiloniya zibarwanya
Jeremiah37:11 Hanyuma ingabo z'Abanyababiloniya ziva muri Yeruzalemu kugira ngo zihunge Abanyamisiri.
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremiya ava i Yeruzalemu ajya mu ntara y'Ababenyamini
Jeremiah37:13 Nyamara ageze ku Irembo rya Benyamini
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya aramusubiza ati: “Oya! Simpungiye mu Banyababiloniya.” Nyamara Iriya ntiyamwumva ahubwo aramufata amushyira abayobozi.
Jeremiah37:15 Abayobozi barakarira Yeremiya cyane
Jeremiah37:16 Ubwo Yeremiya afungirwa mu kasho kari mu nzu yo hasi
Jeremiah37:17 Nuko Umwami Sedekiya aramutumiza
Jeremiah37:18 Hanyuma Yeremiya abaza Umwami Sedekiya ati: “Ni cyaha ki nagukoreye cyangwa nakoreye ibyegera byawe cyangwa rubanda
Jeremiah37:19 Bari hehe ba bahanuzi baguhanuriye ko umwami wa Babiloniya atazagutera
Jeremiah37:20 None rero ndakwinginze nyagasani
Jeremiah37:21 Sedekiya ategeka ko Yeremiya arindirwa mu rugo rwa gereza
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatiya mwene Matani na Gedaliya mwene Pashehuri
Jeremiah38:2 “Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Uzasigara muri uyu mujyi azicishwa inkota cyangwa inzara cyangwa icyorezo. Nyamara uzawusohokamo akifatanya n'Abanyababiloniya azabaho
Jeremiah38:3 “Uhoraho arongera ati: ‘Uyu mujyi uzagabizwa ingabo z'umwami wa Babiloniya ziwigarurire.’ ”
Jeremiah38:4 Nuko abo bayobozi babwira umwami bati: “Uyu muntu akwiriye gupfa
Jeremiah38:5 Sedekiya arabasubiza ati: “Dore uwo muntu ari mu maboko yanyu
Jeremiah38:6 Nuko abo bayobozi bafata Yeremiya bamushyira mu iriba ryari irya Malikiya umwana w'umwami
Jeremiah38:7 Ebedimeleki umwe mu Banyakushi b'inkone wakoraga ibwami
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedimeleki arahamusanga aramubwira ati:
Jeremiah38:9 “Nyagasani
Jeremiah38:10 Nuko umwami ategeka Ebedimeleki w'Umunyakushi ati: “Fata abantu mirongo itatu
Jeremiah38:11 Ebedimeleki ajyana n'abo bantu bajya ibwami mu nzu ibikwamo ibintu
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedimeleki w'Umunyakushi abwira Yeremiya ati: “Fata iyo myenda ishaje n'ibyo biremo
Jeremiah38:13 Hanyuma bamukuruza imigozi bamuvana muri iryo riba
Jeremiah38:14 Umwami Sedekiya atumiza umuhanuzi Yeremiya
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremiya asubiza Sedekiya ati: “Mbese ninkikubwira ntunyica? Ninkugira inama kandi ntuyikurikiza.”
Jeremiah38:16 Umwami Sedekiya arahira Yeremiya rwihishwa ati: “Nkurahiye Uhoraho waduhaye ubuzima
Jeremiah38:17 Nuko Yeremiya abwira Sedekiya ati: “Dore ibyo Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli avuze: nuyoboka ibyegera by'umwami wa Babiloniya nta cyo uzaba
Jeremiah38:18 Nyamara niwanga kuyoboka ibyegera by'umwami wa Babiloniya
Jeremiah38:19 Sedekiya abwira Yeremiya ati: “Ndatinya Abayuda bayobotse Abanyababiloniya
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya aramusubiza ati: “Humura ntibazabakugabiza. Ndakwinginze umvira ijwi ry'Uhoraho ukore icyo nkubwiye
Jeremiah38:21 Nyamara nutabayoboka
Jeremiah38:22 abagore bose basigaye mu ngoro y'umwami w'u Buyuda bazashyirwa ibyegera by'umwami wa Babiloniya. Abo bagore bazakubwira bati: ‘Incuti zawe zarakuyobeje zirakwigarika. Ibirenge byawe byarigise mu cyondo
Jeremiah38:23 Yeremiya arongera aramubwira ati: “Abagore bawe bose n'abahungu bawe bazabashyira Abanyababiloniya
Jeremiah38:24 Nuko Sedekiya abwira Yeremiya ati: “Uramenye ntihagire umuntu umenya ibyo twaganiriye
Jeremiah38:25 Nyamara ibyegera byanjye nibyumva ko twavuganye
Jeremiah38:26 Uzabasubize uti: ‘Natakambiraga umwami ngo atansubiza muri gereza yo mu nzu ya Yonatani
Jeremiah38:27 Nuko ibyegera byose by'umwami bijya kubaza Yeremiya
Jeremiah38:28 Hanyuma Yeremiya yigumira mu rugo rwa gereza kugeza igihe Yeruzalemu ifatiwe. Yeruzalemu ifatwa abyirebera.
Jeremiah39:1 Mu kwezi kwa cumi k'umwaka wa cyenda Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah39:2 Ku itariki ya cyenda y'ukwezi kwa kane k'umwaka wa cumi n'umwe Sedekiya ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah39:3 Nuko abari abagaba b'ingabo z'umwami wa Babiloniya bose bawinjiramo
Jeremiah39:4 Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda n'ingabo ze zose bababonye barahunga
Jeremiah39:5 Icyakora ingabo z'Abanyababiloniya zirabakurikira
Jeremiah39:6 Aho i Ribula umwami wa Babiloniya ahicira abahungu ba Sedekiya abyirebera
Jeremiah39:7 Nuko anogora Sedekiya amaso
Jeremiah39:8 Icyo gihe ni bwo Abanyababiloniya batwitse ingoro y'umwami n'amazu ya rubanda
Jeremiah39:9 Hanyuma Nebuzaradani umutware w'abarinzi
Jeremiah39:10 Nyamara Nebuzaradani umutware w'abarinzi
Jeremiah39:11 Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya aha umutware w'abarinzi amabwiriza yerekeye Yeremiya ati:
Jeremiah39:12 “Jyana Yeremiya umwiteho
Jeremiah39:13 Nuko Nebuzaradani umutware w'abarinzi yumvikana na Nebushazibani umutware w'inkone
Jeremiah39:14 batuma abantu ngo bakure Yeremiya mu rugo rwa gereza. Hanyuma bamushinga Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu mwene Shafani ngo amujyane iwe. Nuko Yeremiya yigumira muri rubanda.
Jeremiah39:15 Igihe Yeremiya yari agifungiye mu rugo rwa gereza
Jeremiah39:16 “Genda ubwire Ebedimeleki w'Umunyakushi uti: ‘Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ngo: Dore ngiye gusohoza ibyo navuze kuri uyu mujyi
Jeremiah39:17 Nyamara icyo gihe nzagukiza
Jeremiah39:18 Nzagukiza ntuzicishwa inkota
Jeremiah40:1 Uhoraho yavuganye na Yeremiya
Jeremiah40:2 Umutware w'abarinzi b'umwami yihererana Yeremiya aramubwira ati: “Uhoraho Imana yawe ni we wiyemeje guteza ibi byago aha hantu
Jeremiah40:3 none rero yabishohoje nk'uko yabivuze. Ibyo byose byatewe n'uko mwamucumuyeho ntimwamwumvira.
Jeremiah40:4 Dore ngiye kuguhamburaho iyi minyururu ikuri ku maboko nkureke wigendere. Niba bikunogeye uze tujyane i Babiloni nzakurinda. Niba kandi kujya i Babiloni bitakunogeye wirorerere. Dore igihugu cyose kiri imbere yawe ujye aho ushaka.”
Jeremiah40:5 Mbere y'uko Yeremiya agira aho ajya
Jeremiah40:6 Yeremiya ajya i Misipa kwa Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu yigumanira na we
Jeremiah40:7 Mu gihugu hari ingabo zimwe z'Abayuda zari zacitse
Jeremiah40:8 Nuko abo batware ari bo Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya na Yohanani na Yonatani bene Kareya
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu mwene Shafani
Jeremiah40:10 Jye ubwanjye nzaguma i Misipa mbavuganire ku Banyababiloniya bazadusanga ino
Jeremiah40:11 Nuko Abayuda bose bari mu gihugu cya Mowabu no mu cy'Abamoni no mu cy'Abedomu no mu bindi bihugu
Jeremiah40:12 bose bagaruka mu Buyuda basanga Gedaliya i Misipa bavuye mu bihugu byose bari baratataniyemo
Jeremiah40:13 Nuko Yohanani mwene Kareya n'abatware b'ingabo bose bavuye mu misozi
Jeremiah40:14 Baramubwira bati: “Mbese uzi ko Bālisi umwami w'Abamoni yohereje Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya ngo akwice?” Nyamara Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu ntiyizera ibyo bamubwiye.
Jeremiah40:15 Nuko Yohanani mwene Kareya abwira Gedaliya biherereye i Misipa ati: “Reka njye kwica Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya
Jeremiah40:16 Nuko Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu asubiza Yohanani mwene Kareya ati: “Uramenye ntumwice! Ibyo uvuga kuri Ishimayeli si ukuri.”
Jeremiah41:1 Nyamara mu kwezi kwa karindwi k'uwo mwaka
Jeremiah41:2 Muri uwo mwanya Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya n'abo bagabo icumi barahaguruka
Jeremiah41:3 Ishimayeli yishe kandi Abayuda bose bari kumwe na Gedaliya
Jeremiah41:4 Bukeye bwaho
Jeremiah41:5 haza abagabo mirongo inani baturutse i Shekemu n'i Shilo n'i Samariya. Baje biyogoshe ubwanwa
Jeremiah41:6 Nuko Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya ava i Misipa ajya kuhabasanganirira
Jeremiah41:7 Abo bantu bakimara kugera mu mujyi hagati
Jeremiah41:8 Nyamara icumi muri bo babwira Ishimayeli bati: “Turakwinginze ntutwice. Dore dufite ingano za nkungu n'iza bushoki
Jeremiah41:9 Iriba Ishimayeli yajugunyemo umurambo wa Gedaliya n'indi mirambo y'abantu yishe
Jeremiah41:10 Hanyuma Ishimayeli ajyana ho iminyago abakobwa b'umwami
Jeremiah41:11 Yohanani mwene Kareya n'abagaba b'ingabo bose bari kumwe na we
Jeremiah41:12 bafata abagabo bari kumwe na bo bose bajya kurwanya Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya
Jeremiah41:13 Nuko abantu bose Ishimayeli yajyanye ho iminyago
Jeremiah41:14 Abantu bose Ishimayeli yajyanye ho iminyago i Misipa
Jeremiah41:15 Nyamara Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya hamwe n'abantu be umunani
Jeremiah41:16 Hanyuma Yohanani mwene Kareya n'abagaba b'ingabo bose bari kumwe na we
Jeremiah41:17 Barakomeza bagera i Geruti-Kimuhamu hafi ya Betelehemu bajya mu Misiri.
Jeremiah41:18 Bari bahunze Abanyababiloniya
Jeremiah42:1 Abagaba b'ingabo bose na Yohanani mwene Kareya
Jeremiah42:2 umuhanuzi Yeremiya baramubwira bati: “Turakwinginze
Jeremiah42:3 Dusabire kugira ngo Uhoraho Imana yawe atwereke aho tugomba kunyura
Jeremiah42:4 Umuhanuzi Yeremiya arabasubiza ati: “Nabyumvise. Ndambaza Uhoraho Imana yanyu nk'uko mubisabye
Jeremiah42:5 Hanyuma babwira Yeremiya bati: “Uhoraho Imana yawe natubere umuhamya w'ukuri wizerwa
Jeremiah42:6 Byatunezeza cyangwa bitatunezeza
Jeremiah42:7 Nuko hashize iminsi icumi Uhoraho avugana na Yeremiya.
Jeremiah42:8 Hanyuma Yeremiya ahamagara Yohanani mwene Kareya n'abagaba b'ingabo bose bari kumwe na we
Jeremiah42:9 arababwira ati: “Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli mwantumyeho ngo mbasabire aravuze ati:
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Nimuguma muri iki gihugu nzabakomeza
Jeremiah42:11 Nimureke gutinya umwami wa Babiloniya
Jeremiah42:12 Nzabagirira imbabazi
Jeremiah42:13 “Nyamara nimutumvira Uhoraho Imana yanyu mukavuga muti: ‘Ntabwo tuzaguma muri iki gihugu
Jeremiah42:14 ahubwo tuzajya kuba mu Misiri
Jeremiah42:15 None rero nimwumve Ijambo ry'Uhoraho mwe abacitse ku icumu bo mu Buyuda. Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: ‘Niba mwiyemeje kujya gutura mu Misiri
Jeremiah42:16 intambara mutinya izabasangayo
Jeremiah42:17 Abantu bose bazahungira mu Misiri bazicishwa inkota
Jeremiah42:18 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: “Nk'uko uburakari n'umujinya byanjye byasutswe ku bantu b'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah42:19 Yeremiya yungamo ati: “Yemwe Bayuda mwacitse ku icumu
Jeremiah42:20 mwakosheje. Mwantumye ku Uhoraho Imana yanyu murambwira muti: ‘Dusabire ku Uhoraho Imana yacu tumenye icyo avuga tuzagikore.’
Jeremiah42:21 Ubu ndababwira ko mutakurikije ibyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yantumye kubamenyesha.
Jeremiah42:22 None rero mumenye ko muzicwa n'inkota n'inzara n'icyorezo
Jeremiah43:1 Yeremiya amaze kubwira rubanda rwose ayo magambo yose Uhoraho Imana yabo yamubatumyeho
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya mwene Hushaya na Yohanani mwene Kareya
Jeremiah43:3 Ahubwo Baruki mwene Neriya ni we wakuduteje kugira ngo mutugabize Abanyababiloniya batwice
Jeremiah43:4 Nuko rero Yohanani mwene Kareya n'abagaba b'ingabo bose n'abantu bose
Jeremiah43:5 Nyamara Yohanani mwene Kareya n'abagaba b'ingabo bose bashyira agahato ku Bayuda bose bacitse ku icumu
Jeremiah43:6 Bajyanye abagabo n'abagore n'abana n'abakobwa b'umwami
Jeremiah43:7 Banze kumvira Uhoraho bajya mu Misiri
Jeremiah43:8 Yeremiya ari i Tafune Uhoraho aramubwira ati:
Jeremiah43:9 “Fata amabuye manini
Jeremiah43:10 Hanyuma ubabwire uti: ‘Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ngo: Dore nzohereza umugaragu wanjye Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya
Jeremiah43:11 Nebukadinezari azatera igihugu cya Misiri
Jeremiah43:12 Nzatwika ingoro z'ibigirwamana byo mu Misiri
Jeremiah43:13 Azamenagura inkingi zo mu ngoro Abanyamisiri basengeramo izuba
Jeremiah44:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa Uhoraho yahaye Yeremiya ku byerekeye Abayuda bose batuye mu Misiri
Jeremiah44:2 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuze ati: “Mwabonye ibyago byose nateje Yeruzalemu n'imijyi yose yo mu Buyuda
Jeremiah44:3 bitewe n'ibibi abaturage baho bakoze. Barandakaje bayoboka izindi mana batazi bo na ba sekuruza
Jeremiah44:4 Sinahwemye kubatumaho abagaragu banjye bose b'abahanuzi mvuga nti: ‘Ntimugakore ibizira nanga.’
Jeremiah44:5 Nyamara ntibumvise cyangwa ngo babyiteho
Jeremiah44:6 Ni cyo cyatumye nsuka umujinya n'uburakari byanjye bigurumana nk'umuriro
Jeremiah44:7 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: “Ni kuki mwikururira ibyago bikomeye? Murakururira abagabo n'abagore n'abana n'impinja gutsembwa
Jeremiah44:8 Kuki mundakaza muyoboka ibigirwamana mwikoreye ubwanyu
Jeremiah44:9 Mbese mwibagiwe ubugome bwa ba sokuruza n'ubw'abami b'u Buyuda n'abagore babo
Jeremiah44:10 Kugeza ubu ntibigeze bicisha bugufi cyangwa ngo banyubahe
Jeremiah44:11 None rero Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: “Ngiye kubateza ibyago ndimbure Abuyuda bose.
Jeremiah44:12 Ngiye kwibasira Abayuda bacitse ku icumu bakajya gutura mu gihugu cya Misiri
Jeremiah44:13 Abatuye mu Misiri nzabahanisha inkota n'inzara n'icyorezo
Jeremiah44:14 Nta n'umwe mu Bayuda bacitse ku icumu wagiye mu Misiri uzarokoka
Jeremiah44:15 Nuko abagabo bose bari bazi ko abagore babo boshereje imibavu izindi mana
Jeremiah44:16 “Ntituzumva ibyo watubwiye mu izina ry'Uhoraho.
Jeremiah44:17 Ahubwo tuzakora ibyo twavuze byose: tuzosereza imibavu umwamikazi w'ijuru
Jeremiah44:18 Nyamara aho twarekeye kosereza imibavu umwamikazi wo mu ijuru no kumutura amaturo asukwa
Jeremiah44:19 Abagore na bo baravuga bati: “Igihe twoserezaga imibavu umwamikazi w'ijuru
Jeremiah44:20 Nuko Yeremiya abwira abagabo n'abagore
Jeremiah44:21 “Mwosereje imibavu izindi mana mu mijyi y'u Buyuda no mu mayira y'i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah44:22 Uhoraho ntabasha kwihanganira ibikorwa byanyu bibi n'ibizira mwakoze. Ni cyo gituma igihugu cyanyu cyahindutse amatongo kikaba giteye ubwoba
Jeremiah44:23 Ibi byago bibugarije mwabitejwe n'uko mwosereje imibavu izindi mana mugacumura ku Uhoraho
Jeremiah44:24 Yeremiya abwira rubanda rwose
Jeremiah44:25 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: ‘Mwebwe n'abagore banyu mwaravuze ngo: uko byagenda kose tuzakomeza amasezerano twagiranye n'umwamikazi w'ijuru
Jeremiah44:26 None rero mwa Bayuda mwe mutuye mu Misiri
Jeremiah44:27 Ngiye kubahagurukira kugira ngo mbagirire nabi
Jeremiah44:28 Nyamara abantu bake bazacika ku icumu
Jeremiah44:29 Dore rero ikimenyetso kizabereka ko ngiye kubahanira aha hantu
Jeremiah44:30 ngiye kugabiza Hofura umwami wa Misiri abanzi be bashaka kumwica
Jeremiah45:1 Mu mwaka wa kane Yoyakimu mwene Yosiya ari ku ngoma mu Buyuda
Jeremiah45:2 “Dore ibyo Uhoraho Imana y'Abisiraheli akubwira:
Jeremiah45:3 waravuze uti: ‘Ngushije ishyano! Nari nsanganywe intimba none Uhoraho ageretseho ingorane. Ndananiwe kubera gutaka
Jeremiah45:4 Yeremiya yungamo ati: “Ngubu ubutumwa Uhoraho yambwiye kukugezaho. Aravuga ati: ‘Ngiye gusenya ibyo nubatse
Jeremiah45:5 Nyamara wowe ushaka ibintu bihambaye! Sigaho kubishaka. Dore ngiye guteza ibyago abantu bose
Jeremiah46:1 Ubutumwa bukurikira ni bwo Uhoraho yahaye Yeremiya
Jeremiah46:2 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagejejwe kuri Misiri n'ingabo z'umwami wayo Neko
Jeremiah46:3 Nimufate ingabo nto n'inini
Jeremiah46:4 Nimushyire intebe ku mafarasi muyurire! Nimwambare ingofero z'icyuma mwitegure
Jeremiah46:5 Mbese bigenze bite? Ibyo mbona ni ibiki? Bafite ubwoba basubiye inyuma
Jeremiah46:6 Abahanga mu kwiruka ntibashobora guhunga
Jeremiah46:7 Uwo ni nde umeze nk'uruzi rwa Nili rwarenze inkombe? Ni nde umeze nk'inzuzi nini zakutse?
Jeremiah46:8 Misiri imeze nka Nili yarenze inkombe
Jeremiah46:9 Amafarasi nahaguruke
Jeremiah46:10 Nyamara uwo munsi ni uwa Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyiringabo
Jeremiah46:11 Bantu bo mu Misiri
Jeremiah46:12 Amahanga azumva ko mwacishijwe bugufi
Jeremiah46:13 Ubutumwa Uhoraho yahaye umuhanuzi Yeremiya
Jeremiah46:14 Menyesha Misiri ubwo butumwa
Jeremiah46:15 Kuki abantu bawe b'intwari bahunze? Ntibashobora gushinga ibirindiro
Jeremiah46:16 Abantu benshi bagwiriranye
Jeremiah46:17 Umwami wa Misiri nimumuhimbe izina
Jeremiah46:18 Umwami aravuga ati: “Ndi muzima
Jeremiah46:19 Yemwe abatuye mu Misiri
Jeremiah46:20 Misiri ni nk'inyana y'ishashi nziza cyane
Jeremiah46:21 Abacancuro bayo ni nk'ibimasa bishishe
Jeremiah46:22 Misiri izavugiriza nk'inzoka ihunga
Jeremiah46:23 Bazatema ishyamba ryayo ry'inzitane
Jeremiah46:24 Abanyamisiri bazakorwa n'isoni
Jeremiah46:25 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: “Ngiye guhana ikigirwamana Amoni cy'i Tebesi
Jeremiah46:26 Nzabagabiza abashaka kubica
Jeremiah46:27 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Rubyaro rw'umugaragu wanjye Yakobo
Jeremiah46:28 Rubyaro rwa Yakobo mugaragu wanjye
Jeremiah47:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya
Jeremiah47:2 Ngibyo ibyo Uhoraho avuga ati: “Dore umuvumba w'amazi aturutse mu majyaruguru
Jeremiah47:3 Hazumvikana imirindi y'amafarasi yiruka
Jeremiah47:4 Koko uwo munsi uzaba uwo kurimbura Abafilisiti bose
Jeremiah47:5 Abantu b'i Gaza bazimoza umusatsi nk'abari mu cyunamo
Jeremiah47:6 Wa nkota y'Uhoraho we
Jeremiah47:7 Nyamara se yatuza ite yabitegetswe n'Uhoraho? Yatuza ite yayitegetse gutsemba Ashikeloni n'inkombe z'inyanja?
Jeremiah48:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa bw'Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli bwagenewe Abamowabu: abaturage b'i Nebo bagushije ishyano
Jeremiah48:2 Mowabu ntizongera gushimagizwa ukundi
Jeremiah48:3 Induru zirumvikana i Horonayimu
Jeremiah48:4 Mowabu irarimbutse
Jeremiah48:5 Abacitse ku icumu bararira bagana i Luhiti
Jeremiah48:6 Baravuga bati: “Nimuhunge mukize ubuzima bwanyu
Jeremiah48:7 Mowabu wiringiye imirimo yawe n'ubutunzi bwawe
Jeremiah48:8 Umurimbuzi azanyura muri buri mujyi
Jeremiah48:9 Nimucukurire Mowabu imva kuko igiye kurimbuka
Jeremiah48:10 Havumwe umuntu ukorana ubunebwe umurimo w'Uhoraho
Jeremiah48:11 Mowabu yaradamaraye kuva mu buto bwayo
Jeremiah48:12 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nyamara igihe kizagera
Jeremiah48:13 Abamowabu bazaterwa isoni n'imana yabo Kemoshi
Jeremiah48:14 Bantu b'i Mowabu
Jeremiah48:15 Mowabu izarimburanwa n'imijyi yayo
Jeremiah48:16 Mowabu igiye kurimbuka
Jeremiah48:17 Abaturanyi bayo mwese nimuyihumurize
Jeremiah48:18 Bantu b'i Diboni
Jeremiah48:19 Bantu ba Aroweri
Jeremiah48:20 Mowabu yakozwe n'isoni kuko yasenyutse
Jeremiah48:21 Urubanza rwaciriwe akarere k'imirambi
Jeremiah48:22 na Diboni na Nebo na Beti-Dibulatayimu
Jeremiah48:23 na Kiriyatayimu na Beti-Gamuli na Beti-Mewoni
Jeremiah48:24 na Keriyoti na Bosira n'indi imijyi yose yo mu gihugu cya Mowabu
Jeremiah48:25 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mowabu yacitse intege ntigifite imbaraga.”
Jeremiah48:26 Abamowabu basuzugura Uhoraho. Nimubareke basinde bigaragure mu birutsi byabo
Jeremiah48:27 Mwa Bamowabu mwe
Jeremiah48:28 Mwa Bamowabu mwe
Jeremiah48:29 Twumvise ubwirasi bwa Mowabu
Jeremiah48:30 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzi neza ubwirasi bwayo budafite umumaro
Jeremiah48:31 “Ni cyo gituma ndirira Mowabu
Jeremiah48:32 Ndaririra umuzabibu w'i Sibuma
Jeremiah48:33 Ibyishimo n'umunezero ntibikirangwa mu mirima y'i Mowabu
Jeremiah48:34 “Abantu b'i Heshiboni barataka
Jeremiah48:35 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzatsemba muri Mowabu abantu bose bajya ahasengerwa
Jeremiah48:36 Ni cyo gituma ndirira Mowabu n'abaturage ba Kiri-Hareseti
Jeremiah48:37 Abagabo bose bimoje imisatsi n'ubwanwa
Jeremiah48:38 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abari hejuru y'amazu yose y'i Mowabu no mu bibuga byaho baraboroga
Jeremiah48:39 Nimurire muvuga muti: “Mowabu yashegeshwe. Mbega ukuntu itewe isoni no kuba yaranteye umugongo! Mowabu izahinduka urw'amenyo n'ikizira mu baturanyi bayo bose.”
Jeremiah48:40 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Dore igihugu kije gutera Mowabu
Jeremiah48:41 Imijyi ya Mowabu izafatwa
Jeremiah48:42 Mowabu izarimburwa
Jeremiah48:43 Bantu b'i Mowabu
Jeremiah48:44 “Uzahunga ubwoba azagwa mu rwobo
Jeremiah48:45 Impunzi zinaniwe zihungiye i Heshiboni
Jeremiah48:46 Mowabu igushije ishyano! Abayoboka Kemoshi bararimbutse
Jeremiah48:47 Nyamara igihe kizagera Mowabu nzayisubize amahoro. Urwo ni rwo rubanza ruciriwe Mowabu.
Jeremiah49:1 Ubu butumwa bwagenewe Abamoni. Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mbese Isiraheli nta bana igira? Mbese ntifite abagenewe umurage? Kuki ikigirwamana Moleki cyigaruriye intara ya Gadi? Kuki Abamoni batuye mu mijyi yaho?
Jeremiah49:2 Igihe kizagera numvikanishe ijwi ry'intambara
Jeremiah49:3 Heshiboni
Jeremiah49:4 Kuki mwiratana ibibaya byanyu birumbuka? Mwa bagome mwe
Jeremiah49:5 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Ngiye kubashyiraho iterabwoba ry'abaturanyi banyu bose
Jeremiah49:6 Hanyuma Abamoni nzabasubiza amahoro.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.
Jeremiah49:7 Ubu ni ubutumwa bw'Uhoraho Nyiringabo bwagenewe Abedomu. Mbese i Temani ntihakirangwa abanyabwenge? Mbese abanyabwenge baho ntibagitanga inama? Ese ubwenge bwabo bwarayoyotse?
Jeremiah49:8 Bantu b'i Dedani
Jeremiah49:9 Mbese abajura nibaza kwiba imizabibu yanyu
Jeremiah49:10 Nyamara ni jye ubwanjye uzanyaga abakomoka kuri Ezawu ibintu byose
Jeremiah49:11 Nimusige impfubyi zanyu nzazitaho
Jeremiah49:12 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abo ntari narageneye igikombe cy'igihano bakinywereyeho. None se mwebwe mwibwira ko muzakirokoka? Reka da! Muzahanwa nta kabuza.
Jeremiah49:13 Ndahiye ko umurwa wanyu Bosira uzahinduka amatongo n'igiterashozi
Jeremiah49:14 Numvise Uhoraho ambwira ati: “Intumwa yoherejwe gutangariza amahanga iti: ‘Nimwishyire hamwe mutere Edomu
Jeremiah49:15 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Wowe Edomu nzaguhindura muto mu mahanga
Jeremiah49:16 Iterabwoba n'ubwirasi bwawe byaragushutse
Jeremiah49:17 “Edomu izaba amatongo ateye ubwoba
Jeremiah49:18 Uko Sodoma na Gomora n'imijyi ihakikije byarimbutse
Jeremiah49:19 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Uko intare iturumbuka mu bihuru byo kuri Yorodani
Jeremiah49:20 None rero nimwumve imigambi Uhoraho afitiye Edomu
Jeremiah49:21 Induru yo kurimbuka kwabo izakangaranya isi
Jeremiah49:22 Dore umwanzi aje ameze nka kagoma iguruka
Jeremiah49:23 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Damasi. Abatuye mu mijyi ya Hamati na Arupadi bakozwe n'isoni
Jeremiah49:24 Abantu b'i Damasi bacitse intege
Jeremiah49:25 Bishoboka bite ko umujyi w'icyamamare watereranwa? Wari umujyi wanezezaga!
Jeremiah49:26 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Abasore baho bazicirwa mu mayira
Jeremiah49:27 Nzaha inkongi inkuta zizengurutse Damasi
Jeremiah49:28 Ubu ni ubutumwa bwagenewe Abarabu b'i Kedari n'abami b'i Hasori
Jeremiah49:29 Amahema yabo n'amatungo yabo bizanyagwa
Jeremiah49:30 “Bantu b'i Hasori
Jeremiah49:31 Nimuhaguruke mutere igihugu kibwira ko kimerewe neza
Jeremiah49:32 Ingamiya zabo zizanyagwa
Jeremiah49:33 “Umujyi wa Hasori uzaba isenga rya za nyiramuhari
Jeremiah49:34 Mu ntangiriro y'ingoma ya Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda
Jeremiah49:35 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Ngiye kuvunagura umuheto w'Abanyelamu
Jeremiah49:36 Nzabateza imiyaga iturutse mu mpande enye z'isi
Jeremiah49:37 Nzabatera ubwoba imbere y'abanzi babo
Jeremiah49:38 Nzashinga intebe yanjye muri Elamu
Jeremiah49:39 Nyamara igihe kizagera Elamu nyisubize amahoro.”
Jeremiah50:1 Ubu ni ubutumwa Uhoraho yahaye umuhanuzi Yeremiya
Jeremiah50:2 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimumenyeshe amahanga ubwo butumwa
Jeremiah50:3 Igihugu giturutse mu majyaruguru giteye Babiloni
Jeremiah50:4 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Icyo gihe Abisiraheli n'Abayuda bazaza hamwe barira
Jeremiah50:5 Bazabaririza inzira igana i Siyoni bajyeyo. Bazaza biyunge n'Uhoraho
Jeremiah50:6 Abantu banjye ni nk'intama zazimiye
Jeremiah50:7 Abababonaga bose babamereraga nabi
Jeremiah50:8 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimuhunge i Babiloni
Jeremiah50:9 Nzahagurutsa ibihugu bikomeye byo mu majyaruguru
Jeremiah50:10 Babiloniya izasahurwa
Jeremiah50:11 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwa Banyababiloniya mwe
Jeremiah50:12 Nyamara igihugu cyanyu kizakozwa isoni bikomeye
Jeremiah50:13 Kubera uburakari bw'Uhoraho Babiloni ntizaturwa
Jeremiah50:14 Mwebwe mwese abarwanisha imiheto
Jeremiah50:15 Nimuyivugirize induru muyiturutse impande zose
Jeremiah50:16 Nimuyitsembemo ababibyi n'abasaruzi
Jeremiah50:17 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abisiraheli bameze nk'intama yazimiye
Jeremiah50:18 Nyamara Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: “Ngiye guhana umwami wa Babiloniya n'igihugu cye
Jeremiah50:19 Ngiye kugarura Abisiraheli mu gihugu cyabo
Jeremiah50:20 Icyo gihe bazashaka ubugome bwa Isiraheli babubure
Jeremiah50:21 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimugabe igitero mu gihugu cya Meratayimu
Jeremiah50:22 Urusaku rw'intambara ni rwose mu gihugu
Jeremiah50:23 Mbese bishoboka bite? Dore Babiloni yari nk'inyundo imenagura isi
Jeremiah50:24 Babiloni we
Jeremiah50:25 Uhoraho afunguye ububiko bw'intwaro ze
Jeremiah50:26 Nimutere Babiloni muturutse impande zose
Jeremiah50:27 Nimutsembe intwari zayo zose
Jeremiah50:28 Nimwumve urusaku rw'abatahuka bava i Babiloni
Jeremiah50:29 Koranya abarwanisha imiheto
Jeremiah50:30 Bityo abasore baho bazicirwa mu mayira
Jeremiah50:31 Nyagasani Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Dore ngiye kurwana nawe wa munyagasuzuguro we
Jeremiah50:32 Wa munyagasuzuguro we
Jeremiah50:33 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Abisiraheli barakandamijwe
Jeremiah50:34 Nyamara Umucunguzi wabo ni umunyambaraga
Jeremiah50:35 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Inkota nitsembe Abanyababiloniya
Jeremiah50:36 Inkota nitsembe abahanurabinyoma baho
Jeremiah50:37 inkota nitsembe amafarasi yaho
Jeremiah50:38 Amazi yaho nakame amapfa atere
Jeremiah50:39 Inyamaswa ndetse na za nyiramuhari zizahatura
Jeremiah50:40 Uko narimbuye Sodoma na Gomora n'imijyi ihakikije
Jeremiah50:41 Dore ingabo ziturutse mu majyaruguru
Jeremiah50:42 Izo ngabo zitwaje imiheto n'amacumu
Jeremiah50:43 Umwami wa Babiloniya yumvise iyo nkuru acika intege
Jeremiah50:44 Nzaba nk'intare iturumbutse mu bihuru byo kuri Yorodani
Jeremiah50:45 None rero nimwumve imigambi Uhoraho afitiye Babiloni
Jeremiah50:46 Induru y'ukurimbuka kwa Babiloni izakangaranya isi
Jeremiah51:1 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ngiye guteza umurimbuzi Babiloniya n'abayituye.
Jeremiah51:2 Nzayiteza abanyamahanga bayirimbure
Jeremiah51:3 “Ntiwemerere Abanyababiloniya gufora imiheto
Jeremiah51:4 Koko Abanyababiloniya bazashiraho
Jeremiah51:5 Nyamara jyewe Imana Uhoraho Nyiringabo
Jeremiah51:6 “Nimusohoke muri Babiloniya muhunge
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloniya yari nk'igikombe cya zahabu
Jeremiah51:8 Babiloniya izatungurwa igwe isenyagurike
Jeremiah51:9 Abanyamahanga baransubiza bati: ‘Twagerageje komora Babiloniya ariko ntizakira. Nimureke tuyisohokemo dusubire buri wese mu gihugu cye
Jeremiah51:10 Abisiraheli na bo baravuga bati: ‘Uhoraho yaraturenganuye
Jeremiah51:11 Nimutyaze imyambi mufate n'ingabo
Jeremiah51:12 Nimushinge ibendera murwanye Babiloni
Jeremiah51:13 Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:14 Uhoraho Nyiringabo ararahiye ati: “Nzaguteza abantu benshi nk'inzige
Jeremiah51:15 Uhoraho ni we waremesheje isi ububasha bwe
Jeremiah51:16 Iyo Uhoraho avuze amazi yo mu kirere arahōrera
Jeremiah51:17 Abantu iyo babibonye barumirwa bakagwa mu rujijo. Abakora amashusho y'ibigirwamana bakorwa n'isoni
Jeremiah51:18 Ibyo bishushanyo ni imburamumaro
Jeremiah51:19 Nyamara Imana ya Yakobo si ko iteye
Jeremiah51:20 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Babiloniya we
Jeremiah51:21 Nagukoresheje mu kwica amafarasi n'abayarwaniraho
Jeremiah51:22 Nagukoresheje mu kwica abagabo n'abagore
Jeremiah51:23 Nagukoresheje mu kwica abashumba n'abayoborwa
Jeremiah51:24 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Muzirebera ukuntu nzitura Babiloniya n'abayituye
Jeremiah51:25 Dore ndakwibasiye wowe Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:26 Nta buye na rimwe ryo mu matongo yawe rizubakishwa ukundi
Jeremiah51:27 Nimushinge ibendera mu gihugu
Jeremiah51:28 Nimutegurire amahanga kurwanya Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:29 Igihugu kirahinda umushyitsi cyatashywe n'ubwoba
Jeremiah51:30 Ingabo za Babiloniya zaretse urugamba
Jeremiah51:31 Intumwa ziriruka zikurikiranye
Jeremiah51:32 Ibyambu byafashwe
Jeremiah51:33 Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli aravuga ati: “Babiloni izanyukanyukwa
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:35 Abantu b'i Yeruzalemu baravuga bati: “Babiloniya niryozwe ibibi yadukoreye
Jeremiah51:36 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yeruzalemu we
Jeremiah51:37 Babiloniya izaba amatongo
Jeremiah51:38 Abanyababiloniya baratontoma nk'intare
Jeremiah51:39 Irari nirimara kubagurumanamo nzabagaburira
Jeremiah51:40 Nzabajyana mu ibagiro bameze nk'intama
Jeremiah51:41 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Bishoboka bite ko Babiloni yafatwa? Umujyi wari icyamamare mu isi hose watsinzwe. Babiloni izaba amatongo amahanga abireba
Jeremiah51:42 Babiloni irengewe n'inyanja
Jeremiah51:43 Imijyi yayo ibaye amatongo
Jeremiah51:44 Nzahana Beli ikigirwamana cyo muri Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:45 Bwoko bwanjye
Jeremiah51:46 “Ntimukurwe umutima n'impuha mwumva
Jeremiah51:47 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Koko rero igihe kizagera
Jeremiah51:48 Ijuru n'isi n'ibirimo byose bizigamba kuri Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:49 Uko abantu benshi bo ku isi bapfuye bazize Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:50 Uhoraho arabwira abacitse ku icumu ati: “Nimugende mwe gutinda! Nimujye mwibuka Uhoraho nubwo muri kure y'iwanyu
Jeremiah51:51 Muravuga muti: ‘Twakojejwe isoni
Jeremiah51:52 None Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe kizagera mpane ibigirwamana byo muri Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:53 Nubwo Babiloni yazamuka ikagera mu bicu
Jeremiah51:54 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Induru iturutse i Babiloni
Jeremiah51:55 Uhoraho azarimbura Babiloni
Jeremiah51:56 Umurimbuzi aje kurimbura Babiloni
Jeremiah51:57 Umwami ari we Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Nzasindisha abatware n'abanyabwenge baho
Jeremiah51:58 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Inkuta ngari zizengurutse Babiloni zizariduka
Jeremiah51:59 Mu mwaka wa kane Sedekiya umwami w'u Buyuda ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremiya yari yaranditse mu muzingo w'igitabo ibyago byose byagombaga kugwirira Babiloniya
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremiya abwira Seraya ati: “Nugera i Babiloni uzarangurure ijwi
Jeremiah51:62 Hanyuma uzasenge uti: ‘Uhoraho
Jeremiah51:63 Numara gusoma uwo muzingo w'igitabo
Jeremiah51:64 uvuga uti: ‘Uko ni ko Babiloniya izazīkama kandi ntiyongere kuzanzamuka
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekiya yabaye umwami afite imyaka makumyabiri n'umwe
Jeremiah52:2 Sedekiya yakoze ibitanogeye Uhoraho nk'Umwami Yoyakimu.
Jeremiah52:3 Uhoraho yarakariye cyane abantu b'i Yeruzalemu no mu Buyuda kubera ibibi bakoze
Jeremiah52:4 Ku itariki ya cumi y'ukwezi kwa cumi k'umwaka wa cyenda Sedekiya ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah52:5 Bakomeje kugota uwo mujyi kugeza mu mwaka wa cumi n'umwe Sedekiya ari ku ngoma.
Jeremiah52:6 Nuko inzara izahaza umurwa
Jeremiah52:7 Abanyababiloniya baca icyuho mu rukuta ruzengurutse umujyi
Jeremiah52:8 Icyakora ingabo z'Abanyababiloniya zikurikira Umwami Sedekiya zimufatira mu kibaya cya Yeriko
Jeremiah52:9 Abanyababiloniya bafata Sedekiya bamushyīra umwami wa Babiloniya
Jeremiah52:10 Aho i Ribula umwami wa Babiloniya ahicira abahungu ba Sedekiya abyirebera
Jeremiah52:11 Hanyuma anogora Sedekiya amaso
Jeremiah52:12 Ku itariki ya cumi y'ukwezi kwa gatanu k'umwaka wa cumi n'icyenda Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah52:13 Atwika Ingoro y'Uhoraho n'ingoro y'umwami n'amazu yose yo mu murwa
Jeremiah52:14 Ingabo z'Abanyababiloniya zose zari zimuherekeje
Jeremiah52:15 Hanyuma Nebuzaradani umutware w'abarinzi ajyana ho iminyago abaturage bari basigaye mu mujyi
Jeremiah52:16 Icyakora Nebuzaradani umutware w'abarinzi asigayo abaturage b'abatindi nyakujya
Jeremiah52:17 Nuko Abanyababiloniya bamenagura inkingi z'umuringa zari ku ibaraza ry'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
Jeremiah52:18 Basahura ibikarayi n'ibitiyo
Jeremiah52:19 Uwo mutware w'abarinzi asahura n'ibindi bikoresho by'izahabu n'iby'ifeza
Jeremiah52:20 Umuringa w'inkingi zombi hamwe n'uw'ikizenga n'uw'ibimasa cumi na bibiri biteretseho ikizenga
Jeremiah52:21 Koko rero izo nkingi zombi
Jeremiah52:22 Buri nkingi yari ifite umutwe ucuzwe mu muringa
Jeremiah52:23 Mu mbavu za buri nkingi hari hatatse amashusho y'imbuto z'imikomamanga mirongo cyenda n'esheshatu
Jeremiah52:24 Umutware w'abarinzi afata Umutambyi mukuru Seraya
Jeremiah52:25 Hanyuma afatira mu mujyi umutware w'ingabo n'abantu barindwi b'ibyegera by'umwami
Jeremiah52:26 Nuko Nebuzaradani ari we mutware w'abarinzi
Jeremiah52:27 Umwami wa Babiloniya ni ko kubakubita abicira aho i Ribula
Jeremiah52:28 Dore umubare w'abantu Nebukadinezari yajyanye ho iminyago: mu mwaka wa karindwi ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah52:29 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'umunani yajyanye ho iminyago abantu magana inani na mirongo itatu na babiri abavanye i Yeruzalemu.
Jeremiah52:30 Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n'itatu Nebukadinezari ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah52:31 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n'irindwi nyuma y'aho Yoyakini umwami w'u Buyuda ajyanywe ho umunyago
Jeremiah52:32 Nuko Evili-Merodaki amubwirana ineza
Jeremiah52:33 Yoyakini ntiyongera kwambara imyenda y'imfungwa
Jeremiah52:34 Umwami wa Babiloniya yageneraga Yoyakini ibyo kumutunga bya buri munsi
Lamentations1:1 Mbega ukuntu Yeruzalemu yari ituwe ihindutse umusaka! Yari igikomerezwa imbere y'amahanga
Lamentations1:2 Arara arira amarira atemba ku matama
Lamentations1:3 Abayuda bajyanywe ho iminyago baba inkoreragahato
Lamentations1:4 Amayira ajya i Siyoni ari mu cyunamo
Lamentations1:5 Abayikandamizaga barayigaruriye
Lamentations1:6 Siyoni yambuwe ikuzo ryayo
Lamentations1:7 Yeruzalemu iribuka iminsi y'umubuyero n'agahinda
Lamentations1:8 Ab'i Yeruzalemu baracumuye bikabije
Lamentations1:9 Yeruzalemu yahindutse umwanda
Lamentations1:10 Abanzi banyaze ubutunzi bwayo bwose
Lamentations1:11 Abaturage bayo bose baraganya bashaka ibyokurya
Lamentations1:12 “Yemwe bahisi n'abagenzi mwese
Lamentations1:13 Uhoraho yansutseho umuriro urantwika
Lamentations1:14 Yagenzuye ibyaha byanjye abibumbira hamwe
Lamentations1:15 Uhoraho yanyambuye ingabo zanjye zose z'intwari
Lamentations1:16 Ni cyo gituma ndira amarira agatemba
Lamentations1:17 Ab'i Siyoni baratakambye ntihagira ubahumuriza
Lamentations1:18 Koko rero nasuzuguye amategeko y'Uhoraho
Lamentations1:19 Natabaje abakunzi banjye baranyigarika
Lamentations1:20 Uhoraho
Lamentations1:21 Abantu bumvise nganya ntihagira umpumuriza
Lamentations1:22 Ubugome bwabo nibukwigaragarize
Lamentations2:1 Uhoraho yarakariye Siyoni ayishyira mu icuraburindi
Lamentations2:2 Uhoraho yashenye imidugudu yose y'Abisiraheli nta kubabarira
Lamentations2:3 Uhoraho yagize uburakari bukaze
Lamentations2:4 Yafoye umuheto we nk'umwanzi
Lamentations2:5 Uhoraho yitwaye nk'umwanzi atsemba Isiraheli
Lamentations2:6 Yashenye Ingoro ye ihinduka amatongo
Lamentations2:7 Uhoraho yashenye urutambiro rwe azinukwa Ingoro ye
Lamentations2:8 Uhoraho agambiriye gusenya inkuta za Siyoni
Lamentations2:9 Amarembo ya Siyoni yararigise
Lamentations2:10 Abakuru b'imiryango b'i Siyoni bicaye hasi bumiwe
Lamentations2:11 Amaso yanjye yakobowe n'amarira
Lamentations2:12 Barabaza ba nyina bati: “Ibyokurya n'ibyokunywa biri he?” Dore bararabiranira mu mihanda nk'inkomere
Lamentations2:13 Yeruzalemu we
Lamentations2:14 Ibyo abahanuzi bawe baguhanuriye ni ibinyoma n'imburamumaro

Ezekiel1:1 Ku itariki ya gatanu y'ukwezi kwa kane k'umwaka wa mirongo itatu nari maze mvutse
Ezekiel1:2 Kuri iyo tariki ya gatanu y'ukwezi
Ezekiel1:3 Ijambo ry'Uhoraho ryangezeho jyewe Ezekiyeli mwene Buzi wari umutambyi mu gihugu cya Babiloniya
Ezekiel1:4 Nitegereje mbona inkubi y'umuyaga uturutse mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel1:5 Muri uwo mucyo kandi nabonyemo amashusho y'ibinyabuzima bine bisa n'abantu
Ezekiel1:6 uretse ko buri kinyabuzima cyari gifite mu maso hane n'amababa ane.
Ezekiel1:7 Amaguru yabyo yari arambuye
Ezekiel1:8 Munsi y'amababa yabyo hari ibiganza by'umuntu byarebaga mu byerekezo bine
Ezekiel1:9 Amababa ya buri kinyabuzima yakoraga ku y'ikindi
Ezekiel1:10 Uko ari bine byari bifite mu maso nk'ah'umuntu
Ezekiel1:11 Abiri mu mababa ya buri kinyabuzima yarebaga hejuru kandi rimwe rikora ku rindi
Ezekiel1:12 Buri kinyabuzima cyagendaga kiromboreje imbere yacyo
Ezekiel1:13 Ibyo binyabuzima byasaga n'amakara yaka
Ezekiel1:14 Ibinyabuzima byagendaga binyuranamo
Ezekiel1:15 Nuko nitegereje mbona ku ruhande rwa buri kinyabuzima
Ezekiel1:16 Isura n'imiterere y'izo nziga yasaga n'ibuye ry'agaciro. Izo nziga uko ari enye zarasaga zose
Ezekiel1:17 Izo nziga zagendaga zikaraga zigana mu byerekezo bine
Ezekiel1:18 Amagurudumu yazo yari maremare cyane
Ezekiel1:19 Iyo ibinyabuzima byagendaga
Ezekiel1:20 Byajyaga iyo bishatse inziga zikajyana na byo
Ezekiel1:21 Iyo ibinyabuzima byagendaga
Ezekiel1:22 Hejuru y'ibyo binyabuzima hari igisa n'igisenge
Ezekiel1:23 Amababa abiri ya buri kinyabuzima yari arambuye munsi y'icyo gisa n'igisenge
Ezekiel1:24 Iyo byagendaga numvaga urusaku rw'amababa yabyo
Ezekiel1:25 Hanyuma ijwi ryumvikanira hejuru y'icyo gisa n'igisenge
Ezekiel1:26 Hejuru y'igisa n'igisenge hari ikintu kimeze nk'ibuye rya safiro
Ezekiel1:27 Nuko mbona icyo gisa n'umuntu kirabagirana nk'icyuma gisennye kandi kizengurutswe n'umuriro. Munsi y'urukenyerero nahabonaga igisa n'umuriro ukimurikira.
Ezekiel1:28 Icyo gisa n'umuntu cyari gikikijwe n'umucyo umeze nk'umukororombya urabagirana mu gihe cy'imvura. Ibyo byashushanyaga ikuzo ry'Uhoraho
Ezekiel2:1 Uwamvugishaga arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu

Ezekiel2:10 Nuko icyo gitabo akiramburira imbere yanjye. Cyari cyanditswemo imbere n'inyuma amagambo y'amaganya n'ishavu n'imiborogo.

Ezekiel5:17 Nzabateza inzara n'inyamaswa z'inkazi bibamareho urubyaro. Muzugarizwa n'ibyorezo n'urugomo kandi intambara ibatsembe. Ni jye Uhoraho ubivuze.”
