Ezekiel9:1 Nuko numva Uhoraho avuga aranguruye ati: “Igihano cy'umujyi kiregereje. Yemwe abashinzwe guhana uyu mujyi
Ezekiel9:2 Hanyuma mbona abantu batandatu baturutse mu muryango w'Ingoro werekera mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel9:3 Nuko ikuzo ry'Imana y'Abisiraheli ryari ku bakerubi rijya ku muryango w'Ingoro. Uhoraho ahamagara wa muntu wambaye imyambaro yera
Ezekiel9:4 Aramubwira ati: “Zenguruka umujyi wa Yeruzalemu
Ezekiel9:5 Hanyuma numva Imana ibwira abandi bantu iti: “Nimumukurikire mugende mwica
Ezekiel9:6 Mutsembe abasaza n'abasore n'inkumi
Ezekiel9:7 Uhoraho arababwira ati: “Ngaho nimugende muhumanye Ingoro
Ezekiel9:8 Igihe bariho bica nari jyenyine
Ezekiel9:9 Uhoraho aransubiza ati: “Ibicumuro by'Abisiraheli n'iby'Abayuda birenze urugero. Dore igihugu cyuzuye amaraso
Ezekiel9:10 Bityo nanjye sinzigera mbitaho cyangwa ngo mbababarire
Ezekiel9:11 Nuko wa muntu wambaye imyambaro yera
Ezekiel10:1 Nuko nditegereza mbona igisa n'intebe ya cyami ikozwe muri safiro
Ezekiel10:2 Uhoraho abwira wa muntu wari wambaye imyambaro yera ati: “Nyura mu nziga ziri munsi y'abakerubi
Ezekiel10:3 Igihe uwo muntu yagendaga
Ezekiel10:4 Nuko ikuzo ry'Uhoraho ryigaragariza hejuru y'abakerubi
Ezekiel10:5 Urusaku rw'amababa y'abakerubi rwumvikana inyuma y'urugo nk'ijwi ry'Imana Nyiringabo iyo ivuze.
Ezekiel10:6 Igihe Uhoraho yategekaga wa muntu wari wambaye imyambaro yera ati: “Fata umuriro uvuye hagati y'inziga ziri munsi y'abakerubi”
Ezekiel10:7 Umukerubi umwe arambura ukuboko afata umuriro wari hagati y'abakerubi
Ezekiel10:8 Munsi y'amababa y'abakerubi hari igisa n'ikiganza cy'umuntu.
Ezekiel10:9 Nitegereje mbona inziga enye zisa
Ezekiel10:10 Izo nziga zose uko ari enye zarasaga
Ezekiel10:11 Iyo zagendaga zerekezaga muri kimwe mu byerekezo bine
Ezekiel10:12 Imibiri y'abo bakerubi n'imigongo yabo
Ezekiel10:13 Nuko numva izo nziga bazita “Izikaraga”.
Ezekiel10:14 Abo bakerubi bari bafite mu maso hane. Mu maso ha mbere hasaga n'ah'umukerubi
Ezekiel10:15 Abo bakerubi batumbagira mu kirere
Ezekiel10:16 Iyo abakerubi bagendaga
Ezekiel10:17 Iyo abakerubi bahagararaga na zo zarahagararaga
Ezekiel10:18 Nuko ikuzo ry'Uhoraho rivanwa ku muryango w'Ingoro
Ezekiel10:19 Abakerubi barambura amababa yabo mbona baragurutse
Ezekiel10:20 Ni bo bya binyabuzima nabonye munsi y'Imana y'Abisiraheli ku muyoboro w'amazi witwa Kebari
Ezekiel10:21 Buri mukerubi yari afite mu maso hane n'amababa ane
Ezekiel10:22 Mu maso habo hasaga na bya binyabuzima nabonye kuri Kebari
Ezekiel11:1 Nuko Mwuka aranzamura anjyana ku muryango w'Ingoro y'Uhoraho
Ezekiel11:2 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel11:3 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel11:4 Yewe muntu
Ezekiel11:5 Nuko Mwuka w'Uhoraho anzaho arambwira ati: “Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel11:6 Mwiciye abantu benshi muri uyu mujyi
Ezekiel11:7 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati: ‘Uyu mujyi ni wo nkono
Ezekiel11:8 Mutinya intambara
Ezekiel11:9 Nzabamenesha muri uyu mujyi mbagabize abanyamahanga
Ezekiel11:10 Nzabatsembesha intambara mbahanire mu gihugu cyanyu
Ezekiel11:11 Uyu mujyi ntuzababera nk'inkono iteka
Ezekiel11:12 Muzamenya ko ndi Uhoraho
Ezekiel11:13 Nuko igihe nahanuraga
Ezekiel11:14 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel11:15 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel11:16 None rero babwire ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati: ‘Nubwo nabohereye mu mahanga nkabatatanyiriza mu bihugu
Ezekiel11:17 “Babwire ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati: ‘Nzabakoranya mbavane mu mahanga
Ezekiel11:18 Muzakigarukamo maze mukureho ibizira n'ibiteye ishozi byose bikirimo.
Ezekiel11:19 Nzabahindura bashya mugire ibitekerezo bitunganye. Nzabakuramo umutima ukomeye nk'ibuye mbashyiremo umutima uboneye.
Ezekiel11:20 Bityo muzakurikiza amateka yanjye kandi mwitondere Amategeko yanjye. Muzaba abantu banjye
Ezekiel11:21 Nyamara abiyeguriye ibizira n'ibiteye ishozi
Ezekiel11:22 Nuko abakerubi barambura amababa yabo bagurukana n'inziga zari iruhande rwabo
Ezekiel11:23 Hanyuma ikuzo ry'Uhoraho rivanwa mu mujyi
Ezekiel11:24 Mwuka aranzamura anjyana muri Babiloniya
Ezekiel11:25 Hanyuma ibyo Uhoraho yanyeretse byose mbitekerereza abajyanywe ho iminyago.
Ezekiel12:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel12:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel12:3 Yewe muntu

Ezekiel12:5 Uzace icyuho mu rukuta bakureba
Ezekiel12:6 Uzabishyire ku rutugu bakureba
Ezekiel12:7 Nuko nkora ibyo Uhoraho yantegetse. Mfata ibintu byanjye ku manywa y'ihangu nk'ujyanywe ho umunyago
Ezekiel12:8 Bukeye Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel12:9 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel12:10 None rero ubabwire ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati: ‘Ubu butumwa bugenewe umwami w'i Yeruzalemu n'Abisiraheli bose bahatuye.’

Ezekiel12:12 Umwami wabo azagenda mu kabwibwi ashyize ibintu bye ku rutugu
Ezekiel12:13 Nzamutega umutego awugwemo
Ezekiel12:14 Nzatatanya ibyegera bye byose
Ezekiel12:15 Nimara kubatatanyiriza mu mahanga no mu bihugu bya kure
Ezekiel12:16 Nyamara bake muri bo nzabarokora intambara n'inzara n'icyorezo. Nibagera mu mahanga bazemera ibizira byose bakoze. Bityo abantu bose bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho.’ ”
Ezekiel12:17 Uhoraho arambwira ati:

Ezekiel16:7 Nagukujije nk'igiti cyo mu gasozi urakura

Ezekiel16:9 “ ‘Narakuhagiye ngukuraho amaraso maze ngusiga amavuta.
Ezekiel16:10 Nakwambitse imyambaro itatse n'inkweto z'uruhu runoze

Ezekiel16:12 Nakwambitse impeta ku zuru n'amaherena ku matwi
Ezekiel16:13 Ibirimbisho byawe byari bikozwe mu izahabu no mu ifeza

Ezekiel16:15 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nyamara wiringiye uburanga bwawe

Ezekiel16:17 Wafashe ibirimbisho byawe byiza naguhaye bikozwe mu izahabu no mu ifeza
Ezekiel16:18 Wafashe imyambaro itatse urabyambika
Ezekiel16:19 Wafashe kandi ibyokurya naguhaye
Ezekiel16:20 Wafashe abahungu n'abakobwa twabyaranye ubatambira ibyo bigirwamana. Mbese ubwo uburaya bwawe ntibwari buhagije?
Ezekiel16:21 Wishe abana banjye ubatambira ibyo bigirwamana byawe.
Ezekiel16:22 Muri uko gukora ibizira no muri ubwo buraya bwawe
Ezekiel16:23 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yeruzalemu ugushije ishyano! Ugushije ishyano nyuma y'ibyo bibi byose umaze gukora.
Ezekiel16:24 Wirundiye igitaka ugisambaniraho
Ezekiel16:25 Wubatse ahasengerwa ibigirwamana mu mahuriro y'inzira hose bityo uriyandarika
Ezekiel16:26 Wasambanye n'Abanyamisiri ari bo baturanyi bawe bakurarikiraga
Ezekiel16:27 “Ni cyo cyatumye nkurwanya nkoresheje imbaraga
Ezekiel16:28 Nyamara ntiwigeze unyurwa
Ezekiel16:29 Wakabije kwiyandarika mu bacuruzi bo muri Babiloniya
Ezekiel16:30 “Mbega ngo uracika intege! Witwaye nk'indaya kabuhariwe!
Ezekiel16:31 Igihe wirundiraga igitaka mu mahuriro y'inzira
Ezekiel16:32 Wagenje nk'umugore w'umusambanyi urarikira abandi bagabo
Ezekiel16:33 Ubusanzwe indaya zihabwa ibiguzi
Ezekiel16:34 Mu kwiyandarika kwawe ntiwakoze nk'izindi ndaya. Abakunzi si bo bakwinginga kandi si bo baguha ibiguzi
Ezekiel16:35 None rero Yeruzalemu we
Ezekiel16:36 Nyagasani Uhoraho arakubwira ati: “Kubera ko wiyambitse ubusa
Ezekiel16:37 ni yo mpamvu ngiye gukoranya abakunzi bawe bose ndetse n'abanzi bawe
Ezekiel16:38 Nzaguha igihano gikwiye abasambanyikazi n'abicanyi. Nzaguhanisha urupfu mbitewe n'uburakari no gufuha.
Ezekiel16:39 Nzakugabiza abakunzi bawe basenye ibirundo byawe by'igitaka n'ahasengerwa ibigirwamana byawe. Bazakwambura imyambaro n'ibirimbisho byawe bagusige utumbuje.
Ezekiel16:40 “Bazaguteza rubanda bagutere amabuye
Ezekiel16:41 Bazatwika amazu yawe
Ezekiel16:42 Nzakumariraho uburakari bwanjye
Ezekiel16:43 Kubera ko wibagiwe ibyo nagukoreye igihe wavukaga
Ezekiel16:44 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yeruzalemu we
Ezekiel16:45 Koko rero umeze nka nyoko
Ezekiel16:46 “Mukuru wawe ni Samariya
Ezekiel16:47 Ntiwakurikije imigenzereze yabo gusa
Ezekiel16:48 “Ndahiye ubugingo bwanjye
Ezekiel16:49 “Ibi ni byo byari ibicumuro bya murumuna wawe Sodoma: we n'abakobwa be bari abirasi n'abanyamurengwe
Ezekiel16:50 Bigize abirasi bakora ibizira ntabasha kwihanganira
Ezekiel16:51 “Nyamara Samariya ntiyakoze ibihwanye na kimwe cya kabiri cy'ibicumuro byawe. Wakoze ibizira birengeje ibyabo
Ezekiel16:52 Ukwiye gukorwa n'isoni kubera ibicumuro byawe bikabije kurusha ibya bene nyoko
Ezekiel16:53 “Nzagarurira ishya n'ihirwe Sodoma n'abakobwa be na Samariya n'abakobwa be
Ezekiel16:54 kugira ngo ukorwe n'ikimwaro kandi uterwe isoni n'ibyo wakoze
Ezekiel16:55 Bene nyoko Sodoma n'abakobwa be na Samariya n'abakobwa be bazongera bagire ishya n'ihirwe nka mbere
Ezekiel16:56 Igihe cy'ubwirasi bwawe
Ezekiel16:57 Ibyo wabikoze ububi bwawe butaragaragazwa
Ezekiel16:58 Ibibi n'ibizira wakoze bizakugaruka.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuze.

Ezekiel16:62 Nzakomeza Isezerano ryanjye nawe
Ezekiel16:63 Ibyo bizatuma wibuka ibibi wakoze maze ukorwe n'isoni kandi wumirwe

Ezekiel17:6 Nuko urwo rugemwe rurakura ruba umuzabibu utoshye

Ezekiel18:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel18:2 “Kuki muca uyu mugani ku byerekeye igihugu cya Isiraheli muti: ‘Ababyeyi bariye imizabibu isharira
Ezekiel18:3 Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho
Ezekiel18:4 Koko rero ubuzima bwa buri wese ni jye ubugenga
Ezekiel18:5 “Umuntu ashobora kuba intungane
Ezekiel18:6 Uwo muntu ntarira ku misozi ibyeguriwe ibigirwamana by'Abisiraheli cyangwa ngo abiyoboke. Ntasambana n'umugore w'undi cyangwa ngo aryamane n'umugore uri mu mihango.
Ezekiel18:7 Nta n'umwe akandamiza ahubwo asubiza ingwate yahawe. Ntiyiba ahubwo agaburira umushonji kandi akambika uwambaye ubusa.
Ezekiel18:8 Ntatanga inguzanyo agamije inyungu cyangwa ngo ashake indonke ikabije. Yirinda gukora ikibi kandi agaca imanza zitabera.
Ezekiel18:9 Akurikiza amateka yanjye kandi akubahiriza amategeko nta buryarya. Koko uwo muntu ni intungane
Ezekiel18:10 “Uwo muntu ashobora kuba afite umwana w'umugome kandi w'umwicanyi
Ezekiel18:11 nubwo se nta na kimwe muri ibyo yakoze. Byashoboka ko uwo mwana arira ku misozi ibyeguriwe ibigirwamana kandi agasambana n'umugore w'undi
Ezekiel18:12 agakandamiza abatishoboye n'abakene
Ezekiel18:13 agatanga inguzanyo agamije inyungu cyangwa indonke ikabije. Mbese uwo umuntu ukora atyo akwiye kubaho? Reka da! Kubera ko yakoze ibyo bizira byose
Ezekiel18:14 “Nyamara uwo mugome na we ashobora kubyara umwana
Ezekiel18:15 Bityo ntarire ku misozi ibyeguriwe ibigirwamana by'Abisiraheli cyangwa ngo abiyoboke kandi ntasambane n'umugore w'undi
Ezekiel18:16 ntagire uwo akandamiza kandi ntagumane ingwate yahawe
Ezekiel18:17 ntakore ikibi kandi ntatange inguzanyo agamije inyungu cyangwa indonke ikabije
Ezekiel18:18 Nyamara se azapfa azize ibyaha bye bwite
Ezekiel18:19 “Nyamara murabaza muti: ‘Kuki umwana atazaryozwa ibyaha bya se?’ Niba uwo mwana aharanira ukuri n'ubutungane
Ezekiel18:20 Umuntu ukora icyaha ni we uzapfa. Umwana ntazaryozwa ibyaha bya se cyangwa ngo umubyeyi ahanirwe ibyaha by'umwana we. Intungane izahemberwa ubutungane bwayo
Ezekiel18:21 “Umugome niyihana ibyaha yakoze agakurikiza amateka yanjye yose
Ezekiel18:22 Ibyaha byose yakoze ntibizibukwa ukundi
Ezekiel18:23 Mbese nezezwa n'urupfu rw'umugome
Ezekiel18:24 “Nyamara intungane nireka ubutungane bwayo igakora icyaha n'ibizira nk'ibyo umugome akora
Ezekiel18:25 Muravuga muti: ‘Imigenzereze y'Uhoraho ntitunganye.’ Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel18:26 Intungane nireka ubutungane bwayo igakora icyaha
Ezekiel18:27 Umugome niyihana ubugome bwe agakurikiza ukuri n'ubutungane
Ezekiel18:28 Yamenye ubugome bwe bwose arabwihana
Ezekiel18:29 “Nyamara Abisiraheli baravuga bati: ‘Imigenzereze y'Uhoraho ntitunganye.’ Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel18:30 Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel18:31 Nimuzibukire ibibi byose mwakoze
Ezekiel18:32 Ntawe nifuriza gupfa
Ezekiel19:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Tera indirimbo uririre abayobozi ba Isiraheli uti:
Ezekiel19:2 ‘Nyoko yari intare y'ingore
Ezekiel19:3 Yareze kimwe mu byana byayo
Ezekiel19:4 Amahanga yumvise ubuhangange bwacyo
Ezekiel19:5 Ya ntare y'ingore irategereza iraheba
Ezekiel19:6 Cyabanaga n'izindi ntare
Ezekiel19:7 Cyasenye amazu yabo akomeye
Ezekiel19:8 Amahanga aturuka impande zose arakirwanya
Ezekiel19:9 Bagikururisha inkonzo barakiboha
Ezekiel19:10 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nyoko yari nk'umuzabibu watewe hafi y'amazi. Wararumbukaga ukagira n'amashami menshi
Ezekiel19:11 Wari ufite amashami akomeye
Ezekiel19:12 Nyamara warimburanywe uburakari ujugunywa hasi
Ezekiel19:13 None uwo muzabibu utewe mu butayu
Ezekiel19:14 Umuriro waturutse mu gihimba cyawo
Ezekiel20:1 Ku itariki ya cumi y'ukwezi kwa gatanu k'umwaka wa karindwi tujyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel20:2 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel20:3 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel20:4 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel20:5 maze ubabwire uti: ‘Nimwumve ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga: igihe natoranyaga Isiraheli nagiranye Isezerano namwe abakomoka kuri Yakobo
Ezekiel20:6 Icyo gihe nabasezeranyije ko nzabavana mu Misiri nkabajyana mu gihugu nabatoranyirije
Ezekiel20:7 Nabategetse kuzibukira ibizira mwakundaga
Ezekiel20:8 “Nyamara barangomeye banga kunyumvira
Ezekiel20:9 Nyamara nisubiyeho kugira ngo ntisuzuguza imbere y'abanyamahanga babana na bo. Koko rero abo banyamahanga babonye uko nimenyesheje Abisiraheli
Ezekiel20:10 Nabavanye mu Misiri mbajyana mu butayu
Ezekiel20:11 nabahaye amateka yanjye mbamenyesha n'Amategeko yanjye abeshaho uyakurikiza.
Ezekiel20:12 Nabahaye kandi isabato yanjye kugira ngo ibe ikimenyetso cy'amasezerano twagiranye
Ezekiel20:13 Nyamara Abisiraheli bageze mu butayu barangomera ntibubahiriza amateka yanjye
Ezekiel20:14 Ariko nisubiyeho kugira ngo ntisuzuguza imbere y'abanyamahanga babana na bo. Koko rero abo banyamahanga babonye uko nimenyesheje Abisiraheli
Ezekiel20:15 Nuko nongera kubarahira bari mu butayu ko ntazabajyana mu gihugu nabahaye
Ezekiel20:16 Ibyo nabitewe n'uko batubahirije amateka yanjye
Ezekiel20:17 Nyamara nabagiriye imbabazi niyemeza kutabatsinda mu butayu.”
Ezekiel20:18 Uhoraho arakomeza ati: “Abana babo nababwiriye mu butayu nti: ‘Ntimugakurikize amateka ya ba sokuruza cyangwa ngo mwumvire amabwiriza yabo
Ezekiel20:19 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Ezekiel20:20 Mujye mwubahiriza isabato yanjye kugira ngo ibe ikimenyetso cy'amasezerano twagiranye
Ezekiel20:21 Nyamara bo barangomeye ntibubahiriza amateka yanjye
Ezekiel20:22 Ariko nisubiyeho kugira ngo ntisuzuguza imbere y'abanyamahanga babana na bo. Koko rero abo banyamahanga babonye uko nimenyesheje Abisiraheli
Ezekiel20:23 Nuko nongera kubarahira bari mu butayu
Ezekiel20:24 Ibyo nabitewe n'uko batubahirije amateka yanjye
Ezekiel20:25 Ndetse nabahaye amateka atabanogeye
Ezekiel20:26 Narabaretse kugira ngo bihumanyishe amaturo batura
Ezekiel20:27 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel20:28 Nabagejeje mu gihugu nabasezeranyije ko nzabaha. Babonye imisozi miremire n'ibiti bitoshye bahatambira ibitambo
Ezekiel20:29 Nuko ndababaza nti: ‘Mbese aho hantu hirengeye mujya ni hantu ki?’ (Hitwa Ahasengerwa ibigirwamana kugeza na n'ubu.)
Ezekiel20:30 “None rero bwira Abisiraheli uti: ‘Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ko mwihumanyije mugenza nka ba sokuruza
Ezekiel20:31 Na n'ubu mutura amaturo
Ezekiel20:32 Muravuga muti: ‘Turashaka kumera nk'andi mahanga cyangwa abantu bo mu bindi bihugu
Ezekiel20:33 Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndahiye ubugingo bwanjye
Ezekiel20:34 Nzabereka imbaraga zanjye n'uburakari bwanjye
Ezekiel20:35 Nzabajyana mu butayu ahitaruye abanyamahanga
Ezekiel20:36 Nk'uko nahannye ba sokuruza ubwo bari mu butayu bava mu Misiri
Ezekiel20:37 Nzabategeka kunyoboka no kubahiriza Isezerano ryanjye.
Ezekiel20:38 Nzabakuramo abivumbagatanya n'abanyigomekaho. Nubwo nzabavana mu gihugu bajyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel20:39 “Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel20:40 Koko rero Abisiraheli bose bazansengera ku musozi wanyeguriwe
Ezekiel20:41 Nimara kubakoranya nkabavana mu bihugu mwatataniyemo
Ezekiel20:42 Icyo gihe muzamenya ko ndi Uhoraho nimbajyana mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
Ezekiel20:43 Aho muzahibukira imigenzereze n'ibikorwa mwihumanyishije
Ezekiel20:44 Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel21:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel21:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel21:3 Burira abatuye muri iryo shyamba uti: ‘Nimwumve Ijambo ry'Uhoraho. Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ko agiye gutwika ishyamba
Ezekiel21:4 Abantu bose bazabona ko ari jyewe Uhoraho wawukongeje
Ezekiel21:5 Nuko ndasubiza nti: “Nyagasani Uhoraho
Ezekiel21:6 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel21:7 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel21:8 uti: ‘Uhoraho avuze ko agiye kubarwanya
Ezekiel21:9 Koko ngiye gutsemba intungane n'abagome
Ezekiel21:10 Abantu bose bazamenya ko jyewe Uhoraho nakuye inkota mu rwubati
Ezekiel21:11 “None rero yewe muntu
Ezekiel21:12 Nibakubaza bati: ‘Kuki uboroga?’
Ezekiel21:13 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel21:14 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel21:15 Yatyarijwe kwica
Ezekiel21:16 Inkota yatyajwe kugira ngo ikoreshwe
Ezekiel21:17 Yewe muntu
Ezekiel21:18 Koko rero icyo kizaba ikigeragezo gikomeye. Uko ni ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze.
Ezekiel21:19 Yewe muntu
Ezekiel21:20 Ni inkota ikura abantu umutima
Ezekiel21:21 Wa nkota we
Ezekiel21:22 Nanjye ngiye gukoma mu mashyi
Ezekiel21:23 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel21:24 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel21:25 Inzira imwe izanyurwamo n'ingabo za Babiloniya ziteye Raba umurwa w'Abamoni
Ezekiel21:26 Koko rero umwami wa Babiloniya ahagaze mu mahuriro y'inzira kugira ngo amenye inzira anyuramo
Ezekiel21:27 Umwambi wo mu kiganza cye cy'iburyo werekanye Yeruzalemu
Ezekiel21:28 Nyamara abantu b'i Yeruzalemu ntibazabyemera kubera indahiro barahiye. Ariko ubu buhanuzi buzabibutsa ibyaha byabo
Ezekiel21:29 “Ni cyo gituma Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati: ‘Kubera ko mukomeza gucumura mukagaragaza ubugome bwanyu
Ezekiel21:30 “Naho wowe mutware wa Isiraheli
Ezekiel21:31 None rero Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Iyambure ingofero yawe n'ikamba ryawe
Ezekiel21:32 Ukurimbuka! Ukurimbuka! Uyu mujyi nzawurimbura
Ezekiel21:33 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel21:34 Igihe mukirangajwe n'amabonekerwa yanyu atari ay'ukuri n'ubuhanuzi bwanyu bw'ibinyoma
Ezekiel21:35 None rero nimusubize inkota zanyu mu rwubati
Ezekiel21:36 Nzabasukaho umujinya wanjye
Ezekiel21:37 Muzamera nk'inkwi zikongorwa n'umuriro
Ezekiel22:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel22:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel22:3 Wubwire ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuze nti: ‘Koko wishe benshi muri wowe kandi wiyandurisha gukora ibigirwamana
Ezekiel22:4 Ubwicanyi bwawe no kwihumanyisha ibigirwamana wiremeye biragushinja
Ezekiel22:5 Ibihugu bya bugufi n'ibya kure bizagukōba
Ezekiel22:6 “ ‘Dore abayobozi bose ba Isiraheli bishingikiriza imbaraga zabo bakica.
Ezekiel22:7 Nta n'umwe mu batuye uyu mujyi wubaha ababyeyi
Ezekiel22:8 Ntibubaha ahantu hanyeguriwe kandi ntibubahiriza isabato yanjye.
Ezekiel22:9 Bamwe muri bo babeshyera abandi bagambiriye kubica
Ezekiel22:10 Bamwe muri bo baryamana n'abagore ba ba se
Ezekiel22:11 Abantu bamwe basambana n'abagore ba bagenzi babo
Ezekiel22:12 Bamwe muri bo bakira ruswa bagambiriye kwica
Ezekiel22:13 “Yemwe abatuye Yeruzalemu
Ezekiel22:14 Mbese mufite imbaraga n'ubutwari bihagije byo guhangana nanjye
Ezekiel22:15 Nzabatatanyiriza mu bihugu by'amahanga kandi ntsembe ibikorwa bibi byanyu byose.

Ezekiel22:18 “Yewe muntu

Ezekiel22:20 Nk'uko abantu bakoranyiriza hamwe ifeza n'umuringa
Ezekiel22:21 Nzabakoranya mbatwikishe uburakari bwanjye bugurumana
Ezekiel22:22 Nk'uko ifeza ishongesherezwa mu ruganda
Ezekiel22:23 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati:

Ezekiel22:25 Abayobozi babo bameze nk'intare yivugira ku muhigo

Ezekiel22:27 Abayobozi b'umujyi ni nk'ibirura bitanyagura umuhigo wabyo
Ezekiel22:28 Abahanuzi babo bahisha ibyo bibi byose
Ezekiel22:29 Mu gihugu hose abantu bagira urugomo kandi bakiba
Ezekiel22:30 Nashakashatse umuntu muri bo wasana urukuta kandi akaziba icyuho
Ezekiel22:31 Ni cyo gituma nzabasukaho umujinya wanjye
Ezekiel23:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel23:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel23:3 Mu bukumi bwabo bahindukiye indaya aho babaga mu Misiri. Bemera ko bakorakora amabere yabo bangiza ubusugi bwabo
Ezekiel23:4 Umukuru yitwaga Ohola
Ezekiel23:5 Nubwo Ohola yari umugore wanjye yakomeje kuba indaya
Ezekiel23:6 Bari abatware n'abagaba b'ingabo bambaye imyambaro y'umuhemba
Ezekiel23:7 Ohola yari indaya y'abayobozi bakomeye bose b'Abanyashūru
Ezekiel23:8 Ntiyigeze azibukira uburaya yatangiriye mu Misiri mu gihe cy'ubukumi bwe
Ezekiel23:9 Ni cyo cyatumye murekera abakunzi be b'Abanyashūru yakundaga cyane.
Ezekiel23:10 Abo ni bo bamwambitse ubusa
Ezekiel23:11 “Murumuna we Oholiba yarabirebaga
Ezekiel23:12 Na we yararikiye abategetsi n'abasirikari b'Abanyashūru
Ezekiel23:13 Nabonye ko na we yiyandaritse
Ezekiel23:14 Nyamara Oholiba we yakabije kuba indaya
Ezekiel23:15 Ayo mashusho yari akenyeje imikandara ateze n'ingofero
Ezekiel23:16 Oholiba akubise amaso ayo mashusho afatwa n'irari
Ezekiel23:17 Nuko abo Banyababiloniya baza kumusambanya
Ezekiel23:18 Yariyandaritse ku mugaragaro
Ezekiel23:19 Yakabije kwihindura indaya
Ezekiel23:20 Yararikiye cyane abagabo bafite irari ribi nk'iry'indogobe y'ingabo
Ezekiel23:21 “Oholiba we
Ezekiel23:22 None rero Oholiba
Ezekiel23:23 Nzaguteza Abanyababiloniya n'Abanyakalideya bose
Ezekiel23:24 Bazagutera ari ingabo nyinshi baturutse mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel23:25 Kubera uburakari ngufitiye nzabareka bakugirire nabi
Ezekiel23:26 Bazagucuza imyambaro yawe n'ibirimbisho utamirije.
Ezekiel23:27 Nzahagarika irari ryawe n'uburaya bwawe watangiriye mu Misiri
Ezekiel23:28 “Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndakubwira nti: ‘Ngiye kukugabiza abo wanga kandi wazinutswe.
Ezekiel23:29 Bazakwanga urunuka kandi bagucuze ibyo waruhiye byose
Ezekiel23:30 Bizakugendekera bityo kuko wararikiye abanyamahanga
Ezekiel23:31 Wakurikije imigenzereze ya mukuru wawe
Ezekiel23:32 Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndakubwira nti: ‘Uzanywera ku gikombe mukuru wawe yagerewemo
Ezekiel23:33 Kizaguhindura umusinzi n'umunyamibabaro
Ezekiel23:34 Uzakinywa ukiranguze
Ezekiel23:35 “None rero Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Kubera ko wanyibagiwe ukantera umugongo
Ezekiel23:36 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel23:37 Barasambanye kandi barica. Bayobotse ibigirwamana byabo biteye ishozi
Ezekiel23:38 Nyamara si ibyo bakoze byonyine
Ezekiel23:39 Uwo munsi batambiye abana babo ibigirwamana byabo
Ezekiel23:40 Byongeye kandi batumye intumwa guhamagara abantu ba kure. Bahageze mwariyuhagiye
Ezekiel23:41 Hanyuma mwicara ku buriri bwiza
Ezekiel23:42 Nuko humvikana urusaku rw'abantu bagashize bari baturutse mu butayu
Ezekiel23:43 Nuko ndibaza nti: ‘Koko bariya bantu baracyasambana na bariya bagore basaziye mu buraya?’
Ezekiel23:44 Abagabo bahoraga basanga izo ndaya
Ezekiel23:45 Nyamara abantu b'intungane bazahana abo bagore
Ezekiel23:46 “None rero jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndavuga nti: ‘Abo bagore nimubagabize agatsiko k'abantu babatere ubwoba
Ezekiel23:47 Ako gatsiko kabatere amabuye
Ezekiel23:48 Bityo nzatsemba ubwiyandarike muri icyo gihugu
Ezekiel23:49 Namwe Ohola na Oholiba

Ezekiel24:4 Uyishyiremo intongo z'inyama
Ezekiel24:5 Ufate inyama nziza z'intama
Ezekiel24:6 “Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Ugushije ishyano wa mujyi w'abicanyi we! Umeze nk'isafuriya yaguye ingese zitagishoboye kuyishiraho. Arura intongo imwe imwe nta gutoranya.
Ezekiel24:7 Amaraso wamennye aracyadendeje mu mujyi rwagati
Ezekiel24:8 Amaraso wamennye nayarekeye ku rutare rwanamye
Ezekiel24:9 “Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndavuga nti: ‘Ugushije ishyano uwo mujyi w'abicanyi! Koko rero ngiye kurunda ikirundo kinini cy'inkwi
Ezekiel24:10 ngaho runda inkwi maze ucane umuriro
Ezekiel24:11 Hanyuma ushyire ku ziko isafuriya irimo ubusa
Ezekiel24:12 Nyamara ndavunwa n'ubusa
Ezekiel24:13 “Yeruzalemu we
Ezekiel24:14 Ni jye Uhoraho ubivuze kandi nzabisohoza nta kabuza
Ezekiel24:15 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel24:16 “Yewe muntu

Ezekiel24:18 Mu gitondo nagejeje ubutumwa ku bantu
Ezekiel24:19 Nuko abantu barambaza bati: “Mbese ibi ukora bisobanura iki?”
Ezekiel24:20 Ndabasubiza nti: “Uhoraho yarambwiye ati:

Ezekiel24:22 Icyo gihe muzigana ibyo nakoze. Ntimuzitwikira mu maso cyangwa ngo murye ibyokurya bihabwa abari mu cyunamo.
Ezekiel24:23 Muzambare ingofero mu mutwe kandi mwambare n'inkweto. Ntimuzajya mu cyunamo cyangwa ngo muganye
Ezekiel24:24 Icyo gihe jyewe Ezekiyeli nzababera ikimenyetso

Ezekiel24:26 Ibyo nibimara kuba
Ezekiel24:27 Icyo gihe ntuzongera kuba ikiragi

Ezekiel25:2 “Yewe muntu

Ezekiel25:4 ngiye kubateza abantu b'iburasirazuba babigarurire. Bazashinga inkambi n'amahema yabo mu gihugu cyanyu. Bazarya imbuto banywe n'amata byari bibagenewe.
Ezekiel25:5 Umurwa wa Raba nzawuhindura urwuri rw'ingamiya
Ezekiel25:6 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwakomye mu mashyi kandi musabagizwa n'ibyishimo kubera ibyago bya Isiraheli. Mwasuzuguye abantu banjye mubanga urunuka.

Ezekiel25:10 Abamowabu nzabateza abantu b'iburasirazuba babigarurire nk'uko byagendekeye Abamoni
Ezekiel25:11 Nzahana Abamowabu

Ezekiel25:15 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga nti: “Abafilisiti bihōreye bikabije
Ezekiel25:16 Ni yo mpamvu jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuga nti: ‘Ngiye guhana Abafilisiti. Nzarimbura Abakereti basigaye baturiye inyanja.

Ezekiel26:2 “Yewe muntu

Ezekiel26:4 Bazasenya inkuta za Tiri
Ezekiel26:5 Hazahinduka nk'imbuga iri hagati mu nyanja
Ezekiel26:6 bazicisha inkota abatuye mu mijyi ihakikije
Ezekiel26:7 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Tiri ngiye kuyiteza Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya
Ezekiel26:8 Bazica abatuye imijyi ikikije Tiri
Ezekiel26:9 Bazasenya inkuta zayo bakoresheje imashini z'intambara
Ezekiel26:10 Tiri izarengwaho n'umukungugu utumuwe n'amafarasi menshi
Ezekiel26:11 Ibinono by'amafarasi y'abanzi bizangiza amayira ya Tiri yose. Bazicisha inkota abaturage bayo
Ezekiel26:12 Bazasahura umutungo n'ibicuruzwa byayo. Bazasenya inkuta zayo n'amazu yayo meza
Ezekiel26:13 Nzacecekesha urusaku rw'indirimbo zayo
Ezekiel26:14 Tiri izasigara imeze nk'urutare rwanamye abarobyi banikaho inshundura zabo
Ezekiel26:15 “Dore ibyo jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mbwira umujyi wa Tiri: abaturiye inyanja bazahinda umushyitsi bumvise urusaku rw'irimbuka ryawe
Ezekiel26:16 Abami bose baturiye inyanja bazava ku ntebe zabo
Ezekiel26:17 “Bazakuririmbira indirimbo y'icyunamo bati: ‘Mbega ngo wa mujyi w'icyamamare urarimbuka
Ezekiel26:18 None abaturiye inyanja barahinda umushyitsi

Ezekiel26:20 Nzakumanurira ikuzimu usangeyo abapfuye bahamaze igihe. Uzaguma muri uko kuzimu hamwe n'abapfuye
Ezekiel26:21 Abantu bose bazaterwa ubwoba n'iherezo ryawe
Ezekiel27:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel27:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel27:3 umujyi wubatswe ku nkengero z'inyanja kandi ukagirana ubucuruzi n'abantu baturiye inyanja
Ezekiel27:4 wirata ko uturiye inyanja
Ezekiel27:5 Abakubatse bakoresheje amasipure y'i Seniri
Ezekiel27:6 Ingashya zawe zabājwe mu biti binini by'i Bashani
Ezekiel27:7 Umwenda wakuyoboraga waturutse mu Misiri
Ezekiel27:8 Tiri we
Ezekiel27:9 Abakuru b'i Gabali n'abanyabukorikori baho
Ezekiel27:10 Abaperesi n'ab'Abaludi n'Abaputi bari mu ngabo zawe
Ezekiel27:11 Ingabo z'Abaruvadi zarindaga inkuta zawe
Ezekiel27:12 “Abantu b'i Tarushishi baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa by'ibintu byinshi by'agaciro. Ibicuruzwa byawe babiguranaga ifeza n'icyuma
Ezekiel27:13 Abagereki n'abaturage ba Tubali n'Abamesheki na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa
Ezekiel27:14 Abantu b'i Beti-Togaruma baguhaga amafarasi aheka imitwaro n'ay'intambara n'inyumbu.
Ezekiel27:15 Abantu b'i Dedani na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa. Abatuye mu birwa bari abaguzi bawe
Ezekiel27:16 Abanyasiriya na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa by'ibintu byinshi by'agaciro. Baguhaga amabuye ya emerodi n'imyenda y'imihemba
Ezekiel27:17 Abayuda n'Abisiraheli na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa. Baguhaga ingano z'i Miniti
Ezekiel27:18 Abantu b'i Damasi na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa by'ibintu byinshi by'agaciro. Baguhaga divayi yengerwa i Heliboni n'ubwoya bw'intama z'i Sahari.
Ezekiel27:19 Abakomoka kuri Dani n'Abagereki baturutse Uzali bajyanaga ibicuruzwa byawe
Ezekiel27:20 Abantu b'i Dedani na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa by'imyenda iboshywe
Ezekiel27:21 Abarabu ndetse n'abategetsi b'igihugu cya Kedari na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa. Baguhaga abana b'intama n'amapfizi y'intama n'ay'ihene.
Ezekiel27:22 Abacuruzi b'i Sheba n'ab'i Rāma na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa. Baguhaga imibavu ihumura neza y'ubwoko bwose
Ezekiel27:23 Abacuruzi b'i Harani n'ab'i Kane n'abo muri Edeni na bo baguraga nawe ibicuruzwa
Ezekiel27:24 Mu masoko yawe bahazanaga imyenda y'agaciro
Ezekiel27:25 “Amato y'i Tarushishi yatwaraga ibicuruzwa byawe
Ezekiel27:26 Abasare bawe bakujyanye mu nyanja rwagati
Ezekiel27:27 Ubutunzi n'ibicuruzwa n'imari byawe
Ezekiel27:28 Abaturiye inyanja bazahinda umushyitsi
Ezekiel27:29 Amato yose bayavuyemo
Ezekiel27:30 Bazarangurura amajwi bakuririre bababaye
Ezekiel27:31 Bazimoza babitewe nawe
Ezekiel27:32 Bazatera indirimbo y'amaganya ku bwawe
Ezekiel27:33 Iyo ibicuruzwa byawe byambutswaga mu bihugu bya kure
Ezekiel27:34 None wasandariye ikuzimu mu nyanja
Ezekiel27:35 Abatuye mu birwa bose bababajwe n'ibikubayeho
Ezekiel27:36 Abacuruzi b'amahanga baraganya
Ezekiel28:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel28:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel28:3 Wowe wibwira ko uri umunyabwenge kuruta Daniyeli
Ezekiel28:4 Warikungahaje kubera ubwenge n'ubushishozi bwawe
Ezekiel28:5 Wagwije umutungo kubera ubuhanga ufite mu bucuruzi
Ezekiel28:6 “None rero jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndavuga nti: ‘Kubera ko wibwiye ko uri umunyabwenge nk'imana
Ezekiel28:7 ngiye kuguteza abanyamahanga bakurwanye
Ezekiel28:8 Bazakuroha ikuzimu mu nyanja
Ezekiel28:9 Ubwo se uzongera kuvuga ko uri imana
Ezekiel28:10 Uzapfa urw'abatakebwe
Ezekiel28:11 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel28:12 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel28:13 Wari utuye muri Edeni ari yo busitani bw'Imana
Ezekiel28:14 Aho wabaga nahashyize umukerubi wo kukurinda
Ezekiel28:15 Wagize imyifatire itagira amakemwa kuva ukiremwa
Ezekiel28:16 Ubucuruzi bwawe bwo hirya no hino bwagukururiye ubugome n'ibyaha. Ni yo mpamu nagukojeje isoni nkakuvana ku musozi wanjye
Ezekiel28:17 Ubwiza bwawe bwatumye wirata
Ezekiel28:18 Ibyaha byawe byinshi n'ubucuruzi bwawe bwuzuye uburiganya
Ezekiel28:19 Amahanga yose akuzi azumirwa kubera iherezo ryawe riteye ubwoba
Ezekiel28:20 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel28:21 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel28:22 ubwire abayituye ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuze nti: ‘Sidoni we
Ezekiel28:23 Nzaguteza icyorezo maze amaraso atembe mu mayira yawe. Uzaterwa impande zose kandi abaturage bawe bazicirwa mu mujyi. Bityo abantu bose bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho.’ ”
Ezekiel28:24 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Amahanga akikije Isiraheli ntazongera kuyibangamira ngo ayibere nk'ibitovu cyangwa imifatangwe bihanda. Bityo abantu bose bazamenya ko ndi Nyagasani Uhoraho.”
Ezekiel28:25 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nimara gukoranya Abisiraheli nkabavana mu mahanga aho bari baratataniye
Ezekiel28:26 Bazahaba mu mahoro biyubakire amazu
Ezekiel29:1 Ku itariki ya cumi n'ebyiri z'ukwezi kwa cumi mu mwaka wa cumi tujyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel29:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel29:3 ubabwire ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuze nti: ‘Ngiye kukurwanya wowe mwami wa Misiri
Ezekiel29:4 Ngiye gushyira ururobo mu rwasaya rwawe
Ezekiel29:5 Nzakujugunya mu butayu hamwe n'amafi yose yo muri Nili
Ezekiel29:6 bityo abatuye Misiri bose bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho.’ ” Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Misiri we
Ezekiel29:7 Bakwishingikirijeho urasaduka ubakomeretsa ibiganza ndetse ubaca n'intugu
Ezekiel29:8 Ni yo mpamvu Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati: ‘Nzaguteza intambara itsembe abantu n'amatungo.
Ezekiel29:9 Igihugu cya Misiri nzagihindura ikidaturwa
Ezekiel29:10 Ni yo mpamvu ngiye kukurwanya wowe n'uruzi rwawe. Igihugu cya Misiri nzakirimbura gihinduke amatongo
Ezekiel29:11 Nta muntu cyangwa amatungo bizongera kuhanyura
Ezekiel29:12 Igihugu cya Misiri nzagihindura ubutayu kurusha ibindi bihugu byose byo ku isi
Ezekiel29:13 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nyuma y'imyaka mirongo ine nzakoranya Abanyamisiri
Ezekiel29:14 Nzabagarura mbavane aho bajyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel29:15 Buzaba ubwami budafite ingufu kandi ntibazongera kwirata ku yandi mahanga
Ezekiel29:16 Misiri ntizongera kuba icyizere cy'Abisiraheli
Ezekiel29:17 Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa mbere mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n'irindwi tujyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel29:18 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel29:19 None rero jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndavuze nti: ‘Misiri ngiye kuyigabiza Nebukadinezari umwami wa Babiloniya ayisahure
Ezekiel29:20 Ngiye kumuha igihugu cya Misiri ho igihembo kubera umurimo yakoze. Koko rero ingabo ze ni jye zakoreraga.’ Uko ni ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuze.
Ezekiel29:21 Icyo gihe nzongerera Abisiraheli imbaraga

Ezekiel30:2 “Yewe muntu

Ezekiel31:1 Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa gatatu mu mwaka wa cumi n'umwe tujyanywe ho iminyago

Ezekiel31:9 Nayitatse ubwiza n'amashami menshi

Ezekiel32:5 Ibisigazwa byawe nzabinyanyagiza ku misozi no mu bibaya.
Ezekiel32:6 Nzasesa amaraso yawe ku butaka maze atembe ku misozi no mu mikokwe.

Ezekiel32:8 Nzazimya ibinyarumuri byose byo ku ijuru kubera wowe
Ezekiel32:9 Abantu benshi nzabakura umutima nujyanwa ho umunyago mu mahanga

Ezekiel32:13 Nzatsemba amatungo yawe yose aragirwa hafi ya Nili
Ezekiel32:14 Nzagabanya umurego w'amazi yo mu Misiri
Ezekiel32:15 Nimara guhindura Misiri ikidaturwa
Ezekiel32:16 Uyu muburo udasanzwe uzahinduka indirimbo y'amaganya. Abagore bo mu mahanga bazayiririmba baririra Misiri n'abantu bayo bose.” Uko ni ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze.
Ezekiel32:17 Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu z'ukwezi kwa mbere mu mwaka wa cumi n'ibiri tujyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel32:18 “Yewe muntu

Ezekiel32:20 mupfane n'abaguye ku rugamba. Koko inkota yiteguye kwica Abanyamisiri bose.’
Ezekiel32:21 Aho ikuzimu intwari zikomeye n'abafatanyije na Misiri bazavuga bati: ‘Abanyamisiri badusanze ikuzimu
Ezekiel32:22 “Umwami wa Ashūru ni ho ari hamwe n'ingabo ze
Ezekiel32:23 Imva zabo ziri kure cyane ikuzimu
Ezekiel32:24 “Umwami wa Elamu ni ho ari hamwe n'ingabo ze
Ezekiel32:25 Koko rero umwami wa Elamu yahambwe hamwe n'abantu be
Ezekiel32:26 “Umwami wa Mesheki n'uwa Tubali ni ho bari hamwe n'ingabo zabo
Ezekiel32:27 Ntibahambwe hamwe n'abandi b'intwari bo mu bihe bya kera bahambanywe intwaro zabo
Ezekiel32:28 Namwe mwa Banyamisiri mwe
Ezekiel32:29 “Abedomu na bo ni ho bari hamwe n'abami babo n'abategetsi babo
Ezekiel32:30 “Abategetsi bose bo mu majyaruguru n'Abanyasidoni na bo ni ho bari

Ezekiel33:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel33:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel33:3 Uwo muntu iyo abonye igitero kije avuza ihembe akaburira abaturage.
Ezekiel33:4 Hagize umuntu wumva iryo hembe ntaryiteho abanzi bakaza bakamwica
Ezekiel33:5 Azapfa azize ikosa rye
Ezekiel33:6 Icyakora uwo murinzi nabona igitero kije ntavuze ihembe ngo aburire abaturage
Ezekiel33:7 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel33:8 Nimbwira umugome nti: ‘Wa mugome we
Ezekiel33:9 Icyakora nuramuka uburiye uwo mugome ariko ntareke imigenzereze ye mibi
Ezekiel33:10 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel33:11 Babwire ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati: ‘Ndahiye ubugingo bwanjye ko ntanezezwa n'urupfu rw'umugome
Ezekiel33:12 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel33:13 Nimbwira intungane nti: ‘Uzabaho nta kabuza
Ezekiel33:14 Nimbwira kandi umugome nti: ‘Uzapfa nta kabuza
Ezekiel33:15 nasubiza kandi ibyo yahawe ho ingwate n'ibyo yibye
Ezekiel33:16 Nta na kimwe mu bicumuro bye kizibukwa
Ezekiel33:17 “Abisiraheli baravuga bati: ‘Imigenzereze y'Uhoraho ntitunganye’
Ezekiel33:18 Niba intungane iretse gukora ibitunganye igakora ibibi
Ezekiel33:19 Niba umugome aretse gukora ibibi agaharanira ukuri n'ubutungane
Ezekiel33:20 Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel33:21 Ku itariki ya gatanu y'ukwezi kwa cumi mu mwaka wa cumi n'ibiri tujyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel33:22 Ku mugoroba wabanjirije ukuza k'uwo muntu nari niyumvisemo imbaraga z'Uhoraho
Ezekiel33:23 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel33:24 “Yewe muntu

Ezekiel33:26 Mwishingikiriza ku nkota zanyu

Ezekiel33:28 Igihugu nzagihindura umusaka
Ezekiel33:29 Igihe nzaba maze guhindura igihugu umusaka
Ezekiel33:30 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel33:31 Abantu banjye bazakoranira imbere yawe kugira ngo bumve ibyo uvuga

Ezekiel34:4 Izifite intege nke ntimwazitayeho
Ezekiel34:5 Koko intama zaratatanye kubera kubura abashumba
Ezekiel34:6 Intama zanjye zirangāra ku misozi no ku dusozi
Ezekiel34:7 “None rero mwa bashumba mwe
Ezekiel34:8 Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndahiye ubugingo bwanjye
Ezekiel34:9 None rero bashumba banjye
Ezekiel34:10 Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndavuga nti: ‘Mwa bashumba mwe

Ezekiel34:12 Nk'uko umushumba yita ku ntama ze zari zatatanye
Ezekiel34:13 Koko rero nzazivana mu bihugu by'amahanga
Ezekiel34:14 Nzaziragira mu rwuri rwiza
Ezekiel34:15 Intama zanjye ni jye ubwanjye uzaziragira kandi nzibyagize. Uko ni ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuze.
Ezekiel34:16 Intama zazimiye nzazitarura n'izatatanye nzigarure
Ezekiel34:17 “Naho mwebwe ntama zanjye
Ezekiel34:18 Mbese ntimwanyuzwe no kuragirwa mu rwuri rwiza? Kuki muribata ubwatsi bwo mu rwuri rwanyu? Mbese ntimwanyuzwe no kunywa amazi meza? Kuki mutoba asigaye?
Ezekiel34:19 None se intama zanjye zizarisha ubwatsi mwaribase
Ezekiel34:20 Ni yo mpamvu jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mbwira intama zanjye nti: “Ngiye gukiranura intama zinanutse n'izibyibushye.
Ezekiel34:21 Intama z'inyantegenke mwazisunikishije intugu
Ezekiel34:22 Nzita ku ntama zanjye ku buryo zitazongera gushimutwa kandi nzazikiranura.

Ezekiel34:24 Jyewe Uhoraho

Ezekiel34:26 Nzabaha umugisha kandi mbatuze ahakikije umusozi wanyeguriwe
Ezekiel34:27 Ibiti bizera imbuto n'ubutaka butange umusaruro
Ezekiel34:28 Abanyamahanga ntibazongera kubashimuta
Ezekiel34:29 Nzabaha imirima irumbuka
Ezekiel34:30 Ubwo ni bwo Abisiraheli bazamenya ko jyewe Uhoraho Imana yabo ndi kumwe na bo
