Ezekiel36:3 “Ubabwire kandi ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuga nti: ‘Mwa misozi ya Isiraheli mwe
Ezekiel36:4 None rero mwa misozi ya Isiraheli mwe
Ezekiel36:5 “Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ndavuga nti: ‘Amahanga agukikije narayarakariye bikabije
Ezekiel36:6 None rero hanurira igihugu cya Isiraheli
Ezekiel36:7 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ndahiye nkomeje ko amahanga abakikije na yo azakorwa n'isoni.
Ezekiel36:8 Nyamara ku misozi ya Isiraheli ibiti bizongera bimere amababi
Ezekiel36:9 Koko rero nzabitaho
Ezekiel36:10 Nzagwiza Abisiraheli
Ezekiel36:11 Nzagwiza abantu n'amatungo
Ezekiel36:12 Bantu banjye b'Abisiraheli
Ezekiel36:13 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Koko abantu bavuga ko igihugu cyanyu cyamaze abantu kandi cyihekuye.
Ezekiel36:14 None rero ntimuzongera kumarana cyangwa ngo mwihekure. Uko ni ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuze.
Ezekiel36:15 Ntabwo nzemera ko amahanga yongera kubakoza isoni cyangwa kubasuzugura
Ezekiel36:16 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel36:17 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel36:18 Ni cyo cyatumye mbasukaho uburakari bwanjye mbahora amaraso bamennye mu gihugu
Ezekiel36:19 Narabahannye kubera imibereho yabo n'imigenzereze yabo mibi
Ezekiel36:20 Mu mahanga yose batataniyemo basuzuguje izina ryanjye riziranenge
Ezekiel36:21 Ibyo byatumye mbabara
Ezekiel36:22 “None rero ubwire Abisiraheli ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuga nti: ‘Ibyo ngiye gukora sinzabikora ku bwanyu
Ezekiel36:23 Ngiye kwerekana ubuziranenge bw'izina ryanjye rikomeye mwasuzuguje mu mahanga
Ezekiel36:24 Nzabavana mu mahanga no mu bihugu byose mwatataniyemo
Ezekiel36:25 Nzabuhagiza amazi meza maze mbahumanure
Ezekiel36:26 Nzabaha umutima mushya mbashyiremo n'ibitekerezo bishya. Nzabakuramo umutima ukomeye nk'ibuye mbashyiremo umutima uboneye.
Ezekiel36:27 Nzabashyiramo Mwuka wanjye
Ezekiel36:28 Muzatura mu gihugu nahaye ba sokuruza
Ezekiel36:29 Nzabakiza ubwandure bwanyu bwose
Ezekiel36:30 Nzagwiza ibiti byera imbuto n'umusaruro w'ibyo muhinga
Ezekiel36:31 Muzibuka ingeso zanyu mbi n'ibibi mwakoze
Ezekiel36:32 Yemwe mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel36:33 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe nzabahumanura nkabakiza ibicumuro byanyu byose
Ezekiel36:34 Ubutaka bwari ubutayu buzongera buhingwe
Ezekiel36:35 Ahubwo bazavuga bati: ‘Igihugu cyari cyarabaye umusaka cyahindutse nk'ubusitani bwa Edeni
Ezekiel36:36 Amahanga abakikije yasigaye azamenya ko ari jye Uhoraho wongera kubaka imijyi yari amatongo kandi ngahinga imirima yari yararaye. Uko ni ko jyewe Uhoraho mvuze kandi nzabisohoza.”
Ezekiel36:37 Nuko Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzongera ndeke Abisiraheli bansabe kubafasha
Ezekiel36:38 Bazaba benshi nk'umukumbi wagenewe gutambwa ho ibitambo i Yeruzalemu ku minsi mikuru
Ezekiel37:1 Uhoraho yanshyizemo imbaraga
Ezekiel37:2 Nuko anzengurutsa hose muri ayo magufwa yari mu kibaya
Ezekiel37:3 Uhoraho arambaza ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel37:4 Nuko arambwira ati: “Ngaho hanurira ayo magufwa uyabwire uti: ‘Mwa magufwa yumye mwe
Ezekiel37:5 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Ngiye kubashyiramo umwuka maze mubeho.
Ezekiel37:6 Ngiye kubashyiraho imitsi mbomekeho inyama
Ezekiel37:7 Nuko ndahanura nk'uko nabitegetswe. Mu gihe nahanuraga humvikana urusaku rw'ibikocagurana
Ezekiel37:8 Nitegereje mbona imitsi n'inyama biyometseho
Ezekiel37:9 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel37:10 Nuko ndahanura nk'uko yantegetse
Ezekiel37:11 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel37:12 Uhanurire Abisiraheli
Ezekiel37:13 Nimara gukingura imva zanyu nkabavanamo
Ezekiel37:14 Nzabashyiramo umwuka wanjye mwongere mubeho kandi mbatuze mu gihugu cyanyu. Ubwo muzamenya ko ari jye Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze kandi nzabisohoza.’ ”
Ezekiel37:15 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel37:16 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel37:17 Nuko ufate izo nkoni uzireshyeshye
Ezekiel37:18 Bene wanyu nibakubaza bati: ‘Mbese ibyo bisobanura iki?’
Ezekiel37:19 uzabasubize ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho ngiye gufata inkoni ishushanya Isiraheli
Ezekiel37:20 Ufate izo nkoni zombi wanditseho ku buryo abantu bose bareba ibyanditsweho
Ezekiel37:21 ubabwire ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuga nti: ‘Ngiye kuvana Abisiraheli mu mahanga batataniyemo
Ezekiel37:22 Nzabagira umuryango umwe mu gihugu
Ezekiel37:23 Ntibazongera kwihumanyisha ibigirwamana byabo biteye ishozi cyangwa ibicumuro byabo
Ezekiel37:24 Umwami umeze nk'umugaragu wanjye Dawidi ni we uzabategeka
Ezekiel37:25 Bazatura mu gihugu nahaye umugaragu wanjye Yakobo
Ezekiel37:26 Nzagirana na bo Isezerano ry'amahoro y'iteka ryose. Nzabakomeza kandi mbagwize
Ezekiel37:27 Nzaturana na bo mbe Imana yabo
Ezekiel37:28 Nimara gushyira Ingoro yanjye hagati yabo iteka ryose
Ezekiel38:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Ezekiel38:2 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel38:3 Umubwire ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuga nti: ‘Ndakwibasiye wowe Gogi
Ezekiel38:4 Ngiye gushyira inkonzo mu nzasaya zawe maze ngukurubane. Nzakwirukana mu gihugu cyawe hamwe n'ingabo zawe zose: amafarasi yawe n'abayagenderaho bambaye imyambaro y'intambara
Ezekiel38:5 Muzaba muri kumwe n'abasirikari b'u Buperesi
Ezekiel38:6 Abasirikari bose bo mu gihugu cya Gomeri na Beti-Togaruma ho mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel38:7 Itegure hamwe n'imbaga yose muri kumwe maze ubayobore.
Ezekiel38:8 Nyuma y'imyaka myinshi nzagutegeka gutera igihugu cya Isiraheli. Uzahasanga abantu bacitse ku icumu baturutse mu mahanga menshi bibereye mu mutekano. Uzatera imisozi ya Isiraheli yari imaze igihe kirekire ari nk'ubutayu
Ezekiel38:9 Wowe n'ingabo zawe zose n'amahanga menshi
Ezekiel38:10 Nyagasani Uhoraho arabwira Gogi ati: “Igihe nikigera ibitekerezo bizakuzamo
Ezekiel38:11 Uzavuga uti: ‘Ngiye gutera igihugu kitagira ukirengera
Ezekiel38:12 Nzanyaga kandi nsahure umutungo w'abantu batuye mu mijyi yahoze ari amatongo
Ezekiel38:13 Abatuye i Sheba n'i Dedani
Ezekiel38:14 “None rero yewe muntu
Ezekiel38:15 Icyo gihe uzava mu majyaruguru y'igihugu cyawe uri kumwe n'ingabo z'amahanga menshi
Ezekiel38:16 Uzatera ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli umeze nk'igihu kibuditse hejuru y'igihugu. Icyo gihe wowe Gogi
Ezekiel38:17 Ni wowe navugaga kera nkoresheje abagaragu banjye
Ezekiel38:18 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Kuri uwo munsi Gogi azatera igihugu cya Isiraheli
Ezekiel38:19 Mbivuganye ishyari n'uburakari bukaze
Ezekiel38:20 Amafi n'inyoni n'inyamaswa zose n'ibikururuka hasi byose ndetse n'abantu bose bo ku isi
Ezekiel38:21 Nzateza Gogi ibyago impande zose
Ezekiel38:22 Nzamuteza ibyorezo n'ubwicanyi
Ezekiel38:23 Ubwo ni bwo nzereka amahanga menshi ubuhangange bwanjye n'ubuziranenge bwanjye
Ezekiel39:1 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel39:2 Nzagutwara ku ngufu nkuvane mu majyaruguru y'igihugu cyawe
Ezekiel39:3 Nzavunagura umuheto uri mu kuboko kwawe kw'ibumoso
Ezekiel39:4 Uzagwa ku misozi ya Isiraheli wowe n'ingabo zawe n'amahanga agushyigikiye. Imirambo yanyu nzayigaburira ibisiga by'amoko yose n'inyamaswa.
Ezekiel39:5 Uzagwa ku gasi nk'uko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho nabivuze.
Ezekiel39:6 Nzateza inkongi y'umuriro igihugu cya Magogi
Ezekiel39:7 Nzamenyekanisha izina ryanjye riziranenge mu bwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli
Ezekiel39:8 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Dore wa munsi navuze urageze ndetse uraje! Uko ni ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze.
Ezekiel39:9 Abatuye mu mijyi ya Isiraheli bazarundanya intwaro zasizwe n'abanzi babo: ingabo n'imiheto n'imyambi
Ezekiel39:10 Ntibazongera gutashya inkwi cyangwa gutema ibiti mu ishyamba
Ezekiel39:11 “Icyo gihe nzaha Gogi aho azahambwa mu gihugu cya Isiraheli mu kibaya cy'Abagenzi
Ezekiel39:12 Abisiraheli bazamara amezi arindwi bahamba iyo mirambo kugira ngo bahumanure igihugu.
Ezekiel39:13 Abantu bose bazitabira kubahamba
Ezekiel39:14 “Mu iherezo ry'ayo mezi arindwi
Ezekiel39:15 Igihe bazaba bazenguruka igihugu
Ezekiel39:16 Aho kandi hazaba umujyi witwa Hamona
Ezekiel39:17 Nyagasani Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel39:18 muzarya imirambo y'ingabo z'intwari munywe n'amaraso y'abategetsi b'isi. Bose bazicwa nk'amapfizi y'intama cyangwa amasekurume y'ihene
Ezekiel39:19 Muri ibyo birori nzabategurira muzarya ibinure muhage
Ezekiel39:20 Muzarira ku meza yanjye muhage amafarasi n'abayagenderaho
Ezekiel39:21 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzagaragariza amahanga ikuzo ryanjye
Ezekiel39:22 Uhereye icyo gihe ndetse no mu gihe kizaza
Ezekiel39:23 Amahanga azamenya yuko Abisiraheli bajyanywe ho iminyago ku bw'ibicumuro byabo. Koko rero barampemukiye ndabatererana
Ezekiel39:24 Narabazinutswe mbahana nkurikije ububi bwabo n'ibicumuro byabo.”
Ezekiel39:25 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Nzagarura Abisiraheli bakomoka kuri Yakobo mbavane aho bajyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel39:26 Icyo gihe bazibagirwa uko basuzuguwe n'ubuhemu bwose bangiriye
Ezekiel39:27 Nimara kubagarura mbavanye mu mahanga
Ezekiel39:28 Ubwo ni bwo bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho Imana yabo
Ezekiel39:29 Sinzongera kubatererana ukundi
Ezekiel40:1 Mu ntangiriro y'umwaka wa makumyabiri n'itanu tujyanywe ho iminyago
Ezekiel40:2 Mu ibonekerwa Imana yanjyanye mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
Ezekiel40:3 Uhoraho anjyanayo mbona umuntu warabagiranaga nk'umuringa. Yari ahagaze mu irembo
Ezekiel40:4 Uwo muntu arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel40:5 Nuko mbona urukuta ruzengurutse Ingoro y'Imana. Wa muntu yari afite urubingo rwa metero eshatu
Ezekiel40:6 Agana ku irembo ry'iburasirazuba azamuka ku ngazi zaryo
Ezekiel40:7 Naho ibyumba by'abarinzi
Ezekiel40:8 Wa muntu apima icyo cyumba asanga gifite metero enye z'uburebure
Ezekiel40:9 
Ezekiel40:10 Ku irembo ry'iburasirazuba hari ibyumba by'abarinzi
Ezekiel40:11 Nuko wa muntu apima ubugari bw'urugi rw'irembo buba metero eshanu
Ezekiel40:12 Imbere ya buri cyumba cy'abarinzi hari urukuta rufite icya kabiri cya metero y'ubuhagarike
Ezekiel40:13 Wa muntu apima ubugari ahereye ku rukuta rwo hirya rw'icyumba ageza ku rukuta rwo hino rw'ikindi cyumba
Ezekiel40:14 Apima kandi icyumba cyari giteganye n'Ingoro asanga gifite metero icumi z'ubugari. Urugo rw'Ingoro rwari ruzengurutse icyo cyumba.
Ezekiel40:15 Uhereye ku irembo ry'inyuma ukageza ku muryango w'icyumba cy'urwinjiriro
Ezekiel40:16 Mu nkuta z'inyuma z'ibyumba byose by'abarinzi kimwe no mu nkuta z'imbere zitandukanya ibyo byumba
Ezekiel40:17 Uwo muntu anjyana mu rugo rw'Ingoro rw'inyuma. Urwo rugo rwose rwari rushashemo amabuye kandi rukikijwe n'ibyumba mirongo itatu.
Ezekiel40:18 Ayo mabuye yari ashashe mu mpande zose z'amarembo no mu rugo hose. Mu rugo rw'inyuma hari haciye bugufi kuruta mu rugo rw'imbere.
Ezekiel40:19 Hanyuma wa muntu apima ahereye mu marembo y'urugo rw'inyuma ageza mu marembo y'urugo rw'imbere
Ezekiel40:20 Nuko apima uburebure n'ubugari bw'irembo ryo mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel40:21 Kuri iryo rembo hari ibyumba by'abarinzi
Ezekiel40:22 Icyumba cy'urwinjiriro n'amadirishya n'amashusho y'imikindo
Ezekiel40:23 Ahateganye n'irembo ryo mu majyaruguru hari irembo ryerekeye mu rugo rw'imbere
Ezekiel40:24 Nuko wa muntu anjyana mu ruhande rwo mu majyepfo
Ezekiel40:25 Hari amadirishya ku mpande zose z'iryo rembo no ku cyumba cy'urwinjiriro. Ayo madirishya yari ameze nk'ayo ku yandi marembo
Ezekiel40:26 Umuntu yageraga kuri iryo rembo azamutse ku ngazi ndwi
Ezekiel40:27 Urugo rw'imbere na rwo rwari rufite irembo ryerekeye mu majyepfo
Ezekiel40:28 Nuko wa muntu anjyana mu rugo rw'imbere anyujije mu irembo ryerekeye mu majyepfo
Ezekiel40:29 Ibyumba by'abarinzi n'inkuta zabyo z'imbere n'icyumba cy'urwinjiriro
Ezekiel40:30 
Ezekiel40:31 Ku nkuta z'imbere z'icyumba cy'urwinjiriro cyerekeye mu rugo rw'inyuma
Ezekiel40:32 Nuko wa muntu anjyana mu rugo rw'imbere anyujije mu irembo ryerekeye iburasirazuba
Ezekiel40:33 Ibyumba by'abarinzi n'inkuta zabyo n'icyumba cy'urwinjiriro
Ezekiel40:34 Icyumba cy'urwinjiriro cyari cyerekeye mu rugo rw'inyuma. Ku nkuta zacyo zombi z'imbere hari hashushanyije imikindo. Kugera kuri iryo rembo hari ingazi umunani.
Ezekiel40:35 Nuko wa muntu anjyana ku irembo ryerekeye mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel40:36 Kuri iryo rembo na ho hari ibyumba by'abarinzi n'inkuta zabyo
Ezekiel40:37 Icyumba cy'urwinjiriro cyari cyerekeye mu rugo rw'inyuma. Ku nkuta zacyo zombi z'imbere hari hashushanyije imikindo. Kugera kuri iryo rembo hari ingazi umunani.
Ezekiel40:38 Mu rugo rw'inyuma hari icyumba gifite umuryango werekeye ku cyumba cy'urwinjiriro. Aho ni ho basukuriraga inyama z'amatungo yatambwaga ho ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro.
Ezekiel40:39 Mu cyumba cy'urwinjiriro hari ameza abiri kuri buri ruhande. Kuri ayo meza ni ho babagiraga ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Ezekiel40:40 Inyuma y'icyumba cy'urwinjiriro
Ezekiel40:41 Ni ukuvuga ko hari ameza ane ku ruhande rumwe rw'irembo
Ezekiel40:42 Aho kandi hari ameza ane abājwe mu mabuye
Ezekiel40:43 Ayo meza yari azengurutswe n'umuyoboro ufite ubugari bwa santimetero umunani
Ezekiel40:44 Wa muntu anjyana mu rugo rw'imbere. Inyuma y'irembo ry'urugo rw'imbere hari ibyumba bibiri. Kimwe cyari mu ruhande rw'irembo ryo mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel40:45 Nuko wa muntu arambwira ati: “Iki cyumba cyerekeje umuryango mu majyepfo
Ezekiel40:46 Naho icyumba cyerekeje umuryango mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel40:47 Nuko apima urwo rugo rw'imbere asanga rufite impande enye zingana
Ezekiel40:48 Nuko wa muntu anjyana mu cyumba cy'urwinjiriro rw'Ingoro apima inkuta zacyo
Ezekiel40:49 Icyumba cy'urwinjiriro cyari gifite metero icumi z'uburebure
Ezekiel41:1 Hanyuma wa muntu anjyana mu Cyumba kizira inenge cy'Ingoro maze aragipima. Inkuta z'urwinjiriro zari zifite metero eshatu z'ubugari.
Ezekiel41:2 Umuryango wari ufite metero eshanu z'ubugari
Ezekiel41:3 Nuko wa muntu yinjira mu Cyumba kizira inenge apima inkingi z'urwinjiriro
Ezekiel41:4 Apima icyumba cy'imbere asanga gifite impande enye zingana
Ezekiel41:5 Wa muntu apima umubyimba w'urukuta rw'Ingoro asanga ari metero eshatu. Amazu yometse ku mpande zose z'Ingoro yari agizwe n'ibyumba bito bikurikiranye
Ezekiel41:6 Ayo mazu yari agizwe n'amagorofa atatu
Ezekiel41:7 Ibyo byumba byari byometse ku Ngoro byagendaga birutana uko bikurikirana
Ezekiel41:8 Nuko mbona urufatiro rukikije Ingoro
Ezekiel41:9 Urukuta rw'inyuma rw'ibyo byumba rwari rufite umubyimba wa metero ebyiri n'igice. Naho umwanya utubatsemo wari hagati ya bya byumba
Ezekiel41:10 n'ibyumba by'abatambyi
Ezekiel41:11 Ibyo byumba byari bifite imiryango ibiri yerekeye kuri wa mwanya utubatsemo
Ezekiel41:12 Iburengerazuba bw'Ingoro hari amazu ateganye na wa mwanya utubatsemo. Ayo mazu yari afite uburebure bwa metero mirongo ine n'eshanu
Ezekiel41:13 Nuko wa muntu apima Ingoro asanga ifite metero mirongo itanu z'uburebure. Naho wa mwanya utubatsemo n'amazu n'inkuta zayo
Ezekiel41:14 Ubugari bw'imbere y'Ingoro n'ubw'umwanya utubatsemo mu ruhande rw'iburasirazuba
Ezekiel41:15 Wa muntu apima uburebure bw'inzu yari mu rugo rw'inyuma rw'Ingoro
Ezekiel41:16 byose byari byometseho imbaho guhera hasi kugeza ku madirishya
Ezekiel41:17 Uhereye hejuru y'umuryango ukagera imbere mu Ngoro no ku nkuta zose imbere n'inyuma
Ezekiel41:18 hari hashushanyijeho abakerubi n'imikindo. Hagati y'abakerubi babiri hari hashushanyijeho umukindo. Buri mukerubi yari afite mu maso habiri.
Ezekiel41:19 Ahasa n'ah'umuntu hari herekeye umukindo wo ku ruhande rumwe
Ezekiel41:20 Mu mpande zose kuva hasi kugera hejuru y'umuryango
Ezekiel41:21 Ibizingiti by'umuryango w'Icyumba kizira inenge byari mpande enye. Imbere y'Icyumba kizira inenge cyane hari igisa
Ezekiel41:22 n'urutambiro rubājwe mu mbaho
Ezekiel41:23 Urugi rw'Icyumba kizira inenge n'urw'Icyumba kizira inenge cyane zari ngari
Ezekiel41:24 Izo nzugi zashoboraga gukingurwa zombi
Ezekiel41:25 Ku rugi rwo ku Cyumba kizira inenge hari hashushanyijeho abakerubi n'imikindo nk'ibyo ku nkuta. Hejuru y'umuryango w'icyumba cy'urwinjiriro
Ezekiel41:26 Ku mpande zose z'icyumba cy'urwinjiriro hari amadirishya y'ibyuma bisobekeranye
Ezekiel42:1 Nuko wa muntu anjyana mu rugo rw'inyuma rw'Ingoro
Ezekiel42:2 Iyo nzu yari yerekeye mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel42:3 Ku ruhande rumwe iyo nzu yari iteganye n'umwanya ukikije Ingoro
Ezekiel42:4 Imbere y'iyo nzu hari inzira ya metero mirongo itanu z'uburebure na metero eshanu z'ubugari. Iyo nzu yari yerekeye mu majyaruguru.
Ezekiel42:5 Amagorofa yo hejuru yagendaga aba mato ku yo hasi.
Ezekiel42:6 Ibyumba by'ayo magorofa ntibyari bifite inkingi nk'iz'andi mazu yari mu rugo. Ibyo byatumye ibyumba byo mu igorofa yo hejuru biba bito ku byo hagati n'ibyo hasi.
Ezekiel42:7 Ahagana mu rugo rw'inyuma
Ezekiel42:8 kuko uburebure bw'ibyumba ubwabyo bwari metero makumyabiri n'eshanu. Naho ibyumba bigana ku Ngoro byari bifite metero mirongo itanu.
Ezekiel42:9 Mu byumba byo hasi hari umuryango werekeye iburasirazuba
Ezekiel42:10 Ku rukuta rw'urugo rw'inyuma aherekera mu majyepfo
Ezekiel42:11 Imbere y'ibyo byumba hari inzira. Ibyo byumba byasaga n'ibyo mu majyaruguru. Byari bifite ingero zimwe
Ezekiel42:12 Imiryango y'ibyumba byerekeye mu majyepfo yari iteye kimwe n'iyo mu majyaruguru. Aho inzira itangirira hari umuryango uteganye n'urukuta rukikije Ingoro. Uwo muryango wanyurwagamo n'abaturutse iburasirazuba.
Ezekiel42:13 Nuko wa muntu arambwira ati: “Ibyo byumba byo mu majyaruguru n'ibyo mu majyepfo byerekeye mu rugo rw'Ingoro
Ezekiel42:14 Byongeye kandi abatambyi binjiye mu Ngoro ntibashobora kujya mu rugo rwo hanze
Ezekiel42:15 Nuko wa muntu arangije gupima imbere mu Ngoro
Ezekiel42:16 Apima uruhande rw'iburasirazuba akoresheje rwa rubingo
Ezekiel42:17 Apima kandi uruhande rw'amajyaruguru
Ezekiel42:18 
Ezekiel42:19 
Ezekiel42:20 Uko ni ko yapimye impande enye z'urukuta ruzengurutse Ingoro y'Imana. Urwo rukuta rwari impande enye zingana
Ezekiel43:1 Nuko wa muntu anjyana ku irembo ryerekeye iburasirazuba
Ezekiel43:2 maze mbona ikuzo ry'Imana y'Abisiraheli rije rituruka iburasirazuba. Ijwi ry'Imana ryasumaga nk'amazi menshi
Ezekiel43:3 Iryo bonekerwa ryari nk'iryo nabonye igihe Imana yazaga kurimbura Yeruzalemu
Ezekiel43:4 Hanyuma ikuzo ry'Uhoraho ryinjira mu Ngoro
Ezekiel43:5 Nuko Mwuka aranterura anjyana mu rugo rw'imbere
Ezekiel43:6 Wa muntu ahagarara iruhande rwanjye
Ezekiel43:7 “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel43:8 Bahangaye kubangikanya ingoro zabo n'Ingoro yanjye. Baransatiriye cyane ku buryo dutandukanyijwe n'urukuta gusa
Ezekiel43:9 None rero Abisiraheli bagomba kureka uburaya bwabo
Ezekiel43:10 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel43:11 Nibaramuka bakozwe n'isoni z'ibibi bakoze
Ezekiel43:12 Iri ni ryo tegeko rigenga Ingoro: ahantu hose hayikikije mu mpinga y'umusozi ni ahaziranenge cyane.”
Ezekiel43:13 Izi ni zo ngero z'urutambiro hakoreshejwe igipimisho nk'icyapimye Ingoro: urwo rutambiro rwari ruzengurutswe impande zose n'umuyoboro wa santimetero mirongo itanu z'ubujyakuzimu
Ezekiel43:14 indiba yarwo yari metero imwe y'ubuhagarike
Ezekiel43:15 Uburebure bw'igice cyo hejuru cy'urutambiro bwari metero ebyiri
Ezekiel43:16 Icyo gice cyo hejuru cy'urutambiro cyari gifite impande enye zingana
Ezekiel43:17 Igice cyo hagati na cyo cyari gifite impande enye zingana
Ezekiel43:18 Nyagasani Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel43:19 Uzafate ikimasa cyo guhongerera ibyaha by'abatambyi bo mu muryango wa Levi bakomoka kuri Sadoki. Ni bo bonyine nategetse kunkorera.
Ezekiel43:20 Uzafate ku maraso y'icyo kimasa uyaminjagire ku mahembe ane y'urutambiro
Ezekiel43:21 Hanyuma uzajyane cya kimasa cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Ezekiel43:22 Ku munsi ukurikiyeho uzajyane isekurume y'ihene idafite inenge
Ezekiel43:23 Numara kuruhumanura
Ezekiel43:24 uzabiture Uhoraho
Ezekiel43:25 Mu minsi irindwi ujye utamba buri munsi isekurume y'ihene ho igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Ezekiel43:26 Bityo muri iyo minsi irindwi urutambiro ruzaba ruhumanuwe
Ezekiel43:27 Iyo minsi nirangira
Ezekiel44:1 Nuko wa muntu angarura ku irembo ryo hanze ryari iburasirazuba bw'Ingoro
Ezekiel44:2 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Iri rembo rizahora rikinze. Ntirigakingurwe kandi ntihakagire umuntu urinyuramo
Ezekiel44:3 Nyamara umwami ni we wenyine uzajya aryinjiriramo
Ezekiel44:4 Hanyuma wa muntu anyinjiza mu irembo ryo mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel44:5 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel44:6 Ubwire abo Bisiraheli b'ibyigomeke ko jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuze nti: ‘Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Ezekiel44:7 Byongeye kandi mwinjije abanyamahanga batanyiyeguriye
Ezekiel44:8 Aho kwita ku mirimo yanjye yo mu Ngoro
Ezekiel44:9 Jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho mvuze ko nta munyamahanga utaranyiyeguriye uzinjira mu Ngoro yanjye
Ezekiel44:10 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abalevi banyimūye bagafatanya n'Abisiraheli bayobye bagasenga ibigirwamana
Ezekiel44:11 Icyakora bashobora gukora mu Ngoro yanjye bashinzwe kurinda amarembo
Ezekiel44:12 Nyamara kubera ko bayobeje abantu basenga ibigirwamana
Ezekiel44:13 Ntibazongera kunyegera ngo bakore umurimo w'ubutambyi
Ezekiel44:14 Nyamara nzabashinga imirimo yoroheje
Ezekiel44:15 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Abatambyi b'Abalevi bakomoka kuri Sadoki bakomeje gukora neza mu Ngoro yanjye
Ezekiel44:16 Abo bonyine ni bo bazinjira mu Ngoro yanjye
Ezekiel44:17 Igihe bazaba binjiye mu marembo y'urugo rw'imbere bajye bambara imyambaro yera
Ezekiel44:18 Bajye bambara ingofero z'umweru mu mutwe
Ezekiel44:19 Nibasohoka bakajya mu rugo rw'inyuma aho abantu bakoraniye
Ezekiel44:20 Ntibagomba kwimoza imisatsi cyangwa ngo bayireke ibe miremire
Ezekiel44:21 Ntihakagire umutambyi unywa divayi igihe agomba kwinjira mu rugo rw'imbere.
Ezekiel44:22 Ntihakagire umutambyi ucyura umupfakazi cyangwa umugore wasenzwe
Ezekiel44:23 “Abatambyi bajye bigisha abantu gutandukanya ibintu byeguriwe Imana n'ibitayeguriwe
Ezekiel44:24 Nihagira impaka zivuka zijye zishyikirizwa abatambyi
Ezekiel44:25 “Umutambyi ntakihumanye akora ku ntumbi y'umuntu
Ezekiel44:26 Igihe azaba amaze guhumanurwa
Ezekiel44:27 Umunsi azinjira mu rugo rw'imbere akajya gukora imirimo ye mu Ngoro
Ezekiel44:28 “Ni jye ubwanjye uzaba umunani w'abatambyi. Ntimuzagire umugabane mubaha mu Bisiraheli
Ezekiel44:29 Bazatungwa n'amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'ibitambo byo guhongerera ibyaha n'ibyo kwiyunga nanjye
Ezekiel44:30 Ibyiza by'umuganura w'umusaruro wose
Ezekiel44:31 Abatambyi ntibagomba kurya inyoni izo ari zo zose
Ezekiel45:1 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Igihe muzaba mugabana igihugu
Ezekiel45:2 Uwo mugabane uzabemo ikibanza cyo kubakaho Ingoro. Icyo kibanza kizabe gifite impande enye zingana
Ezekiel45:3 Muri uwo mugabane wanyeguriwe
Ezekiel45:4 Uwo mugabane wanyeguriwe uzabe uw'abatambyi bakora imirimo yo mu Ngoro
Ezekiel45:5 Ikindi gice gisigaye gifite ibirometero cumi na bibiri n'igice by'uburebure n'ibirometero bitanu by'ubugari
Ezekiel45:6 Igice gikurikiye ahanyeguriwe gifite ibirometero cumi na bibiri n'igice by'uburebure
Ezekiel45:7 “Umwami na we azagenerwe umugabane uhana imbibi n'ahanyeguriwe
Ezekiel45:8 Uwo ni wo mugabane umwami azagira mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
Ezekiel45:9 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Mwa bami ba Isiraheli mwe
Ezekiel45:10 Mujye mukoresha iminzani n'ibindi bipimisho mugeresha bitunganye.
Ezekiel45:11 Igipimisho cy'ibinyampeke cyitwa ‘efa’
Ezekiel45:12 Igipimisho cy'uburemere cyitwa ‘shekeli’
Ezekiel45:13 Dore uko muzajya mutanga amaturo: ingano za nkungu mujye mutanga kimwe cya mirongo itandatu cy'umusaruro
Ezekiel45:14 naho amavuta y'iminzenze mujye mutanga kimwe cy'ijana cyayo. Gupima amavuta muzakoresha za bati:
Ezekiel45:15 Mu ntama mujye mutanga imwe kuri magana abiri zo mu rwuri rwa Isiraheli. Mujye mutanga amaturo y'ibinyampeke n'ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Ezekiel45:16 Abatuye igihugu cya Isiraheli bose bategetswe guha umwami ayo maturo.
Ezekiel45:17 Umwami ni we uzatanga ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro
Ezekiel45:18 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa mbere
Ezekiel45:19 Umutambyi azafate ku maraso y'igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha
Ezekiel45:20 Ku munsi wa karindwi uzabigenze utyo
Ezekiel45:21 “Ku itariki ya cumi n'enye z'ukwezi kwa mbere
Ezekiel45:22 Uwo munsi umwami azatambe ikimasa cyo guhongerera ibyaha bye
Ezekiel45:23 Muri iyo minsi mikuru uko ari irindwi azatange ibimasa birindwi
Ezekiel45:24 Azatange ituro ry'ibiro icumi by'ifu kuri buri kimasa
Ezekiel45:25 “Ku itariki ya cumi n'eshanu z'ukwezi kwa karindwi
Ezekiel46:1 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Irembo ry'urugo rw'imbere ryerekeye iburasirazuba rijye rikingwa mu minsi itandatu y'imirimo. Nyamara rijye rikingurwa ku isabato no ku mboneko z'ukwezi.
Ezekiel46:2 Umwami ajye yinjirira mu irembo ry'urugo rw'inyuma
Ezekiel46:3 Ku minsi y'isabato no ku mboneko z'ukwezi
Ezekiel46:4 “Icyo gitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro umwami azaba azaniye Uhoraho ku munsi w'isabato
Ezekiel46:5 Kuri iyo mpfizi y'intama ajye atanga ituro ry'ibiro mirongo itatu by'ibinyampeke
Ezekiel46:6 Ku munsi w'imboneko z'ukwezi ajye atamba ikimasa n'abana b'intama batandatu
Ezekiel46:7 Kuri icyo kimasa ajye atanga ituro ry'ibiro mirongo itatu by'ibinyampeke
Ezekiel46:8 Umwami ajye yinjira anyuze mu cyumba cy'urwinjiriro
Ezekiel46:9 “Abantu nibaza gusenga Uhoraho ku munsi mukuru
Ezekiel46:10 Umwami ajye yinjirira rimwe n'abantu baje gusenga
Ezekiel46:11 Ku minsi mikuru no ku yindi minsi yategetswe
Ezekiel46:12 Umwami nashaka gutura Uhoraho ituro ry'ubushake
Ezekiel46:13 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Buri munsi ujye utamba umwana w'intama umaze umwaka kandi udafite inenge. Ujye uwutambira Uhoraho ho igitambo gikongorwa n'umuriro buri gitondo.
Ezekiel46:14 Buri gitondo ujye utanga ibiro bitanu by'ituro ry'ibinyampeke
Ezekiel46:15 Umwana w'intama hamwe n'ituro ry'ibinyampeke n'iry'amavuta bijye bitangwa buri gitondo
Ezekiel46:16 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Umwami naha umwana we umunani
Ezekiel46:17 Ariko umwami aramutse ahaye umunani umwe mu bagaragu be
Ezekiel46:18 Nyamara kandi umwami ntakambure rubanda abanyaga iminani yabo. Ajye aha abana be iminani yo mu mugabane we
Ezekiel46:19 Nuko uwo muntu anjyana mu rwinjiriro rw'irembo ryerekeye mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel46:20 arambwira ati: “Aha ni ho abatambyi bazajya batekera inyama z'ibitambo byo guhongerera ibyaha n'ibyo kwiyunga n'Imana. Ni na ho bazajya batekera amaturo y'ibinyampeke ngo hatagira ikintu cyeguriwe Imana bajyana inyuma y'urugo
Ezekiel46:21 Hanyuma wa muntu anjyana mu rugo rw'inyuma anyujije mu nguni enye zarwo
Ezekiel46:22 Muri izo nguni uko ari enye z'urugo rw'inyuma
Ezekiel46:23 Urugo rwose rwari ruzengurutswe n'urukuta rw'amabuye
Ezekiel46:24 Nuko arambwira ati: “Ibyo ni ibikoni
Ezekiel47:1 Uwo muntu angarura ku muryango w'Ingoro
Ezekiel47:2 Nuko anjyana ku irembo ryo mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel47:3 Uwo muntu agenda yerekeje iburasirazuba afite umugozi wo gupimisha
Ezekiel47:4 Apima izindi metero magana atanu
Ezekiel47:5 Apima izindi metero magana atanu
Ezekiel47:6 Nuko wa muntu arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu
Ezekiel47:7 mpageze mbona ibiti byinshi ku nkombe zawo.
Ezekiel47:8 Wa muntu arambwira ati: “Aya mazi atemba agana iburasirazuba
Ezekiel47:9 Ibifite ubuzima byose by'aho uwo mugezi utembera bizabaho
Ezekiel47:10 Abarobyi bazaba benshi uhereye ku mugezi wa Enegidi ukagera ku wa Enegilayimu
Ezekiel47:11 Nyamara amazi yo mu bishanga byaho ntazahinduka ngo abe meza
Ezekiel47:12 Ku nkombe z'uwo mugezi hazamera ibiti by'amoko yose byera imbuto ziribwa. Amababi yabyo ntazigera araba
Ezekiel47:13 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Izi ni zo mbibi z'igihugu
Ezekiel47:14 Nagiranye amasezerano na ba sokuruza ko nzabaha iki gihugu kikaba gakondo yabo. None nimukigabane
Ezekiel47:15 “Urubibi rw'umugabane wo mu majyaruguru ruzatangirire ku Nyanja ya Mediterane
Ezekiel47:16 Ruzakomeze rugere mu mijyi ya Berota na Siburayimu
Ezekiel47:17 Urwo rubibi rwo mu majyaruguru ruzatangirire ku Nyanja ya Mediterane
Ezekiel47:18 “Urubibi rw'iburasirazuba ruzatangirire hagati y'intara ya Damasi n'iya Hawurani
Ezekiel47:19 “Urubibi rwo mu majyepfo ruzatangirire i Tamari rugere ku mazi y'i Meriba i Kadeshi
Ezekiel47:20 “Urubibi rw'iburengerazuba rugizwe n'Inyanja ya Mediterane
Ezekiel47:21 “Muzagabane iki gihugu mukurikije imiryango y'Abisiraheli.
Ezekiel47:22 Muzakigabane mukoresheje ubufindo
Ezekiel47:23 Buri munyamahanga azaherwe gakondo ye mu mugabane w'umuryango azaba atuyemo.” Uko ni ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze.
Ezekiel48:1 Ngaya amazina y'imiryango n'imigabane yayo: Umugabane wa Dani uzabe mu majyaruguru. Urubibi rwawo ruzakurikire inzira ijya i Hetiloni rugere i Lebo-Hamati n'i Hasari-Enani
Ezekiel48:2 Umugabane wa Ashēri uzabangikane n'uwa Dani
Ezekiel48:3 Umugabane wa Nafutali uzabangikane n'uwa Ashēri
Ezekiel48:4 Umugabane wa Manase uzabangikane n'uwa Nafutali
Ezekiel48:5 Umugabane wa Efurayimu uzabangikane n'uwa Manase
Ezekiel48:6 Umugabane wa Rubeni uzabangikane n'uwa Efurayimu
Ezekiel48:7 Umugabane wa Yuda uzabangikane n'uwa Rubeni
Ezekiel48:8 Iruhande rw'umugabane wa Yuda
Ezekiel48:9 Umugabane weguriwe Uhoraho uzabe ufite uburebure bw'ibirometero cumi na bibiri n'igice
Ezekiel48:10 Abatambyi bazahabwe kuri uwo mugabane weguriwe Uhoraho. Uhereye iburasirazuba ukagera iburengerazuba umugabane wabo uzabe ufite ibirometero cumi na bibiri n'igice
Ezekiel48:11 Uwo mugabane weguriwe Uhoraho uzabe uw'abatambyi bakomoka kuri Sadoki. Bambereye indahemuka ntibamera nk'Abalevi banyimūye igihe Abisiraheli bangomeraga.
Ezekiel48:12 Ni yo mpamvu bazahabwa umugabane w'ingenzi ku uweguriwe Uhoraho iruhande rw'uw'Abalevi
Ezekiel48:13 Umugabane w'Abalevi uzabe ungana n'uw'abatambyi. Buri mugabane uzabe ufite ibirometero cumi na bibiri n'igice by'uburebure
Ezekiel48:14 Uwo mugabane ntugomba kugurwa cyangwa kugurishwa
Ezekiel48:15 Umugabane uzasaguka uzabe ufite ibirometero cumi na bibiri n'igice by'uburebure
Ezekiel48:16 kandi uzabe ufite impande enye zingana. Buri ruhande ruzabe rufite metero ibihumbi bibiri na magana abiri na mirongo itanu.
Ezekiel48:17 Muri buri ruhande ahazengurutse uwo murwa
Ezekiel48:18 Ahantu hazasigara bamaze kubaka umurwa mu majyepfo y'aheguriwe Uhoraho
Ezekiel48:19 Abatuye muri uwo murwa ab'imiryango yose y'Abisiraheli bazajye bahahinga.
Ezekiel48:20 Umugabane wose uzabe ufite impande enye zingana. Buri ruhande ruzabe rufite ibirometero cumi na bibiri n'igice. Muzafate igice ku mugabane weguriwe Uhoraho kibe icy'umurwa.
Ezekiel48:21 Ahantu hazasigara ku migabane yombi ari yo aheguriwe Uhoraho n'ah'umurwa
Ezekiel48:22 Umugabane w'Abalevi n'ahubatswe umurwa bizabe hagati y'ahagenewe umwami. Aho hantu hagenewe umwami hazabe ari hagati y'urubibi rw'umuryango wa Yuda n'urw'umuryango wa Benyamini.
Ezekiel48:23 Dore imigabane yagenewe indi miryango: Mu majyepfo y'uwo mugabane udasanzwe
Ezekiel48:24 Umugabane wa Simeyoni uzabangikane n'uwa Benyamini
Ezekiel48:25 Umugabane wa Isakari uzabangikane n'uwa Simeyoni
Ezekiel48:26 Umugabane wa Zabuloni uzabangikane n'uwa Isakari
Ezekiel48:27 Umugabane wa Gadi uzabangikane n'uwa Zabuloni
Ezekiel48:28 Urubibi rw'umugabane wa Gadi mu ruhande rwo mu majyepfo
Ezekiel48:29 “Uko ni ko muzagabanya igihugu mo imigabane
Ezekiel48:30 Aya ni yo marembo y'umurwa: uruhande rwo mu majyaruguru y'umujyi ruzagire uburebure bwa metero ibihumbi bibiri na magana abiri na mirongo itanu.
Ezekiel48:31 Amarembo y'uwo mujyi azitirirwe imiryango y'Abisiraheli. Mu majyaruguru hazabe amarembo atatu: irya Rubeni n'irya Yuda n'irya Levi.
Ezekiel48:32 Urukuta rw'iburasirazuba ruzabe rufite uburebure bwa metero ibihumbi bibiri na magana abiri na mirongo itanu
Ezekiel48:33 Urukuta rwo mu majyepfo na rwo ruzabe rufite uburebure bwa metero ibihumbi bibiri na magana abiri na mirongo itanu
Ezekiel48:34 Urukuta rw'iburengerazuba na rwo ruzabe rufite uburebure bwa metero ibihumbi bibiri na magana abiri na mirongo itanu
Ezekiel48:35 Umuzenguruko wose w'uwo mujyi uzabe ufite ibirometero icyenda. Kuva uwo munsi kugeza iteka ryose
Daniel1:1 Mu mwaka wa gatatu Yoyakimu umwami w'u Buyuda ari ku ngoma
Daniel1:2 Nyagasani amugabiza Yoyakimu umwami w'u Buyuda
Daniel1:3 Umwami Nebukadinezari ategeka Ashipenazi umutware w'ibyegera bye
Daniel1:4 Ntibagombaga kugira ubusembwa ku mubiri ahubwo bagombaga kugira uburanga
Daniel1:5 Umwami ategeka ko buri munsi babagaburira ku byokurya bamutekeye no kuri divayi bamugeneye. Bagombaga kwigishwa imyaka itatu
Daniel1:6 Muri abo basore harimo Daniyeli na Hananiya na Mishayeli na Azariya b'Abayuda.
Daniel1:7 Umutware w'ibyegera abahimba amazina: Daniyeli amuhimba Beliteshazari
Daniel1:8 Daniyeli yagambiriye kutihumanyisha ibyokurya byatekewe umwami na divayi yamugenewe
Daniel1:9 Imana yari yarahaye Daniyeli gutona no gukundwa n'umutware w'ibyegera
Daniel1:10 nyamara abwira Daniyeli ati: “Umwami databuja ni we wabageneye ibyokurya n'ibyokunywa. Aramutse asanze mutamerewe neza nk'abandi basore mungana
Daniel1:11 Noneho Daniyeli abwira uwari ushinzwe kubagaburira
Daniel1:12 “Twebwe abagaragu bawe utugerageze iminsi icumi
Daniel1:13 Nyuma y'iyo minsi uzatugereranye n'abandi basore bagaburirwa ku byokurya by'umwami
Daniel1:14 Nuko abemerera ibyo bamusabye
Daniel1:15 Iyo minsi ishize
Daniel1:16 Bityo uwari ushinzwe kubagaburira areka guha Daniyeli na bagenzi be ibyokurya na divayi byari bibagenewe
Daniel1:17 Imana yahaye abo basore bane ubumenyi no gusobanukirwa ibyanditse mu bitabo no kugira ubwenge
Daniel1:18 Iyo myaka itatu umwami yavuze ishize
Daniel1:19 Umwami abonana na bo
Daniel1:20 Ku bintu byose umwami yababazaga bigomba ubwenge n'ubushishozi
Daniel1:21 Daniyeli akomeza gukora ibwami kugeza mu mwaka wa mbere Umwami Sirusi ari ku ngoma.
Daniel2:1 Mu mwaka wa kabiri Nebukadinezari ari ku ngoma yararose
Daniel2:2 Nuko umwami ahamagaza abanyabugenge n'abapfumu n'abashitsi n'abahanga mu by'inyenyeri
Daniel2:3 arababwira ati: “Narose inzozi sinazisobanukirwa
Daniel2:4 Abo bahanga basubiza umwami mu kinyarameya bati: “Nyagasani
Daniel2:5 Umwami arabasubiza ati: “Icyemezo nafashe ni iki: nimutambwira inzozi narose n'icyo zisobanura
Daniel2:6 Nyamara nimumbwira inzozi n'icyo zisobanura
Daniel2:7 Bongera gusubiza bati: “Nyagasani
Daniel2:8 Umwami arabasubiza ati: “Mu by'ukuri ndabona mushaka kurenza umunsi
Daniel2:9 Nimutambwira iby'izo nzozi narose
Daniel2:10 Abahanga baramusubiza bati: “Nyagasani
Daniel2:11 Icyo utubaza kiraruhije
Daniel2:12 Ibyo bituma umwami arakara cyane arabisha
Daniel2:13 Amaze guca iteka ryo kwica abanyabwenge
Daniel2:14 Ariyoki umutware w'abarinzi b'umwami
Daniel2:15 abaza Ariyoki umurinzi mukuru w'umwami ati: “Kuki umwami yaduciriye iteka rikaze rityo?” Ariyoki amusobanurira uko byagenze.
Daniel2:16 Daniyeli ahita ajya kureba umwami
Daniel2:17 Arataha abimenyesha bagenzi be Hananiya na Mishayeli na Azariya.
Daniel2:18 Ababwira gusaba Imana nyir'ijuru ngo ibagirire impuhwe maze ibahishurire ayo mayobera
Daniel2:19 Nuko nijoro Daniyeli arabonekerwa
Daniel2:20 avuga ati: “Imana nisingizwe iteka ryose! Koko ubwenge n'ubushobozi ni ibyayo.
Daniel2:21 Ni yo ituma ibihe n'imyaka bisimburana
Daniel2:22 Ni yo ihishura amabanga n'ibihishwe kure
Daniel2:23 Mana ya ba sogokuruza ndakuramya
Daniel2:24 Nuko Daniyeli ajya kwa Ariyoki
Daniel2:25 Ariyoki arihuta ajyana Daniyeli ibwami
Daniel2:26 Umwami abaza Daniyeli wahimbwe Beliteshazari ati: “Mbese ushobora kumbwira inzozi narose n'icyo zisobanura?”
Daniel2:27 Daniyeli asubiza Umwami Nebukadinezari ati: “Nyagasani
Daniel2:28 Nyamara nyagasani
Daniel2:29 “Nyagasani
Daniel2:30 Naho jye icyatumye mpishurirwa ayo mayobera si uko ndusha abandi ubwenge
Daniel2:31 “Nyagasani
Daniel2:32 Umutwe waryo wari izahabu inoze
Daniel2:33 amaguru yari icyuma
Daniel2:34 Ucyitegereza iyo shusho
Daniel2:35 Nuko icyuma n'ibumba n'umuringa n'ifeza n'izahabu byose birajanjagurika
Daniel2:36 Nyagasani
Daniel2:37 “Nyagasani mwami w'abami
Daniel2:38 Yaguhaye gutegeka abantu n'inyamaswa n'inyoni aho biba hose
Daniel2:39 Ubwami bwawe buzakurikirwa n'ubundi bwami budahwanyije n'ubwawe gukomera
Daniel2:40 hanyuma hazakurikiraho ubundi bwa kane bukomeye nk'icyuma. Nk'uko icyuma kimenagura ibintu byose kikabijanjagura
Daniel2:41 Ibirenge n'amano wabonye byari ibumba rivanze n'icyuma
Daniel2:42 Naho amano y'icyuma n'ibumba yerekana ko igice kimwe cy'ubwami kizaba gikomeye
Daniel2:43 Ubundi kandi
Daniel2:44 “Ku ngoma z'abo bami
Daniel2:45 Ubwo bwami bushushanywa na rya buye weretswe ryarimbukaga ku musozi nta wuririmbuye
Daniel2:46 Nuko Umwami Nebukadinezari yikubita hasi yubamye
Daniel2:47 Umwami abwira Daniyeli ati: “Mu by'ukuri Imana yanyu ni yo Mana irusha izindi zose gukomera
Daniel2:48 Nuko umwami ashyira Daniyeli mu rwego rwo hejuru
Daniel2:49 Daniyeli asaba umwami guha Shadaraki na Meshaki na Abedinego ubutegetsi bw'intara ya Babiloni. Daniyeli we yigumira ibwami.
Daniel3:1 Umwami Nebukadinezari yacurishije ishusho mu izahabu
Daniel3:2 Umwami Nebukadinezari atumiza abategetsi b'ibihugu bikomatanyije
Daniel3:3 Abategetsi b'ibihugu bikomatanyije n'abaminisitiri n'abategetsi b'ibihugu
Daniel3:4 Nuko intumwa y'umwami irangurura ijwi iti: “Yemwe bantu b'amahanga yose n'amoko yose n'abavuga indimi izo ari zo zose mwe
Daniel3:5 Nimwumva bavugije ihembe n'imyironge
Daniel3:6 Umuntu wese utikubita hasi kugira ngo ayiramye
Daniel3:7 Ni yo mpamvu abantu b'amahanga yose n'amoko yose
Daniel3:8 Ako kanya Abanyababiloniya bamwe baza kurega Abayuda.
Daniel3:9 Babwira Umwami Nebukadinezari bati: “Nyagasani uragahoraho!
Daniel3:10 Wowe ubwawe waciye iteka ko umuntu wese uzumva bavugije ihembe n'imyironge
Daniel3:11 Wategetse kandi ko utazikubita hasi ngo ayiramye azajugunywa mu itanura rigurumana.
Daniel3:12 None dore hari Abayuda wahaye gutegeka intara ya Babiloni
Daniel3:13 Nuko Nebukadinezari ararakara cyane arabisha
Daniel3:14 Nebukadinezari arababaza ati: “Shadaraki na Meshaki na Abedinego mwe
Daniel3:15 Noneho nimwumva bavugije ihembe n'imyironge
Daniel3:16 Shadaraki na Meshaki na Abedinego basubiza umwami bati: “Nebukadinezari
Daniel3:17 Nitujugunywa mu itanura rigurumana
Daniel3:18 Nyamara nubwo itadukiza
Daniel3:19 Nuko Nebukadinezari ararakara cyane
Daniel3:20 Hanyuma atoranya mu ngabo ze abagabo bafite imbaraga
Daniel3:21 Baboha abo bagabo uko bakambaye amakabutura n'amakanzu n'ingofero n'amakoti
Daniel3:22 Kubera ko itegeko ry'umwami ryari rikaze n'itanura ritwika cyane
Daniel3:23 Naho abo bagabo uko ari batatu
Daniel3:24 Nuko Umwami Nebukadinezari ubwoba buramutaha
Daniel3:25 Umwami arongera ati: “Nyamara ndabona abagabo bane bataboshye bagenda mu muriro rwagati kandi nta cyo wabatwaye! Uwa kane arasa n'imana.”
Daniel3:26 Hanyuma Nebukadinezari yegera umuryango w'itanura rigurumana
Daniel3:27 Abategetsi b'ibihugu bikomatanyije n'abaminisitiri
Daniel3:28 Nebukadinezari aravuga ati: “Nihasingizwe Imana ya Shadaraki na Meshaki na Abedinego
Daniel3:29 None ntegetse ab'amahanga yose n'ab'amoko yose
Daniel3:30 Nuko umwami azamura mu ntera Shadaraki na Meshaki na Abedinego
Daniel3:31 Dore uko Umwami Nebukadinezari abwira ab'amahanga yose
Daniel3:32 Nabonye binogeye kubamenyesha ibimenyetso n'ibitangaza Imana Isumbabyose yankoreye.
Daniel3:33 Mbega ukuntu ibimenyetso byayo bikomeye! Mbega ukuntu ibitangaza byayo byerekana ububasha! Ingoma yayo izahoraho iteka
Daniel4:1 Jyewe Nebukadinezari
Daniel4:2 ndota inzozi zimpagarika umutima
Daniel4:3 Nuko ntegeka ko banzanira abanyabwenge bose b'i Babiloni
Daniel4:4 Abanyabugenge n'abapfumu n'abahanga mu by'inyenyeri
Daniel4:5 Bigeze aho haza Daniyeli
Daniel4:6 “Beliteshazari mutware w'abanyabugenge we
Daniel4:7 Dore ibyo nabonye ndyamye: nabonye igiti cyameze ku isi hagati kandi ari kirekire cyane.
Daniel4:8 Igiti kirakura kirakomera
Daniel4:9 Cyari gifite amababi atoshye n'imbuto nyinshi
Daniel4:10 Noneho mu nzozi narotaga ndyamye
Daniel4:11 Arangurura ijwi ati: ‘Tsinda icyo giti ukōkōre amashami
Daniel4:12 Ariko igishyitsi n'imizi yacyo ubirekere mu butaka
Daniel4:13 Ubwenge bwacyo buhinduke bwe kuba nk'ubw'umuntu
Daniel4:14 Iryo teka ryanyujijwe ku bamarayika baziranenge bararitangaza
Daniel4:15 Ngizo inzozi narose
Daniel4:16 Nuko Daniyeli bahimbye Beliteshazari
Daniel4:17 Wabonye igiti cyakuze kandi gikomeye
Daniel4:18 Cyari gifite amababi atoshye n'imbuto nyinshi
Daniel4:19 Nyagasani rero
Daniel4:20 Hanyuma nyagasani
Daniel4:21 “Nyagasani
Daniel4:22 Ugiye kwirukanwa mu bantu ubane n'inyamaswa. Imyaka irindwi yose uzajya urisha nk'amatungo
Daniel4:23 Itegeko ryo kureka igishyitsi n'imizi risobanura ko ubwami bwawe uzabusubizwa
Daniel4:24 None rero nyagasani
Daniel4:25 Nyamara Umwami Nebukadinezari yaje gukabya inzozi.
Daniel4:26 Hashize umwaka
Daniel4:27 yaravuze ati: “Dore ukuntu Babiloni ari umujyi ukomeye! Kubera ko ndi igihangange
Daniel4:28 Umwami akivuga ayo magambo yumva ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru ati: “Yewe Mwami Nebukadinezari
Daniel4:29 Ugiye kwirukanwa mu bantu ubane n'inyamaswa. Uzamara imyaka irindwi yose urisha nk'amatungo
Daniel4:30 Ako kanya ibyo biba kuri Nebukadinezari. Yirukanwa mu bantu
Daniel4:31 Imyaka irindwi ishize
Daniel4:32 Kuri we abatuye isi bose ni ubusa
Daniel4:33 Muri ako kanya nkigarura akenge
Daniel4:34 None jyewe Nebukadinezari
Daniel5:1 Umwami Belishazari akoresha ibirori bikomeye abitumiramo ibikomangoma igihumbi
Daniel5:2 Belishazari akiyinywa
Daniel5:3 Nuko bazana ibikoresho by'izahabu byasahuwe mu Ngoro y'Imana i Yeruzalemu
Daniel5:4 Bityo banywa divayi
Daniel5:5 Ako kanya haboneka intoki z'umuntu
Daniel5:6 ashya ubwoba
Daniel5:7 Arangurura ijwi
Daniel5:8 Nuko abanyabwenge bose b'umwami begera iyo nyandiko
Daniel5:9 Ibyo bituma Umwami Belishazari arushaho gushya ubwoba
Daniel5:10 Umugabekazi yumvise ijwi ry'umwami n'amajwi y'ibikomangoma
Daniel5:11 Mu gihugu cyawe hari umuntu ukoreshwa n'umwuka w'imana zitagira inenge. Ku ngoma y'umukurambere wawe basanze afite ubushishozi n'ubuhanga n'ubwenge nk'iby'imana. Umukurambere wawe
Daniel5:12 kubera ko bari bamusanganye ubwenge budasanzwe n'ubumenyi n'ubushishozi
Daniel5:13 Daniyeli bamuzanira umwami maze aramubaza ati: “Ese koko ni wowe Daniyeli
Daniel5:14 Numvise ko ukoreshwa n'umwuka w'imana
Daniel5:15 None bamaze kunzanira abanyabwenge n'abapfumu kugira ngo basome iriya nyandiko bayinsobanurire
Daniel5:16 Ahubwo bambwiye ko ari wowe ubasha gusobanura amayobera no gutanga ibisubizo by'ibyananiranye. None rero niba ushobora gusoma iyi nyandiko ukayinsobanurira
Daniel5:17 Nuko Daniyeli asubiza umwami ati: “Impano ushaka kumpa uzigumanire
Daniel5:18 Nyagasani
Daniel5:19 Kubera ibyo
Daniel5:20 Ariko yaje kwishyira hejuru arinangira ahinduka umunyagasuzuguro
Daniel5:21 Yirukanywe mu bantu
Daniel5:22 Nawe Belishazari wamusimbuye ku ngoma
Daniel5:23 Dore wasuzuguye Nyagasani nyir'ijuru
Daniel5:24 Ni cyo cyatumye yohereza ikiganza kikandika iriya nyandiko.
Daniel5:25 “Reka nyigusomere. MENE MENE TEKELI na PARESINI.
Daniel5:26 Dore igisobanuro cyayo: MENE risobanurwa ngo ‘Imana yabaze imyaka umaze ku ngoma iyishyiraho iherezo’.
Daniel5:27 TEKELI risobanurwa ngo ‘wapimwe ku munzani bigaragara ko udashyitse’.
Daniel5:28 PARESINI risobanurwa ngo ‘ingoma yawe yiciyemo ibice
Daniel5:29 Nuko Belishazari ategeka ko bambika Daniyeli imyambaro y'agaciro n'umukufi w'izahabu mu ijosi
Daniel5:30 Iryo joro Belishazari umwami wa Babiloniya aricwa.
Daniel6:1 Ingoma ye igabizwa Umumedi Dariyusi
Daniel6:2 Dariyusi yiyemeza gushyiraho abategetsi ijana na makumyabiri
Daniel6:3 Ashyiraho n'abayobozi batatu barimo Daniyeli kugira ngo abo bategetsi bajye babagezaho imitegekere yabo
Daniel6:4 Daniyeli yarushaga cyane abandi bayobozi n'abategetsi ubwenge
Daniel6:5 Kubera ibyo abo bayobozi n'abategetsi
Daniel6:6 Maze abo bagabo baravugana bati: “Nta kosa twabona ryo kurega Daniyeli
Daniel6:7 Nuko abo bayobozi n'abategetsi basanga umwami bati: “Nyagasani Dariyusi
Daniel6:8 Abayobozi bawe n'abaminisitiri
Daniel6:9 None rero nyagasani
Daniel6:10 Nuko Umwami Dariyusi ashyira umukono kuri iryo tegeko.
Daniel6:11 Daniyeli ngo yumve ko iryo tegeko ryatangajwe
Daniel6:12 Ba bagabo bajya kwa Daniyeli basanga asenga Imana ye ayitakambira.
Daniel6:13 Nuko basanga umwami bavugana na we ku byerekeye rya tegeko
Daniel6:14 Barongera babwira umwami bati: “Daniyeli
Daniel6:15 Umwami yumvise ayo magambo agira agahinda kenshi
Daniel6:16 Ba bagabo bongera gusanga umwami bati: “Nyagasani
Daniel6:17 Nuko umwami ategeka ko bazana Daniyeli bakamujugunya mu rwobo rw'intare. Umwami aramubwira ati: “Imana yawe usenga buri gihe igukize.”
Daniel6:18 Bazana ibuye barikingisha urwobo
Daniel6:19 Umwami ajya mu ngoro ye arara atariye
Daniel6:20 Bugicya kare mu gitondo umwami arabyuka
Daniel6:21 Ageze hafi yarwo ahamagara Daniyeli n'umubabaro mwinshi ati: “Yewe Daniyeli mugaragu w'Imana nzima we
Daniel6:22 Daniyeli asubiza umwami ati: “Nyagasani
Daniel6:23 Imana yanjye yohereje umumarayika wayo
Daniel6:24 Nuko umwami aranezerwa cyane
Daniel6:25 Umwami ategeka ko bazana ba bagabo bareze Daniyeli
Daniel6:26 Nuko Umwami Dariyusi yandikira abantu b'amoko yose
Daniel6:27 Ntanze itegeko ngo mu bihugu byose by'ubwami bwanjye
Daniel6:28 Ni yo irokora igakiza
Daniel6:29 Nuko Daniyeli akomeza kugubwa neza ku ngoma ya Dariyusi no ku ya Sirusi w'Umuperesi.
Daniel7:1 Mu mwaka wa mbere Belishazari umwami wa Babiloniya ari ku ngoma
Daniel7:2 uko byakurikiranye: mu ibonekerwa ryanjye nijoro ndyamye
Daniel7:3 Nuko ibikōko bine biva muri iyo nyanja
Daniel7:4 Icya mbere cyasaga n'intare
Daniel7:5 Igikōko cya kabiri cyo cyasaga n'ikirūra
Daniel7:6 Nkomeza kwitegereza mbona igikōko cya gatatu
Daniel7:7 Nkomeza kubonekerwa nijoro
Daniel7:8 Ngitekereza kuri ayo mahembe
Daniel7:9 Nkomeza kureba mbona batera intebe za cyami
Daniel7:10 Imbere ye haturukaga umuriro utemba nk'umugezi
Daniel7:11 Ndakomeza ndareba
Daniel7:12 Bya bikōko bindi byamburwa ububasha bwabyo
Daniel7:13 Nkomeza kubonekerwa nijoro
Daniel7:14 Ahabwa ubutegetsi n'ikuzo n'ubwami kandi abantu b'amoko yose n'ab'amahanga yose n'abavuga indimi izo ari zo zose baramuyoboka. Ubutegetsi bwe ni ubutegetsi bw'iteka butazashira
Daniel7:15 Jyewe Daniyeli
Daniel7:16 Nuko negera umwe mu bari bahagaze aho
Daniel7:17 “Bya bikōko binini uko ari bine bishushanya ubwami bune buzashingwa ku isi.
Daniel7:18 Ariko amaherezo intore z'Isumbabyose zizagabirwa ubwo bwami kandi zizabuhorana iteka ryose.”
Daniel7:19 Nuko nshaka gusobanukirwa ukuri kwerekeye igikōko cya kane cyari gitandukanye rwose n'ibindi uko ari bitatu
Daniel7:20 Nashatse kandi gusobanukirwa ibyerekeye amahembe icumi cyari gifite ku mutwe
Daniel7:21 Nkomeje kureba
Daniel7:22 Ariko Uwabayeho ibihe byose atabara intore ze
Daniel7:23 Nuko wa wundi arambwira ati: “Igikōko cya kane gishushanya ubwami bwa kane buzaba buri ku isi butameze nk'ubundi bwose
Daniel7:24 Ya mahembe icumi yo ashushanya abami icumi bazategeka ubwo bwami. Nyuma yaho hazabaho undi mwami uzaba atameze nk'abamubanjirije
Daniel7:25 Azatuka Isumbabyose kandi azatoteza intore zayo
Daniel7:26 Amaherezo urukiko rw'Imana ruzajyamo rumwambure ubutegetsi
Daniel7:27 Naho ubwami n'ubutegetsi n'icyubahiro cy'ubwami bwose bwo ku isi bizahabwa imbaga y'intore z'Isumbabyose. Ubwami bwayo buzahoraho iteka
Daniel7:28 Ayo magambo agarukiye aha. Ariko jyewe Daniyeli
Daniel8:1 Mu mwaka wa gatatu Umwami Belishazari ari ku ngoma
Daniel8:2 Nagiye kubona mbona ndi i Shushani mu gihugu cya Elamu
Daniel8:3 Nubuye amaso mbona impfizi y'intama ihagaze ku nkombe y'urwo ruzi. Yari ifite amahembe abiri maremare ariko iryameze nyuma risumba iryameze mbere.
Daniel8:4 Nuko mbona iyo mpfizi igenda irwanisha amahembe yayo yerekeje iburengerazuba no mu majyaruguru no mu majyepfo. Nta tungo na rimwe ryashoboraga kuyihangara kandi nta n'uwabashaga kuritabara. Yakoraga icyo ishatse kandi ikagenda iba ikirangirire.
Daniel8:5 Nkibaza ibyo nari maze kubona
Daniel8:6 Iraza igeze hafi ya ya mpfizi y'intama ifite amahembe abiri nari nabonye ku nkombe y'uruzi
Daniel8:7 Nuko mbona isekurume irakaye ishyikiriye ya mpfizi
Daniel8:8 Isekurume y'ihene yagendaga iba ikirangirire cyane
Daniel8:9 Nuko kuri rimwe muri ayo mahembe hameraho irindi. Ryari rito ariko rikura bikabije ryerekeje mu majyepfo no mu burasirazuba no ku gihugu cyiza.
Daniel8:10 Rirakura rigera aho ingabo zo mu ijuru ziri
Daniel8:11 Rirakomera ryigira nk'Umugaba w'izo ngabo
Daniel8:12 Koko ryari ryarigaruriye izo ngabo rikoresheje ubugome bwaryo
Daniel8:13 Ngiye kumva numva umumarayika aravuze
Daniel8:14 Wa mumarayika wa mbere arambwira ati: “Hagomba gushira iminsi ibihumbi bibiri magana atatu nta gitambo cya buri mugoroba na buri gitondo gitambwa. Nyuma Ingoro y'Imana izongera itahwe.”
Daniel8:15 Nkitegereza ibyo neretswe kandi nkigerageza kubisobanukirwa
Daniel8:16 Numva ijwi ry'umuntu riturutse ku ruzi rwa Ulayi rimubwira riti: “Gaburiyeli we
Daniel8:17 Nuko aranyegera maze ngira ubwoba nikubita hasi nubamye. Arambwira ati: “Wa muntu we
Daniel8:18 Akomeza kumbwira nubamye nataye ubwenge
Daniel8:19 Arambwira ati: “Reka nkumenyeshe ibizaheruka igihe cy'uburakari bw'Imana
Daniel8:20 Impfizi y'intama wabonye ifite amahembe abiri ishushanya ubwami bw'Abamedi n'Abaperesi.
Daniel8:21 Naho isekurume y'ihene ishushanya ubwami bw'Abagereki. Ihembe rikomeye riri hagati y'amaso yayo rishushanya umwami wabo w'ingenzi.
Daniel8:22 Iryo hembe rimaze kuvunika andi ane yameze aho ryari riri
Daniel8:23 Mu iherezo ry'ubwo bwami
Daniel8:24 Ububasha bwe buziyongera ariko atari we biturutseho. Azayogoza ibintu ku buryo butangaje
Daniel8:25 Kubera uburyarya bwe
Daniel8:26 Ni yo mpamvu ibitambo bya buri mugoroba na buri gitondo bitazatambwa. Icyakora ibyo weretswe ubigire ibanga kuko byerekeye ibihe bizaza kera.”
Daniel8:27 Jyewe Daniyeli
Daniel9:1 Mu mwaka Dariyusi mwene Ahashuwerusi w'Umumedi yigaruriyemo Babiloniya akaba umwami waho
Daniel9:2 jyewe Daniyeli nisomeye mu Byanditswe
Daniel9:3 Nuko nigomwa kurya
Daniel9:4 Nsenga Uhoraho Imana yanjye
Daniel9:5 Nyamara twakoze ibyaha tugucumuraho
Daniel9:6 Watumye abagaragu bawe b'abahanuzi ku bami bacu no ku bategetsi bacu no kuri ba sogokuruza
Daniel9:7 Nyagasani
Daniel9:8 Koko Uhoraho
Daniel9:9 Ariko wowe Nyagasani Mana yacu
Daniel9:10 Uhoraho Mana yacu
Daniel9:11 Abisiraheli bose iyo bava bakagera bishe Amategeko yawe banga kukumvira. None kubera ibyo waduhanishije umuvumo n'akaga byanditswe mu Mategeko ya Musa umugaragu wawe
Daniel9:12 Washohoje ibyo wari watuburiye twebwe n'abategetsi bacu
Daniel9:13 Ibyo byago byatubayeho nk'uko byanditswe mu Mategeko ya Musa. Ariko Uhoraho Mana yacu
Daniel9:14 Koko Uhoraho Mana yacu
Daniel9:15 “Nyagasani Mana yacu
Daniel9:16 Nyagasani
Daniel9:17 Mana yacu
Daniel9:18 Mana yanjye
Daniel9:19 Nyagasani
Daniel9:20 Nuko nkomeza gusenga no kwemera ibyaha jye n'ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli twakoze
Daniel9:21 Mu gihe nasengaga
Daniel9:22 Aransobanurira ati: “Daniyeli we
Daniel9:23 Kuva ugitangira gusenga
Daniel9:24 Nyuma y'imyaka magana ane na mirongo cyenda
Daniel9:25 Umenye kandi usobanukirwe ibi: uhereye igihe icyemezo cyo gusana no kubaka Yeruzalemu cyatangarijwe kugeza igihe hazabaho umutegetsi washyizweho bamusīze amavuta
Daniel9:26 Nyuma y'iyo myaka magana ane na mirongo itatu n'ine
Daniel9:27 Mu gihe cy'imyaka irindwi uwo mutegetsi azategekesha igitugu abantu benshi. Nyuma y'imyaka itatu n'igice
Daniel10:1 Mu mwaka wa gatatu Umwami Sirusi w'Umuperesi ari ku ngoma
Daniel10:2 Muri icyo gihe
Daniel10:3 Sinigeze ndya inyama cyangwa ibindi byokurya byiza
Daniel10:4 Ku itariki ya makumyabiri n'enye z'ukwezi kwa mbere
Daniel10:5 Nubuye amaso kugira ngo ndebe mbona umuntu wambaye imyambaro yera
Daniel10:6 Umubiri we wateraga ibishashi nk'ibuye ry'agaciro
Daniel10:7 Jyewe Daniyeli nari hamwe n'abandi
Daniel10:8 Nuko nsigara jyenyine nitegereza iryo bonekerwa rikomeye. Byanteye gucika intege nshya ubwoba
Daniel10:9 Numvise amagambo y'uwo muntu
Daniel10:10 Nuko ikiganza kinkoraho kiranyegura
Daniel10:11 Nuko uwo muntu arambwira ati: “Yewe Daniyeli watoneshejwe n'Imana
Daniel10:12 Arongera ati: “Daniyeli
Daniel10:13 “Ariko ikinyabutware cyo mu Buperesi cyamaze ibyumweru bitatu kimbuza kukugeraho
Daniel10:14 Bityo naje kugira ngo ngusobanurire ibigomba kuba ku bwoko bwawe mu minsi izaza
Daniel10:15 Ayo magambo yayambwiye nubitse umutwe ku butaka
Daniel10:16 Nuko haza usa n'umuntu ankora ku munwa
Daniel10:17 None se Nyakubahwa
Daniel10:18 Nuko wa wundi usa n'umuntu arongera ankoraho arampumuriza
Daniel10:19 uwari wambaye imyambaro yera arambwira ati: “Yewe muntu watoneshejwe n'Imana
Daniel10:20 Nuko arambaza ati: “Ese uzi icyatumye nza kukureba? Ni ukugira ngo nkumenyeshe ibyanditswe mu Gitabo cy'Ukuri. Ariko mu mwanya ngomba gusubira kurwanya ikinyabutware cyo mu Buperesi
Daniel10:21 
Daniel11:1 Erega nanjye naramutabaye ndamufasha
Daniel11:2 Arongera ati: “Reka ngusobanurire uko bigiye kugenda. Abami batatu bagiye gusimburana ku ngoma y'u Buperesi
Daniel11:3 Hanyuma u Bugereki buzagira umwami w'igihangange uzategeka ubwami bugari
Daniel11:4 Namara gukomera cyane
Daniel11:5 “Igice cy'amajyepfo ari cyo Misiri kizategekwa n'umwami ukomeye. Ariko umwe mu batware b'ingabo wamutabaye azamurusha gukomera
Daniel11:6 Nihashira imyaka abami b'ibyo bihugu bazagirana ubucuti
Daniel11:7 “Icyo gihe umwe muri basaza be azima ingoma mu Misiri maze atere ingabo z'umwami wa Siriya
Daniel11:8 Azanyaga ibigirwamana byo muri Siriya n'amashusho acuzwe mu cyuma
Daniel11:9 Hanyuma umwami wa Siriya na we azamanuka ajye mu Misiri
Daniel11:10 “Abahungu b'uwo mwami bazakoranya ingabo nyinshi cyane zigabe ibitero
Daniel11:11 Ibyo bizarakaza cyane Umwami wa Misiri na we atere umwami wa Siriya
Daniel11:12 amarire ku icumu ibihumbi n'ibihumbi byazo. Azirata ubutwari ariko ntabwo azaba atsinze burundu.
Daniel11:13 Umwami wa Siriya azamara imyaka akoranya izindi ngabo nyinshi kurusha iza mbere
Daniel11:14 Icyo gihe hazaboneka abantu benshi bazigomeka ku mwami wa Misiri. Daniyeli we
Daniel11:15 Umwami wa Siriya azatera umujyi ntamenwa
Daniel11:16 Abanyasiriya bazakora ibyo bishakiye kuko ntawe uzabakoma imbere. Bazigarurira igihugu cyiza bagire ububasha bwo kukirimbura.
Daniel11:17 “Umwami wa Siriya azafata umugambi wo kuzana ingabo z'igihugu cye zose
Daniel11:18 Umwami wa Siriya azatera ibihugu bikikije Inyanja ya Mediterane ndetse ibyinshi muri byo abyigarurire
Daniel11:19 Umwami azatahuka asubire mu bigo bye ntamenwa
Daniel11:20 Uzamusimbura ku ngoma azaka imisoro myinshi yo kuzahūra umutungo w'ibwami
Daniel11:21 “Nyuma y'ibyo hazaza umuntu usuzuguritse
Daniel11:22 Ingabo zizasandara imbere ye nk'umwuzure ariko ntizizashobora kumutsinda
Daniel11:23 Azagirana amasezerano n'abantu benshi hanyuma abariganye
Daniel11:24 Azakora amarorerwa ba se na ba sekuruza batigeze bakora
Daniel11:25 “Azaterana imbaraga n'ubutwari umwami wa Misiri
Daniel11:26 Ibyegera bye ni byo bizamugambanira maze ingabo ze zitsindwe
Daniel11:27 Abo bami bombi bazagirana imishyikirano bafitanye imigambi mibi maze baryaryane. Imishyikirano yabo nta cyo izageraho kuko igihe cyagenwe kizaba kitaragera.
Daniel11:28 Umwami wa Siriya azatahukana iminyago myinshi. Nagera muri Yudeya aziyemeza gutoteza ubwoko Imana yahaye Isezerano
Daniel11:29 “Igihe cyateganyijwe nikigera
Daniel11:30 Abanyaroma bazaza mu mato y'intambara
Daniel11:31 Azohereza ingabo ze zihumanye ikigo cy'Ingoro y'Imana
Daniel11:32 Umwami ubwe azareshya abataye Isezerano ry'Imana abiyegereze. Ariko abazi Imana bazishyira hamwe bihagarareho kigabo.
Daniel11:33 Abazi gushishoza muri bo bazatoza benshi
Daniel11:34 Muri iryo yicwa abenshi bazabagoboka nubwo bazaba bikurikiriye inyungu zabo
Daniel11:35 Bamwe mu bazi gushishoza bazicwa
Daniel11:36 “Wa mwami azajya akora icyo yishakiye
Daniel11:37 Azasuzugura ibigirwamana bya ba sekuruza
Daniel11:38 Ahubwo aziyegurira imana y'urugamba
Daniel11:39 Azatera ibigo ntamenwa yibwira ko iyo mana y'abanyamahanga imushyigikiye. Abazayiyoboka azabahesha ikuzo ryinshi
Daniel11:40 “Mu gihe giheruka umwami wa Misiri azamutera
Daniel11:41 Azatera igihugu cyiza maze abantu ibihumbi n'ibihumbi bicwe. Ariko Abedomu n'Abamowabu n'ab'intwari bo mu Bamoni bazarokoka.
Daniel11:42 Azarwanya ibihugu byinshi ndetse na Misiri ntizarokoka.
Daniel11:43 Azigabiza umutungo w'izahabu n'ifeza n'ibindi bintu by'agaciro byo mu Misiri. Abanyalibiya n'Abanyakushi bazamuyoboka.
Daniel11:44 Ariko inkuru ziturutse mu burasirazuba no mu majyaruguru zizamuhagarika umutima
Daniel11:45 Azashinga amahema ye y'ibwami hagati y'inyanja n'umusozi mwiza Imana yitoranyirije. Ni bwo igihe cye kizaba kigeze maze yicwe
Daniel12:1 Wa muntu wari wambaye imyambaro yera arongera ati: “Icyo gihe kizaba ari igihe cy'amakuba kitigeze kibaho mu bwoko bwawe. Ariko Mikayeli umutware w'abamarayika
Daniel12:2 Abenshi mu bapfuye bagahambwa bazazuka
Daniel12:3 Abazi gushishoza bazarabagirana ubwiza nk'ikirere
Daniel12:4 Naho rero wowe Daniyeli
Daniel12:5 Nuko jyewe Daniyeli mbona abandi bantu babiri bahagaze ku ruzi
Daniel12:6 Umwe muri bo abaza umuntu wambaye imyambaro yera wari uhagaze mu kirere hejuru y'uruzi ati: “Ibyo bintu bitangaje bizarangira ryari?”
Daniel12:7 Wa muntu wambaye imyambaro yera wari uhagaze hejuru y'uruzi ashyira amaboko yombi hejuru
Daniel12:8 Ibyo narabyumvise ariko sinabisobanukirwa
Daniel12:9 Aransubiza ati: “Daniyeli we
Daniel12:10 Abantu benshi baziboneza babe abere n'intungane
Daniel12:11 Kuva igihe ibitambo bya buri munsi bizahagarikwa hagashyirwaho igiterashozi kirimbuzi
Daniel12:12 Hahirwa umuntu uzihangana akazageza ku minsi igihumbi na magana atatu na mirongo itatu n'itanu.
Daniel12:13 Naho wowe Daniyeli igendere
Hosea1:1 Ubu ni bwo butumwa Uhoraho yahaye Hozeya mwene Bēri. Hari ku ngoma ya Uziya no ku ya Yotamu
Hosea1:2 Ngubu ubutumwa Uhoraho yabanje kugeza ku Bisiraheli abunyujije kuri Hozeya. Uhoraho yabwiye Hozeya ati: “Genda urongore indaya
Hosea1:3 Nuko Hozeya aragenda arongora Gomeri
Hosea1:4 Uhoraho abwira Hozeya ati: “Umwite Yizerēli
Hosea1:5 Icyo gihe nzatsembera ingufu za Isiraheli mu kibaya cya Yizerēli.”
Hosea1:6 Gomeri arongera asama inda
Hosea1:7 Ariko Abayuda bo nzabagirira impuhwe. Jyewe Uhoraho Imana yabo nzabakiza. Icyakora sinzabakiza nkoresheje imiheto cyangwa inkota
Hosea1:8 Gomeri acutsa Ntampuhwe
Hosea1:9 Uhoraho abwira Hozeya ati: “Umwite Subwokobwanjye
Hosea2:1 Nyamara abakomoka kuri Isiraheli bazaba benshi nk'umusenyi wo ku nyanja
Hosea2:2 Abayuda n'Abisiraheli bazakoranira hamwe
Hosea2:3 Bityo abavandimwe banyu muzabite “Bwokobwanjye”
Hosea2:4 Uhoraho abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Nimuburanye nyoko
Hosea2:5 Natabigenza atyo nzamwambika ubusa
Hosea2:6 Abana be sinzabagirira impuhwe
Hosea2:7 Koko nyina yigize indaya
Hosea2:8 Ni cyo gituma inzira acamo nzayicīsha amahwa
Hosea2:9 Aziruka ku bakunzi be nyamara ntazabashyikira
Hosea2:10 Erega ntiyazirikanye ko ari jye wari umugize! Namuhaga ingano na divayi nshya n'amavuta
Hosea2:11 Ni cyo gituma ntazamuha umwero w'ingano
Hosea2:12 Dore ngiye kumwambika ubusa
Hosea2:13 Nzakuraho ibyamushimishaga byose
Hosea2:14 Nzatsemba imizabibu n'imitini bye
Hosea2:15 Nzamuhanira ko yizihizaga iminsi mikuru y'ibigirwamana Bāli
Hosea2:16 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Ni cyo gituma jyewe nzamuhendahenda
Hosea2:17 Tukiriyo nzamusubiza imirima ye y'imizabibu
Hosea2:18 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Icyo gihe azanyita umugabo we
Hosea2:19 Nzamubuza kwambaza ibigirwamana Bāli
Hosea2:20 Icyo gihe nzategeka inyamaswa n'ibiguruka n'ibikurura inda hasi
Hosea2:21 “Isiraheli we
Hosea2:22 uzambera umugore nkubere indahemuka
Hosea2:23 Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Icyo gihe nzaha Abisiraheli icyo bansabye
Hosea2:24 ubutaka na bwo buzera
Hosea2:25 Nzatuma ashora imizi mu gihugu
Hosea3:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Ongera ukunde wa mugore w'umusambanyikazi ukundwa n'undi mugabo utari wowe. Uko ni ko jyewe Uhoraho nkunda Abisiraheli
Hosea3:2 Nuko uwo mugore ndamucyura ntanze ibikoroto cumi na bitanu by'ifeza n'ibiro nka magana abiri by'ingano.
Hosea3:3 Ndamubwira nti: “Tuzamarana iminsi myinshi uri uwanjye
Hosea3:4 Koko Abisiraheli bazamara iminsi myinshi badafite umwami cyangwa umutware. Nta gitambo bazatamba
Hosea3:5 Hanyuma Abisiraheli bazagarukira Uhoraho Imana yabo bamuyoboke
Hosea4:1 Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Hosea4:2 Bakunda kuvumana no kubeshya no kwicana
Hosea4:3 Ni cyo gituma igihugu kizicwa n'amapfa

Hosea4:5 Mwebwe abatambyi

Hosea4:7 “Uko abatambyi barushijeho kugwira
Hosea4:8 Batungwa n'ibitambo byo guhongerera ibyaha
Hosea4:9 Kuba abatambyi ntibizababuza guhanwa kimwe na rubanda. Nzabahana mbaziza imigenzereze yabo
Hosea4:10 Bazarya ibitambo ariko be guhaga
Hosea4:11 ni bwo buraya! “Kunywa divayi ikuze n'iy'ihīra byica umutima.
Hosea4:12 Abantu b'ubwoko bwanjye bahanuza ibigirwamana bibajwe mu biti
Hosea4:13 Batambira ibigirwamana ibitambo ku mpinga z'imisozi
Hosea4:14 Abakobwa banyu si bo nzahanira ko bigize indaya
Hosea4:15 “Mwa Bisiraheli mwe

Amos5:14 Nimuharanire gukora ibyiza muzinukwe ibibi
Amos5:15 Mujye mwanga ibibi mukunde ibyiza
Amos5:16 Nyagasani Uhoraho Imana Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Mu mihanda yose yo mu mujyi abantu bazacura umuborogo
Amos5:17 Imirima y'imizabibu yose izumvikanamo imiborogo
Amos5:18 Bazabona ishyano abifuza umunsi w'Uhoraho! Mbese uwo munsi w'Uhoraho muwifuriza iki? Uzaba ari umunsi w'umwijima ntuzaba ari uw'umucyo.
Amos5:19 Bizasa n'umuntu uhunze intare agakubitana n'ikirura
Amos5:20 Umunsi w'Uhoraho uzaba ari uw'umwijima
Amos5:21 “Mukora ingendo z'iminsi mikuru muza kundamya
Amos5:22 Ibitambo byanyu bikongorwa n'umuriro simbyishimira
Amos5:23 Nimunkize urusaku rw'indirimbo zanyu
Amos5:24 Ahubwo ubutabera nibwishyire bwizane nk'umugezi utemba
Amos5:25 “Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Amos5:26 Icyo gihe ntimwaramyaga ikigirwamana Sakuti
Amos5:27 Nuko rero nzatuma mujyanwa ho iminyago babarenze Damasi.” Uko ni ko Uhoraho avuga: Imana Nyiringabo ni ryo zina rye.
Amos6:1 Bazabona ishyano abatuye i Siyoni badamaraye
Amos6:2 Nimujye i Kaline murebe
Amos6:3 Mwanga kwemera ko igihe cy'akaga cyegereje
Amos6:4 Muryama ku mariri atatse amahembe y'inzovu
Amos6:5 Mufata inanga mugacuranga
Amos6:6 Munywa divayi nyinshi mugakabya
Amos6:7 Ni yo mpamvu muzaba mu ba mbere bazajyanwa ho iminyago
Amos6:8 Nyagasani Uhoraho yarahiye ubutisubiraho
Amos6:9 Nubwo mu nzu hasigara abantu icumi bacitse ku icumu
Amos6:10 Se wabo w'uwapfuye naza gusohora umurambo mu nzu ngo bawutwike
Amos6:11 Yewe
Amos6:12 Mbese amafarasi yakwiruka mu bitare? Ashwi da! Ese ibimasa byo byahinga mu bitare? Ntibishoboka! Nyamara mwebwe mwahumanyije ubutabera bumera nk'uburozi
Amos6:13 Mwirata ko mwigaruriye umujyi wa Lodebari. Murigamba muti: “Mbega ukuntu twagize ubutwari bwo gufata Karinayimu!”
Amos6:14 Uhoraho Imana Nyiringabo aravuga ati: “Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Amos7:1 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: nabonye Uhoraho yohereje amarumbu y'inzige igihe ubwatsi bwari bumaze gushibuka aho bari baratemye ubugenewe umwami.
Amos7:2 Nuko inzige zitsemba ubwatsi bwose bwo mu gihugu
Amos7:3 Uhoraho yisubiraho ati: “Ibyo ubonye ntibizabaho!” Uko ni ko Uhoraho yavuze.
Amos7:4 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: nabonye Nyagasani Uhoraho agiye guhanisha Abisiraheli umuriro. Uwo muriro wakamyaga amasōko avubura imigezi ugakongora n'ubutaka.
Amos7:5 Nuko ndatakamba nti: “Nyagasani Uhoraho
Amos7:6 Maze Uhoraho yisubiraho ati: “Ibyo ubonye na byo ntibizabaho.” Uko ni ko Nyagasani Uhoraho yavuze.
Amos7:7 Dore ibyo Nyagasani yanyeretse: namubonye ahagaze ku rukuta rwagorojwe impinyuzarukuta kandi afashe impinyuzarukuta mu ntoki.
Amos7:8 Uhoraho arambaza ati: “Amosi we
Amos7:9 Aho abakomoka kuri Izaki basengera ibigirwamana hose nzahatsemba
Amos7:10 Amasiya umutambyi w'i Beteli atuma kuri Yerobowamu
Amos7:11 Ubonye ngo Amosi avuge ati: ‘Yerobowamu azicishwa inkota
Amos7:12 Nuko Amasiya abwira Amosi ati: “Genda wa muhanuzi we! Itahire mu Buyuda ube ari ho uhanurira ubone ikigutunga!
Amos7:13 Ntukongere guhanurira hano i Beteli
Amos7:14 Amosi asubiza Amasiya ati: “Umwuga wanjye si uguhanura
Amos7:15 Niragiriraga amatungo ariko Uhoraho arampamagara ati: ‘Jya guhanurira ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli.’
Amos7:16 Amasiya we
Amos7:17 Uhoraho aravuga ati: ‘Umugore wawe azahinduka indaya muri uyu mujyi
Amos8:1 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: nabonye igitebo cy'imbuto zo mu mahenuka y'isarura.
Amos8:2 Nuko arambaza ati: “Amosi we
Amos8:3 Uwo munsi abaririmbaga mu ngoro basengeramo bazacura imiborogo. Ahantu hose imirambo izaba myinshi
Amos8:4 Nimutege amatwi mwumve ibi
Amos8:5 Muribwira muti: “Umunsi mukuru w'imboneko z'ukwezi urarangira ryari ngo twicururize?” Kandi muti: “Si twe tubona isabato irangira ngo tugurishe ingano! Turica iminzani twibe ibiro
Amos8:6 turagurisha ndetse n'ingano z'inkumbi. Abatindi nyakujya turabagura amafaranga
Amos8:7 None Uhoraho yarabarahiye ati: “Abakomoka kuri Yakobo ni abanyagasuzuguro
Amos8:8 Ni cyo gituma isi izatingita
Amos8:9 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Uwo munsi nzatuma izuba rirenga amanywa ava
Amos8:10 Ingendo zanyu z'iminsi mikuru muza kundamya
Amos8:11 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Dore iminsi izaza nteze igihugu inzara
Amos8:12 Icyo gihe abantu bazajarajara
Amos8:13 Uwo munsi abasore n'abakobwa beza bazicwa n'inyota.
Amos8:14 Abarahira ibigirwamana by'i Samariya
Amos9:1 Nabonye Nyagasani ahagaze iruhande rw'urutambiro

Amos9:3 Nubwo bakwihisha mu mpinga y'umusozi wa Karumeli
Amos9:4 Nubwo abanzi babo babajyana ho iminyago

Obadiah1:2 Uhoraho abwira Abedomu ati: “Nzatuma andi mahanga abatesha agaciro
Obadiah1:3 Mwirata ko mutuye mu bitare ahantu hirengeye
Obadiah1:4 Nubwo mwatumbagira nka kagoma
Obadiah1:5 “Abajura cyangwa abasahuzi baramutse babateye nijoro
Obadiah1:6 Mwa bakomoka kuri Ezawu mwe
Obadiah1:7 Abo mwifatanyaga bazabamenesha babambutse imipaka
Obadiah1:8 Koko mwa Bedomu mwe
Obadiah1:9 “Mwa batuye i Temani mwe
Obadiah1:10 “Mwa Bedomu mwe
Obadiah1:11 Mwari muhagaze murebēra igihe abanzi binjiraga muri Yeruzalemu ku ngufu
Obadiah1:12 Ntimwari mukwiye gukina ku mubyimba bene wanyu bageze mu makuba
Obadiah1:13 Muri icyo gihe cy'ibyago
Obadiah1:14 Ntimwari mukwiye gutegera mu mahuriro y'inzira

Obadiah1:16 “Mwa Bisiraheli mwe
Obadiah1:17 Nyamara Siyoni uzongera kuba umusozi unyeguriwe
Obadiah1:18 Abakomoka kuri Yakobo bazamera nk'umuriro
Obadiah1:19 Abayuda bo mu majyepfo bazigarurira igihugu cya Edomu. Abatuye mu mirambi y'iburengerazuba bazigarurira u Bufilisiti n'intara ya Efurayimu n'iya Samariya. Abakomoka kuri Benyamini bazigarurira intara ya Gileyadi.
Obadiah1:20 Abo mu majyaruguru ya Isiraheli bajyanywe ho iminyago bazigarurira Fenisiya bageze i Sarepati. Ab'i Yeruzalemu bajyanywe ho iminyago i Sefaradi bazigarurira imijyi yo mu majyepfo.

Jonah1:1 Uhoraho yahaye Yonasi mwene Amitayi ubutumwa agira ati:
Jonah1:2 “Haguruka ujye i Ninive wa murwa munini
Jonah1:3 Nuko Yonasi yiyemeza guhunga Uhoraho
Jonah1:4 Maze Uhoraho ateza inkubi y'umuyaga mu nyanja
Jonah1:5 Abasare bagira ubwoba
Jonah1:6 Nuko umugenga w'ubwato asanga Yonasi aramukangura
Jonah1:7 Abasare baravugana bati: “Nimuze dufinde kugira ngo tumenye uduteje aya makuba.” Barafinda
Jonah1:8 Maze bamuhata ibibazo bati: “Tubwire. Ni nde uduteje aya makuba? Uragenzwa n'iki? Urava he? Ukomoka mu kihe gihugu? Ubwoko bwawe ni ubuhe?”
Jonah1:9 Yonasi arabasubiza ati: “Jyewe ndi Umuheburayi
Jonah1:10 Nuko ababwira ko ahunze Uhoraho. Abo bagabo babyumvise bagira ubwoba cyane maze baramubaza bati: “Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki?
Jonah1:11 Dore inyanja irarushaho kurubira
Jonah1:12 Yonasi ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nimumfate mundohe mu nyanja na yo iratuza
Jonah1:13 Ariko abo bagabo bagerageza kugashya cyane kugira ngo basubire imusozi
Jonah1:14 Batakambira Uhoraho bati: “Nyabuneka Uhoraho
Jonah1:15 Nuko bafata Yonasi bamuroha mu nyanja
Jonah1:16 Abo bagabo batinya cyane Uhoraho bamutura igitambo bahiga no kuzamutura ibindi.
Jonah2:1 Uhoraho ategeka igifi kinini kimira Yonasi. Nuko Yonasi amara iminsi itatu n'amajoro atatu mu nda y'icyo gifi.
Jonah2:2 Yonasi ari mu nda y'igifi
Jonah2:3 “Uhoraho
Jonah2:4 Wandoshye ikuzimu mu nyanja rwagati
Jonah2:5 Ni ko kwibwira nti: ‘Uhoraho kuri wowe mbaye igicibwa nyamara nkomeje guhanga amaso Ingoro yawe.’
Jonah2:6 Amazi aranyuzuye arenda kumpitana
Jonah2:7 Naramanutse ngera hasi mu imerero ry'imisozi
Jonah2:8 Ubwo ubugingo bwarimo buncika
Jonah2:9 Abaramya ibigirwamana bivutsa imbabazi!
Jonah2:10 Ariko jyewe nzamamaza ishimwe ryawe
Jonah2:11 Nuko Uhoraho ategeka cya gifi kiruka Yonasi imusozi.

Jonah3:5 Abaturage b'i Ninive bemera ubutumwa bw'Imana. Hatangazwa igihe cyo kwigomwa kurya
Jonah3:6 Inkuru igera ku mwami w'i Ninive. Ahaguruka ku ntebe ye ya cyami
Jonah3:7 Nuko umwami aca iteka

Jonah4:11 None se jye sinari nkwiye kubabazwa na Ninive

Nahum1:1 Ngiki igitabo gikubiyemo ibyo Imana yahishuriye Nahumu wo mu mujyi wa Elikoshi. Kirimo imiburo y'ibyerekeye umurwa wa Ninive.
Nahum1:2 Uhoraho ni Imana ifuha kandi ihōra
Nahum1:3 Uhoraho atinda kurakara
Nahum1:4 Acyaha inyanja igakama
Nahum1:5 Atuma imisozi itingita
Nahum1:6 Ni nde wahangara kumuhagarara imbere yarakaye? Ni nde wahangana n'umujinya we ukaze? Uburakari bwe bugurumana nk'inkongi y'umuriro
Nahum1:7 Uhoraho agira neza
Nahum1:8 Nyamara Ninive azayiteza umwuzure ayirimbure
Nahum1:9 Ni kuki mwigomeka ku Uhoraho? Azabatsemba abamareho. Abanzi be ntibazongera kubyutsa umutwe.
Nahum1:10 Bameze nk'amahwa asobekeranye
Nahum1:11 Ninive we
Nahum1:12 Uhoraho arabwira Abayuda ati: “Abanyashūru babarusha imbaraga kandi ni benshi
Nahum1:13 Ubu ngiye kubavana mu gahato k'Abanyashūru
Nahum1:14 Mwa batuye i Ninive mwe
Nahum2:1 Mwa Bayuda mwe
Nahum2:2 Mwa batuye i Ninive mwe
Nahum2:3 Mwasahuye abakomoka kuri Yakobo ari bo Bisiraheli

Nahum2:5 Amagare yabo y'intambara yiroshye mu mihanda

Habakkuk1:2 Uhoraho

Habakkuk1:7 Ni abantu bateye ubwoba kandi batinyitse

Haggai1:1 Ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa gatandatu

Zechariah5:6 Ndamubaza nti: “Kiriya ni iki?” Aransubiza ati: “Ni igiseke kirimo ibicumuro by'abatuye igihugu cyose.”
Zechariah5:7 Icyo giseke cyari gifite umutemeri w'icyuma kiremereye upfundutse

Zechariah6:2 Igare rya mbere ryakururwaga n'amafarasi y'amagaju

Zechariah6:4 Nuko mbaza umumarayika twavuganaga nti: “Nyakubahwa
Zechariah6:5 Aransubiza ati: “Biriya ni imiyaga yo mu byerekezo bine by'isi
Zechariah6:6 Igare rikururwa n'amafarasi y'imikara rirerekeza mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru
Zechariah6:7 Amafarasi y'ibihogo yo afite umwete wo kuzenguruka isi. Uwo mumarayika arayabwira ati: “Ngaho nimugende muyizenguruke.” Ayo mafarasi ahita ajya kuzenguruka isi.
Zechariah6:8 Nuko arampamagara arambwira ati: “Ntureba ariya mafarasi yerekeje mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru
Zechariah6:9 Uhoraho arambwira ati:
Zechariah6:10 “Abayahudi bakiri aho bajyanywe ho iminyago
Zechariah6:11 Wakire ifeza n'izahabu bazanye ubikoremo ikamba
Zechariah6:12 Umubwire ngo: “Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: ‘Umuntu witwa Umushibuka azasagamba
Zechariah6:13 Koko ni we uzanyubakira Ingoro
Zechariah6:14 Rya kamba rizagume mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho
Zechariah6:15 Abantu bazaturuka iyo giterwa inkingi bubake Ingoro yanjye.” Bityo muzamenya ko Uhoraho Nyiringabo ari we wantumye kuri mwe. Ibyo byose bizaba
Zechariah7:1 Ku itariki ya kane y'ukwezi kwa Kisilevu
Zechariah7:2 Abanyabeteli bari barohereje intumwa ziyobowe na Sareseri na Regemeleki ngo zijye gutakambira Uhoraho
Zechariah7:3 kandi zibaze abatambyi b'Ingoro y'Uhoraho Nyiringabo kimwe n'abahanuzi ziti: “Mbese mu kwezi kwa gatanu tuzakomeza kurira no kwigomwa kurya nk'uko tumaze imyaka myinshi tubikora?”
Zechariah7:4 Nuko Uhoraho Nyiringabo antuma
Zechariah7:5 kubaza abaturage bose n'abatambyi ati: “Hashize imyaka mirongo irindwi mwigomwa kurya
Zechariah7:6 Iyo murya n'iyo munywa si mwe muba mwishimisha?”
Zechariah7:7 Ibyo ni byo Uhoraho yavugaga atumye abahanuzi ba kera
Zechariah7:8 Nyuma Uhoraho Nyiringabo atuma Zakariya kubwira abantu ibyo yategetse ati: “Mujye mucira abantu imanza zitabera
Zechariah7:9 
Zechariah7:10 Ntimugakandamize abapfakazi n'impfubyi n'abanyamahanga bari iwanyu n'abakene
Zechariah7:11 Nyamara abantu banze kumvira bagamika amajosi
Zechariah7:12 Banangiye imitima yabo iba nk'urutare
Zechariah7:13 maze aravuga ati: “Ubwo nabahamagaye bakanga kunyumvira
Zechariah7:14 Nabatatanyirije mu mahanga batari bazi. Basiga igihugu cyabo ari amatongo
Zechariah8:1 Uhoraho Nyiringabo yarantumye ati:
Zechariah8:2 “Urukundo nkunda Siyoni ni rwinshi
Zechariah8:3 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Dore ngiye kugaruka i Yeruzalemu
Zechariah8:4 Uhoraho Nyiringabo arakomeza ati: “Abasaza n'abakecuru bazongera bicare ku mihanda y'i Yeruzalemu
Zechariah8:5 Abana b'abahungu n'abakobwa bazuzura imihanda y'i Yeruzalemu
Zechariah8:6 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Nubwo itsinda ry'abasigaye ryatangara
Zechariah8:7 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Dore ngiye kurokora abantu banjye
Zechariah8:8 Nzabagarura bature i Yeruzalemu
Zechariah8:9 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Nimukomere mwebwe mwari muhari
Zechariah8:10 Mbere yaho nta muntu wahemberwaga umurimo yakoze
Zechariah8:11 Ariko ubu itsinda ry'abasigaye b'ubu bwoko
Zechariah8:12 Arongera ati: “Nzasākāza amahoro mu gihugu
Zechariah8:13 Mwa Bayuda mwe
Zechariah8:14 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Ubwo nari maze kwiyemeza kubagirira nabi
Zechariah8:15 Ariko ubu niyemeje kugirira neza abatuye i Yeruzalemu
Zechariah8:16 Dore ibyo mugomba gukora: umuntu wese ajye abwiza mugenzi we ukuri
Zechariah8:17 Ntimukagambirire kugirirana nabi
Zechariah8:18 Uhoraho Nyiringabo yarantumye ati:
Zechariah8:19 “Iminsi yo kwigomwa kurya mugira mu kwezi kwa kane no mu kwa gatanu
Zechariah8:20 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Abanyamahanga batuye mu mijyi myinshi bazaza
Zechariah8:21 abavuye mu mujyi umwe bazasanga abo mu wundi
Zechariah8:22 Bityo abantu benshi ndetse n'abo mu mahanga akomeye
Zechariah8:23 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Muri iyo minsi abagabo icumi bavuga indimi zitari zimwe
Zechariah9:1 Ngiyi imiburo yaturutse ku Uhoraho. Uhoraho yibasiye intara ya Hadaraki
Zechariah9:2 Yibasiye kandi Lebo-Hamati
Zechariah9:3 Abanyatiri biyubakiye ikigo ntamenwa
Zechariah9:4 Nyamara dore Nyagasani agiye kwigarurira Tiri
Zechariah9:5 Abanyashikeloni bazabibona bashye ubwoba
Zechariah9:6 naho Ashidodi hazaturwa n'uruvange rw'amoko. Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Uko ni ko nzamaraho ubwirasi bw'Abafilisiti.
Zechariah9:7 Nzababuza kurya inyama zirimo amaraso n'ibyokurya bizira. Bityo abazaba bakiriho bazaba abanjye
Zechariah9:8 Nzarinda ubwoko bwanjye
Zechariah9:9 Nimwishime cyane baturage b'i Siyoni! Muvuze impundu
Zechariah9:10 Azatsemba amagare y'intambara mu ntara ya Efurayimu
Zechariah9:11 Kandi Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Kubera Isezerano nagiranye namwe
Zechariah9:12 Yemwe abafunzwe mufite icyizere mwe
Zechariah9:13 Koko rero nzatamika umwambi ari wo Befurayimu
Zechariah9:14 Uhoraho aziyerekana hejuru y'abantu be
Zechariah9:15 Uhoraho Nyiringabo azabarinda
Zechariah9:16 Uwo munsi Uhoraho Imana yabo izabakiza
Zechariah9:17 Mbega ihirwe bazaba bafite! Mbega ukuntu bazaba ari beza! Abasore n'inkumi bazasugira basagambe
Zechariah10:1 Musabe Uhoraho imvura y'itumba
Zechariah10:2 Nyamara ibishushanyo musenga birababeshya
Zechariah10:3 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Narakariye abanyamahanga bayobora ubwoko bwanjye
Zechariah10:4 Mu rubyaro rwa Yuda hazakomoka uzamera nk'ibuye ry'insanganyarukuta
Zechariah10:5 Bazitwara nk'intwari ku rugamba
Zechariah10:6 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Abakomoka kuri Yuda nzabagira ibihangange
Zechariah10:7 Abefurayimu bazamera nk'intwari

Zechariah10:9 Nabatatanyirije mu mahanga

Zechariah10:11 Bazambuka inyanja y'akaga

Zechariah11:1 Libani we
Zechariah11:2 Mwa mizonobari mwe
Zechariah11:3 Umva abashumba baraboroga
Zechariah11:4 Uhoraho Imana yanjye irambwira iti: “Ba umushumba w'ishyo ry'intama zigenewe kubagwa.
Zechariah11:5 Abazigura bakazibaga babona ko nta cyaha bakora
Zechariah11:6 Nuko Uhoraho aravuga ati: “Sinzagirira impuhwe abaturage b'iki gihugu. Buri muntu ngiye kumugabiza mugenzi we
Zechariah11:7 Nuko abacuruzaga intama bampa akazi
Zechariah11:8 Mu kwezi kumwe mba maze kwirukana abashumba baryo batatu. Za ntama sinaba ngishoboye kuzihanganira
Zechariah11:9 Ndazibwira nti: “Sinzongera kubabera umushumba ukundi. Izigomba gupfa nizipfe
Zechariah11:10 Nuko mfata ya nkoni yanjye yitwa Buntu
Zechariah11:11 Uwo munsi nsesa amasezerano nagiranye na yo. Abacuruzaga intama bakurikiriraga hafi ibyo nkora
Zechariah11:12 Ndababwira nti: “Niba bibanogeye nimumpe igihembo cyanjye
Zechariah11:13 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Icyo gihembo kijugunye mu bubiko bw'Ingoro yanjye.” Mfata ibyo bikoroto mirongo itatu by'ifeza
Zechariah11:14 Nuko mvuna inkoni yanjye ya kabiri yitwa Bumwe
Zechariah11:15 Uhoraho arambwira ati: “Ongera ufate ibikoresho by'umushumba
Zechariah11:16 Erega ngiye gushyiraho undi mushumba muri iki gihugu! Ntazatarura intama zazimiye
Zechariah11:17 Uwo mushumba gito utererana intama azabona ishyano! Ukuboko kwe n'ijisho rye ry'iburyo bikomerekere ku rugamba
Zechariah12:1 Ngiyi imiburo iturutse ku Uhoraho yerekeye Isiraheli: Uhoraho waremye ijuru
Zechariah12:2 “Yeruzalemu nzayigira nk'igikombe kirimo inzoga
Zechariah12:3 Umunsi amahanga yose yo ku isi yakoraniye kurwanya Yeruzalemu
Zechariah12:4 Uhoraho yungamo ati: “Icyo gihe amafarasi yabo yose nzayateza ubwoba
Zechariah12:5 Abatware b'u Buyuda ubwabo bazivugira bati: ‘Abatuye Yeruzalemu bakomora imbaraga zabo ku Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana yabo.’
Zechariah12:6 “Icyo gihe nzakoresha abatware b'u Buyuda nk'umuriro wo gukongora ibiti
Zechariah12:7 “Jyewe Uhoraho nzabanza ngoboke Abayuda
Zechariah12:8 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azarinda abatuye Yeruzalemu
Zechariah12:9 “Icyo gihe ubwanjye nziyizira

Zechariah12:12 Abatuye igihugu bose bazaboroga
Zechariah12:13 Abakomoka kuri Levi
Zechariah12:14 Bityo bityo n'abo mu yandi mazu asigaye
Zechariah13:1 “Icyo gihe abakomoka kuri Dawidi n'abandi batuye i Yeruzalemu
Zechariah13:2 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Muri icyo gihe nzatsemba ibigirwamana mu gihugu
Zechariah13:3 Nihagira uwongera kwiha guhanura
Zechariah13:4 Icyo gihe abahanuzi bose bazagira isoni zo kuvuga ibyo beretswe mu ibonekerwa. Bityo ntibazongera kwambara ibishura by'abahanuzi
Zechariah13:5 Buri wese azavuga ati: ‘Jye sindi umuhanuzi ahubwo ndi umuhinzi
Zechariah13:6 Nihagira abamubaza bati: ‘Niba utari umuhanuzi izo ndasago zo mu gituza wazitewe n'iki?’ Azabasubiza ati: ‘Nakomerekeye ku ncuti zanjye.’ ”
Zechariah13:7 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Wa nkota we

Zechariah13:9 Abo bagize kimwe cya gatatu nzabagerageza
Zechariah14:1 Dore umunsi w'Uhoraho uregereje. Yeruzalemu izasahurwa maze iminyago bayigabanire muri yo rwagati.
Zechariah14:2 Koko rero Uhoraho azakoranya amahanga yose kugira ngo atere Yeruzalemu. Izafatwa maze amazu bayasahure
Zechariah14:3 Nuko rero Uhoraho azatabara arwanye ayo mahanga
Zechariah14:4 Uwo munsi azahagarara ku Musozi w'Iminzenze
Zechariah14:5 Muzahunga munyuze muri icyo gikombe kuko kizagera ahitwa Asali. Muzahunga nka ba sokuruza ubwo bahungaga umutingito w'isi ukomeye
Zechariah14:6 Uwo munsi ntihazabaho icyokere
Zechariah14:7 Uzaba ari umunsi utazigera wira. Nta manywa cyangwa ijoro bizabaho
Zechariah14:8 Uwo munsi amazi ahesha ubugingo azaturuka muri Yeruzalemu amwe atembere mu Kiyaga cy'Umunyu
Zechariah14:9 Uwo munsi Uhoraho azaba Umwami ugenga isi yose
Zechariah14:10 Akarere kose kazengurutse Yeruzalemu kazaringanizwa habe ikibaya
Zechariah14:11 Yeruzalemu izongera iturwe
Zechariah14:12 Dore icyago Uhoraho azateza abanyamahanga bose bazahagurukira gutera Yeruzalemu: bazabora bahagaze
Zechariah14:13 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azabateza imivurungano ikomeye
Zechariah14:14 Abayuda bazarwanirira Yeruzalemu
Zechariah14:15 Uko cya cyago kizatezwa abanyamahanga
Zechariah14:16 Muri ba banyamahanga bahagurukiye gutera Yeruzalemu
Zechariah14:17 Nihagira amoko yo ku isi atazaza i Yeruzalemu kuramya Umwami Uhoraho Nyiringabo
Zechariah14:18 Abanyamisiri nibataza i Yeruzalemu ngo bizihirizeyo iyo minsi mikuru
Zechariah14:19 Ngicyo igihano cy'Abanyamisiri n'icy'andi mahanga
Zechariah14:20 Icyo gihe inzogera zambikwa amafarasi zizandikwaho ngo “Iyeguriwe Uhoraho.” Ibyungo bisanzwe byo mu Ngoro y'Uhoraho na byo bizamwegurirwa
Zechariah14:21 Ndetse ibyungo byose byo muri Yeruzalemu n'ibyo mu Buyuda
Malachi1:1 Ngiyi imiburo Uhoraho yagejeje ku Bisiraheli ayinyujije ku muhanuzi Malaki.
Malachi1:2 Uhoraho abwira Abisiraheli ati: “Narabakunze.” Na bo baramubaza bati: “Ni iki kigaragaza ko wadukunze?” Uhoraho arabasubiza ati: “None se Ezawu na Yakobo
Malachi1:3 naho Ezawu n'abamukomokaho mbigizayo. Imirenge yabo nayihinduye amatongo
Malachi1:4 Nubwo Abedomu ari bo abakomoka kuri Ezawu bavuga bati: “Imijyi yacu yarashenywe ariko tuyigarukemo tuyisane”
Malachi1:5 Mwebwe Abisiraheli
Malachi1:6 Uhoraho Nyiringabo abwira abatambyi ati: “Umwana yubaha se
Malachi1:7 Muransuzugura kuko muzana ku rutambiro rwanjye ibyokurya bihumanye. Nyamara murambaza muti: ‘Twakugize dute?’ Ni uko muvuga ko urutambiro rwanjye rusuzuguritse!
Malachi1:8 Igihe muje kuntura itungo rihumye cyangwa ricumbagira cyangwa rirwaye
Malachi1:9 Mwa batambyi mwe
Malachi1:10 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Icyampa hakagira umuntu ufunga inzugi z'Ingoro yanjye
Malachi1:11 Ku isi yose hari abantu banyubaha. Ahantu hose hari abatwika imibavu bakayintura kandi bakantura n'amaturo atunganye. Erega mu mahanga yose hari abanyubaha!” Uko ni ko Uhoraho Nyiringabo avuze.
