Malachi1:12 Na none ati: “Ariko mwebwe muransuzugura mukavuga muti: ‘Urutambiro rwa Nyagasani rurahumanye
Malachi1:13 Kandi mukinuba muti: ‘Mbega agahato!’ Nuko amatungo yakomeretse cyangwa acumbagira cyangwa arwaye
Malachi1:14 Havumwe undiganya wese akampigura bene iryo tungo
Malachi2:1 None rero Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Mwa batambyi mwe
Malachi2:2 Nimutanyumvira ngo mumpeshe ikuzo mubyitayeho
Malachi2:3 Dore nzahana ababakomokaho
Malachi2:4 Ubwo ni bwo muzamenya ko nabagejejeho iyo miburo
Malachi2:5 Arongera ati: “Abo Balevi nabasezeraniye ubugingo n'amahoro
Malachi2:6 Bigishaga inyigisho z'ukuri
Malachi2:7 Koko rero abatambyi ni bo bagomba kwigisha abantu kumenya Imana
Malachi2:8 Ariko mwebwe abatambyi ntimwasohoje uwo murimo
Malachi2:9 Na none ati: “Nanjye nabateje rubanda rwose barabasuzugura mukorwa n'isoni
Malachi2:10 Twese dukomoka kuri sogokuruza umwe
Malachi2:11 Abayahudi bahemukiye Imana
Malachi2:12 Umuntu wese ukora ibyo
Malachi2:13 Hari ikindi kandi mukora: muza ku rutambiro rw'Uhoraho mugasuka amarira. Muraboroga kandi mukaganya kubera ko atacyita ku maturo yanyu ngo ayakirane ubwuzu.
Malachi2:14 Nyamara murabaza muti: “Ibyo biterwa n'iki?” Biterwa n'uko wowe mugabo wahemukiye umugore wawe mwashakanye ukiri umusore. Mwasezeraniye imbere y'Uhoraho ko ari mugenzi wawe
Malachi2:15 Mbese Imana ntiyakugize umwe na we
Malachi2:16 Koko rero Uhoraho Nyiringabo Imana y'Abisiraheli
Malachi2:17 Murushya Uhoraho kubera amagambo yanyu. Nyamara murabaza muti: “Tumurushya dute?” Muramurushya iyo muvuga muti: “Umuntu wese ukora ibibi
Malachi3:1 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Dore ngiye kohereza intumwa yanjye kugira ngo intunganyirize inzira. Bidatinze Nyagasani mushaka azasesekara mu Ngoro ye
Malachi3:2 Ni nde uzarokoka ku munsi azaza? Cyangwa se ni nde uzahangara kumuhagarara imbere ubwo azaba aje? Kuko ameze nk'isabune y'umumeshi ikuraho umwanda
Malachi3:3 Azamera nk'ushongesha ifeza ayitunganya. Koko rero nk'uko umucuzi ashongesha ifeza n'izahabu abitunganya
Malachi3:4 Ubwo ni bwo Uhoraho azishimira amaturo y'abaturage b'igihugu cy'u Buyuda
Malachi3:5 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Nzaza muri mwe mbacire imanza. Nzihutira gushinja abanyabugenge n'abasambanyi
Malachi3:6 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Jyewe Uhoraho simpinduka
Malachi3:7 Kimwe na ba sokuruza mwateshutse amabwiriza yanjye ntimwayakurikiza.” Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Nimungarukire nanjye nzabagarukira. Nyamara murambaza muti: ‘Twakugarukira dute?’ ”
Malachi3:8 Na we ati: “Ese koko umuntu yakwima Imana ibyayo? Nyamara mwebwe mwarabinyimye. Ariko murambaza muti: ‘Twakwimye iki?’ Mwanyimye kimwe cya cumi n'amaturo.
Malachi3:9 Nuko rero mwebwe Abisiraheli mwese
Malachi3:10 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Ngaho nimuzane kimwe cya cumi gishyitse
Malachi3:11 Nzabuza inzige kwangiza imyaka yanyu
Malachi3:12 Amahanga yose azabita abanyehirwe
Malachi3:13 Uhoraho aravuze ati: “Mwaranyivovoteye. Nyamara murambaza muti: ‘Twakwivovoteye dute?’
Malachi3:14 Mwaravuze muti: ‘Gukorera Imana nta cyo bimaze. Twakurikije amabwiriza yayo kandi twagaragarije Uhoraho Nyiringabo ko twibabaje tukihana
Malachi3:15 Ahubwo twe tubona abirasi ari bo banyehirwe
Malachi3:16 Nuko abubahaga Uhoraho baraganiraga
Malachi3:17 Uhoraho Nyiringabo aravuze ati: “Bazaba abanjye bwite ku munsi ntegura. Nzabagirira impuhwe nk'uko umubyeyi azigirira umwana we umukorera.
Malachi3:18 Bityo muzongera mumenye itandukaniro riri hagati y'intungane n'abagome
Malachi3:19 Uhoraho Nyiringabo yungamo ati: “Dore hagiye kubaho umunsi abirasi bose n'inkozi z'ibibi zose
Malachi3:20 Ariko mwebwe abanyubaha
Malachi3:21 Ku munsi ntegura muzaribatira abagome munsi y'ibirenge byanyu
Malachi3:22 “Nimuzirikane Amategeko nahereye umugaragu wanjye Musa ku musozi wa Horebu
Malachi3:23 “Dore ngiye kuboherereza umuhanuzi Eliya mbere yuko habaho umunsi w'Uhoraho
Malachi3:24 Azunga abana na ba se
Matthew1:1 Dore uko ibisekuruza bya Yezu Kristo ukomoka kuri Dawidi no kuri Aburahamu bikurikirana:
Matthew1:2 Aburahamu yabyaye Izaki
Matthew1:3 Yuda abyara Perēsi na Zera ababyaranye na Tamari
Matthew1:4 Aramu abyara Aminadabu
Matthew1:5 Salumoni abyara Bowazi amubyaranye na Rahabu
Matthew1:6 Yese abyara Umwami Dawidi. Dawidi yabyaye Salomo amubyaranye na muka Uriya.
Matthew1:7 Salomo abyara Robowamu
Matthew1:8 Asa abyara Yozafati
Matthew1:9 Uziya abyara Yotamu
Matthew1:10 Hezekiya abyara Manase
Matthew1:11 Yosiya abyara Yekoniya n'abavandimwe be
Matthew1:12 Nyuma y'aho bajyaniwe i Babiloni
Matthew1:13 Zerubabeli abyara Abiyudi
Matthew1:14 Azori abyara Sadoki
Matthew1:15 Elihudi abyara Eleyazari
Matthew1:16 Yakobo abyara Yozefu umugabo wa Mariya
Matthew1:17 Kuva kuri Aburahamu kugeza kuri Dawidi hari ibisekuruza cumi na bine
Matthew1:18 Dore uko byagenze mu ivuka rya Yezu Kristo. Nyina Mariya wari warasabwe na Yozefu
Matthew1:19 Yozefu akaba umuntu w'intungane
Matthew1:20 Akiri muri ibyo umumarayika wa Nyagasani amubonekera mu nzozi
Matthew1:21 Azabyara umuhungu umwite Yezu
Matthew1:22 Byose byabereye kugira ngo bibe nk'uko Nyagasani yari yaratumye umuhanuzi kubivuga ati:
Matthew1:23 “Dore umukobwa w'isugi azasama inda
Matthew1:24 Yozefu akangutse abigenza uko umumarayika wa Nyagasani yari yamutegetse
Matthew1:25 Ariko ntibaryamana kugeza igihe yabyariye umwana w'umuhungu. Uwo mwana Yozefu amwita Yezu.
Matthew2:1 Yezu amaze kuvukira i Betelehemu mu ntara ya Yudeya ku ngoma y'Umwami Herodi
Matthew2:2 Barabaza bati: “Umwami w'Abayahudi uherutse kuvuka ari hehe? Twabonye inyenyeri ye turi iburasirazuba
Matthew2:3 Umwami Herodi yumvise ibyo ahagarika umutima
Matthew2:4 Nuko akoranya abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko bose b'Abisiraheli
Matthew2:5 Baramusubiza bati: “Ni i Betelehemu mu ntara ya Yudeya
Matthew2:6 ‘Nawe Betelehemu yo mu Buyuda
Matthew2:7 Nuko Herodi atumiza ba bahanga arabihererana
Matthew2:8 Nuko abatuma i Betelehemu avuga ati: “Nimugende mubaririze neza iby'uwo mwana. Nimumubona muzabimenyeshe
Matthew2:9 Bamaze kumva amagambo y'umwami baragenda. Ni bwo iyo nyenyeri bari babonye bakiri iburasirazuba ibagiye imbere
Matthew2:10 Babonye iyo nyenyeri barishima cyane.
Matthew2:11 Nuko binjira mu nzu basanga umwana ari kumwe na nyina Mariya
Matthew2:12 Nuko Imana imaze kubaburira mu nzozi ngo be gusubira kwa Herodi
Matthew2:13 Bamaze kugenda umumarayika wa Nyagasani abonekera Yozefu mu nzozi
Matthew2:14 Iryo joro Yozefu arabyuka
Matthew2:15 Bagumayo kugeza igihe Herodi apfiriye. Ibyo byabereyeho kugira ngo bibe uko Nyagasani yari yaravuze atumye umuhanuzi ati: “Umwana wanjye naramuhamagaye ngo ave mu Misiri.”
Matthew2:16 Herodi abonye ko ba bahanga bamutengushye ararakara cyane. Nuko yohereza abantu kwica abana b'abahungu bose b'i Betelehemu n'abo mu mirenge yose ihakikije
Matthew2:17 Bityo biba uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Yeremiya agira ati:
Matthew2:18 “Induru yumvikaniye i Rama
Matthew2:19 Nuko Herodi amaze gupfa
Matthew2:20 aramubwira ati: “Byuka ufate umwana na nyina musubire mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
Matthew2:21 Yozefu arabyuka ajyana umwana na nyina
Matthew2:22 Ariko yumvise ko Arikelawo mwene Herodi yabaye Umwami w'i Yudeya asimbuye se
Matthew2:23 Nuko ajyayo atura mu mujyi witwa Nazareti
Matthew3:1 Icyo gihe Yohani Mubatiza atunguka mu butayu bwo muri Yudeya atangaza ati:
Matthew3:2 “Nimwihane kuko ubwami bw'ijuru bwegereje!”
Matthew3:3 Yohani uwo ni we wari waravuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: “Nimwumve ijwi ry'urangururira mu butayu ati: ‘Nimutunganye inzira ya Nyagasani
Matthew3:4 Yohani yambaraga umwambaro uboheshejwe ubwoya bw'ingamiya
Matthew3:5 Abaturage b'i Yeruzalemu n'abo mu ntara yose ya Yudeya n'abo mu karere kose kegereye uruzi rwa Yorodani baramusangaga
Matthew3:6 akababatiriza mu ruzi rwa Yorodani
Matthew3:7 Yohani abonye Abafarizayi n'Abasaduseyi benshi baje kubatizwa arababwira ati: “Mwa rubyaro rw'impiri mwe
Matthew3:8 Nuko rero nk'uko igiti cyera imbuto
Matthew3:9 kandi ntimukirate muti: ‘Turi bene Aburahamu.’ Erega ndahamya ko no muri aya mabuye Imana ibasha kuremamo bene Aburahamu!
Matthew3:10 Ndetse n'ubu intorezo irabanguye kugira ngo iteme ibiti ibihereye ku mizi. Nuko rero igiti cyose kitera imbuto nziza kigiye gutemwa gitwikwe.
Matthew3:11 Jyewe ndababatirisha amazi kugira ngo mwihane
Matthew3:12 Dore afashe urutaro ngo agosore impeke azihunike mu kigega
Matthew3:13 Nyuma Yezu ava muri Galileya ajya kuri Yorodani
Matthew3:14 Ariko Yohani aramuhakanira ati: “Ni jye wari ukwiriye kubatizwa nawe
Matthew3:15 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Emera ubikore kuko ari byo bikwiye
Matthew3:16 Yezu amaze kubatizwa ahita ava mu mazi. Muri ako kanya ijuru rirakinguka
Matthew3:17 Nuko humvikana ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru ati: “Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane
Matthew4:1 Nuko Yezu ajyanwa na Mwuka w'Imana mu butayu
Matthew4:2 Ahamara iminsi mirongo ine n'amajoro mirongo ine yigomwa kurya
Matthew4:3 Umushukanyi aramwegera aramubwira ati: “Niba uri Umwana w'Imana tegeka ko aya mabuye ahinduka imigati.”
Matthew4:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Biranditswe ngo ‘Umuntu ntatungwa n'ibyokurya gusa
Matthew4:5 Satani amujyana i Yeruzalemu umujyi Imana yitoranyirije
Matthew4:6 aramubwira ati: “Niba uri Umwana w'Imana simbuka ugwe hasi
Matthew4:7 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Biranditswe kandi ngo ‘Ntukagerageze Nyagasani Imana yawe.’ ”
Matthew4:8 Nuko Satani arongera amujyana mu mpinga y'umusozi muremure cyane
Matthew4:9 aramubwira ati: “Biriya byose ndabiguha
Matthew4:10 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Genda Satani
Matthew4:11 Satani amusiga aho
Matthew4:12 Yezu yumvise ko Yohani yafunzwe ajya muri Galileya.
Matthew4:13 Ntiyaguma i Nazareti
Matthew4:14 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo:
Matthew4:15 “Nimwumve ntara ya Zabuloni n'iya Nafutali
Matthew4:16 Abantu bāri mu mwijima bigunze
Matthew4:17 Kuva ubwo Yezu atangira gutangaza ati: “Nimwihane kuko ubwami bw'ijuru bwegereje.”
Matthew4:18 Yezu agenda ahakikiye ikiyaga cya Galileya
Matthew4:19 Arababwira ati: “Nimunkurikire nzabagira abarobyi b'abantu.”
Matthew4:20 Bahita basiga aho imitego yabo baramukurikira.
Matthew4:21 Yigiye imbere gato abona abandi bavandimwe babiri
Matthew4:22 Ako kanya basiga se n'ubwato bwabo
Matthew4:23 Nuko Yezu azenguruka Galileya yose yigishiriza abantu mu nsengero zabo
Matthew4:24 Ibye byamamara cyane mu gihugu cya Siriya
Matthew4:25 Nuko imbaga y'abantu iramukurikira
Matthew5:1 Yezu abonye ya mbaga y'abantu benshi azamuka umusozi
Matthew5:2 Atangira kubigisha agira ati:
Matthew5:3 “Hahirwa abafite imitima ikeneye Imana
Matthew5:4 Hahirwa abashavuye
Matthew5:5 Hahirwa abagwaneza
Matthew5:6 Hahirwa abafite inzara n'inyota byo gutunganira Imana
Matthew5:7 Hahirwa abanyambabazi
Matthew5:8 Hahirwa abafite imitima iboneye
Matthew5:9 Hahirwa abazana amahoro mu bantu
Matthew5:10 Hahirwa abatotezwa bahōrwa gukora ibyo Imana ishaka
Matthew5:11 “Murahirwa iyo babatuka
Matthew5:12 Mujye mwishima kandi munezerwe
Matthew5:13 “Muri umunyu w'isi. Ariko se iyo umunyu wamaze gukayuka wakongera kuryoshywa n'iki? Nta cyo uba ukimaze
Matthew5:14 “Muri urumuri rw'isi. Umujyi wubatse mu mpinga y'umusozi ntushobora kwihisha
Matthew5:15 kandi nta wacana itara ngo aryubikeho akabindi
Matthew5:16 Mube ari ko mumurikira abantu
Matthew5:17 “Ntimwibwire ko nazanywe no kuvanaho Amategeko cyangwa ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi. Sinazanywe no kubivanaho
Matthew5:18 Ndababwira nkomeje ko nta kanyuguti habe n'akadomo na kamwe ko mu Mategeko kazavaho
Matthew5:19 Umuntu wese uzaca ku itegeko rimwe
Matthew5:20 Reka mbabwire
Matthew5:21 “Mwumvise ko aba kera babwiwe ngo: ‘Ntukice’
Matthew5:22 Ariko jyewe ndababwira ko umuntu wese urakarira mugenzi we azashyirwa mu rubanza. Kandi umuntu wese ubwira mugenzi we ati: ‘Uri igicucu’
Matthew5:23 Noneho nujyana ituro ryawe ku rutambiro kuritura Imana
Matthew5:24 uzasige ituro ryawe aho imbere y'urutambiro
Matthew5:25 “Nujyana mu rukiko n'uwo muburana
Matthew5:26 Ndakubwira nkomeje ko utazavamo utabanje gutanga amafaranga baguciye yose
Matthew5:27 “Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo: ‘Ntugasambane.’
Matthew5:28 Ariko jyewe ndababwira yuko umuntu wese ureba umugore akamurarikira
Matthew5:29 Nuko rero ijisho ryawe ry'iburyo niba ryakugusha mu cyaha
Matthew5:30 Niba ikiganza cyawe cy'iburyo cyakugusha mu cyaha
Matthew5:31 “Byavuzwe kandi ko ‘Ushaka kwirukana umugore we agomba kumuha urwandiko rwemeza ko amusenze.’
Matthew5:32 Ariko jyewe ndababwira ko umuntu wese wirukana umugore we
Matthew5:33 “Mwumvise ko aba kera babwiwe ngo ‘Ntukarahire ibinyoma
Matthew5:34 Ariko jyewe ndababwira kutarahira rwose
Matthew5:35 cyangwa ku isi kuko ari yo kabaho ikandagizaho ibirenge
Matthew5:36 Ndetse ntuzanarahire ushingiye indahiro ku mutwe wawe
Matthew5:37 Mujye muvuga gusa muti: ‘Yego
Matthew5:38 “Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo: ‘Umennye undi ijisho na we barimumene’
Matthew5:39 Ariko jyewe ndababwira kutitura inabi mwagiriwe. Ahubwo umuntu nagukubita urushyi mu musaya w'iburyo
Matthew5:40 Byongeye kandi umuntu nashaka kuguhuguza ishati uyimuhe
Matthew5:41 Nihagira uguhata kumwakira umutwaro ngo uwutware kirometero imwe
Matthew5:42 Ugusabye umuhe
Matthew5:43 “Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo: ‘Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe
Matthew5:44 Ariko jyewe ndababwira nti: ‘Mukunde n'abanzi banyu kandi musabire ababatoteza.’
Matthew5:45 Ibyo mubikorere kugira ngo mube abana nyakuri ba So uri mu ijuru
Matthew5:46 Niba mukunda ababakunda gusa
Matthew5:47 Kandi niba muramutsa incuti zanyu gusa
Matthew5:48 Mube intungane nk'uko So uri mu ijuru ari intungane.
Matthew6:1 “Ibikorwa byiza byanyu murajye mwirinda kubikorera imbere y'abantu kugira ngo babarebe
Matthew6:2 “Igihe uhaye umukene imfashanyo ntukabyamamaze nk'uko abantu b'indyarya babigenza
Matthew6:3 Ahubwo wowe igihe uhaye umukene imfashanyo
Matthew6:4 Bityo ibyo umuhaye bizabe ibanga. Nuko So we umenya ibiri mu ibanga azakwitura.
Matthew6:5 “Igihe musenga ntimukamere nk'abantu b'indyarya
Matthew6:6 Ahubwo wowe igihe usenga ujye winjira mu cyumba cyawe ukinge
Matthew6:7 “Igihe musenga ntimugatondagure amagambo atagira icyo avuga
Matthew6:8 Ntimukagenze nka bo
Matthew6:9 Nuko rero mujye musenga muti: ‘Data uri mu ijuru
Matthew6:10 ubwami bwawe nibuze. Ibyo ushaka bibe ari byo bikorwa ku isi
Matthew6:11 Uduhe none ifunguro ridukwiriye.
Matthew6:12 Utubabarire ibyo twagucumuyeho
Matthew6:13 Ntutureke ngo tugwe mu byadushuka
Matthew6:14 “Nimubabarira abandi ibyo babacumuyeho
Matthew6:15 Ariko nimutababarira abandi
Matthew6:16 “Igihe mwigomwe kurya ntimukijime mu maso nk'abantu b'indyarya bakambya agahanga
Matthew6:17 Naho wowe niwigomwa kurya
Matthew6:18 kugira ngo abantu batamenya ko wigomwe kurya
Matthew6:19 “Ntimukirundanyirize ubukungu ku isi aho inyenzi n'ingese bibwangiza
Matthew6:20 Ahubwo mubwirundanyirize mu ijuru aho inyenzi n'ingese bitabwangiza
Matthew6:21 Aho ubukungu bwawe buri ni ho uzahoza umutima.
Matthew6:22 “Itara ry'umubiri ni ijisho. Nuko rero ijisho ryawe niriba rizima
Matthew6:23 Ariko ijisho ryawe niriba rirwaye
Matthew6:24 “Nta mugaragu ushobora gukorera ba shebuja babiri. Iyo adakunze umwe ngo yange undi
Matthew6:25 “Reka mbabwire rero ku byerekeye ubuzima: ntimukabunze imitima mwibaza icyo muzarya [cyangwa icyo muzanywa] cyangwa icyo muzambara. Mbese ubuzima ntiburuta ibyokurya
Matthew6:26 Nimurebe inyoni: ntizibiba
Matthew6:27 Ni nde muri mwe wakongēra nibura akanya na gato ku gihe azamara
Matthew6:28 “Ni iki gituma rero mubunza imitima mwibaza icyo muzambara? Mwitegereze ukuntu indabyo zo mu gasozi zikura: nta murimo zikora
Matthew6:29 Nyamara mbabwiye ko na Salomo mu bukire bwe bwose
Matthew6:30 None se mwa bantu bafite ukwizera guke mwe
Matthew6:31 “Ntimukabunze imitima rero mwibaza muti: ‘Tuzarya iki?’ cyangwa muti: ‘Tuzanywa iki?’ cyangwa muti: ‘Tuzambara iki?’
Matthew6:32 Ibyo byose abanyamahanga batazi Imana ni byo baharanira
Matthew6:33 Ahubwo mbere ya byose muharanire ubwami bw'Imana no kuyitunganira
Matthew6:34 Nuko rero ntimukabunze imitima mwibaza iby'ejo
Matthew7:1 “Ntimukihe gucira abandi imanza namwe mutazazicirwa
Matthew7:2 kuko muzacirwa imanza ukurikije uko mwaziciriye abandi. Akebo mubagereramo ni ko namwe muzagererwamo.
Matthew7:3 Kuki ushishikazwa n'agatotsi kari mu jisho rya mugenzi wawe
Matthew7:4 Washobora ute kubwira mugenzi wawe uti: ‘Reka ngutokore agatotsi kakuri mu jisho’
Matthew7:5 Wa ndyarya we
Matthew7:6 “Ibyeguriwe Imana ntimukabijugunyire imbwa
Matthew7:7 “Musabe muzahabwa
Matthew7:8 Usabye wese ni we uhabwa
Matthew7:9 Ni nde muri mwe waha umwana we ibuye igihe amusabye umugati
Matthew7:10 cyangwa akamuha inzoka igihe amusabye ifi?
Matthew7:11 None se ko muzi guha abana banyu ibyiza kandi muri babi
Matthew7:12 “Ibyo mwifuza ko abandi babagirira byose namwe mube ari byo mubagirira
Matthew7:13 “Mwinjire mu irembo rifunganye
Matthew7:14 Naho irembo ry'impatanwa n'inzira ifunganye ni byo bigeza ku bugingo buhoraho
Matthew7:15 “Mwirinde abahanurabinyoma! Baza babasanga bigize nk'intama
Matthew7:16 Muzababwirwa n'imigirire yabo
Matthew7:17 Nuko rero igiti cyiza cyose cyera imbuto nziza
Matthew7:18 Igiti cyiza ntikibasha kwera imbuto mbi
Matthew7:19 Igiti cyose kitera imbuto nziza baragitema bakagitwika.
Matthew7:20 Ni na ko abo bahanurabinyoma muzababwirwa n'imigirire yabo.
Matthew7:21 “Abahora bampamagara ngo ‘Nyagasani
Matthew7:22 Kuri uwo munsi benshi bazambaza bati: ‘Nyagasani
Matthew7:23 Ubwo nzababwira neruye nti: ‘Sinigeze mbamenya. Nimumve imbere mwa nkozi z'ibibi mwe!’
Matthew7:24 “Nuko rero umuntu wese wumva ayo magambo maze kuvuga akayakurikiza
Matthew7:25 maze imvura iragwa imigezi iruzura
Matthew7:26 Naho umuntu wese wumva ayo magambo maze kuvuga ntayakurikize
Matthew7:27 maze imvura iragwa imigezi iruzura
Matthew7:28 Yezu amaze kuvuga ibyo byose
Matthew7:29 kuko atigishaga nk'abigishamategeko babo
Matthew8:1 Nuko Yezu amanuka wa musozi
Matthew8:2 Umuntu wari urwaye ibibembe aramusanga
Matthew8:3 Yezu arambura ukuboko amukoraho agira ati: “Ndabishaka kira.” Ako kanya arakira.
Matthew8:4 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Uramenye ntugire uwo ubibwira. Icyakora ujye kwiyereka umutambyi maze utange ituro Musa yategetse
Matthew8:5 Yezu ageze i Kafarinawumu
Matthew8:6 “Nyagasani
Matthew8:7 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ndaje mukize.”
Matthew8:8 Uwo mukapiteni arasubiza ati: “Nyagasani
Matthew8:9 Erega nanjye ndi umuntu utegekwa
Matthew8:10 Yezu abyumvise aratangara
Matthew8:11 Kandi reka mbabwire
Matthew8:12 Naho abari babugenewe bajugunywe hanze mu mwijima
Matthew8:13 Yezu abwira umukapiteni ati: “Genda bikubere nk'uko wizeye.” Uwo mwanya umugaragu we arakira.
Matthew8:14 Yezu ageze kwa Petero asanga nyirabukwe wa Petero aryamye
Matthew8:15 Nuko Yezu amukora ku kuboko umuriro urazima
Matthew8:16 Bugorobye bamuzanira abantu benshi bahanzweho
Matthew8:17 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: “Ubwe yishyizeho ubumuga bwacu
Matthew8:18 Yezu abonye ko akikijwe n'imbaga y'abantu
Matthew8:19 Nuko umwigishamategeko aramwegera aramubwira ati: “Mwigisha
Matthew8:20 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Za nyiramuhari zigira amasenga zibamo
Matthew8:21 Undi mu bigishwa be aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
Matthew8:22 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Nkurikira ureke abapfu bahambe abapfu babo.”
Matthew8:23 Nuko yurira mu bwato
Matthew8:24 Ni bwo haje inkubi y'umuyaga mu kiyaga kugeza ubwo ubwato bwari bugiye kurengerwa n'amazi. Ubwo Yezu yari asinziriye.
Matthew8:25 Baramwegera baramukangura
Matthew8:26 Arababwira ati: “Ni iki kibateye ubwoba
Matthew8:27 Abigishwa barumirwa baravuga bati: “Uyu ni muntu ki utegeka imiyaga n'ikiyaga bikamwumvira?”
Matthew8:28 Yezu afata hakurya mu ntara y'Abanyagadara
Matthew8:29 Bamubonye bavuza induru bati: “Uradushakaho iki Mwana w'Imana? Mbese uzanywe hano no kutwica urubozo igihe cyacu kitaragera?”
Matthew8:30 Hafi aho hari umugana w'ingurube nyinshi zarishaga.
Matthew8:31 Izo ngabo za Satani zinginga Yezu ziti: “Niba utumenesheje twohereze muri ziriya ngurube!”
Matthew8:32 Yezu arazibwira ati: “Ngaho nimugende.” Nuko ziva mu bantu zijya mu ngurube
Matthew8:33 Abashumba bazo barahunga bajya mu mujyi
Matthew8:34 Nuko abatuye umujyi bose bahururira Yezu
Matthew9:1 Nuko Yezu yurira ubwato
Matthew9:2 Bamuzanira umuntu umugaye bamuhetse mu ngobyi
Matthew9:3 Bamwe mu bigishamategeko babyumvise baribwira bati: “Uriya muntu aratuka Imana.”
Matthew9:4 Yezu amenya ibyo bibwira arababaza ati: “Ni iki kibateye ibyo bitekerezo bibi?
Matthew9:5 Icyoroshye ni ikihe
Matthew9:6 Nyamara ndagira ngo mumenye ko ku isi Umwana w'umuntu afite ubushobozi bwo kubabarira abantu ibyaha.” Nuko abwira uwo muntu umugaye ati: “Byuka ufate ingobyi yawe witahire.”
Matthew9:7 Uwo muntu arabyuka arataha.
Matthew9:8 Aho hari imbaga y'abantu benshi babibonye barakangarana
Matthew9:9 Nuko Yezu ahise abona umuntu witwa Matayo
Matthew9:10 Igihe Yezu n'abigishwa be bari kwa Matayo bafungura
Matthew9:11 Abafarizayi babibonye babaza abigishwa be bati: “Kuki umwigisha wanyu asangira n'abasoresha n'abanyabyaha?”
Matthew9:12 Yezu abumvise arababwira ati: “Abazima si bo bakenera umuvuzi
Matthew9:13 Nimugende mwige uko iri jambo risobanura
Matthew9:14 Nuko abigishwa ba Yohani Mubatiza begera Yezu baramubaza bati: “Kuki twebwe n'Abafarizayi twigomwa kurya kenshi
Matthew9:15 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mbese mu bukwe abasangwa bashobora kugira agahinda
Matthew9:16 “Ntawe utera ikiremo gishya ku mwenda ushaje. Uwabikora
Matthew9:17 Nta n'usuka inzoga y'umubira mu mpago z'impu zishaje. Uwabikora
Matthew9:18 Akibabwira ayo magambo
Matthew9:19 Nuko Yezu arahaguruka aramukurikira
Matthew9:20 Muri bo hari umugore wari urwaye indwara yo kuva
Matthew9:21 kuko yibwiraga ati: “Ninkora ku mwitero we byonyine ndakira.”
Matthew9:22 Nuko Yezu arahindukira
Matthew9:23 Yezu ageze mu rugo rwa wa mutware
Matthew9:24 Arababwira ati: “Nimusohoke
Matthew9:25 Bose bamaze guhēzwa Yezu arinjira amufata ukuboko
Matthew9:26 Iyo nkuru ikwira muri ako karere kose.
Matthew9:27 Yezu avuye aho hantu
Matthew9:28 Ageze mu rugo baramwegera
Matthew9:29 Nuko abakora ku maso arababwira ati: “Bibabere uko mwizeye.”
Matthew9:30 Nuko barahumuka. Arabihanangiriza ati: “Muririnde ntihagire ubimenya.”
Matthew9:31 Ariko bagitirimuka aho bamwamamaza muri ako karere kose.
Matthew9:32 Bakiva aho
Matthew9:33 Yezu amenesha ingabo ya Satani
Matthew9:34 Naho Abafarizayi bo bakavuga bati: “Ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani abuhabwa n'umutware wazo.”
Matthew9:35 Yezu agenda mu mijyi yose no mu byaro yigisha mu nsengero zaho
Matthew9:36 Abonye iyo mbaga y'abantu abagirira impuhwe
Matthew9:37 Nuko abwira abigishwa be ati: “Dore imyaka yeze ari myinshi nyamara abasaruzi ni bake
Matthew9:38 nuko rero nimusabe Nyir'imyaka yohereze abasaruzi mu murima we.”
Matthew10:1 Nuko Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be cumi na babiri
Matthew10:2 Dore amazina y'izo Ntumwa ze uko ari cumi n'ebyiri: uwa mbere ni Simoni wiswe Petero na Andereya umuvandimwe we
Matthew10:3 na Filipo na Barutolomayo
Matthew10:4 na Simoni w'umurwanashyaka w'igihugu
Matthew10:5 Nuko Yezu atuma abo cumi na babiri
Matthew10:6 Ahubwo mujye mu bazimiye nk'intama bakomoka kuri Isiraheli.
Matthew10:7 Mugende mutangaza muti: ‘Ubwami bw'ijuru buregereje.’
Matthew10:8 Mukize abarwayi
Matthew10:9 Ntimugire ibiceri mutwara mu mikandara yanyu
Matthew10:10 Ntimujyane kandi imifuka y'urugendo
Matthew10:11 “Nimugera mu mujyi cyangwa mu mudugudu mujye mushaka uwishimira kubākīra
Matthew10:12 Mukigera iwe mubwire ab'aho muti: ‘Nimugire amahoro!’
Matthew10:13 Niba bene urugo babakiriye
Matthew10:14 Ahantu hose batazabakira ntibabatege amatwi
Matthew10:15 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Matthew10:16 “Dore mbatumye nk'intama hagati y'impyisi. Nuko rero murabe inyaryenge nk'inzoka
Matthew10:17 Mujye mwirinda abantu kuko bazabajyana mu nkiko
Matthew10:18 Bazabagabiza abatware n'abami babampōra
Matthew10:19 Igihe bazabarega mu nkiko
Matthew10:20 Si mwe muzaba mwivugira
Matthew10:21 “Umuntu azicisha uwo bava inda imwe
Matthew10:22 Muzangwa n'abantu bose babampōra
Matthew10:23 Kandi nibabatoteza mu mujyi uyu n'uyu
Matthew10:24 “Nta mwigishwa uruta umwigisha we
Matthew10:25 Biba bihagije ko umwigishwa agera ku rugero rw'umwigisha
Matthew10:26 “Nuko rero ntimugatinye abantu kuko nta gihishwe kitazahishurwa
Matthew10:27 Ibyo mbabwira rwihishwa muzabivugire ku mugaragaro
Matthew10:28 Ntimugatinye abica umubiri ariko batabasha kwica ubugingo
Matthew10:29 “Mbese ibishwi bibiri ntibigura ifaranga? Nyamara nta na kimwe muri byo gipfa So atabyemeye.
Matthew10:30 Naho mwe
Matthew10:31 Nuko rero ntimugatinye kuko mwe murusha kure agaciro ibishwi byinshi.
Matthew10:32 “Umuntu wese uzanyemera imbere y'abantu
Matthew10:33 Ariko uzanyihakanira imbere y'abantu
Matthew10:34 “Ntimutekereze ko naje kuzana amahoro ku isi. Sinaje kuzana amahoro ahubwo ni inkota.
Matthew10:35 Naje gutandukanya umuhungu na se
Matthew10:36 Nuko rero abanzi b'umuntu bazaba abo mu rugo rwe.
Matthew10:37 “Ukunda se cyangwa nyina akabandutisha ntakwiriye kuba uwanjye. Ukunda umuhungu we cyangwa umukobwa we akabandutisha
Matthew10:38 Udatwara umusaraba we ngo ankurikire ntakwiriye kuba uwanjye.
Matthew10:39 Uwihambira ku buzima bwe azabubura
Matthew10:40 “Ubakira ni jye aba yakiriye
Matthew10:41 Uwakira umuhanuzi kuko ari umuntu watumwe n'Imana
Matthew10:42 Uzaha umwe muri aba boroheje nibura agakombe k'amazi afutse yo kunywa
Matthew11:1 Yezu amaze guha abigishwa be cumi na babiri ayo mabwiriza
Matthew11:2 Ubwo Yohani yari muri gereza yumvise ibyo Kristo akora
Matthew11:3 kumubaza bati: “Mbese ni wowe wa wundi ugomba kuza
Matthew11:4 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mugende mutekerereze Yohani ibyo mwiyumviye n'ibyo mwiboneye muti:
Matthew11:5 ‘Impumyi zirahumuka
Matthew11:6 Hahirwa rero umuntu wese utazareka kunyizera.”
Matthew11:7 Abo bigishwa ba Yohani batirimutse aho
Matthew11:8 None se mwagiye kureba iki? Ese ni umuntu wambaye imyambaro y'agaciro? Oya
Matthew11:9 None se nyine mwagiye kureba iki? Ese ni umuhanuzi? Ni we koko ndetse aruta umuhanuzi!
Matthew11:10 Yohani uwo ni we Ibyanditswe bivuga
Matthew11:11 “Ndababwira nkomeje ko mu bana b'abantu hatigeze habaho uruta Yohani Mubatiza
Matthew11:12 Kuva igihe Yohani Mubatiza yigishaga kugeza ubu ubwami bw'ijuru buraharanirwa
Matthew11:13 Ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi bose no mu Mategeko
Matthew11:14 Mushatse kandi kubyemera
Matthew11:15 Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!
Matthew11:16 “Mbese abantu b'iki gihe nabagereranya n'iki? Ni nk'abana bicaye mu masoko bahamagarana bati:
Matthew11:17 ‘Twateye imbyino z'umunezero ntimwabyina! Duteye iz'ishavu ntimwarira!’
Matthew11:18 Yohani yaje yigomwa kurya no kunywa baravuga bati: ‘Yahanzweho!’
Matthew11:19 Naho Umwana w'umuntu aje arya kandi anywa baravuga bati: ‘Mbega igisahiranda cy'igisinzi
Matthew11:20 Nuko Yezu atangira gutonganya abo mu mijyi yakoreyemo ibitangaza byinshi
Matthew11:21 “Mwa bantu b'i Korazini mwe
Matthew11:22 Nyamara reka mbabwire: ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Matthew11:23 Namwe bantu b'i Kafarinawumu
Matthew11:24 Reka mbabwire: ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Matthew11:25 Uwo mwanya Yezu aravuga ati: “Ndagushimiye Data Nyir'ijuru n'isi
Matthew11:26 Yego Data
Matthew11:27 “Ibintu byose nabyeguriwe na Data. Ntawe uzi Umwana w'Imana keretse Se
Matthew11:28 “Mwese abarushye n'abaremerewe nimunsange mbaruhure!
Matthew11:29 Mwikorere umutwaro wanjye kandi mundebereho
Matthew11:30 kuko umutwaro mbakorera utavunanye kandi umuzigo mbahambirira nturemere.”
Matthew12:1 Icyo gihe Yezu anyura mu mirima y'ingano ari ku isabato
Matthew12:2 Abafarizayi babibonye baramubwira bati: “Dore abigishwa bawe barakora ibidakwiriye gukorwa ku isabato.”
Matthew12:3 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese ntimwasomye ibyo Dawidi yakoze igihe we n'abo bari kumwe bari bashonje?
Matthew12:4 Icyo gihe yinjiye mu Nzu y'Imana
Matthew12:5 Cyangwa se ntimwasomye mu Mategeko ko iyo abatambyi bafashe igihe mu Ngoro y'Imana ku isabato
Matthew12:6 Reka mbabwire ko hano hari uruta Ingoro y'Imana.
Matthew12:7 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: ‘Icyo mbashakaho si ibitambo
Matthew12:8 kuko Umwana w'umuntu ari we mugenga w'isabato.”
Matthew12:9 Yezu avayo ajya mu rusengero rwabo
Matthew12:10 aho hakaba umuntu unyunyutse ikiganza. Nuko babaza Yezu bati: “Mbese biremewe gukiza umurwayi ku isabato?” Ibyo babivugiraga kugira ngo babone icyo bamurega.
Matthew12:11 Na we arababaza ati: “Ni nde muri mwe waba afite intama imwe
Matthew12:12 Nyamara ukuntu umuntu arusha intama agaciro! Nuko rero mumenye ko byemewe kugira neza ku munsi w'isabato.”
Matthew12:13 Yezu ni ko kubwira uwo muntu ati: “Rambura ikiganza.” Arakirambura maze cyongera kuba kizima nk'ikindi.
Matthew12:14 Abafarizayi basohotse bahuza umugambi ngo bashake uko bamwica.
Matthew12:15 Yezu abimenye ava aho hantu aragenda. Abantu benshi baramukurikira
Matthew12:16 Abihanangiriza akomeje ngo be kumwamamaza.
Matthew12:17 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo:
Matthew12:18 “Dore umugaragu wanjye nitoranyirije
Matthew12:19 Ntazatongana kandi ntazasakuza
Matthew12:20 Urubingo ruvunitse ntazaruhwanya
Matthew12:21 Bityo amahanga yose azamwiringira.”
Matthew12:22 Nuko bamuzanira umuntu wahanzweho
Matthew12:23 Rubanda rwose babibonye baratangara maze baravuga bati: “Aho uriya si we Mwene Dawidi?”
Matthew12:24 Abafarizayi babyumvise baravuga bati: “Uriya mugabo nta wundi umuha ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani
Matthew12:25 Yezu amenye ibyo batekereza arababwira ati: “Iyo igihugu gisubiranyemo kirasenyuka
Matthew12:26 None se niba Satani amenesha Satani
Matthew12:27 Ikindi kandi
Matthew12:28 Noneho kubera ko ari Mwuka w'Imana utuma menesha ingabo za Satani
Matthew12:29 “Mbese umuntu yabasha ate kwigabiza urugo rw'umunyamaboko kugira ngo amusahure ibyo atunze
Matthew12:30 “Utari mu ruhande rwanjye aba andwanya
Matthew12:31 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira ko nta cyaha abantu batazababarirwa naho kwaba gutuka Imana
Matthew12:32 Umuntu wese uzavuga nabi Umwana w'umuntu azababarirwa
Matthew12:33 “Nimugira igiti cyiza kizera imbuto nziza
Matthew12:34 Mwa rubyaro rw'impiri mwe
Matthew12:35 Umuntu mwiza akura ibyiza mu migambi ye myiza
Matthew12:36 Reka mbabwire: ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Matthew12:37 kuko amagambo wivugiye ni yo azatuma utsinda cyangwa utsindwa n'urubanza.”
Matthew12:38 Nuko bamwe mu bigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi baramubwira bati: “Mwigisha
Matthew12:39 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Abantu b'iki gihe b'abasambanyi n'abagizi ba nabi bashaka ko mbaha ikimenyetso
Matthew12:40 Nk'uko Yonasi yamaze iminsi itatu n'amajoro atatu mu nda y'igifi
Matthew12:41 Ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Matthew12:42 Ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Matthew12:43 “Iyo ingabo ya Satani ivuye mu muntu izerera ku gasi ishaka aho yaruhukira
Matthew12:44 ikibwira iti: ‘Reka nsubire mu nzu yanjye navuyemo.’ Yagerayo igasanga nta muntu urimo
Matthew12:45 Nuko ikajya kuzana izindi ngabo ndwi ziyitambukije ubugome
Matthew12:46 Igihe Yezu akiganira na rubanda
Matthew12:47 Nuko umuntu aramubwira ati: “Yewe
Matthew12:48 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Mama ni nde
Matthew12:49 Nuko arambura ukuboko yerekana abigishwa be
Matthew12:50 Umuntu wese ukora ibyo Data uri mu ijuru ashaka ni we murumuna wanjye
Matthew13:1 Uwo munsi Yezu ava imuhira
Matthew13:2 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu iramukikiza bituma ajya mu bwato yicaramo
Matthew13:3 Nuko ababwira ibintu byinshi akoresheje imigani ati: “Habayeho umuntu wagiye kubiba
Matthew13:4 igihe abiba imbuto zimwe zigenda zigwa ku nzira
Matthew13:5 Izindi zigwa ku gasi zihita zimera
Matthew13:6 Izuba ricanye rirazotsa ziruma
Matthew13:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa
Matthew13:8 Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza zirera
Matthew13:9 Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!”
Matthew13:10 Nuko abigishwa be baramwegera baramubaza bati: “Ni iki gituma wigisha abantu ukoresheje imigani?”
Matthew13:11 Arabasubiza ati: “Mwebwe mwahawe kumenya amabanga y'ubwami bw'ijuru
Matthew13:12 Ufite azongererwa ndetse ahabwe byinshi
Matthew13:13 Naho abandi igituma mbabwira nkoresheje imigani ni uko bareba ariko ntibabone
Matthew13:14 Bityo biba nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: ‘Kumva muzumva ariko ntimuzasobanukirwa
Matthew13:15 Erega aba ni abantu binangiye! Biziba amatwi
Matthew13:16 Mwebwe murahirwa kuko amaso yanyu areba
Matthew13:17 Ndababwira nkomeje ko abahanuzi benshi n'intungane nyinshi bashatse kureba ibyo mureba ntibabibona
Matthew13:18 “Nimutege amatwi rero mwumve iby'uwo mugani w'umubibyi.
Matthew13:19 Umuntu wese wumva Ijambo ry'ubwami bw'ijuru ntarisobanukirwe
Matthew13:20 Aho zabibwe ku gasi ni nk'umuntu wumva Ijambo ry'Imana
Matthew13:21 nyamara ntatume rishorera imizi muri we
Matthew13:22 Aho zabibwe mu mahwa ni nk'umuntu wumva Ijambo ry'Imana
Matthew13:23 Aho zabibwe mu butaka bwiza ni nk'umuntu wumva Ijambo ry'Imana akarisobanukirwa akera imbuto
Matthew13:24 Yezu abaha ikindi kigereranyo ati: “Iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umuntu wari warabibye imbuto nziza mu murima we.
Matthew13:25 Igihe abantu basinziriye
Matthew13:26 Nuko imyaka ibaye imigengararo
Matthew13:27 Abagaragu babibonye
Matthew13:28 Arabasubiza ati: ‘Ibyo ni umwanzi wabikoze.’ Abagaragu bati: ‘Mbese urashaka ko tujya kururandura?’
Matthew13:29 Na we ati: ‘Oya
Matthew13:30 Nimureke bikurane byombi kugeza igihe cy'isarura
Matthew13:31 Yezu yongera kubaha ikigereranyo ati: “Ubwami bw'ijuru wabugereranya n'akabuto kitwa sinapi
Matthew13:32 Karutwa n'izindi mbuto zose
Matthew13:33 Arongera abaha n'ikindi kigereranyo ati: “Ubwami bw'ijuru wabugereranya n'umusemburo umugore yafashe
Matthew13:34 Ibyo byose Yezu yabibwiraga rubanda akoresheje imigani. Nta cyo yababwiraga adakoresheje imigani.
Matthew13:35 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi ngo: “Nzababwirira mu migani
Matthew13:36 Nuko Yezu asezera kuri rubanda asubira imuhira. Abigishwa be bajya aho ari baramubwira bati: “Dusobanurire cya kigereranyo cy'urukungu rwabibwe mu murima.”
Matthew13:37 Nuko arababwira ati: “Ubiba imbuto nziza ni Umwana w'umuntu
Matthew13:38 umurima abibamo ni isi. Imbuto nziza abiba ni abayoboka ubwami bw'ijuru
Matthew13:39 Umwanzi warubibye ni Satani. Isarura ryo ni imperuka y'isi
Matthew13:40 Nk'uko barundarunda urukungu bakarutwika
Matthew13:41 Umwana w'umuntu azatuma abamarayika be
Matthew13:42 maze babarohe mu itanura ry'umuriro
Matthew13:43 Ubwo abatunganiye Imana bazarabagirana nk'izuba mu bwami bwa Se. Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!
Matthew13:44 “Iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'ikintu cy'agaciro gihishwe mu murima
Matthew13:45 “Na none iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umucuruzi washakaga amasaro y'agahebuzo.
Matthew13:46 Nuko abonye rimwe ry'igiciro kinini
Matthew13:47 “Byongeye kandi
Matthew13:48 Iyo umaze kūzura bawukururira ku nkombe
Matthew13:49 Uko ni ko bizamera ku mperuka y'isi
Matthew13:50 babarohe mu itanura ry'umuriro aho bazarira kandi bagahekenya amenyo.”
Matthew13:51 Nuko arababaza ati: “Ibyo byose murabyumvise?” Bati: “Yee.”
Matthew13:52 Arababwira ati: “Noneho rero umwigishamategeko wese wigishijwe iby'ubwami bw'ijuru
Matthew13:53 Nuko Yezu amaze kubacira iyo migani
Matthew13:54 ajya mu mujyi w'iwabo maze yigishiriza mu rusengero rwaho. Baratangara cyane bati: “Mbese ubwenge afite n'ibitangaza akora abikura he?
Matthew13:55 Mbese si umwana wa wa mubaji? Ese nyina ntiyitwa Mariya? Mbese abavandimwe be si Yakobo na Yozefu na Simoni na Yuda?
Matthew13:56 Mbese bashiki be bose ntiduturanye? None se biriya akora byose abikura he?”
Matthew13:57 Ibyo bituma batamwemera. Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nta handi umuhanuzi asuzugurwa
Matthew13:58 Nuko aho ntiyahakorera ibitangaza byinshi kubera ko batamwemeye.
Matthew14:1 Muri icyo gihe Herodi umutegetsi w'intara ya Galileya yumva ibya Yezu.
Matthew14:2 Nuko abwira abo mu rugo rwe ati: “Uriya muntu ni Yohani Mubatiza wazutse! Ni cyo gituma afite ububasha bwo gukora ibitangaza.”
Matthew14:3 Koko rero Herodi yari yarategetse ko bafata Yohani bakamuboha bakamushyira muri gereza. Impamvu yaturutse kuri Herodiya
Matthew14:4 Yohani yari yabwiye Herodi ati: “Ntibyemewe ko umutunga.”
Matthew14:5 Ibyo bitera Herodi gushaka kwica Yohani
Matthew14:6 Ku munsi mukuru wo kwibuka ivuka rya Herodi
Matthew14:7 ku buryo yamurahiye ati: “Ndaguha icyo unsaba cyose.”
Matthew14:8 Nuko uwo mukobwa amaze kugirwa inama na nyina aravuga ati: “Nimumpe igihanga cya Yohani Mubatiza
Matthew14:9 Umwami Herodi arababara
Matthew14:10 Atuma umuntu muri gereza aca Yohani igihanga.
Matthew14:11 Yakizanye ku mbehe agiha uwo mukobwa
Matthew14:12 Nyuma abigishwa ba Yohani baraza bajyana umurambo we barawushyingura
Matthew14:13 Yezu abyumvise avayo
Matthew14:14 Ageze imusozi abona iyo mbaga y'abantu
Matthew14:15 Bugorobye abigishwa be baramwegera
Matthew14:16 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Si ngombwa ko bagenda
Matthew14:17 Baramubwira bati: “Icyo dufite imbere n'inyuma ni imigati itanu n'amafi abiri.”
Matthew14:18 Arababwira ati: “Nimubinzanire hano.”
Matthew14:19 Nuko ategeka abantu kwicara mu byatsi
Matthew14:20 Nuko bose bararya barahaga
Matthew14:21 Abariye bari nk'ibihumbi bitanu
Matthew14:22 Bikirangira Yezu ategeka abigishwa be kujya mu bwato ngo bamubanzirize kugera hakurya
Matthew14:23 Amaze kubasezerera azamuka umusozi
Matthew14:24 Icyo gihe bwa bwato bwari bwamaze kugera kure y'inkombe
Matthew14:25 Nuko bujya gucya Yezu aza abagana agenda ku mazi.
Matthew14:26 Abigishwa be bamubonye agenda ku mazi
Matthew14:27 Yezu aherako arababwira ati: “Nimuhumure ni jye
Matthew14:28 Petero aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
Matthew14:29 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ngwino!” Nuko Petero ava mu bwato
Matthew14:30 Nyamara abonye ko umuyaga ukajije umurego
Matthew14:31 Ako kanya Yezu arambura ukuboko aramusingira
Matthew14:32 Bageze mu bwato umuyaga urahosha.
Matthew14:33 Nuko abari mu bwato bapfukama imbere ya Yezu bati: “Koko uri Umwana w'Imana.”
Matthew14:34 Bafata hakurya mu ntara ya Genezareti.
Matthew14:35 Abantu baho bamenye ko ari Yezu bakwiza inkuru muri ako karere kose
Matthew14:36 Nuko baramwinginga ngo byibura bakore ku ncunda z'umwitero we
Matthew15:1 Nuko Abafarizayi n'abigishamategeko baturutse i Yeruzalemu basanga Yezu
Matthew15:2 “Kuki abigishwa bawe barenga ku muhango wa ba sogokuruza? Kuki mu gihe cyo gufungura batabanza gukaraba?”
Matthew15:3 Yezu arababaza ati: “Kuki mwe murenga ku Mategeko y'Imana mukihambira ku mihango yanyu?
Matthew15:4 Imana yaravuze iti: ‘Ujye wubaha so na nyoko’
Matthew15:5 Naho mwebwe muvuga ko umuntu yabwira se cyangwa nyina ati: ‘Icyo najyaga kugufashisha ngomba kugitura Imana’
Matthew15:6 ntabe acyubaha se [cyangwa nyina]. Bityo mukaba muhinduye ubusa Amategeko y'Imana mwitwaje imihango yanyu.
Matthew15:7 Mwa ndyarya mwe
Matthew15:8 ‘Aba bantu bampoza ku rurimi
Matthew15:9 Barushywa n'ubusa bansenga
Matthew15:10 Nuko Yezu ahamagara rubanda arababwira ati: “Nimuntege amatwi kandi musobanukirwe ibi:
Matthew15:11 igihumanya umuntu si ikijya mu kanwa
Matthew15:12 Nuko abigishwa be baramwegera baramubaza bati: “Uzi ko Abafarizayi bumvise ibyo uvuze bikabarakaza?”
Matthew15:13 Yezu ni ko kubasubiza ati: “Agati kose katatewe na Data uri mu ijuru kazarandurwa.
Matthew15:14 Nimubareke ni impumyi zirandata izindi. Iyo impumyi irandase indi mpumyi
Matthew15:15 Petero ni bwo amubwiye ati: “Dusobanurire ayo marenga.”
Matthew15:16 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Mbese namwe muri abaswa bigeze aho?
Matthew15:17 Mbese ntimwumva ko ikintu cyose cyinjiye mu muntu kinyuze mu kanwa kijya mu nda
Matthew15:18 Ariko igisohoka mu kanwa cyose kiba kivuye mu mutima
Matthew15:19 kuko mu mitima y'abantu ari ho hava imigambi mibi: ubwicanyi n'ubusambanyi n'ubujura
Matthew15:20 Ibyo ni byo bihumanya umuntu
Matthew15:21 Nuko Yezu avayo ajya mu karere gahereranye n'imijyi ya Tiri na Sidoni.
Matthew15:22 Umugore w'Umunyakanānikazi wabaga muri ako karere
Matthew15:23 Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza
Matthew15:24 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Nta bandi natumweho uretse Abisiraheli bameze nk'intama zazimiye.”
Matthew15:25 Uwo mugore araza aramupfukamira ati: “Nyagasani mfasha!”
Matthew15:26 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Si byiza gufata ibyokurya by'abana ngo ubijugunyire imbwa.”
Matthew15:27 Umugore aramusubiza ati: “Ni koko Nyagasani
Matthew15:28 Yezu ni ko kumusubiza ati: “Wa mugore we
Matthew15:29 Nuko Yezu ava aho agenda akikiye ikiyaga cya Galileya
Matthew15:30 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu iramusanga bamuzaniye abacumbagira n'impumyi
Matthew15:31 Nuko rubanda batangazwa no kubona ibiragi bivuga
Matthew15:32 Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be arababwira ati: “Aba bantu barambabaje. Dore uyu ni umunsi wa gatatu turi kumwe kandi ntibagifite icyo bafungura. None sinshaka kubasezerera kandi nta mpamba bafite
Matthew15:33 Abigishwa be baramubaza bati: “Ko aha hantu hadatuwe
Matthew15:34 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mufite imigati ingahe?” Baramusubiza bati: “Dufite irindwi n'udufi dukeya.”
Matthew15:35 Nuko ategeka abantu kwicara hasi.
Matthew15:36 Afata iyo migati uko ari irindwi na twa dufi
Matthew15:37 Bose bararya barahaga
Matthew15:38 Abariye bari ibihumbi bine
Matthew15:39 Nuko Yezu amaze gusezerera iyo mbaga y'abantu ajya mu bwato
Matthew16:1 Nuko Abafarizayi n'Abasaduseyi basanga Yezu
Matthew16:2 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Iyo izuba rirenze muravuga muti: ‘Ejo hazaramuka umucyo kuko ijuru ari umutuku’
Matthew16:3 bwacya mukavuga muti: ‘Haramutse umuvumbi kuko ijuru ritukura kandi rikaba ryijimye.’ Muzi gutahura ijuru ngo mumenye ibihe
Matthew16:4 Abantu b'iki gihe b'abasambanyi n'abagizi ba nabi bashaka ko mbaha ikimenyetso
Matthew16:5 Bafashe hakurya
Matthew16:6 Yezu arababwira ati: “Muramenye mujye mwirinda umusemburo w'Abafarizayi n'uw'Abasaduseyi.”
Matthew16:7 Bo rero baravugana bati: “Ubanza ari uko nta migati twazanye!”
Matthew16:8 Yezu amenye ibyo bavugana arababwira ati: “Yemwe abafite ukwizera guke mwe
Matthew16:9 Mbese ntimurasobanukirwa
Matthew16:10 Cyangwa se ntimwibuka na ya migati irindwi yahagije bya bihumbi bine
Matthew16:11 Kuki mudasobanukirwa ko atari imigati nababwiraga? Mujye mwirinda ahubwo umusemburo w'Abafarizayi n'uw'Abasaduseyi.”
Matthew16:12 Noneho abigishwa basobanukirwa ko atari umusemburo w'imigati yababwiraga kwirinda
Matthew16:13 Bageze mu karere gahereranye n'i Kayizariya ya Filipo
Matthew16:14 Baramusubiza bati: “Bamwe bavuga ko uri Yohani Mubatiza
Matthew16:15 Nuko Yezu arababaza ati: “Mwebwe se muvuga ko ndi nde?”
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati: “Uri Kristo Umwana w'Imana nzima.”
Matthew16:17 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Urahirwa Simoni mwene Yonasi
Matthew16:18 Noneho nanjye reka nkubwire: uri Petero (ni ukuvuga ‘Ibuye’)
Matthew16:19 Nzaguha imfunguzo z'ubwami bw'ijuru
Matthew16:20 Nuko Yezu yihanangiriza abigishwa be kutagira uwo bahingukiriza ko ari we Kristo.
Matthew16:21 Uhereye ubwo
Matthew16:22 Nuko Petero aramwihererana
Matthew16:23 Yezu arahindukira aramubwira ati: “Mva iruhande Satani! Umbereye inkomyi kuko ibitekerezo byawe bitavuye ku Mana
Matthew16:24 Nuko Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Ushaka kunyoboka wese nareke kwiyitaho
Matthew16:25 Ushaka gukiza ubuzima bwe azabubura
Matthew16:26 Mbese umuntu byamumarira iki kwigarurira isi yose
Matthew16:27 Ni koko Umwana w'umuntu agiye kuzaza afite ikuzo rya Se
Matthew16:28 Ndababwira nkomeje ko bamwe mu bari aha
Matthew17:1 Iminsi itandatu ishize Yezu ajyana Petero n'abavandimwe babiri Yakobo na Yohani
Matthew17:2 Nuko ahinduka bamureba
Matthew17:3 Bagiye kubona babona Musa na Eliya baganira na Yezu.
Matthew17:4 Petero abwira Yezu ati: “Nyagasani
Matthew17:5 Akivuga atyo igicu kibengerana kirabatwikīra
Matthew17:6 Abigishwa bumvise iryo jwi bagwa bubamye
Matthew17:7 Maze Yezu arabegera abakoraho
Matthew17:8 Bubuye amaso ntibagira undi babona
Matthew17:9 Bakimanuka umusozi arabihanangiriza ati: “Ntimugire uwo mubwira ibyo mumaze kwerekwa
Matthew17:10 Abigishwa ba Yezu ni ko kumubaza bati: “Kuki abigishamategeko bavuga ko Eliya agomba kubanza kuza?”
Matthew17:11 Arabasubiza ati: “Ni koko
Matthew17:12 Ndetse mbabwire: Eliya yaraje nyamara abantu ntibamumenya
Matthew17:13 Noneho abigishwa basobanukirwa ko ari Yohani Mubatiza yababwiraga.
Matthew17:14 Bageze aho imbaga y'abantu yari iri
Matthew17:15 Nuko aravuga ati: “Nyagasani
Matthew17:16 Namuzaniye abigishwa bawe bananirwa kumukiza.”
Matthew17:17 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Yemwe bantu b'iki gihe mutizera Imana kandi mugoryamye
Matthew17:18 Yezu acyaha iyo ngabo ya Satani
Matthew17:19 Nuko abigishwa be baramusanga
Matthew17:20 Arabasubiza ati: “Ni ukubera ukwizera kwanyu kudahagije. Ndababwira nkomeje ko muramutse mufite ukwizera nibura kungana urwara
Matthew17:21 Ariko bene iyo ngabo ya Satani ntishoborwa n'ikindi kitari ugusenga no kwigomwa kurya.”]
Matthew17:22 Abigishwa bageze muri Galileya
Matthew17:23 bamwice maze ku munsi wa gatatu azuke.” Nuko barashavura cyane.
Matthew17:24 Yezu n'abigishwa be bageze i Kafarinawumu
Matthew17:25 Petero arasubiza ati: “Arawutanga.” Nuko Petero agarutse imuhira Yezu aramutanguranwa ati: “Mbe Simoni
Matthew17:26 Petero aramusubiza ati: “Ni rubanda.” Yezu ati: “Nuko rero abana babo si abo gusoreshwa.
Matthew17:27 Nyamara kugira ngo tudaha abo bantu urwitwazo
Matthew18:1 Icyo gihe abigishwa begera Yezu baramubaza bati: “Mbese ni nde mukuru mu bwami bw'ijuru?”
Matthew18:2 Nuko Yezu arembuza umwana amushyira hagati yabo
Matthew18:3 maze arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko niba mudahindutse ngo mumere nk'abana bato
Matthew18:4 Uwiyoroshya akamera nk'uyu mwana muto
Matthew18:5 Byongeye kandi
Matthew18:6 “Nihagira ugusha mu cyaha umwe muri aba bato banyemera
Matthew18:7 Mbega ngo isi iragatora kubera ibigusha abantu mu byaha! Ibigusha abantu ntibizabura kubaho
Matthew18:8 “Niba ikiganza cyawe cyangwa ikirenge cyakugusha mu cyaha
Matthew18:9 Niba kandi ijisho ryawe ryakugusha mu cyaha
Matthew18:10 “Muramenye mutagira uwo musuzugura muri aba bato. Ndababwira ko mu ijuru abamarayika babo bahora imbere ya Data uri mu ijuru!” [
Matthew18:11 Umwana w'umuntu yazanywe no gukiza abazimiye.]
Matthew18:12 “None se murabibona mute? Hagize umuntu ufite intama ijana maze imwe ikazimira
Matthew18:13 Ndababwira nkomeje ko iyo ayibonye
Matthew18:14 Uko ni ko So uri mu ijuru ashaka ko hatabura n'umwe muri bariya bato.
Matthew18:15 “Mugenzi wawe nagucumuraho
Matthew18:16 Naho natakumva umutorere undi muntu umwe cyangwa babiri
Matthew18:17 Ariko niyanga kubumva ubibwire ikoraniro ry'ab'Imana. Niba kandi na ryo yanze kuryumva
Matthew18:18 “Ndababwira nkomeje ko icyo muzaboha ku isi kizaba kiboshywe n'Imana mu ijuru. Kandi icyo muzabohora ku isi kizaba kibohowe n'Imana mu ijuru.
Matthew18:19 “Reka nongere mbabwire: niba ku isi babiri muri mwe bashyize hamwe kugira ngo basabe ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose
Matthew18:20 kuko aho babiri cyangwa batatu bateraniye mu izina ryanjye mba ndi hamwe na bo.”
Matthew18:21 Nuko Petero yegera Yezu aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani
Matthew18:22 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Sinkubwiye ko wagarukira kuri karindwi gusa
Matthew18:23 “Ni yo mpamvu iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umwami
Matthew18:24 Agitangira kubikora bamuzanira umwe muri bo
Matthew18:25 Nuko abonye ko uwo muntu atari afite icyo kwishyura
Matthew18:26 Uwo mugaragu ni ko kumwikubita imbere akoma yombi ati: ‘Nimunyihanganire nzabishyura ibyanyu byose!’
Matthew18:27 Shebuja amugirira impuhwe
Matthew18:28 “Uwo mugaragu avuye aho ahura n'undi mugaragu mugenzi we wari umurimo amafaranga ibihumbi bikeya
Matthew18:29 Mugenzi we ni ko kumwikubita imbere aramwinginga ati: ‘Nimunyihanganire nzabishyura ibyanyu byose!’
Matthew18:30 Aranga ahubwo aragenda aramufungisha
Matthew18:31 “Abagaragu bagenzi be babonye ibibaye barababara cyane
Matthew18:32 Nuko shebuja atumira uwo mugaragu aramubwira ati: ‘Yewe mugaragu gito
Matthew18:33 None se ntiwari ukwiriye kugirira mugenzi wawe impuhwe nk'uko nazikugiriye?’
Matthew18:34 Shebuja ararakara amwegurira abo kumwica urubozo
Matthew18:35 Yezu yungamo ati: “Nguko uko Data uri mu ijuru azagirira buri wese muri mwe
Matthew19:1 Nuko Yezu amaze kuvuga ayo magambo ava muri Galileya
Matthew19:2 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu bamukurikirayo
Matthew19:3 Abafarizayi baza aho ari kugira ngo bamutegere mu byo avuga
Matthew19:4 Arabasubiza ati: “Mbese ntimwasomye ko mbere na mbere igihe Imana yaremaga yaremye abantu
Matthew19:5 Nyuma yaravuze iti: ‘Ni cyo gituma umugabo azasiga se na nyina akabana n'umugore we akaramata
Matthew19:6 ku buryo baba batakiri babiri ahubwo baba babaye umuntu umwe. Nuko rero ntihakagire umuntu utandukanya abo Imana yafatanyije.”
Matthew19:7 Abafarizayi baramubaza bati: “None se ni kuki Musa yategetse umugabo guha umugore we urwandiko rwemeza ko amusenze
Matthew19:8 Arabasubiza ati: “Igituma Musa yabemereye gukora ibyo ni ukubera imitima yanyu inangiye. Ariko mbere na mbere si uko byahoze.
Matthew19:9 Naho jye mbabwiye ko umugabo wese wirukana umugore we bitavuye ku kubana kutemewe n'Amategeko maze akazana undi
Matthew19:10 Abigishwa baramubwira bati: “Niba imibanire y'umugabo n'umugore ari iyo
Matthew19:11 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Erega si bose bashobora kwakira iyo nyigisho
Matthew19:12 Hariho bamwe batabasha kurongora kuko bavutse ari ibiremba. Hari abandi batabibasha kuko bagizwe batyo n'abantu. Hariho n'abandi babyigomwa ubwabo kubera ubwami bw'ijuru. Ubasha kumva iryo jambo naryumve.”
Matthew19:13 Abantu bazanira Yezu abana bato kugira ngo abarambikeho ibiganza abasengere
Matthew19:14 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nimureke abana bato bansange
Matthew19:15 Amaze kubarambikaho ibiganza ava aho hantu.
Matthew19:16 Hari ubwo umuntu yasanze Yezu aramubaza ati: “Mwigisha
Matthew19:17 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Kuki umbaza ibyiza ugomba gukora? Imana yonyine ni yo nziza
Matthew19:18 Undi aramubaza ati: “Ayahe?” Yezu ati: “Ntukice
Matthew19:19 wubahe so na nyoko kandi ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.”
Matthew19:20 Uwo musore aramubwira ati: “Ayo yose narayakurikije. Ikindi nshigaje ni iki?”
Matthew19:21 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Niba ushaka kuba indakemwa koko
Matthew19:22 Uwo musore yumvise iryo jambo agenda ashavuye
Matthew19:23 Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko biruhije ko umukungu yinjira mu bwami bw'ijuru.
Matthew19:24 Nongere kandi mbabwire: icyoroshye ni uko ingamiya yanyura mu mwenge w'urushinge
Matthew19:25 Abigishwa babyumvise baratangara cyane bagira bati: “Mbese noneho ni nde ubasha kurokoka?”
Matthew19:26 Yezu arabitegereza arababwira ati: “Koko ku bantu ntibishoboka
Matthew19:27 Nuko Petero aramubaza ati: “Mbese nkatwe ko twasize byose tukagukurikira
Matthew19:28 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko igihe ibintu byose bizaba bihinduwe bishya
Matthew19:29 Umuntu wese wasize amazu cyangwa abavandimwe
Matthew19:30 Ikindi kandi benshi mu b'imbere bazaba ab'inyuma
Matthew20:1 “Iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umukungu wazindutse kare
Matthew20:2 Amaze gusezerana na bo igihembo gisanzwe cy'umubyizi
Matthew20:3 Asohotse saa tatu abona abandi bantu bahagaze ku isoko nta cyo bakora
Matthew20:4 arababwira ati: ‘Namwe nimujye mu mizabibu yanjye mukore
Matthew20:5 Nuko baragenda. Yongeye gusohoka saa sita na saa cyenda
Matthew20:6 Na none nka saa kumi n'imwe yongera gusohoka
Matthew20:7 Baramusubiza bati: ‘Ni uko nta waduhaye akazi.’ Na we ati: ‘Namwe nimujye mu mizabibu yanjye.’
Matthew20:8 “Nimugoroba nyir'imizabibu abwira umukoresha we ati: ‘Hamagara abakozi baze ubahembe
Matthew20:9 Nuko abatangiye nka saa kumi n'imwe baraza
Matthew20:10 Aba mbere na bo baraza batekereza ko ari bubarengerezeho
Matthew20:11 Bakira ibihembo bitotombera nyir'imizabibu bati:
Matthew20:12 ‘Bariya baje nyuma bakora isaha imwe gusa
Matthew20:13 “Ni bwo asubije umwe muri bo ati: ‘Mugenzi wanjye
Matthew20:14 Fata ibyawe ugende. Koko nshatse guha uyu waje nyuma igihembo kingana n'icyawe.
Matthew20:15 Mbese hari icyambuza gukora icyo nshatse mu byanjye? Cyangwa undebye nabi kuko ngize ubuntu?’ ”
Matthew20:16 Nuko Yezu ati: “Uko ni ko aba nyuma bazaba aba mbere
Matthew20:17 Yezu azamutse ajya i Yeruzalemu
Matthew20:18 “Dore tugiye i Yeruzalemu
Matthew20:19 Bazamugabiza abanyamahanga bamushinyagurire
Matthew20:20 Nuko nyina wa bene Zebedeyi ari kumwe n'abahungu be
Matthew20:21 Yezu aramubaza ati: “Mbese urashaka iki?” Na we ati: “Tegeka ko aba bana banjye bombi bazicarana nawe
Matthew20:22 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Ntimuzi icyo musaba. Mbese mwashobora kunywera ku gikombe cy'umubabaro ngomba kunywa?” Baramusubiza bati: “Twabishobora.”
Matthew20:23 Arababwira ati: “Ni koko igikombe cyanjye muzakinyweraho
Matthew20:24 Bagenzi babo uko ari icumi babyumvise
Matthew20:25 Yezu arabarembuza arababwira ati: “Muzi ko abategeka amahanga bayatwaza igitugu
Matthew20:26 Ariko muri mwe ntibikagende bityo. Ahubwo ushaka kuba mukuru muri mwe agomba kujya abakorera
Matthew20:27 kandi ushaka kuba uw'imbere muri mwe agomba kuba umugaragu wanyu.
Matthew20:28 Ni na ko Umwana w'umuntu atazanywe no gukorerwa
Matthew20:29 Bavuye i Yeriko imbaga y'abantu benshi ikurikira Yezu.
Matthew20:30 Nuko impumyi ebyiri zikaba zicaye iruhande rw'inzira. Zumvise ko Yezu aje zirangurura amajwi ziti: “Nyagasani Mwene Dawidi
Matthew20:31 Abantu barazicyaha ngo ziceceke
Matthew20:32 Yezu arahagarara ahamagara izo mpumyi
Matthew20:33 Ziramusubiza ziti: “Nyagasani
Matthew20:34 Yezu azigirira impuhwe azikora ku maso
Matthew21:1 Begereye i Betifage ku Musozi w'Iminzenze uteganye na Yeruzalemu
Matthew21:2 ati: “Mujye muri ziriya ngo
Matthew21:3 Nihagira ubabaza impamvu mumubwire muti: ‘Ni Databuja uzikeneye kandi arazigarura vuba.’ ”
Matthew21:4 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi ngo:
Matthew21:5 “Nimubwire abaturage b'i Siyoni muti: ‘Dore umwami wanyu aje abasanga
Matthew21:6 Abigishwa baragenda bakora uko Yezu yabategetse
Matthew21:7 bazana indogobe n'icyana cyayo
Matthew21:8 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu bari aho barambura imyitero yabo mu nzira
Matthew21:9 Nuko imbaga y'abantu bari kumwe na we
Matthew21:10 Yezu yinjiye muri Yeruzalemu umujyi wose urakangarana
Matthew21:11 Rubanda bati: “Ni Yezu wa muhanuzi w'i Nazareti muri Galileya.”
Matthew21:12 Nuko Yezu yinjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Matthew21:13 Nuko arababwira ati: “Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo ‘Inzu yanjye izitwa Inzu yo gusengeramo’
Matthew21:14 Nuko impumyi n'abacumbagira bamusanga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana maze arabakiza.
Matthew21:15 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko bararakara babonye ibitangaza akoze
Matthew21:16 Ni ko kubwira Yezu bati: “Aho ntiwiyumvira ibyo bavuga?” Arabasubiza ati: “Yee
Matthew21:17 Nuko abasiga aho ava mu mujyi
Matthew21:18 Kare mu gitondo Yezu ari mu nzira asubira mu mujyi arasonza.
Matthew21:19 Arabukwa igiti cy'umutini kiri ku nzira. Akigeze iruhande asanga ari amababi masa maze arakibwira ati: “Ntukere imbuto ukundi!” Ako kanya icyo giti kiruma.
Matthew21:20 Abigishwa be babibonye baratangara baramubaza bati: “Kiriya giti cyumye gite aka kanya?”
Matthew21:21 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje. Mwizeye Imana mudashidikanya ntimwakora ibyo nkoreye uyu mutini gusa ahubwo mwashobora no kubwira uriya musozi muti: ‘Shyiguka aho wirohe mu nyanja’
Matthew21:22 Rwose nimusenga mwizeye Imana
Matthew21:23 Nuko Yezu yinjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana. Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango y'Abayahudi bajya aho yari ari yigisha
Matthew21:24 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Nanjye reka ngire icyo mbibariza kimwe gusa
Matthew21:25 Mbese Yohani yatumwe na nde kubatiza? Ni Imana cyangwa se ni abantu?” Bajya inama bati: “Nituvuga ko yatumwe n'Imana
Matthew21:26 Na none kandi nituvuga ko yatumwe n'abantu
Matthew21:27 Nuko basubiza Yezu bati: “Ntitubizi.” Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nanjye rero simbabwiye aho nkura ubushobozi bwo gukora ibyo nkora.”
Matthew21:28 “Mbese iby'uyu mugani mubivugaho iki? Habayeho umugabo akagira abahungu babiri. Asanga uwa mbere aramubwira ati: ‘Mwana wanjye
Matthew21:29 Nuko aramusubiza ati: ‘Ndanze’
Matthew21:30 Wa mubyeyi asanga n'uwa kabiri na we amubwira atyo. Uwo we ahita amusubiza ati: ‘Ndajyayo mubyeyi’
Matthew21:31 Mbese muri abo bombi ni nde wakoze ibyo se ashaka?” Baramusubiza bati: “Ni uwa mbere.” Yezu arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko abasoresha n'indaya bazabatanga kwinjira mu bwami bw'Imana.
Matthew21:32 Yohani yazanywe no kubayobora inzira y'ubutungane ntimwamwemera. Abasoresha n'indaya bo baramwemera naho mwe murabireba
Matthew21:33 “Nimwumve n'undi mugani. Habayeho umugabo wari afite umurima
Matthew21:34 Igihe cy'isarura kigeze atuma abagaragu kuri ba bahinzi
Matthew21:35 Nuko abahinzi basumira abo bagaragu
Matthew21:36 Arongera yohereza abandi bagaragu baruta aba mbere ubwinshi
Matthew21:37 Ubwa nyuma abatumaho umuhungu we yibwira ati: ‘Umwana wanjye ntibazamwubahuka.’
Matthew21:38 Abahinzi babonye uwo mwana baravugana bati: ‘Dore uwarazwe ibintu araje! Nimuze tumwice maze ibye byose bibe ibyacu.’
Matthew21:39 Baramusumira
Matthew21:40 “Mbese nk'ubwo igihe nyir'imizabibu azagarukira
Matthew21:41 Baramubwira bati: “Abo bagome azabatsemba
Matthew21:42 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese ntimwasomye Ibyanditswe? Biravuga ngo ‘Ibuye abubatsi banze
Matthew21:43 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira ko muzanyagwa ubwami bw'Imana
Matthew21:44 Umuntu wese uzagwa kuri iryo buye azavunagurika
Matthew21:45 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'Abafarizayi bumvise imigani ye
Matthew21:46 Nuko bashaka uburyo bamufata ariko batinya rubanda
Matthew22:1 Yezu yongera kuvugana n'abantu akoresheje imigani agira ati:
Matthew22:2 “Iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umwami wacyuje ubukwe bw'umuhungu we.
Matthew22:3 Nuko atuma abagaragu be guhamagara abatumiwe mu bukwe
Matthew22:4 Arongera atuma abandi bagaragu kubwira abatumiwe ngo: ‘Dore nateguye amazimano
Matthew22:5 Ariko bo ntibabyitaho barigendera
Matthew22:6 Abasigaye basumira abagaragu b'umwami
Matthew22:7 Noneho umwami ararakara atuma ingabo ze zitsemba abo bicanyi
Matthew22:8 “Nyuma abwira abagaragu be ati: ‘Iby'ubukwe byateguwe
Matthew22:9 Nuko rero nimujye amayira ahurira
Matthew22:10 Abagaragu bahita bagenda bakwira amayira
Matthew22:11 “Umwami aherako arinjira agira ngo arebe abatumirwa be
Matthew22:12 Aramubaza ati: ‘Mugenzi wanjye
Matthew22:13 Nuko umwami abwira abahereza ati: ‘Nimumubohe amaboko n'amaguru mumujugunye hanze mu mwijima
Matthew22:14 Yezu yungamo ati: “Erega hahamagarwa benshi hagatoranywa bake!”
Matthew22:15 Nuko Abafarizayi baragenda
Matthew22:16 Bamutumaho abigishwa babo hamwe n'abo mu ishyaka rya Herodi bati: “Mwigisha
Matthew22:17 Ngaho rero tubwire rero: mbese ibi ubyumva ute? Ese ni ngombwa ko dutanga umusoro w'umwami w'i Roma
Matthew22:18 Nuko Yezu wari uzi ubugome bwabo arababaza ati: “Mwa ndyarya mwe
Matthew22:19 Nimunyereke igiceri mutanga ho umusoro.” Bakimuzaniye
Matthew22:20 arababaza ati: “Iyi shusho n'iri zina biriho ni ibya nde?”
Matthew22:21 Baramusubiza bati: “Ni iby'umwami w'i Roma.” Yezu arababwira ati: “Nuko rero iby'umwami w'i Roma mubihe umwami w'i Roma
Matthew22:22 Babyumvise batyo baratangara
Matthew22:23 Uwo munsi Abasaduseyi (abo ni bo bavuga ko kuzuka bitabaho) basanga Yezu baramubwira bati:
Matthew22:24 “Mwigisha
Matthew22:25 Iwacu rero habayeho abavandimwe barindwi. Uwa mbere ashaka umugore apfa nta mwana babyaranye
Matthew22:26 Uwa kabiri na we biba bityo
Matthew22:27 Amaherezo umugore na we arapfa.
Matthew22:28 Mbese igihe abantu bazazuka uwo mugore azaba muka nde
Matthew22:29 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mwarayobye
Matthew22:30 Erega mu gihe cy'izuka ntawe uzagira umugore
Matthew22:31 Ku byerekeye izuka ry'abapfuye
Matthew22:32 ‘Ndi Imana ya Aburahamu n'Imana ya Izaki n'Imana ya Yakobo?’ Erega Imana si iy'abapfuye
Matthew22:33 Nuko rubanda babyumvise batangarira izo nyigisho ze.
Matthew22:34 Abafarizayi bumvise ko Abasaduseyi babuze icyo basubiza Yezu
Matthew22:35 Umwe muri bo wari umuhanga mu by'Amategeko ashatse kumutegera mu byo avuga
Matthew22:36 “Mwigisha
Matthew22:37 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “ ‘Ukunde Nyagasani Imana yawe n'umutima wawe wose n'ubuzima bwawe bwose
Matthew22:38 Iryo ni ryo tegeko ry'ingenzi riruta ayandi yose.
Matthew22:39 Irya kabiri rimeze nka ryo ni iri: ‘Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.’
Matthew22:40 Ayo mategeko yombi ni yo shingiro ry'Amategeko yose n'ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi.”
Matthew22:41 Abafarizayi bamaze gukorana
Matthew22:42 “Ibya Kristo mubyumva mute? Ni mwene nde?” Baramusubiza bati: “Ni mwene Dawidi.”
Matthew22:43 Yezu ati: “Bishoboka bite
Matthew22:44 ‘Nyagasani yabwiye Umwami wanjye ati: “Icara ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bwanjye
Matthew22:45 None se ubwo Dawidi yita Kristo umwami we
Matthew22:46 Nuko ntihagira ubasha kugira icyo amusubiza
Matthew23:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Yezu abwira imbaga y'abantu hamwe n'abigishwa be ati:
Matthew23:2 “Abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi ni bo basimbuye Musa mu gusobanura Amategeko.
Matthew23:3 Nuko rero ntimukabure gukora ibyo bababwira byose
Matthew23:4 Bahambirira abantu imitwaro iremereye bakayibashyira ku ntugu
Matthew23:5 Byose babikorera kwibonekeza
Matthew23:6 Bakunda ibyicaro by'imbere aho batumiwe
Matthew23:7 Bakunda kuramukirizwa aho abantu bateraniye no kumva abantu babita ‘Mwigisha’.
Matthew23:8 Mwe ntimugakunde ko babita ‘Mwigisha’
Matthew23:9 Ntimukagire uwo mwita ngo ‘data’ kuri iyi si
Matthew23:10 Ntimukemere kandi ko babita abatware
Matthew23:11 Umukuru muri mwe nabe umugaragu wa bagenzi be.
Matthew23:12 Uwishyira hejuru wese azacishwa bugufi
Matthew23:13 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi
Matthew23:14 Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi
Matthew23:15 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi
Matthew23:16 “Muzabona ishyano bayobozi muhumye muvuga ngo
Matthew23:17 Mwa bapfu mwe b'impumyi
Matthew23:18 Ubundi kandi muravuga ngo
Matthew23:19 Ni ko mwa mpumyi mwe
Matthew23:20 Urahiye ashingiye ku rutambiro
Matthew23:21 Urahiye ashingiye ku Ngoro y'Imana
Matthew23:22 Urahiye ashingiye ku ijuru
Matthew23:23 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi
Matthew23:24 Mwa bayobozi muhumye mwe
Matthew23:25 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi
Matthew23:26 Mufarizayi uhumye
Matthew23:27 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi
Matthew23:28 Namwe ni nk'uko mugaragariza abantu ko muri intungane
Matthew23:29 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi
Matthew23:30 Mukavuga ngo: ‘Iyo tuba twarabayeho mu gihe cya ba sogokuruza
Matthew23:31 Bityo mukaba muhamya ubwanyu ko mukomoka ku babishe.
Matthew23:32 Ngaho namwe nimurangize ibyo ba sokuruza batangiye!
Matthew23:33 Yemwe mwa nzoka mwe
Matthew23:34 Dore nzaboherereza abahanuzi n'abanyabwenge n'abigisha
Matthew23:35 Bityo muzaryozwa amaraso y'intungane zose yamenetse ku isi
Matthew23:36 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ibyo byose ab'iki gihe bazabiryozwa.
Matthew23:37 “Yeruzalemu! Yeruzalemu! Wica abahanuzi kandi ukicisha amabuye abagutumweho! Ni kangahe nashatse gukorakoranya abana bawe nk'uko inkoko ibundikira imishwi yayo mu mababa
Matthew23:38 Dore iwanyu hagiye gusigara ari itongo.
Matthew23:39 Reka mbabwire: ntimuzongera kumbona kugeza igihe muzavuga muti: ‘Hasingizwe uje mu izina rya Nyagasani!’ ”
Matthew24:1 Yezu ava mu Ngoro y'Imana aragenda
Matthew24:2 Nuko arababwira ati: “Aho ntimureba biriya byose? Ndababwira nkomeje ko aha nta buye rizasigara rigeretse ku rindi
Matthew24:3 Nyuma yicaye ku Musozi w'Iminzenze
Matthew24:4 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Muramenye ntihazagire ubayobya
Matthew24:5 kuko hazaduka benshi biyita izina ryanjye bavuga bati: ‘Ni jye Kristo’
Matthew24:6 Mugiye kuzumva urusaku rw'intambara ziri hafi n'amakuru y'intambara za kure. Muramenye ntibizabakure umutima. Ibyo bizagomba kuba ariko si byo herezo.
Matthew24:7 Igihugu kizarwana n'ikindi
Matthew24:8 Ibyo byose bizaba bimeze nk'imigendo ibanziriza ibise by'umugore.
Matthew24:9 “Ubwo ni bwo bazabagabiza ababababaza kandi bakabica. Muzangwa n'amahanga yose babampōra.
Matthew24:10 Ibyo bizaca benshi intege
Matthew24:11 Hazaduka n'abahanurabinyoma batari bake
Matthew24:12 Kuko ubugome buzaba bwiyongereye
Matthew24:13 ariko uzihangana akageza ku munsi w'imperuka azarokoka.
Matthew24:14 Ubu Butumwa bwiza bw'ubwami bw'ijuru buzamamazwa ku isi yose bubere amahanga yose ubuhamya
Matthew24:15 “Nimubona cya ‘Giterashozi kirimbuzi’ cyavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Daniyeli gihagaze mu Ngoro y'Imana – usoma ibi abyumve neza -
Matthew24:16 icyo gihe abazaba bari muri Yudeya bazahungire mu misozi.
Matthew24:17 Uzaba ari hejuru y'inzu aramenye ntazamanuke ngo yinjire mu nzu agire icyo avanamo.
Matthew24:18 N'uzaba ari mu murima ntazasubire imuhira gushaka umwitero we.
Matthew24:19 Hagowe abazaba batwite cyangwa bonsa muri iyo minsi.
Matthew24:20 Musabe Imana kugira ngo uko guhunga kwanyu kutazaba mu mezi y'imbeho cyangwa ku isabato
Matthew24:21 kuko icyo gihe hazaba amakuba akabije atigeze abaho kuva isi yaremwa kugeza ubu
Matthew24:22 Iyo Imana itagabanya iyo minsi nta wari kuzarokoka. Ariko kubera abo yitoranyirije iyo minsi izagabanywa.
Matthew24:23 “Icyo gihe nihagira ubabwira ati: ‘Dore nguyu Kristo’
Matthew24:24 Hazaduka abiyita Kristo n'abiyita abahanuzi. Bazerekana ibimenyetso bikomeye bakore n'ibitangaza
Matthew24:25 Dore mbibamenyesheje bitaraba.
Matthew24:26 “Nuko rero nibababwira bati: ‘Dore ageze mu butayu’ ntimuzajyeyo
Matthew24:27 Uko umurabyo urabiriza iburasirazuba ako kanya ukabonekera n'iburengerazuba
Matthew24:28 “Aho intumbi izaba hose ni ho inkongoro zizakoranira.
Matthew24:29 “Bidatinze
Matthew24:30 Ubwo ni bwo mu ijuru hazagaragara ikimenyetso kiranga ukuza k'Umwana w'umuntu. Amoko yose yo ku isi azacura imiborogo
Matthew24:31 Azatuma abamarayika be bavuza impanda nyamunini
Matthew24:32 “Murebere ku giti cy'umutini kibabere urugero: iyo mubonye amashami yacyo atoshye akameraho ibibabi
Matthew24:33 Ni na ko rero igihe muzabona ibyo byose muzamenya ko Umwana w'umuntu ari hafi
Matthew24:34 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ab'iki gihe batazashira ibyo byose bitabaye.
Matthew24:35 Ijuru n'isi bizashira
Matthew24:36 “Icyakora umunsi n'isaha bizabera ntawe ubizi
Matthew24:37 Nk'uko byagenze mu gihe cya Nowa
Matthew24:38 Muri iyo minsi yabanjirije umwuzure
Matthew24:39 Abantu b'icyo gihe ntibagira icyo bikanga kugeza igihe umwuzure uziye
Matthew24:40 Icyo gihe
Matthew24:41 Abagore babiri bazaba bari hamwe basya
Matthew24:42 “Murabe maso rero
Matthew24:43 Murabizi. Iyaba nyir'urugo yamenyaga igihe umujura azira
Matthew24:44 Namwe rero muhore mwiteguye
Matthew24:45 “Mubirebye ni nde mugaragu w'indahemuka kandi uzi ubwenge
Matthew24:46 Ni uwo shebuja azasanga akora ibyo yamushinze
Matthew24:47 Ndababwira nkomeje ko azamwegurira ibyo afite byose.
Matthew24:48 Nyamara niba ari umugaragu mubi azibwira ati: ‘Databuja aratinze’
Matthew24:49 maze atangire gukubita abagaragu bagenzi be
Matthew24:50 Shebuja azaza ku munsi atamwiteze no mu gihe atari azi
Matthew24:51 amucemo kabiri abarirwe hamwe n'indyarya
Matthew25:1 “Icyo gihe iby'ubwami bw'ijuru bizaba nk'iby'uyu mugani. Habayeho abakobwa icumi bafashe amatara yabo bajya gusanganira umukwe.
Matthew25:2 Batanu muri bo bari abapfu
Matthew25:3 Abakobwa b'abapfu bajyana amatara yabo ariko ntibitwaza amavuta yo kongeramo.
Matthew25:4 Abanyamutima bo bajyana amatara yabo hamwe n'amacupa y'amavuta ku ruhande.
Matthew25:5 Umukwe atinze bose barahunyiza
Matthew25:6 “Igicuku kinishye bumva urusaku ngo ‘Dore umukwe araje nimujye kumusanganira!’
Matthew25:7 Ubwo abakobwa bose barabaduka baboneza amatara yabo.
Matthew25:8 Abakobwa b'abapfu ni ko kubwira abanyamutima bati: ‘Nimuduhe ku mavuta yanyu kuko amatara yacu agiye kuzima!’
Matthew25:9 Abanyamutima bati: ‘Oya
Matthew25:10 “Igihe bagiye kuyagura
Matthew25:11 “Hanyuma ba bakobwa bandi baza kuza
Matthew25:12 Arabasubiza ati: ‘Ni ukuri simbazi!’ ”
Matthew25:13 Yezu yungamo ati: “Nuko rero murabe maso
Matthew25:14 “Iby'icyo gihe wabigereranya n'umuntu witeguraga urugendo
Matthew25:15 Umwe amuha ibiro na mirongo itanu by'izahabu
Matthew25:16 Nuko uwahawe ibiro ijana na mirongo itanu ahita ajya gucuruza iyo zahabu
Matthew25:17 N'uwahawe ibiro mirongo itandatu na we abigenza atyo
Matthew25:18 Naho uwahawe ibiro mirongo itatu aragenda acukura umwobo
Matthew25:19 “Hahise igihe kirekire shebuja w'abo bagaragu aragaruka
Matthew25:20 Nuko uwahawe ibiro ijana na mirongo itanu by'izahabu asanga shebuja
Matthew25:21 Shebuja ni ko kumubwira ati: ‘Nuko nuko mugaragu mwiza w'indahemuka
Matthew25:22 “Uwahawe ibiro mirongo itandatu na we asanga shebuja aramubwira ati: ‘Mwambikije ibiro mirongo itandatu
Matthew25:23 Na we shebuja aramubwira ati: ‘Nuko nuko mugaragu mwiza w'indahemuka
Matthew25:24 “Hanyuma haza uwahawe ibiro mirongo itatu abwira shebuja ati: ‘Nari nzi ko uri umuntu utoroshye
Matthew25:25 nuko ngira ubwoba maze imari yawe nyicukurira umwobo ndayihisha
Matthew25:26 “Shebuja aramusubiza ati: ‘Wa mugaragu mubi we! Wa munebwe we! Harya ngo wari uzi ko nsarura aho ntabibye
Matthew25:27 Kuki utabikije imari yanjye mu isanduku yo kuzigama? Aho ngarukiye mba nyibikuje hamwe n'inyungu zayo.
Matthew25:28 Nimumwake izo zahabu muzihe uwahawe ibiro ijana na mirongo itanu
Matthew25:29 kuko ufite wese azongererwa
Matthew25:30 Uwo mugaragu mubi nimumujugunye hanze mu mwijima
Matthew25:31 “Igihe Umwana w'umuntu azaza afite ikuzo ashagawe n'abamarayika bose
Matthew25:32 Abatuye amahanga yose yo ku isi bazakoranyirizwa imbere ye
Matthew25:33 Azashyira intama iburyo bwe
Matthew25:34 Noneho Umwami azabwira abari iburyo bwe ati: ‘Nimuze abo Data yahaye umugisha
Matthew25:35 Igihe nari nshonje mwaramfunguriye
Matthew25:36 igihe nari mbuze icyo nambara muranyambika
Matthew25:37 “Nuko izo ntungane zizamusubiza ziti: ‘Nyagasani
Matthew25:38 Ni ryari twakubonye uri umushyitsi tukagucumbikira
Matthew25:39 Ni ryari twakubonye urwaye cyangwa uri imfungwa maze tukaza kugusura?’
Matthew25:40 Nuko Umwami azabasubiza ati: ‘Ndababwira nkomeje ko ibyo mwakoreye umwe muri aba bavandimwe banjye boroheje
Matthew25:41 “Hanyuma Umwami azabwira ab'ibumoso bwe ati: ‘Nimumve iruhande mwa bivume mwe
Matthew25:42 Igihe nari nshonje ntimwamfunguriye
Matthew25:43 nje ndi umushyitsi ntimwancumbikira igihe nari mbuze icyo nambara ntimwanyambika
Matthew25:44 “Icyo gihe na bo bazamusubiza bati: ‘Nyagasani
Matthew25:45 “Umwami azabasubiza ati: ‘Ndababwira nkomeje ko ibyo mutakoreye umwe muri aba boroheje
Matthew25:46 Ubwo rero bazahita bajya mu gihano cy'iteka
Matthew26:1 Nuko Yezu arangije kuvuga ibyo byose abwira abigishwa be ati:
Matthew26:2 “Nk'uko mubizi
Matthew26:3 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango y'Abayahudi bakoranira mu ngoro y'Umutambyi mukuru witwaga Kayifa
Matthew26:4 bajya inama yo gufata Yezu ku mayeri kugira ngo bamwicishe.
Matthew26:5 Baravuga bati: “Ntituzamufate mu minsi mikuru kugira ngo rubanda badatera imidugararo.”
Matthew26:6 Igihe Yezu yari i Betaniya kwa Simoni umubembe
Matthew26:7 haje umugore azanye icupa ryuzuye amarashi ahenda cyane
Matthew26:8 Abigishwa be babibonye bararakara
Matthew26:9 Mbese ntiyari kugurishwa amafaranga menshi agahabwa abakene?”
Matthew26:10 Yezu abimenye arababwira ati: “Uyu mugore muramuhora iki kandi icyo ankoreye ari cyiza?
Matthew26:11 Abakene muhorana na bo
Matthew26:12 Ansīze aya marashi ku mubiri
Matthew26:13 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ku isi yose aho ubu Butumwa bwiza buzamamazwa
Matthew26:14 Maze umwe mu bigishwa cumi na babiri witwa Yuda Isikariyoti
Matthew26:15 arababaza ati: “Murampa iki nkabashyikiriza Yezu?” Bamubarira ibikoroto mirongo itatu by'ifeza.
Matthew26:16 Kuva icyo gihe Yuda asigara ashaka igihe gikwiriye cyo kumubashyikiriza.
Matthew26:17 Umunsi wa mbere w'iminsi mikuru y'Imigati idasembuye
Matthew26:18 Yezu ati: “Nimujye mu mujyi kwa kanaka
Matthew26:19 Abigishwa ba Yezu babigenza uko yabategetse
Matthew26:20 Bugorobye Yezu yicarana n'abigishwa be cumi na babiri barafungura.
Matthew26:21 Nuko mu gihe bafungura aravuga ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko umwe muri mwe agiye kungambanira.”
Matthew26:22 Birabababaza cyane batangira kumubaza umwe umwe bati: “Nyagasani
Matthew26:23 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Uwo duhuriza intoki ku mbehe ni we ugiye kungambanira.
Matthew26:24 Koko Umwana w'umuntu agiye kwicwa nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga kuri we. Nyamara ugiye kumugambanira azabona ishyano. Icyari kuba cyiza kuri uwo muntu ni iyo aba ataravutse.”
Matthew26:25 Maze Yuda wari ugiye kumugambanira
Matthew26:26 Igihe bafunguraga
Matthew26:27 Afata n'igikombe
Matthew26:28 Aya ni amaraso yanjye ahamya Isezerano [rishya] Imana igiranye n'abayo
Matthew26:29 Reka mbabwire: sinzongera kunywa kuri bene iyi divayi
Matthew26:30 Nuko bamaze kuririmba
Matthew26:31 Maze Yezu arababwira ati: “Ibigiye kumbaho iri joro biri bubace intege mwese
Matthew26:32 Ariko nimara kuzuka
Matthew26:33 Petero aramubwira ati: “Ibigiye kukubaho naho bose byabaca intege
Matthew26:34 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ndakubwira nkomeje ko muri iri joro
Matthew26:35 Petero ati: “Naho byatuma mpfana nawe sindi bukwihakane na gato!” Abandi bigishwa bose na bo bavuga batyo.
Matthew26:36 Nuko Yezu ajyana n'abigishwa be ahantu hitwa Getsemani. Bahageze arababwira ati: “Nimube mwicaye hano mu gihe ngiye hariya gusenga.”
Matthew26:37 Maze ajyana na Petero na bene Zebedeyi bombi
Matthew26:38 Nuko arababwira ati: “Agahinda mfite karenda kunyica. Nimugume hano mube maso hamwe nanjye.”
Matthew26:39 Nuko yigira imbere gato yikubita hasi yubamye
Matthew26:40 Nyuma asubira aho yasize abigishwa be asanga basinziriye
Matthew26:41 Mube maso kandi musenge kugira ngo mutagwa mu bishuko. Umutima w'umuntu ugira imigambi myiza
Matthew26:42 Asubirayo arasenga ati: “Data
Matthew26:43 Ahindukiye asanga na none basinziriye
Matthew26:44 Yongera kubasiga ajya gusenga ubwa gatatu
Matthew26:45 Nuko asubira aho yasize abigishwa be arababwira ati: “Mbese muracyasinziriye? Muriruhukiye? Yemwe
Matthew26:46 Nimuhaguruke tugende
Matthew26:47 Akivuga ibyo
Matthew26:48 Uwamugambaniraga yari yabahaye ikimenyetso ati: “Uwo nza kuramutsa musoma
Matthew26:49 Ako kanya Yuda asanga Yezu aramusuhuza ati: “Mwiriwe mwigisha.” Nuko aramusoma.
Matthew26:50 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ncuti
Matthew26:51 Ni bwo umwe mu bari kumwe na Yezu akuye inkota
Matthew26:52 Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati: “Subiza inkota yawe mu rwubati
Matthew26:53 Mbese ntuzi ko nshobora gutabaza Data
Matthew26:54 Ariko se bibaye bityo Ibyanditswe byasohozwa bite
Matthew26:55 Ubwo nyine Yezu ni ko kubaza igitero cy'abantu bari baje ati: “Kuki muje kumfata mwitwaje inkota n'amahiri nk'abagiye gufata igisambo? Iminsi yose nicaraga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana nigisha
Matthew26:56 Ariko ibi byose bibereyeho kugira ngo ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi bibe.” Maze abigishwa be bose baramutererana barahunga.
Matthew26:57 Abari bafashe Yezu bamujyana kwa Kayifa Umutambyi mukuru
Matthew26:58 Ubwo Petero amukurikirira kure aza kugera mu rugo rw'Umutambyi mukuru
Matthew26:59 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abandi bose bagize urukiko rw'ikirenga
Matthew26:60 ariko ntibabibona nubwo hari haje benshi bo kumushinja ibinyoma. Nyuma haza kugoboka abantu babiri bati:
Matthew26:61 “Uyu muntu yaravuze ngo: ‘Mbasha gusenya Ingoro y'Imana
Matthew26:62 Noneho Umutambyi mukuru arahaguruka
Matthew26:63 Yezu aricecekera. Umutambyi mukuru ni ko kumubwira ati: “Nkurahije Imana nzima
Matthew26:64 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Urabyivugiye. Byongeye kandi reka mbabwire
Matthew26:65 Umutambyi mukuru ni ko gushishimura imyambaro ye kugira ngo agaragaze ko bimushegeshe
Matthew26:66 Murabitekerezaho iki?” Barasubiza bati: “Akwiriye gupfa!”
Matthew26:67 Nuko bamucira mu maso bamutera n'amakofi
Matthew26:68 “Kristo
Matthew26:69 Icyo gihe Petero yari yicaye hanze mu rugo. Umwe mu baja aramwegera aramubwira ati: “Nawe wari kumwe na Yezu wo muri Galileya!”
Matthew26:70 Petero ahakanira imbere ya bose ati: “Sinzi icyo ushaka kuvuga!”
Matthew26:71 Ahavuye agana ku irembo undi muja aramubona
Matthew26:72 Petero yongera guhakana ndetse ararahira ati: “Uwo muntu simuzi!”
Matthew26:73 Hashize akanya
Matthew26:74 Nuko Petero atangira kwivuma no gucurikiranya indahiro ati: “Uwo muntu simuzi!” Ako kanya inkoko irabika.
Matthew26:75 Petero ni ko kwibuka ijambo Yezu yari yavuze ati: “Inkoko irajya kubika umaze kunyihakana gatatu.” Asohoka ashavuye
Matthew27:1 Igitondo gitangaje
Matthew27:2 Bamaze kumuboha baramujyana
Matthew27:3 Nuko Yuda wamugambaniye abonye ko Yezu yaciriwe urwo gupfa yicuza ibyo yakoze
Matthew27:4 aravuga ati: “Nakoze ishyano kuko nagambaniye amaraso y'umuntu w'umwere.” Baramubwira bati: “Ibyo ni ibyawe twe ntibitureba.”
Matthew27:5 Ajugunya bya bikoroto mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Matthew27:6 Abakuru bo mu batambyi bafata ibyo bikoroto baravugana bati: “Ntibikwiriye ko dushyira aya mafaranga hamwe n'amaturo yandi
Matthew27:7 Bamaze kujya inama
Matthew27:8 Bituma witwa “Umurima w'Amaraso” kugeza na n'ubu.
Matthew27:9 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Yeremiya ngo: “Bakiriye ibikoroto mirongo itatu by'ifeza
Matthew27:10 Babigura umurima w'umubumbyi nk'uko Nyagasani yari yarantegetse.”
Matthew27:11 Yezu ageze imbere y'umutegetsi
Matthew27:12 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango baramurega
Matthew27:13 Nuko Pilato aramubaza ati: “Ntiwumva ibyo byose bagushinja?”
Matthew27:14 Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza kuri ibyo birego byose. Umutegetsi abibonye aratangara cyane.
Matthew27:15 Ku munsi mukuru wa Pasika
Matthew27:16 Icyo gihe bari bafite imfungwa y'ikirangirire yitwaga Baraba.
Matthew27:17 Nuko Pilato abaza abantu bakoraniye aho ati: “Uwo mushaka ko mbarekurira ni nde
Matthew27:18 Pilato yari azi ko bamugabije Yezu babitewe n'ishyari.
Matthew27:19 Igihe Pilato yari yicaye kugira ngo ace urubanza
Matthew27:20 Ariko abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango bemeza rubanda gusaba Umutegetsi ngo abarekurire Baraba
Matthew27:21 Nuko arababaza ati: “Muri aba bombi uwo mushaka ko mbarekurira ni nde?” Baramusubiza bati: “Ni Baraba.”
Matthew27:22 Pilato arababaza ati: “None se Yezu witwa Kristo mugire nte?” Bose bati: “Nabambwe ku musaraba!”
Matthew27:23 Pilato ati: “Kuki? Ikibi yakoze ni ikihe?” Barushaho gusakuza bati: “Nabambwe!”
Matthew27:24 Pilato abonye ko arushywa n'ubusa ahubwo ko bigiye gucika
Matthew27:25 Bose barasubiza bati: “Amaraso ye araduhame ahame n'abana bacu!”
Matthew27:26 Pilato ni ko kubarekurira Baraba. Ategeka ko Yezu abambwa ku musaraba bamaze kumukubita ibiboko.
Matthew27:27 Nuko abasirikari bajyana Yezu mu gikari cy'ingoro y'umutegetsi
Matthew27:28 Bamucuza imyambaro bamwambika umwitero utukura.
Matthew27:29 Bazingazinga ikamba ry'amahwa barimutamiriza ku mutwe
Matthew27:30 Bakamuvundereza amacandwe
Matthew27:31 Nuko bamaze kumushinyagurira batyo bamwambura wa mwitero utukura
Matthew27:32 Bagisohoka mu mujyi bahura n'umuntu ukomoka i Sirene witwaga Simoni
Matthew27:33 Bageze ahitwa Gologota ari ko kuvuga “ahitiriwe igihanga”
Matthew27:34 bamuha divayi ivanze n'indurwe ngo anywe
Matthew27:35 Nuko bamubamba ku musaraba
Matthew27:36 Birangiye bicara aho baramurinda.
Matthew27:37 Hejuru y'umutwe we
Matthew27:38 Yari abambanywe n'abambuzi babiri
Matthew27:39 Abahisi baramutukaga bakazunguza umutwe bati:
Matthew27:40 “Wowe wasenya Ingoro y'Imana ukayubaka mu minsi itatu
Matthew27:41 Abakuru bo mu batambyi hamwe n'abigishamategeko n'abakuru b'imiryango
Matthew27:42 “Yakijije abandi none ananiwe kwikiza! Umva ko ari Umwami w'Abisiraheli
Matthew27:43 Yiringiye Imana avuga ngo ‘Ndi Umwana wayo’
Matthew27:44 Ndetse na ba bambuzi bari babambanywe na we ni ko bamutukaga.
Matthew27:45 Uhereye saa sita
Matthew27:46 Ahagana mu masaa cyenda Yezu avuga aranguruye ati: “Eli
Matthew27:47 Bamwe mu bari bahagaze aho babyumvise baravuga bati: “Aratabaza Eliya.”
Matthew27:48 Umwe muri bo ahita yiruka
Matthew27:49 Abandi baravuga bati: “Mureke turebe ko Eliya aza kumutabara!”
Matthew27:50 Yezu yongera kurangurura ijwi
Matthew27:51 Nuko mu Ngoro y'Imana umwenda wakingirizaga Icyumba kizira inenge cyane utabukamo kabiri
Matthew27:52 Imva zirakinguka
Matthew27:53 Yezu amaze kuzuka
Matthew27:54 Umukapiteni n'abasirikari be barindaga Yezu bumvise umutingito w'isi
Matthew27:55 Hari n'abagore benshi babireberaga kure
Matthew27:56 Barimo Mariya w'i Magadala na Mariya nyina wa Yakobo na Yozefu
Matthew27:57 Bugiye kwira haza umugabo w'umukire witwaga Yozefu
Matthew27:58 Ajya kwa Pilato amusaba umurambo wa Yezu. Pilato ategeka ko bawumuha.
Matthew27:59 Nuko Yozefu ajyana uwo murambo
Matthew27:60 Aherako awushyingura mu mva ye nshya yari yarakorogoshoye mu rutare
Matthew27:61 Mariya w'i Magadala na Mariya wundi basigara bicaye ahateganye n'imva.
Matthew27:62 Umunsi w'imyiteguro y'isabato urangiye
Matthew27:63 baramubwira bati: “Nyakubahwa
Matthew27:64 Nuko rero
Matthew27:65 Pilato arababwira ati: “Ngaba abasirikari
Matthew27:66 Nuko baragenda badanangira umuryango w'imva
Matthew28:1 Isabato ishize
Matthew28:2 Ako kanya haba umutingito w'isi ukomeye
Matthew28:3 Yarabagiranaga nk'umurabyo n'imyambaro ye yeraga de.
