Matthew28:4 Abarinzi bamurabutswe bagira ubwoba bwinshi
Matthew28:5 Umumarayika abwira abagore ati: “Mwitinya! Nzi ko mushaka Yezu umwe babambye ku musaraba
Matthew28:6 ariko ntari hano
Matthew28:7 Noneho mwihute mubwire abigishwa be muti: ‘Yazutse kandi agiye kubategerereza muri Galileya
Matthew28:8 Bava ku mva bwangu bafite ubwoba buvanze n'ibyishimo byinshi
Matthew28:9 Noneho Yezu ahura na bo arababwira ati: “Ndabaramutsa!” Baramwegera bamwikubita imbere
Matthew28:10 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Mwitinya! Mugende mubwire abavandimwe banjye bajye muri Galileya
Matthew28:11 Abagore bakiri mu nzira
Matthew28:12 Abo batambyi baterana n'abakuru b'imiryango bajya inama
Matthew28:13 barababwira bati: “Mujye muvuga ko abigishwa be baje nijoro bakamwiba musinziriye.
Matthew28:14 Umutegetsi naramuka abimenye
Matthew28:15 Abarinzi bamaze gushyikira amafaranga bagenza uko babwirijwe. Nuko iyo nkuru yamamara mu Bayahudi kugeza na n'ubu.
Matthew28:16 Nuko abo bigishwa cumi n'umwe bajya muri Galileya ku musozi Yezu yari yarabarangiye.
Matthew28:17 Bamubonye baramuramya
Matthew28:18 Yezu arabegera arababwira ati: “Nahawe ubushobozi kuri byose mu ijuru no ku isi.
Matthew28:19 Nuko rero nimugende muhindure abo mu mahanga yose babe abigishwa banjye
Matthew28:20 mubigishe gukurikiza ibyo nabategetse byose
Mark1:1 Ngiyi intangiriro y'Ubutumwa bwiza bwerekeye Yezu Kristo Umwana w'Imana.
Mark1:2 Byanditswe mu gitabo cy'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: “Dore nohereje intumwa yanjye mbere yawe
Mark1:3 Nimwumve ijwi ry'urangururira mu butayu ati: ‘Nimutunganye inzira ya Nyagasani
Mark1:4 Yohani yatungutse mu butayu atangaza ko abantu bagomba kwihana bakabatizwa
Mark1:5 Icyo gihe abaturage bo mu ntara yose ya Yudeya n'abo mu murwa wayo wa Yeruzalemu bose basangaga Yohani
Mark1:6 Yohani yambaraga umwambaro uboheshejwe ubwoya bw'ingamiya
Mark1:7 akajya atangaza ati: “Nyuma yanjye hagiye kuza undusha ububasha
Mark1:8 Jyewe ndababatirisha amazi
Mark1:9 Muri iyo minsi Yezu ava i Nazareti yo muri Galileya
Mark1:10 Yezu akiva mu mazi abona ijuru rirakingutse
Mark1:11 Nuko humvikana ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru ati: “Uri Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane
Mark1:12 Mwuka w'Imana aherako amujyana mu butayu
Mark1:13 ahamara iminsi mirongo ine ageragezwa na Satani. Yahabanaga n'inyamaswa
Mark1:14 Yohani amaze gufungwa
Mark1:15 “Igihe kirageze
Mark1:16 Nuko Yezu anyura iruhande rw'ikiyaga cya Galileya
Mark1:17 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimunkurikire nzabagira abarobyi b'abantu.”
Mark1:18 Bahita basiga aho imitego yabo baramukurikira.
Mark1:19 Yigiye imbere ho gato abona Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi. Na bo bari mu bwato batunganya imitego barobeshaga.
Mark1:20 Ako kanya Yezu arabahamagara. Nuko basiga se Zebedeyi n'abakozi be mu bwato baramukurikira.
Mark1:21 Nuko bagera i Kafarinawumu. Ku munsi w'isabato Yezu ajya mu rusengero rw'Abayahudi atangira kwigisha.
Mark1:22 Abaho batangazwa cyane n'imyigishirize ye
Mark1:23 Ako kanya mu rusengero haboneka umuntu wahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani
Mark1:24 “Yezu w'i Nazareti
Mark1:25 Yezu acyaha iyo ngabo ya Satani ati: “Ceceka muvemo!”
Mark1:26 Nuko itigisa uwo muntu bikabije maze imuvamo ivuza induru.
Mark1:27 Bose barumirwa bigeza aho babazanya bati: “Ibi ni ibiki? Mbega inyigisho nshya! Arategekana ububasha ingabo za Satani na zo zikamwumvira!”
Mark1:28 Bidatinze inkuru ye yamamara mu karere kose ka Galileya.
Mark1:29 Bakiva mu rusengero Yezu ajya kwa Simoni na Andereya
Mark1:30 Bagezeyo basanga nyirabukwe wa Simoni aryamye ahinda umuriro. Ako kanya babwira Yezu iby'uburwayi bwe.
Mark1:31 Yezu aramusanga
Mark1:32 Nimugoroba izuba rirenze
Mark1:33 Abaturage b'umujyi bose bari bateraniye ku irembo.
Mark1:34 Nuko akiza abantu benshi bari barwaye indwara zitari zimwe
Mark1:35 Bukeye bwaho Yezu abyuka kare mu rukerera
Mark1:36 Simoni na bagenzi be bajya kumushaka.
Mark1:37 Bamubonye baramubwira bati: “Abantu bose baragushaka.”
Mark1:38 Arabasubiza ati: “Ahubwo nimuze tujye mu yindi misozi idukikije
Mark1:39 Nuko azenguruka Galileya yose avuga Ubutumwa bwiza
Mark1:40 Nuko umuntu urwaye ibibembe asanga Yezu aramupfukamira
Mark1:41 Yezu amugirira impuhwe
Mark1:42 Ako kanya ibibembe bimushiraho arakira.
Mark1:43 Yezu ahita amusezerera amwihanangiriza ati:
Mark1:44 “Uramenye ntugire uwo ubibwira. Icyakora ujye kwiyereka umutambyi maze uture igitambo cyo guhumanurwa nk'uko Musa yabitegetse
Mark1:45 Nyamara uwo muntu akimara kuva aho atangira kubyamamaza
Mark2:1 Hashize iminsi mike Yezu agaruka i Kafarinawumu
Mark2:2 Hateranira abantu benshi buzura mu nzu
Mark2:3 Haza abantu bamuzaniye umuntu umugaye ahetswe na bane muri bo.
Mark2:4 Basanga badashoboye kumugeza aho Yezu ari kuko hari abantu benshi. Nuko basambura igisenge cy'inzu aharinganiye n'aho Yezu yari ari
Mark2:5 Yezu abonye ukwizera kwabo abwira uwo murwayi ati: “Mwana wanjye
Mark2:6 Bamwe mu bigishamategeko bari bicaye aho barabazanya bati:
Mark2:7 “Uriya atewe n'iki kuvuga atyo? Aratuka Imana! Ni nde ubasha kubabarira abantu ibyaha uretse Imana yonyine?”
Mark2:8 Ako kanya Yezu amenya ibyo batekereza
Mark2:9 Icyoroshye ni ikihe
Mark2:10 Nyamara ndagira ngo mumenye ko ku isi Umwana w'umuntu afite ubushobozi bwo kubabarira abantu ibyaha.” Nuko abwira uwo muntu umugaye ati:
Mark2:11 “Ndagutegetse
Mark2:12 Ako kanya arabyuka afata ingobyi ye
Mark2:13 Yezu asubira ku Kiyaga cya Galileya
Mark2:14 Nuko ahise abona Levi mwene Alufeyi
Mark2:15 Igihe Yezu n'abigishwa be bari kwa Levi bafungura
Mark2:16 Abigishamategeko bo mu Bafarizayi babonye Yezu asangira n'abasoresha n'abanyabyaha
Mark2:17 Yezu abyumvise arababwira ati: “Abazima si bo bakenera umuvuzi
Mark2:18 Igihe kimwe abigishwa ba Yohani Mubatiza n'Abafarizayi bari bigomwe kurya
Mark2:19 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mbese mu bukwe abasangwa bashobora kwigomwa kurya
Mark2:20 Nyamara igihe kizagera umukwe avanwe muri bo
Mark2:21 “Ntawe utera ikiremo gishya ku mwenda ushaje. Uwabikora
Mark2:22 Nta n'usuka inzoga y'umubira mu mpago z'impu zishaje. Uwabikora
Mark2:23 Igihe kimwe Yezu anyuze mu mirima y'ingano ku isabato
Mark2:24 Nuko Abafarizayi babwira Yezu bati: “Dorere
Mark2:25 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese ntimwigeze musoma ibyo Dawidi yakoze
Mark2:26 Icyo gihe yinjiye mu Nzu y'Imana arya imigati yatuwe Imana
Mark2:27 Yezu arababwira ati: “Isabato yabereyeho abantu
Mark2:28 Nuko rero Umwana w'umuntu ni we ugenga n'isabato.”
Mark3:1 Yezu asubiye mu rusengero ahasanga umuntu wari unyunyutse ikiganza.
Mark3:2 Bagenzura Yezu ngo barebe ko amukiza ku isabato
Mark3:3 Yezu abwira uwo muntu wari unyunyutse ikiganza ati: “Haguruka ujye hariya hagati.”
Mark3:4 Nuko arababaza ati: “Mbese hemewe iki ku munsi w'isabato
Mark3:5 Yezu abararanganyamo amaso arakaye
Mark3:6 Abafarizayi basohotse
Mark3:7 Nuko Yezu n'abigishwa be bagenda bagana ku kiyaga
Mark3:8 baturutse n'i Yeruzalemu no mu ntara ya Idumeya no hakurya ya Yorodani
Mark3:9 Nuko abwira abigishwa be kumwegereza ubwato ngo ajyemo rubanda rutamuniganaho
Mark3:10 kuko yari yakijije abantu benshi bigatuma abari barwaye bose bamwisukaho kugira ngo bamukoreho.
Mark3:11 Ingabo za Satani na zo iyo zabonaga Yezu
Mark3:12 Na we akazibuza azihanangiriza ngo ze kumwamamaza.
Mark3:13 Hanyuma Yezu azamuka umusozi
Mark3:14 Nuko atoranya muri bo cumi na babiri kugira ngo babane na we
Mark3:15 abaha n'ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani.
Mark3:16 Abo cumi na babiri yatoranyije ni aba: Simoni Petero
Mark3:17 na Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi ari bo yahimbye Bowanerige (ni ukuvuga “abakubita nk'inkuba”)
Mark3:18 na Andereya na Filipo na Barutolomayo
Mark3:19 na Yuda Isikariyoti wa wundi wagambaniye Yezu.
Mark3:20 Hanyuma Yezu agaruka imuhira
Mark3:21 Bene wabo babimenye baza kuhamuvana
Mark3:22 Abigishamategeko bari bavuye i Yeruzalemu baravuga bati: “Yahanzweho na Bēlizebuli”
Mark3:23 Yezu arabahamagara maze abaha urugero ati: “Satani ashobora ate kumenesha Satani?
Mark3:24 Iyo igihugu gisubiranyemo ntigishobora gukomera.
Mark3:25 Byongeye kandi iyo umuryango usubiranyemo
Mark3:26 Nuko rero niba Satani ubwe yirwanya
Mark3:27 “Ntawe ubasha kwigabiza urugo rw'umunyamaboko ngo amusahure ibyo atunze keretse abanje kumuboha
Mark3:28 “Ndababwira nkomeje ko ibyaha byose abantu bakoze
Mark3:29 Ariko uzatuka Mwuka Muziranenge ntabwo azababarirwa bibaho. Azabarwaho icyaha gihoraho iteka ryose.”
Mark3:30 Icyateye Yezu kuvuga ibyo ni uko bari bavuze ngo yahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani.
Mark3:31 Nyina wa Yezu n'abavandimwe be baraza bahagarara hanze
Mark3:32 Abantu benshi bari bicaye bamukikije baramubwira bati: “Yewe
Mark3:33 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mama n'abavandimwe banjye ni bande?”
Mark3:34 Nuko araranganya amaso mu bari bicaye bamukikije
Mark3:35 umuntu wese ukora ibyo Imana ishaka ni we murumuna wanjye
Mark4:1 Yezu yongera kwigishiriza ku nkombe y'ikiyaga. Imbaga y'abantu iramukikiza bituma ajya mu bwato yicaramo
Mark4:2 Nuko abigisha ibintu byinshi akoresheje imigani ati:
Mark4:3 “Nimutege amatwi: umuntu yagiye kubiba
Mark4:4 igihe abiba imbuto zimwe zigenda zigwa ku nzira
Mark4:5 Izindi zigwa ku gasi zihita zimera
Mark4:6 Izuba ricanye rirazotsa ziruma
Mark4:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa
Mark4:8 Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza
Mark4:9 Nuko Yezu aravuga ati: “Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!”
Mark4:10 Yezu asigaye wenyine
Mark4:11 Nuko arababwira ati: “Mwebwe mwahawe kumenya ibanga ry'ubwami bw'Imana
Mark4:12 kugira ngo ‘Kureba barebe ariko be kubona
Mark4:13 Nuko yongera kubabwira ati: “Ese ko mutumvise uwo mugani
Mark4:14 Imbuto umubibyi abiba ni Ijambo ry'Imana.
Mark4:15 Imbuto zaguye ku nzira zigereranywa n'abantu bumva iryo Jambo
Mark4:16 Izabibwe ku gasi ni nk'abantu bumva Ijambo ry'Imana
Mark4:17 nyamara ntibatume rishorera imizi muri bo
Mark4:18 Abandi ni nk'izabibwe mu mahwa. Ni abumva Ijambo ry'Imana
Mark4:19 nyamara guhagarikwa umutima n'iby'isi no gushukwa n'ubukungu
Mark4:20 Naho abagereranywa n'izabibwe mu butaka bwiza
Mark4:21 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese hari uwacana itara akaryubikaho akabindi
Mark4:22 Nta gihishwe kitazahishurwa
Mark4:23 Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!”
Mark4:24 Arongera arababwira ati: “Murajye mwitondera ibyo mwumva. Akebo mugeramo ni ko namwe muzagererwamo
Mark4:25 Ufite azongererwa
Mark4:26 Yezu arongera aravuga ati: “Iby'ubwami bw'Imana wabigereranya n'umuntu utera imbuto mu murima.
Mark4:27 Yasinzira cyangwa yaba maso ijoro n'amanywa
Mark4:28 Ubutaka ubwabwo ni bwo bwera imyaka: habanza ingemwe zigakura zikaba imigengararo
Mark4:29 Nuko imyaka yamara kwera
Mark4:30 Yezu yongera kuvuga ati: “Mbese ubwami bw'Imana twabugereranya n'iki
Mark4:31 Twabugereranya n'akabuto kitwa sinapi
Mark4:32 Nyamara iyo bamaze kugatera karamera kagakura
Mark4:33 Nuko Yezu akomeza kubabwira Ijambo ry'Imana
Mark4:34 Nta cyo yababwiraga adakoresheje imigani
Mark4:35 Uwo munsi bugorobye
Mark4:36 Basiga rubanda aho bamujyana muri bwa bwato yarimo
Mark4:37 Nuko haza inkubi y'umuyaga
Mark4:38 Yezu we yari aryamye inyuma mu bwato
Mark4:39 Nuko arakanguka maze acyaha umuyaga
Mark4:40 Hanyuma arababaza ati: “Ni iki cyabateye ubwoba bungana butyo? Mbese n'ubu ntimurizera?”
Mark4:41 Abigishwa be bakuka umutima barabazanya bati: “Uyu ni muntu ki utegeka umuyaga n'ikiyaga bikamwumvira?”
Mark5:1 Yezu afata hakurya y'ikiyaga mu ntara y'Abanyagerasa.
Mark5:2 Yezu akigera imusozi
Mark5:3 Yiberaga mu irimbi kandi nta muntu n'umwe wari ugishobora kumuboha
Mark5:4 Akenshi bamubohaga amaguru bakoresheje ibyuma
Mark5:5 Ijoro n'amanywa yazereraga mu irimbi no ku misozi
Mark5:6 Akiri kure abona Yezu
Mark5:7 Maze avuga cyane aranguruye ijwi ati: “Uranshakaho iki
Mark5:8 Ibyo byatewe n'uko Yezu yari ategetse ati: “Ngabo ya Satani
Mark5:9 Yezu abaza uwo muntu ati: “Witwa nde?” Aramusubiza ati: “Nitwa Giteronyamwinshi
Mark5:10 Nuko yinginga Yezu cyane ngo ye kumenesha izo ngabo za Satani mu gihugu.
Mark5:11 Hafi aho ku musozi hari umugana munini w'ingurube zarishaga.
Mark5:12 Izo ngabo za Satani zinginga Yezu ziti: “Tureke twigire muri ziriya ngurube tuziberemo!”
Mark5:13 Arazemerera. Nuko ziva muri uwo muntu zinjira mu ngurube
Mark5:14 Abashumba bazo barahunga
Mark5:15 Bageze aho Yezu ari
Mark5:16 Ababibonye babatekerereza ibyabaye kuri uwo muntu wari warahanzweho
Mark5:17 Baherako binginga Yezu ngo abavire ku musozi.
Mark5:18 Yezu agiye mu bwato
Mark5:19 Yezu ntiyamwemerera ahubwo aramubwira ati: “Subira imuhira usange bene wanyu
Mark5:20 Nuko uwo muntu aragenda
Mark5:21 Hanyuma Yezu ajya mu bwato asubira hakurya. Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu yongera guteranira aho ari
Mark5:22 Haza umuntu witwaga Yayiro
Mark5:23 aramwinginga cyane ati: “Umukobwa wanjye arenda gupfa. Ndakwinginze ngwino umurambikeho ibiganza
Mark5:24 Nuko barajyana. Yezu aherekezwa n'abantu benshi bagenda bamubyiganiraho.
Mark5:25 Muri bo hari umugore wari urwaye indwara yo kuva
Mark5:26 Yarababaraga cyane
Mark5:27 Yumvise ibyo bavugaga kuri Yezu
Mark5:28 kuko yibwiraga ati: “Ninkora ku myambaro ye ndakira.”
Mark5:29 Amaraso ahita akama
Mark5:30 Ako kanya Yezu yiyumvamo ko hari imbaraga zimuvuyemo
Mark5:31 Abigishwa be baramusubiza bati: “Dorere! Abantu barakubyiganiraho nawe ukabaza ngo ‘Ni nde unkozeho?’ ”
Mark5:32 Yezu abararanganyamo amaso
Mark5:33 Wa mugore ashya ubwoba ahinda umushyitsi
Mark5:34 Yezu ni ko kumubwira ati: “Mwana wanjye
Mark5:35 Akivuga atyo haza intumwa zibwira wa mutware w'urusengero ziti: “Ko umukobwa wawe amaze gupfa
Mark5:36 Ariko Yezu yirengagiza ibyo bavuze
Mark5:37 Nuko ntiyagira uwo akundira kujyana na we
Mark5:38 Bageze mu rugo rw'uwo mutware w'urusengero
Mark5:39 Yinjiye mu nzu arababaza ati: “Ni iki gitumye musakuza? Murarizwa n'iki? Umwana ntiyapfuye
Mark5:40 Baramuseka cyane. Yezu ni ko guhēza abantu bose
Mark5:41 Amufata ukuboko aramubwira ati: “Talita kumi”
Mark5:42 Ako kanya uwo mukobwa arabyuka atangira kugenda
Mark5:43 Yezu arabihanangiriza ngo be kugira uwo bamenyesha ibibaye
Mark6:1 Yezu ava aho ngaho ajya mu mujyi w'iwabo. Abigishwa be bajyana na we.
Mark6:2 Isabato igeze ajya kwigishiriza mu rusengero. Abenshi bamwumvise baratangara cyane bati: “Mbese biriya byose abikomora he? Ubu bwenge yahawe ni bwenge ki? Ibi bitangaza byo abikora ate?
Mark6:3 Mbese si we wa mubaji mwene Mariya
Mark6:4 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati: “Nta handi umuhanuzi asuzugurwa uretse mu karere k'iwabo no muri bene wabo
Mark6:5 Ntiyashobora kugira igitangaza ahakorera
Mark6:6 Atangazwa n'uko batamwemeye. Yezu azenguruka ako karere kose yigisha
Mark6:7 Nuko ahamagara ba bigishwa be cumi na babiri
Mark6:8 Arabihanangiriza ati: “Ntimugire icyo mujyana
Mark6:9 Mwambare inkweto
Mark6:10 Urugo muzabonamo icumbi
Mark6:11 Ahantu hose batazabakira ntibabatege amatwi
Mark6:12 Nuko baragenda bajya kubwira abantu ko bagomba kwihana.
Mark6:13 Bamenesha ingabo nyinshi za Satani zari mu bantu
Mark6:14 Umwami Herodi yumva ibya Yezu
Mark6:15 Abandi bakavuga bati: “Ni Eliya.” Naho abandi bati: “Ni umuhanuzi kimwe n'abahanuzi ba kera.”
Mark6:16 Herodi na we abyumvise aravuga ati: “Ni Yohani! Namuciye igihanga none yazutse!”
Mark6:17 Koko kandi Herodi yari yaratumye abantu gufata Yohani
Mark6:18 Ni cyo cyatumaga Yohani abwira Herodi ati: “Ntibyemewe ko utunga umugore w'umuvandimwe wawe.”
Mark6:19 Kubera iyo mpamvu Herodiya arwara Yohani inzika
Mark6:20 Herodi yatinyaga Yohani akajya amurengera
Mark6:21 Nuko Herodi atumira abatware be n'abakuru b'abasirikari n'abanyacyubahiro bo muri Galileya
Mark6:22 Umukobwa we araza arabyina
Mark6:23 Ndetse aramurahira ati: “Icyo unsaba cyose ndakiguha
Mark6:24 Nuko uwo mukobwa arasohoka
Mark6:25 Ako kanya uwo mukobwa ariruka asanga umwami ati: “Ndashaka ko mumpa igihanga cya Yohani Mubatiza
Mark6:26 Umwami agira agahinda kenshi
Mark6:27 Ako kanya yohereza umusirikari
Mark6:28 akizana ku mbehe. Agiha uwo mukobwa
Mark6:29 Abigishwa ba Yohani bumvise ibyabaye
Mark6:30 Nuko Intumwa za Yezu zigaruka aho ari
Mark6:31 Arazibwira ati: “Nimuze tujye kwiherera ahantu hadatuwe muruhuke ho gato”
Mark6:32 Nuko bajya mu bwato bajya kwiherera ahantu hadatuwe.
Mark6:33 Benshi mu bababonye bagenda barabamenya. Nuko bava mu mijyi yaho yose
Mark6:34 Yezu ageze imusozi abona iyo mbaga y'abantu abagirira impuhwe
Mark6:35 Umunsi ukuze abigishwa be baramwegera
Mark6:36 Sezerera aba bantu bajye mu mihana no mu nsisiro za bugufi
Mark6:37 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ahubwo mube ari mwe mubafungurira.” Baramubaza bati: “Mbese uragira ngo dutange ay'igihembo cy'imibyizi magana abiri
Mark6:38 Na we arababaza ati: “Mufite imigati ingahe? Nimujye kureba.” Bamaze kubimenya baramubwira bati: “Hari itanu n'amafi abiri.”
Mark6:39 Nuko abategeka kwicaza abantu mu byatsi bitoshye
Mark6:40 Bicara mu matsinda
Mark6:41 Afata iyo migati itanu n'amafi abiri
Mark6:42 Nuko bose bararya barahaga.
Mark6:43 Bateranya utumanyu tw'imigati n'utw'amafi twasigaye
Mark6:44 Mu bariye
Mark6:45 Bikirangira Yezu ategeka abigishwa be kujya mu bwato
Mark6:46 Amaze kubasezerera azamuka umusozi ajya gusenga.
Mark6:47 Bumaze kwira ubwato bwari bugeze mu kiyaga hagati
Mark6:48 Abonye ko bagashya bibaruhije kuko umuyaga wabaturukaga imbere
Mark6:49 Bamubonye agenda ku mazi bakeka ko ari umuzimu bavuza induru
Mark6:50 kuko bose bamubonye bagakuka umutima cyane. Ako kanya Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimuhumure ni jye
Mark6:51 Abasanga mu bwato umuyaga urahosha
Mark6:52 N'igihe yatuburaga imigati ntibari basobanukiwe icyo bivuga
Mark6:53 Bamaze gufata hakurya mu ntara ya Genezareti
Mark6:54 Bakibuvamo abantu babona Yezu baramumenya.
Mark6:55 Bagenda bihuta bakwiza inkuru muri ako karere kose. Abantu bumvise aho Yezu ari
Mark6:56 Byongeye kandi aho yahingukaga hose
Mark7:1 Abafarizayi na bamwe mu bigishamategeko baturutse i Yeruzalemu bakikiza Yezu.
Mark7:2 Babona bamwe mu bigishwa be barisha intoki zanduye
Mark7:3 Koko kandi Abafarizayi kimwe n'abandi Bayahudi bose
Mark7:4 N'iyo bavuye mu isoko
Mark7:5 Noneho Abafarizayi n'abigishamategeko babaza Yezu bati: “Kuki abigishwa bawe batubahiriza umuhango wa ba sogokuruza
Mark7:6 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mwa ndyarya mwe
Mark7:7 Barushywa n'ubusa bansenga
Mark7:8 Yezu arakomeza ati: “Amategeko y'Imana muyarengaho
Mark7:9 Mwihatira kwirengagiza ibyo Imana yategetse
Mark7:10 Musa yaravuze ati: ‘Ujye wubaha so na nyoko’
Mark7:11 Naho mwebwe muvuga ko umuntu ashobora kubwira se cyangwa nyina ati: ‘Icyo najyaga kugufashisha ni “Korubani” (ni ukuvuga ituro ryagenewe Imana)’.
Mark7:12 Bityo mukaba mutakimukundiye kugifashisha se cyangwa nyina
Mark7:13 mukaba muhinduye ubusa Amategeko y'Imana kubera imihango yababayemo akarande. Hariho kandi n'ibindi byinshi bene nk'ibyo mukora.”
Mark7:14 Nuko Yezu yongera guhamagara rubanda arababwira ati: “Nimuntege amatwi mwese kandi musobanukirwe ibi:
Mark7:15 nta cyinjira mu muntu kivuye inyuma cyamuhumanya. Ahubwo ikiva mu muntu ni cyo kimuhumanya. [
Mark7:16 Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!]”
Mark7:17 Yezu amaze gutandukana na rubanda asubira imuhira
Mark7:18 Arababwira ati: “Mbese namwe muri abaswa bigeze aho? Ese ntimuramenya ko nta cyinjira mu muntu kivuye hanze kimuhumanya?
Mark7:19 Si mu mutima kiba kigiye ahubwo kiba kigiye mu nda
Mark7:20 Arongera aravuga ati: “Ikiva mu muntu ni cyo kimuhumanya
Mark7:21 kuko mu mitima y'abantu ari ho hava imigambi mibi: ubusambanyi n'ubujura n'ubwicanyi
Mark7:22 
Mark7:23 Ibyo bibi byose biva mu muntu imbere ni byo bimuhumanya.”
Mark7:24 Nuko Yezu arahaguruka ajya mu karere gahereranye n'umujyi wa Tiri
Mark7:25 Umugore wari ufite akana k'agakobwa kahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani
Mark7:26 Uwo mugore yari umunyamahangakazi w'i Fenisiya ho muri Siriya. Nuko asaba Yezu kumenesha iyo ngabo ya Satani yari mu mukobwa we.
Mark7:27 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Reka abana babanze bahage
Mark7:28 Umugore aramusubiza ati: “Ni koko Nyagasani
Mark7:29 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Kuko uvuze utyo igendere
Mark7:30 Asubiye imuhira asanga wa mwana aryamye ku buriri
Mark7:31 Yezu avuye mu karere k'i Tiri
Mark7:32 Nuko bamuzanira umuntu w'igipfamatwi cy'ikiragi
Mark7:33 Yezu amuvana mu ruhame rw'abantu amushyira ukwe
Mark7:34 Hanyuma yubura amaso areba ku ijuru
Mark7:35 Ako kanya amatwi ye arazibuka
Mark7:36 Yezu arabihanangiriza ngo ntibagire uwo babibwira. Ariko uko yababuzaga kubivuga
Mark7:37 Abantu baratangara bikomeye baravugana bati: “Ibintu byose yabikoze neza! Yatumye ibipfamatwi byumva
Mark8:1 Muri iyo minsi abantu benshi bongera guterana ariko nta mpamba bafite. Nuko Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be arababwira ati:
Mark8:2 “Aba bantu barambabaje
Mark8:3 Nimbasezerera badafunguye inzara irabatsinda ku nzira
Mark8:4 Abigishwa be baramubaza bati: “Twakura he ibyahaza aba bantu
Mark8:5 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mufite imigati ingahe?” Bati: “Dufite irindwi.”
Mark8:6 Nuko ategeka abantu kwicara hasi maze afata iyo migati uko ari irindwi
Mark8:7 Bari bafite n'udufi duke
Mark8:8 Bararya barahaga
Mark8:9 Abariye bari ibihumbi bine. Nuko Yezu arabasezerera
Mark8:10 aherako ajya mu bwato hamwe n'abigishwa be
Mark8:11 Abafarizayi baraza batangira kugisha Yezu impaka. Bamusaba ikimenyetso cyo kubemeza ko yatumwe n'Imana
Mark8:12 Maze asuhuza umutima ababaye aravuga ati: “Abantu b'iki gihe bashakira iki ikimenyetso? Ndababwira nkomeje ko nta kimenyetso bazahabwa.”
Mark8:13 Nuko abasiga aho yurira ubwato asubira hakurya.
Mark8:14 Abigishwa ba Yezu bari bibagiwe kujyana imigati
Mark8:15 Yezu arabihanangiriza ati: “Muramenye mujye mwirinda umusemburo w'Abafarizayi n'umusemburo wa Herodi!”
Mark8:16 Bo rero baravugana bati: “Ubanza ari uko tudafite imigati!”
Mark8:17 Yezu amenye ibyo bavugana arababaza ati: “Ni iki gituma mujya impaka ngo nta migati mufite? Mbese n'ubu nta cyo muriyumvisha? Ese ntimurasobanukirwa? Mbese imitima yanyu iracyahumye?
Mark8:18 Ese mugira amaso ntimubone
Mark8:19 igihe namanyuraga imigati itanu
Mark8:20 Arababaza ati: “Naho se igihe namanyuraga n'imigati irindwi tukayikwiza abantu ibihumbi bine
Mark8:21 Arababwira ati: “None se ntimurasobanukirwa?”
Mark8:22 Bageze i Betsayida abantu bazanira Yezu umugabo w'impumyi
Mark8:23 Yezu amufata ukuboko amujyana ahitaruye ingo
Mark8:24 Uwo muntu arakanura ati: “Ndabona abantu bagenda
Mark8:25 Yezu yongera kumurambika ibiganza ku maso. Noneho arambura amaso cyane arahumuka
Mark8:26 Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati: “Itahire ntusubire muri ziriya ngo.”
Mark8:27 Nyuma Yezu ajyana n'abigishwa be mu mirenge yo hafi y'i Kayizariya ya Filipo. Bakiri mu nzira abaza abigishwa be ati: “Abantu bavuga ko ndi nde?”
Mark8:28 Baramusubiza bati: “Bamwe bavuga ko uri Yohani Mubatiza
Mark8:29 Nuko Yezu arababaza ati: “Mwebwe se muvuga ko ndi nde?” Petero aramusubiza ati: “Uri Kristo.”
Mark8:30 Yezu arabihanangiriza ngo be kugira uwo bahingukiriza ibye.
Mark8:31 Yezu atangira kwigisha abigishwa be ko ari ngombwa ko Umwana w'umuntu ababazwa cyane
Mark8:32 Ayo magambo Yezu yayavugaga yeruye. Nuko Petero aramwihererana
Mark8:33 Yezu arahindukira areba abigishwa be
Mark8:34 Noneho Yezu ahamagara rubanda n'abigishwa be
Mark8:35 Ushaka gukiza ubuzima bwe azabubura
Mark8:36 Mbese umuntu byamumarira iki kwigarurira isi yose
Mark8:37 Cyangwa se ubugingo bw'umuntu yabugurana iki?
Mark8:38 Umuntu wese ugira isoni zo kunyemera no kwemera inyigisho zanjye imbere y'abantu b'iki gihe b'abasambanyi n'abagizi ba nabi
Mark9:1 Arongera arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko bamwe mu bari aha
Mark9:2 Iminsi itandatu ishize Yezu ajyana Petero na Yakobo na Yohani
Mark9:3 imyambaro ye irererana ku buryo nta mumeshi wo ku isi wayeza atyo.
Mark9:4 Bagiye kubona babona Eliya na Musa baganira na Yezu.
Mark9:5 Petero abwira Yezu ati: “Mwigisha
Mark9:6 Ubwo kwari ukubura icyo avuga kubera ubwoba bwinshi bagize.
Mark9:7 Nuko igicu kirabatwikīra
Mark9:8 Bigeze aho abigishwa bakebuka hirya no hino
Mark9:9 Bakimanuka umusozi arabihanangiriza ati: “Ntimugire uwo mubwira ibyo mwabonye
Mark9:10 Iryo jambo bakomeza kurizirikana
Mark9:11 Nuko babaza Yezu bati: “Kuki abigishamategeko bavuga ko Eliya agomba kubanza kuza?”
Mark9:12 Arabasubiza ati: “Ni koko Eliya agomba kubanza kuza
Mark9:13 Reka mbabwire: koko Eliya yaraje kandi abantu bamugiriye uko bishakiye nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga.”
Mark9:14 Bageze aho abigishwa bari bahasanga imbaga nyamwinshi ibakikije
Mark9:15 Abantu bamubonye bose birabatangaza cyane
Mark9:16 Arababaza ati: “Nsanze mujya impaka na bariya ku byerekeye iki?”
Mark9:17 Umwe mu bari aho aramubwira ati: “Mwigisha
Mark9:18 Aho imufatiye hose imutura hasi
Mark9:19 Yezu arababwira ati: “Yemwe bantu b'iki gihe mutizera Imana
Mark9:20 Baramuzana. Umwana akirabukwa Yezu
Mark9:21 Yezu abaza se w'uwo mwana ati: “Ibi abimaranye igihe kingana iki?” Undi ati: “Byamufashe akiri muto.
Mark9:22 Ni kenshi ingabo ya Satani yamutuye mu muriro no mu mazi
Mark9:23 Yezu ati: “Ugize ngo iki? Uvuze ngo niba hari icyo nabasha gukora…! Erega byose bishobokera uwizera Imana!”
Mark9:24 Ako kanya se w'umwana avuga cyane ati: “Ndizeye! Ngoboka unkize kutizera!”
Mark9:25 Yezu abonye abantu benshi bahuruye
Mark9:26 Nuko imaze kuvuza induru no kumutigisa bikabije imuvamo. Umwana asigara ameze nk'uwapfuye
Mark9:27 Ariko Yezu amufata ukuboko aramubyutsa
Mark9:28 Yezu ageze imuhira abigishwa be bamubaza biherereye bati: “Kuki twe tutabashije kuyimenesha?”
Mark9:29 Arabasubiza ati: “Bene iyo ngabo ntimeneshwa n'ikindi kitari ugusenga.”
Mark9:30 Bava aho ngaho banyura muri Galileya
Mark9:31 kuko yigishaga abigishwa be agira ati: “Umwana w'umuntu azagabizwa abantu bamwice
Mark9:32 Abigishwa be ntibasobanukirwa iryo jambo
Mark9:33 Baza i Kafarinawumu. Bageze imuhira Yezu arababaza ati: “Igihe mwari mu nzira mwajyaga impaka zerekeye iki?”
Mark9:34 Baricecekera kuko mu nzira bahoze biburanya
Mark9:35 Nuko Yezu aricara arembuza ba bandi cumi na babiri
Mark9:36 Ni ko kuzana umwana amushyira hagati yabo
Mark9:37 “Umuntu wese wakīra umwe muri aba bana kubera jye ni jye aba yakiriye
Mark9:38 Nuko Yohani abwira Yezu ati: “Mwigisha
Mark9:39 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ntimukamubuze
Mark9:40 Burya utaturwanya aba ari uwacu.
Mark9:41 Umuntu wese uzaza mu izina ryanjye
Mark9:42 “Nihagira ugusha mu cyaha umwe muri aba bato banyemera
Mark9:43 Niba ikiganza cyawe cyakugusha mu cyaha ugice. Icyaruta ni uko wakwinjira ahari ubugingo buhoraho ufite ikiganza kimwe
Mark9:44 Aho hantu
Mark9:45 Niba ikirenge cyawe cyakugusha mu cyaha ugice. Icyaruta ni uko wakwinjira ahari ubugingo buhoraho ufite ikirenge kimwe
Mark9:46 Aho hantu
Mark9:47 Niba ijisho ryawe ryakugusha mu cyaha urinogore. Icyaruta ni uko wakwinjira mu bwami bw'Imana ufite ijisho rimwe
Mark9:48 Aho hantu
Mark9:49 Koko buri muntu
Mark9:50 Umunyu ni ingirakamaro
Mark10:1 Hanyuma Yezu ava aho ngaho ajya mu ntara ya Yudeya
Mark10:2 Abafarizayi bazanwa no kumutegera mu byo avuga. Baramubaza bati: “Mbese biremewe ko umugabo yirukana umugore we?”
Mark10:3 Na we arababaza ati: “Musa yabategetse iki?”
Mark10:4 Baramusubiza bati: “Musa yahaye umugabo uruhushya rwo kwirukana umugore we
Mark10:5 Yezu arababwira ati: “Icyatumye Musa abandikira iryo tegeko ni uko imitima yanyu inangiye.
Mark10:6 Ariko mbere na mbere
Mark10:7 ‘Ni cyo gituma umugabo azasiga se na nyina akabana n'umugore we akaramata
Mark10:8 bombi bakaba umuntu umwe’
Mark10:9 Nuko rero ntihakagire umuntu utandukanya abo Imana yafatanyije.”
Mark10:10 Bageze imuhira abigishwa bongera kumusobanuza ibyo yavuze.
Mark10:11 Arababwira ati: “Umugabo wese wirukana umugore we maze akazana undi
Mark10:12 N'umugore wahukana n'umugabo we agashaka undi mugabo
Mark10:13 Abantu bazanira Yezu abana bato ngo abakoreho
Mark10:14 Yezu abibonye biramurakaza
Mark10:15 Ndababwira nkomeje ko utākira ubwami bw'Imana nk'uko umwana muto abwākira
Mark10:16 Nuko ahobera abo bana
Mark10:17 Yezu agihaguruka aho umuntu aza yiruka
Mark10:18 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Unyitiye iki mwiza? Nta mwiza n'umwe ubaho uretse Imana yonyine.
Mark10:19 Uzi Amategeko ngo ntukice
Mark10:20 Undi ati: “Mwigisha
Mark10:21 Nuko Yezu amwitegereje aramukunda. Ni ko kumubwira ati: “Icyakora ushigaje kimwe
Mark10:22 Uwo muntu yumvise iryo jambo arasuherwa
Mark10:23 Yezu areba abigishwa be arababwira ati: “Mbega ukuntu biruhije abakungu kwinjira mu bwami bw'Imana!”
Mark10:24 Abigishwa be bumvise ibyo baratangara. Nuko Yezu yungamo ati: “Bana banjye
Mark10:25 Icyoroshye ni uko ingamiya yanyura mu mwenge w'urushinge
Mark10:26 Abigishwa be barushaho gutangara
Mark10:27 Yezu arabitegereza arababwira ati: “Koko ku bantu ni ibidashoboka
Mark10:28 Nuko Petero aramubwira ati: “Twebwe twasize byose turagukurikira.”
Mark10:29 Yezu ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko umuntu wese wasize urugo cyangwa abavandimwe
Mark10:30 muri iki gihe uwo muntu azahabwa ibiruta ibyo incuro ijana. Azahabwa ingo n'abavandimwe na ba nyina n'abana n'amasambu
Mark10:31 Ikindi kandi hari benshi mu b'imbere bazaba ab'inyuma
Mark10:32 Ubwo bari mu nzira bagana i Yeruzalemu
Mark10:33 “Dore tugiye i Yeruzalemu
Mark10:34 bamushinyagurire
Mark10:35 Hanyuma Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi baramwegera
Mark10:36 Arababaza ati: “Murashaka ko mbakorera iki?”
Mark10:37 Baramusubiza bati: “Uduhe kuzicarana nawe ku ntebe za cyami
Mark10:38 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ntabwo muzi icyo musaba. Mbese mwashobora kunywera ku gikombe cy'umubabaro ngomba kunywa? Ese mwashobora kubatizwa mu mubabaro kimwe nanjye?”
Mark10:39 Baramusubiza bati: “Twabishobora.” Nuko Yezu arababwira ati: “Ni koko igikombe cyanjye muzakinyweraho
Mark10:40 naho gutanga ibyicaro iburyo cyangwa ibumoso bwanjye
Mark10:41 Bagenzi babo uko ari icumi babyumvise
Mark10:42 Yezu arabarembuza arababwira ati: “Muzi ko abahawe gutegeka amahanga bayatwaza igitugu
Mark10:43 Ariko muri mwe ntibikagende bityo. Ahubwo ushaka kuba mukuru muri mwe agomba kujya abakorera
Mark10:44 kandi ushaka kuba uw'imbere muri mwe agomba kuba umugaragu wa bose.
Mark10:45 Umwana w'umuntu na we ntiyazanywe no gukorerwa
Mark10:46 Hanyuma bagera i Yeriko. Nuko Yezu n'abigishwa be bahavana n'imbaga y'abantu benshi. Basanga umuntu w'impumyi witwaga Barutimeyo mwene Timeyo
Mark10:47 Yumvise ko Yezu w'i Nazareti aje
Mark10:48 Benshi baramucyaha ngo aceceke! Ariko we arushaho kurangurura ati: “Mwene Dawidi
Mark10:49 Nuko Yezu arahagarara aravuga ati: “Nimumuhamagare.” Bahamagara iyo mpumyi barayibwira bati: “Haguruka vuba araguhamagaye!”
Mark10:50 Ijugunya umwitero wayo
Mark10:51 Yezu abaza uwo muntu ati: “Urashaka ko ngukorera iki?” Aramusubiza ati: “Mwigisha
Mark10:52 Yezu ati: “Igendere
Mark11:1 Begereye i Betifage n'i Betaniya
Mark11:2 ati: “Mujye muri ziriya ngo
Mark11:3 Nihagira ubabaza ati: ‘Murakora ibiki?’
Mark11:4 Baragenda koko basanga icyana cy'indogobe kiziritse ku irembo
Mark11:5 Bamwe mu bari bahari barababaza bati: “Murakora ibiki? Iyo ndogobe murayiziturira iki?”
Mark11:6 Abigishwa babasubiza uko Yezu yari yababwiye. Nuko barabihorera.
Mark11:7 Icyana cy'indogobe bakizanira Yezu
Mark11:8 Abantu benshi barambura imyitero yabo mu nzira
Mark11:9 Abari imbere ye n'abari inyuma barangurura amajwi bati: “Hozana! Hasingizwe uje mu izina rya Nyagasani!
Mark11:10 Hasingizwe ingoma y'umubyeyi wacu Dawidi igiye kuza! Mu ijuru nibasingize Imana bati: ‘Hozana!’ ”
Mark11:11 Nuko Yezu ageze i Yeruzalemu
Mark11:12 Bukeye bwaho bavuye i Betaniya
Mark11:13 Akiri kure arabukwa igiti cy'umutini gitoshye. Aracyegera ngo arebe ko hari imbuto yakibonaho
Mark11:14 Arakibwira ati: “Ntihakagire umuntu urya imbuto zawe ukundi!” Abigishwa be bumva abivuga.
Mark11:15 Baragenda bagera i Yeruzalemu. Yezu yinjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Mark11:16 kandi abuza abikoreraga ibintu kunyura mu rugo rw'Ingoro.
Mark11:17 Nuko arabigisha ati: “Mbese Ibyanditswe ntibivuga ngo: ‘Inzu yanjye izitwa Inzu isengerwamo n'amahanga yose’? Ariko mwe mwayigize indiri y'abajura.”
Mark11:18 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko babyumvise bashaka uburyo bwo kumwica
Mark11:19 Bumaze kwira Yezu n'abigishwa be bava mu murwa.
Mark11:20 Kare mu gitondo banyura hafi ya cya giti cy'umutini
Mark11:21 Petero yibuka ibyabaye
Mark11:22 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati: “Mujye mwizera Imana!
Mark11:23 Ndababwira nkomeje ko uwizera Imana ashobora kubwira uriya musozi ati: ‘Shyiguka aho wirohe mu nyanja!’ Niyizera adashidikanya ko ibyo avuze biba bizaba.
Mark11:24 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira nti ‘Icyo musabye cyose musenga
Mark11:25 N'igihe muhagaze musenga
Mark11:26 Naho nimutababarira abandi
Mark11:27 Nyuma y'ibyo basubira i Yeruzalemu. Ubwo Yezu yagendagendaga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Mark11:28 Nuko baramubaza bati: “Uvana he ubushobozi bwo gukora ibyo ukora? Ni nde wabuguhaye?”
Mark11:29 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Nanjye reka mbibarize ikibazo kimwe
Mark11:30 Mbese Yohani yatumwe n'Imana kubatiza
Mark11:31 Bajya inama bati: “Nituvuga ko yatumwe n'Imana
Mark11:32 Na none kandi nituvuga ko yatumwe n'abantu
Mark11:33 Nuko basubiza Yezu bati: “Ntitubizi.” Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nanjye rero simbabwiye aho nkura ubushobozi bwo gukora ibyo nkora.”
Mark12:1 Hanyuma Yezu atangira kubigisha abaciriye imigani
Mark12:2 Igihe kigeze atuma umugaragu kuri ba bahinzi
Mark12:3 Baramusumira baramuhondagura
Mark12:4 Nyir'imizabibu yongera kubatumaho undi mugaragu
Mark12:5 Nuko yohereza undi na we baramwica. Nyuma yohereza abandi benshi
Mark12:6 “Umuntu yari asigaranye ni umwe gusa
Mark12:7 Abahinzi ngo babone uwo mwana baravugana bati: ‘Dore uwarazwe ibintu araje! Nimuze tumwice maze byose bizabe ibyacu.’
Mark12:8 Baramusumira baramwica
Mark12:9 “Mbese mubona nyir'imizabibu azakora iki? Azaza atsembe abo bahinzi
Mark12:10 Mbese ntimwasomye Ibyanditswe? Biravuga ngo: ‘Ibuye abubatsi banze
Mark12:11 Ibyo ni Nyagasani wabikoze
Mark12:12 Ba bakuru bumvise neza ko uwo mugani ari bo werekezagaho
Mark12:13 Hanyuma bamutumaho bamwe mu Bafarizayi n'abo mu ishyaka rya Herodi
Mark12:14 Bakihagera baramubwira bati: “Mwigisha
Mark12:15 Ariko kuko Yezu yari azi uburyarya bwabo
Mark12:16 Bakimuzaniye arababaza ati: “Iyi shusho n'iri zina biriho ni ibya nde?” Baramusubiza bati: “Ni iby'umwami w'i Roma.”
Mark12:17 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Iby'umwami w'i Roma mubihe umwami w'i Roma
Mark12:18 Abasaduseyi (abo ni bo bavuga ko kuzuka bitabaho) basanga Yezu baramubwira bati:
Mark12:19 “Mwigisha
Mark12:20 Habayeho rero abavandimwe barindwi. Uwa mbere ashaka umugore maze apfa batabyaranye.
Mark12:21 Uwa kabiri acyura uwo mupfakazi
Mark12:22 Bose uko ari barindwi bapfa ntawe umubyayeho umwana. Amaherezo
Mark12:23 Mbese igihe abantu bazazuka
Mark12:24 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mwarayobye
Mark12:25 Erega igihe abapfuye bazazuka ntawe uzagira umugore
Mark12:26 Ku byerekeye izuka ry'abapfuye
Mark12:27 Erega Imana si iy'abapfuye
Mark12:28 Umwe mu bigishamategeko aramwegera yumva bajya izo mpaka. Abonye ko Yezu abashubije neza aramubaza ati: “Itegeko riruta ayandi yose ni irihe?”
Mark12:29 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Irya mbere ni iri: ‘Isiraheli we
Mark12:30 Ukunde Nyagasani Imana yawe n'umutima wawe wose n'ubuzima bwawe bwose
Mark12:31 Irya kabiri ni iri: ‘Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.’ Nta rindi tegeko riruta ayo yombi.”
Mark12:32 Uwo mwigishamategeko aramubwira ati: “Ni koko Mwigisha
Mark12:33 Koko kandi umuntu akwiriye kuyikundisha umutima we wose n'ubwenge bwe bwose n'imbaraga ze zose
Mark12:34 Yezu abonye amushubije neza aramubwira ati: “Ntabwo uri kure y'ubwami bw'Imana.” Nuko ntihagira undi uhangara kugira ikindi amubaza.
Mark12:35 Igihe Yezu yigishirizaga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Mark12:36 Dawidi ubwe abihishuriwe na Mwuka Muziranenge
Mark12:37 None se ubwo Dawidi ubwe yita Kristo umwami we
Mark12:38 Mu nyigisho ze Yezu yaravuze ati: “Murajye mwirinda abigishamategeko bakunda gutembera bambaye amakanzu meza
Mark12:39 Bakunda kandi guhabwa intebe z'icyubahiro mu nsengero n'ibyicaro by'imbere aho batumiwe.
Mark12:40 Barya ingo z'abapfakazi
Mark12:41 Yezu yari yicaye mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana ahateganye n'ububiko bashyiragamo amaturo
Mark12:42 Nuko haza umupfakazi w'umukene
Mark12:43 Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko uriya mupfakazi w'umukene arushije abandi bose gutura.
Mark12:44 Bariya bose batanze ku bibasagutse
Mark13:1 Yezu asohotse mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Mark13:2 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ntureba iyi nyubako y'agatangaza? Nta buye rizasigara rigeretse ku rindi
Mark13:3 Nuko Yezu yicara ku Musozi w'Iminzenze ahateganye n'Ingoro y'Imana
Mark13:4 “Tubwire igihe ibyo bizabera
Mark13:5 Yezu afata ijambo ati: “Muramenye ntihazagire ubayobya
Mark13:6 kuko hazaduka benshi biyita izina ryanjye bavuga bati: ‘Ni jye Kristo’
Mark13:7 Nimwumva urusaku rw'intambara ziri hafi n'amakuru y'intambara za kure
Mark13:8 Igihugu kizarwana n'ikindi
Mark13:9 “Namwe ubwanyu
Mark13:10 Icyakora ni ngombwa ko Ubutumwa bwiza bubanza kwamamazwa mu bihugu byose.
Mark13:11 Byongeye kandi igihe bazabarega mu nkiko
Mark13:12 Umuntu azicisha umuvandimwe we
Mark13:13 Muzangwa n'abantu bose babampōra
Mark13:14 “Nimubona cya ‘Giterashozi kirimbuzi’ gihagaze aho kitagomba kuba – usoma ibi abyumve neza – icyo gihe abazaba bari muri Yudeya bazahungire mu misozi.
Mark13:15 Uzaba ari hejuru y'inzu
Mark13:16 N'uzaba ari mu murima ntazasubire imuhira gushaka umwitero we.
Mark13:17 Hagowe abazaba batwite cyangwa bonsa muri iyo minsi!
Mark13:18 Musabe Imana ibyo bye kuzaba mu mezi y'imbeho
Mark13:19 kuko muri iyo minsi hazaba amakuba akabije atigeze abaho kuva isi yaremwa kugeza ubu
Mark13:20 Iyo Nyagasani atagabanya iyo minsi
Mark13:21 Icyo gihe rero
Mark13:22 Hazaduka abiyita Kristo n'abiyita abahanuzi. Bazerekana ibimenyetso bakore n'ibitangaza
Mark13:23 Mwebwe rero murabe maso
Mark13:24 “Ariko muri iyo minsi
Mark13:25 inyenyeri zihanantuke ku ijuru
Mark13:26 Ubwo ni bwo abantu bazabona Umwana w'umuntu aje mu bicu
Mark13:27 Ni bwo azatuma abamarayika gukoranya abo yitoranyirije babavane iburasirazuba n'iburengerazuba
Mark13:28 “Murebere ku giti cy'umutini kibabere urugero: iyo mubonye amashami yacyo atoshye akameraho ibibabi
Mark13:29 Ni na ko rero igihe muzabona ibyo nababwiye bibaye
Mark13:30 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ab'iki gihe batazashira ibyo byose bitabaye.
Mark13:31 Ijuru n'isi bizashira
Mark13:32 “Icyakora
Mark13:33 Muramenye rero mube maso [musenge
Mark13:34 Byagereranywa n'umuntu wagiye mu rugendo agasigira abagaragu urugo rwe
Mark13:35 Murabe maso rero kuko mutazi igihe nyir'urugo azahindukirira
Mark13:36 Muramenye atazabatungura agasanga musinziriye.
Mark13:37 Ibyo mbabwiye ndabibwira bose: mube maso!”
Mark14:1 Hari hasigaye iminsi ibiri ngo habe umunsi mukuru wa Pasika y'Abayahudi
Mark14:2 Icyakora bakavuga bati: “Ntituzamufate mu minsi mikuru
Mark14:3 Igihe Yezu yari i Betaniya kwa Simoni umubembe afungura
Mark14:4 Bamwe mu bari aho bararakara baravugana bati: “Ariya marashi ayapfushirije iki ubusa?
Mark14:5 Mbese ntiyari kugurishwa amafaranga arenga igihembo cy'imibyizi magana atatu
Mark14:6 Ariko Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimumureke! Muramuhora iki kandi icyo ankoreye ari cyiza?
Mark14:7 Abakene muhorana na bo aho mwashakira mwabagirira neza
Mark14:8 Akoze ibyo ashoboye nubwo igihe kitaragera
Mark14:9 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ku isi yose aho Ubutumwa bwiza buzamamazwa
Mark14:10 Yuda Isikariyoti
Mark14:11 Babyumvise baranezerwa
Mark14:12 Umunsi wa mbere w'Iminsi mikuru y'Imigati idasembuye
Mark14:13 Yezu atuma babiri mu bigishwa be ati: “Nimujye mu mujyi
Mark14:14 Inzu ari bujyemo mubwire nyirayo muti: ‘Umwigisha akudutumyeho ngo utwereke icyumba wamuteguriye
Mark14:15 Na we ari bubereke icyumba kigari mu igorofa yo hejuru kirimo ibyicaro kandi giteguye
Mark14:16 Ba bigishwa baragenda bajya mu mujyi basanga bimeze nk'uko yabibabwiye
Mark14:17 Bugorobye Yezu azana n'abigishwa be cumi na babiri.
Mark14:18 Nuko mu gihe bafungura Yezu aravuga ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko umwe muri mwe dusangira agiye kungambanira.”
Mark14:19 Batangira kubabara no kumubaza umwe umwe bati: “Mbese ni jye?”
Mark14:20 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ni umwe muri mwe cumi na babiri
Mark14:21 Koko Umwana w'umuntu agiye kwicwa nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga kuri we. Nyamara ugiye kumugambanira azabona ishyano
Mark14:22 Igihe bafunguraga Yezu afata umugati
Mark14:23 Afata n'igikombe ashimira Imana
Mark14:24 Nuko arababwira ati: “Aya ni amaraso yanjye ahamya Isezerano Imana igiranye n'abayo
Mark14:25 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ntazongera kunywa divayi
Mark14:26 Nuko bamaze kuririmba
Mark14:27 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ibigiye kumbaho biri bubace intege mwese
Mark14:28 Ariko nimara kuzuka muzansanga muri Galileya.”
Mark14:29 Petero aramubwira ati: “Ibigiye kukubaho naho bose byabaca intege
Mark14:30 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ndakubwira nkomeje ko muri iri joro
Mark14:31 Ariko Petero we arushaho kwemeza ati: “Naho byatuma mpfana nawe
Mark14:32 Hanyuma bajya ahantu hitwa Getsemani. Bahageze Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Nimube mwicaye hano igihe nsenga.”
Mark14:33 Ajyana na Petero na Yakobo na Yohani
Mark14:34 Arababwira ati: “Agahinda mfite karenda kunyica. Nimugume hano mube maso.”
Mark14:35 Nuko yigira imbere gato yikubita hasi yubamye
Mark14:36 Aravuga ati: “Aba”
Mark14:37 Hanyuma araza asanga abigishwa be basinziriye
Mark14:38 Mube maso kandi musenge
Mark14:39 Asubirayo yongera gusenga
Mark14:40 Ahindukiye asanga na none basinziriye
Mark14:41 Agarutse ubwa gatatu arababaza ati: “Mbese muracyasinziriye? Muriruhukiye? Yemwe
Mark14:42 Nimuhaguruke tugende dore ungambanira araje.”
Mark14:43 Uwo mwanya akivuga ibyo
Mark14:44 Uwamugambaniraga yari yabahaye ikimenyetso ati: “Uwo nza kuramutsa nkamusoma araba ari we
Mark14:45 Ako kanya Yuda asanga Yezu aramusuhuza ati: “Mwiriwe Mwigisha.” Nuko aramusoma.
Mark14:46 Nuko ba bantu bahita basumira Yezu
Mark14:47 Umuntu umwe mu bari aho akura inkota
Mark14:48 Yezu arababaza ati: “Kuki muje kumfata mwitwaje inkota n'amahiri nk'abagiye gufata igisambo?
Mark14:49 Iminsi yose nari kumwe namwe mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana nigisha
Mark14:50 Abigishwa be bose baramutererana barahunga.
Mark14:51 Umusore umwe yari amukurikiye yifubitse umwenda
Mark14:52 basigarana umwenda we ahunga yambaye ubusa.
Mark14:53 Nuko bajyana Yezu ku Mutambyi mukuru
Mark14:54 Ubwo Petero amukurikirira kure
Mark14:55 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abandi bose bagize urukiko rw'ikirenga
Mark14:56 Icyakora habonetse benshi bamushinja ibinyoma
Mark14:57 Bamwe barahaguruka bamushinja ibinyoma bati:
Mark14:58 “Twamwumvise avuga ngo ‘Nzasenya iyi Ngoro yubatswe n'abantu
Mark14:59 Nyamara no kuri iyo ngingo ibirego byabo ntibyari bihuye.
Mark14:60 Noneho Umutambyi mukuru arahaguruka ahagarara mu ruhame. Abaza Yezu ati: “Ko nta cyo usubiza ku byo aba bantu bagushinja?”
Mark14:61 Yezu aricecekera ntiyagira icyo asubiza. Nuko Umutambyi mukuru yongera kumubaza ati: “Harya ni wowe Kristo Umwana wa Nyir'ugusingizwa?”
Mark14:62 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ndi we. Byongeye kandi
Mark14:63 Umutambyi mukuru ni ko gushishimura imyambaro ye kugira ngo agaragaze ko bimushegeshe
Mark14:64 Mwiyumviye uko atuka Imana! Murabitekerezaho iki?” Bose bamucira urwo gupfa.
Mark14:65 Nuko bamwe batangira kumuvundereza amacandwe
Mark14:66 Icyo gihe Petero yari hanze mu rugo. Nuko haza umwe mu baja b'Umutambyi mukuru
Mark14:67 abonye Petero yota aramwitegereza
Mark14:68 Petero aramuhakanira ati: “Sinumva na busa icyo ushaka kuvuga!” Maze arasohoka ageze ku marembo [inkoko irabika].
Mark14:69 Wa muja yongeye kumubona abwira abari aho ati: “Uyu ni umwe muri bo.”
Mark14:70 Petero yongera guhakana. Hashize akanya abari aho bongera kumubwira bati: “Ni ukuri nawe uri uwo muri bo
Mark14:71 Nuko Petero atangira kwivuma no gucurikiranya indahiro ati: “Uwo muntu muvuga simuzi!”
Mark14:72 Ako kanya inkoko ibika ubwa kabiri. Petero ni ko kwibuka ijambo Yezu yari yamubwiye ati: “Inkoko irajya kubika kabiri umaze kunyihakana gatatu.” Nuko araturika ararira.
Mark15:1 Igitondo gitangaje abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango n'abigishamategeko
Mark15:2 Nuko Pilato aramubaza ati: “Ni wowe mwami w'Abayahudi?” Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Urabyivugiye.”
Mark15:3 Abakuru bo mu batambyi bamurega ibirego byinshi.
Mark15:4 Pilato yongera kumubaza ati: “Ko nta cyo usubiza? Ese ntiwumva ko ibyo bakurega ari byinshi?”
Mark15:5 Yezu ntiyongera kugira icyo asubiza
Mark15:6 Ku munsi mukuru wa Pasika
Mark15:7 Icyo gihe muri gereza hari abari barishe abantu mu myivumbagatanyo yo kugomera Abanyaroma
Mark15:8 Rubanda ni ko kuzamuka basanga Pilato
Mark15:9 Arababaza ati: “Murashaka ko mbarekurira umwami w'Abayahudi?”
Mark15:10 Pilato yari azi ko abakuru bo mu batambyi bamugabije Yezu babitewe n'ishyari.
Mark15:11 Ariko abakuru bo mu batambyi boshya rubanda gusaba Pilato ngo abarekurire Baraba.
Mark15:12 Pilato yongera kubabaza ati: “None se uwo mwita umwami w'Abayahudi mugire nte?”
Mark15:13 Bamusubiza baranguruye amajwi bati: “Mubambe ku musaraba!”
Mark15:14 Pilato arababaza ati: “Kuki? Icyaha yakoze ni ikihe?” Barushaho gusakuza bati: “Mubambe!”
Mark15:15 Pilato ashaka gushimisha rubanda
Mark15:16 Abasirikari bamujyana mu gikari cy'ingoro y'umutegetsi
Mark15:17 Bambika Yezu umwitero w'umutuku wijimye
Mark15:18 Biha kumuramya bati: “Urakarama Mwami w'Abayahudi!”
Mark15:19 Bamara umwanya bamukubita ikibingo mu mutwe
Mark15:20 Nuko bamaze kumushinyagurira batyo
Mark15:21 Bakigenda bahura n'umuntu w'i Sirene witwaga Simoni
Mark15:22 Bajyana Yezu ahitwa i Gologota
Mark15:23 Bamuha divayi ivanzemo umuti wo koroshya uburibwe
Mark15:24 Nuko bamubamba ku musaraba
Mark15:25 Igihe bamubambaga ku musaraba hari isaa tatu.
Mark15:26 Itangazo ry'icyo yaregwaga ryari ryanditswe ngo “Umwami w'Abayahudi.”
Mark15:27 Yari abambanywe n'abambuzi babiri
Mark15:28 Nuko biba nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo “Yabazwe mu bagome.”]
Mark15:29 Abahisi baramutukaga
Mark15:30 ikize wivane ku musaraba turebe!”
Mark15:31 Abakuru bo mu batambyi bafatanyaga n'abigishamategeko kumushinyagurira
Mark15:32 Umva ko ari Kristo umwami w'Abisiraheli
Mark15:33 Isaa sita mu gihugu cyose hacura umwijima
Mark15:34 Nuko isaa cyenda zigeze Yezu avuga aranguruye ati: “Eloyi
Mark15:35 Bamwe mu bari bahagaze aho babyumvise baravuga bati: “Umva re! Aratabaza Eliya.”
Mark15:36 Nuko umuntu umwe ariruka afata icyangwe
Mark15:37 Yezu arangurura ijwi
Mark15:38 Nuko mu Ngoro y'Imana umwenda wakingirizaga Icyumba kizira inenge cyane utabukamo kabiri
Mark15:39 Umukapiteni w'abasirikari wari umuhagaze imbere
Mark15:40 Hari n'abagore babireberaga kure. Barimo Mariya w'i Magadala na Salome na Mariya nyina wa Yakobo muto
Mark15:41 Abo bagore bakurikiraga Yezu akiri muri Galileya
Mark15:42 Bugiye kwira ku munsi w'imyiteguro
Mark15:43 haza Yozefu ukomoka mu mujyi wa Arimateya
Mark15:44 Pilato atangazwa no kumva ko Yezu amaze gupfa. Atumira umukapiteni w'abasirikari
Mark15:45 Umukapiteni arabimwemeza
Mark15:46 Nuko Yozefu amaze kugura umwenda wera
Mark15:47 Mariya w'i Magadala na Mariya nyina wa Yozefu
Mark16:1 Isabato ishize
Mark16:2 Ku cyumweru ari wo munsi wa mbere
Mark16:3 Baza babazanya bati “Ni nde uri budukurire rya buye ku muryango w'imva?”
Mark16:4 Bitegereje basanga rya buye ryahirikiwe hirya
Mark16:5 Binjiye mu mva babona umusore wicaye mu ruhande rw'iburyo
Mark16:6 Arababwira ati: “Mwitinya! Murashaka Yezu w'i Nazareti umwe babambye ku musaraba
Mark16:7 Ahubwo nimugende mumenyeshe Petero n'abandi bigishwa
Mark16:8 Nuko basohoka mu mva bahunga
Mark16:9 Muri icyo gitondo cy'umunsi wa mbere Yezu amaze kuzuka
Mark16:10 Mariya ajya kubimenyesha abari barabanye na Yezu
Mark16:11 Ariko nubwo bumvise avuga ko Yezu ari muzima kandi ko yamwiboneye
Mark16:12 Hanyuma y'ibyo Yezu abonekera abandi babiri mu bigishwa be bari mu nzira bajya mu cyaro
Mark16:13 Bagaruka kubimenyesha abasigaye
Mark16:14 Hanyuma abonekera ba bandi cumi n'umwe bafungura. Abagayira kutamwizera kwabo no kugira imitima inangiye
Mark16:15 Nuko arababwira ati: “Nimujye ku isi hose mwamamaze Ubutumwa bwiza mu bantu bose.
Mark16:16 Ubwemera akabatizwa azakizwa
Mark16:17 Ibimenyetso bizaranga abazaba babwemeye ni ibi: mu izina ryanjye bazamenesha ingabo za Satani
Mark16:18 Nibafata inzoka cyangwa nibanywa uburozi
Mark16:19 Nyagasani Yezu amaze kubabwira ibyo ajyanwa mu ijuru
Mark16:20 Nuko abigishwa be bajya hose bamamaza ibye. Nyagasani yabafashaga muri uwo murimo
Luke1:1 Nyakubahwa Tewofili
Luke1:2 Ibyo twabigejejweho n'ababyiboneye kuva bigitangira
Luke1:3 Nanjye maze kubaririza neza ibyabaye byose kuva ku nkomoko
Luke1:4 Ibyo mbigiriye kugira ngo usobanukirwe ukuri kw'inyigisho wigishijwe.
Luke1:5 Ku ngoma ya Herodi umwami wa Yudeya
Luke1:6 Bombi bari abantu batunganiye Imana
Luke1:7 Icyakora nta mwana bagiraga kubera ko Elizabeti yari ingumba
Luke1:8 Umunsi umwe Zakariya yakoraga imirimo y'ubutambyi imbere y'Imana
Luke1:9 Bakurikije uburyo busanzwe bw'abatambyi
Luke1:10 Igihe cyo kuyitwika cyageze rubanda rwose bari hanze basenga.
Luke1:11 Nuko umumarayika wa Nyagasani abonekera Zakariya
Luke1:12 Zakariya amubonye arikanga
Luke1:13 Umumarayika ni ko kumubwira ati: “Zakariya
Luke1:14 Bizagutera ubwuzu n'ibyishimo
Luke1:15 Koko azaba umuntu ukomeye kuri Nyagasani. Ntazigera anywa divayi n'icyitwa inzoga cyose
Luke1:16 Benshi mu Bisiraheli azabagarura kuri Nyagasani Imana yabo.
Luke1:17 Azabanziriza Nyagasani
Luke1:18 Nuko Zakariya abwira umumarayika ati: “Ibyo nakwemezwa n'iki ko bizaba kandi ndi umusaza
Luke1:19 Umumarayika aramusubiza ati: “Ndi Gaburiyeli
Luke1:20 Nubwo utemeye ibyo nkubwiye
Luke1:21 Ubwo rubanda bari bategereje Zakariya
Luke1:22 Asohotse ntiyashobora kuvuga
Luke1:23 Igihe cyo gukora iby'ubutambyi kirangiye Zakariya arataha.
Luke1:24 Hashize iminsi
Luke1:25 “Mbega ibyo Nyagasani angiriye! Koko arangobotse
Luke1:26 Igihe Elizabeti yari afite inda y'amezi atandatu
Luke1:27 Imutuma ku mukobwa wari warasabwe n'uwitwa Yozefu wo mu muryango wa Dawidi
Luke1:28 Nuko umumarayika amusanga mu nzu aramubwira ati: “Ndakuramutsa mutoni w'Imana! Nyagasani ari kumwe nawe.”
Luke1:29 Mariya yumvise iryo jambo arikanga
Luke1:30 Umumarayika aramubwira ati: “Mariya
Luke1:31 Dore ugiye gusama inda
Luke1:32 Azaba umuntu ukomeye
Luke1:33 ategeke urubyaro rwa Yakobo kugeza iteka ryose. Koko ubwami bwe ntibuzagira iherezo.”
Luke1:34 Mariya abwira umumarayika ati: “Ibyo bizashoboka bite ko nta mugabo tubonana?”
Luke1:35 Umumarayika aramusubiza ati: “Mwuka Muziranenge azakuzaho
Luke1:36 Dore mwene wanyu Elizabeti na we atwite umwana w'umuhungu kandi ari umukecuru
Luke1:37 Erega nta kinanira Imana!”
Luke1:38 Mariya aravuga ati: “Jyewe ndi umuja wa Nyagasani
Luke1:39 Muri iyo minsi Mariya ahaguruka n'ingoga
Luke1:40 ajya kwa Zakariya asuhuza Elizabeti.
Luke1:41 Elizabeti yumvise indamutso ya Mariya umwana atwite yisimbiza mu nda
Luke1:42 Ni ko kurangurura ijwi ati: “Wahebuje abagore bose umugisha
Luke1:43 Mbese ndi nde wo kugendererwa na nyina w'Umwami wanjye?
Luke1:44 Dore mbaye ncyumva indamutso yawe
Luke1:45 Urahirwa wowe wemeye ko ibyo watumweho na Nyagasani bizaba.”
Luke1:46 Noneho Mariya aravuga ati: “Ndasingiza Nyagasani mbikuye ku mutima
Luke1:47 nishimiye Imana Umukiza wanjye.
Luke1:48 Yitaye ku muja we w'intamenyekana
Luke1:49 Ushoborabyose yankoreye ibitangaje
Luke1:50 Agirira impuhwe abamwubaha
Luke1:51 Yarambuye ukuboko akora iby'imbaraga
Luke1:52 Yahanantuye abakomeye abanyaga ubutegetsi
Luke1:53 Abashonji yabahagije ibyiza
Luke1:54 Yagobotse umugaragu we Isiraheli
Luke1:55 Aburahamu n'urubyaro rwe iteka ryose
Luke1:56 Mariya yamaranye na Elizabeti nk'amezi atatu maze arataha.
Luke1:57 Igihe kigeze Elizabeti abyara umuhungu.
Luke1:58 Abaturanyi na bene wabo bumvise impuhwe Nyagasani yamugiriye bishimana na we.
Luke1:59 Ku munsi wa munani baza mu by'imihango yo gukeba umwana. Bashakaga kumwita Zakariya ngo yitiranwe na se
Luke1:60 ariko nyina aranga ati: “Oya
Luke1:61 Abandi baramubwira bati: “Ko nta muntu wo muri bene wanyu witwa iryo zina?”
Luke1:62 Ni ko kubaza se w'umwana baciye amarenga
Luke1:63 Zakariya yaka akabaho yandikaho ngo
Luke1:64 Muri ako kanya abumbura umunwa
Luke1:65 Nuko abaturanyi bose bashya ubwoba
Luke1:66 Ababyumvaga bose bagumyaga kubizirikana bibaza bati: “Rwose nk'uriya mwana azaba muntu ki?” Koko kandi ububasha bwa Nyagasani bwamugaragaragaho.
Luke1:67 Se Zakariya aherako yuzura Mwuka Muziranenge
Luke1:68 “Nihasingizwe Nyagasani Imana ya Isiraheli
Luke1:69 Yaduhagurukirije intwari yo kudukiza
Luke1:70 Ibyo yabivuze atumye abahanuzi be yitoranyirije kuva kera
Luke1:71 yavuze ko azadukiza abanzi bacu
Luke1:72 Yavuze ko azagirira impuhwe ba sogokuruza
Luke1:73 Imana yarahiye sogokuruza Aburahamu ko izatumara ubwoba
Luke1:74 yamurahiye ko izatuvana mu maboko y'abanzi bacu.
Luke1:75 Bityo tuzayiyoboka tubikuye ku mutima
Luke1:76 Naho wowe mwana wanjye
Luke1:77 Uzamenyesha abantu be agakiza baheshwa no kubabarirwa ibyaha.
Luke1:78 Imana yacu igira impuhwe n'imbabazi
Luke1:79 ruzamurikira abari mu mwijima bugarijwe n'urupfu
Luke1:80 Nuko umwana Yohani agumya gukura no guca akenge. Hanyuma ajya kwibera mu butayu kugeza igihe cyo kwigaragariza Abisiraheli.
Luke2:1 Muri icyo gihe umwami w'i Roma witwaga Ogusito
Luke2:2 Iryo barura rya mbere ryabaye igihe Kwirini yari umutegetsi w'intara ya Siriya.
Luke2:3 Nuko abantu bose bajya kwiyandikisha
Luke2:4 Yozefu na we ava mu mujyi wa Nazareti mu ntara ya Galileya agana mu ntara ya Yudeya
Luke2:5 Yozefu ajya kwiyandikishayo ari kumwe na Mariya
Luke2:6 Bakiri i Betelehemu araramukwa
Luke2:7 abyara umuhungu we w'impfura amufubika utwenda tw'impinja
Luke2:8 Muri ako karere hari abashumba barariraga intama zabo ku gasozi.
Luke2:9 Umumarayika wa Nyagasani arababonekera
Luke2:10 Uwo mumarayika ni ko kubabwira ati: “Mwitinya
Luke2:11 Uyu munsi mu mujyi wa Dawidi havukiye Umukiza wanyu
Luke2:12 Dore ikiza kumubabwira: muri busange uruhinja rufubitse utwenda ruryamye mu muvure.”
Luke2:13 Ako kanya hatunguka umutwe w'ingabo nyinshi zo mu ijuru
Luke2:14 “Mu ijuru Imana nisingizwe
Luke2:15 Abamarayika bamaze gusubira mu ijuru
Luke2:16 Bagenda bihuta basangayo Mariya na Yozefu
Luke2:17 Babonye uwo mwana batekerereza abantu ibyo bamubwiweho.
Luke2:18 Ababyumvise bose batangazwa cyane n'ibyo abo bashumba bababwiraga.
Luke2:19 Mariya we abika ibyo byose ku mutima
Luke2:20 Nyuma abashumba basubirayo bagenda basingiza Imana
Luke2:21 Iminsi umunani ishize
Luke2:22 Igihe kiragera ababyeyi be bubahiriza itegeko rya Musa ryerekeye guhumanurwa
Luke2:23 nk'uko byanditswe mu Mategeko ya Nyagasani ngo “Umuhungu wese w'impfura azegurirwa Nyagasani.”
Luke2:24 Bari bajyanywe kandi no gutura igitambo cy'ibyana by'inuma bibiri
Luke2:25 I Yeruzalemu hari umuntu witwa Simeyoni
Luke2:26 kandi yari yaramuhishuriye ko atazapfa atabanje kubona Kristo wa Nyagasani.
Luke2:27 Nuko Simeyoni ajyanwa na Mwuka mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana. Ababyeyi b'umwana Yezu bari bamujyanyeyo kugira ngo bamukorere imihango itegetswe.
Luke2:28 Simeyoni aramuterura ashimira Imana ati:
Luke2:29 “Databuja
Luke2:30 Niboneye n'amaso yanjye agakiza kawe
Luke2:31 ako wageneye amahanga yose.
Luke2:32 Niboneye urumuri rwo kumurikira amahanga
Luke2:33 Nuko se na nyina bagumya gutangazwa n'ibyo Simeyoni amuvuzeho.
Luke2:34 Simeyoni abasabira umugisha kandi abwira Mariya nyina w'uwo mwana ati: “Dore uyu mwana azanywe no kugira ngo benshi mu Bisiraheli bagwe abandi babyuke. Imana izamugira intangamugabo benshi bazarwanya
Luke2:35 bityo ibitekerezo bihishwe mu mitima ya benshi bishyirwe ahagaragara. Nawe kandi bizakubera nk'inkota ikwahuranyije umutima.”
Luke2:36 Hariho n'umuhanuzikazi witwaga Ana
Luke2:37 maze arapfakara. Amara imyaka mirongo inani n'ine adasiba mu rugo rw'Ingoro akorera Imana ijoro n'amanywa
Luke2:38 Nuko uwo mwanya Ana araza
Luke2:39 Ababyeyi ba Yezu barangije imihango yose yategetswe na Nyagasani
Luke2:40 Umwana arakura arakomera
Luke2:41 Buri mwaka ababyeyi ba Yezu bajyaga i Yeruzalemu
Luke2:42 Yezu amaze imyaka cumi n'ibiri
Luke2:43 Iminsi mikuru irangiye ababyeyi barataha
Luke2:44 Bagenda urugendo rw'umunsi wose bakeka ko ari mu bantu bagendanaga. Hanyuma batangira kumushakira muri bene wabo no mu bandi bari baziranye.
Luke2:45 Nuko batamubonye basubira i Yeruzalemu bamushaka.
Luke2:46 Nyuma y'iminsi itatu bamubona mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Luke2:47 Abamwumvaga bose batangazwaga n'ubwenge bwe n'ibyo yabasubizaga.
Luke2:48 Ababyeyi be bamubonye barumirwa. Nyina aramubaza ati: “Mwana wanjye
Luke2:49 Arabasubiza ati: “Ariko se mwanshakiraga iki? Ese ntimwari muzi ko ngomba kuba mu Nzu ya Data?”
Luke2:50 Nyamara ntibasobanukirwa icyo ababwiye.
Luke2:51 Hamyuma asubirana na bo i Nazareti
Luke2:52 Uko Yezu yakuraga ni ko yungukaga ubwenge kandi ashimwa n'Imana n'abantu.
Luke3:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n'itanu umwami w'i Roma witwa Tiberi ari ku ngoma
Luke3:2 Ana na Kayifa bakaba ari bo Batambyi bakuru. Icyo gihe ubutumwa bw'Imana bwageze kuri Yohani mwene Zakariya
Luke3:3 Aherako agenda uturere twose duhereranye n'uruzi rwa Yorodani
Luke3:4 Biba nk'uko byanditswe mu gitabo cy'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo “Nimwumve ijwi ry'urangururira mu butayu ati: ‘Nimutunganye inzira ya Nyagasani
Luke3:5 Imibande yose izuzuzwa
Luke3:6 Bityo umuntu wese azabona agakiza k'Imana.’ ”
Luke3:7 Imbaga y'abantu yasangaga Yohani kugira ngo ababatize
Luke3:8 Nuko rero nk'uko igiti cyera imbuto
Luke3:9 Ndetse n'ubu intorezo irabanguye ngo iteme ibiti ibihereye ku mizi
Luke3:10 Rubanda ni ko kumubaza bati: “None se tubigenze dute?”
Luke3:11 Arabasubiza ati: “Ufite imyenda ibiri
Luke3:12 Abasoresha na bo bari baje kubatizwa
Luke3:13 Yohani arabasubiza ati: “Ntimugasoreshe ibirenze ibyo mwategetswe.”
Luke3:14 Abasirikari na bo baramubaza bati: “Naho se twe bite?” Yohani ati: “Ntimukagire uwo mwambura ibye cyangwa ngo mumurege ibinyoma
Luke3:15 Nuko rubanda bagumya gutegereza ibigiye kuba
Luke3:16 Yohani ni ko kubabwira bose ati: “Jyewe ndababatirisha amazi ariko hagiye kuza undusha ububasha
Luke3:17 Dore afashe urutaro ngo agosore
Luke3:18 Bityo Yohani akomeza guhugūza rubanda izindi nyigisho nyinshi
Luke3:19 Acyaha kandi n'Umutegetsi Herodi ku byerekeye Herodiya
Luke3:20 Nuko ibyo byose Herodi abigerekaho no gushyirisha Yohani muri gereza.
Luke3:21 Mu gihe rubanda rwose babatizwaga
Luke3:22 Mwuka Muziranenge amumanukiraho asa n'inuma. Nuko humvikana ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru ati: “Uri Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane
Luke3:23 Igihe Yezu yatangiraga umurimo we
Luke3:24 mwene Matati
Luke3:25 mwene Matatiya
Luke3:26 mwene Māti
Luke3:27 mwene Yohanani
Luke3:28 mwene Meliki
Luke3:29 mwene Yezu
Luke3:30 mwene Simeyoni
Luke3:31 mwene Meleya
Luke3:32 mwene Yese

Luke3:34 mwene Yakobo
Luke3:35 mwene Serugu
Luke3:36 mwene Kenani
Luke3:37 mwene Metusela
Luke3:38 mwene Enoshi
Luke4:1 Yezu ava kuri Yorodani yuzuye Mwuka Muziranenge
Luke4:2 Ahageragerezwa na Satani iminsi mirongo ine. Iyo minsi yose ayimara atarya
Luke4:3 Satani ni ko kumubwira ati: “Niba uri Umwana w'Imana
Luke4:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Biranditswe ngo ‘Umuntu ntatungwa n'ibyokurya gusa.’ ”
Luke4:5 Nuko Satani amujyana ahirengeye
Luke4:6 Aramubwira ati: “Ndaguha ubushobozi bwose kuri biriya bihugu n'icyubahiro cyabyo byose
Luke4:7 Nundamya byose biraba ibyawe.”
Luke4:8 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Biranditswe ngo ‘Uzaramye Nyagasani Imana yawe
Luke4:9 Satani amujyana i Yeruzalemu amuhagarika ku munara w'Ingoro y'Imana
Luke4:10 kuko byanditswe ngo ‘Imana izategeka abamarayika bayo bakurinde
Luke4:11 bazakuramira mu maboko yabo
Luke4:12 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Byaravuzwe ngo ‘Ntukagerageze Nyagasani Imana yawe.’ ”
Luke4:13 Satani amaze kugerageza Yezu mu buryo bwose
Luke4:14 Yezu asubira muri Galileya afite ububasha bwa Mwuka w'Imana
Luke4:15 Yigishirizaga mu nsengero zaho abantu bose bakamushima.
Luke4:16 Nuko Yezu ajya i Nazareti aho yarerewe
Luke4:17 Bamuhereza umuzingo w'igitabo cy'umuhanuzi Ezayi
Luke4:18 “Mwuka wa Nyagasani ari kuri jye
Luke4:19 no gutangaza umwaka Nyagasani agiriyemo imbabazi.”
Luke4:20 Nuko Yezu azinga uwo muzingo w'igitabo awusubiza uwushinzwe maze aricara
Luke4:21 Nuko arababwira ati: “Ibyo byanditswe mumaze kumva
Luke4:22 Bose bagumya kogeza ibye
Luke4:23 Nyamara arababwira ati: “Ndabazi
Luke4:24 Yungamo ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko nta muhanuzi wemerwa iwabo.
Luke4:25 Ni ukuri no mu gihe cya Eliya hariho abapfakazi benshi mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
Luke4:26 Nyamara nta n'umwe muri bo Eliya yoherejweho
Luke4:27 No mu gihe cy'umuhanuzi Elisha hariho abantu benshi barwaye ibibembe mu gihugu cya Isiraheli
Luke4:28 Abari mu rusengero bose bumvise ibyo bararakara cyane
Luke4:29 bahita bahaguruka bamusohora mu mujyi
Luke4:30 Ariko we abaca mu myanya y'intoki arigendera.
Luke4:31 Nuko Yezu amanuka i Kafarinawumu umujyi wo muri Galileya
Luke4:32 Batangazwaga cyane n'imyigishirize ye kuko yavuganaga ubushobozi.
Luke4:33 Mu rusengero harimo umuntu wahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani
Luke4:34 “Ayi! Yezu w'i Nazareti uradushakaho iki? Mbese wazanywe no kuturimbura? Nzi uwo uri we
Luke4:35 Yezu acyaha iyo ngabo ya Satani ati: “Ceceka muvemo!” Iherako imutura hasi hagati yabo
Luke4:36 Bose barumirwa baravugana bati: “Mbega ijambo! Dore arategekana ubushobozi n'ububasha ingabo za Satani zikamenengana!”
Luke4:37 Amakuru ye yamamara muri ako karere kose.
Luke4:38 Nuko Yezu ahaguruka mu rusengero ajya kwa Simoni Petero
Luke4:39 Yezu amwunama hejuru acyaha umuriro maze urazima. Ako kanya arabyuka arabazimanira.
Luke4:40 Izuba rirenze bazanira Yezu abantu barwaye indwara zitari zimwe
Luke4:41 N'ingabo za Satani zisohoka mu bantu benshi zivuga ziranguruye ziti: “Uri Umwana w'Imana!” Yezu arazicyaha azibuza kuvuga
Luke4:42 Bukeye Yezu ava mu mujyi ajya ahantu hiherereye
Luke4:43 Ni ko kubabwira ati: “Ngomba kugeza Ubutumwa bwiza bw'ubwami bw'Imana no mu yindi mijyi
Luke4:44 Nuko ajya kubutangariza mu nsengero zo muri Yudeya.
Luke5:1 Igihe kimwe Yezu yari ahagaze ku kiyaga cya Genezareti
Luke5:2 Abona amato abiri ku nkombe abarobyi bari bavuyemo
Luke5:3 Ajya mu bwato bumwe muri ayo bukaba ubwa Simoni Petero
Luke5:4 Amaze kuvuga abwira Simoni ati: “Igiza ubwato ahari amazi menshi
Luke5:5 Simoni aramusubiza ati: “Mutware
Luke5:6 Babigenje batyo bafata amafi menshi cyane
Luke5:7 Barembuza bagenzi babo bari mu bundi bwato ngo baze babafashe. Nuko baraza buzuza ayo mato yombi
Luke5:8 Simoni Petero abibonye atyo apfukamira Yezu
Luke5:9 Icyatumye avuga atyo ni uko we n'abo bari kumwe bari bumiwe
Luke5:10 Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi bagenzi ba Simoni
Luke5:11 Baherako basubiza amato imusozi
Luke5:12 Igihe kimwe Yezu ari mu mujyi runaka
Luke5:13 Yezu arambura ukuboko amukoraho agira ati: “Ndabishaka kira.” Ako kanya ibibembe bimushiraho.
Luke5:14 Yezu aramwihanangiriza ngo ye kugira uwo abibwira. Aramubwira ati: “Icyakora ujye kwiyereka umutambyi
Luke5:15 Nyamara Yezu arushaho kwamamara
Luke5:16 Ariko we akanyuzamo akajya ahantu hitaruye agasenga.
Luke5:17 Igihe kimwe Yezu yarigishaga
Luke5:18 Haza abantu bahetse mu ngobyi umuntu umugaye
Luke5:19 ariko babura aho bamucisha kuko hari abantu benshi. Nuko barurira bajya hejuru y'inzu
Luke5:20 Yezu abonye ukwizera kwabo abwira uwo muntu ati: “Ibyaha byawe urabibabariwe.”
Luke5:21 Abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi batangira kubazanya bati: “Ese uyu ni muntu ki utuka Imana? Ni nde ubasha kubabarira abantu ibyaha uretse Imana yonyine?”
Luke5:22 Yezu amenye ibitekerezo byabo ni ko kubabaza ati: “Ni iki kibateye gutekereza mutyo?
Luke5:23 Icyoroshye ni ikihe
Luke5:24 Nyamara ndagira ngo mumenye ko ku isi
Luke5:25 Ako kanya abyuka bamureba
Luke5:26 Bose barumirwa basingiza Imana bafite ubwoba cyane
Luke5:27 Ibyo birangiye avayo
Luke5:28 Levi arahaguruka
Luke5:29 Nuko atumira Yezu iwe amukorera umunsi mukuru ukomeye
Luke5:30 Abafarizayi n'abigishamategeko babo barijujuta
Luke5:31 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Abazima si bo bakenera umuvuzi
Luke5:32 Sinazanywe no guhamagara intungane
Luke5:33 Nuko baramubwira bati: “Akenshi abigishwa ba Yohani Mubatiza bigomwa kurya kandi bakavuga amasengesho
Luke5:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mbese mu bukwe mwashobora kubuza abasangwa kurya
Luke5:35 Nyamara igihe kizagera umukwe avanwe muri bo
Luke5:36 Yungamo abaha ikigereranyo ati: “Ntawe ukata ikiremo ku mwenda mushya ngo agitere mu mwenda ushaje. Uwabikora yaba aciye uwo mwenda mushya
Luke5:37 Nta n'usuka inzoga y'umubira mu mpago z'impu zishaje. Uwabikora
Luke5:38 Ahubwo inzoga y'umubira igomba gusukwa mu mpago zikiri nshya.
Luke5:39 Ikindi kandi umuntu wese unyoye inzoga ihoze ntiyifuza kunywa iy'umubira
Luke6:1 Ku munsi w'isabato Yezu anyura mu mirima y'ingano
Luke6:2 Bamwe mu Bafarizayi barababaza bati: “Kuki mukora ibidakwiriye gukorwa ku isabato?”
Luke6:3 Yezu na we arababaza ati: “Mbese ntimwigeze musoma ibyo Dawidi yakoze
Luke6:4 Yinjiye mu Nzu y'Imana afata imigati yatuwe Imana
Luke6:5 Yezu yungamo ati: “Umwana w'umuntu ni we Mugenga w'isabato.”
Luke6:6 Ku yindi sabato Yezu yinjira mu rusengero maze atangira kwigisha. Hari umuntu unyunyutse ikiganza cy'iburyo.
Luke6:7 Abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi bagenzura Yezu ngo barebe ko amukiza ku isabato
Luke6:8 Ariko Yezu amenya ibyo batekereza
Luke6:9 Yezu arababwira ati: “Hari icyo mbabaza. Mbese hemewe iki ku munsi w'isabato
Luke6:10 Bose abararanganyamo amaso maze abwira uwo muntu ati: “Rambura ikiganza.” Nuko arakirambura cyongera kuba kizima.
Luke6:11 Ariko ba bandi bo barabisha
Luke6:12 Muri iyo minsi Yezu ajya ku musozi gusenga
Luke6:13 Bukeye ahamagara abigishwa be
Luke6:14 Simoni yise Petero n'umuvandimwe we Andereya
Luke6:15 na Matayo na Tomasi
Luke6:16 na Yuda mwene Yakobo na Yuda Isikariyoti wa wundi wabaye umugambanyi.
Luke6:17 Yezu amanukana na bo ahagarara ahantu h'itaba
Luke6:18 Bari bazanywe no kumva Yezu kandi ngo abakize indwara. Ababaga bahanzweho na bo yarabakizaga.
Luke6:19 Abantu bose bamaraniraga kumukoraho
Luke6:20 Yezu yubura amaso yitegereza abigishwa be
Luke6:21 Murahirwa mwebwe mushonje ubu
Luke6:22 “Murahirwa igihe cyose abantu babanga
Luke6:23 Umunsi babagenje batyo muzishime muhimbarwe
Luke6:24 Ariko muzabona ishyano mwebwe abakungahaye ubu
Luke6:25 Muzabona ishyano mwebwe abijuse ubu
Luke6:26 “Muzabona ishyano igihe abantu bose babavuga neza. Uko ni ko na ba sekuruza bagenzerezaga abahanurabinyoma.”
Luke6:27 “Reka mbabwire mwe munyumva
Luke6:28 mwifurize umugisha ababavuma kandi musabire ababagirira nabi.
Luke6:29 Nihagira ugukubita urushyi umuhe n'undi musaya. Nihagira ukwambura ikote umureke atware n'ishati.
Luke6:30 Umuntu wese ugusabye umuhe
Luke6:31 Uko mwifuza ko abandi babagirira abe ari ko namwe mubagirira.
Luke6:32 “Niba mukunda ababakunda gusa
Luke6:33 Niba kandi mugirira neza ababagirira neza gusa
Luke6:34 Niba kandi muguriza abo mwizeye ko bazabishyura gusa
Luke6:35 Ahubwo mukunde abanzi banyu mubagirire neza
Luke6:36 Nimujye mugira impuhwe nk'uko Imana So izigira.”
Luke6:37 “Ntimukihe gucira abandi imanza namwe mutazazicirwa. Ntimukagereke ibibi ku bandi namwe mutazabigerekwaho. Ahubwo mubabarire abandi namwe muzababarirwa.
Luke6:38 Mutange namwe muzahabwa
Luke6:39 Yungamo abaha ikigereranyo ati: “Mbese impumyi ibasha kurandata indi mpumyi? Ubwo se zombi ntizagwa mu rwobo?
Luke6:40 Nta mwigishwa uruta umwigisha we
Luke6:41 “Kuki ushishikazwa n'agatotsi kari mu jisho rya mugenzi wawe
Luke6:42 Wabasha ute kubwira mugenzi wawe uti: ‘Mugenzi wanjye
Luke6:43 “Nta giti cyiza cyera imbuto mbi
Luke6:44 Buri giti ukibwirwa n'imbuto cyera. Nta wasoroma imbuto z'umutini ku mutobotobo
Luke6:45 Umuntu mwiza akura ibyiza mu migambi ye myiza
Luke6:46 “Ni iki kibatera guhora mumpamagara muti ‘Nyagasani
Luke6:47 Umuntu wese unsanga akumva ibyo mvuga kandi akabikurikiza
Luke6:48 ni nk'umuntu wagiye kubaka inzu agacukura cyane
Luke6:49 Ariko uwumva ibyo mvuga ntabikurikize
Luke7:1 Yezu amaze kubwira abantu ibyo byose
Luke7:2 Hariyo umukapiteni w'Umunyaroma wari ufite umugaragu yakundaga cyane. Uwo mugaragu yari arwaye agiye gupfa.
Luke7:3 Uwo mukapiteni ngo yumve ibyo bavuga kuri Yezu
Luke7:4 Bageze aho Yezu ari baramwinginga cyane bati: “Birakwiye ko uwo muntu wamugoboka
Luke7:5 kuko twebwe Abayahudi adukunda kandi ni we watwubakiye urusengero.”
Luke7:6 Nuko Yezu ajyana na bo maze igihe bageze hafi y'urugo
Luke7:7 Kuza kukwishakira na byo nasanze bitankwiye
Luke7:8 Erega nanjye ndi umuntu utegekwa
Luke7:9 Yezu abyumvise atyo atangarira uwo muntu
Luke7:10 Abatumwe bahindukiye basanga wa mugaragu yakize.
Luke7:11 Nyuma y'ibyo Yezu ajya mu mujyi witwa Nayini
Luke7:12 Ageze bugufi bw'irembo ry'umujyi
Luke7:13 Nyagasani amubonye amugirira impuhwe
Luke7:14 Nuko yegera ingobyi umurambo warimo ayikoraho
Luke7:15 Uwari wapfuye areguka atangira kuvuga. Nuko Yezu amushyikiriza nyina.
Luke7:16 Abari aho bose baratinya maze basingiza Imana bati: “Umuhanuzi ukomeye yabonetse muri twe”
Luke7:17 Inkuru y'ibyo Yezu yakoze ikwira muri Yudeya yose no mu karere kose kahakikije.
Luke7:18 Abigishwa ba Yohani bamumenyesha ibyo byose. Yohani ni ko guhamagara babiri muri bo
Luke7:19 abatuma kuri Nyagasani ngo bamubaze bati: “Mbese ni wowe wa wundi ugomba kuza
Luke7:20 Bageze aho Yezu ari baramubwira bati: “Yohani Mubatiza yadutumye kukubaza niba ari wowe wa wundi ugomba kuza
Luke7:21 Icyo gihe basanga Yezu akiza abantu benshi indwara n'ububabare n'ingabo za Satani
Luke7:22 Hanyuma asubiza izo ntumwa ati: “Mugende mutekerereze Yohani ibyo mwiboneye n'ibyo mwiyumviye muti ‘Impumyi zirahumuka
Luke7:23 Hahirwa rero umuntu wese utazareka kunyizera.”
Luke7:24 Intumwa za Yohani zimaze kugenda
Luke7:25 None se mwagiye kureba iki? Ese ni umuntu wambaye imyambaro y'agaciro? Oya
Luke7:26 None se nyine mwagiye kureba iki? Ese ni umuhanuzi? Ni we koko
Luke7:27 Yohani uwo ni we Ibyanditswe bivuga
Luke7:28 Reka mbabwire: mu bana b'abantu ntawe uruta Yohani
Luke7:29 Abantu bose bamwumvise barimo n'abasoresha
Luke7:30 Ibiri amambu Abafarizayi n'abahanga mu by'Amategeko
Luke7:31 Yezu arakomeza ati: “Mbese abantu b'iki gihe nabagereranya n'iki? Mbese bameze nka ba nde?
Luke7:32 Ni nk'abana bicaye mu isoko bahamagarana bati: ‘Twateye imbyino z'umunezero ntimwabyina! Duteye iz'ishavu ntimwarira!’
Luke7:33 Yohani Mubatiza yaje yigomwa kurya no kunywa inzoga muravuga muti: ‘Yahanzweho!’
Luke7:34 Naho Umwana w'umuntu aje arya anywa muravuga muti: ‘Mbega igisahiranda cy'igisinzi
Luke7:35 Nyamara ubwenge bw'Imana bugaragazwa n'abagengwa na bwo bose.”
Luke7:36 Umwe mu Bafarizayi atumira Yezu ngo basangire. Bageze iwe bajya ku meza.
Luke7:37 Muri uwo mujyi hari umugore w'umunyabyaha. Amenye ko Yezu ari ku meza kwa wa Mufarizayi
Luke7:38 Ahagarara inyuma ya Yezu ahagana ku birenge arira
Luke7:39 Umufarizayi wari watumiye Yezu abonye ibyo
Luke7:40 Yezu afata ijambo ati: “Simoni
Luke7:41 Yezu ati: “Tuvuge ko abantu babiri bārimo umwenda w'uwabagurije. Umwe yari amurimo ungana n'igihembo cy'imibyizi magana atanu
Luke7:42 Abonye ko nta wari ufite icyo yamwishyura
Luke7:43 Simoni aramusubiza ati: “Ndatekereza ko ari uwo yarekeye umwenda munini.” Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ubivuze uko biri.”
Luke7:44 Nuko akebuka wa mugore maze abaza Simoni ati: “Urabona uyu mugore? Ninjiye iwawe ntiwampa amazi yo koga ibirenge
Luke7:45 Ntiwandamukije unsoma
Luke7:46 Ntiwansīze amavuta mu mutwe
Luke7:47 Ni yo mpamvu nkubwira ko amaze kubabarirwa ibyaha bye byinshi
Luke7:48 Yezu ni ko kubwira uwo mugore ati: “Ibyaha byawe urabibabariwe.”
Luke7:49 Abatumirwa bari kumwe ku meza batangira kwibaza bati: “Uyu ni muntu ki ugeza n'aho kubabarira ibyaha?”
Luke7:50 Ariko Yezu abwira uwo mugore ati: “Ukwizera kwawe kuragukijije
Luke8:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Yezu anyura mu mijyi no mu byaro
Luke8:2 hamwe n'abagore bamwe yari yarakijije indwara
Luke8:3 na Yowana muka Shuza umunyabintu wa Herodi
Luke8:4 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu irakorana
Luke8:5 “Habayeho umuntu wagiye kubiba
Luke8:6 Izindi zigwa ku gasi
Luke8:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa
Luke8:8 Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza
Luke8:9 Abigishwa be bamubaza icyo uwo mugani ushaka kuvuga.
Luke8:10 Arabasubiza ati: “Mwebwe mwahawe kumenya amabanga y'ubwami bw'Imana
Luke8:11 “Dore icyo uwo mugani uvuga: imbuto zibibwa ni Ijambo ry'Imana.
Luke8:12 Imbuto zaguye ku nzira zigereranywa n'abantu bumva iryo Jambo
Luke8:13 Izaguye ku gasi ni nk'abantu bumva Ijambo ry'Imana
Luke8:14 Izaguye mu mahwa ni nk'abumva iryo Jambo
Luke8:15 Naho izaguye mu butaka bwiza ni nk'abumva iryo Jambo n'umutima mwiza uboneye
Luke8:16 “Ntawe ucana itara ngo aryubikeho akabindi cyangwa ngo arishyire munsi y'igitanda. Ahubwo aritereka ahirengeye kugira ngo abinjira bose basange habona.
Luke8:17 Nta gihishwe kitazahishurwa
Luke8:18 “Murajye mwitondera uburyo mwumva ibyo mbabwira. Ufite azongererwa
Luke8:19 Abavandimwe ba Yezu na nyina bajya aho ari
Luke8:20 Bamwe babimenyesha Yezu bati: “Nyoko n'abavandimwe bawe bahagaze hanze kandi baragushaka.”
Luke8:21 Arabasubiza ati: “Mama n'abavandimwe banjye ni abumva Ijambo ry'Imana bakarikurikiza.”
Luke8:22 Igihe kimwe Yezu yajyanye mu bwato n'abigishwa be
Luke8:23 Bacyambuka ikiyaga Yezu arisinzirira. Nuko haza inkubi y'umuyaga
Luke8:24 Begera Yezu baramukangura bati: “Mwigisha
Luke8:25 Hanyuma arababaza ati: “Mbese ntimunyizera?” Bagira ubwoba barumirwa
Luke8:26 Bomokera mu ntara y'Abanyagerasa
Luke8:27 Yezu akigera imusozi
Luke8:28 Akibona Yezu induru ayiha umunwa
Luke8:29 Ibyo byatewe n'uko Yezu yari ategetse ingabo ya Satani kumuvamo. Iyo ngabo yamuhangagaho kenshi
Luke8:30 Yezu aramubaza ati: “Witwa nde?” Aramusubiza ati: “Nitwa Giteronyamwinshi.” Ibyo abivugira ko yari yarahanzweho n'ingabo za Satani nyinshi.
Luke8:31 Zinginga Yezu ngo atazohereza ikuzimu.
Luke8:32 Hafi aho ku musozi hari umugana w'ingurube nyinshi zarishaga. Izo ngabo za Satani zinginga Yezu ngo azireke zinjire mu ngurube
Luke8:33 Nuko ziva muri uwo muntu zinjira mu ngurube
Luke8:34 Abashumba bazo babonye ibibaye barahunga
Luke8:35 Abaturage bajya kwirebera ibyabaye. Bageze aho Yezu ari babona wa muntu ingabo za Satani zavuyemo
Luke8:36 Abari babyiboneye babatekerereza ukuntu uwo wari wahanzweho yakize.
Luke8:37 Noneho abaturage bose b'iyo ntara y'Abanyagerasa basaba Yezu kubavira aho
Luke8:38 uwameneshejwemo ingabo za Satani asaba Yezu ngo bigumanire. Ariko Yezu aramusezerera agira ati:
Luke8:39 “Subira iwanyu ubatekerereze ibyo Imana yagukoreye byose.” Nuko uwo muntu aragenda
Luke8:40 Yezu agarutse imbaga y'abantu iramwakira
Luke8:41 Haza umugabo witwaga Yayiro
Luke8:42 Amubwira ko umukobwa we w'ikinege w'imyaka nka cumi n'ibiri asamba. Akigenda rubanda nyamwinshi bamuniganagaho.
Luke8:43 Muri abo bantu harimo umugore wari urwaye indwara yo kuva
Luke8:44 Yegera Yezu amuturutse inyuma maze akora ku ncunda z'umwitero we. Ako kanya amaraso arakama.
Luke8:45 Yezu arabaza ati: “Ni nde unkozeho?” Bose barahakana maze Petero aravuga ati: “Mwigisha
Luke8:46 Ariko Yezu aravuga ati: “Hari uwankozeho kuko numvise hari ububasha bumvuyemo.”
Luke8:47 Wa mugore abonye ko yamenyekanye
Luke8:48 Yezu ni ko kumubwira ati: “Mwana wanjye
Luke8:49 Akivuga atyo haza intumwa ibwira wa mutware w'urusengero iti: “Umukobwa wawe amaze gupfa
Luke8:50 Yezu abyumvise abwira Yayiro ati: “Witinya
Luke8:51 Ageze mu rugo ntiyareka hari uwinjirana na we
Luke8:52 Bose barariraga bashavujwe n'uwo mwana. Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Mwirira
Luke8:53 Baramuseka
Luke8:54 Nuko Yezu amufata ukuboko aramuhamagara ati: “Mwana
Luke8:55 Umukobwa agarura akuka aba muzima
Luke8:56 Ababyeyi ibyishimo birabasāba
Luke9:1 Yezu akoranya ba bandi cumi na babiri
Luke9:2 Abatuma gutangaza iby'ubwami bw'Imana no gukiza abarwayi.
Luke9:3 Nuko arababwira ati: “Ntimugire icyo mujyana yaba inkoni cyangwa umufuka
Luke9:4 Urugo muzabonamo icumbi muzarugumemo kugeza igihe muzahavira.
Luke9:5 Umujyi muzageramo ntibabakire muzawuvemo muhunguye umukungugu wo mu birenge byanyu
Luke9:6 Bafata urugendo banyura mu mirenge yose
Luke9:7 Herodi umutegetsi w'intara ya Galileya yumvise ibyabaye byose
Luke9:8 abandi bakavuga ko ari Eliya wagarutse
Luke9:9 Herodi we akavuga ati: “Ko Yohani namuciye igihanga
Luke9:10 Intumwa za Yezu zigarutse zimutekerereza ibyo zari zakoze. Nuko Yezu arazijyana yihererana na zo ahagana mu mujyi witwa Betsayida.
Luke9:11 Imbaga y'abantu imenye ko yagiyeyo baramukurikira
Luke9:12 Ba bandi cumi na babiri babonye ko umunsi uciye ikibu
Luke9:13 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ahubwo mube ari mwe mubafungurira.” Baramubwira bati: “Dufite imigati itarenga itanu n'amafi abiri
Luke9:14 Abagabo bonyine bari aho bari nk'ibihumbi bitanu. Yezu ni ko kubwira abigishwa be ati: “Mubicaze mu byiciro
Luke9:15 Abigishwa babigenza batyo bose barabicaza.
Luke9:16 Yezu afata iyo migati itanu n'amafi abiri
Luke9:17 Nuko bose bararya barahaga
Luke9:18 Igihe kimwe Yezu yari ahiherereye asenga
Luke9:19 Baramusubiza bati: “Bamwe bavuga ko uri Yohani Mubatiza
Luke9:20 Nuko Yezu arababaza ati: “Mwebwe se muvuga ko ndi nde?” Petero aramusubiza ati: “Uri Kristo wavuye ku Mana.”
Luke9:21 Yezu arabihanangiriza ngo ntibagire uwo babihingukiriza.
Luke9:22 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ni ngombwa ko Umwana w'umuntu ababazwa cyane
Luke9:23 Nuko bose arababwira ati: “Ushaka kunyoboka wese nareke kwiyitaho
Luke9:24 Ushaka gukiza ubuzima bwe azabubura
Luke9:25 Mbese umuntu byamumarira iki kwigarurira isi yose
Luke9:26 Umuntu wese ugira isoni zo kunyemera no kwemera inyigisho zanjye
Luke9:27 Ndababwiza ukuri
Luke9:28 Hashize nk'iminsi umunani Yezu avuze ibyo
Luke9:29 Nuko agisenga mu maso he hahinduka ukundi
Luke9:30 Bagiye kubona babona abagabo babiri ari bo Musa na Eliya baganira na Yezu.
Luke9:31 Baboneka bafite ikuzo
Luke9:32 Petero n'abari kumwe na we bari batwawe n'ibitotsi. Bakangutse babona ikuzo rya Yezu n'abo bombi bari kumwe na we.
Luke9:33 Abo bagabo bagiye gutandukana na Yezu
Luke9:34 Akivuga atyo igicu kirabatwikīra. Abigishwa babibonye bagira ubwoba.
Luke9:35 Ako kanya bumva ijwi ry'uvugira muri icyo gicu ati: “Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nitoranyirije
Luke9:36 Iryo jwi rimaze kuvuga
Luke9:37 Bukeye bwaho Yezu n'abigishwa be bamanuka wa musozi
Luke9:38 Nuko umuntu mu bari aho avuga cyane aramubwira ati: “Mwigisha
Luke9:39 Haba ubwo ingabo ya Satani imwegura akavuza induru
Luke9:40 Nasabye abigishwa bawe kuyimenesha ntibabishobora.”
Luke9:41 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Yemwe bantu b'iki gihe mutizera Imana kandi mugoryamye
Luke9:42 Igihe uwo mwana acyegera Yezu ahangwaho. Ingabo ya Satani imutura hasi iramutigisa. Yezu aherako arayicyaha
Luke9:43 Nuko bose babonye ububasha buhebuje bw'Imana barumirwa. Mu gihe bose bagitangarira ibyo byose Yezu yakoraga
Luke9:44 “Nimutege amatwi ibyo ngiye kubabwira. Dore Umwana w'umuntu agiye kuzagabizwa abantu.”
Luke9:45 Abigishwa be ntibumva iryo jambo
Luke9:46 Nyuma batangira kujya impaka bibaza umukuru muri bo.
Luke9:47 Yezu amenye ibyo batekereza azana umwana amuhagarika iruhande rwe
Luke9:48 maze arababwira ati: “Umuntu wese wakira uyu mwana kubera jye ni jye aba yakiriye
Luke9:49 Nuko Yohani abwira Yezu ati: “Mwigisha
Luke9:50 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ntimukamubuze
Luke9:51 Igihe cya Yezu cyo kujyanwa agasubira mu ijuru cyari cyegereje
Luke9:52 Yohereza integuza ngo zimubanzirize kuri umwe mu mirenge y'Abanyasamariya
Luke9:53 Ariko abaho babonye ko yerekeje i Yeruzalemu banga kumwakira.
Luke9:54 Abigishwa be Yakobo na Yohani
Luke9:55 Yezu arabahindukirana arabatwama.
Luke9:56 Bava aho berekeza ku wundi murenge.
Luke9:57 Nuko bakigenda umuntu umwe abwira Yezu ati: “Nzagukurikira aho uzajya hose.”
Luke9:58 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Za nyiramuhari zigira amasenga zibamo
Luke9:59 Abwira undi ati: “Nkurikira.” Na we aramusubiza ati: “Reka mbanze njye gushyingura data.”
Luke9:60 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Reka abapfu bahambe abapfu babo
Luke9:61 Undi muntu aramubwira ati: “Databuja
Luke9:62 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ufashe isuka nyuma akarangara
Luke10:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Nyagasani Yezu atoranya abandi bigishwa mirongo irindwi na babiri
Luke10:2 Arababwira ati: “Imyaka yeze ari myinshi nyamara abasaruzi ni bake. Nuko rero nimusabe Nyir'imyaka yohereze abasaruzi mu murima we.
Luke10:3 Nimugende! Dore mbatumye nk'abana b'intama hagati y'impyisi.
Luke10:4 Muramenye ntimugire icyo mujyana
Luke10:5 Inzu yose muzinjiramo mujye mubanza muvuge muti: ‘Amahoro y'Imana abe muri uru rugo!’
Luke10:6 Niba muri rwo hari umunyamahoro
Luke10:7 Mugume muri iyo nzu murye kandi munywe ibyo babafunguriye
Luke10:8 Umujyi muzinjiramo bakabakira mujye mufungura ibyo babahereje.
Luke10:9 Mukize abarwayi baho kandi mubabwire muti: ‘Ubwami bw'Imana burabegereye.’
Luke10:10 Umujyi muzinjiramo ntibabakīre
Luke10:11 ‘Umukungugu wo mu mujyi wanyu wafashe mu birenge byacu
Luke10:12 Reka mbabwire: ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Luke10:13 “Mwa bantu b'i Korazini mwe
Luke10:14 Ni cyo gituma ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Luke10:15 Namwe bantu b'i Kafarinawumu
Luke10:16 Yezu yungamo ati: “Bigishwa banjye
Luke10:17 Nuko abo mirongo irindwi na babiri bagarukana ibyishimo
Luke10:18 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nabonye Satani ahanuka mu ijuru nk'umurabyo.
Luke10:19 Dore nabahaye ubushobozi bwo kuribata inzoka kimwe n'indyanishamurizo
Luke10:20 Ibyo ari byo byose ntimwishimire ko ingabo za Satani zibumvira
Luke10:21 Uwo mwanya Yezu asābwa n'ibyishimo bivuye kuri Mwuka Muziranenge
