Luke10:22 “Ibintu byose nabyeguriwe na Data. Ntawe uzi Umwana w'Imana uwo ari we keretse Se
Luke10:23 Nuko Yezu yihererana n'abigishwa be arababwira ati: “Hahirwa abareba ibyo mureba!
Luke10:24 Ndababwira ko abahanuzi n'abami benshi bashatse kureba ibyo mureba ntibabibona
Luke10:25 Nuko umwe mu bahanga mu by'Amategeko ahagurutswa no kumutegera mu byo avuga
Luke10:26 Yezu aramubaza ati: “Mu Mategeko handitswe iki? Wasomyemo iki?”
Luke10:27 Undi aramusubiza ati: “Ukunde Nyagasani Imana yawe n'umutima wawe wose
Luke10:28 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Usubije neza
Luke10:29 Uwo muhanga mu by'Amategeko ashatse kwikura mu isoni abaza Yezu ati: “Ariko se
Luke10:30 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Umugabo yakuviriye i Yeruzalemu amanuka ajya i Yeriko
Luke10:31 Umutambyi aza kumanuka anyura aho ngaho
Luke10:32 Haza kunyura n'Umulevi
Luke10:33 Ariko Umunyasamariya wari ku rugendo anyuze aho
Luke10:34 Ni ko kumwegera amupfuka ibikomere
Luke10:35 Bukeye aha nyir'icumbi ibikoroto bibiri by'ifeza
Luke10:36 Nuko Yezu abaza wa muhanga mu by'Amategeko ati: “None se muri abo bantu uko ari batatu
Luke10:37 Aramusubiza ati: “Ni uwamugiriye neza.” Yezu ni ko kumubwira ati: “Genda nawe ujye ugenza utyo!”
Luke10:38 Yezu yari mu rugendo hamwe n'abigishwa be agera ahantu ku murenge
Luke10:39 Murumuna we witwaga Mariya yari yicaye hasi
Luke10:40 Marita we yari ahugiye mu mirimo myinshi. Nuko asanga Yezu aramubwira ati: “Mbese ntibikubabaje kubona murumuna wanjye amparira imirimo? Mubwire aze amfashe.”
Luke10:41 Nyagasani aramusubiza ati: “Marita! Marita! Uhagaritse umutima kandi urahihibikana muri byinshi
Luke10:42 nyamara ikintu cya ngombwa ni kimwe gusa
Luke11:1 Igihe kimwe Yezu yari ahantu asenga. Arangije umwe mu bigishwa be aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
Luke11:2 Arababwira ati: “Igihe musenga mujye muvuga muti: ‘Data
Luke11:3 Buri munsi ujye uduha ifunguro ridukwiriye.
Luke11:4 Utubabarire ibyaha byacu
Luke11:5 Yezu yungamo ati: “Nk'umwe muri mwe afite incuti
Luke11:6 incuti yanjye igeze imuhira ivuye mu rugendo
Luke11:7 Nuko undi akamusubiza yibereye mu nzu ati: ‘Windushya! Dore twamaze gukinga jye n'abana banjye twaryamye
Luke11:8 Ndababwira ko naho uwo muntu atabyuka ngo agire icyo amuha kubera ubucuti
Luke11:9 “Nuko rero musabe muzahabwa
Luke11:10 Usabye wese ni we uhabwa
Luke11:11 Mwa babyeyi mwe
Luke11:12 cyangwa se akamuha ingonokera igihe amusabye igi?
Luke11:13 None se ko muzi guha abana banyu ibyiza kandi muri babi
Luke11:14 Igihe kimwe Yezu yameneshaga ingabo ya Satani yari yaragize umuntu ikiragi. Nuko iyo ngabo imuvuyemo uwo muntu aravuga. Rubanda baratangara cyane.
Luke11:15 Icyakora bamwe baravuga bati: “Ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani abuhabwa na Bēlizebuli umutware wazo.”
Luke11:16 Abandi bo bamwakaga ikimenyetso kibemeza ko yatumwe n'Imana
Luke11:17 Yezu yari azi ibyo batekereza
Luke11:18 Ese niba Satani ubwe yirwanyije ubwami bwe bwakomera bute
Luke11:19 Niba se ari Bēlizebuli umpa ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani
Luke11:20 Noneho kubera ko ari Imana impa ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani
Luke11:21 “Umunyamaboko ufite intwaro iyo arinze urugo rwe
Luke11:22 Ariko umurusha amaboko iyo ahahingutse akamutsinda
Luke11:23 “Utari mu ruhande rwanjye aba andwanya
Luke11:24 “Igihe ingabo ya Satani ivuye mu muntu izerera ku gasi ishaka aho yaruhukira
Luke11:25 Yagerayo igasanga ikubuye
Luke11:26 Nuko ikajya kuzana izindi ngabo ndwi ziyitambukije ubugome
Luke11:27 Yezu akimara kuvuga
Luke11:28 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ahubwo hahirwa abumva Ijambo ry'Imana bakarikurikiza.”
Luke11:29 Abantu bamaze kugwira iruhande rwa Yezu
Luke11:30 Nk'uko Yonasi yabereye ab'i Ninive ikimenyetso
Luke11:31 Ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Luke11:32 Ku munsi Imana izaca imanza
Luke11:33 “Ntawe ucanira itara kurihisha [cyangwa ngo aryubikeho akabindi]
Luke11:34 Itara ry'umubiri ni ijisho ryawe. Igihe ijisho ryawe ari rizima
Luke11:35 Nuko wirinde
Luke11:36 Niba rero umubiri wawe wose umurikiwe ntihabe n'agace kawo kari mu mwijima
Luke11:37 Yezu akivuga atyo Umufarizayi aramutumira ngo basangire. Yinjira iwe ajya ku meza.
Luke11:38 Uwo Mufarizayi atangazwa n'uko Yezu afungura atabanje gukaraba nk'uko umuhango wabo uri.
Luke11:39 Nyagasani Yezu aramubwira ati: “Mwebwe Bafarizayi dore uko muteye: mumeze nk'ibikombe n'amasahane boza inyuma gusa
Luke11:40 Mwa bapfu mwe
Luke11:41 Mujye muha abakene ku biri mu bikombe no ku masahane
Luke11:42 “Muzabona ishyano Bafarizayi
Luke11:43 “Muzabona ishyano Bafarizayi
Luke11:44 Muzabona ishyano mwe mumeze nk'imva zitagira ikiziranga
Luke11:45 Umwe mu bahanga mu by'Amategeko aramubwira ati: “Mwigisha
Luke11:46 Yezu ati: “Muzabona ishyano namwe bahanga mu by'Amategeko
Luke11:47 Muzabona ishyano kuko mwubakira imva z'abahanuzi
Luke11:48 Bityo muba mwemeje ko mushima ibyo ba sokuruza bakoze. Bo bishe abahanuzi
Luke11:49 Ni cyo cyatumye Imana izi byose ivuga iti: ‘Nzabatumaho abahanuzi n'Intumwa zanjye
Luke11:50 Ni yo mpamvu ab'iki gihe bazaryozwa amaraso y'abahanuzi bose bishwe kuva isi yaremwa kugeza ubu
Luke11:51 uhereye ku maraso y'Abeli kugeza ku ya Zakariya
Luke11:52 “Muzabona ishyano mwebwe bahanga mu by'Amategeko
Luke11:53 Yezu akiva aho ngaho
Luke11:54 bamwinja ngo babone uko bamufatira mu byo avuga.
Luke12:1 Icyo gihe abantu bageze ku bihumbi n'ibihumbi bari bamaze gukorana ku buryo bakandagiranaga. Nuko Yezu atangira kubwira abigishwa be ati: “Murajye mwirinda umusemburo w'Abafarizayi
Luke12:2 Nta gihishwe kitazahishurwa kandi nta banga ritazamenyekana.
Luke12:3 Ni cyo gituma ibyo mwavuze rwihishwa bizumvikana ku mugaragaro
Luke12:4 “Ncuti zanjye
Luke12:5 Ahubwo reka mbatungire agatoki uwo mugomba gutinya: mutinye Imana
Luke12:6 “Mbese ibishwi bitanu ntibigura udufaranga tubiri? Nyamara nta na kimwe muri byo Imana yibagirwa.
Luke12:7 Ndetse n'imisatsi yanyu yose irabaze. Nuko rero ntimugatinye kuko mwe murusha kure agaciro ibishwi byinshi.
Luke12:8 “Ndababwira kandi ko umuntu wese uzanyemera imbere y'abantu
Luke12:9 Ariko uzanyihakanira imbere y'abantu
Luke12:10 “Nuko rero umuntu wese uzavuga nabi Umwana w'umuntu azababarirwa
Luke12:11 “Mu gihe bazabajyana mu nsengero imbere y'abatware n'abacamanza
Luke12:12 Igihe nikigera Mwuka Muziranenge azababwira icyo mukwiriye kuvuga.”
Luke12:13 Umuntu umwe muri iyo mbaga abwira Yezu ati: “Mwigisha
Luke12:14 Yezu aramubaza ati: “Wa mugabo we
Luke12:15 Nyuma abwira abari aho ati: “Muramenye mwirinde kugira umururumba
Luke12:16 Nuko abacira uyu mugani ati: “Habayeho umuntu w'umukungu wari wejeje imyaka myinshi
Luke12:17 aza kwibaza ati: ‘Ndabigenza nte
Luke12:18 Hanyuma aribwira ati: ‘Nzi icyo ngiye gukora: reka nsenye ibigega byanjye nubake ibindi binini
Luke12:19 Ubwo ni bwo nzishimira ko mfite ibintu bizāmaza imyaka myinshi. Nzaruhuka ndye nywe
Luke12:20 Ariko Imana iramubwira iti: ‘Waba umupfu! Ko uri bupfe iri joro
Luke12:21 Yezu yungamo ati: “Nguko uko bimerera umuntu wese wirundanyiriza ubukungu
Luke12:22 Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Reka mbabwire rero ku byerekeye ubuzima: ntimukabunze imitima mwibaza ikizabatunga cyangwa icyo muzambara.
Luke12:23 Burya ubuzima buruta ibyokurya
Luke12:24 Mwitegereze ibyiyoni: ntibibiba ntibinasarura
Luke12:25 Ni nde muri mwe wakongēra nibura akanya na gato ku gihe azamara
Luke12:26 Ubwo ibyoroshye nk'ibyo birenze ububasha bwanyu
Luke12:27 Mwitegereze ukuntu indabyo zikura: nta murimo zikora nta n'imyenda ziboha
Luke12:28 None se mwa bantu bafite ukwizera guke mwe
Luke12:29 “Ntimugaharanire ibyo murya n'ibyo munywa
Luke12:30 Ibyo byose abanyamahanga batazi Imana ni byo baharanira
Luke12:31 Ahubwo muharanire ubwami bwe
Luke12:32 “Mwa bushyo buto bw'Imana mwe
Luke12:33 Mugurishe ibyo mutunze mubitange ho imfashanyo. Mwidodere imifuka idasaza yo kubikamo
Luke12:34 Aho ubukungu bwanyu buri
Luke12:35 “Muhore mukenyeye nk'abari ku kazi
Luke12:36 Mumere nk'abantu bategereje ko shebuja ava mu bukwe
Luke12:37 Hahirwa abagaragu shebuja azasanga bari maso! Ndababwira nkomeje ko na we azakenyera
Luke12:38 Naho yaza mu gicuku cyangwa mu nkoko
Luke12:39 Murabizi
Luke12:40 Namwe rero muhore mwiteguye
Luke12:41 Petero aravuga ati: “Nyagasani
Luke12:42 Nyagasani Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Mubirebye
Luke12:43 Ni uwo shebuja azasanga akora ibyo yamushinze
Luke12:44 Ndababwiza ukuri ko azamwegurira ibyo afite byose.
Luke12:45 Nyamara uwo niyibwira ati: ‘Databuja aratinze’
Luke12:46 shebuja azaza ku munsi atamwiteze no mu gihe atazi amucemo kabiri
Luke12:47 “Umugaragu uzi ibyo shebuja ashaka kandi ntabyiteho ngo abikore
Luke12:48 Naho utabizi
Luke12:49 “Nazanywe no gukongeza umuriro ku isi
Luke12:50 Hariho ukuntu ngomba kubatirizwa mu mubabaro. Mbega ukuntu binteye inkeke kugeza ubwo bizarangirira!
Luke12:51 Mbese mutekereza ko naje kuzana amahoro ku isi? Oya. Ahubwo ndababwira ko ibyanjye bituma abantu bicamo ibice.
Luke12:52 Kuva ubu ni ko bizaba mu rugo rw'abantu batanu: batatu bazarwanya babiri
Luke12:53 Bazicamo ibice
Luke12:54 Yezu abwira imbaga y'abantu yari aho ati: “Igihe mubonye igicu kibuditse iburengerazuba
Luke12:55 Igihe kandi mubonye umuyaga uhuha uturutse mu majyepfo
Luke12:56 Mwa ndyarya mwe
Luke12:57 “Kuki mutabona ubwanyu icyo mukwiye gukora?
Luke12:58 Nuko rero nujyana mu rukiko n'uwo muburana
Luke12:59 Reka nkubwire: ntuzavamo utabanje gutanga amafaranga baguciye yose hatabuze na rimwe.”
Luke13:1 Muri icyo gihe abantu bamwe baraza
Luke13:2 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mutekereza ko abo Banyagalileya bishwe bene ako kageni
Luke13:3 Ntabwo ari byo rwose
Luke13:4 Cyangwa ba bantu cumi n'umunani bagwiriwe n'umunara w'i Silowa bagapfa
Luke13:5 Ntabwo ari byo rwose
Luke13:6 Nuko Yezu abacira uyu mugani ati: “Habayeho umuntu wari ufite umutini watewe hagati mu biti by'imizabibu. Aza kuwusoromaho imbuto araheba.
Luke13:7 Abwira uwakoraga muri iyo mizabibu ati: ‘Dore maze imyaka itatu nza gusoroma imbuto kuri uyu mutini ngaheba. Ngaho wuteme! Kuki wakomeza kunyonkera ubutaka?’
Luke13:8 Undi aramusubiza ati: ‘Databuja
Luke13:9 Ahari ubutaha wazera imbuto
Luke13:10 Igihe kimwe ku isabato
Luke13:11 abona umugore wari umaranye imyaka cumi n'umunani ubumuga yatejwe n'ingabo ya Satani
Luke13:12 Yezu amubonye aramuhamagara
Luke13:13 Nuko amurambikaho ibiganza. Uwo mwanya arunamuka atangira gusingiza Imana.
Luke13:14 Umuyobozi w'urusengero arakazwa n'uko Yezu akijije umuntu ku isabato
Luke13:15 Nyagasani Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Mwa ndyarya mwe
Luke13:16 None uyu mugore dore imyaka ibaye cumi n'umunani aboshywe na Satani
Luke13:17 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo abamurwanyaga bose bakorwa n'isoni
Luke13:18 Yezu arababaza ati: “Ubwami bw'Imana bumeze bute? Nabugereranya n'iki?
Luke13:19 Bumeze nk'akabuto kitwa sinapi umuntu yateye mu murima we
Luke13:20 Yezu yongera kuvuga ati: “Ubwami bw'Imana nabugereranya n'iki?
Luke13:21 Bumeze nk'umusemburo umugore yafashe
Luke13:22 Nuko Yezu akomeza urugendo agana i Yeruzalemu
Luke13:23 Umuntu umwe aramubaza ati: “Mwigisha
Luke13:24 “Muharanire kwinjira mu irembo rifunganye! Reka nkubwire
Luke13:25 Nyir'urugo nagaruka agakinga urugi
Luke13:26 Ni bwo muzavuga muti: ‘Twasangiraga nawe ukigishiriza mu mayira y'iwacu.’
Luke13:27 Na bwo azababwira ati: ‘Simbazi
Luke13:28 Ubwo ni bwo muzarira mugahekenya amenyo
Luke13:29 Abantu bazaturuka iburasirazuba n'iburengerazuba
Luke13:30 Bityo bamwe mu b'inyuma bazaba ab'imbere
Luke13:31 Ako kanya bamwe mu Bafarizayi baramubwira bati: “Va hano ugende kuko Herodi ashaka kukwica.”
Luke13:32 Arabasubiza ati: “Nimugende mumbwirire iyo ndyarya ko navuze nti ‘Dore uyu munsi n'ejo ndamenesha ingabo za Satani
Luke13:33 Nubwo bimeze bityo
Luke13:34 “Yeruzalemu! Yeruzalemu! Wica abahanuzi kandi ukicisha amabuye abagutumweho! Ni kangahe nashatse gukorakoranya abana bawe nk'uko inkoko ibundikira imishwi yayo mu mababa
Luke13:35 Dore iwanyu hagiye gusigara ari itongo! Reka mbabwire: ntimuzongera kumbona kugeza igihe muzavuga muti: ‘Hasingizwe uje mu izina rya Nyagasani!’ ”
Luke14:1 Ku munsi w'isabato Yezu ajya mu rugo rw'umwe mu batware b'Abafarizayi kugira ngo afungure
Luke14:2 Nuko umuntu urwaye urushwima aba ageze imbere ye.
Luke14:3 Yezu ni ko gufata ijambo
Luke14:4 Ariko barinumira. Yezu ni ko gukora kuri uwo murwayi
Luke14:5 Nuko arababaza ati: “Ni nde muri mwe utarohora umwana we waguye mu iriba
Luke14:6 Babura icyo bamusubiza.
Luke14:7 Yezu yitegereza ukuntu abatumirwa batanguranwa imyanya y'icyubahiro
Luke14:8 “Igihe bagutumiye mu bukwe ntukihe umwanya w'imbere. Birashoboka ko haba undi ugushumbije icyubahiro watumiwe
Luke14:9 nyir'ukubatumira mwembi akakubwira ati: ‘Bisa uyu muntu!’ Yewe
Luke14:10 Ahubwo igihe utumiwe ujye wicara mu mwanya w'inyuma
Luke14:11 Erega uwishyira hejuru azacishwa bugufi
Luke14:12 Nuko Yezu abwira uwari wamutumiye ati: “Nutumira abantu ku meza
Luke14:13 Ahubwo nugira umunsi mukuru ujye utumira abakene n'abamugaye
Luke14:14 Ni bwo uzaba uhirwa kuko bo batazabasha kukwitura. Imana ni yo izakwitura ubwo intungane zizazuka.”
Luke14:15 Umwe mu basangiraga na Yezu yumvise ibyo aramubwira ati: “Hahirwa umuntu uzaherwa ifunguro mu bwami bw'Imana.”
Luke14:16 Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati: “Habayeho umuntu wakoresheje umunsi mukuru ukomeye
Luke14:17 Igihe cyo gufungura kigeze
Luke14:18 Nuko bose batangira guhimba impamvu zo kubyangirira. Uwa mbere ati: ‘Naguze umurima none ngomba kujya kuwureba
Luke14:19 Undi ati: ‘Naguze ibimasa icumi byo guhinga none ngiye kubigerageza
Luke14:20 Naho undi ati: ‘Narongoye none simbasha kuza.’
Luke14:21 “Uwo mugaragu asubira kwa shebuja
Luke14:22 Umugaragu aragaruka aravuga ati: ‘Databuja nakoze ibyo wategetse
Luke14:23 Shebuja aramubwira ati: ‘Ongera ujye mu mayira yose no mu mihōra
Luke14:24 Ndababwira ko nta n'umwe muri ba bagabo nari natumiye uzangerera ku meza.’ ”
Luke14:25 Abantu benshi bari bashagaye Yezu
Luke14:26 “Umuntu wese unsanga ntankunde cyane kuruta uko akunda se na nyina
Luke14:27 Byongeye kandi umuntu wese utikorera umusaraba we ngo ankurikire
Luke14:28 “Mbese ni nde muri mwe washaka kubaka inzu y'igorofa
Luke14:29 Bitabaye bityo
Luke14:30 bavuga bati: ‘Dore umuntu watangiye kubaka none ananiwe kuzuza!’
Luke14:31 “Cyangwa se umwami waba afite ingabo ibihumbi icumi
Luke14:32 Asanze bidashoboka yakohereza intumwa kuri uwo mwami akiri kure
Luke14:33 Yezu yungamo ati: “Nuko rero namwe
Luke14:34 “Ubusanzwe umunyu ni ingirakamaro
Luke14:35 Nta kamaro uba ugifite
Luke15:1 Abasoresha n'abandi banyabyaha bose bakundaga kwegera Yezu kugira ngo bamwumve.
Luke15:2 Abafarizayi n'abigishamategeko bābibona bakijujuta bavuga bati: “Uyu muntu yakira abanyabyaha ndetse agasangira na bo! ”
Luke15:3 Yezu ni ko kubacira uyu mugani ati:
Luke15:4 “Ni nde muri mwe waba ufite intama ijana
Luke15:5 Iyo ayibonye arishima akayiterera ku bitugu
Luke15:6 akayitahana iwe. Nuko agakoranya incuti n'abaturanyi
Luke15:7 Reka mbabwire: ni na ko mu ijuru bishimira umunyabyaha umwe wihannye
Luke15:8 “Cyangwa ni nde mugore waba afite ibikoroto icumi by'ifeza kimwe kigatakara
Luke15:9 Iyo akibonye akoranya incuti n'abaturanyi akavuga ati: ‘Twishimane kuko nabonye igikoroto nari natakaje.’
Luke15:10 Reka mbabwire: ni na ko mu ikoraniro ry'abamarayika b'Imana bishimira umunyabyaha umwe wihannye.”
Luke15:11 Maze Yezu aravuga ati: “Habayeho umugabo akagira abahungu babiri.
Luke15:12 Umunsi umwe umutoya abwira se ati: ‘Data
Luke15:13 Hashize iminsi mike
Luke15:14 Byose amaze kubitsemba
Luke15:15 Nuko ajya gusaba akazi ku muturage wo muri icyo gihugu
Luke15:16 Yifuzaga kwicisha isari ibyo bagaburiraga ingurube
Luke15:17 Nyuma aza kwisubiraho agira ati: ‘N'ukuntu abakozi ba data ari benshi bakarya bagasigaza! Nyamara jyewe inzara ikaba insinze hano!
Luke15:18 Reka mpaguruke njye kwa Data mubwire nti: “Data
Luke15:19 singikwiriye kwitwa umwana wawe. Ungire gusa nk'umwe mu bakozi bawe.” ’
Luke15:20 Nuko arahaguruka ajya kwa se. “Se amurabutswe akiri kure yumva impuhwe ziramusābye
Luke15:21 Uwo muhungu abwira se ati: ‘Data
Luke15:22 Ariko se abwira abagaragu be ati: ‘Nimubangukane ikanzu irusha izindi ubwiza muyimwambike. Mumwambike n'impeta ku rutoki n'inkweto mu birenge.
Luke15:23 Muzane cya kimasa cy'umushishe mukibage
Luke15:24 Uyu mwana wanjye yari yarapfuye none yazutse
Luke15:25 “Icyo gihe umuhungu mukuru w'uwo mubyeyi yari mu murima. Atashye agere hafi y'urugo
Luke15:26 Ahamagara umwe mu bagaragu aramubaza ati: ‘Mbese ibyo ni ibiki numva?’
Luke15:27 Aramusubiza ati: ‘Ni murumuna wawe wagarutse none se yamubagiye cya kimasa cy'umushishe
Luke15:28 “Undi ararakara cyane yigumira hanze. Se ni ko gusohoka amwingingira kwinjira.
Luke15:29 Nuko abwira se ati: ‘Reba nawe! Uzi imyaka yose maze ngukorera. Nta tegeko ryawe na rimwe narenzeho
Luke15:30 None uriya muhungu wawe wamaze ibyawe abisangira n'indaya
Luke15:31 Se aramusubiza ati: ‘Mwana wanjye
Luke15:32 Ariko byari ngombwa rwose ko twishima tukanezerwa
Luke16:1 Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Habayeho umuntu w'umukungu wari ufite umugaragu yashinze ibintu bye. Baza kumuregera uwo mugaragu ngo aramutagaguriza ibintu.
Luke16:2 Nuko aramuhamagara aramubaza ati: ‘Ibyo nkumvaho ni ibiki? Ngaho murikira ibyanjye kuko kuva ubu utagikomeje kumbera mu bintu.’
Luke16:3 Uwo munyabintu aribaza ati: ‘Ubu se mbigenje nte ko databuja agiye kunyaga? Guhinga sinabishobora! Gusabiriza byantera isoni!
Luke16:4 Yewe
Luke16:5 Nuko abari bafite imyenda ya shebuja
Luke16:6 Aramusubiza ati: ‘Amadebe ijana y'amavuta y'iminzenze.’ Umugaragu aramubwira ati: ‘Akira urupapuro rwawe
Luke16:7 Hanyuma abaza undi ati: ‘Harya wowe wishyuzwa iki?’ Ati: ‘Imifuka magana atanu y'ingano.’ Umugaragu aramubwira ati: ‘Akira urupapuro rwawe wandike magana ane.’
Luke16:8 “Nuko shebuja ashima uwo munyabintu w'umuhemu
Luke16:9 Yezu yungamo ati: “Reka mbabwire: amafaranga ni amatindi
Luke16:10 Ugira umurava mu tuntu duto
Luke16:11 Niba rero mutagize umurava mu matindi y'amafaranga
Luke16:12 Niba kandi mutagize umurava mugenga iby'abandi
Luke16:13 “Nta mugaragu ushobora gukorera ba shebuja babiri. Iyo adakunze umwe ngo yange undi
Luke16:14 Abafarizayi bumvise ibyo byose bagira Yezu urw'amenyo
Luke16:15 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Mwebwe mwigira intungane imbere y'abantu nyamara Imana izi imitima yanyu
Luke16:16 “Kuyoborwa n'Amategeko n'ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi byagarukiye kuri Yohani Mubatiza. Kuva ubwo hatangira gutangazwa Ubutumwa bwiza bwerekeye ubwami bw'Imana
Luke16:17 Icyakora icyoroshye ni uko ijuru n'isi byashira
Luke16:18 “Umuntu wese wirukana umugore we akazana undi aba asambanye
Luke16:19 “Habayeho umugabo w'umukungu wambaraga imyambaro myiza ihebuje y'ibitare n'iy'amabara
Luke16:20 Hakaba n'umutindi witwaga Lazaro wari waramazwe n'ibisebe. Yahoraga aryamye ku irembo ry'uwo mukungu.
Luke16:21 Yifuzaga guhazwa n'utuvungukira tuva ku meza y'uwo mukungu. Byongeye kandi
Luke16:22 “Igihe kiza kugera uwo mutindi arapfa
Luke16:23 Ageze ikuzimu arababara cyane
Luke16:24 Nuko arangurura ijwi ati: ‘Mubyeyi Aburahamu
Luke16:25 “Aburahamu aramusubiza ati: ‘Mwana wanjye
Luke16:26 Uretse n'ibyo hagati yacu namwe hari imanga ndende
Luke16:27 Wa mukungu ni ko kuvuga ati: ‘Noneho mubyeyi
Luke16:28 asangeyo abavandimwe banjye batanu
Luke16:29 “Aburahamu aramusubiza ati: ‘Abavandimwe bawe bafite Amategeko ya Musa n'ibyo abahanuzi banditse
Luke16:30 Undi aravuga ati: ‘Ibyo ntibihagije mubyeyi Aburahamu! Ahubwo hagize uwapfuye uzuka akabasanga bazīhana.’
Luke16:31 Aburahamu aramusubiza ati: ‘Nibatita ku Mategeko ya Musa no ku byo abahanuzi banditse
Luke17:1 Nuko Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Ibigusha abantu mu cyaha ntibizabura
Luke17:2 Icyaruta kuri we ni uko bamuhambira urusyo ku ijosi bakamuroha mu kiyaga
Luke17:3 Mwirinde rero! “Mugenzi wawe nagucumuraho umucyahe
Luke17:4 Ndetse naho yagucumuraho karindwi ku munsi
Luke17:5 Nuko Intumwa za Nyagasani Yezu ziramubwira ziti: “Twongerere ukwizera Imana!”
Luke17:6 Na we ni ko kubabwira ati: “Muramutse mufite ukwizera nibura kungana urwara
Luke17:7 Yezu yungamo ati: “Tuvuge ko umwe muri mwe afite umugaragu umuhingira cyangwa umuragirira
Luke17:8 Reka da
Luke17:9 Mbese ubwo yashimira uwo mugaragu kuko yakoze ibyo ategetswe?
Luke17:10 Namwe ni uko igihe mukoze ibyo mutegetswe byose
Luke17:11 Igihe Yezu yaganaga i Yeruzalemu
Luke17:12 Nuko agiye kwinjira mu mudugudu
Luke17:13 barangurura ijwi bati: “Mwigisha Yezu
Luke17:14 Yezu ababonye arababwira ati: “Nimujye kwiyereka abatambyi.” Baragenda
Luke17:15 Umwe muri bo abonye ko akize
Luke17:16 Yikubita hasi yubamye imbere ya Yezu aramushimira. Kandi rero uwo yari Umunyasamariya.
Luke17:17 Yezu ni ko kubaza ati: “Mbese harya
Luke17:18 Nta wundi wagarutse ngo ahimbaze Imana uretse uyu munyamahanga?”
Luke17:19 Yezu ni ko kumubwira ati: “Byuka wigendere
Luke17:20 Abafarizayi baramubaza bati: “Ubwami bw'Imana buzaza ryari?” Arabasubiza ati: “Ubwami bw'Imana ntibuza ku mugaragaro.
Luke17:21 Ntawe uzavuga ati: ‘Dore ngubu’
Luke17:22 Naho abigishwa be arababwira ati: “Hazabaho igihe muzifuza kubona Umwana w'umuntu nibura umunsi umwe
Luke17:23 Bazababwira bati: ‘Nguriya!’
Luke17:24 Nk'uko umurabyo urabya ukamurikira ijuru kuva mu ruhande rumwe ukagera mu rundi
Luke17:25 Ariko rero agomba kubanza kugirirwa nabi ku buryo bwinshi
Luke17:26 Nk'uko byagenze kandi mu gihe cya Nowa
Luke17:27 Icyo gihe bararyaga bakanywa bagashyingirwa
Luke17:28 Cyangwa nk'uko byagenze mu gihe cya Loti
Luke17:29 Nyamara umunsi Loti avuye i Sodoma
Luke17:30 Uko ni ko bizaba ku munsi Umwana w'umuntu azahishurwa.
Luke17:31 “Kuri uwo munsi
Luke17:32 Mwibuke muka Loti!
Luke17:33 Ushaka kurengera ubuzima bwe azabubura
Luke17:34 Reka mbabwire: abantu babiri bazaba baryamye mu buriri bumwe nijoro
Luke17:35 Abagore babiri bazaba bari hamwe basya
Luke17:36 Abagabo babiri bazaba bari mu murima
Luke17:37 Abigishwa be ni ko kubaza bati: “Ibyo bizabera he?” Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Aho intumbi iri hose
Luke18:1 Yezu acira abigishwa be umugani
Luke18:2 Aravuga ati: “Mu mujyi umwe habayeho umucamanza utatinyaga Imana
Luke18:3 Muri uwo mujyi hakaba umupfakazi wahoraga aza kumubwira ati: ‘Nkiranura n'undenganya.’
Luke18:4 Uwo mucamanza akabyangirira
Luke18:5 ariko uyu mupfakazi arandembeje. Reka urubanza rwe nduce rurangire
Luke18:6 Nyagasani Yezu yungamo ati: “Ese ntimwumvise amagambo y'uwo mucamanza w'umuhemu?
Luke18:7 None se Imana yo yabura ite kurenganura abo yitoranyirije
Luke18:8 Ndababwira ko igihe kizagera ikabarenganura bwangu. Ariko se ubwo Umwana w'umuntu azaza
Luke18:9 Umugani ukurikira na wo Yezu yawuciriye abantu bamwe biyiziho ubutungane
Luke18:10 Aravuga ati: “Habayeho abantu babiri bazamutse bajya mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana gusenga
Luke18:11 Umufarizayi ahagarara yemye asenga bucece ati: ‘Mana
Luke18:12 Nigomwa kurya kabiri mu cyumweru
Luke18:13 “Umusoresha we yihagararira kure adatinyuka no kūbura amaso ngo arebe ku ijuru
Luke18:14 Nuko Yezu yungamo ati: “Reka mbabwire: uwo musoresha yasubiye iwe agizwe intungane ku Mana
Luke18:15 Abantu bazanira Yezu impinja ngo azikoreho
Luke18:16 Yezu yiyegereza izo mpinja aravuga ati: “Nimureke abana bato bansange
Luke18:17 Ndababwira nkomeje ko utākira ubwami bw'Imana nk'uko umwana muto abwākira
Luke18:18 Nuko haza umutware abaza Yezu ati: “Mwigisha mwiza
Luke18:19 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Unyitiye iki mwiza? Nta mwiza n'umwe ubaho uretse Imana yonyine.
Luke18:20 Uzi Amategeko ngo ‘Ntugasambane
Luke18:21 Undi aramusubiza ati: “Ayo yose narayakurikije kuva mu buto bwanjye.”
Luke18:22 Yezu abyumvise aramubwira ati: “Icyakora ushigaje kimwe: genda ugurishe ibyo utunze byose ibivuyemo ubigabanye abakene
Luke18:23 Uwo muntu abyumvise arashavura kuko yari umukungu.
Luke18:24 Yezu abibonye atyo
Luke18:25 Icyoroshye ni uko ingamiya yanyura mu mwenge w'urushinge
Luke18:26 Abamwumvaga barabaza bati: “Noneho se ni nde ubasha kurokoka?”
Luke18:27 Yezu aravuga ati: “Ibidashobokera abantu
Luke18:28 Nuko Petero aramubwira ati: “Twebwe twasize ibyacu byose turagukurikira.”
Luke18:29 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko umuntu wese wasize urugo cyangwa umugore cyangwa abavandimwe
Luke18:30 atazabura guhabwa ibiruseho incuro nyinshi muri iki gihe
Luke18:31 Nuko Yezu yihererana n'abigishwa be cumi na babiri
Luke18:32 Azagabizwa abanyamahanga bamushinyagurire
Luke18:33 Nuko nibamara kumukubita ibiboko
Luke18:34 Ibyo byose biyobera abigishwa be
Luke18:35 Yezu agera hafi y'i Yeriko
Luke18:36 Yumvise imbaga y'abantu bahita ibaza ibyo ari byo.
Luke18:37 Babwira uwo muntu bati: “Ni Yezu w'i Nazareti uhita.”
Luke18:38 Nuko arangurura ijwi ati: “Yezu mwene Dawidi
Luke18:39 Abari imbere baramucyaha ngo aceceke. Ariko we arushaho kurangurura ati: “Mwene Dawidi
Luke18:40 Yezu arahagarara ategeka ko bamumuzanira. Amugeze iruhande
Luke18:41 “Urashaka ko ngukorera iki?” Na we ati: “Nyagasani
Luke18:42 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ngaho humuka
Luke18:43 Ako kanya arahumuka
Luke19:1 Yezu agera mu mujyi wa Yeriko arawambukiranya.
Luke19:2 Haza umugabo w'umukire witwaga Zakeyo
Luke19:3 Ashaka kureba Yezu ntiyabishobora
Luke19:4 Ariruka abacaho yurira umuvumu wari aho Yezu agiye kunyura
Luke19:5 Yezu ageze aho ahantu areba hejuru aramubwira ati: “Zakeyo
Luke19:6 Yururuka vuba ajyana Yezu iwe
Luke19:7 Abantu bose babibonye barijujuta baravuga bati: “Dorere
Luke19:8 Zakeyo arahaguruka abwira Yezu ati: “Nyagasani
Luke19:9 Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati: “Uyu munsi agakiza kageze muri uru rugo.” Abwira abari aho ati: “Erega uyu na we akomoka kuri Aburahamu!
Luke19:10 Umwana w'umuntu yazanywe no gushaka abazimiye no kubakiza.”
Luke19:11 Abantu bacyumva ibyo
Luke19:12 Aravuga ati: “Habayeho umuntu w'impfura wagiye mu gihugu cya kure
Luke19:13 Nuko ahamagara icumi mu bagaragu be
Luke19:14 Icyakora abaturage bo mu gihugu cye baramwangaga. Nuko bamukurikiza intumwa zivuga ziti: ‘Ntidushaka ko uwo mugabo atubera umwami.’
Luke19:15 “Amaze kwimikwa aragaruka
Luke19:16 Uwa mbere ahingutse aravuga ati: ‘Nyagasani
Luke19:17 Na we ni ko kumubwira ati: ‘Nuko nuko mugaragu mwiza
Luke19:18 Uwa kabiri araza aravuga ati: ‘Nyagasani
Luke19:19 Na we aramubwira ati: ‘Nawe ba umutware w'imijyi itanu.’
Luke19:20 “Nuko undi araza ati: ‘Nyagasani
Luke19:21 mbitewe no kugutinya kuko uri umunyamwaga
Luke19:22 Umwami aramusubiza ati: ‘Wa mugaragu mubi we
Luke19:23 None se kuki imari yanjye utayishyize mu isanduku yo kuzigama? Aho ngarukiye mba nyishubijwe hamwe n'inyungu yayo.’
Luke19:24 “Nuko abwira abari bahagaze aho ati: ‘Nimumwake icyo gikoroto mu gihe ufite icumi.’
Luke19:25 Baramubwira bati: ‘Ariko se Nyagasani
Luke19:26 Umwami ati: ‘Reka mbabwire: ufite wese azongererwa
Luke19:27 Naho ba banzi banjye batashakaga ko mbabera umwami
Luke19:28 Yezu amaze kubabwira ibyo
Luke19:29 Nuko yegereye i Betifage n'i Betaniya ku Musozi w'Iminzenze
Luke19:30 “Mujye muri ziriya ngo
Luke19:31 Nihagira ubabaza ati: ‘Murakiziturira iki?’ mumubwire muti: ‘Ni Databuja ugikeneye.’ ”
Luke19:32 Nuko izo ntumwa ziragenda
Luke19:33 Bakizitura cya cyana cy'indogobe
Luke19:34 Ni ko kubasubiza bati: “Ni Databuja ugikeneye.”
Luke19:35 Nuko bakizanira Yezu
Luke19:36 Akigenda abantu barambura imyitero yabo mu nzira.
Luke19:37 Ageze ahamanuka ku Musozi w'Iminzenze
Luke19:38 bakavuga bati: “Hasingizwe Umwami uje mu izina rya Nyagasani! Amahoro n'ikuzo bisagambe mu ijuru ahasumba ahandi!”
Luke19:39 Nuko Abafarizayi bamwe bari muri iyo mbaga baramubwira bati: “Mwigisha
Luke19:40 Ni ko kubasubiza ati: “Reka mbabwire: n'iyo aba baceceka
Luke19:41 Ageze hafi y'umurwa arawitegereza
Luke19:42 “Iyaba uyu munsi wamenyaga ibyaguhesha amahoro! Nyamara na n'ubu urabihishwe.
Luke19:43 Hazaza iminsi abanzi bawe bazakugote bubaka ibikwa byo kuririraho inkuta
Luke19:44 Bazagutsembana n'abagutuye
Luke19:45 Hanyuma Yezu yinjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Luke19:46 Arababwira ati: “Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo ‘Inzu yanjye izaba Inzu yo gusengeramo’
Luke19:47 Nuko buri munsi akigishiriza mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana. Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko
Luke19:48 nyamara ntibabone aho bamuturuka kuko rubanda rwose bari batwawe no kumva ibyo avuga.
Luke20:1 Umunsi umwe Yezu yigishirizaga rubanda mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana atangaza Ubutumwa bwiza
Luke20:2 baramubwira bati: “Tubwire aho uvana ubushobozi bwo gukora ibyo ukora
Luke20:3 Arabasubiza ati: “Nanjye reka mbabaze munsubize.
Luke20:4 Mbese Yohani yatumwe n'Imana kubatiza
Luke20:5 Batangira kubwirana bati: “Nituvuga ko yatumwe n'Imana
Luke20:6 Na none kandi nituvuga ko yatumwe n'abantu
Luke20:7 Nuko baramusubiza bati: “Ntitubizi.”
Luke20:8 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nanjye rero simbabwiye aho nkura ubushobozi bwo gukora ibyo nkora.”
Luke20:9 Hanyuma acira rubanda uyu mugani ati: “Habayeho umugabo wateye ibiti by'imizabibu
Luke20:10 Igihe kigeze atuma umugaragu kuri ba bahinzi
Luke20:11 Nyir'imizabibu yongera kubatumaho undi mugaragu
Luke20:12 Nuko yohereza uwa gatatu
Luke20:13 Nyir'imizabibu ni ko kwibaza ati: ‘Ubu se ngire nte? Reka nohereze umwana wanjye nkunda cyane
Luke20:14 Abahinzi babonye uwo mwana bajya inama bati: ‘Dore uwarazwe ibintu araje! Nimuze tumwice kugira ngo byose bibe ibyacu!’
Luke20:15 Nuko bamukurubana inyuma y'uruzitiro baramwica. “Mbese mubona nyir'imizabibu azagenza ate abo bahinzi?
Luke20:16 Azaza abatsembe maze imizabibu ayishyiremo abandi.” Abantu bumvise ibyo baravuga bati: “Ntibikabeho!”
Luke20:17 Yezu arabitegereza maze arababwira ati: “Mbese ibi byanditswe bivuga iki ngo ‘Ibuye abubatsi banze
Luke20:18 Umuntu wese uzagwa kuri iryo buye azavunagurika
Luke20:19 Nuko abigishamategeko n'abakuru bo mu batambyi bashaka kumufata ako kanya
Luke20:20 Bamugendaho maze bohereza abantu bo kumugenza bigize nk'intungane
Luke20:21 Nuko abo baramubaza bati: “Mwigisha
Luke20:22 Mbese ni ngombwa ko dutanga umusoro w'umwami w'i Roma
Luke20:23 Yezu amenya uburiganya bwabo arababwira ati:
Luke20:24 “Nimunyereke igiceri. Mbese iyi shusho n'iri zina biriho ni ibya nde?” Baramusubiza bati: “Ni iby'umwami w'i Roma.”
Luke20:25 Arababwira ati: “Nuko rero iby'umwami w'i Roma mubihe umwami w'i Roma
Luke20:26 Babura uko bamufatira mu magambo imbere ya rubanda. Batangazwa n'igisubizo cye barinumira.
Luke20:27 Bamwe mu Basaduseyi (abo ni bo bavugaga ko kuzuka bitabaho)
Luke20:28 “Mwigisha
Luke20:29 Habayeho rero abavandimwe barindwi. Uwa mbere ashaka umugore maze apfa adasize umwana.
Luke20:30 Uwa kabiri acyura uwo mupfakazi na we biba bityo
Luke20:31 n'uwa gatatu amucyuye biba bityo. Bose uko ari barindwi bapfa ntawe umubyayeho umwana.
Luke20:32 Amaherezo umugore na we arapfa.
Luke20:33 Mbese igihe abantu bazazuka
Luke20:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ab'iyi si ni bo bagira abagore cyangwa abagabo.
Luke20:35 Nyamara abo Imana izasanga bakwiriye kuzuka bakabaho mu yindi si izaza
Luke20:36 Baba batagipfa ukundi kuko baba bameze nk'abamarayika
Luke20:37 Musa na we yerekanye neza ko abapfuye bazazuka ubwo yari kuri cya gihuru
Luke20:38 Erega Imana si iy'abapfuye
Luke20:39 Bamwe mu bigishamategeko baramubwira bati: “Mwigisha
Luke20:40 Kuva ubwo ntibatinyuka kugira ikindi bamubaza.
Luke20:41 Yezu arababaza ati: “Ni iki gituma bavuga ko Kristo ari umwana wa Dawidi?
Luke20:42 Dawidi ubwe yavuze mu gitabo cya Zaburi ati: ‘Nyagasani yabwiye Umwami wanjye ati: “Icara ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bwanjye
Luke20:43 nanjye nzahindura abanzi bawe nk'akabaho ukandagizaho ibirenge.” ’
Luke20:44 None se ubwo Dawidi ubwe yita Kristo umwami we
Luke20:45 Yezu abwira abigishwa be rubanda rwose rwumva ati:
Luke20:46 “Murajye mwirinda abigishamategeko
Luke20:47 Barya ingo z'abapfakazi nyamara bakiha kuvuga amasengesho y'urudaca. Abo bazacirwa urubanza rukaze kurusha abandi.”
Luke21:1 Yezu yubuye amaso
Luke21:2 abona n'umupfakazi w'umukene ashyiramo uduceri tubiri gusa.
Luke21:3 Nuko aravuga ati: “Ndababwiza ukuri
Luke21:4 Bariya bose batanze ku bibasagutse
Luke21:5 Bamwe barataga Ingoro y'Imana bavuga uburyo yubatswe n'amabuye meza
Luke21:6 “Hari igihe biriya byose mureba bizasenywa
Luke21:7 Baramubaza bati: “Mwigisha
Luke21:8 Yezu aravuga ati: “Muramenye ntimuzayobe
Luke21:9 Nimwumva urusaku rw'intambara n'imyivumbagatanyo ntimuzakuke umutima
Luke21:10 Yungamo ati: “Igihugu kizarwana n'ikindi
Luke21:11 Hazabaho imitingito ikaze kandi hirya no hino hatere inzara n'ibyorezo. Hazabaho n'ibiteye ubwoba n'ibimenyetso bikomeye bivuye mu ijuru.
Luke21:12 Ariko mbere y'ibyo byose bazabafata babatoteze
Luke21:13 Ibyo bizatuma mumbera abagabo.
Luke21:14 Ntimuzirirwe mubunza imitima mbere y'igihe mushaka icyo mwireguza.
Luke21:15 Ni jyewe uzabihera ubushobozi bwo kumenya icyo mukwiye kuvuga
Luke21:16 Muzagambanirwa n'ababyeyi banyu n'abo muva inda imwe na bene wanyu n'incuti zanyu
Luke21:17 Muzangwa na bose babampōra.
Luke21:18 Nyamara nta gasatsi na kamwe kazapfuka ku mitwe yanyu.
Luke21:19 Nimwihangana ni bwo muzarokora ubugingo bwanyu.
Luke21:20 “Ubwo muzabona Yeruzalemu igoswe n'ingabo
Luke21:21 Icyo gihe abazaba bari muri Yudeya bazahungire mu misozi. Abo bizasanga mu mujyi rwagati bazawuvemo
Luke21:22 kuko iminsi yo guhana abagomeye Imana izaba igeze
Luke21:23 Hagowe abazaba batwite cyangwa bonsa muri iyo minsi
Luke21:24 Bazashirira ku nkota
Luke21:25 “Hazaba ibimenyetso ku zuba no ku kwezi no ku nyenyeri. Naho ku isi amahanga azakuka umutima ashoberwe
Luke21:26 Abantu bazicwa n'ubwoba bategereje ibigiye kuba ku isi
Luke21:27 Ubwo ni bwo bazabona Umwana w'umuntu aje mu gicu
Luke21:28 Nuko ibyo nibitangira kuba
Luke21:29 Nuko Yezu abaha ikigereranyo ati: “Mwitegereze umutini n'ibindi biti byose.
Luke21:30 Iyo mubonye bitoshye
Luke21:31 Ni na ko rero igihe muzabona ibyo nababwiye bibaye
Luke21:32 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ab'iki gihe batazashiraho ibyo byose bitabaye.
Luke21:33 Ijuru n'isi bizashira ariko amagambo yanjye azahoraho.
Luke21:34 “Nuko rero muririnde
Luke21:35 nk'umutego
Luke21:36 Nuko rero murabe maso
Luke21:37 Yezu yirirwaga yigishiriza mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Luke21:38 abantu bose bakazindukira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana kumwumva.
Luke22:1 Iminsi mikuru y'imigati idasembuye ari na yo bita Pasika y'Abayahudi yari yegereje.
Luke22:2 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko bashakaga uburyo bakwicisha Yezu
Luke22:3 Nuko Satani yinjira muri Yuda bītaga Isikariyoti
Luke22:4 Ajya kuvugana n'abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abatware b'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana
Luke22:5 Baranezerwa bamusezeranya amafaranga.
Luke22:6 Nuko Yuda arabyemera
Luke22:7 Ku munsi wa mbere w'iminsi mikuru y'Imigati idasembuye
Luke22:8 Yezu atuma Petero na Yohani ati: “Nimugende mudutegurire ifunguro rya Pasika turi busangire.”
Luke22:9 Baramubaza bati: “Urashaka ko turitegurira hehe?”
Luke22:10 Arabasubiza ati: “Nimugera mu mujyi muraza guhura n'umugabo wikoreye ikibindi cy'amazi
Luke22:11 Nuko mubwire nyir'inzu muti ‘Umwigisha aravuze ngo utwereke icyumba ari busangiriremo n'abigishwa be ifunguro rya Pasika.’
Luke22:12 Uwo muntu ari bubereke icyumba kigari mu igorofa yo hejuru kirimo ibyicaro
Luke22:13 Baragenda basanga ari nk'uko yabibabwiye
Luke22:14 Igihe kigeze
Luke22:15 Arababwira ati: “Mbega ukuntu nifuje gusangira namwe iby'uyu Munsi wa Pasika ntarababazwa!
Luke22:16 Ndabamenyesha ko ntazongera kurya ifunguro rya Pasika
Luke22:17 Nuko afata igikombe
Luke22:18 Mbabwire kandi: kuva ubu sinzongera kunywa divayi kugeza igihe Imana izaba ishinze ubwami bwayo.”
Luke22:19 Hanyuma afata umugati
Luke22:20 Bamaze gufungura afata n'igikombe aravuga ati: “Iki gikombe ni Isezerano rishya Imana igiranye n'abayo
Luke22:21 Nyamara dore ungambanira ari hano
Luke22:22 Koko Umwana w'umuntu agiye gupfa nk'uko Imana yabigennye. Nyamara ugiye kumugambanira azabona ishyano.”
Luke22:23 Nuko batangira kubazanya ugiye gukora ibyo uwo ari we.
Luke22:24 Abigishwa ba Yezu batangira kujya impaka bibaza umukuru muri bo.
Luke22:25 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati: “Abami b'amahanga bayatwaza igitugu
Luke22:26 Ariko mwebwe ntimukagenze mutyo. Ahubwo umukuru muri mwe ajye agenza nk'umuto
Luke22:27 Mbese ye
Luke22:28 Icyakora ni mwebwe mutantereranye igihe nageragezwaga.
Luke22:29 Nuko rero mbateganyirije ubwami nk'uko nanjye Data yabunteganyirije
Luke22:30 kugira ngo muzarye kandi munywe dusangirira mu bwami bwanjye
Luke22:31 Nuko abwira Petero ati: “Yewe ga Simoni! Satani yabasabye Imana ngo abashungure nk'uko bashungura ingano.
Luke22:32 Icyakora wowe nagusabiye ku Mana kugira ngo utareka kunyizera
Luke22:33 Petero aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
Luke22:34 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Petero
Luke22:35 Hanyuma Yezu arababaza ati: “Ubwo nabatumaga nta mafaranga mufite
Luke22:36 Nuko arababwira ati: “Noneho rero ufite amafaranga ayajyane
Luke22:37 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: ‘Yashyizwe mu mubare w'abagome.’ Dore mbabwire: ibyo byanditswe bigomba kumbaho
Luke22:38 Baravuga bati: “Nyagasani
Luke22:39 Nuko Yezu arasohoka ajya ku Musozi w'Iminzenze nk'uko yari asanzwe abigenza
Luke22:40 Ahageze arababwira ati: “Nimusenge mutagwa mu bishuko.”
Luke22:41 Hanyuma arabītarura ajya nk'aho umuntu yatera ibuye
Luke22:42 “Data
Luke22:43 Nuko umumarayika ava mu ijuru
Luke22:44 Yari yashegeshwe n'ishavu
Luke22:45 Amaze gusenga
Luke22:46 Nuko arababwira ati: “Ko musinziriye? Nimubyuke musenge kugira ngo mutagwa mu bishuko.”
Luke22:47 Akivuga ibyo haza igitero cy'abantu. Uwitwaga Yuda
Luke22:48 Yezu aramubaza ati: “Ni ko se Yuda
Luke22:49 Abari kumwe na Yezu babonye ibigiye kuba
Luke22:50 Ndetse umwe muri bo akubita inkota umugaragu w'Umutambyi mukuru
Luke22:51 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimusigeho!” Nuko akora uwo mugaragu ku gutwi aramukiza.
Luke22:52 Hanyuma Yezu abaza abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abatware b'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana
Luke22:53 Iminsi yose nahoranaga namwe mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Luke22:54 Bafata Yezu baramujyana bamugeza mu nzu y'Umutambyi mukuru
Luke22:55 Nuko bacana umuriro hagati mu rugo bicara bawukikije
Luke22:56 Mu gihe Petero yicaye aho hafi y'umuriro
Luke22:57 Petero arabihakana ati: “Reka simuzi wa mugore we!”
Luke22:58 Hashize akanya gato
Luke22:59 Haza guhita nk'isaha
Luke22:60 Petero arasubiza ati: “Wa mugabo we
Luke22:61 Nuko Nyagasani arahindukira yitegereza Petero
Luke22:62 Nuko asohoka ashavuye
Luke22:63 Abantu bari barinze Yezu baramunnyega ari na ko bamukubita
Luke22:64 bakamupfuka mu maso bakavuga bati: “Hanura
Luke22:65 Nuko bakomeza kumutuka ibitutsi byinshi.
Luke22:66 Bumaze gucya
Luke22:67 baramubwira bati: “Niba uri Kristo bitubwire!” Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Naho nabibabwira nte ntimwanyemera.
Luke22:68 Ikindi kandi
Luke22:69 Nyamara mu gihe gito Umwana w'umuntu agiye kwicara ku ntebe ya cyami
Luke22:70 Nuko bose baramubaza bati: “Ni wowe rero Mwana w'Imana?” Arabasubiza ati: “Murabyivugiye ndi we.”
Luke22:71 Nuko baravuga bati: “Turacyashaka abagabo b'iki se kandi
Luke23:1 Hanyuma bose barahaguruka bajyana Yezu kwa Pilato.
Luke23:2 Batangira kumurega bagira bati: “Twasanze uyu muntu agomesha rubanda
Luke23:3 Pilato aramubaza ati: “Ni wowe mwami w'Abayahudi?” Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Urabyivugiye.”
Luke23:4 Pilato abwira abakuru bo mu batambyi n'imbaga y'abantu bari aho ati: “Ndabona uyu muntu nta cyaha kimuhama.”
Luke23:5 Ariko bo bahatiriza bagira bati: “Yagomesheje rubanda muri Yudeya yose kubera ibyo yigisha
Luke23:6 Pilato yumvise ibyo abaza ko Yezu ari Umunyagalileya.
Luke23:7 Amenye rero ko ari uwo mu bwatsi bwa Herodi
Luke23:8 Herodi yishimira cyane kubona Yezu
Luke23:9 Amubaza byinshi ariko Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza.
Luke23:10 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko bari bahagaze aho bamurega ibirego bikomeye.
Luke23:11 Herodi n'abasirikari be baramusuzugura baramushinyagurira
Luke23:12 Uwo munsi Pilato na Herodi baruzura
Luke23:13 Pilato atumiza abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abandi bakuru b'Abayahudi na rubanda.
Luke23:14 Arababwira ati: “Mwanzaniye uyu muntu muvuga ko agomesha rubanda. None dore maze kumubariza imbere yanyu
Luke23:15 Herodi na we ni uko kuko yamutugaruriye. None rero uyu muntu nta cyo yakoze gikwiriye kumwicisha
Luke23:16 ngiye kumuhana maze murekure.” [
Luke23:17 Ubusanzwe Pilato yagombaga kubarekurira imfungwa imwe ku munsi mukuru wa Pasika.]
Luke23:18 Nuko bose basakuriza icyarimwe bati: “Tanga uwo muntu apfe
Luke23:19 (Baraba uwo yari yarafungiwe imyivumbagatanyo yari yarabaye mu mujyi igahitana umuntu.)
Luke23:20 Pilato yongera kubavugisha
Luke23:21 Ariko bo barasakuza bati: “Mutange abambwe ku musaraba! Nabambwe!”
Luke23:22 Pilato arongera ababaza ubwa gatatu ati: “Kuki? Ikibi yakoze ni ikihe ko nta cyo mubonyeho gikwiriye kumwicisha? Nuko rero nimara kumuhana ndamurekura.”
Luke23:23 Ariko barushaho gusakabaka basaba ko Yezu abambwa. Bakomeje gusakuza cyane
Luke23:24 Pilato ahitamo kubemerera ibyo bifuzaga.
Luke23:25 Abarekurira uwo bashakaga wari warafunzwe azira ubugome n'ubwicanyi. Naho Yezu aramutanga ngo agenzwe uko bashaka.
Luke23:26 Abasirikari bajyanye Yezu bafata uwitwa Simoni w'i Sirene wiviraga mu cyaro bamukorera umusaraba
Luke23:27 Yezu yari akurikiwe n'imbaga nyamwinshi ya rubanda
Luke23:28 Nuko Yezu arahindukira arababwira ati: “Bagore b'i Yeruzalemu
Luke23:29 Dore hagiye kuza igihe bazavuga bati: ‘Hahirwa ingumba n'inda zitigeze zibyara n'amabere atigeze yonsa.’
Luke23:30 Ubwo ni bwo bazatangira kubwira imisozi bati: ‘Nimutugwire’
Luke23:31 None se ubwo bagenje batyo igiti kibisi
Luke23:32 Bari bajyanye kandi n'abandi bantu babiri b'abagizi ba nabi
Luke23:33 Abasirikari bageze ahantu hitiriwe igihanga
Luke23:34 Yezu aravuga ati: “Data
Luke23:35 Rubanda bari bahagaze aho bareba
Luke23:36 Abasirikari na bo baramushinyagurira
Luke23:37 “Niba uri Umwami w'Abayahudi ngaho ikize turebe!”
Luke23:38 Hejuru ye hari hamanitse itangazo rivuga ngo “Uyu ni Umwami w'Abayahudi.”
Luke23:39 Umwe mu bagizi ba nabi bari babambanywe aramukoba ati: “Si wowe Kristo? Ngaho ikize natwe udukize!”
Luke23:40 Ariko mugenzi we aramucyaha ati: “Mbese nta n'ubwo utinya Imana
Luke23:41 Twebweho kiradukwiye kuko duhōwe ibyo twakoze
Luke23:42 Nuko aravuga ati: “Yezu
Luke23:43 Yezu ni ko kumusubiza ati: “Ni ukuri uyu munsi turaba turi kumwe muri paradiso.”
Luke23:44 Ahagana mu masaa sita
Luke23:45 Izuba rirazima
Luke23:46 Yezu avuga aranguruye ati: “Data
Luke23:47 Umukapiteni w'abasirikari bari aho abonye ibibaye
Luke23:48 Nuko abantu bose bari bateraniye aho barēbēra
Luke23:49 Abari baziranye na Yezu bose barimo abagore bamuherekeje kuva muri Galileya
Luke23:50 Hariho umugabo witwaga Yozefu ukomoka mu mujyi w'Abayahudi witwa Arimateya. Yari umuntu w'inyangamugayo kandi w'intungane
Luke23:51 
Luke23:52 Ajya kwa Pilato amusaba umurambo wa Yezu.
Luke23:53 Nuko awumanura ku musaraba awuhambira mu mwenda wera
Luke23:54 Wari umunsi w'imyiteguro
Luke23:55 Abagore bari bavanye na Yezu muri Galileya baherekeza Yozefu
Luke23:56 Nuko basubirayo bategura amarashi n'andi mavuta ahumura neza
Luke24:1 Kare mu museke ku cyumweru ari wo munsi wa mbere
Luke24:2 Basanga ibuye ryari rikinze imva rihirikiwe hirya.
Luke24:3 Binjiramo ariko ntibasangamo umurambo wa Nyagasani Yezu.
Luke24:4 Babibonye batyo bagwa mu kantu. Ako kanya abagabo babiri bambaye imyenda irabagirana barababonekera.
Luke24:5 Abagore bagira ubwoba bwinshi bubika amaso bareba hasi
Luke24:6 Ntari hano yazutse. Mwibuke ibyo yababwiye akiri muri Galileya
Luke24:7 agira ati: ‘Umwana w'umuntu agomba kugabizwa abagizi ba nabi
Luke24:8 Ni bwo bibutse ibyo Yezu yari yaravuze.
Luke24:9 Bava ku mva barataha
Luke24:10 Ababibwiye Intumwa za Yezu ni aba: Mariya w'i Magadala na Yowana
Luke24:11 Ariko Intumwa zumva ko ibyo abo bagore bazibwiye ari uburondogozi ntizabyemera.
Luke24:12 Nyamara Petero we arahaguruka
Luke24:13 Na none kuri uwo munsi
Luke24:14 Bagenda baganira ku byabaye muri iyo minsi.
Luke24:15 Bakivugana babyibazaho
Luke24:16 Baramureba ariko baba nk'impumyi ntibamumenya.
Luke24:17 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese muragenda muganira ku byerekeye iki?” Nuko bahagarara bijimye.
Luke24:18 Umwe muri bo witwaga Kileyopa aramubaza ati: “Ni wowe wenyine i Yeruzalemu utazi ibyahabaye muri iyi minsi?”
Luke24:19 Arababaza ati: “Ni ibiki byahabaye?” Baramusubiza ati: “Ibyabaye kuri Yezu w'i Nazareti. Uwo muntu yari umuhanuzi ufite ububasha mu byo yakoraga no mu byo yavugaga
Luke24:20 Twavuganaga n'ukuntu abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abayobozi bacu batanze uwo muntu ngo acirwe urwo gupfa
Luke24:21 Twiringiraga ko ari we uzavana Abisiraheli mu buja. Uretse n'ibyo
Luke24:22 Icyakora abagore bamwe bo muri twe badutangaje
Luke24:23 ntibabona umurambo we. Hanyuma baza batubwira ko abamarayika bababonekeye
Luke24:24 Ndetse bamwe muri twe bagiye ku mva basanga ibintu bimeze uko abo abagore bari babivuze
Luke24:25 Yezu aherako arababwira ati: “Mwa bapfu mwe mutinda kwemera ibyo abahanuzi bavuze byose!
Luke24:26 None se ntibyari ngombwa ko Kristo ababazwa ako kageni
Luke24:27 Nuko ahera ku bitabo bya Musa no ku by'abahanuzi bose
Luke24:28 Bageze hafi y'umurenge abo babiri bajyagaho
Luke24:29 Ariko baramwinginga bati: “Reka tugumane
Luke24:30 Bageze ku meza Yezu afata umugati
Luke24:31 Ako kanya bamera nk'abahumutse baramumenya
Luke24:32 Basigara bavugana bati: “Mbese imitima yacu ntiyari ikeye igihe yatuvugishaga turi mu nzira
Luke24:33 Ako kanya barahaguruka basubira i Yeruzalemu
Luke24:34 Bumva bavuga bati: “Ni ukuri Nyagasani yazutse
Luke24:35 Nuko na bo babatekerereza ibyababayeho mu nzira
Luke24:36 Bakivuga ibyo babona Yezu ahagaze hagati yabo
Luke24:37 Barakangarana bashya ubwoba
Luke24:38 Ariko arababwira ati: “Ikibakuye umutima ni iki kandi kuki mushidikanya ibyo mureba?
Luke24:39 Nimwitegereze ibiganza byanjye n'ibirenge byanjye
Luke24:40 Avuze atyo abereka ibiganza bye n'ibirenge bye.
Luke24:41 Nuko bagitangara kandi bagishidikanya kubera ibinezaneza
Luke24:42 Bamuhereza igisate cy'ifi yokeje.
Luke24:43 Aracyakira akirīra imbere yabo.
Luke24:44 Nyuma arababwira ati: “Ibyo ni byo nababwiraga nkiri kumwe namwe
Luke24:45 Nuko arabajijura kugira ngo basobanukirwe Ibyanditswe.
Luke24:46 Arababwira ati: “Uko ni ko byanditswe ko Kristo agomba kubabazwa akanapfa
Luke24:47 Byanditswe kandi ko uhereye i Yeruzalemu
Luke24:48 Ni mwe bagabo bo kubihamya.
Luke24:49 Kandi nzaboherereza uwo Data yasezeranye
Luke24:50 Nuko asohokana n'abigishwa be bagera hafi y'i Betaniya
Luke24:51 Igihe akibaha umugisha
Luke24:52 Abigishwa baramuramya maze basubira i Yeruzalemu bishimye cyane
Luke24:53 bagahora mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana bayisingiza.
John1:1 Mbere ya byose uwitwa Jambo yari ariho. Jambo uwo yari kumwe n'Imana kandi yari Imana.
John1:2 Yari kumwe n'Imana mbere ya byose.
John1:3 Ibintu byose byabayeho kubera we
John1:4 Muri we harimo ubugingo kandi ubwo bugingo bwari urumuri rw'abantu.
John1:5 Nuko urwo rumuri ruboneshereza mu mwijima
John1:6 Habayeho umuntu watumwe n'Imana akitwa Yohani.
John1:7 Yaje ari umugabo wo guhamya iby'urwo rumuri
John1:8 Si we wari urumuri ahubwo yazanywe no guhamya ibyarwo.
John1:9 Jambo ni we rumuri nyakuri rwaje ku isi
John1:10 Yari ku isi kandi isi yabayeho kubera we
John1:11 Yaje mu bye ariko abe ntibamwakira.
John1:12 Nyamara abamwakiriye bose bakemera uwo ari we
John1:13 Kuba abana b'Imana ntibiva ku buryo busanzwe bwo kubyara
John1:14 Jambo yabaye umuntu aba hagati muri twe
John1:15 Yohani ahamya ibye ararangurura ati: “Nguyu uwo navugaga nti: ‘Uje nyuma yanjye aranduta kuko yahozeho mbere yanjye.’ ”
John1:16 Twese twahawe ku migisha ye isendereye
John1:17 Amategeko yanyujijwe kuri Musa
John1:18 Nta muntu wigeze abona Imana
John1:19 Dore ibyo Yohani yahamije
John1:20 Abasubiza atishisha aranaberurira ati “Si jye Kristo.”
John1:21 Nuko baramubaza bati: “None se uri nde? Ese uri Eliya?” Ati: “Sindi we.” Baramubaza ati: “Mbese uri wa Muhanuzi?” Ati: “Oya.”
John1:22 Noneho baramubaza bati: “None se uri nde kugira ngo tubone icyo dusubiza abadutumye? Ese ibyawe ubivugaho iki?”
John1:23 Arabasubiza ati: “Ndi urangururira ijwi mu butayu ati: ‘Nimuringanize inzira ya Nyagasani’
John1:24 Abari batumwe bari abo mu Bafarizayi.
John1:25 Nuko baramubaza bati: “Kuki ubatiza niba utari Kristo cyangwa Eliya
John1:26 Yohani arabasubiza ati: “Jyewe mbatirisha amazi
John1:27 Yaje nyuma yanjye
John1:28 Ibyo byabereye i Betaniya
John1:29 Bukeye Yohani abona Yezu aje amusanga
John1:30 Uyu ni we navugaga nti: ‘Nyuma yanjye haje umuntu unduta
John1:31 Nanjye mbere sinari nzi uwo ari we
John1:32 Nuko Yohani arahamya ati: “Nabonye Mwuka w'Imana amanuka ava mu ijuru asa n'inuma
John1:33 Jye sinari nzi uwo ari we
John1:34 Narabyiboneye none ndahamya ko uwo ari we Mwana w'Imana.”
John1:35 Bukeye Yohani akaba ahagararanye na babiri mu bigishwa be.
John1:36 Abonye Yezu ahita aravuga ati: “Dore Umwana w'intama w'Imana!”
John1:37 Bumvise avuga atyo
John1:38 Yezu arahindukira abona bamukurikiye
John1:39 Arabasubiza ati: “Nimuze muharebe!” Nuko baragenda babona aho yari acumbitse
John1:40 Andereya uva inda imwe na Simoni Petero
John1:41 Uwo abanza gushaka umuvandimwe we Simoni
John1:42 maze amugeza kuri Yezu. Yezu amwitegereje aravuga ati: “Uri Simoni mwene Yohani
John1:43 Bukeye Yezu yiyemeza kujya muri Galileya
John1:44 Filipo yari uw'i Betsayida
John1:45 Filipo abona Natanayeli aramubwira ati: “Twabonye wa muntu uvugwa mu Mategeko yanditswe na Musa no mu byanditswe n'abahanuzi. Uwo ni Yezu mwene Yozefu w'i Nazareti.”
John1:46 Nuko Natanayeli aramubaza ati: “Mbese hari ikintu cyiza cyakomoka i Nazareti?” Filipo aramusubiza ati: “Ngwino urebe!”
John1:47 Yezu abonye Natanayeli aje amusanga aravuga ati: “Dore Umwisiraheli nyakuri utagira uburiganya.”
John1:48 Natanayeli aramubaza ati: “Wamenye ute?” Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Filipo ataraguhamagara
John1:49 Natanayeli aramubwira ati: “Mwigisha
John1:50 Yezu ati: “Mbese unyemejwe n'uko nkubwiye nti ‘Nakubonye munsi y'umutini?’ Uzabona ibiruta ibyo.”
John1:51 Nuko yungamo ati: “Ndakubwira nkomeje ko uzabona ijuru rikingutse
John2:1 Ku munsi wa gatatu haba ubukwe i Kana ho muri Galileya
John2:2 Yezu n'abigishwa be na bo bari babutumiwemo.
John2:3 Nuko nyina wa Yezu abonye ko divayi ishize aramubwira ati: “Nta divayi bagifite.”
John2:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Mubyeyi
John2:5 Nyina abwira abahereza ati: “Icyo ababwira cyose mugikore.”
John2:6 Aho hari intango esheshatu zibajwe mu mabuye zashyiriweho umuhango wa kiyahudi wo kwihumanura
John2:7 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimwuzuze izo ntango amazi.” Barazuzuza bageza ku rugara.
John2:8 Hanyuma arababwira ati: “Noneho nimudahe mushyīre umusangwa mukuru.” Baramushyīra.
John2:9 Umusangwa mukuru asogongera ayo mazi yamaze guhinduka divayi ntiyamenya aho iturutse
John2:10 aramubwira ati: “Ubusanzwe umuntu wese abanza gutanga divayi nziza
John2:11 Icyo gitangaza kimuranga Yezu yagikoze i Kana ho muri Galileya
John2:12 Hanyuma aramanuka agera i Kafarinawumu
John2:13 Umunsi wa Pasika y'Abayahudi wegereje
John2:14 Ageze mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana ahasanga abacuruzaga inka n'intama n'inuma
John2:15 Abohekanya imigozi ayigira nk'ikiboko bose abamenesha mu rugo rw'Ingoro
John2:16 Abwira abacuruzaga inuma ati: “Nimuzivane hano! Inzu ya Data ntimukayigire isoko!”
John2:17 Abigishwa be bibuka ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Ishyaka ngirira Ingoro yawe rirambaga.”
John2:18 Noneho Abayahudi baramubaza bati: “Uratanga kimenyetso ki kitwemeza ko wemerewe gukora bene ibyo?”
John2:19 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Nimusenye iyi ngoro
John2:20 Abayahudi bati: “Dorere
John2:21 Icyakora ingoro yavugaga ni umubiri we.
John2:22 Aho amariye kuzuka mu bapfuye
John2:23 Igihe Yezu yari i Yeruzalemu mu minsi mikuru ya Pasika
John2:24 Nyamara Yezu ntiyabagirira icyizere
John2:25 Byongeye kandi ntiyari akeneye gusiganuza ibyerekeye abantu
John3:1 Mu ishyaka ry'Abafarizayi harimo umuntu witwaga Nikodemu
John3:2 Nijoro asanga Yezu aramubwira ati: “Mwigisha
John3:3 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ndakubwira nkomeje ko umuntu utavutse ubwa kabiri atabasha kubona ubwami bw'Imana.”
John3:4 Nikodemu aramubaza ati: “Umuntu yabasha ate kuvuka kandi akuze? Mbese yabasha gusubira mu nda ya nyina akongera kuvuka?”
John3:5 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ndakubwira nkomeje ko umuntu utabyawe n'amazi na Mwuka w'Imana
John3:6 Ikibyarwa n'umubiri kiba ari umubiri
John3:7 Ntutangazwe n'uko nakubwiye nti: ‘Mugomba kuvuka ubwa kabiri.’
John3:8 Umuyaga uhuhira aho ushaka
John3:9 Nikodemu aramubaza ati: “Ibyo bishoboka bite?”
John3:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ukaba uri umwigisha mu Bisiraheli ntumenye ibyo?
John3:11 Ndakubwira nkomeje ko tuvuga ibyo tuzi kandi tugahamya ibyo twiboneye
John3:12 Nababwiye ibiba ku isi ntimwabyemera
John3:13 Nta wigeze azamuka ngo ajye mu ijuru
John3:14 Kandi nk'uko Musa yashyize inzoka hejuru ari mu butayu akayimanika ku giti
John3:15 kugira ngo umwizera wese ahabwe ubugingo buhoraho.”
John3:16 Imana yakunze cyane abantu bo ku isi yose
John3:17 Imana ntiyatumye Umwana wayo ku isi ngo acire iteka abo ku isi
John3:18 Uwizera Umwana w'Imana ntiyigera acirwa iteka
John3:19 Dore igituma abantu bacirwa iteka: ni uko urumuri rwaje ku isi maze abantu bikundira umwijima kuruta umucyo
John3:20 Umuntu wese ukora ibibi yanga umucyo
John3:21 Nyamara ukora iby'ukuri ajya ahabona
John3:22 Hanyuma y'ibyo Yezu ajyana n'abigishwa be mu ntara ya Yudeya
John3:23 Yohani na we yabatirizaga ahitwa Enoni hafi y'i Salimu
John3:24 Ubwo Yohani yari atarafatwa ngo afungwe.
John3:25 Nuko abigishwa ba Yohani bajya impaka n'undi Muyahudi ku byerekeye imihango yo kwihumanura.
John3:26 Basanga Yohani baramubwira bati: “Mwigisha
John3:27 Yohani arabasubiza ati: “Nta cyo umuntu abasha kwiha kirenze icyo Imana yamugeneye.
John3:28 Mwebwe ubwanyu mwambera abagabo b'ibyo navuze nti: ‘Jyewe sindi Kristo ahubwo ndi uwatumwe kumubanziriza.’
John3:29 Umukwe ni we nyir'umugeni
John3:30 We agomba gukuzwa naho jye ngaca bugufi.”
John3:31 Uturuka mu ijuru asumba byose
John3:32 ibyo yiboneye kandi yiyumviye ni byo ahamya
John3:33 Icyakora uwemera ibyo ahamya aba yemeje ko ibyo Imana ivuga ari ukuri.
John3:34 Uwatumwe n'Imana avuga ubutumwa bwayo
John3:35 Umwana w'Imana akundwa na Se kandi Se yamweguriye byose.
John3:36 Uwemera Umwana w'Imana aba abonye ubugingo buhoraho
John4:1 Abafarizayi bumva ko Yezu yunguka abigishwa
John4:2 nyamara si Yezu wabatizaga ahubwo ni abigishwa be.
John4:3 Nuko rero Yezu ava muri Yudeya asubira muri Galileya.
John4:4 Kugira ngo agereyo yagombaga kwambukiranya intara ya Samariya.
John4:5 Nuko agera mu nkengero z'umujyi wa Sikara muri iyo ntara
John4:6 Aho hari iriba rya Yakobo. Nuko Yezu yicara ku iriba kuko yari yananiwe kubera urugendo. Icyo hari hari nko mu masaa sita.
John4:7 Umunyasamariyakazi aza kuvoma
John4:8 Icyo gihe abigishwa be bari bagiye mu mujyi guhaha.
John4:9 Aramusubiza ati: “Ko uri Umuyahudi nkaba ndi Umunyasamariyakazi
John4:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Iyaba wari uzi ubuntu Imana igira n'ugusabye amazi uwo ari we
John4:11 Umugore aramubaza ati: “None se mutware
John4:12 Mbese waba uruta sogokuruza Yakobo waduhaye iri riba
John4:13 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Unywa kuri aya mazi wese arongera akagira inyota
John4:14 naho uzanywa ku mazi nzamuha ntazongera kugira inyota ukundi. Ahubwo ayo mazi nzamuha azaba isōko idudubiza muri we
John4:15 Umugore aramubwira ati: “Nyakubahwa
John4:16 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Genda uhamagare umugabo wawe maze ugaruke hano.”
John4:17 Umugore aramusubiza ati: “Nta mugabo mfite.” Yezu ati: “Ushubije neza ko nta mugabo ufite
John4:18 kuko washatse abagabo batanu kandi n'uwo mubana ubu akaba atari uwawe. Ibyo ubivuze ukuri.”
John4:19 Umugore aramubwira ati: “Nyakubahwa
John4:20 Ba sogokuruza basengeraga Imana kuri uriya musozi
John4:21 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Mugore
John4:22 Mwe musenga uwo mutazi
John4:23 Igihe kigiye kuza ndetse ubu kirageze
John4:24 Imana ni Mwuka
John4:25 Umugore aramubwira ati: “Nzi ko Mesiya
John4:26 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ni jye tuvugana.”
John4:27 Uwo mwanya abigishwa be baraza
John4:28 Nuko umugore asiga ikibindi aho ajya mu mujyi
John4:29 “Nimuze murebe umuntu wambwiye ibyo nakoze byose! Aho ntiyaba ari we Kristo?”
John4:30 Basohoka mu mujyi bagana aho ari.
John4:31 Hagati aho abigishwa bari babwiye Yezu bati: “Mwigisha
John4:32 Arabasubiza ati: “Mfite ibyokurya mutazi.”
John4:33 Nuko abigishwa barabazanya bati: “Ese haba hari uwamuzaniye icyo afungura?”
John4:34 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ifunguro ryanjye ni ugukora ibyo Uwantumye ashaka no kurangiza umurimo we.
John4:35 Mbese ntimuvuga ko hasigaye amezi ane
John4:36 Umusaruzi arahembwa imbuto azirundarundire ubugingo buhoraho; bityo umubibyi n'umusaruzi barishimira hamwe.
John4:37 Baca umugani w'ukuri ngo: ‘Habiba umwe hagasarura undi.’
John4:38 Nabohereje gusarura ibyo mutaruhiye. Abandi bararushye naho mwe mubonera inyungu mu miruho yabo.”
John4:39 Benshi mu Banyasamariya bo muri uwo mujyi bemera Yezu
John4:40 Abanyasamariya ni ko kumusanga baramwinginga ngo agumane na bo
John4:41 Nuko barushaho kumwemera ari benshi kubera ibyo yababwiye.
John4:42 Babwira uwo mugore bati: “Noneho ntitukimwemejwe n'ibyo watubwiye gusa
John4:43 Iyo minsi ibiri ishize
John4:44 Yari yarivugiye ko umuhanuzi atubahwa mu gihugu cy'iwabo.
John4:45 Nyamara ageze muri Galileya abaho bamwakira neza
John4:46 Nuko Yezu asubira i Kana ho muri Galileya
John4:47 Uwo mutware yumvise ko Yezu yavuye muri Yudeya akagera muri Galileya
John4:48 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ntimuteze kunyemera mutabonye ibimenyetso n'ibitangaza.”
John4:49 Uwo mutware w'ibwami aramubwira ati: “Databuja
John4:50 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Genda
John4:51 Akiri mu nzira ataha ahura n'abagaragu be
John4:52 Ababaza igihe yoroherewe maze baramusubiza bati: “Ejo isaa saba ni bwo umuriro yari afite wazimye.”
John4:53 Se w'uwo mwana asanga ko ari cyo gihe Yezu yari yamubwiriyeho ati: “Umwana wawe arakize.” Nuko yemera Yezu we n'abo mu rugo rwe bose.
John4:54 Icyo kiba icya kabiri mu bitangaza Yezu yakoze bimuranga
John5:1 Nyuma y'ibyo haba umunsi mukuru w'Abayahudi
John5:2 I Yeruzalemu hafi y'Irembo ry'Intama hari ikizenga mu giheburayi cyitwa Betesida
John5:3 Muri ayo mabaraza habaga haryamye abarwayi benshi cyane
John5:4 kuko rimwe na rimwe umumarayika yamanukaga mu kizenga
John5:5 Aho hari umuntu wari ufite ubumuga amaranye imyaka mirongo itatu n'umunani.
John5:6 Yezu amubonye arambaraye aho
John5:7 Umurwayi aramusubiza ati: “Nyakubahwa
John5:8 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Byuka ufate akarago kawe maze ugende!”
John5:9 Muri ako kanya uwo murwayi arakira
John5:10 Nuko Abayahudi babwira uwari umaze gukira bati: “Ni ku isabato
John5:11 Arabasubiza ati: “Uwankijije ni we wambwiye ati: ‘Fata akarago kawe ugende.’ ”
John5:12 Baramubaza bati: “Uwo muntu ni nde wakubwiye ngo ‘Fata akarago kawe ugende?’ ”
John5:13 Ariko uwo mugabo ntiyari azi uwamukijije uwo ari we
John5:14 Hanyuma Yezu aza kumubona mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
John5:15 Uwo muntu aragenda amenyesha Abayahudi yuko burya ari Yezu wamukijije.
John5:16 Ni cyo cyatumye Abayahudi batangira gukurikirana Yezu kuko yakoraga bene ibyo ku isabato.
John5:17 Ariko Yezu arababwira ati: “Na n'ubu Data ntahwema gukora kandi nanjye ndakora.”
John5:18 Ku bw'ibyo Abayahudi barushaho gushaka uburyo bamwica
John5:19 Yezu ni ko kugira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko Umwana w'Imana nta cyo akora na kimwe acyihangiye
John5:20 Data akunda Umwana we akamwereka ibyo akora byose. Ndetse azamwereka n'ibirenze ibyo ngibyo mubonye akora bibatangaze.
John5:21 Nk'uko Data azura abapfuye agatuma bongera kubaho
John5:22 Data nta we acira urubanza
John5:23 kugira ngo bose bamwubahe nk'uko bubaha Se. Utubaha Umwana w'Imana aba atubashye na Se wamutumye.
John5:24 “Ndababwira nkomeje ko untega amatwi akizera Uwantumye
John5:25 Ndababwira nkomeje ko hagiye kuza igihe na ko kirageze
John5:26 Nk'uko Data ari we sōko y'ubugingo
John5:27 amuha n'ubushobozi bwo guca imanza kuko ari Umwana w'umuntu.
John5:28 Ibyo ntibibatangaze. Erega igihe kigiye kuza ubwo abari mu mva bose bazumva ijwi rye
John5:29 bakavamo! Abazaba barakoze ibyiza bazazuka bahabwe ubugingo
John5:30 “Nta cyo nshobora gukora ncyihangiye. Nca imanza nkurikije ibyo Data ambwiye. Sinca urwa kibera kuko ntagambirira ibyo nishakiye
John5:31 “Ndamutse nitanze ho umugabo
John5:32 Nyamara hariho undi uhamya ibyanjye
John5:33 Mwatumye kuri Yohani na we ahamya ibyerekeye ukuri.
John5:34 Ibyo simbivugiye gushaka kwemezwa n'abantu
John5:35 Yohani yari nk'itara ryaka rikabonesha
John5:36 Mfite ibyemezo biruta ibyo Yohani yahamije
John5:37 Data wantumye na we ubwe yahamije ibyanjye. Ntimwigeze mwumva ijwi rye habe ngo mumuce n'iryera.
John5:38 Ndetse n'amagambo ye ntababamo ubwo mutemera uwo yatumye.
John5:39 Musesengura Ibyanditswe kuko mutekereza kubibonamo ubugingo buhoraho
John5:40 Ariko mwanga kunsanga kugira ngo muhabwe ubugingo.
John5:41 “Simparanira gushimwa n'abantu.
John5:42 Ariko mwebwe ndabazi
John5:43 Jye naje ntumwe na Data maze ntimwanyakira
John5:44 Mbese mwashobora mute kunyemera ko buri wese anyurwa no gushimwa na mugenzi we
John5:45 Ntimutekereze ko ari jyewe uzabarega kuri Data
John5:46 Iyaba mwemeraga Musa koko
John5:47 Ariko ubwo mutemera ibyo yanditse
John6:1 Ibyo birangiye Yezu avayo afata hakurya y'ikiyaga cya Galileya
John6:2 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu iramukurikira
John6:3 Nuko Yezu azamuka umusozi yicaranayo n'abigishwa be.
John6:4 Icyo gihe umunsi mukuru wa Pasika y'Abayahudi wari wegereje.
John6:5 Yezu abonye imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu baje bamusanga
John6:6 Icyatumye abaza Filipo atyo kwari ukugira ngo amwumve
John6:7 Filipo aramusubiza ati: “Nubwo twagura imigati y'igihembo cy'imibyizi magana abiri
John6:8 Umwe mu bigishwa be witwaga Andereya umuvandimwe wa Simoni Petero
John6:9 “Hano hari umuhungu ufite utugati dutanu n'udufi tubiri
John6:10 Yezu aravuga ati: “Nimwicaze abantu.” Aho hantu hari ibyatsi byinshi. Nuko baricara
John6:11 Yezu afata iyo migati ashimira Imana
John6:12 Bamaze guhaga abwira abigishwa be ati: “Nimuteranye utumanyu dusagutse kugira ngo hatagira ibipfa ubusa.”
John6:13 Bateranya utumanyu twasagutse kuri ya migati itanu bamaze kurya
John6:14 Abantu babonye icyo gitangaza Yezu yakoze kiranga ibye
John6:15 Yezu amenye ko bagiye kuza kumufata ngo bamwimike ku mbaraga
John6:16 Bugorobye abigishwa be baramanuka bagera ku kiyaga.
John6:17 Bajya mu bwato Yezu atarabageraho
John6:18 umuyaga w'ishuheri uhushye amazi arihinduriza.
John6:19 Bamaze kugashya nk'ibirometero bitanu cyangwa bitandatu
John6:20 Arababwira ati: “Mwigira ubwoba ni jye!”
John6:21 Bamushyira mu bwato maze muri ako kanya ubwato buba bugeze imusozi aho bajyaga.
John6:22 Bukeye ya mbaga y'abantu bari basigaye hakurya y'ikiyaga
John6:23 Ubwo haza andi mato avuye hakurya i Tiberiya
John6:24 Ba bantu bose babonye ko Yezu atagihari ndetse n'abigishwa be
John6:25 Bageze hakurya baramubona baramubaza bati: “Mwigisha
John6:26 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko igitumye munshaka atari uko mwasobanukiwe ibitangaza mwabonye nkora
John6:27 Ntimugakorere ibyokurya byangirika
John6:28 Noneho baramubaza bati: “Twagenza dute kugira ngo dukore imirimo Imana idushakaho?”
John6:29 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Umurimo Imana ibashakaho ni uko mwemera Uwo yatumye.”
John6:30 Nuko baramubaza bati: “Ariko se wowe watanga kimenyetso ki cyatuma tukwemera? Uratwereka gikorwa ki?
John6:31 Mu butayu ba sogokuruza bariye manu nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo ‘Yabagaburiye umugati uturutse mu ijuru.’ ”
John6:32 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko burya icyo Musa yabahaye atari wo mugati wo mu ijuru
John6:33 Umugati w'Imana ni umanutse mu ijuru ugaha abari ku isi ubugingo.”
John6:34 Noneho baramubwira bati: “Nyakubahwa
John6:35 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ni jye mugati w'ubugingo
John6:36 Nyamara nk'uko nabibabwiye
John6:37 Abo Data ampa bose bazansanga kandi unsanze sinzigera mwirukana.
John6:38 Sinamanuwe mu ijuru no gukora ibyo nishakiye
John6:39 Kandi rero icyo Uwantumye ashaka ni ukugira ngo ntagira n'umwe mbura mu bo yampaye
John6:40 Icyo Data ashaka ni uko buri wese ubonye Umwana we akamwemera ahabwa ubugingo buhoraho
John6:41 Abayahudi baritotomba kuko yari avuze ati: “Ni jye mugati wamanutse mu ijuru.”
John6:42 Baravuga bati: “Mbese uyu si Yezu mwene Yozefu? Se na nyina ntitubazi? None se ashobora ate kuvuga ati: ‘Namanutse mu ijuru?’ ”
John6:43 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimureke kwitotomba.
John6:44 Nta n'umwe ushobora kunsanga atazanywe na Data wantumye
John6:45 Byanditswe n'abahanuzi ngo ‘Bose bazigishwa n'Imana.’ Umuntu wese wumva ibyo Data avuga akigishwa na byo
John6:46 Si ukuvuga ko hari uwabonye Data
John6:47 Ndababwira nkomeje ko unyizera afite ubugingo buhoraho.
John6:48 Ni jye mugati w'ubugingo.
John6:49 Ba sokuruza baririye manu mu butayu bararenga barapfa.
John6:50 Ariko hari umugati wamanutse mu ijuru kugira ngo uwuryaho wese ye kuzapfa.
John6:51 Ni jye mugati w'ubugingo wamanutse mu ijuru
John6:52 Nuko Abayahudi bajya impaka barakaye bati: “Uyu muntu abasha ate kuduha umubiri we ngo tuwurye?”
John6:53 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko mutariye umubiri w'Umwana w'umuntu ntimunywe n'amaraso ye
John6:54 Urya umubiri wanjye wese akanywa n'amaraso yanjye
John6:55 Umubiri wanjye ni ibyokurya nyabyo
John6:56 Urya umubiri wanjye kandi akanywa amaraso yanjye
John6:57 Nk'uko Data wantumye afite ubugingo
John6:58 Uyu rero ni wo mugati wamanutse mu ijuru
John6:59 Ibyo Yezu yabivuze igihe yigishirizaga mu rusengero rw'i Kafarinawumu.
John6:60 Benshi mu bigishwa be babyumvise baravuga bati: “Ayo magambo arakomeye
John6:61 Yezu amenye ko abigishwa be bitotomba arababaza ati: “Mbese ayo magambo arabahungabanyije?
John6:62 Noneho se byamera bite mubonye Umwana w'umuntu azamutse ajya aho yahoze mbere?
John6:63 Mwuka ni we utanga ubugingo
John6:64 Nyamara muri mwe hariho abatanyemera.” Kuva mbere hose Yezu yari azi abatamwemera
John6:65 Nuko aravuga ati: “Ngicyo icyatumye mbabwira ko ntawe ushobora kunsanga atabihawe na Data.”
John6:66 Ku bw'ibyo benshi mu bigishwa be bavanamo akabo karenge
John6:67 Nuko Yezu abaza ba bigishwa be cumi na babiri ati: “Ese namwe murashaka kwigendera?”
John6:68 Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani
John6:69 Kandi twemeye ko ari wowe Muziranenge wavuye ku Mana
John6:70 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mbese si jye wabatoranyije uko muri cumi na babiri? Nyamara umwe muri mwe ni intumwa ya Satani.”
John6:71 Ubwo yavugaga Yuda Isikariyoti mwene Simoni wari ugiye kuzamugambanira
John7:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Yezu akomeza kugenda muri Galileya ntiyifuzaga kugenda muri Yudeya kuko Abayahudi bashakaga kumwica.
John7:2 Iminsi mikuru y'ingando y'Abayahudi yari yegereje.
John7:3 Nuko abavandimwe ba Yezu baramubwira bati “Haguruka
John7:4 Erega ushaka kumenyekana ntakora rwihishwa! Ubwo ukora bene ibyo
John7:5 N'ubundi n'abavandimwe be ntibamwemeraga.
John7:6 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati “Igihe cyanjye ntikiragera
John7:7 Ab'isi ntibashobora kubanga
John7:8 Mwebweho nimwigire mu minsi mikuru
John7:9 Amaze kubabwira atyo yigumira muri Galileya.
John7:10 Nyamara abavandimwe be bamaze kujya mu minsi mikuru
John7:11 Abayahudi bamushakashakiraga mu minsi mikuru babaza bati: “Mbese wa muntu ari he?”
John7:12 Rubanda bongoreranaga ibimwerekeye
John7:13 Nyamara nta wamuvugaga ku mugaragaro kuko batinyaga abakuru b'Abayahudi.
John7:14 Iminsi mikuru igeze hagati
John7:15 Abayahudi baratangara maze baravuga bati: “Bishoboka bite ko uriya muntu yamenya ubwenge bungana butya kandi atarigeze yiga?”
John7:16 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ibyo nigisha si ibyanjye bwite
John7:17 Umuntu wese ukunda gukora ibyo Imana ishaka azamenya ko ibyo nigisha bituruka ku Mana
John7:18 Uwivugira ibye bwite aba yishakira icyubahiro
John7:19 Mbese Musa ntiyabahaye Amategeko? Nyamara nta n'umwe muri mwe uyakurikiza. Ni kuki mushaka kunyica?”
John7:20 Rubanda ni ko kumusubiza bati: “Wahanzweho! Ni nde ushaka kukwica?”
John7:21 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Hari ikintu kimwe nakoze
John7:22 Musa yabahaye umuhango wo gukebwa – icyakora si we byakomotseho ahubwo ni kuri ba sogokuruza
John7:23 Niba umuhungu akebwa ku isabato ntibibe byishe itegeko rya Musa
John7:24 Ntimugace imanza mushingiye ku bigaragara gusa
John7:25 Bamwe mu baturage b'i Yeruzalemu barabaza bati: “Uriya si wa wundi bashaka kwica?
John7:26 Nyamara dore aravugira mu ruhame bakinumira. Ubanza koko abayobozi bacu bamenye ko ari we Kristo!
John7:27 Ariko se ko Kristo naza nta muntu n'umwe uzamenya iyo aturutse
John7:28 Icyo gihe Yezu yigishirizaga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
John7:29 Nyamara jyewe ndayizi kuko naturutse kuri yo kandi akaba ari yo yantumye.”
John7:30 Nuko bashaka uko bamufata ariko ntihagira n'umwe umukoza n'urutoki
John7:31 Benshi bo muri iyo mbaga baramwemera
John7:32 Abafarizayi bumva ibyo rubanda bahwihwisa ku byerekeye Yezu. Nuko abakuru bo mu batambyi n'Abafarizayi batuma abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana kumufata.
John7:33 Yezu aherako aravuga ati: “Ndacyari kumwe namwe igihe gito
John7:34 Muzanshaka mwe kumbona
John7:35 Nuko Abayahudi barabazanya bati: “Mbese agiye kujya he tutazamubona? Ese ni mu mahanga
John7:36 Aravuze ngo tuzamushaka twe kumubona
John7:37 Ku munsi uheruka iminsi mikuru y'Ingando ari na wo bizihizaga cyane
John7:38 Nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga
John7:39 Ibyo Yezu yabivuze yerekeza kuri Mwuka w'Imana abamwizeye bari bagiye kuzahabwa. Icyo gihe Mwuka yari ataroherezwa kuko Yezu yari atarahabwa ikuzo.
John7:40 Nuko bamwe muri icyo kivunge cy'abantu bumvise ayo magambo baravuga bati: “Koko uyu ni wa Muhanuzi!”
John7:41 Abandi baravuga bati: “Ni Kristo!” Ariko abandi barabaza bati: “Bishoboka bite ko Kristo yaturuka muri Galileya?
John7:42 Mbese Ibyanditswe ntibivuga ko Kristo azakomoka mu rubyaro rwa Dawidi
John7:43 Nuko abantu bicamo ibice kubera Yezu.
John7:44 Bamwe bashaka kumufata nyamara ntihagira umukoza n'urutoki.
John7:45 Ba barinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana bagarutse
John7:46 Abarinzi barabasubiza bati: “Nta wigeze avuga nk'uwo muntu!”
John7:47 Nuko Abafarizayi barababaza bati: “Mbese namwe yabahenze ubwenge?
John7:48 Mbese mwabonye mu batware cyangwa mu Bafarizayi hari n'umwe wigeze amwemera?
John7:49 Rubanda batazi Amategeko ni bo bonyine bamwemeye
John7:50 Nyamara umwe mu Bafarizayi witwa Nikodemu
John7:51 “Mbese dukurikije Amategeko yacu twashobora gucira umuntu urubanza tutabanje kumva icyo avuga
John7:52 Baramusubiza bati: “Nawe se uri uwo muri Galileya! Reba mu Byanditswe urasanga ko nta muhanuzi ushobora guturuka muri Galileya.” [
John7:53 Nuko barikubura buri muntu asubira iwe.
John8:1 Yezu ajya ku Musozi w'Iminzenze.
John8:2 Umuseke ukebye agaruka mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
John8:3 Abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi bamuzanira umugore wafashwe asambana
John8:4 Baramubwira bati: “Mwigisha
John8:5 Mu Mategeko Musa yadutegetse kwicisha amabuye abasambanyi. Mbese wowe urabivugaho iki?”
John8:6 Ibyo babivugiraga kumutegera mu byo avuga
John8:7 Abonye ko bakomeje kumuhata ibibazo
John8:8 Nuko arongera arunama akomeza kwiyandikira hasi.
John8:9 Na bo babyumvise batyo bagenda umwe umwe uhereye ku bakuze
John8:10 Yezu arunamuka aramubaza ati: “Mugore
John8:11 Na we aramusubiza ati: “Nta we Mwigisha.” Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati: “Nanjye nta teka nguciriyeho genda
John8:12 Yezu arongera arababwira ati: “Ni jye rumuri rw'isi. Unkurikira ntazagenda mu mwijima
John8:13 Nuko Abafarizayi baramubwira bati: “Nta wivuga amabi. Ibyo wivugaho si ukuri.”
John8:14 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Nubwo ari jye uhamya ibinyerekeyeho
John8:15 Mwebwe mwigira abacamanza mushingiye ku byo mureba
John8:16 Icyakora nubwo nagira uwo nducira
John8:17 Ndetse no mu Mategeko yanyu handitswe ko igihamijwe n'abantu babiri kiba ari icy'ukuri.
John8:18 Ni jye uhamya ibinyerekeyeho kandi na Data wantumye arabihamya.”
John8:19 Nuko baramubaza bati: “So ari he?” Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Jye ntimunzi kandi na Data ntimumuzi. Iyo mumenya muba mwaramenye na Data.”
John8:20 Ibyo byose Yezu yabivuze igihe yigishirizaga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
John8:21 Yongera kubabwira ati: “Ndagiye kandi muzanshaka
John8:22 Abayahudi barabazanya bati: “Aravuze ngo ‘Aho ngiye ntimubasha kujyayo’! Mbese agiye kwiyahura?”
John8:23 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati: “Mwe mukomoka ku isi naho jye nkomoka mu ijuru. Muri ab'iyi si jyewe sindi uw'iyi si.
John8:24 Ni cyo gitumye mbabwira ko muzarinda mupfa mukiri mu byaha. Koko rero nimutemera uwo ndi we
John8:25 Baramubaza bati: “Uri nde?” Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ni nk'uko nabibabwiye kuva mbere.
John8:26 Mfite byinshi nabavugaho nkabacira urubanza
John8:27 Ntibasobanukiwe ko yababwiraga ibyerekeye Imana Se.
John8:28 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati: “Igihe muzazamura Umwana w'umuntu hejuru y'isi
John8:29 Uwantumye ari kumwe nanjye
John8:30 Avuze atyo abantu benshi baramwemera.
John8:31 Nuko Yezu abwira Abayahudi bari bamwemeye ati: “Nimukurikiza inyigisho zanjye muzaba abigishwa banjye by'ukuri.
John8:32 Muzamenya ukuri kandi ukuri ni ko kuzabakūra mu buja.”
John8:33 Baramusubiza bati: “Twe dukomoka kuri Aburahamu kandi nta wigeze adushyira mu buja. Uhangaye ute kuvuga uti: ‘Muzava mu buja.?’ ”
John8:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko umuntu wese ukora icyaha aba ari mu buja bw'icyaha.
John8:35 Uri mu buja ntaguma mu rugo burundu
John8:36 Niba rero Umwana w'Imana abakuye mu buja muzishyira mwizane by'ukuri.
John8:37 Nzi yuko muri urubyaro rwa Aburahamu
John8:38 Mvuga ibyo nabonye kuri Data
John8:39 Baramusubiza bati: “Dukomoka kuri Aburahamu.” Yezu arababwira ati: “Iyaba mwakomokaga kuri Aburahamu muba mukora nk'ibyo Aburahamu yakoraga.
John8:40 Nabamenyesheje ukuri Imana yambwiye
John8:41 Mwebwe murakora ibyo so akora.” Baramubwira bati: “Ntabwo turi ibinyendaro dufite Data umwe
John8:42 Yezu arababwira ati: “Iyaba Imana ari So koko mwankunze
John8:43 Kuki mudasobanukirwa ibyo mvuga? Ni uko mudashobora gutega amatwi amagambo yanjye.
John8:44 Muri aba so Sekibi kandi mushaka gukora ibyo so yifuza. Yahoze ari umwicanyi kuva kera kose
John8:45 Igituma mutanyemera ni uko mvuga ukuri.
John8:46 Ni nde muri mwe wabasha kunshinja icyaha? None se niba mvuga ukuri kuki mutanyemera?
John8:47 Ukomoka ku Mana atega amatwi ibyo Imana ivuga
John8:48 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati: “Mbese ntitwavuze ukuri ko uri Umunyasamariya kandi ko wahanzweho?”
John8:49 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Sinahanzweho ahubwo nubaha Data ariko mwe mukansuzugura.
John8:50 Si jye wishakira icyubahiro
John8:51 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ukurikiza amagambo yanjye wese atazapfa bibaho.”
John8:52 Abayahudi baramubwira bati: “Noneho tumenye ko wahanzweho koko. Aburahamu n'abahanuzi barapfuye. None wowe ukaba uvuga uti: ‘Ukurikiza amagambo yanjye wese ntazapfa bibaho’!
John8:53 None rero uruta sogokuruza Aburahamu wapfuye
John8:54 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Iyaba ari jye wihaga icyubahiro
John8:55 Ntimwigeze kumumenya ariko jyewe ndamuzi. Ndetse mvuze ko ntamuzi mba mbaye umubeshyi nkamwe. Ariko rero ndamuzi kandi amabwiriza ye ndayakurikiza.
John8:56 Sogokuruza Aburahamu yishimiye ko azabona igihe cyo kuza kwanjye
John8:57 Nuko Abayahudi baramubaza bati: “Ukaba utarageza no ku myaka mirongo itanu
John8:58 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko mbere y'uko Aburahamu abaho jye ndiho.”
John8:59 Bahita bafata amabuye ngo bamutere
John9:1 Yezu akigenda abona umuntu wavutse ari impumyi.
John9:2 Abigishwa be baramubaza bati: “Mwigisha
John9:3 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Si we wagikoze si n'ababyeyi be
John9:4 Dukwiriye gukora umurimo w'Uwantumye hakibona. Dore bugiye kwira kandi iyo bwije nta muntu ushobora gukora.
John9:5 Igihe nkiri ku isi ndi urumuri rw'isi.”
John9:6 Amaze kuvuga atyo acira amacandwe hasi ayatobesha akondo
John9:7 arayibwira ati: “Genda wiyuhagire mu kizenga cya Silowa.” (Silowa risobanurwa ngo “Uwatumwe”). Nuko uwo muntu aragenda ariyuhagira agaruka ahumūtse.
John9:8 Abaturanyi be n'abajyaga bamubona asabiriza barabazanya bati: “Uyu si wa wundi wahoraga yicaye asabiriza?”
John9:9 Bamwe bati: “Ni we.” Abandi bati: “Si we
John9:10 Baramubaza bati: “Wahumutse ute?”
John9:11 Arabasubiza ati: “Wa muntu witwa Yezu yatobye akondo akansīga ku maso
John9:12 Baramubaza bati: “Uwo muntu ari hehe?” Ati: “Simpazi.”
John9:13 Uwahoze ari impumyi bamushyīra Abafarizayi.
John9:14 Igihe Yezu yatobaga akondo agahumūra uwo muntu hari ku isabato.
John9:15 Ni yo mpamvu Abafarizayi na bo bamubajije uko yahumūtse
John9:16 Bamwe mu Bafarizayi baravugaga bati: “Uwo muntu agomba kuba adaturuka ku Mana kuko atubahiriza isabato.” Abandi bakavuga bati: “Ariko se yaba ari umunyabyaha akabasha ate gukora igitangaza nka kiriya?” Bituma bicamo ibice.
John9:17 Bongera kubaza uwo mugabo bati: “Ese koko yaguhumuye? Ubwo se uramuvugaho iki?” Arabasubiza ati: “Ni umuhanuzi.”
John9:18 Ariko Abayahudi bo banga kwemera ko uwo mugabo yahoze ari impumyi none akaba areba
John9:19 Barababaza bati: “Mbese koko uyu ni umwana wanyu? Ese muremeza ko yavutse ari impumyi? None se byagenze bite kugira ngo arebe?”
John9:20 Ababyeyi barabasubiza bati: “Turahamya ko uyu ari umwana wacu kandi ko yavutse ari impumyi.
John9:21 Naho rero igituma ubu ngubu areba ntitukizi
John9:22 Ababyeyi be bavuze batyo kubera gutinya abakuru b'Abayahudi
John9:23 Ni cyo cyatumye ababyeyi be bavuga bati: “Ni mukuru nimumwibarize.”
John9:24 Noneho bahamagara uwahoze ari impumyi ngo agaruke
John9:25 Na we arabasubiza ati: “Niba ari umunyabyaha simbizi. Icyo nzi ni kimwe
John9:26 Nuko baramubaza bati: “Ese yakugenje ate? Yaguhumūye ate?”
John9:27 Arabasubiza ati: “Maze kubibabwira ntimwabyitaho. Kuki mushaka kongera kubyumva? Mbese aho namwe ntimushaka kuba abigishwa be?”
John9:28 Ni ko kumutuka maze baramubwira bati: “Genda ube umwigishwa we
John9:29 Tuzi ko Imana yavuganye na Musa naho uwo nguwo we ntituzi n'iyo aturuka.”
John9:30 Uwo mugabo arabasubiza ati: “Aka ni akumiro! Ntabwo muzi iyo aturuka kandi yampumūye!
John9:31 Tuzi ko Imana itumva abanyabyaha
John9:32 Kuva isi yaremwa nta wigeze yumva aho umuntu yahumūye uwavutse ari impumyi.
John9:33 Iyaba uwo muntu ataturukaga ku Mana nta cyo yari kubasha gukora.”
John9:34 Baramuhindukirana bati: “Rwose wowe wavukiye mu byaha none uratwigisha?” Nuko bamuca mu nsengero.
John9:35 Yezu yumvise ko bamuciye mu nsengero aramushaka. Amubonye aramubaza ati: “Mbese wemera Umwana w'umuntu?”
John9:36 Undi aramusubiza ati: “Nyakubahwa
John9:37 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Wamubonye kandi ni we muvugana.”
John9:38 Uwo mugabo aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
John9:39 Yezu aravuga ati: “Nazanywe kuri iyi si no guhinyuza abantu
John9:40 Abafarizayi bari aho babyumvise baramubaza bati: “Ubwo se natwe turi impumyi?”
John9:41 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Iyaba mwari impumyi nta cyaha kiba kibariho
John10:1 “Ndababwira nkomeje ko uwinjira mu rugo rw'intama atanyuze mu irembo ahubwo akuririra ahandi
John10:2 Naho rero uwinjiriye mu irembo aba ari umushumba w'intama
John10:3 umuraririzi aramwugururira. Intama zumva ijwi ry'umushumba maze agahamagara ize mu mazina
John10:4 Iyo zose zigeze inyuma y'irembo
John10:5 Ntizikurikira uwo zitazi
John10:6 Icyo ni ikigereranyo Yezu yabahaye ariko bo ntibamenya icyo yashakaga kubabwira.
John10:7 Yezu yungamo ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko ari jye rembo ry'intama.
John10:8 Abaje mbere yanjye bose bari abajura n'abambuzi
John10:9 Ni jye rembo
John10:10 Umujura azanwa gusa no kwiba no kwica no kurimbura. Jyewe nazanywe no kugira ngo intama zibone ubugingo
John10:11 “Ni jye mushumba mwiza. Umushumba mwiza yemera gupfira intama ze.
John10:12 Naho umucancuro w'ingirwamushumba utari nyir'intama
John10:13 Igituma yihungira ni uko ari umucancuro
John10:14 Ni jye mushumba mwiza. Uko Data anzi nanjye nkamumenya
John10:15 
John10:16 Mfite n'izindi ntama zitari izo muri uru rugo
John10:17 “Igituma Data ankunda
John10:18 Nta wubunyaga
John10:19 Ayo magambo yatumye Abayahudi bongera kwicamo ibice.
John10:20 Benshi muri bo baravugaga bati: “Yahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani. Kuki mukimutega amatwi?”
John10:21 Ariko abandi bakavuga bati: “Iyo mvugo si iy'uwahanzweho. Mbese ingabo ya Satani ibasha guhumura impumyi?”
John10:22 I Yeruzalemu hari iminsi mikuru yo kwibuka Itahwa ry'Ingoro y'Imana
John10:23 Yezu yagendagendaga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
John10:24 Abayahudi baramukikiza baramubaza bati: “Uzageza ryari kutwicisha amatsiko? Twerurire niba uri Kristo?”
John10:25 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Narabibabwiye ntimwabyemera. Ibyo nkora mu izina rya Data ni byo ntanze ho umugabo
John10:26 ariko ntimubyemera kuko mutari abo mu ntama zanjye.
John10:27 Intama zanjye zumva ijwi ryanjye
John10:28 Nziha ubugingo buhoraho
John10:29 Data wazimpaye aruta byose
John10:30 Jyewe na Data turi umwe.”
John10:31 Abayahudi bongera gutora amabuye kugira ngo bayamutere.
John10:32 Ubwo Yezu arababwira ati: “Nabagaragarije ibyiza byinshi Data yantumye gukora. Ni ikihe muri ibyo gituma muntera amabuye?”
John10:33 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati: “Igikorwa cyiza si cyo gituma tugutera amabuye
John10:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mbese ntibyanditswe mu Mategeko yanyu ko Imana yavuze ngo muri imana?
John10:35 Tuzi ko Ibyanditswe bidakuka. Ba bantu babwiwe Ijambo ryayo
John10:36 None se kuki munshinja gutuka Imana
John10:37 Niba ntakora ibyo Data yanshinze ntimunyemere.
John10:38 Ariko niba mbikora
John10:39 Icyo gihe bongera gushaka gufata Yezu
