John10:40 Nuko Yezu asubira iburasirazuba bwa Yorodani
John10:41 Abantu benshi bagumya kumusangayo bakavuga bati: “Nubwo Yohani nta gitangaza yigeze akora kiranga ibye
John10:42 Nuko abantu benshi bari aho bemera Yezu.
John11:1 Umuntu witwa Lazaro wari utuye i Betaniya yafashwe n'indwara. I Betaniya aho ni ho Mariya n'umuvandimwe we Marita babaga.
John11:2 Lazaro uwo yari musaza wa Mariya
John11:3 Nuko abo bashiki ba Lazaro batuma kuri Yezu bati: “Nyagasani
John11:4 Yezu abyumvise aravuga ati: “Iyo ndwara si iyo kumwica
John11:5 Yezu yakundaga Marita na Mariya na Lazaro.
John11:6 Yumvise ko Lazaro arwaye asibira aho yari ari indi minsi ibiri.
John11:7 Hanyuma abwira abigishwa be ati: “Nimureke dusubire muri Yudeya.”
John11:8 Abigishwa baramubaza bati: “Mwigisha
John11:9 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mbese umunsi ntufite amasaha cumi n'abiri? Iyo umuntu agenda ku manywa ntasitara kuko aba amurikiwe n'urumuri rw'iyi si.
John11:10 Ariko ugenda nijoro arasitara kuko aba adafite urumuri.”
John11:11 Amaze kubabwira atyo yungamo ati: “Incuti yacu Lazaro arasinziriye
John11:12 Abigishwa baramubwira bati: “Nyagasani
John11:13 Nyamara Yezu yavugaga ko Lazaro yapfuye
John11:14 Yezu ni ko kuberurira ati: “Lazaro yarapfuye.
John11:15 Ariko kubera mwe nishimiye ko ntari mpari kugira ngo munyizere. None nimuze tujye aho ari.”
John11:16 Tomasi witwaga Didimo abwira abigishwa bagenzi be ati: “Reka tumuherekeze tuzapfane na we!”
John11:17 Yezu agezeyo asanga Lazaro amaze iminsi ine mu mva.
John11:18 Kuva i Yeruzalemu ujya i Betaniya hari nk'ibirometero bitatu
John11:19 ku bw'ibyo Abayahudi benshi bari baje gusura Marita na Mariya kubera urupfu rwa musaza wabo.
John11:20 Marita yumvise ko Yezu aje ajya kumusanganira
John11:21 Nuko Marita abwira Yezu ati: “Nyagasani
John11:22 N'ubu ariko nzi yuko icyo uri busabe Imana cyose iri bukiguhe.”
John11:23 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Musaza wawe azazuka.”
John11:24 Marita aramusubiza ati: “Nzi ko azazukana n'abandi ku munsi w'imperuka.”
John11:25 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ni jye kuzuka n'ubugingo
John11:26 Kandi uriho wese unyizera ntazigera apfa. Mbese ibyo urabyemera?”
John11:27 Marita aramusubiza ati: “Yee ndabyemera
John11:28 Amaze kuvuga atyo ajya guhamagara umuvandimwe we Mariya
John11:29 Mariya abyumvise
John11:30 Yezu yari ataragera aho batuye
John11:31 Abayahudi bari baje gusura Mariya babonye asohotse yihuta
John11:32 Mariya agera aho Yezu ari
John11:33 Nuko Yezu abonye Mariya arira n'Abayahudi bari bamuherekeje na bo barira
John11:34 Nuko arabaza ati: “Mwamushyize he?” Bati: “Nyagasani
John11:35 Yezu ararira.
John11:36 Nuko Abayahudi baravuga bati: “Nimurebe ukuntu yamukundaga!”
John11:37 Bamwe muri bo baravuga bati: “Ariko se uwahumūye ya mpumyi ntiyashoboraga kubuza uyu nguyu gupfa?”
John11:38 Nuko Yezu yongera gusuhuza umutima
John11:39 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Nimuvaneho ibuye!” Marita mushiki wa nyakwigendera aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
John11:40 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Mbese sinakubwiye ko nunyizera uri bwibonere ikuzo ry'Imana?”
John11:41 Nuko bavanaho ibuye maze Yezu areba hejuru aravuga ati: “Data
John11:42 Jyewe nsanzwe nzi ko unyumva iteka
John11:43 Amaze kuvuga atyo arangurura ijwi ahamagara ati: “Lazaro
John11:44 Nuko uwari warapfuye arasohoka
John11:45 Benshi mu Bayahudi bari baje gusura Mariya
John11:46 Ariko bamwe muri bo basanga Abafarizayi
John11:47 Nuko abakuru bo mu batambyi n'Abafarizayi bakoranya urukiko rw'ikirenga
John11:48 Nitumwihorera agakomeza atyo abantu bose bazamwemera
John11:49 Umwe muri bo witwa Kayifa wari Umutambyi mukuru uwo mwaka arababwira ati: “Burya koko nta cyo muzi!
John11:50 Ntimuriyumvisha ko icyababera cyiza ari uko umuntu umwe apfira rubanda
John11:51 Ibyo ntiyabivuze abyihangiye
John11:52 kandi si ubwo bwoko bwonyine ahubwo ngo anahurize hamwe abana b'Imana bari hirya no hino ku isi.
John11:53 Kuva uwo munsi biyemeza kumwica.
John11:54 Ni cyo cyatumye Yezu atongera kugaragara muri bo. Ahubwo yigira mu mujyi witwa Efurayimu uri hafi y'akarere kadatuwe
John11:55 Umunsi mukuru wa Pasika y'Abayahudi wari wegereje
John11:56 Babuze Yezu abari mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana barabazanya bati: “Murabitekerezaho iki? Mbese ntazaza mu minsi mikuru?”
John11:57 Ubwo abakuru bo mu batambyi n'Abafarizayi bakaba bategetse ko hagize uwamenya aho Yezu aherereye
John12:1 Hasigaye iminsi itandatu umunsi mukuru wa Pasika y'Abayahudi ukaba
John12:2 Baramuzimanira. Marita yaraherezaga naho Lazaro yicaranye n'abatumirwa.
John12:3 Mariya afata nk'inusu ya litiro y'amarashi ahumura neza yitwa naridi
John12:4 Nuko Yuda Isikariyoti umwe mu bigishwa ba Yezu ari we wari ugiye kuzamugambanira
John12:5 “Kuki aya marashi batayaguze amafaranga ngo bayahe abakene
John12:6 Ntiyavugaga atyo abitewe no kwita ku bakene
John12:7 Yezu ni ko kuvuga ati: “Mwihorere
John12:8 Abakene bo murahorana naho jye ntituzahorana.”
John12:9 Abayahudi benshi cyane bamenye ko Yezu ari i Betaniya
John12:10 Nuko kuva ubwo abakuru bo mu batambyi bafata icyemezo cyo kwica na Lazaro
John12:11 kuko yatumaga Abayahudi benshi babacikaho bakemera Yezu.
John12:12 Bukeye imbaga y'abantu bari baje mu minsi mikuru ya Pasika bamenya ko Yezu ari bugere i Yeruzalemu.
John12:13 Nuko bafata amashami y'imikindo bajya kumusanganira
John12:14 Yezu abonye icyana cy'indogobe
John12:15 “Mwitinya
John12:16 Ibyo abigishwa be ntibahita babisobanukirwa
John12:17 Ba bantu benshi bari kumwe na Yezu igihe yahamagaraga Lazaro ngo ave mu mva akamuzura
John12:18 Rubanda baramusanganira
John12:19 Nuko Abafarizayi baravugana bati: “Murabona ko ibi byose nta cyo bizatugezaho. Dore abantu bose baramuyobotse!”
John12:20 Mu bari baje i Yeruzalemu gusenga mu minsi mikuru harimo n'abanyamahanga.
John12:21 Begera Filipo wari uw'i Betsayida ho muri Galileya baramubwira bati: “Mutware
John12:22 Filipo ajya kubibwira Andereya
John12:23 Yezu arababwira ati: “Igihe kirageze kugira ngo Umwana w'umuntu ahabwe ikuzo.
John12:24 Ndababwira nkomeje ko iyo akabuto k'ingano kadatewe mu gitaka ngo gapfe kagumaho konyine
John12:25 Ukunda ubuzima bwe azabubura
John12:26 Unkorera wese agomba kunkurikira
John12:27 “Ubu umutima wanjye urahagaze – mvuge iki kandi? Ese nsabe nti: ‘Data
John12:28 Ahubwo ndasaba nti: ‘Data
John12:29 Bamwe muri rubanda bari aho bumvise iryo jwi baravuga bati: “Ni inkuba!” Abandi bati: “Ni umumarayika uvuganye na we.”
John12:30 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Iryo jwi si jye rigenewe ahubwo ni mwebwe.
John12:31 Ubu igihe cyo gucira ab'isi urubanza kirageze
John12:32 Nanjye ninshyirwa hejuru y'isi nzikururiraho abantu bose.”
John12:33 Ibyo Yezu yabivugiraga kwerekana urupfu yari agiye gupfa urwo ari rwo.
John12:34 Noneho rubanda baramubwira bati: “Twumvise mu gitabo cy'Amategeko ko Kristo ahoraho ibihe byose. None se uvuga ute ko Umwana w'umuntu azagomba gushyirwa hejuru? Mbese uwo Mwana w'umuntu ni nde?”
John12:35 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Urumuri muracyarufite akanya gato
John12:36 Umwanya mugifite urumuri nimurwizere mube abantu bayoborwa n'urumuri.” Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo
John12:37 Nubwo Abayahudi bari barabonye akora ibyo bitangaza byose bimuranga
John12:38 bityo biba nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: “Nyagasani
John12:39 Ntibashoboraga kubyemera nk'uko Ezayi yongeye kuvuga ati:
John12:40 “Imana yabahumye amaso
John12:41 Ezayi yavuze ibyo ngibyo kuko yeretswe ikuzo rya Yezu
John12:42 No mu batware b'Abayahudi benshi baramwemeraga
John12:43 kuko bahitagamo gushimwa n'abantu kuruta gushimwa n'Imana.
John12:44 Yezu avuga aranguruye ati: “Unyemera si jye aba yemeye gusa
John12:45 Kandi n'umbonye aba abonye n'Uwantumye.
John12:46 Naje kuba urumuri rw'isi
John12:47 Kandi umuntu wese wumva amagambo yanjye ntayakurikize si jye umucira urubanza. Sinazanywe no gucira abantu urubanza ahubwo nazanywe no kubakiza.
John12:48 Umpinyura ntiyakire n'amagambo yanjye afite ikimucira urubanza: amagambo navuze ni yo azamucira urubanza ku munsi w'imperuka.
John12:49 Erega sinavuze ibyo nihangiye
John12:50 Nzi yuko amategeko ye ageza ku bugingo buhoraho. Nuko rero ibyo Data yambwiye ni byo mvuga.”
John13:1 Hari ku munsi ubanziriza Pasika y'Abayahudi. Yezu yari azi ko igihe kigeze cyo kuva kuri iyi si agasubira kwa Se. Nk'uko yari asanzwe akunda abe bari ku isi
John13:2 Nimugoroba Yezu n'abigishwa be bari ku meza bafungura. Satani yari yamaze kwemeza Yuda Isikariyoti mwene Simoni kumugambanira.
John13:3 Yezu yari azi ko Se yamweguriye ibintu byose kandi ko yaturutse ku Mana
John13:4 Ni ko kuva ku meza
John13:5 Asuka amazi ku ibesani atangira koza abigishwa be ibirenge
John13:6 Ageze kuri Simoni Petero we ahita amubaza ati: “Nyagasani
John13:7 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Nturamenya icyo nkora ariko uzakimenya hanyuma.”
John13:8 Petero ati: “Reka da
John13:9 Simoni Petero ati: “Noneho rero Nyagasani
John13:10 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Uwiyuhagiye umubiri wose ntakeneye gusubira kwiyuhagira
John13:11 Yari azi uri bumugambanire
John13:12 Yezu amaze kuboza ibirenge asubizamo umwitero we asubira ku meza. Nuko arababaza ati: “Aho musobanukiwe ibyo maze kubagirira?
John13:13 Munyita Umwigisha na Shobuja kandi ntimwibeshya kuko ari ko biri.
John13:14 Ubwo rero mbogeje ibirenge
John13:15 Mbahaye urugero ngo mujye mukora nk'uko mbagiriye.
John13:16 Ndababwira nkomeje ko nta mugaragu uruta shebuja
John13:17 Ubwo mumenye ibyo muzaba muhiriwe nimubikurikiza.
John13:18 “Si mwebwe mwese mvuga kuko nzi abo natoranyije. Ariko ni ngombwa ko ibi Byanditswe biba ngo: ‘Uwo dusangira ni we umpindutse’.
John13:19 Igitumye mbibabwira bitaraba ni ukugira ngo igihe bizaba bibaye muzemere uwo ndi we.
John13:20 Ndababwira nkomeje ko uwakiriye uwo ntumye ari jye azaba yakiriye
John13:21 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo ni ko gushenguka maze avuga yeruye ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko umwe muri mwe agiye kungambanira.”
John13:22 Abigishwa be barebana bumiwe
John13:23 Umwe muri bo
John13:24 Simoni Petero amucira amarenga ati: “Mubaze uwo avuze uwo ari we.”
John13:25 Uwo mwigishwa yegama mu gituza cya Yezu aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani
John13:26 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Uwo mpereza ikimanyu cy'umugati ngiye gukoza mu burisho ni we uwo.” Nuko afata ikimanyu agikozamo
John13:27 Yuda amaze guhabwa icyo kimanyu ni bwo Satani yamwinjiyemo. Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati: “Icyo ukora gikore bwangu.”
John13:28 Ariko nta n'umwe mu basangiraga na we wamenye icyatumye amubwira atyo.
John13:29 Kubera ko Yuda yari umubitsi w'amafaranga
John13:30 Yuda akimara kwakira cya kimanyu ako kanya arasohoka. Icyo gihe hari nijoro.
John13:31 Yuda amaze gusohoka Yezu aravuga ati: “Ubu Umwana w'umuntu ahawe ikuzo kandi ahesheje Imana ikuzo.
John13:32 Kandi ubwo ahesheje Imana ikuzo
John13:33 Bana banjye
John13:34 Mbahaye itegeko rishya ngo mukundane. Nk'uko nabakunze abe ari ko namwe mukundana.
John13:35 Icyo bose bazamenyeraho ko muri abigishwa banjye ni uko bazabona mukundana.”
John13:36 Simoni Petero aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani
John13:37 Petero aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani
John13:38 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Aho wakwemera kumpfira koko? Ndakubwira nkomeje ko inkoko itari bubike utaranyihakana gatatu.”
John14:1 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ntimuhagarike imitima. Mwizere Imana nanjye munyizere.
John14:2 Mu rugo rwa Data harimo amazu menshi. Iyo bitaba bityo simba narababwiye ko ngiye kubategurira umwanya.
John14:3 Nuko rero ningenda nkamara kuwubategurira
John14:4 Aho njya
John14:5 Tomasi aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani
John14:6 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ni jye nzira n'ukuri n'ubugingo. Ntawe ujya kwa Data atanyuze kuri jye.
John14:7 Ubwo munzi na Data muzamumenya. Ndetse kuva ubu muramuzi kandi mwaramubonye.”
John14:8 Filipo aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani
John14:9 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Filipo we
John14:10 Mbese ntiwemera ko ndi muri Data kandi na Data akaba ari muri jye? Ibyo mbabwira si ibyo nihangira
John14:11 Nimwemere ibyo mbabwira
John14:12 Ndababwira nkomeje ko unyizera
John14:13 Icyo muzasaba cyose mu izina ryanjye nzagikora
John14:14 Nimugira icyo munsaba cyose mu izina ryanjye nzagikora.
John14:15 “Nimunkunda muzakurikiza amategeko yanjye.
John14:16 Nanjye nzasaba Data kubaha undi Mujyanama kugira ngo agumane namwe iteka.
John14:17 Uwo ni we Mwuka w'ukuri. Ab'isi ntibabasha kumwakira kuko batamureba ntibanamumenye. Naho mwebweho muramuzi kuko ari kumwe namwe kandi azaba muri mwe.
John14:18 “Sinzabasiga mwenyine nk'impfubyi
John14:19 Hasigaye umwanya muto ab'isi ntibabe bakimbona
John14:20 Uwo munsi muzamenya ko ndi muri Data kandi namwe mukaba muri jye
John14:21 “Uwemera amategeko yanjye
John14:22 Yuda (utari Isikariyoti) aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani
John14:23 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Unkunda wese azakurikiza ibyo mvuga
John14:24 Utankunda ntakurikiza ibyo mvuga
John14:25 “Ibyo mbibabwiye nkiri hamwe namwe.
John14:26 Ariko wa Mujyanama ari we Mwuka Muziranenge Data azohereza mu izina ryanjye
John14:27 “Mbasigiye amahoro
John14:28 Mwumvise ko nababwiye nti: ‘Ndagiye kandi nzagaruka mbasange.’ Iyaba mwankundaga mwakwishimiye ko ngiye kwa Data
John14:29 Ibyo mbaye mbibabwiye bitaraba
John14:30 Nta gihe ngifite cyo kuvugana namwe byinshi kuko umutware w'iyi si aje
John14:31 Nyamara ab'isi bagomba kumenya ko nkunda Data kandi ngakora byose nk'uko yabintegetse “Nimuhaguruke
John15:1 “Ni jye muzabibu w'ukuri kandi Data ni we uwuhingira.
John15:2 Ishami ryose ryo kuri jye ritera arivanaho
John15:3 Namwe mumaze gusukurwa n'ibyo nababwiye.
John15:4 Nimugume kuri jye nanjye ngume muri mwe. Nk'uko ishami ubwaryo ritabasha kwera ridafashe ku muzabibu
John15:5 “Ni jye muzabibu namwe muri amashami. Uguma kuri jye nanjye nkaguma muri we
John15:6 Utaguma kuri jye ajugunywa kure akuma nk'ishami. Amashami nk'ayo barayasakuma bakayashyira mu muriro agakongoka.
John15:7 Nimuguma kuri jye
John15:8 Igihesha Data ikuzo ni uko mwera imbuto nyinshi
John15:9 Uko Data yankunze
John15:10 Nimukurikiza amategeko yanjye muzaguma mu rukundo rwanjye
John15:11 “Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo ibyishimo byanjye bibe muri mwe
John15:12 Ngiri itegeko ryanjye: mukundane nk'uko nabakunze.
John15:13 Nta wagira urukundo ruruta urw'umuntu upfira incuti ze.
John15:14 Mwe muri incuti zanjye niba mukora ibyo mbategeka.
John15:15 Sinkibita abagaragu kuko umugaragu atamenya ibyo shebuja akora. Ahubwo nabise incuti kuko nabamenyesheje ibyo Data yambwiye byose.
John15:16 Si mwe mwantoranyije
John15:17 Icyo mbategetse rero ni ugukundana.
John15:18 “Ab'isi nibabanga mumenye ko ari jye babanje kwanga.
John15:19 Iyo muba ab'isi
John15:20 Mwibuke iri jambo nababwiye nti; ‘Nta mugaragu uruta shebuja.’ Ubwo bantoteje bazabatoteza namwe. Niba barakurikije inyigisho zanjye n'izanyu bazazikurikiza.
John15:21 Ariko ibyo byose bazabibagirira babampōra kuko batazi Uwantumye.
John15:22 Iyo ntaza ngo mvugane na bo nta cyaha bajyaga kugira
John15:23 Unyanga aba yanze na Data.
John15:24 Iyo ntakorera muri bo ibitigeze bikorwa n'undi muntu wese nta cyaha bajyaga kugira
John15:25 Nyamara byagenze bityo kugira ngo bibe nk'uko byanditswe mu gitabo cy'Amategeko yabo ngo: ‘Banyanze ari nta mpamvu.’
John15:26 “Wa Mujyanama azaza
John15:27 Namwe kandi muzambera abagabo kuko turi kumwe uhereye mbere na mbere.
John16:1 “Ibyo nabibabwiriye kugira ngo hatagira ikibacogoza.
John16:2 Bazabaca mu nsengero zabo
John16:3 Bazabagirira batyo kuko batamenye Data
John16:4 Ariko ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo igihe nikigera muzibuke ko nabibamenyesheje. “Icyatumye ntabibabwira mbere ni uko nari nkiri kumwe namwe.
John16:5 Ariko ubu ngiye gusanga Uwantumye
John16:6 None ishavu rirabashengura kuko maze kubibabwira.
John16:7 Nyamara ndababwira ukuri: icyabagirira akamaro ni uko ngenda
John16:8 Kandi naza azemeza ab'isi ko batsinzwe ku byerekeye icyaha cyabo no ku byerekeye gutunganira Imana
John16:9 Azabemeza ibyerekeye icyaha cyabo kuko batanyemeye.
John16:10 Azabemeza ibyerekeye gutunganira Imana kuko ngiye kwa Data mukaba mutakimbonye.
John16:11 Azabemeza ibyerekeye urubanza kuko umutware w'iyi si yamaze kurucirwa.
John16:12 “Ndacyafite byinshi nababwira ariko ubu ntimwabasha kubyihanganira.
John16:13 Mwuka werekana ukuri naza azabayobora mu kuri kose
John16:14 Azanyubahiriza kuko azahabwa ku byanjye akabibamenyesha.
John16:15 Ibyo Data afite byose ni ibyanjye
John16:16 “Hasigaye igihe gito mwe kumbona hanyuma mu kindi gihe gito mukazambona.”
John16:17 Nuko bamwe mu bigishwa be barabazanya bati: “Ibyo se ni ibiki atubwiye ngo hasigaye igihe gito twe kumubona hanyuma mu kindi gihe gito tukazamubona
John16:18 Bati: “Icyo ‘gihe gito’ ni ukuvuga iki? Ntituzi icyo ashaka kuvuga.”
John16:19 Yezu amenye ko bashaka kumubaza ni ko kugira ati: “Ese murabazanya kuri iryo jambo navuze nti: ‘Hasigaye igihe gito mwe kumbona hanyuma mu kindi gihe gito mukazambona?’
John16:20 Ndababwira nkomeje ko muzarira muboroge
John16:21 Iyo umugore aramukwa arababara kuko agejeje igihe
John16:22 Namwe ubu murababaye koko
John16:23 “Uwo munsi nugera nta cyo muzaba mukinsiganuza. Ndababwira nkomeje ko icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye azakibaha.
John16:24 Kugeza ubu nta cyo mwigeze musaba mu izina ryanjye. Musabe muzahabwa kugira ngo ibyishimo byanyu bisendere.
John16:25 “Ibyo mbibabwiye mu marenga. Igihe kizaza ubwo ntazongera kubabwira mu marenga
John16:26 Uwo munsi muzamwambaza mu izina ryanjye. Simvuze ko nzabavuganira kuri Data.
John16:27 Erega Data ubwe asanzwe abakunda
John16:28 Naturutse kwa Data nza ku isi
John16:29 Abigishwa be baramubwira bati: “Dore noneho utubwiye weruye utaducira amarenga.
John16:30 Ubu tumenye yuko uzi byose kandi ntukeneye ko hari uwagira icyo akubaza. Kubera ibyo twemera ko wavuye ku Mana.”
John16:31 Yezu arababwira ati: “Noneho murashyize muranyemeye!
John16:32 Ariko igihe kigiye kuza ndetse kirageze
John16:33 Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo mugire amahoro mukomora kuri jye. Ku isi muzagira amakuba
John17:1 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo
John17:2 Wamuhaye ububasha ku bantu bose
John17:3 Kandi ubugingo buhoraho ngubu: ni uko bakumenya wowe Mana y'ukuri wenyine bakamenya n'uwo watumye Yezu Kristo.
John17:4 Naguhesheje ikuzo ku isi ndangiza umurimo wampaye gukora.
John17:5 Noneho Data
John17:6 “Abantu wampaye ubakuye mu b'isi nabagaragarije uwo uri we. Bari abawe maze urabampa kandi bakurikije ijambo ryawe.
John17:7 None bazi ko ibyo wampaye byose ari wowe biturukaho
John17:8 kuko ubutumwa wampaye nabubagejejeho bakabwakira. Bazi badashidikanya ko naturutse kuri wowe kandi bemera ko ari wowe wantumye.
John17:9 “Ni bo nsabira sinsabira ab'isi
John17:10 Ibyanjye byose ni ibyawe
John17:11 Kuva ubu sinkiri ku isi ariko bo baracyayiriho
John17:12 Nkiri kumwe na bo
John17:13 Ubu rero nje aho uri ariko ibyo mbivuze nkiri ku isi
John17:14 Nababwiye ijambo ryawe
John17:15 Singusaba ngo ubakure ku isi
John17:16 Si ab'isi nk'uko nanjye ntari uw'isi.
John17:17 Ubiyegurire ukoresheje ukuri kwawe
John17:18 Nk'uko wantumye ku isi ni ko nanjye mbatumye ku isi.
John17:19 Ku bwabo ndakwiyeguriye kugira ngo na bo babe bakwiyeguriye by'ukuri.
John17:20 “Ntabwo ari bo nsabira bonyine
John17:21 Ndasaba ko bose baba umwe. Data
John17:22 Ikuzo wampaye nanjye nararibahaye kugira ngo babe umwe nk'uko natwe turi umwe
John17:23 mbe muri bo nawe ube muri jye. Bibumbire hamwe byimazeyo
John17:24 “Data
John17:25 Data nyir'ubutungane
John17:26 Narabakumenyesheje kandi nzakomeza kubikora
John18:1 Yezu amaze gusenga atyo
John18:2 Yuda wari ugiye kumugambanira yari azi aho hantu
John18:3 Nuko Yuda ajyayo ayoboye igitero cy'abasirikari n'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana
John18:4 Yezu yari azi ibigiye kumubaho byose
John18:5 Baramusubiza bati: “Yezu w'i Nazareti.” Yezu arababwira ati: “Ni jyewe.” Yuda w'umugambanyi yari kumwe na bo.
John18:6 Yezu avuze ati: “Ni jyewe”
John18:7 Nuko yongera kubabaza ati: “Murashaka nde?” Bati: “Yezu w'i Nazareti.”
John18:8 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Nababwiye ko ari jye. Niba rero ari jye mushaka nimureke aba bigendere.”
John18:9 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko yari yavuze ati: “Sinabuze n'umwe mu bo wampaye.”
John18:10 Nuko Simoni Petero wari ufite inkota arayikura ayikubita umugaragu w'Umutambyi mukuru
John18:11 Yezu abwira Petero ati: “Subiza inkota mu rwubati. Mbese uragira ngo ndeke kunywa igikombe cy'umubabaro Data yampaye?”
John18:12 Ubwo rero abasirikari n'umukuru wabo hamwe n'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana b'Abayahudi
John18:13 Babanza kumujyana kwa Ana
John18:14 Kayifa ni we wari waragiriye Abayahudi inama
John18:15 Nuko Simoni Petero n'undi mwigishwa bakurikira Yezu. Uwo mwigishwa wundi yari azwi n'Umutambyi mukuru
John18:16 naho Petero asigara ku irembo. Nuko wa mwigishwa wundi wari uzwi n'Umutambyi mukuru
John18:17 Uwo muja abaza Petero ati: “Mbese aho nawe nturi uwo mu bigishwa b'uriya muntu?” Aramusubiza ati: “Oya.”
John18:18 Abagaragu n'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana bari bacanye umuriro kubera imbeho bari bahagaze bota
John18:19 Nuko wa Mutambyi mukuru Ana abaza Yezu ibyerekeye abigishwa be n'inyigisho ze.
John18:20 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Nahoze mbwira abantu bose ku mugaragaro. Iteka nigishirizaga mu nsengero no mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
John18:21 None urambariza iki? Ahubwo baza abumvise ibyo navuze
John18:22 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo
John18:23 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Niba mvuze nabi erekana aho ikibi kiri
John18:24 Nuko Ana amwohereza aboshye kwa Kayifa Umutambyi mukuru.
John18:25 Ubwo Simoni Petero akaba ahagaze yota. Nuko baramubaza bati: “Mbese aho nawe nturi uwo mu bigishwa be?” Arabihakana ati: “Oya.”
John18:26 Umwe wo mu bagaragu b'Umutambyi mukuru
John18:27 Nuko Petero yongera kubihakana
John18:28 Igitondo gitangaje bavana Yezu kwa Kayifa
John18:29 Nuko Pilato arasohoka abasanga hanze arababaza ati: “Uyu muntu muramurega iki?”
John18:30 Baramusubiza bati: “Iyo ataba umugizi wa nabi ntituba tumukuzaniye.”
John18:31 Pilato arababwira ati: “Nimube ari mwe mumujyana
John18:32 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko Yezu yari yavuze
John18:33 Pilato asubira mu ngoro ye
John18:34 Yezu ni ko kumubaza ati: “Ibyo ni wowe ubyihangiye
John18:35 Pilato aramusubiza ati: “Nanjye se uragira ngo ndi Umuyahudi? Ni bene wanyu n'abakuru bo mu batambyi banyu bakunzaniye. Mbese wakoze iki?”
John18:36 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ubwami bwanjye si ubwo kuri iyi si. Iyo buza kuba ubwo kuri iyi si
John18:37 Maze Pilato aramubaza ati: “Ni ukuvuga rero ko uri umwami?” Yezu ati: “Ubwawe wivugiye ko ndi umwami! Icyo navukiye kandi cyanzanye ku isi ni ukugira ngo mpamye ibyerekeye ukuri. Umuntu wese ukunda ukuri antega amatwi.”
John18:38 Pilato ati: “Ukuri ni iki?” Pilato amaze kuvuga atyo
John18:39 None se
John18:40 Barasakuza bati: “Si we dushaka ahubwo duhe Baraba!” Nyamara Baraba uwo yari umwambuzi.
John19:1 Ni bwo Pilato ategetse ko bafata Yezu ngo bamukubite.
John19:2 Nuko abasirikari bazingazinga ikamba ry'amahwa barimutamiriza ku mutwe
John19:3 bakamwegera bati: “Urakarama Mwami w'Abayahudi”
John19:4 Nuko Pilato yongera gusohoka abwira Abayahudi ati: “Dore ndamubazaniye kugira ngo mumenye ko nta cyaha namusanganye.”
John19:5 Yezu ni ko gusohoka yambaye rya kamba ry'amahwa na wa mwitero w'umutuku wijimye. Pilato arababwira ati: “Nguyu wa muntu.”
John19:6 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana bamukubise amaso
John19:7 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati: “Twebwe dufite itegeko rivuga ko agomba gupfa kuko yigize Umwana w'Imana.”
John19:8 Pilato yumvise iryo jambo arushaho kugira ubwoba
John19:9 maze asubira mu ngoro ye abaza Yezu ati: “Ukomoka hehe?” Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza.
John19:10 Pilato ni ko kumubwira ati: “Nta cyo unsubiza? Ese ntuzi ko mfite ububasha bwo kukurekura cyangwa bwo kukubamba ku musaraba?”
John19:11 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Nta bubasha na buke wari kuba umfiteho iyo utabuhabwa n'Imana. Noneho rero uwangambaniye kuri wowe agusumbije icyaha.”
John19:12 Guhera ubwo Pilato akora uko ashoboye ngo amurekure
John19:13 Pilato abyumvise atyo asubiza Yezu hanze
John19:14 Ubwo hari mu masaa sita ku munsi w'imyiteguro ya Pasika y'Abayahudi. Abwira Abayahudi ati: “Dore umwami wanyu!”
John19:15 Ariko bo bararangurura bati: “Mukureho! Mukureho! Mubambe ku musaraba!” Pilato arababaza ati: “Ese mbambe umwami wanyu?” Abakuru bo mu batambyi barasubiza bati: “Nta mwami tugira utari umwami w'i Roma.”
John19:16 Ni bwo Pilato amubahaye kugira ngo bamubambe. Nuko bafata Yezu baramujyana.
John19:17 Agenda yitwariye umusaraba agana ahantu hitiriwe igihanga
John19:18 Aho ni ho bamubambye ku musaraba abambanwa n'abandi babiri
John19:19 Pilato yari yandikishije itangazo arishyira ku musaraba
John19:20 Abayahudi benshi basoma iryo tangazo
John19:21 Nuko abakuru bo mu batambyi b'Abayahudi babwira Pilato bati: “Wikwandika ngo ‘Umwami w'Abayahudi’
John19:22 Pilato arabasubiza ati: “Icyo nanditse nacyanditse.”
John19:23 Abasirikari bamaze kubamba Yezu ku musaraba
John19:24 Nuko baravugana bati: “Twe kuyicamo ibice
John19:25 Iruhande rw'umusaraba wa Yezu hari hahagaze nyina
John19:26 Nuko Yezu abonye nyina
John19:27 Abwira n'uwo mwigishwa ati: “Nguwo nyoko!” Nuko guhera icyo gihe uwo mwigishwa amujyana iwe.
John19:28 Nyuma y'ibyo
John19:29 Ikibindi cyuzuye divayi isharira cyari giteretse aho. Nuko bafata icyangwe bagihambira ku gati kitwa hisopo
John19:30 Yezu amaze kunyunyuza iyo divayi isharira
John19:31 Kuko wari umunsi w'imyiteguro y'isabato
John19:32 Nuko abasirikari baraza
John19:33 ariko bageze kuri Yezu basanga amaze gupfa
John19:34 Ahubwo umwe mu basirikari amutoboza icumu mu rubavu
John19:35 Uwabyiboneye ni we ubihamya kandi ibyo ahamya ni iby'ukuri. Uwo azi ko ibyo avuga ari ukuri kugira ngo namwe mubyemere.
John19:36 Ibyo bintu byabereyeho kugira ngo bibe nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nta gufwa rye na rimwe rizavunwa.”
John19:37 Kandi ahandi havuga ngo: “Bazitegereza uwo batoboye.”
John19:38 Hanyuma y'ibyo haza uwitwa Yozefu ukomoka mu mujyi wa Arimateya
John19:39 Nikodemu wigeze gusanga Yezu nijoro na we araza
John19:40 Bombi bajyana umurambo wa Yezu
John19:41 Hafi y'aho yabambwe hari ubusitani burimo imva nshya itigeze ihambwamo.
John19:42 Kubera ko wari umunsi w'imyiteguro y'isabato kandi iyo mva ikaba yari bugufi
John20:1 Ku cyumweru ari wo munsi wa mbere
John20:2 Nuko ariruka asanga Simoni Petero na wa mwigishwa wundi Yezu yakundaga
John20:3 Petero ahagurukana na wa mwigishwa wundi bajya ku mva.
John20:4 Bombi bariruka ariko wa mwigishwa wundi asiga Petero
John20:5 Arunama abona imyenda irambitse aho
John20:6 Simoni Petero na we aba arahageze yinjira mu mva
John20:7 n'igitambaro cyari gitwikiriye umutwe wa Yezu kitari hamwe n'indi myenda
John20:8 Nuko wa mwigishwa wundi wageze ku mva bwa mbere na we arinjira
John20:9 Bari batarasobanukirwa Ibyanditswe bivuga ko agomba kuzuka.
John20:10 Nuko abo bigishwa bisubirira imuhira.
John20:11 Mariya yari ahagaze hafi y'imva arira. Akirira arunama areba mu mva
John20:12 maze abona abamarayika babiri bambaye imyambaro yera bicaye aho umurambo wa Yezu wari uri
John20:13 Baramubaza bati: “Wa mugore we
John20:14 Amaze kuvuga atyo ahindukiye ngo arebe inyuma
John20:15 Yezu aramubaza ati: “Wa mugore we
John20:16 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Mariya we.” Mariya arahindukira amubwira mu kinyarameya ati: “Rabuni!” (Bisobanurwa ngo “Mwigisha”).
John20:17 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Wishaka kungumana kuko ntarazamuka ngo njye kwa Data! Ahubwo genda usange abavandimwe banjye
John20:18 Mariya w'i Magadala aragenda abwira abigishwa ati: “Niboneye Nyagasani!” Nuko abatekerereza ibyo yamubwiye.
John20:19 Nuko kuri uwo munsi bugorobye
John20:20 Amaze kuvuga atyo abereka ibiganza bye no mu rubavu rwe. Abigishwa babonye Nyagasani barishima cyane.
John20:21 Ababwira ubwa kabiri ati: “Nimugire amahoro! Uko Data yantumye ni ko nanjye mbatumye.”
John20:22 Amaze kuvuga atyo abahumekeraho ati: “Nimwakire Mwuka Muziranenge!
John20:23 Abo muzababarira ibyaha bose bazaba babibabariwe
John20:24 Ariko Tomasi witwaga Didimo umwe mu bigishwa cumi na babiri
John20:25 Nuko abandi bigishwa baramubwira bati: “Twabonye Nyagasani!” Tomasi arababwira ati: “Nintabona imyenge y'imisumari mu biganza bye ngo nshyiremo urutoki
John20:26 Nuko iminsi umunani ishize na bwo abigishwa ba Yezu bari muri ya nzu
John20:27 Abwira Tomasi ati: “Shyira urutoki aha ngaha
John20:28 Tomasi aramusubiza ati: “Mwami wanjye! Mana yanjye!”
John20:29 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Unyemejwe n'uko umbonye. Hahirwa abanyemera kandi batambonye.”
John20:30 Yezu ari kumwe n'abigishwa be yakoze n'ibindi bitangaza byinshi bimuranga
John20:31 Ariko ibi byandikiwe kugira ngo mwemere yuko Yezu ari Kristo Umwana w'Imana
John21:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Yezu yongera kubonekera abigishwa be ku nkombe z'ikiyaga cya Tiberiya. Dore uko byagenze:
John21:2 abari bahari ni Simoni Petero na Tomasi witwaga Didimo
John21:3 Simoni Petero arababwira ati: “Ngiye kuroba.” Baramusubiza bati: “Reka tujyane!” Nuko baragenda bajya mu bwato
John21:4 Mu gitondo cya kare Yezu yari ku nkombe
John21:5 Nuko arababaza ati: “Yemwe
John21:6 Arababwira ati: “Nimuterere umutego iburyo bw'ubwato murayafata.” Nuko babigenza batyo
John21:7 Wa mwigishwa Yezu yakundaga abwira Petero ati: “Ni Nyagasani!” Simoni Petero yumvise ko ari Nyagasani
John21:8 Abandi bigishwa baza mu bwato
John21:9 Bageze imusozi bahasanga amakara yaka
John21:10 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimuzane ku mafi mumaze gufata.”
John21:11 Simoni Petero asubira mu bwato
John21:12 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimuze mufungure!” Nta n'umwe mu bigishwa be wubahutse kumubaza ati: “Uri nde?” Bari bamenye ko ari Nyagasani.
John21:13 Yezu araza afata umugati arawubahereza
John21:14 Ubwo bwari ubwa gatatu Yezu abonekera abigishwa be amaze kuzuka.
John21:15 Nuko bamaze gufungura Yezu abaza Simoni Petero ati: “Simoni mwene Yohani
John21:16 Yongera kumubaza ubwa kabiri ati: “Simoni mwene Yohani
John21:17 Yongera kumubaza ubwa gatatu ati: “Simoni mwene Yohani
John21:18 Ndakubwira nkomeje ko igihe wari ukiri umusore
John21:19 Yavugiye atyo kugira ngo yerekane urwo Petero azapfa rugahesha Imana ikuzo. Amaze kuvuga atyo aramubwira ati: “Nkurikira!”
John21:20 Petero akebutse abona wa mwigishwa Yezu yakundaga abakurikiye. Uwo ni umwe wari wegamye mu gituza cya Yezu cya gihe bari ku meza
John21:21 Petero amubonye abaza Yezu ati: “Naho se Nyagasani
John21:22 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Niba nshaka ko abaho kugeza aho nzazira bigutwaye iki? Wowe nkurikira!”
John21:23 Nuko iyo nkuru ikwira mu bavandimwe yuko uwo mwigishwa atazapfa. Ariko Yezu ntiyavugaga ko atazapfa
John21:24 Uwo mwigishwa ni we ubwe uhamya ibyo
John21:25 Hariho n'ibindi byinshi Yezu yakoze. Uwabyandika byose uko bingana
Acts1:1 Kuri Tewofili
Acts1:2 kugeza ku munsi ajyanywe mu ijuru. Ibyo bitaraba yagize ibyo amenyesha abo yari yaratoranyije kuba Intumwa ze
Acts1:3 Abo ni bo yari yariyeretse nyuma yo kubabazwa agapfa
Acts1:4 Igihe kimwe bari kumwe arabategeka ati: “Ntimuzave i Yeruzalemu
Acts1:5 Yohani we yabatirishaga amazi
Acts1:6 Nuko Intumwa za Yezu zimaze guterana ziramubaza ziti: “Mbese Nyagasani
Acts1:7 Arabasubiza ati: “Ibihe n'iminsi ibyo bizabera byagenwe n'ubushobozi bwite bwa Data
Acts1:8 Icyakora Mwuka Muziranenge nabazaho muzahabwa ububasha. Bityo muzaba abagabo bo guhamya ibyanjye i Yeruzalemu no muri Yudeya hose
Acts1:9 Amaze kuvuga atyo azamurwa bamureba
Acts1:10 Igihe bagihanze amaso ku ijuru akigenda
Acts1:11 Barababaza bati: “Yemwe bagabo bo muri Galileya
Acts1:12 Nuko basubira i Yeruzalemu bavuye ku musozi w'Iminzenze
Acts1:13 Bagezeyo bajya muri cya cyumba cyo hejuru
Acts1:14 Abo bose bakomeza kubana bashishikariye gusenga bahuje umutima
Acts1:15 Muri iyo minsi Petero ahaguruka hagati y'abemera Yezu bari bateranye ari nk'ijana na makumyabiri
Acts1:16 “Bavandimwe
Acts1:17 Uwo yahoze abarwa muri twe kandi yari yaratorewe umurimo umwe n'uwacu.”
Acts1:18 Yuda uwo amaze kugura umurima ibivuye mu buhemu bwe
Acts1:19 Ibyo bimenyekana mu baturage b'i Yeruzalemu bose
Acts1:20 Petero yungamo ati: “Koko kandi ni ko byanditswe mu gitabo cya Zaburi ngo ‘Iwe hazahinduke itongo
Acts1:21 “Dore rero uko bigomba kugenda: hariho abagabo twajyanaga igihe cyose Nyagasani Yezu yabanye natwe
Acts1:22 uhereye ubwo Yohani yabatizaga ukageza ku munsi Yezu yadukuriwemo akajya mu ijuru. Umwe muri bo ni we uzafatanya natwe
Acts1:23 Nuko bazana abantu babiri. Umwe ni Yozefu witwaga Barisaba wari waranahimbwe Yusito
Acts1:24 Basenga bagira bati: “Nyagasani
Acts1:25 kugira ngo abe Intumwa ya Kristo mu cyimbo cya Yuda
Acts1:26 Barafinda maze ubufindo bwerekana Matiyasi
Acts2:1 Umunsi mukuru wa Pentekote ugeze bose bari bakoraniye hamwe.
Acts2:2 Nuko umuriri ubatungura uvuye mu ijuru umeze nk'umuyaga w'ishuheri
Acts2:3 Haboneka indimi zisa n'ibirimi by'umuriro zibajyaho
Acts2:4 Bose buzuzwa Mwuka Muziranenge
Acts2:5 I Yeruzalemu habaga Abayahudi bubaha Imana
Acts2:6 Bumvise urwo rusaku
Acts2:7 Barumirwa baratangara bati: “Mbese aba bose bavuga si Abanyagalileya?
Acts2:8 Bishoboka bite se ko buri wese muri twe yumva bavuga ururimi rwe kavukire?
Acts2:9 Ko bamwe twaturutse muri Pariti no mu Bumedi no muri Elamu
Acts2:10 na Furujiya
Acts2:11 abandi ni Abayahudi kavukire
Acts2:12 Bose barumirwa bagwa mu kantu
Acts2:13 Abandi baraseka bavuga bati: “Basinze inzoga y'ihīra!”
Acts2:14 Petero arahaguruka ari kumwe na ba bandi cumi n'umwe
Acts2:15 Erega aba bantu ntibanyoye nk'uko mubyibwira. Dore ni mu gitondo haracyari isaa tatu!
Acts2:16 Ahubwo ibyo mureba ibi ni ibyahanuwe n'umuhanuzi Yoweli
Acts2:17 ngo Imana iravuga iti: ‘Mu minsi y'imperuka nzasuka Mwuka wanjye ku bantu bose
Acts2:18 Mu minsi y'imperuka nzasuka Mwuka wanjye ku bagaragu banjye no ku baja banjye
Acts2:19 Nzerekana ibitangaza hejuru ku ijuru
Acts2:20 Izuba rizijima
Acts2:21 Umuntu wese uzatakambira Nyagasani azakizwa.’
Acts2:22 “Yemwe Bisiraheli
Acts2:23 Uwo muntu yatanzwe nk'uko Imana yari yarabigennye ikabiteganya mbere
Acts2:24 Ariko Imana iramuzura imugobotora ingoyi z'urupfu
Acts2:25 Mwibuke ko Dawidi yavuze ibyerekeye Yezu uwo ati: ‘Nabonye Nyagasani imbere yanjye iteka
Acts2:26 Ni cyo gituma nezerwa nkanishima
Acts2:27 Koko rero ntuzandeka ngo mpere ikuzimu
Acts2:28 Unyobora inzira izangeza ku bugingo
Acts2:29 “Bavandimwe
Acts2:30 Yari umuhanuzi kandi yazirikanaga indahiro Imana yamurahiye
Acts2:31 Yeretswe mbere y'igihe uko bizamera
Acts2:32 Yezu uwo rero Imana yaramuzuye
Acts2:33 Amaze kuzamurwa mu ijuru ashyirwa iburyo bw'Imana
Acts2:34 Erega Dawidi we ntiyagiye mu ijuru
Acts2:35 nanjye nzahindura abanzi bawe nk'akabaho ukandagizaho ibirenge.” ’
Acts2:36 “None rero urubyaro rwose rwa Isiraheli rukwiriye kumenya rudashidikanya ko Yezu uwo mwabambye
Acts2:37 Abantu bumvise ibyo barakangarana
Acts2:38 Petero arababwira ati: “Nimwihane buri wese abatizwe mu izina rya Yezu Kristo
Acts2:39 Erega Isezerano ni mwe ryagenewe kimwe n'abana banyu
Acts2:40 Avuga n'andi magambo menshi yo kubemeza no kubakomeza agira ati: “Nimwikize
Acts2:41 Abemeye izo nyigisho za Petero barabatizwa
Acts2:42 Bakomezaga kwita ku nyigisho z'Intumwa
Acts2:43 Abantu bose bagize ubwoba
Acts2:44 Abemeraga Yezu bose babaga hamwe bafatanya byose.
Acts2:45 Bagurishaga amasambu yabo n'ibindi bintu bari batunze
Acts2:46 Iminsi yose bagiraga umwete wo guteranira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana bahuje umutima
Acts2:47 bahimbaza Imana kandi bashimwa n'abantu bose. Uko bukeye Nyagasani akungura umubare w'abagenda bakizwa.
Acts3:1 Umunsi umwe saa cyenda
Acts3:2 Hariho umuntu wavutse ari ikirema bahekaga buri munsi
Acts3:3 Ngo abone Petero na Yohani bagiye kwinjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro na bo arabasaba.
Acts3:4 Petero na Yohani baramutumbira
Acts3:5 Nuko uwo mugabo agumya kubahanga amaso agira ngo hari icyo bamuha.
Acts3:6 Petero aramubwira ati: “Nta mafaranga mfite
Acts3:7 Nuko amufata ukuboko kw'iburyo aramuhagurutsa. Muri ako kanya
Acts3:8 Nuko arabaduka arahagarara
Acts3:9 Rubanda rwose babonye agenda kandi asingiza Imana
Acts3:10 bamenya ko ari wa wundi wajyaga asabiriza
Acts3:11 Igihe uwo muntu yanze kuvirira Petero na Yohani
Acts3:12 Petero abibonye arababaza ati: “Bisiraheli
Acts3:13 Imana ya Aburahamu n'Imana ya Izaki n'Imana ya Yakobo
Acts3:14 Mwihakanye uwo Muziranenge akaba n'Intungane
Acts3:15 Nuko uwo Mugaba w'ubugingo we muramwica
Acts3:16 Uyu muntu mureba kandi muzi yakijijwe ubumuga kubera kwizera ubushobozi bwa Yezu. Ubushobozi bwa Yezu n'ukwizera gukomoka kuri we
Acts3:17 “None rero bavandimwe
Acts3:18 Nyamara Imana ni yo yatumye biba bityo
Acts3:19 Nuko rero nimwisubireho
Acts3:20 habeho ibihe byo guhemburwa bituruka kuri Nyagasani
Acts3:21 Yezu uwo agomba kuguma mu ijuru kugeza igihe Imana izahindura byose bishya
Acts3:22 Musa yaravuze ati: ‘Nyagasani Imana yanyu azabatumaho umuhanuzi umeze nkanjye ukomoka muri mwe
Acts3:23 Umuntu wese utazumvira uwo muhanuzi azarimburwe.’
Acts3:24 Kandi abahanuzi bose uhereye kuri Samweli no ku bamukurikiye
Acts3:25 Ni mwe mwarazwe ibyavuzwe n'abahanuzi n'ibyo Imana yasezeranye na ba sokuruza
Acts3:26 Noneho igihe Imana yahagurutsaga uwo Mugaragu wayo
Acts4:1 Igihe Petero na Yohani bakivugana n'abantu
Acts4:2 Barakajwe cyane n'uko Petero na Yohani bigisha abantu
Acts4:3 Nuko barabafata babaraza muri gereza kuko bwari bugorobye.
Acts4:4 Nyamara abenshi mu bari bumvise ibyo bavuga bemera Yezu
Acts4:5 Bukeye abatware b'Abayahudi n'abakuru b'imiryango n'abigishamategeko bakoranira i Yeruzalemu.
Acts4:6 Basanga Ana Umutambyi mukuru na Kayifa
Acts4:7 Nuko bazana Petero na Yohani bababariza mu ruhame bati: “Mbese mwabashije mute gukiza uwo muntu? Ese mwashobojwe na nde kubikora?”
Acts4:8 Petero yuzuye Mwuka Muziranenge arabasubiza ati: “Batware namwe bakuru b'imiryango
Acts4:9 uyu munsi duhamagariwe kubazwa ibyerekeye ineza uyu muntu yagiriwe n'uburyo yakijijwe ubumuga!
Acts4:10 Noneho mwebwe mwese n'umuryango wose wa Isiraheli
Acts4:11 Yezu ni we Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo ‘Ibuye mwebwe abubatsi mwanze
Acts4:12 Nta wundi agakiza kabonekaho
Acts4:13 Abanyarukiko babonye ukuntu Petero na Yohani bavuga bashize amanga
Acts4:14 Babonye uwo muntu wakijijwe ubumuga ahagararanye na bo
Acts4:15 Nuko bamaze kubaheza abanyarukiko barabazanya bati:
Acts4:16 “Bariya bantu tubagenze dute? Erega abaturage bose b'i Yeruzalemu bamenye ko bakoze igitangaza gikomeye
Acts4:17 Ariko kugira ngo bitarushaho gukwizwa muri rubanda mureke tubakange
Acts4:18 Nuko bongera kubahamagara
Acts4:19 Ariko Petero na Yohani barabasubiza bati: “Mbese tubumvire cyangwa twumvire Imana? Namwe nimwihitiremo icyo Imana ishima!
Acts4:20 Twe rero ntitubasha guceceka ibyo twiyumviye n'ibyo twiboneye.”
Acts4:21 Bamaze kubuka inabi barabarekura. Ubwo bari babuze uko babahana
Acts4:22 Koko kandi uwo muntu wari wakijijwe ubumuga ku buryo butangaje butyo
Acts4:23 Petero na Yohani bamaze kurekurwa basanga bagenzi babo
Acts4:24 Babyumvise bose bahita basenga Imana bashyize hamwe bati: “Nyagasani
Acts4:25 Ni wowe watumye Mwuka Muziranenge avugisha umugaragu wawe sogokuruza Dawidi ati: ‘Kuki amahanga yarubiye? Kuki amoko yiha imigambi y'impfabusa?
Acts4:26 Abami bayo barahagurutse
Acts4:27 Ni ukuri Herodi na Ponsiyo Pilato
Acts4:28 Kwari ugusohoza imigambi wateganyije kuva kera kose ku bw'ububasha n'ubushake bwawe.
Acts4:29 None Nyagasani
Acts4:30 Urambure ukuboko ukize indwara
Acts4:31 Bamaze gusenga ahantu bari bakoraniye haratigita. Bose buzura Mwuka Muziranenge maze batangaza Ijambo ry'Imana bashize amanga.
Acts4:32 Ikoraniro ry'abemeye Yezu bose ryari rihuje umutima n'imigambi. Nta n'umwe wavugaga ko icyo atunze cyose acyihariye
Acts4:33 Nuko Intumwa za Kristo zikomeza guhamya ibyerekeye izuka rya Nyagasani Yezu zibivugana ububasha bukomeye
Acts4:34 Nta n'umwe muri bo wagiraga icyo akena ngo akibure
Acts4:35 bakagishyikiriza Intumwa za Kristo
Acts4:36 Umwe wakoze atyo ni Yozefu
Acts4:37 Yagurishije umurima yari afite ikiguzi agishyikiriza Intumwa.
Acts5:1 Ariko umugabo witwaga Ananiya amaze kumvikana n'umugore we Safira
Acts5:2 
Acts5:3 Petero aramubaza ati: “Ananiya
Acts5:4 Mbese isambu utarayigurisha ntiyari iyawe
Acts5:5 Ananiya yumvise ayo magambo yitura hasi araca
Acts5:6 Nuko abasore barahaguruka baramupfunya bajya kumuhamba.
Acts5:7 Hashize nk'amasaha atatu umugore we arinjira
Acts5:8 Petero aramubaza ati: “Cyo se ye
Acts5:9 Petero ni ko kumubwira ati: “Ni iki cyatumye muhuza inama yo kugerageza Mwuka wa Nyagasani? Umva imirindi y'abavuye guhamba umugabo wawe bageze ku muryango
Acts5:10 Ako kanya Safira amugwa imbere araca. Abasore binjiye basanga yapfuye
Acts5:11 Umuryango wose wa Kristo n'abumvise ibyabaye bose bashya ubwoba.
Acts5:12 Intumwa zikomeza gukora ibitangaza no gutanga ibimenyetso byinshi muri rubanda
Acts5:13 Ariko nubwo rubanda babashimaga
Acts5:14 Nyamara abantu benshi cyane
Acts5:15 Ibyo Intumwa zakoraga byatumaga abantu bazana abarwayi mu mihanda y'umujyi
Acts5:16 Nuko rubanda nyamwinshi bagashika baturutse mu mijyi ikikije Yeruzalemu
Acts5:17 Umutambyi mukuru na bagenzi be bose bo mu ishyaka ry'Abasaduseyi bashengurwa n'ishyari.
Acts5:18 Nuko bafata izo Ntumwa za Kristo bazishyira muri gereza rusange.
Acts5:19 Nyamara muri iryo joro umumarayika wa Nyagasani akingura inzugi za gereza
Acts5:20 “Nimugende muhagarare mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Acts5:21 Babyumvise bahita binjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro mu museke
Acts5:22 Abatumwe kubazana bageze muri gereza ntibabasangamo. Nuko baragaruka baravuga bati:
Acts5:23 “Twasanze gereza idanangiye n'abarinzi bahagaze ku nzugi
Acts5:24 Babyumvise batyo umutware w'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana n'abakuru bo mu batambyi
Acts5:25 Nuko umuntu araza arababwira ati: “Dore ba bagabo mwashyize muri gereza bahagaze mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Acts5:26 Uwo mutware ajyana n'abarinzi
Acts5:27 Nuko bazihagarika imbere y'urukiko
Acts5:28 “Twari twarabihanangirije kutigisha mwitwaje iryo zina
Acts5:29 Petero n'izindi Ntumwa barasubiza bati: “Tugomba kumvira Imana kuruta kumvira abantu.
Acts5:30 Imana ya ba sogokuruza yazuye Yezu mumaze kumwica mumubambye ku musaraba
Acts5:31 imushyira hejuru iburyo bwayo ngo abe Umutegetsi n'Umukiza
Acts5:32 Turi abagabo bo kubihamya – twe na Mwuka Muziranenge
Acts5:33 Babyumvise batyo umujinya urabasya bashaka kubica.
Acts5:34 Ariko muri urwo rukiko hari Umufarizayi witwaga Gamaliyeli
Acts5:35 Nuko abwira abari mu rukiko ati: “Bisiraheli
Acts5:36 Hambere aha Teyuda yadutse avuga ko ari umuntu ukomeye
Acts5:37 Nyuma ye mu minsi y'ibarura
Acts5:38 Mureke mbagire inama: ntimugire icyo mutwara bariya bagabo mubihorere. Niba ibyo batekereza n'ibyo bakora bikomoka ku bantu bizayoyoka.
Acts5:39 Ariko niba bikomoka ku Mana koko ntimuzabasha kubatsinda. Muramenye hato mutaba murwanya Imana.” Nuko bemera iyo nama
Acts5:40 bahamagaza za Ntumwa barazikubita
Acts5:41 Intumwa ziva mu rukiko zishimira ko zemerewe gusuzugurwa zihōrwa Yezu
Acts5:42 Nuko buri munsi ntizisibe kwigishiriza mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana no mu ngo
Acts6:1 Muri iyo minsi umubare w'abigishwa ba Kristo ukomeje kwiyongera
Acts6:2 Nuko Intumwa cumi n'ebyiri zikoranya imbaga y'abigishwa bose zirababwira ziti: “Ntibikwiye ko tureka kwigisha Ijambo ry'Imana ngo duhugire ku kugabura.
Acts6:3 None rero bavandimwe
Acts6:4 Bityo twebwe tuzagumya kwibanda ku murimo wo gusenga no kwigisha Ijambo ry'Imana.”
Acts6:5 Iyo nama y'Intumwa inyura abakoraniye aho bose. Nuko batoranya Sitefano umuntu wemeraga Kristo byimazeyo kandi wuzuye Mwuka Muziranenge
Acts6:6 Abo bantu babashyikiriza Intumwa maze zirabasabira
Acts6:7 Nuko Ijambo ry'Imana rikomeza gukwira
Acts6:8 Sitefano wari waragiriye umugisha ku Mana ikamuha n'ububasha bwinshi
Acts6:9 Ariko abantu bamwe bo mu rusengero rw'abitwaga “Ababohowe” barahaguruka
Acts6:10 Nyamara ntibashobora guhangana n'ubwenge bwari bumurimo
Acts6:11 Nuko bagurira abantu ngo bazavuge bati: “Twumvise avuga amagambo yo gutuka Musa n'Imana.”
Acts6:12 Bahuruza rubanda n'abakuru b'imiryango n'abigishamategeko
Acts6:13 Ni ko guhagurutsa abagabo bo kumushinja ibinyoma
Acts6:14 Twumvise avuga ko Yezu uwo w'i Nazareti azasenya iyi Ngoro
Acts6:15 Abanyarukiko bose bitegereje Sitefano babona mu maso he hasa n'ah'umumarayika.
Acts7:1 Umutambyi mukuru abaza Sitefano ati: “Mbese ibyo bakuvugaho ni ukuri?”
Acts7:2 Sitefano arasubiza ati: “Bavandimwe namwe babyeyi
Acts7:3 iramubwira iti: ‘Va mu gihugu cyanyu
Acts7:4 Nuko ava mu gihugu cy'Abanyakalideya ajya gutura i Harani. Nyuma y'urupfu rwa se Imana imuvanayo
Acts7:5 Imana ntiyigeze imukebera isambu ye bwite
Acts7:6 Imana ni ko kumubwira iti: ‘Abazagukomokaho bazasuhukira mu kindi gihugu bakimaremo imyaka magana ane yose
Acts7:7 Ariko nzahana igihugu kizabakoresha agahato
Acts7:8 Nuko igirana na we Isezerano rirangwa n'umuhango wo gukebwa. Hanyuma abyaye Izaki amukeba ku munsi wa munani. Ni na ko Izaki yagenje Yakobo
Acts7:9 “Ba sogokuruza abo bagirira Yozefu ishyari
Acts7:10 imugobotora mu magorwa ye yose. Imuha ubwenge no gutona ku mwami wa Misiri
Acts7:11 Hanyuma inzara itera hose mu Misiri no muri Kanāni
Acts7:12 Nuko Yakobo yumvise ko mu Misiri hari ibiribwa
Acts7:13 Bagiyeyo ubwa kabiri Yozefu yibwira bene se
Acts7:14 Yozefu atumira se Yakobo n'umuryango we wose
Acts7:15 Nuko Yakobo yimukira mu Misiri
Acts7:16 Imirambo yabo ijyanwa i Shekemu
Acts7:17 “Igihe kigeze ngo bibe nk'uko Imana yasezeraniye Aburahamu
Acts7:18 Ni bwo mu Misiri himye undi mwami utarigeze amenya ibya Yozefu.
Acts7:19 Uwo mwami mushya apyinagaza umuryango wacu
Acts7:20 Ubwo ni bwo Musa avutse ari umwana mwiza bihebuje. Nuko arererwa imuhira amezi atatu.
Acts7:21 Bamuhisha mu gasozi ariko umukobwa w'umwami aramwitorera
Acts7:22 Musa yigishwa ubuhanga bwose bw'Abanyamisiri
Acts7:23 “Musa amaze imyaka mirongo ine avutse
Acts7:24 Abona umwe muri bo agirirwa nabi n'Umunyamisiri aramurengera
Acts7:25 Musa yibwiraga ko bene wabo bamenyeraho ko ari we Imana yatumye kubakiza
Acts7:26 Bukeye asanga Abisiraheli babiri barwana
Acts7:27 Uwarenganyaga mugenzi we asunika Musa amuhinda ati: ‘Ni nde wakugize umutware cyangwa umucamanza wacu?
Acts7:28 Mbese urashaka kunyica nk'uko ejo wishe wa Munyamisiri?’
Acts7:29 Musa abyumvise arahunga ajya gutura mu gihugu cya Midiyani
Acts7:30 “Imyaka mirongo ine ishize abonekerwa n'umumarayika mu gihuru cyaka umuriro
Acts7:31 Musa abibonye aratangara
Acts7:32 ‘Ndi Imana ya ba sokuruza
Acts7:33 Nuko Nyagasani aramubwira ati: ‘Kuramo inkweto kuko uhagaze ahantu nitoranyirije.
Acts7:34 Nabonye uko ubwoko bwanjye bukoreshwa agahato mu Misiri
Acts7:35 “Musa uwo bene wabo bari baramwanze bamubaza bati: ‘Ni nde wakugize umutware cyangwa umucamanza wacu?’ Nyamara ni we Imana yohereje kubabera umutware n'umutabazi
Acts7:36 Musa ni we wabavanye mu Misiri akora ibitangaza
Acts7:37 Ni we wabwiye Abisiraheli ati: ‘Imana izabatumaho umuhanuzi umeze nkanjye ukomoka muri mwe.’
Acts7:38 Musa uwo ni we wari mu ikoraniro ry'Abisiraheli mu butayu
Acts7:39 “Ariko ba sogokuruza banga kumwumvira baramuhinda
Acts7:40 Babwira Aroni bati: ‘Turemere imana zo kutuyobora
Acts7:41 Ubwo ni bwo bacuze ishusho y'ikimasa bagitambira igitambo
Acts7:42 Nuko Imana irabazibukira
Acts7:43 Nyamara mwahetse ihema ry'ikigirwamana Moleki n'ishusho y'inyenyeri y'ikigirwamana Refani
Acts7:44 “Mu butayu ba sogokuruza bari bafite Ihema rihamya Isezerano Imana yagiranye na bo
Acts7:45 Hanyuma ba sogokuruza bahererekanya iryo Hema kugeza mu gihe cya Yozuwe
Acts7:46 Dawidi uwo yatonnye ku Mana
Acts7:47 Nyamara ni Salomo wayubakiye iyo Nzu.
Acts7:48 “Ariko Usumbabyose ntaba mu mazu yubatswe n'abantu
Acts7:49 ‘Ijuru ni intebe yanjye ya cyami
Acts7:50 Mbese si jye waremye ibyo byose?’
Acts7:51 “Yemwe bantu b'ibyigomeke! Yemwe bantu batagira umutima kandi b'ibipfamatwi! Muri kimwe na ba sokuruza
Acts7:52 Mbese hari umuhanuzi n'umwe ba sokuruza batatoteje? Ese ntibishe n'abahanuye kuza kwa ya Ntungane? None namwe ni yo mwagambaniye murayica.
Acts7:53 Mwahawe Amategeko y'Imana muyashyikirijwe n'abamarayika
Acts7:54 Abari aho bumvise ibyo Sitefano avuze
Acts7:55 Naho Sitefano yuzura Mwuka Muziranenge
Acts7:56 Aravuga ati: “Dore ndareba ijuru rikinguye
Acts7:57 Baherako bavuza induru barasakuza cyane
Acts7:58 baramukurubana bamuvana mu mujyi maze bamutera amabuye. Abamushinjaga basigira imyitero yabo umusore witwaga Sawuli.
Acts7:59 Bakimutera amabuye Sitefano arasenga ati: “Nyagasani Yezu
Acts7:60 Nuko arapfukama avuga aranguruye ati: “Nyagasani
Acts8:1 Ibyo kwica Sitefano Sawuli yari abishyigikiye. Uwo munsi Abakristo b'i Yeruzalemu batangira gutotezwa bikomeye. Uretse Intumwa
Acts8:2 Abantu bubahaga Imana bashyingura Sitefano kandi baramuririra cyane.
Acts8:3 Naho Sawuli we agumya kuyogoza Umuryango wa Kristo. Yavaga mu rugo akajya mu rundi
Acts8:4 Abatatanye bagenda hose bamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza.
Acts8:5 Filipo we ajya mu mujyi wo muri Samariya
Acts8:6 Rubanda bitondera ibyo Filipo avuga
Acts8:7 Ingabo za Satani zavaga mu bantu benshi zomongana
Acts8:8 Nuko muri uwo mujyi hakaba ibyishimo byinshi.
Acts8:9 Muri uwo mujyi kandi hari umugabo witwaga Simoni wari usanzwe aragura agatangaza Abanyasamariya
Acts8:10 Nuko abantu bose bakamurangarira
Acts8:11 Bamuhugiraho kuko bari bamaze igihe batangazwa n'ubupfumu bwe.
Acts8:12 Bamaze kwemera Ubutumwa bwiza Filipo yabazaniye yerekeye ubwami bw'Imana na Yezu Kristo
Acts8:13 Nuko Simoni na we yemera izo nyigisho arabatizwa
Acts8:14 Intumwa za Kristo zari i Yeruzalemu zumvise ko abo muri Samariya bemeye Ijambo ry'Imana
Acts8:15 Bagezeyo barabasabira ngo bahabwe Mwuka Muziranenge
Acts8:16 kuko ari nta n'umwe muri bo yari yamanukiraho
Acts8:17 Petero na Yohani bamaze kubarambikaho ibiganza
Acts8:18 Simoni abonye uko abo Intumwa za Kristo zirambitseho ibiganza bahawe Mwuka Muziranenge
Acts8:19 “Mumpe nanjye ubwo bushobozi
Acts8:20 Petero aramubwira ati: “Uragapfana n'amafaranga yawe! Ubonye ngo utekereze ko wagura impano y'Imana amafaranga!
Acts8:21 Ntaho uhuriye n'ibi ngibi
Acts8:22 Nuko rero wihane ubwo bugome bwawe maze usabe Nyagasani
Acts8:23 Erega ndasanga umazwe n'ishyari kandi wahambiranye n'ubuhemu!”
Acts8:24 Simoni ni ko gusubiza ati: “Munsabire Nyagasani
Acts8:25 Petero na Yohani bamaze kwemeza abantu ibyo biboneye no kubabwira ijambo rya Nyagasani
Acts8:26 Umumarayika wa Nyagasani abwira Filipo ati: “Haguruka ugende werekeje mu majyepfo
Acts8:27 Nuko Filipo arahaguruka aragenda
Acts8:28 Mu gihe yari mu nzira ataha
Acts8:29 Mwuka w'Imana abwira Filipo ati: “Egera uriya mugabo wicaye mu igare mugendane.”
Acts8:30 Filipo ariruka maze yumva wa mugabo asoma igitabo cy'umuhanuzi Ezayi
Acts8:31 Undi aramusubiza ati: “Nkabyumva nte se ntabonye unsobanurira?” Nuko asaba Filipo kurira ngo bicarane mu igare.
Acts8:32 Ibyo yasomaga mu Byanditswe byari ibi ngo: “Yajyanywe nk'intama bajyana mu ibagiro
Acts8:33 Bamucishije bugufi ntihagira umurengera. Ni nde uzamenyekanisha urubyaro rwe ko nta cyo yasize? Koko yakuwe ku isi.”
Acts8:34 Uwo mugaragu w'umugabekazi abaza Filipo ati: “Mbese ni nde umuhanuzi yavuzeho ibyo ngibyo? Ni we wivugaga
Acts8:35 Filipo ahera kuri ibyo byanditswe
Acts8:36 Bagikomeje uwo muhanda baza guhita ahantu hari amazi. Wa mugabo ni ko kugira ati: “Dore amazi hano! None se nabuzwa n'iki kubatizwa?” [
Acts8:37 Filipo aramusubiza ati: “Niba wemera Yezu n'umutima wawe wose
Acts8:38 Nuko ategeka guhagarika igare
Acts8:39 Bavuye mu mazi Mwuka wa Nyagasani ajyana Filipo
Acts8:40 Filipo agiye kubona asanga ari ahitwa Azoto
Acts9:1 Sawuli we nta kindi yahozaga ku rurimi kitari ugukangisha abigishwa ba Nyagasani ko bicwa. Nuko ajya ku Mutambyi mukuru
Acts9:2 amusaba inzandiko zo gushyikiriza abakuru b'insengero z'Abayahudi z'i Damasi
Acts9:3 Ari mu nzira agenda agiye kugera i Damasi
Acts9:4 Yitura hasi
Acts9:5 Arabaza ati: “Uri nde Nyagasani?” Yumva usubiza ati: “Ndi Yezu uwo utoteza.
Acts9:6 Ariko haguruka ujye mu mujyi
Acts9:7 Abagabo bagendanaga na Sawuli bari bahagaze badakoma. Bumvaga ijwi ariko ntibabone uvuga.
Acts9:8 Sawuli arabaduka
Acts9:9 Amarayo gatatu atareba
Acts9:10 I Damasi rero hakaba umwigishwa wa Kristo witwaga Ananiya. Nyagasani aramubonekera aramuhamagara ati: “Ananiya!” Undi arasubiza ati: “Karame Nyagasani.”
Acts9:11 Nyagasani aramubwira ati: “Haguruka ujye ku muhanda witwa Ugororotse
Acts9:12 Amaze kubonekerwa abona umuntu witwa Ananiya yinjira
Acts9:13 Ananiya arasubiza ati: “Nyagasani
Acts9:14 None dore yaje ino ahawe uburenganzira n'abakuru bo mu batambyi
Acts9:15 Ariko Nyagasani abwira Ananiya ati: “Genda kuko uwo muntu ari igikoresho nitoranyirije kugira ngo amenyekanishe mu mahanga
Acts9:16 Nanjye nzamwereka uburyo bwose azagomba kubabazwa ari jye ahorwa.”
Acts9:17 Nuko Ananiya aragenda. Ageze mu nzu arambika ibiganza kuri Sawuli
Acts9:18 Muri ako kanya utuntu dusa n'udushishwa dutunguka ku maso ye
Acts9:19 Amaze kurya
Acts9:20 Ahita atangira kwamamaza ibya Yezu mu nsengero z'Abayahudi
Acts9:21 Abamwumvaga bose baratangaraga
Acts9:22 Nyamara Sawuli arushaho kunguka ububasha
Acts9:23 Hashize iminsi myinshi Abayahudi bajya inama yo kwica Sawuli.
Acts9:24 Nyamara Sawuli amenya uwo mugambi wabo. Barindaga amarembo y'umujyi ijoro n'amanywa kugira ngo babone uko bamwica.
Acts9:25 Ariko abigishwa be bamucikisha nijoro
Acts9:26 Sawuli ageze i Yeruzalemu agerageza kwifatanya n'abigishwa ba Kristo. Nyamara bose baramutinya ntibamushira amakenga
Acts9:27 Nuko Barinaba aramujyana amushyikiriza Intumwa za Kristo
Acts9:28 Nuko Sawuli agumana na bo
Acts9:29 Yaganiraga n'Abayahudi bavugaga ikigereki ndetse akajya impaka na bo
Acts9:30 Abavandimwe babimenye baramuherekeza bamugeza i Kayizariya
Acts9:31 Ubwo abagize Umuryango wa Kristo bari bafite amahoro muri Yudeya hose
Acts9:32 Ubwo Petero yagendagendaga igihugu cyose
Acts9:33 Ahasanga umugabo witwa Eneya
Acts9:34 Petero aramubwira ati: “Eneya
Acts9:35 Abaturage bose b'i Lida n'abo mu kibaya cya Sharoni babibonye
Acts9:36 I Yope hari umwigishwakazi wa Kristo witwaga Tabita (mu kigereki ni Doruka
Acts9:37 Muri iyo minsi aza gufatwa n'indwara maze arapfa. Bamaze kūhagira umurambo
Acts9:38 Abigishwa ba Kristo b'i Yope bumvise yuko Petero ari i Lida bugufi bw'i Yope
Acts9:39 Nuko Petero arahaguruka ajyana na bo. Ahageze bamujyana muri cya cyumba cyo hejuru. Abapfakazi bose bari bamukikije barira
Acts9:40 Nuko Petero arabaheza bose maze arapfukama arasenga. Ni ko kugana ku murambo aravuga ati: “Tabita
Acts9:41 Petero amufata ukuboko aramuhagurutsa
Acts9:42 Iyo nkuru imenyekana i Yope hose
Acts9:43 Nuko Petero amara iminsi myinshi i Yope
Acts10:1 I Kayizariya hāri umuntu witwaga Koruneli
Acts10:2 Yari umuntu wubaha Imana akayitinya
Acts10:3 Nuko umunsi umwe nk'isaa cyenda z'amanywa aza kubonekerwa. Yibonera umumarayika w'Imana yinjira iwe. Aramubwira ati: “Koruneli!”
Acts10:4 Agira ubwoba bwinshi atumbira uwo mumarayika
Acts10:5 Nuko rero ohereza abantu i Yope nonaha
Acts10:6 Acumbitse mu rugo rw'umukannyi witwa Simoni
Acts10:7 Hanyuma umumarayika bavuganaga arigendera. Nuko Koruneli ahamagara abagaragu babiri bo mu rugo rwe
Acts10:8 Amaze kubatekerereza ibyo byose abohereza i Yope.
Acts10:9 Bukeye bwaho bakiri mu nzira
Acts10:10 Atangira gusonza ashaka kurya. Mu gihe bategura ibyokurya
Acts10:11 Abona ijuru rikingutse
Acts10:12 Muri cyo harimo amoko yose y'amatungo n'inyamaswa n'ibikururuka hasi n'inyoni.
Acts10:13 Yumva ijwi ry'umubwira ati: “Petero
Acts10:14 Ariko Petero aravuga ati: “Oya Nyagasani! Sinigeze kurya ikintu cyose kitaribwa cyangwa gihumanye.”
Acts10:15 Yumva iryo jwi ry'umubwira ubwa kabiri ati: “Ibyo Imana yahumanuye ntukabyite ibihumanye!”
Acts10:16 Biba bityo gatatu
Acts10:17 Nuko Petero acyibaza ku byo yeretswe ngo amenye icyo bishaka kuvuga
Acts10:18 Barahamagara barabaza bati: “Mbese hari umushyitsi uri hano witwa Simoni Petero?”
Acts10:19 Mu gihe Petero atekereza ku byo yeretswe
Acts10:20 None haguruka umanuke
Acts10:21 Ubwo Petero aramanuka asanga abo bagabo
Acts10:22 Baramusubiza bati: “Twatumwe n'umukapiteni Koruneli. Ni umuntu w'intungane
Acts10:23 Petero ni ko kubinjiza mu nzu arabacumbikira. Bukeye
Acts10:24 Bukeye bwaho Petero agera i Kayizariya
Acts10:25 Petero agiye kwinjira mu nzu Koruneli aramusanganira
Acts10:26 Ariko Petero aramwegura agira ati: “Haguruka! Nanjye ndi umuntu nkawe.”
Acts10:27 Yinjirana na Koruneli mu nzu bavugana
Acts10:28 Arababwira ati: “Muzi neza ko nta Muyahudi wemererwa n'idini kugirana umubano n'abanyamahanga
Acts10:29 Ni na yo mpamvu mumaze kuntumira
Acts10:30 Koruneli aravuga ati: “Ejo bundi buriya nko muri aya masaha
Acts10:31 Aravuga ati: ‘Koruneli! Imana yumvise amasengesho yawe
Acts10:32 Nuko none ohereza abantu i Yope
Acts10:33 Mperako rero ngutumaho
Acts10:34 Nuko Petero aratangira aravuga ati: “Ni ukuri mbonye ko Imana ifata abantu bose kimwe.
Acts10:35 Yemera uwo mu bwoko bwose uyubaha agakora ibitunganye.
Acts10:36 Imana yoherereje urubyaro rwa Isiraheli Ubutumwa bwiza bw'amahoro abonerwa muri Yezu Kristo
Acts10:37 Muzi ibyabaye muri Galileya bigakwira no mu ntara yose ya Yudeya
Acts10:38 Muzi n'ibya Yezu w'i Nazareti
Acts10:39 Kandi rero ni twe bagabo b'ibyo yakoze byose
Acts10:40 Ariko Imana imuzura ku munsi wa gatatu imuha kwiyerekana.
Acts10:41 Ntiyiyereka rubanda rwose
Acts10:42 Nuko adutegeka kwamamaza ibye muri rubanda
Acts10:43 Abahanuzi bose bemeje ibya Yezu
Acts10:44 Petero akivuga ibyo Mwuka Muziranenge amanukira ku bumvaga amagambo ye bose.
Acts10:45 Abemeye Yezu bo mu Bayahudi bari bavanye i Yope na Petero
Acts10:46 kuko bumvaga bavuga indimi zindi kandi baha Imana ikuzo. Petero aravuga ati:
Acts10:47 “Aba bantu bahawe Mwuka Muziranenge nk'uko natwe twamuhawe. None se hari uwabima amazi ngo be kubatizwa?”
Acts10:48 Nuko ategeka ko babatizwa mu izina rya Yezu Kristo
Acts11:1 Intumwa za Kristo n'abavandimwe bari muri Yudeya yose bumva ko n'abatari Abayahudi bakiriye Ijambo ry'Imana.
Acts11:2 Nuko Petero agarutse i Yeruzalemu abavugaga ko gukebwa ari ngombwa bamugisha impaka
Acts11:3 “Ubonye ngo uragenderera abatakebwe ukanasangira na bo?”
Acts11:4 Petero abatekerereza uko byagenze kose abikuye ruhande ati:
Acts11:5 “Nari mu mujyi w'i Yope nsenga maze ndabonekerwa. Mbona ikintu cyamanukaga gisa n'umwenda munini urambuye
Acts11:6 Nkirungurutsemo mbona amatungo n'ibikoko n'ibikururuka hasi n'inyoni.
Acts11:7 Nuko numva ijwi ry'umbwira ati: ‘Petero
Acts11:8 Ndamusubiza nti ‘Oya Nyagasani! Sinigeze nkoza mu kanwa ikintu cyose kitaribwa cyangwa gihumanya!’
Acts11:9 Nongera kumva iryo jwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru ati: ‘Icyo Imana yahumanuye ntukacyite igihumanya.’
Acts11:10 Ibyo bisubirwamo gatatu
Acts11:11 Ako kanya abagabo batatu bantumweho baraza baturutse i Kayizariya
Acts11:12 Mwuka ambwira kujyana na bo nta kugingimiranya. Abo bavandimwe batandatu b'i Yope turajyana
Acts11:13 Adutekerereza ukuntu yabonye umumarayika ageze iwe
Acts11:14 Azakubwira uburyo wowe n'abo mu rugo rwawe mwese mwakizwa.’
Acts11:15 Ngitangira kuvuga Mwuka Muziranenge aramanuka abajyaho
Acts11:16 Ni bwo nibutse icyo Nyagasani yigeze kuvuga ati: ‘Yohani yabatirishije amazi
Acts11:17 None rero niba Imana yarabagabiye impano imwe n'iyo natwe twahawe cya gihe twemeraga Nyagasani Yezu Kristo
Acts11:18 Babyumvise batyo bahita batuza
Acts11:19 Abemera Kristo batatanijwe n'amakuba yabaye igihe Sitefano yicwaga. Bamwe muri bo bagiye muri Fenisiya
Acts11:20 Nyamara bamwe muri abo bigishwa ba Kristo bakomokaga muri Shipure no muri Sirene
Acts11:21 Ububasha bwa Nyagasani bwari kuri bo
Acts11:22 Iyo nkuru igera ku itorero rya Kristo ry'i Yeruzalemu
Acts11:23 Agezeyo abona ukuntu Imana yahaye abo bantu umugisha biramushimisha
Acts11:24 Barinaba yari umuntu mwiza wuzuye Mwuka Muziranenge no kwizera Kristo. Bityo abantu benshi biyongera ku bemeraga Nyagasani.
Acts11:25 Barinaba aherako ajya i Tarisi gushaka Sawuli.
Acts11:26 Amubonye bagarukana Antiyokiya. Bamara umwaka wose mu itorero rya Kristo ryaho
Acts11:27 Icyo gihe habonetse abahanuzi bavuye i Yeruzalemu
Acts11:28 Umwe muri bo witwaga Agabo akoreshejwe na Mwuka w'Imana
Acts11:29 Noneho abigishwa ba Kristo bakurikije uko umuntu wese yifite
Acts11:30 Babigenza batyo izo mfashanyo baziha Barinaba na Sawuli
Acts12:1 Muri icyo gihe Umwami Herodi atangira kugirira nabi abantu bamwe bo mu Muryango wa Kristo.
Acts12:2 Ategeka ko bicisha inkota Yakobo mwene se wa Yohani.
Acts12:3 Abonye ko ibyo bishimishije Abayahudi
Acts12:4 Amaze kumufata amushyira muri gereza. Ategeka amatsinda ane y'abasirikari bane bane ngo bajye bakuranwa kumurinda. Yashakaga kuzamushyira mu ruhame nyuma y'iminsi mikuru ya Pasika.
Acts12:5 Nuko Petero arindirwa muri gereza. Ariko ab'Umuryango wa Kristo bakomeza kumusabira ku Mana bashyizeho umwete.
Acts12:6 Herodi araye ari bumujyane gucirwa urubanza
Acts12:7 Nuko umumarayika wa Nyagasani aratunguka
Acts12:8 Umumarayika aramubwira ati: “Kenyera ushyiremo n'inkweto!” Abigenza atyo. Umumarayika ni ko kumubwira ati: “Ifubike umwitero wawe unkurikire!”
Acts12:9 Petero aramukurikira bava aho. Ariko ntiyari azi ko ibyo umumarayika akoze ari ibimubayeho koko
Acts12:10 Banyura ku barinzi ba mbere no ku ba kabiri
Acts12:11 Nuko Petero agaruye umutima aravuga ati: “Noneho menye by'ukuri ko Nyagasani yohereje umumarayika we
Acts12:12 Amaze kumenya neza aho ari
Acts12:13 Petero akomanga ku rugi rwo ku irembo
Acts12:14 Amenya ijwi rya Petero maze ibyishimo bimubuza kumukingurira
Acts12:15 Baramubwira bati: “Wasaze!” Ariko ababwira akomeje ko ari iby'ukuri. Bo rero baravuga bati: “Si we
Acts12:16 Nyamara Petero akomeza gukomanga. Bigeza aho baza gukingura
Acts12:17 Arabacecekesha maze abatekerereza uko Nyagasani yamukuye muri gereza. Nyuma arababwira ati: “Mubimenyeshe Yakobo n'abandi bavandimwe.” Nuko Petero arasohoka yigira ahandi hantu.
Acts12:18 Bukeye haba impagarara nyinshi mu basirikari
Acts12:19 Herodi amushakisha hose ariko ntiyamubona. Ni bwo yategetse ko babaza abarinzi b'imbohe
Acts12:20 Herodi yari arakariye cyane abaturage b'i Tiri n'i Sidoni. Nuko bo bahuza inama baramusanga
Acts12:21 Ku munsi wagenwe Herodi yambara imyambaro ya cyami
Acts12:22 Nuko batera hejuru bati: “Erega si umuntu uvuga
Acts12:23 Ako kanya umumarayika wa Nyagasani aramukubita agwa inyo arapfa
Acts12:24 Nyamara ijambo ry'Imana rirushaho kwamamara.
Acts12:25 Barinaba na Sawuli barangije umurimo wabo bava i Yeruzalemu basubira Antiyokiya
Acts13:1 Mu itorero rya Kristo rya Antiyokiya
Acts13:2 Igihe basengaga Nyagasani bigomwe kurya
Acts13:3 Nuko bigomwa kurya barasenga
Acts13:4 Barinaba na Sawuli batumwe na Mwuka Muziranenge bajya i Selukiya
Acts13:5 Bageze ku cyambu cya Salamina
Acts13:6 Bambukiranya ikirwa cyose bagera i Pafo
Acts13:7 Yabaga kwa Serugiyo Pawulo
Acts13:8 Uwo mupfumu Eluma (ni ko Bariyezu yitwa mu Kigereki) arabarwanya
Acts13:9 Nyamara Sawuli ari we Pawulo yuzuye Mwuka Muziranenge
Acts13:10 “Yewe mwana wa Satani
Acts13:11 None dore Nyagasani abanguye ukuboko ngo agukubite
Acts13:12 Wa mutegetsi abonye ibibaye atangazwa n'inyigisho za Nyagasani
Acts13:13 Pawulo n'abo bari kumwe binjirira mu bwato i Pafo
Acts13:14 Bo bava i Periga barakomeza
Acts13:15 Bamaze gusoma mu gitabo cy'Amategeko n'Abahanuzi
Acts13:16 Pawulo arahaguruka arambura ukuboko abasaba gutuza
Acts13:17 Imana y'uyu muryango wa Isiraheli yatoranyije ba sogokuruza ibagira ubwoko bukomeye
Acts13:18 Nuko imara imyaka mirongo ine yihanganira ingeso zabo igihe bari mu butayu.
Acts13:19 Imana imaze kurimbura amahanga arindwi mu gihugu cya Kanāni
Acts13:20 bakimaramo imyaka magana ane na mirongo itanu. “Nyuma y'ibyo ibaha abacamanza bo kubategeka kugeza mu gihe cy'umuhanuzi Samweli.
Acts13:21 Ubwo ni bwo basabye umwami wo kubategeka
Acts13:22 Imana imaze kumukuraho ishyiraho Dawidi kugira ngo ababere umwami
Acts13:23 Yezu ukomoka kuri Dawidi uwo
Acts13:24 Nuko Yezu atarasesekara aho
Acts13:25 Nuko Yohani ajya kurangiza umurimo we abaza abantu ati: ‘Muragira ngo ndi nde? Sindi uwo mukeka. Ahubwo dore hari uje ankurikiye
Acts13:26 “Bavandimwe
Acts13:27 Abatuye i Yeruzalemu n'abategetsi babo ntibasobanukiwe Yezu uwo ari we
Acts13:28 Nubwo batabonye impamvu yo kumwicisha
Acts13:29 Bamaze gukora nk'uko byanditswe kuri we kose
Acts13:30 Ariko Imana iramuzura.
Acts13:31 Amara iminsi myinshi abonekera abo bari baragendanye kuva i Galileya kugera i Yeruzalemu
Acts13:32 None tubazaniye inkuru nziza: icyo Imana yasezeranyije ba sogokuruza
Acts13:33 yarakidukoreye twebwe abana babo ubwo yazuraga Yezu
Acts13:34 Imana yavuze kandi ko izamuzura mu bapfuye
Acts13:35 Ni cyo gituma no mu yindi zaburi havuga ngo ‘Ntuzemera ko ugutunganiye abora.’
Acts13:36 Dawidi we yakoze ibyo Imana ishaka mu gihe cye
Acts13:37 Ariko uwo Imana yazuye ntiyigeze abora.
Acts13:38 Noneho bavandimwe
Acts13:39 
Acts13:40 Muririnde rero kugira ngo ibyavuzwe n'abahanuzi bitababaho bagira bati:
Acts13:41 ‘Mwa banyagasuzuguro mwe
Acts13:42 Pawulo na Barinaba basohotse mu rusengero
Acts13:43 Iteraniro rimaze gusezererwa
Acts13:44 Ku isabato yakurikiyeho
Acts13:45 Abayahudi babonye icyo kivunge cy'abantu ishyari rirabashengura
Acts13:46 Nuko Pawulo na Barinaba babasubiza bashize amanga bati: “Byari bikwiriye ko ari mwe mubanza kubwirwa Ijambo ry'Imana. Ariko kuko muryanze kandi mukabona ko mudakwiriye ubugingo buhoraho
Acts13:47 Ni na ko Nyagasani yadutegetse ati: ‘Nakugize urumuri rw'abanyamahanga
Acts13:48 Abatari Abayahudi babyumvise baranezerwa
Acts13:49 Ijambo rya Nyagasani rikwira muri icyo gihugu cyose.
Acts13:50 Ariko Abayahudi boshya abagore bubaha Imana b'abanyacyubahiro n'abantu bakomeye bo mu mujyi
Acts13:51 Na bo bahungura umukungugu wo mu birenge byabo
Acts13:52 Abigishwa ba Kristo bo mu mujyi wa Antiyokiya basigaye buzuye ibyishimo na Mwuka Muziranenge.
Acts14:1 Ni ko byagenze bageze Ikoniyo
Acts14:2 Ariko Abayahudi bari banze kumwemera bateye imidugararo mu batari Abayahudi
Acts14:3 Nuko Pawulo na Barinaba bahamara igihe kitari gito bavuga ibya Nyagasani bashize amanga
Acts14:4 Abatuye uwo mujyi bicamo ibice
Acts14:5 Nuko Abayahudi n'abatari bo bajya inama n'abatware babo
Acts14:6 Abo babimenye bahungira mu mijyi ya Lisitira na Derube yo muri Likawoniya
Acts14:7 Aho ngaho bakomeza kuhatangaza inkuru nziza ya Kristo.
Acts14:8 I Lisitira hari umugabo wari waravutse aremaye ibirenge
Acts14:9 Yicaye aho atega Pawulo amatwi. Pawulo amwitegereje abona yizeye gukira indwara
Acts14:10 amubwira mu ijwi riranguruye ati: “Haguruka uhagarare wemye!” Arabaduka aragenda.
Acts14:11 Aho hari imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu
Acts14:12 Barinaba bamwita Zewu
Acts14:13 Ingoro ya ya mana yabo Zewu yari inyuma y'umujyi. Nuko umutambyi wayo azana ku irembo ibimasa bitatse indabyo
Acts14:14 Ariko Barinaba na Pawulo bumvise ibyo bashaka kubakorera
Acts14:15 “Mwa bagabo mwe
Acts14:16 Mu bihe byashize yaretse amahanga yose akora ibyo yishakiye.
Acts14:17 Nyamara ntiyareka gutanga ibimenyetso bihamya ukugira neza kwayo: kubavubira imvura no kubaha umusaruro mu gihe gikwiriye
Acts14:18 Nubwo izo Ntumwa za Kristo zavuze zityo
Acts14:19 Bigeze aho haza Abayahudi bamwe bavuye muri Antiyokiya no muri Ikoniyo
Acts14:20 Ariko igihe abigishwa ba Kristo bamukikije
Acts14:21 Pawulo na Barinaba bamamaza inkuru nziza ya Yezu i Derube
Acts14:22 Bakomeza abigishwa ba Kristo baho
Acts14:23 Batoranya abakuru muri buri koraniro ry'Umuryango wa Kristo
Acts14:24 Bambukiranya akarere kose ka Pisidiya
Acts14:25 Bamaze kubwira ab'i Periga Ijambo ry'Imana
Acts14:26 bavayo bafata ubwato bagana Antiyokiya ho muri Siriya
Acts14:27 Bagezeyo bakoranya itorero rya Kristo ryaho ryose
Acts14:28 Nuko bamarana igihe kitari gito n'abigishwa ba Kristo.
Acts15:1 Abantu bamwe bavuye muri Yudeya basanga abavandimwe bo mu mujyi wa Antiyokiya
Acts15:2 Pawulo na Barinaba babyumvise bajya impaka na bo zitoroshye
Acts15:3 Nuko ab'itorero rya Kristo babaha ibyo kubafasha mu rugendo
Acts15:4 Bageze i Yeruzalemu bakirwa n'itorero rya Kristo ryaho n'Intumwa za Kristo n'abakuru
Acts15:5 Ariko bamwe bo mu ishyaka ry'Abafarizayi bari bemeye Kristo
Acts15:6 Intumwa za Kristo n'abakuru bakoranywa no gusuzuma icyo kibazo.
Acts15:7 Bamaze umwanya bajya impaka
Acts15:8 Ariko Imana yo izi imitima y'abantu itanga icyemezo ko yemeye abo banyamahanga
Acts15:9 Nta tandukaniro Imana yashyize hagati yacu na bo
Acts15:10 None rero kuki mushaka kugerageza Imana
Acts15:11 Ahubwo twemera ko ari twe ari na bo
Acts15:12 Iryo teraniro ryose riraceceka
Acts15:13 Bamaze kuvuga Yakobo afata ijambo ati: “Bavandimwe
Acts15:14 Simoni Petero yadutekerereje ukuntu Imana yagendereye abanyamahanga rugikubita
Acts15:15 ibyo bikaba bihuje n'ibyavuzwe n'abahanuzi nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo
Acts15:16 ‘Nyuma y'ibyo nzagaruka
Acts15:17 Abantu bazacika ku icumu bazansanga
Acts15:18 wabitangaje kuva kera kose.”
Acts15:19 Yakobo arakomeza ati: “Ndemeza ko tutashyira amananiza ku banyamahanga bahindukirira Imana.
Acts15:20 Ahubwo tubandikire kugira ngo birinde ibyahumanijwe kubera ko byatuwe ibigirwamana
Acts15:21 Erega kuva kera kose
Acts15:22 Nuko Intumwa za Kristo n'abakuru n'ab'Umuryango we bose biyemeza kwitoramo bamwe ngo babohereze Antiyokiya
Acts15:23 Babaha urwandiko ruvuga ruti: “Twebwe Intumwa za Kristo n'abakuru turabaramutsa
Acts15:24 Twumvise ko bamwe muri twe babaroshyemo amagambo yo kubakura imitima
Acts15:25 None twese twahuje umugambi wo gutoranya abo kubatumaho. Bazanye na Barinaba na Pawulo dukunda cyane
Acts15:26 bahaze amagara yabo kugira ngo bakorere Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo.
Acts15:27 Ngabo rero Yuda na Silasi ni bo tubatumyeho
Acts15:28 Byanogeye Mwuka Muziranenge kimwe natwe kutabashyiraho umutwaro urenze aya mategeko ya ngombwa:
Acts15:29 mwirinde kurya inyama zatuwe ibigirwamana n'iz'ibyanizwe
Acts15:30 Nuko abari batumwe berekeza iya Antiyokiya
Acts15:31 Bamaze kurubasomera
Acts15:32 Yuda na Silasi ubwabo bari abahanuzi
Acts15:33 Bamarana na bo iminsi
Acts15:34 Icyakora Silasi yiyemeza kuguma aho.]
Acts15:35 Pawulo na Barinaba baguma Antiyokiya
Acts15:36 Hashize iminsi Pawulo abwira Barinaba ati: “Reka dusubireyo dusure abavandimwe bo mu mijyi yose aho twatangaje Ijambo rya Nyagasani
Acts15:37 Ubwo Barinaba yashakaga ko bajyana na Yohani witwaga Mariko
Acts15:38 ariko Pawulo asanga atari byiza kujyana na we kuko yigeze kubatererana muri Pamfiliya
Acts15:39 Impaka ziba zose kugeza ubwo batandukana
Acts15:40 Pawulo we atoranya Silasi
Acts15:41 Anyura muri Siriya na Silisiya akomeza amatorero ya Kristo.
Acts16:1 Nuko Pawulo agera i Derube hanyuma ajya i Lisitira. Aho hari hatuye umwigishwa wa Kristo akitwa Timoteyo
Acts16:2 Yashimwaga n'abavandimwe b'i Lisitira n'abo muri Ikoniyo.
Acts16:3 Pawulo yifuzaga kujyana na we
Acts16:4 Uko banyuraga mu mujyi
Acts16:5 Bituma amatorero akomera ku kwemera Kristo kandi akiyongera uko bukeye.
Acts16:6 Nuko bambukiranya intara ya Furujiya n'iya Galati
Acts16:7 Bageze ku mbibi za Misiya bagerageza kujya mu ntara ya Bitiniya
Acts16:8 Bamaze kwambukiranya Misiya
Acts16:9 Muri iryo joro Imana yereka Pawulo umugabo wo mu ntara ya Masedoniya. Uwo mugabo aramwinginga ati: “Ambuka uze muri Masedoniya udutabare”.
Acts16:10 Pawulo akimara kubonekerwa twahise dushaka uko twakomeza ngo tujye muri Masedoniya
Acts16:11 Nuko tuva i Tirowa mu bwato
Acts16:12 Tuvayo duca iy'ubutaka tugera i Filipi
Acts16:13 Ku munsi w'isabato tuva mu mujyi tujya ku mugezi
Acts16:14 Umwe muri bo witwaga Lidiya wo mu mujyi wa Tiyatira
Acts16:15 Amaze kubatizwa we n'urugo rwe rwose
Acts16:16 Umunsi umwe twagiye ha hantu basengeraga
Acts16:17 Akomeza kudukurikira twe na Pawulo arangurura ati: “Aba bantu ni abagaragu b'Imana Isumbabyose
Acts16:18 Amara iminsi myinshi abigenza atyo. Pawulo bimaze kumurembya
Acts16:19 Ba shebuja b'uwo mukobwa babonye ko nta nyungu bakimutezeho
Acts16:20 Babashyikiriza abacamanza bakuru barababwira bati: “Aba bantu baratera imvururu mu mujyi wacu. Ni Abayahudi
Acts16:21 kandi barigisha imigenzo tudashobora kwemera cyangwa gukurikiza
Acts16:22 Rubanda na bo barabahagurukira. Nuko abacamanza babahubuzamo imyambaro
Acts16:23 Bamaze kubahaza inkoni babaroha muri gereza
Acts16:24 Na we abonye ko ahawe itegeko rikomeye rityo
Acts16:25 Mu gicuku Pawulo na Silasi basengaga baririmba basingiza Imana
Acts16:26 Nuko muri ako kanya habaho umutingito w'isi ukomeye
Acts16:27 Umurinzi wa gereza arakanguka. Abonye ko inzugi za gereza zikinguye
Acts16:28 Ariko Pawulo avuga aranguruye ijwi ati: “Wikwigirira nabi! Twese turahari.”
Acts16:29 Nuko uwo murinzi atumiza amatara
Acts16:30 Nyuma arabasohokana arababaza ati: “Batware
Acts16:31 Baramusubiza bati: “Wizere Nyagasani Yezu
Acts16:32 Nuko bamubwira Ijambo rya Nyagasani
Acts16:33 Ako kanya muri iryo joro
Acts16:34 Nuko ajyana Pawulo na Silasi iwe
Acts16:35 Bumaze gucya ba bacamanza bakuru batuma abaporisi ku murinzi wa gereza bati: “Rekura ba bantu!”
Acts16:36 Umurinzi na we abibwira Pawulo ati: “Abacamanza batumye ngo murekurwe
Acts16:37 Ariko Pawulo arasubiza ati: “Badukubitiye mu ruhame nta rubanza rwadutsinze
Acts16:38 Abaporisi bajya kumenyesha abacamanza ayo magambo
Acts16:39 Ni bwo baje kubasaba imbabazi
Acts16:40 Pawulo na Silasi bavuye muri gereza bajya kwa Lidiya
Acts17:1 Banyura Amfipoli na Apoloniya bagera i Tesaloniki
Acts17:2 Nuko Pawulo yinjira mu rusengero
Acts17:3 abitanga ho umugabo ko Kristo yagombaga kwicwa
Acts17:4 Bamwe mu Bayahudi bemera ibyo avuze bifatanya na Pawulo na Silasi
Acts17:5 Ariko Abayahudi ishyari rirabasya
Acts17:6 Bababuze ni ko gukurubana Yasoni n'abandi bavandimwe
Acts17:7 na Yasoni uyu yabakiriye. Bose barakora ibinyuranye n'amategeko y'umwami w'i Roma
Acts17:8 Ayo magambo atera imidugararo muri rubanda no mu bategeka umujyi.
Acts17:9 Nuko baca Yasoni na bagenzi be amafaranga y'ingwatiramubiri maze barabarekura.
Acts17:10 Bwije abavandimwe bacikisha Pawulo na Silasi
Acts17:11 Abantu baho barushaga ubupfura ab'i Tesaloniki
Acts17:12 Benshi muri bo bemeye Yezu
Acts17:13 Abayahudi b'i Tesaloniki bamenye ko Pawulo atangariza Ijambo ry'Imana i Beroya
Acts17:14 Uwo mwanya abavandimwe bahita bohereza Pawulo ku nyanja
Acts17:15 Abaherekeje Pawulo bamugeza Atene. Bamusezeyeho abatuma kuri Silasi na Timoteyo ngo bazamugereho vuba uko bishobotse.
Acts17:16 Igihe Pawulo yari Atene agitegereje Silasi na Timoteyo
Acts17:17 Buri munsi yajyaga mu rusengero akajya impaka n'Abayahudi n'abandi basengaga Imana batari Abayahudi
Acts17:18 Bamwe mu bahanga b'Abepikuri n'Abasitowiki batangira kumugisha impaka. Bamwe bakabaza bati: “Iyi ndondogozi irashaka kuvuga iki?” Abandi bati: “Arasa n'uvuga iby'imana z'inzaduka.” Icyatumye bavuga batyo ni uko bumvise Pawulo atangaza Kristo n'ukuzuka.
Acts17:19 Nuko baramufata bamujyana mu rukiko rwabo rw'ikirenga rwitwa Areyopago
Acts17:20 Koko bimwe mu byo uvuga ni inzaduka kuri twe
Acts17:21 Erega Abanyatene n'abavamahanga bahatuye
Acts17:22 Nuko Pawulo ahagarara hagati muri urwo rukiko maze aravuga ati: “Yemwe bagabo ba Atene
Acts17:23 Ubwo nagendagendaga mu mujyi wanyu nkareba n'ibyo musenga
Acts17:24 Imana yaremye isi n'ibiyiriho byose
Acts17:25 Ntikorerwa n'abantu nk'aho hari icyo ikennye. Ni yo ibeshaho abantu ikabaha umwuka bahumeka n'ibindi byose.
Acts17:26 Yakomoye ku muntu umwe amoko yose
Acts17:27 Imana yabigize ityo kugira ngo ahari nibayishakashaka bayibone. Erega n'ubundi ntiri kure ya buri muntu muri twe!
Acts17:28 Umwe yigeze kuvuga ati: ‘Ni yo dukesha guhumeka no kwinyagambura
Acts17:29 None rero ubwo dukomoka ku Mana
Acts17:30 Koko Imana yirengagije ibihe bya kera ubwo abantu bari mu bujiji
Acts17:31 kuko yashyizeho umunsi wo gucira isi yose imanza zitabera
Acts17:32 Pawulo avuze ibyo kuzuka kw'abapfuye bamwe bahita bamugira urw'amenyo
Acts17:33 Nuko Pawulo abavamo aragenda.
Acts17:34 Ariko abantu bamwe bifatanya na we bemera Kristo. Muri bo hakaba umujyanama wa rwa rukiko rwa Areyopago witwa Diyoniziyo
Acts18:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Pawulo ava Atene ajya i Korinti.
Acts18:2 Ahasanga Umuyahudi witwa Akwila ukomoka muri Ponto
Acts18:3 kandi kubera ko bari bahuje umwuga wo kuboha amahema
Acts18:4 Buri sabato Pawulo yajyaga mu rusengero rw'Abayahudi
Acts18:5 Silasi na Timoteyo bamaze kuhagera baturutse muri Masedoniya
Acts18:6 Bo baramurwanya baranamusebya
Acts18:7 Nuko ava aho ajya kuba mu rugo rw'umuntu witwa Titiyo Yusito wubahaga Imana
Acts18:8 Krisipo umuyobozi w'urusengero yemera Nyagasani we n'urugo rwe rwose. Benshi mu b'i Korinti na bo bumvise amagambo ya Pawulo
Acts18:9 Hanyuma Nyagasani abonekera Pawulo nijoro
Acts18:10 kuko ndi kumwe nawe. Nta n'umwe uzagutera ngo akugirire nabi
Acts18:11 Nuko Pawulo aguma i Korinti
Acts18:12 Ubwo Galiyo yatwaraga Akaya ategekera Abanyaroma
Acts18:13 baramurega bati: “Uyu muntu aroshya abantu gusenga Imana mu buryo bunyuranyije n'Amategeko.”
Acts18:14 Pawulo agiye kugira icyo avuga
Acts18:15 Naho ubwo ari impaka zishingiye ku nyigisho no ku mazina no ku mategeko yanyu bwite
Acts18:16 Nuko abirukana mu rukiko.
Acts18:17 Bose basumira Sositeni umuyobozi w'urusengero rw'Abayahudi
Acts18:18 Pawulo yamaze indi minsi myinshi i Korinti. Hanyuma asezera ku bavandimwe
Acts18:19 Bageze Efezi Pawulo ahasiga Purisila na Akwila
Acts18:20 Bamusaba kuhatinda ntiyabakundira
Acts18:21 ahubwo abasezeraho ati: “Imana nibishaka muzabona ngarutse.” Nuko afata ubwato ava Efezi.
Acts18:22 Ageze i Kayizariya ava mu bwato
Acts18:23 Ahamaze igihe arahava akomeza urugendo
Acts18:24 Icyo gihe Umuyahudi witwa Apolo ukomoka Alegisanderiya
Acts18:25 Yari yarigishijwe Inzira ya Nyagasani kandi akavuga ibyerekeye Yezu
Acts18:26 Apolo uwo atangira kuvugira mu rusengero ashize amanga. Purisila na Akwila bamaze kumwumva bamujyana imuhira
Acts18:27 Hanyuma igihe Apolo yiyemeje kujya muri Akaya
Acts18:28 Yagishaga Abayahudi impaka mu ruhame akabatsinda
Acts19:1 Igihe Apolo yari i Korinti Pawulo anyura mu gihugu rwagati
Acts19:2 Ni ko kubabaza ati: “Mbese mwahawe Mwuka Muziranenge igihe mwemeraga Yezu?” Baramusubiza bati: “Uretse kumuhabwa
Acts19:3 Pawulo ni ko kubabaza ati: “Mwabatijwe mute?” Baramusubiza bati: “Twabatijwe uko Yohani yabatizaga.”
Acts19:4 Pawulo ati: “Yohani yabatizaga ababaga bihannye bakareka ibyaha byabo
Acts19:5 Bamaze kumva ibyo
Acts19:6 Pawulo ngo abarambikeho ibiganza Mwuka Muziranenge ahita abazaho
Acts19:7 Abo bagabo bose bari nka cumi na babiri.
Acts19:8 Pawulo ahamara amezi atatu
Acts19:9 Ariko bamwe muri bo barinangira banga kumvira
Acts19:10 Amara imyaka ibiri abigenza atyo
Acts19:11 Imana yakoreshaga Pawulo ibitangaza bihambaye.
Acts19:12 Ndetse n'udutambaro cyangwa imyenda byabaga byarakoze ku mubiri we iyo byakozwaga ku barwayi
Acts19:13 Hari Abayahudi bamwe bari bafite akamenyero ko kugenda igihugu bamenesha ingabo za Satani mu bantu. Na bo bagerageza kuzimenesha bakoresheje izina rya Yezu
Acts19:14 Abagenzaga batyo ni abahungu barindwi ba Seva
Acts19:15 Nyamara ingabo ya Satani irabasubiza iti: “Yezu ndamuzi na Pawulo nzi uwo ari we
Acts19:16 Nuko uwo muntu wari uhanzweho arabasimbukira
Acts19:17 Abayahudi n'abatari Abayahudi bari batuye Efezi babimenye bashya ubwoba bose
Acts19:18 Nuko benshi mu bari bamaze kwemera Yezu baraza
Acts19:19 Abakoraga iby'ubupfumu batari bake bakoranya ibitabo byabo
Acts19:20 Bityo inkuru za Nyagasani zikomeza kwamamara n'imbaraga
Acts19:21 Nyuma y'ibyo Pawulo ayobowe na Mwuka yiyemeza kujya i Yeruzalemu
Acts19:22 Nuko yohereza muri Masedoniya babiri mu bafasha be Timoteyo na Erasito
Acts19:23 Icyo gihe ni bwo mu mujyi wa Efezi habyutse imvururu zitoroshye kubera Inzira ya Nyagasani.
Acts19:24 Hari umucuzi witwa Demeteriyo
Acts19:25 Ni bwo akoranyije abo bakozi n'abandi bakoraga bene uwo mwuga
Acts19:26 None muriyumvira kandi mukirebera ibyo Pawulo uriya avuga
Acts19:27 Ibyago si uko ubucuruzi bwacu bwahinyuka gusa
Acts19:28 Abantu babyumvise bahita barakara cyane
Acts19:29 Umujyi wose uravurungana
Acts19:30 Pawulo na we yashakaga kwiroha muri icyo kivunge
Acts19:31 Ndetse na bamwe bo mu bategetsi b'incuti ze bamutumaho
Acts19:32 Ikoraniro riravurungana
Acts19:33 Abayahudi batambutsa uwitwa Alegisanderi
Acts19:34 Bamenye ko ari Umuyahudi
Acts19:35 Umunyamabanga w'umujyi amaze kubacecekesha
Acts19:36 Nta muntu n'umwe wabasha kubihakana. Kubera iyo mpamvu mugomba gutuza mukareka guhubuka.
Acts19:37 Erega mwazanye hano aba bantu batarigeze basahura ingoro
Acts19:38 Niba rero Demeteriyo na bagenzi be bafite uwo barega
Acts19:39 Niba hari n'ikindi mufite kubaza kizatunganywa n'inama rusange
Acts19:40 kuko ibyabaye uyu munsi byatuma turegwa ubugome. Mwumve namwe ko iyi midugararo idafite ishingiro
Acts19:41 Amaze kuvuga atyo asezerera iyo mbaga.
Acts20:1 Iyo midugaruro irangiye Pawulo akoranya abigishwa ba Kristo
Acts20:2 Agenderera uturere twose tw'iyo ntara
Acts20:3 ahamara amezi atatu. Igihe ashatse gufata ubwato ngo ajye muri Siriya
Acts20:4 Sopateri mwene Piro w'i Beroya aramuherekeza
Acts20:5 Abo baratubanjirije badutegerereza i Tirowa.
Acts20:6 Naho twe iminsi mikuru y'imigati idasembuye irangiye dufatira ubwato i Filipi
Acts20:7 Buri bucye ari icyumweru ari wo munsi wa mbere
Acts20:8 Mu cyumba cyo mu nzu yo hejuru twari dukoraniyemo hakaga amatara menshi.
Acts20:9 Umusore umwe witwa Utiko yari yicaye mu idirishya igihe Pawulo yigishaga
Acts20:10 Pawulo aramanuka amwubararaho
