Acts20:11 Birangiye Pawulo asubira mu igorofa afata umugati
Acts20:12 Naho uwo musore bamujyana imuhira ari mutaraga
Acts20:13 Twe dufata ubwato tugenda mbere ya Pawulo twerekeza ahitwa Aso
Acts20:14 Nuko adusanze Aso tumushyira mu bwato
Acts20:15 Bukeye turahava tugera ahateganye n'ikirwa cyitwa Kiyo. Ku munsi ukurikiyeho turambuka tugera i Samo
Acts20:16 Pawulo yari yaragennye gukomezanya n'ubwato atanyuze Efezi
Acts20:17 Pawulo ari i Mileto atumiza abakuru b'itorero rya Kristo rya Efezi.
Acts20:18 Bamugezeho arababwira ati: “Muzi uko nabanye namwe igihe cyose kuva nagera muri Aziya.
Acts20:19 Nakoreye Nyagasani niyoroshya ku buryo bwose
Acts20:20 Nta cyo nabakinze mu byo nagombaga kubabwira byabagirira akamaro
Acts20:21 Nihanangirije Abayahudi n'abatari Abayahudi ko bakwiriye kwihana bakagarukira Imana
Acts20:22 None ubu ngiye i Yeruzalemu mpaswe na Mwuka
Acts20:23 Icyakora muri buri mujyi
Acts20:24 Nyamara ku bwanjye nta cyo bimbwira kubaho cyangwa gupfa
Acts20:25 “Nagenze muri mwe ntangaza ibyerekeye ubwami bw'Imana
Acts20:26 Ni cyo gitumye uyu munsi mbemeza ko ndi umwere
Acts20:27 kuko nta cyo nabakinze cyerekeye imigambi yose y'Imana ngo ndeke kukibamenyesha.
Acts20:28 Mwite ku mibereho yanyu no ku y'umukumbi wose mwaragijwe na Mwuka Muziranenge. Muragire itorero ry'Imana yaguze amaraso y'Umwana wayo.
Acts20:29 Nzi yuko nimara kugenda impyisi z'ibirura zizabageramo
Acts20:30 No muri mwe ubwanyu hazaduka abantu bavuga ibifutamye
Acts20:31 Murabe maso rero kandi mwibuke ko namaze imyaka itatu
Acts20:32 “Ubu rero mbaragije Nyagasani n'inyigisho zerekeye ubuntu bwe. Ni we ufite ububasha bwo kububaka ubugingo
Acts20:33 Nta kintu cy'umuntu wese nigeze ndarikira
Acts20:34 Namwe ubwanyu muzi ko ari aya maboko nakoresheje kugira ngo nimare ubukene
Acts20:35 Mu byo nakoze byose naberetse ko tugomba gushishikara dutyo
Acts20:36 Pawulo amaze kuvuga atyo
Acts20:37 Bose baraturika bararira
Acts20:38 Icyabashenguraga cyane ni uko yababwiye ko batazongera kumuca iryera. Nuko baramuherekeza bamugeza ku bwato.
Acts21:1 Tumaze kubiyaka turagenda dufata ubwato
Acts21:2 Tuhasanga ubundi bwato bwambuka bugana muri Fenisiya
Acts21:3 Tugeze ahareba ikirwa cya Shipure
Acts21:4 Tuhasanze abigishwa ba Kristo tuhamara iminsi irindwi. Bo bayobowe na Mwuka babwira Pawulo kutajya i Yeruzalemu.
Acts21:5 Nyamara iyo minsi irangiye
Acts21:6 Nuko dusezeranaho twe twurira ubwato
Acts21:7 Dukomeza urugendo rwacu tuvuye i Tiri
Acts21:8 Bukeye turahava tujya i Kayizariya kwa Filipo
Acts21:9 Yari afite abakobwa bane b'abāri bahanuraga.
Acts21:10 Tuhamaze iminsi umuhanuzi umwe witwa Agabo arahinguka
Acts21:11 Aza aho turi afata umukandara wa Pawulo
Acts21:12 Tubyumvise twe n'abantu bari bahari
Acts21:13 Ariko Pawulo arasubiza ati: “Ni iki gitumye murira
Acts21:14 Tutabashije kubimwemeza
Acts21:15 Iyo minsi ishize duhambira ibintu tujya i Yeruzalemu.
Acts21:16 Bamwe mu bigishwa ba Kristo b'i Kayizariya baraduherekeza
Acts21:17 Tugeze i Yeruzalemu abavandimwe baho batwakirana ubwuzu.
Acts21:18 Bukeye bwaho Pawulo ajyana natwe kwa Yakobo n'abakuru b'Umuryango wa Kristo bose bari bahari.
Acts21:19 Pawulo arabaramutsa
Acts21:20 Babyumvise bahita basingiza Imana. Nuko babwira Pawulo bati: “Muvandimwe
Acts21:21 Ariko rero babwiwe ko wigisha Abayahudi bose batuye mu mahanga kuzinukwa inyigisho za Musa
Acts21:22 Biragenda bite rero ko batabura kumva ko waje?
Acts21:23 Noneho ukore ibyo tukubwira. Dore dufite abagabo bane muri twe bahize umuhigo.
Acts21:24 Ubajyane ufatanye na bo umuhango wo kwihumanura
Acts21:25 Naho ku byerekeye abemeye Kristo bo mu mahanga
Acts21:26 Bukeye Pawulo ajyana ba bagabo bane maze atangira umuhango wo kwihumanura ari kumwe na bo
Acts21:27 Ya minsi irindwi iri hafi kurangira
Acts21:28 Barangurura amajwi bati: “Yemwe Bisiraheli
Acts21:29 Icyatumye bavuga batyo ni uko bari babonye Pawulo mu mujyi ari kumwe na Tirofimo wa Efezi
Acts21:30 Umujyi wose uravurungana
Acts21:31 Igihe igitero cyageragezaga kumwica
Acts21:32 Muri ako kanya afata abasirikari hamwe n'abatware babo
Acts21:33 Nuko Komanda araza afata Pawulo
Acts21:34 Rubanda barasakabaka
Acts21:35 Bamugejeje ku ngazi z'amabuye
Acts21:36 Ikivunge cy'abantu benshi kimuhombokaho basakabaka bati: “Ntakabeho!”
Acts21:37 Igihe bagiye kumwinjiza mu kigo cy'abasirikari
Acts21:38 Aho si wowe wa Munyamisiri wateje imyivumbagatanyo hambere aha
Acts21:39 Pawulo ni ko gusubiza ati: “Jyewe ndi Umuyahudi ukomoka i Tarisi
Acts21:40 Komanda aramwemerera. Nuko Pawulo ahagarara ku ngazi
Acts22:1 “Bavandimwe namwe babyeyi
Acts22:2 Bumvise avuze mu giheburayi barushako guceceka. Nuko aravuga ati:
Acts22:3 “Ndi Umuyahudi ukomoka i Tarisi muri Silisiya
Acts22:4 Natoteje abantu bayobotse iyi nzira ya Yezu kugeza ubwo mbica. Naboshye abagabo n'abagore mbashyira muri gereza.
Acts22:5 Umutambyi mukuru n'abakuru b'imiryango ni bo ntanze ho abagabo. Ndetse bampaye n'inzandiko nshyikiriza abavandimwe bacu b'i Damasi
Acts22:6 “Nuko ku manywa y'ihangu ndi hafi kugera i Damasi
Acts22:7 Nikubita hasi maze numva ijwi ry'umbaza ati: ‘Sawuli
Acts22:8 Ndasubiza nti: ‘Uri nde Nyagasani?’ Arambwira ati: ‘Ndi Yezu w'i Nazareti uwo utoteza.’
Acts22:9 Abantu twari kumwe babonye umucyo ariko ntibumva ijwi ry'uwo twavuganaga.
Acts22:10 Ndabaza nti: ‘Nyagasani
Acts22:11 Kubera ko wa mucyo ukomeye wampumye amaso
Acts22:12 “Muri uwo mujyi hari umugabo akitwa Ananiya. Yari umuntu wubaha Imana akurikije amategeko yacu
Acts22:13 Aransanga ampagarara iruhande arambwira ati: ‘Sawuli muvandimwe
Acts22:14 Nuko aravuga ati: ‘Imana ya ba sogokuruza yamaze kugutoranya ngo umenye ibyo ishaka
Acts22:15 kuko uzayibera umugabo kugira ngo ubwire abantu bose ibyo wabonye n'ibyo wumvise.
Acts22:16 None se kandi utegereje iki? Haguruka wambaze Nyagasani
Acts22:17 “Nuko ngaruka i Yeruzalemu
Acts22:18 mbona Nyagasani ambwira ati: ‘Ihutire kuva i Yeruzalemu
Acts22:19 Ndasubiza nti: ‘Nyagasani
Acts22:20 Ndetse n'igihe Sitefano wahamyaga ibyawe yicwaga
Acts22:21 Nyagasani arambwira ati: ‘Genda kuko nzagutuma ku bo mu mahanga ya kure.’ ”
Acts22:22 Bagumya kumutega amatwi kugeza ubwo avuze iryo jambo
Acts22:23 Igihe bariho basakabaka bazunguza imyitero yabo
Acts22:24 Komanda w'abasirikari ategeka ko bajyana Pawulo mu kigo cyabo
Acts22:25 Igihe babohaga Pawulo kugira ngo bamukubite
Acts22:26 Uwo mukapiteni abyumvise asanga Komanda
Acts22:27 Komanda asanga Pawulo aramubaza ati: “Mbwira
Acts22:28 Komanda aravuga ati: “Jyewe nishyuye amafaranga menshi kugira ngo mpabwe ubwenegihugu.” Pawulo ati: “Jyewe narabuvukanye!”
Acts22:29 Ako kanya abari bagiye kumukubita barigendera. Komanda na we agira ubwoba
Acts22:30 Bukeye bwaho Komanda ashatse kumenya neza impamvu Abayahudi barega Pawulo
Acts23:1 Pawulo ahanga amaso abagize urukiko rw'ikirenga
Acts23:2 Ananiya Umutambyi mukuru ategeka abari bahagaze iruhande rwa Pawulo kumukubita ku munwa.
Acts23:3 Pawulo aramubwira ati: “Nawe Imana izagukubita
Acts23:4 Abari bahagaze iruhande rwe baravuga bati: “Ese uratuka Umutambyi mukuru w'Imana?”
Acts23:5 Pawulo arabasubiza ati: “Bavandimwe
Acts23:6 Pawulo amenye ko bamwe muri bo ari Abasaduseyi abandi ari Abafarizayi
Acts23:7 Avuze atyo habyuka impaka hagati y'Abafarizayi n'Abasaduseyi
Acts23:8 Abasaduseyi bavugaga ko abapfuye batazazuka
Acts23:9 Haba urusaku rwinshi
Acts23:10 Haba intonganya zikaze ku buryo Komanda yatinye ko bari butanyaguze Pawulo. Ni cyo cyatumye ategeka abasirikari be ngo bamanuke
Acts23:11 Mu ijoro rikurikiyeho Nyagasani abonekera Pawulo
Acts23:12 Bukeye mu gitondo Abayahudi bamwe bahuza inama
Acts23:13 Abari bahuje uwo mugambi bari abantu barenga mirongo ine.
Acts23:14 Basanga abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango barababwira bati: “Twarahiye twivuma ko tutazagira icyo dukoza mu kanwa tutabanje kwica Pawulo.
Acts23:15 None rero mwebwe n'abagize urukiko rw'ikirenga
Acts23:16 Mwishywa wa Pawulo yumvise ubwo bugambanyi
Acts23:17 Na we ahamagara umwe mu bakapiteni aramubwira ati: “Geza uyu musore kwa Komanda kuko hari icyo ashaka kumumenyesha.”
Acts23:18 Nuko aramujyana amushyikiriza Komanda
Acts23:19 Komanda ni ko kumufata ukuboko
Acts23:20 Aramubwira ati: “Abayahudi biyemeje kubasaba ngo ejo muzabazanire Pawulo mu rukiko
Acts23:21 Ntimuzamubahe rero kuko abantu barenga mirongo ine bo muri bo bamwubikiye. Barahiye ko batazagira icyo barya cyangwa ngo banywe batabanje kumwica. Ubu bategereje ko muri bukore icyo basabye.”
Acts23:22 Komanda yihanangiriza uwo musore ati: “Ntugire umuntu n'umwe uhingukiriza ibyo umenyesheje!” Nuko aramusezerera.
Acts23:23 Nuko Komanda ahamagara abakapiteni babiri arababwira ati: “Nimutegure abasirikari magana abiri bo kujya i Kayizariya
Acts23:24 Mutegure n'amafarasi yo guheka Pawulo
Acts23:25 Nuko Komanda yandika urwandiko ruteye rutya:
Acts23:26 “Jyewe Kilawudiyo Lusiya
Acts23:27 Uyu muntu yafashwe n'Abayahudi biyemeza kumwica. Nuko menye ko afite ubwenegihugu bw'Umunyaroma
Acts23:28 Nashatse kumenya icyo bamurega mujyana imbere y'abanyarukiko rwabo.
Acts23:29 Uretse ko bamurega ibyerekeye amategeko yabo
Acts23:30 Maze kumenya ko Abayahudi bamuciriye igico niyemeza kumuboherereza. Nuko ntumiza abamurega ngo bazabagezeho ibirego. [Mbasezeyeho.]”
Acts23:31 Nuko abasirikari bakora uko bategetswe
Acts23:32 Bukeye bwaho abasirikari bagenza amaguru basubira mu kigo cyabo i Yeruzalemu
Acts23:33 Bageze i Kayizariya baha Umutegetsi Feliki urwandiko
Acts23:34 Feliki amaze gusoma urwandiko abaza Pawulo intara akomokamo. Amenye ko akomoka muri Silisiya
Acts23:35 aramubwira ati: “Nzaba numva ibyawe abakurega nibamara kuza.” Nuko ategeka ko barindira Pawulo mu ngoro ya Herodi.
Acts24:1 Iminsi itanu ishize Umutambyi mukuru Ananiya agera i Kayizariya
Acts24:2 Pawulo baramuhamagara
Acts24:3 Aho turi hose ntidusiba kubyakiriza yombi
Acts24:4 Ariko kugira ngo ntabatwarira igihe
Acts24:5 Uyu muntu twasanze ari macinya
Acts24:6 Ndetse yagerageje guhumanya Ingoro y'Imana
Acts24:7 nyamara Komanda Lusiya araza amutwaka byo kuturusha amaboko
Acts24:8 maze ategeka abamuregaga kubasanga.] Mumwibarije mushobora kumenya neza ko tutamubeshyera.”
Acts24:9 Abayahudi na bo baryungamo
Acts24:10 Umutegetsi Feliki arembuza Pawulo amuha ijambo. Pawulo ni ko kugira ati: “Nzi yuko umaze imyaka myinshi ucira imanza abaturage b'iki gihugu
Acts24:11 Nk'uko ushobora kubyigenzurira
Acts24:12 Abayahudi ntibigeze basanga hari uwo tujya impaka mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Acts24:13 Nta n'ubwo yewe bashobora kukubonera ibimenyetso by'ibyo ubu bandega.
Acts24:14 Nyamara icyo niyemerera imbere yawe ni uko nkorera Imana ya ba sogokuruza
Acts24:15 Mpuje n'aba kwiringira Imana ko abantu bose bazazurwa
Acts24:16 Ni cyo gituma iteka nihatira kugira umutima utandega ikibi imbere y'Imana n'abantu.
Acts24:17 “Namaze imyaka myinshi mu mahanga
Acts24:18 Nkiri muri ibyo bansanga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana maze kwihumanura
Acts24:19 Ariko hari Abayahudi bamwe bo mu ntara ya Aziya bari bahari
Acts24:20 Cyangwa aba bantu nibavuge icyaha bansanganye igihe nari mpagaze mu rukiko rw'ikirenga
Acts24:21 uretse iri jambo navugiye muri bo ndanguruye nti: ‘Ubu munshyize mu rubanza kuko nemera ko abapfuye bazazuka!’ ”
Acts24:22 Nuko Feliki wari uzi neza iby'Inzira ya Yezu
Acts24:23 Ategeka umukapiteni kuba afunze Pawulo
Acts24:24 Hashize iminsi Feliki azana n'umugore we Durusila w'Umuyahudikazi. Atumira Pawulo maze amutega amatwi ngo amubwire kwemera Kristo Yezu icyo ari cyo.
Acts24:25 Igihe Pawulo asobanuye ibyerekeye imibereho itunganye no kumenya kwifata
Acts24:26 Icyakora kandi yiringiraga ko Pawulo azamuha ruswa
Acts24:27 Imyaka ibiri ishize
Acts25:1 Fesito amaze iminsi itatu ageze mu butware bwe
Acts25:2 Abatambyi bakuru n'abandi bakuru b'Abayahudi bamuregera Pawulo
Acts25:3 kubagirira neza ngo amutumire aze i Yeruzalemu
Acts25:4 Nuko Fesito arabasubiza ati: “Pawulo azagumya gufungirwa i Kayizariya
Acts25:5 Yongera kubabwira ati: “Muzareke tujyaneyo n'abakuru muri mwe
Acts25:6 Fesito amara iminsi itarenze umunani cyangwa icumi i Yeruzalemu
Acts25:7 Ahageze Abayahudi bavuye i Yeruzalemu baramukikiza
Acts25:8 Nuko Pawulo ariregura ati: “Nta cyaha nakoze haba ku Mategeko y'Abayahudi
Acts25:9 Ariko Fesito ashatse kwikundisha Abayahudi abaza Pawulo ati: “Mbese urashaka kujya i Yeruzalemu ngo mbe ari ho nkemurira urubanza rw'ibi bakurega?”
Acts25:10 Pawulo aramusubiza ati: “Hano ndi ni mu rukiko rw'umwami w'i Roma
Acts25:11 Niba narishe amategeko
Acts25:12 Nuko Fesito amaze kuvugana n'abajyanama be
Acts25:13 Hashize iminsi Umwami Agiripa na Berenike bajya i Kayizariya kuramutsa Fesito.
Acts25:14 Bahamaze iminsi Fesito atekerereza umwami ibya Pawulo agira ati: “Hari umugabo Feliki yasize afunze.
Acts25:15 Nageze i Yeruzalemu abatambyi bakuru n'abakuru b'imiryango y'Abayahudi baramundegera
Acts25:16 Ariko mbasubiza ko atari umuco w'Abanyaroma gucira umuntu iteka
Acts25:17 Igihe nazaga twarazanye na bo maze sinakerereza urubanza
Acts25:18 Abamuregaga bahagurutse ntibagira ikirego na kimwe bamurega mu bibi nakekaga.
Acts25:19 Ahubwo bari bafite ibyo bapfa na we byerekeye idini yabo n'umuntu witwa Yezu wapfuye
Acts25:20 Bitewe n'uko ntabashije kumenya uko nasuzuma izo mpaka zabo
Acts25:21 Nuko Pawulo ahita ajurira ashaka ko ibye bizarangizwa na nyir'icyubahiro umwami w'i Roma
Acts25:22 Agiripa ni ko kubwira Fesito ati: “Nanjye nakunda kwiyumvira uwo muntu.” Na we ati: “Ejo uzamwumva.”
Acts25:23 Nuko bukeye Agiripa na Berenike binjirana ishema ryinshi mu rukiko
Acts25:24 Nuko Fesito aravuga ati: “Mwami Agiripa
Acts25:25 Ariko nasanze ari nta kintu yakoze gikwiriye kumwicisha
Acts25:26 Icyakora nta kirego na kimwe cy'ukuri mbonye nakwandikira umwami w'i Roma. Ngicyo igitumye muzana imbere yanyu
Acts25:27 kuko nasanze nta cyo bivuze kohereza umuntu w'imfungwa ntagaragaje neza icyo aregwa.”
Acts26:1 Nuko Agiripa abwira Pawulo ati: “Ngaho iregure.” Pawulo arambura ukuboko atangira kwiregura ati:
Acts26:2 “Mwami Agiripa
Acts26:3 cyane cyane kuko usanzwe uzi neza imico y'Abayahudi n'ibyo bajyaho impaka. Ni cyo gitumye ngusaba ngo wihanganire kunyumva.
Acts26:4 “Abayahudi bose bazi imibereho yanjye uhereye mu buto bwanjye
Acts26:5 Banzi kuva kera
Acts26:6 None ubu ndaregwa ko nizera ibyo Imana yasezeraniye ba sogokuruza.
Acts26:7 Iryo sezerano ni ryo imiryango yacu cumi n'ibiri ikomoka kuri Isiraheli yizera kuzahabwa
Acts26:8 Kuki mwihandagaza muvuga muti: ‘Ntibishoboka ko Imana yazura abapfuye?’
Acts26:9 “Nanjye ubwanjye natekerezaga ko ngomba kurwanya ibya Yezu w'i Nazareti uko nshoboye kose.
Acts26:10 Ni na byo nakoze i Yeruzalemu: benshi mu ntore z'Imana nabashyize muri gereza mpawe uburenganzira n'abakuru bo mu batambyi
Acts26:11 Kenshi mu nsengero zose nabahanishaga bikomeye
Acts26:12 “Ni cyo cyatumye njya i Damasi abatambyi bakuru bampaye uburenganzira n'amabwiriza.
Acts26:13 Nuko rero Mwami Agiripa
Acts26:14 Twese twikubita hasi maze numva ijwi ry'umbwira mu Giheburayi ati: ‘Sawuli
Acts26:15 Nuko ndabaza nti: ‘Uri nde Nyagasani?’ Na we aransubiza ati: ‘Ndi Yezu uwo utoteza.
Acts26:16 Ariko byuka uhagarare. Igituma nkubonekeye ni ukugira ngo nkugire umugaragu wanjye n'umugabo wo guhamya ibyo ubonye kuri jye
Acts26:17 Nzagutabara ngukize Abayahudi n'abanyamahanga ngutumyeho.
Acts26:18 Ngutumye kubahumura amaso kugira ngo ubahindure
Acts26:19 “Kubera iyo mpamvu Mwami Agiripa
Acts26:20 Nuko mbanziriza i Damasi
Acts26:21 Ni cyo cyatumye Abayahudi bamfata igihe nari mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana
Acts26:22 No kugeza uyu munsi Imana iracyantabara
Acts26:23 ko Kristo yagombaga kubabazwa agapfa maze akaba ubimburiye abandi kuzuka
Acts26:24 Pawulo amaze kwiregura atyo Fesito ariyamirira ati: “Pawulo
Acts26:25 Pawulo aramusubiza ati: “Nyakubahwa Fesito
Acts26:26 Ibyo byose Umwami Agiripa arabizi
Acts26:27 Mwami Agiripa
Acts26:28 Nuko Agiripa abwira Pawulo ati: “Mbese uragira ngo muri aka kanya gato unyemeze kuba Umukristo?”
Acts26:29 Pawulo aramusubiza ati: “Kaba ari akanya gato cyangwa kanini
Acts26:30 Umwami n'Umutegetsi Fesito na Berenike n'abandi bari bicaranye na bo barahaguruka.
Acts26:31 Bagitirimuka aho baravugana bati: “Uyu muntu nta cyaha yakoze cyo kumwicisha
Acts26:32 Nuko Agiripa abwira Fesito ati: “Uyu muntu yajyaga kurekurwa iyo atajuririra umwami w'i Roma.”
Acts27:1 Bamaze kwemeza ko dufata ubwato tukajya mu Butaliyani
Acts27:2 Twurira ubwato buvuye Aduramiti
Acts27:3 Bukeye duhagarara i Sidoni
Acts27:4 Tuvuye aho tugenda dukikiye ikirwa cya Shipure
Acts27:5 Tuhavuye tunyura mu nyanja ihereranye n'intara za Silisiya na Pamfiliya
Acts27:6 Aho ngaho umukapiteni ahabona ubundi bwato buturutse Alegisanderiya bujya mu Butaliyani
Acts27:7 Tumara iminsi itari mike tugenda buhoro
Acts27:8 Tumaze kuhakikira bituruhije
Acts27:9 Turahatinda ndetse turenza umunsi w'Abayahudi wo kwigomwa kurya
Acts27:10 “Mwa bagabo mwe
Acts27:11 Ariko umukapiteni aho kwita ku cyo Pawulo avuga
Acts27:12 Icyo cyambu nticyari kiboneye ku buryo bari kuhamara amezi y'imbeho n'umuyaga
Acts27:13 Bumvise umuyaga woroshye uva mu majyepfo utangiye guhuha
Acts27:14 Ariko bidatinze ishuheri y'umuyaga witwa “Majyaruguru y'iburasirazuba”
Acts27:15 Ikubita ubwato bananirwa kuyirwanya
Acts27:16 Igihe twanyuraga mu majyepfo y'akarwa kitwa Kawuda
Acts27:17 Abasare barakūriza bagashyira mu bwato
Acts27:18 Dukomeza guteraganwa bikomeye n'inkubi y'umuyaga
Acts27:19 Ku munsi wa gatatu
Acts27:20 Twamaze iminsi myinshi tutareba izuba n'inyenyeri
Acts27:21 Bari bamaze iminsi batarya. Pawulo ni ko guhagarara hagati yabo arababwira ati: “Mwa bagabo mwe
Acts27:22 Ariko ubu bwo ndabagira inama yatuma musubiza umutima mu nda
Acts27:23 Iri joro nabonekewe n'umumarayika w'Imana niyeguriye kandi nkorera
Acts27:24 arambwira ati: ‘Pawulo
Acts27:25 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero mwa bagabo mwe
Acts27:26 Icyakora hari ikirwa ubwato buzagomba kudusukaho.”
Acts27:27 Mu ijoro rya cumi na kane
Acts27:28 Bamanurira mu mazi umugozi uziritseho icyuma kugira ngo bapime uko hareshya
Acts27:29 Batinya ko ubwato bwasekura ku ntaza
Acts27:30 Abasare biyemeza gucika ni ko gusubiza mu mazi ka kato
Acts27:31 Pawulo ni ko kubwira umukapiteni n'abasirikari ati: “Aba nibataguma mu bwato
Acts27:32 Abasirikari bahita batema imigozi iziritse ako kato
Acts27:33 Bujya gucya Pawulo abasaba bose kugira icyo bafungura agira ati: “Dore uyu ni umunsi wa cumi n'ine muhangayitse
Acts27:34 Ndabasabye rero nimufungure
Acts27:35 Amaze kuvuga atyo afata umugati
Acts27:36 Bose bagarura agatima na bo barafungura.
Acts27:37 Abari mu bwato twese twari magana abiri na mirongo irindwi na batandatu.
Acts27:38 Umuntu wese amaze guhaga bajugunya ingano zasigaye mu nyanja
Acts27:39 Bumaze gucya abasare ntibamenya ahantu bitegeye aho ari ho
Acts27:40 Bazitura bya byuma bihagarika ubwato birokera mu mazi
Acts27:41 Ariko ubwato bugeze ku gashoro butikura mu musenyi
Acts27:42 Abasirikari biyemeza kwica imbohe zose
Acts27:43 Ariko umukapiteni ashaka gukiza Pawulo ni ko kubabuza kubikora
Acts27:44 abasigaye bakabona kuhagera bogeye ku mbaho cyangwa ku bimene by'ubwato. Uko ni ko bose babashije gufata imusozi amahoro.
Acts28:1 Tumaze guhonoka icyo cyago tumenya yuko ikirwa tugezeho cyitwa Malita.
Acts28:2 Abaturage baho batwakira neza bitangaje
Acts28:3 Pawulo amaze gusakuma inkwi ngo azishyire mu muriro
Acts28:4 Abaturage babonye icyo gisimba kimunagana ku kiganza baravugana bati: “Ni ukuri uyu muntu agomba kuba ari umwicanyi. Nubwo yakize urw'inyanja
Acts28:5 Ariko Pawulo akungutira iyo nzoka mu muriro
Acts28:6 Abantu bategereza ko abyimbirwa
Acts28:7 Hafi aho hakaba amasambu y'umutware w'icyo kirwa witwa Pubuliyo. Na we atwakira neza tumara iwe iminsi itatu.
Acts28:8 Se wa Pubuliyo yari mu kirago ari indembe
Acts28:9 Ibyo bimaze kuba
Acts28:10 Abaho baherako baduha icyubahiro cyinshi
Acts28:11 Hashize amezi atatu twurira ubwato bwavaga Alegisanderiya bwitiriwe imana z'impanga
Acts28:12 Tugera mu mujyi wa Sirakuza tuhamara iminsi itatu.
Acts28:13 Tuhavuye dukikira inkombe tugera ahitwa Regiyo. Hashize umunsi umwe umuyaga utangira guhuha uturutse mu majyepfo
Acts28:14 Tuhasanga abavandimwe badusaba kumarana na bo icyumweru. Nyuma turahava tugana i Roma.
Acts28:15 Abavandimwe b'i Roma bumvise ko tuje baza kudusanganirira ku Isoko rya Apiyo
Acts28:16 Tugeze i Roma bemerera Pawulo kwicumbikira ukwe
Acts28:17 Iminsi itatu ishize Pawulo atumiza abakuru b'Abayahudi b'aho hantu
Acts28:18 Basuzumye ibyo ndegwa basanga nta cyo nakoze cyo kunyicisha
Acts28:19 Ariko Abayahudi babirwanyije biba ngombwa ko njuririra umwami w'i Roma
Acts28:20 Ngicyo icyatumye mbatumiza kugira ngo tuganire. Koko nashyizwe kuri iyi ngoyi mpōrwa Uwo Abisiraheli bizera kuzabona.”
Acts28:21 Baramusubiza bati: “Ntabwo twigeze tubona urwandiko ruturutse i Yudeya rukuvuga
Acts28:22 Icyakora turashaka kumenya icyo utekereza
Acts28:23 Basezerana na we umunsi bazongera guterana
Acts28:24 Bamwe bemezwa n'ibyo avuze
Acts28:25 Nuko ntibahuza maze igihe benda gutaha
Acts28:26 ‘Genda ubwire abo bantu uti: Kumva muzumva ariko ntimuzasobanukirwa
Acts28:27 Erega aba ni abantu binangiye
Acts28:28 Pawulo yungamo ati: “Nuko none mumenye ko ab'andi mahanga bagejejweho aka gakiza kava ku Mana
Acts28:29 Amaze kuvuga atyo Abayahudi bataha bajya impaka zikomeye.]
Acts28:30 Pawulo amara imyaka ibiri yuzuye ari mu icumbi akodesha
Acts28:31 Yatangazaga ubwami bw'Imana kandi akigisha ibyerekeye Nyagasani Yezu Kristo
Romans1:1 Ni jye Pawulo ubandikiye
Romans1:2 Ubwo Butumwa Imana yabusezeranye kuva mbere mu Byanditswe yatugeneye
Romans1:3 Buvuga ibyerekeye Umwana wayo Yezu Kristo Umwami wacu. Ukurikije amasekuruza y'abantu akomoka kuri Dawidi
Romans1:4 
Romans1:5 Ku bw'uwo Imana yangiriye ubuntu ngo mbe Intumwa yayo
Romans1:6 Namwe muri muri abo kuko Imana yabahamagaye ngo mube aba Yezu Kristo.
Romans1:7 Ni mwe mwese nandikiye abakundwa n'Imana b'i Roma
Romans1:8 Mbere na mbere ndashimira Imana yanjye ku bwa Yezu Kristo kubera mwe mwese
Romans1:9 Imana nkorera n'umutima wanjye wose
Romans1:10 mu masengesho. Nyisaba ubudasiba ngo ubu ibe yampa uburyo bwo kuza iwanyu
Romans1:11 Mbega ukuntu nifuza kubabona
Romans1:12 Ndifuza kuba muri mwe ngo muterwe inkunga no kwemera Kristo kwanjye
Romans1:13 Bavandimwe
Romans1:14 Koko nahawe inshingano yo kugeza Ubutumwa bwiza ku bantu bose
Romans1:15 Ni cyo gituma nshaka namwe kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwiza
Romans1:16 Erega kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza ntibintera isoni
Romans1:17 Ubwo Butumwa ni bwo buhishura uburyo Imana iha abantu kuyitunganira babikesha kwemera Kristo
Romans1:18 Uhereye mu ijuru
Romans1:19 Erega ibyo umuntu ashobora kumenya ku byerekeye Imana bimaze kubagaragarira
Romans1:20 Kuva isi yaremwa
Romans1:21 Nubwo bazi Imana
Romans1:22 Barirase ngo ni abanyabwenge
Romans1:23 Ikuzo ry'Imana idapfa bariguranye amashusho y'abantu bapfa
Romans1:24 Ni yo mpamvu Imana yabaretse ngo biyandarike babitewe no kurarikira
Romans1:25 Ukuri kw'Imana bakuguranye ibinyoma
Romans1:26 Ni cyo gituma Imana yabaretse bakagengwa n'irari ritesha agaciro
Romans1:27 Abagabo na bo biba bityo bareka kubana n'abagore bashakanye uko Imana yabigennye
Romans1:28 Bibwiraga ko atari ngombwa kumenyana n'Imana
Romans1:29 Buzuye ubugome bw'uburyo bwose
Romans1:30 no gusebanya. Ni abanzi b'Imana n'abanyagasuzuguro n'abirasi
Romans1:31 barangwaho ubujiji n'ubuhemu
Romans1:32 Bazi iteka ry'Imana rivuga ko ibyaha nk'ibyo bikwiye guhanishwa urupfu
Romans2:1 Wowe uwo uri we wese wigira umucamanza w'abandi
Romans2:2 Koko kandi tuzi ko Imana icira urubanza abagenza batyo ishingiye ku kuri.
Romans2:3 Ese wowe wigira umucamanza w'abakora bene ibyo kandi ukora nka bo
Romans2:4 Cyangwa wirengagiza ineza yayo isesuye n'ubugwaneza n'ukwihangana kwayo? Mbese ntuzi ko ikugirira neza ityo kugira ngo wihane?
Romans2:5 Ibiri amambu winangiye umutima
Romans2:6 Ubwo ni bwo izagirira umuntu wese ibikwiranye n'ibyo yakoze.
Romans2:7 Abazaba baravunwe no gukora neza bagaharanira ikuzo n'icyubahiro no kudapfa
Romans2:8 Naho abatera amahane bagahakana ukuri bakiyegurira ubugome
Romans2:9 Umugizi wa nabi uwo ari we wese azagubwaho n'amakuba n'ishavu
Romans2:10 Naho abagiraneza bose bazahabwa ikuzo n'icyubahiro n'amahoro
Romans2:11 kuko Imana ifata abantu bose kimwe.
Romans2:12 Abacumura bose batazi Amategeko bazapfa batazize ayo mategeko
Romans2:13 Koko rero abumva Amategeko si bo ntungane ku Mana
Romans2:14 Abanyamahanga ntibazi Amategeko
Romans2:15 Bityo ibikorwa byabo byerekana ko amategeko y'Imana yanditswe mu mitima yabo
Romans2:16 Ni ko bizamera ku munsi Imana izaca urubanza rw'ibihishwe mu mitima y'abantu ikoresheje Kristo Yezu – ni na ko Ubutumwa bwiza nahawe bubyemeza.
Romans2:17 Noneho wowe witwa Umuyahudi
Romans2:18 uzi icyo Imana ishaka kandi wigishijwe n'Amategeko yayo guhitamo ibyiza.
Romans2:19 Wowe wemeza ko uri umurandasi w'impumyi n'urumuri ruboneshereza abari mu mwijima
Romans2:20 ukaba n'umwigisha w'injiji n'umwarimu w'abana
Romans2:21 None se ubwo bimeze bityo
Romans2:22 Ubwiriza kudasambana kandi ugasambana! Uvuga ko wanga ibigirwamana urunuka kandi ugasahura ingoro zabyo!
Romans2:23 Urata Amategeko kandi ugasuzuguza Imana uyacaho!
Romans2:24 Nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga
Romans2:25 Niba ukurikiza Amategeko gukebwa biba bigufitiye akamaro
Romans2:26 Naho rero umuntu utigeze akebwa agakurikiza ibiri mu Mategeko byose
Romans2:27 Ndetse utigeze akebwa umubiri ariko agakurikiza amategeko y'Imana
Romans2:28 Koko rero ikibonekera amaso gusa si cyo kiranga Umuyahudi nyakuri
Romans2:29 Ahubwo Umuyahudi nyakuri arangwa n'ibiri mu mutima we
Romans3:1 None se kuba Umuyahudi birushije iki kutaba we? Mbese gukebwa byo bifite kamaro ki?
Romans3:2 Ku buryo bwose ni kanini! Icya mbere Abayahudi ni bo bashinzwe amabwiriza y'Imana.
Romans3:3 None se naho bamwe muri bo baba barabaye abahemu
Romans3:4 Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ni ngombwa kumenya ko Imana ari inyakuri
Romans3:5 None rero niba ubugome bwacu bushyira ku mugaragaro ubutungane bw'Imana
Romans3:6 Ntibikanavugwe! None se Imana iramutse irenganya
Romans3:7 Icyakora niba ikinyoma cyanjye gituma ukuri kw'Imana kurushaho kugaragara bikayihesha ikuzo
Romans3:8 Niba ari uko bimeze
Romans3:9 Bite rero? Twebwe Abayahudi se hari icyo turusha abandi? Nta na gito. Nk'uko tumaze kubigaragaza
Romans3:10 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nta muntu n'umwe w'intungane ubaho
Romans3:11 nta n'umwe usobanukiwe
Romans3:12 Bose bayiteshutseho
Romans3:13 “Bafite akarimi gashyanuka
Romans3:14 “Amagambo yabo yuzuyemo imivumo no gukariha.”
Romans3:15 “Bihutira kumena amaraso
Romans3:16 aho banyuze hasigara ari amatongo n'umubabaro
Romans3:17 ntibamenya imigenzereze y'amahoro.”
Romans3:18 “Ntibigera batinya Imana.”
Romans3:19 Tuzi ko ibyo Amategeko y'Imana avuga byose abibwira abagengwa na yo
Romans3:20 Ngiyo impamvu nta muntu n'umwe uba intungane imbere y'Imana
Romans3:21 Ubu ariko Imana yagaragaje uburyo igira abantu intungane imbere yayo
Romans3:22 Ibagira intungane babikesha kwemera Yezu Kristo. Ibigirira abamwizera bose nta kurobanura.
Romans3:23 Koko bose bakoze ibyaha
Romans3:24 Ariko none Imana yabahereye ubuntu kuba intungane imbere yayo
Romans3:25 Ni we Imana yagennye ngo abere abantu icyiru ku bw'amaraso yabameneye babikesha kumwizera. Kwari ukwerekana ubutabera bwayo igihe yihanganiraga abantu
Romans3:26 
Romans3:27 None se haracyari impamvu yatuma abantu birata? Nta n'imwe. Kubera iki? Barata se ko bakora ibyategetswe n'Amategeko? Oya
Romans3:28 Koko rero dusanga umuntu agirwa intungane imbere y'Imana kuko yizera Kristo
Romans3:29 Cyangwa se Imana yaba ari iy'Abayahudi bonyine? Ese ntabwo ari n'iy'abatari Abayahudi? Koko ni iyabo na bo
Romans3:30 kuko Imana ari imwe rukumbi. Abayahudi bakebwe izabagira intungane imbere yayo kuko bemeye Kristo
Romans3:31 Ibyo se bivuga ko ukwemera Kristo gutuma dutesha Amategeko agaciro? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ahubwo kudutera kuyashyigikira rwose.
Romans4:1 Twavuga iki se kuri Aburahamu umukurambere wacu? Mbese byamugendekeye bite?
Romans4:2 Niba yaragizwe intungane n'ibikorwa bye afite icyo yirata
Romans4:3 Mbese Ibyanditswe bivuga iki? Biravuga ngo: “Aburahamu yizeye Imana bituma abarwa nk'intungane.”
Romans4:4 Uwakoze umurimo igihembo ahabwa ntaba agiherewe ubuntu
Romans4:5 Naho udashingira ku byo akora
Romans4:6 Ni uko Dawidi avuga ibyerekeye amahirwe y'umuntu Imana ibara nk'intungane
Romans4:7 “Hahirwa abantu Imana yababariye ibicumuro
Romans4:8 Hahirwa umuntu Nyagasani atabaraho icyaha.”
Romans4:9 Mbese ayo mahirwe Dawidi avuga agenewe abantu bakebwe gusa
Romans4:10 Ariko se byabaye ryari? Ese ni mbere cyangwa nyuma y'ugukebwa kwe? Si nyuma ahubwo ni mbere.
Romans4:11 Nyuma yaho Imana yahaye Aburahamu ikimenyetso cyo gukebwa. Kwari ukugaragaza ko yari yaramufashe nk'intungane imbere yayo
Romans4:12 Ubusanzwe kandi ni umubyeyi w'abakebwe bidatewe n'uko bakebwe
Romans4:13 Imana yasezeranyije Aburahamu ko we cyangwa urubyaro rwe bazahabwa isi ho umunani. Ntiyahawe iryo sezerano kubera ko yumviye Amategeko y'Imana
Romans4:14 Niba abakurikiza amategeko ari bo bonyine bahabwa umunani
Romans4:15 Koko Amategeko y'Imana akururira umuntu uburakari bwayo
Romans4:16 None rero abizera Imana ni bo bahabwa umunani yabasezeranyije
Romans4:17 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nzaguha gukomokwaho n'amahanga menshi.” Ni umukurambere wacu imbere y'Imana yizeye ari yo Mana izura abapfuye
Romans4:18 Aburahamu yizeye Imana bituma yiringira
Romans4:19 Yari amaze imyaka nk'ijana umubiri we umeze nk'uwapfuye na Sara akaba yari yaracuze
Romans4:20 Ntabwo yigeze ashidikanya ibyo Imana yamusezeranyije
Romans4:21 Yemejwe rwose ko Imana ifite ububasha bwo gukora icyo yasezeranye.
Romans4:22 Ngiyo impamvu Imana yamubaze nk'intungane kubera ko yayizeye.
Romans4:23 Kandi si we wenyine Ibyanditswe bivugaho iri jambo ngo: “Imana yamubaze nk'intungane”
Romans4:24 ahubwo natwe biratureba kuko Imana izatubara nk'intungane
Romans4:25 Yashyikirijwe abamwica azira ibyaha byacu
Romans5:1 Nuko rero ubwo ukwemera Kristo kwatugize intungane imbere y'Imana
Romans5:2 Ni we watugejeje kuri ubu buntu bw'Imana dushingiyeho kubera kumwizera. Noneho dufite ishema kuko twiringira kuzahabwa ku ikuzo ry'Imana.
Romans5:3 Si ibyo gusa ahubwo dufite n'ishema ry'amakuba yacu kuko tuzi ko amakuba atera kwihangana
Romans5:4 kwihangana na ko kukadutera gutsinda ibitugerageza
Romans5:5 Uyiringira kandi ntabwo azakorwa n'isoni
Romans5:6 Koko rero ku gihe Imana yateganyije twe tukiri abanyantege nke
Romans5:7 Birakomeye kubona umuntu wemera gupfira intungane
Romans5:8 Ariko Imana yatweretse ukuntu idukunda
Romans5:9 Noneho ubwo twagizwe intungane imbere y'Imana n'amaraso ye
Romans5:10 Igihe twari tukiri abanzi b'Imana ni bwo yiyunze na twe ikoresheje urupfu rw'Umwana wayo
Romans5:11 Ikindi kandi
Romans5:12 Ibyaha byazanywe ku isi n'umuntu umwe ari we Adamu
Romans5:13 No mu gihe Imana yari itaratanga Amategeko ibyaha byahoze ku isi
Romans5:14 Nyamara kuva mu gihe cya Adamu kugeza mu cya Musa
Romans5:15 Icyakora igicumuro cya Adamu nta wakigereranya n'impano Imana itanga. Ni ukuri igicumuro cy'umuntu umwe cyateje rubanda rwose urupfu. Nyamara ubuntu bw'Imana mbega ukuntu buhebuje
Romans5:16 Impano y'Imana kandi nta wayigereranya n'icyaha cya wa muntu umwe Adamu. Urubanza rwaje nyuma y'icyaha cy'umwe ruzanira abantu gucirwa iteka
Romans5:17 Koko rero igicumuro cy'umuntu umwe cyatumye urupfu ruganza mu bantu
Romans5:18 Nuko rero nk'uko igicumuro cy'umuntu umwe cyatumye bose baba abo gucirwa iteka
Romans5:19 Koko rero nk'uko kutumvira Imana k'umuntu umwe kwatumye rubanda baba abanyabyaha
Romans5:20 Amategeko yo yazanywe no kugira ngo ibicumuro bigwire
Romans5:21 Noneho nk'uko ibyaha byaganje mu bantu bibageza mu rupfu
Romans6:1 Ubwo bimeze bityo tuvuge iki? Mbese tugumye gukora ibyaha kugira ngo ubuntu Imana itugirira bugwire?
Romans6:2 Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ese ko twapfuye ku byerekeye ibyaha twashobora dute kugumya kubikora?
Romans6:3 Mbese muyobewe ko twese ababatirijwe kuba umwe na Kristo Yezu
Romans6:4 Ni ukuvuga ko igihe twabatizwaga twahambanywe na we
Romans6:5 Koko rero ubwo twabaye umwe na we
Romans6:6 Tumenye neza ibi ngibi: umuntu twari we kera yabambanywe na Kristo ku musaraba
Romans6:7 kuko uwapfuye aba atakigengwa n'ibyaha.
Romans6:8 Ubwo twapfanye na Kristo
Romans6:9 Tuzi neza ko Kristo yazutse mu bapfuye. Nuko rero ntagipfa
Romans6:10 Ubwo yapfaga yapfuye rimwe ku bw'ibyaha
Romans6:11 Namwe ni uko
Romans6:12 Nuko rero ibyaha ntibikaganze mu mibiri yanyu izapfa
Romans6:13 Ingingo z'imibiri yanyu ntimukazigabize ibyaha ngo zibe ibikoresho by'ubugome. Ahubwo mwiyegurire Imana kubera ko mwavuye ikuzimu mukaba bazima
Romans6:14 Ibyaha ntibikabaganze kuko mutakigengwa n'Amategeko
Romans6:15 Ibyo se ni ukuvuga iki? Mbese tujye dukora ibyaha kubera ko tutakigengwa n'Amategeko
Romans6:16 Mbese ntimuzi ko iyo mwiyeguriye umuntu kugira ngo ababere Shobuja kandi mumwumvire
Romans6:17 Dushimire Imana. Mwahoze mu buja bw'ibyaha
Romans6:18 Imana yabakuye ku ngoyi y'ibyaha ibagira abagaragu b'ubutungane.
Romans6:19 Ibyo ndabibabwira ntanga ingero ku bisanzwe mu bantu
Romans6:20 Igihe mwari mu buja bw'ibyaha ntimwagengwaga n'ubutungane.
Romans6:21 Mbese ibyo mwakoraga kera byabamariye iki
Romans6:22 Ariko none mwakuwe ku ngoyi y'ibyaha muba abagaragu b'Imana
Romans6:23 Ibihembo by'ibyaha ni urupfu
Romans7:1 Bavandimwe
Romans7:2 Itegeko rigenga abashakanye rishinga umugore kubana n'umugabo we igihe cyose akiriho
Romans7:3 Ni cyo gituma umugore wishyingira undi mugabo uwe akiriho
Romans7:4 Bavandimwe
Romans7:5 Koko rero tukigengwa na kamere yacu
Romans7:6 Naho ubu ntitukigengwa n'Amategeko
Romans7:7 Ibyo se tubivugeho iki? Ese Amategeko tuyite icyaha? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ahubwo iyo Amategeko atakinyereka sinari kumenya icyaha icyo ari cyo. Sinari kumenya irari
Romans7:8 Icyakora ibyaha byishingikirije ku Mategeko bintera irari ry'uburyo bwose. Koko hatabayeho amategeko ibyaha ntibyabaho.
Romans7:9 Kera ntaramenya icyitwa itegeko nari muzima. Ariko haje Amategeko ibyaha birampagurukana
Romans7:10 bityo ndapfa. Amabwiriza y'Imana yari agenewe kuzana ubugingo
Romans7:11 Bityo ibyaha byishingikirije kuri ayo mabwiriza
Romans7:12 Ni ukuvuga ko Amategeko y'Imana atagira inenge
Romans7:13 None se ibyiza nk'ibyo byanzaniye urupfu? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ahubwo ibyaha ni byo byarunzaniye. Byitwaje ibyiza binteza urupfu kugira ngo byigaragaze ukuntu ari bibi. Uko ni ko amabwiriza y'Imana yatumye ibyaha bimbera ibyaha ku buryo bukabije.
Romans7:14 Tuzi ko Amategeko aturuka ku Mana
Romans7:15 Sinsobanukirwa ibyo nkora kuko ibyo nshaka gukora ntabikora
Romans7:16 Noneho ubwo nkora ibyo ntashaka
Romans7:17 Bityo rero si jye ubikora
Romans7:18 Nzi rero ko muri jye
Romans7:19 Ibyiza nshaka simbikora
Romans7:20 Ubwo rero nkora ibyo ntashaka si jye ubikora
Romans7:21 Dore uko nasanze bigenda: igihe nshaka gukora ibyiza
Romans7:22 Mu mutima wanjye Amategeko y'Imana aranshimisha
Romans7:23 ariko muri kamere yanjye nsangamo ibindi bintegeka birwana intambara n'amategeko yemewe n'umutima wanjye. Ibyaha ni byo bitegeka kamere yanjye bikangira imfungwa.
Romans7:24 Mbega ngo ndagatora! Ni nde wankiza uyu mubiri wigaruriwe n'urupfu?
Romans7:25 Imana ishimirwe ko izabikora
Romans8:1 Ubu rero abari muri Kristo Yezu nta teka bacirwa
Romans8:2 kuko gutegekwa na Mwuka w'ubugingo buri muri Kristo Yezu kwankuye mu buja bwo gutegekwa n'ibyaha n'urupfu.
Romans8:3 Ibyo Amategeko atashoboye bitewe n'intege nke za kamere y'umuntu
Romans8:4 kugira ngo tugirwe intungane rwose nk'uko Amategeko ashaka
Romans8:5 Abayoborwa na kamere yabo baharanira ibyo kamere yabo ishaka
Romans8:6 Guharanira ibyo kamere ishaka bibyara urupfu
Romans8:7 Ni yo mpamvu abaharanira ibyo kamere yabo ishaka ari abanzi b'Imana
Romans8:8 Abagengwa na kamere yabo ntibabasha gushimisha Imana.
Romans8:9 Mwebwe rero ntabwo mugengwa na kamere yanyu
Romans8:10 Ariko niba Kristo ari muri mwe
Romans8:11 Niba kandi Mwuka w'Imana yazuye Yezu mu bapfuye abatuyemo
Romans8:12 Bityo rero bavandimwe
Romans8:13 Niba mubaho uko kamere yanyu ishaka muzapfa
Romans8:14 Koko rero abayoborwa na Mwuka w'Imana ni bo bana b'Imana.
Romans8:15 Mwuka mwahawe si uwo kubashyira mu buja ngo musubire mu bwoba. Ahubwo Mwuka mwahawe ni uwo kubagira abana b'Imana
Romans8:16 Mwuka ubwe ni we utwemeza mu mitima ko turi abana b'Imana.
Romans8:17 Ubwo turi abana bayo rero
Romans8:18 Ndatekereza ko imibabaro yacu yo muri iki gihe ntaho ihuriye n'ikuzo Imana izaduhishurira.
Romans8:19 Ibyaremwe byose bitegereje n'ubwuzu bwinshi igihe Imana izahishura abana bayo.
Romans8:20 Koko rero ibyaremwe byose byahawe kugengwa n'ibitagira umumaro
Romans8:21 ko bizavanwa mu buja bw'uko kononekara
Romans8:22 Tuzi ko na n'ubu ibyaremwe byose biniha
Romans8:23 Si byo byonyine
Romans8:24 Twarakijijwe ariko hari ibyo tucyiringiye. Iyo ubonye ikintu uba utacyiringira kuzakibona. Ni nde wavuga ko yiringiye kubona ikintu kandi amaze kugishyikira?
Romans8:25 Ariko ubwo twiringira ibyo tutarabona bidutera kubitegereza twihanganye.
Romans8:26 Bityo Mwuka adusanga dufite intege nke akatwunganira. Koko ntituzi gusenga nk'uko bikwiye
Romans8:27 Nyamara Imana ireba mu mitima izi imigambi ya Mwuka
Romans8:28 Tuzi kandi ko byose bifatanyiriza hamwe kuzanira ibyiza abakunda Imana
Romans8:29 Abo yamenye kuva kera yabageneye kumera nk'Umwana wayo
Romans8:30 Abo yageneye ibyo yarabahamagaye
Romans8:31 None se ibyo twabivugaho iki? Ubwo Imana itwemera ni nde uzaturwanya?
Romans8:32 Ubwo itimanye Umwana wayo bwite
Romans8:33 Ni nde uzarega abo Imana yitoranyirije? Nta we kuko yo ibita abere.
Romans8:34 Ni nde wabaciraho iteka? Nta we kuko Kristo Yezu ari we wapfuye ndetse akazuka
Romans8:35 Ni nde uzadutandukanya n'urukundo rwa Kristo? Ese amakuba yabishobora
Romans8:36 Ni ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Turicwa umunsi ukira bakuduhōra
Romans8:37 Ariko muri ibyo byose turushaho gutsinda tubikesha uwadukunze.
Romans8:38 Koko rero ndemeza ko nta kizadutandukanya n'urukundo rwe
Romans8:39 
Romans9:1 Ibyo mbabwira ni ukuri
Romans9:2 Mbega ukuntu mfite agahinda kenshi kandi nkababara ubutitsa!
Romans9:3 Rwose nakwifuza kuba ari jye uvumwa n'Imana nkaba natandukana na Kristo
Romans9:4 Ni bo muryango wa Isiraheli Imana yagize abana bayo
Romans9:5 Ba sekuruza ni bo na Kristo akomokaho
Romans9:6 Nyamara si ukuvuga ko Imana yashēshe ibyo yari yarasezeranye
Romans9:7 Kandi abakomoka kuri Aburahamu si ko bose ari urubyaro rwe nyakuri. Ahubwo Imana yaramubwiye iti: “Izaki ni we uzakomokwaho n'urubyaro nagusezeranyije.”
Romans9:8 Ibyo bivuga ko abakomotse kuri Aburahamu ku buryo busanzwe atari bo bitwa abana b'Imana
Romans9:9 Koko rero iri ni ryo sezerano Imana yahaye Aburahamu
Romans9:10 Si ibyo gusa hari na Rebeka wabyaye abana babiri
Romans9:11 Nyamara kandi Imana ifite ibyo ikurikiza mu gutoranya abantu bidaturutse ku bikorwa byabo
Romans9:12 
Romans9:13 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nikundiye Yakobo
Romans9:14 None se ibyo twabivugaho iki? Ese Imana yaba irenganya? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe!
Romans9:15 Yabwiye Musa iti: “Ngirira imbabazi n'impuhwe uwo nshatse.”
Romans9:16 Ibyo rero ntabwo biterwa n'ubushake bw'umuntu cyangwa n'umwete we
Romans9:17 Ni na ko mu Byanditswe Imana yabwiye Umwami wa Misiri iti: “Ngiki icyatumye ngushyiraho: ni ukugira ngo nerekanire muri wowe imbaraga zanjye
Romans9:18 Ni ukuvuga rero ko Imana igirira imbabazi uwo ishaka
Romans9:19 Noneho rero wabaza uti: “Ubwo ari uko bimeze
Romans9:20 Wowe muntu
Romans9:21 Ese umubumbyi si we ufite ubushobozi bwo kugena icyo ibumba riri bukore
Romans9:22 Ni na ko Imana yihitiyemo kwerekana uburakari bwayo no kugaragaza ububasha bwayo. Nyamara yiyemeje kwihanganira cyane abikururiragaho uburakari byayo bagenewe kurimbuka.
Romans9:23 Ibyo kwari ukugaragaza ukuntu ikuzo ryayo risesuye ku bo ishaka kugirira imbabazi
Romans9:24 Abo kandi ni twebwe Imana yahamagaye
Romans9:25 Ni na ko Imana yavuze mu gitabo cyanditswe na Hozeya iti: “Abahoze batari abo mu bwoko bwanjye nzabita ubwoko bwanjye
Romans9:26 Kandi ahantu bababwiriraga ngo ‘Ntimuri ubwoko bwanjye’
Romans9:27 Ezayi na we yavuze aranguruye ibyerekeye Abisiraheli ati: “Nubwo Abisiraheli bangana n'umusenyi wo ku nyanja
Romans9:28 Nyagasani ntazatinda gusohoza ijambo rye mu isi ku buryo bunonosoye.”
Romans9:29 Ni byo Ezayi yari yarahanuye mbere ati: “Iyo Nyagasani Nyiringabo atadusigira nibura urubyaro ruke
Romans9:30 None se ibyo twabivugaho iki? Ni uko abatari Abayahudi batigeze bashaka gutunganira Imana
Romans9:31 Ibiri amambu Abisiraheli bashakashakaga amategeko yatuma batunganira Imana
Romans9:32 Kubera iki se? Kubera ko ubwo butungane batabukuraga ku kwemera Kristo
Romans9:33 ryavuzwe mu Byanditswe ngo: “Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye risitaza abantu
Romans10:1 Bavandimwe
Romans10:2 Ndahamya rwose ko bafite ishyaka ryo gukorera Imana
Romans10:3 Ntibasobanukiwe uburyo Imana igira abantu intungane
Romans10:4 Erega Kristo ni we wanonosoye ibyo Amategeko yari agamije
Romans10:5 Musa ubwe yanditse ibyerekeye gutunganira Imana bivuye ku Mategeko agira ati: “Uzayumvira azabeshwaho na yo.”
Romans10:6 Nyamara dore icyo avuga ku byerekeye ubutungane buvuye ku kwizera: “Ntukibaze uti: ‘Ni nde washobora kuzamuka mu ijuru?’ (ari ukugira ngo ajye kumanurayo Kristo)
Romans10:7 cyangwa ngo wibaze uti: ‘Ni nde washobora kumanuka ikuzimu?’ (ari ukugira ngo azamureyo Kristo amuvana mu bapfuye.)”
Romans10:8 Ahubwo aravuga ati: “Ijambo ry'Imana urarifite
Romans10:9 ngo nubyivugira n'umunwa wawe ko Yezu ari Nyagasani
Romans10:10 Koko rero kubyemera mu mutima bituma Imana ikugira intungane
Romans10:11 Ibyanditswe bigira biti: “Nta n'umwe umwizera uzakorwa n'isoni.”
Romans10:12 Bityo Umuyahudi n'utari Umuyahudi nta kurobanura
Romans10:13 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Umuntu wese uzatakambira Nyagasani azakizwa.”
Romans10:14 None se bamwiyambaza bate batabanje kumwemera? Kandi bamwemera bate batigeze bamwumva? Mbese bamwumva bate hatabonetse umuntu umwamamaza?
Romans10:15 Ikindi kandi abantu bamwamamaza bate ntawe ubatumye? Ni yo mpamvu Ibyanditswe bigira biti: “Mbega ukuntu ari byiza kubona abazanye Inkuru nziza!”
Romans10:16 Ariko si bose bumviye ubwo Butumwa bwiza. Ni na ko Ezayi yavuze ati: “Nyagasani
Romans10:17 Bityo abantu bemera Kristo bamaze kumva ubutumwa
Romans10:18 Noneho ndabaza. Mbese abantu ntibumvise ubwo butumwa? Yee
Romans10:19 Ndabaza rero. Mbese Abisiraheli ntibabisobanukiwe? Erega mbere Musa yari yaravuze ati: “Nzabaharika abanyamahanga mbatere gufuha
Romans10:20 Ndetse Ezayi yageze n'aho yerura ati: “Abatanshakaga barambonye
Romans10:21 Ariko ku byerekeye Abisiraheli agira ati: “Nirizaga umunsi nteze amaboko ngo nakire abantu b'ibyigomeke batanyumvira.”
Romans11:1 None rero ndabaza. Mbese Imana yaba yaraciye ubwoko bwayo? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Nanjye ubwanjye ndi Umwisiraheli ukomoka kuri Aburahamu
Romans11:2 Imana ntiyatereranye ubwoko bwayo yitoranyirije kuva kera. Mbese ntimuzi icyo Ibyanditswe bivuga
Romans11:3 “Nyagasani
Romans11:4 Ariko se Imana yamushubije iki? Yaravuze iti: “Nisigiye abantu ibihumbi birindwi batarapfukamira ikigirwamana Bāli.”
Romans11:5 No muri iki gihe na bwo
Romans11:6 Kwari ukubagirira ubuntu koko itabitewe n'ibikorwa byabo
Romans11:7 Ibyo se ni ukuvuga iki? Icyo Abisiraheli bashakaga nta bwo bakibonye. Abakibonye ni abo Imana yatoranyije
Romans11:8 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Imana yabahaye imitima ihuramye n'amaso atabona n'amatwi atumva kugeza n'ubu.”
Romans11:9 Dawidi na we ati: “Ibyokurya byabo nibibabere umutego wo kubatega
Romans11:10 Amaso yabo ahume atsiratsize
Romans11:11 Nuko rero ndabaza. Mbese igihe Abisiraheli basitaraga kwari ukugwa burundu? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ahubwo gucumura kwabo kwatumye agakiza kagera ku banyamahanga
Romans11:12 None se ubwo gucumura kwabo kwakungahaje abatuye isi
Romans11:13 Noneho reka mbabwire mwebwe abatari Abayahudi: ni jye Ntumwa Kristo yatumye ku batari Abayahudi
Romans11:14 Icyampa nkabona uko ntera bene wacu b'Abayahudi kugira ishyari ngo mbakizemo bamwe!
Romans11:15 Koko rero ubwo guhēzwa kwabo kwatumye rubanda rutari Abayahudi bungwa n'Imana
Romans11:16 Igihe bafata igisate cy'umugati ho umuganura bakagitura Imana
Romans11:17 Urubyaro rwa Isiraheli rugereranywa n'igiti cy'umunzenze cyakonzweho amashami. Wowe utari Umuyahudi ugereranywa n'ishami ry'umunzeze wo mu gasozi ryagemetswe aho ayo mashami yakonzwe
Romans11:18 Nuko rero we kwirata ngo wigambe ku mashami. None se wakwirata iki? Si wowe ushyigikiye imizi
Romans11:19 Ahari aho wakwibwira uti: “Amashami yarakonzwe kugira ngo ngemekwe.”
Romans11:20 Yee
Romans11:21 Koko ubwo Imana itababariye abagereranywa n'amashami kamere
Romans11:22 Zirikana rero kugira neza kw'Imana n'igitsure cyayo
Romans11:23 Naho Abayahudi nibareka ubuhemu bwabo
Romans11:24 Wowe utari Umuyahudi
Romans11:25 Koko rero bavandimwe
Romans11:26 Uko ni ko urubyaro rwose rwa Isiraheli ruzakizwa
Romans11:27 Ngiryo Isezerano nzagirana na bo nimbakuraho ibyaha.”
Romans11:28 Ku byerekeye Ubutumwa bwiza
Romans11:29 Koko Imana ntabwo yisubiza ibyo yahaye abantu
Romans11:30 Namwe kera mwanze kumvira Imana
Romans11:31 Ubu ni ko biri kuri bo
Romans11:32 Imana yagize abantu bose imbohe babitewe no kutayumvira

Romans16:1 Mbashinze mushiki wacu Foyibe ukorera itorero rya Kristo ry'i Kenkireya.
Romans16:2 Mumwakire muri Nyagasani nk'uko bikwiriye intore z'Imana
Romans16:3 Mutashye Purisila na Akwila
Romans16:4 Bari biyemeje no gupfa kugira ngo bandokore. Si jye jyenyine ubashimira
Romans16:5 Mutashye n'itorero rya Kristo rikoranira mu rugo rwabo. Mutashye n'incuti nkunda Epayineto
Romans16:6 Na Mariya wabavunikiye cyane mumutashye.
Romans16:7 Mutashye bene wacu Andironiko na Yuniya twafunganywe. Ni intumwa za Kristo z'ibirangirire
Romans16:8 Mutashye na Ampuliyato
Romans16:9 Mutashye Urubano dufatanya umurimo dukorera Kristo
Romans16:10 Mutashye Apele uzwiho ko akomeye kuri Kristo. Mutashye n'abo kwa Arisitobule.
Romans16:11 Mutashye mwene wacu Herodiyoni
Romans16:12 Mutashye Tirifayina na Tirifoza bakorera Nyagasani bashyizeho umwete. Mutashye n'incuti nkunda Perusi
Romans16:13 Mutashye Rufo watorewe kuba uwa Nyagasani
Romans16:14 Mutashye na Asinkirito na Fulegoni
Romans16:15 Mutashye Filologo na Yuliya
Romans16:16 Muramukanye muhoberana ku buryo butagira amakemwa. Abagize amatorero yose ya Kristo barabatashya.
Romans16:17 Bavandimwe
Romans16:18 Koko rero abameze batyo ntibakorera Umwami wacu Kristo
Romans16:19 Abantu bose bazi ukuntu mwumvira Nyagasani
Romans16:20 Imana yo sōko y'amahoro
Romans16:21 Mugenzi wanjye dukorana Timoteyo arabatashya
Romans16:22 Jyewe Terutiyo wanditse uru rwandiko ndabatashya – nanjye ndi uwa Nyagasani.
Romans16:23 Gayo uncumbikiye arabatashya
Romans16:24 Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese. Amina.]
Romans16:25 Dusingize Imana ibasha kubakomeza
Romans16:26 Ubu iryo banga ryashyizwe ahagaragara n'Ibyanditswe n'Abahanuzi
Romans16:27 Imana nyir'ubwenge yonyine nihabwe ikuzo ku bwa Yezu Kristo iteka ryose. Amina.

1Corinthians1:2 turabandikiye mwebwe ab'itorero ry'Imana riri i Korinti
1Corinthians1:3 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu ibahe n'amahoro
1Corinthians1:4 Mpora nshimira Imana yanjye kubera mwebwe
1Corinthians1:5 Kuba muri we byatumye Imana ibakungahaza
1Corinthians1:6 Ibyo twabemeje byerekeye Kristo byashinze imizi muri mwe
1Corinthians1:7 ku buryo nta mpano n'imwe y'Imana mubuze
1Corinthians1:8 Ni na we uzabakomeza kugeza ku iherezo
1Corinthians1:9 Imana ni indahemuka
1Corinthians1:10 Bavandimwe
1Corinthians1:11 Bavandimwe
1Corinthians1:12 Dore icyo mvuga ni iki: buri wese avuga ibye umwe ati: “Ndi uwa Pawulo
1Corinthians1:13 Ese Kristo yaciwemo ibice byinshi? Mbese Pawulo ni we wababambiwe ku musaraba? Mbese ni mu izina rya Pawulo mwabatijwe?
1Corinthians1:14 Ndashimira Imana ko nta n'umwe muri mwe nabatije uretse Krisipo na Gayo
1Corinthians1:15 bityo nta wavuga ko yabatijwe mu izina ryanjye.
1Corinthians1:16 Koko nabatije na Sitefana n'abo mu rugo rwe
1Corinthians1:17 Erega Kristo ntiyantumye kubatiza ahubwo yantumye gutangaza Ubutumwa bwiza
1Corinthians1:18 Ubutumwa bwerekeye umusaraba wa Kristo ku bazimiye ni ubupfu
1Corinthians1:19 kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nzamaraho ubwenge bw'abanyabwenge
1Corinthians1:20 Mbese umunyabwenge bimumariye iki? Ese umwigishamategeko bimumariye iki? Mbese intyoza mu mpaka z'iki gihe yo biyimariye iki? Mbese aho ubwenge bw'iyi si Imana ntiyabuhinduye ubupfu?
1Corinthians1:21 Imana mu bwenge bwayo ntiyakunze ko abantu bayimenya bayobowe n'ubwenge bwabo bwite. Ahubwo yishimiye gukoresha ubupfu bw'ubutumwa tuvuga kugira ngo ikize abemera Kristo.

1Corinthians1:25 kuko ubupfu bw'Imana burusha abantu ubwenge

1Corinthians1:29 ari ukugira ngo hatagira umuntu n'umwe wishyira hejuru imbere y'Imana.

1Corinthians6:1 Muri mwe hagize ugira icyo apfa na mugenzi we wemera Kristo
1Corinthians6:2 Mbese ntimuzi yuko intore z'Imana zizacira ab'isi urubanza? Ese niba ari mwe muzacira ab'isi urubanza
1Corinthians6:3 Ntimuzi se ko n'abamarayika tuzabacira imanza
1Corinthians6:4 Igihe mufite imanza nk'izo
1Corinthians6:5 Mbivugiye kubakoza isoni. Ese ni ukuvuga yuko nta munyabwenge n'umwe uri muri mwe wabasha kunga abavandimwe?
1Corinthians6:6 Ese atanabaho birakwiriye koko ko umuntu aburanya umuvandimwe we
1Corinthians6:7 Erega izo manza mufitanye zirerekana ko ibyaha byabatsinze rwose! Kuki ahubwo mutakwemera kurenganywa? Kuki mutakwemera guhuguzwa ibyanyu?
1Corinthians6:8 Ibiri amambu ni mwe murenganya
1Corinthians6:9 Mbese ntimuzi yuko abarenganya abandi batazabona umunani mu bwami bw'Imana? Ntimukibeshye. Inkozi z'ibibi n'abasenga ibigirwamana
1Corinthians6:10 abajura n'abanyamururumba n'abasinzi n'abatukana n'ibisambo
1Corinthians6:11 Bamwe muri mwe ni ko mwari mumeze ariko ubu mwamaze kuhagirwa

1Corinthians6:13 “Ibyokurya bigenewe inda
1Corinthians6:14 Imana yazuye Nyagasani Yezu

1Corinthians6:16 Cyangwa se ntimuzi yuko umuntu wifatanya n'indaya
1Corinthians6:17 Nyamara uwifatanya na Nyagasani aba abaye umwe na we mu by'ubugingo.
1Corinthians6:18 Mugendere kure ubusambanyi. Ibindi byaha byose umuntu akora biba bidakorewe mu mubiri

1Corinthians7:1 Ku byerekeye ibyo mwambajije mu rwandiko rwanyu
1Corinthians7:2 Ariko kubera ko ubusambanyi bwabaye gikwira
1Corinthians7:3 Umugabo ntakwiriye kwiyima umugore we
1Corinthians7:4 Umugore ntiyigenga ku mubiri we
1Corinthians7:5 Ntihakagire uwiyima undi
1Corinthians7:6 Ibyo mbabwiye ndabibemereye gusa si itegeko ntanze.
1Corinthians7:7 Nakwifuza yuko abantu bose bamera nkanjye
1Corinthians7:8 Abatarashaka bo muri mwe kimwe n'abapfakazi
1Corinthians7:9 Ariko abadashoboye kwifata nibashyingiranwe
1Corinthians7:10 Dore itegeko ku bashyingiranywe
1Corinthians7:11 Icyakora aramutse atandukanye na we ntagashake undi mugabo
1Corinthians7:12 Ku bandi dore icyo mvuga ku giti cyanjye
1Corinthians7:13 Bityo kandi n'umugore wo muri mwe aramutse afitwe n'umugabo utemera Kristo
1Corinthians7:14 Erega umugabo utemera Kristo aba yeguriwe Imana bitewe n'umugore we
1Corinthians7:15 Nyamara kandi utemera Kristo ashatse gutandukana n'uwo bashakanye nagende. Bibaye bityo uwo muvandimwe aba atakigengwa n'amategeko
1Corinthians7:16 Mbese wa mugore we
1Corinthians7:17 N'ubundi umuntu akomeze kuba nk'uko Imana yamugeneye
1Corinthians7:18 Niba umuntu yarahamagawe n'Imana yaramaze gukebwa ntakīgire nk'aho atakebwe
1Corinthians7:19 Ari ugukebwa
1Corinthians7:20 Umuntu wese nagume uko yari ari igihe Imana yamuhamagaraga.
1Corinthians7:21 Mbese wowe igihe Imana yaguhamagaraga wari inkoreragahato? Ibyo nta cyo bigutwaye
1Corinthians7:22 Uwahamagawe na Nyagasani ari inkoreragahato aba avanywe mu buja na Nyagasani. Bityo rero n'uwahamagawe yigenga
1Corinthians7:23 Imana yarabacunguye ibatangaho ikiguzi
1Corinthians7:24 Nuko rero bavandimwe
1Corinthians7:25 Ku byerekeye ingaragu
1Corinthians7:26 Kubera ingorane zo muri iki gihe
1Corinthians7:27 Niba usanzwe ufite umugore ntugashake gutandukana na we. Niba uri ingaragu ntugashake kurongora.
1Corinthians7:28 Icyakora nubwo warongora ntiwaba ukoze icyaha
1Corinthians7:29 Bavandimwe
1Corinthians7:30 Abarira nibamere nk'abatarira
1Corinthians7:31 n'abatunze iby'iyi si ntibagatwarwe na byo
1Corinthians7:32 Icyo mbifuriza ni uko mudahagarika umutima. Ingaragu iharanira ibya Nyagasani
1Corinthians7:33 Naho umuntu warongoye aharanira iby'isi kugira ngo abone uko ashimisha umugore we.
1Corinthians7:34 Bene uwo aba afite imitima ibiri. Umugore udafite umugabo cyangwa umukobwa w'inkumi
1Corinthians7:35 Ibyo mbivugiye kubafasha si ukubahata. Ndagira ngo mwifate uko bikwiye
1Corinthians7:36 Igihe umusore yasabye umukobwa
1Corinthians7:37 Ariko niba uwo musore ntawe umuhase
1Corinthians7:38 Nuko rero urongoye umukobwa yasabye aba akoze neza
1Corinthians7:39 Umugore aba ahambiriwe ku mugabo we igihe cyose uwo mugabo akiriho. Ariko aramutse apfuye uwo mugore aba afite uburenganzira bwo gushyingirwa uwo ashaka wese
1Corinthians7:40 Ariko uko jyewe mbibona
1Corinthians8:1 Ibyerekeye inyama zaterekerejwe ibigirwamana
1Corinthians8:2 Uwibwira ko hari icyo ajijutseho
1Corinthians8:3 Nyamara umuntu ukunda Imana amenywa na yo.
1Corinthians8:4 None se biremewe kurya inyama zaterekerejwe ibigirwamana? Tuzi yuko ku isi ibigirwamana byose ari ubusa
1Corinthians8:5 Nubwo hariho ibyo bita imana ku isi cyangwa mu ijuru – kandi koko hariho ibyitwa “imana” byinshi n'ibyitwa “abatware” byinshi -

1Corinthians9:1 Mbese simfite uburenganzira bwo kwishyira nkizana? Ese sindi Intumwa ya Kristo? Mbese siniboneye Yezu Umwami wacu? Ese mwebwe ntimuri ikimenyetso kigaragaza umurimo Nyagasani yampaye gukora?
1Corinthians9:2 Nubwo ku bw'abandi ntaba Intumwa ye
1Corinthians9:3 Dore uko niregura ku bangenza.
1Corinthians9:4 Mbese simfite uburenganzira bwo gutungwa n'umurimo nkora?
1Corinthians9:5 Ese simfite uburenganzira bwo kugendana n'umugore wemera Kristo twashakanye
1Corinthians9:6 Cyangwa se ni jye na Barinaba twenyine tugomba gukorera ibidutunga?
1Corinthians9:7 Ni nde waba umusirikari akitunga? Ni nde watera ibiti by'imizabibu ntarye imbuto zabyo? Ni nde waragira ubushyo bw'inka ntanywe amata?
1Corinthians9:8 Mwe kugira ngo ibyo ndabivuga nshingiye ku bintu bisanzwe mu bantu gusa. Erega n'Amategeko ya Musa ni ko abivuga!
1Corinthians9:9 Muri ayo Mategeko handitswe ngo “Ntimugahambire umunwa w'ikimasa igihe gihonyōra ingano.” Mbese ni ukuvuga ko Imana yita ku bimasa gusa?
1Corinthians9:10 Mbese aho si twebwe cyane cyane yabivugiye? Ni koko byanditswe ku bwacu

1Corinthians9:12 Niba abandi bafite uburenganzira bwo kugira icyo bababonaho
1Corinthians9:13 Mbese ntimuzi yuko abakora mu Ngoro y'Imana iyo Ngoro ari yo ibatunga
1Corinthians9:14 Ni na ko Nyagasani yategetse ngo abamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza batungwe na bwo.
1Corinthians9:15 Nyamara jyewe sinagize icyo nitwaza na kimwe muri ibyo ngibyo
1Corinthians9:16 Kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza ntibyambera impamvu yo kwirata kuko ngomba kubikora byanze bikunze
1Corinthians9:17 Iyo mba nkora uyu murimo ari jye wawihitiyemo
1Corinthians9:18 None se igihembo cyanjye ni ikihe? Ni ukwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza ku buntu
1Corinthians9:19 Nubwo nishyira nkizana
1Corinthians9:20 Iyo ndi mu Bayahudi
1Corinthians9:21 Iyo ndi mu batazi Amategeko

1Corinthians9:24 Mbese ntimuzi yuko mu mikino

1Corinthians9:26 Ni yo mpamvu nanjye niruka ntameze nk'utazi iyo agana
1Corinthians9:27 Ahubwo mbabaza umubiri wanjye nkawukoresha agahato

1Corinthians15:22 Nk'uko abo mu rubyaro rwa Adamu bose bapfa
1Corinthians15:23 Buri wese azabigeraho mu rwego rwe. Habanje umuganura wo kuzuka ari we Kristo
1Corinthians15:24 Nyuma hazaza imperuka
1Corinthians15:25 Kristo agomba kwima ingoma
1Corinthians15:26 Umwanzi uzaheruka gutsembwa ni urupfu.
1Corinthians15:27 Koko kandi Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Imana yamuhaye kugenga ibintu byose.” Icyakora igihe bivugwa ko Imana yamuhaye kugenga byose
1Corinthians15:28 Noneho ubwo Umwana w'Imana azaba amaze kwegurirwa byose
1Corinthians15:29 Bitabaye bityo twibaze kuri ba bandi babatirizwa abamaze gupfa. Niba koko abapfuye batazazuka
1Corinthians15:30 Natwe kandi ni iki gituma duhara amagara yacu buri gihe?
1Corinthians15:31 Buri munsi mpora mpanganye n'urupfu – bavandimwe
1Corinthians15:32 Biba byaramariye iki kurwana n'inyamaswa muri Efezi
1Corinthians15:33 Ntihakagire ubayobya: “Kubana n'ababi byonona ingeso nziza” (nk'uko umwe yavuze).
1Corinthians15:34 Mwisubireho mwifate uko bikwiye
1Corinthians15:35 Ahari hari uwabaza ati: “Abapfuye bazurwa bate? Bazazukana imibiri iteye ite?”
1Corinthians15:36 Mbega ubupfu! Icyo utera nticyamera kitabanje gupfa.
1Corinthians15:37 Kandi rero urwo utera ntirusa n'icyo ruzera hanyuma
1Corinthians15:38 Ariko buri rubuto iyo rumaze guterwa
1Corinthians15:39 No ku bifite umubiri n'amaraso ni ko biri: icyitwa umubiri cyose si kimwe. Umuntu agira umubiri usa ukwawo
1Corinthians15:40 Hari ibyaremwe byo mu ijuru n'ibindi byo ku isi. Ubwiza bw'ibyo mu ijuru buteye ukwabwo
1Corinthians15:41 Izuba rifite ukurabagirana kwaryo
1Corinthians15:42 Ni na ko bimera mu kuzuka kw'abapfuye. Umubiri ushyirwa mu butaka ni umurambo wo kubora
1Corinthians15:43 Ushyirwa mu butaka usuzuguritse ariko uzazukana ikuzo
1Corinthians15:44 ushyirwa mu butaka ari umubiri upfa ariko uzazuka ari umubiri utangwa na Mwuka. Ubwo habaho imibiri ipfa
1Corinthians15:45 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Umuntu wa mbere Adamu aba muzima”
1Corinthians15:46 Ufite umubiri utangwa na Mwuka si we wabanje
1Corinthians15:47 Adamu wa mbere yaremwe mu gitaka agizwe n'igitaka
1Corinthians15:48 Abafite imibiri ivanywe mu gitaka bateye nka wa mukurambere wabo wavanywe mu gitaka
1Corinthians15:49 Noneho rero nk'uko twagiranye isano na wa muntu w'igitaka
1Corinthians15:50 Nuko bavandimwe
1Corinthians15:51 Reka mbabwire ibanga: ntituzapfa twese. Ariko ubwo impanda y'imperuka izavuga tuzahinduka twese
1Corinthians15:52 
1Corinthians15:53 Ni ngombwa ko twebwe abafite imibiri ibora twambikwa itazabora
1Corinthians15:54 Ndetse twebwe ab'imibiri ipfa ikabora
1Corinthians15:55 “Wa rupfu we
1Corinthians15:56 Koko kandi ibyaha ni byo rubori rw'urupfu
1Corinthians15:57 Ariko Imana ishimirwe ko iduha gutsinda kubera Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo.
1Corinthians15:58 Bityo rero bavandimwe nkunda
1Corinthians16:1 Ibyerekeye imfashanyo zo kunganira intore z'Imana
1Corinthians16:2 Ku munsi wa mbere ari ho ku cyumweru
1Corinthians16:3 Ningera iwanyu rero nzaha abantu mwatoranyije inzandiko zo kubasohoza
1Corinthians16:4 Nibiba ngombwa ko nanjye ngenda tuzajyana.
1Corinthians16:5 Nzaza iwanyu nyuze muri Masedoniya
1Corinthians16:6 Birashoboka ko natinda iwanyu wenda nkaba naharangiriza amezi y'imbeho
1Corinthians16:7 Sinifuza kubonana namwe huti huti ngo nkomeze urugendo. Nizeye kuzamara iwanyu iminsi
1Corinthians16:8 Nzaguma ino muri Efezi kugeza mu gihe cya Pentekote.
1Corinthians16:9 Hano nugururiwe amarembo kugira ngo mpakore umurimo munini w'ingirakamaro
1Corinthians16:10 Timoteyo naza muzamwakire ku buryo atagira icyo yishisha ari iwanyu
1Corinthians16:11 Nuko rero ntihazagire umusuzugura
1Corinthians16:12 Ibyerekeye umuvandimwe Apolo
1Corinthians16:13 Mube maso mwishingikirije ku uwo twemera
1Corinthians16:14 Icyo mukora cyose mugikorane urukundo.
1Corinthians16:15 Ikindi bavandimwe
1Corinthians16:16 
1Corinthians16:17 Byaranshimishije kubona Sitefana na Foritunato na Akayiku baje
1Corinthians16:18 Ari jye ari namwe baturemye agatima. Mujye mushima abameze batyo.
1Corinthians16:19 Abo mu matorero ya Kristo yo muri Aziya barabaramutsa. Akwila na Purisila hamwe n'itorero rikoranira mu rugo rwabo
1Corinthians16:20 Abavandimwe bose barabaramutsa. Namwe muramukanye muhoberana ku buryo butagira amakemwa.
1Corinthians16:21 Jyewe Pawulo ndabatashya. Ibi ni jye ubyiyandikiye n'ukwanjye kuboko.
1Corinthians16:22 Nihagira udakunda Nyagasani avumwe! “Marana ta”
1Corinthians16:23 Nyagasani Yezu nagumye kubagirira ubuntu.
1Corinthians16:24 Ni jye ubakunda mwese ku bwa Kristo Yezu.

2Corinthians1:20 “Yego” ya Kristo ni yo cyemezo cy'amasezerano y'Imana uko angana

2Corinthians1:23 Imana ni yo ntanzeho umugabo – niba mbeshya ibimpōre. Icyatumye ntongera kuza i Korinti kwari ukugira ngo ntabaremerera.
2Corinthians1:24 Erega si twe tubagenga ku byerekeye ibyo kuyoboka Kristo – musanzwe mukomeye kuri we! Ahubwo dukorana namwe kugira ngo mugire ibyishimo.

2Corinthians9:15 Imana ishimwe kubera impano itagereranywa yatugabiye.
2Corinthians10:1 Jyewe Pawulo ndabinginga nkoresheje ubugwaneza no kugira neza bya Kristo. Bavuga ko iyo turi kumwe mba nk'intama
2Corinthians10:2 Ndabasaba nkomeje rero kugira ngo ninza iwanyu mutazantera gukara. Koko kandi sinzabura gukara
2Corinthians10:3 Nubwo turi abantu ntabwo turwana kimwe n'abantu b'isi.
2Corinthians10:4 Intwaro turwanisha ntizacuzwe n'abantu ahubwo ni intwaro zikomeye twahawe n'Imana
2Corinthians10:5 zikanahirika inkuta ndende zose zashyiriweho gutambamira abantu ngo batamenya Imana. Bityo imigambi yose yo kugomera Kristo tukayinesha
2Corinthians10:6 Nuko rero ubwo muzaba mwumviye byimazeyo
2Corinthians10:7 Mwebwe mufata ibintu mushingiye ku byo mureba gusa. Umuntu wese wiyumvamo ko ari uwa Kristo niyongere yibaze
2Corinthians10:8 Nyagasani yaduhaye ubushobozi bwo kubaka ubugingo bwanyu atari ubwo kubusenya. Ubanza ahari narakabije kwiratana ubwo bushobozi nyamara nta pfunwe binteye.
2Corinthians10:9 Sinshaka ko mutekereza ko inzandiko mbandikira ari izo kubatera ubwoba.
2Corinthians10:10 Nyamara hariho abavuga bati: “Inzandiko za Pawulo ni iz'igitsure
2Corinthians10:11 Uvuga atyo wese ndagira ngo amenye neza ko ibyo tuvuze mu nzandiko tutari kumwe
2Corinthians10:12 Koko rero ntitwahangara kwireshyeshya cyangwa ngo twigereranye n'abo bantu biyogeza. Ni abapfu rwose kuko bishyiriraho igipimo bakacyigeraho
2Corinthians10:13 Naho twebwe ntitwirata ngo turenze urugero. Ahubwo tugarukira ku rugero ari zo mbibi Imana yadushingiye
2Corinthians10:14 Ubwo ari twe twabanje kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo
2Corinthians10:15 Ntiturenga izo mbibi ngo twiratane umurimo wakozwe n'abandi. Ahubwo twiringiye ko muzakomeza gutera imbere mu kwizera Kristo
2Corinthians10:16 Nyuma ni bwo tuzageza Ubutumwa bwiza no mu bihugu biri hirya y'icyanyu. Na bwo ntituziratana umurimo tuzasanga warakozwe n'abandi aho Imana yabakebeye.
2Corinthians10:17 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Ushaka kwirata yirate Nyagasani.”
2Corinthians10:18 Uwiyogeza si we ushimwa
2Corinthians11:1 Yewe
2Corinthians11:2 Erega mbafuhira nk'uko Imana ibafuhira. Nabatanze mumeze nk'umugeni wirinze
2Corinthians11:3 Ariko nk'uko Eva yashutswe n'amayeri ya ya nzoka
2Corinthians11:4 Dore nawe iyo hadutse umuntu akamamaza muri mwe Yezu wundi utari uwo twamamaje
2Corinthians11:5 Ndibwira ko bene izo “ntumwa” z'akataraboneka nta cyo jye zindusha.
2Corinthians11:6 Nubwo wenda mu magambo ntari intyoza
2Corinthians11:7 Nabagejejeho Ubutumwa bwiza nta gihembo mbaka
2Corinthians11:8 Natungwaga n'amatorero ya Kristo y'ahandi – kwari nko kuyasahura kugira ngo mwebwe mbone uko mbakorera.
2Corinthians11:9 Iyo nagiraga icyo nkenera igihe nari iwanyu
2Corinthians11:10 Nshingiye ku kuri kwa Kristo kundimo
2Corinthians11:11 Ese ibyo mbivugiye iki? Mbese ni uko ntabakunda? Imana ni yo izi uko mbakunda.
2Corinthians11:12 Nzakomeza kugenza uko nsanzwe ngenza
2Corinthians11:13 Bene abo ni ingirwantumwa zikora ibinyuranye n'ibyo zivuga
2Corinthians11:14 Ibyo kandi si igitangaza
2Corinthians11:15 Ntabwo ibyo rero ari ibikomeye kubona n'abakozi be bihindura nk'abagaragu b'Imana nyir'ubutungane. Iherezo baziturwa ibihwanye n'ibyo bakora.
2Corinthians11:16 Ndabisubiramo: ntihagire umuntu unyita umusazi. Ariko rero mushatse kubikora
2Corinthians11:17 Ibyo ngiye kuvuga simbikuye kuri Nyagasani
2Corinthians11:18 Benshi birata nk'ab'isi
2Corinthians11:19 Mwebwe muzi ubwenge
2Corinthians11:20 Dore namwe mwihanganira umuntu ubashyira mu buja cyangwa akabarya imitsi
2Corinthians11:21 Twe twabaye ibigwari ntitwabagirira dutyo – yewe
2Corinthians11:22 Mbese za ngirwantumwa ni Abaheburayi? Nanjye ndi we. Ese ni Abisiraheli? Nanjye ndi we. Ese ni urubyaro rwa Aburahamu? Nanjye ni uko.
2Corinthians11:23 Ese ni abagaragu ba Kristo? Noneho reka mvuge nk'uwataye umutwe! Jyewe ndi we kubarusha. Uti kuki? Nabarushije gukora nshishikaye cyane
2Corinthians11:24 Ibihe bitanu Abayahudi bankubise ibiboko mirongo itatu n'icyenda.
2Corinthians11:25 Ibindi bihe bitatu nakubiswe inkoni n'abasirikari b'Abanyaroma. Igihe kimwe natewe amabuye bashaka kuyanyicisha. Ibihe bitatu ubwato nagenderagamo bwaramenetse ndarohama. Hari n'ubwo naraye mu nyanja rwagati bukeye nirirwamo.
2Corinthians11:26 Mu ngendo nyinshi najyagamo nagiye ngira akaga gatewe n'inzuzi zuzuye
2Corinthians11:27 Narakoze cyane niyuha akuya. Kenshi nagize ibimbuza kugoheka. Nagize inzara n'inyota ndetse akenshi mbura n'icyo ndya. Nagiye mbura ibyo nambara maze imbeho ikantunda.
2Corinthians11:28 Uretse ibyo n'ibindi ntavuze
2Corinthians11:29 Iyo hagize ucika intege bituma nanjye ncika intege. Iyo hagize uteshuka agakora icyaha biranshegesha.
2Corinthians11:30 Niba ari ngombwa ko nirata reka nirate intege nke zanjye.
2Corinthians11:31 Imana Se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo yogahora isingizwa iteka
2Corinthians11:32 Ubwo nari i Damasi umutegetsi washinzwe umujyi n'Umwami Areta
2Corinthians11:33 Nuko Abakristo baho banshyira mu gitebo bancisha mu idirishya ryo mu rukuta rw'umujyi
2Corinthians12:1 Ni ngombwa ko nirata nubwo ari nta cyo bimaze. Noneho reka mvuge ibyerekeye ibyo neretswe n'ibyo nahishuriwe na Nyagasani.
2Corinthians12:2 Hari umuntu wa Kristo nzi wazamuwe
2Corinthians12:3 Nzi ko uwo muntu yazamuwe akagezwa muri paradiso. Na none sinzi neza ko yari ahari koko cyangwa niba kwari ukuherekwa gusa
2Corinthians12:4 
2Corinthians12:5 Umuntu nk'uwo ni we nakwiratana koko
2Corinthians12:6 Nyamara nshatse kugira icyo niratana sinaba mbaye umusazi
2Corinthians12:7 Koko kandi kugira ngo ntavaho nirata mbitewe n'uko nahishuriwe ibitangaje gutyo
2Corinthians12:8 Ibihe bitatu nasabye Nyagasani kunkiza icyo cyago
2Corinthians12:9 maze na we akansubiza ati: “Ubuntu ngira buraguhagije
2Corinthians12:10 Ni cyo gituma nishimira kugira intege nke n'ubukene
2Corinthians12:11 Yemwe
2Corinthians12:12 Ibimenyetso biranga Intumwa ya Kristo Imana yampaye kubitanga muri mwe nta gucogora na busa ni byo ibi: kwerekana ibimenyetso no gukora ibitangaza n'ibindi bikorwa by'ububasha.
2Corinthians12:13 Mbese ni iki nakoreye andi matorero ya Kristo
2Corinthians12:14 Ubu niteguye kuzaza iwanyu ubwa gatatu kandi nta bwo nzabarushya ngira icyo mbasaba. Si ibyanyu nshaka ahubwo ni mwebwe ubwanyu. Erega abana si bo bakwiye kuzigama ibyo gukenura ababyeyi babo
2Corinthians12:15 Jyewe rero nashimishwa no gutanga ibyo mfite byose ku bwanyu
2Corinthians12:16 Noneho mwambwira muti: “Koko ntiwaturuhije nyamara wabaye inyaryenge
2Corinthians12:17 None se hari inyungu nabashatsemo maze nkayituma umwe mu bo naboherereje?
2Corinthians12:18 Nasabye Tito kuza iwanyu mutumana na wa muvandimwe. Mbese Tito hari inyungu yabashatsemo? Ese ntimwabonye ko twembi twifata kimwe tukanyura inzira imwe?
2Corinthians12:19 Mbese mwibwiye ko tumaze igihe kingana gitya tubireguraho? Si ko biri ahubwo imbere y'Imana tuvuga ibyo Kristo ashaka. Ncuti dukunda
2Corinthians12:20 Ndatinya ko ninza iwanyu nzasanga mutameze nk'uko nshaka
2Corinthians12:21 Ndatinya ko ningaruka iwanyu Imana yanjye izankoza isoni imbere yanyu. Koko kandi nzagomba kuririra benshi muri ba bandi bacumuye mbere
2Corinthians13:1 Ubu ni ubwa gatatu ngiye kuzaza iwanyu kubasura. Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Ikirego cyose ntigishobora kwemerwa keretse gihamijwe n'abagabo babiri cyangwa barenzeho.”
2Corinthians13:2 Ubwo nazaga kubasura ubwa kabiri narababuriye
2Corinthians13:3 Ibyo bizababera icyemezo mushaka ko ari Kristo umvugisha. Ku bibareba Kristo si umunyantegenke
2Corinthians13:4 Koko rero yabambwe ku musaraba afite intege nke
2Corinthians13:5 Nimwigerageze ubwanyu
2Corinthians13:6 Ndiringira ko muzamenya ko twebweho tutatsinzwe n'isuzumwa.
2Corinthians13:7 Tujya dusaba Imana kugira ngo mwe kugira ikibi mukora. Ntitubasabira dutyo kugira ngo twe tuboneke ko twatsinze
2Corinthians13:8 Nta cyo tubasha gukora cyabangamira ukuri kw'Imana
2Corinthians13:9 Koko rero twishimira ibihe tugiramo intege nke mwe mugakomera. Ni yo mpamvu duhora tubasabira kugira ngo mube indakemwa.
2Corinthians13:10 Dore ikinteye kubandikira ibyo byose kandi tutari kumwe
2Corinthians13:11 Ahasigaye bavandimwe
2Corinthians13:12 Muramukanye muhoberana ku buryo buzira amakemwa. Intore z'Imana z'ino zose zirabatashya.
2Corinthians13:13 Ubuntu Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo abagirira
Galatians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo utagizwe Intumwa n'abantu cyangwa ngo bicishwe ku muntu runaka
Galatians1:2 mfatanyije n'abavandimwe bose turi kumwe
Galatians1:3 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu
Galatians1:4 Kristo yaradupfiriye kugira ngo adukize ibyaha byacu
Galatians1:5 Imana nihabwe ikuzo iteka ryose. Amina.
Galatians1:6 Ntangajwe n'ukuntu mwihutiye kureka Imana yabahamagaye ibitewe n'ubuntu mwagiriwe na Kristo
Galatians1:7 Mu by'ukuri nta bundi butumwa bwiza bubaho
Galatians1:8 Ariko hagize undi ubagezaho ubutumwa buciye ukubiri n'ubwo twabagejejeho
Galatians1:9 Nk'uko twari twarabivuze na none nongeye kubisubiramo
Galatians1:10 Mbese ubu naba nshaka gushimwa n'abantu cyangwa gushimwa n'Imana? Ese ubu mparanira kunezeza abantu? Oya. Iyo mba nkigamije kunezeza abantu sinajyaga kuba umugaragu wa Kristo.
Galatians1:11 Bavandimwe
Galatians1:12 Nta muntu n'umwe wigeze abungezaho
Galatians1:13 Mwumvise amatwara nari mfite kera nkiri mu idini ya kiyahudi. Muzi ko natotezaga Umuryango w'Imana bikabije
Galatians1:14 Nateraga imbere mu by'idini ya kiyahudi kurusha benshi bo muri bene wacu b'Abayahudi b'urungano
Galatians1:15 Nyamara Imana yo yantoranyije ntaravuka ikampamagara ibitewe n'ubuntu bwayo
Galatians1:16 kumpishurira Umwana wayo kugira ngo mwamamaze mu batari Abayahudi. Ni ko guhaguruka nta we niriwe ngisha inama
Galatians1:17 habe no kujya i Yeruzalemu ngo mbaze abantanze kuba Intumwa ya Kristo
Galatians1:18 Hashize imyaka itatu mbona kujya i Yeruzalemu gusura Petero
Galatians1:19 Nta yindi Ntumwa ya Kristo nigeze kubona
Galatians1:20 Ibyo mbandikiye ni ukuri
Galatians1:21 Hanyuma nagiye mu ntara ya Siriya n'iya Silisiya.
Galatians1:22 Icyo gihe abo mu matorero ya Kristo yo muri Yudeya bari bataranca iryera.
Galatians1:23 Bari barumvise gusa inkuru ngo: “Wa wundi wadutotezaga asigaye yamamaza ubutumwa bwemeza abantu Kristo
Galatians1:24 Nuko ibyambayeho bibatera gusingiza Imana.
Galatians2:1 Nyuma y'imyaka cumi n'ine nsubira i Yeruzalemu hamwe na Barinaba
Galatians2:2 Icyanteye kujyayo ni uko Imana yari yabimpishuriye. Nuko nihererana n'abitwaga abayobozi baho
Galatians2:3 Yewe na Tito wamperekeje utari Umuyahudi
Galatians2:4 Icyakora aba yarakebwe bitewe na bamwe biyita abavandimwe
Galatians2:5 Nta bwo twigeze tubabererekera na gato
Galatians2:6 Ku byerekeye ba bandi bitwa abayobozi – icyo bari cyo nta cyo bindebaho
Galatians2:7 Ahubwo na bo babonye ko Imana yanshinze umurimo wo kugeza Ubutumwa bwiza ku batari Abayahudi
Galatians2:8 Koko Imana yampaye ububasha bwo kuba Intumwa yayo ku batari Abayahudi
Galatians2:9 Yakobo na Petero na Yohani bitwa inkingi z'Umuryango w'Imana
Galatians2:10 Icyo badusabye gusa ni ukwibuka abakene kandi nanjye ibyo nashishikariye kubikora.
Galatians2:11 Icyakora ubwo Petero yazaga Antiyokiya namurwanyije ku mugaragaro
Galatians2:12 Mbere y'uko abantu baturutse kwa Yakobo bahagera
Galatians2:13 N'abandi Bayahudi batangira kugenza nka we
Galatians2:14 Nuko mbonye ko badakurikiza ukuri k'Ubutumwa bwiza
Galatians2:15 Twebwe turi Abayahudi kavukire
Galatians2:16 Nyamara tuzi ko umuntu atagirwa intungane no gukora ibyategetswe n'Amategeko
Galatians2:17 Ariko rero niba dushaka kugirwa intungane tubikesha Kristo
Galatians2:18 Nanjye nsubiye kugengwa n'Amategeko
Galatians2:19 Ku byerekeye kugengwa n'Amategeko
Galatians2:20 Nabambanywe na Kristo ku musaraba ku buryo atari jye ukiriho
Galatians2:21 Sinirengagiza ubuntu bw'Imana
Galatians3:1 Yemwe mwa Banyagalati b'abapfu mwe
Galatians3:2 Ndifuza ko munsubiza iki kibazo cyonyine: mbese mwahawe Mwuka w'Imana kubera ko mwakoze ibyategetswe n'Amategeko
Galatians3:3 Bishoboka bite ko muba abapfu bigeze aho? Ibyo mwatangiye mubishobojwe na Mwuka w'Imana
Galatians3:4 Noneho ga bya bindi byose mwanyuzemo byabaye impfabusa? Ese birashoboka?
Galatians3:5 Mbese Imana ibaha Mwuka wayo igakora ibitangaza muri mwe
Galatians3:6 Ibyanditswe bivuga ko “Aburahamu yizeye Imana bituma abarwa nk'intungane.”
Galatians3:7 Bityo rero mumenye ko abizera Imana ari bo rubyaro nyakuri rwa Aburahamu.
Galatians3:8 Ibyanditswe byateganyije kandi ko n'abatari Abayahudi Imana izabagira intungane
Galatians3:9 Nuko rero abizera Imana bose baherwa umugisha hamwe na Aburahamu wayizeraga.
Galatians3:10 Nyamara abishingikiriza ku kumvira Amategeko baba biteje umuvumo
Galatians3:11 Biragaragara rwose ko nta muntu watunganira Imana abitewe no kumvira Amategeko
Galatians3:12 Naho Amategeko yo ntaho ahuriye no kwizera Imana. Ahubwo nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga
Galatians3:13 Kristo yadukijije umuvumo uterwa n'Amategeko igihe yahindukaga ikivume ku bwacu
Galatians3:14 Ibyo kwari ukugira ngo abatari Abayahudi baherwe muri Kristo umugisha Imana yasezeranyije Aburahamu
Galatians3:15 Bavandimwe
Galatians3:16 Ngibyo rero. Aburahamu ni we Imana yahaye amasezerano we n'urubyaro rwe. Ibyanditswe ntibivuga “abazamukomokaho”
Galatians3:17 Icyo nshaka kuvuga ni iki: Imana yagiranye Isezerano na Aburahamu irarikomeza
Galatians3:18 Niba rero ari ukumvira Amategeko bihesha abantu umunani w'Imana
Galatians3:19 None se kuki Amategeko yatanzwe? Yongeweho nyuma kugira ngo ibicumuro by'abantu bigaragare
Galatians3:20 Icyakora nta muhuza wakenerwa iyo atari uguhuza abantu babiri
Galatians3:21 Noneho se Amategeko acisha ukubiri n'amasezerano y'Imana? Ntibikabeho! Koko iyo haza kubaho Amategeko ahesha umuntu ubugingo
Galatians3:22 Ariko Ibyanditswe bivuga ko ibiriho byose bizitiwe n'ibyaha
Galatians3:23 Mbere y'uko igihe cyo kwemera Kristo kigera
Galatians3:24 Bityo Amategeko yashyiriweho kuturera kugeza igihe Kristo aziye
Galatians3:25 Ariko ubu igihe cyo kwemera Kristo kirasohoye
Galatians3:26 Koko mwese muri abana b'Imana mubiheshejwe no kwemera Kristo
Galatians3:27 kuko mwese mwabatirijwe kuba muri Kristo
Galatians3:28 Nuko rero nta tandukaniro riba riri hagati y'Umuyahudi n'utari Umuyahudi
Galatians3:29 Ubwo rero muri aba Kristo

Galatians4:3 Natwe igihe twari nk'abana
Galatians4:4 Ariko igihe cyagenwe kigeze Imana yohereje Umwana wayo
Galatians4:5 kugira ngo acungure abari bakigengwa n'Amategeko

Galatians4:8 Kera mutaramenya Imana
Galatians4:9 None ubwo mumaze kumenya Imana ndetse ikirutaho na yo ikaba ibazi
Galatians4:10 Musigaye muziririza iminsi runaka kimwe n'amezi n'ibihe n'imyaka!
Galatians4:11 Mfite impungenge ku bwanyu ko ahari ibyo nabakoreye byose naba naravunikiye ubusa.
Galatians4:12 Bavandimwe
Galatians4:13 Muzi ko icyatumye bwa mbere mbona uburyo bwo kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwiza ari uko nari ndwaye.
Galatians4:14 Iyo ndwara yanjye yababereye ikigeragezo
Galatians4:15 None se bwa bwuzu mwari mufite bwagiye he? Koko ndahamya ko iyo biba ibishoboka
Galatians4:16 Mbese ubu mpindutse umwanzi wanyu kuko mbabwiza ukuri?
Galatians4:17 Ba bantu babafitiye ishyaka ariko si ishyaka ryiza
Galatians4:18 Si bibi kugira ishyaka iyo ari ishyaka ryo gukora ibyiza
Galatians4:19 Bana banjye
Galatians4:20 Iyaba nari nshoboye kuba hamwe namwe ubu
Galatians4:21 Yemwe abashaka kugengwa n'Amategeko
Galatians4:22 Ibyanditswe bivuga ko Aburahamu yari afite abahungu babiri
Galatians4:23 Uw'umugore w'umuja yavutse ku buryo busanzwe
Galatians4:24 Ibyo ni ikigereranyo. Abo bagore bombi bagereranywa n'Amasezerano abiri Imana yagiranye n'abantu bayo. Rimwe muri yo ryatangiwe ku musozi wa Sinayi ribyara abana b'ubuja
Galatians4:25 Hagari we ashushanya wa musozi wa Sinayi wo muri Arabiya
Galatians4:26 Naho aba Yeruzalemu yo mu ijuru barishyira bakizana
Galatians4:27 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga biti: “Ishime mugore w'ingumba
Galatians4:28 Bavandimwe
Galatians4:29 Nk'uko byabaye icyo gihe
Galatians4:30 Ariko se Ibyanditswe bibivugaho iki? Biravuga biti: “Irukana uriya muja n'umuhungu we! Umuhungu w'umuja ntagomba kugabana umunani n'uw'umugore utigeze aba umuja.”
Galatians4:31 Nuko rero bavandimwe
Galatians5:1 Ni na ko Kristo yadukuye mu buja kugira ngo twishyire twizane. Nuko rero muhagarare kigabo
Galatians5:2 Nimunyumve. Jyewe Pawulo ndabivuga nkomeje
Galatians5:3 Na none kandi ndabamenyesha ko umuntu wese wiyemeza gukebwa
Galatians5:4 Mwebwe rero abashaka kugirwa intungane imbere y'Imana mwitwaje kumvira Amategeko
Galatians5:5 Kugirwa intungane imbere y'Imana bidutera gutegereza ibyo twiringiye kuzabona
Galatians5:6 Iyo umuntu ari muri Kristo Yezu
Galatians5:7 Ko mwateraga imbere neza
Galatians5:8 Iyo rukuruzi ntituruka ku Mana ibahamagara.
Galatians5:9 N'ubundi bavuga ko “agasemburo gake gatubura ifu yose”.
Galatians5:10 Jyewe niringiye Nyagasani ku bwanyu
Galatians5:11 Naho jyewe rero bavandimwe
Galatians5:12 Iyaba abo babatera imidugararo bari bishahuye bikarangira!
Galatians5:13 Naho mwe bavandimwe
Galatians5:14 Koko rero Amategeko yose abumbiye muri iri rimwe ngo: “Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.”
Galatians5:15 Ariko nimuryana mugacagagurana
Galatians5:16 Reka mbabwire: nimureke Mwuka w'Imana abayobore
Galatians5:17 Kamere y'umuntu yifuza ibyo Mwuka yanga
Galatians5:18 Naho niba muyoborwa na Mwuka
Galatians5:19 Dore ibibi kamere y'umuntu imukoresha: gusambana
Galatians5:20 gusenga ibigirwamana no kuroga
Galatians5:21 ishyari
Galatians5:22 Nyamara imbuto ziva kuri Mwuka ni izi: urukundo
Galatians5:23 kugwa neza no kumenya kwifata. Bene ibyo nta mategeko abibuza.
Galatians5:24 Aba Kristo Yezu babambye kamere yabo ku musaraba
Galatians5:25 Niba ari Mwuka uduha ubugingo nitureke atuyobore.
Galatians5:26 Ntitukabe abirasi ahubwo twirinde kurakaranya no kugirirana ishyari.
