Galatians6:2 Mwakirane ibibaremereye
Galatians6:3 Umuntu wibwira ko akomeye kandi nta cyo ari cyo aba yibeshya.
Galatians6:4 Ahubwo umuntu wese niyigenzure ubwe mu byo akora. Niba hari icyo afite kwirata
Galatians6:5 kuko buri wese azibarizwa ibyo azaba yarakoze.
Galatians6:6 Uwigishwa Ijambo ry'Imana ajye asangira ibyo atunze byose n'urimwigisha.
Galatians6:7 Ntimukibeshye
Galatians6:8 Ubiba imbuto z'ibishimisha kamere ye
Galatians6:9 Ntitukarambirwe gukora ibyiza
Galatians6:10 Nuko rero igihe cyose tubonye uburyo tujye tugirira neza abantu bose
Galatians6:11 Dore izi nyuguti nini ni jye ubwanjye uziyandikiye n'ukwanjye kuboko!
Galatians6:12 Abashaka gushimwa n'abantu ku mpamvu z'imigenzo igaragara ni bo babahatira gukebwa. Intego yabo ni imwe nsa: ni ukugira ngo badatotezwa bazira umusaraba wa Kristo.
Galatians6:13 Nyamara kandi abo bantu nubwo bakebwa
Galatians6:14 Naho jye nta kindi ngomba kwiratana kitari umusaraba w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo. Uwo musaraba ni wo utuma isi imbera nk'iwubambweho
Galatians6:15 Ku bwanjye gukebwa cyangwa kudakebwa nta cyo bimaze
Galatians6:16 Abagenza batyo bakurikiza uwo mugambi
Galatians6:17 Ahasigaye ntihakagire uwongera kundushya
Galatians6:18 Bavandimwe
Ephesians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko Imana yabishatse
Ephesians1:2 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu
Ephesians1:3 Nihasingizwe Imana Se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo. Muri Kristo yadusenderejeho imigisha yose ya Mwuka
Ephesians1:4 Isi itararemwa Imana yadutoranyirije muri Kristo
Ephesians1:5 Imana yari yariyemeje kutugira abana bayo tubiheshejwe na Yezu Kristo
Ephesians1:6 Tuyishime rero kubera ikuzo ry'ubuntu bwayo yatugabiye mu Mwana wayo ikunda!
Ephesians1:7 Muri we twacungujwe amaraso yamennye ku bwacu
Ephesians1:8 Ubwo buntu yabudusesuyeho buduhesha ubwenge n'ubumenyi bwuzuye.
Ephesians1:9 Yatumenyesheje ibanga ry'ubushake bwayo
Ephesians1:10 kugira ngo igeze byose ku gihe yagennye
Ephesians1:11 Muri we Imana yaradutoranyije ngo tube umwihariko wayo
Ephesians1:12 Kwari ukugira ngo twebwe ababanje kwiringira Kristo dushimishe Imana
Ephesians1:13 Muri we kandi mwebwe mwumvise Ijambo ry'ukuri
Ephesians1:14 Ni na we musogongero w'umunani tuzahabwa
Ephesians1:15 Ni cyo gituma nanjye
Ephesians1:16 ntahwema gushimira Imana kubera mwebwe.
Ephesians1:17 Uko nsenze ndabibuka nkabasabira ngo Imana y'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo
Ephesians1:18 Abahumure imitima musobanukirwe ibyo kwiringirwa Imana yabahamagariye
Ephesians1:19 mumenye kandi ububasha bwayo bukomeye butagereranywa ikoresha muri twe abayizera. Ubwo ni bwo bushobozi budukoreramo
Ephesians1:20 yakoresheje muri Kristo
Ephesians1:21 Yahaye Kristo gusumba bihanitse ibinyabutware byose n'ibinyabushobozi n'ibinyabubasha n'ibinyabutegetsi
Ephesians1:22 Imana yeguriye Kristo ibintu byose ibishyira munsi y'ibirenge bye
Ephesians1:23 na wo umubere umubiri. Ni wo rero cyuzuzo cya Kristo
Ephesians2:1 Namwe mwari mwarapfuye muzize ibicumuro n'ibyaha byanyu.
Ephesians2:2 Ni byo mwabagamo
Ephesians2:3 Natwe twese twabarirwaga muri abo
Ephesians2:4 Nyamara Imana yuje imbabazi
Ephesians2:5 yadusanze twarapfuye tuzize ibicumuro byacu

Ephesians2:7 Kwari ukugira ngo mu bihe bizaza yerekane ubutunzi buhebuje bw'ubuntu bwayo
Ephesians2:8 Koko mwakijijwe n'ubuntu kuko mwizeye Kristo
Ephesians2:9 Ntibyakomotse kandi ku bikorwa byanyu
Ephesians2:10 Imana ni yo yaduhanze ituremera muri Kristo Yezu
Ephesians2:11 Mwebwe abanyamahanga
Ephesians2:12 uko kera mwari mumeze. Mwariho mudafite Kristo nta sano mufitanye n'Abisiraheli
Ephesians2:13 Mwari kure yayo
Ephesians2:14 Kristo ni we mahoro yacu
Ephesians2:15 Yavanyeho Amategeko hamwe n'amabwiriza n'imigereka yayo
Ephesians2:16 Ku bw'urupfu rwe rwo ku musaraba
Ephesians2:17 Yaraje atangaza inkuru nziza y'amahoro
Ephesians2:18 Ubu twese ni we utuma twegera Imana Data tubikesha Mwuka umwe.
Ephesians2:19 Bityo rero ntimukiri abanyamahanga n'abimukira
Ephesians2:20 Mwubatswe nk'amabuye ku rufatiro rugizwe n'Intumwa za Kristo n'abahanuzi
Ephesians2:21 Muri we ibuye ryose rifungana n'irindi inzu ikajya ejuru
Ephesians2:22 Bityo muri we namwe mwubakwa hamwe
Ephesians3:1 Ni cyo gituma jyewe Pawulo ndi imbohe mpōrwa Kristo Yezu
Ephesians3:2 Mwaba mwarumvise umurimo Imana yanshinze kubakorera
Ephesians3:3 Yampishuriye ibanga ryayo irimenyesha neza. Namaze kubyandika mu magambo make
Ephesians3:4 muyasomye mubasha kwiyumvira ukuntu nasobanukiwe iryo banga rya Kristo.
Ephesians3:5 Ni ibanga ritigeze rimenyeshwa abantu ba kera
Ephesians3:6 Iryo banga ni uko kubera Ubutumwa bwiza
Ephesians3:7 Kubera ubuntu yangiriye n'impano yangabiye
Ephesians3:8 Jyewe urutwa n'uworoheje cyane mu ntore z'Imana
Ephesians3:9 no gusobanurira abantu bose uko umugambi w'Imana ugomba gusohozwa. Uwo mugambi ni ibanga Imana Umuremyi wa byose yazigamye uhereye kera kose
Ephesians3:10 kugira ngo ubu imenyeshe ibinyabutware n'ibinyabushobozi “by'ahantu ho mu ijuru”
Ephesians3:11 Ni uko Imana yabikoze ikurikije umugambi wayo uhoraho
Ephesians3:12 Ni na we uduhesha uburenganzira bwo kwegera Imana nta cyo twishisha
Ephesians3:13 Ni cyo gituma mbasaba kudacogozwa n'amakuba ndimo kubera mwe
Ephesians3:14 Ni yo mpamvu mpfukamira Imana Data
Ephesians3:15 uwo imiryango yose yo mu ijuru no ku isi ishingiyeho.
Ephesians3:16 Ndayisaba ngo ikurikije ubwinshi bw'umutungo w'ikuzo ryayo
Ephesians3:17 kugira ngo Kristo ature muri buri muntu bitewe n'uko amwizera. Ndasaba kandi ngo mushorere imizi mu rukundo rwe murwubakeho
Ephesians3:18 maze hamwe n'izindi ntore z'Imana zose
Ephesians3:19 Ni bwo muzamenya urwo rukundo rwe rurenze ubwenge bw'umuntu
Ephesians3:20 Nuko rero Imana ibasha gukora ibirenze kure ibyo twasaba

Ephesians4:2 Mwicishe bugufi rwose

Ephesians4:4 Umubiri wa Kristo ni umwe
Ephesians4:5 Nyagasani ni umwe

Ephesians4:10 Uwamanutse ni na we wazamutse ajya hejuru y'amajuru yose
Ephesians4:11 Nuko aha bamwe kuba Intumwa ze

Ephesians4:16 Umutwe ni wo ugenga ingingo z'umubiri zose
Ephesians4:17 Ibi ni byo mvuga kandi nemeza mbikomora kuri Nyagasani: nimureke kugenza nk'abatazi Imana bakurikiza ibitekerezo byabo bitagira umumaro
Ephesians4:18 kandi n'ubwenge bwabo bwararindagiye. Baciye ukubiri n'ubugingo buva ku Mana
Ephesians4:19 Bataye isoni biroha mu bwomanzi
Ephesians4:20 Naho mwebwe uko si ko mwamenyeshejwe Kristo.
Ephesians4:21 Ni iby'ukuri
Ephesians4:22 Noneho nimwiyambure kamere yanyu ya kera yagengaga imigenzereze mwari mufite
Ephesians4:23 Ahubwo muhindurwe bashya mu bugingo no mu bitekerezo.
Ephesians4:24 Mwambare kamere nshya mumere nk'uko Imana ishaka
Ephesians4:25 Ni cyo gituma mugomba kwiyambura n'ibinyoma
Ephesians4:26 Kandi nimurakara ntibikabatere gukora icyaha

Ephesians5:27 uwo Muryango ari wo Mugeni we

Ephesians5:32 Iryo ni ibanga rikomeye

Ephesians6:2 “Ujye wubaha so na nyoko” – ni ryo tegeko rya mbere ririmo Isezerano –
Ephesians6:3 “bityo uzagubwa neza kandi urame ku isi.”
Ephesians6:4 Namwe babyeyi
Ephesians6:5 Mwebwe nkoreragahato
Ephesians6:6 Ntimugakorere ijisho nk'abashaka gushimisha abantu
Ephesians6:7 Imirimo y'agahato mukoreshwa muyikorane umutima ukunze nk'abakorera Nyagasani
Ephesians6:8 Muzirikane ko icyiza cyose umuntu akora
Ephesians6:9 Namwe bakoresha
Ephesians6:10 Ahasigaye mushake amaboko kuri Nyagasani no ku bubasha bwe bukomeye.
Ephesians6:11 Mwitwaze intwaro z'Imana kugira ngo mubashe guhagarara kigabo
Ephesians6:12 kuko ibyo turwana na byo atari abantu
Ephesians6:13 Ni cyo gituma mukwiye gufata intwaro zose z'Imana. Bityo igihe cy'iminsi mibi muzabashe guhangana na wa Mwanzi
Ephesians6:14 Nuko rero nimuhagarare kigabo
Ephesians6:15 Naho mu birenge mube mwambaye inkweto
Ephesians6:16 Muhore mwitwaje ingabo ari yo kwizera Kristo
Ephesians6:17 Mwambare ingofero y'icyuma ari yo gakiza
Ephesians6:18 Byose mubikore musenga ku buryo bwose mwinginga Imana. Ibihe byose muyambaze muvugishwa na Mwuka. Mugumye kuba maso
Ephesians6:19 Nanjye mujye munsabira kugira ngo uko mbumbuye umunwa
Ephesians6:20 No kuri iyi ngoyi ubwo Butumwa ni bwo mpagarariye. Munsabire kugira ngo mbuvuge nshize amanga
Ephesians6:21 Tikiko umuvandimwe nkunda n'umugaragu w'indahemuka wa Nyagasani
Ephesians6:22 Ni na yo mpamvu muboherereje
Ephesians6:23 Amahoro n'urukundo hamwe n'ukwizera
Ephesians6:24 Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo nagumye kugirira ubuntu abantu bose bamukunda urukundo rudatezuka.
Philippians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo na Timoteyo abagaragu ba Kristo Yezu
Philippians1:2 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu
Philippians1:3 Nshimira Imana yanjye igihe cyose mbibutse
Philippians1:4 iteka iyo nsenze mbasabira mwese nezerewe
Philippians1:5 mbitewe n'uruhare mufite kimwe nanjye rwo kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza kuva bigitangira kugeza n'ubu.
Philippians1:6 Ndemeza ko Imana yatangiye uwo murimo mwiza muri mwe izawukora
Philippians1:7 Sinabura kubagiraho mwese ibitekerezo nk'ibyo kuko mbahoza ku mutima. Mwese mufite uruhare ku buntu Imana yangiriye
Philippians1:8 Imana ni yo ntanze ho umugabo ko mbakumbuye mwese
Philippians1:9 Icyo mbasabira kandi ni ukugira ngo urukundo rwanyu rurusheho kugwira ngo mumenye byose
Philippians1:10 kugira ngo mushobore gusuzuma ibintu
Philippians1:11 ahubwo muzabe mwareze imbuto z'ubutungane
Philippians1:12 Bavandimwe
Philippians1:13 ku buryo abo mu ngoro y'umwami w'i Roma bose
Philippians1:14 Ikindi kandi izi ngoyi zanjye zatumye abenshi mu bavandimwe bakomera kuri Nyagasani
Philippians1:15 Icyakora bamwe batangaza ibyerekeye Kristo babitewe n'ishyari n'amakimbirane
Philippians1:16 Abo babiterwa n'urukundo bazirikana ko nashinzwe kurwanira Ubutumwa bwiza.
Philippians1:17 Naho ba bandi batangaza ibya Kristo
Philippians1:18 Mbese bitwaye iki? Baba babiterwa n'urwitwazo cyangwa n'ukuri
Philippians1:19 Icyo nzi cyo ni uko bizamviramo agakiza
Philippians1:20 Dore icyo mfitiye amatsiko kandi niringiye kuzabona: nta kizatuma nkorwa n'isoni. Ahubwo ubu nk'uko bisanzwe nzakomeza kuvuga nshize amanga
Philippians1:21 Ku bwanjye kubaho ni Kristo
Philippians1:22 Nyamara niba kubaho kwanjye kwatuma nkomeza gukora umurimo w'ingirakamaro
Philippians1:23 Mpeze hagati nk'ururimi. Kimwe cyo ndifuza gutabaruka ngo nibanire na Kristo
Philippians1:24 nyamara mwebwe icyarushaho kubagirira akamaro ni uko nagumya kubaho.
Philippians1:25 Icyo nemeza kandi nzi neza ni uko nzagumya kubaho no kubana namwe mwese
Philippians1:26 maze muri we ishema ryanyu risesure kubera jyewe kuko nzaba ngarutse muri mwe.
Philippians1:27 Gusa mujye mukora ibikwiranye n'Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo
Philippians1:28 Ntimugaterwe ubwoba n'ababarwanya
Philippians1:29 Koko kandi Imana yabagiriye ubuntu ni yo ibaha gukorera Kristo
Philippians1:30 Iyo ntambara murwana ni iyo mwasanze ndwana

Philippians2:3 Ntimukagire icyo mukora mubiterwa no kwishyira imbere cyangwa kwikuza
Philippians2:4 Umuntu wese yirinde kuzirikana ibye gusa
Philippians2:5 Mujye mugira amatwara nk'aya Kristo Yezu.
Philippians2:6 We nubwo yari asanzwe afite kamere y'Imana
Philippians2:7 Ahubwo yaretse ibye byose
Philippians2:8 yicisha bugufi arumvira
Philippians2:9 Ni cyo cyatumye Imana imushyira hejuru cyane
Philippians2:10 kugira ngo mu ijuru no ku isi ndetse n'ikuzimu
Philippians2:11 bose bamwogeze mu ruhame
Philippians2:12 Mwebwe abo nkunda cyane
Philippians2:13 kuko Imana ari yo ubwayo itwarira muri mwe kugira ngo mushake kandi mukore ibyo yagambiriye.
Philippians2:14 Mukore byose mutinuba kandi mutagirana impaka
Philippians2:15 kugira ngo mube abana b'Imana batagira umugayo
Philippians2:16 mubagezaho Ijambo ry'ubugingo. Ibyo bizantera kubiratana ku munsi Kristo azaza
Philippians2:17 Ahari amaraso yanjye azagomba gusukwa ku gitambo mutura Imana
Philippians2:18 Namwe ni uko nimwishime
Philippians2:19 Nyagasani Yezu nabishaka niringiye ko bidatinze nzashobora kubatumaho Timoteyo
Philippians2:20 Ni we wenyine mfite duhuje kubakunda
Philippians2:21 Abandi bose baharanira inyungu zabo bwite
Philippians2:22 Muzi ko Timoteyo yerekanye ko ari ingirakamaro
Philippians2:23 Ni we rero niringiye kuzabatumaho nimara kumenya aho ibyanjye byerekeye.
Philippians2:24 Ubundi kandi ndemeza ko Nyagasani nabishaka
Philippians2:25 Nabonye ko ari ngombwa kubatumaho umuvandimwe Epafurodito dufatanyije umurimo
Philippians2:26 Yari abakumbuye mwese kandi ababajwe cyane n'uko mwumvise ko arwaye.
Philippians2:27 Koko yari arwaye yenda gupfa
Philippians2:28 Ni yo mpamvu ndushaho kumva ari ngombwa kumuboherereza
Philippians2:29 Muramwakire rero mwishimye nk'umuvandimwe muri Nyagasani
Philippians2:30 Erega yari agiye gupfa azize umurimo wa Kristo

Philippians3:2 Mwirinde za mbwa ari zo bagizi ba nabi
Philippians3:3 Ahubwo ni twe twakebwe by'ukuri twe dusenga Imana tubikesha Mwuka wayo
Philippians3:4 Jyewe mfite impamvu zatuma niyemera ubwanjye. Haramutse hagize uwibwira ko afite impamvu zo kwiyemera
Philippians3:5 Umva nawe: nakebwe ku munsi wa munani. Ndi Umwisiraheli kavukire wo mu muryango wa Benyamini
Philippians3:6 naho ku byerekeye ishyaka

Philippians3:8 Ndetse ibintu byose mbibara ko ari igihombo

Philippians3:11 bityo nkaba niringiye kuzazurwa mu bapfuye.

Philippians3:16 Uko biri kose dukomereze aho tugeze twe gucogora.

Philippians3:18 Nabibabwiye kenshi n'ubu nongeye kubibabwira mbogoza amarira: abenshi babaye abanzi b'umusaraba wa Kristo.

Philippians4:2 Ewodiya na Sintike
Philippians4:3 Kandi nawe mugenzi wanjye dufatanyije umurimo ndagusaba gufasha abo bagore
Philippians4:4 Mugumye kwishimira muri Nyagasani. Reka mbisubiremo
Philippians4:5 Ineza yanyu imenywe n'abantu bose. Nyagasani ari hafi kugaruka.
Philippians4:6 Ntimukagire ikibahagarika umutima
Philippians4:7 Bityo amahoro y'Imana asumba kure ubwenge bw'umuntu
Philippians4:8 Ahasigaye bavandimwe
Philippians4:9 Ibyo nabigishije rero n'ibyo nabagejejeho
Philippians4:10 Nishimiye cyane muri Nyagasani kuko noneho mwongeye kunzirikana. Erega n'ubundi mwaranzirikanaga
Philippians4:11 Ibyo simbivugishwa n'ubukene
Philippians4:12 Nzi kubaho gikene nzi no kubaho gikungu. Aho ndi hose n'uko byamera kose namenyereye guhaga no gusonza
Philippians4:13 Mbashishwa byose na Kristo untera imbaraga.
Philippians4:14 Nyamara mwagize neza ubwo mwifatanyaga nanjye mu makuba nagize.
Philippians4:15 Banyafilipi
Philippians4:16 Nkiri i Tesaloniki ni mwe mwanyoherereje ibyo nari nkeneye
Philippians4:17 Erega ntabwo ari imfashanyo zanyu nkurikiranye
Philippians4:18 Ubundi kandi ibyo mwanyoherereje narabishyikiriye ndetse birasaguka. Ibyo nari nkeneye byose ndabifite
Philippians4:19 Namwe Imana yanjye ntizabura kubahundazaho ibyo kubakenura byose
Philippians4:20 Nuko ikuzo ribe iry'Imana Data uko ibihe bihaye ibindi. Amina.
Philippians4:21 Mudutahirize intore z'Imana zose ziri muri Kristo Yezu. Abavandimwe bose turi kumwe barabatashya.
Philippians4:22 Intore z'Imana z'ino zose zirabatashya
Philippians4:23 Nyagasani Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu.
Colossians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko Imana yabishatse
Colossians1:2 turabaramukije mwebwe ntore z'Imana z'i Kolosi Kristo yagize abavandimwe b'indahemuka. Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu
Colossians1:3 Iyo tubasabira duhora dushimira Imana Se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo
Colossians1:4 kuko twumvise ko mwemeye Kristo Yezu mugakunda n'intore z'Imana
Colossians1:5 mubitewe no kwiringira ibyo mwabikiwe mu ijuru. Ibyo mwabimenyeshejwe n'inyigisho z'ukuri z'Ubutumwa bwiza mwumvise mbere.
Colossians1:6 Ubwo Butumwa bwamaze kugera ku isi yose
Colossians1:7 Ibyo mwabyigishijwe na mugenzi wacu Epafura dukunda kandi dufatanyije umurimo
Colossians1:8 Ni na we watubwiye urukundo rwanyu mukomora kuri Mwuka w'Imana.
Colossians1:9 Ni cyo cyatumye natwe kuva aho tubyumviye
Colossians1:10 Bityo muzashobora kujya mugenza uko Nyagasani ashaka kugira ngo mumushimishe iteka
Colossians1:11 Turabasabira ngo muhabwe ububasha ku buryo bwose nk'uko imbaraga z'ikuzo ryayo zingana
Colossians1:12 mushimira Imana Data
Colossians1:13 Ni yo yatubohoye ituvana mu butware bw'umwijima
Colossians1:14 Ni we dukesha gucungurwa ari ko kubabarirwa ibyaha.
Colossians1:15 Kristo ni ishusho y'Imana itarebwa n'amaso. Ni na we Mwana wayo w'impfura wabimburiye ibyaremwe byose kubaho.
Colossians1:16 Ni we Imana yakoresheje irema ibintu byose
Colossians1:17 Yariho mbere ya byose
Colossians1:18 Ikindi kandi ni we mutwe ugenga umubiri we
Colossians1:19 Koko Imana yishimiye ko ibyuzuye muri yo byose biba mu Mwana wayo
Colossians1:20 maze yunga ibintu byose na yo ikoresheje uwo Mwana wayo
Colossians1:21 Kera namwe mwahoze kure y'Imana muri abanzi bayo
Colossians1:22 Ariko ubu Imana yiyunze namwe ikoresheje urupfu rw'Umwana wayo
Colossians1:23 Icyakora mukomere ku byo twemera
Colossians1:24 Ubu nishimiye ko mbabazwa ari mwe nzira
Colossians1:25 Nabaye umugaragu wawo
Colossians1:26 Iryo ni ibanga ryahishwe abantu bose kuva kera kose
Colossians1:27 Iryo banga Imana yageneye amahanga yose
Colossians1:28 Ni we twamamaza tukaburira buri muntu tukamwigisha
Colossians1:29 Ibyo ni byo mparanira nshishikaye
Colossians2:1 Ndifuza ko mumenya ukuntu mbarwanira inkundura
Colossians2:2 Ni ukugira ngo yaba mwe cyangwa bo
Colossians2:3 Muri we ni ho habitswe ubwenge n'ubumenyi bwose.
Colossians2:4 Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo hatagira ubashukisha amagambo y'ubucakura.
Colossians2:5 N'ubwo tutari kumwe bwose mbahozaho umutima
Colossians2:6 Nuko rero nk'uko mwakiriye Kristo Yezu akababera Nyagasani
Colossians2:7 Mushore imizi muri we
Colossians2:8 Muramenye ntihakagire ubatwaza igitugu
Colossians2:9 Erega ibyuzuye mu Mana byose biba muri Kristo wabaye umuntu!
Colossians2:10 Namwe muruzuye kuko mumufite
Colossians2:11 Kubera Kristo kandi mwarakebwe bitari bimwe byo ku mubiri
Colossians2:12 Igihe mwabatizwaga mwahambanywe na Kristo
Colossians2:13 Kera mwari mwarapfuye muzize ibyaha byanyu no kudakebwa nk'Abayahudi
Colossians2:14 isibanganya urwandiko rutondagura imyenda twashinjwaga n'amategeko
Colossians2:15 Bityo Imana yanyaze bya binyabutware na bya binyabushobozi
Colossians2:16 Nuko rero ntihagire ubashyiraho amategeko y'ibyo murya n'ibyo munywa
Colossians2:17 Ibyo byose ni ibimenyetso biranga ibizaza
Colossians2:18 Ibihembo mwagombaga kwegukana ntimukere kubivutswa n'abantu bishimira kwigira nk'abicisha bugufi
Colossians2:19 bityo bakaba batifatanyije na Kristo ari we mutwe ugenga umubiri. Umutwe ni wo utuma umubiri wose uhuza imikorere kandi ukagaburirwa
Colossians2:20 Ubwo mwapfanye na Kristo ntimukiri ku ngoyi ya bya binyabutware bikorera ku isi. None se kuki mucyifata nk'aho muri ab'isi? Kuki mukomeza kugengwa n'amategeko nk'aya
Colossians2:21 ngo: “Ntugafate iki! Ntugasogongere kiriya! Ntukanakore kuri kino!”
Colossians2:22 Erega ibyo byose igihe umaze kubikoresha biba birangiye! Ni amategeko n'inyigisho by'abantu gusa.
Colossians2:23 Ni ukuri bene ibyo wagira ngo bishingiye ku bwenge
Colossians3:1 Imana yabazuranye na Kristo
Colossians3:2 Muhoze imitima ku byo mu ijuru atari ku byo ku isi
Colossians3:3 kuko mwapfanye na Kristo kandi ubugingo bwanyu bukaba bwarahishwe hamwe na we mu Mana.
Colossians3:4 Ubugingo bwanyu nyakuri ni Kristo
Colossians3:5 Nuko rero nimwice imigirire yanyu ifitanye isano n'iby'isi
Colossians3:6 Ibyo ni byo bitera Imana kurakarira [abatayumvira].
Colossians3:7 Namwe ubwanyu mwagenzaga mutyo kera mukigengwa n'ibyo bibi.
Colossians3:8 Ariko ubu mugomba kuzinukwa ibi byose: uburakari n'umujinya
Colossians3:9 Ntimukabeshyane kuko mwiyambuye kamere yanyu ya kera n'imigirire yayo
Colossians3:10 mukambara kamere nshya. Iyo kamere nshya igenda ivugururirwa kugira ishusho y'Iyayiremye
Colossians3:11 Aho rero haba hatakivugwa umunyamahanga cyangwa Umuyahudi
Colossians3:12 Naho mwebwe abo Imana yitoranyirije ikabagira abantu bayo b'inkoramutima
Colossians3:13 Igihe umuntu agize icyo apfa na mugenzi we
Colossians3:14 Hejuru ya byose kandi mwambare urukundo ho umwitero. Ni na rwo mugozi ubafatanya bihebuje.
Colossians3:15 Mureke amahoro ya Kristo agenge imitima yanyu
Colossians3:16 Inyigisho za Kristo zibacengere rwose zibakungahaze
Colossians3:17 Ibyo muvuga byose n'ibyo mukora byose

Colossians3:19 Bagabo
Colossians3:20 Bana
Colossians3:21 Babyeyi
Colossians3:22 Namwe nkoreragahato
Colossians3:23 Ibyo mukora byose mubikorane umutima ukunze
Colossians3:24 Muzirikane ko Shobuja uwo azabagororera kubaha umunani. Koko kandi Kristo ni we Shobuja mukorera.
Colossians3:25 Ukora ibibi wese bizamugaruka kuko Imana ifata abantu bose kimwe.

1Thessalonians1:2 Uko dusenze turabazirikana
1Thessalonians1:3 twibuka iteka imbere y'Imana Data ibikorwa byiza muterwa no kwemera Kristo
1Thessalonians1:4 Bavandimwe mukundwa n'Imana
1Thessalonians1:5 Koko rero twabagejejeho Ubutumwa bwiza atari amagambo gusa
1Thessalonians1:6 Namwe mwakurikije urugero rwacu n'urwa Nyagasani. Nubwo mwari mu makuba menshi
1Thessalonians1:7 Bityo mwabereye urugero abemera Kristo bose bo mu ntara ya Masedoniya n'iya Akaya.
1Thessalonians1:8 Koko rero Ijambo rya Nyagasani ryavuye muri mwe ntiryasakaye muri Masedoniya no muri Akaya gusa
1Thessalonians1:9 Abantu bose usanga bavuga ukuntu mwatwakiriye
1Thessalonians1:10 igihe mugitegereje Umwana wayo Yezu yazuye mu bapfuye. Ni we uzava mu ijuru aje kudukiza uburakari bw'Imana bwegereje.

2Thessalonians3:4 Ni Nyagasani utuma tubagirira icyizere

2Thessalonians3:9 Si uko tutari tubifitiye uburenganzira

2Thessalonians3:11 None twumva ko muri mwe hari abanebwe batagira icyo bakora
2Thessalonians3:12 Abo ngabo turabategeka tubihanangiriza mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu Kristo
2Thessalonians3:13 Naho mwebwe bavandimwe
2Thessalonians3:14 Nihagira utumvira amabwiriza yacu akubiye muri uru rwandiko
2Thessalonians3:15 Icyakora ntimukamufate nk'umwanzi
2Thessalonians3:16 Nyagasani we sōko y'amahoro
2Thessalonians3:17 Jyewe Pawulo ndabatashya. Ibi ni jye ubyiyandikiye n'ukwanjye kuboko. Ni wo mukono njya nshyira ku nzandiko zanjye zose. Uko ni ko nandika.
2Thessalonians3:18 Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese.
1Timothy1:1 Jyewe Pawulo Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko byategetswe n'Imana Umukiza wacu na Kristo Yezu twiringira
1Timothy1:2 ndakwandikiye Timoteyo mwana wanjye nibyariye muri Kristo twemera. Imana Data ikugirire ubuntu iguhe n'imbabazi n'amahoro
1Timothy1:3 Nk'uko nabigusabye igihe najyaga mu ntara ya Masedoniya
1Timothy1:4 Ubabuze no kwihambira ku bitekerezo bitagira ishingiro
1Timothy1:5 Intego mfite ngushinga ibyo ni ukugira ngo bagire urukundo rukomoka ku mutima uboneye utabarega ikibi
1Timothy1:6 Bamwe bahushije iyo ntego
1Timothy1:7 Bashaka kuba abigisha b'Amategeko
1Timothy1:8 Turabizi koko Amategeko ni meza
1Timothy1:9 N'ubundi tuzi ko Amategeko atashyiriweho intungane
1Timothy1:10 abasambanyi basanzwe n'abasambana n'abo bahuje igitsina
1Timothy1:11 Izo ni zo nyigisho zihuje n'Ubutumwa nashinzwe
1Timothy1:12 Ndashimira Umwami wacu Kristo Yezu watumye mbasha kumukorera
1Timothy1:13 Nari umuntu ukunda gutuka Imana
1Timothy1:14 Ubuntu Umwami wacu agira bwaransābye
1Timothy1:15 Iri jambo ni iry'ukuri kandi rikwiye kwemerwa na bose: Kristo Yezu yazanywe ku isi no gukiza abanyabyaha
1Timothy1:16 Ariko icyatumye Imana ingirira imbabazi
1Timothy1:17 Umwami uhoraho ari we Mana imwe rukumbi
1Timothy1:18 Timoteyo mwana wanjye
1Timothy1:19 ukomere kuri Kristo twemera ufite umutima utakurega ikibi. Uwo mutima bamwe banze kuwumvira bareka kwizera Kristo
1Timothy1:20 Muri abo hari Himeneyo na Alegisanderi
1Timothy2:1 Mbere ya byose ndabihanangiriza ngo mu masengesho yanyu mujye musabira abantu bose
1Timothy2:2 Mujye musabira abami n'abandi bategetsi bose kugira ngo tugire amahoro n'ituze
1Timothy2:3 Ngibyo ibyiza bishimisha Imana Umukiza wacu
1Timothy2:4 ishaka ko abantu bose bakizwa kugira ngo babashe kumenya ukuri byuzuye.
1Timothy2:5 Hariho Imana imwe rukumbi kandi umuhuza wayo n'abantu ni umwe
1Timothy2:6 witanze agapfa ngo abere incungu abantu bose. Icyo ni icyemezo cy'uko Imana ishaka ko bose bakizwa
1Timothy2:7 Ku bw'ibyo nashyiriweho kuba umuvugizi wa Kristo
1Timothy2:8 Ndashaka ko ahantu hose abagabo bajya basenga barambuye amaboko
1Timothy2:9 N'abagore ni uko bajye bambara uko bikwiye
1Timothy2:10 Ahubwo umurimbo wabo ube ibikorwa byiza bikwiriye abagore bubaha Imana.
1Timothy2:11 Abagore bajye biga batuje kandi bubaha ku buryo bwose.
1Timothy2:12 Sinemera ko abagore bigisha cyangwa ngo bategeke abagabo
1Timothy2:13 N'ubundi Adamu ni we waremwe mbere
1Timothy2:14 Adamu si we washutswe
1Timothy2:15 Nyamara umugore azakirizwa mu ibyara nakomera kuri Kristo twemera
1Timothy3:1 Iri jambo ni iry'ukuri: niba umuntu yifuza kuba umuyobozi w'Umuryango w'Imana
1Timothy3:2 Umuyobozi w'Umuryango w'Imana agomba kuba umuntu w'inyangamugayo
1Timothy3:3 utari umunywi w'inzoga cyangwa umurwanyi. Ahubwo agomba kuba umunyamahoro
1Timothy3:4 Agomba kuba azi kuyobora neza abo mu rugo rwe bwite
1Timothy3:5 None se unanirwa kuyobora urugo rwe bwite yashobora ate kwita ku Muryango w'Imana?
1Timothy3:6 Umuyobozi w'Umuryango wayo ntakwiriye kuba umuntu wemeye Kristo vuba ngo atigira ishyano ryose
1Timothy3:7 Na none kandi agomba kuba umuntu n'abatemera Kristo bavuga neza
1Timothy3:8 Abadiyakoni na bo ni uko
1Timothy3:9 Bagomba gukomera ku mabanga ya Kristo twemera
1Timothy3:10 Na bo kandi bajye babanza bageragezwe
1Timothy3:11 Abadiyakonikazi na bo bagomba kuba ari abantu biyubaha
1Timothy3:12 Umudiyakoni wese agomba kuba umugabo ufite umugore umwe
1Timothy3:13 Abakora uwo murimo neza bibahesha umwanya mwiza
1Timothy3:14 Nkwandikiye ibyo niringiye kuzaza kugusura vuba.
1Timothy3:15 Icyakora nindamuka ntinze
1Timothy3:16 Nta wabihakana
1Timothy4:1 Mwuka w'Imana avuga yeruye ko mu minsi y'imperuka bamwe bazimūra Kristo
1Timothy4:2 Bazaba bayobejwe n'uburyarya bw'abanyabinyoma bafite imitima ihuramye
1Timothy4:3 Bazabuza abantu gushakana no kurya bimwe na bimwe kandi Imana ari yo yabiremye
1Timothy4:4 Erega ibyo Imana yaremye byose ni byiza
1Timothy4:5 kuko kiba cyejejwe n'Ijambo ry'Imana no gusenga!
1Timothy4:6 Niwumvisha abavandimwe ibyo ngibyo uzaba ubaye umugaragu mwiza wa Yezu Kristo
1Timothy4:7 Naho ibitekerezo by'abakecuru bitagira ishingiro kandi bihakana Imana
1Timothy4:8 Imyitozo ngororamubiri ifite akamaro ariko gake
1Timothy4:9 Iri jambo ni iry'ukuri kandi rikwiye kwemerwa na bose:
1Timothy4:10 igituma twemera kuvunika tugahirimbana
1Timothy4:11 Ngibyo ibyo ugomba kwemeza abantu no kubigisha.
1Timothy4:12 Ntihakagire ugusuzugura ngo ni uko uri muto. Ahubwo ubere urugero abemera Kristo mu mivugire no mu myifatire
1Timothy4:13 Igihe ugitegereje ko nza wihatire gusomera abantu Ibyanditswe
1Timothy4:14 Ntukirengagize impano ikurimo wahawe n'Imana ubikesha ibyahanuwe
1Timothy4:15 Ngibyo ibyo ugomba kuzirikana ukabyitaho. Ni bwo bizagaragarira bose ko utera imbere.
1Timothy4:16 Wirinde ubwawe
1Timothy5:1 Ntugacyahe umusaza ahubwo ujye umuhugura nk'aho ari so
1Timothy5:2 Abakecuru ubahugure nk'aho ari ababyeyi bawe

1Timothy5:4 Naho niba umupfakazi afite abana cyangwa abuzukuru

1Timothy5:7 Ibyo ubibashinge kugira ngo babe inyangamugayo.

1Timothy5:12 Bityo bakaba batsindwa n'urubanza rwo kureka ibyo bari biyemeje mbere.

1Timothy5:17 Abakuru bayobora neza Umuryango w'Imana bakwiye guhembwa incuro ebyiri
1Timothy5:18 N'ubundi Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Ntimugahambire umunwa w'ikimasa igihe gihonyōra ingano”
1Timothy5:19 Ntukemere ibyo barega umukuru w'Umuryango w'Imana

1Timothy5:22 Ntukihutire kugira uwo urambikaho ibiganza ngo abe umukozi w'Imana. Ntukifatanye n'abandi gukora ibyaha
1Timothy5:23 Reka kunywa amazi gusa
1Timothy5:24 Ibyaha by'abantu bamwe byigaragaza mbere y'uko bacirwa urubanza
1Timothy5:25 Bityo n'ibikorwa byiza na byo byigaragaza mbere y'igihe

1Timothy6:5 n'impaka z'urudaca mu bantu bafite ubwenge bwononekaye bakamyemo ukuri. Bibwira ko uwubaha Imana aba yikurikiraniye inyungu.

1Timothy6:7 Erega nta cyo twazanye ku isi

1Timothy6:12 Ujye urwana intambara nziza

1Timothy6:17 Abakungu b'iki gihe cya none ubihanangirize
1Timothy6:18 Ubihanangirize kandi bajye bakora neza

1Timothy6:20 Nuko rero Timoteyo
1Timothy6:21 Bamwe bitwaje ubwo bumenyi bituma bateshuka kuri Kristo twemera. Nyagasani nagumye kubagirira ubuntu.
2Timothy1:1 Jyewe Pawulo Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko Imana yabishatse
2Timothy1:2 ndakwandikiye Timoteyo mwana wanjye nkunda. Imana Data ikugirire ubuntu
2Timothy1:3 Ndashimira Imana nkorera mfite umutima utandega ikibi
2Timothy1:4 Iyo nibutse amarira yawe nifuza cyane kongera kukubona

2Timothy1:6 Ni yo mpamvu nkwibutsa ngo umere nk'uwatsa umuriro
2Timothy1:7 Koko rero umwuka Imana yaduhaye si uwo kutugira abanyabwoba
2Timothy1:8 Ntukagire isoni zo guhamya Umwami wacu
2Timothy1:9 Ni yo yadukijije
2Timothy1:10 Ariko noneho bwashyizwe ku mugaragaro
2Timothy1:11 Ubwo Butumwa ni bwo nashinzwe gutangaza ngo mbubere intumwa n'umwigisha.
2Timothy1:12 Ni na yo mpamvu ituma mbabazwa ntyo. Nyamara ntibinkoza isoni kuko nzi uwo nizeye
2Timothy1:13 Inyigisho zishyitse wanyumvanye uzifate ho urugero uzajya ukurikiza
2Timothy1:14 Ibyiza washinzwe ubirinde ufashijwe na Mwuka Muziranenge uba muri twe.
2Timothy1:15 Nk'uko ubizi abo mu ntara ya Aziya bose barantereranye
2Timothy1:16 Nyagasani nagirire neza urugo rwa Onesiforo
2Timothy1:17 Ahubwo akigera i Roma yanshatse ashyizeho umwete maze arambona.
2Timothy1:18 Ntawe ukurusha kumenya ibyiza yangiriye turi Efezi. Kuri wa munsi Nyagasani azamugirire imbabazi

2Timothy4:22 Nyagasani abane nawe. Nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese.
Titus1:1 Jyewe Pawulo umugaragu w'Imana nkaba n'Intumwa ya Yezu Kristo
Titus1:2 kugira ngo biringire kuzabona ubugingo buhoraho Imana itabeshya yasezeranye kuva kera kose.
Titus1:3 Mu gihe kigenwe igaragaza Ubutumwa bwayo
Titus1:4 Ndakwandikiye Tito mwana wanjye by'ukuri
Titus1:5 Icyatumye nkurekera i Kireti ni ukugira ngo utunganye ibyasigaye bitari ku murongo
Titus1:6 Buri wese muri bo agomba kuba indakemwa akaba n'umugabo ufite umugore umwe
Titus1:7 Erega n'ubundi umuyobozi w'Umuryango w'Imana agomba kuba indakemwa
Titus1:8 Agomba kuba umuntu ukunda kwakira abashyitsi

Titus1:10 Koko rero hariho benshi b'ibyigomeke bavuga amagambo y'amanjwe kandi babeshya
Titus1:11 Ni ngombwa kubacecekesha
Titus1:12 Umuhanuzi umwe wo mu Banyakireti ubwabo yaravuze ati: “Abanyakireti iteka ni ababeshyi
Titus1:13 Ibyo ahamya ni ukuri. Ni cyo gituma ukwiye kubacyaha ukomeje
Titus1:14 bareke kwihambira ku bitekerezo bidafite ishingiro by'Abayahudi no ku mabwiriza y'abantu bacurika ukuri.
Titus1:15 Abatunganye nta kitabatunganira
Titus1:16 Bemeza ko bazi Imana

Titus3:4 Ariko igihe kigeze
Titus3:5 ni ko kudukiza

Titus3:15 Abo turi kumwe bose baragutashya. Tashya abadukunda dusangiye kwemera Kristo. Nyagasani nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese.

Hebrews1:1 Kera Imana yamenyesheje ba sogokuruza ibyayo kenshi no ku buryo bwinshi
Hebrews1:2 Ariko ubu tugeze mu gihe cy'imperuka
Hebrews1:3 Uwo Mwana w'Imana ni we urabagirana ho ikuzo ryayo
Hebrews1:4 Imana yahaye uwo Mwana wayo gusumba kure abamarayika
Hebrews1:5 Koko nta mumarayika n'umwe Imana yigeze ibwira iti: “Ni wowe Mwana wanjye
Hebrews1:6 Nyamara kandi igihe Imana yoherezaga impfura yayo ku isi
Hebrews1:7 Ku byerekeye abamarayika yaravuze iti: “Igira abamarayika bayo imiyaga
Hebrews1:8 Naho ku byerekeye Umwana wayo iravuga iti: “Mana
Hebrews1:9 Ukunda ubutungane ukanga ubugome
Hebrews1:10 Na none iti: “Nyagasani
Hebrews1:11 Ibyo bizashiraho ariko wowe uzahoraho
Hebrews1:12 Uzabizingazinga nk'uzingazinga umwenda
Hebrews1:13 Nta mumarayika n'umwe Imana yigeze ibwira iti: “Icara ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bwanjye
Hebrews1:14 None se abamarayika ni iki? Bose ni ingabo zo mu ijuru zikorera Imana
Hebrews2:1 Ni cyo gituma tugomba kwita cyane ku byo twumvise
Hebrews2:2 Ubutumwa bwavuzwe n'abamarayika bwari bukaze
Hebrews2:3 None se twebwe tuzarokoka dute niba twirengagiza agakiza gakomeye gatyo? Ibyerekeye ako gakiza byabanje gutangazwa na Nyagasani
Hebrews2:4 Imana na yo ishyigikira ibyo bemeje itanga ibimenyetso
Hebrews2:5 Erega si abamarayika Imana yahaye kugenga isi izabaho
Hebrews2:6 Ahubwo mu Byanditswe hari uwavuze ati: “Mana
Hebrews2:7 Habuzeho gato ngo umuntu umugire nk'abamarayika
Hebrews2:8 byose urabimuha kugira ngo abigenge.” Igihe Imana yeguriraga umuntu ibintu byose nta na kimwe yasize. Nyamara kugeza ubu ntiturabona koko umuntu agenga byose.
Hebrews2:9 Ahubwo Yezu ni we tubona
Hebrews2:10 Imana yaremye byose ibigira ibyayo. Byari bikwiye rero ko itunganya Yezu bidasubirwaho imucishije mu mibabaro
Hebrews2:11 Ari Yezu ugeza abantu ku Mana ari n'abo ayigezaho
Hebrews2:12 Nuko akabwira Imana ati: “Nzakuratira abavandimwe banjye
Hebrews2:13 Akongera akavuga ati: “Imana ni yo nzaba mfitiye icyizere”
Hebrews2:14 Ubwo rero abo yagize abana bayo bahūzwa no kugira umubiri n'amaraso
Hebrews2:15 maze avane mu buja ababubayemo kuva bakivuka babitewe no gutinya urupfu.
Hebrews2:16 Erega si abamarayika yaje kugoboka
Hebrews2:17 Kubera iyo mpamvu yagombaga guhinduka
Hebrews2:18 Nuko rero abasha kugoboka abageragezwa
Hebrews3:1 Bavandimwe
Hebrews3:2 Ni indahemuka ku Mana yamuhamagariye uwo murimo
Hebrews3:3 Nk'uko umwubatsi ahabwa icyubahiro kirenze icy'inzu yubatse
Hebrews3:4 Inzu yose igira uwayubatse
Hebrews3:5 Musa yabaye indahemuka
Hebrews3:6 Naho Kristo we yabaye indahemuka
Hebrews3:7 Ni cyo gituma mu Byanditswe Mwuka Muziranenge avuga ati: “Uyu munsi nimwumva icyo Imana ibabwira
Hebrews3:8 ntimunangire imitima nka cya gihe cy'imyivumbagatanyo
Hebrews3:9 ubwo ba sokuruza bangeragezaga bampinyuza
Hebrews3:10 Ni cyo cyatumye ndakarira ab'icyo gihe imyaka mirongo ine. Ni ko kuvuga nti: ‘Bahora bateshuka
Hebrews3:11 Nuko ndahirana uburakari nti: ‘Ntibateze kwinjira aho kuruhukira nagennye.’ ”
Hebrews3:12 Bavandimwe
Hebrews3:13 Ahubwo mukomezanye buri munsi mu gihe cyose hacyitwa “uyu munsi”
Hebrews3:14 Twahawe gukorana na Kristo
Hebrews3:15 Dore uko Ibyanditswe bibivuga: “Uyu munsi nimwumva icyo ibabwira
Hebrews3:16 Ni ba nde bumvise ijwi ry'Imana nyamara bakivumbagatanya? Ni ba bandi bose bavuye mu Misiri bayobowe na Musa!
Hebrews3:17 Ni ba nde se Imana yarakariye imyaka mirongo ine? Ni ba bandi bacumuye
Hebrews3:18 Ni ba nde se kandi Imana yarahiye ko batazinjira ha hantu ho kuruhukira yagennye? Ni ba bandi banze kuyumvira!
Hebrews3:19 Tubona kandi ko batabashije kuhinjira
Hebrews4:1 Haracyariho Isezerano ryo kwinjira aho kuruhukira Imana yagennye. Nuko rero twitonde
Hebrews4:2 Erega natwe twabwiwe Ubutumwa bwiza nk'uko ba bandi ba kera babubwiwe! Bo nta cyo bwabamariye
Hebrews4:3 Naho twebwe abayizeye
Hebrews4:4 koko kandi
Hebrews4:5 Aho na none Ibyanditswe birongera biti: “Ntibazinjira aho kuruhukira nagennye.”
Hebrews4:6 Aba mbere bagejejweho Ubutumwa bwiza ntibinjiye aho hantu kubera kutumvira Imana kwabo. Bityo haracyari umwanya w'abandi bashaka kuhinjira.
Hebrews4:7 Ni cyo gituma Imana yongeye gushyiraho umunsi
Hebrews4:8 Koko kandi iyo Yozuwe aza kubageza aho baruhukira

Hebrews4:10 kuko uwinjiye aho kuruhukira Imana yagennye aba aruhutse imirimo ye
Hebrews4:11 Nuko rero twihatire kwinjira aho hantu ho kuruhukira
Hebrews4:12 Ijambo ry'Imana ni rizima kandi rifite imbaraga
Hebrews4:13 Mu byaremwe byose nta cyo Imana ihishwa. Ahubwo byose bitwikuruwe nk'ibyambitswe ubusa imbere yayo
Hebrews4:14 Nuko rero ubwo dufite Umutambyi mukuru ukomeye
Hebrews4:15 Umutambyi mukuru dufite ntananirwa kubabarana natwe mu ntege nke zacu
Hebrews4:16 Nuko rero nidushire umususu twegere intebe ya cyami y'Imana igira ubuntu
Hebrews5:1 Umutambyi mukuru wese atoranywa mu bantu kandi agahagararira abantu imbere y'Imana. Umurimo we ni ugusohoza amaturo n'ibitambo kubera ibyaha byabo.
Hebrews5:2 Abasha korohera no gufata neza injiji n'abakunda kuyoba
Hebrews5:3 Kubera iyo mpamvu ntagomba guhongerera ibyaha bya rubanda gusa
Hebrews5:4 Nta muntu washobora kwiha icyubahiro cyo kuba Umutambyi mukuru
Hebrews5:5 Kristo na we ntiyihaye ikuzo ryo kuba Umutambyi mukuru
Hebrews5:6 Na none hari ahandi Imana yavuze iti: “Uri umutambyi iteka ryose
Hebrews5:7 Mu gihe Yezu yari akiri ku isi yasenze yinginga
Hebrews5:8 Nubwo yari Umwana w'Imana
Hebrews5:9 Nuko amaze kuba indakemwa
Hebrews5:10 Imana ni ko kumugira Umutambyi mukuru mu buryo bwa Melikisedeki.

Hebrews6:3 Tuzatera imbere dutyo Imana nibishaka.

Hebrews6:9 Nyamara ncuti dukunda
Hebrews6:10 Imana ntirenganya

Hebrews6:12 Mwe kuba abanebwe ahubwo mwigane abizera Imana bakihangana

Hebrews6:19 Kwiringira ibyo ni ko gukomeza imitima yacu
Hebrews6:20 Aho ni ho Yezu yatubanjirije kwinjira ngo tubone kumukurikira. Yabaye Umutambyi mukuru iteka ryose mu buryo bwa Melikisedeki.
Hebrews7:1 Melikisedeki uwo yari umwami w'i Salemu akaba n'umutambyi w'Imana Isumbabyose. Ubwo Aburahamu yatabarukaga atsinze ba bami
Hebrews7:2 Nuko Aburahamu amutura kimwe cya cumi cy'ibyo yari yagaruje byose. Iryo zina Melikisedeki risobanura ngo: “Umwami nyir'ubutungane.” Byongeye kandi akaba n'umwami w'i Salemu
Hebrews7:3 Melikisedeki uwo nta kizwi ku byerekeye se na nyina habe n'igisekuru
Hebrews7:4 Nimwirebere namwe ukuntu uwo muntu akomeye! Dore nawe Sogokuruza Aburahamu yamutuye kimwe cya cumi cy'ibyo yari yanyaze ku rugamba!
Hebrews7:5 Abo mu rubyaro rwa Levi ni bo beguriwe umurimo wo gusohoza ibitambo
Hebrews7:6 Naho Melikisedeki we ntabwo ari uwo mu rubyaro rwa Levi
Hebrews7:7 Nta wahakana ko uhesha abandi umugisha aruta uwuhabwa.

Hebrews7:10

Hebrews7:12 Koko kandi iyo umurongo w'abatambyi uhindutse
Hebrews7:13 Uvugwaho ibyo byose ni Umwami wacu Yezu kandi rero ni uwo mu wundi muryango
Hebrews7:14

Hebrews7:16 Ntiyagizwe umutambyi bikurikiza amabwiriza agenga igisekuru cy'abantu
Hebrews7:17 Ibyanditswe bivuga ibye biti: “Uri umutambyi iteka ryose mu buryo bwa Melikisedeki.”
Hebrews7:18 Nuko imitegekere ya kera iba ivuyeho

Hebrews7:21 Nyamara Yezu yagizwe Umutambyi hageretsweho indahiro

Hebrews7:23 Si byo byonyine
Hebrews7:24 Naho Yezu we ni Umutambyi uhoraho iteka

Hebrews7:27 We rero si kimwe n'abandi batambyi bakuru
Hebrews7:28 Abatambyi bakuru Amategeko ashyiraho na bo ni abanyantegenke. Nyamara nyuma y'ayo Mategeko
Hebrews8:1 Mu byo tuvuga ijambo ry'ingenzi ni iri: dufite Umutambyi mukuru umeze utyo
Hebrews8:2 Ashinzwe umurimo w'ubutambyi aheguriwe Imana
Hebrews8:3 Umutambyi mukuru wese ashyirirwaho gusohoza amaturo n'ibitambo. Ni ngombwa rero ko n'uyu wacu agira icyo atura.
Hebrews8:4 Iyo aza kuba ku isi ntabwo yari kuba umutambyi
Hebrews8:5 Umurimo ukorwa n'abo batambyi ni ikigereranyo kiranga ibikorerwa mu ijuru. Ni cyo cyatumye Imana yihanangiriza Musa
Hebrews8:6 Naho ubu umurimo Yezu ashinzwe usumbye kure uw'abo bandi
Hebrews8:7 Iyo Isezerano rya mbere ritaza kugira inenge
Hebrews8:8 Ni yo mpamvu Imana igaya abantu bayo ibabwira iti: “Dore igihe kigiye kugera

Hebrews9:1 Mu Isezerano rya mbere harimo amabwiriza agenga kuramya Imana kw'abayo
Hebrews9:2 Ihema ryarashinzwe
Hebrews9:3 Hagakurikiraho umwenda ukingiriza icyumba cya kabiri cyitwa “Icyumba kizira inenge cyane”.
Hebrews9:4 Ni ho habaga igicaniro cy'izahabu batwikiragaho imibavu
Hebrews9:5 Hejuru y'iyo Sanduku hari amashusho y'abakerubi. Amababa yabo yatwikiraga aho bahongereraga ibyaha. Icyakora iki si cyo gihe cyo kurondora ibyo byose mu magambo arambuye.
Hebrews9:6 Byose bimaze gutegurwa bityo
Hebrews9:7 Naho mu cyumba cya kabiri
Hebrews9:8 Bityo rero Mwuka Muziranenge yerekanaga ko hataraboneka inzira igeza mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane
Hebrews9:9 Ibyo bishushanya iby'iki gihe turimo. Byerekana ko amaturo n'ibitambo bihora biturwa Imana bitabasha guhindura ababitura indakemwa
Hebrews9:10 Bishingiye ku byokurya n'ibyokunywa
Hebrews9:11 Ariko Kristo ahingutse
Hebrews9:12 Ubwo Kristo yinjiraga rimwe na rizima mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane
Hebrews9:13 Ubusanzwe amaraso y'amasekurume y'ihene n'ay'impfizi
Hebrews9:14 Ubwo bimeze bityo
Hebrews9:15 Ni cyo gituma Kristo aba umuhūza ku byerekeye Isezerano rishya Imana yagiranye n'abayo
Hebrews9:16 Iyo habaye icyemeza uko umurage wateganyijwe
Hebrews9:17 Erega umurage ugira agaciro igihe nyir'ukuraga amaze gupfa
Hebrews9:18 Ni cyo gituma Isezerano rya mbere ry'Imana na ryo ritari kugerwaho hatabanje kumenwa amaraso.
Hebrews9:19 Musa yabanje guha rubanda rwose amabwiriza yose
Hebrews9:20 Ni ko kuvuga ati: “Aya ni amaraso ahamya Isezerano Imana yagiranye namwe ngo muryubahirize.”
Hebrews9:21 Kandi na rya Hema n'ibikoresho byose by'imihango yo kuramya Imana
Hebrews9:22 Ndetse ukurikije Amategeko
Hebrews9:23 Nuko ubwo bya bindi bishushanya ibyo mu ijuru byagombaga guhumanurwa na bene ibyo bitambo
Hebrews9:24 Erega Kristo ntiyinjiye mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyubatswe n'abantu
Hebrews9:25 Ubusanzwe Umutambyi mukuru yinjira mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane uko umwaka utashye
Hebrews9:26 Iyo biba bityo yari kubabazwa akicwa incuro nyinshi kuva isi yaremwa. Ariko muri iki gihe giheruka ibindi yabonetse rimwe rizima
Hebrews9:27 Umuntu wese agenewe gupfa rimwe gusa
Hebrews9:28 Ni na ko Kristo yatambwe rimwe rizima
Hebrews10:1 Amategeko ni nk'igishushanyo gusa cy'imigisha tuzahabwa
Hebrews10:2 Iyo biza kugenda bityo
Hebrews10:3 Ibiri amambu
Hebrews10:4 Erega amaraso y'ibimasa n'ay'amasekurume y'ihene ntabwo abasha kuvanaho ibyaha!
Hebrews10:5 Ni cyo gituma Kristo aje ku isi yabwiye Imana ati: “Ibitambo n'amaturo si byo washatse
Hebrews10:6 Ibitambo bikongorwa n'ibyo guhongerera ibyaha si byo bigushimisha.
Hebrews10:7 Nuko ndavuga nti: ‘Dore ndaje
Hebrews10:8 Yabanje kuvuga ati: “Ibitambo n'amaturo
Hebrews10:9 Ahita yungamo ati: “Dore ndaje. Mana
Hebrews10:10 Kubera ubwo bushake bwayo
Hebrews10:11 Umutambyi wese ahora ahagurutswa no gukora umurimo we
Hebrews10:12 Naho Kristo we amaze gusohoza igitambo kimwe gikuraho ibyaha ku buryo budasubirwaho
Hebrews10:13 Kuva ubwo ategereje ko Imana igira abanzi be nk'akabaho akandagizaho ibirenge.
Hebrews10:14 Bityo bitewe n'igitambo cye kimwe
Hebrews10:15 Mwuka Muziranenge na we ni ko abitwemeza. Abanza kugira ati:
Hebrews10:16 “Ngiri Isezerano nzagirana na bo nyuma y'icyo gihe
Hebrews10:17 Arongera ati: “Ibyaha byabo n'ibicumuro byabo sinzabyibuka ukundi.”
Hebrews10:18 Koko kandi iyo habayeho kubabarirwa ibyaha
Hebrews10:19 Noneho bavandimwe
Hebrews10:20 Yaduciriye inzira nshya igeza mu bugingo. Iyo nzira inyura mu mwenda ukingirije cya Cyumba
Hebrews10:21 Ikindi kandi dufite Umutambyi mukuru ukomeye
Hebrews10:22 Nuko rero nimucyo twegere Imana tutaryarya kandi tuyizeye tudashidikanya
Hebrews10:23 Dukomeze kuvuga ku mugaragaro ibyo twiringiye tudahungabana
Hebrews10:24 Twite kandi kuri bagenzi bacu
Hebrews10:25 Twirinde kubura mu materaniro
Hebrews10:26 Nidukomeza gukora ibyaha nkana kandi twaramaze kumenya ukuri
Hebrews10:27 Ahubwo ikiba gisigaye ni ugutegerezanya ubwoba urubanza rw'Imana
Hebrews10:28 Umuntu wese wishe Amategeko ya Musa agashinjwa n'abagabo babiri cyangwa barenzeho
Hebrews10:29 Mwibaze namwe rero uko bizamera ku muntu uzaba yaratesheje agaciro Umwana w'Imana
Hebrews10:30 Koko kandi tuzi neza uwavuze ati: “Guhōra ni ukwanjye
Hebrews10:31 Biteye ubwoba gutabwa muri yombi n'Imana nzima!
Hebrews10:32 Mwibuke ibyababayeho mu bihe bya mbere. Muri iyo minsi mukimara kumurikirwa n'Imana
Hebrews10:33 Rimwe kwari ugutukwa no kugirirwa nabi ku mugaragaro. Ubundi kandi kwari ukwifatanya n'abagirirwa bene ibyo.
Hebrews10:34 Koko kandi mwababaranye n'abari mu minyururu
Hebrews10:35 Nuko rero kuvuga mushize amanga ntimukabitezukeho
Hebrews10:36 Icyo mukeneye ni ukwihangana kugira ngo mukore ibyo Imana ibashakaho
Hebrews10:37 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga biti: “Hasigaye akanya gato ndetse ni gato cyane
Hebrews10:38 Umuntu untunganiye azabeshwaho no kunyizera
Hebrews10:39 Twe rero ntituri mu basubira inyuma bakajya kurimbuka
Hebrews11:1 Kwizera Imana ni ukwemera ko umaze guhabwa ibyo wiringiye kuzabona
Hebrews11:2 Uko kwizera ni ko kwatumye aba kera bashimwa n'Imana.
Hebrews11:3 Kwizera Imana bitwumvisha ukuntu yavuze maze ijuru n'isi bikabaho
Hebrews11:4 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Abeli ayitura igitambo kiyishimishije kiruta icya Kayini. Ni na ko kwatumye yemerwa ko atunganiye Imana
Hebrews11:5 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Henoki yimurwa ku isi atagombye gupfa
Hebrews11:6 Icyakora nta wabasha kunogera Imana atayizera
Hebrews11:7 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Nowa yita ku byo yaburiwe na yo ku byerekeye ibigiye kuzaba
Hebrews11:8 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Aburahamu ayumvira igihe yamuhamagaraga
Hebrews11:9 Kwizera Imana kwanatumye Aburahamu aba nk'umushyitsi muri icyo gihugu Imana yamusezeranyije. Aba mu mahema kimwe na Izaki na Yakobo
Hebrews11:10 Erega Aburahamu yari ategereje kuzatura mu murwa wahanzwe n'Imana ubwayo
Hebrews11:11 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Sara abasha gusama inda
Hebrews11:12 Bityo rero umukambwe umwe na we wasaga n'uwapfuye
Hebrews11:13 Abo bose bapfuye bagifitiye Imana icyizere. Bari batarahabwa ibyo yabasezeranyije
Hebrews11:14 Abavuga batyo baba beruye ko bashaka igihugu cyabo bwite.
Hebrews11:15 Iyo baza rero gukumbura igihugu bari baravuyemo
Hebrews11:16 Ahubwo bifuzaga igihugu kirusha icyo kuba cyiza
Hebrews11:17 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Aburahamu atura Izaki ho igitambo
Hebrews11:18 Imana yari yaramubwiye iti: “Izaki ni we uzakomokwaho n'urubyaro nagusezeranyije.”
Hebrews11:19 Aburahamu yibwiraga ko nubwo umuntu yaba apfuye
Hebrews11:20 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Izaki aha Yakobo na Ezawu umugisha ku byo bazahabwa bwanyuma.
Hebrews11:21 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Yakobo atarapfa aha umugisha abahungu bombi ba Yozefu. Yabikoze yishingikirije inkoni ye
Hebrews11:22 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Yozefu ajya kwitārūra
Hebrews11:23 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye ababyeyi ba Musa bamuhisha amezi atatu amaze kuvuka. Babonye ko ari umwana mwiza ntibatinya kurenga ku itegeko ry'umwami wa Misiri.
Hebrews11:24 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Musa ubwo yari amaze gukura
Hebrews11:25 Ahubwo yiyemeza kugirirwa nabi hamwe n'ubwoko bw'Imana
Hebrews11:26 Yasangaga ko guteshwa agaciro nka Kristo ari ubukungu buruta kure umutungo wose w'igihugu cya Misiri
Hebrews11:27 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Musa ava mu Misiri
Hebrews11:28 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwamuteye kandi gushyiraho umuhango wa Pasika
Hebrews11:29 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Abisiraheli bambuka Inyanja Itukura
Hebrews11:30 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye inkuta z'umujyi wa Yeriko ziritagurika
Hebrews11:31 Kwizera Imana ni na ko kwatumye ya ndaya yitwa Rahabu idapfana n'abatumvira Imana
Hebrews11:32 Nongere mvuge iki se kandi? Igihe cyambana gito
Hebrews11:33 Kubera ukwizera Imana kwabo bigaruriye ibihugu
Hebrews11:34 bazimya umuriro ugurumana
Hebrews11:35 Abagore bahabwa ababo bazuwe mu bapfuye. Abandi bishwe urubozo ntibemera kurengerwa
Hebrews11:36 Bamwe bahawe urw'amenyo bakubitwa ibiboko
Hebrews11:37 Bamwe bicishijwe guterwa amabuye
Hebrews11:38 Yemwe
Hebrews11:39 Abo bose Imana yarāse ukwizera kwabo
Hebrews11:40 Erega natwe Imana yaduteganyirije ibyiza bihebuje
Hebrews12:1 Natwe rero ubwo tuzengurutswe n'imbaga ingana ityo y'abahamije ibyo bizera
Hebrews12:2 Duhange Yezu amaso we nkomoko y'ukwizera kwacu
Hebrews12:3 Nuko nimumwibuke
Hebrews12:4 Erega mu ntambara muhanganye n'ibyaha
Hebrews12:5 Kandi rero mwibagiwe ya magambo yo kubakomeza Imana yababwiye nk'ubwira abana be iti: “Mwana wanjye
Hebrews12:6 Koko rero Nyagasani acyaha uwo akunda
Hebrews12:7 Noneho mwihanganire guhanwa n'Imana
Hebrews12:8 Niba rero mudahanwa nk'uko umwana wese ahanwa na se
Hebrews12:9 Ba data batubyaye ku buryo busanzwe ko baduhanaga tukabubaha
Hebrews12:10 Ba data baduhanaga uko babyumvaga na bwo by'igihe gito
Hebrews12:11 Nta muntu uhanwa ngo muri ako kanya bimushimishe
Hebrews12:12 Kubera iyo mpamvu nimukomeze amaboko ananiwe n'amavi adandabirana.
Hebrews12:13 Muhange inzira zigororotse
Hebrews12:14 Mwihatire kubana n'abantu bose mu mahoro no kuba abaziranenge
Hebrews12:15 Murabe maso kugira ngo hatagira ucogora ngo yivutse ubuntu Imana igira. Ntihakagire umuntu uba nk'umuzi mubi ushibuka ukēra imbuto zisharira
Hebrews12:16 Ntihakagire umuntu uba umusambanyi
Hebrews12:17 Muzi ko bitinze yashatse ko se amuraga umugisha umukwiye maze ntawuhabwe. Ntiyari agishoboye guhindura ibyo yari yarakoze nubwo yabishatse arira.
Hebrews12:18 Mwe rero ntimuri nk'Abisiraheli ba kera
Hebrews12:19 n'impanda zivuga n'ijwi rirangīra. Abumvise iryo jwi basabye bakomeje ko ritongera kuvuga rwose.
Hebrews12:20 Ntibabashaga kwihanganira kumva ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru agira ati: “Uzakora kuri uyu musozi wese azicishwa amabuye
Hebrews12:21 Ibyo babonaga byari biteye ubwoba koko
Hebrews12:22 Ahubwo mwegereye umusozi Siyoni n'umurwa w'Imana
Hebrews12:23 Mwegereye n'imbaga y'abana b'impfura b'Imana amazina yabo akaba yanditswe mu ijuru. Mwegereye kandi Imana umucamanza wa bose
Hebrews12:24 Ndetse mwegereye na Yezu Umuhuza w'Imana n'abagengwa n'Isezerano rishya
Hebrews12:25 Muramenye ntimwange kumva uvuga! Abanze kumva uwababuriye ku isi ntibanze no guhanwa. Twe rero byaba bikabije. Twazahungira he igihano niba twirengagiza utuburira wo mu ijuru?
Hebrews12:26 Cya gihe ijwi ry'Imana ryatigishije isi
Hebrews12:27 Iryo jambo ngo: “Hasigaye rimwe …”
Hebrews12:28 Dushimire Imana rero ko yaduhaye ubwami budashobora guhungabanywa. Bityo tuyisenge uko ishaka
Hebrews12:29 Erega Imana yacu ni nk'umuriro ukongora!
Hebrews13:1 Ntimuhweme gukundana bya kivandimwe.
Hebrews13:2 Ntimukibagirwe no kwakira abashyitsi. Erega hari bamwe babikoze
Hebrews13:3 Muzirikane abanyururu nk'aho mufunganywe na bo. Mwibuke n'abagirirwa nabi
Hebrews13:4 Gushyingiranwa kubahwe n'abantu bose
Hebrews13:5 Ntimugatwarwe n'inyota y'ifaranga ahubwo munyurwe n'ibyo mufite
Hebrews13:6 Ni cyo gituma tuvuga nta cyo twishisha tuti: “Nyagasani ni we unshyigikiye
Hebrews13:7 Mujye mwibuka abayobozi banyu babagejejeho Ijambo ry'Imana. Muzirikane uko babayeho n'uko bapfuye
Hebrews13:8 Yezu Kristo uko yari ari ejo na none ni ko ari
Hebrews13:9 Ntimugateshwe inzira n'inyigisho zitari zimwe z'inzaduka. Icyiza ni uko imitima yacu yatungwa n'ubuntu Imana igira
Hebrews13:10 Twe dufite urutambiro rundi
Hebrews13:11 Ubusanzwe Umutambyi mukuru ajyana amaraso y'amatungo atuwe Imana mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane
Hebrews13:12 Ni cyo gituma Yezu yaraguye inyuma y'irembo rya Yeruzalemu
Hebrews13:13 Noneho rero nimucyo dusohoke tumusange inyuma y'inkambi
Hebrews13:14 Erega nta mujyi uhoraho dufite hano ku isi
Hebrews13:15 Nuko rero ntiduhweme gutura Imana ibitambo by'ishimwe tubikesha Yezu. Ni ukuvuga ngo tujye tuyogeza mu ruhame
Hebrews13:16 Ntimukibagirwe kugira neza no gusangira ibyo mufite
Hebrews13:17 Mwumvire ababayobora kandi mwemere kugengwa na bo
Hebrews13:18 Mukomeze kudusabira. Turahamya ko nta kibi imitima yacu iturega
Hebrews13:19 Ndabinginze murusheho kunsabira
Hebrews13:20 Umwami wacu Yezu ari we mushumba mukuru w'intama
Hebrews13:21 
Hebrews13:22 Bavandimwe
Hebrews13:23 Mumenye kandi ko umuvandimwe wacu Timoteyo yafunguwe. Naramuka angezeho vuba tuzazana kubasura.
Hebrews13:24 Muramutse ababayobora bose
Hebrews13:25 Nyagasani nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese.
James1:1 Jyewe Yakobo umugaragu w'Imana n'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo
James1:2 Bavandimwe
James1:3 Mumenye ko iyo ukwizera Imana kwanyu kugeragejwe bibatera kwihangana.
James1:4 Mureke ukwihangana kurangize umurimo wako
James1:5 Niba muri mwe hari ubuze ubwenge nasabe Imana ibumuhe
James1:6 Ariko asabe yizeye ari nta cyo ashidikanya
James1:7 Umuntu nk'uwo ntakībwire ko hari icyo Nyagasani yamuha
James1:8 kuko ari nyamujyiryanino uhindagurika mu byo akora byose.
James1:9 Umuvandimwe woroheje ajye yishimira ko Imana imushyira ejuru
James1:10 n'umukungu na we ajye yishimira ko Imana imucisha bugufi
James1:11 Izuba rirarasa maze ryakara rikumisha ibyatsi
James1:12 Hahirwa umuntu wihanganira ibimugerageza
James1:13 Igihe umuntu ashutswe ngo akore icyaha ntakavuge ati: “Imana ni yo inshutse”
James1:14 Ahubwo umuntu wese ashukwa igihe irari rye bwite rimukuruye rikamugusha mu mutego
James1:15 nyuma iryo rari rigatwita rikabyara icyaha
James1:16 Bavandimwe nkunda
James1:17 Icyiza cyose umuntu agabiwe kimwe n'impano yose ihebuje ahawe
James1:18 Ni yo yiyemeje kutubyara ikoresheje Ijambo ry'ukuri
James1:19 Bavandimwe nkunda
James1:20 kuko umuntu urakaye adakora ibitunganiye Imana.
James1:21 Kubera ibyo rero mwitandukanye n'ibyanduza umutima byose
James1:22 Ntimukishuke ngo mupfe kumva Ijambo ry'Imana gusa
James1:23 kuko uwumva iryo Jambo ntarikurikize
James1:24 nyuma akagenda agahita yibagirwa uko asa.
James1:25 Ariko uhanga amaso ku Mategeko atagira amakemwa
James1:26 Umuntu wibwira ko ari umunyedini nyamara ntagenge ururimi rwe aba yishuka
James1:27 Idini itunganye kandi idafite inenge ndetse igashimwa n'Imana Data
James2:1 Bavandimwe
James2:2 Tuvuge ko mu ikoraniro ryanyu haje umuntu wambaye impeta y'izahabu ku rutoki n'imyenda ibengerana
James2:3 Nuko mukita ku wambaye imyenda ibengerana mukamubwira muti: “Nimushyike aha hantu mwateguriwe.” Nuko mukabwira wa mukene muti: “Hagarara hariya!”
James2:4 Mbese iyo mugize mutyo ntimuba musumbanyije abantu
James2:5 Bavandimwe nkunda
James2:6 Nyamara mwebwe musuzugura abakene. Mbese ye
James2:7 Ese si bo batuka rya zina ryiza mwitiriwe?
James2:8 Ahubwo muba mukoze neza iyo mukurikije Itegeko ry'ubwami bw'Imana
James2:9 Ariko niba musumbanya abantu muba mukora icyaha
James2:10 Umuntu ukurikiza Amategeko iyo agize rimwe ateshukaho
James2:11 Erega iyavuze iti: “Ntugasambane” ni na yo yavuze iti: “Ntukice.” None rero niba udasambana ariko ukica
James2:12 Mu byo muvuga no mu byo mukora
James2:13 Utagiriye abandi impuhwe azacirwa iteka nta mpuhwe. Nyamara uwagize impuhwe nta rubanza ruzamutsinda.
James2:14 Bavandimwe
James2:15 Tuvuge ko abavandimwe bambaye ubusa bakaba babuze ibibatunga
James2:16 umwe muri mwe akababwira ati: “Nimugende amahoro
James2:17 Bityo ukwizera Imana iyo kuri konyine kutarangwa n'ibikorwa
James2:18 Ariko umuntu ashobora kuvuga ati: “Wowe wizera Imana
James2:19 Mbese wizera Imana ukemera ko ari imwe rukumbi? Ibyo ni byiza. Erega n'ingabo za Satani ni ko zibyemera
James2:20 Wa mupfu we
James2:21 Mbese sogokuruza Aburahamu si ibikorwa bye byatumye atunganira Imana
James2:22 Urumva ko kwizera Imana kwe n'ibikorwa bye byagendanaga
James2:23 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Aburahamu yizeye Imana bituma abarwa nk'intungane”
James2:24 Murabona ko umuntu atagirwa intungane imbere y'Imana no kuyizera konyine
James2:25 Mbese Rahabu w'indaya we Imana ntiyamugize intungane bitewe n'ibikorwa bye
James2:26 Erega n'ubundi nk'uko umuntu udafite umwuka aba apfuye
James3:1 Bavandimwe
James3:2 Twese dufudika mu buryo bwinshi. Udafudika mu byo avuga aba ari indakemwa
James3:3 Dushyira utwuma mu kanwa k'amafarasi bityo akatwumvira
James3:4 Dore n'amato yo mu nyanja nubwo ari manini bwose kandi akagenzwa n'inkubi y'umuyaga
James3:5 N'ururimi na rwo ni ruto mu ngingo z'umubiri
James3:6 Ururimi na rwo ni umuriro. Ni isangano y'ububi bungana n'isi. Ni rumwe mu ngingo z'umubiri wacu kandi rukawangiza wose
James3:7 Amoko yose y'inyamaswa n'inyoni n'ibikururuka n'ibikoko biba mu mazi
James3:8 Ariko ururimi rwo nta wagira icyo arutoza ngo arushobore. Ni icyorezo kidahosha cyuzuye uburozi bwica.
James3:9 Ni rwo dukoresha ngo dushimire Nyagasani Imana ari yo Data
James3:10 Bityo mu kanwa kamwe hakavamo umugisha n'umuvumo. Bavandimwe
James3:11 Mbese isōko imwe yavubura amazi meza n'arura?
James3:12 Bavandimwe
James3:13 Ni nde muri mwe ufite ubwenge no gusobanukirwa? Nabyerekanishe ibyo akora abiterwa n'imyifatire myiza
James3:14 Ariko niba imitima yanyu yuzuye ishyari n'amakimbirane
James3:15 Ubwenge nk'ubwo ntibuturuka mu ijuru
James3:16 Ahari ishyari n'amakimbirane
James3:17 Ariko ubwenge buturuka mu ijuru icya mbere buraboneye
James3:18 Abanyamahoro babiba ibizana amahoro
James4:1 Mbese izo ntambara n'amahane biri muri mwe bikomoka he? Aho ntibikomoka ku byo murarikira birwanira mu mibiri yanyu?
James4:2 Mwifuza ikintu mwakibura mukica. Muhirimbanira ikintu
James4:3 N'iyo musabye ntimuhabwa kuko musaba nabi
James4:4 Mwa basambanyi mwe
James4:5 Ese mutekereza ko Ibyanditswe ari ugupfa kuvuga
James4:6 Nyamara kandi ubuntu Imana igira burahebuje
James4:7 Nuko rero nimwemere kugengwa n'Imana
James4:8 Nimwegere Imana na yo izabegera. Mwa banyabyaha mwe
James4:9 Nimushavure
James4:10 Mwicishe bugufi imbere ya Nyagasani na we azabakuza.
James4:11 Bavandimwe
James4:12 Imana yonyine ni yo itanga Amategeko kandi igaca imanza. Ni yo ifite ububasha bwo gukiza abantu no kubatsemba. Naho se wowe uri nde ngo unegure mugenzi wawe?
James4:13 Yemwe abavuga muti: “Uyu munsi cyangwa ejo tuzajya mu mujyi uyu n'uyu tumareyo umwaka
James4:14 Mwebwe habe ngo muzi n'uko muzaba mumeze ejo! Mbese ubugingo bwanyu ni iki? Mumeze nk'igihu kiboneka akanya gato kikaba kirayoyotse.
James4:15 Ahubwo mwari mukwiriye kuvuga muti: “Nyagasani nabishaka tuzabaho maze dukore ibi n'ibi.”
James4:16 Nyamara ubu murirata ndetse mukirarira! Bene ubwo bwirasi ni bubi.
James4:17 Nuko rero umuntu uzi gukora icyiza ntagikore aba akoze icyaha.
James5:1 Mwa bakire mwe
James5:2 Ubukungu bwanyu bwaraboze n'imyambaro yanyu yariwe n'inyenzi.
James5:3 Izahabu n'ifeza mwabitse byaguye ingese
James5:4 Abasaruye imyaka yanyu ntimwabahembye none dore baraboroga! Umuborogo wabo kandi wageze mu matwi ya Nyagasani Nyiringabo.
James5:5 Mwadābagiriye ku isi murarengwa. Mwashishe nk'amatungo none dore umunsi wo kubagwa urageze!
James5:6 Intungane mwaziciriye urwo gupfa ntizabarwanya murazica!
James5:7 Bavandimwe
James5:8 Namwe mube ari ko mwihangana mukomere
James5:9 Bavandimwe
James5:10 Bavandimwe
James5:11 Dore abadacogora tubita abanyehirwe. Mwumvise uko Yobu yihanganye n'ibyo Nyagasani yamukoreye hanyuma
James5:12 Cyane cyane bavandimwe
James5:13 Mbese hari ubabaye muri mwe? Nasenge Imana. Hari uwishimye? Naririmbe asingize Imana.
James5:14 Mbese hari urwaye muri mwe? Natumize abakuru b'itorero bamusabire
James5:15 Byongeye kandi nibasenga bizeye Nyagasani
James5:16 Mujye mubwirana ibyaha byanyu kandi musabirane
James5:17 Eliya yari umuntu umeze nkatwe. Yasabye Imana ko imvura itagwa
James5:18 Hanyuma yongera gusenga
James5:19 Bavandimwe
James5:20 mumenye ko ugaruye umunyabyaha akava mu nzira yayobeyemo
1Peter1:1 Jyewe Petero Intumwa ya Yezu Kristo
1Peter1:2 Imana Data yabatoranyije ikurikije umugambi yagize kuva kera
1Peter1:3 Nihasingizwe Imana se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo
1Peter1:4 Bityo mutegereje umunani mwabikiwe mu ijuru utabora
1Peter1:5 Kwizera Imana kwanyu gutuma murindwa n'ububasha bwayo
1Peter1:6 Ni byo bibatera guhimbarwa
1Peter1:7 Icyo bigamije ni ukugira ngo ukwizera kwanyu kugeragezwe. Koko kandi ukwizera kwanyu kurusha kure izahabu agaciro
1Peter1:8 We muramukunda mutamubonye
1Peter1:9 kuko mwegukanye agakiza mwari mwizeye.
1Peter1:10 Ako gakiza ni ko abahanuzi bashakashatse babishishikariye
1Peter1:11 Bihatiraga kumenya ibyo Mwuka wa Kristo yabagaragarizaga
1Peter1:12 Imana yahishuriye abo bahanuzi ko ubutumwa yabashinze atari bo bugenewe
1Peter1:13 Nuko rero nimuhaguruke mwitegure
1Peter1:14 Mwumvire Imana nk'abana bayo
1Peter1:15 Ahubwo mube abaziranenge mu myifatire yanyu yose
1Peter1:16 kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Mube abaziranenge kuko nanjye ndi umuziranenge.”
1Peter1:17 Ubwo mwiyambaza Imana muyita So yo ifata abantu bose kimwe
1Peter1:18 Muzi ko atari ibintu bita agaciro nk'ifeza cyangwa izahabu
1Peter1:19 Ahubwo icyabacunguye ni amaraso ya Kristo y'igiciro gikomeye
1Peter1:20 Imana yari yaragennye ko Kristo akora ibyo mbere y'uko isi iremwa
1Peter1:21 Ni we ubaha kwemera Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye ikamuha n'ikuzo
1Peter1:22 Mwiyejesheje kumvira ukuri kw'Imana kugira ngo mukundane bya kivandimwe
1Peter1:23 kuko mwabyawe ubwa kabiri bidakomotse ku mbuto ibora
1Peter1:24 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Abantu bose bameze nk'ibyatsi
1Peter1:25 ariko ijambo rya Nyagasani rihoraho iteka.” Iryo jambo ni ryo Butumwa bwiza babagejejeho.
1Peter2:1 Nuko rero nimwivaneho icyitwa ubugizi bwa nabi n'uburiganya bwose
1Peter2:2 Nk'uko uruhinja rukenera konka
1Peter2:3 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Mwamaze gusogongera mumenya uko Nyagasani agira neza.”
1Peter2:4 Nimwegere Nyagasani we buye rizima abantu banze
1Peter2:5 Namwe nimumusange muri nk'amabuye mazima
1Peter2:6 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye natoranyije
1Peter2:7 Nuko rero mwebwe abemera Kristo iryo buye ribafitiye agaciro
1Peter2:8 Kandi ngo: “Iryo ni ibuye risitaza abantu
1Peter2:9 Ariko mwebweho muri ubwoko bwatoranyijwe n'abatambyi bakorera Umwami Imana n'abantu baziranenge
1Peter2:10 Kera ntimwari ubwoko
1Peter2:11 Ncuti nkunda
1Peter2:12 Mugire imyifatire myiza hagati y'abatazi Imana
1Peter2:13 Ku mpamvu za Nyagasani Umugenga wanyu mwemere kugengwa n'umutegetsi uwo ari we wese
1Peter2:14 cyangwa abatware be yatumye guhana abakora nabi no gushima abakora neza.
1Peter2:15 Koko rero Imana ishaka ko mukora neza
1Peter2:16 Mumere nk'abantu bishyira bakizana
1Peter2:17 Muhe abantu bose agaciro
1Peter2:18 Bagaragu
1Peter2:19 Erega bishimisha Imana igihe umuntu yihanganira kugirirwa nabi arengana
1Peter2:20 None se mwashimwa mute igihe mwihanganiye gukubitwa muhōrwa ibyaha byanyu? Ariko rero igihe mwakoze neza mukabihōrwa maze mukihangana
1Peter2:21 Ibyo ni byo Imana yabahamagariye
1Peter2:22 We nta cyaha yigeze akora
1Peter2:23 Yaratutswe ntiyasubiza
1Peter2:24 Kristo ubwe yatwaye ibyaha byacu mu mubiri we
1Peter2:25 Mwari mumeze nk'intama zazimiye”
1Peter3:1 Namwe bagore
1Peter3:2 Bazareba gusa imyifatire yanyu itagira amakemwa n'ukuntu mwubaha.
1Peter3:3 Umurimbo wanyu ntukabe uw'inyuma nko kuboha imisatsi
1Peter3:4 Ahubwo umurimbo wanyu ube uw'imbere mu mutima. Ni umurimbo udasaza w'ubugwaneza n'amahoro
1Peter3:5 Abagore ba kera biyeguriye Imana bakayiringira ni ko na bo barimbaga
1Peter3:6 Ni ko na Sara yari ameze
1Peter3:7 Namwe bagabo
1Peter3:8 Ahasigaye mwese muhuze ibitekerezo
1Peter3:9 Ntimukiture umuntu inabi yabagiriye cyangwa igitutsi yabatutse
1Peter3:10 Ibyanditswe biravuga biti: “Ushaka ubugingo no guhorana amahoro
1Peter3:11 Azibukire ibibi akore ibyiza
1Peter3:12 Kuko Nyagasani ahoza ijisho ku ntungane
1Peter3:13 Mbese ni nde uzabagirira nabi nimugira ishyaka ryo gukora ibyiza?
1Peter3:14 Icyakora nubwo mwababazwa muzira ibikorwa bitunganye
1Peter3:15 Ahubwo mwubahe Kristo abe Umugenga w'imitima yanyu. Muhore kandi mwiteguye gusubiza umuntu wese wabasaba gusobanura ibyo mwiringira.
1Peter3:16 Ariko mubikorane ubugwaneza no kwicisha bugufi. Mugire umutima utabarega ikibi
1Peter3:17 Niba Imana ibishaka
1Peter3:18 Kristo na we yapfuye rimwe rizima kubera ibyaha byanyu
1Peter3:19 Yakoresheje Mwuka atangariza ubutumwa bw'Imana abapfuye bagizwe imfungwa.
1Peter3:20 Ni zo ba bantu bari baragomeye Imana
1Peter3:21 Ayo mazi ashushanya kubatizwa ari byo bibakiza namwe muri iki gihe. Si uko yuhagira umuntu imbyiro zo ku mubiri
1Peter3:22 wagiye mu ijuru akaba ari iburyo bw'Imana
1Peter4:1 Ubwo Kristo yababajwe mu mubiri
1Peter4:2 Bityo igihe mushigaje kubaho mureke gukurikiza ibyo abantu bararikira
1Peter4:3 Erega mwamaze igihe gihagije mukora ibyo abatazi Imana baharanira! Dore ibyo mwabagamo: ubwomanzi n'irari
1Peter4:4 Ubu rero abatazi Nyagasani basigaye babatangarira
1Peter4:5 Nyamara ibyo bazabibazwa na Nyagasani
1Peter4:6 Ni cyo cyatumye Ubutumwa bwiza butangarizwa abapfuye na bo
1Peter4:7 Iherezo ry'ibintu byose riregereje. Kubera iyo mpamvu mujye mushyira mu gaciro
1Peter4:8 Mbere ya byose mukundane urukundo rudatezuka
1Peter4:9 Mujye mwakira abashyitsi mutinuba.
1Peter4:10 Umuntu wese uko Imana yamuhaye impano ajye ayikoresha yunganira abandi
1Peter4:11 Nihagira uterura kuvuga
1Peter4:12 Ncuti nkunda
1Peter4:13 Ahubwo mwishimire gufatanya na Kristo imibabaro
1Peter4:14 Murahirwa niba babatuka babahōra Kristo
1Peter4:15 Ntihagire umuntu n'umwe muri mwe uhōrwa ko ari umwicanyi cyangwa umujura
1Peter4:16 Nyamara nahōrwa ko ari umukristo ntibikamutere isoni
1Peter4:17 Koko rero igihe cy'urubanza kirageze kandi rubanjirije kuri twebwe ab'inzu y'Imana. None se ubwo rubanjirije kuri twe
1Peter4:18 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Ubwo intungane zirokoka biziruhije
1Peter4:19 Kubera ibyo abababazwa bahōrwa gukora ibyo Imana ishaka
1Peter5:1 Abakuru b'itorero rya Kristo bo muri mwe ndabihanangiriza. Nanjye ndi umukuru hamwe namwe
1Peter5:2 Noneho nimukenure umukumbi w'Imana yabaragije mubikore mutinuba
1Peter5:3 Ntimugatwaze igitugu abo mwaragijwe
1Peter5:4 Bityo ubwo Umushumba mukuru azaba ahingutse
1Peter5:5 Namwe basore
1Peter5:6 Nuko rero mwicishe bugufi imbere y'Imana igira amaboko
1Peter5:7 Ibibahagarika imitima byose mubiyegurire kuko ibitaho.
1Peter5:8 Mwirinde gutegekwa n'inda kandi mube maso
1Peter5:9 Mumurwanye kigabo mwitwaje kwizera Kristo
1Peter5:10 Ariko nimumara kubabazwa igihe gito
1Peter5:11 Iragahorana ingoma iteka ryose. Amina.
1Peter5:12 Mbandikiye aya magambo make mfashijwe na Silasi
1Peter5:13 Abari i Babiloni batoranyijwe n'Imana kimwe namwe barabatashya
1Peter5:14 Nimuramukanye muhoberana mu ndamutso y'urukundo. Abari muri Kristo mwese nimugire amahoro.
2Peter1:1 Jyewe Simoni Petero umugaragu wa Yezu Kristo n'Intumwa ye
2Peter1:2 Imana nibagirire ubuntu ibahe n'amahoro bisendereye
2Peter1:3 Kubera ububasha bwayo Imana yaduhaye ibya ngombwa byose
2Peter1:4 Ni cyo cyatumye aduha amasezerano akomeye cyane kandi afite agaciro
2Peter1:5 Kubera iyo mpamvu murusheho kugira umwete wo kwizera Imana
2Peter1:6 ubumenyi na bwo mubugerekeho kumenya kwifata
2Peter1:7 maze kubaha Imana mukugerekeho kubana kwa kivandimwe
2Peter1:8 Nimugira mutyo byimazeyo bizabarinda kuba abanebwe
2Peter1:9 Umuntu utagenza atyo aba ari nk'impumyi ireba ibiyegereye gusa
2Peter1:10 Ubwo bimeze bityo bavandimwe
2Peter1:11 Ahubwo bizabahesha kwakiranwa ubwuzu mu bwami buhoraho bwa Yezu Kristo
2Peter1:12 Ni yo mpamvu nzahora mbibutsa ibyo ngibyo nubwo musanzwe mubizi
2Peter1:13 Ndibwira ko ari ngombwa guhora mbakangura
2Peter1:14 Nzi yuko bidatinze ngiye kwimuka nkava muri uyu mubiri nsembereyemo
2Peter1:15 Nuko rero nzakora uko nshoboye kose
2Peter1:16 Igihe twabamenyeshaga uko Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo azaza afite ububasha
2Peter1:17 Icyo gihe Imana Data yamuhaye agaciro n'ikuzo
2Peter1:18 Igihe twari kumwe na we mu mpinga ya wa musozi w'Imana
2Peter1:19 Byongeye kandi turushaho kugirira icyizere ubutumwa bw'abahanuzi. Namwe muzaba mugize neza nimubwitaho
2Peter1:20 Mbere ya byose mumenye ko ari nta muntu ubasha kwisobanurira ubuhanuzi bwo mu Byanditswe ubwo ari bwo bwose.
2Peter1:21 Nta buhanuzi bwigeze kuvugwa ku bushake bw'umuntu habe na rimwe. Ahubwo abahanuzi bavugaga ibyo batumwe n'Imana bayobowe na Mwuka Muziranenge.
2Peter2:1 Ariko nk'uko abahanurabinyoma badutse kera muri rubanda
2Peter2:2 Benshi bazakurikiza ingeso zabo ziteye isoni
2Peter2:3 Kubera irari ryabo abo bigishabinyoma bazababwira amagambo bihimbiye bashaka kurya utwanyu. Nyamara kuva kera urubanza rwabo rwarateguwe
2Peter2:4 Abamarayika bakoze ibyaha na bo Imana ntiyabababariye
2Peter2:5 Byongeye kandi Imana ntiyababariye abo ku isi yo mu gihe cya kera
2Peter2:6 Imijyi ya Sodoma na Gomora na yo Imana yarayihannye
2Peter2:7 Yarokoye Loti w'intungane
2Peter2:8 Erega uwo muntu w'intungane yari aturanye na bo
2Peter2:9 Bityo Nyagasani azi uburyo bwo kuvana abamwubaha mu bigeragezo
2Peter2:10 Cyane cyane hazahanwa abakurikiza irari baterwa na kamere yabo yandavuye
2Peter2:11 Nyamara abamarayika nubwo babarusha cyane imbaraga n'ububasha
2Peter2:12 Ariko abo bantu batuka ibintu kandi batabizi. Bameze nk'inyamaswa zitagira ubwenge
2Peter2:13 Kubera ko bagiriye abandi nabi na bo baziturwa kugirirwa nabi. Bishimira kwiyandarika no ku manywa y'ihangu. Igihe basangira namwe ku munsi mukuru bakoza abantu isoni
2Peter2:14 Batwawe umutima n'abagore gito kandi ntibahwema gukora ibyaha
2Peter2:15 Bateshutse inzira iboneye banyura iya Balāmu mwene Bewori
2Peter2:16 Icyakora yarakangawe kubera icyo cyaha
2Peter2:17 Abo bantu bameze nk'amasōko yakamye
2Peter2:18 Bavuga ibigambo by'ubwirasi bitagira icyo bimara. Bareshya abantu bakoresha irari baterwa na kamere yabo
2Peter2:19 Basezeranira abantu kubakura mu buja
2Peter2:20 Ubundi abantu baca ukubiri n'iby'isi byonona ingeso
2Peter2:21 Icyajyaga kubabera cyiza ni ukutigera banyura inzira y'ubutungane kuruta kuyinyura
2Peter2:22 Bikababera nka wa mugani uvuga ukuri ngo: “Imbwa isubiye ku birutsi byayo”
2Peter3:1 Ncuti nkunda
2Peter3:2 Ndabibutsa ibyavuzwe kera n'abahanuzi batumwe n'Imana
2Peter3:3 Mbere ya byose mumenye ko mu minsi y'imperuka
2Peter3:4 bagira bati: “Mbese ntiyasezeranye ko azaza? None se ubu ari he? Ba sogokuruza bacu baritārūye
2Peter3:5 Abavuga batyo baba biyibagije ko kera Imana yavuze ijambo maze ijuru n'isi bikaremwa. Yaremye isi iyikuye mu mazi kandi ikoresheje amazi.
2Peter3:6 Byongeye kandi amazi ni yo yarenze hejuru y'abari ku isi cya gihe akabahitana.
2Peter3:7 Na none Ijambo ry'Imana ni ryo ryemeza ko ijuru n'isi by'ubu bibikiwe gutsembwa n'umuriro
2Peter3:8 Ariko ncuti nkunda
2Peter3:9 Nyagasani ntatinda gushyitsa amasezerano ye nk'uko bamwe babitekereza. Nyamara ni mwe yihanganira
2Peter3:10 Ku munsi wa Nyagasani azaza atunguranye nk'umujura. Uwo munsi ijuru rizavanwaho urusaku ari rwose
2Peter3:11 Nuko rero ubwo byose bizayoyoka bityo
2Peter3:12 mutegereza uwo munsi w'Imana mukanawutebutsa! Uwo munsi ijuru rizagurumana
2Peter3:13 Ariko nk'uko Imana yabisezeranye
2Peter3:14 None rero ncuti nkunda ubwo mutegereje ibyo
2Peter3:15 Mumenye yuko igituma Umwami wacu yihangana atyo
2Peter3:16 Ni ko yanditse mu nzandiko ze zose
2Peter3:17 Nuko rero ncuti nkunda
2Peter3:18 Ahubwo mutere imbere mu buntu Imana ibagirira no mu kumenya Yezu Kristo Umwami n'Umukiza wacu. Nahabwe ikuzo none n'iteka ryose. Amina.

1John1:7 Ariko niba tugendera mu mucyo nk'uko na yo iba mu mucyo
1John1:8 Niba tuvuga ko nta cyaha dufite tuba twishuka kandi nta kuri tuba dufite.
1John1:9 Nyamara nitwemera ko twakoze ibyaha
1John1:10 Niba tuvuga ko tutigeze dukora icyaha

Revelation2:20 Ariko mfite icyo nkugaya: ni uko wa mugore Yezebeli wiyita umuhanuzikazi
Revelation2:21 Namuhaye igihe cyo kwihana nyamara ntashaka kureka ubusambanyi bwe.
Revelation2:22 Ni cyo gituma ngiye kumuheza ku buriri hamwe n'abasambane be
Revelation2:23 Ndetse n'abana be nzabica

Revelation4:3 arabagirana nk'amabuye y'agaciro yitwa yasipi na sarudiyo. Iyo ntebe ya cyami kandi yari izengurutswe n'umukororombya warabagiranaga nk'ibuye rya emerodi.
Revelation4:4 Yari izengurutswe kandi n'izindi ntebe za cyami makumyabiri n'enye
Revelation4:5 Kuri iyo ntebe ya cyami haturukaga imirabyo n'amajwi no guhinda kw'inkuba. Imbere y'iyo ntebe hari hateretswe amatara arindwi yaka umuriro

Revelation14:20 Nuko izo mbuto z'imizabibu zengerwa inyuma y'umurwa
Revelation15:1 Nyuma mbona mu ijuru ikindi kimenyetso gikomeye kandi gitangaje: ni abamarayika barindwi bacigatiye ibyago birindwi by'imperuka
Revelation15:2 Nuko mbona igisa n'ikiyaga cy'ibirahure bivanzwemo umuriro. Mbona n'abatsinze cya gikōko n'ishusho yacyo
Revelation15:3 Baririmbaga indirimbo ya Musa umugaragu w'Imana

Revelation15:6 Ba bamarayika barindwi bacigatiye bya byago birindwi basohoka muri iyo Ngoro
Revelation15:7 Kimwe muri bya binyabuzima bine giha ba bamarayika barindwi inzabya ndwi z'izahabu
Revelation15:8 Iyo Ngoro yuzura umwotsi kubera ikuzo ry'Imana n'ububasha bwayo. Nta muntu n'umwe wabashije kwinjira mu Ngoro

Revelation16:2 Umumarayika wa mbere aragenda asuka urwabya rwe ku isi
Revelation16:3 Umumarayika wa kabiri asuka urwabya rwe mu nyanja
Revelation16:4 Umumarayika wa gatatu asuka urwabya rwe mu nzuzi no mu masōko y'amazi
Revelation16:5 Nuko numva umumarayika ushinzwe iby'amazi agira ati: “Uri intabera kuko wagennye guca imanza utyo
Revelation16:6 Kubera ko bamennye amaraso y'intore zawe n'ay'abahanuzi bawe
Revelation16:7 Hanyuma numva ijwi ry'uvugira ku rutambiro agira ati: “Ni koko Nyagasani Mana Ishoborabyose
Revelation16:8 Umumarayika wa kane asuka urwabya rwe ku zuba
Revelation16:9 Nuko abantu bababurwa n'icyokere cy'izuba rikaze
Revelation16:10 Umumarayika wa gatanu asuka urwabya rwe ku ntebe ya cyami ya cya gikōko
Revelation16:11 maze batuka Imana nyir'ijuru kubera ububabare n'ibisebe bafite. Nyamara ntibemera kwisubiraho ngo bareke ibibi bakora.
Revelation16:12 Umumarayika wa gatandatu asuka urwabya rwe mu ruzi rugari rwa Efurati
Revelation16:13 Nuko mbona ingabo za Satani eshatu zisa n'ibikeri
Revelation16:14 Izo ni zo ngabo za Satani zikora ibitangaza byo kwemeza abantu
Revelation16:15 Nyagasani aravuga ati: “Dore ndaje ngutunguye nk'umujura! Hahirwa umuntu wese uhora ari maso
Revelation16:16 Izo ngabo za Satani zikoranyiriza abami ahantu hitwa Harimagedoni mu giheburayi.
Revelation16:17 Umumarayika wa karindwi asuka urwabya rwe mu kirere

Revelation17:1 Hanyuma umwe mu bamarayika barindwi bari bafashe za nzabya ndwi araza arambwira ati: “Ngwino nkwereke igihano giteganyirijwe indaya kabuhariwe
Revelation17:2 Abami bo ku isi basambanye na yo
Revelation17:3 Mwuka w'Imana anzaho maze ndabonekerwa
Revelation17:4 Umugore yari yambaye imyenda y'agaciro y'umutuku wijimye n'itukura tukutuku
Revelation17:5 Mu ruhanga rwe hari handitswe izina ry'irigenurano ngo: “Babiloni y'icyatwa
Revelation17:6 Nuko mbona ko uwo mugore yasinze amaraso y'intore z'Imana
Revelation17:7 Nuko umumarayika arambaza ati: “Utangajwe n'iki? Ngiye kugusobanurira amayobera yerekeye uwo mugore n'ayerekeye igikōko kimuhetse
Revelation17:8 Igikōko wabonye cyahozeho kera none ntikikiriho. Ubu kigiye kuva ikuzimu kugira ngo kirimburwe. Abatuye isi batanditswe mu gitabo cy'ubugingo kuva isi ikiremwa
Revelation17:9 “Kuri ibyo haragomba ubwenge butuma umuntu asobanukirwa. Ya mitwe irindwi ni yo misozi irindwi wa mugore yicayeho. Ubundi kandi ni yo bami barindwi
Revelation17:10 abatanu muri bo barahangutse
Revelation17:11 Cya gikōko cyahozeho ubu kikaba kitakiriho
Revelation17:12 “Amahembe icumi wabonye na yo ni abami icumi bataratangira kwima ingoma
Revelation17:13 Bose uko ari icumi bahuje umugambi wo kwegurira cya gikōko ububasha n'ubushobozi bwabo.
Revelation17:14 Bazarwanya Umwana w'intama
Revelation17:15 Umumarayika arongera arambwira ati: “Amazi wabonye ha handi ya ndaya yicaye
Revelation17:16 Na ya mahembe icumi wabonye kimwe na cya gikōko
Revelation17:17 Erega Imana yashyize umugambi wayo mu mitima yabyo
Revelation17:18 “Naho umugore wabonye ni wa mujyi w'icyatwa
Revelation18:1 Hanyuma mbona undi mumarayika amanutse ava mu ijuru. Aza afite ubushobozi burambuye
Revelation18:2 Nuko arangurura ijwi cyane agira ati: “Babiloni irasenyutse! Irasenyutse Babiloni wa mujyi w'icyatwa! Usigaye utuwe n'ingabo za Satani
Revelation18:3 Amahanga yose yanyoye inzoga zawo
Revelation18:4 Hanyuma numva ijwi ry'undi uvugira mu ijuru agira ati: “Nimusohoke muri Babiloni bantu banjye
Revelation18:5 Erega ibyaha byayo byarenze ihaniro
Revelation18:6 Nimuyīture ibihwanye n'ibyo yakoze
Revelation18:7 Aho Babiloni iyo yageze yiha ikuzo n'umurengwe
Revelation18:8 Ni yo mpamvu ibyorezo biyigenewe
Revelation18:9 Abami b'isi bihaye gusambana n'icyo cyatwa Babiloni bakarengwa
Revelation18:10 Bazayitaza kubera gutinya ububabare bwayo bagire bati: “Mbega ishyano! Mbega ishyano rikugwiriye
Revelation18:11 Abacuruzi bo ku isi na bo baririra uwo mujyi ndetse bawugira mu cyunamo
Revelation18:12 Ntawe ukigura izahabu yabo n'ifeza
Revelation18:13 Ntawe ukigura n'ibyitwa sinamomu n'ishangi
Revelation18:14 Abo bacuruzi babwira uwo mujyi bati: “Ibyo wararikiye kubona byagushizeho
Revelation18:15 Abakungahajwe no gucuruza muri uwo mujyi bazawitarura
Revelation18:16 bavuge bati: “Mbega ishyano! Mbega ishyano rigwiriye umujyi w'icyatwa! Wari wambaye imyenda myiza inoze
Revelation18:17 Nyamara isaha imwe irahagije kugira ngo ubukungu bwawo buwushireho!” Abayobozi b'amato n'abagenzi atwara
Revelation18:18 Babonye umwotsi w'inkongi yawo bariyamira cyane bati: “Nta mujyi wigeze kubaho uhwanye n'uyu w'icyatwa!”
Revelation18:19 Biyorera umukungugu ku mutwe
Revelation18:20 Icyakora wowe wa juru we ishime
Revelation18:21 Umumarayika w'igihangange aherako aterura ibuye ringana n'urusyo runini cyane

Revelation18:23 Urumuri rw'itara ntiruzakuboneshereza ukundi
Revelation18:24 Koko Babiloni yahōwe gutahurwamo amaraso y'abahanuzi n'ay'intore z'Imana
Revelation19:1 Nyuma y'ibyo mu ijuru numva urusaku rw'imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu bavuga cyane bati: “Haleluya! Agakiza n'ikuzo n'ububasha ni iby'Imana yacu.
Revelation19:2 Imanza ica ni iz'ukuri n'ubutabera. Yaruciriye ya ndaya kabuhariwe yahumanishije isi ubusambanyi bwayo. Imana yayihōye amaraso y'abagaragu bayo yishe.”
Revelation19:3 Barongera bati: “Haleluya! Inkongi y'uwo mujyi ihora icumba iteka ryose!”
Revelation19:4 Ba bakuru makumyabiri na bane bikubita hasi kimwe na bya binyabuzima bine
Revelation19:5 Numva ijwi ry'uvugira kuri ya ntebe ya cyami agira ati: “Nimushime Imana yacu
Revelation19:6 Hanyuma numva ijwi ry'imbaga nyamwinshi rirangira nk'amazi menshi asuma
Revelation19:7 Nitunezerwe twitere hejuru tumusingize
Revelation19:8 Yemerewe kwambara umwenda mwiza unoze
Revelation19:9 Nuko umumarayika arambwira ati: “Andika ibi: Hahirwa abatumiwe mu bukwe bw'Umwana w'intama.” Yungamo ati: “Ubwo ni ubutumwa bw'ukuri buvuye ku Mana.”
Revelation19:10 Mpita mwikubita imbere ngo muramye
Revelation19:11 Hanyuma mbona ijuru rikingutse mbona n'ifarasi y'igitare
Revelation19:12 Amaso ye ameze nk'ibirimi by'umuriro
Revelation19:13 Yambaye ikanzu yinitswe mu maraso kandi yitwa Jambo w'Imana.
Revelation19:14 Ingabo zo mu ijuru zari zimukurikiye zihetswe n'amafarasi y'ibitare
Revelation19:15 Mu kanwa ke havamo inkota ityaye azatera amahanga. Azayaragiza inkoni y'icyuma
Revelation19:16 Ku mwambaro we no ku kibero cye handitswe iri zina: “Umwami ugenga abami n'Umutegetsi ugenga abategetsi”.
Revelation19:17 Nuko mbona umumarayika uhagaze ku zuba. Arangurura ijwi cyane
Revelation19:18 Nimuze murye intumbi z'abami n'iz'abagaba b'ingabo n'iz'ibihangange. Murye intumbi z'amafarasi n'iz'abo yari ahetse. Murye abantu bose
Revelation19:19 Hanyuma mbona cya gikōko
Revelation19:20 Icyo gikōko kirafatwa
Revelation19:21 Ingabo zacyo zo zicishwa inkota iva mu kanwa k'Uhetswe n'ifarasi. Nuko ibisiga byose byijuta intumbi zazo.
Revelation20:1 Nuko mbona umumarayika amanuka ava mu ijuru
Revelation20:2 Agira atya asumira cya kiyoka
Revelation20:3 Aherako akiroha ikuzimu arahafunga arahadanangira
Revelation20:4 Mbona n'intebe za cyami zicaweho n'abahawe ubushobozi bwo guca imanza. Mbona n'abantu baciwe imitwe bahōrwa gukomera ku by'ukuri Yezu yahamije
Revelation20:5 Iryo ryabaye izuka rya mbere. Abapfuye bandi ntibazutse kugeza ubwo imyaka igihumbi irangiye.
Revelation20:6 Abahawe umwanya mu izuka rya mbere barahirwa
Revelation20:7 Imyaka igihumbi nishira Satani azarekurwa ave aho yari afungiye
Revelation20:8 ajye kuyobya abo mu mahanga yo mu mpande zose z'isi ari yo Gogi na Magogi
Revelation20:9 Nuko baraza bakwira isi yose
Revelation20:10 Satani wabayobyaga arohwa mu kiyaga cyaka umuriro kirimo n'amazuku
Revelation20:11 Nuko mbona intebe ya cyami nini kandi yera de y'Imana
Revelation20:12 Mbona n'abapfuye
Revelation20:13 Inyanja igarura abapfuye yari ibitse. Urupfu ubwarwo n'ikuzimu bigarura abapfuye byari bibitse. Nuko bose bacirwa imanza zishingiye ku byo bakoze.
Revelation20:14 Urupfu n'ikuzimu bijugunywa mu kiyaga cyaka umuriro. Icyo ni cyo rupfu rwa kabiri.
Revelation20:15 Umuntu wese batasanze yanditswe mu gitabo cy'ubugingo

Revelation21:16 Uwo murwa wari mpandenye
Revelation21:17 Umumarayika afata ingero z'urukuta
Revelation21:18 Urukuta rwari rwubatswe n'amabuye yitwa yasipi
Revelation21:19 Amabuye yari yubatse urufatiro rw'urukuta yari arimbishijwe n'amabuye y'agaciro y'ubwoko butari bumwe. Dore amazina y'amabuye yari agize urufatiro: irya mbere ni yasipi

Revelation21:21 Amarembo cumi n'abiri y'umurwa yari agizwe n'amasaro y'agahebuzo cumi n'abiri

Revelation21:25 Amarembo y'umurwa azahora akinguye amanywa yose

Revelation22:4 Bazabona mu maso hayo kandi bazandikwaho izina ryayo mu ruhanga.
Revelation22:5 Nta joro rizongera kubaho

Revelation22:11 Inkozi y'ibibi yose nigumye ikore ibibi

Revelation22:13 Ndi Alufa na Omega
Revelation22:14 “Hahirwa abamesa amakanzu yabo
Revelation22:15 Inyuma y'uwo murwa hazasigara abiyandarika n'abarozi
Revelation22:16 “Jyewe Yezu natumye umumarayika wanjye ngo abemeze ibyo byerekeye amatorero y'Imana. Ni jye gishyitsi cya Dawidi nkaba mukomokaho
